Uhulumeni uveze ukutho lo mnyakazo wokunganyusi uphethroli nodizili, kuzokwenza ungakwazi ukuqoqa u-R17.2 billion, ezinyangeni ezimbalwa kumisiwe kusuka ngo-Ephreli kuya kuJuni nonyaka. "Kusuka ngoJulayi 1, 2026, intela yelitha kaphethroli izobuyela ku-R4.10 ilitha, kuthi ekadizili ibuyele ku-R3.93 ilitha." Ekuqaleni kwenyanga, uMnyango wezokuMbiwa phansi wathi ubuyekeza eyokubiza kukaphethroli okuwuhlelo okulindeleke ukuthi luphothulwe ngoMashi wangonyaka ozayo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMPHATHISWA woMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka ZIYAQONGA izinkinga eMnyangweni wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal njengoba usahlwaya imali ukuze ukhokhele izikole imali yazo ngenyanga ezayo. UMphathiswa woMnyango uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, uthe bazoya eMnyangweni kaMgcinimafa ukuze abanike imali yokukhokhela izikole imali yama-Norms and Standards. "Siya kuMgcinimafa siyomnxusa ukuthi asheshe asinike imali phambili ukuze sikhokhele izikole imali yazo. Le mali kumele izikole ziyithole ngoMeyi, kanti sibhekene nezinselelo emalini," kusho uHlomuka ekhuluma emhlanganweni wekomiti lezeMfundo esiShayamthetho. Lo mnyango uhlale ubhekene nezinselelo ngasekukhokheni ngesikhathi imali yama-Norms and Standards. Le nkinga esiphenduke insakavukela yasusa umsindo izinyunyana ziyifuna ngodli imali zikhala ngokuthi akusebenzeki ezikoleni ngenxa yokuthi ayifakwa ngesikhathi. Akuyona kuphela inselelo yama-Norms and Standards ebhekene nomnyango kodwa kubalwa nendaba yokungakwazi ukukhokhela ngesikhathi osonkontileka owenza nabo imisebenzi. Amalungu esiShayamthetho akhale ngesimo esibi sezemfundo esifundazweni. Kuphinde kwakhalwa nangezinselelo ezibhekene nohlelo lokuthuthwa kwabafundi njengoba kuzokwehliswa isibalo sabafundi abathuthwayo ngabangu-44 000 njengoba bengu-76 000 abathuthwayo kumanje esifundazweni. Kwenzeka lokhu nje bevile ku-100 000 abasalinde ukuhlomula kulolu hlelo. UNksz Fikile Masiko we-ANC, ukhale ngokuthi lesi simo sifana nenhlekelele ebhekene nomnyango ngemali. "Kubalulekile ukuthi Mphathiswa uma kunezinkinga, uzibeke ezithebeni zekomiti. Kumele seseke isiphakamiso somnyango sokuthi uNdunankulu asize, ahlanganise izinhlaka ezehlukene ukuze kutholakale isixazululo enkingeni yomnyango." Uthe siyadabukisa isimo somnyango ngoba siveza ngokusobala ukuthi kunengane engeke ikwazi ukuthola izimfanelo zayo esikoleni. UDkt Imran Keeka weDA, ukhale ngesimo somnyango wathi kubukeka sengathi lo mnyango uzocwilisa sonke isifundazwe uma lesi simo singalungiswa. Ukhale ngokuthi ayikho imali esifundazweni wathi umnyango kumele ubheke ezinhlelweni zawo ukuthi imali uzoyithathaphi. UMnuz Nathi Ngcobo, inhloko yomnyango, uthe seziqalile izingxoxo phakathi kukaMngcinimafa nehhovisi likaNdunankulu ukuze kubanjiswane uma sekuyiwa kuhulumeni kazwelonke ngezithinta imali nesimo esibhekene nomnyango. Kwenzeka lokhu nje inkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu, iyalele umnyango ukuthi uqhamuke nohlelo oluzoveza ukuthi uzoyikhokha kanjani imali yezikole kanjalo nodaba olumayelana nokuthengwa kwezincwadi ezikoleni.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: 1008601889__20260413__0 UNGQONGQOSHE wezeMfundo eyiSisekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube UNGQONGQOSHE weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, usebhalele uzakwabo eMnyangweni kaMgcinimafa, uMnuz Enoch Godongwana, ecela ukuthi ajube uphenyo ngethenda equbule imvunge, yokugaya izincwadi zokufunda ezikoleni. Le thenda kuthiwa eyokugaya izincwadi zamabanga aphansi, i-Foundation Phase. Kunezinsolo zokuthi enye yezinkampani yaseKapa enikwe lo msebenzi, ibinezinsuku ezimbalwa isunguliwe emuva kokukhishwa kwethenda yokugaya izincwadi zakwaGrade 1 kuya kuGrade 3. UNksz Gwarube uthe lezi zinsolo zibucayi kanti ufuna ziphenywe. "Sengibhalele uMnyango kaMgcinimafa nginxusa ukuthi kube nophenyo mayelana nale thenda. Le thenda ithinta izincwadi ezizosiza abafundi bakuleli kanti asifune lutho oluzobeka engcupheni ukuhlinzekwa kwezinsiza kubafundi," usho kanje. Uthe ukubeka engcupheni ukuhlinzekwa kwezincwadi kubafundi, kungathunaza ilungelo eliseMthethwenisisekelo wezwe wokuthi wonke umfundi kumele athole imfundo. "UMnyango kaMgcinimafa unawo amandla okuphenya izinto ezithinta amathenda akhishwa yiminyango. Yingakho sifuna lo Mnyango uphenye ngaphambi kokuba ngithathe izinyathelo," kuqhuba uNksz Gwarube. Uxwayise ngokuthi uzothathela abathintekayo izinyathelo uma kutholakala ukuthi kukhona okungahanjiswanga kahle ngesikhathi kukhishwa le thenda. "Uma uphenyo lukaMgcinimafa luveza ukuthi kukhona okungahambanga kahle, ngeke nginanaze ukuthatha izinyathelo kubona bonke abathintekayo." Imibiko yabezindaba iveza ukuthi le thenda ka-R1.6 billion, ibihlose ukuqinisa isisekelo semfundo yakuleli. Le nkampani okuthiwa yathola ingxenye kule thenda yokugaya lezi zincwadi, ibizohlomula ngo-R285 million. Iqembu i-ActionSA lixwayise ngokuthi inkohlakalo eMnyangweni ibeka engcupheni ukuhlinzekwa kwemfundo esezingeni. Leli qembu lithe liyayeseka eyophenyo, lathi kudingeka kutholakale ubuqiniso bezinsolo ezivezwayo ngale thenda. "UMnyango kumele uthole ukuthi yahlomula kanjani inkampani eyasungulwa emuva kokukhishwa kwethenda. Sifuna uMnyango kaMgcinimafa uphuthumise uphenyo ukuze kuqedwe ungabazane olukhona," kusho leli qembu. I-DA ithe iyayeseka eyophenyo, yazwakalisa ukukhathazeka ngekusasa labafundi nenkohlakalo eyenziwa yizikhulu zoMnyango. "Abafundi kudingeka bathole izincwadi ezisezingeni kanti leli qembu lizokulwela ukuthi lokhu kwenzeke. Sifuna ukwazi ukuthi kungani inkampani engenawo amava aziwayo okugaya noma ukusabalalisa izincwadi, yanikwa umsebenzi omkhulu kangaka?" kusho i-DA. I-DA ithe uma kutholakala ukuthi kukhona isandla semfene, abathintekayo kumele bathathelwe izinyathelo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UNOBHALA weSadtu KwaZulu-Natal, uNksz Nomarashiya Caluza UNIKWE umnqamulajuqu uMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal, wokuthi uze neqhinga lokuthi uzoyikhokha kanjani imali oyikweleta izikole kanjalo nokuthi uzozihlinzeka nini ngezincwadi zokufunda. Umyalelo ukhishwe yiNkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu, emuva kokuba inyunyana yothisha esifundazweni iSadtu, yayisa uMnyango enkantolo ifuna uphoqwe ukuthi uhlinzeke izinsiza zokufunda uphinde ukhokhe imali yama-Norms and Standards ezikoleni. UNobhala weSadtu, uNksz Nomarashiya Caluza, uthe sibuyise ithemba isinqumo senkantolo njengoba siphoqa uMnyango ukuthi ufeze izidingo zabafundi. "Siyajabula ngalesi sinqumo esiphoqa uMnyango ukuthi wenze okufanele, ufeze izinto ezikuMthethisisekelo ezithinta imfundo yezingane. Inkantolo iyalele uMnyango ukuthi ulethe iqhinga lawo kule nkantolo ngokuthi le mali kanjalo nezinsiza uhlela ukuzihlinzeka kanjani," kusho uNksz Caluza. Uthe leli qhinga kumele ulihambise enkantolo ngoMeyi 7, 2026. "Sethemba ukuthi izidingo zabafundi zizofika njengoba kulindelekile. Silwa nje ngoba sibonile kuphulwa ilungelo labafundi lokuthola imfundo," kuqhuba uNksz Caluza. Uthe uma umnyango uphambana nalo myalelo, kuyobe sekusho ukuthi usuphula umthetho. "Sililinde ngabomvu leli qhinga lomnyango ngoba uma uhluleka ukuhlangabezana nomyalelo wenkantolo, lokho kuyobe kusho ukuphula umthetho. Besifuna uphoqwe ukuze uhlinzeke izidingo zabafundi kanjalo nezothisha," usho kanje. Sekunesikhathi izinyunyana zothisha zilwa nomnyango ngendaba yama-Norms and Standards. Minyaka yonke umnyango uhlale uhluleka ukukhokha le mali ngesikhathi. Ezinye zezikole zisakweletwa imali yeminyaka wezimali edlule ngenxa yokuthi umnyango uyahluleka ukuyikhokha. Zicishe zavulwa ngaphandle kwezinsiza kufunda izikole zesifundazwe kulo nyaka. Lokhu kwenziwa ngukuthi umnyango ubuhluleka ukuthenga izincwadi ne-stationery. Ugcine uthenga i-stationery ngomzuzu wokugcina emuva kokuveza ukuthi awunayo imali yokuthenga lezi zinsiza. Kwakhona ukuthi i-stationery sigcine sifikile ezikoleni, kwasiza inkampani esabalalisa lezi zincwadi, iNdabase Printing, eyathenga i-stationery ngesikweletu ukuze abafundi bakwazi ukuthola lezi zinsiza. Abafundi bayalelwa ukuthi basebenzise izincwadi ezindala njengoba umnyango wathi ngeke ube nemali yokuzithenga. Nakulo nyaka kubanjwe umoya ngokuthi ngabe umnyango uzokwazi ukuthenga izincwadi ngenxa yemali. Izikhulu zoMnyango zihlale zikuveza ukuthi zibhekene nengwadla yemali emnyangweni. Kwahlula ngisho sekungenelela uNdunankulu wesifundazwe uMnuz Thami Ntuli, noNgqongqoshe kazwelonke womnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, kule nkinga kodwa kwanhlanga zimuka nomoya.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMGUBHO woSuku lweNkululeko uqalwe ngokuviliyela kwamasosha eDr Rantlai Molemela Stadium, eBloemfontein, izolo UKHIPHE isexwayiso esishubile uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, sokuthi ngeke bavumele abantu abangeneme ngezinto ezithinta abantu bokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho, ukuthi baphule umthetho wezwe baphinde bazenzele umathanda. URamaphosa ukhuze abantu bakuleli wathi akumele bagcine sebenenzondo ngoba abahleli dekle, kodwa bayayisebenza eyabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Akumele izikhalo ngabakuleli ngokungemthetho, zigcine sezenza kube nenzondo noma sekuba nodlame olubhekiswe kwabokufika. Siyalwa nenkinga yabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho kodwa ngeke sikuvumele ukuphulwa komthetho kanjalo nabantu abazenzela umathanda," usho kanje. UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa ethula inkulumo yoSuku lweNkululeko eDr Rantlai Molemela Stadium, eBloemfontein, izolo Uhlabe ikhwelo kubantu bokufika wathi abahloniphe imithetho, amasiko kanjalo nezinto ezenziwa kuleli. "Nabo ngeke bathande uma abantu bakuleli benza umathanda emazweni abo. Abokufika abahloniphe imithetho yezwe,"  kusho uRamaphosa Uncome iqhaza lamazwe ase-Afrika asiza elakuleli ngesikhathi kuliwa nobandlululo. "Samukelwa ngezandla ezimhlophe kwamanye amazwe ngesikhathi sicindezelwe. Sabhaciswa kulamazwe, amanye aze afela izono zethu ngenxa yokuthi ayebhacise ababelwela inkululeko. Singabantu abaziwa ngemfudumalo, asikwazi ukubuswa yinzondo ngabantu bakwamanye amazwe, nabo abasisiza ngesikhathi sisenkingeni," kugcizelela uRamaphosa izolo ekhuluma ngesikhathi kugujwa usuku lwenkululeko, eMangaung eFree State. Usho lokhu nje abantu babhukule bakubeka emahlombe abo ukuthi bachithe abantu bokufika kuleli abangenazo izimfanelo ngokuthi babe namamashi, okuzwakalisa ukungahambisani nokuba kwabo kuleli. URamaphosa uthe uyazi ukuthi abanye abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho, bangena kuleli ngenxa yenkohlakalo eyenzeka eMnyangweni wezaseKhaya. Kube nesehlakalo esingabanga namthelela ngesikhathi omunye wabebethamele umcimbi, ezama ukugibela esteji lapho obekukhona khona izikhulu, kubalwa noRamaphosa, uxhakathiswe onogada bamkhiphela ngaphandle. URamaphosa ubale ezinye izinto ezinhle athe ziyenzeka kuleli okubandakanya nendaba yabantu ababoshwayo, ngenxa yeKhomishini kaMadlanga. "Siyalwa nenkohlakalo nabaphula umthetho njengoba sizobabopha bonke abenza okubi. Yenza umsebenzi omuhle iKhomishini kaMadlanga." Ubale nezemfundo, wathi inqwaba yabafundi ifunda mahhala futhi ihlomula nsuku zonke ohlelweni lokudla. Ubalule nendaba yokuxhaswa kwezitshudeni, ezifunda mahhala ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme ezikhokhelwa yisikhwama iNSFAS. "Abantu bakuleli bathola usizo lwezempilo kanjalo nemishanguzo ezibhedlela zakuleli. Bakhelwa izindlu, bathola amanzi kanjalo nogesi." Ukhumbule usuku lokuqala okwavotelwa ngalo uhulumeni wentando yabantu ngo-1994, lapho ethe kwaphuma izinkumbi zabantu ababemagange ukuyovota. Uyalele abesilisa ukuthi bavikele abesifazane, bangabhebhezeli udlame olubhekiswe kubona. Uthe kuningi okusamele kwenziwe kuleli ukukhipha abantu ebubheni. ABOMBUTHO wezokuVikela bevula umcimbi woSuku lweNkululeko eDr Rantlai Molemela Stadium, e Bloemfontein, izolo

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa usencome umbutho wokuvikela kuleli, ngokuvikela izwe ezimeni ezinzima. URamaphosa obekhuluma kugujwa usuku lwenkululeko eFree State, uthe umsebenzi wamasosha ukuvikela izwe kodwa agcina esenza neminye imisebenzi ethinta izwe. "Ayasiza uma kunezinhlekelele, akhe amabhuloho aphinde enze neminye imisebenzi. Muva nje asiza empini yokulwa nobugebengu bamagenge kanjalo nokulwa noZamaZama," kusho uRamaphosa. URamaphosa uncome nomsebenzi omuhle owenziwa yiKhomishini kaMadlanga. "Siyalwa nenkohlakalo nabaphula umthetho njengoba sizobabopha bonke abenza okubi. Yenza umsebenzi omuhle iKhomishini kaMadlanga." UNgqongqoshe wezemiDlalo nezobuCiko uMnuz Gayton McKenzie, uthe ngesikhathi uRamaphosa ejuba ikhomishini kaMadlanga, baningi abashaya amakhala. "Manje wonke umuntu iso lakhe lithe njo kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga. Mengameli ngesikhathi umemezela ikhomishini, abanye bathi nakho-ke, ubuyile namakhomishini kodwa manje wonke umuntu uncoma umsebenzi wayo," usho kanje. Uthe uRamaphosa uzoliphothula ihlandla lakhe ekuholeni uhulumeni wamaqembu abambisene kuhulumeni, iGNU.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMPHATHISWA woMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka UMNYANGO wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal, usezinhlelweni zokwandisa isibalo sothisha ezikoleni. UMphathiswa womnyango uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, uthe kuseyisiqalo okwenzekile kuqashwa othisha bakwaGrade R muva nje. "Bangu-500 othisha bakwaGrade R abaqale kule nyanga. Sizimisele ukuqhubeka sandise isibalo sothisha esifundazweni," kusho uHlomuka izolo ekhuluma esiShayamthetho eMgungundlovu. UHlomuka usho lokhu nje othisha abangaqashiwe bahlale bekhala ngokushaywa indiva ngumnyango. Baqhinqa emahhovisi omnyango eMgungundlovu befuna ukuqashwa. Sekuphenduke insakavukela ukuthi bayomasha bekhala ngokungaqashwa. Muva nje umnyango umemezele ukuthi uzoqasha othishanhloko, amaphini othishanhloko kanjalo nezinhloko zezifundo ezikoleni. Zevile ku-3 000 izikhala ezikhangisiwe. UHlomuka uthe bafuna ukuqinisa ukufundiswa kwezibalo ezikoleni. Ubalule nokuthi baqinisa nokufundiswa kwesiNgisi, ukuze abafundi bakuqonde abakufundayo. "Siqinisa ukufundiswa kweMaths ukuze kuphuculwe ikhono labafundi kulesi sifundo. Ukwenza kahle kwabafundi kwa-matric, kuncike esisekelweni okumele sisiqinise," kusho uHlomuka. Uthe bafuna ukuphucula nemiphumela ka-matric ukuze isifundazwe silokhu siqhubeka nokwenza kahle. UHlomuka uthe bafuqa nezifundo zobuchwepheshe okubalwa i-Coding and Robotics. "Ngalezi zifundo silungiselela abafundi kwezithinta ubuchwepheshe. Kunesidingo sokuthi izifundo ezifundwayo zihambisane nokudingwa wumnotho." UHlomuka uthe bayabalalela othisha, abafundi kanjalo nabazali bese bakha uhlelo oluzobhekana nabakudingayo. "Siyabhekana nohlelo lokuthuthukisa othisha kanjalo nengqalasizinda ezikoleni. Imali eyabelwe umnyango kumele ithuthukise abafundi kanjalo nezikole." Usho lokhu nje kuhlale kukhalwa ngokuhluleka komnyango ukulungisa ingqalasizinda ezikoleni ngenxa yezinkinga zemali. Le nkinga yenza umnyango ungakwazi ukukhokhela ngesikhathi osonkontileka osebenza nabo. Umnyango uhluleke ukuthenga izincwadi zokufunda ezikoleni nyakenye. Ukwazi ukuthenga i-stationery. Namhlanje iSadtu izoba senkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu lapho ifuna kuphoqwe umnyango ukuthi uthenge izincwadi nezinye izinsiza. Okunye ifuna umnyango ufake imali yezikole eyaziwa ngama-Norms and Standards. Minyaka yonke izinyunyana zihlale zilwa nomnyango ngendaba yemali yezikole engafakwa ngesikhathi. Le mali isetshenziselwa ukulungisa izinto ezincane ezonakele ezikoleni okubalwa nokukhokhela ugesi namanzi.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UNOBHALA Jikelele weSACP, uMnuz Solly Mapaila ASHAYA phansi ngonyawo amaKhomanisi athi ngeke avume ukuchukuluzwa yi-ANC. Lokhu kushiwo unobhala jikelele weSACP uMnuz Solly Mapaila, othe abakaze bayibuke njengesitha i-ANC. "Asikaze sibe nenkinga yokuthi i-ANC ingenela ukhetho. Asikaze siqondise muntu ubugwegwe ngokuvotela i-ANC. Ngeke sivume ukuthi kuchukuluzwe amalungu ethu ," kusho uMapaila. Usho lokhu nje i-ANC neSACP babhekene ngeziqu zamehlo ngodaba lokungenela ukhetho ngokuzimela kweSACP. Phambilini iSACP ibivota ne-ANC kanti manje lezi zinhlangano zizoba yizimbangi. UMapaila uthe eminyakeni engu-30 edlule, bebelokhu beseka i-ANC kanti bebeze bayikhankasele. "Siyaqhubeka asijiki ekungeneleni ukhetho oluzayo. Ngeke sisatshiswe muntu ngokungenela ukhetho," kuqhuba uMapaila. Uyalele amalungu eSACP ukuthi angavumeli muntu ukuthi awasabise. "Ningavumi ukusatshiswa nganoma yingani njengoba singenela ukhetho. Ningasuli ngoba nisatshiswa," usho kanje. Uthe ngeke bawachukuluze amalungu anquma ukuqhubeka nokuba yingxenye ye-ANC. "Sizosihlonipha isinqumo samalungu asala kwi-ANC, ngeke siwakhiphe inyumbazana. Akekho umuntu okumele asatshiswe ngoba siphila ngokwentando yabantu eyalwelwa kanzima." Ugqugquzele abahlukunyezwayo ukuthi babike ngokushesha. "Abasatshiswayo kanjalo nabathuswa ngokuthi bazoqondiswa ubugwegwe, abasibikele ngokushesha. Akwesekwe namalungu ethu ajutshwe kuhulumeni yi-ANC." Uthe abayona ingozi kwi-ANC wathi into eyingozi kakhulu ukulawulwa koMbuso yidlanzana kanjalo nokulahleka kwethemba kubasebenzi. "Ukungenzi kahle kukahulumeni, ukulahlekelwa yithemba kwabantu ngezinye zezinto eziyinkinga kuleli. Yizona zinto ezinkulu eziyizingqinamba." Uyalele izinhlaka ezifundazweni nasezifundeni ukuthi zibe nemihlangano okuzobhungwa kuyona indaba yomdonsiswano okhona ne-ANC. Uthe kuzoba nezifundo zokwazisa amalungu ngesinqumo sokuzimela okhethweni kanjalo nombono we-SACP ngohulumeni basekhaya. Isinqumo seSACP sidale uqhekeko nangaphakathi ezinhlakeni zale nhlangano njengoba kuze kwahlakazwa ubuholi baKwaZulu-Natal ngoba kuthiwa abuhambisani nalesi sinqumo. Kwaqokwa ubuholi besikhashana kulesi sifundazwe njengoba kuthiwa abanye abaholi bakhala ngokuthi iSACP iyagagamela ngokuzimela okhethweni.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ABE-Democratic Alliance (DA) bafuna ukuthi iyobhungwa ephalamende eyezingane ezikhulelwayo ezikoleni Image: JENNIFER BRUCE I-DA ifuna kubizwe umhlangano ophuthumayo ohlanganisa iminyango ehlukene kahulumeni, okubalwa nezinhlaka zokuphepha nezokushushiswa komphakathi, ukuze kubhungwe ngesihlava sokukhulelwa kwezingane kuleli. Leli qembu libhalele uSihlalo wekomiti labesiFazane, iNtsha nabaPhila nokuKhubazeka ePhalamende, ukuze abize umhlangano ofaka iminyango ehlukene okubalwa oweMfundo eyisiSekelo, owezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi, owezeMpilo, amaphoyisa kanjalo nophiko lwezokuShushisa kuleli, iNational Prosecuting Authority. Okhulumela i-DA eMnyangweni wezabesiFazane, iNtsha nabaPhila nokuKhubazeka, uNksz Angel Khanyile, uthe bakhathazekile ngesihlava sokukhulelwa kwezingane. Uthe ziyashaqisa izibalo zezingane ezikhulelwe KwaZulu-Natal, onyakenimali u-2025/26. "Izibalo ziveza ukuthi zingu-421 izingane ezineminyaka engu-10 kuya ku-14 ezikhuleliwe esifundazweni onyakenimali u-2025/2026. Lokhu kusho ukuthi izingane ezintathu zikhulelwa ezinsukwini ezimbili," kusho uNksz Khanyile. Uthe lezi zibalo zikhomba ukuhlukunyezwa kwezingane kuleli. "Kulo mhlangano kumele yonke iminyango iveze iqhaza layo ekulweni nalesi sihlava. Kudingeka kube nokubambisana kweminyango ukuze kulandelelwe amacala asuke ebikiwe agcina egweba abathintekayo." Uthe umthetho ucacile ukuthi ingane eneminyaka engu-12 ayikwazi ukuvuma ukuya ocansini. Ukhale ngosonhlalakahle athe bayahluleka ukubika amacala emaphoyiseni. "Ezinye iziteshi zamaphoyisa aziwamukeli la macala. Umthetho wezingane kanjalo nothinta ucansi, uyalela ukuthi kubikwe icala uma kunengane eneminyaka engaphansi kwengu-16 ekhulelwe." Uthe ngeke bakuvumele ukuthi kudlwengulwe izingane ziphinde zikhuleliswe. "Abomthetho kumele benze umsebenzi wabo, abenzi bobubi baboshwe, bajeziswe," usho kanje. Uthe umthetho ukubeka kucace ukuthi uhulumeni kumele enze okuthile. Umthetho uyalela othisha, abahlengikazi, odokotela, osonhlalakahle nabanye abasebenza nezingane ukuthi babike emaphoyiseni uma kunengane encane ekhulelwe. Kowezemfundo kwakhalwa ngokuthi abanye abazali, bagcina behoxisa amacala emuva kokuba osuke enze icala ethembise ukukhokha inhlawulo. Abanye othisha sebekwe balahlwa amacala okulala nezingane. Abanye kuthiwa bathembisa ukukhokha ilobolo ukuze bangaboshwa, bese imindeni iba manqika ukuvula amacala okudlwengula.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: IZIKHULU zeKhomishini yezoKhetho oMnuz Mosotho Moepya noGlen Mashinini zineSilo uMisuzulu kaZwelithini oPhogolo ngoLwesibili IZIKHULU zeKhomishini yezoKhethozihambele esigodlweni saseMashobeni, oPhongolo ngoLwesibili, ziyohlangana neSilo uMisuzulu kaZwelithini ISILO samaZulu uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini, sigqugquzele abantu ikakhulu intsha ukuthi babhalisele ukuvota okhethweni oluzayo. IMbube ithe yeseka umsebenzi weKhomishini yoKhetho kuleli, esemkhankasweni wokukhuthaza abantu ukuthi babhalisele ukuvota okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya. Sikusho lokhu emuva kokuhlangana nezikhulu zekhomishini, esigodlweni eMashobeni, oPhongolo ngoLwesibili. Okhulumela ihhovisi leSilo, uMntwana Thulani Zulu, uthe iMbube iweseka ngokugcwele umsebenzi wekhomishini njengoba kuza ukhetho. "IMbube igqugquzele abantu ikakhulu intsha ukuthi ibhalise ukuze ivote. Inxuse intsha ukuthi ikwenze lokhu ngokuthula," kusho uMntwana Thulani. Uthe izikhulu zekhomishini zisemkhankasweni wokuhambela izinhlaka zobuholi bomdabu njengoba kuzoba nokhetho. "Ithimba labekhomishini lenabe ngezinhlelo zokhetho okubalwa namalungiselelo alo. Likhulume nangomkhankaso wokufundisa abantu ngokuvota." Uthe kubhungwe nangombiko wakamuva oveze ukuthi abantu baKwaZulu-Natal, bamanqika ukuthi bavote ngoba sebelahle ithemba kuhulumeni. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi lo mbiko waveza ukuthi abantu bakulesi sifundazwe sebelahle ithemba kakhulu uma kuqhathaniswa nezinye izifundazwe ngokuvota ngenxa yokuthi abasamethembi uhulumeni. UMntwana Thulani uthe bayakwamukela ukuthi ikhomishini iyabuhlonipha ubuholi bomdabu nokugqugquzela abantu basemakhaya ukuthi bavote. Izikhulu zekhomishini bezikulesi sifundazwe lonke leli sonto zizoxoxa nezinhlaka ezehlukene okubalwa noNdunankulu wesifundazwe, uMnuz Thami Ntuli. Kusasa kulindeleke lezi zikhulu zibe nesithangami nabezindaba ukuzochaza ngohambo lwazo kulesi sifundazwe. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, ikhomishini iyalele amaqembu ezepolitiki ukuthi asheshe alungise uhlu lwabantu azofolosa ngabo okhethweni oluzayo. Izikhulu zekhomishini zikhuluma ePhalamende, zithe amacala amaningi ayexazululwa okhethweni lukazwelonke nolwezifundazwe lwango-2024, ayemayelana nezikhalo ngabajutshwe amaqembu. "Amaqembu kumele kuthi kushaya uJulayi 30, abe eseyiphothulile eyohlu lwabantu abazowamela. Aba maningi amacala okwadingeka siwaxazulule ayethinta abantu abazojutshwa amaqembu okhethweni lwango-2024," kusho uMamabolo izolo ngesikhathi bekhuluma ngamalungiselelo okhetho, ekomitini loMnyango wezaseKhaya ePhalamende. NgoJuni 20 no-21, 2026  kuzovulelwa abantu ukuthi babhalisele ukuvota. Mayelana nosuku lokhetho kusalindwe uNgqongqoshe wokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu kuleli, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, ukuthi amemezele usuku. UHlabisa kulindeleke ukuthi amemezele usuku lokhetho ngaphambi kokuphela kukaJuni. Ukhetho kulindeleke ukuthi lube ngoNovemba noma uJanuwari.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ISIKHULU esiphezulu se-IEC uMnuz Sy Mamabolo ISIKHULU esiphezulu seKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli, i-Independent Electoral Commission (IEC), uMnuz Sy Mamabolo, siyalele amaqembu ezepolitiki ukuthi asheshe alungise uhlu lwabantu azofolosa ngabo okhethweni oluzayo. UMamabolo uthe amacala amaningi ababewaxazulula okhethweni lukazwelonke nolwezifundazwe lwango-2024, ayemayelana nezikhalo ngabajutshwe amaqembu. "Amaqembu kumele kuthi kushaya uJulayi 30, abe eseyiphothulile eyohlu lwabantu abazowamela. Aba maningi amacala okwadingeka siwaxazulule ayethinta abantu abazojutshwa amaqembu okhethweni lwango-2024," kusho uMamabolo izolo ngesikhathi bekhuluma ngamalungiselelo okhetho, ekomitini loMnyango wezaseKhaya ePhalamende. UMamabolo uthe zizoba zimbili izimpelasonto zokubhalisela ukuvota ngaphambi kokhetho. "Eyokuqala kwamenyezelwa ukuthi izoba ngoJuni 20 no-21. Eyesibili izoba ngasekuqaleni kuka-Agasti." Uthe balindele ukuthi lufakwe ngokusemthethweni emqulwini kahulumeni usuku lokhetho ngo-Agasti. Lokhu kuzokwenziwa nguNgqongqoshe wokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu kuleli, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. UHlabisa kulindeleke amemezele usuku lokhetho ngaphambi kokuphela kukaJuni. Ukhetho kulindeleke ukuthi lube ngoNovemba noma uJanuwari. UNksz Dawn Mbatha, isikhulu esibhekele imali kwikhomishini, uthe banesabelomali sika-R4.75 billion kulo nyakamali. Uthe bayaxoxa noMnyango kaMgcinimafa ngemali njengoba kubhekwe okhethweni. UMamabolo uthe baqinisa izinhlelo zabo ukuze kungabi nezikhalo ngemiphumela yokhetho. "Sizowamema namaqembu ezepolitiki ukuthi alethe abacwaningi abazobheka uhlelo lwemiphumela esilusebenzisayo ukuze kungabi nezikhalo. Kwaba nezikhalo okhethweni lwango-2024 ngezinkinga ezithinta ibhodi eliveza imiphumela yokhetho," usho kanje. Lezi zinselelo zakhalisa amaqembu amaningi. Kwakucima ibhodi isikhathi eside. Kwenzeka lokhu nje iMKP ifuna luhlehliswe ukhetho oluzayo, ikhala ngokuthi kumele lubanjwe uma sekuxazululwe isikhalo eyasifaka mayelana nemiphumela yokhetho lwango-2024. I-IEC yazichitha izikhalo zeMKP kanti leli cala elafakwa yileli qembu kulindeleke ukuthi liqulwe eNkantolo yezoKhetho ngenyanga ezayo. Umholi weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uthe ukugijimela ukuba nolunye ukhetho ekubeni singakaphumi isinqumo ecaleni abalifakile kuzokwenza ukuthi abantu bangayithembi imiphumela yokhetho. "Kufanele sibatshele ukuthi sifuna ukwazi ukuthi ashonaphi amavoti ethu antshontshwa okhethweni olwedlule. Asibatshele ukuthi asifuni ukuthi kube khona olunye ukhetho ngoba kunezinkinga abangakazixazululi," kusho uZuma.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: 1008536259__20260131__0 ASADINGEKA ama-passports kwabaseLesotho abahlela ukuvakashela kuleli BAKHATHAZEKILE aboMnyango wezaseKhaya, abachithe njengamampunge imibiko esabalele yokuthi abaseLesotho akusadingeki ukuthi baveze ama-passports uma bengena emingceleni yakuleli. UMnyango uthe asikho isivumelwano esifuze lesi phakathi kwelakuleli nelaseLesotho. "AbaseLesotho basazowaveza ama-passports uma bengena kuleli. Ngeke bakwazi ukusebenzisa omazisi babo kuphela uma beza kuleli," kusho uMnyango. UMnyango uveze ukuthi ukungena kuleli ngaphandle kwe-passports, kuzobe kuwukuphula imithetho yezwe. "ONgqongqoshe beminyango yezaseKhaya eLesotho nakuleli, bahlangana eKapa, ngo-Ephreli 17, 2026, ukuze kuxoxwe ngeziphakamiso ezithinta imingcele. Uma kumele kwenziwe izinguquko kwezemingcele, kudingeka ukuthi kuchitshiyelwe umthetho okufaka nePhalamende. Akukho hlelo oluthinta lokhu oluqhubekayo." UMnyango uthe kusamile ukuthi abantu bakuleli uma beya eLesotho kudingeka baveze ama-passports kanti nakanjalo nabaseLesotho kumele benze okufanayo uma beza kuleli.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UNGQONGQOSHE weMfundo eyiSisekelo uNksz Siviwe Gwarube SILULELWE inyanga ezayo esokuphawula ngemigomo ethinta isifundo somlando, iHistory ezikoleni zakuleli. Bekumele kuvalwe ngeSonto ukuphawula ngemigomo ethinta lesi sifundo kodwa uNgqongqoshe weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, walula isikhathi. Umnyango ufuna abantu baphawule ngemigomo kulesi sifundo, kusuka kuGrade 4 kuya kuGrade 12. Okhulumela umnyango, uMnuz Terence Khala, uthe silulwe ngezinsuku ezingu-30, isikhathi sokuthi umphakathi uphawule ngemigomo. "Manje sekuzovalwa ngoMeyi 19, 2026 ukwamukela ukuphawula komphakathi ngemigomo. Lokhu sikwenze emuva kokuba bebebaningi, abasafuna ithuba lokuphawula," usho kanje. Ugqugquzele abasafuna ukuphawula ukuthi bakwenze lokhu ngokushesha. "Siwumnyango sifuna ukuthi lesi sifundo sifundise abafundi ukucabanga ngendlela ehlukile, baphinde bafundiswe ngomlando wezwe." Inyunyana yothisha iSadtu, ifuna ukuthi kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngomlando wase-Afrika. Le nyunyana isamile ekutheni ifuna lesi sifundo sibe yimpoqo kubona bonke abafundi. UNobhala Jikelele weSadtu, uDkt Mugwena Maluleke, uthe bebelokhu besho ukuthi bafuna kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngomlando othinta izwekazi i-Afrika, hhayi amazwe aphesheya. "Sifuna kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngezinto ezithinta i-Afrika, kungagxilwa kakhulu ezintweni ezithinta amazwe ase-Europe. Sethemba ukuthi le migomo ekhishelwe umphakathi, nathi esizophawula ngayo nge-History, izobalula eyokuthi sibe yimpoqo lesi sifundo." Uthe uma isifundo siyimpoqo, sizokwenza ukuthi abafundi bazi lapho besuka khona nokuthi kwenzekani ezweni labo. Abafuna ukuphawula bangabhalela ku: Director-General, baqondise ku: Florence Modipa, oyiChief Education Specialist: Curriculum Policy, Department of Basic Education, 222 Struben Street, Pretoria, 0001; noma bathumele kwi:Department of Basic Education, Private Bag X895, Pretoria, 0001; noma bathumele nge-email ku:[email protected].

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMPHATHISWA woMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka KUNENHLANSI yethemba ezikoleni zaKwaZulu-Natal, emva kokukhangiswa kwezikhala ezibalelwa ku-3 000 zothishanhloko, amaphini othishanhloko kanjalo nabazobhekela izifundo. Lezi zikhala zikhangiswe ngaphansi kwesekhula uHRM Circular 10, ka-2026. UMphathiswa woMnyango, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, uveze uthe bakhiphe izikhala ezingu-3 002 zothishanhloko, amaphini abo kanjalo nabazobhekela izifundo. Uthe bazikhangise ukuze kuqiniswe ezemfundo esifundazweni. "Sizinikele ekutheni siqinise imfundo esifundazweni. Simile ekutheni sifuna ukulokhu senza kahle uma kuziwa emiphumeleni." Uthe akuzovalwa kuphela izikhala kodwa kuzoqiniswa ukuphathwa kwezikole. "Sibeka abafundi phambili yingakho siqinisa ukuphathwa kwezikole. Sinxusa othisha ukuthi bazifake izicelo ngesikhathi esibekiwe kulezi zikhala ezikhangisiwe," usho kanje. Ezikhaleni ezikhangisiwe zingu-1 784 abazobhekela izifundo, babengu-673 othishanhloko, bese bebangu-545, amaphini othishanhloko. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi kuhlale kunesikhalazo esifundazweni, kothisha abangaqashiwe abakhala ngokungadedelwa kwezikhala eMnyangweni. UMnyango uhlale ukuveza ukuthi ubhekene nengcindezi yemali eyenza ungakwazi ukuvala ezinye izikhala. Othisha abangaqashiwe baze bamashele emahhovisi oMnyango, kokunye balale ngaphandle kwawo izinsuku, bekhala ngendlala yomsebenzi. Kuba nombango uma kukhangiswe izikhala zothishanhloko, amaphini abo kanjalo nababhekele iminyango. Okususa umsindo ukuthi baningi abasuke begaqele ukunyuselwa kulezi zikhundla zokuphatha. Uqophe umlando uMnyango wesifundazwe emiphumeleni ka-matric yanyakenye, ngokulala endaweni yokuqala uma kuqhathaniswa nezinye izifundazwe. Lokhu kwenzeka phezu kwezinkinga lo Mnyango obhekene nazo zokungakwazi ukuvala izikhala zabahloli, nabaphethe amasekethe ngenxa yemali. UMnyango uhluleka nawukukhokhela ngesikhathi osomabhizinisi osebenza nabo ngenxa yemali. Kwaze kwangenelela noNdunankulu wesifundazwe, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, kanjalo noNgqongqoshe kazwelonke, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, enkingeni ebhekene noMnyango kodwa isimo asikashintshi.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Umholi we-IFP uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa UNGQONGQOSHE wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, ufuna kuqiniswe izinhlelo zokuvikela abantu kwizinhlekelele ezihlasela kungazelele muntu. UHlabisa uthe izikhukhula zango-2022 KwaZulu-Natal, zenza abantu abevile ku-40 000 bangaba nendawo yokuhlala. "Kwafa abantu abangu-500 ngenxa yalezi zikhukhula. Muva nje kube nezikhukhula eLimpopo, ezidale omkhulu umonakalo. Abantu balahlekelwa imizi yabo, baba ondingasithebeni," kusho uHlabisa ekhuluma engqungqutheleni ebibhunga ngezindlela zokubhekana nezinhlekelele ezweni, eGoli muva nje. UHlabisa uthe elakuleli libhekene nesimo sokuhlasela kwezinhlekelele ezehlukene. Ubale izikhukhula, isomiso, imililo yequbula, izimvula ezina ngamandla kanjalo neziphepho. "Lokhu kudalwa ukuguquguquka kwesimo sezulu. Kudingeka kube nezinhlelo zokukwazi ukuhlonza izinhlekelele zingakahlaseli." Ukhale ngokuthi abesifazane, izingane, abaphila nokukhubazeka nabadala, yibona ababa yizisulu zezinhlekelele. "Noma ikhona imithetho yezinhlekelele kodwa ngeke isebenze iyodwa. Kudingeka ubuholi obunqala ukubhekana nalesi simo. Kudingeka nokubambisana ezinhlakeni ezehlukene ukuze inqotshwe le mpi." Uthe kudingeka kwenziwe izinhlelo kusenesikhathi kuphinde kube nezinto ezizosheshe zihlonze uma kuzoba nenhlekelele ukuze kusheshe kuxwayiswe abantu. "Omasipala baneqhaza elibalulekile odabeni lwezinhlekelele. Kodwa babhekene nezinselelo, ezinye zazo zifaka indawo okwakhiwe kuyona imizi, ukuvumbuka kwemijondolo kanjalo nezinye. Kudingeka kucetshiswe abantu ngolwazi ngezinhlekelele." Ubalule nobuchwepheshe wathi buneqhaza elibalulekile ekutheni kusheshe kuhlonzwe izinhlekelele. Uthe kumele kwakhiwe ingqalasizinda esezingeni ukuze ikwazi ukumelana nesimo esinzima sokushintsha kwezulu.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Babhekene nenkinga omasitende abangakatitholi inkokhelo kwabeNsfas BABHEKENE nengwadla omastende abakhala ngokuqonga kwezindleko zamanzi, ugesi kanjalo nezinye izinto kulabo abaqashise izitshudeni ezikhokhelwa yisikhwama esixhasa ngemali yokufunda ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme nasemakolishi amakhono amaTVET KwaZulu-Natal, iNational Students' Financial Aid Scheme (NSFAS). Labo mastende bakhala ngokuthi selokhu kuqale unyaka, abakaze bakhokhelwe yiNSFAS. Bathe iNSFAS izisabisa okwenyoka izitshudeni, bona ayibashayi ndiva ngoba ziyabhikisha uma imihlomulo yazo ingangenanga. Omunye womastende okhulume neSolezwe, wacela ukungavezwa, uthe sebecabanga ngisho ukukhipha izitshudeni, ngenxa yokuthi abakhokhelwe. "Asazi manje ukuthi kumele senzenjani, ngoba sihambise yonke into ezikhungweni nakwiNSFAS, kodwa kuze kube yimanje asikakhokhelwa. Konke okuthinta imininingwane yezitshudeni, nokusayinwa kwezinkontileka kwahanjiswa kodwa lutho imali." Umastende uveze ukuthi uma sekumele bakhokhelwe, uhlelo olusha olusetshenziswayo luyabakhahlela. "Senza ubuntu ngoba iNSFAS isikhokhela izinyanga ezingu-10 kuphela ngonyaka, kodwa thina siyazamukela izitshudeni kusuka ngoJanuwari ngoba zisuke zingenayo indawo yokufihla ikhanda. Sikwenza lokhu ngoba sisuke singafuni ukuthi zihlupheke, noma zilale endle kodwa thina asicatshangelwa futhi asibongwa ngokwenza lokhu." Uthe bafuna ukukhokhelwa okungokwabo kusuka ngoFebhuwari kuze kube yimanje. "Kuyophela u-Ephreli manje kodwa lutho imali. Siqashe onogada ezindaweni zethu okuhlala kuzo izitshudeni. Sikhokhela ugesi, amanzi nabanye abasebenzi abahlanza lezi zindawo. Sikhokhela ngisho i-WiFi ukuze izitshudeni zikwazi ukufunda. Sesicabanga nokungazikhokheli zonke lezi zidingo ukuze sifake ingcindezi yokuthi sikhokhelwe." Omunye umastende naye ocele ukungavezwa, uthe bekuzoshuba ukuba bekuyizitshudeni ezingayitholi imihlomulo. "Ngabe kume nse yonke into manje ukuba bekuyizitshudeni ezingayitholi imihlomulo yazo. Akekho umuntu okungaphela izinyanga ezingaka engakhokhelwe bese engawi bhu. Bayasiwisa bhu phansi ngoba sizogcina sesivala ngenxa yokungakhokhelwa," kusho lo mastende othe, sebejahwa omashonisa futhi abasakwazi nokuthola imali emabhange. Uthe phambilini iXquel, iyona eyayikhokhelwa yiNSFAS, ukuze ikhokhele omastende abazimele eKZN kodwa yaphucwa la mandla. "Manje sekudingeka umastende axhumane ngqo neNSFAS. Asikwazi ukuxhumana neNSFAS ngoba akukho mnyango obhekele imali esingakwazi ukuxhumana nawo uma singakhokhelwe. Sidukuza ebumnyameni ekubeni yonke into efunwa yiNSFAS sayenza singomastende." Empendulweni ebhekiswe kwiSolezwe ekhishwe ngaphansi kwebamba lesikhulu esiphezulu seNSFAS uMnuz Waseem Carrim, ithe abalesi sikhwama yibona asebengamele uhlelo lokukhokhelwa komastende. Ithe ukuze kungabambezeleki ukukhokhelwa komastende, imininingwane yabo yasemabhange kumele iqinisekiswe (verified) ukuze uhlelo lokukhokhelwa lungabakhahleli. "Inombolo kamazisi noma yokubhaliswa kwebhizinisi, kumele ihambisane ne-akhawunti yasebhange. Isibongo noma igama lenkampani kumele kuhambisane nomnikazi we-akhawunti," kusho iNSFAS. INSFAS ithe isixoxile nezinhlangano ezimele omastende, ngezinselelo ezithinta ukukhahlelwa komastende uma sekumele bakhokhelwe nebhange iFNB, ukuze kucetshiswe omastende ngokumele bakwenze.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: INYUNYANA yothisha iSadtu isiphakamise ukuthi ifuna ukuthi kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngomlando wase-Afrika esifundweni i-History ezikoleni zakuleli. Le nyunyana isamile ekutheni ifuna lesi sifundo sibe yimpoqo kubona bonke abafundi. ISadtu isho lokhu nje, uMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo, ukhiphele umphakathi ukuthi uphawule ngemigomo ethinta lesi sifundo somlando ezikoleni. UMnyango ukwenze lokhu ukuze uqinise ukufundiswa kwalesi sifundo, kusuka kaGrade 4 kuya kaGrade 12. UNobhala Jikelele weSadtu, uDkt Mugwena Maluleke, uthe bebelokhu besho ukuthi bafuna kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngomlando othinta izwekazi i-Afrika, hhayi amazwe aphesheya. "Sifuna kugxilwe ekufundisweni ngezinto ezithinta i-Afrika, kungagxilwa kakhulu ezintweni ezithinta amazwe ase-Europe. Sethemba ukuthi le migomo ekhishelwe umphakathi, nathi esizophawula ngayo nge-History, izobalula eyokuthi sibe yimpoqo lesi sifundo." Uthe uma isifundo siyimpoqo, sizokwenza ukuthi abafundi bazi la besuka khona nokuthi kwenzakalani ezweni labo. UMnuz Terence Khala oyibamba lomkhulumeli woMnyango, uthe bese kunesikhathi bebheka izindlela zokubuyekeza ukufundiswa kwalesi sifundo ezikoleni. Uthe kwaqokwa nethimba elalibheka ukubuyekezwa kwalesi sifundo eMnyangweni. "Leli thimba lalibheka indaba yokuthi kubuyekezwe uhlelo lokufundisa lesi sifundo, ukubheka ukuthi izincwadi zalesi sifundo zihambisana nokuphakanyisiwe ngokufundiswa kwalesi sifundo kanjalo nezinhlelo zokucija othisha abafundisa lesi sifundo. Umbiko wethimba wathulwa ePhalamende, esigungwini soNgqongqoshe bezemfundo, kanjalo naku-Umalusi." Uthe bazwile ngokuphawula okukhona okuthinta ukufundiswa komlando ngelakuleli, njengoba kunabakhathazekile ngokuthi kungenzeka kushiywe ngaphandle ezinye zezinto. Uveze ukuthi kuvalwa ngeSonto, ngo-Ephreli 19, 2026, ukuphawula komphakathi ngemigomo. Abafuna ukuphawula bangabhalela ku: Director-General, baqondise ku: Florence Modipa, oyiChief Education Specialist: Curriculum Policy, Department of Basic Education, 222 Struben Street, Pretoria, 0001; noma bathumele ku:Department of Basic Education, Private Bag X895, Pretoria, 0001; noma bathumele nge-email ku:[email protected].

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa nenxusa elisha alijube eMelika uMnuz Roelf Meyer ngama-90s UVIKELE isinqumo sokujuba uMnuz Roelf Meyer, njengenxusa elisha laseMelika uMnuz Cyri Ramaphosa, emva kokugxekwa. URamaphosa ugxekwe ngokuqoka uMeyer, owayenguNgqongqoshe ngesikhathi sobandlululo. Wayehola izingxoxo eqenjini iNational Party, kubhungwa ngokuqedwa kobandlululo kuleli. URamaphosa uthe uMeyer, ubelokhu ethembekile futhi ethanda izwe lakhe. "Lonke inxusa elimele elakuleli kwamanye amazwe, kumele lilandele umyalelo liphinde likwazi ukugqamisa imigomo yezwe lethu. Uma lihluleka ukwenza lokhu, liyobuyiselwa kuleli," usho kanje. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba izolo eGoli, njengoba bekunengqungquthela ebheka umnotho. URamaphosa uthe akazange abheke ukuthi uMeyer useka liphi iqembu ngaphambi kokuba amjubele kulesi sikhundla. Utuse iqhaza likaMeyer, wathi angakwazi ukubhekana nezimo ezinzima ngenxa yamava anawo kwezithinta izingxoxo zokuphemba uxolo. "Unamava kwezithinta izingxoxo zokuphemba uxolo okuyinto aseyenze emhlabeni jikelele. Useqalile ukuxoxa neminyango ehlukene yaseMelika kanjalo nezikhulu zakhona." UMeyer ungena esikhundleni esashiywa nguMnuz Ebrahim Rasool, owaxoshwa eMelika ngenxa yokugxeka uMengameli wakhona uMnuz Donald Trump. Elakuleli linyambanambana kuTrump, olisola ngokuthi kunodlame olubhekiswe kubalimi abamhlophe abaphucwa nomhlaba wabo. Yize esetshelwe izikhawu eziningi ukuthi lokhu kungamampunge, kodwa uTrump akezwa mshini. URamaphosa uthe akangabazi ukuthi uMeyer uzowenza ngempumelelelo lo msebenzi wakhe. "Sethemba ukuthi uzokwamukelwa nguTrump. Nathi sisanda kwamukela inxusa laseMelika, uMnuz Brent Bozell." Ekhuluma ngezithinta umnotho, uthe umkhakha wezamanzi kuleli kuhambisa ngelonwabu ukutshalwa kwemali kuleli. "Ingqalasizinda endala, ukungaphathwa ngendlela komasipala kunqinda izinguquko ngokushesha kuleli. Ukungahlinzekwa ngendlela kwamanzi kubantu, kwenza nokutshalwa kwemali kuhambe ngelonwabu." Uthe umsebenzi omkhulu nokutshalwa kwemali kwenzeka komasipala wathi kudingeka bavuke emaqandeni. Udalule nokuthi abantu abaningi baqashwe osomabhizinisi abazimele kuleli, ngakho kudingeka athuthukiswe ukuze sande isibalo sabantu abasebenzayo kuleli. URamaphosa uthe abantu bakuleli baziwa ngokuphanta. "Noma ikuphi la ngihamba khona ikakhulu emalokishini, uthi uyadlula ubone kukhona ibhizinisi elithile. Yinto eyayivele ikhona phambilini le. Ukuthi ibhizinisi liyachuma noma alichumi, olunye udaba lolo. Okubalulekile ngukuthi abantu bakuleli bayaziwa ngokuthi bayaphanta, abafuni ukuhluleka. Iyona nto okumele siyigqugquzele," usho kanje.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMHOLI weRISE Mzansi, uMnuz Songezo Zibi AZONGENELA ukhetho ngokuzimela amaqembu amathathu, ayememezele ukuthi azobumbana, angenele ukhetho ngaphansi kwe-Unite for Change. La maqembu okuyiGOOD Party, RISE Mzansi neBosa, izolo akhiphe isitatimende esiveze ukuthi asezongenela ukhetho ngawodwana. Athe ngeke esangenela ukhetho ngaphansi kwe-Unite for Change ngoba kunezinto okusadingeke ukuthi kubhungwe kabanzi ngazo. "Phezu kokuba lilikhulu ibanga eselihanjiwe ekutheni kuhlanganiswe la maqembu ukuze angenele ukhetho ngokubambisana kodwa kunesidingo sokuthi kuqale kulungiswe ezinye zezinto. Lezi zinto ngeke zikwazi ukuphothulwa ngokushesha, njengoba ukhetho luseMome. Yingakho kunesidingo sokuthi amaqembu, aqhubeke nokuzimela okhethweni," kusho isitatimende salawa maqembu. Sithe la maqembu azobakhona ephepheni lokuvota, lapho ezobe ezimele geqe. "Ngeke esangenela ukhetho ngaphansi kwe-Unite for Change. Izwe lisenkingeni ngakho lidinga abaholi abanamava." Phambilini, la maqembu ayethe azobhalisa kwikhomishini eyengamele ukhetho ngaphansi kwe-Unite for Change, ukuze angenele ukhetho ngokuhlanganyela. Tourism Minister Patricia de Lille says the sector continues to play a vital role in strengthening South Africa’s economy, noting that international and domestic visitors contribute significantly to revenue while sustaining jobs across industries such as hospitality, transport, retail and heritage tourism.  UMHOLI weGOOD Party, uNkk Patricia de Lille IBosa iholwa nguDkt Mmusi Maimane, iGOOD Party iholwa nguNkk Patricia de Lille, kuthi iRISE Mzansi iholwa nguMnuz Songezo Zibi. La maqembu ayethe azojuba abantu abanamava abazowamela okhethweni. Ayethe azogxila ezintweni ezithinta imisebenzi, ukuhanjiswa kwezidingo kubantu, ezokuphepha, ukulwa nenkohlakalo, ukukhulisa umnotho nezinye izinselelo ezibhekene nezwe. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, kulindeleke ukuthi usuku lokhetho lumenyezelwe ngaphambi kokuphela kukaJuni nonyaka. Ukhetho kulindeleke ukuthi lube phakathi kukaNovemba noJanuwari wangonyaka ozayo. Umholi we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, onguNgqongqoshe wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu kuleli, nguyena ozomemezela usuku lokhetho ngenxa yokuthi olohulumeni basekhaya. Uma kuwukhetho lukazwelonke, lumenyezelwa nguMengameli wezwe. UMHOLI weBosa, uDkt Mmusi Maimane Image: Phando Jikelo/ParliamentRSA

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UNGQONGQOSHE womnyango weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi BEVILE ku-500 ngosuku abantu abangeniswa ezibhedlela ezizimele kuleli abakhokhelwa yiGovernment Employees Medical Scheme (GEMS). Lokhu kuvezwe nguNgqongqoshe weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha, Inkosi uMzamo Buthelezi, ephendula imibuzo yelungu le-EFF ePhalamende. UButhelezi uthe ngosuku i-GEMS yamukela amalungu amasha angu-112. Uthe ikhokha cishe u-R182 milllion njalo ngosuku kanti ongoti bodokotela bakhokhelwa ngosuku u-R27 milion. "Ngosuku i-GEMS ikhokhela izibhedlela ezizimele ngezingane ezingu-60, ezizalwa ngosuku. Zizalwa abantu abasuke besikiwe, abanye basuke bezibelethele. Bangu-593 abangeniswa ezibhedlela nsuku zonke," kusho uButhelezi. Ubechaza ngezinselelo ezibhekene ne-GEMS enyuse imali ngenxa yokunyuka kwezindleko. Sisuse umsindo isenzo se-GEMS sokunyusa imali ekuqaleni konyaka, okwenze izinyunyana zabasebenzi zamashela ukwehliswa kwemali. Okwamanje kusaqhubeka izingxoxo zokuzama ukufinyelela esivumelwaneni njengoba i-GEMS ikhale ngokunyuka kwezindleko okuyimbangela yokunyuswa kwemali ekhokhwa amalungu. Okunye i-GEMS ekhale ngakho yinkohlakalo edla lubi, njengoba amanye amalungu elalisa izihlobo zawo ezingeyona ingxenye ye-GEMS, bese kudingeka lesi sikhwama sikhokhe. Izinyunyana zikhale ngokuthi i-GEMS ibuye ingafuni ukukhokha. UButhelezi empendulweni, uthe i-GEMS iyakhokha uma kungukuthi kuyahambisana nemigomo ebekiwe ethinta ezempilo. "Uma kwenzeka i-GEMS inqaba ukukhokha, kusuke kufaka izinto ezehlukene okubalwa ukusebenzisa izibhedlela ezingeyona ingxenye yezikhungo ezikhokhelwa yilesi sikhwama. Kokunye kusuke kungazange kutholakale imvume ngaphambi kokuba ogulayo angeniswe esibhedlela." Uthe kokunye kusuke kunemininingwane engaphelele noma ezinye izinto okumele zikhokhelwe ezisuke zingekho ngaphansi ezikhavwe yilesi sikhwama. Uveze nokuthi nyakenye, i-GEMS ikhokhele izindleko ezibalelwa ku-R67 billion, ekubeni amalungu akhokha u-R65 billion. Ubalule nokuthi abalesi sikhwama basebenzisa u-R10 billion, ukukhava izindleko ukuze imali ezokhokhwa amalungu inganyuswa kakhulu. UButhelezi uthe ziyaqhubeka izingxoxo phakathi kwezinyunyana ezingaphansi komfelandawonye iCosatu neFedusa, ngokunyuswa kwemali.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ISouth African Health Products Regulatory Authority (SAHPRA) igunyaze ukusebenza kwe-Lenacapavir, okungumjovo wezinyanga eziyisithupha wokugwema i-HIV KUNENHLANSI yethemba ngempi ebhekiswe kwi-HIV eNingizimu Afrika, njengoba sekufike umjovo ozosiza ukuvikela abangakasuleleki ngaleli gciwane. Lo mjovo, i-Lenacapavir, uzosiza ngokuvikela abangakahaqwa yigciwane ukuthi lingabe lisabangena. Abangakasuleleki bazojovwa kabili ngonyaka. UMnyango wezeMpilo umemezele ukuthi ifikile imijovo engu-37 920 ye-Lenacapavir kuleli. Okhulumela uMnyango, uMnuz Foster Mohale, uthe abantu bazojova kabili ngonyaka. "Umuntu uzojova kanye ezinyangeni eziyisithupha, aphinde ajove ezinyangeni eziyisithupha ezilandelayo ukuze angasulelekile nge-HIV. Inhloso ukwehlisa abantu abahaqwa yileli gciwane." Uthe bahlose ukuvikela izingane ezincane zamantombazane, abesifazane abasebancane kanjalo nabesilisa abalala nabanye besilisa. "Sihlose nokuvikela nabadayisa ngomzimba nabanye. Sifuna ukukucacisa ukuthi lo mjovo uzovikela abangakahaqeki, awulona ikhambi lokulapha ingculazi." Uthe maduzane bazowethula emphakathini lo mjovo kanti kulindeleke uthulwe ngumengameli wezwe. I-DA ikwamukele ukufika kwawo, yathi uzosiza kakhulu empini yeHIV kuleli. Ithe abangakahaqeki bazovikeleka ekutheni bangasuleleki ngaleli gciwane. "Elakuleli linesibalo esiphezulu sabantu abane-HIV emhlabeni jikelele. Babalelwa ku-8 million abaphila ne-HIV kuleli. Babalelwa ku-6 million abadla imishanguzo ama-ARV. Lo mjovo uzoshintsha izinto kuleli." Leli qembu lithe lifuna uMnyango uvele ePhalamende ukuze uzothula uhlelo lokusabalalisa lo mjovo emphakathini ngokushesha.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Izimoto zongqongqoshe SIGXEKWA nxa zonke isinqumo soMnyango kaMgcinimafa, sokunyusa imali yokuthenga izimoto zoNgqongqoshe kanjalo nabaPhathiswa beminyango ezifundazweni. Lokhu kulandela ukunyuswa kwemali yokuthenga izimoto, isuke kuR800 000 yaya kuR1.1 million. Umfelandawonye wezinyunyana zabasebenzi iCOSATU neqembu iBOSA, bagxeka lesi sinyathelo sikaMgcinimafa. UMnuz Matthew Parks weCOSATU, ugxeke lesi sinyathelo wathi sifana nokuthifela emehlweni abantulayo. Uthe umnyango kaMgcinimafa utshela abantu ukuthi babophe izifociya kodwa ngakolunye uhlangothi, uthatha izinqumo ezibudedengu ngemali. "UMgcinimafa uhlale ekhala ngokuthi kunenkinga yemali afune ukunyusa intela efakwa uma uthenga impahla iVAT, kodwa unyusela abantu abavele behola kahle imihlomulo. Unyusa intela ekhokhwa abasebenzi ngenxa yokuthi ufuna ukupepenyekisa kahle osopolitiki." Ukhale ngokuthi ayinyuswa nemali eholwa abantu abangasebenzi kuleli, esami ku-R370 ngenyanga. "Le mali ayinyuki kodwa isiza abahlwempu. Sifuna uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa angenelele ngokuchitha lesi sinyathelo." Uthe akukwazi ukulokhu kukhalwa ngemali ekubeni kuhlonyuliswa osopolitiki kuphela. "Incane imali ekhona ezweni ngakho osopolitiki abafunde ukuphila ngalokhu abanakho. Abahambe ngezimoto zohlobo olufanayo ziphinde zakhiwe kuleli." Uthe uhulumeni unezinto ezibaluleke kakhulu okumele uzenze hhayi ukugxila ezintweni ezingathi shu. "Abakhokhi bentela balindele okungcono kuhulumeni hhayi ukuxhashazwa kwemali. Ayichithwe eyokunyuswa kwemali yezimoto zosopolitiki kanti sifuna ukubakhumbuza ukuthi luyeza ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya maduzane." Umholi weBOSA uDkt Mmusi Maimane, usigxekile isinyathelo sikahulumeni sokunyusa imali yezimoto wathi siveza ukuthi uhulumeni uqhelile kubantu. Uthe lesi sinyathelo sivuna ngisho amaphini ongqongqoshe kanjalo nondunankulu bezifundazwe. "Lesi sinyathelo sizocasula abantu, ikakhulu abangasebenzi nababhuqwa yindlala. Imali yomphakathi kumele yenze izidingo ezibalulekile, hhayi ubukhazikhazi." Uthe bazolokhu beqhubekile nokuphenya ibheshu njengoba uNgqongqoshe wezeziMali, uMnuz Enoch Godongwana, edalule eyokunyuka kwemali empendulweni yombuzo obubuzwe yileli qembu ePhalamende.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: Ministry of Human Settlements UNGQONGQOSHE wokuHlaliswa kwaBantu, uNksz Thembi Simelane, uveze ukuthi babalelwa ku-3.4 million, abantu ababhalisele ukuthola izindlu. UNksz Simelane uthe lesi sibalo usithole ohlwini lwabantu abafuna izindlu , i-National Housing Needs Register (NHNR). "Umbiko weCensus ka-2022, uveza ukuthi zibalelwa ku-2.1 million izindlu ezidingekayo. Ngokombiko ofanayo elakuleli linezindlu ezingu-17.8 million, kanti u-13% wabantu uhlala emijondolo," usho kanje ephendula imibuzo eNdlini yoMkhandlu weziFundazwe ePhalamende kuleli sonto. Uthe bahlele ukuthi kusuka onyakenimali u-2024/2025 kuya kunyakamali u-2029/20230, bazokwakha izindlu ezingu-230 000, baphinde bakhiphe neziza ezingu-314 000. Uveze nokuthi basemkhankasweni wokuphucula nemijondolo. Mayelana nomonakalo odalwe yizikhukhula zakamuva eLimpopo, Mpumalanga, Gauteng, Eastern Cape naKwaZuku-Natal, uthe bafuna ukuthola ukuthi zidale umonakalo ozodla malini. "Sibheka nendlela yokungenelela kwezinye izindawo ezikhahlanyezwe yilezi zikhukhula. Singenelela ngokuthumela izinto zokusiza uma kunomlilo, senze ucwaningo ngezindlu ezicekeleke phansi siphinde sibheke neyokuhlinzeka ngezindlu zesikhashana." Uthe uma sekuphothulwe lonke ucwaningo, bazobe sebazi ukuthi kudingeka malini. "Izifundazwe ezithintekayo sezinolwazi ngomthelela wononakalo odalekile kwingqalasizinda nokuthi kungase kudle malini ukuyilungisa. Lokhu kuzosigqugquzela ukuthi sikwazi ukufaka isicelo esikhwameni sezinhlekelele," kusho uNksz Simelane.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Kudedelwe imigomo ethinta ukukhulelwa kwabafundi ezikoleni ukuze umphakathi uphawule ngayo INGCABHA isemphakathini ukuthi uphawule ngemigomo ethinta indlela okumele izikole zisingathe ngayo udaba lokukhulelwa kwabafundi besafunda. Le migomo esemthethweni iBasic Educations Laws Act (Bela), idedelwe nguNgqongqoshe woMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube ukuze umphakathi uphawule ngayo. Uthe le migomo ivikela ilungelo lomfundi osuke ekhulelwe esasesikoleni. "Iqinisekisa ukuthi umfundi okhulelwe, kumele asekwe yisikole ngesikhathi esakhulelwe. Iqinisekisa nokuthi kumele abuyele esikoleni uma esetetile, angaxoshwa noma anqatshelwe ukubuyela esikoleni," usho kanje. Uthe izikole akumele zihlukumeze umfundi osuke ekhulelwe noma zimkhiphe inyumbazane. "Ngokubambisana nomnyango wezeMpilo, kumele asekwe ngesikhathi engakateti kanjalo noma esetetile ngokuthi anikwe usizo lwezokululekwa. Likhulu ibanga eselihanjiwe kuleli ukuvikela abafundi abakhulelwe," kusho uNksz Gwarube. Uthe sesadlula isikhathi lapho abafundi abakhulelwe, abebexoshwa ezikoleni ngenxa yokuthi bakhulelwe. "Ukuxoshwa kwabo kwakunyusa izinga lokuthi balaxaze isikole, bengaqedanga. Sifuna wonke umfundi alithole ithuba lokuqeda isikole ngaphandle kokucwaswa." Okunye akuvezile ngukuthi kuzobaluleka ukubika abafundi abangaphansi kweminyaka engu-16, abakhulelwe. "Kumele babikwe ngokushesha emnyangweni wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi kanjalo nasemaphoyiseni ukuze kube nokungenelela." Sezike zakhala izinyunyana zothisha ngokukhishwa amancozuncozu kwale migomo ethinta izikole, kulandela ukuphasiswa kwalo mthetho. Yasusa umsindo eyalo mthetho ngesikhathi kunezigcawu zomphakathi njengoba kukhona ababewuchitha. Okunye okuqukethwe kuwona ngukuthi uGrade R, usuyimpoqo kuleli ekubeni phambilini uGrade 1 iwona owawuyimpoqo. Kusaneminye imigomo esazodedelwa emuva kokuphothulwa kwethinta ukukhulelwa kwabafundi. UNksz Gwarube uthe abantu bangaletha ukuphawula kwabo ku:[email protected]. Bangakwenza lokhu zingakapheli izinsuku ezingu-30 njengoba isimemezelo sishicilelwe emqulwini kahulumeni, ngoMashi 25, 2026.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: I-logo entsha yokukhuthaza abantu bakuleli, ikakhulu intsha ukuthi ivote UNGENA kwelinye igiya umkhankaso wokukhuthaza intsha ukuthi ivote okhethweni oluzayo lohulumeni basekhaya. Ikhomishini yezokhetho isiqhamuke nezinye izindlela zokukhuthaza intsha ukuthi ivote ngokuvula i-podcast kanjalo nohlelo oluzodlala kwithelevishini, oluzokhuluma ngokhetho. Lokhu kuvele izolo ngesikhathi ikhomishini yethula i-logo ezosetshenziswa njengoba ukhetho kulindeleke ukuthi lube phakathi kukaNovemba nonyaka, noJanuwari ngonyaka ozayo. USihlalo wekhomishini uMnuz Mosotho Moepya, uthe bazokwethula i-podcast ngesonto elizayo lapho kuzobe kukhulunywa khona ngokhetho. "Le podcast izoqala ukusebenza ngo-Ephreli 8, kanti izobe ifundisa ngokuvota. Kuzoba nohlelo oluzodlala kwi-SABC 1, kusuka ngoMeyi 1, 2026, lokukhuthaza abantu abasha ukuthi babe yingxenye yokhetho," usho kanje ekhuluma eGoli. Uthe ngalezi zinhlelo, bahlose ukuqeda ngamampunge nangezinto ezingelona iqiniso ezithinta ukhetho. Isikhulu esiphezulu sekhomishini, uMnuz Sy Mamabolo, siveze ukuthi bahlela ukuqasha abasebenzi abevile ku-70 000, abazobe besebenza ngesikhathi kubhaliselwa ukuvota. "Bazobe bematasa ngesikhathi sempelasonto yokubhalisela ukuvota ngoJuni 20 no-21. Sesenze wonke amalungiselelo athinta impelasonto yokubhalisela ukuvota." UMoepya uthe i-logo ethuliwe ihlose ukugqugquzela intsha ukuthi ivote. "Inhloso yayo njengoba ithi, "Sukuma, ziveze bese uvota". Isho ukuthi intsha kanjalo nabantu bakuleli kumele babhukule, bavote. Abangabhalisile ukuvota basenalo ithuba lokwenza lokhu," usho kanje. Uthe akangabazi ukuthi ukhetho luzoba ngolukhululekile, nolunokuthula. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, kusalindwe uNgqongqoshe wokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, ukuthi amemezele usuku lokhetho. Amandla akuyena ngosuku lokhetho ngenxa yokuthi olohulumeni basekhaya. Usuku lokhetho lukazwelonke lumenyezelwa ngumengameli wezwe.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ZIMI ngomumo izinhlaka ezibhekele ukuphepha eNingizimu Afrika uma kwenzeka kuqubuka izibhelu ezifuze ezenzeka ngoJulayi 2021. IPhini likaMengameli lezwe, uMnuz Paul Mashatile, liveze ukuthi ngeke kuwuphinde uhulumeni okwenzeka ngo-2021, lapho izinhlaka zokuphepha zazingalindele ukuthi kungase kuqubuke izibhelu, ezakhahlameza kakhulu KwaZulu-Natal naseGauteng. Lezi zibhelu ezathatha cishe isonto lonke, zacekela phansi impahla yezitolo namafemu kuleli, kutatshwa impahla kwaphinde kwashiswa ngenxa yokuthi kukhona ababezwelana nokuboshwa kowayengumengameli wezwe, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, osengumholi weqembu iMKP. "Zafika singalindele izibhelu zango-2021. Ezobunhloli zazingekho ezingeni kodwa manje mkhulu umehluko okhona. Silindele noma yini, siyokwazi futhi ukusheshe siyihlonze ingozi ngoba ukhona umnyakazo owenziwe nangasohlangothini lwezobunhloli kuleli," kusho uMashatile ephendula imibuzo yamalungu ePhalamende, izolo. Bevile ku-300 abantu abashona kulezi zibhelu, kwaboshwa abevile ku-5 000, kwadaleka umonakalo wezigidigidi zamarandi emnothweni. Umholi weBosa, uDkt Mmusi Maimane, ukhale ngokushoda kwamaphoyisa, wathi abantu abaphephile ekubeni eqhethe ePhalamende. "Kungani amaphoyisa engayi kovikela abantu kodwa agcwele la ePhalamende?" UMashatile uthe iPhalamende lashiswa ngakho abafuni kuphinde lesi sehlo futhi ngomuso. "Uma kunomengameli wezwe kudingeka kuqiniswe ezokuphepha. Ukhona umnyakazo wokuqasha amaphoyisa ukuze aqaphe ubugebengu kuleli. Sikhathazekile ngobugebengu obunendlakadla kuleli," usho kanje. Uveze ukubaluleka kokubambisana uma kuzoliwa ngempumelelo nobugebengu kuleli. "Phambilini. bekukhona amakomiti okulwa nobugebengu emphakathini. Abesiza kakhulu kule nkinga ngoba umphakathi iwona owazi ukusuka nokuhlala kobugebengu. Ngezinye zezinto okudingeka sizibuyise ukulwa nobugebengu." Uthe nezobulungiswa kumele zibe yingxenye empini yobugebengu ukuze kungaboshwa umuntu manje kusasa useyadedelwa.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Umphathiswa wezeMfundo eKZN uSipho Hlomuka SITHOLE ukwesekwa isiphakamiso sikaNgqongqoshe weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, sokuthi kuphenywe impilo ephilwa yizikhulu nezisebenzi zoMnyango. UNksz Gwarube umeme uphiko oluphenya amacala enkohlakalo, i-Special Investigating Unit (SIU), ukuthi lwenze lolu phenyo eMnyangweni wakhe. Ukusho lokhu emva kokuba esolwe ngokuthi ufake unyawo lwedada wangenelela ohlelweni lokuqashwa kozokhulumela lo Mnyango kuzwelonke, kulandela ukuhamba kowayewukhulumela, uMnuz Elijah Mhlanga. Kuthiwa uNksz Gwarube kunomuntu ayemfuna angene esikhundleni, okuyinto ayichithayo. USihlalo wekomiti loMnyango weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha ePhalamende, uMnuz Mr Jan de Villiers, uthe uyaweseka umbono kaNksz Gwarube, wokuthi kuphenywe impilo yezisebenzi boMnyango. Uthe kumele kuhlakazwe isidleke senkohlakalo eMnyangweni, wathi kumele iSIU ilwenze lolu phenyo. "Sifuna uphenyo lugxile kwizisebenzi ezisezinhlakeni ezibalulekile. Yilapho okudlange khona inkohlakalo." Uthe bafuna kuphenywe nangokuqashwa kwezisebenzi eMnyangweni ngokufakwa kobhululu. "Izinsiza zikahulumeni kumele ziye kubafundi, nakulabo abazidingayo, hhayi emaphaketheni abathile. Abafundi yibona abathwala kanzima uma bengazitholi izimfanelo zabo." Uthe bazimisele ukusebenzisana neSIU ekuphenyeni impilo ephilwa abasebenzi eMnyangweni. "Sifuna uma sebebanjiwe abenza inkohlakalo, bavezwe obala. Sifuna bathathelwe nezinyathelo zokuqondiswa ubugwegwe. Sifuna baboshwe futhi labo abenza le nkohlakalo." Uthe bayayeseka yonke imizamo yokuqinisa ukusebenza kukahulumeni ngokulwa nenkohlakalo ukuze kuzuze abantu bakuleli. Inyunyana yothisha, iSadtu, ixwayise uNksz Gwarube ukuthi angasabisi izisebenzi ngokuthi ufuna iSIU iphenye impilo eziyiphilayo ekubeni zisebenza, zihola. Ixwayise ngokuthi ayeke ukufaka unyawo lwedada ohlelweni lokuqashwa kwezisebenzi nezikhulu eMnyangweni ngoba kunemithetho elandelwayo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KUSINDA kwehlela phakathi koMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal nenhlangano ephakela izikole esifundazweni i-National School Nutrition Programme Service Providers, kulandela ukukhishwa ohlwini kwecala ebelifakwe ile nhlangano, mayelana nokumisa uhlelo lwabaphakela izikole. INkantolo eNkulu yaseMgungundlovu ikhiphe icala ohlwini lwamacala aphambi kwayo, ibe isiyalela abale nhlangano ukuthi bakhokhe izindleko zecala. UMnyango usamukele lesi sinqumo ngoba uthi uzoqhubeka nohlelo ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, usihlalo wenhlangano, uMnuz Lindani Matiwane, uthe bazosiphikisa isinqumo senkantolo. "Nakanjani sizosiphikisa isinqumo senkantolo ngoba asihambisani naso," usho kanje. UMphathiswa woMnyango, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, uthe bazobe belungisa ezinye zezinto ezithinta lolu hlelo, wathi uhlelo luyaqhubeka futhi bazimisele ukuthi lungaphazamiseki. "Sisemkhankasweni wokulungisa nokuqinisa ezinye zezinto okubalwa nokuqinisekisa ukuthi abenza lo msebenzi bakhokhelwa ngesikhathi. Asifuni kube nomfundi ozolamba nsuku zonke," usho kanje. Uthe bazimisele ukulandela yonke imigomo ethinta uhlelo, wathi lusiza ekwesekeni izinhlelo zokufunda nokufundisa. Inhlangano yabaphekela baphakele izikole yaya enkantolo iyokhala ngokungahambi kahle kohlelo ngesikhathi kuqokwa osonkontileka abasha abazophakela abafundi eminyakeni emithathu ezayo. Lolu hlelo laqala nyakenye kanti abasha kumele baqale ngoLwesithathu. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, ngisho ezikoleni kunohlelo lokuqoka abazophekela abafundi kule minyaka emithathu ezayo. Le nhlangano ike yakhala ngokuphulwa kwemigomo njengoba uMnyango ujahe ukunqamula izinkontileka zabaphakayo ekubeni lungaphothuliwe uhlelo oluthinta izikhalazo. Isike yakhala futhi nangokuphuza ukukhokhelwa ngesikhathi kosonkontileka abenza lo msebenzi.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Kuzowashubela amakhansela ngemuva kokhetho AMANDLA azowela koSomlomo bomasipala abazoqhubeka baqaphe ukusebenza kwemikhandlu, uma kusalindwe ukumenyezelwa ngokusemthethweni kwemiphumela yokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. Lokhu kwenzelwa ukuthi omasipala baqhubeke nokusebenza kusalindwe le miphumela. Ngokomthetho, imiphumela yokhetho kumele imenyezelwe ngemuva kwezinsuku eziyisikhokmbisa, kudlule ukhetho. UMnuz Lance Joel wenhlangano i-South African Local Government Association (Salga), utshele oSomlomo bomasipala baKwaZulu-Natal, emhlanganweni obusesiShayamthetho sesifundazwe eMgungundlovu, ngoLwesihlanu, ukuthi oSomlomo bazoqhubeka nokusebenza kuze kumenyezelwe imiphumela yokhetho. "Ningawubiza ngisho umhlangano wokhetho nangosuku lokhetho. Uma kwenzeka kuhlonzwa isimo senhlekelele ezweni, omasipala kumele baqhubeke nokuhambisa izidingo emphakathini, ngeke ume umsebenzi ngenxa yokuthi kunokhetho," usho kanje. Uveze ukuthi ihlandla lobuholi bomasipala kuleli, liphela ngoNovemba 3, 2026. Kulindeleke ukuthi ukhetho lubizwe phakathi kukaNovemba noJanuwari wangonyaka ozayo. Ngokwezinhlelo ezikhona zokhetho, amalungiselelo okhetho ayaqhubeka phezu kokuba usuku lungakamenyezelwa. UNgqongqoshe wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana nezindaba zoMdabu kuleli, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uMengameli we-IFP, nguyena onamandla okumemezela usuku lokhetho. UJoel uthe okunye abakulungiselelayo wukuxoxa nawo wonke amakhansela ukuwalungiselela ukuthi abhekane nesimo uma engabuyeli ezikhundleni. "Inqwaba yamakhansela angeke abuyele ezikhundleni zawo ngemuva kokhetho. Siyawalungiselela, kahle kahle sixoxa nawo wonke ukuze azilungiselele ukuthi kungenzeka angabuyi ngemuva kokhetho. Amanye awo kawazoba neholo ngoba azobe engasatohozi ngakho kumele akulungele lokhu," usho kanje. Uthe kunabanye abasebenzi komasipala, izinkontileka zabo ezincike ezikhulwini zemikhandlu, abangeke babuye ngemuva kokhetho. "Yizona zonke izinto okumele zihlelelwe kusenesikhathi. Kunemibiko okumele yenziwe ngezinhlelo ezenziwe abaholi abakhona komasipala, ezodluliselwa ebuholini obuzongena ngemuva kokhetho," kusho uJoel. Uthe umhlangano wokuqala womasipala kumele uhlale ezinsukwini ezingu-14, ngemuva kokumenyezelwa kwemiphumela yokhetho. Ayisalanga indaba yokuthuthwa kwabantu abangahlali emawadini abo, bayovota kwamanye amawadi uma kunokhetho lokuchibiyela. Ihlale iyindaba egudwini emaqenjini ezombusazwe indaba yokuthuthwa kwabantu abangahlali kuleyo ndawo, bayovota kwenye indawo uma kunalolu khetho. Isikhulu sekhomishini yezokhetho esifundazweni, uDkt Khulekani Zulu, sithe ngaphambi kokhetho badedela uhlu lwabavoti kuleyo ndawo ukuze amaqembu akwazi ukukhalaza uma kukhona angakuboni kahle. "Amaqembu analo ilungelo lokufaka isikhalazo ukuze sisibheke siyikhomishini uma kukhona abantu abangahlali kuleyo wadi. Kumele alethe nobufakazi balokhu ukuze sikwazi ukuphenya," kusho uZulu. Kuvele ukuthi ngo-Agasti, amaqembu kumele aqale uhlelo lokuqoka azofolosa ngabo okhethweni.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Ithemba kuqashwa othisha baka-Grade R Archives BAQALA emsebenzini ngenyanga ezayo, othisha abangu-500 abazofundisa uGrade R KwaZulu-Natal, abaqashwe nguMnyango wezeMfundo esifundazweni. Bese kunesikhathi ibangwa indaba yokuqashwa kothisha abafundisa leli banga kulesi sifundazwe. UMphathiswa woMnyango, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, uthe laba basebenzi baqala ngo-Ephreli 1, emsebenzini, wathi babaqasha ukuze baqinise isisekelo semfundo kulesi sifundazwe. "UMnyango uzibophezele ekulandeleni umthetho wezikole iBela, okubeka kucace ukuthi uGrade R, usuyimpoqo kuleli. Siqinisekisa nokuthi othisha abafundisa leli banga, baneziqu ezifanele kanti abafundi sifuna bafundiswe ngabantu abazinikele," usho kanje. Uthe labo thisha bazokwehlisa nesibalo sabafundi emakilasini kulandelwa umkamo obekiwe wokuthi uthisha oyedwa ufundisa abafundi abangaki ekilasini. "Ukuqinisa esisekelweni semfundo kuzokwenza ukuthi zibe zinhle izithelo emabangeni aphezulu, kubalwa no-matric. Labo thisha bazosiza kakhulu nasezindaweni zasemakhaya, lapho bezovulela khona iminyango abafundi abahlala kulezi zindawo." Uthe bahleli befuna ukuqikelela ukuthi umfundi oqala isikole, uthola imfundo esezingeni. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, kusanothisha abangaqashiwe abahlala bekhala ngokunqaba kwemisebenzi emnyangweni. Iningi labo lize liqhinqe emahhovisi oMnyango lifuna izikhulu zibaqashe. Leli qulu likhala ngosizi elibhekene nalo njengoba lafunda kodwa alikwazi ukuthola umsebenzi. UMnyango wesifundazwe ubhekene nengcindezi yokungakwazi ukuvala ezinye izikhala ngenxa yokungeneli kwesabelomali. Izikhala okubalwa ezabahloli, abaphathi bamasekethe oMnyango kanjalo nezabasebenza emahhovisi, azivaliwe ngenxa yokushoda kwemali. Inkinga yemali yenza lo Mnyango ungakwazi ukukhokhela ngesikhathi osonkontileka osebenza nabo. Abanye babo kubalwa inkampani esabalalisa izincwadi ezikoleni, okudingeka yenzele uMnyango isikweletu sokuthenga i-stationery nezincwadi ukuze abafundi baqhubeke nokufunda. Nezikole zithwala kanzima njengoba nemali yama-norms and standards, eyenza izinhlelo ezehlukene iphuza ukufakwa ngenxa yokushoda kwemali.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KWEMBULWE izipoki ezibhubhudla imali esikhwameni esixhasa izitshudeni ngemali yokufunda ezikhungweni zemfundo, i-National Students' Financial Aid Scheme (NSFAS), ekubeni kuvela ukuthi sezafa. Lezi zipoki zivundululwe embikweni kaMcwaningi Mabhuku Jikelele, oveze ukuthi zingu-822 izipoki okutholakale ukuthi ziyahlomula kulesi sikhwama, ekubeni ulwazi lwaseMnyangweni wezaseKhaya, luveza ukuthi zendela koyisemkhulu. UNgqongqoshe weMfundo ePhakeme, uMnuz Buti Manamela, useyalele abalesi sikhwama ukuthi baqale uphenyo. Uthe kumele basebenzisane nophiko oluphenya amacala enkohlakalo, i-SIU ukuze kutholakale abenza lo mkhonyovu. "Umbiko uveza ukuthi lezi zipoki ziyaqhubeka nokuxhaswa yi-NSFAS ekubeni zingaphili ngokoMnyango wezaseKhaya. Asifuni ngomuso kube nento efuze le yingakho kumele kuphenywe." Uthe lo mbiko ubuye waveza ukuthi kunezitshudeni ezevile ku-14 000, ezihlomula oxhasweni ngendlela engafanele. "Imindeni yalezi zitshudeni ihola imali engaphezu kwebekiwe ukuze uxhaswe. Kodwa nazo ziyaqhubeka nokuhlomula ngendlela engafanele." Uthe kuphinde kwatholwa nezitshudeni ezingu-321, ezihlomulayo ekubeni zihlomula nasesibonelelweni sabangasebenzi kuleli, esingu-R370 ngenyanga. "Konke lokhu uhlelo lwe-NSFAS luhlulekile ukukubika ukuthi kunezitshudeni ezithola uxhaso kungafanele. Okunye kunabaxhasiwe ekubeni bafeyila, ekubeni umgomo we-NSFAS uthi uma ufeyila uphucwa uxhaso." Uthe imali ye-NSFAS ihlinzekwa abadonsa kanzima, hhayi uwonke wonke ongamele ayithole. "Sifuna ukuqeda nya ngenkohlakalo nokudliwa kungafanele kwemali yabakhokhi bentela kuleli. Sethemba ukuthi uphenyo luzothola yonke into, sazi ukuthi ubani owenzeni." Uthe asikho isitshudeni esixhaswe ngendlela efanele okumele sitatazele ngenxa yalolu phenyo. Uqhube wathi bafuna ukubamba labo abaqamba amanga, abaletha ulwazi olungelona ngesikhathi befaka izicelo zoxhaso.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Iyaqhubeka impi yokunqanda isifo sofuba KUYALWE abesilisa ukuthi bayeke ukuhambela kude nokuyohlolwa isifo sofuba iTB njengoba kuyibo abancane kwabahlolwayo. Leli khwelo lihlatshwe yiPhini likaMengameli wezwe uMnuz Paul Mashatile izolo, kugujwa usuku lweTB emhlabeni, eWestern Cape. Uthe lesi sifo siyalapheka kodwa sisabhubhisa inqwaba yabantu kuleli, nasemhlabeni jikelele. "Sihlaba ikhwelo kwabesilisa ukuthi bahlolwe lesi sifo ngoba yibona abahambela kude nokuhlolwa. Ezinyangeni ezingu-11 ezedlule, izibalo zikhomba ukuthi bambalwa abesilisa abahlolwa lesi sifo ekubeni kuyibo esibahaqe kakhulu. Sinxusa nalabo asebedla imishanguzo yaso ukuthi bangayiyeki, kodwa bayidle baze bayiqede," usho kanje. Uthe lesi sifo sigadla kakhulu kwabahaqwe yiHIV/AIDS. Uveze nokuthi u-3.5 million wabantu abahlolwe lesi sifo selokhu kuqale umkhankaso wokuhlola nyakenye. "Sifuna ukukhulisa isibalo sabantu abahlolwa leli gciwane ukuze silwe nokubhebhetheka kwalo. Kunenhlansi yethemba ngokuthi sizoyinqoba impi yalesi sifo. Yisibalo esikhulu esake saba naso ngonyaka sabantu abahlolwa iTB kuleli." Uthe abantu asebeke bahlangana nomuntu one-TB kumele bayohlolwa ukuze kutholakale ukuthi abathelelekanga ngaso. UNgqongqoshe wezeMpilo kuleli, uDkt Aaron Motsoaledi, uthe umkhankaso owathulwa nyakenye owokuhlola abantu abangu-5 million ngonyaka kulesi sifo. Uthe abantu bacabanga ukuthi lesi sifo sihambisana nesifuba kuphela kanti akunjalo. "Sihlala noma yikuphi emzimbeni. Singahlala esibelethweni sowesifazane, nakwezinye izindawo emzimbeni," usho kanje.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KUNTWELA ezansi ngezikhalazo zabasebenzi bakahulumeni abafuna ukuvunyelwa ukuthi bajoyine noma iyiphi i-medical aid kuleli, bangaphoqwa ukuba yingxenye yeGovernment Employees Medical Scheme (GEMS) kuphela ukuze baxhaswe. Isikhalazo sabo sizobhungwa ezingeni likahulumeni, njengoba abaholi bezinyunyana zabasebenzi bekhalaze kwiPhini likaMengameli wezwe, uMnuz Paul Mashatile izolo, ngokubiza kuka-GEMS, ngesikhathi evula umhlangano weNational Economic Development and Labour Council (NEDLAC), ePitoli. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi izinyunyana zamashela i-GEMS, zikhala ngokunyuswa kwemali ngo-9.5% kulo nyaka. Izinyunyana zifuna kwehliswe imali, kubuyekezwe kabusha ibhodi le-GEMS kuphinde kwenziwe uphenyo ngokusebenza kwemali kulesi sikhwama. "Abaholi bathe angiyithinte eyokunyuswa kwemali yi-GEMS. Asikayixoxi futhi asikasithathi isinqumo mayelana nodaba lwe-GEMS, lokuthi sivumele abasebenzi ukuthi bazikhethele. Bakhalile ngokuthi abasebenzi abasakwazi ukumelana nokunyuka kwemali yi-GEMS yingakho befuna ukuzikhethela," kusho uMashatile. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi abasebenzi uma bengewona amalungu ka-GEMS abalutholi uxhaso kuhulumeni njengoba lesi sikhwama sasungulelwa ukubahlinzeka ngosizo lwezempilo olungambi eqolo. Iningi labasebenzi lifuna ukuvunyelwa ukujoyina ezinye izinkampani zama-medical aids kuleli kodwa baqhubeke nokuxhaswa nguhulumeni, njengoba enza ku-GEMS. Uthe abamile bahlabela phambili neyokuqaliswa kweyomshwalense wezempilo kuleli, i-National Health Insurance. "I-NHI iwumthetho owadlula ePhalamende wasayinwa nanguMengameli. Kukhona abangeneme abayisa uhulumeni enkantolo, yinto esiyilwayo enkantolo kanti, asimile siyaqhubeka nayo." Odabeni oluthinta ukuhoxiswa koxhaso lwaseMelika, obelusiza empini yokulwa neHIV/AIDS kuleli, uveze ukuthi uhulumeni kaMnuz Donald Trump, awukayimisi unomphela imali oyifaka kulolu hlelo. "Sibheka izinhlelo zokuthi sikwazi ukuzimela singathembeli kuhulumeni waseMelika ngalolu xhaso. Sifuna ukuthi uma sekufika isikhathi sokuthi lolu xhaso lunqanyulwe, sibe sesikwazi ukuzimela." Uveze nokuthi balwa nobugebengu kuleli njengoba kujutshwe namasosha ukusiza kule mpi ezifundazweni ezigubuzelwe wubugebengu. Uthe kutshalwe nemali ezinhlelweni zokuqinisa imingcele engenela kuleli, ukuvala izimpahla ezingena kuleli ngokungemthetho. Ukhulume nangendaba yokungasebenzi kwentsha, wathi akumele kube yinto ejwayelekayo ukuthi izinga lokungatohozi liphezulu. "Kumele sihlale siyilwa eyezinga eliphezulu lentsha engasebenzi kuleli, kungabi yinto eyamukelekayo. Siyazi isimo asisihle, abanye abasebenzi abanaso isiqinisekiso ngekusasa labo lapho betohoza khona," kuqhuba uMashatile. Uncome neqhaza lezinyunyana ekulweleni abasebenzi, wathi kudingeka kubanjiswane ukulwa nesihlava sokushoda kwemisebenzi kuleli.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ILUNGU lePhalamende leRise Mzansi, uMnuz Makashule Gana, selihlabe ikhwelo kuNgqongqoshe wezoHwebo neziMboni nokuNcintisana, uMnuz Parks Tau, nophiko lwasezifundazweni olukhipha amalayisensi ezinkampanini zokugembula nge-internet (online), ukuthi balumise nse lolu hlelo. UGana uthe lezi zimvume zikhishwa kalula nanoma yikanjani, wafanisa lokhu nokuthenga uswidi esitolo. Uthe amanye amazwe anemigomo eqinile ethinta ukukhishwa kwalezi zimvume, njengoba kuleli isibalo sazo sikhule saya ku-402. Archives Lesi sibalo sikhishwe nguTau ephendula uGana obebuze ukuthi zingaki lezi zinkampani ezinemvume yokwenza lokhu kuleli? UTau uveze ukuthi zevile ku-400 kanti kwamanye amazwe zincane kakhulu. "E-Australia zibalelwa ku-200, eBrazil zingu-81 kuthi eDenmark zingu-26. Kuleli zingu-402," kusho uTau empendulweni. Uthe lesi sibalo sikhule sisuka ku-288 ngo-2020 saya ku-402 nyakenye, okusho ukuthi sinyuke ngo-40% eminyakeni emihlanu edlule. UGana uthe isibalo salezi zinkampani sicwilisa abantu ebubheni abagembula imali yabo. "Kunento engahambi kahle ohlelweni lokukhishwa kwalezi zimvume kuleli. Sifuna ukuqeda ngesihlava sokugembula esihlasele kuleli," kusho uGana. Leli qembu lisekhaleni yokulwa le mpi yokugembula okuthiwa isidlange kakhulu ngisho kwabesifazane nakwizitshudeni. Izitshudeni kuthiwa zigembula ngemali eziyithola kuhulumeni yoxhaso, esikhwameni i-NSFAS. Umbiko webhodi elengamele ukugembula onyakenimali u-2024/2025, waveza ukuthi abantu bakuleli bachitha ngaphezu kuka-R1.5 trillion ngokugembula. Le mali kuthiwa yanyuka ngo-R400 billion uma uqhathanisa nonyakamali ongaphambilini. Leli bhodi laveza nokuthi kugembula ngisho nabahola isibonelelo sikahulumeni, sakwa-Sassa. Laveza nokuthi abantu abangu-52% abangasebenzi bangene shi ekugembuleni. Abaphakathi kweminyaka u-30 no-49, okuthiwa bangenwe kulo mshungo wokugembula. Iningi labo kwathiwa abesilisa. Okunye okwavela ukuthi umgembuli oyedwa kwabahlanu, bavuma ukuthi baze baboleke imali noma badayise izinto zabo ukuze bakwazi ukuqhubeka bagembule.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Ungqongqoshe wezokuThuthukiwa koMphakathi uSisisi Tolashe uthembise ukuthuthukisa izinsiza kusebenza ukwehlisa imigqa emide kwabathola izibonelelo zikaihulumeni. INHLANGANO ekhokha izibonelelo i-South African Social Security Agency (Sassa), iveze ukuthi ayizikhokhi izibonelelo ngezimpelasonto, imiSombuluko noma ngamaholidi. Le nhlangano ithe ayizikhokhi futhi izibonelelo nangosuku lokuqala enyangeni. Ikusho lokhu ngemuva kokudedela uhlu lwezinsuku zokukhokhwa kwezibonelelo kuze kuphele lo nyaka, kulandela ukuvumelana noMnyango kaMgcinimafa. I-Sassa ithe ngaso sonke isikhathi ikhokha izibonelelo ngokwehlukana kwezinsuku. "Kuqale kukhokhwe isibonelelo sabantu abadala, kulandele esabaphila nokukhubazeka, bese kugcina esesondlo sabantwana. Uma kwenzeka usuku lokukhokhwa kwesibonelelo lungempelasonto noma ngeholidi, imali iyoze ingene ngosuku olulandelayo," kusho i-Sassa. I-Sassa iveze lokhu njengoba ngenyanga ezayo kuzoba namaholidi ePhasika kuleli. Iveze ukuthi isibonelelo sabadala sizoholwa ngoLwesine, u-Ephreli 2, 2026. Esabaphila nokukhubazeka siholwe ngemuva kwePhasika, ngo-Ephreli 7. Kuzobe sekulandela esabantwana esidume ngeqolo esizoholwa ngo-Ephreli 8. I-Sassa imemezele nezindaba ezimnandi kwabahola izibonelelo njengoba zizonyuka kusuka ngenyanga ezayo. Ukunyuswa kwezibonelelo kumenyezelww nguNgqongqoshe wezeziMali, uMnuz Enoch Godongwana, ngesikhathi ethula isabelomali sezwe ngoFebhuwari, ePhalamende. Isibonelelo sabadala nesabaphila nokukhubazeka, sizonyuswa ngo-R80 siye ku-R2 400. Esamasosha sizonyuka siye ku-R2 420. I-Foster Care izonyuka ngo-R40, ibe ngu-R1 290, kanti imali yeqolo izonyuka ngo-R20, ibe ngu-R580. I-Sassa inxuse ukuthi abantu bangajahi ukuyokhipha imali ngoba uma isikhona ngeke isaya ndawo. Iyalele nalabo abazoba nenkinga yokungayitholi imali ukuthi bangalindi kodwa banikele emahhovisi alolu phiko ukuze bathole izizathu zokungaholi. Okunye okugcizelelwe ukuthi kumele baqikelele ukuthi imininingwane yabo iyiyona kanti bangashayela enombolweni ethi: 0800 60 10 11 ukuze basizakale. ISassa iqinisekise izinsuku zokuthola izibonelelo ngenyanga ka-Ephreli 2026

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: BEKUHLOBISWA kahle amabhokisi anamathambo abalandwe emazweni ase-Europe abafihlwe izolo, eNorthern Cape Image: X/PresidencySA IMINDENI iphethe amabhokisi anamathambo ezihlobo abuyiselwe kuleli esuswa eHunterian Museum, eNyuvesi yaseGlasgow eScotland, nakwiZiko Museum. Angcwatshwe kabusha izolo, eNorthern Cape Image: X/PresidencySA UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa useyalele amazwe ase-Europe, ukuthi abuyise konke okungamagugu akushaqa kuleli ukuze ayokwenza ngakho ucwaningo aphinde akugcina emanyuvesi nasezindaweni ezigcina amagugu kulawo mazwe. URamaphosa uthe bakufuna konke kubalwa namathambo ambiwa abantu kwayobukiswa ngakho emhlabeni. "Sifuna yonke into eyashaqwa ngezikhathi zakudala, kwayiswa emazweni e-Europe ukuze kuyogcinwa kuphinde kwenziwe nocwaningo. Kwambiwa kungafanele amathambo abantu ukuze kuyobukiswa ngakho ezindaweni ezigcina amagugu kulawa mazwe. Siwafuna wonke la magugu ngoba ngawethu, abuyele kuleli ngoba angumlando oveza ubuthina," kusho uRamaphosa. Ukusho lokhu izolo, ngesikhathi kungcwatshwa kabusha amathambo abangu-63, besizwe samaKhoi namaSan, ababegcinwe ezikhungweni zemfundo ezehlukene kanjalo nasezindaweni zamagugu njengaseHunterian Museum, eNyuvesi yaseGlasgow eScotland, nakwiZiko Museum. La magugu afihlwe kabusha eKinderlê Monument, eSteinkopf, eNorthern Cape. "Umoya wabasuswa kuleli ngokungemthetho ubungakutholi ukuphumula ngoba bebegqunywe kwamanye amazwe. Bebengekho ezweni labo, eduzane nezihlobo kanjalo nezingane zabo. KwabaseScotland, ngifuna uma sebefika ezweni labo basho ukuthi ngiyaveva, ngifuna zonke izinto ezathathwa kuleli zibuyiswe. " Uthe ukufihlwa kabusha kwalawa mathambo kwenziwe ngokuhlanganyela koMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko kanjalo ne-South African Heritage Resources Agency neZiko Museums. "Inhloso yokwenza lokhu ukuhlonipha bonke abalwela amalungelo kuleli. Kumele sibahloniphe ngokuthi sibangcwabe ngendlela enenhlonipho. Lokhu sikwenza siqhakambisa nenyanga yamaLungelo aBantu." Uthe ababethatha amagugu akwamanye amazwe bawayise emazweni abo, babeqhutshwa nawubandlululo. Uveze nokuthi useyalele uNgqongqoshe wezemiDlalo, uMnuz Gayton McKenzie, ukuthi aqale uhlelo lokubuyisela emuva enye yezinyoni yaseZimbabwe. "Kufike ithimba ebelivela eZimbabwe, lifuna enye yezinyoni okuthiwa yathathwa umholi owayevela eBritain, uMnuz Cecil John Rhodes (owayephethe iCape Colony), owashaqa le nyoni okuthiwa igcinwe eGroote Schuur. Le nyoni bathe yayiwuphawu lwabo njengabantu baseZimbabwe, kanti sebayayifuna ukuthi ibuyele ezweni labo. Ngiyalele uMcKenzie ukuthi asheshise uhlelo lokuthi ibuyiselwe emuva le nyoni ngoba zonke izinto ezingamagugu zakwamanye amazwe ezebiwa, kumele zibuyiselwe emuva." Uthe yingakho nabo befuna wonke amagugu ebiwa kuleli ngoba asho lukhulu kubantu bakuleli. USihlalo weSouth African Heritage Resources Agency, uNksz Elodie Tlhoaele, uthe kufihlwa kabusha amathambo ambiwa ngokungemthetho ayiswa kwamanye amazwe ukuze kuyokwenziwa ucwaningo. "Sibuyisa isithunzi sabantu bakuleli lapho abebegcinwe khona besetshenziswa njengombukiso ezikhungweni zemfundo nakuma-museum. Sivikela wonke amagugu akuleli kanti siyawabuyisa ukuze afihlwe ngendlela enenhlonipho."

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Umnyango wezasekhaya ukhala ngabantu abangabalandile omazisi ISIKHULU soMnyango wezaseKhaya KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Cyril Mncwabe, sesinxuse abashaya omazisi bagcina ngokungabalandi, ukuthi babalande njengoba beduve emahhovisi abo. UMncwabe uthe bevile ku-100 000 omazisi abangalandiwe emahhovisi ehlukene esifundazweni. Uthe bakhuluma nothishanhloko bezikole, kanjalo nezinhlaka ezehlukene ukuze bahlabe umkhosi wokuthi kulandwe omazisi abaduvile. "Kusuka ngoDisemba 2025, bangu-105 878 omazisi abangalandiwe emahhovisi ethu. Sinemikhankaso ehlukene okubalwa nokuya emisakazweni, ukunxenxa abantu ukuthi balande omazisi," usho kanje muva nje ekhuluma ekomitini lasePhalamende.
