Kulo mhlangano kuvele ukuthi abaneminyaka engu-15 kuya ku-35, yibona abaningi kakhulu kwabangabalandile omazisi. "Kumahhala kulabo abaqalayo ukushaya omazisi abakhokhi nhlobo. Kunomazisi abadala abaluhlaza nabo abangalandiwe kwamanye amahhovisi. Asisabashayi omazisi abadala kodwa bakhona abangalandiwe emahhovisi ethu." Ngokombiko othulwe emhlanganweni, babalelwa ku-5 000 omazisi abaluhlaza abangalandiwe emahhovisi ehlukene. UMncwabe uveze nokuthi basemkhankasweni wokuhambela izikole ukuze abafundi abaseminyakeni yokuthi bavote, bathole ithuba lokushayelwa omazisi. "Kunamaloli ahambela izikole ukuze kushayelwe abafundi omazisi. Sisebenzisana noMasipala weTheku, lapho kuhlonzwa khona izikole ezinabafundi abadinga ukushayelwa omazisi. Abanye abafundi balethwa emahhovisi aseMngeni, njengoba kunamavolontiya aya emphakathini ahlonze abafundi abadinga omazisi," usho kanje. Uveze nokuthi kunamabhange abantu abangaya kuwona ukuyoshaya omazisi okuyibhange iFNB enxanxatheleni yezitolo iCornubia, Nedbank eDurban North kanjalo naseStandard Bank egatsheni iKingsmead, eThekwini. Kwenzeka lokhu nje ikhomishini yezokhetho izovula ithuba ngempelasonto yangoJuni 20 no-21, 2026, ukuze abantu babhalisele ukuvota okhethweni. Phezu kokuba lungakamenyezelwa usuku lokhetho, kodwa kulindeleke ukuthi lube phakathi kukaNovemba noJanuwari ngonyaka ozayo. Ikhomishini iveze ukuthi bangaphezu kuka-200 000 abantu ababhalisele ukuvota kusuka ngoMashi nyakenye kuya kuMashi kulo nyaka. Kulaba abangu-132 092 babhalise besebenzisa uhlelo lobuchwepheshe, kanti abangu-128 113 babhalise emahhovisi ekhomishini. Abantu abasha yibona abanesibalo esiphezulu sababhalisile ngalesi sikhathi. Ikhomishini inomkhankaso wokuhambela izikole, lapho ifundisa khona abafundi ngokuvota iphinde ibagqugquzele ukuthi bavote. Ayigcini ngokuhambela izikole kodwa ibuye ivakashele nasezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme, lapho inxenxa khona izitshudeni ukuthi zibhalisele ukuvota.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Kuhlangene izimbangi ngolweGems IHLANGANISA izinyunyana zabasebenzi bakahulumeni, impi yokulwa nokunyuswa kwemali okwenziwe yi-Government Employees Medical Scheme (GEMS). Lezi zinyunyana zamashela i-GEMS ngokunyusa imali ngo-9.5% ekuqaleni konyaka. Abalesi sikhwama babala inkohlakalo, ukunyuka kwezindleko kanjalo nokukhokha imali ephezulu bekhokhela amalungu e-GEMS ngosizo lwezempilo, njengesizathu esenza banyusa imali. I-GEMS yaqala yanyusa imali ngo-9.8% ekuqaleni konyaka, yehla emuva kwezikhalazo zabasebenzi yaya ku-9.5%. Izinyunyana zifuna kwehliswe imali okunyuswe ngayo kuphinde kwakhiwe kabusha ibhodi lale nhlangano. UMnuz Simon Hlungwani osekomitini elilwa nokunyuswa kwemali ngaphansi komfelandawonye wezinyunyana iCosatu, uveze ukuthi bazitholile izimpendulo emva kokuhambisa uhlu lwezikhalazo emashini eyayibhekiswe kwi-GEMS. "Simatasa sibhunga ngezithinta lezi zimpendulo nomnyakazo olandelayo esizowenza ukufaka ingcindezi yokuthi kwehliswe imali. I-GEMS ifuna ukuthi kube nomhlangano ekupheleni kwenyanga," usho kanje. Uthe omunye umnyakazo abawenzayo ngukuhlwaya izeluleko zomthetho ngokuphoqa i-GEMS ukuthi igobe uphondo. "Abameli bethu baphezu kodaba, bayalusebenza kumanje. Sixhumana nezinye izinyunyana ezingekho ngaphansi kweCosatu mayelana nalolu daba," usho kanje. Unxuse amalungu ukuthi angadikibali kodwa aqhubeke aqinise impi ebhekiswe ekunyusweni kwemali. Ngeledlule i-GEMS idalulele iPhalamende ukuthi iphenya amacala evile ku-400 enkohlakalo avulelwe odokotela nabanye abahlinzeka ngosizo lwezempilo. La macala athinta ukusebenzisana kwamalungu alesi sikhwama nalaba abahlinzeka ngosizo lwezempilo. I-GEMS ikhale ngokuthi ngonyaka, ilahlekelwa phakathi kuka-R3 billion kuya ku-R9 billion ngenxa yenkohlakalo, ukuxhashazwa nokusetshenziswa budlabha kwe-medical aid. Isikhulu esibhekele inkohlakalo kwi-GEMS, uMnuz Ishmael Mohapi, sithe nyakenye baphenye abahlinzeka ngosizo lwezempilo abangu-399, abaxebule umkhoma imali engu-R1.3 billion kulesi sikhwama nyakenye uwodwa. "Sivule amacala angu-413 emaphoyiseni eminyakeni edlule, uphenyo luhamba ngolonwabu. Sesikwaze ukubuyisa imali engu-R11.7 million ebuyele kulesi sikhwama," sisho kanje. Ngonyaka, i-GEMS ithe ichitha u-R67 billion ikhokhela izindleko ekubeni amalungu ekhokha ngonyaka u-R65 billion. "Ziphezulu izindleko ezikhokhelwa odokotela, izibhedlela ezizimele kanjalo nongoti. Ngaleyo ndlela bekumele sinyuse imali ukuze sihlangabezane nezindleko ezinyukayo minyaka yonke," sisho kanje. UNgqongqoshe weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi, waveza ukuthi wakuchitha ukunyuswa kwemali okwenziwa yi-GEMS. UButhelezi wathi akuyena ogunyaza ukunyuswa kwemali kodwa kwenziwa yibhodi le-GEMS. I-GEMS iveze ukuthi ziyaqhubeka izingxoxo nezinyunyana zabasebenzi ngokunyuswa kwemali.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: GCIS / Phando Jikelo UKHALE ngezingozi zomgwaqo ezidlula nabantu abevile ku-12 000 minyaka yonke kuleli, uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, athe bafuna ukuzehlisa eminyakeni ezayo. URamaphosa okusho lokhu ngesikhathi evula ingqungquthela yezokuthutha eGoli, izolo, uthe uma kuphazamiseka imigwaqo kulahleka u-R1 billion emnothweni ngosuku. "Sihlela ukulehlisa inani lezingozi ezidlula nabantu abevile ku-12 000 minyaka yonke. Sihlela ukuzehlisa ngohhafu lezi zingozi ngonyaka u-2030." Uthe imigwaqo iyona engenisa inzuzo njengoba izimpahla eziningi zihanjiswa ngayo. "Imikhankaso efana nokujuba abezomthetho emigwaqweni emikhulu kuleli, ithela izithelo njengoba sesiqala ukwehla isibalo sezingozi. Ngonyaka odlule, sehlile isibalo sezingozi uma uqhathanisa neminyaka emihlanu edlule," usho kanje. Uphakamise ukuthi kusungulwe umkhandlu wezokuthutha njengoba u-69% wezimpahla kuleli, zithuthwa ngomgwaqo. "Asidingi ukuthi silahlekelwe u-R1 billion ngosuku ngenxa yokuphazamiseka emigwaqweni. Sidinga ukuqinisa kwezinye izinto zokuthutha okubalwa amaguzu athwala impahla." Uthe umkhandlu uz0ohlanganisa zonke izinhlaka kubalwa uhulumeni, osomabhizinisi kanjalo nezinye izinhlaka. "Kungaheha abatshalimali, kwehlise nezindleko zokwenza ibhizinisi uma sinezokuthutha ezithuthukisiwe. Ezokuthutha zibaluleke kakhulu emnothweni wezwe nakubantu jikelele." Uveze ukuthi kungakheka namathuba emisebenzi kuphinde kugqugquzele ezokuvakasha. "Abalimi bakwazi ukuhambisa imikhiqizo yabo besebenzisa ezokuthutha. Kuhanjiswa nezinto ezimbiwa phansi ziyiswe kwamanye amazwe kusetshenziswa ezokuthutha." Uveze ukuthi amanye amazwe atshala imali ekuthuthukiseni ezithinta izitimela ezithwala impahla kanjalo nezithinta amachweba. "Izikhukhula nokuguquka kwesimo sezulu kucekela phansi ingqalasizinda yezokuthutha. Sidinga ukwakha ezokuthutha ezizohambisana nokuguquka kwesimo sezulu," kusho uRamaphosa. Uveze nokuthi imboni yamatekisi ithutha u-80% wabantu kuleli kanti iyona enkulu eyenganyelwe ngabantu abamnyama. "Sisebenzisana nemboni yamatekisi nababolekisa ngemali, ukuze abanikazi bamatekisi bakwazi ukubolekwa imali. Ezokuthutha kumele zifake uwonke wonke kuleli." Ubuye waveza nokuthi ezinye zezinto ezihanjiswayo kuleli zihamba olwandle wabuye wathi akumele ukuya kwamanye amazwe ase-Afrika, kuthathe isikhathi eside uma kuhanjwa ngamabhanoyi.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: abokufika bengena evenini yamaphoyisa Image: eThekwini Municipality UYAQINA umkhankaso wempi yokulwa nabantu bokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho njengoba KwaZulu-Natal, abasePakistan nabaseMalawi kuyibona abanesibalo esiphezulu, abaphindiselwa emazweni abo. Lokhu kuvezwe yisikhulu esiphezulu eMnyangweni wezaseKhaya KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Cyril Mncwabe, otshele ikomiti lasePhalamende, ukuthi abavela kula mazwe yibona abanesibalo esiphezulu abababuyisela emazweni abo. UMncwabe uthe sevile ku-3 000 isibalo sabakuleli ngokungemthetho abababuyisele emazweni abo emakoteni amathathu edlule onyaka. "Bangu-948 abakuleli ngokungemthetho esibathatha sibashiye emingceleni eyakhelene nesifundazwe, ukuze babuyele emazweni abo. Abangu-2 141 sibasusa eKZN, sibayise koLindela eGauteng, ukuze babuyiselwe emazweni abo," usho kanje. UNksz Hlengiwe Mkhaliphi ilungu lePhalamende elimele i-EFF, libuze ukuthi abakumaphi amazwe abantu ababuyiselwa emuva. "Ngibuza ngoba ngifuna ukwazi ukuthi akugxilwa kuphela kubantu abamnyama, abanye bashiywe ngaphandle." UMncwabe ukuqinisekisile ukuthi isibalo esiningi sabababuyisela emuva, abadabuka ePakistan naseMalawi. Uveze nokuthi bazokwandisa isibalo sabasebenza ophikweni lwabokufika eMnyangweni. UMnuz Sihle Ngubane weMKP ufunde uhlu lwezikhalazo ezivela kubasebenzi besifazane abasebenza ophikweni olubhekele abokufika. "Bakhala ngokuhlukumezeka, ukungahlinzekwa ngezinsiza ezifana nozankosi nama-pepper spray ekubeni besuke behambisa abokufika besilisa ezinkantolo. Bakhala ngokuthukwa, bahlukunyezwe nangakwezobulili baphinde bangaphephi uma behambisa laba besilisa abangokufika," usho kanje. UMncwabe uthe bakhona nabesilisa abane abasebenza kulolu phiko ehhovisi laseMngeni, eThekwini. "Sizokwandisa abasebenzi abangu-10 kulolu phiko, cishe ezinyangeni ezimbalwa ezizayo sizobe sesisandisile isibalo sabasebenzi ukuze kwehle umthwalo. Abokufika esibashiya emngceleni eyakhelene nesifundazwe, basuke bevela eLesotho naseSwaziland," kusho uMncwabe. Umqondisi jikelele eMnyangweni, uMnuz Tommy Makhode, uthe udaba lwezikhalazo zabasebenzi besifazane eMngeni, yinto abangayithatheli phansi bewuMnyango. Kulo mhlangano kubuye kwavela izikhalazo ngezinkinga emahhovisi ahlukene oMnyango. Phakathi kwezikhalo yindaba yokungabi sesimweni esihle sokusebenzela kulawa mahhovisi, abantu ababamba olayini eMnyango bashiswe yilanga baphinde banethwe yimvula, kanjalo nabahamba amabanga amade uma beyoshaya omazisi eJozini. Kuvele ukuthi amanye alawa mahhovisi okubalwa elisePinetown naseMgungundlovu, kunezinselelo osekuneminyaka zibikwa ngawo. EMgungundlovu kukhalwe ngokuthi abantu babamba olayini emnyango ngoba kushoda indawo. IPhini likaNgqongqoshe eMnyangweni, uMnuz Njabulo Nzuza, livumile ukuthi kunezinselelo eseziqede iminyaka zikhona kwamanye amahhovisi okubalwa nelasePinetown. "Ngaziyela mathupha emahhovisi asePinetown, ngo-2021, sathenjiswa ukuthi maduzane azoyiswa kwesinye isakhiwo. Kwaba nezinkinga kwagcina kungenzekanga. Mhlawumbe sekumele sizifunele mathupha amahhovisi njengoMnyango, njengoba lo msebenzi wenziwa uMnyango wezemiSebenzi kaHulumeni," usho kanje. Uthe uMnyango wakhe iwona okhokha irenti emahhovisi aqashiwe, ayikhokhwa wuMnyango wezemiSebenzi kaHulumeni. Usihlalo wekomiti lezaseKhaya, uMnuz Mosa Chabane, ukhwele wadilika eMnyangweni wezemiSebenzi wathi akumele uthi uyazazi zonke izinkinga okukhalwa ngazo kodwa kumele uzilungise ngoba zineminyaka zibikwa. Uthe amanye amahhovisi ayingozi kubantu kanjalo nakubasebenzi ngenxa yokungabi sesimweni. Kugqugquzelwe ukuthi kusetshenziswe amabhilidi kahulumeni ngoba omastende abazimele bayagoloza ukulungisa amabhilidi aqashiwe.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UBUKEKA usekude ukuphela umdonsiswano wasezinkantolo wokumiswa ukushicilelwa kwemiphumela ka-matric emaphephandabeni. Lo mbango uphakathi koMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo nenhlangano i-Information Regulator (IR). I-IR iyaphikisana nokuthi kushicilelwe le miphumela emaphephandabeni, ekubeni uMnyango umile ekutheni uyaqhubeka nokushicilela imiphumela ngoba abanye abafundi basuke bekude nezikole uma kukhishwa imiphumela ekuqaleni konyaka. Kulindeleke ukuthi iNkantolo eNkulu yaseGoli, inqume kuleli sonto mayelana nokuthi iyavumelana ne-IR, ukuthi idlulise isinqumo senkantolo efanayo sanyakenye, esachitha isicelo sale nhlangano mayelana nokuthi le miphumela ingabe isashicilelwa emaphephandabeni. Muva nje, le nkantolo ilalele izethulo zabameli boMnyango nabe-IR ngalolu daba. I-IR ikhala ngokuthi ukushicilelwa kwemiphumela emaphephandabeni kubeka engcupheni ulwazi lwabafundi ngaphansi komthetho i-Protection of Personal Information (POPIA). Phezu kokuba uMnyango waveza ukuthi ushicilela le miphumela usebenzisa kuphela izinombolo zokubhala kwabafundi, hhayi amagama nezibongo zabo kodwa i-IR yathi lokhu kuyafana nokudalula ulwazi lwabafundi. I-IR ifuna ukuvunyelwa yile nkantolo ukuthi isidlulisele phambili isinqumo sayo sokuthi lolu daba luyolalelwa eNkantolo yezokuDluliswa kwamaCala. Uma le nkantolo igcina ivumile ukuthi i-IR isidlulisele phambili lesi sinqumo, lokho kuyosho ukuthi udaba oluthinta i-POPIA luzobhekwa kabusha yile nkantolo. Okwamanje isinqumo sokushicilelwa kwemiphumela emaphephandabeni simile. I-AfriForum yahlanganyela noMnyango enkantolo njengoba ihambisana nesinqumo sawo sokuthi uqhubeke nokushicilelelwa kwemiphumela emaphephandabeni. Sekuneminyaka kubangwa lolu daba lwemiphumela emaphephandabeni. Phambilini, kwakushicilelwa amagama nezibongo zabafundi emaphephandabeni kodwa kwagcina kushintshiwe emuva kwengcindezi yokuthi lokhu kwenza abanye babafundi bazibulale uma bengaziboni emaphepheni. Lokhu kwenza uMnyango wanquma ukuthi ugcine usushicilela izinombolo zokubhala zabafundi.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ABASEBENZI abayingxenye yeCosatu abamashele ukunyuswa kwe-GEMS ezindaweni ezehlukene KUPHENYWA amacala evile ku-400 enkohlakalo avulelwe odokotela nabanye abahlinzeka ngosizo lwezempilo ngabesikhwama esihlinzeka ngosizo lwezempilo kubasebenzi bahulumeni, i-Government Employees Medical Scheme (GEMS). La macala athinta ukusebenzisana kwamalungu alesi sikhwama nalaba abahlinzeka ngosizo lwezempilo. Lokhu kuvezwe yizikhulu zalesi sikhwama izolo, ngesikhathi zivele ngaphambi kwekomiti loMnyango weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha, ePhalamende. I-GEMS ikhale ngokuthi ngonyaka, ilahlekelwa phakathi kuka-R3 billion kuya ku-R9 billion ngenxa yenkohlakalo, ukuxhashazwa nokusetshenziswa budlabha kwe-medical aid. Isikhulu esibhekele inkohlakalo kwi-GEMS, uMnuz Ishmael Mohapi, sithe nyakenye baphenye abahlinzeka ngosizo lwezempilo abangu-399, abaxebule umkhoma imali engu-R1.3 billion kulesi sikhwama nyakenye uwodwa. "Sivule amacala angu-413 emaphoyiseni eminyakeni edlule, uphenyo luhamba ngolonwabu. Sesikwaze ukubuyisa imali engu-R11.7 million ebuyele kulesi sikhwama," sisho kanje. UMohapi uthe bayaqhubeka nokuvula amacala njengoba bebika abahlinzeka ngezempilo emikhandlwini ebalawulayo. "Sisebenzisa ubuchwepheshe ukuze silwe nenkohlakalo ngoba kunzima ukuhlonza inkohlakalo njengoba kuba nokusebenzisana phakathi kwabezempilo namalungu e-GEMS. Sizofundisa namalungu ngendaba yenkohlakalo nokuxhaphaza i-medical aid." Isikhulu sezimali kulesi sikhwama, uNksz Karyna Van Lingen, sithe ukunyuka kwezindleko ezikhokhelwa amalungu alesi sikhwama yikhona okwenze kwanyuswa imali ekhokhwa amalungu  yabangu-9.5%. Sithe ngonyaka, i-GEMS ichitha u-R67 billion ikhokhela izindleko ekubeni amalungu ekhokha ngonyaka u-R65 billion. "Ziphezulu izindleko ezikhokhelwa odokotela, izibhedlela ezizimele kanjalo nongoti. Ngaleyo ndlela bekumele sinyuse imali ukuze sihlangabezane nezindleko ezinyukayo minyaka yonke," sisho kanje. Izinyunyana zabasebenzi bahulumeni zamashela i-GEMS zifuna yehlise ukunyuswa kwemali, kuxoshwe ibhodi lalesi sikhwama kuphinde kwenziwe uphenyo ngemali ekhokhwayo amalungu aleli bhodi. Amalungu ePhalamende azwelane nabasebenzi bahulumeni, abakhala ngokunyuka kwemali abayikhokhayo selokhu kuqale unyaka. UNksz Sixolise Gcilishe, ilungu lePhalamende, lithe kumele kukhonjwe indlela amalungu ebhodi ukuze kuqokwe azolalela abasebenzi. "Kumele kufakwe ibhodi elisha elizolalela izikhalazo zabasebenzi. Aniwacabangeli amalungu ngokunyusa imali kangaka ekubeni abasebenzi bahulumeni benganyuselwa ngisho nomholo ngo-10%." Elinye ilungu, uNksz Gugulethu Mchunu, likhale ngokuthi amalungu ahlale ekhala ngokungagunyazwa ukuthi ayolala ezibhedlela ngoba imali kuthiwa kayikho. UNksz Reneilwe Pholwane, ilungu lePhalamende, lizwakalise ukucasuka ngokuthi i-GEMS inyuse imali. "Iyangijulukisa indaba yokuthi ninyuse kangaka imali. Anibacabangeli abasebenzi abavele bathwele kanzima." UNgqongqoshe weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi, waveza ukuthi yakuchitha ukunyuswa kwemali okwenziwa yi-GEMS. UButhelezi wathi akuyena ogunyaza ukunyuswa kwemali kodwa kwenziwa yibhodi le-GEMS. I-GEMS iveze ukuthi ziyaqhubeka izingxoxo nezinyunyana zabasebenzi ngokunyuswa kwemali.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMENGAMELI we-ANCYL uCollen Malatji LUMISE zonke izingqungquthela uphiko lwentsha lwe-ANCYL KwaZulu-Natal, njengoba lumatasa nezinhlelo zokulungiselela umgubho ozohanjelwa wuMengameli we-ANC nezwe, uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa. Lolu phiko luveze ukuthi lumatasa namalungiselelo okunxenxa intsha, ukuthi ihambele imashi ezoba ngempelasonto, yokuvikela inkululeko yakuleli. Esitatimendeni uVukayibambe uveze ukuthi umatasa nezinhlelo zomgubho weminyaka engu-114, kwasungulwa i-ANC, ozohanjelwa nguRamaphosa ozoba kulesi sifundazwe. "Ngenxa yezinhlelo ezehlukene eziqhubekayo, kumiswa zonke izingqungquthela zezifunda ze-ANCYL esifundazweni. Zizomiswa kuze kube isigungu esiphezulu sesifundazwe, siyazanelisa ngokuthi sezingabanjwa izingqungquthela kuzona zonke izifunda," kusho isitatimende. Sinxuse ukuthi kube nokubambisana emalungwini ngenxa yalesi sinqumo. Kwenzeka lokhu nje akucaci ukuthi izohlala nini ingqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi be-ANC kulesi sifundazwe njengoba kunethimba lesikhashana elibhekele isifundazwe. UVukayibambe uveze nokuthi usuqale uphenyo ngokuziphatha kukanobhala wale nhlangano, uNksz Lulama Mabude. Uthe lesi sinqumo sathathwa emhlanganweni owawungoFebhuwari 21, 2026. "Kulo mhlangano isigungu esiphezulu sanquma ukuthi kuphenywe ngendlela aziphatha ngayo uNksz Mabude, okubandakanya nokuphula imigomo yenhlangano. Isigungu sesifundazwe saphakamisa ukuthi amiswe esikhundleni kanti wanquma ukuzihoxela kulesi sikhundla kuze kuphothulwe uphenyo," kusho isitatimende. Isitatimende siveze ukuthi ihhovisi lePhini likaSihlalo, uNksz Phindile Mdanda, selimnikile uhlu lwamacala uNksz Mabude kanti uyalelwe ukuthi avele phambi kwekomiti lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe. "Njengoba emisiwe nje, ngeke aze ayimele i-ANCYL kuze kukhishwe isinqumo. Siyakwamukela ukuthi uzihoxele ezintweni ezithinta inhlangano kuze kuphume isinqumo. Ukumiswa kwakhe akusho ukuthi yingoba enecala kodwa yindlela yokuthi kungabi nokuphazamiseka kophenyo." Le nhlangano iveze ukuthi uMnuz Siyabonga Mzenda, uzobamba esikhundleni sikanobhala. Ithe umsebenzi kule nhlangano uyaqhubeka.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMQONDISI jikelele eMnyangweni weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uMnuz Mathanzima Mweli, uhlabe ikhwelo ezikoleni ukuthi zabe othisha ngokwezifundo abagogode kuzona. UMweli uthe kunenkinga yokushoda kothisha ezifundweni ezithile kwezinye izikole, ekubeni kugcwele othisha abafundisa izifundo ezizodwa. Uthe kubalulekile ukuthi uma kwabiwa othisha, babiwe ngokwezifundo abagogode kuzona emanyuvesi. "Uthola ukuthi kushoda uthisha ozofundisa isifundo sezolimo, kodwa isikole sigcwele othisha abafundisa izilimi. Lokhu kwenza ukuthi kugcine sekuthathwa omunye wothisha ongabe ufundisa izilimi, afakwe ukuthi afundise ezolimo ekubeni engenalwazi ngalesi sifundo," usho kanje. Ukusho lokhu ephendula amalungu ePhalamende, kulandela isikhalo sokuthi kunothisha abafundisa izifundo abangenalwazi ngazo. Usihlalo wekomiti lezemfundo, uNksz Joy Maimela, uthe bahambele izikole ezehlukene bafike bahlangabezana nenkinga yothisha abangazi lutho ngezifundo abazifundisa nsuku zonke. Uthe kwezinye izikole, bafice othishanhloko befundisa ngenxa yokushoda kothisha. "Kwezinye zezikole imiphumela ibingemihle, uma sibuza satshelwa ukuthi yingoba akekho uthisha ogogodile ofundisa leso sifundo. Le nto yandile ezikoleni zethu, kanti umnyango kumele uyisukumele." Nelungu le-EFF uMnuz Mandla Shikwambana, lihambe emazwini kaNksz Maimela, lathi le nkinga yande kakhulu ezikoleni. "Akukhona nje ukuthi othisha abagogodile ekutheni bangafundisa, inkinga wukuthi bafundisa izifundo abangazazi kwabona. Lokhu kudalela abafundi inkinga ngoba bafundiswa ngabantu kwabona abangazi." UMweli uthe bayazama ukuyixazulula le nkinga ngokuthi bajube othisha abafundiswa wuhulumeni, ngaphansi komfundaze iFunza Lushaka. Nokho ukhale ngenkinga yemali, eyenza bangakwazi ukubaqasha labo thisha. "Sigcina sesibadedela ukuthi bahambe bayozifunela umsebenzi noma sibaxhase ngokubafundisa ngoba singenazo izikhala zokubaqasha. Ngokomthetho kumele ngabe siyabaqasha bonke kodwa asikwazi ngenxa yemali," kusho uMweli. Kulo mhlangano kuvele ukuthi babalelwa ku-10 000 othisha abafundiswa ngalo mfundaze, kodwa bangu-2 662 kuphela abaqashiwe. Okunye okuvelile wukuthi iminyango yezifundazwe ibhekene nenkinga enkulu yokungakwazi ukuvala izikhala zabasebenzi ngenxa yemali. Kuphinde kwanxuswa iminyango yezifundazwe ukuthi iyisebenzise yonke imali esuke yabelwe yona ikakhulu eyengqalasizinda ngoba izikole eziningi zisesimeni esingesihle. IPhini likaNgqongqoshe womnyango, uDkt Reginah Mhaule, likhale ngokwanda kwesibalo sabafundi minyaka yonke, eyenza kugcwale kuchichime emakilasini. "EGauteng nje kulo nyaka, kufike abafundi ababalelwa ku-100 000 abasha, abebengekho nyakenye. Bekumele lo mnyango wakhe izikole ezicela ku-30, ukuze ukwazi ukwamukela lesi sibalo. Yinto engeke yenzeke le ngenxa yemali. Asikwazi ukungabamukeli laba bafundi nakuba kuzogcwala emakilasini."

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KUZOPHELA amahlathi okucasha kubashushisi abafaka unyawo lwedada uma kushushiswa amacala njengoba inhloko yophiko lwezokushushisa, iNational Prosecuting Authority, u-Advocate Andy Mothibi, ithembise ukubhekana nabo. UMothibi obekhuluma okokuqala nabezindaba izolo selokhu aqokwa kulesi sikhundla, uthembise ukusiphula inkohlakalo kulolu phiko. Uthe uthole imibiko yokuthi kunabashushisi abangenelelayo baphazamise ukushushiswa kwamacala. "Sifuna umphakathi ubuyelwe yithemba ophikweni lwezokushushisa. Abashushisi kumele bashushie amacala ngaphandle kokwesaba nokwenzelela," usho kanje. Uthe bazogcwalisa nezikhala ezibalulekile kulolu phiko ukuze kusheshiswe uhlelo lokushushiswa kwamacala. "Sizosebenzisa nobuchwepheshe ukusheshisa amacala. Liphezulu izinga lobugebengu kuleli kodwa kuhamba kancane ukushushiswa kwamacala nokukhishwa kwezigwebo." Uveze nokuthi bazogxila emacaleni athinta inkohlakalo, ubugebengu obuhleliwe, nenzeka ngesikhathi sobandlululo kuleli. Ubalule nokuthi ufuna baqaphe ngelokhozi okwenzeka kumakhomishini ahlukene kuleli okubalwa nekaMadlanga, ukuze uma kuphuma izincomo bahlale izithonto kulabo okumele bashushiswe. Elinye icala athe balibheke ngelokhozi, elokubulawa kowayengunozinti we-Orlando Pirates neBafana Bafana, uSenzo Meyiwa, elisaqhubeka namanje enkantolo. "Angu-292 amacala okungakakhishwa izigwebo kuwona. Yingakho siyibeke eqhulwini eyokuphothulwa ngokushesha kwamacala." UMothibi uthe ngeke bawashiye ngaphandle amacala okuhlukunyezwa kwabesifazane. "Njengoba lesi sihlava sesithathwa njengenhlekelele, sizofaka izinsiza ukushushisa amacala athinta ukuhlukunyezwa kwabesifazane. Namacala okubulala, nawokudlwengula ngeke asale ngaphandle ezintweni eziseqhulwini." Uthe bafuna lolu phiko luzimele ngasemalini nangendlela olusebenza ngayo, wathi sebexoxile noNgqongqoshe wezobuLungiswa owesekayo lo mbono. Uveze ukuthi uma kususwa izibhamu ezingekho emthethweni, lokho kungasiza empini yokulwa nobugebengu obuhleliwe. "Sihlanganile noKhomishana wamaphoyisa, ukuze izinhlelo zethu nezamaphoyisa zihambisane. Lezi zinhlelo zbandakanya ukuhlonza amacala ukuze asheshe ashushiswe." Uthe bazoqhubeka bathungathe ababalekela umthetho ukuze kubuyiswe imali edliwe kungafanele. "Ngizokwenza umsebenzi wami ngokwethembeka, akukho okungivimbayo ukuthi ngenze lokhu."

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KUNTWELA ezansi ngenkinga yokuhlinzekwa kwamanzi kuleli njengoba uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, ethembise ukuthi kuzophela le nyanga selibunjiwe ithimba elizobhekana nale nkinga. URamaphosa okusho lokhu ephendula imibuzo ePhalamende izolo, umemezele ukusungulwa kwethimba elizobhekana nenkinga yokuhlinzekwa kwemiphakathi ngamanzi, azoba ngusihlalo walo. "Uyaqhubeka umsebenzi wokuqhamuka nohlelo oluzosetshenziswa ukubhekana nenkinga yamanzi nokubunjwa kwethimba elizobhekana nale nkinga. Lo msebenzi kulindeleke ukuthi uphothulwe ekupheleni kukaMashi, nonyaka," kusho uRamaphosa. Iseqhulwini kuRamaphosa eyokulungiswa kwenkinga yokugqoza kokuhanjiswa kwamanzi njengoba eveze nokuthi mkhulu umsebenzi osuwenziwe eThekwini ukulungisa le nkinga. "Amapayipi ahambisa amanzi asemadala, kudingeka ilungiswe ingqalasizinda yamanzi. Asizosinisa mahleza, abahlulwa umsebenzi wokuhambisa amanzi ngeke sinanaze ukubakhomba indlela, sifake abantu abazokwenza umsebenzi," usho kanje, wathi kubalulekile ukuthi umphakathi uthole amanzi. Uveze nokuthi ngeke kuvikelwe muntu ozokhonjwa ngokwenza okungafanele yiKhomishini kaMadlanga, ephenya izinsolo zenkohlakalo kwezobulungiswa kubalwa nasemaphoyiseni. "Akukho ukwenzelela okuzoba khona kwabakhonjwe yikhomishini noma kungathiwa ngubani. Sifuna bashushiswe nalabo okuyotholakala ukuthi bayathinteka ezenzweni zenkohlakalo." Uthe wajuba ibamba likaNgqongqoshe wamaPhoyisa uSolwazi Firoz Cachalia, noKhomishana wamaPhoyisa uGeneral Fannie Masemola, ukuthi basungule ithimba elizophenya okuvela amagama abo kwikhomishini. "Kungaba yingozi ukudedela umbiko wekhomishini njengoba isaqhubeka. Kumele sinike ithuba nofakazi abangakaveli kuyona futhi bangabi madolonzima ukuya kuyona," kusho uRamaphosa njengoba kunabakhala ngokuthi akakawudedeli umbiko wokuqala wekhomishini, awuthola ngoDisemba nyakenye. Ubalule nokuthi bayaqhubeka neyomshwalense wezempilo, iNational Health Insurance (NHI), phezu kokuba kukhona abaye enkantolo beyophikisana nalokhu. "Ezinye zezikhungo zezempilo azikho esimeni esihle, kudingeka zilungiswe. Asijiki ekutheni eyalo mshwalense kumele iqhubeke ngoba izosiza abantu bakuleli." Umholi we-EFF uMnuz Julius Malema, ubuze ukuthi ngabe uyakweseka yini ukuthi imitholampilo ivulwe ubusuku nemini. "Ngiyavumelana nalesi siphakamiso, inkinga wukuthi kumele kube nabasebenzi okubalwa abahlengikazi nodokotela. Abantu bahlale bekhala ngokuthi lezi zikhungo azivulwa. Inkinga kuzoba yimali, okuyinto esizama ukuyilungisa."

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Izitshudeni eziswele indawo yokuhlala emanyuvesi KUHLUKENE imibono emalungwini ePhalamende, ngesiphakamiso se-EFF sokuthi kujutshwe ikhomishini ezobhekana nenkinga yaminyaka yonke yokushoda kwezikhala zokufunda ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme. Leli qembu likhala ngokuthi izinkumbi zabafundi eziphase u-matric, zigcina sezibhuquza emakhaya ngenxa yokushoda kwezikhala. UMnuz Sihle Lonzi, ilungu le-EFF, ukhale ngokuthi bangaphezu kuka-600 000 abafundi abaphasa u-matric, kodwa amanyuvesi akwazi ukwamukela ababalelwa ku-235 000 kuphela. Uthe amakolishi amakhono amaTVET, akwazi ukwamukela ababalelwa ku-170 000 kuphela. "Lokhu kusho ukuthi babalelwa ku-200 000, abagcina sebebhuquza emakhaya bengasenayo indawo yokufunda. Nango-2024 bangaphezu kuka-200 000 abafundi abangazitholanga izikhala zokufunda. Kucacile ukuthi eminyakeni emibili edlule, bacela ku-500 000 ababhuquza emakhaya ngenxa yokungazitholi izikhala," kusho uLonzi, ngesikhathi kubhungwa ngalesi siphakamiso ePhalamende. UMnuz Mnqobi Msezane weMKP, weseke i-EFF wathi abasuke bephase u-matric baphenduka ondingasithebeni minyaka yonke. "Abanye bayazithola kodwa kunezinkinga zokuthi iNSFAS abayitholi ngesikhathi. Yingakho siyeseka eyokuthi iPhalamende lingenelele kule nkinga okucacayo ukuthi nangeminyaka ezayo, izoqhubeka ngoba abahlelelwa abaphase u-matric." UMnuz Sanele Zondo we-IFP, uthe abahambisani neyekhomishini hhayi ngoba zingekho izinselelo kodwa bafuna kwandiswe izikhungo zemfundo. "Akufuqwe uhlelo lokufunda ngobuchwepheshe kusalungiswa inkinga yokushoda kwezindawo zokufundela kanjalo nezindawo zokuhlala ezikhungweni zemfundo. Mkhulu umthamo ophuma ku-matric minyaka yonke, uya ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme. Ziyashoda izikhala okwenza abasuke befuna izikhala bagcine sebejikiswa bengazitholile." UMnuz Songezo Zibi weRise Mzansi, uthe:"Le nkinga isazoqhubeka ngoba minyaka yonke siyanda isibalo sabaphasa u-matric. Yingakho kudingeka kwenziwe okuthile ukuze kunqandwe le nkinga yokuthi bagcine sebehleli emakhaya ekubeni ngabe bayafunda." UMnuz Vuyo Zungula we-ATM, uhambe emazwini kaLonzi, wathi kuyadabukisa ukuthi minyaka yonke kuba nabalala ngaphandle ezikhungweni befuna izikhala zokufunda kanjalo nendawo yokuhlala. "Uhulumeni uhluleke ukuhlelela kahle abasuke bephase u-matric ukuthi bazoyaphi. Kumele ibhungwe eyokuthi ilungiswa kanjani le nkinga esiphenduke insakavukela." UNksz Karabo Khakhau we-DA uthe abahambisani nokuthi kujutshwe uphenyo ngoba banazo izixazululo kule nkinga. "Akuxoshwe abaphethe umnyango kubalwa noNgqongqoshe wawo (uMnuz Buti Manamela). Intsha ibhuquza emakhaya ayisebenzi kanti kushoda izindawo zokufunda nokuhlala ezikhungweni zemfundo." Usihlalo wekomiti uMnuz Tebogo Letsie we-ANC, usichithile isiphakamiso se-EFF wathi babize umhlangano lapho befuna ukwazi kabanzi ngezinhlelo zokubhekana nale nkinga ngonyaka ozayo. UManamela uthe zikhona izinto abazenzayo njengokuthi kufundwe kusetshenziswa ubuchwepheshe wakhala nangokushoda kwemali ukuze kwengezwe izindawo zokuhlala nezokufundela ezikhungweni.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: INKOSI uMzamo Buthelezi UNGQONGQOSHE weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi, isiveze ukuthi yakuchitha ukunyuswa kwemali ekhokhelwa i-medical aid yabasebenzi bahulumeni, i-Government Employees Medical Scheme (GEMS). UButhelezi uthe wakuveza ezikhulwini ze-GEMS ukungahambisani kwakhe nokunyuswa kwemali ngo-9.8%. "I-GEMS yazisa izinhlaka ezehlukene enkundleni i-Public Service Coordinating Bargaining Council (PSCBC) ngoDisemba nyakenye, ukuthi izonyusa imali. Kunomgomo wokuthi kumele kuvunyelwane ngaphambi kokunyuswa kwemali," kusho uButhelezi. Ukusho lokhu ephendula umbuzo welungu le-EFF ePhalamende, uMnuz Adil Nchabeleng, obuze ukuthi ngabe kwaba khona yini ukuphikisana nesinqumo se-GEMS, esasivela kwizinyunyana zabasebenzi ngokunyuswa kwemali? UButhelezi uthe akuyena ogunyaza ukunyuswa kwemali kodwa kwenziwa yibhodi le-GEMS. "Zisaqhubeka izingxoxo phakathi kwami nebhodi le-GEMS mayelana nokwehliswa kwemali njengoba ezikhawini eziningi, ngabaxwayisa ngalokhu kunyuswa kwemali. Ukwehliswa kwemali isuka ku-9.8% iya ku-9.5%, akubanga namthelela okutheni emalini ekhokhwa abasebenzi," kusho uButhelezi. Muva nje, izinyunyana ezehlukene zabasebenzi bahulumeni zimashele i-GEMS zifuna kwehliswe imali. Zifuna nokuthi kwenziwe uphenyo mayelana nezikhulu ze-GEMS kuphinde kuchithwe nesikhulu sayo. Zanika i-GEMS izinsuku eziyisikhombisa ukuthi ziphendule izikhalazo zazo, zathi zisabheka nezinye izindlela ezingazisebenzisa, okubalwa nokuya enkantolo ukuze kuphoqwe i-GEMS ukuthi yehlise imali. Izinyunyana ezingaphansi kweFedusa, zilulele isikhathi i-GEMS ukuthi iphendule kwizikhalazo zayo. Le nyunyana ibhikishe ngoFebhuwari 21, ikhala ngokunyuswa kwemali. Nezinyunyana ezingaphansi kweCosatu zisho ngazwi linye ukuthi zifuna kwehliswe le mali. Zikhale nangokuthi iminyaka ilandelana, inyuswa kakhulu imali ekhokhwa abasebenzi ekubeni isheshe iphele nemali ezabelwa nonyaka ungakapheli. Izinyunyana zasabisa nangokuthi zizobamba ukhukhulelangoqo wesiteleka uma i-GEMS iqhubeka nokuqinisa ikhanda. I-GEMS yaveza ukuthi yanyusa imali ngenxa yokunyuka kwezindleko nemali eyikhokhile ngamalungu ayo. Yakhala nangenkohlakalo eyenzekayo njengoba yasola amanye amalungu ngokuthi alalisa izihlobo zawo ezibhedlela ezizimele, ezingekho ngaphansi kwe-GEMS.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: INKANTOLO eNkulu yasePitoli ivune umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ecaleni lokuhlanjalazwa uNgizwe Mchunu INKANTOLO eNkulu yasePitoli iphinde yavuna umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, kwelokwehliswa isithunzi ngumengameli wamabhinca, uNgizwe Mchunu izolo. UNgizwe ubevele enkantolo eyokwethula olwakhe uhlangothi ngokuthi kungani inkantolo kufanele iwushaye indiva umyalelo wayo ngokuthi kufanele axolise esidlangalaleni, angaphinde akhulume izinkulumo ezehlisa uMalema isithunzi bese ekhokha zonke izindleko zabameli. UMchunu wehlulekile ukunikeza izizathu ezizwakalayo zokuthi kungani kufanele inkantolo iguquke emyalelweni wayo wesikhashana. Inkantolo yagcina isifinyelela ekutheni lo myalelo iwenze waba ngowokugcina. Kuthiwa kufanele enze i-video axolise kuMalema bese ehoxisa akusho ngaye. Inkantolo iyalele ukuthi le video kufanele ayifake emithonjeni lapho okwavela khona lena ayehlisa ngayo uMalema isithunzi. Ibe isimyalela ukuthi akhokhe izindleko zabameli bakaMalema. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, uMchunu wayebonakale ezinkundleni zokuxhumana emasontweni edlule ethi uMalema njengoba evuna abokufika, ebeseka, yingoba uhlomula imali engango-R60 milion kwabaseNigeria abahweba ngezidakamizwa. Wamsola ngokusebenzisa amandla akhe ezepolitiki ukuvikela abokufika ababandakanyeka ebugebengwini. Ekhuluma nabezindaba ngaphandle kwenkantolo uNgizwe uthe akekho ongazi ukuthi uMalema ubehlale ebathuka abantu ngaphakathi, nangaphandle kwePhalamende. Uthe yena akaze amthuke, kodwa ubekhuluma iqiniso alaziyo. “Abasibopheke okungcono, sihlale ejele. Asingavumi uMalema asiphazamise embhidlangweni wethu wokuxosha abokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho,” kusho uNgizwe, ophinde wezwakalisa ukukhathazeka ngokubekwa kwenkosi yabaseSomalia eGoli. “Basebenzise ngisho uphawu lwethu, i-coat of arm, okuyiyona ngubo yethu yokuthandaza. Ingubungcwele bethu bokuthi ekugcineni inkululeko isifikile,” usho kanje. UNgizwe ubesekwe amabutho kanjalo nabanye abakuleli. Phakathi kwabo bekukhona noNkosikhona "Phakelumthakathi" Ndabandaba, othe babonga bonke abaphume ngobuningi ukuzokweseka uNgizwe, wathi bacela abaholi bakuleli ukuthi banake into eqondene nezwe iNingizimu Afrika. Uthe uMthethosisekelo, obhalwe ngaphakathi ukuthi iNingizimu Afrika eyawo wonke umuntu ohlala kuyo, ngaphandle ibhalwe ukuthi uMthethosisekelo waseNingizomu Afrika, okusho ukuthi okungaphakathi kukhuluma ngabakuleli. “Lokhu kusho ukuthi ikhuluma ngabantu baseNingizimu Afrika hhayi abantu bakwenye indawo. Abantu abayeke ukuhlanekezela uMthethosisekkelo wethu,” kusho uPhakela. Uqhube wathi bazokulwela ukuthi uMthethosisekelo ukusuka manje kubhekwe phambili uyashintshwa. “Ngeke sivume ukuthi uMalema athi abokufika abangenamaphepha, abenzelwe amaphepha ngoba nakhu yena evikela ibhizinisi lakhe elingaphandle kwezwe esingazi ukuthi lisemthethweni yini njengoba sizwa kuthiwa bakha ugwayi ongekho emthethweni,” kusho uPhakela. Usole uMalema ngokuthi ufike athi abantu abazithathele umhlaba, uma sebekwenzile lokho, kuphinde kuthunyelwe inkampani yakhe yonogadla iyobabhidlizela Uthe njengoba abokufika bezibeka beba amakhosi, yingoba bezwa amanzi ngobhoko. Abebekhaphe uNgizwe, bebehambe becula iculo elithi: “UMalema uyadelela, akashaywanga.”

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Image:  Fusz Photography/pexels.com UFUNA kuthathelwe abama-ambulensi izinyathelo umndeni waseCongo, eNanda, kulandela ukufa kosana lwawo ngenxa yokubambezeleka kanjalo nobudedengu babasebenzi bezimo eziphuthumayo. Usana obelunamasonto ayisikhombisa luzelwe, uSqiniseko Nxumalo, lushonele esibhedlela sikahulumeni iMahatma Gandhi Memorial, ePhoenix ngo-Ephreli 29. Ngokusho kukanina, uNksz Lindokuhle Nxumalo, izinkinga eziholele ekushoneni kwendodana yakhe eyiwele, zaqala ngayizolo, ebona ukuthi ayiphilile, waya emtholampilo wendawo. Uthe wafika khona ngo-9 ekuseni, wangawubamba ngisho nolayini ngoba wayebona isimo sendodana yakhe ukuthi sibi. “Abahlengikazi bamxilonga ngo-9.30, maqede bathi asingabe sisagoduka. Bambizela i-ambulensi eyayizosithatha isidlulisele esibhedlela iMahatma Gandhi,” kusho uNksz Nxumalo. Uthe bahlala kwaze kwaba yileyo ndaba, ingabonwa nangokhalo i-ambulensi. “Yaze yafika ngo-4. Nakhona yafika ingawuphethe umbhede wezingane ezisuke zizalwe singakafiki isikhathi. Kwaphoqa ukuthi ijike, iyowulanda. Nokwathi uma isibuya okwesibili, kwatholakala ukuthi awushajiwe umbhede,” kusho uNksz Nxumalo. Uthe kwaphela esinye isikhathi usashajwa kwazise usana lwalungeke lulaliswe kuwo ubanda. Uthe esibhedlela bafika ngo-6,kwathi uma bebonwa abahlengikazi nodokotela masinyane, bakhala ngokuthi kungani usana lulethwe sekuhambe isikhathi ngoba lusesesimeni esibucayi. “Wayeseqale ukudlikiza, into eyayikade ingamenzi ekuseni, njengoba mina ngangimhambise emtholampilo ngisola ukuthi unomkhuhlane,” usho kanje. Nebala uthe indodana yakhe kwayenela ekuseni ngakusasa, abahlengikazi baphinde baveza ukuthi lokhu kube wumphumela wokuthi usana lulethwe sekudlule isikhathi. Uthe ukhona umhlangano ababe nawo nezikhulu zasemtholampilo, ezazihlangula, zathi iphutha akulona elazo njengoba zona zayibiza ngesikhathi i-ambulensi ngezikhathi zasekuseni kodwa yona yafika ilanga seliyozilahla kunina. “Abesibhedlela nabo bazihlangulile, ngelithi indodana yami yafika ezandleni zabo isivele isisesimeni esibucayi kakhulu,” kusho uNksz Nxumalo. Uthe emhlanganweni ababe nawo batshelwa ukuthi iyinhlekelele indaba yama-ambulensi esifundazweni. Wathi batshelwa ukuthi iTheku jikelele linangu-40, kodwa kuwona, kusebenza angu-26, wonke lawa amanye afile. “Mina ngifuna kube khona ozothathelwa izinyathelo kwabama-ambulensi. Nginomuzwa wokuthi bangenzele phansi ngokufika sekwedlule isikhathi baphinde benza nobudedengu bokungawuphathi umbhede wezingane,” kusho uNksz Nxumalo. Uveze eyokuthi umhlengikazi awafonela abama-ambulensi wagcizelela ukuthi lo mbhede awuphathwe futhi ushajwe ngoba isiguli esiyiswa esibhedlela yingane ezalwe ngaphambi kwesikhathi. “Okwenza bafike emva kwesikhathi mina angikwazi futhi angikwazi nokwadala ukuthi bafike bengawuphethe kuthi noma sebewulandile bangawushaji,baze baphoqeleka ukuthi balindwe besawushajile,” usho kanje.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UKUNGACACI kokuthi idokodo lisezandleni zikabani, kuholele ekutheni lihlehliselwe uLwesithathu oluzayo, icala lokubulawa ngesihluku kowesilisa waseKoffee Farm, KwaNdengezi. UMnuz Kholwani Cele (34) kuthiwa washaywa waze wafa, isidumbu sakhe sabelethiswa itshe, sase siyophonswa emfuleni uMngeni. Wayegcine ukubonwa ephila ngo-Okthoba 23, nyakenye, ephuma emsebenzini, egoduka. NgoJanuwari nonyaka, kwaqale kwaboshwa umakhelwane, uMnuz Sibongiseni Johannes Mbhele, kwase kulandela kamumva abasolwa ngokuthi wayebambisene nabo enza icala, oMnuz Bongumusa Mkhonto noMnuz Sboniso Phungula, nabo abangabendawo. Izolo, uMbuso wenze isicelo sokuthi lihlehliswe icala ukuze kuqhutshekwe nophenyo. Phakathi kwalo, kuvele ukuthi idokodo lecala alikho phambi kwenkantolo futhi akuqondakali ngokugcwele ukuthi likuliphi ihhovisi. Kuvele ukuthi ngesikhathi lihlehla icala phambilini, nakhona lalingekho idokodo, kwavela ukuthi likudokotela ohlola ingqondo. Kwathiwa kulindeleke ukuthi abhale umbiko, awengeze edokodweni emva kokuhlola isimo somqondo kaMbhele. Phambilini, kwakukade kuphume umyalelo wokuthi ayohlolwa ingqondo kulandela ukuvela kolwazi lokuthi wake wathikamezeka eminyakeni eminingi edlule. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi lo mbiko noma umphumela wokuhlolwa kwakhe awukaze ubuye ukuzokwethulwa enkantolo ukuthi udokotela wamhlola maqede wathola umphumela othini. Imantshi, uNkk Wendolyn Robinson, ibe isilihlehlisela uLwesithathu oluzayo icala. Abasolwa bathamele icala ngohlelo lwe-video bengaphakathi ejele laseWestville, abezanga siqu sabo eNkantolo yeMantshi yasePinetown. Umndeni kamufi nakuba ukhombise ukumangala ngendida yokuthi idokodo liphi, uthe awukabi nazo izikhalazo ngecala, usazoqhubeka nokulokhu uza enkantolo ukuzolethamela. Umufi njengoba ayeduke ebuya emsebenzini ngo-Okthoba nyakenye, kuphele izinyanga ezintathu ethathwa njengomuntu odukile. Uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lwagcina luvundulule ukuthi umakhelwane wakhe, uMbhele, wuye onesandla ekudukeni kwakhe. Kuthiwa wagonyuluka, washo nokuthi bambulala bayomphonsa emfuleni. Emva kwengonyuluka yakhe, umndeni namaphoyisa wabe usuya endaweni yesigameko lapho wafike wathola khona isidumbu sikamufi, sase zingcwatshwa ngesizotha. Waveza ukushaqeka ngokuthi uMbhele wuye ongumsolwa wokuqala ecaleni, wathi babejwayelene kakhulu nomufi, ehlale efika ekhaya labo ukuzomvakashela. Nokho baveza ukuthi emva kokunyamalala kwakhe, kwaba khona isikhathi lapho kuthiwa noMbhele unyamalele, nokwaba yinto eyabamangaza ukuthi usedukiswa yini kodwa kwangaba bikho osola ukuthi usebalekela ukuthi "uyathinteka" ekufeni kukamufi. Izinsolo zokuthi umufi kukhona ayekuhlanganisa nomkaMbhele umndeni wazichitha, ngelithi wayengumuntu owayezihlonipha, engeke alenze ichilo lokuthi agange nenkosikazi yomuntu. Bathi banethemba lokuthi uma icala seliqhubeka, uMbhele uyosiveza isizathu sangempela esamenza wabulala umufi.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNKSZ Nobukhosi Zulu odukile UZWA ubuhlungu obuphindiwe owesifazane wasePanikeni, eMariannhill, eThekwini, njengoba sekuyophela unyaka ebambe ngamazinyo abazukulu abathathu bendodakazi engekatholakali namanje nokusolwa ukuthi yenzakaliswa umastende (69) oyisangoma ngoJuni nyakenye. Kulesi sigameko okusolakala ukuthi senzeka ngasekuqaleni kukaJuni nyakenye, kwanyamalala ngendlela engaqondakali uNksz Nobukhosi Zulu (34) nendodakazi eyayinezinyanga ezingu-18. Ngokuthola komndeni, bagcina ukubonwa behamba nomastende, betshethe izikhwama, besuka emqashweni oseSunshine khona eMariannhill. Unina kaNksz Zulu, uNksz Thandazile Ngcobo (52), utshele Isolezwe ukuthi yena wathintwa yisoka lendodakazi, limbuza ukuthi ukhona yini ekhaya njengoba sekwenzeke okungajwayelekile, ukuthi bangabikhona emqashweni isikhathi eside. Uthe emva kokulandula, isoka labuyela emqashweni ukuyobuzisisa kahle ukuthi wanyamalala washonaphi nokuyilapho khona bathola ukuthi mhla begcina ukubonwa, babehamba nomastende. “Iziqashi zaseluleka ngokuthi asihlale silinde ukuphela kukaJuni, sibone ukuthi ababuyi yini ngoba ujwayele ukuzothatha imali ye-rent njengoba ayengumuntu ohlala eMgungundlovu. Yaphela inyanga, lutho ukuqhamuka,” kusho uNksz Ngcobo. Uthe yilapho abathola khona inombolo kamastende, bamfonela bambuza ukuthi uphi iNksz Zulu nengane, wabaphika wathi akabazi. Uthe babe sebenikela emaphoyiseni ukuyobika isehlakalo, kwavulwa idokodo lokulahleka komuntu. “Sathi sisabheke uphenyo lwamaphoyisa, kwavumbuka olunye ulwazi lokuthi ubonakale efika eNdwedwe nengane encane, wathi uma ebuzwa, wathi umzukulu wakhe,” kusho uNksz Ngcobo. Uthe lezo zindaba zashaqisa ngisho nendodakazi yakhe umastende njengoba yaphumela obala yathi unina akanamzukulu. Uthe yabe isicela abaseNdwedwe ukuba bathumele isithombe sengane efike nonina maqede wayibiza ngomzukulu. “Yilapho okwathi uma kuthunyelwa khona isithombe, kwatholakala ukuthi umzukulu wami onezinyanga ezingu-18. Kwathi uma amaphoyisa eya emzini wakhe oseMgungundlovu, nebala amfica umzukulu wami ephila,” kusho uNksz Ngcobo, othe indodakazi yakhe yayingabona nangokhalo. Uthe ngisho esebuzwa umastende ukuthi uphi uNksz Zulu, wamphika wathi akamazi. Kuthiwa ngesikhathi ebuzwa ukuthi kwenzeke kanjani ukuthi ingane yakhe itholwe kuye uma engamazi, wangundaza. Kuvela ukuthi zabe sezimkhalela lapho, yize umnyakazo ngecala ungakaze ucaciswe emndenini kamgilwa. “Kube yimuva nje, lapho ngithintwe khona umphenyi omusha, ongitshele ukuthi leli cala lizongena maduze enkantolo, angibeke phansi umoya,” kusho uNksz Ngcobo. Uthe kuze kube yimanje ubuthongo akabazi kwazise ngeke alikhombe ithuna lendodakazi yakhe, athe uzwa egazini ukuthi yabulawa. “Ngisola ukuthi wayibulala ingane yami, wenza ngayo imithi njengoba kuthiwa uyisangoma. Ngisho nezihlobo zakhe zamchaza njengowesifazane ongalungile,” usho kanje. Uthe akufisayo ubulungiswa, kujeziswe lona wesifazane ngesenzo sakhe, bese egonyuluka ukuthi indodakazi yakhe wayigqiba kuphi. Ubike olunye usizi, wathi izingane ezintathu kwezine zikamgilwa akanamandla okuzikhulisa, ucela usizo. “Endala (15) ihlala kubo kayise, lezi ezinye ezintathu okukhona kuzo eneminyaka emibili, eyisithupha kanjalo neyishumi, zihlala nami. Zingabazukulu bami, akukho lapho ngingaziyisa khona kodwa ngiyasizwa. Ngelinye ilanga sike silale singadlile, kungekho engizokupheka,” usho kanje. Uthe lokhu kuyazikhahlameza izingane naye ngokunjalo njengoba esengumuntu wamaphilisi, kwazise waqalwa ukugula emva kokunyamalala kwendodakazi ngendlela engaqondakali. Uthe kubazukulu kukhona ongenaso isitifiketi sokuzalwa, wathi ababili basanda kuba nazo, osekusilele ukuthi enze imizamo yokubabhalisela isibonelelo sabantwana sikahulumeni. “Noma iluphi usizo ngingalujabulela. Ngihluphekile, enyameni nasemphefumulweni ngiguliswa ukuthi indokakazi yami yanyamalala ngendlela engaqondakali kahle, ngapha nginokhwantalala lokuthi kunabazukulu okufanele ngibakhulise,” usho kanje. UNKSZ Nobukhosi Zulu odukile

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNOBHALA jikelele weNatu, uMnuz Mathenjwa Mabija I-NATU isizwakalise ukukhathazeka ngokusonga izandla koMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal ekubeni kuqhubeka ukungabi bikho kozinzo esikoleni uMkhumbane Secondary eChesterville, eThekwini. Lokhu kuza emva kokuvalwa kwesango lesikole ngengidi engaziwa, maqede kwabhalwa imiyalezo eyehlukene ezingqwembeni ezinanyathiselwe esangweni ngoLwesithathu. UNobhala jikelele weNatu, uMnuz Mathemba Mabija, ubehambele lesi sikole ngoLwesine, ukuyohlola isimo. Uthe ufike wathola ukuthi isimo asigwinyisi mathe futhi konke okulokhu kwenzeka kunomthelela omubi kubafundi kanjalo nakothisha. Uthe ngokubuka kwabo, umnyango uluyekelele ngamabomu udaba lwalesi sikole. “Kuthikamezeke ukufunda othisha abangu-22 beyeka ukufundisa. Ziphelile manje izinyanga ezintathu uMnyango ungenzi lutho ngalolo daba,” kusho uMabija. Uthe kufanele ngabe uMnyango wenza into eyodwa, ungenelele ngokubuyisa labo othisha noma uqashe ngokugcwele laba abayitoho, abafika bezolekelela idlanzana elingatelekanga ukuthi kuqhubeke ukufundisa. Ugcizelele eyokuthi ukulaxaza kothisha ukufundisa kwakungayamene nodaba lokufakwa kwamakhamera kodwa kwakudlalwa nje ipolitiki. Uphathe eyokumiswa kukathishomkhulu obekhona uMnuz Ntokozo Ngobese ngaphandle kwesizathu esiphathekayo. “Njengoba bethule, bamatasa babheka amacala abazombeka wona njengoba leya ncwadi eyayimmisa yayingasibaluli isizathu sokuthi umiselwani. Kusobala icala abazombheca ngalo uMnyango usalicinga,” kusho uMabija. Uthe akekho uthisha ongadinwa eyokufakwa kwamakhamera esikoleni ekubeni isizathu sokuthi kwenzelwa ezokuphepha sacaciswa. Uthe kuyabakhathaza ukuthikamezeka kokufunda ngoba sekusondele izivivinyo zaphakathi nonyaka. Ube eseveza ukuthi emva kokuxoxisana nothisha abebesesikoleni bakuvezile ukuthi ukungabi bikho kozinzo sekuholele ekutheni iningi libe nokhwantalala. “Kukhona uthisha ositshele ukuthi uke wathatha ikhefu lokugula lesonto lonke. Uthe bekuqala ukuthi angabi bikho isikhathi eside kanje esikoleni selokhu afika kulesi sikole,” usho kanje. Ubuye waveza nokuthi uyishayele ucingo inhloko yoMnyango, uMnuz Nkosinathi Ngcobo, efuna ukwazi ukuthi uMnyango ukephi nezinhlelo zokulungisa isimo. “Uthe udaba lulungiswa ezingeni lesifunda. Ngithe uma ngimbuza ukuthi isifunda sesimlethele ziphi ezakamuva maqondana nokungenelela kwaso, wangena ezintangeni. Kuvele kwangicacela ukuthi abenzi lutho ngalolu daba,” kusho uMabija. Izinxushunxushu ziqale ngasekupheleni kukaJanuwari nonyaka othisha abangu-22 benyunyana iSadtu belaxaza ukufundisa, bethi bafuna kukhishwe amakhamera emakilasini. Kwasuka esinamathambo, abazali beshaya phansi ngonyawo, bethi amakhamera awayi ndawo ngoba lesi sikole sinenkinga yokugqekezwa, kwebiwe impahla efana nezitulo emakilasini. Abazali bagcina bezitholela othisha abayitoho, kulabo abasanda kuthola iziqu zobuthisha eNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, ukuthi baqhubeke nokufundisa. Kwabe sekumiswa uNgobese izinyanga ezintathu ngelithi kukhona ukungaziphathi kahle akwenza okungahlobene nodaba kwamakhamera. Abazali baze bafika eNkantolo eNkulu yaseMgungundlovu, beyolwa olwamakhamera njengoba uMnyango wase ukhiphe umyalelo wokuthi awakhishwe. Inkantolo yafike yavuna abazali ngelithi awangakhishwa. UNobhala jikelele weSadtu esifundazweni, uNksz Nomarashiya Caluza, ethintwa ukuba aphawule, akatholakalanga, ucingo lukhale, lwaze lwathula. Kuthintwa okhulumela uMnyango wezeMfundo esifundazweni uMnuz Mlungisi Mtshali uthe akekho esifundazweni ngakho akanalo ulwazi olugcwele ngokwakamumva eMkhumbane. Nokho uthe uvumile ukuthi uMnyango uyazi ngesimo esiqhubekayo. “Iyasikhathaza kakhulu siwuMnyango ngoba ilimaza imfundo yezingane,” usho kanje.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: USASHAQEKILE namanje umndeni wowesilisa waseThokazi, KwaNongoma, okuthiwa ushaywe womunye wesilisa ngequpha, washona, kubangwa eyokukora amagoli amaningi. Kulesi sigameko okuthiwa senzeke eMajomela, KwaNongoma, ngoLwesine olwedlule, kushone uMnuz Phumlani Dlamini (24). Ngokusho kukadadewabo, uNksz Qinisile Dlamini, isigameko senzeke sekuhlakazekwa emva kokuphela komdlalo umufi abeyidlala okuthiwa ibiphakathi kwesikole iMthombowesizwe High kanjalo neNongoma LoveLife Youth Centre. “Kuthiwa uhlaselwe abafana abambalwa okuthiwa wayekade exabane nabo ngempelasonto ende yokuqala kukaMeyi. Kuthiwa iqembu ayepikwe kulo, iMjiva yayikade idlala neqembu lalaba bafana esingalazi igama lalo, yena wase ekora amagoli ayisithupha,” kusho uNksz Dlamini. Uthe bezwa kuthiwa abasolwa ababediniwe yilawa amagoli, bazama ukumxakazisa khona lapho kodwa balanyulwa, kwahlukanwa. “Njengoba sebephinda bezomhlasela ngoLwesine. Ngosuku abulawe ngalo kuthiwa waqale washaywa ngoyedwa nenqindi, balanyulwa. Kuthe kusabhekwe lokho, waphinde washaywa owesibili, ngayo inqindi, wavele wawa, wadlikiza, wase ethula,” kusho uNksz Dlamini. Uthe umsolwa esebona ukuthi umlimazile umufi, wakhumula ibhande engalweni wamshaya ngalo. “Asazi noma wayesezama ukumvusa noma wayemqedela,” usho kanje. Uthe bayasola ukuthi ibhande elalifakwe umsolwa lalinomuthi onzima, owaholela ekutheni akwazi ukubulala umufi ngenqindi. "Kubuhlungu ngoba umfowethu ubengesiye umuntu wodlame. Ubekhonze ukuzihlekela futhi ezithandela ibhola. Indaba yokuthi aphume ekhaya eyodlala ibhola bese sifikelwa umyalezo wokuthi usebulewe enkundleni yemidlalo, isizwise ubuhlungu obukhulu,” kusho uNksz Dlamini. Uthe abakutholile ukuthi kwakudlalelwa isiteki, abangasazi ukuthi esamalini. Uthe umyalezo bawuthola ngomunye ayehambe naye ukuya ebholeni, kwathi uma befika, bathola sekufike namaphoyisa, eseqinisekisile ukuthi useshonile. UMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uNksz Mbali Shinga ubezovakashela umndeni kamufi izolo. Esitatimendeni esithunyelelwe abezindaba ukududuza umndeni, abangani nomphakathi waKwaNongoma, uNksz Shinga uzwakalise ukushaqeka nokuphatheka kabi ngesigameko. “Isigameko siyisikhumbuzo esibuhlungu sokuthi kufanele kugqugquzelwe indaba yokuxazulula ukungaboni ngaso linye ngendlela enokuthula ikakhulukazi kubantu abasha abazibandakanya kwezemidlalo,” kusho uNksz Shinga. Uthe ngale kokuyokhalisa umndeni kamufi, bazophinde bawuhlinzeke ngosizo lokwelulekwa ngokomqondo kulandela isigameko. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, uthe amaphoyisa aKwaNongoma abophe owesilisa oneminyaka engu-19 ngecala lokubulala kulandela isigameko sokubulawa kowesilisa. “Ushaywe washona ngoMeyi 7, 2026 KwaMajomela,” kusho uSerg Ngcobo. Uthe umsolwa uvele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaKwaNongoma ngoMsombuluko.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: NKOSINATHI Emmanuel Mzobe USEZE wonda nasemzimbeni owesifazane waseMthebeni, eNdwedwe, kulandela ukuphela kwezinyanga kwanyamalala indodana yakhe eyayisebenza njengonogada enkampanini yezimoto ezithwala imali. Ngokusho kukaNkk Joyce Mhlongo, indodana yakhe, uMnuz Nkosinathi Emmanuel Mzobe (36) yalahleka ngoDisemba 24 nyakenye. Elandisa ngesehlo uthe kwakungemuva kukaKhisimusi, ethola ucingo kowesifazane angamazi, owazethula njengesinqandamathe sikaMzobe, wathi umphathele umyalezo wokuthi ulahlekile. “Wangitshela ukuthi ufonelwe abangani bakhe (uMzobe), bemazisa ukuthi umjondolo wakhe osezakhiweni zase-Uganda eSiphingo, sekuphele izinsuku uvaliwe. Uthe owesifazane wamtshela ukuthi abangani bamtshela ukuthi bona bamgcine ngoDisemba 24, 2025, kade behleli naye khona e-Uganda,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Uqhube wathi waya khona ngakusasa, bahamba nowesifazane bayobika ngomuntu odukile emaphoyiseni aseSiphingo agcina ebadlulisela kwawaseMlaza, nokuyilapho bagcina bebika khona ngempumelelo. Uveze ukuthi abangani, athe wawanikwa amagama abo, abakaze bamthinte ukuze baziveze emndenini ukuthi babazana noMzobe. “Ngikhathazwa nawukuthi kungani bengezanga bazochaza ukuthi waphelelaphi njengoba kuyibo ababegcine ukubonakala naye,” usho kanje. Ukhale ngendlela amaphoyisa asingethe ngayo udaba, ethi wagcina kunezinhlelo zokuthi amaphoyisa azohloma imibuzo isinqandamathe kanjalo nabo abangani, okwagcina kungenzekanga. Uphinde wakhala ngokungalukhombisi uzwelo ephoyiseni elajutshwa ukuthi liphenye udaba. “Sagcina sesingasaboni ngaso linye, selingisola ngokuthi ngilifundisa umsebenzi walo uma nginemibuzo ngophenyo. Lokhu kwangizwisa ubuhlungu ngoba alibukhombisanga ubuntu, futhi alizange libe nesihe kimina ngingowesifazane ophithanelwe yikhanda ngokulahlekelwa yindodana ngendlela engaqondakali,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Uthe nangesikhathi sekushintshe uhlelo lokuthi ngeke abahlanu besaphoswa imibuzo, yena akaze aziswe ngalolo guquko. Uthe bekusinda kwehlela nangesikhathi kufanele kuyiwe emakhazeni kahulumeni ezindaweni ezehlukene, ukuyocinga ukuthi isidumbu sikaMzobe asikho yini kulezo ezisuke zilethiwe kuthiwa ezabangaziwal. Ubuye wathi umphenyi ubevele angabi khona, akhale ngokuba matasatasa ngamanye amacala abalulekile, yena agcine ezihambela yedwa. “Abasemakhazeni bebeze bangitshele ukuthi akuvumelekile ukuthi ngize ngedwa, kufanele ngiphelezelwe umseshi. Ngangisemakhazeni asePhoenix ngesikhathi umseshi efonelwa osebenza khona, wamtshela ukuthi umatasa yena,” usho kanje. Udalule ukuthi okunye  akuthola wukuthi emsebenzini wayegcine ngoDisemba 23, kanti ngakusasa wavuka waya emagaraji adayisa izimoto, ngenhloso yokuthenga eyodwa, ayezoza ngayo ekhaya. “Umzala wakhe okwathi uma esethola ukuthi ulahlekile, naye wathuka wacishe woma ethi ubenaye kanye nesinqandamathe sakhe ngesikhathi eyobheka imoto ayezoyithenga,” usho kanje. Uthe ngesikhathi sekugqekezwa emjondolo wendodana yakhe, akukho okusolisa ukuthi yahlaselwa phakathi, izimpahla zayo eziningi zazikhona futhi zihleli kahle. “Ngisho nomfaniswano wakhe womsebenzi wawukhona,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Uthe iselula yayilokhu ivalekile uma bezama ukuyifonela kodwa abakuqaphelayo wukuthi akhona amalungu omndeni athunyelwa imiyalezo engaqondakali emva kukaKhisimusi. “Sisola ukuthi kwakungabantu abase beyithathile iselula yakhe,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo, othe lonke lolu lwazi waludlulisela emaphoyiseni kodwa akukho akwenza ngalo. Uthe akangabazi ukuthi kukhona okubi okwehlela indodana yakhe kwazise yayingesiye umuntu ovele asuke anyamalale nje. “Ukunyamalala kwakhe kunesandla somuntu. Ngangifisa ukuthi amaphoyisa abathathe laba abahlanu ayobaphosa imibuzo, mhlawumbe ukhona umkhondo ongavela. Ngiphatheke kabi ngokungalutholi usizo ngokunyamalala kwengane yami. Bengimkhulu ngomzimba, sengize ngancipha ngaba mncane,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Unxuse noma ubani ongaba nolwazi abikele amaphoyisa aseduze ngoba unesifiso sokuthola ithambo lendodana yakhe ukuze azidelise. Uthe indodana inendodakazi (14) abaqale bayifihlela ukuthi uyise udukile, nokho bagcina beyitshela, bebona kuhamba isikhathi bengawutholi umkhondo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uNksz Zinhle Simphiwe Mchunu KUVUKE umunyu emndenini wowesifazane okuthiwa wabulawa yisoka, lamgqiba ngepotimende ngoNovemba nyakenye, ngesikhathi iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal yedlulisela iziqu zakhe emndenini emcimbini wokwethweswa kweziqu wezitshudeni obungoLwesihlanu, eThekwini. Isidumbu sikaZinhle Simphiwe Mchunu (23) waseRoosboom, eMnambithi, owayenza unyaka wokugcina ezifundweni zobuthishela kule nyuvesi, satholwa sigqitshwe ngepotimende ethuneni  eduze kweflethi elalihlala isoka lakhe kwa-C, eMlaza, ngoDisemba 20, 2025. Ngesikhathi kutholwa isidumbu kwase kuphele inyanga edukile, njengoba kuthiwa wagcina ukubonwa ephila ngoNovemba 23, 2025. IKHADI elinomyalezo kanjalo nezimbali iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal ebilibhalele unina kamufi, kwanikwa umndeni ngosuku lweminyezane Udadewabo, uNksz Nolwazi Mchunu, utshele Isolezwe ukuthi siqale phansi sabhibha isilonda sokubulawa ngesihluku kukamufi. “Ngizwe usizi ngesikhathi kubizwa isitshudeni ebesiphambi kwegama lakhe ohlwini lwezitshudeni ebezithweswa iziqu, sasukuma, sayithweswa iziqu zaso. Kwathi uma sekubizwa elakhe, kwangasukuma muntu, kwaze kwazosukuma esinye ezimenyezwe emva kwakhe,” kusho uNksz Mchunu. Uthe yilapho ubuye khona ngamandla umuzwa wokuthi konje udadewabo akasekho emhlabeni futhi wabashiya ngendlela enesihluku. Uthe emva komcimbi, babizelwe eceleni bamukeliswa iziqu zikamufi, kanjalo nezimbali nekhadi ebelinomyalezo inyuvesi ebiwubhalele unina, inyuvesi imduduza isibili. Uthe unina kamufi akakwazanga uphumelela kulo mcimbi njengoba ewumuntu osebenzela kude. Uthe kubafikele emcabangweni yabo ukuthi ngabe ujabule into engachazeki umufi ukube lesi sikhathi sifike esadla anhlamvana. Uthe wayengumuntu ophokophelele phambili futhi enethemba lokuthi nakanjani ikusasa lakhe lizoqhakaza njengoba enza izifundo esikhungweni semfundo ephakeme. “Ngabe ubesezokhuluma eyokuthi ufuna umsebenzi ngoba iziqu zakhe usezitholile,” usho kanje. Uthe ubungakabi khona umnyakazo otheni ngecala njengoba namanje lingakaqali ukuqulwa. Uthe lisalokhu lihlehliswa eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseMlaza, kanti umsolwa, uMnuz Themba Xaba (24), usalokhu etoke ejele ngengoba engadedelwanga ngebheyili. Ngesikhathi kwenzeka isigameko, kuthiwa umufi - owayeseqedile ukubhala izivivinyo zokuphela konyaka wokugcina enyuvesi - wahamba endaweni ehlala abafundi ePinetown, ewumuntu oyovakashela isoka lakhe eMlaza. Kusolakala ukuthi baba nengxabano, umsolwa wambulala, wase emgqiba ngepotimende. Kuthiwa esembulele, wazenza umuntu ocela ukufuniswa yena, ebhala nasezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi isinqandamathe sakhe sidukile, siphume sahamba ebusuku emva kwengxabano. Umndeni waba nemibuzo ngesikhathi usufika eflethini likamsolwa, ubuza ukuthi uma ezihambele, uhambe kanjani ebusuku washiya iselula nesikhwama semali, esasizomsiza akwazi ukukhokha imali yokugibela yala ayeya khona? Emva kokungagculiseki komndeni ngophenyo lwamaphoyisa olwamthatha umsolwa, wayophonswa ngemibuzo, maqede wadedelwa, kuthiwa akukho okuphathekayo okukhomba ukuthi uyathinteka, umndeni waziqashela umphenyi ozimele, owavundulula ukuthi empeleni umsolwa unesandla. Phakathi kolwazi olwatholwa umphenyi ozimele, olokuthi ngezinsuku okwanyamalala ngazo umufi, umsolwa wake waboleka amathuluzi okumba umgodi kumasitende wakhe, wathi kukhona afuna ukukwenza. Kwathi uma sekuphenywa eduze kweflethi, kwatholakala ithuna elingashoni lapho umsolwa ayegqibe khona umufi ngepotimende, kwabe zimkhalela kanjalo. ABOMNDENI kaZinhle Simphiwe Mchunu waseMnambithi obulawe ngonyaka edlule bemukela iziqu zakhe e-UKZN ngoLwesihlanu

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: KWEHLE izinyembezi kuThembisani Mntungwa othweswe iminyezane ephethe isikibha esinomyalezo wokukhumbula unina osanda kushona SIKHETHE ukukhumbula unina ongasekho ngokuthi sinyukele esteji sabagqokiswa iminyezane siphethe isikibha esibhalwe umyalezo ngokushona kwakhe, isitshudeni saseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, ebesithweswa iziqu ngoLwesihlanu. UThembisani Mntungwa okhulele eMalukazi, ngaseSipingo, uthweswa iziqu zeBachelor of Social Science in Criminology and Forensic Studies nje, akukapheli nezinyanga ezimbili unina, uNksz Nondumiso Mntungwa (40), amshiyile emhlabeni. Isikibha abesiphethe esinesithombe sikanina besikhombisa ukuthi uhambe emhlabeni ngoMashi 21, nonyaka. Besibhalwe umyalezo othi: “Umuntu obehlale engigqugquzela ukubadlula bonke. Njengamanje usuyingelosi engigadile. Mama uyisizathu ngilana namuhla.” Elandisa ngokushona kukanina, uthe kushiye esikhulu isikhala. “Ngifisa sengathi ubekhona ukuthi siwujabulele ndawonye lo mzuzu. Sasiwuhlelele, saxoxa ngokuthi sizowubungaza kanjani. Ubengumama wami, engumngani futhi engeseka kakhulu,” kusho uMntungwa. Uthe ngokuya esteji nesikibha esinalo myalezo, ubefuna ukuthi umhlaba wonke wazi ukuthi iziqu zakhe, kahle hle zingezikanina. Ekhumbula okunye, uthe unina wadela okuningi ukuqinisekisa ukuthi yena nezingane zakwabo ezintathu ezimlamayo banakekelwa ngendlela eyiyo. “Ubengumsebenzi wasendlini, kuthi ngezinye izikhathi, ahambe ayodayisa emgwaqweni ukuqinisekisa ukuthi sihlale sinakho ukudla kanjalo nemali yokuphatha esikoleni,” kukhumbula uMntungwa. Uthe nangesikhathi eseqale ukuqhuba izifundo zakhe enyuvesi, unina ubehlale emshayela ucingo embheka ukuthi kuhamba kanjani, ambuze ngamamaki akhe. “Lezo bekuyizinto ezincane ebezibalulekile kimina, kuthi ngezikhathi ezinzima, lapho sengifuna ukuyeka, ngivele ngikhumbule ukuthi nginomuntu ekhaya okholelwa kakhulu kimi futhi oziqhenyayo ngami, ofuna ukungibona ngizithola lezi ziqu, ngiba yisifundiswa,” usho kanje. Ngesikhathi ezothweswa iziqu, ubekhashwe nguyise kanjalo noninakhulu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: INDAWO yesigameko kuQuarry Road lapho kungqongqe khona imijondolo elinganiselwa ku-130 Image: KZN HUMAN SETTLEMENTS UMNYANGO wezokuHlaliswa kwaBantu KwaZulu-Natal uphezu kwezihlelo zokutholela inqwaba yabafundi basemijondolo eyakhele umqwaqo uQuarry Road, eThekwini, umfaniswano wesikole ukuze basheshe babuyele esikoleni. Lokhu kuza emva kokuthi umlilo ungqongqise imijondolo elinganiselwa ku-130 ngoLwesine, kwasala dengwane inqwaba yemindeni. Abakhahlamezekile kuthiwa bagcinwe ematendeni amabili amakhulu agxunyekwe endaweni yesigameko. Okhulumela uMnyango, uMnuz Ndabezinhle Sibiya, uthe umlilo ushiye dengwane abantu abangu-477, okukhona kubo izingane ezingu-299 bese kuba abantu abadala abangu-178. “Njengamanje simatasatasa nokutholela abafundi umfaniswano wesikole njengoba kufanele babuyele esikoleni masinyane. UMphathiswa wezeMfundo uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka uhanjiselwe umbiko,” kusho uSibiya. Uthe olunye usizo ithimba elilunikeza abagilwa kule ndawo, olokubhalisa labo abalahlekelwe omazisi kanjalo nezitifiketi zokuzalwa zezingane. Uthe ngokuthola kwabo umlilo ocekele phansi izakhiwo kule ndawo uqale emjondolo womuntu wokufika kuleli, okuthiwa uvele wacela empunzini emva kwesigameko. Uthe ukuhanjiswa kosizo oludingwa amagilwa kufaka phakathi noMasipala weTheku njengoba besebenzisana nehhovisi leMeya uMnuz Cyril Xaba kanjalo nelikaNksz Thembi Simelane onguNgqongqoshe wezokuHlaliswa kwaBantu ezingeni likazwelonke. Uthe amathimba alekelela kule ndawo azoqhubeka nokuba khona kuyo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abakhahlamezekile bayakuthola ukusizakala abakudingayo. Uveze nokuthi noMphathiswa wezeMpilo esifundazweni uNksz Nomagugu Simelane kanjalo nowezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uNksz Mbali Shinga nabo bawathumele awabo amathimba ukuzonikezela ngosizo oluqondene neminyango yabo oludingwa abagilwa. Ubonge ezinye izinhlangano, athe zifake isandla ekunikezeleni ngosizo kulesi simo. Phakathi kwazo uthe kukhona iGift of the Givers Foundation esize ngomatrasi nezingubo zokulala, i-Al Imdaad Foundation enikezele ngamaphasela okudla, iRed Cross elekelele ngokudla okufudumele, i-Ikabawo Performing Arts Academy namalungu omphakathi abanikele ngokudla okuvuthiwe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMSUNGULI weNtuzuma Neighbourhood Watch, uMnuz Andile Jali, uthe baphume benethemba lokuthi izocabeka indlela eya phambili Isithombe: SITHUNYELWE UMSUNGULI weThekwini Neighbourhood Watch, uMnuz Andile Jali, uwathole enenhlabathi amazwi ashiwo uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, kulandela ukubulawa kwamalungu abo amathathu eBhambayi, eNanda, ngoMgqibelo. Esigamekweni okuthiwa senzeke ezintatha, abeqembu lemigulukudu badubule babulala amalungu eThekwini Neighbourhood Watch amathathu. Phakathi kwababulewe, bekukhona uMnuz Nkosinathi Mhlongo (41), Mnuz Mazuzo Nomonti (48) noMnuz Mdunyiswa Nozulela (64). Kuthiwa uNozulela noMhlongo bafele endaweni yesigameko, kwathi uNomonti washonela esibhedlela esiKwaMashu, iDkt Pixley Ka Seme Memorial. Kuvela ukuthi uMhlongo ubengowokudabuka KwaMaphumulo, kuthi uNomonti noNozulela babe ngabaseFlagstaff naseLusikisiki, e-Eastern Cape. Kuthiwa nakubasolwa abathathu okuthiwa bavulele ngenhlamvu kubafi, kufe ababili njengoba bese befayela ngenhlamvu bengasaboni ukuthi badubula bani. Kuvela ukuthi oyedwa wabo ufele esigamekweni, kwathi owesibili washonela esibhedlela esifanayo. Lieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi Esitatimendeni esithunyelwe abezindaba, uMkhwanazi ugcizelele eyokuthi izinhlaka ezilwa nobugebengu emphakathini kufanele zisebenzisane namaphoyisa, zigweme eyokufuna ukubhekana ngqo nezigebengu. “Siyakugqugquzela ukuzibandakanya kwemiphakathi empini yokulwa nobugebengu. Iyona ndlela engasiza ukuthi kunqotshwe ubugebengu kodwa izinhlaka zomphakathi ezifana neCommunity Police Forum (CPF) nezinye izinhlangano kufanele zibe amehlo nezindlebe zamaphoyisa, zingenzi into ezogcina ibeka impilo yamalungu azo engcupheni,” kusho uMkhwanazi. Uthe zibonakele izigebengu zidubula amaphoyisa nokudweba isithombe esicacile sokuthi ngeke zicabange kabili ngaphambi kokuba zidubule umuntu ojwayelekile. “Sinxusa abaholi balezi zinhlangano ukuthi baziyamanise nemigomo yokusebenza kweCPF ebhalwe kuMthethosisekelo, bazibandakanye ezinhlelweni zokulwa nobugebengu ezivumelekile,” kusho uMkhwanazi. UJali uthe lesi sitatimende asehlanga kahle kubona. “Siyafisa uNdonga asihoxise lesi sitatimende esisihumushe ngokuthi sidutshulwa, silimale ngoba sizenza amaphoyisa. Kufike kuthiwe, asiwalekelele amaphoyisa, uma sesibulawa, bese kukhulunywa kanje,” kusho uJali. Uqhube wathi into ebasukumisa phansi bazibambele mathupha empini yobugebengu eNanda ukuthi uma ebizelwa izigameko zobugebengu amaphoyisa aye akhale ngokuthi awanele, kokunye athi amaveni awekho. Uthe bebengakulindele nhlobo ukuthi uMkhwanazi akhulume kanje emva kwesigameko. “Bekufanele uma ebona ukuthi kukhona esingakwenzi kahle, asondele kithi asinike umhlahlandlela ngoba iqiniso lithi ubugebengu buphumile esandleni eNanda. Uma sekushiwo kanje, sizizwa sengathi siyizimvu zomhlatshelo,” usho kanje. Uthe basalishumayela ivangeli lokuthi ayisukunyelwe phezulu eyobugebengu baseNanda, wathi kufanele kuphungulwe amaphoyisa aseziteshini ezingenabo ubugebengu obuningi, ayotshalwa eNanda, awoMkhandlu weTheku, aqinise izivimbamgwaqo eNanda, ukuvimba izigelekeqe ezicanasa ngezimoto nezibhamu ezizisebenzisa ukwenza ubugebengu, bese kusungulwa uhlelo lwama-wardens olubonakale luba wusizo eGoli. Uthe asengu-34 esewonke amalungu enhlangano yakhe asebulawe yizigebengu emalokishini aseThekwini, kusuka ngo-2022, nathe isigameko esenzeke ngoMgqibelo, sibashiye bekhathazekile ngoba sibadwebele isithombe sokuthi kusaqhubeka ukubulawa kwabo. Obekhona kwenzeka isigameko ocele ukungadalulwa, uthe iziwombe zokugqekezelwa kwabantu endaweni zaqala ngoLwesihlanu ebusuku, babikelwa ngazo. “Sahlangana saba yiqulu labaqaphi ababalelwa ku-16, sachusha emigwaqweni ehlukene endaweni. Izibhamu sasilokhu sizizwa ziqhuma ngapha nangapha kodwa singababoni nabafana,” kukhumbula owesilisa. Uthe bathi besachusha kanjalo, bavele bazithela kubasolwa abathathu behamba ngezinyawo, bazama ukubamisa babaseshe njengoba babesola ukuthi bayizigebengu. “Yilapho abavele bavulela ngenhlamvu bebhekise kithi, savele sasaphazeka yonke indawo, sibaleka. Kwadubuleka amalungu ethu amathathu,” usho kanje. Uthe yilapho ababona khona ukuthi ngesikhathi zivulela ngezulu lezandla izigebengu, kudubuleke nesisodwa sazo, safela esigamekweni. “Sazitshela ukuthi ababili bakwazile ukuphunyula babaleke kanti sizozwa emva kwesikhathi ukuthi kulaba ababalekile, owesibili naye ugcine efela esibhedlela,” kusho ulona wesilisa, othe bahlanu abagcine befa ngesigameko. Uveze eyokuthi ubugebengu obese buqale phansi endaweni obokugqekezelwa kwabantu, bakhonjwe ngezibhamu, bakhishiswe imali emabhange bese bephucwa amaselula.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: BANGASE bavale isifundazwe sonke ngokhukhulelangoqo wesiteleka osonkontileka abakha imigwaqo, abakhala ngokungakhokhelwa wuMnyango wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, kusuka nyakenye. Lokhu bakuveze, esikhangisweni ebesizungeza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana iFacebook neWhatsApp. Lesi sikhangisi besiphelezelwa yinkulumo eqoshiwe yomunye wabakhahlamezekile, obezwakala ukuthi uthelwe ngezibonkolo. Kule nkulumo, lona wesilisa uzwakala ethi banenkinga noMnyango oholwa nguMphathiswa uSiboniso Duma, ongabakhokheli imali yabo. UMPHATHISWA wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma, usolwa ngokukhokhela osonkontileka abathandayo “Ezinye izindawo zokusebenza zimile. UDuma (onguMphathiswa woMnyango) nezikhulu zakhe bakhokhela abangani babo. Sicela yonke iZululand, ukushona phansi koMnambithi, ko-Estcourt, yiTheku, akuvalwe thaqa, ngisho no-N3,” kusho inkulumo. Lona wesilisa uqhubeka athi badlelwa impahla okufaka phakathi amaloli, izimoto nemizi. “Kuyaphela ngathi,” usho kanje. Ukhale ngokukhethwa kwephela emasini, wathi uDuma nezikhulu zakhe bakhetha abantu abambalwa, athe bangabangani bakhe babakhokhele, abanye babashiye kanjalo. “Sicela i-ANC isikhuzele uDuma. Uyasimosha, uyawuqeda uMnyango. Sidlelwa izimoto, amaloli, nakho konke okunye,” kusho lona wesilisa. Uveze ukuthi lokhu kwenzeka kusuka ngonyaka odlule. “UDuma uholela abantu abathandayo, abasenhliziyweni yakhe,” kuqhuba lona wesilisa. Uthe amamashi abo ufuna aqonde emahhovisi oMnyango asezindaweni ezehlukene. Ukhale ngokuthi kulo Mnyango bafika benezimoto, amaloli, ama-TLB, bese behamba bengenalutho, sebedayise yonke into. “Ngoba uma sekukhokhwa sewusebenzile, ukhokhelwa kabuhlungu,” usho kanje. Uthe bacwile ezikweletini, wakhala nangokuthi banabasebenzi abangakhokhelwe kusuka ngo-Okthoba nyakenye. “Sagcina ukukhokhelwa ngo-Okthoba ngonyaka ophelile. Kodwa izinkampani ezithandwa umhlonishwa zikhokhelwa nyanga zonke. Sizovala kwasani. Sizovala amahhovisi, sivale imisebenzi eyenziwa yizigwili eziseduze nenhliziyo yomhlonishwa,” kusho lona wesilisa ophethe ngokuqanganisa, ethi uDuma akavele ababulale okungcono. Kulandela ukusabalala kwezinsongo zombhikisho, ihhovisi likaDuma linameke isaziso ekhasini lalo leFacebook, esithi kuzoba nomhlangano ophuthumayo namuhla phakathi kwakhe nosonkontileka abakhahlanyezwe eyezinkokhelo ezibambezelekile. Ngokwalesi saziso, ebesikhashwa umbhalo othi: “Ukubambisana obunobuhlakani bokuzoqinisekisa ukuthi sixazulula izingqinamba ezimi phakathi kwethu neKwaZulu-Natal enempumelelo”, umhlangano uzobanjelwa emahhovisi alo Mnyango aseMerebank, eThekwini, ngo-12 emini namuhla.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: IMGIXABEZE ngodilikajele iNkantolo yesiFunda saseScottburgh, owesilisa oneminyaka engu-43, olahlwe yicala lokudlwengula owesifazane (20) waseDududu, eMzinto. Lokhu kuvezwe yiNational Prosecuting Authority (NPA), ngesikhathi isishayela ihlombe isigwebo esehliswe yinkantolo kolahlwe yicala. Ngokusho koyikhulumelayo, uNkk Natasha Ramkisson-Kara, inkantolo iphinde yanquma ukuthi angaphinde avunyelwe ukuba nesibhamu. Uthe iphinde yakhipha umyalelo wokuthi igama lakhe lifakwe ohlwini lukazwelonke lwabantu abahlukumeza ngokocansi. UNkk Ramkisson-Kara uthe bayasemukela isigwebo esikhishwe yinkantolo kulona olahlwe yicala. “Ukunqanda udlame lobulili kusalokhu kuhleli eqhulwini ophikweni lweNPA. Izigwebo ezifuze lesi siyazamukela kwazise zithumela umyalezo kulabo abasuke besacabanga ukwenza ubugebengu obufanayo,” kusho uNkk Ramkisson-Kara. Elandisa ngesigameko uthe senzeka ngoDisemba 24, 2022 endaweni yaseDududu. Uveze ukuthi umdlwenguli nomgilwa babazana njengoba umdlwenguli wayeke wasebenza endaweni, ewumuntu owaziwayo umndeni kamgilwa. “Ngobusuku bangoDisemba 24, 2022, umgilwa kuthiwa wayelele nengane yakhe encane kubo. Kuthiwa wezwa kukhona umuntu owayengqongqoza ewindini,” kusho uNkk Ramkisson-Kara. Uthe njengoba ugesi wawuhambile endaweni, umgilwa wasebenzisa ithoshi leselula yakhe ukuyobheka. UNkk Ramkisson-Kara uthe yilapho umgilwa ambona khona umdlwenguli, emi ngaphandle kwewindi. “Kuthiwa wavele wamkhomba ngesibhamu, wamyalela ukuthi amvulele angene ngaphakathi, nokuthiwa umgilwa wakwenza ngempela ngenxa yokwesabela impilo yakhe,” usho kanje. Uthe ngesikhathi esengaphakathi, lona wesilisa wabe esemdlwengula umgilwa, emkhombe ngesibhamu. Uthe waphinde wamdlwengula futhi ezintatha zangoKhisimusi. Uveze ukuthi ngaphambi kokuba akhale amaphepha, wamsabisa ngokuthi uzombulala nengane yakhe uma kuke kwaba khona umuntu amtshela ngesigameko. “Nokho emva kokuhamba kwakhe, umgilwa wavele wafonela unina noninakhulu. Isigameko sabe sesibikwa emaphoyiseni, wathola usizo lwezempilo esibhedlela esiseduze, umdlwenguli waboshwa ngokuhamba kosuku olufanayo,” usho kanje. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka ukuqulwa kwecala, uMshushisi woMbuso uThanusha Govender ubehola ubufakazi bukamgilwa, obukanina kanjalo noninakhulu. Nodokotela owaxilonga umgilwa naye ubethulie obakhe ubufakazi. Ngesikhathi uGovender ecindezela eyokuthi umdlwenguli anikwe isigwebo esiqinile ugqamise eyokuthi izigameko zokudlwengulwa kwabantu kule ndawo zithe chithi saka. Wachaza isigameko njengesinokuhlukumeza amalungelo omzimba womuntu okufaka phakathi ukumehlisa isithunzi. Uphinde wethula phambi kwenkantolo isitatimende esibhalwe umgilwa, ngaphansi kweso likaNkk Nokukhanya Mkhize, oyiCourt Preparation Officer, lapho echaza kabanzi ukuthi yamhlukumeza kangakanani indaba yokunukubezwa. Kusona umgilwa uveze ukuthi ulahlekelwe ukubethemba abantu besilisa kanjalo nasebudlelwaneni emva kwesigameko, wathi emva kokwenzeka kwaso, impilo yakhe yavele yashintsha unomphela.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: SEKUPHELE isonto kumi nse ukufunda nokufundisa esikoleni iSiyathuthuka Secondary eNewtown A, eNanda, abazali abawotha ubomvu, befuna kuqashwe ngokugcwele uthishomkhulu abathi usebe yibamba isikhathi eside. Ngokusho komunye wabazali, ocele ukungadalulwa, abazali abebedinwe begane unwabu, bazifake ngoLwesine olwedlule izingidi ezingaziwa esangweni lesikole. Uthe ngaphezu kwengidi eyaziwa yisikole, ejwayele ukufakwa unogada, kukhona ezinye ezimbalwa ezifakwe abazali abadiniwe. “Abazali bathi izingidi zizophuma uma uMnyango wezeMfundo usuthumele incwadi yokumqasha ngokugcwele uthishomkhulu oseneminyaka emithathu eyibamba kulesi sikhundla,” kusho umzali. Uqhube wathi abazali bazwakalise ukuwuthakasela umsebenzi owenziwa uthishomkhulu yingakho bebona sengathi uMnyango uyanwabuluka uma ungamqashi ngokugcwele. Uthe banovalo lokuthi uMnyango uzovele uqashe uthishomkhulu ozobe evela ngaphandle, kanti bona bafuna kuqashwe ibamba. Uveze ukuthi ibamba selifundise kulesi sikole isikhathi eside kanti lathatha izintambo zokubamba emva kokuhamba kukathishomkhulu owayekhona eminyakeni emithathu edlule. “Kuthikamezeke ngempela ukufunda njengoba izingidi zafakwa ngoLwesine olwedlule. Okusho ukuthi sekuphela isonto abafundi bengafundi,” kusho umthombo. Uthe abazali abafake izingidi bafunga bagomela ukuthi zizokhishwa uma kufika le ncwadi abathi bafuna ukuyibona ngamehlo. Uveze ukuthi ukhona umhloli oke wazama ukuzohlola isimo ngoLwesithathu esuka ehhovisi lesifunda ePinetown. Uthe ugcine engakwazanga ukungena ngaphakathi, abazali bamyalela ukuthi akhulume nabo khona ngaphandle kwesango lesikole njengoba ebefike engayiphethe incwadi yokuqasha ibamba ngokugcwele. NOTE: Kushoda i-comment ye-SBG neye-DOE.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: SEKUVELE izinsolo ezishaqisayo ngababili ababulawa eNgwelezane, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal SEKUVELE izinsolo ezishaqisayo zokuthi owesifazane waseSigisi, eNgwelezane, osanda kubulawa nendodana ngesihluku babulawa ngesinqindi. Lokhu kuza emva kokuthi umndeni wabafi uthole ubuhlalu okuthiwa babuhlobise isinqindi emva kwefriji ngempelasonto, njengoba bebefihlwa ngoMgqibelo. UNkk Thuli Khumalo nendodana yakhe, uMbuso Khumalo, kuthiwa bagwazwa bafa "yisigebengu" esahlasela ekhaya labo ngoLwesine olwedlule. Ngokusho komthombo, kuvele ngesikhathi kulungiselelwa umngcwabo ukuthi ummese, okuthiwa uNkk Khumalo wayesina ngawo ngesikhathi egcagca nyakenye awubonwa. “Izihlobo kuthiwa zigcine ziligqekeza ibhokisi lomshado likaNkk Khumalo, kulandela ukuthi isihlobo esisondelene nabafi, sale saphetha ukuthi livulwe,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi izihlobo zigcine ziphoqa ukuthi ligqekezwe nokuyilapho okubonakale khona ukuthi  ummese awukho. “Kuthiwa isihlobo kuthe uma sesibuzwa ukuthi uphi ummese, sathi siyabona ukuthi uthathwe yisigebengu,” kusho umthombo. Udalule nokuthi ngesikhathi kupeqululwa endlini, kube sekutholakala ubuhlalu obabuhlobise wona ummese, bulahlwe emva kwefriji. Ngesonto eledlule Isolezwe libike udaba ngokuthi izihlobo zabafi zishaya amakhala "ngesigebengu" okuthiwa sagasela kulo muzi, senzakalisa abafi. Zazikhala ngokuthi isihlobo ebesihlala nabafi sikhuluma izinto ezingafani ngesigameko. Ngakolunye uhlangothi kuthiwa lesi sihlobo satshela umndeni ukuthi isigebengu sigasele naso sikhona. Nokho kuthiwa emaphoyiseni sathi safika umonakalo usuvele wenzekile, isigebengu saphuma siqhasha, sesibona sona. Izihlobo ziphinde zaveza ukuthi okunye okwenza zishaye amakhala wukuthi kukhona izinsolo zokuhlukumeza amanye amalungu omndeni abazi ngazo, kodwa uNkk Khumalo ebengakaze abhoboke ngazo. Isihlobo sabafi, Isolezwe elalikhulume naso ngeledlule, sithe sesicela ukungaphawuli ngoba bayesaba. “Umndeni ubufuna lolu lwazi lube yimfihlo. Asazi ukuthi luphume kanjani,” kusho isihlobo. Owomndeni uqhube wathi okwenza umndeni ube namanzi emadolweni wukuthi akukaboshwa muntu namanje. “Kungangcono uma (umsolwa) esebanjiwe, esengaphakathi,” usho kanje. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLt Col Paul Magwaza, ngesikhathi eqinisekisa isigameko wathi amaphoyisa aseMpangeni aphenya amacala amabili okubulala kanjalo nelokugqekeza kulandela isigameko esenzeke eNgwelezane ngo-Ephreli 16. "Kubikwa ukuthi ubaba uthole isidumbu sendodana yakhe nesomkakhe emagumbini ahlukene, benamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Utshele amaphoyisa ukuthi ngesikhathi engena endlini, owesilisa ongaziwa uphume eyinhlamvu ephethe ubhakha, okuthe uma ejomba uthango, i-laptop yaqathaka kuwo," kusho uMagwaza. Akukaboshwa muntu ngesigameko.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI, uConstable Njabulo Cebekhulu BABOSHWE ngalo usuku lwesigameko abesilisa ababili abasolwa ngokudubula babulale iphoyisa ebelingekho emsebenzini endaweni yokucima ukoma eRichmond, ngeSonto. UConstable Njabulo Cebekhulu (32) okuvela ukuthi ungowokudabuka eLovu, kuthiwa udutshulwe wafa ngomunye wabasolwa abeyobakhuza ngokudlala ngesibhamu endaweni evulelekile. Kuvela ukuthi umufi - obengekho emsebenzini - uzwe kukhona okuqhuma kwesibhamu obekuqhamuka ngaphakathi eShames Tavern, wase enikela khona ukuyobheka. Kuthiwa ngesikhathi efika ngaphakathi uthole ukuthi obeqhumisa isibhamu, ubexabana nomunye umuntu, wase eqhumisa isibhamu endaweni ebinabantu. Kuvela ukuthi ngesikhathi ethi uzama ukumkhuza lona wesilisa obeqhumisa isibhamu, uvele wasiphendula wasibhekisa ngakumufi, wamdubula ephindelela. Kuthiwa uphuthunyiswe esibhedlela, nokho wafika waqinisekiswa njengosephangalele. Umufi kuthiwa ubeneminyaka emine esebenzela isiteshi samaphoyisa saseRichmond. IMeya kaMasipala waseRichmond, uMnuz Melikhaya Ngcongo, ithe bakushayela ihlombe ukuboshwa kwabasolwa ngokuphazima kweso. “Umufi obewuthanda umsebenzi wakhe futhi ekukhathalele ukuphepha komphakathi, uhambile waya kumsolwa eyozama ukungenelela. Ngeshwa umsolwa uphendule ngentululwane yezinhlamvu, wamdubula wambulala umsolwa,” kusho uNgcongo. Ubonge ukusebenza ngokuzikhandla kwamaphoyisa, iCommunity Policing Forum (CPF) kanjalo namalungu omphakathi ngokusebenza ngokubambisana, okuholele ekutheni umsolwa nabehamba naye baboshwe ngokushesha. Uthe ukuboshwa kwabasolwa ngokuphazima kweso kuzobuyisa isithunzi kwezomthetho kuphinde kuthumele umyalezo oqinile wokuthi labo abenza amacala afuze lawa bazobhekana nengalo yomthetho. Udalule ukuthi emva kokwenza umuga, umsolwa ube esephanga umufi isibhamu sakhe somsebenzi, wayosilahla. Kuvela ukuthi ngesikhathi uNgcongo ehambela isiteshi samaphoyisa, lapho obekusebenza khona umufi nangesikhathi ehambela endaweni yesigameko, bekusenziwa imizamo yokuthi sicingwe. Ezwelana nomndeni kamufi, uthe amaphoyisa nawo angabantu, umehluko ukuthi abeka impilo yawo engcupheni ukuze kuvikeleke umphakathi. “Sidlulisa okukhulu ukudabuka emndenini, kozakwabo, nakuwo wonke umuntu abesondelene naye. Siyazwelana kakhulu nabo ngokudlula kwakhe sesihluku,” usho kanje. Imizamo yokuthola umndeni kamufi ayiphumelelanga.
