Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant Colonel Paul Magwaza, uthe amaphoyisa aseRichmond aphenya icala lokubulala emva kokuthi iphoyisa ebelingekho emsebenzini lidutshulwe ngaphakathi endaweni yokucima ukoma. “Iphoyisa elingu-constable lidutshulwe ngesikhathi lizama ukuphenya ngokuqhuma kwesibhamu obekuqhamuka ngaphakathi engaweni yokucima ukoma,” kusho uMagwaza. Uqhube wathi kube sekuzwakala okunye ukuqhuma kwesibhamu kaningi ngaphakathi endaweni yokucima ukoma, kwase kutholakala ukuthi yiphoyisa selidutshuliwe. “Liphuthunyiswe esibhedlela nokuyilapho elifike lashonela khona,” kusho uMagwaza othe isigameko senzeke ezintatha zangeSonto.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMNUZ James 'God'olulala amankankane' Mthembu owadutshulwa nyakenye UTHOLA izinsongo zokubulawa umndeni wenyanga eyayidumile KwaMhlabuyalingana, uMnuz James "God'olulala amankankane" Mthembu (61), kulandela ukubulawa komunye wabasolwa ngokuyisoconga ngeSonto. Kulesi sigameko, okuthiwa senzeke eThengani, khona eManguzi, owesilisa obegqekezelwa ngenhloso yokuthi aphucwe imoto, udubule kwafa "isigebengu", uMnuz Sifiso "Coach" Malwane. Ngokusho kwamaphoyisa, uMalwane, ubengungqondongqondo emacaleni obugebengu bokwebiwa kwezimoto endaweni, bese zeqiswa umngcele, zibhekiswe eMozambique. Kuthiwa ubulawa nje, amaphoyisa abemfunela icala lokubulawa kukaGod'olulala amankankane, owadutshulwa ngoyaba lwezinhlambu ekhaya lakhe ePhelandaba, eManguzi ngasekupheleni kuka-Okthoba nyakenye. UMalwane kuthiwa ubefunelwa necala lokudutshulwa, kubulawe uMnuz Juda Mthethwa ngoFebhuwari 2023. Umthombo ocele ukuthi ungadalulwa uthe umndeni kaGodo usuqalile ukuthola izinsongo ngoba usolwa ngokuthi ubhiyozela ukubulawa kukaMalwane. “Kuthiwa njengoba bejabula nje, nabo basazobulawa,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi okwenzekayo, ukuthi kubulawe abathintekayo ekubulaweni kukaGodo, yinto umndeni obuyilindele vele njengoba ubunayo inkolelo yokuthi umufi uzozilwela nalabo abamsoconga. Ithintwa indodana kaGodo, uMnuz Mandla Mthethwa, yale yaphetha ukuphawula, yathi lolu daba lubucayi, akukho umndeni ongakuphawula. Isolezwe lihlulekile ukuthola ukuphawula komndeni kaJuda njengoba isihlobo, sithe kulukhuni ukuthi bangaphawula ngesehlakalo, kwathi ucingo lukankosikazi kamufi, lwakhala lwangaphendulwa. Osekomitini, elilwa nobugebengu obusemngceleni, uMnuz Joseph Ngubane, uthe nakuba ebulewe ungqondongqondo kodwa kusekhona ukukhathazeka emphakathini ngoba basekhona abanye abasele. Uthe bajatshuliswa wukuthi umgilwa odubule umufi ukwazile ukuzivikela, ehlaselwa. “Neyakhe impilo ibisengcupheni, nabo bebedubula bebhekise kuye,” kusho uNgubane. Uthe ithimba eliyisipesheli elasungulwa ukuze libhekane nalolu hlobo lobugebengu, lisawubambe kahle. “Kuke kuthule, ngoba izigebengu ziyalalisa, kodwa bese kubuye kubhoka ke futhi,” usho kanje, enezela ngokuthi njengoba kwenzeke isigameko nje, ikhona imoto eyiveni ethathwe kuzosa kube yizolo eBhambanana. Unxuse umphakathi ukuthi uqhubeke ubambisane namaphoyisa ekulweni nalobu bugebengu, waphinde wawuxwayisa ngokuthi uqaphele ngoba izigebengu zalolu hlobo ziyingozi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda uthe umufi ungomunye wezelamani zakwaMalwane ezaziwayo, ezisohlwini lwabasolwa abafunwa amaphoyisa ngamacala okubulala kanjalo nawobugebengu obusemngceleni. “Phakathi kwalawo macala, kukhona nelokubulala uMnuz Juda Mthethwa,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe umufi udutshulwe wafa ngesikhathi kubanjwa inkunzi eThengani, eManguzi, ngeSonto. Uthe uMalwane nomunye abehamba naye bagqekeze umuzi, bephethe izibhamu, bafuna ngodli izikhiye zemoto kumnikazi womuzi. “Umgilwa usheshe wathatha isibhamu sakhe, wadubula ebhekise kubasolwa, abaphunyule babaleka. Umufi ubaleka nje, udubulekile,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe amaphoyisa alwa nobugebengu obusemngceleni azwe ukuthi kunesidumbu esingcwatshwe ngendlela engafanele eMgodiwemvubu ngeSonto. “Amaphoyisa athole ukuthi leso sidumbu ngesikaMalwane obedutshulwe esikhathini esingengakanani ngosuku olufanayo. Kuvele ukuthi singcwatshwe ngokuyimfihlo wumfowabo, uMnuz Musa Malwane, naye ofunelwa uxhaxha lwamacala okubulala nawobugebengu obusemngceleni,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uqinisekise ukuthi lezi zelamani zifunelwa necala lokubulawa kwenyanga edumile eManguzi, uJames ‘God'olulala amankankane’ Mthembu. Uthe isidumbu sikamufi sigcine simbiwa ngokulandela uhlelo olufanele, kanti uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka. Uthe nokucingwa kusaMusa nakho kusaqhubeka, wanxusa abangaba nolwazi ngokuthi uphi, bathinte amaphoyisa.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: KUKHONA nesisebenzi kwabathathu abaqothe abomndeni abayisikhombisa bomndeni waseNewark, eMandeni KUKHONA nobeyisisebenzi kwabathathu abasolwa ngecala lokubulala ngesihluku umndeni wabayisikhombisa eNewark, KwaDukuza, ngoLwesibili. Izidumbu zabafi okuthiwa baneminyaka ephakathi kuka-20 no-83, kuvela ukuthi zikhonjwe abasolwa eMelmoth, ngoLwesithathu. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe kubasolwa okuthiwa baneminyaka ephakathi kuka-21 no-28, kukhona oyedwa obeyisisebenzi emzini wabafi. Uthe kulindeleke ukuthi bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaKwaDukuza, namuhla. Elandisa ngesigameko, uthe abagilwa baqale bathunjwa, besuswa ekhaya labo eliseNewark ngoLwesibili ebusuku, bayobulawa eMelmoth. “Yisisebenzi esihlanza indlu esihlabe umkhosi ngesigameko ngoLwesithathu ekuseni, kulandela ukuthi sifike ekhaya labagilwa, sathola ukuthi kugqekeziwe, amalungu omndeni ayisikhombisa wonke engekho, kanjalo nemoto ingekho,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe kube sekubizelwa endaweni yesigameko amaphoyisa aseNewark kanjalo namanye ama-unit amaphoyisa. Kuwona uthe kusebenzisane amaphoyisa aseNewark, abaphenyi baKwaDukuza, KwaDukuza Tactical Response Team, Provincial Counter Intelligence Unit, Provincial Counter Kidnapping Unit neProvincial Serious Violence Crimes Unit. Uthe uphenyo lwawo luqale lwawaholela KwaHlomendlini, eMandeni, lapho okufike kwaboshwa khona abasolwa ababili ngoLwesithathu. “Oyedwa wabasolwa utholwe neselula yoyedwa wabagilwa. Umkhondo ube usuwakhomba KwaDendethu, eSundumbili, amaphoyisa lapho okufike kwaboshwa khona umsolwa wesithathu,” kusho uNetshiunda. Udalule ukuthi umsolwa wesithathu yena utholwe nesibhamu. Uthe angu-11 amaselula abagilwa, atholwe kubasolwa. Uthe yilapho amaphoyisa ethole khona ukuthi oyedwa wabagilwa ubesebenzela abagilwa. Kwabe sekuvela nokuthi abasolwa ngokubambisana bagqekeze emzini wabagilwa, bababopha ngentambo. “Kuvela ukuthi oyedwa wabo uqale wadlwengula umgilwa oneminyaka engu-20 ngaphambi kokuba babalayishe emotweni yomunye wabo (abagilwa), bayikhomba eMelmoth,” kusho uNetshiunda, othe bahambe ibanga elilinganiselwa ku-200km ukusuka emzini wabagilwa kuyiwa endaweni yesigameko. Uveze ukuthi amaphoyisa athole ukuthi umsolwa obedlwengule umgilwa (20) ekhaya lakhe, uphinde wamdlwengula okwesibili sekufikwe eMelmoth. Uthe emva kokumdlwengula isibili, ube esefuna ngodli imininingwane yabagilwa abathathu yasebhange nezinombolo zakhona eziyimfihlo. “Emva kokuthola le mininingwane, babe sebebadubula bebabulala bobathathu. Laba abanye abagilwa abane, bona bagwazwe, baze bafa,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe uphenyo lwamaphoyisa luveze ukuthi ngoLwesibili ebusuku kanjalo nangoLwesithathu ekuseni, kube nemali ekhishwe emabhange abagilwa izikhawu eziningi. UKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Mkhwanazi, uwashayele ihlombe amaphoyisa ngokusheshe ababophe abasolwa. Ube eseyalela abaphenyi ukuthi baqinisekise ukuthi ubulungiswa buyenzeka ukuze izihlobo zabagilwa zizothobeka amanxeba. Uthe kuyakhathaza ukuzwa ukuthi omunye wabasolwa ubeqashwe abagilwa. “Siyabanxusa abaqashi ukuthi abazikhathaze ngokuthola ulwazi ngomuntu abamqashayo, baphinde bayihlole indlela yabo yokuziphatha esolisayo,” kusho uMkhwanazi. Uthe imvamisa, ezindaweni ezingamapulazi noma ezithe qekelele, amacala enziwa ngabantu ngabagilwa ababaziyo noma abasondelene nabo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: AMANQINA ezinye zezinkomo zikaMnuz Mthobisi Cele okuthiwa zebiwe, zabulawa emadlelweni BAFUNA amaphoyisa abhukule ekuphenyeni izigameko zokwebiwa kwemfuyo abantu baseMawuleni, ePort Shepstone, abakhala ngokuthi sebephelile amasela. Esigamekweni sakamumva, okuthiwa senzeke ngoLwesihlanu, owesilisa wendawo onguMnuz Mthobisi Cele, webelwe izinkomo eziyisikhombisa. Elandisa ngesehlakalo asifanise nesimngcwabe ephila, uthe umelusi wakhe uqaphele ngezikhathi zantambama, izinkomo sezibuya emadlelweni ukuthi eziyisikhombisa azibonwa. Uthe kuyinqubo yendawo ukuthi abelusi noma imindeni iyazivulela izinkomo ezibayeni, zizihambele ziye emadlelweni, baze bazibone ntambama uma sezibuya khona. Uthe ngesikhathi zidla emadlelweni akekho osuke ehleli nazo eziqaphile. “Kuthe uma kuyobhekwa emadlelweni, kwaficwa ngamanqina azo kanjalo nemiswani, okunye kungekho, kwacaca ukuthi zebiwe yilabo abazibulala khona lapho, maqede balayishe inyama yazo, bese bekhala amaphepha,” kusho uCele. Uthe uvukele emaphoyiseni ekuseni ngoMgqibelo, ukuyovula icala, nokuyilapho ezithele khona phezu kolwazi lokuthi ngayizolo, amaphoyisa athole imoto eyiveni, i-NP200, ebiphantshelwe yisondo esigodini saseMntentweni, bude buduze nedolobha i-Port Shepstone. “Athe le moto ayithole ingenamuntu phakathi, isele dengwane. Athi uma eyibheka ngemumva, athola kukhona inqwaba yenyama nezinhloko. Athi uma eyongikhombisa, nebala ngathola ukuthi yizo izinkomo zami lezi engithi zidukile,” usho kanje. Uthe amaphoyisa aqhubeke amtshela ukuthi athe uma ephenya ngale moto etholakele, kwavela ukuthi yayibikwe ukuthi yebiwe esiteshini samaphoyisa i-Durban Central nyakenye. "Ngiphatheke kabi ngokuthi sintshontshelwe imfuyo ngale ndlela. Sifisa amaphoyisa enze kangcono ngamacala okwebiwa kwemfuyo ngoba siyawabika ngethemba lokuthi kukhona abazoboshwa kodwa uphenyo lwakhona luphelele emoyeni,” kusho uCele. Uthe njengoba yena elahlekelwe yimfuyo, ungowesibili emndenini ukulahlekelwa esikhathini esiyizinyanga ezimbalwa. “Umalume wami ubulawelwe ezine ngasekupheleni konyaka odlule. Nezakhe zabulawa ngendlela efanayo emadlelweni. Yena-ke akazange athole namkhondo. Naye wabika emaphoyiseni kodwa icala laphelela emoyeni,” kubeka uCele. Uthe uma ekhumbula kahle, lesi yisigameko sesithathu esikhathini esingangezinyanga eziyisishiyagalombili. “Zibulawelwa endaweni eyodwa, nokwenza sicabange ukuthi amasela asicekela phansi abantu ababodwa,” kusho uCele, othe indlela okwenzeka ngayo babuye babe nakho ukusola ukuthi amasela kungenzeka kube abantu bendawo abasebenzisana nabokuhamba. Uthe lokhu bakusho ngoba abanazo izimpendulo zokuthi umuntu wokuhamba angaluthathaphi ulwazi lokuthi amadlelo endawo angakuphi. Unxuse amaphoyisa ukuthi alusukumele lolu daba ngoba nakuba omunye umuntu engayibuka incane into yokwebiwa kwemfuyo kodwa isuke iwudume lwengozi kubanikazi. Wenze umfanekiso ngaye, wathi lezi zinkomo ezebiwe zingabiza u-R120 000 uma zidayiswa. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uCaptain Ntathu Ndlovu, uthe amaphoyisa aseMehlomnyama aphenya icala lokwebiwa kwemfuyo kulandela ukuthi kwebiwe izinkomo eziyisikhombisa eMawuleni. “Uphenyo lwamaphoyisa nomphakathi luholele eNdundumeni lapho okutholakale khona ukuthi izinkomo zihlinziwe, kwasala izimpondo namanqina kuphela,” kusho uCapt Ndlovu, othe akukabi bikho muntu oseboshiwe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UKHALA ngokwenzelwa phansi amaphoyisa umndeni wowesilisa okuthiwa wagwazwa wafa kunetiye (umsebenzi wesintu) kamakhelwane eKoki, eMzimkhulu, ngo-Ephreli nyakenye. Kulesi sigameko okuthiwa senzeka emini kwabha phambi kwawo wonke umuntu, kwabulawa ngesihluku uMnuz Ziphilele Mtambo (42). Ngokusho kukamfowabo kamufi, uMnuz Nyameko Mtambo, kwakungu-Ephreli 25, 2025, kwenzeka umshophi. Uthe isigameko senzeka egcekeni lalapho okwakwenziwe khona umsebenzi, okuyikwamakhelwane wakwamufi kanjalo nowabasolwa. Uthe isigameko senzeka lapho okwakuhleli khona wonke umuntu, okukhona kubo nezihlobo zakhe umufi kanjalo nabanye omakhelwane. “Kuthiwa ingxabano yaqala ngenxa yotshwala. Umufi wayefuna ukuphuziswa utshwala, abasolwa bengafuni aphuze. Kuthiwa baqala basukuma bamshaya, bemhlanganyela. Kwathi kusabukwa lokho, oyedwa wabo wakhipha uhalakasha lommese, wamgwaza ephindelela,” kusho uMtambo. Uqhube wathi izihlobo zikamufi ezazikhona endaweni yesigameko, zamphuthumisa esibhedlela, nokho kwamenela ngezikhathi zasebusuku, emva kokulaliswa amahora ambalwa. Uthe amaphoyisa abizwa endaweni yesehlo, afika umufi esephuthunyiswe esibhedlela, abuza imibuzo ngokwenzekile kumnikazi womuzi, kwavulwa icala, wathi abasolwa banele babona ukuthi umufi uselimele kanzima, babaleka endaweni. “Kwaphela izinsuku ezimbalwa bengekho endaweni kodwa babuye babuya. Sathi singcwaba base bebuyile, abangaboshwa,” kusho uMtambo. Uqhube wathi babelokhu belindele ukuthi bazoboshwa kodwa kwangenzeka lokho. “Okusiphatha kabi ukuthi sekuze kwaphela cishe unyaka bezihambela ngokukhululeka emphakathini, sabantu abangaze benze lutho. Thina ngapha salahlekelwa othandiweyo ngenxa yabo,” kusho uMtambo. Uthe okubaphatha kabi ukuthi bayazizwa izinkulumo abasolwa abazikhuluma emphakathini, lapho beqhosha ngokuthi akukho mnyakazo ozoke wenzeke ngecala ngoba bona bawakhokhela imali amaphoyisa. Uthe abazi ukuthi le nkulumo iyiqiniso kangakanani kodwa uma bebuka okwenzeka ecaleni, limi ndawonye, basola sengathi iyiqiniso. “Esikukhalelayo ubulungiswa. Sesifisa ukuthi kungenelele noMkhwanazi (uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa eKZN, uLt-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi) ngoba usizo asilutholanga emaphoyiseni ebesiwathembile,” usho kanje. Amaphoyisa athe ayiveli imininingwane eqondene nalolu daba ngokwenombolo yecala Isolezwe ebeliyinikwe umndeni.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: KUMINZE isangoma ebesiyogeza abantu emfuleni waseNanda, enyakatho yeTheku KUMINZE isangoma, okuthiwa besiyohlambulula abantu edamini laseNanda, endaweni yaseSikebheni, eMzinyathi, ngoMsombuluko. Ngokusho komthombo, umufi ongowesifazane, ubehamba nabanye abantu abambalwa beyogezwa. “Uminze engakabagezi. Bekusewuye kuphela obesangene emanzini,” kusho umthombo. Uveze ukuthi isigameko senzeke kusakhanya, nokho umufi abakwazanga ukumhlenga ebebekhona. “Asazi ukuthi bebesukaphi, kodwa akubona abendawo,” kusho umthombo. Ikhansela lendawo, uMnuz Falakhe Gcabashe, lithintwa yiSolezwe, lithe lisanda kuzwa ngodaba, lathi alikakabi nolwazi olugcwele. “Engikutholile wukuthi umufi nalabo abehamba nabo ababona abantu bendawo. Asikabi nalo ulwazi lokuthi bebesuka kuphi nendawo. Okusho ukuthi bebezokwenza lokho ebebezokwenza bese behamba,” kusho uGcabashe. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, uthe amaphoyisa aseNanda avule idokodo lokufa komuntu ukuze liphenywe kulandela ukuminza komuntu edamini laseNanda ngoMsombuluko. “Kusolwa ukuthi owesifazane ubegeza abantu edamini eliseSikebheni ngesikhathi eminza,” kusho uSgt Ngcobo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uNkk Thuli Khumalo USHAYA amakhala umndeni wowesifazane okuthiwa ugwazwe wabulawa ngesihluku kanye nendodana yakhe eNgwelezane, eMpangeni. Kulesi sigameko esenzeke ngoLwesine olwedlule, kushone uNkk Thuli Khumalo (56) nengane yakhe yomfana uMbuso Khumalo (13). Kuthiwa izidumbu zabo zitholwe ekhaya, zinamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Ngokusho kwesihlobo esicele ukungadalulwa, umndeni kawuyizwa kahle eyokubulawa kwabo “yisigebengu”. Sitshele Isolezwe ukuthi esinye isihlobo esisondelene nomufi, sitshele umndeni ukuthi isigameko senzeke sikhona naso ekhaya. Kuthiwa sithe sona besicashile ngesikhathi isigebengu sigwaza sibulala owesifazane nendodana yakhe. “Okudidayo wukuthi esitatimendeni asibhalise emaphoyiseni, uguqukile kulokhu akusho emndenini, wathi ufike isigameko sesenzekile kodwa umbonile umsolwa kancane,” kusho isihlobo. Elanda ngalokhu okuthiwa isihlobo sikutshele amaphoyisa, umthombo uthe siwatshele ukuthi sifike ekhaya sibuya emsebenzini, saqaphela ukuthi akukhanyisiwe endlini kodwa kuvuliwe. “Uveze ukuthi uthe esengaphakathi wabona isithunzi sithi shazi, wazitshela ukuthi uMbuso. Uthe uhambe wayokhanyisa ngasekhishini, lapho abone khona ukuthi akuyena uMbuso kodwa isigebengu esiphethe ijazi lakhe ne-laptop, maqede, saphuma sabaleka,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi isihlobo sitshele amaphoyisa ukuthi siphumile sasijaha isigebengu, esivele seqa uthango, sawa, sashiya phansi i-laptop nejazi. “Uthe ngesikhathi esebuyela endlini, ilapho abone khona ukuthi uMbuso ulimele, wase etshela omakhelwane,” kusho umthombo. Umthombo uthe ngesikhathi kufika umndeni nomakhelwane endaweni yesigameko, lesi sihlobo besingakayikhulumi ekalona wesifazane. “Kubuze umndeni ukuthi uphi uThuli, kwayima kuqala ecingwa. Yiso sihlobo esijike samthola kuqala phansi kombhede, naye egwaziwe,” umthombo usho kanje. Uthe awekho amaconsi egazi abeconse aze ayofika ngaphansi kombhede. Uthe basola sona isihlobo lesi ngokufa kwalaba ababili ngenxa yokushintshashintsha inkulumo uma sichaza okwenzekile. Umthombo uveze ukuthi basola ukuthi lesi sihlobo sifike sagwaza lona wesifazane, sase sifihla isidumbu sakhe ngaphansi kombhede. “Sisola ukuthi uMbuso yena ubulawelwe ukuthi ubone okuthile, naye wasale esebulawa,” sisho kanje. Umthombo uqhube wathi okunye okwenza bashaye amakhala ukuthi bathole ngasekupheleni konyaka odlule, ukuthi lona wesifazane ubehlukunyezwa kuleli khaya. “Yena uMbuso uke wagijima waya emzini wesinye isihlobo, eyocela ukuthi sizolamulela unina ngoba uyashawa. Nebala waficwa eshaywa ngempela,” kusho umthombo. Uthe yena futhi uMbuso ubethi uma edlala nezinye izingane, akhiphe amazwi athi ziyajabula zona ngoba abazo omama abashaywa muntu. “Siwatshelile amaphoyisa konke lokhu nokuthi sifuna uphenyo lwawo luqale khona egcekeni ngoba aseneme ngezitatimende ezingafani,” kusho umthombo. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal uLt Col Paul Magwaza, uthe amaphoyisa aseMpangeni aphenya amacala amabili okubulala kanjalo nelokugqekeza kulandela isigameko esenzeke eNgwelezane ngoLwesine. "Kubikwa ukuthi ubaba uthole isidumbu sendodana yakhe nesomkakhe emagumbini ahlukene, benamanxeba okugwazwa emzimbeni. Utshele amaphoyisa ukuthi ngesikhathi engena endlini, owesilisa ongaziwa uphume eyinhlamvu ephethe ubhakha, okuthe uma ejomba uthango, i-laptop yaqathaka," kusho uMagwaza. Uthe akukaboshwa muntu ngesigameko.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMBHIKISHO wamanzi uholele ekutheni izakhamuzi zaseZiqwaqweni eMlalazi zivale umgwaqo uR66 eShowe ZIFUNGE zagomela ukuthi zizoqhubeka nokuwuvala ngamathayi avuthayo umgwaqo uR66, eShowe, izakhamuzi ezingenawo amanzi eZiqwaqweni, eMlalazi. Lezi zakhamuzi esezinengekile zitshele Isolezwe ukuthi sekuphele izinyanga ezimbili zingenawo amanzi. Omunye wazo, uMnuz Ntethelelo Mpungose, uthe okubacasula kakhulu wukuthi izakhamuzi zaku-ward 9, okuyi-ward engumakhelwane wabo, zona zinawo amanzi. “Sizizwa sideleleka siyizakhamuzi zaku-ward 10. Asiqondi ukuthi kwenzeka kanjani ukuthi ku-ward 9 abekhona amanzi, kuthi kweyethu, kungaphumi ngisho iconsi kompompi,” kusho uMpungose. Uthe bezwe ngandlebenye ukuthi kukhona abasebenzi bakaMasipala wesiFunda, iKing Cetshwayo, abathengwa yiqembu elithile lepolitiki ukuthi bavale amanzi ku-ward 9. “Asazi ukuthi lezi zinsolo ziyiqiniso kangakanani kodwa zisicabangisa okuningi ngoba ngempela asinikwa thina amanzi,” usho kanje. INDLALA yamanzi iholele ekutheni izakhamuzi zaseZiqwaqweni eMlalazi zivale umgwaqo uR66 eShowe Uthe sebeze baqashe izimoto ezibabiza u-R200 ukuyobakhelela amanzi ku-ward 9. Uthe okubuhlungu wukuthi iningi alisebenzi, alinayo le mali. “Kudingeka ukuthi ukhiphe okungenani o-R200 ababili ngesonto ukuze uthole amanzi anele. Asinayo le mali. Eminye imizi iphethwe yizaguga. Ziphoqeleka ukuthi zihlephule empeshenini yazo ukuze zithole amanzi,” kusho uMpungose. Uthe ezinye izaguga zisuke zingenayo le mali, zize zingene ezibophezelweni nabezimoto eziqashwayo ukuthi abahambe bayozikhelela amanzi, zizokhokha uma sezihole impesheni. Uveze ukuthi okunye okubaphatha kabi wukuthi akhona amaloli athunyelwayo ukuthi abahlinzeke ngamanzi kodwa abashayeli bawo, bawadayisela imindeni enemali. “Amaloli afika ebusuku azokwethela abanamathangi, abawakhokhela u-R500 amanzi. Abangenamali, basala kanjalo,” kusho uMpungose, othe nalokhu bafuna kungenelelwe kukho. Esinye isakhamuzi, uMnuz Sibusiso Mkhize, sithe, bazoqhubeka nokubhikisha kuze kuphume amanzi kompompi babo. “Sikhathele wukuxhashazwa. Balokhu bebika imbiba nebuzi, thina esikufunayo amanzi,” kusho uMkhize. Okhulumela uMasipala wesiFunda iKing Cetshwayo, uNkk Rekha Naidoo, uthe akusekude ukuthi inkinga yamanzi ebhekene nomphakathi waku-wadi 10 eMlalazi ixazululwe ngokugcwele. Uthe iziphathimandla zikamasipala waseKing Cetshwayo kanjalo nowaseMlalazi, zibe nomhlangano nezakhamizi ezithintekayo. "Ukuphazamiseka kwamanzi bekudalwa ukuthikamezeka kwesiphehli samanzi Kwahlokohloko. Lokhu kulungisiwe ngoLwesihlanu," kusho uNkk Naidoo. Uthe okunye ukwenzekayo ukuthi amanzi avulelwa imiphakathi ngezikhathi ezehlukene, okwenza bangakwazi ukuwathola ngesikhathi esisodwa amanzi. "Kulezo zindawo amanzi asuke engaphumi kuzona, siwahlinzeka ngamaloli," usho kanje. Uthembise ukuthi lesi simo esibonakala eZiqwaqweni, sizoshintsha esikhathini esingamasonto ambalwa kusuka manje njengoba kukhona izinhlelo zokuqeda inkinga yamanzi kuwadi 9 no-10. Uthe projekthi yokuqala edle uR65 million esisetshenzwe cishe u-78%, ezolungela ukunikezelwa emphakathini ezinyangeni ezimbili ezizayo, izohlinzeka ngamanzi imindeni engu-1 350 yaseNkume, Gawozi naseZiqwaqweni. Uveze ukuthi eyesibili edle uR72 million, izohlinzeka isibalo esifanayo semindeni yakuwadi 9, yona uthe isiku-92% umsebenzi osuqediwe kuyona.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ISIKOLE iMaphephetha High, eMatata, eNanda, sithungelwe ngomlilo BUSADIDEKILE ubuholi besikole imaphephetha High, ematata, enanda, kulandela isigameko sokungqongqiswa kwenye ingxenye yaso ngolwesihlanu. Emlilweni okuthiwa ubonwe omakhelwane ezintatha, kushiswe ihhovisi likathishanhloko, elephini lakhe, amane ama-head of department nekilasi elilodwa elincikene nompheme okungqongqiswe imoto ebisetshenziswa abafundi abenza izifundo zokukhenikha. Usihlalo wesigungu sesikole, umnuz Mzokhona Khumalo, uthe basashayisana ngamakhanda ngokuthi ubani lo obenesifiso sokucekela phansi isikole. “Kusobala ukuthi umlilo uthungelwe umuntu futhi sisola ukuthi ubesebenzisa ibhomu likaphethroli. Okusididayo ukuthi ukwenze lokhu nganhlosoni ngoba azikho izinxushunxushu esikoleni. Othisha bonke bayezwana, iSGB nayo iyezwana. Akukho muntu onanxa nomunye,” kusho uKhumalo. Uthe kuningi okumqoka okubalahlekele ngaphakathi emagunjini ashisiwe. Phakathi kwakho ubale ama-riphothi abafundi abequkethe imiphumela yabo yokuphela kwesigaba sokuqala sonyaka, athe bebezonikwa wona maduze. Uphinde wabala nemishini emithathu yokufothokhopha, amaphepha abalulekile abafundi, izincwadi kanjalo nazo zonke ezinye izinsizakusebenza ezisetshenziswa othisha uma befundisa. “Sife olwembiza futhi asikazi nokuthi izothini indlela eya phambili. Abahloli bafikile ngosuku lwesigameko, bafike babuka umonakalo, babhala phansi abakubonile. Thina sizoba nomhlangano sodwa kusasa (esho namuhla) bese sibiza owabazali bonke maduze,” kusho uKhumalo. Uthe ukufunda nokufundisa akukazoqhubeka ngoba umonakalo ucekele phansi zonke izinsizakusebenza zawo wonke amabanga esikole. Udalule ukuthi uthole ucingo lumbizela esigamekweni ngo-5:45 ekuseni, wathatha imizuzu engu-15 ukuthi afike khona. Uthe ufike kukhombisa ukuthi imoto isishe yangqongqa kanti kulawa amanye amahhovisi, umlilo ubusha ngaphakathi ungakaphumeli ngaphandle. Umthombo weSolezwe, uthe kwenzeka lesi sigameko nje, kunesonto kukhishwe wonke amafasitela emakilasini angomahamba nendlwana esikoleni. Uveze ukuthi ngasekuqaleni konyaka, kukhona umuntu owahamba wathwebula isikole, maqede wakhenikha isithombe nge-Artificial Interligence (AI), sakhombisa isikole sisha, wase esinameka ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. “Kwathi uma kugijinywa kuyiwa esikoleni, kwatholakala ukuthi asinalutho. Akuzange kunakwe lutho ngaleso sikhathi kodwa sekuyacaca manje ukuthi leso senzo sasixoxa indaba,” kusho umthombo, othe ayinuki ingosiwe. Uphinde wadalula eyokuthi kukhona umoya wokudayiswa kwezikhala zokufundisa kulesi sikole, okuthiwa sinezikhala zothisha ezimbili. Nokho uthe akekho ofuna ukuphumela obala ngaleyo ndaba, okusolakala ukuthi ingahle ibe yisizathu sokushiswa kwesikole. AboMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal - kweminye imithombo yabezindaba - baveze ukuthi banalo ulwazi ngesigameko, bathi sithikameze ukufunda nokufundisa.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNGQONGQOSHE wemiSebenzi yoMphakathi, uMnuz Dean Macpherson noKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, besesikhungweni i-Forensic Science Laboratory, evulwe ngoLwesihlanu, eMayville ZIYIFANISE nokunqoba kwesifundazwe empini yobugebengu obubucayi, eyokuvulwa kweForensic Science Laboratory (FSL), eMayville, eThekwini, ngoLwesihlanu. Izinhlaka ezilwa nobugebengu emphakathini, zithe le laboratory enikezelwe nguNgqongqoshe wemiSebenzi yoMphakathi kuzwelonke, uMnuz Dean Mcpherson kwibamba likaNgqongqoshe wamaPhoyisa kuzwelonke, uSolwazi Firoz Cachalia, ibuyisa ithemba empini yokulwa nobugebengu esifundazweni. Phakathi kokunye okuningi okuyamaniswa nophenyo lwamacala, izoba yisikhungo esizohlola amasampula olibofuzo oluqondene namacala okudlwengula enzeka esifundazweni. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi phambilini, amasampula alolu hlobo abethunyelwa esikhungweni esenza umsebenzi ofanayo esisePitoli. Lokhu bekuholela ekutheni kube khona izikhalo ngamacala abucayi afana nawokudlwengula njengoba bekuhlale kuvela ukuthi uyaphela nonyaka imiphumela yolibofuzo ingabuyile. Lokhu kuthiwa bekudalwa ukuthi lesi sikhungo senza umsebenzi osuke ulethwe nangezinye izifundazwe. Umsunguli weThekwini Neighbourwood Watch, eqapha ubugebengu emalokishini ehlukene eThekwini, uMnuz Andile Jali, uthe ukuvulwa kwesikhungo kuwukunqoba eyobugebengu esifundazweni. “Lokhu kusho ukuthi uphenyo olumaqondana nokuhlolwa kolibofuzo emacaleni okudlwengula, seluzoyeka ukushaya ngonyawo lonwabu, lokhu kusho ukushesha kokutholakala kobulungiswa kubagilwa bokudlwengulwa kanjalo nemindeni yabo,” kusho uJali. Uthe indaba yokwethembela esikhungweni ebesisePitoli, bekubalahlekisela ngethemba abagilwa kanjalo nemindeni yabo. “Umuntu ubefike adlwengule, aboshwe, bathi bayabona abagilwa nemindeni yabo, usededelwe, usezihambela ngokukhululeka emphakathini, kube sengathi ezobulungiswa zibenzela phansi." Uthe uma kwenzeka okufuze lokhu imiphakathi igcina isola amaphoyisa ngokuthi ehlulekile ukwenza umsebenzi wawo ekubeni kungekho asuke angakwenza ukuphuthumisa uhlelo lokuhlolwa kolibofuzo. Uqhube wathi abakubhekile manje ukushesha kokuphothulwa kwamacala okudlwengula enkantolo njengoba kungasekho okuzoba yisithiyo ophenyweni oluqondene nokuhlolwa kolibofuzo. Isolezwe likhumbule iziwombe ezimbalwa ezike zenzeka lihambele amanye amacala ezinkantolo ezehlukene eThekwini. Kwesinye isiwombe esenzeka eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseThekwini, eminyakeni embalwa edlule, kwangena icala lokudlwengulwa kowesifazane lapho imantshi eyayilisingethe yakhombisa okukhulu ukunengeka ngokuhamba kwesikhathi eside ingabuyi imiphumela yolibofuzo. “Leli cala ngiyalihoxisa okwesikhashana. Sekuphele inqwaba yezinyanga ingabuyi imiphumela yolibofuzo. Ukuthi uhulumeni waseNingizimu Afrika uyahluleka ukulungisa inkinga yokubambezeleka kwemiphumela yolibofuzo e-laboratory, akuyona inkinga yami leyo noma ekamsolwa,” kwasho imantshi. Yaqhuba yathi ukumgcina ngaphakathi esitokisini umsolwa ngesikhathi kusalindwe imiphumela yolibofuzo okungaziwa ukuthi iyobuya nini, kuwukucindezela amalungelo akhe. Ngaleso sizathu, yamdedela, yathi necala iyalihoxisa, lobuye livulwe uma  sekubuye imiphumela yolibofuzo. Kwenzeka esifanayo eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseNtuzuma, nyakenye, lapho okwakuboshwe khona uthisha wasesikoleni iMtapo High, eLindelani, ngecala lokudlwengula umfundi, wamkhulelisa. Imantshi yavele yamdedela ngaphandle kokuthandabuza, ithi vele kusazothatha eside isikhathi ukuthi icala liqulwe njengoba kwakusazolindwa imiphumela yolibofuzo, okungaziwa ukuthi izobuya nini ePitoli.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UKHALELA ukubuya kwethambo lomyeni okuthiwa ushonele eRussia, ngenyanga edlule, owesifazane waKwaVukaphansi, eMakhabeleni, eKranskop. UMnuz Sihle Makhaye (44), okuthiwa wayehambe nethimba labangu-13 ukuyosebenza eRussia, ngoDisemba nyakenye, kuthiwa ushonele kuleliya zwe ngoMashi 28, nonyaka. Lokhu kudalulwe yinkosikazi yakhe, uNksz Sibonile Ndwandwe, ngesikhathi icela usizo lokubuyiswa kukamufi kuMphathiswa wezokuThutha esifundazweni, uMnuz Siboniso Duma. Elandisa lona wesifazane, uthe umyeni wakhe wahamba nabanye ngohlelo lwe-agent ethize, eyabatholela amathikithi ebhanoyi, yabathembisa ukuthi iyobafaka emsebenzini phesheya kwezilwandle. Uthe akanalo ulwazi olwenele mayelana nalolu hambo ngoba umyeni wakhe ubengesiye umuntu ovulelekayo ngokuxoxa ngezinto zakhe. “Angazisa kona nje ukuthi baya eRussia, uthole umsebenzi,” usho kanje. Uthe ngoMashi 28 nonyaka, uthole ucingo obelumazisa ukuthi umyeni wakhe usedlulile emhlabeni. Uqhube wathi akutholile ukuthi laba ayehambe nabo bagcine bebuyiswa ngempelasonto yePhasika. “Umfana ebengilokhu ngixhumana naye, ubelokhu engitshela ukuthi i-agent ayisatholakali,” kusho uNksz Ndwandwe. Uthe okumkhathazayo ukuthi akasebenzi ngakho akazi ukuthi uzothathani ahlanganise nani. “Ngiyafisa ukuthi uyise wezingane zami angcwatshwe ekhaya ngendlela yosiko lwethu singamaZulu kodwa amandla engingenawo,” usho kanje. Uthe abenxusa lakuleliya zwe bamtshele ukuthi phakathi kwezinto ezingenziwa ukuthi ashiswe noma angcwatshelwe khona le, wathi bathe konke lokhu kufanele kube yizindleko zomndeni. “Kukho konke lokho anginalutho, ngiyalucela usizo. Ngifuna ukuthi abantwana bami bakwazi ukuphola, bazi ukuthi uyise wahamba emhlabeni, wangcwatshwa, ithuna lakhe balibone. Angifuni ukuthi kuvele kuphele kanjalo ngenxa yokuswela kwami amandla,” kubeka uNksz Ndwandwe. UDuma ujube oyiNhloko yoMnyango wakhe, uMnuz Max Mbili, ukuba ahole ithimba ebeliyobheka isimo salo mndeni, wathembisa ukuthi naye uzowuvakashela masinyane uma kuvela ithuba. Uthe usexhumene nabaholi bakuhulumeni. “Phakathi kwabo kukhona noNgqongqoshe wezobuDlelwano namaZwe oMhlaba, uMnuz Ronald Lamola, ukucaba indlela eya phambili,” kusho uDuma. Uphinde wayalela ihhovisi lakhe ukuthi libe umxhumanisi phakathi kwalo mndeni kanjalo nezinhlaka zikahulumeni ezithintekayo. Ududuze umndeni, wawufisela ukuqina ngesikhathi esinzima obhekene naso. Laba abaya eRussia, kuthiwa bafika baba yingxenye yabantu ababelwa impi ephakathi kweRussia ne-Ukraine. Abanye basola nendodakazi yomholi weMKP, uNkk Duduzile Zuma-Sambudla, ngokuthi iyona eyabafaka emshikashikeni wokuyolwa le mpi. UNkk Zuma-Sambudla wasula nasePhalamende njengoba kuqhubeka uphenyo ngalolu daba.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMMELI kaNkk Duduzile Zuma-Sambudla, u-Advocate Dali Mpofu, eNkantolo eNkulu eThekwini, izolo, ecaleni lezibhelu zango-2021 ISAZI sezomthetho wokusetshenziswa kwezinkundla zokuxhumana, uNkk Emma Sadleir, simile ekutheni indodakazi yomholi weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uNkk Duduzile Zuma-Sambudla, yayilokhu iyiphehlile eyodweshu ngesikhathi sezibhelu zango-2021. Sikusho lokhu izolo, ngesikhathi sifakaza eNkantolo eNkulu eThekwini, lapho ummeli kaNkk Zuma-Sambudla, u-Advocate Dali Mpofu, ekhale ngokuthi lo ngoti ufakaza ngaphandle kombiko ofanele, obizwa ngokuthi i-expert report. Lo ngoti ubehlonywa ngemibuzo ngobufakazi bakhe abethula phambilini, abuqoqa enkundleni yokuxhumana i-X, wase ebhala i-memorandum ngalokho akuthola. Wabe esenikezela ngombono wakhe ngokuziphatha kukaNkk Zuma-Sambudla. UNkk Sadleir utshele inkantolo ukuthi umqulu awusebenzisile ukwethula ngawo ubufakazi bakhe i-memorandum, akuwona umbiko (expert report). Uthe lokhu kwenzeka ngesizathu sokuthi abophiko loKlebe abeza kuye ukuzomtshela ukuthi kudingeka acubungule okwakubhalwe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, abazange babuye kuye ukuzomtshela ukuthi ahlanganise lo mbiko ngoba uzoba wufakazi enkantolo. Uthe wathi uma esebizelwa enkantolo, waphoqeleka ukuthi athule ubufakazi bakhe esebenzisa ayekubhale kwi-memorandum. Uthe mabili amacala abophiko loKlebe ababethe bafuna abalekelele kuwo; elokuqala elalabo ababegqugquzela udlame besebenzisa inkundla yokuxhumana uWhatsApp, bese elesibili kube eliqondene nommangalelwa (uNkk Zuma-Sambudla). Uthe emva kokuhlanganisa i-memorandum yakhe eyayihambisana nombono wakhe wokuthi likhona icala okufanele aliphendule enkantolo ummangalelwa, wabe eseyihambisa kwabophiko loKlebe. Emphosa imibuzo uMpofu, uthe bashaya amakhala ngokwethula kwakhe ubufakazi ngaphandle kombiko wesazi (expert report). “Uyavuma kodwa ukuthi lo mqulu othule ngawo ubufakazi akuyona i-expert report kodwa yi-memorandum? Sizophakamisa ukuthi ubufakazi bakho buchithwe ngoba inkantolo ayikwazi ukulalela ubufakazi besazi ngaphandle kombiko,” kubeka uMpofu. UNkk Sadleir uphendule ngelithi ukuthi ubufakazi bakhe ubethule ngaphandle kombiko, abukuguquli ubuqiniso balokho akuthola njengesazi. Wengeze ngelithi ngisho ngabe wayewuhlanganisile umbiko uMpofu ambuza ngawo, wayezothatha khona lokhu akubhale kwi-memorandum, akunameke lapho ayezobhala khona umbiko. Uthe akazange asazi isizathu esenza oKlebe bangabe besabuyela kuyena ukuzomtshela ukuthi akahlanganise umbiko wesazi. Ecacisa ngokunye athi wakuthola, uthe kwakungama-tweet angu-2 uNkk Zuma-Sambudla awafaka ekhasini lakhe esikhathini esingamahora angu-36 kulandela ukuboshwa kukayise. Phakathi kwawo, uthe kwakukhona eyayithi “Siyanibona” (“we see you”), athe wayebalula izindawo ezehlukene lapho okwase kuqubuke khona udlame. UNkk Sadleir uthe ngokucubungula kwakhe, lokhu kwakukhombisa ukuthi ugqugquzela udlame, kukhombisa injabulo, ukuthakasela kanjalo nokubonga. Uthe ikhasi lomuntu ofana noNkk Zuma-Sambudla lithathwa njengelinomthelela kubantu njengoba linabalandeli abangaphezu kuka-360 000. Uveze nokuthi ungumuntu odumile, ozalwa owayengumengameli nakho okuba nomthelela ekutheni into ayishoyo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, ilalelwe abantu abaningi. Uveze ukuthi lokhu kwabonakala nangesibalo sabantu abaphinde bafaka ayekuphanyeke kule nkundla yakhe emakhasini abo. IJaji uMnuz Mbuzeni Mathenjwa, lilihlehlisele inamuhla icala, ukuze kulethwe ufakazi omusha. UNkk Zuma-Sambudla, ubeswenke econsa ngesudi yakhe emnyama, eshaye nezicathulo zakhe ezimnyama ezihambela phezulu. Ubebukeka ezikhululekele, kuthi uma kuthathwa ikhefu, abonakale exhawula abeMKP ebebezomeseka, aphinde athathe izithombe nalabo ebebefuna ukushutha naye. Phakathi kwabebezomeseka bekukhona noyilungu leMKP ePhalamende, uMnuz Vusi Shongwe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMNUZ S'bu Mpisane eNkantolo eNkulu eThekwini, izolo ASIBANGE sisalalelwa izolo, eNkantolo eNkulu yaseThekwini, isicelo sombango wamafa ophakathi kowayeyiphoyisa likaMasipala weTheku, uMnuz S'bu Mpisane nowayengunkosikazi wakhe, uNksz Shauwn Mkhize. Bekulindeleke ukuthi inkantolo ilalele isicelo sombango wamafa kulandela isehlukaniso somshado esakhishwa yinkantolo ngoNovemba 2024. Nokho kwagcina kungafinyelelwanga ekutheni bazohlukaniselana kanjani amafa. UMpisane ufuna kubuyekezwe izinto ezimbalwa mayelana nokwahlukaniselana kwamafa njengoba babeshade umshado owahlanganisayo. UMpisane obeswenke ngesudi emnyama enemikhono emfishane, ubonakale efika enkantolo ngethemba lokuthi udaba lwakhe luzolalelwa. Nokho ubonakale eqhwetshwa ebizelwa ngaphandle ngabameli bakhe, ukuyongqumuza okuthile, okuthe emva kwesikhathi babonakala bephuma behamba. Ubebukela ezikhululekele ebusweni, engakhombisi kudinwa noma kuphatheka kabi. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi abameli bakhe belulekwe ngokuthi bambhalele incwadi uNksz Mkhize, emphoqa ukuba abekhona enkantolo uma sekulalelwa isicelo sikaMpisane. Ngaleso sizathu icala lagcina lingahlalanga, kwangacaca nokuthi lizophinde lihlale nini. Ngokwamaphepha asenkantolo, uMpisane ufuna kubuyekelwe isigaba sesibili sencwadi yesehlukaniso, ukuze kwengezwe ezinye izinto, eveza eyombango oqhubekayo wempahla abayithola ngesikhathi beshade umshado ohlanganisa amafa. Umshado walaba ababili wabhidlika emva kweminyaka eyevile ku-20 beshadile. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, uNksz Mkhize ujahwa abe-South African Revenue Service (SARS) ngesikweletu sentela ebalelwa phakathi kuka-R37 million kuya ku-R40 million.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ABANYE babelaphi bendabuko ebebeyingxenye yosuku lokuvulwa kwekhemisi eHluhluwe iMfolozi Park KUHLOSWE ukuthi kulungiswe inkinga yokuvunwa kwezihlahla ngokwedlulele kanjalo nokuzingelwa kwezilwane okungekho emthethweni, ngekhemisi labelaphi bendabuko elivulwe yinhlangano yokongiwa kwemvelo esiqiwini iHluhluwe iMfolozi Park (HiP) ngoMgqibelo. Lokhu kushiwe uMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThuthukiswa koMnotho, ezokuVakasha nezeMvelo KwaZulu-Natal, uMfundisi Musa Zondi, obeyingxenye yalo mcimbi. Kuthiwa bonke abelaphi bendabuko abasemthethweni, sebezothenga izihlahla kanjalo nokunye okufana namathambo, amafutha, izikhumba zezilwane ezithile nokunye kuleli khemisi elethiwe ngokuthi iseMpilweni Warehouse. UZondi uthe ukukhula kokuvunwa kwezihlahla nokuzingelwa kwezilwane okungekho emthethweni, okuholele ekutheni basibone isidingo sokuvula indawo efuze le, ezodayisa lezi zinto ngokusemthethweni. “Ukuvunwa kwazo okungekho emthethweni nokudayiswa kwazo emakethe engavumelekile, kuyingozi kwimvelo kanjalo nakulezo zitshalo nezilwane ezisengcupheni yokushabalala,” kusho uZondi. Uthe ukwakhiwa kwaleli khemisi akwenziwanga njengoba kulula kodwa kwenziwe ngoba kubonakala isidingo. “Besibhekene nenkinga enkulu yokudayiswa nokuthengwa obekungalawuleki, ukuvuna okwedlulele ezindaweni ezivikelekile yize kunezimvume,” usho kanje. Udalule ukuthi lokhu bekugcina kuholela ekutheni kulahleke imali emakethe engakahleleki. Uthe konke okuzodayiswa kule ndawo kuzobe kuqinisekisiwe, kulandeleka futhi kuyamene nemithetho ehambisana nokongiwa kwemvelo. Uveze ukuthi kubalulekile ukuthi kuqhakambiswe ukuthi le ndawo yenzelwe ukweseka ababelaphi bendabuko. Ubalule nokuthi lokhu kuzobuyisa kabusha isithunzi kwezokwelapha, ubuqotho kanjalo nokusimamisa kezokwelapha ngendabuko. UZondi uthe imali ezophuma ekudayisweni kwalezi zinto, izophinde itshalwe ukuphindaphinda okufanayo. Uthe ikhemisi lenzeke layimpumelelo ngokubambisana kwezeMvelo KZN Wildlife, SAPPI, Provincial People and Parks, kanjalo neNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, wathi kulindeleke ukuthi le ndawo iqale ukusebenza ngokugcwele emva kwezinsuku eziyisikhombisa. Uveze nokuthi bahlela ukuthi eminyakeni emihlanu ezayo, kube sekukhona amakhemisi afana naleli nakwezinye izingxenye zesifundazwe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: IBHOKISI ebelithwele isidumbu sikaNksz Happy Mthethwa ngesikhathi kuqhubeka inkonzo yomngcwabo wakhe izolo UZITHAKASELE umndeni izindaba zokuboshwa kobeyisoka lowesifazane obulawe ngesihluku ngeledlule, eNkwezane, eDoringkop, KwaDukuza. Ngokusho kukadadewabo kamufi, uNksz Kholeka Mthethwa, umsolwa ubhadanywe amaphoyisa eMelmoth, lapho okuthiwa ubebhace khona. Ubebaleke kulandela isigameko sokugwaza aphinde anqume uNksz Happy Mthethwa (35), ngeSonto eledlule. UNksz Mthethwa utshele Isolezwe izolo, ukuthi kubajabulisile ukuthola lezi zindaba ngesikhathi kusaqhubeka inkonzo yomngcwabo kamufi. “Izindaba zifike ngenduna yendawo, ethe itshelwe ngamaphoyisa ukuthi ayisidlulisele lo myalezo njengoba thina besingatholakali. Sijabule ukuthi lithi liya phansi ibhokisi likadadewethu, naye zibe sezimkhalele,” kusho uNksz Mthethwa. Uthe babone injabulo nasebusweni bezingane zikamufi uma kuvela eyokuthi sezimkhalele umsolwa. Uthe njengoba ezovela enkantolo, abakulindele ukuthi inkantolo imdedele ngebheyili umsolwa ngesihluku asenze kumufi. “Sizobe sigcwele khona nomphakathi siyosho ngazwi linye ukuthi akangadedelwa nhlobo ngebheyili. Sifuna abolele phakathi,” usho kanje. Umufi kuthiwa ubesanesikhashana esincane efudukele eGoli, ukuyozama amatoho. Kuthiwa ubebuyele izinkonzo zePhasika ngempelasonto edlule, njengoba kuthiwa wahamba wayokhonza impelasonto yonke nezinye izihlobo. Kuthiwa wathi uma ebuya ngeSonto ekuseni, wahlala isikhashana, wase ethi usaya emzini obekuhlala khona isoka lakhe ukuyolanda izingubo zakhe ngoba uselitshele ukuthi abahlukane. Kuthiwa akabange esakwazi nokuzithatha izingubo njengoba kwasuka ingxabano emzini owakhelene nalowo obekuhlala kuwo isoka, lamgwaza, wayowela kuveranda wakwamakhelwane, lapho okuthiwa nakhona lafike lahosha ummese, lase limnquma phambi kwabo. NgoLwesihlanu, kusabalale izinkulumo eziqoshiwe lapho belisho khona ukuthi alizisoli nhlobo ngokumbulala. Lezi zinkulumo kuthiwa belizithumela kwi-group ka-WhatsApp womphakathi, limsola ngokungaziphathi kahle, lathi lalishilo ukuthi lizovele limbulale. Liphinde lathuka namadoda endawo, lathi limbulele ngoba wonke angabafazi. Siye koshicilela amaphoyisa engakaphawuli ngokuboshwa kukamsolwa.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ABAFUNDI bajabulele umnikelo wezicathulo ovela kwabeNdabe Dignified Funerals.Esithombeni banoSihlalo wayo uMnuz Ndabe Ngcobo kwesokunxele nothishanhloko waseBhekaphambili Primary, uDkt Sthenjwa Ncwane IZIHLATHI zivakashele izindlebe kubafundi bezikole ezimbili zaseLamontville, eThekwini, benikelelwa ngamapheya ezicathulo. Isolezwe lijoyine abeNdabe Dignified Funerals kanjalo nabeDurban Solid Waste behambisa lo mnikelo izolo eBhekaphambili Primary kanjalo naseGijima Primary. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, Isolezwe ligubha iminyaka engu-24 lasungulwa USihlalo weNdabe Dignified Funerals, uMnuz Ndabe Ngcobo, uthe lo mnikelo uyindlela yokubuyisela emphakathini kanjalo nokukhombisa ukuthi abafundi babalulekile. “Ngokuletha lo mnikelo, asigcini nje ngokufaka izicathulo ezinyaweni zabo kodwa sibanika ukuzethemba, isithunzi nokuziqhenya uma beshaya kancane beyongena emakilasini,” kusho uNgcobo. Uthe bahlose ukuthi benze umehluko, balethe ushintsho empilweni yengane ngayinye kancane kancane. “Ukwenza umehluko akuhlale kusho ukuthi kufanele ushintshe umhlaba wonke kanyekanye kodwa kuqala ngezenzo nje ezincane, eziletha umehluko,” kusho uNgcobo. Abafundi babonakale bekuthakasela ukunikelelwa ngezicathulo baphinde baphiwa nezinye izipho. Kuphinde kwatshalwa izihlahla nabakwa-DSW ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izikole zihlanzekile, futhi ziyanakekelwa. Lokhu kuzogqugquzela ukuthi banakekele imvelo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uMnuz Sanele Thembani UYISE wowesilisa waseWaterloo, eVerulam, owadutshulwa wabulawa yiphoyisa likaMasipala weTheku engenze lutho ngo-Agasti 2023, useveze ukuthi sekuzokwehla nobuthongo emuva kwesigwebo esitholwe yimantshi yesifunda. Lokhu kuza emva kokuthi ngoLwesithathu, iNkantolo yesiFunda saseThekwini, igixabeze ngeminyaka ngu-45 ebhadla ejele uMandlenkosi Gumbi (50), owayeyiphoyisa lomkhandlu ngesikhathi enza icala. Ubethweswe amacala amathathu okukhona kuwo elokubulala kanjalo namabili okuzama ukubulala. Ngosuku lwesigameko, uGumbi kuthiwa wadubula uMnuz Sanele Thembani (24) emgwaqweni u-M4 ngasePick n Pay Hyper, eDurban North. Ngokombiko wamaphoyisa, uGumbi wayeyingxenye yamaphoyisa ayenesivimbamgwaqo kule ndawo kodwa ngokwalaba ababehamba ngemoto umufi athulela kuyo, kwakunengozi yomgwaqo. Kuthiwa umnikazi we-double cab, umufi ayehleli kuyo nabanye esikhenkeni, wanquma ukujika aphindele emuva ebona ezinye izimoto zijika, zibona ingozi. Kuthiwa yilapho uGumbi adubula khona kathathu ebhekise evenini, inhlamvu yanemba uThembani. Uyise kamufi, uMnuz Mzomuhle Thembani, uthe kumjabulisile ukuthi ekugcineni umuntu owabulala indodana yakhe ngaphandle kwesizathu, ajeziswe. “Sengizoke ngilale nobuthongo ngazi ukuthi nakuba ingane yami ingeke isavuka kodwa nomuntu owayibulala naye uvalelwe eziseleni ezimnyama. Ngizothi noma ngimcabanga umntanami, ngiduduzwe ukuthi naye umenzi wobubi usezikhindini,” kusho uThembani. Uthe kumjabulisile ukuthi uGumbi agcine egwetshiwe ngoba ngesikhathi kuqhubeka ukuqulwa kwecala, ubekhombisa ukudelela futhi enethemba lokuthi uzophunyula ngoba eyiphoyisa. Uqhube wathi neminyaka anikwe yona bajabule ngayo ngoba uthe uma embalela, wabona ukuthi uyophuma ejele eseyinganekwane. “Ngiyazi ukuthi kungenzeka angayihlali yonke iminyaka engu-45 kodwa ngiyazi ukuthi uyophuma eseyinto ongayazi,” kusho uThembani. Uthe uGumbi ugwetshwa nje, yena ubengasalubhadi enkantolo, esededela amanye amalungu omndeni ukuthi aqhubeke nokuthamela icala. “Bengivele ngikhushukelwe umoya ngibe yinqaba, ikakhulukazi uma esekhuluma into ekhombisayo ukuthi akazisoli ngokubulala ingane yami futhi ezama ukuzithethelela,” usho kanje. Uthe bekungamkhathazi ukuhamba ngonyawo lonwabu kwalo icala ngoba abaphenyi be- Independent Police Investigative Directorate (IPID), babebathembisile ukuthi nakanjani lizomgojela ekugcineni. Uthe nemantshi ebilengamele icala iliphathe ngesinono, wathi ubezwa uma bembikela akade beyile ukuthi belungafakwa. Uveze ukuthi ngesikhathi ibulawa indodana yakhe, yase iphothule izifundo zazenyuvesi, isimatasa nokuthola izincwadi zokushayela. “Ubulawa nje, wayesethole ngisho nosuku ayezoyohlolwa ngalo ukuze athole izincwadi zokushayela. Lawo maphepha ngisawabekile namanje emotweni yami, akuvumi ngiwalahle,” kusho uThembani, othe njalo uma eke wawabheka lawo maphepha, izinyembezi zivele zigcwale amehlo. Ngesikhathi imgweba imantshi, uNkk Sophie Reddy, ithe ithumela umyalezo oqinile wokuthi amaphoyisa akufanele asebenzise igunya lawo lobuphoyisa ukwenza okungafanele. Isole uGumbi ngokubulala umuntu owayengenze lutho, ngoba edinwa ukuthi umnikazi wemoto akamgqizanga qakala ekubeni ewumuntu womthetho.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: OBENGUSIGAXAMABHANDE emaphoyiseni kaMasipala weTheku, uMandlenkosi Gumbi ugwetshwe yiNkantolo yesiFunda saseThekwini izolo WEHLULEKILE ukuzibamba, wasikhihla isililo umndeni wowesilisa obengusigaxamabhande kaMasipala weTheku izolo, iNkantolo yesiFunda eThekwini imgixabeza ngeminyaka engu-45 ngecala lokubulala namabili okuzama ukubulala. Owesilisa, uMandlenkosi Gumbi (50), ugwetshwe ngecala lokudubula, abulale uMnuz Sanele Thembani (24) esigamekweni esenzeka emgwaqweni uM4 ngasePick n Pay Hyper, eDurban North ngo-Agasti 2023. Abomndeni kaGumbi bakhale baze bakhishelwa ngaphandle enkantolo. Ngokobufakazi bamaphoyisa, uGumbi wayeyingxenye yamaphoyisa ayenesivimbamgwaqo kule ndawo, kodwa ngokwalaba ababehamba ngemoto umufi athulela kuyo, kwakunengozi yomgwaqo. Kuthiwa umnikazi we-double cab, umufi ayehleli kuyo nabanye esikhenkeni, wanquma ukujika aphindele emuva ebona ezinye izimoto zijika, zibona ingozi. Kuthiwa yilapho uGumbi adubula khona kathathu, ebhekise evenini, inhlamvu yanemba uThembani. Imgweba izolo iMantshi, uNkk Sophie Reddy, ithe imnika iminyaka engu-15 ebhadla ejele ngecala lokubulala, engu-15 icala ngalinye, kwamabili okuzama ukubulala. Ithe lezi zigwebo uzozidonsa kanyekanye, yathi lokhu kwenza ibe ngu-15 iminyaka uGumbi azoyidonsa ngaphakathi. Inqume nokuthi akumfanele ukuthi aphinde aphathe isibhamu. Ngesikhathi endlalela isigwebo uNkk Reddy, usole uGumbi ngokusebenzisa kabi amandla akhe obuphoyisa, wathi wayengenza kangcono kakhulu ngesipiliyoni sakhe seminyaka engu-30, kunokukhetha ukudubula. “Wena waba yiphoyisa elazizwa lideleleka, lingahlonishwa wumnikazi wemoto, wabe ususebenzisa igunya lakho ngokuthi udubule. Wawungenza kangcono kunokuthi uphoqe umthetho ngendlela engalungile,” kusho uNkk Reddy. UNkk Reddy uwashaye indiva amaphuzu abekwe wummeli kaGumbi, uNksz Ncube, obezama ukuncenga inkantolo ukuthi imnike isigwebo esincane kunaleso esibekelwe abenze amacala afana nelenziwe uGumbi. Phakathi kwamaphuzu akhe uthe uGumbi obehlala eMlaza, ungowesilisa oseneminyaka engu-50, wathi ngesikhathi enza icala wayeneminyaka engu-47. Wathi akanazo izingane, akashadile, kodwa wuye onakelela unina osehola impesheni, aphinde anakekele izingane zikadadewabo ezintathu. Uphinde wabalula nokuthi emaphoyiseni kaMasipala weTheku wajoyina ngo-1997, kanti ubeqala ukwenza icala. UNkk Reddy uthe lezi akuzona izizathu ezibambekayo ezingenza ukuthi uGumbi athanjiselwe isigwebo, wathi kulaba ababalile ukuthi uyabanakekela, ayikho into ephathekayo eveza ukuthi bancike kuye ngokusemthethweni. Umshushisi woMbuso, uMnuz Celani Dludla ngesikhathi ecindezela ukuthi inkantolo ingagudluki nakancane esigwebeni esinikwa abasuke benze amacala afuze leli, uthe akukho lapho uGumbi ake wakhombisa khona ukuzisola kusaqulwa icala. “Okubonakele kuye ukukhombisa ukungazisoli lapho athe khona akakwamukeli ngokugcwele ukuthi wenze icala,” kusho uDludla othe okunye inkantolo okufanele izibuze imibuzo ngakho, yindlela ozakwabo ababezama ukumvikela ngayo." Uthe:“Umbuzo uthi ngabe bangaki abanye abantu ababalimazile, bakwazi ukuvikelana ngempumelelo. Lesi yisikhathi sokuthi inkantolo imnike isigwebo esizothumela umyalezo emphakathini, kuthi nalabo abahlale bekhala ngale ndlela yokuziphatha kwamaphoyisa, bagculiseke.” Uthe uphoxekile ngokuthi ngesikhathi kuqulwa icala, uGumbi wathi yena wayenza umsebenzi wakhe. “Ngesipiliyoni sakhe seminyaka ngeminyaka, kufanele ngabe wakwazi ukuzikhuza ngemigomo elawula ukusetshenziswa kwesibhamu, kunalokho wakhetha ukuqhubeka adubule,” usho kanje. Uphinde wagqamisa ukuthi njengoba umshayeli wemoto akhetha ukujika abuyele emuva, uGumbi wayengenaso isizathu sokudubula umuntu owayengumgibeli, owayengenzanga lutho. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi emva kophenyo lwangaphakathi emaphoyiseni, uGumbi akaxoshwanga kodwa wehliswa esikhundleni, wabekwa kwesingezansi, waqhubeka wasebenza, njengoba adedelwa ngebheyili kaR2 000 maphakathi no-2024, emva kokuboshwa kwakhe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNKSZ Happy Mthethwa obulawe yisoka ephuma ePhasikeni KUSENZIMA ukwamukela isimo emndenini wowesifazane waseSakhamkhanya, eDoringkop, KwaDukuza, okuthiwa ugwazwe wabulawa yisoka lakhe eqeda kubuya ePhasikeni ngeSonto. Kulesi sigameko kufe ngesihluku uNksz Happy Mthethwa (35), okuthiwa ubulawe umsolwa, ethi uyolanda izimpahla zakhe emzini abehlala kuwo, ukumkhombisa ukuthi akadlali uma ethi ucu alusahlangani. Ngokusho kukadadewabo kamufi, uNksz Kholeka Mthethwa, isigameko senzeke besanda kubuya enkonzweni yePhasika ababeye kuyo ngoLwesihlanu. “Sithe sibuya wahlala cishe imizuzu engu-30, wase ethi usaya kulo muzi umsolwa abehlala kuwo ngoba ewugada khona endaweni. Ngisale ngalala, ngamangala ukuthi akakabuyi ngesikhathi ngivuka kodwa ngangazitshela ukuthi kukhona osekumehlele,” kusho uNksz Mthethwa. Uthe bekuyizithuba zasemini ngesikhathi kufika umyalezo wokuthi abaphuthume kwamakhelwane walo muzi ngoba umufi ulimele. “Ngithukile ukuthi ingabe uselinyazwa yini. Ngithe uma ngifika khona, besekugcwele nabantu, ngambona edindilizile kuveranda walo makhelwane othumele umyalezo. Bekukhombisa ukuthi akasekho kodwa ngendlela ebengiphanjanelwe ngayo yikhanda, ngiqhubekile ngafonela i-ambulensi,” kuchaza uNksz Mthethwa othe ngesikhathi efike ngaso i-ambulensi, ivele yaqinisekisa ukuthi umufi akasekho. Uthe bathole ukuthi umsolwa uqale ukumhlasela emzini womunye umakhelwane angumngani wakhe umufi. Uqhube wathi bathole ukuthi ubemshaya, emklinya kodwa kucaca ukuthi umufi uyamhlula ngamandla. “Kulowo muzi sifice kumahliphihliphi, kulimele ngisho amawindi, kukhombisa ukuthi bekuliwa. Uma sithola, kuthiwa ukwazile ukuphunyuka uHappy, wabalekela kwamakhelwane wesibili, okuyilapho okuthiwa umsolwa umjahile wamfica khona, wase edonsa ummese awuthole eduze, wamgwaza ngawo,” kusho yena. Uveze ukuthi ngesikhathi besalinde amaphoyisa, umsolwa uqhamuke kulo muzi awugadayo eqimbile, wazishaya isifuba ethi njengoba edindilizile, wuye ombulele. “Ubegcwele igazi yonke indawo. Abesilisa abambalwa ebebekhona bazamile ukumjaha, emva kokumuzwa ekhuluma kanje, bathi ngeke phela akhulume kanjalo phambi kwabo, nokho ukwazile ukubaleka abashiye njengoba namanje engakaboshwa,” usho kanje. UNksz Mthethwa uveze ukuthi umsolwa nomufi bese bethandane cishe iminyaka emithathu, wathi muva nje, umufi ubesemala kodwa umsolwa ala aphethe. “Ubekwazi ukubekezela uHappy kodwa lona wesilisa engamhloniphi. Ubevele aqonywe, izintombi zakhe zifonele uHappy zimthuke. Ugcine esecikeka, esethi abuphele ubudlelwano kodwa umsolwa engafuni," kusho uNksz Mthethwa. Uveze ukuthi ngisho nangempelasonto yePhasika besenkonzweni, wayelokhu emfonela ngama-video call. Uthe njengoba umufi ebese efudukele eGoli ukuyozama amatoho, nabehlala nabo khona bakhala esifanayo sama-video call. Uveze ukuthi umsolwa ubulala umufi nje, unengane enamasonto amathathu izelwe, okuthiwa uyithole kowesifazane wakhona endaweni, wathi umsolwa ungowokuzalwa eNkwalini, eShowe. Uveze ukuthi bamfonele udadewabo bemazisa ngomonakalo umsolwa asewenzile, kwangathi uyazwelana nabo. “Simangele uma esefika namaphoyisa ngoMsombuluko, bezothatha izimpahla zikamsolwa. Kuvele kwasicacela ukuthi uye omthumile,” usho kanje. Uthe njengamanje abazi ukuthi umsolwa ukuziphi izinkalo kodwa batholile ukuthi uyaxhumana nomngani wakhe osendaweni, unina wengane yakhe encane kanjalo nodadewabo. Uveze ukuthi uma amaphoyisa engaphenya laba bobathathu, lingavela iqiniso lokuthi umsolwa ubhacephi. Umufi uneziqu zobuthisha azithole eNyuvesi yaseZululand. Ushiye izingane ezintathu, ezineminyaka ephakathi kweyisishiyagalolunye no-17. Kuthiwa ubulawa nje, ubehle ngoLwesine, esuka etohweni lakhe eGoli. Uveze ukuthi izimpahla abehlose ukuyozilanda, ubulawe engakazithathi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe amaphoyisa aKwaDukuza avule icala lokubulawa komuntu kulandela isigameko sokugwazwa abulawe ngumsolwa amaziyo ngeSonto. Uthe ngesikhathi amaphoyisa efika endaweni yesigameko, isidumbu sikamufi besinezibazi, kanjalo nenxeba lokugwazwa. Imbangela yokubulala uthe ibingakaziwa.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMNUZ Sfiso Meyiwa usole uLongwe Twala ngokuqhuba intwala ngewisa UMFOWABO kaSenzo Meyiwa ongasekho, uMnuz Sfiso Meyiwa, usole uLongwe Twala ngokuqhuba intwala ngewisa, kulandela ukuvumbuka kweheheba le ncwadi okuthiwa ulibhalele unina kamufi. Kule ncwadi - uLongwe oziqhelelanisayo necala - unxusa unina kaMeyiwa, uNkk Ntombifuthi Meyiwa, ukuthi acele ukulaleliswa inkulumo eqoshiwe, okuthiwa ummangalelwa wesibili, uBongani Ntanzi, wagonyuluka kuyo ngokubulala umufi. Kuyona, uLongwe unxusa uNkk Meyiwa ukuthi angavumi ukuthi ayilalele yedwa inkulumo kodwa akobiza abantu abathenjiwe njengoLieutenant-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi kanjalo neJaji uMbuyiseli Madlanga. UMeyiwa ekhuluma neSolezwe izolo, uthe kuwukubenza iziphukuphuku ukwenza sengathi uyazwelana nabo ngokufa kukaSenzo. “Ekubeni yonke le nto yasuka ngaye, edinwe ukuthi intombi yakhe wayengayitholi, efika nesibhamu,” kusho uSfiso uMeyiwa. Uthe into eyayicika uLongwe ukuthi intombi yakhe yayihambe noMthoko, kuwo-two-by-two, wazitshela ukuthi kulalwe nayo. “Yasuka lapho le nto. Lo mbhedo abawukhulumayo awukho,” usho kanje. Uthe okubuhlungu ukuthi uNtanzi washaywa, washiswa ngogesi ukuze avume icala. “Ngakho akukho okuzoveza ukuthi uNtanzi umsulwa, yize sazi thina ukuthi umsulwa. Indaba yenkulumo eqoshiwe vele ayikho,” kusho uMeyiwa. Uthe yena ufikelwa ukucasuka ukuthi uLongwe ampende kabi encwadini, wathi ubona emthatha kancane. Uthe ijaji elengamele icala, uMbuso kanjalo nomphenyi omkhulu wecala, ayikho indaba yabo, wathi bona bewundeni bafuna badedelwe bonke abamangalelwa abaphambi kwenkantolo ngoba baboshelwe into engekho. Uthe isimo sikanina asisihle, wathi akasakhulumi nangayo indaba yecala lokubulawa kwendodana yakhe. “Asisayixoxi indaba yecala ngoba iyamthunuka,” usho kanje. Uveze ukuthi kukhona imashi ezoba khona maduze eThekwini, lapho abangahambisani nokwenzeka enkantolo, bezozwakalisa ilaka labo. Uphinde waveza ukuthi kukhona icala alivulele abasingethe icala elisenkantolo njengamanje, athe elokuvimba ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. USenzo wadutshulwa, wabulawa ngo-Okthoba 2014, eseVosloorus, eGauteng, kubo kanina wengane yakhe ongumculi, uKelly Khumalo. Ngokwababekhona kwenzeka isigameko, uSenzo wabulawa yizigebengu ezagasela endlini, zizobamba inkunzi. Nokho umndeni wakhe uthi uLongwe owambulala, njengoba uthi kukhona umngani kamufi owayekhona endlini, owabafonela wabatshela ukuthi sekudubuleke uSenzo ngephutha. Bayisihlanu abamangalelwa ababoshwa ngaleli cala, okumanje bagqigqa inkantolo. Yibo laba abamangalelwa umndeni othi kufanele badedelwe ngoba abanacala.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Image: Oupa Mokoena/African News Agency(ANA) ULONGWE Twala, usephumele obala wanxusa ukuthi kungenelele uLieutenant-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, kanjalo neJaji uMbuyiseli Madlanga, ukuze kuvele iqiniso ngokubulawa kukaSenzo Meyiwa. Usho kanje encwadini ebonwe yiSolezwe, elithole ngemithombo yalo ukuthi usanda kuyibhalela unina kaSenzo, uNkk Ntombifuthi Meyiwa. Kule ncwadi uLongwe ugcizelela eyokuthi yena akanasandla ekubulaweni kukaSenzo, nakuba kunukwa yena, ikakhulukazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. ULongwe uthe uNkk Meyiwa akazame ukuthola usizo kuMkhwanazi nakuMadlanga ngoba bayahlonishwa ngomsebenzi wabo. “Nginxusa ukuba ucindezele ukuthi ijaji, abameli, amaphoyisa kanjalo noMbuso, bakuvumele ukuthi ulalele inkulumo ephelele eqoshiwe lapho uBongani Ntanzi, egonyuluka khona phambi kweMantshi uVivienne Cronje,” kusho uLongwe. Uqhube wathi uNkk Meyiwa uma eselalela le nkulumo eqoshiwe, kufanele acele ukungayilaleli yedwa kodwa ayilalele noMkhwanazi noMadlanga. “Wena njengonina kaSenzo, kufanele uzizwele ukuthi wayekhuluma ngenkululeko noma wayengaphansi kwengcindezi,” kusho uLongwe. Ngo-Okthoba 2023, iJaji uRatha Mokgoatlheng lanquma ukuthi inkulumo eqoshiwe, ngeke yamukelwe njengobufakazi obuphathekayo enkantolo yomthetho. ULongwe uthe okuqukethwe kule nkulumo, yikho kanye okufanele kulalelwe uNkk Meyiwa, wathi kubalulekile ukuthi athole ubulungiswa ngokubulawa kwendodana yakhe. Ubuye wasola kakhulu umfowabo kaSenzo, uMnuz Sfiso Meyiwa kanjalo nabanye ngokuthi uma uNkk Meyiwa ezoqhubeka abalalele, akahlukene nomuntu ovimbela ubulungiswa ngomufi. Uthe ngesikhathi ijaji linquma ukuthi le nkulumo eqoshiwe ayingalalelwa enkantolo, uSfiso omunye wabantu abakhombisa ukukuthakasela lokho. “Zibuze umbuzo wokuthi uma labo abakukakile, okukhona kubo nendodana yakho, bethi balwela ubulungiswa, kungani bajabula uma ijaji linquma ukuthi ubufakazi obubalulekile kangaka bungamukelwa enkantolo? Kungani abantu abathi balwela ubulungiswa bebhiyozela ukufihlwa kobufakazi?” kusho uLongwe. Ethintwa uSfiso, uthe ubengakaze ayibone noma ezwe ngencwadi. Elinye ilungu lomndeni okuthiwa lihlala nonina kaMeyiwa kodwa elithintwe lingekho ekhaya, lithe nabo bebengakezwa lutho ngale ncwadi.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UYAQHUBEKA umsebenzi wokuhlolwa komonakalo odalwe yizikhukhula eThekwini naseMgungundlovu. Lokhu kuvezwe yilabo masipala izolo, kulandela izikhukhula ezihlasele ngeSonto ebusuku. Ngokwesitatimende esikhishwe wuMasipala waseMsunduzi, kwaziswe abantu ukuthi umsebenzi wokukhucululwa kwezindawo ezikhahlamezekile uyaqhubeka. UMONAKALO odalwe yizikhukhula Image: ETHEKWINI MUNICIPALITY “Ukuhlolwa komonakalo emawadini ehlukene kumasipala nakho kuyaqhubeka,” kusho isitatimende. Siqhube sathi isimo sezulu esibi, ebesihambisana nemvula, umoya onamandla, ukuduma kwezulu kanjalo nesichotho, siholele ekutheni konakale izinto ezehlukene. Kuzona kubalwe ingqalasizinda, ukuwa kwezihlahla emgwaqweni kanjalo nokuthikamezeka kukagesi ezindaweni ezehlukene. UMONAKALO odalwe yizikhukhula Image: ETHEKWINI MUNICIPALITY “Amathimba kamasipala atshaliwe ezindaweni ezehlukene ukubheka ukuthi ungakanani umonakalo odalekile ukuze umasipala ungenelele ngendlela efanele,” kusho isitatimende. Sithe okwamanje umasipala ubusagxile ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi izindawo ezehlukene ziyakhucululwa, imigwaqo evalekile iyavulwa, bese kubuyiselwa nogesi lapho uhambe khona. UMasipala weTheku uthe izikhukhula zidale omkhulu umonakalo njengoba eminye imigwaqo ivalwe amanzi, kwacekeleka phansi izimoto, kunezihlahla ebezivale imigwaqo. Siveze uthi izindawo ezikhahlamezeke kakhulu kube yiMorningside kanjalo neChatsworth, okubikwe kuzo izigameko ezingu-22. Sithe entshonalanga yeTheku, okukhona kuyo neWestville, kubikwe izigameko ezingu-13, kwathi enyakatho yeTheku okukhona kuyo iNewlands West, kwabikwa eziyisikhombisa. Kunxuswe izakhamuzi ukuthi ziqaphele, zigweme imigwaqo egcwele amanzi kanjalo namabhuloho amafishane agcwele amanzi.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ZETHUKILE izikhulu kuMasipala uMdoni, eScottburgh, kulandela ukuvela kwezinsolo zokuthi inkabi ethelwe othulini ngamaphoyisa ezintatha zayizolo, ibihlela ukuyobulala ezinye zezikhulu. Lokhu kuvele ngesikhathi abesiteshi sezindaba zikamabonakude esikhokhelwayo, i-eNCA, beveza ukuthi umufi oneminyaka engu-41 obulawe ePinetown, ngesikhathi kukhona ukudubulana phakathi wakhe namaphoyisa, ubehlela ukuyosoconga izikhulu zalo masipala. Umthombo ongomunye wosopolitiki ngaphakathi kulo masipala, uthe zibethusile lezi zindaba ngoba bekungakaze kube khona osolayo ukuthi uzoyiswa kwagoqanyawo. “Akekho obeseke wathola izinsongo zokuthi uzobulawa futhi azikho izinxushunxushu ezikhona kumasipala ngakho-ke sididekile ukuthi lolu lwazi luqhamukaphi,” kusho umthombo. Uthe nakuba bengenalo ulwazi lokuthi izinsolo ziqhamukaphi kodwa lubathe heqe uvalo ngesikhathi bethola ngazo. “Phela ezinye izigelekeqe zihlanganisa itulo lokubulala umuntu, kungabi bikho miyalezo yezinsongo ethunyelwayo kulowo osuke ezobulawa, kubonakale ngaye nje esesocongwa,” kusho umthombo. Udalule eyokuthi lona wesilisa ongqoklozwe amaphoyisa ebhace ePinetown, udabuka eMzinto. “Kubo kukhona la eMzinto, ubedume ngelikaCilo. Sengisilibele isibongo sakhe,” kusho umthombo. Uthe umufi ubazana kakhulu nenye inkabi ayigagule ngegama, athe ibulawe eduze kwesitolo sendawo ngoJanuwari nonyaka. Uveze ukuthi yasocongwa kade kunomhlangano mayelana nokulungiswa komgwaqo endaweni. “Umufi waziwa kakhulu ngokuba yinkabi ebisetshenziswa ukuqotha abemboni yamatekisi,” kuqhuba umthombo. Kuthintwa iMeya kaMasipala waseMdoni, uNkk Mbali Cele-Luthuli, ithe akukho abakwaziyo ngokuthi kukhona izikhulu ebese zibalelwe izinsuku zokuphila. Nokho ithe ngeke babayithandabuze eyokuqinisa ezokuphepha kwezikhulu zalo masipala uma kuvela ukuthi izinsolo zokusocongwa kwazo ziyiqiniso. “Sisathumele imenenja kamasipala ukuthi isixhumanele namaphoyisa ukuthola kabanzi ngalezi zinsolo esizibone ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Uma ebuyisa impendulo ekhomba ukuthi kukhona izikhulu ezisengcupheni yokubulawa, sizoziqinisa ezokuphepha,” kusho uNkk Cele-Luthuli. Uthe bazoyiphenya eyalezi zinsolo ukuthi iqhamukaphi. “Akekho obesabike ngokuthi kukhona izinsongo zokubulala noma zokusatshiswa,” isho kanje. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe umsolwa obefunelwa uxhaxha lwamacala eSouth Coast, udutshulwe wabulawa ngesikhathi kukhona ukudubulana phakathi kwakhe namaphoyisa eManors, ePinetown. "Amaphoyisa athole umkhondo ngendawo lapho umsolwa abemfuna ebebhace khona. Athe uma enikela khona, kube khona ukudubulana phakathi kwakhe namaphoyisa, wafa. Kutholwe isibhamu ezincane nezinkulu endaweni yesigameko," kusho uNetshiunda.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UGIXABEZWE ngeminyaka ewu-95 ebhadla ejele, owesilisa olahlwe ngoxhaxha lwamacala okudlwengula nawokugqekeza imizi eNtabamhlophe naseWembezi. USabelo Khumalo oneminyaka engu-36, ugwetshwe yiNkantolo yesiFunda sase-Estcourt. Okhulumela amaphoyisa, uCaptaion Ntathu Ndlovu, uKhumalo wenza la macala phakathi kuka-2021 no-2023. “Utholwe enecala lokuhlukumeza abesifazane abayisihlanu. Abagilwa baneminyaka ephakathi kuka-15 no-36 kanti lona wesilisa wayebahlukumeza ezehlakalweni ezehlukene,” kusho uCapt Ndlovu. Enaba, uKhumalo uthe wayegasela emakhaya abo abagilwa, angene ngaphakathi ezindlini ngokungemthetho, abadlwengule bese ebaphuca izinto zabo. Uthe inkantolo ngaphambi kokuba idedele isigwebo esimfanele, ilalele bonke ubufakazi bokuthi izenzo zakhe zabakhahlameza kangakanani abagilwa emqondweni, zabashiya behlale bethuka izanya ngokuphepha kwabo. “Ugwetshwe iminyaka engu-75 ngamacala amahlanu okudlwengula, waphinde wagixabezwa ngeminyaka engu-20 ngaphezulu, ngecala ngalinye, kwamane okugqekeza awenza,” kusho uCapt Ndlovu. Uthe abaphenyi bophiko lweFamily Violence Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit (FCS) Estcourt, basebenza ngokuzikhandla ukuze baqinisekise ukuthi uKhumalo unikezwa isigwebo esinzima. Uthe lokhu bakwenze ukukhombisa ukuthi ezobulungiswa ziyazinikela ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi abesifazane nezingane abangenamandla okuzivikela, umthetho uyabavikela. “Abenzi bobubi bayajeziswa ngezenzo zabo. Lesi sigwebo sizothumela umyalezo oqinile wokuthi ukuhlukumeza ngokobulili kanjalo nobugebengu obunodlame ngeke kubekezelelwe,” usho kanje.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: IZIDAKAMIZWA ezitholwe ngamaphoyisa kwabesifazane esikhumulweni sezindiza i-OR Tambo eGoli KULINDEKELE ukuthi bavele namuhla eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKempton Park, abesifazane abahlanu, okuthiwa babanjwe nezidakamizwa bezishutheke ezithweni zangasese esikhumulweni sezindiza, i-OR Tambo, eGauteng, izolo. Lokhu kudalulwe okhulumela amaphoyisa ezingeni likazwelonke, uLieutenant Colonel Amanda van Wyk. Uthe amaphoyisa eSouth African Police Service (SAPS) esebenzisana ngokubambisana nabe-Airports Company South Africa (ACSA), abophe abesifazane abahlanu ngecala lokushushumbisa izidakamizwa. “Zingabiza inani elingaphezu kuka-R5 million izidakamizwa ababanjwe nazo, ebebezithukuse emizimbeni yabo,” kusho uLt Col Van Wyk. Uthe uphenyo lwamaphoyisa olwenziwe, luveza ukuthi bebelibangise ezweni iChina, kodwa bezodlula eDubai. “Ukuseshwa kwabo okuholele ekutheni kutholwe izidakamizwa ebezithukuswe ematekini, ezikhindini zangaphansi kanjalo nasezithweni zangasese,” kusho uLt Col Van Wyk. Uqinisekise eyokuthi kulindeleke ukuthi bayobingelela imantshi namuhla ngamacala ayamaniswa nokushushumbiswa kwezidakamizwa. Wathi uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UTHISHANHLOKO osamisiwe esikoleni uMkhumbane Secondary, uMnuz Ntokozo Ngobese, ejabulela isinqumo senkantolo sokumisa ukukhishwa kwamakhamera esikoleni Image: STHEMBISO MNGOMA BAPHUPHUME injabulo abazali basesikoleni uMkhumbane Secondary, eChesterville, kulandela ukuthi iNkantolo eNkulu yaseMgungundlovu, ivune bona ngolwamakhamera afake emakilasini alesi sikole. Lo mbango oqale ngasekupheleni kukaJanuwari nonyaka, ugcine ufinyelela enkantolo ngoMsombuluko, maqede yakhipha isinqumo sokuthi angakhishwa. Kwasuka umsindo kulesi sikole, kwaphazamiseka ukufunda amasonto amathathu ngenyanga edlule, ngesikhathi othisha beSadtu belaxaza ukufundisa, befuna akhishwe amakhamera emakilasini. Ngokusho kukaMnuz Babalo Majola, osesigunwgini esilawula isikole, uthe basizwe yiNatu, ukuqhubezela lolu daba enkantolo. “Udaba saluyisa enkantolo ngosizo lweNatu, kulandela ukuthola incwadi eMnyangweni wezeMfundo, ithi kufanele siwakhiphe ngokukhulu ukushesha amakhamera. Sabe sesithola usuku enkantolo kulandela ukwenza isicelo sokuthi lulalelwe ngokuphuthuma udaba,” kusho uMajola. Uthe kubajabulisile okunqunywe yinkantolo. “Ijaji lishiye elingalazi eMnyangweni ngodaba lwamakhamera, lase linquma ukuthi angakhishwa. Lokhu kusijabulisile ngoba yikho ebesikufuna futhi nabazali bajabule kakhulu ngoba bebevele belwela ukuthi angakhishwa,” usho kanje. Uthe selokhu luqalile ukukhulunywa nokususa umsindo olwamakhamera, bebelokhu bemile kwelithi awangakhishwa ngoba awusizo kubafundi nothisha kulesi sikole, okuthiwa sinenkinga yokungenelwa yizigebengu mihla namalanga. Uthe abanalo ulwazi lokuthi kuzokwenzekani ngenqwaba yothisha beSadtu abalaxaza ukufundisa. Labo thisha bafunga bagomela ukuthi ngeke babuye ukuzofundisa uma amakhamera engakakhishwa. “Asazi ke ukuthi bazokwenzenjani njengoba isinqumile inkantolo ukuthi awangakhishwa amakhamera,” usho kanje. Ubasole ngokuthi uma babenganeme ngamakhamera afakwe emakilasini, kwakufanele bakhulume nenyunyana yabo ingenelele, bangashiyi abafundi esithubeni. Uthe abakuthola kubazali abasadiniwe namanje, ukuthi abasabafuni ngisho bangashintsha umqondo bathi bayabuya, wathi kusukela balaxaza ukufundisa labo thisha bathola abetoho abakhokhelwa yibo, kusaqhubeka bona. “Esesikufisa ukuthi uMnyango ungenelele ekutheni kuqashwe ngokugcwele labo thisha ababambile njengamanje,” usho kanje. Kulesi sikole kugcine kumiswa uthishanhloko, uMnuz Ntokozo Ngobese, izinyanga ezintathu. Nakuba uMnyango ugcizelele eyokuthi ummisele ukungaziphathi kahle emsebenzini, okumayelana nokunqaba ukubuyisa uthisha owawina elokuxoshwa ngendlela engafanele kulesi sikole, abazali banenkolelo yokuthi ujeziselwa eyokushaya phansi ngonyawo kwabo, bethi amakhamera awayi ndawo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMPHATHISWA wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma (ngakwesokudla) nethimba lakhe behambele irenki yaseDurban Station beyohlola isimo njengoba kubhekwe emaholidini ePhasika KUKHISHWE isexwayiso esishubile kubashayeli abazophuza bese beshayela izimoto KwaZulu-Natal. UMphathiswa wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma, uthe abazothi nsi, kwabazoshayela bephuzile esifundazweni. Ukusho lokhu izolo ngesikhathi ehambele irenki yaseDurban Station kanjalo neyaseYMCA. UDuma uthe ukuhambela kwabo kula marenki athathwa njengamanye aba matasa kakhulu ngezikhathi zamaholidi, kumayelana nokuyohlola isimo ukuthi ngabe konke kuhamba kahle yini njengoba kubhekwe kwimpelasonto ende yePhasika. Uthe umuntu ophuzile uba nenkinga yokungaboni kahle emehlweni, agcine engaboni kahle nalapho sekufanele ehlise isivinini. Uveze ukuthi kwizivimbagwaqo zabo, sebehambisana nabama-ambulensi ukuqinisekisa ukuthi umuntu obanjwa ephuzile, uthathwa khona lapho igazi. “Uma like laveza ukuthi kukhona utshwala obungu-0,8, kusuke kuveza ukuthi sekwedlulele kokusemthethweni okuvumelekile,” kusho uDuma. Uphinde wakhuza nabahamba ngesivinini esiphezulu, wathi lokho kuyazibanga izingozi. “Kuyiqiniso ukuthi ngesikhathi senyanga yezokuthutha u-Okthoba kanjalo ngangoDisemba, KwaZulu-Natal asibanga nazo izingozi ezinjalo kwabemboni,” kusho uDuma. Uthe ukwephulwa komthetho kwabemboni abajwayele ukuhlangabezana nakho, ukulayishwa kwabantu okwedlule esibalweni esivumelekile, kanjalo namathayi agugile. “Uma ushayela imoto enamathayi ayimpandla, kufanele ucabange ukuthi uthwele abantu, uthi uma ufaka amabhuleki, imoto ingakwazi ukwenza okufanele,” kusho uDuma. Uthe kulabo abazokwephula umthetho kufanele bazi ukuthi amaphoyisa omgwaqo atshalwe yonke indawo, nezivimbamgwaqo zithe chithi-saka kuso sonke isifundazwe. “Asixoleli,” kusho uDuma. Okhulumela usoseshini iDurban Station Long-Distance Taxi Association, uMnuz Mcabangeni Nala, esika elijikayo, uqinisekise uDuma ukuthi erenki yabo ayikho imoto ‘eyikhehla’, wathi abaye bakusabe ukuhlangabezana nezingozi emgwaqweni. “Asinavalo lokuthi imoto ngeke ifike lapho iya khona. Futhi asinankinga yamasondo (angekho esimeni),” kusho uNala. Ephawula ngokunyuka kukaphethroli uthe abanazinhlelo zokukhuphula imali ngoba bayazi ukuthi abagibeli badonsa kanzima. “Ngeke uthi kade ukhushulwa izolo, bese nathi isithi siyayikhuphula imali yokugibela namuhla,” usho kanje.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: USDUDUZO Mavundla olahlwe yicala lokuzama ukubulala indodana kamfowabo SIMGCULISILE isigwebo sikadilikajele esinikwe umfowabo, owesilisa waseChesterville, eThekwini, kulandela ukulahlwa yicala lokuzama ukubulala indodana yakhe ngoba ethi uyamyala. USduduzo Mavundla (29), ugixabezwe ngodilikajele yiNkantolo yesiFunda saseThekwini ngoMsombuluko, elahlwa yicala lokuzama ukubulala uMpendulo Msweli, owayeneminyaka eyisishiyagalolunye ngesikhathi kwenzeka isigameko ngoJanuwari 2024. Uyise kaMpendulo, uMnuz Simingezwilenkosi Mavundla, uthe simjabulisile isigwebo, wathi unethemba lokuthi sizoyijabulisa nendodana yakhe. “Sesizoke sihambe sikhululeke, lungekho uvalo lokuthi kungaphinde kwenzeke ishwa, ayenzakalise isibili indodana yami. Sikhululwa wukuthi okungenani, njengoba evalelwe nje, uyophuma ejele ingane yami isikhulile,” kusho uMavundla. Ngosuku lwesigameko kuthiwa olahlwe yicala wayenga umgilwa, owayefike ngokuvakasha kubo kayise eChesterville, wathi abaye esitolo ayomthengela ama-chips. Kuthiwa wagcina ezibuyela yedwa emva kwesikhathi umgilwa engekho, kwathi uma ebuzwa ngaye, wathi yena umnike u-R2 ukuthi ayozithengela ama-chips esitolo, yena waqhubeka nenye indlela. Kuthiwa umgilwa wacingwa yonke indawo, engatholakali, kwaze kwabikelwa amaphoyisa. Kuvela ukuthi watholwa esesesibhedlela iVictoria Mxenge (King Edward), enenkebenkebe yengozi ebusweni. Kwavela ukuthi uSduduzo, owayekade esiza ngesikhathi kucingwa umgilwa nawo wonke umuntu, wuye owayemyengele ehlathini, lapho afika khona wamlimaza ngesikhali esithize, wamshiya ezitshela ukuthi ufile. Kuthiwa umgilwa waphaphama sekuhwalele, wagaqa, waze wayofika emgwaqweni okuyilapho athathwa khona abantu angabazi, bamphuthumisa esibhedlela. Zabe sezimkhalela ummangalelwa, umgilwa etshela amaphoyisa nezihlobo ukuthi uSduduzo omlimazile, ngelithi ufuna ukufundisa uyise isifundo. Emva kokugwetshwa kukaSduduzo, uyise kamgilwa utshele Isolezwe ukuthi umfowabo wayethi uzwisa yena ubuhlungu ngokuzama ukubulala indodana yakhe kwazise wayemkweleta imali. Uveze ukuthi yayila ku-R32 000 imali ayemkweleta yona umfowabo emalini eyayinguR61 000 ayemboleke yona ngasekuqaleni kuka-2022. “Wayephunyelwe yimali yesibili, kulandela ukushona kukanina ngo-2014. Sakhuluma, savumelana ngokuthi angiboleke uR50 000, engangizogcwalisela phezu kwawo ngithenge imoto yokwenza umsebenzi we-Uber. Wagcina engiboleka uR61 000, okwathi emva kokungifakela ebhange, washintsha, watshela umndeni ukuthi ngimphuzise uphuzo oludakayo, ngase ngintshontsha imali yakhe,” kusho uMavundla. Uthe ngokudinwa yisenzo sikamfowabo, wagcina eyisebenzisa budlabha imali, wangabe esayithenga imoto ayethi uzoyithenga. Uveze ukuthi umfowabo wagcina eya ebhange eyosho ukuthi imali engene ebhange likamfowabo, isuka kwelakhe yebiwe. Ibhange lakhetha ukuyivala, yangakwazi ukuphuma, kodwa futhi langayibuyisela kumnikazi. Uqhube wathi yayikuR35 000 imali agcina eyisebenzisa budlabha kuR61 000 ayewubolekiwe. Uveze ukuthi emva kwemihlangano embalwa yomndeni lapho okwakuzanywa khona ukuthi kulungiswe udaba babuyisane, bagcina beya emaphoyiseni beyofuna izincwadi ezifungelwe abazihambisa ebhange, ukuze lidedele imali engu-R26 500 eyayivalelekile. “Kwathi uma liyidedela ibhange, ngambuyisela uR20 000, engagcina ngithola ukuthi wasebenzisa uR15 000 wawo ukungithengela izinkabi ezazizongibulala,” kusho uMavundla, othe wasinda emlonyeni wengwenya ngokuthi angalubhadi eNanda lapho uSduduzo ayemyengela khona ophathe. Uthe yaqhubeka yabanjwa eminye imihlangano yomndeni ukuzama ukuza nesixazululo ngoba  kwakubonakala ukuthi isimo siyaphuma endleleni kulandela ukuthi uSduduzo esedubele emotweni yomuntu ekhokhelwa ngebanga elihambile, uMavundla ayehamba ngayo. Uqhube wathi kwase kuvunyelwenwe ngokuthi ngoJanuwari 2024, uzoqala ayikhokhe kancane kancane aze ayiqede, okwagcina kungasenzekanga, uSduduzo esezama ukubulala umgilwa. Uthe yize ayemazi uSduduzo ukuthi unenhliziyo embi, kodwa wayengakaze akhombise ukuthi indodana yakhe uyicabangela okubi. “Wayeyithanda ngale ndlela, kungekho okusolisayo ukuthi uzoyenzakalisa,” kusho uMavundla, othe ugculiseke kakhulu ngesigwebo ikakhulukazi ngoba wayezitshela ukuthi uzonikwa iminyaka eyisishiyagalombili kuya kweyishumi, ngokusho kwesisebenzi sasenkantolo athe sasibasayinisa iphepha elithize. USduduzo ugwetshwa nje, wabanjwa ngoDisemba 2025 eNorth West, emva kokubalekela ingalo yomthetho ngaboJuni 2024, kulandela ukudedelwa kwakhe ngebheyili. Isolezwe labhala udaba ngokuthi amaphoyisa ayamfuna, udaba lwafundwa yiphoyisa laseNorth West elalingumakhelwane wakhe, lathinta umphenyi waseCato Manor, lasho ukuthi: “Nangu la endaweni yokucima ukoma, uphuza utshwala, ubuka nebhola,” kwaba wukubanjwa kwakhe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Usomabhizinisi ochithwe yinkantolo uMnuz Calvin Mathibeli UKHOMISHANA wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uGeneral Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, usishayele ihlombe isinqumo senkantolo ISICHITHE nezindleko iNkantolo eNkulu yaseThekwini, izolo, isicelo sikasomabhizini osematheni, uMnuz Calvin Mathibeli, sokudlulisela phambili icala. Ngokusho kokhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uMathibeli ubefake isicelo sokuphikisa isinqumo esakhishwa yinkantolo ngoFebhuwari 26 nonyaka. Ngalelo langa, inkantolo yayimyalele ukuthi asuse zonke izinkulumo zakhe ayeziphanyeke ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, ezazidicilela phansi igama likaKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. “Inkantolo yayimnike amahora angu-24 ukuba enze lokho. Yayithe kufanele azikhiphe nakuma-website kanjalo nabakwezindaba ezi-online,” kusho uNetshiunda. Wabe eseyalelwa nokuthi angaphinde asole uMkhwanazi ngezinsolo ezingamampunge, wase eyalelwa ukuthi akhokhele zonke izindleko zabameli. UNetshiunda uthe izinsolo ezehlisa isithunzi ezenziwe uMathibeli, bezingasingcolisa isithunzi sikaMkhwanazi kanjalo nombutho wamaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal. Uthe uMkhwanazi uyasamukela isinqumo sakamumva senkantolo, wathi siyisifundo esibalulekile kulabo abavele badicilele phansi isithunzi sabantu ngaphandle kobufakazi. “Lokhu kunqoba okwezakhamuzi zaseNingizimu Afrika eziwugcinayo umthetho, ezingayingeni eyobugebengu futhi eziphupha ngezwe elingenabugebengu. Nanoma ubani angasolwa kodwa ukwehlisa umuntu isithunzi akufanele kube yingxenye yempikiswano,” kusho yena. Uthe umthetho owawo wonke umuntu ngoba uyilungelo lawonke wonke, elikuMthethosisekelo okufanele lihlonishwe ngaso sonke isikhathi.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Amatekisi azonyuka ngenxa yokunyuka kukaphethroli BAKHALA ubumayemaye abanikazi bamatekisi angaphansi kwenhlangano ethathwa njengenkulu kunazo zonke kuleli, iSouth African National Taxi Council (SANTACO) ngokunyuka kukaphethroli. Izinkomba zabeCentral Energy Fund (CEF), ziveza ukuthi uphethroli i-95 octane, ungahle unyuke ngo-R5,82 ilitha, kuthi i-93 octane inyuke ngo-R5,32. Zithi udizili wona ungahle unyuke ngo-R10,27 ilitha. Kuvela ukuthi lezi zibalo azikakayifaki intela ekhokhelwa uphethroli, i-fuel levy yona okuthiwa ingahle inyuke ngo-21c ilitha. USihlalo weSantaco KwaZulu-Natal uMnuz Boy Zondi, uthe abanikazi bezimoto bakhala ubumayemaye ngoba ayikaze yenzeke into efuze le emlandweni wokunyuka kukaphethroli eNingizimu Afrika. “Siyaqala ukubhekana nento enje emlandweni. Ukunyuka kwawo ngale ndlela kuzokwenza ukuthi kube nzima kakhulu kubanikazi bezimoto kanjalo nakobasi bethu abangabagibeli,” kusho uZondi. Uthe akungatshazwa ukuthi kuzoba nzima kakhulu ukusebenza njengoba kwaziwa ukuthi kubhekwe kwimpelasonto yePhasika, lapho iningi labantu lisebenzisa izithuthi zomphakathi ukuthutheleka emakhaya kanjalo nasezinkonzweni. “SiyiSantaco ezingeni lesifundazwe, asikaphumi nesinqumo sokuthi imali yokugibela inyuswe masinyane njengoba kuzoba yimpelasonto yePhasika ukuzama ukubhekana nesimo. Ngakho ngokwethu ayizunyuka njengamanje imali yokugibela kodwa ngifuna ukukucacisa ukuthi ngeke sikunqande ukuthi kube khona abanye ososeshini ezindaweni ezehlukene abazoyinyusa manje,” kusho uZondi, othe yibo ososeshini abazobe bezwa ukuthi insimbi ishisa kangakanani. Nokho ukuvezile ukuthi banqume ukuthi babe nomhlangano ophuthumayo ngodaba lukaphethroli ngesonto elizayo, athe emva kwawo, nakanjani bazoyiyusa imali yokugibela. “Nakanjani sizoyinyusa imali yokugibela ngelizayo. Ngeke silinde uJulayi njengoba sihlale senza,” usho kanje. Ebhekise kubelungu babo, okungabagibeli, uthe ucela bakuqonde ukuthi nabo bengosomabhizinisi bemboni, babhekene nesimo esingaphezu kwamandla. “Besingeke siyinyuse imali yokugibela ukube akwenzekanga le mikhuba eyenzekayo. Besizolinda umhla ka-1 Julayi njengenhlalayenza,” kusho uZondi. UMengameli wezwe, uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa ethula inkulumo yokuvala ingqungquthela ye-ANC eLimpopo ngempelasonto, uxwayise ngobunzima obuzayo ngenxa yokunyuka kukaphethroli nodizili. Uthe useyalele ongqongqoshe ukuthi babhekane nezingqinamba ezizodalwa ukwenyuka kukaphethroli nodizili. Ukunyuka kakhulu kukaphethroli kudalwe yizinxushunxushu eziqhubekayo eMiddle East, eziholele ekutheni kunyuke intengo kawoyela, kwase kudala ingcindezi emandleni erandi lakuleli. Uwoyela ongahluziwe unyuke usuka ku-$69 waya ngaphezuku kuka-$115, kanti amandla erandi lehle esuka kuR15,85  aya kuR17,00 uma liqhathaniswa neDollar laseMelika.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
