text: UKHOMISHANA wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Mkhwanazi, ubuyela esikhundleni sakhe ISHAYELWE ihlombe nayizinhlaka ezilwa nobugebengu emphakathini eyokuvuselelwa kwenkontileka kaKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. Amaphoyisa akuqinisekisile ukuthi uMkhwanazi usenikezwe inkontileka yeminye iminyaka emihlanu esesikhundleni. Inkontileka yakhe ibiphela kusasa kanti entsha kulindeleke ukuthi iqale ngoLwesithathu. Amaphoyisa athe ukunikezwa kwakhe eyesibili kuze emva kwezingxoxo phakathi nobuholi bamaphoyisa ezingeni likazwelonke noNdunandlulu wesifundazwe, uMnuz Thami Ntuli. Bese kunesikhathi uNtuli aphumela obala ngelithi ufisa abuye ihlandla lesibili uMkhwanazi kulesi sikhundla. UNtuli wathi lokhu ukusho ngoba ebona ukuthi umsebenzi wokulwa nobugebengu kwamaphoyisa kwenzeka ngendlela encomekayo noMkhwanazi esezintanjeni. Emva kwesimemezelo sokubuya kukaMkhwanazi isibili, uNtuli uzwakalise ukujabula, wamhalalisela. UMnuz Andile Jali weThekwini Neighbourhood Watch okuyinhlangano elwa nobugebengu eNanda, Ntuzuma, KwaMashu, ephinde ikapakele nakwezinye izingxenye zesifundazwe, ukushayele ihlombe ukubuya kukaMkhwanazi. UJali echaza uMkhwanazi, uthe uzibonakalise ebuholini bakhe ukuthi akalona iphoyisa ejoyina umbutho ngoba nakhu lizifunela umsebenzi wokuxosha ikati eziko. “Into yobuphoyisa uMkhwanazi uyayiphila, akazenzisi. Ngenxa yokungabi bikho kwamathuba omsebenzi, abanye bangena emaphoyiseni ngoba bezifunela nje umsebenzi ukuze babeke ukudla phezu kwetafula. Iningi labo sibabona bebanjwa benza ubugebengu, besebenzisana nezigebengu noma bethatha imali yokufumbathiswa. Yena ufike waba yiphoyisa elizimisele ukulwa nobugebengu,” kusho uJali. Umncome ngokungabi umkhuzi wamaphoyisa ongawavikeli uma enze okubi kodwa ovele aqinisekise ukuthi athola isijeziso esiwafanele. “Ngikhumbula efika lapho okwakubulawe khona izigebengu, kukhona namaphoyisa, kunokuthi alokhu edabuka, wavele wathi ibambe ngakho,” usho kanje. Uthe ubelidinga ithuba lesibili ngoba isifundazwe usasibambe kahle. “Siye sibone ngisho nasezinkundleni zomphakathi, abezinye izifundazwe, bethi bacela ukubolekwa uMkhwanazi azoqondisa isimo ezifundazweni zabo, baphendule abaKwaZulu-Natal bathi ngeke bakwazi ukuvuma noMkhwanazi. Sidinga abaholi okukhulunywa kanje ke ngabo. Uma bengaba baningi, izwe lethu lingaba yindawo engcono kakhulu,” kusho uJali. Uphinde wakhumbula ukwesekwa, athi bakuthola kuye ngo-2023, beyizinhlangano ezilwa nobugebengu eThekwini, ngesikhathi beqothwa yizigebengu. “Salwa kakhulu nobugebengu ngo-2022, lwabonakala ushintsho ngoba izigebengu sasingazinike thuba. Zakhetha ukusinombola, zisiqothe ngo-2023, wasondela uMkhwanazi, kwase kuthi ukuba ngcono,” kusho uJali. Uphinde wamncoma nangokuthi ukhumbuze amaphoyisa ukuthi angamaphoyisa, wathi isimo sizoya ngokuya sibuyela kokwakudala lapho iphoyisa lalihlonishwa khona. UNobhala webhodi leCommunity Policing Forum (CPF) KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siyanda Biyela, uhalalisele uMkhwanazi, wathi njengoba isiqinisekisiwe eyokubuya kwakhe ihlandla lesibili, umshikashika uzoqhubeka. “Sisezinhlelweni zokumkhombisa uhlelo lwethu lokugcina ezokuphepha njengoba kuyiwa ePhasikeni. Uma kudlula lapho kufanele kubhungwe ngeyokhetho oluphephile ngoNovemba, uma kudlula ukhetho sibheke amaholidi okuphela konyaka,” kusho uBiyela. Uthe uMkhwanazi umchoma uphaphe lwegwalagwala ngokuba umholi oqotho, wathi lokhu uye akubone uma kuvela izinsolo zokuthi kukhona amaphoyisa aphule umthetho. NeMeya yeTheku uMnuz Cyril Xaba, ithe ibambe ngakho ngokubuyiselwa esikhundleni kukaMkhwanazi, yathi ufike ngesikhathi esihle belungiselela izinhlelo zamaholidi ePhasika. Ne-ActionSA ikwamukele ukubuyela kukaMkhwanazi yathi uyisithenjwa sabantu empini yobugebengu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UKHALA ngezobulungiswa othi zihlinzela ezibini abagilwa bamacala okudlwengulwa asuke ebandakanya abasolwa abayizingane, umndeni wentombazanyana okuthiwa yehlelwa umuga ofanayo nyakenye njengoba kuhoxiswe icala ngesonto eledlule. Kulesi sigameko, okuthiwa senzeka eZwelibomvu  KwaNdengezi, ngoSepthemba 4 nyakenye, umgilwa owayeneminyaka emithathu, kuthiwa wadlwengulwa wumsolwa owayeneminyaka engu-12. Kwavela ukuthi umndeni kamgilwa wezwa ngesehlakalo ngosuku okuthiwa senzeka ngalo. Kuthiwa umgilwa watshela isihlobo ukuthi ulimele esithweni sakhe sangasese ngoba umsolwa, okuthiwa wamgagula ngegama, ufake isitho sakhe sangasese kwesakhe. Kwavela ukuthi umsolwa, owayekade ewufihlele umndeni wakhe, wavuma esebuzwa ngesehlakalo, icala lagcina livulwe ngoba umndeni kamgilwa waya esikhungweni iThuthuzela, eChatsworth. Uyise kamgilwa ongeke adalulwe ukumvikela, utshele Isolezwe ukuthi igama lomphenyi wagcina ukulibona ngesikhathi ethunyelelwa umyalezo wokuthi icala liphethwe ubani. “Akakaze angifonele, angikaze ngimbone, angikaze ngizwe lutho oluqhamuka kuye njengomphenyi wecala,” kusho uyise kamgilwa. Uthe yena ayekulindele wukuthi umphenyi asondele kubo njengabazali bakamgilwa, asho ukuthi icala lizohamba kanjani. “Ngimangele sengithunyelelwa i-sms ethi icala selihoxisiwe. Ngizwe ngidinwa futhi ngibone umthetho ungangisizi njengomzali kamgilwa, ngacabanga nabanye abaesisimeni esifana nesami,” usho kanje. Uthe ngesikhathi elusukumela udaba kukhona iphoyisa laKwaNdengezi elamtshela ukuthi nakuba icala lenziwe umuntu oneminyaka engaphansi kwewu-18 kodwa lisuke likhona ithuba lokuthi umsolwa ashushiswe. “Wathi nakuba kusuke kuyingane kodwa ngesikhathi kwenziwa uphenyo, kuyabhekwa ukuthi iyayazi yini into ebiyenza ukuthi ayifanele. Uma yazi, amathuba okuthi libe yicala eliphathekayo, asuke emaningi,” kusho uyise kamgillwa. Uthe lelo phoyisa lenza isibonelo sokuthi uma umsolwa engazange ayithi vu into asuke eyenzile, lokho kusuke kungolunye lwezimpawu ezikhombisa ukuthi uyaqonda ngokuphelele ukuthi asuke ekwenzile akufanele. Udalule ukuthi akakholwa wukuthi konke lokhu kuke kwabhekelelwa kuleli cala, wathi ngenxa yalokho, ubona umthetho ubenzela phansi abagilwa bokudlwengulwa. “Njengamanje umsolwa uyazitshakadulela, konke kumnandi. Mina ngapha kufanele nginakekele ingane esihlala ithukile, eshintsha ebusweni uma ike yambona umsolwa edlula ngaphandle komuzi,” kusho uyise kamgilwa. Uthe sebeshintshe ngisho nendlela ingane edlala ngayo, wathi isikhathi esiningi isihlale idlala endlini. "Uma sizoba nohambo, oluphoqa ukuthi siyishiye, sesiyicelela emzini osebangeni elingamakhilomitha angu-400 ngoba sesiyasaba ukuyishiya komakhelwane abaseduze." Uveze nokuthi indodakazi yakhe ibiyingane eziphaphele kodwa manje isihlale indwazile nje, kokunye ivele ikhale. “Iyona mpilo le ezomthetho ezifuna iphilwe abagilwa bokudlwengulwa nemindeni yabo? Kungani sibone sengathi umthetho ubeka phambili amalungelo abasolwa, bese awabagilwa uwashovela emuva?” usho kanje. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe abaphenyi bophiko lweFamily Violence Child Protection and Sexual Offences (FCS) eChatsworth, baavula icala lokudlwengula kulandela isigameko lapho okusolwa ukuthi intombazane (3) yadlwengulwa ngoSepthemba 4 nyakenye eZwelibomvu. “Icala lahoxiswa enkantolo,” kusho uNetshiunda.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMFUNDI ozibulele, uMongezi Shandu UFUNA amiswe uthisha bese kuqalwa uphenyo ngaye, umndeni womfundi kaGrade 12 eKhethimfundo High, eBhamshela, kulandela ukuzikhunga kwakhe ngoLwesine. UMongezi Shandu (22) utholwe wumndeni wakhe esebanda, ezilengise ngentambo egumbini lakhe lokulala. Umalume wakhe, uMnuz Nathi Santosi, uthe bathole engasekho umshana wakhe ukuthi bese kunesikhathi kukhona uthisha anenkinga naye esikoleni. Uveze ukuthi kusuka ngonyaka odlule, umshana wakhe ubengalenzi iphutha lokuya esikoleni engasifakile isifonyo. Uthe ubede embuza ukuthi esani isifonyo ngoba kudala yaphela iCovid-19, umufi aphendule ngelithi: “Lutho lume”. “Sithole manje ngoba esezibulele ukuthi kukhona uthisha owathi kuye akamsize afake isifonyo uma eza esikoleni ngoba umlomo wakhe uyamnyanyisa,” kusho uSantosi. Udalule ukuthi kukhona okungahambi kahle ebebekwazi ngothisha ofanayo kodwa bengazi ukuthi kuzoholela ekutheni umshana azibulale. Uthe maphakathi noFebhuwari, bathole ukuthi lo thisha ugibele umufi ngamanqindi, kulandela ukuthi amdlalise ngendlela angayithandi. “Sizwa kuthiwa lo thisha waqukula umshini wokugaya amaphepha (printer), umshana wamdlalisa ngelithi ‘uyisigora Sir’. Kuthiwa wavele wabeka phansi umshini, wamngena ngezibhakela,” usho kanje. Uthe emva kwaleso sigameko, ekhaya labo kwafika uthishanhloko, ethi ezokhuluma ngodaba. Uveze ukuthi lwaphetha ngokuthi unina kamufi athi umufi akabuyele esikoleni, afike axolise kuthisha, nokuyinto umfundi okuthiwa wayenza. Nokho kuvela ukuthi ngoLwesihlanu olwandulela uLwesine, umfundi agcine ezibulala ngalo, uthisha wambizela ehhovisi, bangqumuza bobabili. “Asazi ukuthi yini le ayisho kuye njengoba sesithola ukuthi ngoMsombuluko nangoLwesibili wahlala emathoyilethi, wangalubhada ekilasini. NgoLwesithathu walova kanjalo nangoLwesine agcine ezibulala ngalo,” kusho uSantosi. Uthe akukho ncwadi noma myalezo abawubhalelwe umufi ngaphambi kokuba azibulale kodwa umyalezo abawuthole kwiselula, abewuthumelela umngani wakhe ethi: “Bafikile othisha ekhaya kwakhuluywa kodwa mina hhayi ngeke”. Uthe lokhu kubadwebele isithombe esigcwele sokuthi into eholele ekutheni umshana wakhe azibulale, yile mpi ebikhona phakathi kwakhe nothisha. “Sisola ukuthi kukhulu akukhuluma enganeni. Kodwa yangakuveza ngoba ibengesiyo ingane ekhonze ukukhuluma. Yini ndaba ikhulume naye bese emva kwesikhathi esifishane iyazibulala?” kubuza uSantosi. Uthe bona bewumndeni bafuna ubulungiswa ngesehlakalo. “Sifuna amiswe bese ephenywa ngesehlakalo. Sikhathazeke ngokuthi uma lolu daba luphelela emoyeni, zingaki ezinye izingane ezizozibulala ngenxa yakhe?” kusho uSantosi. Abesigungu esilawula isikole ngokunjalo noMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal, kuze kwashaya isikhathi sokushicilela bengakaphefumuli ngalolu daba. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, uthe amaphoyisa aseNsuze avule idokodo lokufa komuntu ukuze liphenywe, kulandela isigameko sokutholwa kowesilisa (22) ezihengile endaweni yaseSidunjini ngoLwesine.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UHLALELE ovalweni umphakathi wase-Area 2, eMhlasini, eVerulam, kulandela ukwanda kwezigameko zokudutshulwa kubulawe abantu ngesihluku kule ndawo. Lokhu kuza emva kwesigameko sangoLwesibili, sokudutshulwa kubulawe owesilisa noyise. Ngokusho komthombo ocele ukungadalulwa, abasolwa abangaziwa, bafike babhodloza isicabha salapho obekulala khona owesilisa (41), bangena ngaphakathi, bamdubula. “Kuthe uma uyise ephuma kwelakhe igumbi lokulala, ezobheka emva kokuzwa umsindo wokuqhuma kwesibhamu, abasolwa baphendukela kuye, naye bamdubula,” kusho umthombo oqinisekise eyokuthi bobabili baphelele endaweni yesigameko. Uthe kwenzeka lokhu nje ngenyanga edlule, bekudutshulwe abanye abane endaweni. Uqhuba, uthe kubona kwaphangalala ababili, kwathi abanye ababili balimala. “Asisazi ukuthi kwenzekani ngempela. Sesihlale sisaba ngoba kulezi zigameko, abantu balahlekelwa yimiphefumulo yabo,” kusho umthombo othe okubi, kabazi bewumphakathi ukuthi ababulawayo babulawelwani? Okhulumela abenkampani yonogada ebizelwe endaweni yesigameko ngomakhelwane, i-Reaction Unit South Africa (Rusa), uMnuz Prem Balram, uthe baqaphele ukuthi abafi bebedutshulwe emakhanda. “Badutshulelwe emagunjini amabili ahlukene ngaphakathi egcekeni. Kutholwe amagobolondo amane ezinhlamvu zohlobo lwe-9mm kwelinye igumbi, kwathi kwelinye kwatholwa amathathu ohlobo olufanayo,” kusho uBalram. Uthe omakhelwane bathe kabayazi imbangela yokubulala futhi kabababonanga abasolwa. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uCaptain Ntathu Ndlovu, uthe amaphoyisa aseVerulam, aphenya amacala amabili okubulala. “Izidumbu zabafi abaneminyaka elinganiselwa ku-41 no-60, zitholwe ngaphakathi endlini eMhlasini, ngoLwesibili,” kusho uCapt Ndlovu, othe akukaboshwa muntu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMHOLI we-ActionSA, uMnuz Herman Mashaba ubeyingxenye yombhikisho we-March and March eThekwini, izolo. Ubehamba nabanye okubalwa uMfundisi Vusi Dube we-ANC noPhakel'umthakathi ADWEBE umugqa obomvu amaphoyisa izolo, athi akukho muntu ozoya eSouth Beach (Phoyinti), ekhalima ababhikishi be-March and March, abebefuna ukuya khona njengoba kugcwele abantu bokufika. Lokhu kuze emva kokuthi epopole ingozi yokuthi singahle singakwazi ukulawuleka isimo uma ababhikishi, abalwa neyabantu bokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho, beya kuleya ndawo, esithathwa njengo-alubhadwa oyisizinda sabokufika eThekwini. Umsunguli we-March and March, ebiqeda unyaka yasungulwa izolo, uNkk Jacinta Ngobese-Zuma, uthe kabagculisekile ngokwenzekile. Uthe abakubonayo ukuthi izikhulu zikahulumeni kanjalo namaphoyisa bacabanga ukuthi bayazidlalela bona njengoba bebhikisha nje. "Angiboni ukuthi le nto esikhala ngayo bayayibona. Uma beyibona, banakho ukuthi vele ekugcineni kosuku, sizothobela umthetho wabo," kusho uNkk Ngobese-Zuma. Usole izikhulu zikahulumeni ngokungaphumeleli kwesifiso sabo sokuthi imashi yabo ihambe ngasePhoyinti, wathi zazibathembisile ezingxoxweni ukuthi uma bengayi kule ndawo, kuzofika uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa esifundazweni, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi azokhuluma nabo, asho ukuthi yini ezokwenziwa ngenkinga yabokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho? "Sabanika imizila emine, yonke eyayizodlula ePhoyinti. Sasinesizathu salokho. Izidakamizwa zigcwele laphaya, ukudayiswa komzimba kubuzwa laphaya, abokufika abangene ngokungemthetho kuleli, bagcwele khona, ngisho nalabo abadelelayo bakhona," kusho uNkk Ngobese-Zuma. Uthe ngisho nezibhedlela kanjalo nezikole okuvela ukuthi zigcwele abokufika, zikuleya ndawo. "Ngesikhathi sikhuluma nabo, sasikubeke kwacaca ukuthi sifuna ukudlula laphaya. Kunezakhiwo ezikuleya ndawo ezithathwe yibo ngodli. Besifuna ukudlula ngakhona, sibakhumbuze ukuthi yizwe lethu leli," usho kanje. Uthe bayafisa ukwazi ukuthi yini le engaka evikelwa amaphoyisa kuleya ndawo? Uqhube wathi kubajabhisile ukuthi uMkhwanazi angabonwa, wakhala nangokuthi ngisho neMeya yedolobha, uMnuz Cyril Xaba, ibingabonwa. Umsunguli we-ActionSA, uMnuz Herman Mashaba, uthe indaba yabokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho isinesikhathi ilimaza elakuleli, wathi okwenziwa yi-March and March kanjalo nezinye izinhlaka zomphakathi bakushayela elikhulu ihlombe. "Kwanele! Sanele! Abantu bethu bayahlupheka. Sinabethu abantu ababalelwa ku-12 million abangasebenzi, intsha yethu icekelwa phansi yizigebengu eziseqophelweni eliphezulu zokufika, ezabona ithuba lokwenza izwe lethu indawo yokudlalela," kusho uMashaba. Isishoshovu sokugcinwa kwezinto eziphathelene nesintu, uPhakelumthakathi, sithe bazokhumbuza uhulumeni ukuthi izakhamuzi zaseNingizimu Afrika yizona izingane zakhe, hhayi abokufika. "Sizolokhu simkhumbuze njalo. Yithi okufanele asinakekele kakhulu kunabantu bokufika," kusho uPhakel'umthakathi. Uthe kuletha elikhulu ithemba ukwanda kwabantu emibhikishweni ye-March and March, wathi nokusabalala kwayo ezindaweni ezehlukene, kushunyayelwa ivangeli elilodwa, kukhomba ukuthi iyogcina inqotshiwe eyabokufika. "Uhulumeni akasasilaleli ngoba sebebaningi kakhulu abantu bokufika. Siyabona ukuthi usecabanga ukuthi sebengamvotela, aphathe, kanti akazi ukuthi njengoba kade ephethe yonke le minyaka, ngeke esaphatha ngoba abantu sebebonile ukuthi akanendaba nabantu," usho kanje. Enza isibonelo sokuthi kubukeka uhulumeni elwa nabakuleli, uthe njengoba bebhikisha, kukhishwe inqwaba yamaphoyisa ukuthi izobagada, ekubeni ababoni kukhishwa isibalo esifanayo ukuyokhuculula yonke inhlobo yobugebengu athe benzeka ePhoyinti. "Abokufika badayisa izidakamizwa la, bashushumbisa abantu, beba izingane kodwa abenziwa lutho," kusho uPhakel'umthakathi, othe yizo zonke izinto abafuna ukuzivimba lezo. Uphinde wakhala ngabesifazane bakuleli, ababize ngodadewabo, wathi bashade nabantu abangabazi. "Silungisa lezo zinto ke. Sogcina siyinqobile. Uzophuma lo hulumeni okhona kungene abantu abazokhethwa umphakathi," kusho uPhakel'umthakathi, othe into ethi muntu wokufika, izohamba kuleli.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMPHATHISWA wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma (phakathi nendawo), ebuka ngesikhathi kuhlolwa izithuthi zomphakathi esikhungweni seRoad Traffic Inspectorate (RTI) eMdloti, KwaDukuza. ANGAPHEZU kuka-3 400 amaphoyisa omgwaqo azotshalwa ezindaweni ezehlukene zesifundazwe ngamaholidi ePhasika. Lokhu kuvezwe wuMphathiswa wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma izolo, ngesikhathi ethula ngokusemthethweni imikhankaso yoMnyango yokuqinisekisa ezokuphepha ngamaholidi ePhasika. UDuma usho kanje esithangamini nabezindaba emgwaqweni uDumisani Makhaye, KwaMashu, lapho obekunesivimbamgwaqo esikhulu khona, okuvulwe ngaso imikhankaso. Ngaphambi kwalokho, uDuma ubehambele isikhungo seRoad Traffic Inspectorate (RTI) eMdloti, KwaDukuza. Ekhuluma nabezindaba, uDuma uthe angaphezu kuka-3 483 amaphoyisa omgwaqo alesi sifundazwe azotshalwa, wathi avela ezingeni likazwelonke azoba ngaphezuku kuka-105. Uthe bazibekele ukuthi zehle ngo-10% izingozi ezibulala abantu emgwaqweni ngempelasonto ende yePhasika. “NgePhasika langonyaka odlule, saqopha ukwehla okungu-38% esibalweni sabafe ezingozini zomgwaqo, uma kuqhathaniswa no-43% wango-2024. Sitshale amaphoyisa esifundazwe angaphezu kuka-3 483 nangaphezu kuka-105 awubamba ngendlela efanele umkhankaso kaNenzani La Ezweni,” kusho uDuma. Uthe amaphoyisa azosebenza amahora angu-24 izinsuku eziyisikhombisa zesonto kuze kube uMeyi 3, nonyaka. “Sizoba nezivimbamgwaqo ezingu-148 ezizobe zibheka izinto ezehlukene. Ezingu-80 zizobhekana nabashayela bephuzile,” kusho uDuma. UMPHATHISWA wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma (phakathi nendawo), ebuka ngesikhathi kuhlolwa izithuthi zomphakathi esikhungweni seRoad Traffic Inspectorate (RTI) eMdloti, KwaDukuza. Uthe ezindaweni ezithathwa njengezihlale zehlelwa yizingozi kanjalo nakulezo okujwayele ukuthutheleka khona izivakashi kanjalo nabakhonzayo, zizoba ngu-118 izindawo okuzotshalwa kuzo amaphoyisa azobe eqaphe isivinini izimoto ezihamba ngaso. Uqhube wathi izimoto ezingakufanele ukuba semgwaqweni, zizosuswa emgwaqweni. Uthe abazobhekana kuphela nabashayeli bezimoto kodwa bazophinde badlulele kubanikazi bazo. Abaphuza amanzi amponjwana bese begcwaneka emgwaqweni, uthe bazokhalelwa amasongo kaSigonyela. Emkhankasweni wayizolo, obuqale ngo-7 ekuseni, kuthe kushaya u-9 wasekuseni, bese kuhlolwe amabhasi angu-17 kanjalo namatekisi. Ngesikhathi esifanayo, bese zizine izithuthi zomphakathi ebese ziboshiwe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: SIKE sagqekezwa isikole uMkhumbane Secondary kulandela udweshu ngokufakwa kwamakhamera UKUGQEKEZWA kwesikole uMkhumbane Secondary, eChesterville, kunike abazali isizathu esiqinile sokuthi angabe esathintwa ngempela amakhamera asuse umsindo ngenyanga edlule kulesi sikole. Lokhu kuvele ngesikhathi Isolezwe lixoxa nomunye wabazali, ukubheka ukuthi sihamba kanjani isimo selokhu kubuyelwe esikoleni, kulandela ukuphazamiseka kokufunda amasonto amathathu. Umzali, uNksz Xolile Buhlalu, uveze ukuthi sigqekeziwe isikole ngoMashi 10, kodwa abasolwa abathathu abavezwa amakhamera, bagcina bengathathanga lutho. “La makhamera angafunwa ngothisha beSadtu noMnyango wezeMfundo, yiwo aveze kahle ukuthi abasolwa babebathathu, kanti omunye wabo, sizwa kuthiwa abamaziyo sebeshilo ukuthi ungubani. Lokhu kusinikeze esinye isizathu esiqinile singabazali sokuthi bubaluleke ngani ubukhona bawo,” kusho uNksz Buhlalu. Uthe uthishanhloko obambile njengoba esamisiwe obekhona phambilini, ukuqonda ngokuphelele ukukhathazeka kwabazali ngobugebengu esikoleni. UNksz Buhlalu uthe ngaleso sizathu uthishanhloko ubalalele bengabazali uma bethi awangakhishwa. Uveze ukuthi ngoLwesithathu olwedlule, uMnyango uthumele uchwepheshe okuvele ukuthi ubezowakhipha. “Nokho uthole abazali bengangaye esangweni lesikole, basondela eduze ukuzwa ukuthi uzokwenzani, ngesikhathi engena ngaphakathi,” kusho uNksz Buhlalu, othe ugcine ehamba engawakhiphanga, emva kokubalalela ngokuthi awusizo emuva kokugqekezwa ezinsukwini ezimbalwa ezedlule. Uveze ukuthi ngokwabo isikole sisaqhubeka kahle ngothisha betoho. “Laba abalaxaza ukufundisa izingane zethu, abakabuyi. Basavuka bayovala amahhovisi ezemfundo eTruro. Izingane zethu zisafundiswa yilaba abakhokhelwa abazali. Sibona konke kuhamba kahle ngoba bazifundisa ngisho nangezimpelasonto ukuzama ukubuyisa isikhathi esilahlekile,” usho kanje. Uqhube wathi njengamanje baphezu kwezinhlelo zokucela uMnyango ukuthi usale usubaqasha ngokugcwele ngoba bayithathela phezulu imfundo yezingane zabo. “Laba abakhetha ukuvele bazishiye esithubeni izingane zethu ngenxa yamakhamera ekubeni ekhona ezikoleni zabadla izambane likapondo lapho kufunda khona ezabo, asisabadingi esikoleni sethu,” usho kanje. Kusuke omkhulu umsindo kulesi sikole ngasekupheleni kukaJanuwari, othisha abangu-22 beSadtu belaxaza ukufundisa. Phakathi kwezikhalo zabo, kwakungukuthi bafuna akhishwe amakhamera abefakwe emakilasini. Kwavela ukuthi bakholwa wukuthi uthishanhloko - obekhona ngaleso sikhathi - uwafake ngoba efuna ukubabuka befundisa. Kwasuka esinamathambo abazali beshaya phansi ngonyawo, bethi awayi ndawo ngoba angelinye lamathuluzi isikole esiwasebenzisayo ukuqapha ubugebengu. Ngasekupheleni kukaFebhuwari, ugcine emiswa uthishanhloko obekhona. Nakuba abazali, ababewotha ubomvu, bakubeka kwacaca ukuthi uMnyango umumisa ngoba uthatha uhlangothi lothisha benhlangano eyamaniswa ne-ANC, iSadtu, uMnyango waveza ukuthi umiselwe okunye okungahlobene nodungunyane. Zintathu izinyanga azimisiwe uthishanhloko.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNDUNANKULU waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, uthe kuyomthokozisa ukutholwa kwentombazanyana eneminyaka eyisikhombisa, enyamalale ngasekupheleni kukaFebhuwari nonyaka, maqede kwasuka esinamathambo eKokstad. ULathitha Mtolo (7), obefunda uGrade 2 eXoloxolo Primary, kuthiwa waduka ngendlela engaqondakali ngoFebhuwari 26. Kuthiwa waphuma ewumuntu owayeyodlala nabangani bakhe emijondolo yaseMarikana, wangaphinde wabuya. Emva kwezinsuku engatholakali, umphakathi owawuvutha ungabaselwe - ugcine ungqongqisa ngomlilo imizi embalwa yalabo ebebesolwa ngokuba nolwazi ngokunyamalala kwakhe. UNDUNANKULU waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, emisa idolo umndeni kaLathitha Mtolo odukile Image: KZN PREMIER'S OFFICE Phakathi kwayo kukhona owakubo komlutha wewunga, okuthiwa waveza ukuthi uwona othathe uLathitha wayomnika owesifazane owayegane inyanga yaseKokstad. Lo mlutha kuthiwa wathi bamcwiye ephila umgilwa, base bembulala, isidumbu sakhe basiphonsa edamini elisendaweni. Umuzi wayo le nyanga kanjalo neyabanye abelaphi bendabuko endaweni ayisindanga njengoba umphakathi wavele wayingqongqisa ngomlilo, ngelithi awusafune belaphi bendabuko endaweni. UNtuli uqale ngokuhambela isiteshi samaphoyisa iKokstad ukuyothola umbiko ogcwele ngokulahleka kukamgilwa kanjalo nokwenziwa amaphoyisa ngesehlakalo. Ube esedlulela emndenini kamgilwa ukuyowumisa idolo, kwayima eyokwengamela umcimbi wokugujwa koSuku lwamaLungelo Abantu enkundleni yezemidlalo eRiverview, eKokstad. UNtuli uthe bakhathazeke kakhulu njengohulumeni ngokuqhubeka kwezigameko eziyamaniswa nokuhlukunyezwa kwabesifazane nezingane kule ndawo nasesifundazweni sonkana. Uthe lena akuyona nje inkinga eyamaniswa nobugebengu kuphela kodwa ithinta nokuhlukunyezwa kwamalungelo abantu. Uthe ukukhathazeka kwakhe kuqhamuke ngesikhathi ethola umbiko ngokulahleka kwezingane kule ndawo. “Kungikhathazile okwenzeke ngoFebhuwari, ingane (7) okuthiwa ibidlala ibuye ize ekhaya, izodla, iphinde iphume, yagcina ingabuyanga. Kuze kube yinamuhla ayikaze iphinde itholakale,” kusho uNtuli. Uthe umthokozisile umbiko awuthole emaphoyiseni wokuthi enza konke okusemandleni ukuthungatha umgilwa, okufaka phakathi ukucinga kusetshenziswa kobuchwepheshe besimanje. “Ngithe emaphoyiseni ngilindele ukuzwa isiphetho esiyosithokozisa sonke ngoba ngifisa siyithole iphila, siyithole noma ingasaphili,” usho kanje. Uthe uthole nangodaba lokugqunywa esitokisini kwabazali bengane (3) okuthiwa yezwakala ikhala ekameleni eyayihleli kulo nosingababa ngoDisemba nyakenye, kulandela ukuthi eyibuze ukuthi iphi i-USB yakhe? Kuthiwa unina owaphuma lwelinye ikamelo eyobheka ukuthi kwenzekani lapho okwakuhleli khona usingababa nengane, wathola ukuthi kayisabonwa. Kuvela ukuthi lezi zithandani azizange zibike lutho emaphoyiseni ngokulahleka kwengane, kwaze kwaba uJanuwari nonyaka, nokwaholela ekuthe kube yizo eziboshwa kuqala ngokunyamalala kwayo. Le ngane kuthiwa namanje ayikaze itholakale. UNtuli ufanise izigameko ezifuze lezi nento ekhathazayo. “Noma sigubha amalungelo abantu kodwa baningi abantu besifazane abangakujabuleli ukuthi sinomthetho onikeza amalungelo ngoba bayizisulu,” usho kanje.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UBUSATHI uzikhotha amanxeba ngesihlobo esibulawe ngesihluku, sabekwa endlini yaso yokugcina ngempelasonto edlule, umndeni wesaguga (84) esibulawe nomzukulu (13) eMkhelekehleni, KwaNgcolosi, ngoLwesibili olwedlule. Lokhu kuvele ngoMgqibelo, ngesikhathi Isolezwe likhuluma nesihlobo, uMnuz Hlelo Bhengu, kulandela ukuthi amaphoyisa esifundazweni ekhiphe isitatimende esithi "ambulele" umsolwa ezintatha. Ngokusho kokhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, umsolwa, Isolezwe elithole ukuthi unguMnuz Nqobani Bhengu (24), ubulawe nomunye ngesikhathi bekhetha ukuvulela ngenhlamvu emaphoyiseni abezobafuna. INDAWO yesigameko lapho amaphoyisa ebulale khona abasolwa ababili kudutshulwanwa Image: DASSEN THATHIAH UBhengu ekhuluma neSolezwe, uthe uninakhulu, uNkk Thengani Bhengu (84) nomzukulu wakhe uZesuliwe Mbambo (13), babulawe ngokudutshulwa ngoLwesibili ebusuku. “Izihlobo zesifazane ebezikhona egcekeni ngesikhathi kwenzeka isigameko, zithe umbulali udubule ephindelela ekameleni likagogo, emi ngaphandle. Kudubuleke ugogo nabazukulu ababili bamantombazane alala nabo,” kusho uBhengu. Uthe umzukulu wesibili, naye odubulekile uyelulama esibhedlela. “Kwenzeka lesi sigameko, umndeni ubusanda kufihla umalume, naye oshone ngokudutshulwa,” kusho uBhengu. Uthe umalume wakhe, uMnuz Zenzele Bhengu (57) wadutshulwa emasontweni amabili edlule, ebuya esontweni ebusuku. “Abantu bezwa kuqhuma isibhamu kaningi, bathi uma bephuma beyobheka, njengoba isigameko senzeka phakathi kwemizi, bathola ukuthi usedutshulwe,” usho kanje. Uthe izihlobo ezingezesifazane, bese zithukile kulandela isigameko sakamumva. “Bezingaqondi ukuthi kwenzekani, ukuthi kungani kubulawa umndeni ngesihluku? Bezihlalele ovalweni impela kwazise zingabantu besifazane,” kusho uBhengu. Ngokuthola kweSolezwe, umsolwa, uNqobani ubethinteka ekubulaweni kwesinye isihlobo, naso esabulawa ngesihluku emzini waso ngo-2024. Uthe nakuba uZesuliwe ayekhona endaweni yaleso sigameko kodwa ngeke alibeke ngesihloko elokuthi wasibona isigameko senzeka ukusuka nokuhlala, ngoba wabaleka wayocasha. Uthe okwamanje ngeke basho ukuthi banolwazi olugcwele ngokuthi lona wesilisa obulawe amaphoyisa nguye othintekayo ekubulawa kwezihlobo, kwazise amaphoyisa abengakabikeli ngalokho. “Abengakasiniki thina umbiko ogcwele wokuthi njengoba ebulewe nje, ingoba ubethinteka ezehlakalweni zokubulawa komndeni wethu. Sisabhekene nokufihla ugogo nomzukulu, cishe uma sekudlulile, yilapho umuntu azozwa kahle emaphoyiseni ukuthi athini,” usho kanje. Uthe akukho okuphathekayo abanakho maqondana nokuthi umndeni wakhe ubulawelweni ngesihluku, wathi ngisho nesigameko sango-2024, bagcina uphenyo lwakhona lungayidalulanga imininingwane ngomsolwa. UNkk Bhengu noZesuliwe bafihlwe ngeSonto. UNetshiunda, esitatimendeni asithumelele abezindaba, uthe abasolwa ababili ebebefunelwa amacala amane okubulala endaweni yaseHillcrest, bafe ngesikhathi bedubulana namaphoyisa. Eqhubeka nokuchaza, uthe phakathi kwamacala okubulala ebebefunelwa wona, kukhona nawokubulala isaguga (84) nentombazane (13) ebebesanda kubabulala. Uthe amaphoyisa athole umkhondo wokuthi abasolwa babhace ekhaya elisemgwaqweni uMkhelekehleli, KwaNgcolosi. “Athe uma egasela kulo muzi onendlu ewulawondi, ebilele abasolwa, bavele badubula bebhekise kuwona. Nawo abuyisele ngayo inhlamvu, badubuleka bafa,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe alikho iphoyisa elilimalile kulokhu kudubulana, waveza ukuthi kuvulwe amacala okuzama ukubulala amaphoyisa, asazophenywa.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: EZINYE zezinyathi zaseHluhluwe iMfolozi Park Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI UNAKA usungaphakathi esiqiwini iHluhluwe-iMfolozi Park (HiP) ukuthi kwesinye isikhathi abantu bazama ukuvakashela umhlaba wonke kodwa ubuhle balapha ekhaya bengabazi. Akuzona izilwane kuphela ezikukhanga kule ndawo engaphansi kwesifunda uMkhanyakude, kodwa nomlando wendawo wenza ibe ngehlukile ebalazweni lomhlaba. Lesi siqiwi, esisebangeni elingamakhilomitha angu-280 uma usuka eThekwini, sidala kunazo zonke ezwenikazi i-Afrika njengoba sasungulwa ngo-1895. Singudedangendlale njengoba singamahektha angu-96 000. Sizakhele elikhulu igama emhlabeni ngokuba yiso sodwa esakwazi ukuhlenga ubhejane omhlophe ukuba ungashabalali. Umlando waso uyigugu ngoba lolu hlobo lukabhejane bese lubhekene nenselelo yokuthi lungase lube yinzwabethi ezizukulwaneni ezizayo. I-HiP iyikhaya lezinhlobonhlobo zezilwane zasendle, kodwa igabe kakhulu ngezilwane ezinhlanu ezaziwa ngele-Big Five - okuyibhubesi, ubhejane, indlovu, ingwe kanjalo nenyathi. Akuzona lezi zilwane kuphela ezikhanga amehlo esivakashi kule ndawo. Ubuhle bezintaba namathafa ambethe ingubo eluhlaza yezihlahla notshani ayiphendula iPharadisi lasemhlabeni, nomqondo ujubalale emoyeni wakhona opholile othakwe ngomsindo wezinyoni ezitshiloza zenanelana. Khona lapha enqulwini! Uma uhamba ngemoto ulibangise ezindaweni zokuphumula ezakhiwe kule ndawo, uhamba ukhangwa amadube eduze komgwaqo, agabe ngemibala yawo egqamile. AMANYE amadube agabe ngobuhle eHluhluwe iMfolozi Park Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI Izintibane zikhishazela eduze kwezindlela ngoba kuthiwa zikhonze ukudla utshani obusonqenqemeni lomgwaqo ngoba obakhona abubude. Uma usufikile ngaphakathi kunezinhlobonhlobo zezinto izivakashi ezingazenza ukuzijabulisa, nokuthakasela imvelo. Phakathi kwazo kungaba ukuhamba ngemoto yakhona eyakhelwe ukwehla yenyuka emahlathini, ithwele izivakashi ezisuke zimagange ukubona iBig Five kanye nezinye izilwane zasendle. AMABHUBESI aseHluhluwe iMfolozi Park Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI Ohambweni lwethu sibe nenhlanhla yokuwabona ngamehlo amabhubesi, esiwabhadame ekhwelana. Obesiphelezela ongungoti walapha, uSamora Xulu, uthe kuyinto eyivelakancane ezivakashini, njengoba uke uphele unyaka kwabona bengayibonanga. Uchaze ukuthi ibhubesi aliyona ingozi kubavakashi abasuke behamba ngezinyawo esiqiwini. Phakathi kwezinto athe akufanele umuntu azenze, uthe ukwethuka, ukubanga umsindo ngokukhuluma kanjalo nokuphenduka ubaleke uma ulibona. “Uma ubanga umsindo livele libone sengathi uyingozi kulona, bese liyakuhlasela. Uma futhi ubaleka, ulinika umqondo wokuthi uyinyamazane, ngakho livele libone into okufanele liyijahe, liyibambe, liyiqhobozele,” kusho uXulu. Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI Uchaze ingwe njengesilwane esinamahloni, esingazwani nomsindo, wathi uma sizwa umsindo wabantu noma sibabonela kude, sivele sicashe. Uthe  indaba yonakala uma kwenzekile kwahlangana amehlo phakathi kwayo nomuntu. Elanda ngobhejane uthe imvamisa awuboni kahle emehlweni kodwa uthembela ekuhogeleni kanjalo nasemoyeni ukupopola ingozi. Isiqiwi saseHluhluwe siyikhaya lazo zonke izilwane eziwuphawu lweNingizimu Afrika njengoba  sibone amabhubesi, obhejane, izindlovu, izinyathi, izindlulamithi, amadube, izintibane, izimpala nokunye. Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI UXulu uthe iningi lezilwane zasendle, okubalwa kuzona zonke lezi okuthiwa ziyingozi, njengayo iBig Five, ziba nolaka uma zizele, azifuni lutho olusondela kuzo nasemazinyaneni azo. Siphinde sabuka nefilimu, iWild Hope, eqophe yaphinde yagcina umlando wokususwa kobhejane izimpondo ukubavikela kulabo abasuke befuna ukubazingela, bababulale. Le filimu ichaza kabanzi ngokuthi kuhlangana baphi ochwepheshe uma ubhejane uzonqunywa uphondo, lokhu kubandakanya lowo owujovayo ukuze utubeke ungezwa lutho, udokotela wezilwane, onquma izimpondo nabanye. Kuphinde kuvele ukuthi ukwenza wonke lo msebenzi kuthatha imizuzu engu-20 ubhejane ngamunye. Iphinde iveze nokuthi luphinde lukhule ngokuphelele uphondo emuva kwezinyanga ezingu-18 lunqunyiwe. Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI IVulamehlo Craft, okuyindawo lapho kudayiswa yonke inhlobo yomsebenzi wezandla ayisalanga ngaphandle ezindaweni esizihambele. Kuyona kukhona abesilisa bendawo ababaza izinto zokuhlobisa ezehlukene ngesikhathi abesifazane begabisa ngekhono labo lokwenza izinto ezehlukene ngobuhlalu nokunye okwelukwayo. Sibuye sahambela ne-Nerve Centre yezobunhloli, lapho kugadwa abangena esiqiwini ngokungemthetho. Kule ndawo kubhekwa ukusebenza kwamakhamera, indiza enophephela emhlane, ama-drone kanjalo nezinja  ezifuna umkhondo ngephunga. Impela iHiP akuyona indawo ongazisola uma wena nomndeni wakho nizikhiphela kuyo. Ungabuya ubheme wakholwa ngobuhle besiqiwi, izilwane ezikuso, abasebenzi abanobungani, ukudla okwehla esiphundu nezindawo zokulala ezinhle.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMFUZISELO kaNelson Mandela Image: EThekwini Municipality UMPHATHISWA woMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu KwaZulu-Natal, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi, uhlabe eyokungapheleli komlando ngemifuziselo emibili yabaholi be-ANC esanda kwembulwa eThekwini. UButhelezi usho lokhu ngesikhathi ethula inkulumo yakhe yomcimbi wokuklonyeliswa komasipala abenze kahle KwaZulu-Natal, eDurban International Convention Centre (ICC) ngoLwesihlanu. UButhelezi uthe kayiphelele le mifuziselo uma ungekho owoMntwana uMangosuthu Buthelezi ongasekho, owayengumsunguli we-IFP, aphinde abe nguNdunankulu wesizwe samaZulu. UMFUZISELO ka-OR Tambo Ube esenza isiphakamiso sokuthi iTheku, elakhe le mifuziselo esuse umsindo, lakhe owesithathu woMntwana. Kule mifuziselo kukhona oka-Oliver Reginald Tambo oseNorth Beach, bese kuba okaNelson Mandela osenkundleni yemidlalo iMoses Mabhida. Yomibili yembulwe nguMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa ngasekuqaleni kwale nyanga. UButhelezi uthe umlando wenkululeko yaseNingizimu Afrika ophelele noneqiniso kufanele umhloniphe njengamanye amaqhawe omzabalazo uMntwana waKwaPhindangene ngeqhaza naye alibamba emzabalazweni. “UMntwana waKwaPhindangenewaba yibhuloho phakathi komshoshaphansi we-ANC ka-Tambo eyayisekudingisweni kanjalo nenkululeko entsha kaMandela. UMntwana wenza isiqiniseko sokuthi umzabalazo uyaqhubeka eNingizimu Afrika ngesikhathi uhulumeni wobandlululo ubavale imilomo oTambo noMandela, waba yizwi labacindezelwe. Ngakho ke ayiphelele le mifuziselo eseThekwini uma ungekho owakhe,” kusho uButhezi. Ukhale ngokuthi umlando oxoxwa ngale mifuziselo awuphelele uma uMntwana engafakiwe, wathi ukuhlonishwa kwakhe kanye namanye amaqhawe omzabalazo kuyoqinisekisa ukuthi umlando oxoxwayo ngomzabalazo uyakuveza ukubambisana kwabaholi okwabumba isizwe. Umsindo usuke ngale mifuziselo emva kokuvela ukuthi yakhiwe ngo-R22 million. Ebebegxeka ukwakhiwa kwayo kukhona kubo izinhlangano ezifana neThekwini Ratepayers Protest Movement kanjalo namaqembu epolitiki. Bathe ukwakhiwa kwemifuziselo kuwukuchitha imali ebingenza omkhulu umehluko ekulethweni kwentuthuko emkhandlwini ohlale uhaqwe yizinkinga. Nokho iMeya kamasipala, uMnuz Cyril Xaba, eziphungela wathi ukufakwa kwayo kungenye yezindlela zokutshala kwezokuvakasha, wathi imali okwakhiwe ngayo imifuziselo ikwibhajethi yeminyakazimali edlule, ayithathwanga emalini yokulethwa kwezidingo emphakathini.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uSergeant Mondli Gabisa UFISA kube wukuthi bese lihlehliswa okokugcina yiNkantolo yeMantshi yaseThekwini, icala lokubulawa kwephoyisa laseCato Manor, eMayville, umndeni walo, olokhu ugqigqe njalo enkantolo. Usho kanje ngaphandle kwenkantolo izolo kulandela ukuvela kwabane ababhekene necala lokugwaza, babulale uSergeant Mondli Gabisa (39) ngoNovemba 8 nyakenye. Isidumbu sikaGabisa kuthiwa saficwa amaphoyisa sidindilize ngaphandle kwamaflethi aseMayville, kwavela ukuthi ugwazwe, wabulawa, emva kwengxabano nabasolwa, kanti isibhamu sakhe somsebenzi satholwa endaweni yesigameko. Amaphoyisa abe esebopha uMnuz Thalenta Griffiths Cele (42), Mnuz Philani "Maphila" Mhlongo (29), umfundi ka-matric uMinenhle Amahle Cele (20) noNksz Nadia Shezi (25). Isolezwe lathola ukuthi uThalenta noMinenhle bayizelamani. UMshushisi woMbuso, uMnuz Calvin Govender, utshele inkantolo ukuthi idokodo lisahleli ehhovisi loMqondisi wezokuShushiswa koMphakathi esifundazweni ukuze anqume ukuthi icala lizoyoqulwa kuyiphi inkantolo. Uveze nokuthi umbiko wokuhlolwa kwesidumbu nawo usashoda ophenyweni, iMantshi, uMnuz Ashwin Singh ibe isinquma ukuthi icala lihlehliselwe uMashi 27 nonyaka ukuze kuqhutshekwe nalolu phenyo. Udadewabo kamufi, uNksz Thobile Gabisa ephawula ngamafuphi uthe: “Sesikhulekela ukuthi uma selihlala ngokuzayo kube wukuthi selizonikwa inkantolo elizoqulwa kuyo.” Nokho uthe bayakuqonda ukuthi kokunye, ezobulungiswa zibuye zingasheshi njengoba besuke befisa. “Nokho sinalo ithemba lokuthi ubulungiswa buzogcina benzekile,” usho kanje. Kuleli cala umsolwa wokuqala, owesibili nowesithathu basolwa ngokubulala umufi bese kuthi owesine asolwe ngokushaya unkosikazi kamufi okuthiwa wayehamba naye ngosuku lwesigameko. Ngesikhathi befaka isicelo sebheyili nyakenye, abasolwa abathathu abangasekuqaleni, okungoCele, Mhlongo noMinenhle, banqatshelwa ibheyili, kwathi owesine, wadedelwa ngeka-R1000 eyayihambisana nemibandela yokuthi angalenzi iphutha lokuzama ukuxhumana nenkosikazi kamufi. Emva kokuboshwa kwabo nyakenye, kwavela ukuthi uMinenhle uboshwa nje ubefunda u-matric futhi ubebhala izivivinyo zokuphela konyaka. Wazama ukukubeka lokhu njengelinye lamaphuzu okuthi adedelwe ngebheyili, nokho inkantolo yakushaya indiva.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UKHALELA izimpendulo ezihlotsheni zikamsolwa, umndeni wowesifazane waseMabaleni, eMahlongwa, eMkhomazi, okuthiwa ubulawe ngesihluku uyise wezingane entathakusa ngeSonto. Kulesi sigameko okuthiwa senzeke kubo kamsolwa eGqolweni, kufe uNksz Zinhle Khomo (35) obedume ngelikaNeneh. Ngokusho kukadadewabo, uNksz Ngane Khomo, umndeni wabizelwa esigamekweni wumakhelwane, osazi ukusuka nokuhlala isehlakalo. Uthe bathola ucingo kumakhelwane, lungekho olwase lushaywe wumndeni kamsolwa. Uthe ngesikhathi bephuthuma esigamekweni, bazithela phezu kwezimoto zamaphoyisa kanjalo nomphakathi usubuthene khona. “Indlu yomxhaso, eyayiyindawo yesehlo, yayisihenqwe nge-tape yamaphoyisa, asiyalela ukuthi asiyoma ngakolunye uhlangothi. Yilapho esaqaphela khona ukuthi umsolwa usephakathi evenini yamaphoyisa ezama ukucasha ngokuthi alale phansi ngesisu,” kusho uNksz Khomo. Uthe akubona ubuningi begazi abazithela kulo ngesikhathi sebengeniswa ngaphakathi endlini yesigameko. “Igazi lalisihlangabeza emnyango. Kwathi uma singena ekamelweni, salibona lisaphazeke odongeni, emakhethinini, kukhombisa ukuthi ubengqinyuzwa khona,” kusho uNksz Khomo. Uthe basibona isidumbu sikadadewabo, sithe ja embhedeni, eshaya ngesudi yesele. Uveze ukuthi babona insimbi eyayiphansi igcwele igazi, intambo kagesi, kanjalo nenye eyayilenga ophahleni lwekamelo, kokubili kugcwele igazi. “Sisola ukuthi njengoba isidumbu sakhe sasiphezu kombhede, wabuye wasethula entanjeni njengoba yayinegazi futhi naso isidumbu sinomhuzuko entanyeni,” usho kanje. Uthe baqaphela ukuthi wayelimele kakhulu ekhanda, emzimbeni eluhlaza yonke indawo kanti ezinye izitho zomzimba zazinamanxeba avulekile, kukhombisa ukuthi ushaywe ngento ebimdebeza. Uthe esebalandisa umakhelwane wathi yena weza endaweni yesigameko ebusuku, ezwa kukhala ubudukluduklu, nomufi ememeza, ezikhalela. “Wathi ngesikhathi engqongqoza ewindini nasemnyango, umsolwa, wavula umnyango maqede wamkhahlela wayowa le kude. Esevuka lapho waqaphela ukuthi udadewethu uyahlaselwa futhi hhayi kancane kodwa wangaba nawo amandla okumsiza, kunalokho, wavele wathatha indodana (4) yabo eyayikhona endlini, wagoduka nayo. Kuvela ukuthi ngale kwale ngane eneminyaka emine, ikhona enye eneminyaka emibili, okuthiwa yayilele noninakhulu ngosuku lwesigameko. Udalule ukuthi umakhelwane ebalandisa wathi emva kwemizuzu engu-30 wezwa ngomsolwa engqongqoza kwakhe, wafike waziceba ukuthi usembulele, maqede waphindela kubo. “Umakhelwane uthe akabange esalandelela ngoba wazitshela ukuthi njengoba ezosho kuye, usewubikele nomndeni wakhe, nokwagcina kuvela ukuthi kwakungenjalo, walala nesidumbu waze waziceba ekuseni,” usho kanje. Kuthiwa ekuseni esezicebile, washo ukuthi usefuna ukubaleka njengoba esewabikele namaphoyisa ngesigameko, nokho afika esekhona. “Sibheke ubulungiswa ngokubulala udadewethu ngesihluku. Emndenini wakhe sifuna izimpendulo zokuthi ubulawa kanjani umuntu egcekeni elinabantu, bangezwa, futhi bangenzi lutho,” kusho uNksz Khomo. Uthe uma umsindo wazwiwa wumakhelwane, akukwazi ukuthi umndeni usegcekeni awuzwanga lutho. Uthe uninakhulu womsolwa wakhala ngokuthi libalahlile, ngokuthi indodana yakhe ibulale umuntu egcekeni. Uveze ukuthi umsolwa ubehlale emshaya umufi kangangoba ubebuye amvulele icala emaphoyiseni, aze amenzele ngisho nezincwadi zezivimbelo zenkantolo, nokho kuthiwa ubebuye akusule konke, babonakale sebeqale phansi bethandana.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: IGCAGCELE esokeni isitimela sempilo sakwaTransnet, iPhelophepha, sihambela indawo yaseMakhwezini, KwesakwaMthethwa, eMfolozi, ukuhambisa usizo lwezempilo oluhlukahlukene. Lesi sitimela esisuke sihlome ngodokotela bezifo ezehlukene, sihambela izindawo ezehlukene eNingizimu Afrika. Kusukela ngoMsombuluko sihambele kule ndawo kanti kulindeleke ukuthi size sihambe ngoLwesihlanu oluzayo. Phakathi kosizo esiluletha emphakathini olwezinkinga zamehlo, amazinyo, olokwelulekwa ngokomqondo kanjalo nezinye ezivame ukumba eqolo, uma ogulayo ethi uyofuna usizo ngazo kodokotela abazimele. UMPHAKATHI waseMakhwezini uthola usizo esitemeleni sempilo iPhelophepha Esinye isakhamuzi, uNkk Ngenzeni Majola sithe: “Sisizakele kakhulu ngokufika kwesitimela endaweni yethu. Silutholile usizo ebesiludinga. Njengoba sifikile endaweni sisizakele ngoba sivame ukusihambela uma sifuna usizo.” Umphathi wesitimela, uMnuz Bheki Mendlula, uthe ngesikaTransnet, wathi silekelela uMnyango wezeMpilo ngokuletha usizo lwezempilo emiphakathini ehlukene. Uthe leli yisonto lokuqala bekule ndawo, wathi bazoze bahambe ngoLwesihlanu oluzayo. “Sizobona abantu bakithi abasezindaweni zasemakhaya, abadinga ukusizwa ezifweni ezehlukene. Silekelela ngosizo lodokotela bengqondo, abamazinyo, abamehlo, siphinde sibe nabakhipha imithi,” kusho uMendlula. Uqhube wathi kusukela befikile ngoMsombuluko endaweni, baqaphele ukuthi isidingo esikhulu esezinkinga zamehlo. “Sibona bebaningi abantu abafuna usizo lwezinkinga eziphathelene namehlo. Sizozama ngakho konke okusemandleni ukuthi sibone abaningi, yize singeke sikwazi ukubaqeda bonke kodwa sizozama ukuziphusha ukuthi sibone abaningi,” usho kanje. Uthe bayazikhipha izizibuko ngoxhaso abaluthola kwabakwa-Eskom kanjalo nabe-OneSight EssilorLuxottica Foundation. IMeya kaMasipala waseMfolozi, uMnuz Xolani Bhengu, ihambela isitimela ngoMsombuluko ukuzosamukela, ithe bazoqinisekisa ukuthi basizwa ngezinsiza zokulala, labo abasuke besuka ezindaweni ezikude, okuvela ukuthi bafika ngayizolo, ukusondezela ukuthi basheshe bavuke, bathole usizo. “Siye sibone isasasa ababanalo uma kuthiwa isitimela sihambele eMpangeni esiteshini, uthole abantu sebeyolalela ngakhona. Siwutholile umbiko wokuthi bakhona abafikile kwayizolo bezolala eduze. Sizobona ukuthi sibalekelela kanjani ukuze bangagcini sebelala ezitulweni,” kusho uBhengu. UBhengu uthe ukuphuma kwabo ngobuningi, kukhomba ukuthi abantu baludinga kangakani usizo isitimela esiza nalo. Uphinde wakushayela ihlombe nokuthathwa kwezitshudeni zasemanyuvesi ehlukene, nazo ezinikwa ithuba lokuthi zizokwenza uhlelo lokuthwasela umsebenzi kulolu hlelo. “Nentsha yendawo eneziqu zasemanyuvesi, icoshe amathuba omsebenzi wokutolika, itolikela abantu abadala,” kusho uBhengu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Basathukile othisha baseZamokuhle Primary School, KwaMashu angozakwabo obanjwe inkunzi emagcekeni esikole SESIGXEKWE nawuMphathiswa woMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, isigameko sokubanjwa inkunzi kothisha abafundisa esikoleni iZamokuhle Primary, KwaMashu. Ngokusho kukaHlomuka, lesi sigameko senzeke ngoLwesihlanu, kanti abasolwa kuthiwa babakhombe ngezibhamu othisha ngesikhathi sesigameko. Uthe ngosuku lwesigameko abasolwa bagasele esikoleni, behlomile, bavalela unogada, base beqhubekela phambili nokubamba othisha inkunzi, bebaphuca izimpahla zabo ezehlukene. Kuvela ukuthi abagcinanga lapho, kodwa baphinde babaphoqa ukuthi bakhiphe imali yabo abayisebenze kanzima emabhange kusetshenziswa ama-app. “Lesi senzo siwubuqaba nobugwala lapho abenzi bobubi begcweleza khona abazinikele emsebenzini wokwakha ikusasa lezwe. Othisha bethu kufanele bavikelwe ngaso sonke isikhathi. Akufanele basebenze ngaphansi kwengcindezi yobudlova,” kusho uHlomuka. Uveze ukuthi lesi sigameko sishiye othisha kanjalo nabafundi bethikamezekile ngokomqondo, wathi umnyango usebenzisana namaphoyisa ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abasolwa babanjwa ngokushesha. “Kukhona icala lokubanjwa kwenkunzi kuhlonyiwe elivuliwe emaphoyiseni kulandela isigameko. Sinxusa noma ubani ongaba nolwazi olungaba wusizo ukuthi aphuthume, athinte amaphoyisa,” kusho uHlomuka. Uphinde waveza ukuthi othisha abathintekayo kanjalo nabafundi, bathola usizo lokwelulekwa ngokomqondo, ngesikhathi kwengezwa ezokuphepha kulesi sikole kanjalo nakwezinye esizendaweni. “Lesi sigameko siwukuhlaselwa kwekusasa lezwe kanjalo nesifundazwe. Asikwazi ukuvumela izigebengu ziphendule izikole zethu izindawo zezigameko zalolu hlobo,” usho kanje. Uthe izikole kufanele ziqhubeke nokuba yizindawo eziphephile zokufunda nokufundisa. Ube esenxusa imiphakathi ukuthi isebenzisane nezinhlaka ezilwa nobugebengu kanjalo nomnyango ukuze kuvikelwe izikole. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe amaphoyisa aKwaMashu aphenya icala lokubanjwa kwenkunzi esikoleni esikwa-D ngoLwesihlanu. "Imibiko iveza ukuthi abasolwa abathathu abangaziwa, ebebehlome ngezibhamu, bagasele esikoleni, babamba inkunzi othisha kanjalo nonogada izimpahla zabo," kusho uNetshiunda. Uqinisekise eyokuthi abasolwa baphinde baphoqa abagilwa ukuthi bakhiphe imali yabo emabhange. Uthe akubanga khona ukuqhunyiswa kwesibhamu okubikiwe, wathi akekho olimele. Uveze ukuthi okwamanje akukaboshwa muntu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: IPHOYISA elabulawa eNanda, uSergeant Sanele Dlamini LIHLEHLELE uLwesihlanu, ukuze afake isicelo sebheyili owesilisa osolwa ngecala lokudubula, abulale iphoyisa lophiko lwePresidential Protection Unit eNewtown A, eNanda, ngo-Ephreli nyakenye. Umufi, uSergeant Sanele Dlamini (37), wakuyo le ndawo, wadutshulwa, wabulawa abasolwa abangaziwa ngo-Ephreli 2025. Ngokusho kokhulumela oKlebe KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant Colonel Simphiwe Mhlongo, umsolwa wakamumva, uMnuz Kwanele Khatheni (27) uboshwe ngoLwesithathu, wavela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseNtuzuma ngoLwesihlanu. Ngosuku lwesigameko, kuthiwa uDlamini owayengekho emsebenzini, ehamba ngemoto yakhe emgwaqweni uMafukuzela eNewtown A, wama eduze negaraji waya esitolo esingaphesheya. “Ngesikhathi elinde ukuthenga, wahlaselwa abasolwa. Wakwazi ukukhipha isibhamu sakhe somsebenzi, wadubula ephindelela kubasolwa, oyedwa wabo naye wamdubula uDlamini, waphumelela ukumphuca isibhamu sakhe somsebenzi,” kusho uMhlongo. Uthe wabe esephuthunyiswa esibhedlela ngemoto yakhe kodwa kwatholwa ukuthi useshonile ngesikhathi efika. Uthe kwavulwa icala lokubulala esiteshini samaphoyisa saseNanda, ithimba loKlebe kwaba yilo eliya endaweni yesigameko. “Kwavela ulwazi lokuthi oyedwa wabasolwa uyiswe emtholampilo wendawo, amaphoyisa ase enikela khona, nokuyilapho afike amfaka ngaphansi kweso lamaphoyisa, kwavela ukuthi unguMnuz Ntuthuko Nzama (27),” kusho uMhlongo. Uveze ukuthi wabe esevela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseNtuzuma emva kwezinsuku ezimbalwa, nokuyilapho asaqhubeka nokuvela khona njengoba esagqunywe esitokisini. Uthe uphenyo lwamaphoyisa luhambe lahamba laveza ukuthi uNzama wayiswa emtholampilo uKhatheni, okuthiwa wafike wazibiza ngoSipho, nokwaholela ekutheni angasheshe aboshwe njengoba zigcine zimkhalela ngoLwesithathu. Uveze ukuthi ngesikhathi kulindeleke ukuthi uKhatheni afake isicelo sebheyili ngoLwesihlanu, uNzama yena uzovela enkantolo efanayo ngoLwesithathu njengoba kuzobe kuqhubeka ukuqulwa kwecala lakhe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ISITESHI samaphoyisa saseNtuzuma lapho okugcine kubulawa khona umsolwa, obhozomele amaphoyisa UBUBOSHELWE icala lokuzama ukubulala umfowabo umgulukudu weqembu lezigelekeqe, iWest, okuthiwa ugcine ubulawa amaphoyisa esiteshini saseNtuzuma, kulandela ukuzama ukuwadubula. Kulesi sigameko okuthiwa senzeke ngezikhathi zasekuseni, kufe lona wesilisa oneminyaka engu-22. Umthombo weSolezwe olwazi ukusuka nokuhlala udaba, uthe umufi ubekade elandwe amaphoyisa kubo ngoMgqibelo ngecala lokuzama ukubulala umfowabo. “Uboshwe amaphoyisa kubo eNtuzuma, ngecala alenza khona,” kusho umthombo. Omunye umthombo nawo olwazi kahle udaba uthe amaphoyisa amathathu, obekukhona kuwo amabili esifazane, nelilodwa lesilisa ahlaselwe wumufi ngesikhathi emthatha izithupha esitokisini. “Ngokuphazima kweso uvele wawahlasela. Uthathe isibhamu sephoyisa elilodwa, kwaba ukuthola kwakhe amandla,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi yilapho ekwaze khona ukuwaphuca okhiye, wakhiyela wona esitokisini,” usho kanje. Uthe uzamile ukudubula ebhekise emaphoyiseni, kwasho ukuthi isicabha sesitokisi esensimbi. Uveze ukuthi ugcine enqotshwa amaphoyisa angene ngaphakathi esitokisini esebenzisa imigudu engabonakali esophahleni. “Ubevele elwa kwangoMgqibelo ngesikhathi eboshwa,” kusho umthombo. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uqinisekise isigameko, wathi umufi udutshulwe amaphoyisa, ambulala emva kokuthi ezame ukuwabulala. “Umufi ubeboshwe ngoMgqibelo ngecala lokuzama ukubulala. Udutshulwe amaphoyisa, ambulala emva kokuthi ezame ukuwabulala esitokisini esigcina iziboshwa izolo ekuseni,” kusho uNetshiunda. Echaza kabanzi ngabakutholile beyisifundazwe uthe amaphoyisa amabili abesesitokisini, ematasa nokwenziwayo uma umsolwa ebekwa icala. Uthe kuthe kusenjalo, umsolwa wawahlula ngamandla, waqala wawashaya, wawaphuca ukhiye womnyango omkhulu. “Akwazile ukubiza amanye, ukuze alekelelwe. Kusondele amaphoyisa abengawugqokile umfaniswano, azobahlenga,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe umsolwa uphuce elilodwa lawo isibhamu, wabe esedubula, ewavalele esitokisini. “Athole indlela yokuvika ngobuchule, ngesikhathi elokhu eqhubeka edubula. Lesi simo siqhubeke imizuzu emningana ngaphambi kokuthi kufike amanye amathimba amaphoyisa, akwazi ukumgojela,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uqinisekise eyokuthi kulesi siwombe, kulimale amaphoyisa amabili, elesifazane nelesilisa. Uveze ukuthi wonke amaphoyisa abevinjezelwe wumufi azoke athi ukuma kancane emsebenzini, esahamba uhlelo lokwelulekwa ngokwengqondo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ABANYE babazali bebhikisha emgwaqweni oya esikoleni i-Webbstown Combined eCabazi, eXobho UZIBHALELE esikoleni esingumakhelwane izivivinyo ngoLwesihlanu, u-matric wasesikoleni i-Webbstown Combined, eCabazi, eXobho, njengoba kuqhubeka umbhikisho wabazali abangeneme ngezinto ezehlukene ezenzeka esikoleni. Lokhu kuvezwe usihlalo wesigungu esilawula isikole (SGB), uMnuz Morgan Shezi, ngesikhathi ethintwa yiSolezwe ukuze aphawule ngobhikisho osuqhubeke isonto lonke kulesi sikole. “Kuphoqile ukuthi u-matric ucelelelwe kwesinye isikole esikhona endaweni yaseXobho. Sikhathazekile,” kusho uShezi. Uvumile ukuthi kukhona izikhalo kubazali ababhikishayo, ezimayelana nothisha abathathu abangasezi esikoleni okukhona kubo nothishanhloko. “Kuyiqiniso ukuthi abekho esikoleni. Kukhona uphenyo olwenziwe, thina ebesisalinde umphumela walo. Abazali bavele bahlukana phakathi, kukhona abalindile njengathi, bese kuba khona abavele bakhetha ukubhikisha,” kusho uShezi ongafunanga ukwanda kakhulu ngenkulumo, ngelithi kusalindwe umphumela wophenyo olwenziwe abahloli. Ngesikhathi Isolezwe lithola ngodaba ngomthombo, lixhunyaniswe nomunye wabazali ababhikishayo, othe abasamfuni uthishanhloko wesikole ngoba sekumhlule iminyaka ukusiphatha. Umzali uMnuz Mjabulisi Chiya uthe sekunesikhathi bebhalela uMnyango wezeMfundo ngezinkinga ezikhungethe isikole kodwa bengaphendulwa. Uthe sebedinga uMphathiswa wezeMfundo, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, noma iNhloko yoMnyango uMnuz Nkosinathi Ngcobo, ukuba basondele kubona. Utshele Isolezwe ukuthi kuningi okuqhubeka esikoleni abangeneme ngakho bengabazali. Phakathi kwakho kukhona othisha abazenzela umathanda esikoleni, abafika sekwedlule isikhathi, baphinde bahambe isikole singakaphumi ngale kokucacisa ukuthi basuke bebanjezelwe yini noma bephuthumaphi. Uphinde waveza ukuthi kukhona abafundi abanikwa umyalelo wokuthi bahlale emakhaya ngenxa yokungabi bikho kukathisha ozobafundisa. “Abafundi abafunda uGrade 4 bahleli emakhaya selokhu kuqale unyaka. Ngokuvulwa kwezikole, babuya nomyalezo wokuthi esikoleni kuthiwe abangabe besaqhubeka nokuza ngoba akekho uthisha ozobafundisa,” kusho uChiya. UChiya uqhube wathi nasemabangeni aphezulu esikoleni kunenkinga efanayo njengoba kukhona izifundo ezintathu ezingafundwa ngenxa yokuthi othisha abekho. Uthe bakhathazekile ngemfundo yabafundi abenza uGrade 4, wathi bayazibuza nokuthi laba bezifundo ezingafundwa emabangeni aphakeme bazobhalani njengoba kuqalwa ukubhalwa kwezivivinyo zokuphela kwekota yokuqala sonyaka. Ubuye waveza nokuthi bengabazali bathola ukuthi isikole sikhokhela umshini wokugaya amaphepha osebenza ebhizinisini lamakhaza likathishanhloko. “Sathola ngalokhu ngo-2023, ngesikhathi kucutshungulwa izitatimende zokusetshenziswa kwemali yesikole. Kwavela ukuthi isikole sikhokhela imishini yokufothokhopha emibili ekubeni esikoleni kukhona owodwa. Kwathi uma sekuphenywa, kwavela ukuthi owesibili usebhizinisini lamakhaza likathishanhloko,” usho kanje. Uveze nokuthi kuneminikelo enikelwa yizinkampani ezizimele ngenhloso yokuthuthukisa isikole, okugcina kungaziwa ukuthi iphelelaphi. “Umnikelo owanikelwa abakwaTransnet ukuthi isikole sakhelwe amathoyilethi owawungu-R100 000 akwaziwa ukuthi washonaphi, awazange akhiwe futhi akakaze aphendule ukuthi washonaphi,” kusho uChiya. Uqhube wathi kukhona omunye futhi ophinde walethwa yinkampani efanayo ukuthi kwakhiwe amakilasi, nawo phinde waphelela emoyeni. Uthe konke lokhu bakubikile ezincwadini abazibhalele uMnyango ezingeni lesifunda kanjalo nesifundazwe. “Sesikhethe ukubhikisha ngoba siyabona ukuthi sibhala izincwadi ezingakaze ziphendulwe muntu. Sesifuna yena uHlomuka noma uNgcobo beze kithi bezochaza,” usho kanje. Uveze ukuthi okubenza bangahlaliseki, umthelela ovela emiphumeleni ka-matric njengoba isikole sibe semsileni ngo-60% ezikoleni zendawo ngonyaka odlule. Waphinde wathi bakhathazwa nawukuthi isibalo sabafundi siya ngokuya sehla njengoba abanye abazali bebonakale bezikhipha izingane zabo esikoleni, beziyisa kwezinye. Kushaye isikhathi sokushicilela uMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal ungakaphefumuli ngalolu daba.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: INDAWO okushonele kuyona omunye wabasolwa ebebejahwa abenkampani yonogada Image: ALS Paramedics BAKHOLWA wukuthi zilahlwe elakubo , zabalekela endaweni ezingayijwayele izigebengu, okufe kuzo ezimbili, abazibonele ngawabo zifa kabuhlungu egaraji likaphethroli, i-Engen, ngaphandle kwenxanxathela yezitolo, iPavilion, eThekwini, izolo. Kulesi sigameko kufe ababili, kubona kukhona oyedwa ofe ngokudutshulwa, okuvela ukuthi ufele ngaphakathi emotweni, esihlalweni esiseduze kwesomshayeli. Kwathi owesibili, okuvela ukuthi uphume eyinhlamvu ezihlalweni ezingemuva, wathi uyabaleka, ujomba udonga olungemuva kwegaraji, kanti uzovele azithele phezu kokufa ngoba belushona phansi ngamamitha amade ngokwedlulele. Owesithathu, okuvela ukuthi ubengumshayeli usindile, nokho wakhalelwa amasongo kaSigonyela. Ngokusho komthombo, ocele ukungadalulwa, imoto ingene ngesivinini egaraji, igijinyiswa yimoto yenkampani yonogada. INDAWO okushonele kuyona omunye wabasolwa ebebejahwa abenkampani yonogada Image: ALS Paramedics “Siqaphele ukuthi ibidubulekile njengoba ibinembobo emzimbeni, bekukhona ngisho newindi elifile,” kusho umthombo. Uthe ngesikhathi abenkampani yonogada belandisa amaphoyisa abesebizelwe endaweni yesigameko, ucoshe ukuthi abagilwa bebengabasolwa asebekhathazile ngokubamba inkunzi ezindaweni ezehlukene eThekwini. “Sizwe umoya wokuthi onogada babagijimise bebasusa eMhlanga, nokuyilapho okugcine kuba khona ukudubulana phakathi kwabo njengoba kuvele ukuthi badubule kuqala bebhekisa konogada,” usho kanje. Uthe bezwe ukuthi abasolwa babamba abantu inkunzi, bese beyobakhiphisa imali emishinini yasemabhange. “Sisola ukuthi abantu ebebengayazi nhlobo indawo ngoba ukube bebeyazi, lona okhalakathele odongeni olude ubezokwazi ukuthi akufanele agxume lapho egxume khona. Okungenani ubezovele abaleke ashone phansi, ngoba kukhona ilokishi iChesterville eduzane, abengavele achushe phakathi kwemizi bese ephela emehlweni,” kusho umthombo. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe amaphoyisa aphenya icala lokubulala nelokuzama ukubulala kulandela isigameko esenzeke egaraji likaphethroli. Elandisa ngesigameko uthe munye umsolwa otholwe esefile ngaphakathi emotweni emhlophe iBMW enamanxeba okudutshulwa. Kwathi owesibili watholwa efile emva kokuthi ephume emotweni efanayo, wazama ukugxuma odongeni olude (lwegaraji), kanti uzovele awe, ashone. “Imibiko iveza ukuthi iBMW emhlophe ebinabantu abathathu idlule igijima konogada ebebezihambela emgwaqweni u-M19. Kuthiwa bakhethe ukuyilandela nokuyilapho ebebekuyo, bevele bavulela ngenhlamvu konogada,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe yilapho okusuke khona esinamandla, onogada bebuyisela ngenhlamvu, bebeqhubeka nokubajaha ngemoto kwaze kwayofikwa egaraji. “Uphenyo lwamaphoyisa luthole ukuthi iBMW ibifakwe izinombolo okungezona ezayo. Umshayeli wayo uvele wazinikela emaphoyiseni, waboshwa,” kusho uNetshiunda, othe kutholwe nezibhamu ezimbili ngaphakathi kwiBMW.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: USIZWE ukulubika ekomkhulu lamaphoyisa esifundazweni udaba lwakhe owesifazane othandana nabantu abanobulili obufana nobakhe waseMpangeni, njengoba zigcine ziyikhalele Inkosi yesizwe esithile kule ndawo, okuthiwa yazama ukumdlwengula ngoDisemba nyakenye. Kulesi sigameko esenzeka ngasekupheleni kukaDisemba, inkosi (engeke idalulwe ngoba ayikabuzwa yinkantolo ukuthi iyalivuma noma iyaliphika yini icala) yazama ukumdlwengula  owesifazane oneminyaka engu-40 kwenye yezindawo zokulala eMpangeni. Ngokusho kwesihlobo sikamgilwa, esingeke sidalulwe, isigameko senzeka emva kokuthi umsolwa, eshayele umgilwa ucingo, wathi ucela ukumbona, baxoxe. “Akazange axwaye kangako ngoba yinkosi yangakubo, wavuma ukuba ize ngalapho ayesebenza ngakhona. Bagcina behambisana beya emakhaya njengoba umgilwa wayevele enezinhlelo zokugoduka,” kusho umthombo. Nokho uveza ukuthi endleleni, inkosi yashaya imoto yaya endaweni yokulala, nalapho eyafika yacela ukuba bangene ngaphakathi, ukuze baxoxe kahle esithe, bengekho abaqaphi bayo eduzane. “Sebengene ngaphakathi, umsolwa wavele wacela ukulala nomgilwa, owala waphetha. Umsolwa wabe esengena ethoyilethi wabuya esenqunu, esephulula ubuntu bakhe,” kusho umthombo. Uveze ukuthi nakuba waphunyuka umgilwa, wasizwa ukungena kocingo lowesifazane, owayebuza umsolwa ukuthi ukuphi ngoba usemhlanganisele amantombazane abewafunile. Udalule ukuthi umgilwa wawubikela umndeni wakhe ngesigameko, waphinde wavula necala emaphoyiseni, maqede kwathula kwathi du, ingaboshwa inkosi. “Nakuba igcine iboshwa ngoLwesithathu, kusize ukuthi ezinsukwini, ushayele ekomkhulu lamaphoyisa, wabika ukuthi akabutholi ubulungiswa ecaleni alivulela inkosi ngoDisemba nyakenye,” kusho umthombo. Umthombo uthe abanasiqiniseko sokuthi yini eyaholela ekutheni inkosi ifune ukudlwengula umgilwa ngoba yayazi ukuthi uthandana nabanobulili obufana nobakhe. "Asazi noma yayihlose ukumyala ngenxa yendlela aphila ngayo, noma ibisambambele igqubu ngoba wake wayigxeka ezinkundleni zokuxhumana." Inkosi engumsolwa lapha ihlale isolwa ngezigemegeme ezishiya abantu bebambe ongezansi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe abaphenyi bophiko lwamaphoyisa iMpangeni Family Violence Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit (FCS) babophe umsolwa (28) ngecala lokuzama ukudlwengula umgilwa ngoDisemba 23, 2025. Uthe umsolwa uvele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseMpangeni ngoLweisthathu. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi icala lihlehliselwe uLwesithathu oluzayo ukuze umsolwa, otokile, afake isicelo sebheyili.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text:
UBHEJA okhishwe uphondo usesiqiwini iHluhluwe ZITHELA izithelo ezinhle izinhlelo ezehlukene zabezeMvelo KZN Wildlife, ezibandakanya ubuchwepheshe obusezingeni eliphezulu, ukuvimba ukubulawa kobhejane ngenhloso yokweba izimpondo zabo okuthiwa ziyinyama emazweni aphesheya, asezwenikazi i-Asia. Lokhu kuvezwe wuMphathiswa woMnyango wokuThuthukiswa koMnotho, ezokuVakasha nezeMvelo KwaZulu-Natal, uMfu Musa Zondi,  eHilltop Camp, eHluhluwe-iMfolozi Park (HiP) ngoLwesibili. UZondi uveze ukuthi ngoJanuwari nonyaka, akubanga khona nowodwa ubhejane obulewe eziqiwini ezibhekwe abezeMvelo KZN Wildlife. UBHEJANE onqunywe uphondo ukuze amasela angawuhlaseli “Lokhu akuvelanga kwazenzakalela nje kodwa kube wumsebenzi owenziwe ngokubambisana nangokuzimisela,” kusho uZondi. Ubalule ukuthi lokhu kube wumphumela womsebenzi wezobunhloli, okubandakanya ubuchwepheshe obuthuthukisiwe nobusezingeni eliphezulu. “Kutshalwe inqwaba yonogada beziqiwi, kwafakwa imishini eqapha ngokobuchwepheshe, kwaphinde kwenziwa uhlelo lokususwa kwezimpondo kobhejane,” kusho uZondi. Uhlelo lokususwa kwezimpondo zobhejane luqale ngo-Ephreli 2024. Lwaba yisisombululo sokugcina abezeMvelo abafinyelela kuso, kulandela ukungalawuleki kwendlela ababebulawa ngayo. UZondi uthe kuphinde kwalekelela nokuqinisa ezobunhloli lapho kusetshenziswana khona nezinhlaka ezehlukene zomthetho. Uthe ukubambisana nemiphakathi akuzange kusale ngaphandle njengoba nakho kuklame indima ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ziyathikanyezwa izindlela zokuzingelwa kobhejane. “Sigudlukile ekutheni kube khona esikwenzayo ngoba nakhu sekukhona umonakalo owenzekile, sagxila ekutheni siqinise ekunqandeni umonakalo,” usho kanje. Uthe abezeMvelo KZN Wildlife batshengisile ukuthi lolu hlobo lobugebengu obuhleliwe lunganqotshwa uma kubanjiswana. Isikhulu esiphezelu sezeMvelo KZN Wildlife, uMnuz Sihle Mkhize, sithe eminyakeni emithathu edlule beliphezulu kakhulu izinga lokuzingelwa kobhejane. Uthe baqala ngokuthi bonke abasebenzi beziqiwi baphoqwe ukuba bahlolwe ngemishini yokubabamba uma beqamba amanga - kubhekwa ukuthi akukho yini abakwaziyo ngokubulawa kobhejane, abakwenza emva kokuxoxisana nezishoshovu zabasebenzi ngalolu hlelo. Uthe kwaqala yena phambili, walandelwa yibo bonke abasebenzi ababesekhaleni lokulwa nokubulawa kobhejane. “Abaningi baphuma phambili kulolu hlelo, kwathi abambalwa abafeyila, basuswa eziqiwini ezinobhejane,” kusho uMkhize, othe kwaba nomdonsiswano omkhulu ngalokhu. “Yonke le mizamo, yalekelela kakhulu ekutheni kuliwe nenkinga yokuzingelwa kobhejane,” usho kanje. Uthe kwabasiza kakhulu futhi nokusebenzisana nemiphakathi, okubandakanya amakhosi angu-10 akhele iziqiwi eziseHluhluwe namaphethelo, amalungu ebhodi, nokuyilapho kwavunyelwana khona ngezinye izinto ezibandakanya ukuthi imiphakathi kufanele ihlomule nayo ngesiqiwi. “Eminye yemisebenzi, engadingi amakhono atheni, savumelana ngokuthi sizoya emphakathini, siqashe labo bantu,” kusho uMkhize. Uthe baphinde bavula ithuba lokuthi eminye imikhiqizo bayithenge emiphakathini eseduze, wabalula izinto ezifana namaqanda nokunye.  Uthe baphinde babafundisa ukuthi baba kanjani osomabhizinisi abakwazi ukuhlinzeka ngemikhiqizo esuke idingeka ngaphandle kwezinkinga. Phakathi kobuchwepheshe obulethwe eHiP, yisikhungo i-Nerve Centre ebhekele ukugadwa kwabangena esiqiwini ngendlela engafanele. Ukukha phezulu, lesi sikhungo sibheka ukusebenza koxhaxha lwamakhamera athukuswe ezindaweni ezehlukene esiqiwini. Njengonyazi, la makhamera akwazi ukuthwebula izithombe eziningana zabantu abasuke bedlula ngakuwo, aphinde athathe ne-video. Ngokuphazima kweso abe esekuthumela kulesi sikhungo, kuhanjiiswa umyalezo wokuthi kukhona ubungozi osebungaphakathi esiqiwini. Abakulesi sikhungo basuke sebezothatha izinyathelo ezifanele njengokuthumela ama-drone agijima ibanga elilinganiselwa ku-87km ngehora, ukuya ngalapho okusuke sekuvele khona ukuthi kukhona asebengene esiqiwini kungafanele. Nawo athwebula ezawo izithombe. Kukhona nezinja eziqeqeshiwe ezikwazi ukulandela umkhondo ngephunga, ezikwazi ukusifuna zize zisithole isigebengu. Kuphinde kube khona nendiza enophephela emhlane, nayo efika ngokuphazima kweso lapho okusuke sekunomonakalo khona. ISIKHULU esiphezulu sezeMvelo KZN Wildlife, uMnuz Sihle Mkhize noMphathiswa  
woMnyango wezokuThuthukiswa koMnotho, ezokuVakasha nezeMvelo KwaZulu-Natal, uMfu Musa Zondi banabe ngeyokusindiswa kobhejane eHluhluwe-iMfolozi Park (HiP)

OMUNYE wobhejane osususiwe uphondo ngenhloso yokuwuvikela

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: OMUNYE wemizi yabelaphi oshisiwe Image: NKK SOPHAZI GWALA BAHLELI ngesinqe esisodwa abelaphi bendabuko abakhele imijondolo yaseMarikana, eKokstad, kulandela ukushiswa kwemizi yabo wumphakathi odinwe wudaba lwengane elahlekile. Kuthiwa isiyisithupha imizi yabelaphi bendabuko eshisiwe kule ndawo kulandela ukulahleka komfundi kaGrade 2 eXoloxolo Primary, uLathitha Mtolo. Kuvela ukuthi uLathitha unyamalale kade edlala nabangani bakhe ngoFebhuwari 26. Umakhosi (umelaphi wendabuko), uNkk Sophazi Gwala, utshele Isolezwe ukuthi naye uhleli ngesinqe esisodwa njengoba umphakathi odinwe wathelwa ngamanzi usubuye izikhawu eziningana kwakhe, uzomhlasela. Uthe kuyena, ubevele abone umphakathi usukake umuzi, uthi akavule isango kucingwe ingane edukile. “NgoMgqibelo nje, utheleke la umphakathi. Ngathinta amaphoyisa, afika, angenisa abambalwa, athi ababheke. Bashiye indlu ibheke phezulu, bangayithola ingane, bahamba,” kusho uNkk Gwala. Uqhube wathi kuthi ezintatha zangeSonto, uphinde wabuya isibili umphakathi uthi uzocinga futhi ngoba isangoma esithize sesishaye umhlahlo sathi sikhona isidumbu sengane kwakhe, balungiselela ukuthi basithathe ngemoto, basibalekise baye naso ndawana thize. “Baphinde bangena babheka bangathola lutho. Nalolu hlobo lwemoto abathi isangoma sithe izobalekiswa ngayo ingane, asinayo lapha ekhaya. Sihleli kabuhlungu ngento esingayazi futhi asazi ukuthi sizophepha nini njengoba umphakathi usabisile ngokuthi uzowushisa nowami umuzi,” usho kanje. Uthe bazamile ukuvula icala lokusatshiswa emaphoyiseni kodwa athi abangalivuli, azobagada olakeni lomphakathi. Ngokusho kukamakhosi wakhona eMarikana, ocele ukungadalulwa, imizi iqale ukushiswa emva kokudedelwa ngamaphoyisa komunye wabelaphi, okuthiwa bese zimkhalele ngoba enukwe yiphara ngokulahleka kwengane. OMUNYE wemizi yabelaphi oshisiwe Image: NKK SOPHAZI GWALA “Iphara livele lanyamalala endaweni emva kokulahleka kwengane. Umphakathi obudinwe ukuthi sekuphele isonto ingane inyamalele, ulifune walithola, walibuza ukuthi yini eliyaziyo ngokunyamalala kwengane? Livele lakhomba umelaphi oyinyanga futhi onesonto,” kusho umakhosi. Uqhube wathi emva kokuba ligonyuluke ngokuthi layithatha ingane layihambisa kuye emva kokuthi eliyalele ukuthi liyilethe, ube esethathwa ngamaphoyisa ahamba naye. “Abuye amdedela, ethi abukho ubufakazi obuphathekayo ngokuthi uyazana nokulahleka kwengane. Yilapho-ke umphakathi ovele washisa imizi yakhe emine ezindaweni ezehlukene. Umphakarthi odiniwe ubuye washisa eminye imizi yabanye abelaphi, uthi awusabadingi endaweni ngoba bangababulali,” usho kanje. Utshele Isolezwe ukuthi ilokhu iqhubeke njalo imibhikisho yomphakathi lapho ucula khona amaculo athi: “Phansi ngabelaphi bendabuko phansi!” “Sihleli lubhojozi. Asazi nokuthi senzenjani ngoba uma sicela umasipala ukuthi usilekelele sibe nomhlangano nabo bonke abelaphi kanjalo nomphakathi, usishaya indiva. Ngapha namaphoyisa awavumi ukusivulela amacala okuthi siyasatshiswa futhi sishiselwa nemizi,” kuchaza umakhosi. Usole amaphoyisa adedele umelaphi obese ekhonjwe yiphara, wathi bekufanele aqhubeke nokumhloma ngemibuzo kuze kuvele iqiniso. “Kunokuthi bamgcine, bavele bamdedela. Bangagcina lapho, baphinde bamlekelela ukuthi abaleke njengoba bemphelezele waya endaweni esingayazi, lapho okuthiwa uzophepha khona,” kusho umakhosi okhale ngokuthi sekuyibo bodwa asebebhekene nolaka lomphakathi. Owenhlangano yabelaphi bendabuko, iNational Unitary Professional Association for African Traditional Health Practitioners of South Africa, uMnuz Mlungisi Mlaba, usigxekile isenzo somelaphi okhombe umuzi womunye umelaphi, wathi ingane ikuyena. “Indlela efanele yokwenza ukuthi uma usuvezelwe ukuthi into ekanjalo ikuphi, uyawutshela umndeni, bese uthi asambe siye emaphoyiseni, siyowacela asiphelezele, siyoyikhipha ingane lapho ebonakala khona,” kusho uMlaba. Uthe bekuyisenzo esingafanele ukuthi umelaphi oshaye umhlahlo akhombe uzakwabo, bese eshiya kanjalo. “Uma umakhosi womhlahlo eya naye lapho athi into ithukuswe khona kusuke kwenzelwa ukuthi kuonakale ubuqiniso bomhlahlo wakhe. Ukuhamba kwakhe namaphoyisa kusuke kwenzelwa ukuthi akwazi ukukhalima ulaka lomndeni osuke ulahlekelwe uma kwenzeka itholakala ngempela into evele emhlahlweni,” kusho uMlaba othe indlela okwenzeke ngayo yiyo ezodala uthuthuva olungalawuleki, isidingo singekho. Kuze kwashaya isikhathi sokushicilela amaphoyisa engakatholakali ukuphawula ngalolu daba ngokunjalo nomndeni wengane edukile awutholakalanga.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: AZOZIHAMBISELA ngokwawo izikhalazo zawo kuMbhishobhi oMkhulu uMandla Jwara, ophethe iDayosisi yaseThekwini, esontweni lamaRoma aKhatholika, amalungu ePherish yasePinetown, iThe Immaculate Conception Church. Lokhu kuza emva kokuba kumenyezelwe emasontweni amathathu edlule, ukuthi uFata Sifiso Ndlovu onomoya wobungoma ushaywe ngesithende. Incwadi kuthiwa iwakhalise mi izinyembezi amalungu aleli pherishi kuvela ukuthi impelasonto yePhasika kuyobe kungeyokugcina uNdlovu esontisa kuleli bandla. Akuyena yedwa uNdlovu "ofakwa umgxala", njengoba kuvele amalungu epherishi yaseMontclair, akhala esifanayo ngoFata Thembelani Ngcobo, naye okuthiwa unomoya wobungoma, ogudluzwe ngendlela efanayo. Ilungu lepherishi elaziwa kakhulu kwezomculo, uThokozani "Tzozo" Zulu lithe emva kokufundwa kwencwadi ebandleni, eyayazisa amalungu ukuthi uzogcina maduze uFata, kube khona isikhalo esikhulu. “Amalungu ebandla awazange azamukele kahle lezi zindaba. Siphatheke kabi ngoba sisuka kude noFata. Efika la eminyakeni emihlanu edlule, ibandla belinabantu abanela amabhentshi amabili kuphela. Namuhla ligcwele phama isonto ngenxa yakhe,” kusho uTzozo. Uthe uFata ungumholi ohlangabezana nomuntu lapho ekhona, wathi uma umuntu edinga ukwelashwa ngokomoya, uNdlovu uba yilokho. Uma umuntu edinga indlebe, uphinde amnike yona. “Yiyo le nto eyenze wangena kakhulu ezinhliziyweni zabantu ubona kukhathazeke wonke umuntu ngokumiswa kwakhe isigubhukane,” kusho uTzozo uthe ngeledlule, omama babekhala mi izinyembezi, betshelwa ukuthi akukho ibandla elingakwenza ukuguqula isinqumo soMbhishobhi oMkhulu. Ube esedalula ukuthi bazihambisile izikhalazo zabo esigungwini esiphezulu sepherishi, ngenhloso yokuthi zedluliselwe kwabaphezulu, kuqhanyukwe nesixazululo. “Kuze kube yimanje asikazitholi izimpendulo. Yikho sihlele ukuthi sizihambise ngokwethu ehhovisi loMbhishobhi singamalungu ebandla,” kusho uTzozo, othe bahlela ukuthi lokho bakwenze ngoLwesithathu. UMBHISHOBHI  Mandla Jwara Uthe yize bazi ukuthi izinqumo zithathwa uMbhishobhi oMkhulu ngokuthi uFata wenzenjani kodwa bake babone kwamanye amapherishi eqhubeka elulelwa isikhathi uFata uma amalungu ebandla ethi asamdinga. Uthe sebewuhoshile umoya kwamanye amalungu ebandla ukuthi athi azoyeka ukusonta uma uFata ehamba ngempela, wathi abanye bathi bazoshintsha ibandla, ngesikhathi amanye ethi azokuduba ukunikela njengoba umnikelo awenza nyanga zonke ubalelwa ku-R63 000. Uthe amalungu ebandla awakaze abe nenkinga nezinto “zobungoma” uFata azenza emaceleni. “Uma size endlini yokukhonza, akukho lapho okuvela khona ukuthi ungumuntu obuye enze izinto zesintu. Usontisa ngendlela esikhule kusontwa ngayo. Ingakho sithi asinayo inkinga nezinto azenza emaceleni, asiphazamiseki,” usho kanje. Nokho uveze ukuthi indaba yonakala ngesikhathi uFata esiza omunye webandla ngezinto zesintu. “Sizwe kuthiwa kukhona owambiza ukuba azomsiza, wase emthwebula isithombe, wasithumela kwabakhulu,” kusho uTzozo. Uthe kungemva kwalokhu, lapho kwaqala khona ukukhuluma, nathe kwenzeke ngonyaka odlule. UTzozo uthe ubuKrestu ngesikhathi bufika kuleli, abushongo ukuthi akuyekwe ubu-Afrika, wathi kusuka bebancane bengamaRoma, ayikho into engenziwa emakubo. “Uma kungafanele ukwenza izinto zesintu, kungani kwenziwa iMisa labangasekho (ebandleni) ngoba ukuthi kubizwa ngeMisa noma ukuhlaba, kuyinto efanayo,” usho kanje. Ngesikhathi eshumayela uFata Ndlovu enkonzweni yayizolo, nakuba ebengaphumelanga obala kodwa intshumayelo ibikhombisa ukuthi ubhekene nezivunguvungu. Ukhulume ngokuthi abazalwane akufanele baphonse ithawula empilweni, wathi naye nje uma zimnetha, akaliphonsi ithawula ngoba uye azibuze ukuthi abantu abathembele kuye bazothini? Ushumayeze amakholwa kuthi noma ziwanetha aqhubeke ahambe endleleni. “Nami anothi uma nihlangana nami lapho enizohlangana nami khona, anongitshela ukuthi qhubeka uhambe Fata,” usho kanje. Usihlalo wepherishi, uDikoni Magasela Mthembu, uthe inqubo yebandla ayibavumeli ukuthi baphawule ngezinto zebandla, nokho uthe angakuqinisekisa ukuthi izikhalazo zebandla bazithathile bazedlulisela kophezulu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UGWETSHWE udilikajele uNtuthuko Sosibo ngecala lokubulala unina wengane owayengumfundi Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI UTHOLE ubuthongo okokuqala ngqa ngoLwesihlanu, uyise womfundi owabulawa yisoka lakhe ngesihluku eSiqungeni, eMthwalume, ngoJulayi 2024, umbulali egixabezwa ngodilikajele. Lokhu kuze emva kokuthi iNkantolo yesiFunda saseScottburgh, imgwebe udilikajele uNtuthuko Sosibo (29)  ngokushaya, abulale uNksz Mandisa Cele  (20). Iphinde yanquma nokuthi akumfanele ukuba nesibhamu. Uyise kamufi, uMnuz Mzwandile Dlungele, utshele Isolezwe ukuthi ubengasabazi ubuthongo obuphelele kusukela kwabulawa indodakazi yakhe. “Bengilala cishe ngabo-8 ebusuku, phakathi namabili buphele ubuthongo, ngiqwashe kuze kucishe kuse. Uma icala liya enkantolo bekuvele kube nzima kakhulu,” kusho uDlungele. Uthe isigwebo inkantolo esinike umbulali sibagculisile bewumndeni. Uthe nakuba singeke simbuyise umntanakhe kodwa kuyabajabulisa ukuthi usazoke abhadle ejele ngobuhlungu abazwisa bona. “Isihlukumeze kakhulu into ayenza lo mfana kodwa isigwebo asinikiwe sisigculisile. Besivele sifuna ukuthi athole isigwebo esinzima,” kusho uDlungele. “Ngilale ubuthongo, into ebesengingasayazi. Bengihlale ngibikelwa njalo uma kuzoyiwa enkantolo. Ngizoke ngilale ngiphumule ngoba inkantolo igcine ibenzile ubulungiswa,” usho kanje. Uthe ngesikhathi bengaphakathi enkantolo umbulali engakagwetshwa, umndeni wakhe uke wahleka omunye wabo. Uveze ukuthi kuphenduke amatafula umbulali esegwetshiwe njengoba ebebehleka enkantolo, baphume sebedinda isililo sikaNandi. Uthe baze badidwa nawukuthi bebeyipakephi imoto ebebehamba ngayo, bantantatheka babheka kwenye indawo. Utshele iphephandaba ukuthi umbulali wayenodlame kumufi, wadalula eyokuthi waze wamyekisa kabili isikole, nokuholele ekutheni aphazamiseke ezifundweni zakhe. “Kuthe esehlala emxhasweni kanina, nakhona ubefika azomhlukumeza. Ngelinye ilanga wake wabulala wonke amawindi endlu. Ngathi ngiyaya khona ngiyofuna ukuthi angichazele ukuthi uwabulaleleni, ngafica esebalekile,” usho kanje. Owenhlangano elwela abesifazane kule ndawo iWomen of uMthwalume, uNksz Nombuso Sibisi, uthe: “Sijabule kakhulu ngesigwebo asitholile nokho sidumele kakhulu ngokuthi kukhona abazali abeseka izingane zabo uma zenze into enje. Siphoxekile futhi nangendelelo ekhonjiswe ngumbulali enkantolo, enze icala elibi kangaka, bese eqhubeke nokudelela inkantolo, izintatheli namaphoyisa.”

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMFULA iNadi eMsinga, lapho okuthiwa kumuke khona abayisithupha BEBENESONTO elilodwa vo beqalile emsebenzini emapulazini eKranskop, abayisithupha abamuke namanzi emfuleni iNadi, eMabovini, eMsinga, ngoLwesine. Lokhu kwenzeke emva kokugasela kwezikhukhula kule ndawo ngezintambama zangoLwesine. Kwabaguguleke nemoto eyiveni, sekutholwe kubo izidumbu zabane kanti kubona bekukhona nowesifazane obenezinyanga ezimbili ezithwele. Kuthiwa bamuke namanzi ngesikhathi iveni ebebehamba ngalo lizama ukuwela ebhulohweni elifishane kulo mfula. Ngokusho kukaMnuz Mandlenkosi Malinga, ongumyeni kaNkk Nokwazi MaNdlovu Malinga (26), umshayeli weveni ubatshele ukuthi bebeyishumi sebebonke evenini, besuka eKranskop emsebenzini, belubangise emakhaya eMabovini. Uthe ngesikhathi besondela ebhulohweni, babone imoto encane iwela ngempumelelo ebhulohweni. “Uthe yilapho naye athathe khona isinqumo sokuthi awele kanti umfula uzovele ungenise besephakathi nebhuloho. Uthe iveni livele lagugulwa amanzi, labheka ezansi,” kusho uMalinga. Uthe lona wesilisa umtshele ukuthi kuthe uma iveni libhajwa yitshe, wabamba owesifazane abehleli naye ngaphambili, baphuma emanzini. “Uthe ngesikhathi eqalaza ngemumva evenini, uqaphele ukuthi i-canopy ayisekho futhi akusekho noyedwa kwabayisishiyagalombili ebebehleli ngemumva,” kusho uMalinga. Uthe umshayeli ugcine ethola ukuthi ababili bakwazile ukugxuma, baphuma ngesikhathi iqala iguguleka imoto kodwa kwathi abayisithupha behluleka, baguguleka namanzi. “Kubuhlungu kakhulu okusehlele. Mina nje ngithe sengitholile ukuthi kwenzeke umonakalo, ngihambe khona ebusuku (ngoLwesine) ngayocinga emaceleni omfula ngethemba lokuthi ngizomthola umkami. Ngithe uma ngibona indwangu, ngathi ngiyayiphakamisa, ngabona ukuthi isikibha abesigqokile, ngikhale kwaduma izihosha ngoba bese ngibona ukuthi lingishonele,” kusho uMalinga, othe nebala isidumbu somkakhe sigcine sitholwa amathimba abatakuli phakathi kweNkandla namaBomvu. Ngokusho koMnyango wezokubusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, zine izidumbu zabagilwa esezitholakele kanti ukuthungathwa kwezimbili kusaqhubeka. UMphathiswa woMnyango, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi, uthe izidumbu zabane zitholakale njengoba kusaqhubeka ukubhekwa kwabagilwa ngohlelo lwamathimba ezinhlekelele esifundazweni. “NgoLwesihlanu amathimba abecinga abagilwa, athole izidumbu ezimbili zabesifazane. Esokuqala sitholwe emfuleni iNadi, eMsinga kwathi esesibili satholakala emfuleni uThukela, eNkandla,” kusho uButhelezi. Uveze ukuthi oyedwa wabo ubekhulelwe, waqhuba wathi, ukucingwa kwabaminzile kuphinde kwaqhubeka nangoMgqibelo, kwaholela ekutholakaleni kwezinye izidumbu ezimbili. “Izidumbu ezimbili zitholwe emfuleni uThukela. Esowesifazane sitholwe endaweni engaphansi kukaMasipala waseMsinga kwathi esowesilisa satholakala eMakhabeleni, ngaphansi kukaMasipala waseMvoti,” usho kanje. Uqinisekise eyokuthi abagilwa abatholakele baneminyala ephakathi kuka-25 kuya ku-40. Ube esedlulisa amazwi enduduzo emindenini elahlekelwe, wancoma amathimba ngomsebenzi oncomekayo wokucisha abaminzile ukuze imindeni ithole ithambo labathandiweyo bayo. “Abesilisa ababili abakatholwa kanti amathimba asaqhubeka nokwenza konke okusemandleni ukubathungatha. UMnyango ngokubambisana noMasipala waseMsinga, ulokhu uxhumane njalo nemindeni ethintekile ukuyeseka ngalesi sikhathi esinzima,” usho kanje.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUNWE womunye wabagilwa abalinyaziwe UFUNA ubulungiswa owesilisa othi abazukulu bakhe bashaywe kanzima omunye umakhelwane eNew Hanover, eMshwathi, ngasekupheleni kwenyanga edlule. Kulesi sigameko kuthiwa kulimale kanzima ekhanda kanjalo nasemunweni umfundi oneminyaka engu-18 nonengu-16. Ngokusho kukamkhulu wabagilwa, uMnuz Joseph Luthuli, ngoFebhuwari 21, emzini wakhe, kugasele omakhelwane bakhe, befuna esinye isihlobo. “Ngaphuma ngasho ukuthi lo abamfunayo akekho, bathi akusale sekuza mina. Bangixhakathisa, baya nami emzini wabo. Bafika bangivalela, bangibuza ngamaselula nomazisi okulahlekile,” kusho uLuthuli.
