Uthe wayelokhu echaze njalo ukuthi akukho akwaziyo ngalezi zinto okuthiwa zilahlekile. Uthe kusenjalo, kwaqhamuka abazukulu bakhe bezobheka ukuthi kwenzekani, nokuyilapho abagcina sebehlaselwa khona. “Abantu bakulo muzi babashaya abazukulu bami, omunye walimala ekhanda, omunye walimala emunweni. Kwaphoqa ukuthi baye esibhedlela nokuyilapho abafike balaliswa khona, batishwa,” usho kanje. IKHANDA lomunye wabagilwa abalinyaziwe Uqhube wathi balivulile icala esiteshini samaphoyisa iNew Hanover kodwa kwangaba bikho mnyakazo owenzekayo. Uthe kwathi sebelivulile icala, amaphoyisa abatshela ukuthi kufanele bathathe ifomu, iJ88 baliyise esibhedlela ukuze ligcwaliswe. “Wawagwalisa udokotela lawo mafomu, kodwa wala ukubanika ukuthi bawahambise esiteshini samaphoyisa, wathi umthetho uthi awalandwe wumphenyi wecala,” usho kanje. Uthe umphenyi akazange azixake ngokuwalanda, kunalokho, wambiza ukuba ayokhomba abasolwa ngoLwesine olwedlule. Uthe omunye wabasolwa wabe eseshaqwa amaphoyisa, kodwa ngakusasa bambona esezithwabazela emphakathini. “Sathi uma siya enkantolo ukuyobuza, umshushisi wathi icala likhishiwe ohlwini lwamacala ngoba belingenasisindo,” usho kanje. Uthe umshushisi wathi abasolwa kwakufanele bayokhonjwa abagilwa futhi namafomu (J88) eseka okushiwo yizitatimende awekho. “Manje thina sibuza ukuthi amaphoyisa kungani athatha mina ukuthi ngiyokhomba abasolwa esikhundleni sokuthi athathe abagilwa. Futhi sixakwa nawukuthi yiphutha likabani ukuthi ama-J88 awekho edokodweni ngoba umthetho waziwa yiwo amaphoyisa,” kusho uLuthuli. Uthe bafuna ubulungiswa ngecala njengoba abasolwa bebasabise ngokuthi abaqedile. Uthe kugcine kungacacanga ukuthi isihlobo ababesimemeza, beze begcina bethatha yena, yiso yini ababesisola ngokweba impahla abathi ilahlekile.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: SISAVALIWE namanje isikole uMkhumbane Secondary kulandela udweshu ngokufakwa kwamakhamera SISAVALIWE namanje isikole uMkhumbane Secondary kulandela udweshu ngokufakwa kwamakhamera UNOBHALA weSadtu KwaZulu-Natal, uNksz Nomarashiya Caluza uthe uMnyango wezeMfundo esifundazweni awuphumele obala uchaze ukuthi uthini umthetho olawula ukusebenza kothishanhloko ezikoleni. UNksz Caluza usho kanje kulandela ukumiswa kukathishanhloko wasesikoleni uMkhumbane Secondary, eChesterville, uMnuz Ntokozo Ngobese, ngoLwesibili. Bese kuphele amasonto amabili kuthikamezeke ukufunda nokufundisa kulesi sikole kulandela ukuthi othisha abangu-22 benyunyana iSadtu, bengalubhadi esikoleni. Kuthiwa bafuna ukuthi kukhishwe amakhamera aqopha izithombe kanjalo nomsindo emakilasini. Bekusalindelwe ukuthi kube nomhlangano wabazali, umnyango nabo othisha ngesikhathi kuvela ukuthi umnyango usuthumele umhloli esikoleni ngoLwesibili. Kuvele ukuthi umhloli ubezonika uthishanhloko incwadi ebhalwe ukuthi uyamiswa esikoleni izinyanga ezintathu ngezinsolo zokungaziphathi kahle. Kuthiwa le ncwadi ayenabi ngokuthi yikuphi ukungaziphathi kahle asolwa ngakho namiselwa khona. UNksz Caluza ethintwa yiSolezwe Ngempelasonto uthe into ebhedise uhlelo kuyo yonke le nxushunxushu, ukungabi khona kokuxhumana. “Tholani umnyango kuqala ukuze uchaze kabanzi ngenqubomgomo yawo nokusebenza kothisha. Uthishanhloko kwakufanele abonisane nothisha kuqala ngaphambi kokuthi afake amakhamera,” kusho uNksz Caluza. Ukhale ngokuthi amakhamera awaqophi izithombe kuphela, kodwa aqopha nomsindo. “Asikwazi ukuthi sibe nomuntu ohleli ehhovisi lakhe, abe matasa nokubuka nokulalela othisha befundisa,” usho kanje. Uqhube wathi into ebe yinkinga enkulu ngalolu daba wukuthi akukhulunywanga nothisha, kodwa babone ngawo esefakiwe. Wenze isiphakamiso sokuthi abaholi bezikole ababahloniphe ozakwabo abangothisha ukuze kuhlale kunokuthula ezikoleni. UMengameli weNatu, uMnuz Sibusiso Malinga, ethintwa yintatheli ngoLwesithathu, uthe udaba lusha kubona, abalwazi. Uthe uma kukhona izinqumo ezithathwayo ngesikole, kufanele zibe khona zonke izinhlaka zesigungu esilawula ukuphathwa kwesikole. “Kulesi sigungu kukhona abamela abafundi, abazali kanjalo nothisha. Uma kukhona izinguquko ezenziwayo esikoleni, zenziwa emhlanganweni osuke wethanyelwe yilezi zinhlaka. Uma kungabazali abathi akufakwe amakhamera esikoleni, kufanele ukuthi lokho kuvele emaminithini omhlangano okwathathwa kuwo leso sinqumo,” kusho uMalinga. Uthe bona beyiNatu, bayakhathazeka uma kuthikamezeka ukufunda. “Umnyango awungenelele, kungaphazamiseki ukufunda,” kusho uMalinga, othe okunye okungaba yisisombululo wukuthi amakhamera avulwe sekuphume isikole uma kukhalwa ngobugebengu bokwebiwa kwempahla. Uthe abanalwazi lokuthi uthishanhloko umiselweni, nokho wathi umthetho uthi azibalulwe izinsolo amiselwa zona encwadini esuke ithi akamiswe. Khonamanjalo, Isolezwe Ngempelasonto lithinte omunye wabazali, uNksz Xolile Buhlalu ngoLwesine, waveza ukuthi bahambe bayobhikisha ngaphandle kwesikole iBerea Primary lapho betshelwe ukuthi kuhlala khona abahloli. Uthe bafike balalelwa yilungu lePhalamende, elibatshele ukuthi linguRadebe. Uthe ubathembise ukuthi namuhla kuzofika uMphathiswa wezeMfundo uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka azolalela izikhalo zabo. Uveze eyokuthi esikoleni ingidi efakwe abazali isavalile, ukufunda nokufundisa akuqhubeki. Kumanje bahlela ukuthi ngesonto elizayo basivule isikole kuqhubeke ukufundisa kothisha besikhashana abazokhokhelwa abazali. “Laba abalaxaze ukufunda, asisabadingi esikoleni sethu. Simile futhi kwelithi amakhamera awayi ndawo futhi nothishanhloko simdinga ebuyile,” usho kanje. Isolezwe Ngempelasonto lizamile ukuthola abakhulumela uMnyango, uMnuz Muzi Mahlambi noMnuz Mlungisi Mtshali, kodwa izingcingo zabo bezikhala zingabanjwa.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ABANYE babazali bephethe izingqwembe ezibhalwe imiyalezo njengoba bebebhikisha ngaphandle kwesikole uMkhumbane Secondary Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI ABAZALI abebedinwe begane unwabu bafunge bagomela ukuthi ngeke sivulwe isikole, uMkhumbane Secondary esiseChesterville, eThekwini, engabuyisiwe uthishanhloko waso omiswe isigubhukane. Basho kanje izolo, emva kokuthi usihlalo wesigungu esilawula isikole (SGB), uMnuz Bongani Mokoena, ebazisa ngokwakamuva odabeni lwezinxushunxushu eziqhubekayo esikoleni. Kulesi sikole kuthikamezeke ukufunda esikhathini esingaphezudlwana kwamasonto amathathu, kulandela ukuthi othisha abayamaniswa neSadtu, bekulaxaze phansi ukufundisa bedinwa ukufakwa kwamakhamera emakilasini. ABANYE babazali bebhikisha ngaphandle kwesikole uMkhumbane Secondary Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI Kube khona umdonsiswano phakathi kwabafundi, othisha kanjalo nabazali. Othisha abangu-22 bafunge bagomela ukuthi ngeke babuye esikoleni amakhamera engakhishiwe nothishanhloko, uMnuz Ntokozo Ngobese, engahambile. Abafundi bake bazama ukubhikishela ukuthi kubuyiswe othisha abalaxaze ukufunda, abazali bashaya phansi ngonyawo, bathi akukho mfundi ozobhikishela othisha abangafuni ngamabomu ukufundisa. Baphinde bakubeka kwacaca ukuthi amakhamera awayi ndawo futhi nothishanhloko bafuna aqhubeke nokuhola isikole. Umzali, uMnuz Smanga Mkhwanazi, ugxeke eyomhloli okhethe ukuthumela umyalezo ngesigungu sesikole (SGB), wathi ngesikhathi begcina ukukhuluma naye kwakuvunyelwane ngokuthi uzobuya msalofu azoletha izimpendulo kubona bengabazali. Ubasole ngokuthi bathathe isinqumo bodwa bengabazisile bona bengabazali, wathi bona bamile kwelokuthi amakhamera awaphumi futhi noNgobese bamdinga ebuyile. “Amakhamera awangakhishwa, akubuyiswe uNgobese. Uma kungenzeki lokho, isikole ngeke sivulwe. Okwesithathu uNgcobo (uMnuz Nkosinathi - oyinhloko yoMnyango wezeMfundo esifundazweni) noMsomi (umhloli) sibadinga la,” kusho uMkhwanazi. Uqhube wathi bathatha lezi zinqumo nje, ezabo izingane zifunda ezikoleni ezizimele ezinawo lawa makhamera kodwa bathi awakhishwe eMkhumbane Secondary. Omunye umzali, uNksz Nonhlanhla Magundu, uthe uMnyango ungasihlinzeka isikole ngezinsiza ezifana nothisha nokunye kodwa isikole ngesabazali nomphakathi. “Isikole ngesethu. Okusho ukuthi njengoba bemise uNgobese izinyanga ezintathu, nathi sizode sizoma la kuze kuphele lezo zinyanga, kuze kubuyiswe uNgobese,” usho kanje. Omunye umzali, uNksz Xolile Buhlungu, usabise ngokuthi uma uMnyango uqhubeka nokungabalaleli, bazovala uthelawayeka womgwaqo u-N2. Ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabazali, usihlalo ubatshele ukuthi umhloli ubatshele izinqumo ezintathu, athe ziphuma koyinhloko yoMnyango. Esokuqala esokuthi lungapheli uLwesibili amakhamera engakhishiwe, esesibili esokuthi aphume naye ngesango uthishanhloko omiswayo, bese abazali betshelwa ukuthi abakhiphe ingidi engaziwa abavale ngayo isikole. Ilungu le-SGB elicele ukungadalulwa lithe babona uMnyango usebenzisa udaba lwamakhamera ukujezisa uthishanhloko ngothisha osanda kubuyiswa owayexoshwe eminyakeni emithathu edlule ngenxa yokulibala izinkamba zikaFaro, engawenzi umsebenzi. “Nakuba incwadi yokummisa ibhalwe ukuthi “akaziphathanga kahle” maqede yangachaza, ukhona umoya ovelayo ukuthi usejeziselwa lo thisha kodwa sekucashwa ngolwamakhamera,” lisho kanje. Lithe bahlela ukuluyisa enkantolo lolu daba njengoba sekunento ebhalwe phansi evela koyinhloko yoMnyango. Licacise eyokuthi isinqumo sokufakwa kwamakhamera senziwa ngabazali, hhayi uthishanhloko. “Uma bethi awakhishwe, ubani ozokhokhela ukukhishwa kwawo? Abazali abanayo imali yokukhokhela ukukhishwa kwawo,” kuphetha ilungu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ABAFUNDI basesikoleni iMkhumbane Secondary bechwaza ngaphakathi egcekeni lesikole, kulandela ukungaphumeleli kombhikisho ebebewuhlelile Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI KUTHIKAMEZEKE ukufunda nokufundisa izolo esikoleni iMkhumbane Secondary, eChesterville, eThekwini, abafundi bezama ukubhikisha, kulandela ukubeka phansi oshoki kothisha abadinwe wukufakwa kwamakhamera emakilasini. Ngokuthola kweSolezwe sekuphele amasonto amabili kuthikamezekile ukufunda kulesi sikole. Kuvela ukuthi isikole sithole othisha abayizitshudeni ukuba bazobamba, njengoba othisha abangu-21 besaqhubeka nokungayingeni eyokufundisa. Kuthiwa abafundi bebezimisele ngokubhikishela ukuthi kubuyiswe othisha abatelekile nokuthi abafuni ukufundiswa othisha abayizitshudeni. Abazali abathe bakhathazekile ngemfundo yezingane zabo, bavele bavuka bayonkanisa esangweni lesikole, bashaya phansi ngonyawo bathi akukho mfundi ozovimba isango ngombhikisho. Ngokusho komunye wabazali, uNksz Xolile Buhlalu, emhlanganweni wabazali kulandela ukusuka komsindo, othisha bathe abawadingi amakhamera kodwa bangazibeka izizathu. ABAZALI bemi ngaphandle kwesango lesikole, iMkhumbane Secondary, ukuqinisekisa ukuthi akekho umfundi ozobhikisha Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI “Isikole sike sacekelwa phansi, kwebiwa izihlalo, kwafinyelelwa ekutheni kufakwe amakhamera,” kusho uNksz Buhlalu. Uthe bona bengabazali bayameseka uthishanhloko ngokufakwa kwamakhamera ngoba kuzolekelela ezintweni ezehlukene, okubandakanya yona eyobugebengu. Uthe basola ukuthi abafundi banxenxwe othisha abalaxaze ukufundisa ukuthi babhikishe. “Okubuhlungu wukuthi izingane azifundile amasonto ababili wonke ekubeni sekuzobhalwa izivivinyo zethemu yokuqala. Esifuna umnyango ukuthi usenzele kona wukuthi uthole abanye othisha abazofundisa izingane, laba abangafuni ukufundisa, bahambe,” kusho uNksz Buhlalu. Uthe namanje basadidekile ukuthi yini lena engaka eyenza othisha bangawafuni amakhamera. “Abaphumeli obala ngezizathu, ezabo izingane zifunda ezikoleni ezizimele yikho benza kanje,” usho kanje. Kuke kwavela ukuthi othisha abadube umsebenzi bakhala ngokuthi uthishanhloko uhlekisa ngendlela abafundisa ngayo okuthiwa yinto abayibone iqoshwe amakhamera afakiwe. Omunye umzali, uNksz Londeka Ngobese, uthe kothisha abalaxaze ukufundisa kukhona abanxenxa abafundi ukuthi ababhikishe, bafune ukuthi babuyiswe. Unxuse uMnyango wezeMfundo ukuba usondele kulesi sikole ukuxazulula le nkinga, nezinye abathi bazizwe ngabafundi. Owesigungu esilawula isikole, obekhona esikoleni izolo, uMnuz Majola, uthe bakhona othisha abayizitshudeni abake babamba njengoba kuqhubeka isixakaxaka kodwa bayeka kulandela ukusatshiswa. Uveze ukuthi othisha abalaxaze ukufundisa bangaphezu kwengxenye njengoba singu-39 isibalo sothisha kulesi sikole. “Njengoba kwenzeka konke lokhu, umnyango uthule du,” kusho uMajola. Uqinisekise eyokuthi abazali abayizwa eyesiteleka sabafundi futhi bayameseka uthishanhloko ngokufaka amakhamera. “Bathi awayi ndawo, umnyango awusilethele othisha abazofuna ukufundisa, futhi abayingeni eyesiteleka,” kusho uMajola. Okhulumela uMnyango wezeMfundo, uMnuz Mlungisi Mtshali, uthe bayazi ngalolu daba, nokho uthe abakafuni ukuphawula ngalo njengoba inhloko yomnyango isesemhlanganweni nobuholi besikole, ukuludingida.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: OLAHLWE yicala lokubulala unina wengane uNtuthuko Sosibo Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI KUHLEHLISELWE usuku lwanamuhla ukugwetshwa kowesilisa olahlwe yicala lolubulala ngesihluku unina wengane yakhe owayengumfundi, kulandela ukwala kwakhe aphethe ukubuya ebhokisini, ethi akuxoshwe izintatheli. UNtuthuko Sosibo (29) ulahlwe yicala lokubulala uMandisa Cele (20) waseSiqungeni, eMthwalume, ngoJanuwari nyakenye. Kuthiwa uSosibo washaya ephindelela uMandisa ngesitulo nange-ironing board, waphinde wamgqimuza kukhonkolo wethangi lamanzi kubo. Izolo, bekulindeleke ukuthi imgwebe iNkantolo yesiFunda saseScottburgh nokugcine kungenzekanga, esedlala umacashelana nenkantolo. Kade engene okokuqala, izintatheli zamaziko ehlukene zithole ithutshana lokumthwebula, nokuthe ngesikhathi icala liguqiswa isikhashana waziphakamisela umunwe ophakathi nendawo, ezithuka. Kuthe esephinda ebizwa emva kwekhefu elifishane, watshela iphoyisa elisebenza enkantolo ukuthi ngeke anyuke uma ezothwetshulwa yizintatheli. OLAHLWE yicala uNtuthuko Sosibo (ngaphambi kwephoyisa), ethuka izintatheli ebezimshutha Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI Kuphele imizuzu embalwa enganyuki ngempela, imantshi uNkk E Botha, yayalela izintatheli ukuthi zibeke phansi amakhamera. Kuthe sezenze njalo, ummeli wakhe uNksz Nzimande wacela ukwehla ayokhuluma naye. Ubuye nomyalezo othi uSosibo uthi ngeke anyuke uma izintatheli zisengaphakathi enkantolo. Azixoshwe! UNkk Botha akabange esakhipha myalelo ngaphandle kokuthi alihlehlisele usuku lwanamuhla icala. Esiwombeni sokuqala sokuvela kukaSosibo, umshushisi woMbuso, uMnuz Active Njapha, ubuze uyise kamufi, uMnuz Mzwandile Dlungele, ukuba atshele inkantolo ukuthi ukubulawa kukaNksz Cele kwabahlukumeza kangakanani bewumndeni. UDlungele utshele inkantolo ukuthi ingane (5) kamufi isihlala ezihlotsheni njengoba unina abulawa ngesihluku. Ukhale ngokunqanyulezwa kwempilo kamufi esabhekwe yikusasa eliqhakazile, njengoba eveze ukuthi wayengumuntu owayenamaphupho amakhulu. Ube esecela inkantolo ukuthi ibakhuzele udadewabo kaSosibo okhuluma amagama alumelayo kubona uma kuziwe ecaleni. “Ngokwedlule, sathi sizikhulumela siwumndeni, kukhona obuzayo ukuthi umndeni wabo wenzani uMandisa esebulewe, wayinqaka kuqala inkulumo, ngelithi basingcwabela ingane yethu, akazi ukuthi yini enye esiyifunayo emndenini wabo? Ukudelela kwakhe kuzongiyisa endaweni engingafuni ukuya kuyo,” kusho uDlungele. Nakuba engasikalanga isigwebo asifisela uSosibo ngaphakathi, esekhuluma nabezindaba ngaphandle, uthe ufuna adilikelwe yijele. Uqhube wathi akubajabulisanga okwenziwe uSosibo ngaphakathi enkantolo enqaba ukubuyela ebhokisini. “Inkantolo bekufanele imphoqe ukuthi abuyele ebhokisini,” usho kanje. Ekhumbula isigameko, uthe wafica isigazi emnyango eduze nethangi lamanzi, elinye lisendlini kanti wathi uma ethi uyamthinta umntanakhe, wezwa ikhanda libokozela sengathi kalinamathambo, emzimbeni eluhlaza cwe, ukushaywa.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ABAZALI bemi ngaphandle kwesango lesikole, iMkhumbane Secondary, bevimba abafundi abebefuna ukubhikisha ngoMsombuluko Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI KUPHINDE kwaphazamiseka ukufunda nokufundisa esikoleni, iMkhumbane Secondary, eChesterville, izolo, kulandela ukumiswa isigubhukane kukathishanhloko. Ngokusho komzali, obekhona ngaphakathi esikoleni, uNksz Xolile Buhlalu, uthishanhloko, uMnuz Ntokozo Ngobese, umiswe emva komhlangano abe nawo nomhloli okuthiwa ubethunywe uMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal nesigungu esilawula isikole. UNksz Buhlalu uveze ukuthi emva kokumiswa kukaNgobese, abazali ebebedinwe begane unwabu, ebebenkanise ngaphandle kwesango lesikole, bavele basivala ngeketanga nangengidi isikole. “Abazali babafundi abafunda uGrade 12 bebebizelwe emhlanganweni ukuzodingida eziphathelene nesixakaxaka esiqhubekayo esikoleni ngenxa yokufakwa kwamakhamera. Kuthe umhlangano usaqhubeka, kwangena omunye uthisha othe awuhlakazeke umhlangano ngoba sekumiswe uthishanhloko,” kusho uNksz Buhlalu. Uqhube wathi yilapho bethole khona ukuthi umhloli obeze esikoleni, ubelethe incwadi yokumisa uthishanhloko. Uveze ukuthi abazali bayaveva ngalolu daba njengoba besola ukuthi kusetshenziswa izingane zabo ezimpini zothisha nokubangwa kwezikhundla. Udalule ukuthi namuhla abazali bahlele owabo umbhikisho ngaphandle kwesango lesikole, njengoba bengahambisani neyokumiswa kukathishanhloko. “Sifuna incazelo yokuthi eyani incwadi enikwe uthishomkhulu,” usho kanje. Ugcizelele eyokuthi abazali bathi amakhamera awayindawo futhi uthishanhloko bamdinga ebuyile. Owenhlangano engenzi nzuzo, enezinhlelo ezeseka ezemfundo, Ubhaqa Networks, uNksz Phumzile Kubheka, uthe kuyabakhathaza okuqhubeka esikoleni. “Izivivinyo ziyaqala ngoMashi 13. Sekuphele amasonto amabili izingane zithikamezekile ezifundweni zazo. Sikhathazekile ngokuthi yini ezizoyibhala ezivivinyweni osekusele izinsuku eziyishumi ukuthi ziqale,” kusho uNksz Kubheka. Ugcizelele eyokuthi akukho gcobho abawubona kuthishanhloko njengoba enerekhodi elihle ekuholeni isikole. “Umatric wesikole usuthole o-100% iminyaka eyisishiyagalolunye ilandelana. Abazali bajabule ngothishanhloko nangobuholi bakhe,” kusho uNksz Kubheka. Usole othisha abathintekayo ngokuphusha eyabo i-"agenda", engahlangene namakhamera abathi yiwo asuse udweshu. “Babizwe kaningi ukuthi abeze bazochaza ukuthi kungani bengawafuni, bangeza. Kuthe noma uNgobese esethi kulungile uzowakhipha, bangabuya. Into abayaziyo wukufika njalo ekuseni bayohlala ejoyintini eliseduze kwesikole lapho bedingida khona eyokuphazamisa ukufunda kwezingane,” usho kanje. Kulesi sikole othisha abangu-22, kwabangu-39, balaxaza ukufundisa bedinwa wukufakwa kwamakhamera emakilasini. Kuthiwa uthishanhloko wathi awafakwe ukuze kunqandeke  ubugebengu obuqhubekayo esikoleni. Kuthiwa ukufakwa kwawo akuhlalanga kahle kothisha abatelekile njengoba baveza ukuthi afakelwe ukuthi kugadwe bona uma befundisa. Owesigungu esilawula isikole, uNksz Nomonde Matumtum, uthe akukho okuningi azokwazi ukukusho njengoba besazoba nowabo umhlangano. Nokho uthe angakuqinisekisa ukuthi uthishanhloko umisiwe. Abakhulumela uMnyango wezeMfundo esifundazweni abathalakalanga njengenjwayelo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: USAZINWAYA amakhanda ngokuthi udalwe yini umlilo obhubhise izihlobo zawo, omunye wemindeni emithathu ebhujelwe abayisishiyagalombili ngoMgqibelo. Ezigamekweni ezimbili ezenzeke ezindaweni ezimbili ezehlukene esifundazweni, kushone abayisishiyagalombili bemindeni emithathu. Emndenini wakwaNoyila eShaka’s Head, KwaDukuza, kushone abayisihlanu. Kubona kukhona uNksz Asamkele Somtsewu (19), umzala wakhe uSonwabise Noyila (14), udadewabo u-Amila (3) kanye nezingane zakhe ezingamawele uSokhula (1) noSolulele (1). Inhloko yekhaya, enguyise ka-Asamkele, uMnuz Sivuyile Noyila, ithe umlilo ugasele ngezintatha kungazelele muntu. Uthe bebekade bezijabulele, kade bebuka ibhola base bedlala i-snooker, kudlalwa nomculo. “Izingane nonina basheshe bayolala ngokwehlukana. Mina nabanye bendawo, sihlale kwaze kwashaya o-3 ekuseni, sasesihlukana sebegoduka. Ngithe ngisanda kuzumeka, ngezwa ngezingane zikhala, zingimemeza,” kusho uNoyila. Uthe yena nonina, baphume beyinhlamvu beyobheka ukuthi izingane zidliwa yini. Uthe bebezitshela ukuthi sekungene izigebengu. “Sikhangwe umlilo obuvimbanise ngasemnyango. Unina uvele waphonseka phakathi, wabuya neyodwa (2), ayithole itholoza ngaphakathi ifuna indlela yokuphuma,” kusho uNoyila. Uthe lona wesifazane uthe uyabuyela ngaphakathi, umlilo wangabe usamvumela ukuthi acinge ezinye izingane. U-ASAMKELE SOMTSEWU NEZINGANE ZAKHE OSOKHULU NOSOLULELE “Zishe zaze zaphela izingane zami, zibulawa umlilo namanje esingazi ukuthi udalwe yini,” kusho uNoyila. Uthe kubafi bekukhona izingane zakhe ezimbili, abazukulu bakhe abangamawele abazalwa umufi omdala, bese kuba ewumshana wakhe, ezalwa udadewabo. Uthe unina nengane angene wayidonsa emlilweni, baphuthunyiswe esibhedlela ukuyolashwa njengoba nabo beshile. Uveze ukuthi yena nalona wesifazane balala emjondolo ongemuva, kuthi izingane zilale kongaphambili. Uthe umlilo uqale ngasemnyango, wanyuka njalo, waze wayoshaya emsamo. “Yiyo le nto eyenza sithi awuqalwanga izimpahla ezisebenza ngogesi. Namanje sisadidekile ukuthi ubangwe yini ngoba sibiyile nesango siyalivala,” usho kanje. Esigamekweni sesibili esenzeke KwaNongoloza, eMdoni, kushone izelamani zakwaCibane, uSanele (37) noLungelo (30), kwathi kwaDlamini, kwashona uZamokuhle (33). Kulesi sigameko, kuthiwa umlilo ongaziwa wokhele imijondolo yabafi ngokulandelana. UMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi ohambele imindeni yomibili izolo, uthe umnyango uzoyilekelela ngalo lonke usizo eludingayo, okufaka phakathi, izinhlelo zokungcwaba. UButhelezi ubuye waveza ukuthi izolekelelwa ngama-alamu akwazi ukusheshe abike uma kukhona intuthu evumbukayo, wathi lokhu kuzosiza ukuhlenga impilo. Uphinde wayalela izisebenzi zikahulumeni ukuba zibambisane, ziqinisekise ukuthi zilungiswe izidingo umphakathi okhale ngazo wathi zenza isimo sibe nzima kakhulu uma kwehla izigameko zalolu hlobo. Phakathi kwezinto ezibalwe umphakathi kukhona amanzi. “Ubuhlungu obuzwiwe ile mindeni kukhulu kakhulu, sizoqinisekisa ukuthi asigcini nje ngokuzwelana nayo kodwa sizokwenza okuthile,” usho kanje.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ZITHOLWE zigqishwe ethoyilethi lomgodi ngeSonto, izidumbu zabesifazane ababili okusolwa ukuthi babulawe ngokuklinywa nangokugencwa eNdundumeni, eMakhabeleni, eKranskop. Kulesi sigameko okusolwa ukuthi senzeke ezintatha zangoMgqibelo, kubulawe uNksz Nonkasa Shezi (84) nendodakazi yakhe, uNksz Zama Majozi (47). Ngokusho kweNduna yesigodi, uMnuz Mboniseni Nala, engomunye wabafike endaweni yesigameko, ithe uthintwe omakhelwane abangaphesheya komfula ngalo iSonto, abamtshele ukuthi basola ukuthi kukhona okushaya amanzi kwaShezi. “Omunye wabo uthe ake kuyobhekwa kulo muzi njengoba ebona kulokhu kuvaliwe ezindlini, nezinkomo sekuphele izinsuku ezimbili zingakaze zikhishwe ukuya emadlelweni, ekubeni eke wezwa kukhala isaguga ezintatha zangoMgqibelo,” kusho uNala. Kuthiwa owesifazane ozwakale ekhala ubethi: “Ngisizeni ngengane yami”. Uveze ukuthi bavele banikela khona namalungu omphakathi, bathola izicabha zivaliwe, bathi uma belunguza ngamawindi bangabona lutho. “Sigcine sigqekeza umnyango nokuyilapho esibone khona ukuthi kukhona okwenzekile, njengoba bekunegazi kodwa kukhombisa ukuthi lihlanziwe,” usho kanje. Uthe amanye amalungu omphakathi abehlaziya igceke, aqaphele ukubhodloka kwethoyilethi okungaqondakali, ase engena phakathi. “Azithele phezu kwengalo ebibonakala. Kwacaca ukuthi kukhona okubi okwenzekile, kwabizwa amaphoyisa,” kusho uNala. Uthe ngesikhathi sezitatululwa izidumbu, baqaphele ukuthi esesaguga sinezingozi ezimbi ekhanda, kwathi esikaNksz Majozi sinentambo ebivale umlomo. “Sisola ukuthi isaguga sibulawe ngokugencwa kwathi lo omunye waklinywa,” kuchaza uNala. Uthe indwangu abasolwa abayisebenzisile ukusula igazi, bayishutheke ngaphansi kukamata, wathi basadidekile bewumphakathi ukuthi kungani abafi behlaseliwe. “Asazi noma kukhona okuthathiwe njengoba amaphoyisa engasivumelanga ukuthi sisondele ngaphakathi endlini kanti nezihlobo zabo azikafiki ukuzobheka,” kusho yona induna. Uthe nemfuyo abanaso isiqiniseko sokuthi abasolwa abayithathanga yini njengoba esibayeni bekukhona amathole, ezinye izinkomo eziningana zingekho. “Njengoba zingekho, asazi noma zisemadlelweni noma zintshontshiwe. Kuzobonakala ngokuqhubeka kwesikhathi uma sekubhekwa kahle,” usho kanje. Uthe umphakathi usathukile, uzizwa ungaphephile njengoba kungaziwa ukuthi abenzi bobubi abasagcwelwe amathafa, bangobani futhi bakuphi. Umshana kaNksz Shezi, uMnuz Wandi Majozi, uthe bathole ucingo lubaphathele umyalezo ngoshophi ngeSonto. Uveze ukuthi basadidekile ngokuthi bahlaselelweni, babulawa ngesihluku njengoba bebengakaze bababikele ukuthi kukhona okubi abakusolayo. “Ngigcine ukukhuluma nabo ngoLwesithathu, bangabika lutho olubi. Asazi ukuthi lesi sitha sivela ngaphi,” kusho uMajozi. Uthe bebeqala abafi ukungenelwa abantu, bebengakaze bagetshengwe phambilini. Ukhale ngokuthi ufe olwembiza njengoba sekufanele athwale izindleko zomngcwabo wabantu ababili, ekubeni akazi ukuthi uzothathani ahlanganise nani. Uthe bayabufuna ubulungiswa ngesigameko ukuze kuphenduleke imibuzo abanayo kanti nenduna isho okufanayo, yathi umphakathi uhlalele ovalweni njengoba abasolwa besagcwele amathafa. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant Colonel Paul Magwaza, uthe amaphoyisa aseKrankop aphenya amacala amabili okubulala kulandela ukutholwa kwabesifazane ababili bebulewe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Uboshiwe osolwa ngokusabisa usomabhizinisi wenkampani yonogada UVELE eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseThekwini, owesilisa oneminyaka engu-42, oboshwe ngoLwesihlanu, eCornubia, eVerulam, ngecala lokufuna ngodli imali yokuvikela. Ngokusho kokhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant Colonel Paul Magwaza, bathathu abantu asebebulewe okuthiwa bebesebenza enkampanini yonogada, lona wesilisa abefuna kuyo ngenkani imali yokuvikela. Elandisa ngodaba uMagwaza, uthe kusolwa ukuthi ngoJanuwari nonyaka, umsolwa wahlaba ucingo walubhekisa kumnikazi wenkampani yonogada, wafuna ngodli isamba semali yokuvikela. Kuthiwa wabe esesabisa ngokuthi onogada benkampani yakhe bazophambana nemvula uma engayikhokhi le mali. “Umnikazi wenkampani waqale wangayingena eyokwenza okwakufunwa umsolwa, wavele wayobika udaba esiteshini samaphoyisa i-Durban Central,” kusho uMagwaza. Uqhube wathi ngenyanga efanayo, kwabe sekubulawa onogada abathathu abaqashwe yile nkampani. Uthe izingcingo ebezisabisa umnikazi wenkampani, nazo bezilokhu ziqhubeke njalo. “Lugcine lugoba uphondo, wayifaka ebhange imali ebifunwa kuye ngodli,” usho kanje. Uveze ukuthi ithimba le-Crime Intelligence libe  selihlanganisa ulwazi lokuthi umsolwa ukuphi, lase lilwedlulisela kwi-Provincial Task Team kanjalo ne-Durban Metropolitan Police Tactical Team, ukuba basebenze ngalo. “Ithimba ligasele eCornubia (ngoLwesihlanu), zase zimkhalela. Ubekwe icala lokufuna ngodli imali yokuvikela,” kusho uMagwaza. Ube esedalula nokuthi uphenyo ngonogada abathathu ababulawa, luyaqhubeka.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: OMUNYE wemikhankaso ngaphandle kwesikole iVuyiswa Mtolo BAKHOLELWA ukuthi uzokwenza omkhulu umehluko ekulweni nobugebengu umkhankaso wokusesha abafundi ezikoleni, abenhlangano eqapha ubugebengu i-eThekwini Neighbourhood Watch. Lokhu kushiwo umsunguli wayo, uMnuz Andile Jali muva nje, kulandela ukuhambela esinye sezikole. UJali uthe zevile eshumini izikole asebezihambele kusukela kuvulwe izikole emalokishini ehlukene enyakatho yeTheku. Phakathi kwezindawo abahambele izikole kuzo, iNanda, Ntuzuma, KwaMashu kanjalo nePhoenix. Phakathi kwezikole asebezihambele ubale iVuyiswa Mtolo High eKwaMashu, Mtapo High eseLindelani, Machobeni High yaseNanda, Delview esePhoenix nezinye. Uthe phakathi kwezinto abazitholayo uma besesha abafundi, inhlamvu yesibhamu esingabulali, izinhlobo ezehlukene zezidakamizwa, izikhali ezifana nemimese nezinto ezicijile. “Inhlamvu yesibhamu esiqhumayo kodwa esingabulali sayithola eMzuvele High, KwaMashu. Sathi uma simbuza umfundi ukuthi ifunani inhlamvu esikhwameni sezincwadi, wathi ingene ngephutha,” kusho uJali. Uthe basala bezibuza ukuthi ingabe siphi isibhamu sayo nokuthi esakhe yini? Uthe komunye umfundi bathole isigqabo sezintombi, waveza ukuthi zikhona izingqinamba abazitholayo uma benza le mikhankaso ezifana nabafundi abahongayo, bengafuni ukuseshwa. Uthe kulabo bafundi kuze kusize ukuthi babaqinisele amehlo, ukubakhombisa ukuthi abezile ukuzodlala. Udalule ukuthi uma sebexoxisene nobuholi besikole, bavele bagasele ngezikhathi zokungena kwabafundi, bakanise esangweni, baseshe wonke umfundi ngaphambi kokuba angene esangweni. Amantombazane uthe aseshwa amalungu enhlangano esifazane, kuthi abafana baseshwe ngabesilisa. “Kwesinye isikole sithole ukuthi kukhona umfundi obesabise uthisha ngokuthi uzombulala, uthisha waze wamenzela incwadi yokuvikela,” kusho uJali. Uveze ukuthi umfundi ubesexoshiwe esikoleni kodwa kwafika iqembu lepolitiki lazotshela isikole sokuthi asinalo ilungelo lokuxosha umfundi. “Lokhu kusixakile ke ukuthi kungani likhulumele umfundi osabise uthisha ngokumbulala, kwaze kwaphoqa ukuthi amtholele incwadi yokuvikela? Sithole ukuthi lo thisha ufundisa kabuhlungu ngoba uyamsaba lo mfundi, okuthiwa usevele wamila izimpiko kakhulu njengoba elekelelwe yileli qembu ukuthi abuye ngenkani esikoleni,” usho kanje. Uthe kwesasePhoenix, abathole kuso umfundi ephethe ummese, bathe uma bembuza, wathi ubezowusebenzisa ukuzivikela njengoba exabane nomunye umfundi waseNanda, omsabise ngokuthi uzobiza igenge yakhe izomfundisa isifundo. Uveze ukuthi bayakholelwa ukuthi njengoba benza le mikhankaso nje, izothela izithelo ezinhle ekuncishisweni kobugebengu njengoba iTheku linenkinga yezingane ezijoyina amaqembu emigulukudu zincane, bese zenza ubugebengu obunyantisa igazi. “Uma bazi ukuthi laba omalume bavele bafike esikoleni kungazelelwe, baseshe izikhwama, bazoba novalo lokuphatha izikhali nezidakamizwa esikoleni. Uma impi yobugebengu siyilwa nasezikoleni, umphumela wakhona uzobonakala nasemphakathini,” usho kanje. Uthe baye bakhethe izikole okuthiwa zinabafundi abangezwa, baye kuzo, wathi nokho emva kokuqala kwabo umkhankaso ngoJanuwari, bayazithola izicelo nakothishanhloko bezikole, ukuthi abeze ngoba sikhulu isidingo. Ubalule ukuthi njengoba besahambele inyakatho yeTheku kuphela okwamanje, basezinhlelweni zokusabalala nakwamanye amalokishi abangakafiki kuwona.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Imeya yeTheku uCyril Xaba I-DA ishayele ihlombe isinqumo sekomiti lasePhalemende elibhekelele ukusebenza kwemali yomphakathi sokuphenya izinsolo zenkohlakalo kuMasipala waseThekwini. Ohola iDA kuMasipala waseThekwini, uMnuz Thabani Mthethwa, uthe kade babekhala ngezinsolo zenkohlakalo kulo mkhandlu. "Sihlezi sikhala ngenkinga yamanzi ekhungethe iTheku. Esikhathini esiningi umasipala awuwathumeli amaloli amanzi ezindaweni ezinenkinga. Amaloli amanzi amaningi afile. Imali eningi isetshenziswa ngaphandle kokulandela imigomo futhi abekho abantu abathathelwa izinyathelo. Siyajabula ukuthi lezi zinto esihlezi sikhala ngazo sesizophenywa yikomiti." Ikomiti lasePhalamende lizopheka ngebhodwe elincane izikhulu zomkhandlu emhlanganweni ozokuba sePhalamende namhlanje. Ikomiti lifuna izikhulu zichaze ngezinsolo zenkohlakalo ekuqashweni kwamaphoyisa omkhandlu, izinsolo zocansi ezibhekiswe kwimenenja kamasipala, umbiko ngokuqashwa kukankosikazi wesikhulu sezimali emkhandlwini. Ikomiti lifuna umasipala udalule abanikazi bamaloli amanzi aqashwe umasipala, lifuna nombiko ngokubambezeleka kohlelo lokwakhiwa kwezindlu eNanda, iNamibia Stop 8 Housing Project. UMthethwa uthe kade babefuna kuphenywe ngokubambezeleka kokwakhiwa kwezindlu okwaqala ngo-2019. "Imali esetshenzisiwe kwakhiwa lezi zindlu u-R140 million kodwa kuze kube namhlanje azikaqedwa." IMeya yeTheku, uMnuz Cyril Xaba, isukume yayohlola ukwakhiwa kwalezi zindlu ngoMsombuluko. Esitatimendeni, umasipala uthe kuzokwakhiwa izindlu ezingu-1 977 ngaphansi kwalolu hlelo. Uthe ngaphansi kwesigaba sokuqala kuzokwakhiwa izindlu ezingu-342, njengamanje zingu-73 izindlu esezakhiwe. Isigaba sokuqala sale phrojekthi esokwakhiwa kwezindlu ezingu-342. Ngesikhathi kuqala ukwakhiwa kwezindlu imindeni engu-68 yayiswa kolindela, njengamanje kusele imindeni engu-20 kolindela. "Enye yezinkinga eyenza uhlelo lubambezeleke kwaba ukudliwa komhlaba nokwenza ukuthi kunyuke isibalo sabantu ababeqokiwe ukuthi bahlomule. Njengamanje umkhandlu usezinhlelweni zokubheka amanye amaqhinga azolekelela ekutheni lolu hlelo luqhubeke."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI weMKP uMnuz Jacob Zuma, noMnuz Nhlamulo Ndhlela ngaphambi kwesithangami sangoMgqibelo UNGOTI wezepolitiki nendodakazi yomholi weMKP bachaze odilizwe kwesokukhulumela iqembu, uMnuz Nhlamulo Ndhlela, ngengemvu yomhlatshelo. Umhlaziyi wezepolitiki, uMnuz Sandile Swana, nendodakazi yomholi weqembu, uNkk Duduzile Zuma-Sambudla, bathe uNdhlela ufele izono zabanye abantu. UNdhlela ukhonjwe afika ngayo kwesokuba umkhulumeli weqembu kanye nokuba yilungu lePhalamende. Ukudilizwa kwakhe esikhundleni kumenyezelwe esithangamini nabezindaba esibizwe isigubhukane, ngoMsombuluko ebusuku. UNdhlela usolwa ngokukhweza emakhanda abaholi uhlaka olusha lweqembu alumemezela ngoMgqibelo, iMKP Institute. Ngesikhathi efunda isitatimende, uNdhlela wamemezela ukuhlakazwa kwesigungu esiphezulu, iNational High Command. Wamemezela ukuthi uhlaka oluholwa yiphini lomholi weMKP, uDkt John Hlophe, yilona oluzoqoka isigungu esiphezulu esisha. Ngesikhathi uNdhlela efunda lesi sitatimende kwakukhona uZuma, uHlophe, nosihlalo kazwelonke, uMnuz Nathi Nhleko. UNobhala jikelele weMKP, uMnuz Sibonelo Nomvalo, uthe uNdhlela wafike washo izinto okungazange kuvunyelwane ngazo. UNomvalo uthe ngesikhathi uNdhlela ethula uhlaka wathi luzokwenza ucwaningo. "Akuyona indlela elungile yokwenza izinto lena ngoba wagcina esenika uhlaka amandla olungenawo." UNomvalo uthe akubanga lula ukuthi abaholi bamumise uNdhlela ngesikhathi bebona ukuthi usekhuluma izinto obekungavunyelwene ngazo. "Kuyiqiniso impela ukuthi abaholi babekhona ngesikhathi efunda isitatimende. Kwaba nzima ukuthi bathi akame. Kunzima ukuthi babengamumisa esephakathi nendawo nenkulumo. Kwakungeke kubukeke kahle ebantwini ukuthi siphazamise umuntu efunda isitatimende. Yingakho bamlinda, waqeda." UNomvalo uthe bambizile uNdhlela kanye nabanye abathintekayo babasola ngalesi senzo. "Balibonile iphutha labo base beyaxolisa." Ngesikhathi efunda isitatimende, uNdhlela wathi usifunda egameni likaZuma. USwana uthe uZuma wabamba iqhaza kulesi simemezelo esenziwa uNdhlela. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabeSABC News. "Isimemezelo esikhulu lesi abasenza futhi asijwayelekile. Asikaze siyibone into enje lapha eNingizimu Afrika. Ngazitshela ukuthi uZuma uqhamuke nento entsha kodwa konke kushabalele. UZuma wayekhona ngesikhathi kwenziwa isimemezelo. Bekufuneka umuntu okuzosulelwa ngaye icala. Kusobala ukuthi icala lisulelwe ngaye uNdhlela." UNkk Zuma-Sambudla yena ubhale ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi uNdhlela ube yimvu yomhlatshelo. "Ngelinye ilanga iqiniso liyovela." UNdhlela ubesebambe lesi sikhundla kusukela kusungulwa iMKP ngo-2023. I-MKP iqoke uqweqwe lwentatheli, uMnuz Sifiso Mahlangu, ukuba kube yilona olukhulumela iqembu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMNTWANA uGcwalisile kaGideon Zulu-Kabanyane SEKUPHINDE kwehla omunye umshophi eNdlunkulu kaZulu kulandela ukushona kochazwa njengenqolobane, uMntwana uGcwalisile kaGideon Zulu. UMntwana uGcwalisile ubengumbhali wezincwadi, abe nenhlangano ethuthukisa abesifazane, kanti futhi uke wasebenzela izinhlaka zikahulumeni ezihlukene. UMntwana uGcwalisile uyindodakazi yowayenguMphathiswa wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi, uMntwana uGideon. Okhulumela iSilo neNdlunkulu, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uthe bagqenywe engeqiwantwala ngokuguqa kukaMntwana uGcwalisile. "Uzokhumbula ukuthi uMntwana ubengumbhali wezincwadi njengoba eke wabhala incwadi nangoyise. Uke wabhala incwadi yamahubo, ebhalela izikole. Ubeyinqolobane uqobo lwayo njengoba ulwazi abeluthola kuyise abelugcina. Uma uzokhumbula kahle sebebancane kakhulu abaseNdlunkulu abadala abasadla anhlamvana. Kunzima uma sibabona behamba," kusho uMntwana UMntwana uThulani uthe kuyabakhathaza ukushona ngokulandelana kwabaseNdlunkulu. "Lolu daba lubanga amahloni. Uma ukhumbula kusuka ngomhla ka- 18 Ephreli kuhlezi kunomngcwabo eNdlunkulu. Ngaleyo mpelasonto kwakungcwatshwa oSuthu (uMntwana uGibizizwe), ngelandelayo kwakungcwatshwa kithi (eZibindini, uMntwana Gcinabani Thembisile Zulu). Kule mpelasonto bekungcwatshwa uMntwana uMuziwoxolo. "Sibona sengathi kunomshophi okuyinto ejwayelekile eNdlunkulu. Kuvamile ukuthi uma kwehla umshophi bese kwenzeka ngokulandelana. Sikhalela iSilo ukuthi ngesikhathi saso bese kuhamba abantu abadala." Indodana kaMntwana uGcwalisile, uLuyanda Kabanyane, ifake umyalelzo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana lapho imemezele khona ukuguqa koMntwana. Icele ukuba banikwe ithuba lokuzila njengomndeni. Ibandla obekukhonza kulo uMntwana uGcwalisile, iMethodist Church of Sourthern Africa Paarl Valley Circuit, limchaze njengomuntu obezinikele futhi enothando. "Ubeyisibusiso ebandleni. Uzakhele igama ngokusebenzela uNkulunkulu. Sizohlezi siwakhumbula amagalelo akhe." UMntwana uGcwalisile uneziqu zobudokotela azithola eNyuvesi yaseToronto, eCanada. Ngo-2011 waklonyeliswa emcimbini wamaqhawe namaqhawekazi owawuhlelwe yiNedbank. Waklonyeliswa ngomsebenzi owenziwa yinhlangano ayisungula iQolothani Makhosikazi.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IJAJI libanqumele ugwayi katiki abasolwa ecaleni lokubulawa kowayengunobhala jikelele we-ANC Youth League, uMnuz Sindiso Magaqa, licasulwa ukubambezeleka kokuqulwa kwecala. IJaji Mluleki Chithi litshele abasolwa ukuthi ngokulandelayo icala lizoqhubeka ngisho noma ngabe kukhona umsolwa ongenaye ummeli. Ukusho lokhu emva kokuba kuhlehliswe ukuqulwa kwecala izolo ngenxa yokuthi omunye wabameli bekunelinye icala obekufanele aye kulona khona izolo. Bekuhlelwe ukuthi kuqalwe ukuqulwa kwecala izolo kuze kube uJuni 12. Kepha ummeli wowayeyimenenja kaMasipala waseMzimkhulu, uMnuz Zweliphansi Skhosana, uMnuz Sibusiso Dlamini, utshele inkantolo ukuthi akakwazi ukuqhubeka necala izolo nakulezi ezinye izinsuku ezibekiwe. "Ngibone kamumva sengivumile ukuthatha leli cala ukuthi kufanele ngibe kwenye inkantolo ngalezi zinsuku ezibekiwe. Ngizamile ukuthola omunye ummeli engingamnika elinye icala kodwa kwangalunga." Ukuqulwa kwecala sekubambezeleke iminyaka eyisishiyagalombili. Umshushisi, u-Advocate Elvis Gcweka, uthe usesola ukuthi abasolwa bashintsha abameli ngoba befuna ukubambezela ukuqulwa kwecala. UGcweka uthe sekushone ofakazi abane kulesi sikhathi kusalindwe ukuqulwa kwecala. "Kunofakazi abahlezi endaweni egcina ofakazi. Njalo uma kuhlehla icala kufanele sihambe siyobachazela ofakazi ukuthi kungani icala lihlehlisiwe. Abanye sebehlale iminyaka eyisithupha. Kufanele silokhu sibancenga ukuthi baqhubeke nokuhlala endaweni egcina ofakazi. Njalo uma kuhlehla ukuqulwa kwecala kufanele siyochazela intombi endala (unina kaMagaqa) ukuthi kungani kuhlehlisiwe ukuqulwa kwecala." UChithi utshele abasolwa ukuthi njengamajaji banalo ilungelo lokuphenya uma kunezinsolo zokuthi abasolwa babambezela ngamabomu ukuqulwa kwecala. "Isigaba 342a somthetho sisinika igunya lokuba siphenye ngokubambezeleka kwecala. Uma sithola ukuthi ngempela abasolwa babambezela icala, zikhona izinyathelo umthetho osigunyaza ukuba sizithathe. Kuthatha isikhathi ukuhlelela ukuqulwa kwecala. Kuba kubi uma sekufika usuku lokuqulwa kwecala bese liyahlehla ngenxa yokuthi kukhona umsolwa oshintshe ummeli." UChithi uxwayise abasolwa ngokuthi kufanele bagawule babheke. "Kuzofika isikhathi lapho khona singeke sikubekezelele ukubambezeleka kokuqulwa kwecala. Lapho-ke icala lizoqhubeka liqulwe noma ngabe kukhona umsolwa ongenaye ummeli. Kuzobe kungaqali njengoba sekuke kwenzeka phambilini. Lile cala libhekwe abantu abaningi. Abantu bafuna ukubona isiphetho. Umndeni nawo ufuna izimpendulo." Umfowabo kaMagaqa, uMnuz Lwazi Magaqa, uthe kubajabulisile ukuzwa uChithi enqumela abasolwa ugwayi katiki. "Umsolwa ulokhu eshintsha abameli. Nanamhlanje ufike washintsha abameli. Okuhle ke wukuthi ijaji lithe akabuyele lapha ngoJuni 3,"kusho uLwazi. Icala lihlehliselwe uJuni 3.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMNUZ Brown Mogotsi ophikwe yizinto evele eNkantolo yeMantshi eJohannesburg izolo Image: Itumeleng English KUSHIYANE ukwenza kubantu amagama abo avela kwiKhomishini ephenya izinsolo ezenziwa uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, njengoba abanye bephume behleka kwabanye kwaba nokukhala nokugedla kwamazinyo. Usomabhizinisi othi usebenza nophiko lwezinhloli, uMnuz Brown Mogotsi, uphikwe yizinto njengoba icala lakhe lihlehliselwe uMsombuluko. UMogotsi ubevele eNkantolo yeMantshi eJohannesburg lapho ebhekene khona necala lokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. UMogotsi uboshwe emva kwezinsolo zokuthi waqamba amanga wathi kukhona abantu abebezama ukumsoconga. Imoto kaMogotsi yadutshulwa, amaphoyisa athi uMogotsi unesandla ekudutshulweni kwayo. Lokhu kwenzeka ngesikhathi uMogotsi kwakufanele ayovela kwiKhomishini yeJaji uMbuyiseli Madlanga. Okhulumela amaphoyisa, uBrigadier Athlenda Mathe, uthe isibhamu esasetshenziswa ngesikhathi kudutshulwa imoto kaMogotsi sithinteka emacaleni okukhona kuwo nawokubulala. "Asikasitholi isibhamu kodwa siyaqhubeka nokusifuna." UBrigadier Mathe uthe kungenzeka ukuthi kuboshwe abanye abasiza uMogotsi ngesikhathi epheka itulo lokuqamba amanga. "Sifuna ukuthi achaze ukuthi kungani aqamba amanga athi kukhona abantu abebezama ukumsoconga. Ubufakazi obutholwe amaphoyisa aphenya icala buyashayisana nesitatimende sikaMogotsi. Akazange afune ukubambisana nabaphenyi. Manje simnika ithuba lokuba akhulume iqiniso." UMogotsi uboshwe ngoLwesihlanu nokuwusuku aqeda ukwethula ngalo ubufakazi kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga. USOMATEKISI uMnuz Joe Sibanyoni ukhululiwe eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKwaggafontein izolo Usomatekisi igama lakhe elivela kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga, uJoe "Ferrari" Sibanyoni, uphume ehleka yedwa enkantolo. Inkantolo ichithe icala elithweswe uSibanyoni kanye nabanye asolwa nabo. USibanyoni ubesolwa ngokufuna ngodli imali kusomabhizinisi. USibanyoni usolwa ngokusondelana nosomabhizinisi obhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusimuzi "Cat" Matlala. Inkantolo ilihoxisile icala ngenxa yokuthi umshushisi kanye nomphenyi wecala abazange balubhade enkantolo. Inkantolo ikhiphe umyalelo wokuthi kuboshwe umshushisi. Inhlangano yezokushushisa, iNational Prosecuting Authority, imemezele ukumiswa komshushisi emva kwesinqumo senkantolo. Icala elibhekene nosolwa ngokusoconga ufakazi owethula ubufakazi ngokuyimfihlo kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga lona lihlehliselwe uLwesine. UMnuz Matipandile Sotheni uzoqhubeka nokufaka isicelo sebheyili eNkantolo yeMantshi eBoksburg. USotheni usolwa ngokubulala uMnuz Marius Van Der Merwe owathula ubufakazi ngokuyimfihlo phambi kweKhomishini kaMadlanga. Ubhekene namacala angu-13, uyawaphika wonke amacala abekwe wona.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, nephini lomholi weqembu, uDkt John Hlophe UMHOLI weMPK, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uveze eyokungenisa kosomathuba abalandela ibhodwe eliconsayo eqenjini ngesikhathi enza izinguquko. UZuma uthe umbiko wocwaningo abalwenzile uthole ukuthi iqembu lisengcupheni ngenxa yokujoyina kwabantu abajahe izikhundla. Ukusho lokhu esitatimendeni esifundwe okhulumela iMKP, uMnuz Nhlamulo Ndhlela, esethulwe ngoMgqibelo. UZuma umemezele ukusungulwa kohlaka lobuholi olusha iMKP Institute nokuhlakazwa kwesigungu esiphezulu iNational High Command. Uhlaka olusha lusungulwe emva kocwaningo oluthathe izinyanga ezingu-18. Uhlaka olusha luzoholwa iPhini lomholi weMKP, uDkt John Hlophe, futhi lona luzobika ngqo kuZuma. Amanye amalungu ohlaka olusha uNdhlela, uSotswebhu weMKP ePhalamende, Nkk Mmabatho Mokoena-Zondi, oyinhloko yeHhovisi likaMengameli kwiMKP, uMnuz Lindelani Mbambo, Nkk Khanyisile Litchfield-Tshabalala, uMnuz General Manana, noMnuz Oupa Mathebula. Uhlaka olusha ilona oluzoqoka isigungu esiphezulu esisha. "Iningi labantu abazoqokelwa esigungwini esiphezulu abantu ababe yingxenye yobuholi bokuqala ngesikhathi sikhankasela ukunqoba ngamalengiso ukhetho lukazwelonke lwango-2024. Abanye abazoqokwa sizobheka ebuholini bezifundazwe nakomakadebona ukuze sizokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi iqembu limeleleke kahle yonke indawo." Uhlaka olusha lithweswe ijoka lokuqinisekisa ukukhulula abahlwempu emaketangeni enhlupheko kanye nokulwa nokungalingani uZuma athe kudla lubi ngaphansi kukahulumeni wokubambisana. UZuma uthe angeke bavume ukuthi iqembu liphazanyiswe osomathuba abafuna izikhundla. "Umbiko uthole ukuthi iqembu lisengcupheni ngenxa yosomathuba abafuna izikhundla, izimpi zangaphakathi nokungena kwabantu abahlose ukuzophazamisa ukusebenza kweqembu. Angeke sivume ukuthi abantu abathanda izikhundla bathikameze umkhankaso wokukhulula abantu." UZuma uthe basemkhankasweni wokunqoba ngamalengiso ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya lwangoNovemba, nokhetho lukazwelonke lwango-2029. UZuma unxuse onke amaqembu amancane ukuba ahlangane kwakhiwe inhlangano eyodwa. "Imiphumela yocwaningo ikubeka ngokusobala ukuthi abantu bakhathele amaqembu ezepolitiki. Inkohlakalo yenze ukuthi abantu bengabe besawathemba amaqembu ezepolitiki. Yonke indawo abantu baphelelwe ithemba ngenxa yokwehluleka kwezinhlelo zikahulumeni ukushintsha impilo yabantu. Senze izinguquko ebuholini beMKP ngoba nakhu sifuna ukuthi iqembu likwazi ukwemukela abantu abaqhamuka ezinhlakeni ezahlukene."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IKOMITI lasePhalemende elibhekelele ukusebenza kwemali yomphakathi lihlezi imbashalala uMasipala waseThekwini ngezinsolo zenkohlakalo, ukuqasha ngokwenzelela ophikweni lwamaphoyisa omkhandlu nezinsolo zocansi ezibhekiswe kwimenenja yomkhandlu. Ikomiti libhalele iMeya yomkhandlu, uMnuz Cyril Xaba, licela ukuba ichaze ngalezi zinsolo kanye nezinye. IMEYA yeTheku, uMnuz Cyril Xaba UMasipala weTheku kulindeleke ukuthi uphekwe ngebhodwe elincane uma usuvele phambi kwekomiti ukuzochaza ngalezi zinsolo. Encwadini ebhalwe usihlalo wekomiti, uMnuz Songezo Zibi, ikomiti licele ukuba uXaba achaze kabanzi ngezinsolo zenkohlakalo ekuqashweni kwamaphoyisa kamasipala. Ngo-2024, kwasuka umsindo ngesikhathi kuqashwa amaphoyisa kamasipala angu-500 emva kokuthi owesifazane wabonga wanconcoza kunobhala wegatsha le-ANC athi waba nesandla ekutheni kuqashwe umzukulu wakhe. UZibi ucele uXaba ukuba achaze ngophenyo olwenziwe ngalezi zinsolo. "Sicela uchaza ukuthi yiziphi izinhlelo ezikhona zokuqinisekisa ukuthi akubi khona ukwenzelela uma kuqashwa?" UZibi ucele uXaba ukuba alethe umbiko ogcwele ngezinsolo zocansi ezibhekene nomenenja yomasipala, uMnuz Musa Mbhele, ezenziwa yiPhini lemenenja yomkhandlu, uNksz Kim Makhathini. "Iyiphi inkampani eyaqashwa ukuba iphenye izinsolo? Ubani owaqasha le nkampani futhi yabiza malini? Ngabe ukhona omunye umsebenzi le nkampani eyake yawenza lapha emkhandlwini? Ubani owagunyaza ukuqashwa kwayo?" Image: RSA Parliament UZibi uyalele uXaba ukuba achaze ngokuqashwa kukankosikazi wesikhulu sezezimali emkhandlwini, uDkt Sandile Mnguni. "Imiphi eminye imisebenzi ake wayenza lapha emkhandlwini? Obani abagunyaza ukuqashwa kwakhe?" Ikomiti lifuna ukwazi ukuthi obani abanikazi bamaloli amanzi aqashwe umkhandlu. "Ngabe imalini asebekhokhelwe yona kule minyaka emihlanu eyedlule?" Ikomiti lifuna ukwazi ngokubambezeleka kohlelo lokwakhiwa kwezindlu eNanda olubizwa ngeNamibia 8 Housing Project. Lolu hlelo lwezigidi zamarandi lwaqala ngo-2019. Ikomiti liyalele umkhandlu ukuba uchaze ngohlelo lokufakwa kwengqalasizinda yokuthuthwa kwendle olwaqala ngo-2019. "Iluphi uhlelo olwalandelwa ngesikhathi kukhishwa ithenda yalo msebenzi? Kungani izinkampani zingakaze zikhokhelwe? Yini eyenze ukuthi uhlelo lubambezeleke? Ngabe luzoqedwa nini lolu hlelo?" Ikomiti licele uXaba ukuthi achaze ngo-R60 million owabhubhudlwa ngonyakamali owedlule. UXaba uyalelwe ukuba aphendule le mibuzo namhlanje. Okhulumela uXaba, uMnuz Mluleki Mntungwa, uthe bayitholile incwadi kaZibi kodwa wathi ngeke aphawule ngezinto okubuzwa ngazo kule ncwadi. UMntungwa uthe ubuholi bomkhandlu buzophendula kahle ngalezi zinto emhlanganweni abazokuba nawo namalungu ekomiti. "Engingakusho nje ukuthi sizokuba nomhlangano namalungu ekomiti kuleli sonto. Angikwazi ukungena kulezi zinto okubuzwa ngazo kule ncwadi."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: no NFP new member4.jpg UMNZ Sipho Mbatha Image: NQOBILE MBONAMBI SEKUQUBUKE imvunge kwi-NFP kulandela amahlebezi okuthi osanda kuxoshwa yi-IFP kwesobukhansela, uMnuz Sipho Mbatha, ugixabezwe ngesikhundla esibalulekile kuleli qembu eligubuzelwe izimpi zangaphakathi. Amalungu eqembu anganelisekile akhala ngokunikwa kukaMbatha isikhundla sikaNational Organizer. Amahlebezi okuthi uMbatha unikwe isikhundla abhebhetheke emva kokuba kusabalale incwadi okuthiwa ibhalwe uyena lapho azisa khona amalungu eNFP ngomcimbi ozohanjelwa umholi weqembu, uMnuz Ivan Barnes. Kule ncwadi uMbatha uzibiza ngo-National Organizer. UMbatha usanda kuxoshwa ekubeni ikhansela le-IFP kuMasipala wesifunda iKing Cetshwayo. UMbatha waxoshelwa izinsolo zokuthi ubenobulungu bamaqembu amabili kanye nezinsolo zokugwazisa abantu ayebathembisa umsebenzi namathenda kwamasipala. Amalungu anganelisekile athe ukunikwa kukaMbatha isikhundla kuphambene nemigomo yeqembu. Ilungu elicele ukuba igama lalo lingadalulwa lithe imigomo yeNFP ikubeka kucace ukuthi umuntu kufanele abe ilungu leqembu iminyaka emihlanu ngaphambi kokuthi anikwe isikhundla. "Kazi kuyoze kube nini izikhundla zinikwa abantu abafikayo eqenjini? UMbatha asimazi nokuthi ujoyine nini njengoba esenikwa isikhundla. Mina ngamgcina eyikhansela le-IFP ngiyathuka namhlanje uma sengizwa kuthiwa usenikwe isikhundla esikhulu kangaka. Ingoba bebengekho yini abanye abantu abebengaqokwa?" Umholi uthe uMbatha washiya onile kwiNFP njengoba esenikwa isikhundla nje. "Ngesikhathi iNFP iphuma kwi-IFP, saphuma naye. Wasishiya simanxebanxeba, waphindela kwi-IFP. Namhlanje uzonikwa isikhundla. Kaze uzobenza njani labantu ashiye ebaqolile kwi-IFP?" Omunye umholi uthe ukunikwa kwabantu izikhundla ngendlela engaqondakali kwenza ukuthi amalungu eqembu aphelelwe umdlandla. "Icobana amathambo le ndaba yabantu abanikwa izikhundla ngendlela engaqondakali futhi yenza ukuthi kube nzima ukuthi amalungu eNFP abamukele. Nabo nje abasebenzi ngokukhululeka ngoba basuke belandelwa izinkulumo." Unobhala jikelele weNFP, uMnuz Sunset Xaba, uthe abakaze bamqoke uMbatha. UXaba uthe bayibonile incwadi okuthiwa ibhalwe uMbatha kodwa wathi abazi ukuthi ubenikezwe ubani igunya lokuthi ayibhale. "Akayena u-organizer wembu. Thina u-organizer esinaye uBawinile Mhlongo. Asikaze simqoke loyo Mbatha, angimazi nangokumbona. Angimazi ukuthi ubethunywe ubani ukuthi abhale leyo ncwadi." UXaba uthe uMbatha wayephethe lesi sikhundla ngesikhathi kusekhona umsunguli weqembu, uNkk Zanele kaMagwaza-Msibi. Imizamo yokuthola ukuphawula kukaMbatha ayizange iphumelele njengoba ucingo lwakhe belukhala lungangeni futhi engazange ayiphendule imibuzo ayithunyelwe.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa UMENGAMELI, Cyril Ramaphosa, uvulelwe elinye icala elithinta udaba lokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. I-ActionSA ivulele uRamaphosa icala imsola ngokuthi waqamba amanga ngesikhathi edalula isamba semali eyalahleka epulazini lakhe. USotswebhu we-ActionSA, uNkk Lerato Ngobeni, uthe kunobufakazi obukhomba ukuthi inkulu kakhulu imali eyantshontshwa kunalena eyashiwo uRamaphosa. URamaphosa wadalula ukuthi kwantshontshwa u-580 000 wamadola aseMelika, nokusho ukuthi imali elinganiselwa ku-R10 million uma ibuyiselwa emalini yakuleli. UNkk Ngobeni uthe ubufakazi bakamumva bukhomba ukuthi imali eyantshontshwa ayikho ngaphansi kuka-R15 million. UNkk Ngobeni uthe kungavela okushaqisayo ngesamba semali eyantshontshwa uma kungase kuqhubeke kuphenywe. "Siyiqaphelile imibiko ethi iNational Prosecuting Authority (NPA) nayo ishaya amakhala ngesamba esalahleka. INPA iqale ukushaya amakhala emva kokuphenya ngemali eyayiphuma ingena kwi-akhawunti yomunye wabantu ababoshelwe ukuntshontsha imali epulazini likaRamaphosa. Kuningi okungavela uma kungase kuphenywe ngemali eyangena neyaphuma kuma-akhawunti abanye abasolwa." URamaphosa uvulelwe icala lokwehluleka ukubika ngobugebengu, elokuqamba amanga efungile kanye nelenkohlakalo. Udaba lokuntshontshwa kwemali epulazini likaRamaphosa luqale phansi emva kwesinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosiseklo sangesonto eledlule. Inkantolo yachitha isinqumo sePhalamende sokunqaba ukwamukela umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwamadola aseMelika epulazini likaRamaphosa. Umbiko wethimba elaliholwa owayeyiJaji, uSandile Ngcobo, wathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona imigomo uRamaphosa ayiphula. Isinqumo senkantolo sesenze ukuthi iPhalamende liqhubeke nohlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Amaqembu ezepolitiki afuna uRamaphosa akhishwe esikhundleni. Amalungu esigungu esiphezulu kwi-ANC abenomhlangano oyisipesheli, izolo ebusuku lapho ebhunge khona ngalolu daba. Amalungu amaningi e-ANC ayameseka uRamaphosa kodwa kukhona afuna ukuthi ehle esikhundleni.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KWESOKUNXELE, nguMnuz Vusimuzi 'Cat' Matlala obewukhumbintethe namaphoyisa asolwa nawo ecaleni lethenda yezigidi zamaradi ayeyithole kwiSAPS. Kuvela ukuthi uMatlala angase alivume leli cala awumshungu kulo noMkhuzi wamaPhoyisa onikwe ikhefu, uGeneral Fannie Masemola ANGASE alivume icala usomabhizinisi, uMnuz Vusimuzi "Cat" Matlala, oboshwe kanye noKhomishana wamaPhoyisa omisiwe, uGeneral Fannie Masemola. UMbuso uveze ukuthi kunezingxoxo eziqhubekayo ezingaholela ekutheni uMatlala avume icala elithinta ithenda yezigidi zamarandi eyanikwa inkampani yakhe. UMatlala, Masemola namanye amaphoyisa angu-12 athinteka ekukhishweni kwethenda ka-R360 million, bavele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi ePitoli, izolo. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uJune 26, ukuze kuqedelwe uphenyo. Abameli bakaMatlala bacele inkantolo ukuba ikhiphe umyalelo wokuthi uMatlala aqhubeke nokugcinwa ejele elisePitoli, iKgosi Mampuru II, esikhundleni sokubuyiselwa ejele eliKwaZulu-Natal, iBongweni. Abameli bakaMatlala bathe ukugcinwa kwakhe eKgosi Mampuru II kuzokwenza ukuthi kube lula ukuthi balungiselele icala ngenxa yokuthi ijele liseduze nalapho kuqulwa khona icala. Umshushisi, u-Advocate Santhos Manilall, uthe abaphikisani nesicelo sabameli bakaMatlala. UManilall uthe ukugcinwa kukaMatlala eKgosi Mampuru II kuzokwenza ukuthi kube lula ukuqhubeka nezingxoxo. "Izingxoxo sezifinyelele kwesinye isigaba, kungenzeka siqale izingxoxo zokuthi uMatlala avume icala. Kungaba kuhle kakhulu uma engaqhubeka atoke eKgosi Mampuru." Okhulumela inhlangano yezokushushisa, iNational Prosecuting Authority (NPA), uMnuz Kaizer Kganyago, uthe kunobufakazi obusha ababutholile ngalolu daba. "Sifuna ukuqinisekisa lobu bufakazi obusha esibutholile. Sifuna ukubheka kahle izitatimende zokusebenza kwezimali." UMatlala uphinde abhekane noxhaxha lwamacala okukhona kuwo nawokuzama ukubulala. Igama likaMatlala livela ezinsolweni ezenziwa uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. Bekumatasa ezinkantolo izolo, amacala athinta abantu amagama abo avela phambi kweKhomishini eholwa yiJaji Mbuyiseli Madlanga. Usomatekisi odumile, uMnuz Joe "Ferrari" Sibanyoni, uvele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein, eMpumalanga, izolo. USibanyoni uboshelwe icala lokufuna ngodli imali kusomabhizinisi. Ekhuluma nabezindaba, uSibanyoni uthe umsulwa. "Ngiyinceku kaNkulunkulu mina." USibanyoni uthe uzoshumayela ivangeli ejele njengoba eboshiwe. Uboshwe kanye noMnuz Mvimbi Masilela noMnuz Philemon Msiza. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uLwesihlanu. Imenenja kaMasipala waseKurhuleni, uMnuz Kagiso Lerutla, nesikhulu sophiko lwamaphoyisa omkhandlu esimisiwe, uMnuz Julius Mkhwanazi, bavele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi eBoksburg. ULerutla noMkhwanazi babhekene namacala enkohlakalo, ukukhwabanisa nokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uJuni 9. Umholi weqembu iNational Coloured Congress, uMnuz Fadiel Adams, ubevele eNkantolo yeMantshi ePinetown. U-Adams ubhekene necala lokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Izolo uqhubekile nokufaka isicelo sebheyili, icala lahlehliselwa uLwesihlanu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: OWAYENGUMSAKAZI oKhozini, uNgizwe Mchunu, uphonsele inselelo ubuholi be-ANC eThekwini, ukuba bulalele abantu bakuleli abakhala ngabokufika abangekho emthethweni. UMchunu uthe abaholi kufanele basukumele izikhalazo zabantu abalwa nabokufika abakuleli abangekho emthethweni. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ubuholi be-ANC esifundeni iTheku, buzomkhalisa kulandela ukungqongqiswa komuzi wakhe oseMbumbulu. Umuzi kaMchunu uthungelwe ngomlilo ngeSonto, kanti ukushiswa kwawo kusolwa ukuthi kuhlobene nemibhikisho yokulwa nabokufika, njengoba uMchunu engomunye wabantu abaphambili kule mibhikisho. Utshele abaholi be-ANC esifundeni iTheku ukuthi abantu bakuleli sebekhathele abakufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Siyanicela baholi ukuthi nisilalele. Ngiyazi ukuthi izindlebe zenu ziyaphuza ukuzwa kodwa ngiyacela ukuba nisilalele. Le nto esiyenzayo lapha inokuthula. Siyazi ukuthi nonke nina baholi bezepolitiki niyaphuza ukuzwa." Abaholi be-ANC abebeyokhalisa uMchunu bebeholwa ongumdidiyeli we-ANC eThekwini ophinde abe uSomlomo kuMasipala waseThekwini, uMnuz Thabani Nyawose. UMchunu uphonsele uNyawose inselelo ukuba asukumele umonakalo odalwa ngabantu bokufika edolobheni eThekwini. "Baba ngiyazi ukuthi ngelinye ilanga ungase ube yimeya kamasipala njengoba nibekana ngale ndlela enibekana ngayo. Awukwazi ukwenza sengathi awuyiboni le nto eyenzeka edolobheni eThekwini. Amabhilidi angcolile. Abantu bokufika bagwazela izikhulu zoMnyango wezaseKhaya. Bagwazela wonke umuntu." UMchunu uthe kuyamjabulisa ukuthi i-ANC eThekwini isanda kukhipha isitatimende lapho ithe iyayeseka imibhikisho elwa nabokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UNyawose uthe i-ANC ayinawo umgomo wokuvikela abantu bokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Abantu abangena emngceleni yethu bengenawo amaphepha abagunyaza ukuthi bangene eNingizimu Afrika, i-ANC iyakugxeka lokho. Lena imfundiso nje eqhutshwa abantu abafuna ukuveza i-ANC njengenhlangano ephambana nehlombe, engasabalaleli abantu." UNyawose uthe bayakugxeka ukushiswa komuzi kaNgizwe, wathi banethemba lokuthi amaphoyisa azobathola ngokushesha abasolwa. I-ANC inikele ngevawusha ka-R10 000 yokuthenga izimpahla zokwakha.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umengameli Cyril Ramaphosa Image: File/IOL graphics UNGOTI wezomthetho ubona lulude ukhalo oluzohanjwa njengoba uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, ememezele ukuthi uzophonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe, iPhala Phala. Ungoti weDonda Attorneys, uMnuz Melusi Xulu, uthe uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni lungase lunyomfe ukufakwa kwesicelo esiphonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba elaliholwa owayeyijaji, uSandile Ngcobo. UXulu uthe uRamaphosa angase afake isivimbelo esizonqanda ukuqhubeka kohlelo lwasePhalamende lokumkhipha esikhundleni. URamaphosa umemezele ukuthi uzophonsela inselelo umbiko owathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona imithetho ayephula ekusingathweni kodaba lokuntshontshwa kwemali epulazini lakhe. Enkulumweni abeyibhekise ezweni, uRamaphosa uveze ukuthi ngeke asule esikhundleni. URamaphosa uthe uyasihlonipha isinqumo senkantolo kodwa wathi umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende unamaphutha. "Nginqume ukuphonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba. Angikwenzi lokhu ngoba nakhu ngingalihloniphi ikomiti kodwa ngenza lokhu ngoba ngikholelwa ukuthi kunamaphutha embikweni wethimba." URamaphosa uthe umbiko wethimba ugcwele izinto ezingenabufakazi. "Inzwabethi yonke lena equkethwe umbiko wethimba." UXulu uthe kungase kuthathe isikhathi eside ukuthi inkantolo inqume esicelweni esizofakwa uRamaphosa. "Kungathatha izinyanga noma unyaka. Ukhumbule ukuthi uma icala ezolifaka enkantolo enkulu, uma kuwukuthi akuhambi ngendlela afisa ngayo kungenzeka adlulele enkantolo yamacala adlulisiwe. Angaze afike eNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo. Uzokhumbula ukuthi isicelo se-EFF salalelwa ngo-2024 kodwa isinqumo size saphuma ngo-2026. Ngakho ke kunzima ukusho ukuthi icala lizothatha isikhathi esingakanani." UXulu uthe uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni luzoqhubeka uma engasifaki isivimbelo senkantolo. "Uma engasifaki isivimbelo senkantolo bazoqhubeka nabakwenzayo. Kuzomele asifake isicelo sokuvimba ukuqhubeka kohlelo lokumkhipha esikhundleni. Uma engakwenzi lokho uzothi eqhubeka enkantolo nabo bebe beqhubeka ngapha." Amaqembu ezepolitiki afuna ukuthi luqhubeke uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni yize ephonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, uthe iPhalamende kufanele liqhubeke nomsebenzi walo. "Uhlelo lokukhipha uMengameli esikhundleni luwumsebenzi wePhalamende okungafanele umiswe ukuthi kunecala elifakiwe. Kufanele uhlelo luqhubeke kanye necala." Okhulumela i-EFF, uMnuz Sinawo Thambo, uthe bebevele bekulindele ukuthi uRamaphosa uzophonsela inselelo umbiko. "Akananembeza. Silindele ukuthi uSomlomo (uNkk Thoko Didiza) asiphikise isicelo sikaRamaphosa. Nathi sizosiphikisa isicelo sikaRamaphosa. Yini emenze ukuthi alinde isikhathi eside ukuthi aphonsele inselelo isinqumo senkantolo. IPhalamende kufanele liqhubeke nezinhlelo zalo. Izinhlelo zePhalamende akufanele zimiswe isicelo sikaRamaphosa."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMNUZ Melikhaya Ngcongo IBONA ukufunda kwezimeya kungaba yikhambi elingaqeda idimoni lokungalandelwa kwemigomo komasipala baKwaZulu-Natal iMeya kaMasipala waseRichmond esanda kuthweswa iziqu zemfundo ephakeme, uMnuz Melikhaya Ngcongo. UNgcongo uthe ukuncipha kwezimeya ezingaziboni izimpukane kuzokwenza ukuthi banciphe nomasipala abathola imibiko enogcobho. Ukusho lokhu engxoxweni abe nayo neSolezwe. UNgcongo usanda kuthweswa iziqu iPost Graduate Diploma in Public Management eNyuvesi yasePitoli. Umasipala awuphethe wenza kahle kakhulu ekuphathweni kwemali njengoba uyingxenye yomasipala abane baKwaZulu-Natal abathole imibiko engenagcobho ngonyaka odlule. Bekungunyaka wesibili umasipala uthola umbiko ongenawo ugcobho, kanti lona ngunyaka wesithathu uNgcongo esesihlalweni. UNgcongo uthe kuba lula ukuthi izikhulu zizenzele umathanda uma imeya ingayazi imithetho eyengamele ukusetshenziswa kwemali. "Uma uyimeya uwena ongusihlalo wekomiti lezezimali kumasipala. Uma imeya ingaziboni izimpukane kuzokonakala. Izikhulu zizozenzela umathanda. Ngeke sifunde sonke siyizimeya, kodwa labo ithuba elisavuma kubona kufanele baye kofunda. Uma uwumholi kufanele uwazi umsebenzi wezikhulu zomasipala kanye nemithetho ethinta ukuphathwa kwemikhandlu. Ugcina uvuma noma izikhulu sezenza izinto ezingalungile uma ungayazi imithetho." UNgcongo uthe izimeya kufanele ziqinisekise ukulandelwa kwemithetho uma zifuna ukuthola imibiko engenagcobho. "Ngeke uwuthole umbiko ongenagcobho uma ungathembekile. Kufanele uqashe abantu abawaziyo umsebenzi. Omasipala abaningi bathola imibiko enogcobho ngenxa yokuthi abayilandeli imigomo uma besebenzisa imali. Inkinga enkulu ilapha ophikweni okukhishwa kulo amathenda." UNgcongo uthe usaphokophele ukuthola ezinye iziqu zemfundo ephakeme. "Uma uwumholi kubalulekile ukuthi uzithuthukise ngolwazi. Ngesikhathi ngiqokelwa ukuphatha umasipala ngo-2023 ngabona ukuthi kuningi engingakwazi mayelana nokuphathwa komasipala kanye nokusetshenziswa kwemali yomphakathi." UNgcongo uthe uyaqhubeka nezifundo zakhe njengoba manje esenza iMasters. Ebuzwa ukuthi ngabe ufisa ukufinyelela eziqwini zobudokotela yini uthe uzofinyelela uma iNkosi ivuma. UNgcongo uthe bekungelula ukuqhuba iziqu zemfundo ephakeme. "NgesiZulu nje ngingathi ibingitibulisa, namanje ngisaqhubeka nokutibula ngoba ngisaqhubeka nokufunda. Akulula ukucaza isikhathi sakho njengoba bengifunda ngisebenza. Ukuzimisela kwami yikhona okwenze ukuthi ngigcine ngiphumelela."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMNUZ Christo Botha obemele i-DA embangweni wesikhundla sobumeya kuMasipala waseMhlathuze KUSHONE obemele i-DA embangweni wesikhundla sobumeya kuMasipala waseMhlathuze, uMnuz Christo Botha. UBotha, obeyiphini lemeya kuMasipala waseMhlathuze, ushone emva kokuxinwa ukugula. Izindaba zokushona kwakhe zimenyezelwe ngumholi we-DA KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sithembiso Ngema. UNgema uthe bagqemeke engeqiwa ntwala ngokushona kukaBotha. "Asilahlekelwanga nje iphini lemeya kodwa silahlekelwe umholi obesebenzela abantu. Uyena obezomela i-DA embangweni wesikhundla sobumeya eMhlathuze njengoba kuza ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. Angeke siwakhohlwe amagalelo akhe kuMasipala waseMhlathuze  nokulwela kwakhe abantu baseMhlathuze." UBotha ubephinde abe yikhansela lakuWard 2. USomlomo womkhandlu, uMnuz Tobias Gumede, unxuse abantu abahlala kuWard 2 abadinga usizo lomkhandlu ukuba bathinte ihhovisi lakhe namalungu ekomiti lekhansela kuWard 2 ukuze ezothola usizo. UGumende udlulise amazwi enduduzo emndenini kaBotha.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uthe ngeke baseseke isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa. UHlabisa uwachaze njengosomathuba amaqembu afake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabeNewzroom Afrika. Amaqembu iMKP ne-ATM afake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa La maqembu afake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa emva kokuba iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ichithe isinqumo sePhalamende sokunqaba ukwamukela umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini likaRamaphosa. UHlabisa uthe asikho isidingo sokuthi kulalelwe isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa, wathi kufanele kulandelwe imiyalelo yenkantolo. "Emva kwesinqumo senkantolo sakhipha isitatimende. Sikholwa wukuthi kufanele kulandelwe umthetho njengoba naye uRamaphosa eshilo ukuthi asihloniphe isinqumo senkantolo. IPhalamende kufanele lenze lokho okushiwo yisinqumo senkantolo. Akukuhle ukuba usomathuba. Asikho isidingo sesiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. Kunesinqumo senkantolo esishoyo ukuthi yiluphi uhlelo okufanele lulandelwe. Thina njenge-IFP asibona abantu abathanda ukubukwa. Siyavumelana ngokuthi kufanele kulandelwe imiyalelo yenkantolo." USomlomo wePhalamende, uNkk Thoko Didiza, ubengakasiphenduli isicelo se-MKP nese-ATM. Phezu kwesicelo se-MKP ne-ATM kuphinde kube nesicelo se-EFF efuna ukuthi iPhalamende lisungule ngokushesha ikomiti elizoqhuba uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, uthe uRamaphosa uzolahlekelwa okuningi uma ekhishwa esikhundleni ngohlelo abaluhlongozayo. "Uma ukhishwa ngalolu hlelo ulahlekelwa imihlomulo etholwa ababengomengameli. Lapha sibala impesheni, izimoto kanye nabasebenzi onikezwa bona uma usuthatha umhlalaphansi." UMalema uthe bazolwa nemizamo kaRamaphosa yokubambezela uhlelo lokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. Kuvela ukuthi uRamaphosa angase aye enkantolo eyophonsela inselelo umbiko wekomiti elalijutshwe yiPhalamende ukuba liphenye lolu daba. "Noma angaya enkantolo sizoya nathi enkantolo. Sizothi lolu daba luyaphuthuma, alulalelwe ngokushesha. Uma ecabanga ukuthi uzosibambezela, uqambe eshilo. Sizofaka isicelo sokuthi udaba lulalelwe ngokushesha. Uzobizwa ukuba azoziphendulela." Ukuze uRamaphosa akhishwe esikhundleni ngalolu hlelo kufanele isiphakamiso sivotelwe u-66% wamalungu ePhalamende. UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema UMalema uthe abanandaba noma singachithwa ekugcineni isiphakamiso sokuthi uRamaphosa akhishwe esikhundleni ngoba bazobe sebemhlambalaze bamqeda ngesikhathi evele phambi kwekomiti elizobe liqhuba uhlelo lokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. "Asinandaba nokuthi uyakhishwa yini esikhundleni. Indaba yokuvota isekugcineni. Kuyothi kufikwa lapho uRamaphosa uyobe esehlambalazeke waphela. Kuningi okuzovela. Sizombiza ezoziphendulela sibize nabasebenzi basepulazini. Kuningi okuzovela. Abasebenzi bazositshela iqiniso. Ngiyazi ukuthi kwakungekhona okokuqala bentshontsha imali lapha. Maningi amagama abantu abazovela. Uzombuleka izinqe."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, uthi ukuboshelwa kwakhe icala lokuqhumisa isibhamu kumenza abe sezingeni lezingqalabutho ze-ANC ezaboshelwa amacala ezepolitiki abala kuzo owayengumengameli wokuqala ngaphansi koMbuso wentando yeningi, uMnuz Nelson Mandela, owayengumholi we-ANC, uMnuz Oliver Tambo, kanye nowayengunobhala jikele we-ANC, uMnuz Walter Sisulu. UMalema uthe uma kuwukuthi ugcinwa ngempela ephoqiwe ukuthi akayodonsa isigwebo ejele kuyomele aboshwe ejele elisesiqhingini okwakugcinwe kulo uMandela nezinye izishoshovu, iRobben Island. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma emcimbini wethimba lentsha ye-EFF elijutshwe ukuba liqhube umkhankaso wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. UMalema wagwetshwa iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele ngecala lokuqhumisa isibhamu. Usiphonsela inselelo isigwebo sakhe. Uthe ngeke ehle esikhundleni ngoba elahlwe icala lezepolitiki. "Ngiboshelwe icala lezepolitiki. Ngiboshelwe into engayenza eqenjini lezepolitiki. Uma befuna ukungibopha kufanele bavule iRobbeni Island. Ngeke ngiyogqunywa nezigebengu ejele. Angisona isigebengu. Mina ngisezingeni loMandela, Sisulu noTambo. Angiyena utsotsi. Mina abangibambanga ngintshontsha, angibulalanga muntu. Ngenza into ephathelene nepolitiki emcimbini weqembu lezepolitiki. Manje bafuna ukungibophela lokho." UMalema uthe labo abafuna aboshwe bafuna ukumvala umlomo. "Abafuni ukuthi ngiqhubeke nokukhuluma iqiniso ngoba abezwani neqiniso." UMalema uthe uzoqhubeka nokulwa noma angaboshwa. Unxuse intsha ukuba iphume ngezinkani iyobhalisela ukuvota njengoba kuzokuba nokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ngoNovemba. Kuzokuba nempelasonto yokubhalisela ukuvota ngenyanga ezayo. Intsha yakuleli ayimandla ekuvoteni. UMalema uthe ukuvota kwentsha okhethweni oluzayo kungenza ukuthi amaqembu amadala angaliboni elidlalayo. "Uma kuwukuthi uyaqaphela kahle i-ANC, DA ne-IFP abayingeni eyokunxenxa abantu ukuthi babhalisele ukuvota. Ingoba bafuna kungabi noshintsho ohlwini lwabantu ababhalisele ukuvota." UMalema uthe intsha kufanele isukumele izinkinga ezibhekene nemiphakathi yayo. "Akufanele nigcine kuphela ngokuba izishoshovu ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme kuphela. Kufanele nisukumele izinkinga ezikhungethe imiphakathi yangakini ngoba uma niyocasha ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme nizozifica zinilindile lezi zinkinga emakhaya uma seniqedile ukufunda."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMENGAMELI weZwe uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa USAZOQHUBEKA nokuqhoqhobala isikhundla uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, oveze ukuthi uzophonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. URamaphosa uveze ukuthi uzonikela enkantolo eyophonsela inselelo lo mbiko owathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona okufanele akuphendule ngalolu daba. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ethula inkulumo, ngoMsombuluko ebusuku. IPhalamende lawuchitha umbiko wethimba elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo. Kepha ngoLwesihlanu iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ichithe isinqumo sePhalamende sokunqaba umbiko wethimba. URamaphosa uthe uyasihlonipha isinqumo senkantolo kodwa wathi umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende unamaphutha. "Nginqume ukuphonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba. Angikwenzi lokhu ngoba nakhu ngingalihloniphi ikomiti kodwa ngenza lokhu ngoba ngikholelwa ukuthi kunamaphutha embikweni wethimba." URamaphosa uthe umbiko wethimba ugcwele izinto ezingenabufakazi. "Inzwabethi yonke lena equkethwe umbiko wethimba." URamaphosa uthe angeke ashiye esikhundleni. "Kukhona abathi angisule esikhundleni. Akukho lapho khona inkantolo ethe nginecala. Ngizimisele ukuqhubeka ngihole abantu baseNingizimu Afrika. Muningi umsebenzi osangihlalele."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-DA KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sithembiso Ngema Image: Facebook/ DA KZN UMHOLI omusha we-DA KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sithembiso Ngema, uyihlomise wayibhekisa kowayengumengameli, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, neqembu lakhe iMKP. UNgema uthe ufuna ukuthi baqinise kakhulu umkhankaso wabo wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ngakubo kaZuma, eNkandla. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ethula inkulumo engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi be-DA KwaZulu-Natal, ebingempelasonto. UNgema oyikhansela kuMasipala waseThekwini, wehlule ilungu lePhalamende, uMnuz Mzamo Billy, embangweni wokuhola i-DA KwaZulu-Natal. UNgema uthe amanzi avele asengenile endlini kuZuma njengoba sebenomholi obamele esikhungweni semfundo ephakeme esiseNkandla. "Sizokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi siyakhula eNkandla. Kade ngikhuluma nosihlalo we-DA eNkandla, ngamtshela ukuthi kufanele sibe nabantu abazongenela ukhetho lwamakhansela khona." UNgema uthe abayesabi nakancane iMKP eyafika kwezwakala okhethweni lukazwelonke lwango-2024. "Siyazi ukuthi kukhona iqembu elisha elifaka izikibha ezimhlophe, singangalo." UNgema uthe ayikho indawo abangeke bakhankase kuyo lapha KwaZulu-Natal. "Sizokhankasa kuzo zonke izindawo zaKwaZulu-Natal, sizokhankasa kubona bonke omasipala. Kulabo abahambe bethi siyinhlangano ebandlululayo, abaqhubeke nokusho njalo kodwa thina sizoqhubeka nokuhambisa izidingo kubantu. Abanye babethi i-DA ayisoze iphathe lapha KwaZulu-Natal. Buka namhlanje sinabaphathiswa kuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal futhi siphethe uMasipala waseMngeni." UNgema uthe ufuna iqembu likhule kuzona zonke izindawo. Uthe bazoqhubeka nokukhuluma namakhosi nezinduna ukuze baqinisekise ukuthi iqembu liyakhula ezindaweni zasemakhaya. UNgema ukhulume ngobunzima kuhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe KwaZulu-Natal abayingxenye yawo kodwa wathi bazoqhubeka nokuyibamba ishisa kuhulumeni ababambisene kuwo ne-IFP, ANC neNFP. "Siyazi ukuthi kunezinkinga kuhulumeni wesifundazwe. Abasimele esiShayamthetho bayaqhubeka nokufuna izimpendulo kubaholi be-ANC. Ukuthi sibambisene ne-ANC akusho ukuthi sekufanele siyeke lokho esikholelwa kukhona." Abanye abaholi abaqokelwe ezikhundleni uNgqongqoshe wezeMisebenzi yoMphakathi, uMnuz Dean Macpherson, oqokelwe kwesikaSihlalo, kwathi uMphathiswa wezeMsebenzi yoMphakathi, uMnuz Martin Meyer, waqokelwa kwesePhini lomholi. Abaqokelwe kwesePhini likasihlalo yiPhini leMeya kuMasipala waseMngeni, uMnuz Sandile Mnikathi, ilungu lesiShayamthetho, uMnuz Sakhile Mngadi, nomxhumanisi we-DA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz  Velenkosini Hlabisa ABAHOLI be-IFP okuthiwa abezwani, okunguMengameli weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa noSihlalo weqembu KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, bakhulume ngezwi elilodwa, bekhuza uqhekeko iqembu lethula umkhankaso wokubhalisela ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. UHlabisa noNtuli baxwayise ngokuthi labo abadala uqhekeko bazophazamisa umkhankaso wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. Bakusho lokhu ngesikhathi beshiyelana inkundla emcimbini obuseMpangeni. UHlabisa uhlabe wahlikiza labo abathi ngeke bazigqoke izikibha ezinobuso bakhe kanye nalabo abathi ngeke besazigqoka izikibha ezinobuso bomsunguli weqembu, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi. Amalungu e-IFP asanda kunikezwa ilungelo lokuba agqoke izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa kodwa kunamalungu eqembu angafuni ukufaka izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. Kusanda kusabalala inkulumo yelungu leqembu, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, lapho lithi ngeke lisigqoke isikibha esinobuso bukaHlabisa ngesikhathi likhuluma nelungu lesiShayamthetho elingusihlalo wophiko lwentsha kwi-IFP KwaZulu-Natal omisiwe, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. UHlabisa uthe ukuba uButhelezi usekhona ubezokuba owokuqala ukugqoka isikibha esinobuso bakhe. Archives UHlabisa uthe uButhelezi wayefuna ukuthi kube nezikibha ezinobuso bakhe ngesikhathi kubhekwe okhethweni lwango-2019. Ngaleso sikhathi uHlabisa wayengakabi umholi weqembu, wayemele i-IFP embangweni wesikhundla sikandunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal. "Ngathi Shenge angikabi umholi weqembu, asikwazi ukuba nezikibha ezinobuso bomuntu ongeyena umholi weqembu. Ngathi asisebenzise ubuso obaziwa abantu." UHlabisa uthe nangokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya lwango-2021, uButhelezi waphinda wenza isicelo esifanayo kodwa bamchitha ngenxa yokuthi umkhankaso wokhetho wasuke waphazanyiswa ukubheduka kobhubhane iCorona. "Ngaphambi kokhetho lwango-2024, uMntwana waphinde wenza isicelo esifanayo. Ngebhadi ke wabe esekhothama. Sabe sesinquma ukuthi siqhubeke nokusebenzisa ubuso bakhe okhethweni lwango-2024, njengendlela yokuqhakambisa amagalelo akhe. "Umuntu othi yena akasezokusigqoka isikibha soMntwana ngoba uthanda uHlabisa, ungumkhohlisi. Umuntu othi yena wethembeke kuMntwana, akazekusigqoka isikibha sikaHlabisa, ungumkhohlisi. UMntwana wathi uzokuba owokuqala ukugqoka esikibha esinobuso bukaHlabisa. Wena ngapha uhamba utshela abantu ukuthi angeke usigqoke isikibha esinobuso bukaHlabisa." UNtuli uthe asikho isidingo sokuthi amalungu e-IFP alwe wodwa ngoba iqembu linomholi oyedwa okunguHlabisa, wanxusa onke amalungu eqembu ukuthi aseke uHlabisa. "Kubaluleliile ukuthi sonke seseke umengameli emsebenzini wakhe. Asikwazi ukwehlukana. Sinomholi oyedwa, asinabo abaholi ababili. SinePhini likamengameli elilodwa, asinawo amaphini kamengameli amabili. SinoSihlalo waKwaZulu-Natal oyedwa, asinabo osihlalo baKwaZulu-Natal ababili. "Ngiyafisa ukugcizelela lokhu. Njengoba siya okhethweni, uma silibele ukuklwebhana sodwa azosehlula amanye amaqembu. Uma silibele ukwehlukana, azosehlula amanye amaqembu. Noma ubani ohola umkhankaso wokwehlukanisa iqembu loyo muntu uyisitha seqembu. Noma ngabe ubani osebenzela ukugxeka umengameli weqembu, usihlalo waKwaZulu-Natal, noma imuphi umholi weqembu, loyo muntu uyisitha sobumbano lwe-IFP."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umsunguli we-IFP, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi UFA olubonakala kwi-IFP kufanele lubakhathaze abaholi beqembu. Iqembu elinezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibangayo lijwayele ukuba inyoka ezidla yona. Uma abaholi be-IFP bengakukholwa lokho abobuza kwi-ANC. I-ANC ilahlekelwe amandla nje namhlanje kungenxa yemibango yangaphakathi. Ngesikhathi i-ANC iya engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi yango-2007 kwakunezinhlangothi ezimbili, olweseka uJacob Zuma, nolwalweseka uThabo Mbeki. Sekuwumlando ukuthi kwanqoba uZuma nokwalandela ukuthi ababeseka uMbeki bahlubuke beyoqala inhlangano entsha, iCongress of the People. Umphumela wokuhlubuka kwabeseka uMbeki kwaba ukuthi kwehle ukweseka kwe-ANC okhethweni lwango-2009. Ezingqungqutheleni zokukhetha ubuholi be-ANC ezilandele eyango-2007 kuhlezi kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibangayo. Abasohlangothini oluhlulwayo bayaye behlubuke beqale amanye amaqembu njengoba i-ANC isizele amaqembu afana ne-EFF ne-MKP. Umphumela wokuhlubuka kwala maqembu uzwakale kakhulu kwi-ANC okhethweni lwango-2024 njengoba yahluleka ukuthola amavoti anele ukubusa ngokuzimela kuzwelonke nasezifundazweni iKwaZulu-Natal neGauteng. Abaholi be-IFP isike yabashaya le nduku Ngesikhathi owayengusihlalo we-IFP, uNkk Zanele kaMagwaza-Msibi, esungula iNFP, i-IFP yalahlekelwa inqwaba yomasipala okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya lwango-2011. I-IFP yasala nomasipala ababili nje kuphela. Uma abaholi be-IFP bengabhekile ingase ibaphinde le nduku. Sekunesikhathi eside ikhulunyelwa phansi eyoqhekeko kwi-IFP. Mumva nje nengane encane isiyabona ukuthi kunomfantu onqabayo ukuvaleka nodalwa abathile abafuna ubuholi obehlukile ngaphakathi kwi-IFP. Lokhu kugqame kakhulu ngesikhathi kusabalala inkulumo eqoshiwe ephehla udlame yelungu lesiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal elinguSihlalo woPhiko lwentsha kwi-IFP KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. Kule nkulumo uMaphisa ukhuluma nelungu le-IFP, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, elizwakala lithi ngeke lisigqoke isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. Kule nkulumo uNksz Ndlovu ukhala ngokubanjwa ngophondo kohlangothi lwabo emhlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. Yile nkulumo efakazela ukuthi kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezinezifiso ezingefani. UNksz Ndlovu uzwakala ethi abaholi abasohlangothini lwabo bavinjwa nangamatshe emigwaqweni ukuze bengayi emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. UMaphisa uphendula ngokuthi akufanele abasohlangothini lwabo bavume ukudlala abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa uze asho nokusho ukuthi kufanele bashaywe, 'bafokofiswe', labo abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa noNkk Ndlovu bamisiwe njengoba bebhekene nekomiti lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe.
