Akuyona eyokuqala inkulumo eqoshiwe esike yasabalala. Phambilini kuke kwasabalala enkulumo eqoshiwe okukholakala ukuthi kuyo kukhuluma usomlomo woMasipala waseNewcastle, uMnuz Thengi Zulu. Kule nkulumo lomuntu okukholakala ukuthi uZulu uzwakala ecija itulo lokuthi bazoludlisela kanjani ogageni uhlangothi ababanga nalo emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. Kusukela umsunguli weqembu osakhothama, Inkosi Mangosuthu kaMathole Buthelezi, wabeka phansi izintambo ngo-2019, ibilokhu ikhulunyelwa phansi eyezinhlangothi ezibangayo kwi-IFP. Kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibhekene ngeziqu zamehlo olunye olubizwa ngama-AU (abusekho ubunzima) kanye nelibizwa ngamaKKK (konke kuhamba kahle). Ama-AU kuthiwa ahamba noHlabisa ama-KKK wona kuthiwa afuna kukhishwe uHlabisa esikhundleni. Izimpi zangaphakathi kwi-IFP zigqame kakhulu emva kokukhothama kukaButhelezi ngo-2023 futhi sekubona ngisho nengane encane ukuthi inkulu inkinga lapha. Iphini lomholi we-IFP, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi, lisanda kuxwayisa ngokuthi iqembu alikulungele ukubhekana nomonakalo ozodalwa ilaba abagqugquzela uqhekeko eqenjini. Ikhuluma emcimbini obuseNquthu, Inkosi ithe baqala into abangeke bayimele laba abagqugquzela ukwehlukana eqenjini. "Le nto yethu yokuthi sibhekane sodwa izosilimaza kakhulu. Nginganitshela mina ngingabazi ukuthi njengeqembu asikulungele ukubhekana nomphumela wale nto esiyiqalayo. Angiphinde nginichazele, njengeqembu asikakasawoti ukuze sikwazi ukubhekana nalokhu esikuqala manje ukuba sikukhande. Ngamanye amanye amagama le nto yokuthi sibhekane sodwa, silwe sodwa, izosishaya isibhuqe nya. Siyophaphama ngakusasa kungekho kwalezihlalo esinazo." Emlandweni wayo weminyaka engu-51 i-IFP ayikaze ibhekane nezimpi zalolu hlobo. Umhlaziyi wezepolitiki waseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Zakhele Ndlovu, uthe akwethusi ukubona izimpi zangaphakathi ezifufusa kwi-IFP. "UMntwana uyena umuntu obeyibambile, ubeyinomfi. Siyazi ukuthi ukukhethwa kukaHlabisa akuhambisananga nenqubo ejwayelekile. UMntwana nje owakhomba uHlabisa. I-IFP ibanjwe isikhathi eside uMntwana, kunguyena oyi-glue. Njengoba engasekho ayisekho leyo glue ebiyihlanganisile." UNdlovu uthe okunye okudala uqhekeko kwi-IFP ukuthi sekunezikhundla kuhulumeni. "I-IFP isemandleni komasipala, kuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal, nakuhulumeni kazwelonke. Izikhundla zizobangwa ngoba wonke umuntu ufuna isinkwa. Kukhona abantu abangajabule ngenxa yokuthi bona abazitholanga izikhundla." UMENGAMELI we-IFP leader uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: AMAQEMBU aphikisayo alolela izembe uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, kulandela isinqumo seNkantolo yezoMthethosisekelo esivuse upelepele ogqokweni ngodaba lokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. Amaqembu amabili asefake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa, kuneqembu lesithathu lona elifuna kusungulwe ngokushesha ikomiti elizoqhuba uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Amaqembu i-MKP, EFF ne-ATM abhalele uSomlomo, uNkk Thoko Didiza. Nakuba izicelo zala maqembu zingafani kodwa onke afuna ukuthi uRamaphosa adliwe yizembe. I-MKP ne-ATM bafuna kulalelwe ngokushesha isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. I-EFF yona ifuna kusungulwe ngokushesha ikomiti elizoqhuba uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Lolu hlelo oluhlongozwa yi-EFF luhlukile kunesiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi. Umholi okhishwa ngaphansi kwalolu hlelo akayitholi imihlomulo yakhe okubalwa nempesheni njengoba kwenzeka kowayeyinhlomo yamajaji eWestern Cape, uDkt John Hlophe, nowayengumvikeli womphakathi, u-Advocate Busisiwe Mkhwebane. Uhlelo oluhlongozwa yi-EFF luyaye luthathe isikhathi njengoba kuba nezigcawu zokulalelwa kwezethulo lapho osuke esuswa esikhundleni enikwa ithuba lokuziphendulela. Uma kunesiphakamiso sokungamethembi umengameli kuyaye kube nempikiswano ePhalamende, bese kuyavotwa. Okungaphinde kubambezele uhlelo oluhlongozwa i-EFF ukuthi uRamaphosa aphonsele inselelo umbiko wethimba lasePhalamende elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo, owathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona uRamaphosa okufanele akuphendule ezinsolweni zokuthi awabikelwanga amaphoyisa ngokuntshontshwa kwemali epulazini lakhe. URamaphosa wake wazama ukuwuphonsela inselelo umbiko kodwa wabuye wayeka ngenxa yokuthi iPhalamende lawuchitha. Njengoba isinqumo sangoLwesihlanu sesibuyisele umbiko ezithebeni zePhalamende, kungeza uRamaphosa abuyele enkantolo. USihlalo we-EFF onguSotswebhu weqembu ePhalamende, uNkk Nontando Noluntshungu, ubhalele uNkk Didiza ecela ukuba kusungulwe ikomiti ngokushesha. UNkk Noluntshungu uthe isinqumo senkantolo siqede nya umbango obukhona ngalolu daba. Unqumele uNkk Didiza umnqamulajuqu wezinsuku ezimbili ukuba aqinisekise ukusungulwa kwekomiti. "Uma singayitholi impendulo kulesi esisibekile, uze wazi ukuthi sinelungelo lokukuthathela izinyathelo zomthetho. Lolu daba selubambezeleke kakhulu. Asifuni kuphinde kube nokubambezeleka." Umholi weMKP ePhalamende, uHlophe, uthe abasabuthembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. UHlophe uthe bafuna ukuthi isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa silalelwe lingakashoni elangoLwesithathu. UHlophe nomholi we-ATM, uMnuz Vuyo Zungula, bathe bafuna ukuthi kuvotwe ngokuyimfihlo esiphakamisweni sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. Ubuholi be-ANC KwaZulu-Natal buzwakalise ukumeseka uRamaphosa. Umdidiyeli wethimba elihola i-ANC KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Mike Mabuyakhulu, uthe isinqumo senkantolo asisho ukuthi uRamaphosa unecala. Amaqembu abambisene ne-ANC kuhulumeni wokubambisana, okubalwa kuwo iDA ne-IFP. awazange afune ukusho ukuthi azophikisana yini nokuthi kukhishwe uRamaphosa esikhundleni. La maqembu ame ngelokuthi kufanele kulandelwe umthetho.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: SBHEKWE ngabomvu isinqumo seNkantolo yezoMthethosisekelo ngodaba lwePhala Phala noMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa KUNGASE kuvuke upelepele ogqokweni azithole ebhekene nohlelo lokukhishwa esikhundleni uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, njengoba iNkantolo yezoMthethosisekelo izokhipha isinqumo ngodaba lokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. Inkantolo izokhipha isinqumo esibhekwe ngabomvu namhlanje ngo-10 ekuseni. Inkantolo izonquma ukuthi kwakusemthethweni yini ukuthi iPhalamende lichithe umbiko wethimba elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo. Umbiko wawuthole ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona uRamaphosa okufanele akuphendule ezinsolweni zokuthi awabikelwanga amaphoyisa ngokuthathwa ngozwane kwenkece. Ukuchithwa kombiko kwasho ukuthi uRamaphosa uyaphunyuka esiphakamisweni sokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. I-EFF ne-ATM babe sebefaka isicelo enkantolo bephonsela inselelo ukuchithwa kombiko. Bese kunesikhathi kulindwe isinqumo senkantolo njengoba icala laqulwa ngo-2024. I-EFF ike yaba nemibhikisho ehlukene ifuna ukuthi inkantolo ikhiphe isinqumo. Amalungu e-EFF azobe ebhikisha ngaphandle kwenkantolo namhlanje uma sekuphuma isinqumo. Umhlaziyi wezepolitiki waseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Zakhele Ndlovu, uthe uRamaphosa angase azithole esesobishini uma inkantolo ivuna i-EFF. UNdlovu uthe uma inkantolo ivuna i-EFF kuzoba nzima kuRamaphosa njengoba i-ANC ingasenazo izihlalo ezanele ePhalamende ezingenza ichithe noma yimiphi imizamo yokumkhipha esikhundleni. UNdlovu uthe kufanele uRamaphosa athandazele ukuthi amaqembu abambisene ne-ANC kuhulumeni aphikisane nemizamo yokumkhipha esikhundleni. "Abantu bamaqembu abusa ngokubambisana yibona engibabheke kakhulu. Umbuzo uthi amaqembu angaphakathi kuhulumeni wokubambisana ngabe azozama yini ukumvikela noma azokwenza umsebenzi wawo ngobuqotho." UNdlovu uthe kuzophinde kuncike nasohlelweni oluzosetshenziswa uma kuba nesiphakamiso sokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. "Uma kuvotwa ngokuyimfihlo uRamaphosa angajikelwa ngisho nangamalungu e-ANC angahambisani naye. Uma kuvotwa ngokuvulelekile uzosinda." Okhulumela i-EFF, uMnuz Sinawo Tambo, uthe basibheke ngabomvu isinqumo senkantolo. "Bese kuphele izinsuku ezingu-521 silinde isinqumo senkantolo. Yi-EFF kuphela ebilokhu imile, ifuna ukuthi uRamaphosa aphendule. Sibe nemibhikisho eminingi saphinde sabhalela nenhloko yamajaji (Jaji Mandisa Maya) sifuna izimpendulo ngalolu daba. Ukubambezeleka kwesinqumo kwenza ukuthi abantu bengazithembi izinhlaka zomthetho," kusho uTambo. Izinhlaka eziningi ezaphenya ngalesi sigameko okubalwa kuzo ihhovisi lomvikeli womphakathi, uphiko oluqapha ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa i-Ipid, iBhange loMbuso neSA Revenue Services zamkhipha phambili uRamaphosa. Lezi zinhlaka zalahla ngecala amaphoyisa ayegada uRamaphosa asolwa ngokuthi ashaya abasolwa aphinde asebenzisa izinsiza zoMbuso eyofuna abasolwa eNamibia. Umholi we-ATM ePhalamende, uMnuz Vuyo Zungula, ukhale ngokuthi izinhlaka zoMbuso zivikela uRamaphosa. "Lapha sibhekene nomuntu ovikelwa yizinhlaka zoMbuso ezihlukene. Abantu into okufanele bayazi wukuthi akekho umuntu ongaphezu komthetho. Naye umengameli kufanele abhekane nengalo yomthetho." Okhulumela iHhovisi likaMengameli, uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, unxuse ukuba abantu balinde isinqumo senkantolo. "Kunzima ukukhuluma manje ngoba inkantolo ayikasikhiphi isinqumo. Kunzima ukuthi sengingasho ukuthi kuzokwenzekani uma isinqumo senkantolo sisho lokhu. Okungcono asilinde ukuthi inkantolo ikhiphe isinqumo."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMntwana uMuziwoxolo Zulu ISEMANZINI iNdlunkulu kaZulu kulandela ukushona koMntwana uMuziwoxolo Graduate Zulu obesebenza nophiko obelugada iSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini. UMntwana uMuziwoxolo ubeyiphoyisa futhi wayesophikweni olwalugada iSilo uGoodwill Zwelithini kaBhekuzulu. Okhulumela iSilo, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uthe uMntwana uMuziwoxolo ushone ngempelasonto. "Ifu elimnyama seliphinde lehla futhi eNdlunkulu kaZulu. UMntwana udlule ngokukhulu ukuzuma ngoMeyi 1. Udlula nje eneminyaka engu-49. Egameni leSilo Samabandla, iNdlunkulu nesizwe sonke sidlulisa ukulila bakwethu. Siyakhala, sikhalela iNgonyama ngoba lo ohambile ungomunye wabanawayo. Sikhalela isizwe, sikhalela abaNtwana baseNdlunkulu." UMntwana uThulani uthe uMntwana uMuziwoxolo ubezinikele kakhulu emsebenzini wakhe. "Usebenze kakhulu nophiko obelugada iSilo uZwelithini kaBhekuzulu kanti nakuyo iNgonyama esesihlalweni usebenzile." UMntwana uMuziwoxolo ushona nje iNdlukulu kaZulu ibisazikhotha amanxeba kulandela ukushona kwabaNtwana ngokulandelana. Ngenyanga eyedlule kushone abaNtwana ababili. Kuqale kwaguqa uMntwana owayekhongela iMbube ekhweni layo kwaMyeni, uGibizizwe Zulu, kwase kulandela uMntwana uGcinabani Thembisile "Sister Eunice" Zulu. UMntwana uThulani uthe kuyakhathaza ukudlula ngokulandelana kwabaNtwana baseNdlunkulu. "Sinobumbuzo ongephendulwe muntu ke nokho ezinhliziyweni zethu ukuthi awu kwenzekeni eNdlunkulu? Kwanomkhonto olokhu ugwaza uphindelela. Sicela imithandazo nina beSilo. Akukho esingakwenza, sibhekisa kuye umdali. Nilale ngenxa nina beNdlovu." UMntwana uThulani uthe uMntwana uMuziwoxolo uzongcwatshwa ngoMgqibelo, KwaNongoma. "UMntwana uzobekwa lapha eMakhosini, eMahhasini, emva kwenkonzo ezokuba lapha ezinkundleni zezemidlalo esigodlweni KwaKhethomthandayo ngehora lesishiyagalolunye ekuseni."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ZIKHALE ngaphansi izikhulu zikaMasipala wasebaQulusini, i-DA ivimba isiphakamiso sokuthi zigixabezwe ngamabhonasi. ZIKHALE ngaphansi izikhulu zikaMasipala wasebaQulusini, i-DA ivimba isiphakamiso sokuthi zigixabezwe ngamabhonasi. Isiphakamiso sokuthi izikhulu zomkhandlu zinikwe amabhonasi sichithiwe emhlanganweni womkhandlu emva kokuba i-DA izwakalise ukungahambisani nesiphakamiso. Umasipala uphethwe ngokubambisana yi-IFP ne-DA. Ukwenqaba kwe-DA ukweseka isiphakamiso kwenze ukuthi singaphumeleli. IKhansela le-DA, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe, lithe banqume ukuphikisana nesiphakamiso ngenxa yokuthi abukho ubufakazi abanikwe bona obukhombisa ukuthi lezi zikhulu ebezizonikwa amabhonasi ziwenze ngendlela encomekayo umsebenzi wazo. "Ukunika umuntu ibhonasi engakhombisanga ukuthi ukwenze konke abebekelwe ukuba akwenze kufana nokuthi uyamupha nje imali yomphakathi. Kufanele kube nombiko onobufakazi bokuthi umuntu ukwazile ukukwenza konke abebekelwe khona ngaphambi kokuthi umbonge ngebhonasi." UShelembe uthe bacele izikhulu obekuhlongozwa ukuthi zinikwe amabhonasi ukuba zilethe ubufakazi obukhombisa ukuthi zikwazile ukukwenza konke ebezibekelwe khona. "Ngenxa yokuthi abuzange bulethwe ubufakazi ebesibufuna, isiphakamiso sokuthi banikwe amabhonasi asizange siphumelele. Siyalele imenenja kamasipala ukuba yenze isiqiniseko sokuthi asikho isiphakamiso esifana nalesi esizolethwa emhlanganweni womkhandlu ngaphandle uma kuwukuthi sizokube sihambisana nobufakazi." UShelembe uthe kunzima ukukhuluma indaba yokunika izikhulu zomkhandlu amabhonasi ekubeni ingqalasizinda yomkhandlu ifadabala. Uthe ukubusa ngokubambisana angeke kubenze ukuthi bavume noma yini ephakanyiswa yiqembu abambisene nalo. "Sikukhombisile lokho namhlanje ngokuthi siphikisane nalesi siphakamiso. Ngesikhathi singena kuhulumeni sazibophezela ekusebenzeni ngobuqotho saphinda futhi sazibophezela ukuthi sizoqinisekisa ukuthi abantu bazithola ngendlela izidingo. Angeke sigudluke kulezi zibophezelo esazenzayo. Ngeke sivumelane nezinqumo ezingeke zibasize ngalutho abantu basebaQulusini. Abantu basebaQulusini kufanele bazi ukuthi imali yabo isebenze kanjani."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KUMISWE uSihlalo we-IFP Youth Brigade (IFPYB) KwaZulu-Natal, ozwakala engxoxweni eqoshiwe ephehla udlame, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. UMaphisa umiswe nelungu le-IFP, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, elizwakala kule nkulumo lithi ngeke lisifake isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. UMaphisa uyilungu lesiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal futhi uke waba imeya kaMasipala wasebaQulusini, ekubeni uNksz Ndlovu, yena usebenza kumasipala ophethwe yi-IFP. Isinqumo sokumisa uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu sithathwe emhlanganweni oyisipesheli wesigungu esiphezulu kwi-IFP obizwe emva kokusabalala kwayo. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, uthe isigungu esiphezulu sithathe isinqumo sokumisa uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu emva kokuba uMaphisa evumile ukuthi nguyena okhuluma kule ngxoxo eqoshiwe. UHlengwa uthe uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu bazoqondiswa ubugwegwe. "UMaphisa umiswe kuzo zonke izikhundla okubalwa kuzo ukuba uSihlalo we-IFPYB KwaZulu-Natal nokuba ilungu loMkhandlu kaZwelonke kwi-IFP. Uzomiswa esikhundleni kuze kube udaba lwakhe lulalelwa uMkhandlu kaZwelonke. UNksz Ndlovu umisiwe kuzo zonke izinto ezithinta iqembu, akavumelekile ukuba abe yingxenye yezinto ezithinta iqembu kuze kuba kuphuma isinqumo ohlelweni lwakhe lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe lulalelwa uMkhandlu kaZwelonke." UHlengwa uthe isigungu esiphezulu sizoqhubeka nokuphenya lolu daba, bese sethula umbiko ogcwele emhlanganweni woMkhandlu kaZwelonke. "I-IFP ixwayisa abaholi bayo, amalungu nezinhlaka zeqembu ukuba bagweme ukwenza izinkulumo ezidala ezibudedengu, ezifaka iqembu ehlazweni nezidala uqhekeko eqenjini. Ubuholi be-IFP buzokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi iyalandelwa yonke imigomo yeqembu." UMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu bangene obishini emva kokuba kusabalale inkulumo eqoshiwe lapho kuzwakala khona bekhuluma ngezimpi zangaphakathi kwi-IFP. Kule nkulumo kuzwakala uNksz Ndlovu ekhalaza kuMaphisa ukuthi abantu abasohlangothini lwabo bayavinjwa uma kunemihlangano yokugcoba amaziko. UMaphisa uphendula ngokuthi uNksz Ndlovu nabanye abasohlangothini lwabo akufanele bavume ukudlala abantu abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa uzwakala ethi abasohlangothini lwabo kufanele bashaye abasohlangothini oluphikisayo emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko okuvinjwa kuyo abasohlangothini abahambisana nalo. Uma iqhubeka inkulumo kuzwakala uNksz Ndlovu ethi kade ayenikwa izikibha ezinobuso bomuntu ambize ngalo baba, nokukholakala ukuthi ubesho izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. UNksz Ndlovu uzwakala ethi yena ngeke azigqoke izikibha ezinobuso "balo baba". Amalungu e-IFP asanda kuvunyelwa ukuba agqoke izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. Phambilini, bekuvumeleke izikibha ezinobuso bomsunguli weqembu, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMXHUMANISI weDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe UMXHUMANISI weDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe, ungenele umbango wesikhundla esibhekwe ngabomvu engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi beDA KwaZulu-Natal. UShelembe uphakanyiselwe emjahweni wesikhundla sephini likasihlalo weDA KwaZulu-Natal nokuyisikhundla esibangwa kakhulu. Bayisishiyagalolunye ababheke lesi sikhundla, kanti ingqungquthela izoba ngoMeyi 9. UShelembe uthe ukuqokelwa kwakhe kulesi sikhundla kuzoqinisa ubudlelwano beqembu neNdlunkulu kaZulu namakhosi, kuphinde kukhulise iDA ezindaweni zasemakhaya, emalokishini nasemapulazini. "Abantu abaphakamise igama lami bathe into yokuqala abayibona ibalulekile wukuthi siyibukele eduze into ethinta ubukhosi, umphakathi wasemakhaya, owasemalokishini kanye nabantu abahlala emapulazini. Mina ngisebenzile kakhulu ezindaweni zasemakhaya, emalokishini nasemapulazini. "Ngiqale ukusebenza kulezi zindawo ngo-2012. Ukukhankasa kulezi zindawo kwehlukile, akufani nasesilungwini lapho okwazi khona ukukhankasa ngokuthi ufonele abantu noma ubathumele imiqhafazo. Abantu basemakhaya badinga ukuthi usondele eduze kwabo, wakhe ubudlelwano nabo." UShelembe uthe kuningi akwenzile kusukela aqokwa ukuba axhumanise iDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu ngo-2023. Uthe wakwazi ukuhlela ukuthi umholi weDA osanda kuphuma esikhundleni, uMnuz John Steenhuisen, ayokotha iSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini. "Ngaphinde ngahlelela ubuholi beDA KwaZulu-Natal ukuba buyokotha iSilo. Ngaphinde ngahlelela ubuholi besifundazwe ukuthi buyobona uNyazi (umholi wamaNazaretha ohlangothini lwaseBuhleni. Nemeya yaseMngeni (uMnuz Chris Pappas) maningi amakhosi engimxhumanise nawo. Lokhu ngikwenza ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi iKwaZulu-Natal yakhelwe kakhulu esisekelweni samasiko nenkolo." UShelembe uwusihlalo wekomiti elibhekele ukusebenza kwemali yomphakathi kuMasipala wesiFunda iZululand, aphinde abe uSotswebhu weDA kuMasipala AbaQulusi. Bobabili labo masipala baphethwe ngokubambisana yi-IFP neDA. UShelembe uzishaya isifuba ngokuthi uvundulule inkohlakalo eningi kule mikhandlu. UShelembe uyena umvusi wenyamazane ezinsolweni ezagcina ziholela ekuxoshweni kowayeyimeya kaMasipala wasebaQulusi, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. "EZululand ziningi izimenenja ezixoshiwe ezinye eziphenywayo ngenxa yomsebenzi owenziwe yikomiti engiliholayo. Kungokokuqala emlandweni ukuthi kube nosihlalo wekomiti olwa ngale ndlela nenkohlakalo," kusho uShelembe. UShelembe uke waba ngumholi wophiko lwentsha kwiDA KwaZulu-Natal, njengamanje uyingxenye yethimba eleluleka Inkosi yaseNadi, eMgungundlovu, uVusizwe Zondi. UMXHUMANISI weDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI weNFP, uMnuz Ivan Barnes UMHOLI we-NFP, uMnuz Ivan Barnes, ushiye angalazi kumholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, amsola ngokuvikela abokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UBarnes ubize uMalema ngohlanya oluhambe luvikela abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi amukela amalungu ajoyine iqembu esifundeni uThukela. UMalema usanda kukhwela adilike ebantwini abahola imibhikisho elwa nabokufika ethe chithi saka ezweni. Imibhikisho iqale esifundazweni iKwaZulu-Natal, yabe isidlulela e-Eastern Cape. Ngeledlule le mibhikisho ingenise esifundazweni iGauteng edolobheni eliyisizinda somnotho wakuleli, iGoli, kanye nasenhloko dolobha yezwe iPitoli. UMalema uthe le mibhikisho yenzeka ezifundazweni lapho abantu abamnyama babebulalana bodwa ngesikhathi sobandlululo. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma esidlweni sakusihlwa ebesihlelwe inhlangano engenzi nzuzo iCollen Mashawana Foundation. UMalema uthe abahola imibhikisho abazi lutho bazi ukuphuza intelezi nempesu. UMalema uthe akanendaba noma bengangayivotela i-EFF labantu abaqhuba le mibhikisho. "Anginendaba namavoti abo, iMKP ingawathatha uma iwafuna amavoti abo. Angifuni mina ukuvotelwa abantu abafuna ukuthi ngizonde abantu balapha e-Afrika." UBarnes unxuse abantu ukuthi bengamnaki uMalema. UBarnes uthe naye uyahambisana nomkhankaso wokuxosha abokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Lo ogula ngekhanda othi badla intelezi nempesu, uma bekwenza ngakubo, abahambe ngakubo ke. Thina la KwaZulu sithi umuntu nomuntu akabuyele ngakubo. La kwelikaMthaniya sithi umuntu nomuntu akabuyele ngakubo. Uma uyiSulumane buyela ngakini emaSulumaneni amanye eSomalia. Uma ungowaseNigeria hamba ngakini eNigeria. Uma ungowaseZimbabwe hamba ngakini eZimbabwe. Anisenamahloni yini ukuthi selokhu kwathi nhlo iNingizimu Afrika iyahlupheka ngenxa yenu? Sesikhathele." UBarnes uthe nabo beyiNFP bazowujoyina umkhankaso wokuxosha abokufika wanxusa abaholi imibhikisho, uNgizwe Mchunu noNkosikhona "Phakel'uthakathi" Ndabandaba ukuba babameme emkhankasweni. UBarnes ukhuluma kanjena ngoMalema nje lamaqembu ahlela ukubambisana neMKP KwaZulu-Natal ekuketuleni uhulumeni wesifundazwe. I-MKP ihola umkhankaso wokugudluza uhulumeni wokubambisana oholwa i-IFP, iNFP ingababeki benkosi esiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal. Uma lingagcina liphumelela itulo leMKP lokuchitha uhulumeni wesifundazwe kungasho ukuthi izobambisana namaqembu anemibono eyehlukile odabeni lwabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Izimoto ezinikelwe umnyango kaCogta UTHATHWE emalini yezinye izinhlelo zoMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambinsana kanye neziNdaba zoMdabu KwaZulu-Natal u-R 19 million okuthengwe ngawo izingqovungqovu zezimoto ezinikwe imikhandlu yamakhosi angu-30 KwaZulu-Natal. Ingxenye yemali ethenge lezi zimoto ezingundaba mlonyeni bekuhlelwe ukuthi kuholelwe abasebenzi abebezoqashwa umnyango. Lokhu kuqukethwe empendulweni ebhalwe phansi yoMphathiswa woMnyango, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi, obephendula imibuzo yelungu leDA, uNksz Marlaine Nair. UButhelezi uveze ukuthi banqume ukuthi imali bathenge ngayo izimoto ngenxa yokubambezeleka kohlelo lokuqashwa kwabasebenzi abebezoholelwa ngale mali. Enye imali bekufanele ithenge imishini yamakhompyutha. "Sithathe yonke le mali engazange isebenze sabe sesithenga izimoto, asizange sisebenzise ngokweqile isabelomali soMnyango." UButhelezi uthe bazoqhubeka nokuthenga izimoto ezizonikelwa emikhandlwini yamakhosi. Uveze ukuthi izimoto zohlobo lweFord Everest ezingu-12 ebiza u-R772 259 ngayinye, kanye nama-GWM P300 D/C angu-18 abiza u-R563 494 ngayinye. UNksz Nair uthe usephinde wabhalela uButhelezi eminye imibuzo. Uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi izimoto azithengangwa yini ngemali ebibekelwe ukulekelela omasipala noma ukubhekana nezinhlekelele. UNksz Nair uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi imikhandlu yamakhosi izokwazi yini ukumelana nezindleko zalezi zimoto okubalwa ukufaka uphethroli, ukukhokhela imishwalense, ukulungisa izimoto namasondo. UNksz Nair uthe ufuna ukuthi uMnyango uchaze kahle ukuthi yiluphi uhlelo olulandelile ngesikhathi ukhetha imikhandlu yamakhosi enikwe izimoto. Ukuthengwa kwezimoto sekususe umsindo njengoba ubuholi benhlangano yobuholi bomdabu, iCongress of Traditional Leaders of SA (Contralesa) KwaZulu-Natal busola ukuthi uButhelezi wakhetha iphela emasini ngesikhathi aba izimoto. Ngesikhathi kwethulwa izimoto uMnyango wathi zizonikwa amalungu endlu yobuholi bomdabu KwaZulu-Natal, osihlalo kanye namaphini osihlalo bezindlu zobuholi bomdabu ezifundeni. Abaholi beContralesa KwaZulu-Natal baveza ukuthi kukhona osihlalo abashiywa ngaphandle ngesikhathi kwabiwa izimoto, bathi kukhona amakhosi angebona osihlalo kodwa ahlomula. Ngokohlu lwamakhosi ahlomula oluqukethwe empendulweni kaButhelezi, bayisithupha osihlalo abathola, kwathola amaphini osihlalo amabili. Kunezifunda ezingu-11 KwaZulu-Natal. Uhlu luveza ukuthi kunamakhosi angu-14 angamalungu engeziwe ezindlu zobuholi bomdabu ezifundeni ahlomula. IContralesa KwaZulu-Natal isanda kubika izikhalazo zayo kusihlalo wekomiti elibhekelele ukusebenza komnyango ePhalamende, uDkt Zweli Mkhize.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KUDILIZWE uSomlomo woMasipala wasoPhongolo, uNkk Celiwe Nxumalo-Sibiya, obengakaqedi nesonto eqokelwe esikhundleni. UNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya wehliswe esikhundleni yisinqumo seNkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu esithi umhlangano aqokwa kuwo wawungekho emthethweni. Isinqumo senkantolo siphume ngeledlule. UNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya, oyikhansela le-ANC, waqokwa emhlanganweni owawusemasontweni amabili edlule. Ukuqokwa kwakhe kwamangaza abaningi ngenxa yokuthi i-IFP iyona ephethe umkhandlu njengoba inamakhansela angu-14 kwangu-29 emkhandlwini. I-IFP ivota ne-DA enekhansela elilodwa kulo mkhandlu. UNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya wakhethwa ngo-elethu ngenxa yokuthi amakhansela ayisishiyagalombili  e-IFP awezanga kulo mhlangano ngenxa yezinsolo zokuthi ayengahambisani negama lobuholi be-IFP obabufuna ukuthi aqokelwe esikhundleni. Ubuholi be-IFP babuyalele amakhansela eqembu ukuba akhethe uMnuz Ndukisebandla Mavuso, ukuba abe usomlomo womkhandlu. Isikhundla sasikade siphethwe uMnuz Kwenzakakufani Nxumalo, owayalelwa ubuholi be-IFP ukuba asule esikhundleni. Okhulumela uMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana kanye neziNdaba zoMdabu KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Senzelwe Mzila, uthe iJaji Nontuthuzelo Mlaba lichithe zonke izinqumo ezathathwa emhlanganweni okwaqokwa kuwo uNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya njengosomlomo. "Inkantolo iyalele uMphathiswa (uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi) ukuba ahlele umhlangano okuzoqokwa kuwo usomlomo ukuze kungeke kuphazamiseke ukusebenza komkhandlu." Inkantolo iphinde yachitha nezinqumo ezathathwa emhlanganweni womkhandlu owawungo-Ephreli 7 kanye nowawungo-Ephreli 28. UMzila uthe le mihlangano yabanjwa ngaphandle kokulandela imigomo elawula imihlangano yomkhandlu. Inkantolo iphinde yanquma ukuthi imenenja yomkhandlu ebhekene nezinsolo zenkohlakalo, uMnuz Mntonjani Bethuel Khali, ingalubhadi emahhovisi omkhandlu. UMzila uthe inkantolo iyalele uKhali ukuba angalinge aqhubeke nokuzenza imenenja yomkhandlu noma anikeze abasebenzi bomkhandlu imiyalelo. UKhali wamiswa emva kwezinsolo zenkohlakalo kodwa wabuye wabuyiselwa emsebenzi. UMzila uthe isikhulu somnyango esajutshwa ukuba siyobamba kwesokuba imenenja yomasipala ngoMashi, uMnuz Khulekani Ngcobo, isona esizoqhubeka nokubamba isikhundla. UMzila uthe isinqumo senkantolo sizoqinisekisa ukuthi uyalandelwa umthetho kuMasipala wasoPhongolo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: THABO Mathonsi Chonco KUBE ubutatata inkabi eboshwe nenkosi uSimpiwe Erick Zuma ivukwa yisifo sokuwa  enkantolo . UThabo Mathonsi Chonco uvukwe isifo sokuwa ngaphambi kokuthi kuqale ukuqulwa kwecala lokubulawa kowayeyikhansela le-DA kuMasipala waseMngeni, uMnuz Nhlalayenza Ndlovu. UChonco ubevele eNkantolo yesifunda eMgungundlovu. Bekulindeleke ukuthi uzolivuma icala izolo kodwa kwangabe kusenzeka lokho njengoba kuphoqe ukuthi aphuthunyiswe esibhedlela emva kokugula. Uphume enkantolo eqhutshwa ngesihlalo esinamasondo, eyethile. Isifo simvuke kungazelele muntu ngesikhathi ehlezi emabhentshini, elinde ukuba kuqale ukuqulwa kwecala. Bake babukana bodwa abebesenkantolo, kwasweleka ozomlekelela. Isimo siholele ekutheni iMantshi, uBemal Jaynarayan, ithethise ojele abebelethe uChonco. UJaynarayan uthe ojele kufanele babe nohlelo lokulekelela iziboshwa uma zivukwa wukugula. Ummeli kaChonco, uMnuz Zipho Khanyile, utshele inkantolo ukuthi uChonco unesifo sokuwa. "Ngiyazi ukuthi udla amaphilisi esifo sokuwa." UKhanyile unxuse inkantolo ukuba ikhiphe umyalelo wokuba uChonco anikezwe amaphilisi njengoba esejele. UKhanyile uthe bafuna nokuthi uChonco angavalelwa yedwa ejele ukuze kube khona umuntu ozosheshe ambone uma evukwa yisifo sokuwa. Uthe wesaba ukuthi uChonco uvalelwa yedwa njengoba esethuthelwe ejele eliseKokstad, eBongweni. "Angicabangi ukuthi eKokstad banalo uhlelo lokuthi iziboshwa zivalelwe ndawonye, sengathi wonke umuntu uvalelwa ngayedwana." Icala lihlehliselwe uMeyi 28. UChonco nasolwa naye, uMnuz Khayelihle Shabalala, bahlela ukulivuma icala. Inkosi uZuma noMnuz Thobani Masobho Hlongwa bona bayaliphika icala. UChonco uyayikazela yizigwebo. Ngenyanga edlule wagwetshwa iminyaka engu-20 ebhadla ejele ngecala lokubulala owayephikisana nokudayiswa komhlaba eHowick, uMnuz Xolani Ndlovu/Ntombela. NgoFebhuwari wagwetshwa eminye iminyaka engu-20 ngecala lokubulala owayengundunankulu wesizwe sakwaNxamalala, uMnuz Qalokunye Zuma. NgoJanuwari wagwetshwa odilikajele abahlanu ngecala lokubulala umndeni waseBulwer. UChonco uphinde abhekane necala lokuqothwa kwamalungu omndeni wakwaMemela ayishumi abulawa eMbali, eMgungundlovu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa I-IFP isijube uphenyo emva kokusabalala kwenkulumo eqoshiwe okukholakala ukuthi ngeyelungu lesiShayamthetho elizwakala ligququzela ukuthi kushaywe ozakwabo eqenjini ngesikhathi linengxoxo nowesifazane ozwakala ethi angeke asigqoke isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. I-IFP isiqale uphenyo lwangaphakathi emva kokuba kusabalale inkulumo eqoshiwe okukholakala ukuthi eyelungu lesiShayamthetho eliphinde libe uSihlalo wophiko lwentsha kwi-IFP KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. Kule ngxoxo lona okukholakala ukuthi uMaphisa uzwakala ekhuluma nowesifazane okhala ngokuthi kukhona ababanjwa ngophondo emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko e-IFP. Ozwakala njengoMaphisa uthi ugqugquzela ukuba kushaywe labo abayizimbangi zabo eqenjini. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, uthe bayalele uMaphisa ukuba alethe incazelo ngalolu daba. "Le nkulumo eqoshiwe ingahumusheka ngokuthi igqugquzela udlame emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. Lolu daba lubucayi ngakho ke ubuholi be-IFP buzolusukumela. I-IFP inxusa amalungu eqembu ukuba ehlise amaphaphu, agweme ukukhuluma ngalolu daba esidlangalaleni." Akukhona okokuqala uMaphisa efakwa obishini inkulumo eqoshiwe. Ngesikhathi esayimeya kaMasipala waseBaQulusini wadilizwa emva kokuba kusabalale inkulumo eqoshiwe enamagama alumelayo. UMaphisa kuthiwa wenza inkulumo esabalele ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngeSonto. Kuthiwa le nkulumo wayenza emva kokuhambela umhlangano we-IFP okwakhuzwa kuwo abadala uqhekeko eqenjini. UMaphisa kuthiwa wenza inkulumo emva kokuphatha uhlelo emcimbini we-IFP lapho khono iPhini lomholi weqembu, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi, lakhuza abadala uqhekeko eqenjini. Ikhuluma emcimbini we-IFP wokuvivela ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo obuseNquthu, ngeSonto, Inkosi yathi labo abadala uqhekeko eqenjini baqala into abangeke bayimele. "Le nto yethu yokuthi sibhekane sodwa izosilimaza kakhulu. Nginganitshela mina ngingangabazi ukuthi njengeqembu asikulungele ukubhekana nomphumela wale nto esiyiqalayo. Angiphinde nginichazele, njengeqembu asikakwazi ukubhekana nalokhu esesikuqala manje. Ngamanye  amagama, le nto yokuthi sibhekane sodwa, silwe sodwa, izosishaya isibhuqe nya. Siyophaphama ngakusasa kungekho kwalezi zihlalo esinazo." UMaphisa wasukuma emva kwenkulumo yeNkosi, naye wakhuza uqhekeko. Ilwa buthule impi yangaphakathi kwi-IFP lapho kubhekene khona uhlangothi olwaziwa ngama-AU (Abusekho Ubunzima) nohlangothi olubizwa ngaKKK (Konke Kuhamba Kahle). Ama-AU kuthiwa ahambisana noHlabisa, amaKKK wona kuthiwa awahambisani noHlabisa.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMPHATHISWA wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma KUSHAYISANA izincazelo ngokungakhokhelwa kosonkontileka abakweletwa izizumbulu uMnyango wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal njengoba uMphathiswa woMnyango, uMnuz Siboniso Duma, esho okuhlukile kunalokho okushiwo uMphathiswa wezeziMali esifundazweni, uMnuz Francois Rodgers. UDuma ukhale kakhulu ngobuhixihixi obudalwe uhlelo olusha lokukhokha, kepha uRodgers uthe inkinga idalwe ukuthi kuqale unyakamali uMnyango unezikweletu eziningi. UDuma unikeze le ncazelo ngesikhathi ekhuluma nosonkontileka abebewotha ubomvu eThekwini ngoMsombuluko. Osonkontileka abangakhokhelwe bebekade besabise ngokuthi bazomisa yonke into uma bengakhokhelwa. Osonkontileka bakhala ngokuthi uMnyango ubakweleta imali enkulu esukela ngonyaka owedlule. UDuma ube esebiza umhlangano ophuthumayo nosonkontileka lapho efike wabatshela khona ukuthi ukushintsha kohlelo olusetshenziswa iminyango kahulumeni ukukhokha izikweletu ludale ukuthi kube nobuhixihixi. UMnyango kaDuma ukhale nangokuthi imali oyithola nyanga zonke ayanele ukuthi ukwazi ukukhokha zonke izikweletu. UMnyango kaDuma uthe ufisa ukuthi uthole u-R1 billion njalo ngenyanga ukuze uzokwazi ukukhokhela zonke izikweletu. "Esabelwenimali soMnyango esingu-R13 billion, sithola imali eshodayo. Kwesinye isikhathi sithola u-R200 million ngenyanga, kwesinye isikhathi kube u-R500 million kuya ku-R700 million. Le mali ayanele ukuthi sikhokhele bonke esibakweletayo." URodgers uvumile ukuthi ukushintshwa kohlelo lokukhokha kwadala ubuhixihixi emasontweni ayisithupha okuqala kodwa wathi izinkinga ezibhekene noMnyango wezokuThutha aziqalwanga ukushintshwa kohlelo lokukhokha. URodgers uthe inkinga enkulu ebhekene noMnyango ukuthi unezinhlelo eziningi ozenzayo ezisuke zingahlelelwe ukuthi zizokhokhelwa kanjani. URodgers uthe ngesikhathi kungena isabelomali sakulo nyaka esingu-R13 billion, ingxenye engu-R2.5 billion yakhokhela izikweletu zangonyaka owedlule. Odabeni lwemali enikwa uMnyango nyanga zonke, uRodgers uthe iminyango iyaye itshelwe kusaqala unyakamali ukuthi yimalini ezotholwa nyanga zonke. "Imali eqhamuka kuhulumeni kazwelonke siyithola mancozu. Iminyango kahulumeni wesifundazwe siyaye siyabele imali esuke ikhona ngaleso sikhathi." URodgers uthe uMnyango wezeMfundo esifundazweni usanda kucela ukuba usheshe unikwe imali ukuze uzokhokhela izidingo ngenxa yokubona ukuthi imali owabelwa yona nyanga zonke ayanele ukubhekana nezindleko. "UMnyango wezokuThutha awuzange usho ukuthi wona unenkinga efanayo." UMPHATHISWA wezeziMali KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Francois Rodgers

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI  weNational Coloured Congress, uMnuz  Fadiel Adams oboshwe amaphoyisa ePKTT ePhalamende izolo LILALE libaliwe ilungu lePhalamende elisolwa ngokuphazamisa uphenyo lokubulawa kowayengunobhala jikele we-ANC Youth League, uMnuz Sindiso Magaqa. UMnuz Fadiel Adems, ongumholi wenhlangano iNational Coloured Congress, ukhalelwe amasongo kaSigonyela izolo emva kokwehluleka ukuhlangabezana nomnqamulajuqu wokuba azinikele emaphoyiseni. U-Adams uboshwe esezindlini ezihlala amalungu ePhalamende, eCape Town. U-Adams usolwa ngokuphazamisa uphenyo lokubulawa kukaMagaqa. Okwamdalela amazinyo abushelelezi ukuthi waya kobona inkabi eyavuma icala lokubulawa kukaMagaqa, uSibusiso Ncengwa. UNcengwa wagwetshwa iminyaka engu-25 emva kokuvuma icala lokubulala uMagaqa. Okhulumela amaphoyisa, uBrigadier Athlenda Mathe, uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi yini eyenza ukuthi u-Adams aye kobona uNcengwa. "Amalungu ePhalamende ayazi ukuthi kunemigudu okufanele ayilandele uma enza umsebenzi wawo. Uma kuwukuthi wayeyokwenza umsebenzi wakhe njengelungu lePhalamende kwakufanele okungenani abikele usihlalo wekomiti lasePhalamende elibhekelele ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa. Yini lena eyamenza ukuthi aye ejele eyobona inkabi eyingozi ngale ndlela?" UBrigadier Mathe uthe u-Adams waya kobona uNcengwa ejele ngesikhathi wawushisa phansi umkhankaso wokuba kuhlakazwe ithimba lamaphoyisa eliphenya amacala okubulawa kosopolitiki KwaZulu-Natal. UBrigadier Mathe uthe u-Adams uzovela enkantolo KwaZulu-Natal. Uthe empeleni bekufanele ukuba u-Adams avele enkantolo eKwaZulu-Natal ngoMsombuluko. "Senza izinhlelo nommeli wakhe ukuba avele enkantolo kodwa akazange alubhade enkantolo. Siphinde sakhipha umyalelo wokuba azinikele emaphoyiseni kodwa wangakwenza lokho. Ingakho amaphoyisa egcine embopha." U-Adams ucashunwe phambi kwabezindaba, wayofakwa ngemuva evenini yamaphoyisa. U-Adams uzwakale enza izinsolo zokuthi amaphoyisa azomhlukumeza. "Maningi amathuba okuthi ngizofakwa ishubhu, iyona ndlela abenza ngayo izinto lena. Anginendaba, abenze noma yini abafuna ukuyenza." U-Adams uthe akazi ukuthi kungani amaphoyisa enqume ukumbopha ekubeni ebeshilo ukuthi uzimisele ukubambisana nawo ophenyweni lwawo. Uthe amalungu ePhalamende wawabikela ngodaba lukubulawa kukaMagaqa ngonyaka odlule. "Ngawatshela amalungu ePhalamende ukuthi isibhamu i-AK 47 okwabulawa ngaso uMagaqa sathengwa ngemali yophiko lwezinhloli. Inhloko yezinhloli uLieutenant General Dumisani Khumalo." UMagaqa wabulawa ngo-2017, kusolwa ukuthi wabulawelwa ukukhononda ngenkohlakalo yezigidi zamarandi ngesikhathi kulungiswa ihholo lesikhumbuzo eMzimkhulu. Icala lokubulawa kukaMagaqa lizobuyela eNkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu maphakathi nenyanga. Abasolwa ababhekene necala iloyo owayeyimenenja yoMasipala waseMzimkhulu, uMnuz Zweliphansi Skhosana, uSibonelo Myeza noMbulelo Mpofana.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa Image: DOCTOR NGCOBO/INDEPENDENT NEWSPAPERS ISHIPHELENE kwi-IFP kuputshuka inkulumo eqoshiwe okukholakala ukuthi eyelungu leqembu esiShayamthetho elizwakala ligqugquzela ukuba kushaywe ozakwabo engxoxweni lapho belikhuluma khona nowesifazane ozwakala efunga egomela ukuthi akasoze asifake isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. Inkulumo eqoshiwe okukholakala ukuthi eyelungu lesiShayamthetho eliphinde libe usihlalo wophiko lwentsha kwi-IFP KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa, isuse umsindo ngaphakathi kwi-IFP. Abangeneme bafuna uMaphisa athathelwe izinyathelo emva kokuba kuputshuke inkulumo eqoshiwe lapho ekhuluma khona nowesifazane okuthiwa usebenza kumasipala ophethwe yi-IFP. Kule ngxoxo kuzwakala owesifazane ekhala ngohlelo lokugcotshwa kwamaziko. Abakhulumayo kuzwakala sengathi basohlangothini olungahambisani noHlabisa. Owesifazane ukhala ngokuthi uhlangothi lwabo lubanjwa ngophondo nangokuthi abaholi abahambisana nabo bayavinjwa ngisho nangamatshe emigwaqweni uma kuyogcotshwa amaziko. Lona okukholakala ukuthi uMaphisa uzwakala ethi akufanele abasohlangothini lwabo bavume ukudlala abantu abakolunye uhlangothi. "Nina nibaningi oLundi, bona bancane. Kumele engabe nibancisha umoya wokuphefumula.  Bashayeni emhlanganweni ngoba bancane." Uqhuba athi bekufanele kusuke umuntu ohambisana nabo afike aqhumise impama emhlanganweni okuvinjwe kuwo umholi osohlangothini lwabo. "Bekufanele kufike kuthiwe doti muni lona owenzeka lana? Kuqhume impama kuqhume isibhakela, nibafokofise." Owesifazane uzwakala ethi kade ayethengelwa izikibha ezinobuso bomuntu ambiza ngalo baba. Kukholakala ukuthi izikibha azishoyo zinobuso bukaHlabisa. Owesifazane uzwakala ethi akasoze azigqoke. Akukhona okokuqala uMaphisa engena obishini ngenkulumo eqoshiwe. Ngesikhathi eseyimeya kuMasipala waseBaQulusini wadilizwa emva kokuba kusabalale inkulumo eqoshiwe enamagama alumelayo. Imizamo yokuthola ukuphawula kukaMaphisa ayizange iphumelele njengoba ucingo lwakhe belukhala lungabanjwa futhi engazange awuphendule umbuzo awuthunyelelwe. Umholi we-IFP ocele ukuba igama lakhe lingadalulwa unxuse ubuholi be-IFP ukuba buthathele uMaphisa izinyathelo zokuqondiswa ubugwegwe. "Yini eyenza ukuthi abantu abadelela kangaka bangathathelwa izinyathelo? Abantu bakhuluma umathanda nje. Yihlazo leli. Inkulumo yakhe ayakhi futhi ihlukanisa iqembu phakathi. Ukhuluma indaba yokuthi obani basaba obani. Kanti kusemgangeleni yini lana ngoba phela kwipolitiki ubeka umbono wakho nomunye abeke umbono wakhe?" Umholi ongeneme uthe ziningi kabi izinto uMaphisa okufanele engabe ukhuluma ngazo njengomholi wentsha esifundazweni. "Kukhona iMKP lana efuna ukukhipha undunankulu esikhundleni. Ukuze sibone ukuthi uyiqhawe kufanele engabe ukhuluma ngaleyo nto. Abantu abasha abasebenzi, amathuba emisebenzi awekho. Nazo ke izinto okufanele ngabe ukhuluma ngazo." Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, akazange ayiphendule imibuzo yize kukhombisa ukuthi uyifundile.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ILUNGU leDA elibulewe, uMnuz Lungani Xaba UBUHOLI beDA KwaZulu-Natal bufuna kungenelele uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa esifundazweni, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, ecaleni lokubulawa kwesishoshovu ebesizongenela ukhetho lwamakhansela, uMnuz Lungani Xaba. UXaba ungcwatshwe ngeSonto, oPhaphase, KwaHlabisa. Wangenelwa abantu ekubo, bamdubula ngeledlule. Kuthiwa ubevele egula ngesikhathi ehlaselwa. Ilungu lesigungu esiphezulu kwiDA KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe, lithe bafuna kungenelele uMkhwanazi kuleli cala. "Sizokhuluma nabasimele esiShayamthetho KwaZulu-Natal sibacele ukuba baxoxe noMkhwanazi. Sifuna ukuthi lolu daba alulungise." UShelembe uthe bafuna ukuthi kuphenywe namanye amacala okubulawa kwabantu abikwe esiteshini samaphoyisa KwaHlabisa. "Esikutholayo wukuthi kule nyanga eyedlule angaphezu kuka-10 amacala okubulala abikiwe." UShelembe uthe okubakhathaza kakhulu wukuthi amaphoyisa awazange asukumele phezulu ngesikhathi ebikelwa ngokushona kukaXaba. Uthe amaphoyisa aze afika emva kwezinsuku ezintathu. "Lokhu kwenza ukuthi singawethembi amaphoyisa kanye nokusebenza kwawo. Sibona sengathi  asekubona njengento ejwayelekile ukubulawa kwabantu." UShelembe uthe uXaba ubeqokelwe ukuba amele iDA okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya lwangoNovemba. Uthe akakungabazi ukuthi uXaba ubezodla umhlanganiso okhethweni ngenxa yamagalelo abenawo emphakathini. "Abantu ababulale uXaba baphuce umphakathi umuntu obewumholi, obebeke phambili izidingo zomphakathi bese yena eza ngemuva. Baphuce abantu basoPhaphase ithuba lokuthi babe nomholi oqotho njengoba sibheke okhethweni lwangoNovemba 4. Asikungabazi ukuthi umphakathi ubuzomeseka njengoba bese eqokiwe ngokohlelo lwangaphakathi kwiDA ukuthi ungomunye wabantu abebezosimela okhethweni. "Ubezolwela izidingo zomphakathi. Konke lokho kushabalele ngenxa yabantu abayizigebengu, abayizinswelaboya, abayizidlova, abasiphuce leli thuba elihle kangaka. Kodwa ke sizothi umphakathi awuqhubeke nokulwela ukuthi abaphethe uhulumeni baqhubeke nokuletha izidingo kubantu." UShelembe uthe uXaba ubehlela umbhikisho wokukhala ngokugqoza kwezidingo obuzoya emahhovisi kaMasipala waKwaHlabisa. "Lo mphakathi sekunesikhathi eside ungahlomuli ngezidingo okufanele engabe uyazithola. Ayikho imigwaqo la, alikho ibhuloho. Uma kuna imvula izingane aziyi ezikoleni, abasebenzi abayi emsebenzini. Abakwazi ukuwela ngoba ibhuloho alikho."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMengameli, uCyril Ramaphosa Image: Facebook/ MyANC UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa ukhuthaze ukuhlanzwa kwamadolobha kanye nokuphathwa kahle kwemikhandlu. URamaphosa uthe abantu bakuleli bafanelwe ukuhlala emadolobheni ahlanzekile. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ehola amalungu ekomiti elibhekelele ukusebenza kwansuku zonke kwi-ANC abehambele esifundazweni i-Eastern Cape. Amalungu ekomiti abeyohlola ukuhanjiswa kwezidingo kubantu. URamaphosa uthe kufanele omasipala baqikelele ukuthi amadolobha ahlale ehlanzekile ngaso sonke isikhathi. "Sifuna ukuthi abantu bahlale emadolobheni ahlanzekile. Sifuna ukuthi abantu bahlale emadolobheni angagcwele udoti. Abantu balapha eNingizimu Afrika bangamanono, ngakho bafanelwe ukuhlala ezindaweni ezihlanzekile." URamaphosa uphonsele inselelo abaholi bomasipala ukuba baqinisekise ukuthi baphatha ngobuqotho. "Abantu bafanelwe ukuhlala komasipala abaphethwe ngendlela. Lapha ngibala abaholi bezepolitiki kanye nezikhulu zomkhandlu." Uhambo lwabaholi be-ANC luqale enkonzweni iBantu Church of Christ. Abaholi be-ANC bahambele izindawo ezahlukene ezingaphansi kukaMasipala iNelson Mandela Bay lapho behlole khona izinhlelo zokwakhiwa kwengqalasizinda kagesi, amanzi kanye nokunye. Lo masipala uke wakhungathwa izinkinga zokuhanjiswa kwezidingo. Izinkinga ezikhungethe umasipala zidalwa umbango wezikhundla njengoba kujwayele ukuba noginqigonqo wezikhundla. Alikho iqembu elinezihlalo ezanele ukuthi liphathe ngokuzimela kulo mkhandlu. Le nkinga yaqala okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya lwango-2016, kwaphinda futhi nangokhetho lwango-2021 kwangaba khona iqembu elithola izihlalo ezanele ukuba libuse ngokuzimela. Izimeya zamaqembu ahlukene sizishintshwe kaningi kulo mkhandlu kusukela ngo-2016. Mumva nje kuphethe imeya ye-ANC, uNkk Babalwa Lobishe, owangena esikhundleni ngasekupheleni kuka-2024. URamaphosa uthe mkhulu umehluko abawubonayo kusukela kwangena uNkk Lobishe esikhundleni. "Muhle umsebenzi awenzayo wokubuyisa uzinzo lapha. Ungumuntu wesifazane owenza kahle kakhulu. Asinabo abantu besifazana abaphethe imikhandlu engama-metro. Ngakho ke kufanele sishaye ihlombe uma kukhona umuntu wesifazane ophethe umkhandlu omkhulu owenza umsebenzi oncomekayo. Kuningi impela okwenziwayo lapha futhi sifuna ukuthi baqhubeke nokusebenza ngokuzikhandla." URamaphosa uthe amalungu ekomiti azozihambela zonke izindawo zakuleli ukuyohlola ukuhanjiswa kwezidingo. "Sazibophezela ukuthi njalo ngenyanga sizokuya kohlola ukuhanjiswa kwezidingo. Uhambo lwethu lwanamhlanje luyingxenye yaleso sibophezelo."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: OWAYENGUNDUNANKULU waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Willies Mchunu UZOHOLWA owayengundunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Willies Mchunu, umkhankaso weMKP wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya esifundazweni. UMchunu uqokwe ukuba abe umdidiyeli wethimba elizohola umkhankaso weMKP wokhetho KwaZulu-Natal. Ukuqokwa kwethimba kumenyezelwe uNobhala Jikelele weMKP, uMnuz Sibonelo Nomvalo.  Ithimba liqokwe emva kokuhlakazwa kobuholi besifundazwe. UMchunu ubekade engumdidiyeli wobuholi obuhlakaziwe. Iningi labaholi abebeyingxenye yethimba elihlakaziwe liqokelwe ethimbeni elizohola umkhankaso wokhetho. Phakathi kwabaholi abaqokelwe ethimbeni elizohola umkhankaso wokhetho, kubalwa uMnuz Simphiwe Mpungose neNduna yamabutho, uMnuz Gobizizwe Makhanya, abebevele beyingxenye yethimba elihlakaziwe. Image: Parliament RSA  /Supplied UNomvalo uthe ithimba liqokwe emva kwemihlangano yezifunda ebibanjwe ngeledlule. Kule mihlangano ebibanjwe kuzo zonke izifunda zaKwaZulu-Natal, kuphakanyiswe amagama abantu abazokuba yingxenye yomkhankaso wokhetho. UNomvalo uthe bazomemezela maduze abazohola umkhankaso weqembu ezifundeni, wamemezela abazohola umkhankaso weMKP ezifundazweni iGauteng, Eastern Cape neLimpopo. "Ubuholi bakulezi fundazwe ezinhlanu ezisele nobezifunda sizobumemezela emasontweni ambalwa ezayo." UNomvalo uthe bazokwenza izinguquko ebuholini uma kunesidingo. "Ithimba elizohola umkhankaso wokhetho esifundazweni lizokuba nabantu abangu-22. Sizokwenza izinguquko emathimbeni uma sibona kukhona isidingo sokuthi sishintshe." UNomvalo uthe uzonikeza abakhethiwe ukuba bahole umkhankaso wokhetho umhlahlandlela. "Ngizobacacisela ukuthi yini umsebenzi wabo nokuthi yini esiyilindele kubo." Kuzokube kungokokuqala ukuba iMKP ingenele ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. Leli qembu eliholwa owayengumengameli, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, lamangaza abaningi okhethweni lukazwelonke lwango-2024, njengoba laba yiqembu lesithathu ngobukhulu ePhalamende, laphinde lahamba phambili ngamavoti KwaZulu-Natal. Imiphumela yango-2024, ikhombisa ukuthi iMKP yayizothatha inqwaba yomasipala KwaZulu-Natal ukuba kwakuvotelwa amakhansela. I-MKP inamakhansela angaphezu kwamahlanu KwaZulu-Natal komasipala abahlukene okubalwa kubo iTheku noMasipala waKwaDukuza. Onke la makhansela anqoba okhethweni lokuchibiyela olwalubanjelwe emva kokhetho lwango-2024. I-MKP yenza amalungiselelo okhetho nje, kusenongabazane lokuthi ngabe leli qembu lizolungenela yini ukhetho. UZuma usanda kuveza ukuthi bafuna luhlehle ukhetho ngenxa yokuthi kunecala abalifakile lapho bephonsela inselelo imiphumela yokhetho lwango-2024.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: OWAYEYIJAJI uMnuz Jerome Ngwenya Image: GCINA NDWALANE AKUCACI ngokubuya kowayeyijaji, uMnuz Jerome Ngwenya, esikhwameni esigade umhlaba kaZulu, iNgonyama Trust, njengoba ihhovisi leSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini lithi akakaqokwa ngokusemthethweni ukuba aluleke iMbube ezindabeni ezithinta iNgonyama Trust. Indaba yokubuyiswa kukaNgwenya yavela ngesikhathi iSilo sibize imbizo yamakhosi eyayisesigodlweni eMashobeni, ngenyanga edlule. Kule mbizo eyayibizelwe ukuzobhunga ngezithinta iNgonyama Trust, kwavela ukuthi iMbube izobuyisa uNgwenya kodwa kwangacaca ukuthi yiliphi iqhaza azolibamba. UNgwenya waze wanikwa ithuba lokuphefumula kulo mhlangano lapho anikeza amakhosi umlando weNgonyama Trust. Kuze kube manje akucaci ukuthi yiliphi iqhaza elizobanjwa uNgwenya. Unobhala ehhovisi leSilo, uMnuz Arnold Nododile (Ndamase), uthe uNgwenya akakaze aqokwe ngokusemthethweni ukuba aluleke iSilo ezindabeni ezithinta iNgonyama Trust. Okhulumela iSilo, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, unxuse ukuba yonke imibuzo ibhekiswe kuNododile, wakhala ngokuthi wayengekho embizweni yangenyanga edlule futhi ubengekho emsebenzini ngenxa yomkhuhlane. UNgwenya ube usihlalo weNgonyama Trust iminyaka, waze waphuma ngo-2023 ngesikhathi iSilo siphakamisa Inkosi Thanduyise kaMpiyezintombi Mzimela ukuba ibe ngusihlalo webhodi. Ukususwa kukaNgwenya kwesikasihlalo weNgonyama Trust kwahlukanisa phakathi amakhosi. Kunamakhosi okukhona kuwo nowayengundunankulu kaZulu ngaleso sikhathi, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi, azwakalisa ukungahambisani nokukhishwa kukaNgwenya. UNgwenya ubambene ngezihluthu enkantolo nebhodi leNgonyama Trust elikhona elimsola ngokuba nesandla ekunyamalaleni kwezigidi zamaRandi ngesikhathi ephethe isikhwama. INkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu isanda kunquma ukuthi uNgwenya akhokhe u-R30 million owaduka ngesikhathi esaphethe kwiNgonyama Trust. Lena yimali uMasipala waseThekwini owawuthenge ngayo umhlaba ongaphansi kweNgonyama Trust eHammarsdale. Ubufakazi obethulwe enkantolo buveze ukuthi uNgwenya wayalela ukuba imali ifakwe kwi-akhawunti yommeli wakhe. Inkantolo yanquma ukuthi kudliwe impahla kaNgwenya. Inkantolo yaphinde yachitha isicelo sikaNgwenya sokuba anikezwe igunya lokuphonsela inselelo isinqumo senkantolo. Ibambene ngezihluthu empini yokulawula iNgonyama Trust. UNgqongqoshe wezoMhlaba, uMnuz Mzwanele Nyhontso, usanda kuzama ukuhlakaza ibhodi leNgomyama Trust kodwa isinqumo sakhe sachithwa yinkantolo. Ngapha iSilo sifuna kuchibiyelwe umthetho olawula iNgonyama Trust ukuze kube yiso esiqoka amalungu ebhodi. Ngeledlule ithimba elijutshwe yiSilo libe nomhlangano namaqembu ameleleke ePhalamende  liwanxenxa ukuba aseke isiphakamiso seSilo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: INGAPHANDLE lenxanxathela yezitolo eseMpangeni eqanjwe ngeNkosi uMangosuthu Buthelezi IVUKWE umunyu Inkosi yakwaButhelezi, uZuzifa kaMangosuthu Buthelezi, kuvulwa inxanxathela yezitolo eqanjwe ngenkosi eyizalayo, uMangosuthu kaMathola Buthelezi. Inkosi Zuzifa ithe ukuvulwa kwenxanxathela yezitolo kuyenze yazibuza ukuthi kazi ibizozizwa kanjani inkosi ukuba isekhona? Inxanxathela yezitolo eseMpangeni, ivulwe izolo. "Ngizwe kubuhlungu uma sengiyibona isiphelele. Ngifikelwe umunyu, ngezwa ngifikelwa izinyembezi ezincane. Ngizibuzile ukuthi kaze ubezothini uMntwana ukuba besingena naye lapha, esebona inxanxathela yezitolo inegama lakhe." Inkosi okuqanjwe ngayo inxanxathela yezitolo yayingundunankulu kaZulu futhi iwumsunguli we-IFP. Inkosi uZuzifa ithe kubajabulisile ukuba ubaba wabo ahlonishwe ngale ndlela. "Namhlanje sithi ncinci kamjoli. Nezingane ezincane ziyobuza ukuthi ubani lona okuqanjwe ngaye inxanxathela yezitolo, bese sizichazela." Inkosi ithe ifisa ukuthi inxanxathela yezitolo ithuthukise abantu bendawo. "Ngifisa ukuthi izitshalo ezizodayiswa lapha zithengwe ebantwini bendawo. Sifuna ukubona amadumbe, ubhatata nokunye okutshalwe ngabantu bendawo kulethwa ngamaloli ukuba kuzodayiswa lapha. Le nto angiyisho nje ngoba nakhu nginandisa kodwa ngiyikhuluma le nto ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi le nto yayisenhliziyweni kaMntwana. Ngiphonsela inselelo uMnyango wezoLimo ukuba welekelele abalimi bendawo." Usihlalo wenhlangano engenzi nzuzo eqanjwe ngenkosi yakwaButhelezi, iPrince Mangosuthu Buthelezi Foundation, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uthe ukuvulwa kwenxanxathela yezitolo kudale amathuba emisebenzi kubantu abangaphezu kuka-1 000 asebeqashiwe. "Abathole amathuba emisebenzi sebezokwazi ukuzakhela izindlu abazithandayo. Abezukuhlala bengokhangezile kodwa sebezozenzela abakuthandayo. Ingakho sikushayela ihlombe lokhu ngoba inkolelo kaMntwana waKwaPhindangene bekuwukuthi abantu abanikezwe amathuba okuzenzela." UHlabisa uthe ukuvulwa kwenxanxathela yezitolo kuzophinde kuhlomulise abamatekisi  nabadayisa emgwaqweni. IMeya kaMasipala waseMhlathuze, uMnuz Xolani Ngwezi, ithe ziningi ezinye izinhlelo zentuthuko ezizayo kulo mkhandlu. Uthe kunezinhlelo zokwakhiwa kwesikhumulo sezindiza, ihotela, inxanxathela yezitolo nemayini. "Lokhu kuzodala amanye amathuba emisebenzi." Amalungu enhlangano edlelana neMKP, i-Labour and Civic Organisation, abebhikisha ngesikhathi kuvulwa inxanxathela yezitolo, ekhala ngokuthi kube nokwenzelela ngesikhathi kuqashwa abazosebenza kule nxanxathela yezitolo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMPHATHISWA woMnyango wokuThuthukisa uMphakathi KwaZulu-Natal, uNksz Mbali Shinga USAPHEPHILE okwesikhashana ezembeni uMphathiswa wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi KwaZulu-Natal, uNksz Mbali Shinga, njengoba enikwe igunya lokuphonsela inselelo ukuxoshwa kwakhe kwiNFP. Isinqumo sokunika uNksz Shinga ilungelo lokuphonsela inselelo isinqumo sokuxoshwa kwiNFP sithathwe emhlanganweni wekomiti elibhekele ukusebenza kwansuku zonke eqenjini obungempelasonto. Ukunikwa kukaNksz Shinga ilungelo lokuphonsela inselelo isinqumo sokuxoshwa kusho ukuthi sisaphephile isikhundla sakhe sokuba umphathiswa. UNobhala jikelele weNFP, uMnuz Sunset Xaba, uthe bazosungula ikomiti elizolalela isicelo sikaNksz Shinga sokuphonsela inselelo ukuxoshwa kwakhe. "Ngokulandela imigomo yeqembu, kanye nokubona isidingo sokuba kungabi khona umuzwa wokuthi senza izinto ngokwenzelela, sinqume ukumnika ilungelo lokuba aphonsele inselelo isinqumo. Ikomiti lizolalela isicelo sakhe ngokungachemi. Lokhu kusho ukuthi uzothola ithuba lokuziphendulela futhi kuzokwenzeka isiqiniseko sokuthi iyalandelwa imigomo yeqembu." UNksz Shinga walahlwa yicala lokushaya indiva umyalelo weqembu wokuba aseke isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, esasifakwe yiMKP. Ukunikwa ilungelo lokuphonsela inselelo isinqumo kusho ukuthi uNksz Shinga ngeke axoshwe ekubeni yilungu lesiShayamthetho kuze kuphume isinqumo esicelweni sakhe. Ukuxoshwa ekubeni yilungu lesiShayamthetho bekuzosho ukuthi uphunyukwa yisikhundla sokuba umphathiswa. Ukuxoshwa kwakhe bekuzophinde kubeke engcupheni uhulumeni wokubusa ngokubambisana ophethe KwaZulu-Natal. I-NFP ingababeki benkosi ngesihlalo sayo esisodwa kuhulumeni wesifundazwe. Ubuholi beNFP kuzwelonke bufuna ukuthi iqembu lihoxe kuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal nokungenza ukuthi kube nongqingetshe njengoba amaqembu abusayo ezosala nezihlalo ezingu-40 kwezingu-80 esiShayamthetho. Khonamanjalo, iNFP iphinde yaqoka uXaba ukuba abe unobhala jikelele weqembu. UXaba ubelokhu ebambile kulesi sikhundla kulandela ukuxoshwa kukaMnuz Teddy Thwala, owayekhethwe njengonobhala engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi beqembu eyayingo-2023. UNksz Duduzile Nhlengethwa waqokelwa kwesephini likanobhala jikelele. Lesi sikhundla besiphethwe uNksz Sithembile Msomi.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: (Archives) IZOVALEKA maduze intuba yokuqasha ngobungani kanye nobuqembu komasipala bakuleli uma sekuqale ukusebenza komthetho omusha. UNgqongqoshe wokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu ophinde abe umholi we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uthe ngomthetho omusha othinta ohulumeni basekhaya kuhloswe ukuqinisekisa ukuthi kuqashwa abantu abafanelwe wumsebenzi ezikhundleni. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma emcimbini we-IFP wokugubha uSuku lweNkululeko obuseGoli, izolo. UHlabisa uthe ukuqasha ngobungani yikhona okwenza ukuthi omasipala bahlulwe wukuhambisa izidingo kubantu. "Akufanele abantu baqashwe ngokobungani nangepolitiki. Ukuze omasipala basebenze  kahle kufanele kuqashwe abantu abawaziyo umsebenzi. Ukuqasha abantu abangawazi umsebenzi kwenza ukuthi omasipala bahluleke ukuhambisa izidingo. Uma ufuna ukubona izidingo zomphakathi kufanele uqashe umuntu owaziyo umsebenzi. Sizokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi zonke izikhulu zomasipala ezizoqashwa ziyawazi umsebenzi," kusho yena. UHlabisa uthe nezimeya bafuna kube ngabantu abawaziyo umsebenzi. Uthe bafuna nokuthi kungabi khona ukushintshwa njalo kwezimeya komasipala bakuleli. Izimeya eziningi ezangena ngo-2021 sezaphuma ezikhundleni. Ezinye zakhishwa amaqembu azo ezinye zaphucwa amaketanga obumeya emva kokujikelwa amaqembu amancane angababeki benkosi komasipala njengoba omasipala abaningi bephethwe ngokubambisana. UHlabisa uthe ukushintshwa kwezimeya kudala ukuthi lungabi khona uzinzo komasipala. "Umasipala oshintsha izimeya njalo awubi nalo uzinzo. Njengoba siya okhethweni kufanele sibe nomasipala abanozinzo ukuze kungaphazamiseki ukuhanjiswa kwezidingo." Ekhuluma ngoSuku lweNkululeko, uHlabisa uthe abantu bakuleli abakayitholi inkululeko abayithenjiswa eminyakeni engaphezu kuka-30 edlule. UHlabisa uthe inkululeko iyiphupho ezinkumbini zabantu bakuleli ezibhuqwabhuqwa yindlala kanye nobugebengu obudla lubi. Ubuye wathi kufanele kuliwe nobugebengu kuphinde kuliwe nodlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane nezingane. UHlabisa uthe bakhathazekile ngodaba lwabantu bokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Uthe ukuba nenqwaba yabantu bokufika abakuleli kwenza ukuthi abantu bokufika bagcine sebencintela abakuleli izinsiza zikahulumeni. "Udaba lwabantu bokufika lubucayi. Kungase kwenzeke inhlekelele. Le nqwaba yemibhikisho esiyibonayo ikhombisa ukuthi kungase kuvele inhlekelele. Lapha kuhulumeni wokubambisana simile ezwini lokuthi abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho ababuyele emazweni abo. Le nto yenzeka emhlabeni jikelele," kusho uHlabisa.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMENGAMELI uCyril Ramaphosa uqoke uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa obambile, uLieutenant General Puleng Dimpane AMAQEMBU ezepolitiki asishayele ihlombe isinqumo sikaMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, sokumisa uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa othweswe amacala athinta ukukhishwa kwethenda ka-R360 million, uLieutenant General Fannie Masemola. Awezepolitiki athe kumfanele uMasemola ukuba amiswe njengoba ebhekene necala elithinta ithenda eyanikwa inkampani kasomabhizinisi obhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusimuzi "Cat" Matlala. URamaphosa umemezele ukuthi esikhundleni kuzobamba uLieutenant General Puleng Dimpane, obhekele ezezimali emaphoyiseni. URamaphosa uthe uMasemola uzomiswa emsebenzini kuze kuqedwe ukuqulwa kwecala. UMasemola uvele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi ePitoli ngoLwesibili, lapho ebebhekene khona necala lokwephula imigomo yokuphathwa kwemali yomphakathi iPublic Finance Management Act. URamaphosa uthe banqume ukunika uMasemola ikhefu njengoba esabhekene necala. UMasemola uzobuyela enkantolo ngenyanga ezayo lapho ezobe evele noMatlala kanye namanye amaphoyisa ngu-12 athweswe amacala athinta ithenda eyanikwa inkampani kaMatlala. URamaphosa uthe unqume ukumisa uMasemola ukuze kungonakali isithunzi samaphoyisa. "Uma nizokhumbula kahle ngathi kulo nyaka sifuna ukulwa nobugebengu obuhleliwe kanye nodlame. Ngathi ukuze siqede ubugebengu kufanele sibe namaphoyisa aqotho. Kubalulekile ukuthi sibe nabaholi bamaphoyisa abathenjwa abantu." URamaphosa uthe uyamethemba uLieutenant General Dimpane ukuthi uzoyibamba ishisa. "Ngiyamethemba ukuthi uzokwazi ukuzibamba ziqine. Unesipiliyoni emaphoyiseni kanye nakwezinye izinhlaka. Uneminyaka engu-20 esemaphoyiseni. Sifuna ukuthi aqhubeke nokuqinisa umkhankaso wokulwa nobugebengu. Ehlile amacala anodlame. Sibheke ukuthi kwehle isibalo samacala okuhlukumeza ngokobulili." URamaphosa uthe ukumiswa kukaMasemola ngeke kuphazamise impi yokulwa nobugebengu. "Ukubekwa amacala kukaMasemola akufanele kuphazamise ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa. Amaphoyisa akufanele ehlelwe umdlandla, kufanele aqhubeke nokulwa nobugebengu." Image: Siyabulela Duda / GCIS UNobhala jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula, uthe bayakwamukela ukuqokwa kukaLieutenant General Dimpane. Okhulumela iMKP, uMnuz Nhlamulo Ndhela, uthe abamethembi kahle uLieutenant General Dimpane. "Akakaze abe yiphoyisa. Wafika emaphoyiseni ezosebenza kwezokuphathwa kwemali. Ubugebengu budla lubi lapha eNingizimu Afrika, sinenkinga yamaqembu emigulukudu. Sizolwa kanjani nalobu bugebengu." Umholi weDA, uMnuz Geordin Hill-Lewis, uthe ukumiswa kukaMasemola kuzovikela isithunzi samaphoyisa. UHill-Lewis uthe ukumiswa kukaMasemola kukhombisa ngokusobala ukuthi kumapeketwane emaphoyiseni. Ilungu le-ActionSA, uNksz Dereleen James, lithe sebekhathele wukuthi ezikhundleni ezimqoka emaphoyiseni kuphathe abantu ababambile.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Image: Willem Phungula UMHOLI weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uthi abantu bakuleli basazoqhubeka nokudonsa kanzima uma kusekhona abantu abasahleli eqenjini asuka kulo, i-ANC. UZuma uthe abantu bakuleli bayokhomba ngophakathi mhla bonke balaxaza i-ANC. Ukusho lokhu emcimbini weMKP wokubungaza uSuku lweNkululeko obusePitoli ngoMsombuluko. "Anitshele nalabo abasasele ukuthi uma besasele emuva siyohlupheka njalo. Abeze ngapha khona sizophatha izwe lethu. Ithina esizophatha izwe lethu. Nitshele abanye ukuthi isikhathi sokuthi sibuse izwe lethu sifikile." Kulo mcimbi iMKP ikhumbule isosha elabulawa uhulumeni wobandlululo, uMnuz Solomon Mahlangu. UMahlangu wagixabezwa isigwebo sentambo eneminyaka engu-22 ngo-1979. UZuma uthe wayeyisosha elalizinikele ekulweleni inkululeko yakuleli. "Sasizimisele ukufa naye uma kuwukuthi kuyafiwa. Wazinikela emzabalazweni emncane enjalo." UZuma uthe bazoqhubeka nokubungaza uMahlangu kanye namanye amaqhawe alwela inkululeko. Uthe uMahlangu kanye namanye amaqhawe alwela inkululeko okubalwa kuwo loyo owaba umengameli wokuqala wakuleli ngaphansi kombuso wentando yeningi, uMnuz Nelson Mandela, akubona abe-ANC. "Akuyena umuntu we-ANC. Ithina esamqeqesha sase simthumela ukuthi ayolwa nobandlululo. SiwuMkhonto, naye wayewuMkhonto. Akekho umuntu ozositshela ukuthi akusiyena owethu. Abantu abangazange benze lutho bese kuba ibona abathi umuntu wethu lona. Akunjalo. Asikwazi ukuba nombango uma sekufanele sikhumbule isosha lethu. "Lokhu esikwenzayo sikwenza ngezifiso zomndeni. Asisho ukuthi abanye abangakwenzi. Nabo bazokwenza ngesikhathi sabo. Akekho umuntu ozosiphuca oMandela. UMkhonto wakhiwa oMandela. Akekho umuntu ozosiphuca la makhehla."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IPHINI likandunankulu kaZulu, Inkosi Phathisizwe Chiliza, usihlalo we-EFF, uNksz Nontando Nolutshungu, nondunankulu kaZulu, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi ITHIMBA elijutshwe yiSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini lithi ziyathembisa izingxoxo zalo namaqembu ameleleke ePhalamende mayelana nodaba lokuchibiyela umthetho olawula isikhwama esigade umhlaba kaZulu, iNgonyama Trust. Ithimba libe nemihlangano namaqembu ezepolitiki ameleleke ePhalamende ayisishiyagalombili kulezi zinsuku ezimbili ezedlule. Obekuxoxwa emhlanganweni yisiphakamiso seSilo sokuba kuchitshiyelwe umthetho olawula iNgonyama Trust. IMbube ifuna umthetho ugunyaze ukuthi kube iyona eqoka amalungu ebhodi leNgonyama Trust, njengamanje amalungu ebhodi aqokwa uNgqongqoshe wezoMhlaba. IMbube ifuna nokuthi iNgonyama Trust iphathwe uhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal esikhundleni sokuthi iphathwe uhulumeni kazwelonke. Amaqembu ahlangane nethimba yi-ANC, MKP, DA, EFF, Bosa, ACDP, FF Plus neRise Mzansi. UNdunankulu kaZulu, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi, uthe izingxoxo zabo namaqembu ezepolitiki zihambe kahle. "Amaqembu azibophezele ekwesekeni izinguquko ezizokwenza ukuthi kuzuze abantu abahlala ezindaweni zamakhosi." Kuxabene ubendle kwiNgonyama Trust njengoba iSilo singahoshelani namalungu ebhodi esiwasola ngokuthi awafuni ukusamukela njengosihlalo webhodi. Imizamo kaNgqongqoshe wezoMhlaba, uMnuz Mzwanele Nyhontso, yokuchitha amalungu ebhodi yahluleka. UNyhontso waqale wabhalela amalungu ebhodi incwadi ewabuza ukuthi kungani kufanele angamiswa. Amalungu ebhodi atshela uNyhontso ukuthi akanawo amandla okuwamisa emsebenzini. Muva nje, uNyhontso uzame ukuhlakaza ibhodi kodwa isinqumo sakhe sachithwa yiNkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UNOBHALA Jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula Image: Facebook/ MyANC I-ANC isabisa ngokuthi izobadiliza ezikhundleni zikahulumeni labo abazoqoma ukukhankasela idlelandawonye layo elikhethe ukungenela ukhetho ngokuzimela, i-SACP. UNobhala Jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula, uthe abazokhetha ukukhankasela amaKhomanisi okhethweni oluzayo bazozibeka engcupheni yokukhishwa ezikhundleni abajutshwe kuzo kuhulumeni. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba ngoLwesine. Kunenqwaba yabaholi be-SACP abanezikhundla kuhulumeni okubalwa kubo uNgqongqoshe wezeSayensi nezobuChwepheshe, uDkt Blade Nzimande, uNgqongqoshe wezeMfundo ePhakeme, uMnuz Buti Manamela, noNdunankulu waseLimpopo, uDkt Phophi Ramathuba. I-ANC inikeze amalungu ayo umnqamulajuqu wezinsuku eziyishumi ukuba asho ukuthi azokhankasela liphi iqembu okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo. UMbalula uthe labo abazokhetha ukungaphumeli obala, bazothatha ngokuthi bazokhankasela i-SACP. UMbalula uthe kuyicala ukukhankasela iqembu elincintisana ne-ANC okhethweni, wathi labo abenza lelo cala bazothathelwa izinyathelo. "Onke amalungu e-ANC aphoqelekile ukuba akhankasele i-ANC nabayimele okhethweni. Ngisho nalabo abanobulungu be-SACP baphoqelekile ukuthi bakhankasele i-ANC. Abangeke baphumele obala ukuthi bazokhankasela i-ANC, sizothatha ngokuthi bazokhankasela elinye biqembu. Abakhankasela iqembu elincintisana ne-ANC bazothathelwa izinyathelo. "Uma ujutshwe esikhundleni kuhulumeni sizokuthathela izinyathelo okubalwa kuzo ukuthi sikukhiphe esikhundleni. Sizokukhipha esikhundleni ngoba uzokube ukhankasela iqembu elibanga ne-ANC okhethweni, nokuyinto ephambene nemigomo ye-ANC." UMbalula uthe amalungu e-SACP angeke axoshwe kwi-ANC. "Siyasihlonipha isinqumo se-SACP sokungenela ukhetho. Angeke silwe namaKhomanisi emkhankasweni wethu. Asinankinga namalungu e-SACP. I-SACP inabaholi abanohlonze abanye babo bajutshwe ezikhundleni kuhulumeni. Amanye amalungu e-SACP anombono ohlukile ngodaba lokungenela ukhetho. "Asikho empini. Into nje okufanele abantu bakhethe ukuthi bazokhankasela liphi iqembu. Awukwazi ukukhankasela womabili amaqembu. Kufanele ukhethe iqembu elilodwa. Awukwazi ukuthi namhlanje uzokhankasela i-ANC, uvuke kusasa usukhankasela i-SACP." UMbalula uthe bayoze bayibone emva kokhetho i-SACP. "Mhlawumbe le nto sizoyixoxa emva kokhetho. Uma sekuphume imiphumela yokhetho mhlawumbe sizobona ukuthi singakwazi yini ukusebenzisana ne-SACP. Ngeke uphinde usizwe sikhuluma ngale ndaba."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UNOBHALA Jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula I-ANC izokwenza ezinye izinguquko ebuholini bayo obuphethe esifundazweni iKwaZulu-Natal kanye nasezifundeni zakulesi sifundazwe. UNobhala jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula, uveze ukuthi bazomemezela ithimba lesikhashana elisha elizohola i-ANC esifundazweni baphinde bamemezele nabazohola i-ANC ezifundeni. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba ngoLwesine. UMbalula uthe ithimba elisha elizohola isifundazwe uzolimemezela ngempelasonto. "Sesisemaphethelweni okuqokwa kwethimba elisha elizohola i-ANC KwaZulu-Natal. NgoMgqibelo ngizobe ngiKwaZulu-Natal, lapho sizoqoka khona ithimba elisha. Sivele sesibaqokile abaholi abaphezulu abazohola ithimba." Ithimba ebelikhona belinabaholi abangaphezu kuka-60. Kulindeleke ukuthi abaningi badliwe yizembe njengoba uMbalula akuveza phambilini ukuthi bazolinciphisa ithimba. UMbalula wakhala nogokuthi ithimba ebelikhona liyahluleka ukwenza umsebenzi walo, lazi ukulwa izimpi zangaphakathi kuphela. Waze wafanisa ithimba nohlobo lwemoto i-Tazz. I-ANC isanda kumemezela izinguquko ebuholi obuphezulu bethimba elihola isifundazwe. Kulezi zinguquko kuqokwe uMnuz Mike Mabuyakhulu njengomdidiyeli, kwathi uMnuz James Nxumalo waqokwa njengomgqugquzeli. Kulezi zinguquko ezimenyezelwe uMbalula ngeledlule, abaholi abanohlonze okubalwa kubo, uMnuz Jeff Radebe, uNkk Nomusa Dube-Ncube, noNkk Weziwe Thusi, badliwe yizembe. UMbalula uveze ukuthi bazophinde baqoke amathimba azohola i-ANC ezifundeni. "NgoMsombuluko, ngeholidi, sizoqoka ubuholi bazo zonke izifunda ze-ANC KwaZulu-Natal." Lokhu kusho ukuthi buzodliwa yizembe ubuholi be-ANC ezifundeni obaqokwa ngonyaka odlule. Ubuholi obuzomenyezelwa wuMbalula buzohola umkhankaso we-ANC KwaZulu-Natal. Kubheda uhlelo kwi-ANC KwaZulu-Natal njengoba yaphunyukwa yisifundazwe okhethweni lwango-2024. I-ANC iyiqembu lesithathu ngobukhulu KwaZulu-Natal, iyingxenye kahulumeni wokubambisana. Izinto zaqala ukuyibhedela okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya lwango-2021 i-ANC KwaZulu-Natal lapho eyalahlekelwa khona yinqwaba yomasipala.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-EFF uMnuz Julius Malema Image: ABONGILE GINYA UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ufuna kuthathelwe izinyathelo umshushisi wecala  eliholele ekutheni agwetshwe iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele, u-Advocate Joel Cesar. UMalema ufake isikhalo esisemthethweni enhlanganweni yezokushushisa, iNational Prosecuting Authority (NPA), lapho ecele khona ukuthi kuphenywe uCesar. UCesar ubengumshushisi ecaleni likaMalema lokuqhumisa isibhamu. Encwadini yabameli, uMalema usola uCesar ngokwephula imigomo yeNPA. UMalema uthe uCesar wenza okungafanele ngesikhathi egunyaza ukuthi isibhamu esaqhunyiswa uMalema sibuyiselwe kumnikazi waso ekubeni inkantolo ingakanqumi ukumkhipha phambili umnikazi wesibhamu. Umnikazi wesibhamu, uMnuz Adriaan Snyman, watholwa engenacala. USnyman, owayengumqaphi kaMalema ngesikhathi eqhumisa isibhamu, ubonakala kwi-video enikeza uMalema isibhamu asiqhumisa ngesikhathi kunomcimbi wokugubha iminyaka engu-10 kwasungulwa i-EFF. UMalema uthe uCesar wakhipha umyalelo wokuthi uSnyman abuyiselwe isibhamu ngaphambi kokuthi inkantolo imkhiphe phambili. "UCesar watshela abameli bakaSnyman ukuthi isibhamu bazosithola enkantolo. Isibhamu sabuyiselwa kuSnyman ekuseni ngosuku okwaphuma ngalo isinqumo sokuthi akanacala. Lokho kusho ukuthi wabuyiselwa isibhamu ngaphambi kokuthi kuphume isinqumo senkantolo." UMalema uqhuba athi uCesar akanalo igunya lokukhipha umyalelo wokuthi kubuyiselwe uSnyman isibhamu. UMalema uthe yimantshi noma ijaji abanamandla okunquma ukuba kubuyiselwe ubufakazi emuva uma sekuphothulwe icala. "Kusobala ukuthi wephula imigomo yeNPA uCesar ngokukhipha umyalelo angagunyaziwe ukuba awukhiphe." Kusale kancane ukuba uMalema ayolala ezikhindini ngesikhathi inkantolo imgweba iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele ngesonto eledlule. UMalema wasindiswa wukuthi wafaka isicelo sokuphonsela inselelo isigwebo sakhe. Inkantolo yabe isimdedela ngesexwayiso. Isicelo sikaMalema sokuphonsela inselelo isigwebo sakhe sizolalelwa enkantolo enkulu. Ukugwetshwa kukaMalema iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele kubeka engcupheni isikhundla sakhe sokuba yilungu lePhalamende. Umthetho awumuvumeli umuntu oseke wadonsa isigwebo esingaphezu kwezinyanga ezingu-12 ukuthi abe yilungu lePhalamende.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UNDUNANKULU waKwaZulu-Natal uMnuz Thami Ntuli usekhuze izigameko nezenzo zodlame okubhekiswe ebantwini bokufika abakuleli zwe ABAHOLI KwaZulu-Natal, uNdunankulu Thami Ntuli, noKhomishana wamaPhoyisa esifundazwe uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, sebephumele obala bakhuza udlame olubhekiswe kwabokufika olufufusayo kulandela ukwandwa kwemibhikisho elwa nabokufika eminye yayo egcina isiba nodlame. Bathe ababhikishi abanalo ilungelo lokuhambe behlola ukuthi abokufika banawo yini amaphepha okuba kuleli njengoba kunezinhlaka ezigunyazwe ukwenza lo msebenzi. Uya ngokubanciphela umhlaba KwaZulu-Natal abokufika njengoba cishe usuku nosuku sekuba nombhikisho wokulwa nabakuleli ngokungemthetho. Imibhikisho miningi kakhulu eThekwini naseMgungundlovu, muva nje isiba khona nasemadolobheni amancane ngisho nasezindaweni zamakhosi imbala. Kukhona amakhosi asephumele obala athi awasabadingi abokufika. Izinhlangano iWomen's Liberation Movement ne-African Solidarity Network, zithe kungase kwenzeke imbedumehlwana yango-2008 no-2015 uma lunganqandwa udlame olufufusayo. Ngo-2015 kwabulawa abokufika abayisikhombisa ngesikhathi kunezigameko zokuhlaselwa kwabo KwaZulu-Natal nasezingxenyeni zeGoli. Kwashiswa inqwaba yezitolo zabokufika kuleyo mibhikisho. Ngo-2008 kwabikwa ukuthi kwashona abantu abangu-62 ngesikhathi kunodlame olubhekiswe kwabokufika olwaqala eGoli lwagcina selusabalele ezifundazweni eziningi okubalwa neKwaZulu-Natal. Esitatimendeni esikhishwe ngokuhlanganyela, izinhlangano ezikhuza udlame zithe kunezinkomba zokuthi isimo singase sibhebhetheke uma kungakhuzwa. "Kulezi zinyanga ezedlule sibonile kushuba isimo KwaZulu-Natal. Kube nemibhikisho ngaphandle kwesikole i-Addington Primary, kube nezinsolo zokuvimba abokufika ezibhedlela nasezikoleni, baningi nje abantu abavelile abakhuluma izinto ezicwasa abokufika." Izinhlangano zinxuse amaphoyisa ukuba abophe abaphehla udlame. Zinxuse amakhosi, izinhlaka zikahulumeni, abamasonto nosomabhizinisi ukuba bangenelele. "NeSilo uMisuzulu kaZwelithini sineqhaza elibalulekile okufanele silibambe ekubuyiseni uzinzo." UNtuli unxuse abantu ukuthi behlise umoya, wathi akufanele kubukeke sengathi abantu baKwaZulu-Natal bacwasa abantu bokufika. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabeSABC News. "Kufanele kucace ukuthi inkinga esinayo ingabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Akufanele kube nokudideka kule nto. Umuntu wangaphandle ofuna ukuba kuleli kufanele abe namaphepha amgunyaza ukuba abe kuleli. Abangenawo amaphepha kufanele babuyele emazweni abo." UMkhwanazi yena uthe usazoba nomhlangano nabaholi bezinhlangano ezihlela imibhikisho. UMkhwanazi uthe ababhikishi abakuqeqeshelwe ukubona ukuthi abantu bokufika banamaphepha aqondile yini. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabeNewzroom Afrika. "Uma ababhikishi benolwazi ngabantu bokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho kufanele babikele amaphoyisa kube yiwona aphenyayo. Bazogcina sebephambanisa nabantu balana eNingizimu Afrika bebadidanisa nabokufika."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: U-LIEUTENANT-General Puleng Dimpane Image: Phando Jikelo / RSA Parliament KUMISWE uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa othweswe amacala ayamene nethenda yezigidi zamarandi, uGeneral Fannie Masemola, kwabe sekuqokwa uLieutenant General Puleng Dimpane, ukuba abambe isikhundla. Ukumiswa kukaMasemola kumenyezelwe nguMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba izolo. UMasemola uthweswe amacala ayamenele nethenda ka-R360 million eyanikwa inkampani kasomabhizinisi obhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusimuzi "Cat" Matlala. UMasemola uvele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi ePitoli, ngoLwesibili, lapho ebebhekene khona necala lokwephula imigomo yokuphathwa kwemali yomphakathi, i-Public Finance Management Act. URamaphosa uthe banqume ukunika uMasemola ikhefu njengoba esabhekene nezinsolo. UMasemola uzobuyela enkantolo ngenyanga ezayo, lapho uzokube evele noMatlala namanye amaphoyisa angu-12 athweswe amacala athinta ithenda eyanikwa inkampani kaMatlala. URamaphosa uthe uyamethemba uLieutenant General Dimpane ukuthi uzowenza kahle umsebenzi. ULieutenant General Dimpane ubephethe ezeziMali emaphoyiseni. U-GENERAL Fannie Masemola Image: Picture: Siyabulela Duda/GCIS

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IPHOYISA eliwuSayitsheni elisamisiwe uSergeant Fannie Nkosi LISAZOKUBA ukudla kwejele iphoyisa elisolwa ngokuba ubhululu wemigulukudu, uSergeant Fannie Nkosi, njengoba kuchithwe isicelo salo sebheyili. INkantolo yeMantshi i-Pretoria North ichithe isicelo sebheyili sikaNkosi izolo. UNkosi uboshelwe amacala okwephula imigomo yokugcinwa kwezibhamu, ukutholakala nesiqhumane nezinhlamvu nelokutholakala namadokodo amacala asavalwa. Imantshi uThandi Theledi ithe uNkosi uhlulekile ukuveza izizathu zokuthi kungani kufanele adedelwe ngebheyili. UMbuso ubungafuni ukuthi uNkosi anikwe ibheyili usabela ukuthi angase abalekele icala, njengoba ububeke nokuthi ubona uNkosi ephephile uma esejele ukunokuba anikwe ibheyili ngenxa yokuthi uzwana nemigulukudu engase ifune ukumenzakalisa uma enikwa ibheyili. Ubusabela nokuthi ubengazama ukuphazamisa uphenyo ngenxa yokuthi uyiphoyisa. UNkosi uzogcinwa ejele njengoba amaphoyisa eqhubeka nophenyo lwawo. Usolwa ngokusondelana nosomabhizinisi ababhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusimuzi "Cat" Matlala noKatiso "KT" Molefe. Ngesikhathi efakaza phambi kweKhomishini eholwa yiJaji Mbuyiseli Madlanga, kwavela ukuthi uNkosi kukhona imali ayeyithola kulabo somabhizinisi abasobishini. Kuphinde kuvele ukuthi wayesondelene nosomatekisi owayesatshiswa okwenyoka, uMnuz Jotham "Mswazi" Msibi nePhini likaKhomishana wamaPhoyisa elimisiwe, uLieutenant General Shadrack Sibiya. UNkosi waboshwa emva kokugasela kwamaphoyisa emzini wakhe kulandela ukuvela kwakhe phambi kweKhomishini kaMadlanga. UNkosi usamisiwe emsebenzini njengoba ebhekene nenqwaba yezinsolo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMntwana uGcinabantu Thembisile 'Sister Eunice' IPHINDE yagubuzelwa yifu elimnyama iNdlunkulu kaZulu kulandela ukuguqa kukaMntwana Gcinabani Thembisile "Sister Eunice" Zulu (78), waseZibindini. UMntwana uGcinabani ushone ngoMgqibelo, nokuwusuku obekufihlwa ngalo omunye uMntwana waseNdlunkulu kaZulu, uGibizizwe Zulu (67), wasoSuthu. Okhulumela iSilo, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uzwakalise ukukhathazeka ngokuguqa ngokulandelana kwabantwana baseNdlunkulu. "Nina beSilo senginamahloni ukuthi ngilokhu ngibika ngezindaba ezibuhlungu nezingehli kahle. INdlunkulu kaZulu isiphinde yehlelwa yifu elimnyama. Egameni leSilo samabandla onke, nasegameni leNdlunkulu nesizwe sonke sithi akwehlanga olungehliyo, nilale ngenxeba nina beSilo." UMntwana uThulani uchaze uMntwana uGcinabani njengomuntu obenenhliziyo emnene futhi ezinikele okholweni. UMntwana uThulani uthe uMntwana uzofihlwa ngoMgqibelo. "Umngcwabo uzokuba seKuthokozeni kweZibindi, eShoba, eFilidi. Sengathi umoya wakhe ungalala ngokuthula." UMntwana uGibizizwe yena ufihlwe ngoMgqibelo, oSuthu. UMntwana uGibizizwe ubeseduze kweSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini, futhi uyena owayekhongela iMbube ekhweni layo kwaMyeni. UMntwana uThulani uthe ukushona kwabaNtwana ikakhulukazi labo abangoyise beNgonyama, kuphazamisa umsebenzi weMbube. "Siyazi ukuthi abaNtwana njengoba bengoyise beNgonyama yibona ethembele kubo ukuthi njengoba ikhona ihlezi esihlalweni, mayibheka ngapha nangapha ibona ukuthi oyise bakhona, okwenza ukuthi izinze. Kodwa lokhu kufana nokuhlwithwa amaphiko ayo okundiza." Baningi abanye abaNtwana abayizinsika eNdlunkulu kaZulu abaguqe kule minyaka edlule. Phakathi kwabaguqe ngonyaka odlule kubalwa uMntwana uHenrietta Zulu kanye noNdlunkulu Thoko Mantombela Zulu owayegane owayeyibamba bukhosi, uMntwana uMcwayizeni Zulu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UKHOMISHANA wamaPhoyisa uGeneral Fannie Masemola Image: Kamogelo Moichela / IOL News UKHOMISHANA wamaPhoyisa kuZwelonke, uGeneral Fannie Masemola, uthi umsulwa ezinsolweni abekwa zona. UMasemola uthe akukho okuphambene nomthetho akwenza ngesikhathi kukhishwa ithenda yezigidi zamaRandi eyanikwa inkampani kasomabhizinisi obhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusumuzi 'Cat' Matlala. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi evele eNkantolo yeMantshi ePitoli, izolo. UMasemola ubekwe icala lokuphula imigomo yokusetshenziswa kwemali yomphakathi iPublic Finance Management Act. Inkampani kaMatlala yanikezwa ithenda kaR360 million, kodwa yabuye yahoxiswa ithenda emva kwezinsolo zokungalandelwa kwemigomo. UMasemola uthe akalazi icala abekwa lona. "Ngiyazi ukuthi mina ngimsulwa. Akukho okuphambene nomthetho engikwenzile. Ngizodedela inkantolo yenze umsebenzi wayo. Kufanele engabe ngijaha izigebengu kodwa ngilapha namhlanje ngibekwe amacala okuphula imigomo yokusetshenziswa kwemali." Akucaci ngekusasa likaMasemola emaphoyiseni njengoba kukhona abafuna ukuthi amiswe emsebenzini bese kuqala uphenyo ngokuthi kufanele yini aqhubeke nokuphatha isikhundla. UMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, waveza ukuthi uzonquma maduze ngodaba lukaMasemola. UMasemola utshele abezindaba ukuthi sebeke baluxoxa lolu daba noRamaphosa. "Ngeke ngihambe nginekela izwe izinto engizixoxa nomengameli. Ngizolinda isiphetho sezingxoxo." UMasemola unxuse amaphoyisa ukuthi aqhubeke nomsebenzi wawo, angaphazanyiswa wukuboshwa kwakhe. "Amaphoyisa awaqhubeke enze umsebenzi wawo. Awaqhubeke asebenza ngokuzikhandla. Kungenzeka ukuthi ngiboshiwe njengamanje, kodwa bona kufanele baqhubeke nomsebenzi wabo. Ziningi izinto esizitholayo njengoba siphenya amacala ahleliwe. Sisezithendeni zabantu abathinteka ebugebengwini. Sesiyazi ukuthi obani abenza ubugebengu obuhleliwe." Icala elibhekene noMasemola lihlehliselwe uMeyi 13. Icala likaMasemola lihlanganiswe nelinye elibhekene namaphoyisa athwese amacala athinta ithenda efanayo. UMasemola uzovela nalamaphoyisa uma esebuyela enkantolo. Amaphoyisa angu-12, asolwa ngokuhlanganyela kuleli cala, abhekene namacala ahlanganisa ukukhwabanisa, ukushushumbisa imali nokuphula imithetho yemali. Amaphoyisa phambilini anikezwa ibheyili ephakathi kuka-R40 000 kuya ku-R80 000 ngokwahlukana.
