UMatlala naye uthweswe icala elithinta ithenda, uzovela nezikhulu zamaphoyisa uma icala selibuyela enkantolo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-MK Party uMnuz Jacob Zuma Image: WILLEM PHUNGULA UMHOLI weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, ufuna kuhlehliswe ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo. UZuma ufuna ukhetho okufanele lube phakathi kukaNovemba noJanuwari, lubanjwe uma sekuxazululwe isikhalo esafakwa yiMKP mayelana nemiphumela yokhetho lukazwelonke nezifundazwe lwango-2024. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma namalungu eMKP ngeSonto ebusuku emhlanganweni obuhanjelwe yizinhlaka zeqembu esifundeni iTheku. IMKP yaphonsela inselelo imiphumela yokhetho lwango-2024, lapho yaba yiqembu lesithathu ngobukhulu ePhalamende. Inhlangano eyengamele ukhetho, i-Independent Electoral Commission (IEC), yazichitha izikhalo zeMKP. Icala elafakwa iMKP kulindeleke ukuthi liqulwe eNkantolo yezoKhetho ngenyanga ezayo. UZuma uthe ukugijimela ukuba nolunye ukhetho ekubeni singakaphumi isinqumo ecaleni abalifakile kuzokwenza ukuthi abantu bangayithembi imiphumela yokhetho. Unxuse amalungu eqembu ukuba asho ngazwi linye ukuthi aluhlehliswe ukhetho oluzayo. "Kufanele sibatshele ukuthi sifuna ukwazi ukuthi ashonaphi amavoti ethu antshontshwa okhethweni olwedlule. Asibatshele ukuthi asifuni ukuthi kube khona olunye ukhetho ngoba kunezinkinga abangakazixazululi." Umhlangano wangeSonto ububizelwe ukuzolungiselela ukhetho. UZuma unxuse amalungu eqembu ukuba asebenze ngokuzikhandla uma sekuqale umkhankaso wokhetho. Uthe bafuna ukunqoba ngamalengiso kuMasipala waseThekwini. Ngokwemiphumela yokhetho lwango-2024, iMKP iyona eyathola amavoti amaningi eThekwini, okusho ukuthi ngabe yilona leli qembu eliphethe umkhandlu ukuba kwakuvotelwa omasipala. IMKP ibinemihlangano yokulungiselela ukhetho kuzo zonke izifunda zaKwaZulu-Natal. Imihlangano ibihanjelwe abaholi abaphezulu kwiMKP okubalwa kubo unobhala jikelele, uMnuz Sibonelo Nomvalo, nephini lomholi weqembu, uDkt John Hlophe. Kusuke umsindo kweminye imihlangano okubalwa obusesifundeni iMoses Mabhida kanye nasesifundeni Ilembe. Ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kusabalale ama-video amalungu eMKP kulezi zifunda exabana wodwa.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UNOBHALA jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula Image: Facebook/ MyANC AZONIKWA umnqamulajuqu wezinsuku eziyishumi, amalungu e-ANC anobulungu be-SACP ukuba acacise ukuthi azokhankasela liphi iqembu okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo njengoba womabili la madlelandawonye ezolungenela ukhetho. Unobhala jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula, uthe azozifaka obishini amalungu azokhetha ukungayiphenduli incwadi yakhe. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba, izolo. UMbalula uthe uzobhalela wonke amalungu e-ANC incwadi ngoLwesine, lapho ezowacela khona ukuthi acacise ukuthi azohamba naliphi iqembu. "Amalungu e-ANC kufanele aphendule zingakapheli izinsuku eziyishumi. Uma kukhona abazokhetha ukungayiphenduli incwadi, baqoke ukukhankasela iSACP, bazoba nenkinga. Imigomo ye-ANC icacile ukuthi awukwazi ukukhankasela iqembu elibanga ne-ANC okhethweni." Kunenqwaba yabaholi be-SACP abanezikhundla kuhulumeni okubalwa kubo uNgqongqoshe wezeSayensi nezobuChwepheshe, uDkt Blade Nzimande, uNgqongqoshe weMfundo ePhakeme, uMnuz Buti Manamela, noNdunankulu waseLimpopo, uDkt Phophi Ramathuba. UMbalula uthe ngeke amalungu e-ANC aphoqwe ukuthi asule ekubeni amalungu eSACP. "Akukhona ukuthi silwa ne-SACP, into esiyenzayo wukuvikela i-ANC. Asinankinga nabantu abanobulungu be-SACP kodwa awukwazi ukukhankasela lezi zinhlangano zombili. Kufanele ukhethe iqembu elilodwa ozolikhankasela. Abanye bavele sebekhethile. Ngeke baxoshwe abantu abangamalungu e-SACP." UMbalula uthe abanalo itwetwe lokuthi ukungenela kweSACP ukhetho kungase kwenze ukuthi i-ANC ingenzi kahle okhethweni. Uthe ukungenela kweSACP ukhetho, ngeke kufane nokuvumbuka kweqembu eliholwa owayengumengameli wezwe, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, iMKP. "Le nto ayifani nekaZuma.EkaZuma yayifana nomlilo wequbula, owavuka singawulindele. I-SACP yasitshela ukuthi izongenela ukhetho. Sebesithathile isinqumo, ayikho into esingayenza ngalokho. Sizohlangana nabo okhethweni." UMbalula uthe sebeluqalile uhlelo lokuqoka abazomela i-ANC okhethweni oluzayo. "Amakhansela awenza kahle umsebenzi wawo sinethemba lokuthi azophinde akhethwe. Ngalena kwalokho sinethemba lokuthi kulo nyaka, sizothola amakhansela azosebenza ngokuzikhandla ukwedlula lawa esinawo njengamanje." Uthe uhlelo lokuqoka abazoba yizimeya bazoluphothula ngoJuni. UMbalula uthe bazokwenza okungajwayelekile kulo nyaka njengoba behlela ukuthi  abazophakanyiselwa kwesobumeya, basheshe bathathe izintambo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa Image: DOCTOR NGCOBO/INDEPENDENT NEWSPAPERS AMALUNGU e-IFP asekhululekile ukugqoka izikibha ezinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. Lesi sinyathelo kuvunyelwane ngaso emhlanganweni woMkhandlu kaZwelonke kwi-IFP, obuseMpangeni, ngeSonto. Kulo mhlangano kuphinde kwavela nokuthi ingqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi beqembu izoba ngonyaka ozayo. Isolezwe lithole ngemithombo yalo ukuthi amalungu eqembu, anikezwe imvume yokuthi afake izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. Phambilini amalungu eqembu abevunyelwe ukufaka izikibha zomsunguli weqembu, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi. Omunye umthombo uveze ukuthi ingqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi beqembu izoba ngonyaka ozayo. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, ukuqinisekisile ukuthi ingqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi be-IFP kuzwelonke nasesifundazweni izoba ngoMashi. Uthe banqume ukuthi zonke izingqungquthela zibe ngonyaka ozayo ukuze kungaphazamiseki umkhankaso wokhetho. I-IFP yagcina ukuba nengqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi beqembu ngo-2019, ngesikhathi uButhelezi edlulisela izintambo kuHlabisa. UHlengwa akazange ayiphendule imibuzo mayelana nokusetshenziswa kobuso bukaHlabisa ezikibheni. Umholi we-IFP ocele ukuba igama lakhe lingadalulwa, uthe ujabulise okwengane ngesikhathi uMkhandlu kaZwelonke uvumelana ngokuthi sezingafakwa izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. "Ngangizibuza ukuthi azigqokwa ngani izikibha ezinobuso bomuntu omdala ngoba uyena umholi weqembu. Ngijabule kabi uma umkhandlu kazwelonke uthi sesingazigqoka izikibha. UBulawayo wakhonjwa emazulwini, buka ukuthi i-IFP ikhula kanjani. Kuyasho ukuthi wangena ngendlela eqondile esikhundleni. Wanikezwa wumnikazi weqembu." Uthe: "Ulokhu eqhubekile nokwamukela amalungu amasha. Ebuholi bakhe sinongqongqoshe namaphini ongqongqoshe kuhulumeni kazwelonke. Lapha KwaZulu-Natal yithina esiphethe uhulumeni. Ngijabulise okwengane encane." Lo mholi uthe ubevele eseqalile ukugqoka isikibha esinobuso bukaHlabisa. "Le nto yezikibha ibuhlukumeza. Bese ngivele ngisigqoka. Uma ungena emhlanganweni weNkatha ububukwa ngelinye iso. Bebekuxwaya kube sengathi kungena umuntu weMKP noma owe-ANC. Ngihamba ngikhululekile, namanje ngisigqokile." Eqhuba uthe yena akasiboni isidingo sokuthi kube nengqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi. "Yini lena esiyijahile? Angisho ukuthi ayingabi khona. Kodwa mina ngithi ingqungquthela ayibe khona uma sekuwukuthi sibona sengathi lona okhona uyayizikisa inqanawe. Ngokomthetho kufanele kuze kusho yena umuntu omkhulu ukuthi usebuthaka." Uphinde wanxusa amalungu eqembu ukuba aseke uHlabisa. "Sonke nje ngothi lwethu asesekeni uBulawayo ukuze ayise i-IFP phambili."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IZIKHULU zikaMasipala waseKurhuleni, uBrigadier Julius Mkhwanazi noMnuz Kagiso Lerutla, abavele enkantolo izolo AMAPHOYISA aveze ukuthi izikhulu zikaMasipala waseKurhuleni, uBrigadier Julius Mkhwanazi noMnuz Kagiso Lerutla, baboshelwe ukuthi baqasha umuntu owaya kozenza uLerutla enkantolo. ULerutla oyimenenja yomkhandlu, kuthiwa waqasha umuntu ukuthi ayozenza yena enkantolo lapho ayebhekene khona necala lokushayela budedengu. Icala lagcina limlahla uLerutla, wagwetshwa ukuba ayokwenza umsebenzi womphakathini. Kuthiwa lo muntu owayeqashiwe waphinda wazenza uLerutla, waya kokwenza umsebenzi womphakathi okwakufanele wenziwe uLerutla. Lokhu kuvezwe okhulumela amaphoyisa kuzwelonke, uBrigadier Athlenda Mathe. UBrigadier Mathe uthe lo muntu owayeqashiwe wakhokhelwa imali ayihlukaniselana noMkhwanazi. UBrigadier Mathe akazange afune ukusho ukuthi ngabe uzoboshwa yini lo muntu owayeqashwe uLerutla. UMkhwanazi noLerutla bavele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi eBoksburg, lapho bebebhekene khona necala lenkohlakalo nelokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Icala labo lihlehliselwe uLwesine. UMkhwanazi watholwa nezinhlamvu zesibhamu ngesikhathi eboshwa. UMkhwanazi usolwa ngokusondelana nosomabhizinisi obhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusumuzi 'Cat' Matlala. Khonamanjalo: Iphoyisa elisolwa ngokusondelana noMatlala, uSergeant Fannie Nkosi, liqhubekile nokufaka isicelo sebheyili, izolo. UNkosi uboshelwe icala lokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho nokuphula imigomo yokugcinwa kwezibhamu. Isinqumo esicelweni sakhe sebheyili sizokhishwa kusasa.Naye uMatlala uvele kafushane enkantolo izolo, lapho kunqunywe khona ukuthi asuswe ejele eliKwaZulu-Natal, iBongweni, ayogcinwa eKgosi Mampuru.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UBUKEKA usekude ukuphela umdonsiswano kwiNFP, njengoba kulindeleke ukuthi akuphonsele inselelo ukuxoshwa kwakhe kuleli qembu, uMphathiswa wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi KwaZulu-Natal, uNksz Mbali Shinga. Umthombo osondelene noNksz Shinga, uthe uzosiphonsela inselelo isinqumo sekomiti esithi akaxoshwe eqenjini. Isinqumo sokuxoshwa kukaNksz Shinga simenyezelwe uNobhala Jikelele weNFP obambile, uMnuz Sunset Xaba, izolo. UNksz Shinga ulahlwe yicala lokushaya indiva umyalelo weqembu wokuba aseke isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaNdunankulu wesifundazwe, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, esasifakwe yiMKP. UXaba uthe uNksz Shinga unikeziwe ithuba lokuthi azikhalele ukuthi kungani kungafanele anikezwe isigwebo esiqinile kodwa wakhetha ukungalisebenzisi lelo thuba. "Wacela ukuba alulelwe isikhathi sokuthi enze izethulo. Wacela ukuba anikezwe umnqamulajuqu wangoMashi 22. Usihlalo wekomiti wachitha isicelo sakhe kodwa wamlulela kwaze kwaba u-Ephreli 17. Akazange alisebenzise leli thuba anikwa lona." UXaba uthe osekungasindisa uNksz Shinga ukuthi ayozikhalela phambi kwekomiti elibheke ukusebenza kwansuku zonke kwiNFP. Ukoxoshwa kukaNksz Shinga kusho ukuthi uzophunyukwa yisikhundla sokuba uMphathiswa nesokuba ilungu lesiShayamthetho. UXaba uthe luzoqala maduze uhlelo lokuqoka ozongena esikhundleni sikaNksz Shinga. Umthombo osondelene noNksz Shinga, uthe luselude ukhalo oluzohanjwa. Umthombo uthe uNksz Shinga ngeke ajahe ukuya enkantolo. "Umthetho weqembu umnika igunya lokuthi aphonsele inselelo isinqumo ekomitini elibhekele ukusebenza kwansuku zonke kwiNFP. Uzoqala ayilwe ngaphakathi ngaphambi kokuthi agijimele enkantolo." Imizamo yokuthola ukuphawula kukaNksz Shinga ayizange iphumelele njengoba ucingo lwakhe belukhala lungabanjwa futhi engazange awuphendule umyalezo awuthunyelwe. Sekunesikhathi eside uNksz Shinga elengelwa yizembe. Ubuholi beqembu baqale bazama ukumkhipha esiShayamthetho ngonyaka owedlule, lapho babuphakamisa khona ukufaka umholi weqembu, uMnuz Ivan Barnes, esikhundleni sakhe. Lo mzamo awuzange uphumelele njengoba kwatholakala ukuthi ubuholi beqembu, abuzange bulandele imigomo ngesikhathi buzama ukuhoxisa uNksz Shinga. Emva kwalokho ubuholi bamisa ubulungu bukaNksz Shinga kodwa bahluleka ukummisa emsebenzini wakhe wokuba ilungu lesiShayamthetho. Ubuholi beNFP bufuna iqembu lihoxe kuhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe KwaZulu-Natal futhi kade bayalela uNksz Shinga ukuba asule esikhundleni sokuba uMphathiswa.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UNDUNANKULU waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, neNkosi Mabhudu Israel Tembe, eMkhosini woMthayi INKOSI Mabhudu Israel Tembe inesifiso sokuthi uMkhosi woMthayi udlondlobale uze ufike ezingeni lemicimbi emikhulu ehlonishaywo efana neVodacom Durban July kanye nomcimbi womculo i-Cape Town International Jazz Festival. Inkosi ithe nakuba umkhosi uhlukile ukuneDurban July kanye nomcimbi wejazz, iyafisa ukuthi umkhosi nawo ubalwa kanye nale micimbi uma kukhulunywa ngemicimbi ethuthukisa umnotho. Ikusho lokhu ngesikhathi ixoxa neSolezwe. UMkhosi woMthayi ugujwa minyaka yonke lapho khona abesifazane besuke belethe imikhiqizo eyakhiwe ngamaganu okubalwa kuyo notshwala obuvutshelwe ngamaganu. Inkosi ithe ifuna ukuthi umkhosi uthuthukise umnotho wendawo. "Nakuba umkhosi ungafani neDurban July, kodwa iDurban July uma ifikile eThekwini isho ukuthi izoshiya cishe u-R1 billion emnothweni ngesonto nje elilodwa. Ijazz eCape Town nayo yenza into efanayo. Siyafisa ke ukuthi nalapha emakhaya kube khona umnotho osalayo ozokwenza ukuthi abantu abaqashisa ngezindawo zokulala bakwazi ukuziphilisa kuze kube kuphinde kufika esikhathi lapho kwanda abantu abaqasha izindawo zokulala." Inkosi ithe ifuna ukuthi kube nemibukiso ezokuba khona uma kunomkhosi. "Sifuna ukuba nombukiso lapho sizobambisana noMnyango wezoLimo. Sifuna ukubona ukuthi abantu bengasizakala kwelimo. Inkampani yezimoto enkulu yezimoto, iToyota, nayo izokwenza  umbukiso. Izimoto zabo zithengwa kakhulu endaweni. Banesibopho sokubuyisela emphakathini. Sizobheka ukuthi yini abangayenzela umphakathi." Inkosi ithe ifuna ukuthi baphinde balekelele abantu abadayisa imikhiqizo ukuthi bakwazi ukudayisela amazwe angaphandle. Inkosi ithe ifuna nokuthi baqinise nasemnothweni wasolwandle ikakhulukazi ukudoba. "Kusenomnotho ongathintiwe lapha kwezokuvakasha, umnotho wasolwandle. Lento isakhulunywa nje, isebenzela kakhulu iWestern Cape lapho kudotshwa kakhulu ofishi. Lo mnotho unamandla kakhulu. Nathi siyafisa ukusondeza ochwepheshe." Inkosi inamava kwezokuvakasha kanye nezokuthuthukiswa komnotho njengoba isike yaba usihlalo wamabhodi ezinhlangano zezokuvakasha. Inkosi ike yaba usihlalo webhodi leSimangaliso Wetland Park, ike yaba iphini likasihlalo webhodi, futhi ike yaba ilungu lebhodi lezeMvelo KZN Wildlife.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: IMEYA kaMasipala wesiFunda uMgungundlovu, uMnuz Mzi Zuma UMASIPALA wesiFunda uMgungundlovu udingisa umshayeli weloli yamanzi obanjwe oqotsheni edayisa amanzi. IMeya, uMnuz Mzi Zuma, ithe abasafuni ukuphinde babone lo msebenzi esebenza ezindaweni ezingaphansi koMgungundlovu. Umsebenzi uqashwe yinkampani ehlinzeka umasipala ngezimoto zamanzi. UZuma uthe utshele izikhulu zomasipala ukuba zitshele inkampani eqashe lo msebenzi ukuthi akasadingakali eMgungundlovu. Lo msebenzi ubanjwe edayisa amanzi eMaqongqo, ngaphansi koMasipala waseMkhambathini. Ngesikhathi ebanjwa edayisa amanzi, bekufanele ngabe uhlinzeka amanzi ezindaweni ezingaphansi koMasipala waseRichmond. IMaqongqo neRichmond ziqhelelene ngebanga elingaphezu kuka-60 KM kanti lezi zindawo zihlukaniswe yizindawo ezingaphansi koMasipala waseMsunduzi. Umshayeli ubanjwe ethela amanzi emzini yabantu ekhethekile. UZuma uthe umuntu uma efuna ukuthelelwa amanzi emzini wakhe, kufanele awathenge amanzi kwamasipala bese umasipala uthumela imoto ezomthelela leso sibalo samanzi asithengile. Uthe imizi ebithelelwa amanzi ilo mshayeli, ibingazange iwathenge amanzi kumasipala. UZuma uthe abashayeli abadayisa amanzi benza ukuthi abantu bagcine bengawatholi amanzi ngenxa yokuthi abashayeli bawayisa kulabo abasuke bewathengile. "Kunabantu abangawatholi amanzi. Ngesikhathi ngikhuluma nabantu, kukhona abathe kunamasonto amabili bengathelelwa amanzi. Nina ninemizi yenu eniyithelela amanzi. Abantu uma bebona imoto yamanzi, baphuma nezigubhu namabhakede, nina niyabadlula ngoba kunemizi eniyithelela amanzi. Umphakathi wonke awunawo amanzi, le mizi ethandwa inina ithola amanzi." UZuma uthe isenzo salo msebenzi senza ukuthi umasipala ulahlekelwe imali. "Usuqhuba ibhizinisi lakho. Ithina esithwala izindleko zebhizinisi lakho. Thina sikhokha imali wena uziqhubela ibhizinisi lakho. Sikhokhela ukuthi umphakathi uthole amanzi, nina nihambisa amanzi lapho enazi khona ukuthi nithola imali." UZuma uthe lo mshayeli uzodala ukuthi abantu abangawatholi amanzi badinelwe umasipala. "Ulindiwe eRichmond kodwa wena usuzakhele uhlelo lwakho ukuthi uzosebenza kanjani. Sizothukwa abantu eRichmond, ulindiwe eRichmond. Wena uyashushuluza yonke le ndlela. Le moto ohamba ngayo ine-tracker. Umqashi wakho uzofuna ukuthi simkhokhele imali eningi uma ebuka ibanga olihambile. Uthunywe eRichmond wena uziyela lapho othanda khona. Nakhona lana awuzile ukuzosiza abantu uzoziqhubela ibhizinisi lakho." UZuma uthe inkampani eqashe lo msebenzi kuzofanele imtholele umsebenzi kwenye indawo. "Asifuni ukuphinde sikubone la eMgungundlovu. Akuyona indawo yokuganga lena."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ISILO uMisuZulu kaZwelithini Image: SIPHAMANDLA MBHELE | KZN DSAC LIHLALELWE ifulaha lomsebenzi ithimba elijutshwe iSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini ukuba liyonxenxa amaqembu ezepolitiki ameleleke ePhalamende ukuba aseke isiphakamiso sokuba kuchibiyelwe umthetho olawula ukuphathwa kwesikhwama esigade umhlaba kaZulu, iNgonyama Trust. Ithimba eliqokwe yiMbube lizokuba nemihlangano namaqembu ameleleke ePhalamende ngesonto elizayo. Amaqembu avume ukuhlangana nethimba i-ANC, MKP, DA, EFF, IFP, PA, ACDP, PA, Bosa, Rise Mzansi, PAC, ActionSA, FF Plus ne-UDM. Kuzobe kuphekwa kuthululwa njengoba le mihlangano izokuba ngoLwesine nangoLwesihlanu. Ithimba kuzofanele ligawule libheke lapha ePhalamende ngoba lolu daba luke lwaphathwa kuleli zinga kanti imiphumela ayibanga njengesifiso seNdlunkulu. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi iPhalamende lake lajuba ithimba elaliholwa owayengumengameli, uMnuz Kgalema Motlanthe. Umbiko waleli thimba waphakamisa ukuthi kuqedwe ngeNgonyama Trust. Amaqembu ezepolitiki amaningi ayekhona ePhalamende ngaleso sikhathi azwakalisa ukuzeseka izincomo zombiko wango-2017. Kepha lo mbiko wagcina uphelela emoyeni emva kokubhoka kukaZulu uholwa yiSilo uGoodwill Zwelithini kaBhekuzulu. Akuyona imfihlo ukuthi amaqembu amaningi ezepolitiki awajabule ngendlela okuphethwe ngayo iNgonyama Trust. Amanye avame ukuzwakalisa ukuthi umhlaba ongaphansi kwalesi sikhwama kufanele kube ngokahulumeni. Okuningi ukushaya amakhala kusuke kuthinta izimali lapho izikhulu zeNgonyama Trust zibizwa ukuba zizophendula ePhalamende ngokusetshenziswa kwezimali. Ithimba leNdlulamithi liya ePhalamende ngesikhathi esibukhunyana lapho lingekho iqembu elaphumelela ukhetho ngamalengiso. Lesi simo senza umsebenzi wethimba ube nzima njengoba kuzofanele lizame ukubonisana nezicagogo ngezicagogo zamaqembu ameleleke ePhalamende. Lowo akuwona umsebenzi olula. Kunzima ukuphasisa ukushintshwa komthetho ePhalamende ngoba kwawona amaqembu abusa ngokubambisana abuye engavumelani ewodwa. Lokhu kwabonakala kakhulu ngesikhathi kunesiphakamiso sokwenyusa ngo-2% intela eyengezwa empahleni ethengwayo. Sagcina singaphumelelanga lesi esiphakamiso ngenxa yokungavumelani kwamaqembu abusa ngokubambisana. Ithimba kuzofanele lizilungiselele ukubhekana nazo zonke lezi zimo. AMANDLA KAZULU NESILO Kungenzeka nokho ukuthi lesi simo sivune ithimba ngoba amaqembu amaningi ezepolitiki aseyakugwema ukuphikisana neSilo bukhoma. Lokhu kungenxa yokwesabela ukuthi ukuphikisana neSilo kwenza ukuthi abantu baKwaZulu-Natal bengalivoteli lelo qembu eliphikisana noMlomo ongathethi manga. Lona unyaka wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya, kwazi bani mhlawumbe ithimba lingase liyinqobe le mpi ngokusetshenzelwa yisihe osopolitiki ababa naso ngale sizini. Injongo enkulu yomhlangano ukuba kunxenxwe amaqembu ezepolitiki ukuthi aseke isiphakamiso sokuba kuchibiyelwe umthetho iNgonyama Trust Act ukuze iMbube izonikwa amandla okuqoka amalungu ebhodi. Umthetho okhona njengamanje unikeza uNgqongqoshe wezoMhlaba amandla okuqoka amalungu ebhodi. Akusiniki ukuthula iSilo ukunikwa kukangqongqoshe amandla okuqoka amalungu ebhodi. Amalungu ebhodi akhona njengamanje abhekene ngeziqu zamehlo neSilo. Ukube kuya ngayo iMbube ngabe kade la malungu ebhodi axoshwa. IMbube ikhala ngokuthi amalungu ebhodi awayihloniphi futhi awafuni ukuyamukela njengoSihlalo webhodi. La malungu aqokwa ngesikhathi uMnyango usaphethwe uNkk Thoko Didiza, osenguSomlomo wePhalamende. Ungqongqoshe ophethe, uMnuz Mzwanele Nyhontso, usezame kaningi ukuxosha amalungu ebhodi. Mumva nje uNyhontso uzame ukuxosha amalungu ngenxa yokuthi sekusule ubuthaphuthaphu amanye nokwenza abasele bangabi yisibalo esanele ukuthi bakwazi ukwenza umsebenzi.  Amalungu ebhodi anikela eNkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu eyophonsela inselelo isinqumo sikaNyhontso. Nebala inkantolo yakhipha isivimbelo sesikhashana esichitha isinqumo sikaNyhontso sokuxosha amalungu ebhodi. KUBOSHELWE IZINGQWEQWE Okunye okufunwa iiMbube ukuthi iNgonyama Trust iwele ngaphansi kukahulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal esikhundleni sikahulumeni kazwelonke. Ithimba leMbube eliholwa uNdunankulu kaZulu, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi, libophele izingqweqwe zemikhakha eyahlukene, ikakhulu kwezomthetho. Phakathi kwamanye amafolosi, kukhona iJaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi uMjabuliseni Isaac Madondo, nommeli wasemaJajini, u-Advocate Tembeka Ngcukaitobi. Amakhosi asesifundazweni azwakalise ukuyeseka imizamo yeMbube yokuba kuchibiyelwe umthetho olawula iNgonyama Trust. Amakhosi athe afuna ukuthi iMbube kube yiyo ngokubambisana nawo elawula iNgonyama Trust. Akusho lokhu emhlanganweni wawo okhethekile obungoLwesibili. Umhlangano ubuhanjelwe amakhosi aqhamuka kuzo zonke izifunda. Kuleli sonto iMbube ihlangane noNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, lapho igcizelele khona ukubaluleka kokuba kubuyiswe uzinzo kwiNgonyama Trust. Okhulumela iSilo, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uthe iSilo siyalele uNtuli ukuba axhumane noNyhontso ukuze bezoqhamuka neqhinga lokuxazulula izinkinga ezibhekene neNgonyama Trust. "Lokhu kubalwa ukubhekana nezinselelo zokuphatha, ukuqinisekisa ukuthi kunomthetho ocacile, nokubuyisela ukusebenza okugcwele kwalesi sikhungo ngendlela evikela izimfuno zesizwe samaZulu nokuqinisekisa ukwethenjwa ngumphakathi. "ISilo sigcizelele ukuthi ukusebenzisana phakathi kwehhovisi likaNdunankulu, uMnyango wezoMhlaba nehhovisi lomphathi weNgonyama Trust. INgonyama iphinde yathi i-Ingonyama Trust iseyimpahla ebalulekile esizweni nasesifundazweni, edinga ukuphathwa ngobunono, obala, nangokuvumelana nawo wonke amazinga kahulumeni."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UNOBHALA Jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula UNOBHALA Jikelele we-ANC, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula, usole umndeni wosomabhizinisi abafunelwa amacala kuleli, abakwaGupta, njengongqondongqondo emkhankasweni weMKP wokhetho lwango-2024, owawudla lubi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. UMbalula uthe abakwaGupta yibona abapheka umkhankaso weMKP, owawushisa kakhulu enkundleni yezokuxhumana i-Tiktok. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma kwiLekgotla ye-ANC Youth League, eqhubeka eMangaung, eFree State. AbakwaGupta kusolwa ukuthi babezitamuzela kumathenda kuleli ngesikhathi umholi weMKP, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, engumengameli wezwe. Lo mndeni walifulathela elakuleli emva kokunindeka ezinsolweni ezenziwa kwiKhomishini eyayiphenya izinsolo zokuLawulwa koMbuso yiDlanzana. UMbalula uthe ubheke ukuthi iMKP iphinde ivimbanise kuzo zonke izinkundla zokuxhumana njengoba ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya seluseMome. "Iqembu likaZuma lalimandla kuTiktok ngoba umkhankaso walo wawuphushwa abakwaGupta. Sebecwilile manje kodwa uzobabona bazobuya njengoba sibheke okhethweni. Uzoze uzibuze ukuthi bavukaphi la bantu? Indlela abanamandla ngayo, benza uze ukhohlwe ukuthi uZuma akuyena owayephethe izwe ngesikhathi kunezinsolo zokulawulwa koMbuso yidlanzana." I-MKP yamangaza abaningi okhethweni lwango-2024, njengoba yaba yiqembu lesithathu ngobukhulu ePhalamende. UMbalula uthe ukugxeka kwabo iMKP ngesikhathi kubhekwe okhethweni, akuzange kubasize. "Abanye bethu bacabanga ukuthi uma begxeka uZuma, sizothola amavoti. Ukugxeka uZuma akusisizi, empeleni ukumgxeka kwenza isimo sethu sibe sibi kakhulu." UMbalula uthe abaholi be-ANC nabo kufanele bazilungiselele ukulwa impi eqhubeka ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. "Sibaningi kabi singabaholi be-ANC. Kungani kungethina esimandla lapha ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngoba ithina esibaningi? Abantu bakholelwa izinto ezikhulunywa abantu abagxeka i-ANC ngenxa yokuthi thina asiphawuli ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Asikhulumi ngezinto ezinhle ezenziwa uhulumeni, nokwenza ukuthi abantu bakholelwe kulaba abagxeka uhulumeni." UMbalula uthe kufanele bazibambe ziqine njengoba kubhekwe okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya. "Akuzukuba lula okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya." Okuzokwenza ukuthi kube nzima kakhulu kwi-ANC kulolu khetho ukujikelwa idlelandawonye layo, i-SACP, elinqume ukungenela ukhetho ngokuzimela. I-SAPC ibiyaye iseke i-ANC uma kunokhetho kodwa kulolu khetho inqume ukuzimela. Izolo, i-ANC ibibambe imihlangano ezifundeni ezahlukene, lapho ibiyazisa khona amalungu ayo ngesinqumo esithathwe isigungu esiphezulu ngodaba lokungenela ukhetho kwamaKhomanisi. Namhlanje abaholi be-ANC, bazochazela abezindaba ngesinqumo esithathiwe.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMENGAMELI wezwe uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa IPHALAMENDE lichithe isicelo se-African Transformation Movement (ATM), sokuba kuqalwe uhlelo lokukhipha uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa esikhundleni. I-ATM ibifuna ukuthi kuqalwe uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni emva kombiko wophiko olugada ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa, i-Ipid, oluveze ukuthi abaqaphi bakaRamaphosa baphula imigomo ngesikhathi bephenya ngokuntshontshwa kwezindodla zemali epulazi likaRamaphosa. Umbiko we-Ipid osanda kunekelwa izwe, ukhombe ngenjumbane izikhulu ezazigada uRamaphosa ngesikhathi kuntshontshwa imali epulazini lakhe ngo-2021. IPhalamende lake lwaqala uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni ngo-2022, ngesikhathi kuvela izinsolo okukuqala. Nokho iPhalamende lachitha umbiko wethimba elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo, okwasho ukuthi uRamaphosa uyaphunyula esiphakamisweni sokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. I-ATM iyona eyayifake isicelo sokuthi kuqalwe uphenyo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni esachithwa. Emva kokudedelwa kombiko we-Ipid, i-ATM, iphinde yabhalela iPhalamende icela ukuthi kuvuswe lolu daba. USomlomo wePhalamende, uNkk Thoko Didiza, uthe iPhalamende livele selaqeda ngalolu daba. Ukusho lokhu empendulweni yencwadi ayithumele i-ATM. "Uzokhumbula ukuthi ngesikhathi ufaka isicelo sokuqala, wawufuna kuphenywe izinsolo ezifanayo. IPhalamende lanquma ukuqoka ithimba elalizophenya. Sekuwumlando ukuthi iPhalamende lanquma ukuchitha umbiko wethimba." UNkk Didiza uthe iPhalamende alikwazi ukubuye liqale phansi liphenye lezi zinsolo, ngaphandle uma kungaba nesinqumo senkantolo esiphoqa ukuthi kuqalwe phansi uphenyo. I-EFF yaphonsela inselelo ukuchithwa kombiko wethimba eliholwa uNgcobo. INkantolo yoMthethosisekelo kulindeleke ukuthi ikhiphe isinqumo sayo maduze. Umholi we-ATM, uMnuz Vuyo Zungula, uthe kuyabadumaza ukuchithwa kwesicelo sabo. UZungula uthe uNkk Didiza usebenzise izaba ukuchitha isicelo sabo. Uthe bazoqhubeka nokulwela ukuthi uRamaphosa aphendule ngodaba lwasePhala Phala.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ISIKHULU samaPhoyisa kuMasipala waseKurhuleni, uBrigadier Julius Mkhwanazi SIZOVELA enkantolo nozakwabo ocashunwe ngamaphoyisa, isikhulu samaPhoyisa kuMasipala waseKurhuleni esimisiwe, uBrigadier Julius Mkhwanazi. UMkhwanazi oboshwe ngempelasonto, uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi eBoksburg, namhlanje. UMkhwanazi usolwa ngokusondelana nosomabhizinisi obhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusumuzi "Cat" Matlala. Kusolwa ukuthi uMkhwanazi wagunyaza ukuthi izimoto zikaMatlala zifakwe amalambu aluhlaza futhi kwavela kwiKhomishini eholwa yiJaji Mbuyiseli Madlanga, ukuthi uMkhwanazi kunemali ayeyithola kuMatlala. Ngaphandle kwalokho, uMkhwanazi uphinde abhekane nezinsolo okubalwa kuzo nezokufihla ubufakazi ecaleni lokufa komuntu. UMkhwanazi ushaqwe ngamaphoyisa kungakapheli izinsuku ezingaki eqede ukwethula ubufakazi phambi kweKhomishini kaMadlanga, lapho ebephekwe khona ngebhodwe elincane. Okhulumela amaphoyisa, uBrigadier Athlenda Mathe, uthe uMkhwanazi uboshwe yithimba eliphenya amacala asuka kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga. UMkhwanazi ubhekene necala lenkohlakalo nelokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. UBrigadier Mathe uthe ukuboshwa kukaMkhwanazi akuhlangene nobufakazi obethulwe kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga, wathi futhi akuhlangene nophenyo obeluqhutshwa uphiko olugade ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa, i-Ipid. Uphenyo lwe-Ipid lwaphakamisa ukuthi amaphoyisa kaMasipala waseKurhuleni, asolakala ecaleni lokufa komuntu, kufanele athathelwe izinyathelo. UMkhwanazi naye uyathinteka kuleli cala. UBrigadier Mathe uthe kukhona abanye abasolwa abasazokhalelwa amasongo kaSigonyela. "Ithimba liyaqhubeka nomsebenzi walo. Kukhona abanye abasolwa ithimba elisezithendeni zabo. Amacala aphenywa asukela ezinsolweni zenkohlakalo ophikweni lwamaphoyisa kaMasipala waseKurhuleni." Izolo, kuphinde kwaboshwa esinye isikhulu sakuMasipala waseKurhuleni. UBrigadier Mathe uthe lesi sikhulu siboshwe sisesikhumulweni sezindiza i-OR Tambo International Airport. Sibhekene necala lenkohlakalo, ukukhwabanisa nokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. "Sizovela enkantolo kusasa (namhlanje)."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umholi we-EFF uJulius Malema Image: Abongile Ginya KUHLWE emini kumholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ngesikhathi egwetshwa iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele. UMalema ulahlwe icala lokuqhumisa isibhamu. Isinqumo sikhishwe iNkantolo yeMantshi e-East London. IMantshi Twanet Oliver iphinde yagweba uMalema iminyaka emibili ebhadla ejele ngecala lokuphula imithetho elawula ukuphathwa kwezibhamu. Lezigwebo uzozidonsa ngesikhathi esisodwa. UMalema uphinde wahlawuliswa o-R20 000 noma isigwebo sezinyanga eziyisithupha ebhadla ejele kwamanye amacala amathathu amlahlile. Inkantolo inqume ukuthi uMalema aphucwe igunya lokuphatha isibhamu. UMalema ufake isicelo sokuphonsela inselelo isinqumo senkantolo. UMalema waqhumisa isibhamu ngesikhathi kunomcimbi wokubungaza iminyaka eyishumi kwasungulwa i-EFF.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UNDUNANKULU waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli UNDUNANKULU waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, uthe kuyamkhathaza ukungathathelwa ngokushesha izinyathelo zokuqondiswa kobugwegwe kwezikhulu zeminyango kahulumeni wesifundazwe, ezisolwa enkohlakalweni kanye neziphula imithetho yokuphathwa kwemali. UNtuli uthe ukungathathelwa ngokushesha izinyathelo kwezikhulu ezisolwa enkohlakalweni, kwenza ukuthi abantu bangawuthembi uhulumeni. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma emhlanganweni weKhabhinethi yesifundazwe okhethekile, obuhanjelwe yizo zonke izinhloko zeminyango kahulumeni wesifundazwe. Esitatimendeni, uNtuli uthe bafuna ukuthi bathathelwe izinyathelo ngokushesha  abangawulandeli umthetho wokuphathwa kwemali. "Ngesikhathi singena emandleni, sazibophezela ngokuthi sizoyiphatha ngobuqotho imali yomphakathi. Siphelile isikhathi senkohlakalo, ukukhwabanisa kanye nesabantu abahlulwa wukwenza umsebenzi wabo. Ukungathathelwa ngokushesha izinyathelo kwabasolwa enkohlakalweni, kwenza ngibe nomuzwa wokuthi abantu bazobona sengathi bayayekwa abenza okuphambene nomthetho. Lokhu kuzokwenza ukuthi abantu bangawuthembi uhulumeni wesifundazwe. Akufanele sigcine ngokukhuluma nje, kodwa kufanele sihambe emazwini esawasho ngesikhathi sizibophezela ekuholeni ngobuqotho." UNtuli uthe uyazi ukuthi kwesinye isikhathi ukuqondiswa ubugwegwe kwezikhulu kubanjezelwa wukuthi kunemigomo okufanele ilandelwe uma kunohlelo lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe. "Kufanele kube nezingxoxo nezinye izinhlaka ezifana neSpecial Investigating Unit, ukuze kubonakale ukuthi zingaxazululwa kanjani izinkinga ezibambezela ukuqondiswa kobugwegwe. Kufanele kube khona indlela yokusebenzisana ezokwenza ukuthi bathathelwe izinyathelo ngokushesha abathintekayo." UNtuli uphinde watshela izikhulu zeminyango ukuba ziqinisekise ukuthi bakhokhelwa zingakapheli izinsuku ezingu-30, osomabhizinisi abasuke benikwe amathenda. "Umthetho obekwe wuMnyango kaMgcinimafa uthi kufanele iminyango kahulumeni ikhokhele usomabhizinisi zingakapheli izinsuku ezingu-30, ngaphandle uma kunezizathu ezivimba ukuthi umnyango uhlangabezane nalo mnqamulajuqu. Yonke iminyango kahulumeni kufanele ilwele ukuthi ibakhokhela bonke osomabhizinisi zingakapheli izinsuku ezibekiwe. Ukukhokha ngesikhathi kweminyango kahulumeni, kuzokwenza ukuthi amabhizinisi amancane angaphazamiseki kuphinde kudaleke namathuba emisebenzi."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: BAKHALA ngokugqigqela ubala emahhovisi oMnyango wezaseKhaya oLundi, abathi sekusizwa abantu abayisithupha kuphela ngosuku kulandela ukuphephuka kwamahhovisi oMnyango asesiShayamthetho esidala. Abantu basoLundi bathe kuhlula noma sebelala khona emahhovisi oMnyango kodwa kuba nzima ukuthi bathole usizo. Uphahla esiShayamthetho esidala lwaphephuka ngoFebhuwari, wangonyaka owedlule. UMnyango wezeMisebenzi yoMphakathi wanquma ukuthi akuphephile ukuthi abasebenzi baqhubeke nokusebenzela kulesi sakhiwo. Isikhulu esiphezulu eMnyangweni wezaseKhaya KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Cyril Mncwabe, sithe ukuphephuka kophahla kwaphoqa ukuthi basebenzele emalolini oMnyango ngenxa yokuthi uMnyango wezeMisebenzi yoMphakathi ubungakabatholeli enye indawo abazosebenzela kuyo. UMncwabe uthe ukusebenzela emalolini kuphoqe ukuthi banciphise umthamo wabantu ababasizayo. UMncwabe uthe ngosuku basiza abantu abaphakathi kuka-34 no-40 kanti phambilini bebekwazi ukusiza abantu ababalelwa ku-100. "Njengoba sisebenzela emalolini, asikwazi ukubafaka bonke abasebenzi boMnyango emalolini ngenxa yesikhala. Njengoba abasebenzi besebenzela emalolini, kufanele sibheke izinto ezifana nesimo sezulu nezindlu zangasese." UMncwabe uthe bafuna ukuthi uMnyango wezeMisebenzi yoMphakathi ubavumele ukuthi bazitholele bona indawo yokuhlala. "Udaba lwasoLundi lubucayi kakhulu. Siyaxolisa kubantu basoLundi abangakwazi ukusizakala. Siyazama ngakho konke okusemandleni ethu ukuthola indawo esizosebenza kuyo ngokukhululeka. Isimo sibi impela oLundi." Usotswebhu weNFP eZululand, uMnuz Siphamandla Ntombela, uthe abanye abantu sebelala khona emahhovisi kodwa abanye bagcine bengasizakala khona kunjalo. "Kufanele uvuke ezintathakusa ukuze uzozibeka emathubeni okusizakala. Abantu bahamba amabanga ango-70 km, kunabantu abasuka eMthonjaneni ngoba awekho amahhovisi khona, kufika abantu abasuka koBabanango naKwaCeza. Bagcina bebuyela emuva bengasizakalanga. Abanye bagcina belala ezihlotsheni." UNtombela uthe abantu abahlupheka kakhulu ilabo abafuna omazisi. "Izingane ezifunda u-matric zisenkingeni enkulu. Ezinye ziyalova ezikoleni kodwa futhi zigcine zingasizakalanga." UNtombela unxuse ukuthi uMnyango uzame ukusebenzela ezinkantolo zamakhosi nasemahhovisi omasipala. "Izinkantolo zamakhosi zihlezi zivuliwe, abakhulume namakhosi. Okuhle ukuthi izinkantolo zamakhosi ziseduze nabantu." Okhulumela uMnyango wezeMisebenzi yoMphakathi KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Steve Bhengu, akazange ayiphendule imibuzo ayithunyelwe.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: South Africa - Pretoria - 20 March 2026. Madlanga Commission of Inquiry witness USergeant Fannie Nkosi INGXENYE enkulu yomholo wephoyisa elisolwa enkohlakalweni, uSergeant Fannie Nkosi, iphelela ekukhokheleni umuzi walo kanokusho. UNkosi kuvele ukuthi unomuzi kaR1.5 million, awukhokhela u-R7 500 njalo ngenyanga. UNkosi uhola u-R16 500 ngenyanga. Le mininingwane uyinekele inkantolo ngesikhathi ecela ibheyili eNkantolo yeMantshi ePitoli, izolo. UNkosi akazange aveze ukuthi ikhona yini enye imali ayithola eceleni ngaphandle komholo. Usolwa ngokusondelana kanye nokwamukela imali kosomabhizinisi ababhekene namacala, uMnuz Vusumuzi 'Cat' Matlala, noMnuz Katiso 'KT' Molefe. UNkosi uboshelwe icala lokuphula imigomo yokugcinwa kwezibhamu, ukutholakala nezinhlamvu ezingekho emthethweni, ukutholakala namadokodo amacala asavalwa, ukutholakala neziqhumane kanye nokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Uwaphikile wonke amacala abekwa wona, wasola uMbuso ngokumbophela amanqina enyathi. "Ngiyawaphika wonke amacala engibekwa wona. Zonke izibhamu engatholwa nazo zazisesisefweni. Kungamampunge ukuthi ezinye izibhamu zatholwa embhedeni." Encwadini efungelwe, uNkosi uthe izinhlamvu atholwa nazo yizinhlamvu azinikwa emsebenzini. "Awukho umthetho othi kufanele ngibuyisele emuva zonke izinhlamvu engazinikwa wumqashi uma ngimiswa emsebenzini. Ngesikhathi ngimiswa emsebenzini, angitshelwanga ukuthi angibuyise izinhlamvu. Ngatshelwa ukuthi angibuyise isibhamu nekhadi lokungena emsebenzini. Bekunzima ukuthi ngibuyisele izinhlamvu emuva ngoba ngesikhathi ngimiswa emsebenzini, ngatshelwa ukuthi angingalubhadi lapho ngisebenzela khona." Amadokodo atholwa nawo uthe kwakufanele abe kuye ngoba uyingxenye yethimba eliphenya amacala okubanjwa inkunzi kwezimoto ezithutha imali. Ukuphikile ukuthi watholwa nesiqhumane. UMbuso uthe ufuna uNkosi anganikwa ibheyili wathi angase abalekele icala uma ededelwa. UMbuso uthe uNkosi uyingozi ngenxa yokuthi usebenzisana nemigulukudu. Ukulalelwa kwesicelo sebheyili kuhlehliselwe uMsombuluko. Khonamanjalo kuhlehlele isonto elizayo ukulalelwa kwesicelo sebheyili, somlisa osolwa ngokubulala ufakazi owethula ubufakazi ngokuyimfihlo kwikhomishini ephenya izinsolo ezenziwa wuKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. UMnuz Matipandile Sotheni, uvele kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi eBrakpan izolo, lapho ebhekene khona necala lokubulala uMnuz Marius Van Der Merwe. Ukulalelwa kwesicelo sakhe sebheyili kuhlehliselwe u-Ephreli 24.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ISILO uMisuZulu kaZwelithini Image: SIPHAMANDLA MBHELE | KZN DSAC SELUPHINDE lwavutshelwa kabusha uthuthuva lombango wesihlalo sobukhosi bukaZulu, obekucatshangwa ukuthi usuphelile kulandela ukuvumbuka kwenselelo ephonswa uMntwana uMbonisi kaBhekuzulu, ofuna iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ibuyekeze isinqumo esavuna ubukhosi beSilo uMisuzulu kaZwelithini. Ukuvuswa kwaleli cala, kubuyisela iNdlunkulu kwesinye isibindolo sempicabadala yomdonsiswano ngeSihlalo, oklaye abaNtwana bayinhlakanhlaka esabekayo. UMntwana uMbonisi kanye nabanye abaNtwana baseNdlunkulu, bafuna ukuthi iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo, iguqule isinqumo sayo esivuna isinqumo sikaMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, sokuvuma ukuqokwa kweSilo. INkantolo yoMthethosisekelo yachitha isicelo sikaMntwana uMbonisi nabanye sokuba baphonsele inselelo isinqumo seNkantolo yaMacala aDlulisiwe, esivuna uRamaphosa, ngoFebhuwari. Ngesikhathi kuphuma lesi sinqumo, abaningi babezitshela ukuthi sebefike kwangqingetshe labo abaphikisa ukuqokwa kweSilo njengoba iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ingeyokugcina. Manje uMntwana uMbonisi nahambisana nabo, bafuna ukuthi inkantolo ibavumele ukuthi baphonsele inselelo isinqumo seNkantolo yaMacala aDlulisiwe. Encwadini efungelwe, uMntwana uMbonisi usayibhedlile indaba yokuthi akuzange kulandelwe imigomo ngesikhathi kuhlonzwa iSilo. "URamaphosa kwakungafanele avume ukuqokwa kweSilo ngoba wayazi ukuthi kunombango wesihlalo sobukhosi. Kwakunezikhalazo ngesikhathi uRamaphosa evuma ukuqokwa kweSilo." UMntwana uMbonisi uthe kuningi okuzokonakala uma bengagcina bengavunyelwanga ukuthi benze izethulo. "Lana sikhuluma ngodaba olubalulekile oluthinta isizwe esikhulu. Abantu babona iNkantolo eNkulu ePitoli ichitha isinqumo sikaRamaphosa sokuvuma ukuqokwa kweSilo, baphinde babona iNkantolo yaMacala aDlulisiwe ivuna uRamaphosa. Manje abantu bafuna ukubona isiphetho." Uthe: "UMntwana uMbonisi uwumfowabo weSilo esakhothama, uGoodwill Zwelithini kaBhekuzulu. UMntwana uMbonisi weseka uMntwana uBuzabazi Mbuzeli kaZwelithini embangweni wesihlalo." Phakathi kwabantwana abafake isicelo kukhona abaNtwana beSilo sakwaKhethomthandayo,  uMathuba, Vulindlela, Mxolisi noMntwana uLindiwe. Okhulumela iSilo, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uthe bebenethemba lokuthi isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo, sawuqeda umbango wesihlalo sobukhosi. "Kuyajabhisa ngoba imibango kade yayiba khona endlunkulu, kwaze kwaba khona lapho kubulawana khona. Njengoba ubukhosi busekhona namanje, kusho khona ukuthi kwakubuye kufike isikhathi lapho kuhlalwa phansi, kuxoxiswane. Iyangixaka lena yabafowethu abangaboni ukuthi sekufanele kuhlalwe phansi kuxoxiswane." UMntwana uThulani uthe okumdumaza kakhulu ukuhamba phambili kukaMntwana uMbonisi kulabo abaphikisa ukuqokwa kweSilo. "Kubi uma yenziwa uMntwana uMbonisi ngoba uyena omdala, okufanele ngabe uhlanganisa umndeni. IMbube ikhathazekile, kufanele iwafake amaphepha. Kusobala ukuthi kuzohlale kunombango. Kuyishwa lokhu okwenzekayo." Ungoti wezomthetho waseDonda Attorneys, uMnuz Melusi Xulu, uthe akuvamile ukuthi kube khona abantu abaphonsela inselelo isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo. "Imvamisa uma kunesinqumo esikhishwa iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo, esiphikisa isinqumo seNkantolo yaMacala aDlulisiwe, kusuke sekuqediwe. Kodwa uma kunobufakazi obusha noma okubalulekile emthethweni njengoba kubhaliwe emaphepheni kaMntwana uMbonisi, kuyenzeka ukuthi kubuye kubhekisiswe. Sekuyocaca enkantolo ngamathuba okuthi aphumelele." UXulu uthe okukhalisa kakhulu uMntwana uMbonisi ukuthi iNdlunkulu ayizange inikwe ithuba lokuthi ihlonze ozongena esihlalweni.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMnuz Mike Mabuyakhulu INGXENYE yethimba lesikhashana elihola i-ANC KwaZulu-Natal, idliwe yizembe ngesikhathi kwenziwa izinguquko ebuholini nguNobhala Jikelele wenhlangano, uMnuz Fikile Mbalula, abuchaza njengohlobo lwemoto i-Tazz. UMbalula umemezele izinguquko ebuholini besifundazwe ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba, izolo, eThekwini. Wenze isimemezelo emva kokuhlangana nobuholi esifundazweni. Kulezi zinguquko abaholi abaqavile okubalwa kubo obengumdidiyeli wethimba, uMnuz Jeff Radebe, obeyiphini lomdidiyeli wethimba, uNkk Weziwe Thusi, nobeyiPhini likamgqugquzeli, uNkk Nomusa Dube-Ncube, badliwe yizembe. Obengumgqugquzeli wethimba, uMnuz Mike Mabuyakhulu, uyena osezoba umdidiyeli wethimba. Owayeyimeya kaMasipala waseThekwini, uMnuz James Nxumalo, uqokelwe kwesikamgquguqquzeli wethimba. Owayengumphathiswa woMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, uNkk Bongi Sithole-Moloi, uqokelwe kwesePhini likamdidiyeli. IMeya kaMasipala wesiFunda uMkhanyakude, uMnuz Siphile Mdaka, iqokelwe kwesePhini lomgqugquzeli. Abaphathiswa; uMnuz Siboniso Duma noNksz Nomagugu Simelane bazoqhubeka nezikhundla abaziphethe. UMbalula umemezele ukuthi kuzoncishiswa isibalo samalungu ethimba. Phambilini, uMbalula wakhala ngokuthi ithimba ebelikhona liyahluleka ukwenza umsebenzi walo waze walifanisa nemoto i-Tazz. Kepha izolo, uMbalula akazange afune ukubeka amabala ithimba ebeliphethe. "Isikhathi sabo bese siphelile. Senze izinguquko ngenxa yokuthi sifuna ukuthi iqembu lisebenze kangcono esifundazweni. Angifuni ukugxila kakhulu ezintweni ezedlule. Sibheke kabanzi isimo esifundazweni futhi siyazi ukuthi yini okufanele siyenze. Sizojuba amalungu esigungu esiphezulu ukuthi ayolekelela ithimba. Amalungu esigungu esiphezulu azojutshwa kuzo zonke izifunda." UMbalula ubonge abebeyingxenye yethimba. Uthe uRadebe unikezwe omunye umsebenzi eqenjini. "Sizomemezela maduze ukuthi unikezwe muphi umsebenzi." UMbalula uphinde waveza ukuthi bazoba nemihlangano kuzo zonke izifunda lapho bezokwazisa khona amalungu enhlangano ngesinqumo esithinta ubudlelwano babo nedlelandawonye elizongenela ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ngokuzimela, i-SACP. "Sizokwazisa onke amalungu enhlangano ngesinqumo esithathwe emhlanganweni wesigungu esiphezulu okhethekile obungesonto eledlule. Sesiqalile vele ukwazisa amadlelandawonye ngesinqumo sesigungu esiphezulu. Sizoxoxa namakadebona kwi-ANC, uphiko lwabesifazane kanye nophiko lwentsha."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umholi we-EFF uJulius Malema UBUYELA enkantolo umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, lapho kuzoqhubeka khona icala lakhe lokuqhumisa isibhamu. UMalema uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi e-East London, ngoLwesithathu nangoLwesine, lapho kuzokwenziwa izethulo ezandulela isigwebo. Ukulalelwa kwezethulo kwahlehliswa ngoJanuwari. UMalema walahlwa yicala lokuqhumisa isibhamu ngonyaka owedlule. Wavulelwa icala emva kokuba kusabalale i-video emkhombisa eqhumisa isibhamu, emcimbini wokugubha iminyaka kwasungulwa i-EFF. Umcimbi aqhumisa kuwo isibhamu wawuseMdantshane, ngo-2018. UMalema uveze ukuthi uMbuso ufuna ukuthi agwetshwe iminyaka engu-15 ebhadla ejele. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba ngeledlule. Uthe sekumcacele ukuthi kukhona umuntu ofuna ukumbona ebhadla ejele. "Uyabona ukuthi uMbuso uyangicindezela. Bathi bafuna ngigwetshwe iminyaka engu-15. Abameli bami bazophikisana nalesi sigwebo abasifunayo kodwa into ecacile ukuthi bangifuna ejele. Anginankinga nokuthi kube khona abafuna ukungibona ngisejele." UMalema usengcupheni yokulahlekelwa isikhundla sokuba yilungu lePhalamende, uma egcine enikwe isigwebo esingaphezu kwezinyanga ezingu-12 ebhadla ejele. Umthetho awubavumeli asebeke bagwetshwa isikhathi esingaphezu kwezinyanga ezingu-12 ukuba babe amalungu ePhalamende. Ukugwetshwa kukaMalema ukuba abhadle ejele, kungaphazamisa umkhankaso weqembu wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo. Amalungu e-EFF kulindeleke ukuthi abhikishe ngaphandle kwenkantolo ngoLwesithathu nangoLwesine. Inkantolo kulindeleke ukuthi imemezele usuku lokukhishwa kwesigwebo uma uMbuso nabameli bakaMalema sebeqede ukwenza izethulo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KUZOCACA kuleli sonto ngekusasa likaMphathiswa wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi KwaZulu-Natal, uNksz Mbali Shinga, olahlwe yicala lokushaya indiva umyalelo weqembu. I-NFP izokhipha isigwebo esizonikwa uNksz Shinga ngoLwesithathu. Lokhu kuvezwe uNobhala Jikelele weNFP obambile, uMnuz Sunset Xaba, encwadini ayibhekise ezinhlakeni zeqembu. UNksz Shinga ubekade ebhekene nekomiti lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe, emva kokuba ashaya indiva umyalelo weqembu wokuba aseke isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, esasifakwe yiMKP. I-NFP iyona engababeki benkosi esiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal. UXaba uthe embikweni wesikhashana, ulahlwe yiwo wonke amacala abhekene nawo. "Isinqumo sekomiti siveza obala ubucayi bamacala awenzile. Isinqumo siyisifundo kulabo abangafuni ukulandela umthetho. Onke amalungu kufanele ahloniphe umthetho weqembu, akukhathaleki ukuthi uphethe siphi isikhundla." UXaba uthe ikomiti kulindeleke ukuthi likhiphe isigwebo ngoLwesithathu. "Amalungu ekomiti elibhekelele ukusebenza kwansuku zonke kwiNFP, ayanxuswa ukuba alungiselele ukukhishwa kwesigwebo. Ayanxuswa ukuba aqhubeke nokuhola iqembu ngokucophelela." Umthombo ongaphakathi uthe kulindeleke ukuthi iNFP imxoshe uNksz Shinga ekubeni yilungu leqembu, okuzomlahlekisela ngesikhundla sokuba uMphathiswa. Uqhuba umthombo, uthe iNFP ihlela ukufaka umholi wayo, uMnuz Ivan Barnes, esikhundleni sikaNksz Shinga. "Bake bazama vele ukukhipha uNksz Shinga befake uBarnes kodwa bahluleka. Bazophinde bazame futhi." Uqhuba umthombo, uthe uNksz Shinga uzokuphonsela inselelo ukuxoshwa kwakhe. "Kusukela kwasekuqaleni ethweswa amacala, ubelokhu ekhala ngokuthi ubuholi beqembu abuyilandeli imigomo yeqembu. Le ndaba izophelela enkantolo. Engingakutshela khona ukuthi kuzokuba nzima enkantolo. I-NFP ijwayele ukuhlulwa emacaleni lapho isuke izama ukuxosha abantu ebajube ezikhundleni." Ukuxoshwa kukaNksz Shinga kungabeka engcupheni uhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe esifundazweni. Ukuphuma kweNFP kuhulumeni wesifundazwe kungashiya amaqembu abusa ngokubambisana nezihlalo ezingu-40 kwezingu-80 esiShayamthetho. Ubuholi beNFP kade bamemezela ukuhoxa kwabo kuhulumeni wesifundazwe, baze bayalela noNksz Shinga ukuba asule esikhundleni sokuba uMphathiswa. Kuze kube namhlanje, uNksz Shinga akakaze asule esikhundleni futhi uyaqhubeka nokuvota namaqembu abusa ngokubambisana esiShayamthetho. UNksz Shinga uphinde abe uSihlalo weNFP esifundazweni.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-DA, uMnuz Geordin Hill-Lewis UMHOLI omusha we-DA, uMnuz Geordin Hill-Lewis, ufuna iqembu lakhe kube yilo eliphatha uhulumeni kazwelonke. UHill-Lewis uthe ufuna ukuthi iqembu lakhe lingagcini nje ngokuba ingxenye yohulumeni wokubambisana kodwa kube ilona eliphethe ngokuzimela. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma engqunqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi be-DA ebiseGoli, ngempelasonto. UHill-Lewis uhlule loyo ohola i-DA kuMasipala waseSedibeng, uMnuz Sibusiso Dyonase, embangweni wokuhola iqembu. UHill-Lewis uthembise ukukhulisa i-DA. "Umbuzo okhona ukuthi ngabe i-DA izokuba yini iqembu eliphethe. Impendulo ithi yebo. I-DA izokhula ibe iqembu eliphethe uhulumeni kazwelonke. Angifuni nje ukuthi sigcine ngokuba ingxenye yohulumeni wokubambisana. Ngifuna ukuthi kube ithina esiphethe uhulumeni kazwelonke." Uthe okuzokwenza ukuthi i-DA iqhubeke nokukhula ukuthi yenza into yamehlo lapho iphethe khona. "Omasipala abaphethwe i-DA baphethe kahle. Isabelomali siphasiswa ngesikhathi futhi siphathwa ngendlela. Abantu abahlwempu bayazithola izidingo lapho kuphethe khona i-DA. Ezifundazweni esiphethe kuzo nakhona senza umsebenzi oncomekayo. Ongqongqoshe beDA abakuhulumeni kazwelonke nabo benza kahle kakhulu. Abanye bazi ukukhuluma nje, bazi ukugxekana nathi, thina siyasebenza." Uthe okubasalele ukuba bangenise lapho bengavotelwa khona. "Abantu abaningi sebebonile ukuthi i-DA iyakwazi ukuhambisa izidingo. Okusele ukuthi thina sisondele eduze kwabantu. Lokho akusho ukuthi sekufanele silaxaze labo abasivotele." UHill-Lewis uthe bazoqhubeka nokuzibamba ziqine kuhulumeni wokubambisana. "Kufanele siqhubeke nokuphikisana nemigomo evimba ukukhula komnotho kuhulumeni wokubambisana." Phakathi kwabaholi abaqokelwe ezikhundleni, kubalwa umholi we-DA eGauteng, uMnuz Solly Msimanga, oqokelwe kwesikaSihlalo weFederal, uNgqongqoshe wezeMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, oqokelwe kwesePhini lokuqala likaSihlalo kwathi uNgqongqoshe wezokuXhumana, uMnuz Solly Malatsi, waqokelwa kwesePhini lesithathu likaSihlalo. IPhini likaNgqongqoshe wezeziMali, uMnuz Ashor Sarupen, liqokelwe kwesikaSihlalo womkhandlu we-DA.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: US President Donald Trump UMENGAMELI waseMelika, uMnuz Donald Trump Image: Mandel Ngan / AFP ZIFINYELELE kwangqingetshe izingxoxo zamazwe amabili alwayo, iMelika ne-Iran. La mazwe ahlulekile ukufinyelela esivumelwaneni sokuqeda impi emva kwezingxoxo ezidonse amahora awu-21. Izingxoxo ziqale emva kokuba womabili la mazwe evumelane ngokubeka phansi izikhali kuze kube amasonto amabili. Bekunethemba lokuthi izingxoxo zizoholela ekupheleni kwempi eqale ngenyanga eyedlule kepha izolo, iMelika imemezele ungqingetshe ezingxoxweni ezibanjelwe ezweni iPakistan. IPhini likaMengameli waseMelika, uMnuz JD Vance, lithe banqume ukubuyela eMelika emva kukofinyelela kwangqingetshe kwezingxoxo. "Senze isiphakamiso sokugcina kubona, bangavumelana naso. Kube sekusicacela ukuthi ayikho into esisayihlalele ePakistan, sanquma ukuthi ababuyele ekhaya labo abebesimele ezingxoxweni." UVance akazange afune ukuchaza ukuthi ikuphi lokhu i-Iran engafunanga ukuvumelana nakho. Abaholi base-Iran bathe bazibophezele ezingxoxweni. Bathe iMelika isheshe yaphonsa ithawula ezingxoxweni njengoba bekungokokuqala eminyakeni engu-40, ukuba kube nezingxoxo phakathi kwabaholi bamazwe. Akucaci ukuthi ukufinyelela kwangqingetshe kwezingxoxo kusibekaphi isivumelwano sala mazwe sokumisa impi. Amazwe omhlaba abambe umoya ngale mpi eholele ekunyukeni kukawoyela emhlabeni wonke jikelele. Intego kawoyela inyuke kakhulu emva kokuqubuka kwempi ngenyanga eyedlule. Ukunyuka kwentengo kawoyela kuholele ekunyukeni kukaphethroli emazweni amaningi. Lapha eNingizimu Afrika uphethroli unyuke ngo-R3.06 kwathi udizili wona wanyuka ngo-R7.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ekhuluma nabezindaba ekomkhulu laleli qembu eWinnie Madikizela-Mandela House. UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ufuna iqembu lakhe linikezwe isikhundla soMphathiswa kuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal. UMalema uthe noma kanjani bazosithola isikhundla asifunayo uma sekuchithwe uhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe KwaZulu-Natal. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba izolo. I-EFF yeseka imizamo yeMKP yokuchitha uhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe isifundazwe. Isiphakamiso seMKP sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaNdunankulu, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, sachithwa ngonyaka odlule. UMalema uthe bazogcina bewuchithile uhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal, wathi nabo bazoba yingxenye yokuphathwa kwesifundazwe uma sekuchithwe uhulumeni oholwa yi-IFP. "Sizoba nabaphathiswa KwaZulu-Natal kuhulumeni weMKP. Ungajahi, ijubane liyabulala. Siyasebenza lapha KwaZulu-Natal futhi kukhona okuzokwenzeka maduze. Uyazi ukuthi ngamahora amabili kuningi okungashintsha kwipolitiki." UMalema uthe bafuna ukuthi i-ANC ibambisane nabo neMKP. "Ilawa maqembu azophatha izwe ngomuso." UMalema uphinde wachaza kabanzi ngobudlelwano bakhe nabantu okuvela amagama abo kwikhomishini ephenya izinsolo ezenziwa uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. UMalema uvumile ukuthi uyazana nosomabhizinisi uMnuz Ze Nxumalo nosomatekisi osashona owayesatshiswa okwenyoka, uMnuz Jotham "Mswazi" Msibi. Uvumile impela ukuthi wethula inkulumo emngcwabeni kaMsibi. Uthe waqala ukwazana noMsibi ngesikhathi kunesiteleka samatekisi. Uqhube wathi babexoxa ngezinto ezithinta amatekisi noMsibi. "Ngangiya kuyena ngiyomcela ukuthi behlise imali yokugibela ematekisini. Baningi abantu be-EFF abagibela amatekisi. Ayikho into ewubugebengu esasiyixoxa naye." UMalema uthe akukho okubi ngobudlelwano bakhe noNxumalo. "UZe ngazi ukuthi uyingane kaSolwazi Otty Nxumalo, owayengunobhala jikelele wokuqala we-IFP." UMalema uthe uNxumalo ungumngani wosomabhizinisi abaningi okubalwa kubo nabamhlophe. "UZe uwumngani wosomabhizinisi abaningi. Uyazi ukuthi uke avakashele ngisho emapulazini kaMnuz Johan Rupert? UZe ungumngani wendodakazi kaRupert. Kungani ningababuzi bona labo somabhizinisi ukuthi yini ebahlanganisa noNxumalo? Nibasabani abelungu?" UMalema uthe akukho okutheni ngobudlelwano bakhe nePhini likaKhomishana wamaPhoyisa elimisiwe, uLiuetenant General Shadrack Sibiya. "Ngimazi ngokomsebenzi." Uthe akazibandakanyi nezenzo zobugebengu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uthe ukuvumbuka kweqembu iMKP, kwabaphuca iqatha emlonyeni okhethweni lwango-2024, njengoba ekholelwa ukuthi babezozidlela amahlanga KwaZulu-Natal, ukuba lalingekho iqembu eliholwa owayengumengameli wezwe, uMnuz Jacob Zuma. UHlabisa uthe ukuvumbuka kweMKP sekusele kancane kufike ukhetho, kwaphendula amatafula. Ukusho lokhu izolo, ngesikhathi enengxoxo nabamaphephandaba angaphansi kwe-Independent Media. I-MKP iyona eyahamba phambili KwaZulu-Natal njengoba yathola u-45%, yalandelwa i-IFP yona eyathola u-18%. UHlabisa uthe ukube ayivelanga iMKP, alikho elinye iqembu elalizomelana nabo KwaZulu-Natal. "Ngesikhathi kuyiwa okhethweni lwango-2024, i-IFP yayikhombisa ukukhula. Ukube yayingekho iMKP sasizonqoba ngamalengiso. I-DA kunezindawo engakwazi ukukhula kuzona lapha KwaZulu-Natal. I-ANC yona aziyihambeli kahle izinto lapha KwaZulu-Natal. Ingakho yalahlekelwa isifundazwe okhethweni olwedlule. Yasuka ku-54% yathola u-17%. Bonke la bantu abavotela iMKP, babengeke bavote okhethweni olwedlule." UHlabisa uthe kwabamangaza okwenziwa yiMKP okhethweni njengoba babengabhekile ukuthi ingahamba phambili ngamavoti KwaZulu-Natal. "Okwenzeke okhethweni olwedlule kusivule amehlo. I-MKP yaya okhethweni ingahlelekile. Nani nazibonela, kwakufike kumenyezelwe ukuthi iMKP izoba nomcimbi wokukhankasela ukhetho, uthi uyezwa ntambama sekuthiwa loyo mcimbi usuhoxisiwe. Kwesinye isikhathi wawuzwa sekuthiwa umholi wayo akafikanga emcimbini. Ukuze ukwazi ukukhankasela ukhetho, kufanele ube nezinhlaka zeqembu. I-MKP yayingenazo izinhlaka." UHlabisa uthe abanye abantu abavotela iMKP babequbisile. Uthe abanye abantu abavotela iMKP babelandwa emakhaya ngezimoto ezazihlelwe amanye amaqembu ezepolitiki kodwa bafike ezikhungweni zokuvota, bavotele iMKP. "Abantu ababefake izikibha zeMKP babembalwa. Kwamangala bonke abaholi bamaqembu ezepolitiki uma sekuphuma imiphumela. Bazibuza ukuthi baqhamukaphi la bantu abavotela iMKP ngoba abantu ababefike ezikhungweni zokuvota babelethwe yibona ngezimoto." UHlabisa uthe kukhona izinkampani ezicwaningayo ezazisho ukuthi iMKP izonqoba ngamalengiso. "Sakhetha ukungazilaleli lezi zinkampani. Sasibuza ukuthi zikuthathaphi lokhu ezikushoyo."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMENGAMELI we-IFP uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, othi akanqwahile nengqungquthela yeqembu UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, usephumele obala wathi akavimbile ukuthi kube nengqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi beqembu. UHlabisa uthe okubambezele ingqungquthela wukuthi bafuna ukwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi kulandelwa yonke imigomo. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi enengxoxo nabamaphephandaba angaphansi kwe-Independent Media. I-IFP ilokhu yagcina ukuba nengqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi ngo-2019. Kukuleyo ngqungquthela lapho umsunguli weqembu, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi, adlulisela khona izintambo kuHlabisa. Ingqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi kwakufanele ibe ngo-2024 kodwa yahlehliselwa unyaka odlule, nakhona yagcina ihlehliswa. UHlabisa uthe akusilona iqiniso ukuthi benza ngamabomu ukuthi ingqungquthela ingabi khona. "Abanye bathi siyasaba ukubiza ingqunguthela ngoba sisaba ukuphuma ezikhundleni. Mina anginqabile ukuthi kube nengqungquthela, inqobo nje uma kuzolandelwa yonke imigomo." UHlabisa uthe kubalulekile ukuthi kulandelwe yonke imigomo ukuze bagweme ukuthi kube khona abantu abaphonsela inselelo ukuhlala kwengqungquthela. Ingqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi be-IFP izokuba khona uma sekulandelwe yonke imigomo. "Asifuni kwenzeke lokhu okwenzeke e-Eastern Cape (engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi be-ANC). Asifuni kube nesimo lapho inkantolo izonquma ngosuku lwengqungquthela ukuthi ingqungquthela ayichithwe, abantu sebeze bahamba amabanga amade bethi beze engqungqutheleni. Uma ngizwa imali okuthiwa imosheke e-Eastern Cape, ngiyathuka, angifuni nathi sehlelwe yisimo esifanayo." UHlabisa uthe kunamaziko angu-600 angakagcotshwa. "La maziko angaphonsela inselelo ukuhlala kwengqungquthela uma singase sikhethe ukuwashiya ngaphandle." UHlabisa uthe kule mpelasonto kuzoba nemihlangano ezifundeni lapho kuzogcotshwa khona amaziko asele. Uveze ukuthi ngoMsombuluko kuzoba nomhlangano womkhandlu kazwelonke kwi-IFP. "Umkhandlu kazwelonke yiwona othatha izinqumo zokuthi kufanele noma akufanele yini kube nengqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi." Khonamanjalo, uHlabisa uveze ukuthi uzolumemezela maduze usuku lokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. UHlabisa uyena ozomemezela ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya njengoba enguNgqongqoshe wokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu. Ukhetho oluzayo luzokuba phakathi kukaNovemba noJanuwari. UHlabisa uthe uzolumemezela usuku ngaphambi kukaJuni. "Sifuna ukuthi abantu bethi beyobhalisela ukuvota ngoJuni, bebe sebazi ukuthi bazobe bekuphi ngosuku lokhetho." UHlabisa uthe uzoziphothula maduze izingxoxo mayelana nokuqokwa kosuku lokhetho. "Siqedela izingxoxo noMengameli (uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa)."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: USUQALILE umjaho wokuhola i-DA KwaZulu-Natal, njengoba ilungu lomkhandlu weNdlu yeziFundazwe ePhalamende, uMnuz Mzamo Billy, selimemezele ukuthi lizongenela umbango wokuhola leli qembu esifundazweni. I-DA izoba nengqungquthela yokukhetha ubuholi besifundazwe ngenyanga ezayo futhi amalungu aseqalile ukuphakamisa amagama abantu afuna ukuthi bangenele izikhundla. Izolo uBilly umemezele ukwamukela ukuphakanyiswa kwegama lakhe ukuba lingenele umbango wokuhola isifundazwe. Ukusho lokhu embhalweni awufake ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. "Kuyintokozo ukuba nginazise ukuthi ngivumile ukuba igama lami liphakanyiselwe emjahweni wokuhola i-DA KwaZulu-Natal. Ukuphakanyiswa kwegama lami kwenzeka ngesikhathi esimqoka. Ligaya ngomunye umhlathi lapha esifundazweni njengoba sibona kwanda ukuphatha ngokubambisana ezinhlakeni zikahulumeni. I-DA kufanele ingasali ngemuva." UBilly uthe umkhankaso wakhe uzogxila emaphuzwini amathathu. "Ngifuna ukukhulisa i-DA ifinyelele nasezindaweni engekho kuzona. Ngifuna iKwaZulu-Natal ibe imbumba, lokhu kuzokwenza ngokudala ubumbano ezinhlakeni zeqembu. Ngifuna ukuthi i-DA kube iyona ephathayo ngesikhathi esizayo, kufanele i-DA ibe iqembu abantu abazolethemba ukuthi lingakwazi ukuphatha." Uthe uzohambela ezindaweni ezahlukene esifundazweni lapho ezobe exoxa khona nezithunywa eziya engqungqutheleni. UBilly ubeyikhansela kuMasipala waseThekwini ngaphambi kokuthi aye ePhalamende. Akukacaci ukuthi bangaki abazongenela umbango wokuhola i-DA esifundazweni. Igama elivelayo embangweni elephini lomholi we-DA esifundazweni, uMnuz Sithembiso Ngema. UNgema ubengakaphumeli obala ukuthi uzowungenela yini umjaho. Umholi okhona njengamanje, uMnuz Francois Rodgers, umemezele ukuthi usethi khumu. Khonamanjalo: I-DA izoqoka ubuholi bayo bukazwelonke engqungqutheleni engempelasonto. Kulindeleke ukuthi iMeya kaMasipala waseKapa, uMnuz Geordin Gwyn Hill-Lewis, izidlele amahlanga embangweni wokuhola i-DA. UHill-Lewis uzophonsela inselelo ikhansela lakuMasipala waseSedibeng, uMnuz Sibusiso Dyonase. Umholi ophethe njengamanje, uMnuz John Steenhuisen, wahoxa emjahweni wezikhundla.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UDKT Bongani Mncwango nomholi we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa UKWENZA izinto ngokungaphaphi kobuholi be-IFP, kungenye yezinto ezihehele kuleli qembu loyo olaxaze iMKP, uDkt Bongani Mncwango. UMncwango, omenyezelwe ngokusemthethweni njengelungu le-IFP izolo, uveze ukuthi maningi amaqembu abemshela. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba. UMncwango owayengunobhala jikelele weMKP, uveze ukuthi ugcine eqome i-IFP emaqenjini amane abemfunisa okomsebenzi. "Ngikhethe ukunika i-IFP ucu kula masoka abengeshela ngenxa yokubuka umlando wayo. I-IFP ineminyaka engu-51 futhi kunozinzo kuyo. Abaholi bayo bakhulile ngokomqondo. Izinto zakwi-IFP azenziwa ngokuphapha, ucabanga kabili ngaphambi kokuthi wenze into kwi-IFP. Engikuthandayo nge-IFP ukuthi inethuba lokukhula." UMncwango udilizwe esikhundleni sokuba unobhala jiekelele weMKP ngenyanga edlule kanti ubesahlale kulesi sikhundla isikhathi esingaphansi kwezinyanga eziyisikhombisa. Akazange afune ukwanda kakhulu ngokumenze washiya iMKP. Uthe uma umuntu ejoyina iqembu kuyaye kube nombono athenjiswa wona. "Uma abaholi beqembu sekuba yibo abangasawulandeli loyo mbono, kuyaye kufanele ukuthi uthathe isinqumo sokuthi uyahlala noma uyahamba." Bekuqhilika izidlathi kuMncwango ngesikhathi ethulwa, ekhuza neziqubulo ze-IFP. Umholi we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uthe babambe ufishi omkhulu. "Namhlanje usuku olukhethekile. Egameni le-IFP simemukela ngezandla ezivulekile nangezinhliziyo ezimhlophe. Sithobeka kakhulu ukujoyinwa nguMncwango onolwazi olunzulu njengoba eke waba yisikhulu esiphezulu ezinkampani ezizimele nezisebenza ukuvikela umphakathi. Kwezokuphatha unolwazi olunzulu. Siyazi ukuthi baningi abazokulandela, abakholelwa kuwena. I-IFP ikhaya labo bonke abantu. Ingakho sihlezi siwavulile amasango." UHlabisa uthe asikho isikhundla athenjiswe sona uMncwango. UHlabisa uthe amava kaMncwango azosiza ekukhuliseni iqembu kanjalo nasemkhankasweni wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo, wathi bafuna ukunqoba omasipala abaningi okhethweni oluzayo. "Ngesikhathi kuza ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya lwango-2021, sathi sifuna ukunqoba inqwaba yomasipala. Abantu bathi siyazikhohlisa. Namanje kunenqwaba yomasipala esifuna ukubanqoba. Kunomasipala abaphethwe ngokubambisana esifuna ukubanqoba futhi sifuna ukuqhubeka nokunqoba komasipala esiphethe kubo. Umgqigqo wethu muhle kakhulu njengoba sinqobe amawadi amaningi okhethweni lokuchibiyela lwakamuva."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umonakalo odaleke eTehran. AMAZWE alwayo, iMelika ne-Iran avumelane ngokubeka phansi izikhali okwesikhashana. La mazwe avumelene ngokumisa impi amasonto amabili ukuze kuqhubeke izingxoxo zokuqeda impi eyaqala ngenyanga edlule. Ukumiswa kwempi kumenyezelwe uMengameli waseMelika, uMnuz Donald Trump, ngoLwesibili ebusuku. UTrump unqume ukumisa impi ngenxa yokuthi i-Iran, ivume ukuvula umzila wemikhumbi, iStrait of Hormuz. I-Iran ibivimbile eStrait of Hormuz obekwenza ukuthi imikhumbi ethwele u-oyela oqhamuka emazweni aseMiddle East, ingakwazi ukudlula. UTrump ubesabise ngokuthi uzoqotha imbokodo nesisekelo e-Iran, uma iqhubeka nokuvimba eStrait of Hormuz. Ubenikeze i-Iran umnqamulajuqu wangoLwesibili ukuba ivulele imikhumbi. UTrump uveze ukuthi unxuswe abaholi basePakistan ukuba angangqongqisi ingqalasizinda kagesi i-Iran. "Ngilimisile ibutho ebese lilungele ukuphuma uma i-Iran ingavumi ukuvula eStrait of Hormuz." UTrump uthe i-Iran imnikeze amaphuzu ayishumi efuna kuvunyelwane ngawo ngaphambi kokuthi ivume ukuqeda impi. "Ngiwabukile la maphuzu, sizoxoxa ngawo." Womabili amazwe akuchaze njengokunqoba ukumiswa kwempi. Ukumiswa kwempi kwenze ukuthi kwehle inani lika-oyela izolo. Amanani ka-oyela anyuka kakhulu ngemuva kokuqubuka kwempi ngenyanga edlule. Ukunyuka kwamanani ka-oyela kuholele ekunyukeni kukaphethroli emazweni amaningi. Lapha eNingizimu Afrika uphethroli unyuke ngo-R3.06 kwathi udizili  wanyuka ngo-R7. Irandi lakuleli nalo kuvulwe izimakethe lenza kahle izolo uma liqhathaniswa nedola laseMelika.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMphathiswa wezeMpilo obebambele undunankulu, uNksz Nomagugu Simelane, iphini lemeya kuMasipala waseNdwedwe, uNkk Zandile Siwetu-Thoolsi, imeya kuMasipala waseNdwedwe, uMnuz Sam Mfeka, uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, imeya kaMasipala wesifunda Ilembe uMnuz Thobani Shandu, uNgqongqoshe wezoBulungiswa, uNksz Mmamoloko Kubayi nephini likangqongqhse wezoBulungiswa, uMnuz Andries Nel UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa, uthe usalucubungula udaba lukaKhomishana wamaPhoyisa obhekene necala, uGeneral Fannie Masemola. URamaphosa uthe uzokwenza isimemezelo uma eseqedile ukubheka. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba abebehambele uhlelo lokudluliselwa koxhaso lokuvusa imizi eyacekelwa phansi ngesikhathi sobandlululo, eNdwedwe, izolo. UMasemola usengcupheni yokumiswa ngenxa yokuthi ubhekene necala elithinta ithenda kaR360 million, eyanikwa inkampani kasomabhizinisi obhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusumuzi 'Cat' Matlala. UMasemola ubhekene necala lokwephula imigomo yokuphathwa kwemali yomphakathi.Uzovela enkantolo ngo-Ephreli 21. "Udaba lukaMasemola silusingethe futhi sizolulungisa. Sizokwenza isimemezelo uma kukhona isinqumo esesithathiwe." Ekhuluma ngohlelo abezolwethula, uRamaphosa uveze ukuthi kuzohlomula imindeni engu-220 okwacekelwa phansi imizi yayo ngesikhathi sobandlululo. Le mindeni yahlonzwa ngesikhathi kuneKhomishini yamaQiniso nokuBuyisana, iTruth and Reconciliation Commission. URamaphosa uthe le mindeni izothola uxhaso luka-R40 million. "Abantu abahlomulile bazokwakha noma balungise imizi yabo. Lokhu kuzobuyisa isithunzi esabalahlekela ngesikhathi sobandlululo. Inkululeko yethu ayanele uma abantu abahlukumezeka ngesikhathi sobandlululo bengakathotshwa amanxeba. Ngisho ne-United Nations (inhlangano yezizwe), yavumelana ngokuthi ukuze kube nokuthula emazweni, kufanele basulwe izinyembezi labo abahlukumezeka. Yngakho nathi sithi akube khona okuncane okutholwa abahlukumezeka. Sinxusa abantu abathole izimfanelo zabo ukuthi bazisebenzise kahle." URamaphosa uthe baningi abantu abalahlekelwa ngesikhathi kunodlame eNdwedwe ngeminyaka yo-1980 no-1990. "Abantu bakhishwa emakhaya. Izindlu eziningi zashiswa. Okubuhlungu kakhulu wukuthi abantu abaningi babulawa. Kwahlaselwa ngisho abantu abangenacala ababengazibandakanyi nepolitiki. Udlame lwadonsa isikhathi eside, lwaphazamisa abantu abaningi. Abaningi basahlupheka namanje ngenxa yalo." UNgqongqoshe wezoBulungiswa, uNksz Mmamoloko Kubayi, uthe ingu-400 isiyonke imizi eyacekelwa phansi eNdwedwe. Uthe imizi engu-112 yanikwa uxhaso luka-R21 million, wathi eminye imizi eyathinteka abakatholakali abantu abaqondene nayo. "Okunye esikwenzayo wukunikeza uxhaso lwezemfundo ezinganeni zasemindenini eyathinteka. Ngizwile ukuthi kunezikhalo zokuthi kukhona izingane ezazihlonziwe kodwa ezagcina zingalutholanga uxhaso. Sizokulungisa lokho ngoba sesizwile ukuthi kunenkinga," kusho uKubayi.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKELA kwesokunxele yingqalabutho yomculi engasekho uMiriam Makeba, uLeleti Khumalo, Whoopi Goldberg nophrojusa be-Sarafina oDarrell Roodt no-Anant Singh bekwi-Cannes Film Festival ngo-1992 KUZOKWENZEKA okwehlukile nobekungaziwa ngentandokazi yomdlalo weshashalazi othi Sarafina, oveza ubunjalo besimo esasibhekene nentsha eyayilwela ilungelo layo lokuthi ifundiswe ngezilimi zebele - yaze yadela impilo yayo ngoJuni 16, 1976. Lokhu kumenyezelwe ngabenkampani eqopha imidlalo yethelevishini neyeshashalazi iVideovision Entertainement, edalule ukuthi izobambisana nowayengumlingisi oqavile kwiSarafina ngeminyaka yama-90s uLeleti Khumalo, ukuwukhombisa ema-cinema ngoJuni 5, ukukhumbula iminyaka ewu-50 kwenzeka isigameko sangoJuni 16. Lo mdlalo weshashalazi, owabhalwa yinkakha yombhali nomqondisi wemidlalo yeshashalazi engasekho emhlabeni uMbongeni Ngema, wazakhela igama emhlabeni jikelele kangangoba waze waqopha umlando wokuba yifilimu yokuqala yakuleli zwe ukuqokwa kwiCannes Film Festival, okwenza ukuthi ikhonjiswe emazweni ehlukene omhlaba ngoMeyi 11 wango-1992. I-Sarafina izokhonjiswa isonto lonke kuma-cinema ehlukene okubalwa kuwona iBaywest, Blue Route, Brooklyn, CapeGate, Cedar Square, Cresta, Eastgate, Irene, Mall of Africa, Mooi River, Rosebank Nouveau, Sandton, Somerset, SunCoast CineCentre, The Grove, Vaal, V&A neWatercrest. Amathikithi okungena ukuyibuka azobiza u-R50 umuntu ngamunye. Uphrojusa weVideovision Entertainment, u-Anant Singh, udalule ukuthi uma sekukhonjiswa lo mdlalo ngenyanga ezayo, kuzovela nokunye kwezigameko zawo ezingafakwanga kulona owaziwayo - okuhlanganiswa nengoma ethi Thank You, Mama, esuke iculwa wuye uLeleti (Khumalo) nenkakha yomculi wakuleli zwe ongasekho emhlabeni uMiriam Makeba. “Lo mdlalo uyohlale usemqoka kakhulu emlandweni wezwe lethu ngakho awusoze ulibaleke nanini, yingakho kuthi sekudlule iminyaka ewu-34 wenziwa - kepha sisalokhu siqhubeka nokuthi siwubeke ebalazweni futhi siwusabalalise ezizukulwaneni ezihlukene,” usho kanje. ULeleti yena uthe intsha yango-1976 yabakhuthaza kakhulu ukuthi balwele izinto ezinhle nezimqoka abazidingayo empilweni, ngakho kuzohlale kusemqoka ukuthi lokho kuhlale kuqhakambiseka minyaka yonke nangezikhathi zonke ezweni nasemhlabeni jikelele. Umculo wakulo mdlalo wabhalwa wuye uMbongeni (Ngema) noHugh Masekela (naye ongasekho emhlabeni), umdanso wahlelwa wuMichael Peters noMbongeni (Ngema), nophrojusa bemisebenzi eyahlukene kuwona oDavid Barkham, Kirk D’Amico, Sudhr Pragjee, Helena Spring, Sanjeev Singh, David Thompson naye u-Anant (Singh) nomqondisi uDarrell James Roodt.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Nqobile Khoza wuyena omncane kunabo bonke kwabathweswe iziqu e-UKZN, ngeziqu zakhe ze-Bachelor of Science Degree in Geological Sciences INTOKAZI encane kunazo zonke izitshudeni zemikhakha eyehlukene ezithweswe iziqu e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN), uNksz Nqobile Khoza, idalule ukuthi ukuqopha lowo mlando sekuyikhuthaze ukuthi iqhube imfundo ize igogode kwezesayensi. UNksz Khoza (20) uthweswe iziqu ze-Bachelor of Science Degree in Geological Sciences, okuyisigaba sempilo asichaze ngokuthi simjabulisile futhi senza ukuthi wazizwa ethobekile futhi eshisekela nokuthi angabe esaphelela kusona - kepha aqhubeke nemfundo yakhe. “Ngijabule kakhulu ngakho futhi kwenza ukuthi ngizizwe ngithobekile kakhulu kozakwethu, ngakho ngiyaziqhenya ngokuthi ngikwaze ukuqopha umlando omuhle kangaka - nengibona ukuthi uzongikhuthaza kakhulu ukuqhubeka ngisebenze kanzima empilweni,” usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe okumkhuthaze ukwenza lezi zifundo wukuthi unothando lokushisekela ukwazi kabanzi ngomhlaba nakho konke okukuwona, nokuthi kusebenza kanjani. “Bengihlale nginentshisekelo yokwazi ukuthi umhlaba usebenza kanjani, nakho konke okwenzekayo kuwona nangawo ukuthi kwenzeka kanjani nomthelela wakho ezigigabeni zansuku onke esingenawo amandla okuzivimba nokuzilawula. “Uthando lwami lwalo mkhakha lukhuliswe wukufuna ukuqonda imvelo nokusebenza kwayo ngendlela ejulile, ngase ngigxila kwi-geology ngoba ngifuna ukuqonda kabanzi ngamatshe, amadalwa, imikhiqizo embiwa phansi nomhlabathi okusuka kuwona,” kulanda uNksz Khoza. Uthe ngenkathi esenza lo mkhakha, ubethanda kakhulu izifundo zawo ebezimxukuza ugebhezi futhi zenza ukuthi uthole ulwazi olunzulu lomlando wokudaleka kwezinto esizibonayo emhlabeni okubalwa kuzona i-Structural Geology, Palaeontology, Geochemistry, Sedimentology ne-Geological Evolution of Southern Africa. “Manje sengivele ngiqhubeka ne-honours degree in Geology, kanti izinhlelo zami ngekusasa wukuthi ngiqhubeke ngikhule kwezemfundo yalo mkhakha engikuwona, njengoba sekuvele kusezinhlelweni zami ukuthi uma ngiphothula i-honours, ngiqhubeke futhi nocwaningo lwe-Master's ezogxila kwi-structural geology, geophysics ne-GIS application in geology,” kusho yena. UNksz Khoza uthe wethemba ukuthi ulwazi azogcina enalo lwemfundo luzosiza ukuza nomehluko emkhakheni wezokumbiwa phansi, wase ekhuthaza abeza ngemva kwakhe ukuthi baphokophele ukufeza amaphupho abo kungakhathalekile ukuthi bangakanani ngokweminyaka.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI kamaskandi uGqizile Khanyile nomngani wakhe uMlondi Msweli - sebezakhele ugazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngama-video abo begconana UKUGCONANA sakuxabana uma behlezi ndawonye, okuhambisana namancoko avame ukuphetha ngempikiswano sekwakhele idumela nogazi umculi kamaskandi uGqizile Khanyile nomngani wakhe uMlondli Msweli owaziwa ngeShoshozela. Abaconsi phansi kubalandeli ngenxa yama-video abavame ukuwenza behlezi ndawonye, kokunye baqophe bedla bebanga ukudla noma bexoxa futhi bephikisana ngezinto ezehlukene. Ukuthandwa kwabo kufakazelwa wukukhula kwezinombolo zabantu ababalandelayo manje njengoba uGqizile esenabalandeli abangaphezu kuka-378 000 kwiFacebook, abawu–190 000 nama-like awu-3 million kwiTikTok. UMsweli yena ulandelwa abantu abangaphezu kuka-175 000 kwiFacebook, abawu-26 000 nama-like awu-353 000 kwiTikTok. UMCULI kamaskandi uGqizile Khanyile nomngani wakhe uMlondi Msweli - sebezakhele ugazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngama-video abo begconana Kuxoxwa noGqizile, owaziwa ngokuthi uBende - uthe lokho kwaqala sakudlala kwathi ngelinye ilanga baqopha i-video okwathi bangayifaka emakhasini abo kwiFacebook, abantu bakhombisa ukuyithakasela kakhulu. “Into yethu iqale ngokuthi umngani wami uMsweli vele uwumuntu onamancoko kakhulu, okuthi noma sizihlalele sixoxa into ebalulekile yena alokhu encokola. Kuqale lapho-ke ngokuthi uma ekhuzwa, angakhuzeki - kuze kusize ukuthi kungenelele mina uma kukhona esikuxoxayo  sizihlalele nezinye izinsizwa esizwana nesazana nazo,” kusho uGqizile. UMCULI kamaskandi uGqizile Khanyile nomngani wakhe uMlondi Msweli - sebezakhele ugazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngama-video abo begconana Abaningi abake babone ama-video alezi zinsizwa bazokhumbula futhi bazi ukuthi zivame ukuphikisana ngamancoko azo okuthi uma kukhuzwa omunye, okhuzayo athi: “awukahle, awukahle wena” - osekuphenduke itemu elisetshenziswa nangabalandeli babo. “Yinto esizoqhubeka siyenze ngoba siyabona ukuthi abantu bayayijabulela kakhulu, futhi iyasiza ngokuthi isigcine sisematheni ebantwini - okungisiza kakhulu-ke mina njengoba ngibuye ngigxile emculweni ukuthi ngingalibaleki kubalandeli bami,” kulanda uGqizile. Lezi zinsizwa zineminyaka emithathu zazana manje. UGqizile udabuka KwaCholwane, eNkandla, kuthi uMsweli yena kube ngowaseCinci, eMpangeni. Okwamanje bahlala ndawonye KwaMashu, eThekwini.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUVUKE umunyu kuNksz Thembile Biyela ekhumbula ubunzima adlule kubho empilweni ngenkathi ethweswa iziqu zobuthishela e-UKZN UKUTHUKWA ngapha nangapha, namagama angemahle ayebhekiswe kuyena ekhulelwe esemncane efunda emabangeni aphezulu, ukusebenzisele ukuthi kube yisikhuthazi sokuthi afeze okuhle nabekufisa ngempilo yakhe, wathweswa iziqu zobuthishela enyuvesi. Lowo uNksz Thembile Biyela waseNdwedwe, ongesinye sezitshudeni ezithweswe iziqu zemikhakha ehlukene e-University of KwaZulu-Natal kuleli sonto. Emukela lezi ziqu uNksz Biyela, uvukwe wumunyu ekhumbula bonke lobo buhlungu adlule kubo, wakhumbula unyaka owawunzima kakhulu kuyena u-2016 lapho akhulelwa khona esafunda uGrade 11, abaningi bemgxeka ngephutha alenza. “Izenzo zabantu kimina ngenkathi ngibhekene naleso simo zazenza ukuthi ngizizwe sengathi impilo yami ngeke isaya phambili. Babengihleka, bengihleba futhi bengiphatha kabi kangangokuthi ngisho nangenkathi sengibuyela esikoleni ngangizizwa ngingamukelekile,” usho kanje. KUVUKE umunyu  kuNksz Thembile Biyela, ekhumbula ubunzima adlule kubo empilweni ngenkathi ethweswa iziqu zobuthishela e-UKZN Eqhuba, uthe okunye okwafana nokuthela usawoti esilondeni wukuthi ukhulele ekhaya ebelingamile kahle emalini, kangangokuthi kwesinye isikhathi ubeya esikoleni engadlile. “Impilo ibe nzima ngokuphindiwe sengifeyila u-matric, okwenza ngazizwa ngiyisahluleki futhi kwenza ukuthi ngiqale nokukholwa yizinto ezimbi ezazishiwo abantu ngami.  Konke lokho kwacishe kwaqeda nya ngempilo yami,” kusho uNksz Biyela. Uthe emva kwalokho wahlala ekhaya iminyaka embalwa, esakhulisa umntwana  futhi ezama nokukhokha umoya. Wagcina ebuyele esikoleni waze waphasa u-matric ayesewenza okwesibili ngo-2020. Lokho kwamsiza ukuqhubeka nemfundo yakhe enyuvesi. Nalapho bekungelula neze njengoba bekumele ukuthi abhekane nomthwalo wokufunda, ebe ekhulisa umntwana. Ukubhimba kwemali kwakungamnike thuba kodwa waphokophela ngoba efisa ukusebenzisa imfundo ukucaba indlela yekusasa elihle. “Ngifuna ukuthi izingane zami zikhule zazi ukuthi noma ngabe kunzima kangakanani empilweni yakho, kepha akumele ukuthi uphonse ithawula - futhi ngifuna nokukhombisa abantu ukuthi ukuzala usemncane akukuhle kodwa akukuvimbi ukufeza amaphupho akho,” usho kanje.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Lwandile Nkwanyana, othweswe iziqu ze-Diploma in Public Management e-DUT UKUNGAFELI ngaphakathi kukaNksz Lwandile Nkwanyana, owasebenzisa izinkundla zokuxhumana ukuzwakalisa ukukhathazeka kwakhe ngokuchithwa kwesicelo sokufunda enyuvesi ngendlela engaqondakali, kumnike umvuzo nezithelo ezibonakalayo. UNksz Nkwanyana (26) waseBhanganomo, KwaNongoma, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal - wacishe wangaqhubeka nemfundo yakhe enyuvesi ngenkathi ehambela ubala eDurban University of Technology (DUT), ophikweni iNdumiso, eMgungundlovu, echithwa esefikile. “Kwaba yisimo esibuhlungu kakhulu kimina leso ngoba ngase ngilinde isikhathi eside ukuthi ngithole ithuba lokufunda emva kokuphothula u-matric ngo-2017, kepha ngingabi nenhlanhla yokwamukelwa kwesicelo sami emanyuvesi ehlukene. “Kuthe ngo-2022 kwamukelwa isicelo sami sokwenza izifundo ze-Diploma in Public Management e-DUT, kodwa ngajabha sengifikile khona ngiyobhalisa ngoJanuwari ngo-2023, sebengitshela ukuthi isikhala sami sesinikwe omunye umuntu,” kusho yena. UNKSZ Lwandile Nkwanyana, othweswe iziqu ze-Diploma in Public Management e-DUT Nokho sekuwumlando manje ukuthi uNksz Nkwanyana usethweswe iziqu zalo mkhakha ngenxa yokuthi  ngenkathi echithwa kanjena, akafelanga ngaphakathi - kunalokho wanikela ekhasini leFacebook iLadies House, waneka usizi lwakhe, echaza okumehlele. “Ngachaza ukuthi kwenzekeni, ngizwakalisa nokuphoxeka kwami ukuthi ngase ngihambe ibanga elide kangaka ngisuka eGoli lapho ebese ngihlala khona nomama ongasebenzi, ngithi ngiyofunda eMgungundlovu ngenhloso yokushintsha isimo sasekhaya. “Nangempela ngaba nenhlanhla, ngathintwa uNksz Zama Mncube owayesesigungwini esiphethe izitshudeni ngaleso sikhathi. Wathembisa ukungisiza ukulungisa inkinga yami. Kwaba njalo, wangithinta sekulungile konke ngakusasa. Ngaphindela khona ngayofunda futhi baba baningi nabangizwela, bangipha nemali,” kusho uNksz Nkwanyana. Eqhuba, uthe nokho akubanga lula konke njengoba kwathi esaqhubeka nokufunda ngonyaka wokuqala, washonelwa wubaba wengane yakhe eneminyaka emihlanu manje, owashona ngokudutshulwa. “Konke lokho kwangiphazamisa kakhulu emoyeni nasenhliziyweni yami, kepha ngaphokophela ngoba ngangifisa ukuthi ngiphumelele ngemfundo yami. Kuphela ngizwela laba engangichithwe nabo ngalowa nyaka. Iningi labo lagcina lingalitholalanga ithuba elatholwa yimina ngoba nami ngasukuma, ngangafela ngaphakathi,” kusho uNksz Nkwanyana okumanje uqhubeka nemfundo yakhe njengoba esenza i-Advanced Diploma in Public Management and Administration khona e-DUT.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
