text: INTOKAZI ewunobuhle uDkt Lungile Ngcobo, ithweswe iziqu ze-Doctor of Philosophy in Business and Information Management e-DUT INTOKAZI eyathweswa isicoco sika-Miss DUT wango-2016, uDkt Lungile Ngcobo,  isiphonsele inselelo onobuhle abasebasha nabeza emva kwayo ukuba bangathembeli ebuhleni kuphela ukuze bafike empumelelwei, kepha bakhuthale baqinise kakhulu olwazini lwemfundo. UDkt Ngcobo usho njalo emva kokuthweswa iziqu ze-Doctor of Philosophy in Business and Information Management emcimbini wokwethweswa iziqu izitshudeni zemikhakha ehlukene eDurban University of Technology (DUT), obukuleli sonto eMgungundlovu, KwaZulu-Natal. Lo zime kumanje ufundisa khona e-DUT lapho eqeqesha abafundi kwezezimali nezamabhizinisi ophikweni lwayo oluseMidlands. Uthe ubheke ukuqhubeka azihlomise ngolwazi lwezemfundo ukuze akhuthaze abanye onobuhle ebe ezisiza naye ngalolo lwazi empilweni yakhe. “Ukuthola lezi ziqu zobudokotela kungaphezu kokuphumelela ngemfundo kimina. Ngikufanisa nokufeza isithembiso seminyaka engasenza kimina uqobo ngo-2016 ngenkathi ngithola iziqu zami zokuqala ze-Diploma in Management, lapho engazitshela khona ukuthi akusekho lutho okungase kuphazamise uhambo lwami lwezemfundo,” kusho uDkt Ngcobo. INTOKAZI ewunobuhle uDkt Lungile Ngcobo, ithweswe iziqu ze-Doctor of Philosophy in Business and Information Management e-DUT Lesi singqazu siqale ukufunda e-DUT ngo-2012 emkhakheni we-National Diploma in Management, okuthe ngo-2017 saqhubekela kwi-Bachelor of Technology in Management, kwase kuthi ngo-2021 senza iMaster of Management Sciences in Administration and Information Management. “Emva kokuphothula iMaster’s yami ngo-2023, ngashiya konke engangikwenza eNorth West ngaleso sikhathi, ngabuyela eMgungundlovu ngiyofunda, okwaba yisinqumo esingelula neze ngoba ngashiya phansi umsebenzi wami owawungiphethe kahle ngenzela ukufeza iphupho lami lokufunda ngigogode,” sisho kanje. Elandisa ngocwaningo lwezifundo zakhe, uDkt Ngcobo uthe ubegxile kakhulu ekubhekeni ukuthi ukunikezela ngolwazi oluseqophelweni eliphezulu kwabezikhungo zemfundo ephakeme kungazisiza kanjani futhi kangakanani izitshudeni ukuze zicijeke emqondweni futhi zikwazi ukuthatha izinqumo eziphusile ngempilo yazo. UDkt Ngcobo ubonge kakhulu abeHlomisa Skills Academy ngethuba abamnike lona lomfundaze omsize ukuphothula izifundo zakhe zobudokotela.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: OWAYENGUMSAKAZI woKhozi FM uNgizwe 'Sinqa Semfene' Mchunu UKUTHULA emoyeni nokuphila impilo engenamsindo kubukeka kusazoqhubeka kube ngabakhwekazi empilweni yowayengumsakazi woKhozi FM uNgizwe ‘Sinqe Semfene’ Mchunu, obhekene notalatiya lwezinkinga okubonakala zingamnike thuba lokuphefumula. Lokhu kungenxa yokwanda kwezinkinga ezibhekene noMchunu njengoba kumanje nje kusabatshazwa isihluku esenzeke kushiswa umuzi wakhe oseMbumbulu, ogwini oluseNingizmu yeTheku ngeSonto - wasala uwumlotha, kusha yonke into. Evikini elilodwa kwenzeka konke lokho, inhlangano engenzi nzuzo i-Ahmed Kathrada Foundation nayo isizwakalise ilaka layo, yagxeka uNgizwe ngenkulumo ayenze kwesinye seziqephu zohlelo lwakhe olusesitshini sikaMacG kwiYouTube oluthi Bhinca Nation. Le nhlangano ikhale ngokuthi enye yezinkulumo zikaNgizwe nasuke ebameme ohlelweni lwakhe iwukucwasa ngokwebala futhi yagxeka kakhulu ukuvama kwabo ukusebenzisa igama eliwukucwasa amaNdiya ngokwebala elithi “amakula”. I-Ahmed Kathrada ixwayise nangokuthi iyabona umthelela omubi odalwa yizinkulumo zikaMchunu ezinokucwasa ngokwebala, ekhale ngokuthi kuphehla nokubhebhethekisa izenzo zodlame emphakathini, kangangokuthi uma kunganqandwa kungagcina kudala ukuthi lesi simo singalawuleki. OWAYENGUMSAKAZI woKhozi FM uNgizwe 'Sinqa Semfene' Mchunu Kuleso siqephu uNgizwe waphawula wathi: “Uyabona nje amaChina anomqondo ofanayo nowamak**la. AmaNdiya asehlale kuleli zwe iminyaka engaphezu kuka-150, ehlukumeza abantu bakithi ezimbonini nasezinkampanini ezahlukene ahola kuzona.” Owayeyisihambeli sakhe ngalelo langa, uNota Baloyi, yena waphendula wathi: “Uqinisile, futhi amaNdiya ayenalo ithuba lokuthi aphindele ezweni lawo, kwakumele akwenze lokho kusukela ngabo-1924 kuya ku-1931.” Khona lapho futhi, kuleli sonto iNkantolo ePhakeme yasePitoli ivale uNgizwe ukuthi aqhubeke akhulume izinkulumo ezihlambalazayo ngomholi we-Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF), uMnuz Julius Malema - obemvulele icala lokuhlambalaza nelokumcekela phansi isithunzi. Lokhu kusukela ekutheni uMchunu ubesolwa ngokuthi wathi ekhuluma kwesinye sezithangami zabezindaba, waveza izinsolo zokuthi uMalema wathola imalii ewu-R60 million kubantu bokufika baseNigeria abashushumbisa izidakamizwa kuleli zwe. Wadalula nokuthi uMalema angenza noma yini ukusiza ukuvikela abantu bokufika abakuleli zwe ngokungemthetho ngoba kukhona abamfumbathisa khona. Isinqumo ngaleli cala kube wukuthi uNgizwe angaphinde akhulume noma abhale, aze ashicilele noma yini engaba yinkulumo ewukuhlambalaza ngoMalema. Ube eseyalelwa nokuthi akhokhe zonke izindleko zabameli bakaMalema kuleli cala, futhi wabekelwa nomnqamlajuqu wokuvela eNkantolo ngoLwesibili oluzayo ukuzoveza ukuthi kungani kumele kuqhutshekwe ngalezi zinqumo ezikhishwe kuleli cala. Kuphinde kwazamazama izinkundla zokuxhumana ngoLwesithathu ntambama ngenkathi intandokazi yomculi kamaskandi uKhuzani ‘Indlamlenze’ Mpungose, ebhala ekhasini lakhe likaFacebook ukuthi ufuna ukuthi kungaphinde kukhulunywe lutho ngegama lakhe kulolu hlelo lukaNgizwe iBhinca Nation. Indlamlenze ithe isikhathele wukuthi kulokhu kuhlanjalazwa igama lalo kulolu hlelo, yase yesabisa ngokuthi uma ekucelayo kungenzeki, izoluvala thaqa lolu hlelo.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: IBANDLA i-Morning Star Ministries linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE NGOKUJWAYELEKILE amabandla aseZayoni ahlangana uma kunemincintiswano yomculo, nezinkonzo zemishado okusuke kumenywane kuzona ngenhloso yokuqhoshelana ngokuthi wubani onikele kakhulu, nokuthi yiliphi ibandla elihlanzekile nelicula kangcono kunelinye. Kepha kwenzeke okwehlukile nokungajwayelekile kwi-Zion Worship Experience, umbuthano obuseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo - obekuhloswe ngawo ukwakha ubumbano emabandleni ehlukene aseZayoni nokudumisa uNkulunkulu ndawonye. Lo mbuthano, obuqala ukwenziwa kulo nyaka - ubuhlelwe ngokubambisana amabandla amahlanu aseZayoni angamanye anedumela kakhulu okuyi-CCAC Ministries, Throne of Grace, River of Mercy Ministries, Enyonini Amaphiko Ayisithupha ne-Burning Fire of God. IBANDLA i-River of Mercy Ministries linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE Isasasa nokuthakaselwa kwalo mbuthano kufakazelwe wukugcwala phama kwezihambeli ebeziwuthamele ebeziphuma ezindaweni ezihlukene, nakwezinye izifundazwe imbala. Umcimbi uvulwe ngomculo webandla i-Morning Star Ministries, ebelingekho ohlwini lwalawa amahlanu, kodwa okuvele ukuthi lizicelele ukweseka lo mcimbi ngokunandisa kuwona, futhi lanikela ngoR25 000 wokuthenga amathikithi awu-100 ukusiza ukuxhaseka komcimbi. IBANDLA i-eNyonini Amaphiko Ayisithupha linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE Emva kwayo kuqhubeke uhlelo lo mcimbi lokunandisa kwala mabandla amahlanu abehlele lo mcimbi, engena ephuma esteji ejabulisa abantu ngomculo onomyalezo wethemba, futhi oveza noqhakambisa ubukhona bukaNkulunkulu; kwagwatshwa, kwakuhle kwanjeyana. IBANDLA i-CCAC Ministries linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE Omunye wabahleli balo mcimbi, uMnuz Mhlengi Ntshapha weRiver of Mercy Ministries, uthe bekuhlale kubakhathaza ukuthi ayikho imibuthano lapho amaZayoni ehlangana khona nje kungonakele lutho - ukuzodumisa uNkulunkulu nokukhulisana kubhekwe phambili. “Yingakho sibone kusemqoka ukuthi sihlangane kanjena ukuthi ngenhloso yokwakha ubunye, futhi siqinise ubudlelwano emabandleni ehlukene aseZayoni - ukusiza ukubulala ubutha, ukubukelana phansi nokuqhoshelana okuphakathi kwethu,” kusho uNtshapha. IBANDLA i-Throne of Grace linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE Umholi webandla i-CCAC Ministries, u-Archbishop Mlamuli Zondo yena uthe bafisa ukuthi lokhu abakwenzile manje kukhuthaze amanye amabandla aseZayoni ukweseka nokulandela umbono wabo ukusiza ukuthi kukhule amaZayoni futhi kwande ukubumbana kuwona. UNtshapha uthe manje sebebheke ukuthi bakhele kulokhu abakwenzile ukusiza ukuthi i-Zion Worship Experience ingabi ngeyamabandla athile kuphela, kepha ikhule ize igcine yenziwa ezindaweni ezinkulu njengako-ICC, eThekwini - bese inabela nakwezinye izifundazwe. IBANDLA i-Burning Fire of God linandisa kwiZion Worship Experience, ebiseFaith in The Word Ministries, eKenville, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKELA kwesokunxele woSiyamthanda Nxumalo, Samkelo Ndlovu, Kay Sibiya noSimphiwe Ngema - abalingisa phambili emdlalweni omusha wakwiMzansi Magic othi Kuningi UBUHLUNGU nesilonda esisala komama abondla izingane ngabodwana ngenxa yobaba abangondli yikhona okuzogqama kakhulu emdlalweni omfishane ozokhonjiswa kwiMzansi Magic othi Kuningi, ozoqala ukukhonjiswa ngoMsombuluko ngo-7 kusihlwa. Kulo mdlalo ozokhonjiswa iziqephu ezintathu kuzogqama uMbali olingiswa wuSamkelo Ndlovu, ongumama okhulisa umntwana womfana ngayedwana. UMbali unebhizinisi lokuhlela imishado, okuthi ngokuqhubeka kwesikhathi ahlangane noyise wengane yakhe ongondli. Kuthi esemaphakathi nezinhlelo zokuhlela umshado, athole ukuthi ozoshada uyise wengane yakhe uMandla, olingiswa wuKay Sibiya, ozoshada noSophie - olingiswa uSimphiwe Ngema. Exoxa ngokulingisa kulo mdlalo, uSamkelo uthe iKuningi ixoxa indaba yobaba abangazondli izingane zabo, bese futhi ubeka obala ukuthi lokhu kubahlukumeza kangakanani abantu besifazane abasuke bebhekene nomthwalo wokukhulisa izingane zabo ngabodwana. USAMKELO NDLOVU, omunye wabalingisi abazogqama emdlalweni omusha wakwiMzansi Magic othi Kuningi “Kuzovela futhi kucace ngokusobala ukuthi le nkinga inomthelela omubi kangakanani emphakathini, ikakhulu ngoba sekwaze kwajwayeleka ukuthi umuntu wesifazane okhulisa umntwana yedwa kuthiwa unamandla ekubeni elimala ngaphakathi,” usho kanje. Eqhuba uthe okunye akuthanda ngalo mdlalo wukuthi uveza futhi ugqamise ukuthi abantu besifazane kumele bazikhulumele, bangavumeli izimo ezinjena zibacindezele. “Baningi abesifazane abanjengoMbali emphakathini esiphila kuwona abalwela ukuthi abantwana babo baphile impilo engcono ngakho ngithemba ukuthi lo mdlalo uzokhuthaza nabanye ukuthi benze okufanayo ukuze kunqotshwe le nkinga ezweni,” usho kanje.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INHLOKO yoPhiko lwezaBathengi nokuThuthukisa amaBhizinisi eStandard Bank, uNkk Naledzani Mosomane OSOMABHIZINISI abasafufusa nabafisa ukuchuma kwezamabhizinisi banengqayizivele yethuba lokufeza lokho ngohlelo lwe-Standard Bank lokufukula osomabhizinisi abangakachumi lwaminyaka yonke i-Standard Bank Kasi SME Pitch Challenge. I-Standard Bank iqinisekise ukuthi nakulo nyaka luyabuya lolu hlelo olukhuza ibuya ihlandla lesine, luhambisana nesamba somklomelo ka-R1 million - osekuvele kuvuliwe ukungenela kulona okuzoze kuvalwe ngoMeyi 22. Kanjengaminyaka yonke, nakulo nyaka kuzoqokwa osomabhizinisi abawu-10 isifundazwe ngasinye, abazonikwa ithuba lokukhuluma nokudayisa amabhizinisi abo emajajini azobe ehlunga, bese kuqokwa abathathu kubona isifundazwe ngasinye - bese abanqobayo kubona bakhale bemuke no-R50 000, bese abaphume isibili nesithathu baduduzwe ngo-R10 000. Akupheleli lapho, njengoba kuzothi labo somabhizinisi abayisishiyagalolunye abazobe benqobe ezifundazweni, bazobe sebeqhubekela kwi-Standard Bank Kasi SME Natonal Pitch Challenge, lapho bezobe sebebanga khona isamba somklomelo ka-R1 million wozonqoba. INhloko yoPhiko lwezaBathengi nokuThuthukisa amaBhizinisi eStandard Bank, uNkk Naledzani Mosomane, ithe okunye okuhle ngalokho wukuthi osomabhizinisi abangu-10 abahambe phambilini bazothola nethuba lokufakwa ohlelweni lokubacebisa nokubachushisa ngamasu nezindlela zokubasiza ukuthuthukisa amabhizinisi abo kubhekwe phambili. “Lokhu kuyingxenye yezindlela esizibophezela ngazo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi osomabhizinisi abehlukene bayathuthuka ezweni lethu nokuphendla indlela yamathuba okufukula umnotho, ngoba siqonda ukuthi osomabhizinisi abasafufusa baneqhaza elimqoka abalibambayo emphakathini ngakho akumele ukuthi sibayekelele bezabalaze ngabodwana,” usho kanje. Imigomo ezolandelwa kwabazongenela kulo nyaka imi kanjena: Osomabhizinisi abafisa ukungenela bengangena kwi-website yaseStandard Bank ukuthola imininingwane efanele yokumele bakwenze ukuze bangenele.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UDJ Tira, oqhulula inqwaba yezingoma zeGqom - okuvela ukuthi yilona elingase ligcina lihamba phambili ngokulalelwa kakhulu ezweni eminyakeni ezayo INDLELA okulalelwa nokuthengwa umculo ngayo nsuku zonke ikhomba ukuthi umculo weGqom yiwona ozogcina uqengeleza phambili ngokulalelwa nangokuthengwa kakhulu eNingizimu Afrika. Lokho kushiwo yiNhloko yoPhiko lwezamaCiko nokuSebenzisana eSpotify, uMnuz Henco Harmse - akusho ngenkathi ekhuluma kwesinye sezigcawu zokucobelana ngolwazi lwezobuciko ebesenzwe yile nkampani eGoli kuleli sonto. UHarmse uthe lokhu kudalwa wukwanda kwabantu abathakasela lo mculo minyaka yonke, okufakazelwa wukukhula kwezibalo zokulalelwa kwawo ngo-92% kusuka eminyakeni emihlanu edlule kuze kuzoba yimanje. UMCULI we-pop uTyla wuyena osazihola phambili ngokulalelwa kakhulu kwiSpotify “Okunye futhi esikuqaphelayo ngezibalo zabantu abalalela umculo kwiSpotify wukuthi eminyakeni emihlanu edlule kuze kuzoba yimanje kukhule ngo-450% ukulalelwa komculo nje jikelele emazweni ehlukene ase-Afrika, okuyisimo esihle nesizosiza kakhulu amaciko, usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe okunye abakuqaphelile wukuthi umculo wama-piano nawo ungeminye yemiculo elokhu yenza kahle kakhulu njengoba kule minyaka emihlanu ukhombe ukwenyuka ngo-98%, okukhomba ukuthi ukhula ngokuphindaphindiwe njalo ngonyaka. “Singekushiye ngaphandle nokuthi umculo wesintu umaskandi nawo ugila izimanga emakethe njengoba ikhule ngo-174% indlela olalelwa ngawo kwiSpotify kule minyaka emihlanu edlule kuze kuzoba yimanje,” kusho uHarmse. UMCULI kamaskandi Umafikizolo ngelinye lamaciko okuvela ukuthi enze kahle kakhulu kwiSpotify ngonyaka odlule IMenenja yoPhiko lwezamaCiko, iziTebele zomCulo nokuSebenzisana eSpotify, uNksz Jodie Tabisher, yona idalule ukuthi okunye okugqamile ngenkathi becwaninga izibalo zabo wukuthi umculi kamaskandi Umafikizolo ugile izimanga nyakenye ngengoma yakhe ethi Uyoncengwa Unyoko edobe abantu abangaphezu kwa-15 million ukuyilalela. UNksz Tabisher udalule nokuthi umculi we-pop uTyla wuyena olokhu ehambe phambili njalo ngokulalelwa nokuthengwa kakhulu komculo wakhe kusuka ngo-2023 kuze kuzoba yimanje, okufakazelwa wukuthi ingoma yakhe yango-2023 ethi Water, isilalelwe ngaphezu kwa-100 million. “Okunye esikuqaphelile nesikushayela ihlombe elikhulu wukukhula kwesibalo sabantu abalalela umculo weRn’B yakuleli zwe, obekukade kungavamile ukwenzeka kule minyaka edlule njengoba abantu bebethanda ukulalelwa amaciko aphesheya kwezilwandle enza lolu hlobo lomculo, osekujikile manje njengoba sebegxile kowamaciko abo,” kusho yena.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UPAPA Penny usule isigubhukane ekubeni yilungu leMK Party nasekubeni yilungu laleli qembu ePhalamende UMAKADEBONA emculweni nezikaqedisizingu obesegxile kwezepolitiki, uGezane Eric Kobane, odume ngelikaPapa Penny - ukhale ngobunyoka ebuholini beqembu lezepolitiki uMkhonto Wesizwe Party (MK) ngenkathi esula isigubhukane kulona ngoLwesihlanu. Encwadini yakhe yokwesula ayibhekise kumholi weqembu uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uPapa Penny uthe ukwesula ekubeni yilungu le-MKP nasekubeni yilungu layo ePhalamende kube yisinqumo esingelula neze nesimphule inhliziyo. Uthe wajoyina i-MK Party ngokwakhe ngoba efuna ukukhulula abantu bakuleli zwe, kodwa lokho kwaphazamiseka ngenxa yengxenye ethile yobuholi baleli qembu eLimpopo - akhale ngokuthi idale ukuthi abe nyamanambana emalungwini eqembu. Ukhale nangokuthi ubebhekene nezimpi ebeziqondiswe kuyena, ehlukunyezwa futhi kwenziwa isiqiniseko sokuthi uhlale ezizwa ecindezelekile. Wengeze nangokuthi bekuze kusetshenziswane nabezindaba ukucekela phansi isithunzi sakhe negama lakhe akusebenzele kanzima. UPAPA Penny usule isigubhukane ekubeni yilungu leMK Party nasekubeni yilungu laleli qembu ePhalamende Image: VUYILE MADWANTSI Njengoba ngiwumuntu okhathalele inhlalakahle yabantu neyomphakathi, bengingazibekezelela lezi zimo ukube beziyimbangela yabanye abantu abaseceleni. Manje inkinga yami wukuthi ziqhamuka ngaphakathi eqenjini ebengikulona okwenza ukuthi kube nzima ukuzishaya indiva sengathi angiboni ngibe ngibona kahle,” kusho uPapa Penny. Nokho uthe nakuba kunjalo, uyazibongela kuZuma ngokumnika ithuba lokuthi amele iqembu ePhalamende futhi amele nabantu baseNingizimu Afrika esebenzisa amandla eMK Party. Leli qembu eliholwa wuZuma owayengumengameli wezwe, lilokhu liqhubeke njalo nokubhekana nezinkinga ezilizamazamisayo selokhu langenela ukhetho lukazwelonke eminyakeni emibili edlule, okufakazelwa wukuhlale kushintsha izinto ngaphakathi kulona. Sekuvamile ukuthi lihlale lipheka lithulula ezikhundleni ezihlukene. Ukwesula kukaPapa Penny kulindeleke ukuthi kushaye kuzwele kuleli qembu eLimpopo, ikakhulu kuMasipala wesifunda iMopani naseGiyani, okuyilapho enabalandeli kakhulu khona. UPapa Penny uke waba nohlelo kwiMzansi Magic obeluthandwa kakhulu oluthi Papa Penny Ahe - nolwakhonjiswa amasizini amane. Wafungiswa ukuba yilungu lePhalamende le-MK Party emva kokhetho lukazwelonke ngo-2024.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI we-house ne-deep house uSboniso L Musician usematheni kulezi zinsuku ngecwecwe lakhe elisha elithi Loss & Love EP “YIQINIISO elingenakuphikwa ukuthi akuwona wonke umuntu ojatshuliswa wuthando ngakho ngibone kukuhle ukuthi ngisebenzise ubuciko bomculo ukuzwakalisa ilaka lalabo abaphoxekile othandweni, ngibe ngiveza futhi ubuhle nobumnandi bokuthandwa.” Usho kanjalo umculi we-house ne-deep house, uSboniso L Musician elandisa ngecwecwe lakhe elisha elisihloko sithi Loss & Love EP, eliphume ngenyanga edlule nelididiyele izingoma ezinhlanu eziqukethe umyalezo owehlukene oweyamene nomuzwa wothando. USboniso waKwandengezi, eThekwini, udalule ukuthi kulo msebenzi usebenzisane nabaculi oDa Alto noBrandon Dhludhlu; kanjalo noDa Gifto - ofake isandla ekuphrojuseni izingoma zawo. “Lo msebenzi uyinhlanganisela yezingoma ezikhuluma ngobuhlungu bokuthanda umuntu kepha yena engakuthandi ngale ndlela omthanda ngayo, futhi iveza obala ukuthi ukuphoxwa ngabantu obathandayo kungenza ukuthi ugcine ungasakholelwa othandweni. Zikhona futhi izingoma ezimbalwa eziveza ukuthi nakuba kunjalo, kodwa lukhona uthando lweqiniso,” usho kanje. UMCULI we-house ne-deep house uSboniso L Musician usematheni kulezi zinsuku ngecwecwe lakhe elisha elithi Loss & Love EP Eqhuba, uthe okunye abhale nacula ngakho kwi-Loss & Love EP kusukela ezimweni abhekane nazo okwangempela empilweni yakhe, nabone kukuhle ukusebenzisa ubuciko ukuzelapha ngokukhipha ubuhlungu abuzwayo ngaphakathi enhlizweni yakhe. “Kungithathe cishe izinyanga ezimbili ukwenza lo msebenzi ngiwuqede, engisizwe kakhulu nawukuthi vele ngiwumuntu ohlale ese-studio isikhathi esiningi ngipheka umculo engihlela ukulokhu ngiwukhipha kancane, kancane ngize ngichume kule ndima,” kusho yena. Leli ciko igama lalo lokuzalwa wuSiboniso Msweli. Ligqame emculweni ngecwecwe lalo lokuqala eliphume nyakenye elithi The Weight of Silence; kanti ngale kwalokho selisebenze namanye amaciko esingabala kuwona oMngomezulu, uLance Hebron noKnightSA.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI we-house nama-piano uDe Rose ufike kwezwakala emculweni UMA kubalwa izintokazi ezifike kwezwakala emculweni nyakenye, alisali ngaphandle igama lentokazi yaseMlaza, eningizimu yeTheku - uDe Rose ongelinye lamaciko afike kwezwakala, egila izimanga ngengoma ethi Lutho ekwi-albhmau kaDJ Jaivane ethi Onkgopotse. Ngale kwe-Lutho edayise ama-stream angaphezu kwa-50 million, uDe Rose ungenise futhi ngengoma yakhe noSfarzo ethi Hello, nayo eyenze kahle idayisa i-platinum eliphindwe kabili, futhi wenza kahle nange-albhamu yakhe yokuqala ephume ngoNovemba nyakenye ethi 925. Elandisa ngokumsize ukufeza konke lokhu esikhathini esifishaane esemculweni futhi eyiciko lesifazane, uthe usizwe wukuthi uziveze ngendlela ehlukile kunamanye amaciko njengoba yena ecula ngesigqi esiyinhlanganisela yeRn’B ne-Hip-Hop, okwenza ukuthi ehluke kwabanye. “Lokho kwenza ukuthi ngizwakale ngendlela eyehlukile kokujwayelekile, kangangokuthi baningi abantu abavame ukungibuza ukuthi ngake ngaba wumrepha yini, okukhomba ukuthi indlela engicula ngayo ayifani nhlobo nabajwayele ukukulalela emculweni,” usho kanje. UMCULI we-house nama-piano uDe Rose ufike kwezwakala emculweni Eqhuba, uDe Rose uthe okunye akuqikelelayo wukuthi noma ngabe ucula ingoma enomyalezo ongaqondene nye ngqo, kepha kumele umyalezo wayo uqine futhi ube nesisindo - okuthola indawo ekhethekile endlebeni nasemqondweni womlaleli. “Kufana nakule ngoma ethi Lutho, equkethe umyalezo ongangithinti kangako, kepha ngoba ngangazi ukuthi kukhona umuntu ozomthinta - ngavumela ukuthi ngibe sesimweni salowo myalezo ewuqukethe ukuze ngizokwenza ubulungiswa kuyona,” kulanda yena. Uthe uzimisele ukuqhubeka akhele kulokhu asekuzuzile manje ngomculo wakhe ukusiza ukucaba indlela yokufeza okunye okukhulu, nokuzomsiza ukukhula nokuchuma endimeni. UDe Rose igama lakhe lokuzalwa wuThandeka Cele, kanti kumanje usematheni ngengoma yakhe entsha eshaya ngesigqi seHip-Hop ethi Easy, apike kuyona oBlue Pappi noLowfeye. Usesebenze nenqwaba yamaciko okubalwa kuwona oFrank Mabeat, uTycoon, uBabalwa M, uSino Msolo, uKelvin Momo, uNomfundo Moh, uTyler ICU, iMurumba Pitch, uSoa Mattrix, uCnethemba Gonelo, uStixx, uSam Deep no-Omit ST ukukha nje phezulu.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI kamaskandi Umafikizolo, ngelinye lamaciko agile izimanga ngokulalelwa kakhulu kwiSpotify ngonyaka odlule KUKHUTHAZWE amaciko aseNingizimu Afrika ukuba aqhubeke asebenzise izilimi zawo ezehlukene zebele nezomdabu ukukhombisa ubuciko bawo, nokuzigqamisa ngendlela ehlukile kunejwayele ukusetshenziswa amaciko akwamanye amazwe. Lokho kungenxa yokugqama komculo wesintu umaskandi, ongeminye yemikhakha yomculo elalelwe kakhulu kwiSpotify. Izibalo ezikhishwe yile nkampani zikhombe ukuthi ikhule ngo-37% indlela okulalelwa ngayo umculo oculwa ngolimi isiZulu, okusho ukukhula ngo-120% kule minyaka emibili edlule. INhloko yoPhiko loMculo e-Afrika eseNingizimu kwiSpotify, uPhiona Okumu, idalule ukuthi lokhu kukhomba ukuthi abantu bayawuthakasela umculo ovutshelwe kusetshenziswa izilimi zomdabu, okuwuphawu lokuthi inkulu imakethe yawo emhlabeni. U-Okumu usho njalo ekhuluma kwesinye sezigcawu zokucobelana ngezobuciko saminyaka yonke ebesenziwe yiSpotify emahhovisi ayo amasha aseRosebank, eGoli, ngoLwesithathu. “Lokhu kukhombisa ukuthi akuphoqelekile ukuthi uze usebenzise izilimi zakwamanye amazwe ukugqamisa ubuciko bakho, ngakho sikhuthaza namanye amaciko asafika endimeni ukunganqeni ukucikoza esebenzisa izilimi zawo zebele ezehlukene,” usho kanje. Lezi zibalo zifakazelwe wukuthi umculi kamaskandi Umafikizolo ugile izimanga kwiSpotify nyakenye ngengoma yakhe ebishisa izikhotha ethi Uyoncengwa Unyoko, okuvela ukuthi idobe abantu abangaphezu kuka-15 million bayilalela. U-Okomu uthe okunye okubajabulisile wukuthi ibalelwa ngaphezu kuka-R504 million inzuzo yemali engeniswe wukulalelwa komculo wamaciko akuleli zwe ngonyaka odlule, nokuthi abe wu-67% amaciko akuleli zwe okube nezingoma zawo ebezingena zishintshana ohlwini lweziwu-50 ezisuke zihamba phambili ngenkathi kuqhubeka unyaka odlule. “Ngale kwalokho, sithole nokuthi ungaphezu kuka-74% umculo ovutshelwe eNingizimu Afrika ofinyelele emazweni omhlaba ahlukene nyakenye, okube yisibalo esikhulu kakhulu nesingakaze sifinyelele kusona phambilini,” usho kanje.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKA kwesokunxele usomabhizinisi ne-podcaster u-Amahle-Imvelo Jaxa, umculi weRn'B uLloyiso Gijana, uPhiona Okumu noBryan Johnson beSpotify bekwesinye sezigcawu zokubhunga ngomculo nobuciko ebesiseRosebank, eGoli ngoLwesithathu Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE ILOKHU ikhule njalo inzuzo yemali eyenziwa amaciko akuleli zwe ngokulalelwa komculo wawo kwiSpotify. Izibalo zangonyaka odlule zikhombie ukuthi ukulalelwa komculo wawo kungenise imali ebalelwa ngaphezulu kuka-R504 million, okusho ukwenyuka ngo-28%. Lezi zibalo zihlaluke esigcawini seSpotify saminyaka yonke sokucobelelana ngolwazi lwezomculo nezobuciko  i-Loud & Clear, ebesisemahhovisi amasha eSpotify eRosebank, eGoli kuleli sonto. Njengoba iSpotify igubha iminyaka ewu-20 yasungulwa, okuhlanganisa neyisishiyagalombili yethulwa kuleli zwe kusuka ngo-2018, lezi zibalo zikhombise ukukhula okukhulu okukhomba ukuthi amaciko akuleli enza kahle ngokulalelwa komculo wawo. I-Loud & Clear iwuhlelo lwale nkampani eyisizinda sokulalela umculo wamazwe ehlukene emhlabeni, nolwaqala ngo-2021 ngenhloso yokuveza obala izibalo ezikhomba ukuthi umculo wamaciko ulalelwa kangakanani nokuveza ukuthi inzuzo yenziwa kanjani ukuze kungabi nakudideka emacikweni afaka umculo kuyona. Okugqame embikweni walezi zibalo yilokhu okulandelayo: Umqondisi omkhulu weSpotify kwiSub-Saharan Africa, uJoceleyne Muhutu-Remy, uthe lezi zibalo zikhomba ukuthi amaciko akuleli awagcini ngokukhula nje ngobuciko, kepha alokhu engenise njalo emhlabeni wonke. “Ukuphumelela kwawo kukhomba ukuthi ayinyama kangakanani emhlabeni jikelele, okuzothi uma kuqhubeka kanjena agcine esenezigidigidi zabalaleli emhlabeni jikelele futhi kuwavulele amathuba amakhulu,” usho kanje. UNgqongqoshe wezokuXhumana nezobuChwepheshe, uMnuz Solly Malatsi, esitatimendeni asithumele ukuze sifundwe kulo mbuthano - ubonge iSpotify ngokukhetha iNingizimu Afrika nangokukholelwa kuyona nasemacikweni emikhakha ehlukene enza kahle. Ugqugquzele ukuthi kuqhutshekwe kuhlonzwe ikhono lamaciko futhi kulekelelwe kakhulu lawo asebenzisa izilimi zawo zomdabu ebucikweni bawo, bese esizwa nangengqalasizinda ezowalekelela ukuze athuthuke..

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMQONDISI jikelele woPhiko lwezobuDlelwano lwe-UKZN), uDkt Normah Zondo ethweswa iziqu zobudokotela aziphothule kuyo le nyuvesi SEKUYISIKHATHI eside i-University of KwaZulu-Natal  (UKZN) ilokhu ingesinye sezikhungo ezihlale zenza imicimbi yokuthweswa izitshudeni iziqu, okuwuphawu lokuzihlonipha nokuzibongela ngenxa yomsebenzi wazo omuhle wemfundo emikhakheni eyehlukene. Omunye walabo abahlale beseqhulwini futhi bezikhandlela ukuqinisekisa ukuthi konke kuhamba ngohlelo kuleyo micimbi wuDkt Normah Zondo, uMqondisi jikelele woPhiko lwezobuDlelwano kwezeBhizinisi e-UKZN osebenzisana nehhovisi lomphathi wenyuvesi ukwenza lokho. Nokho wenze okuhlukile kulokhu, njengoba kuthe kuklonyeliswa izitshudeni nezifundiswa emikhakheni eyehlukene naye wabizwa kwizifundiswa ezithweswe iziqu zobodokotela, athi kukhuthazwe yigebe alibone phakathi kwabasebenzi benyuvesi nezitshudeni. UDkt Zondo uthe ucwaningo lwakhe belubheka ukungena nokuphuma kwezitshudeni emanyuvesi, kusuka ngenkathi zifika zizokwenza unyaka wokuqala kuze kufike esiphethweni sohambo lwemfundo yazo ngokwehlukana kwemikhakha yazo. UMQONDISI jikelele woPhiko lwezobuDlelwano kwezeBhizinisi e-UKZN), uDkt Normah Zondo, ethweswa iziqu zobudokotela aziphothule kuyo le nyuvesi “Ngaphambi kokuthi zihambe, izitshudeni zincika kwabenyuvesi ukubhekena nezifundo zazo. Nokho uma sezingasekho emanyuvesi, zibhekana nenkinga yengcindezi yokuthungatha umsebenzi. Inselelo wukuthi ziba nenkinga yokungakutholi ukwesekwa lapho zizama ukusebenzisa amava ezikufunde ngaphandle ukwakha impumelelo ngemfundo,” kulandisa yena. Uthe ucwaningo lwakhe luveza ukuthi uhambo lwezitshudeni alulingani futhi luveze nokuthi lezo zitshudeni ezisuke zingazi muntu lapho ezisuke zikhona zibhekana nenkinga nengcindezi yokungakwazi ukwenza umsebenzi nokulindeleke kuzona. “Ocwaningweni lwami ngiveza amasu okumele kwenziwe ukweseka lezo zitshudeni ohambweni lwazo olunjalo ukuze zizethembe futhi zingathwali kanzima uma sezisebenza kwamanye amazwe noma ezindaweni ezingazazi nezingazejwayele,” usho kanje. Uthe ingxenye enkulu yocwaningo lwakhe ubevame ukuyenza ekuseni kakhulu andukuba aye emsebenzini, ebusuku kakhulu andukuba alale, emva kwemihlangano yasemsebenzini nangasemva kwemicimbi eyahlukene yase-UKZN. Kanti okumsize ukuphothula izifundo zakhe, abezisheba nomsebenzi wase-UKZN nowokuba wuMengameli we-International Education Association of South Africa (IEASA), uDkt Zondo ubengajahe ndawo kepha wazisebenzisa njengokuthi ziyingxenye yohambo lwakhe lokuba wumholi.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UDKT Phumelele Basi uthweswe iziqu zobodokotela e-UKZN ngocwaningo lwakhe mayelana nomjolo wezitshudeni emanyuvesi UBUHLE nobubi bokuthandana kwezitshudeni emanyuvesi, yizona zethulo ezigqame ocwaningweni lukaDkt Phumelele Basi ezifundweni zakhe zobudokotela asanda kuzethweswa yi-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN). Ngokuthweswa lezi ziqu ze-PhD ye-Gender Education, uDkt Basi (25) waseHlokozi, ogwini oluseningizimu yeKwaZulu-Natal, uqophe umlando ngokuthi wuyena obe yisitshudeni esincane kunazo zonke izifundiswa ezithweswe iziqu zobudokotela kulo nyaka. Isihloko socwaningo lwakhe sithi "Negotiating Heterosexual Relationships on Campus: Female Students Sexual Practices, Desire, Pleasure and Risk at a South African University", okumthathe iminyaka emibili kuphela futhi wakuphasa ngamalengiso. Elandisa ngokumkhuthaze ukucwaninga ngalokhu, uDkt Basi uthe kungenxa yokuthi uhlale ecabanga futhi enemibono ehlukene ngendlela abantu bobulili obehlukene abaphathana ngayo besebenzisa imibono yezindlela zokwenza zamasiko, ukujwayela nangokuphushwa yizimo zabadlule kukho empilweni yabo. “Ngiqinise kakhulu kulokhu sengenza ucwaningo lwami lwe-master’s lapho ebengicwaninga khona ngesimo sabantu abahlale befuna ukuba nemibono ngempilo yabanye, futhi behlale befuna ukuthi izinto ezithile zenzeke ngendlela ethile. Lokho kuholele ekutheni ngiqhubekele ekucwaningeni ukuthi abantu besifazane babhekana kanjani nobudlelwano bothando abangena kubona uma sebesezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme,” kusho uDkt Basi. Ocwaningweni lwakhe ubheka ukuthi abantu besifazane abasebancane baba buthaka futhi bacindezeleke kangakanani othandweni lwabo nabantu besilisa, bese eveza nokuthi uthando olunjalo luba nobuhle, ububi nabungozi buni - ngenhloso yokugqugquzela ukwanda kobudlelwano obunokulingana ngokobulili nokungenabungozi. Uthe akazukuphelela lapha njengoba esevele uhlela ukuqhubeka nemfundo yakhe ebambisene nabeSouth African Research Chairs Initiative (SARChi) ukuqhubeka acwaninge ngokunye okumayelana nezobulili.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Thembeka Mpanza, osanda kuthweswa iziqu ze-Master of Arts in Applied Theatre e-UKZN UKUBHEKANA nezinselelo ezihlukene esafika enyuvesi - iningi lazo elalidalwa wukuthi wayesuka endaweni yasemakhaya futhi engakazi okuningi ngenqubo okwenziwa izinto ngayo emanyuvesi - kwamkhuthaza ukucwaninga ngezindlela zokuqeda leyo nkinga. Lwaqala kanjalo uhambo locwaningo lukaNksz Thembeka Mpanza osanda kuthweswa iziqu ze-Master of Arts in Applied Theatre zase-University of KwaZulu-Natal, ngocwaningo lwakhe oluthi Investigation on Black Rural Students Mental Health Wellness. Engxoxweni neSolezwe Ngempelasonto ngalokhu, uNksz Mpanza odabuka eNhlungwane, oLundi, uthe yizimo abhekane nazo ngqo ezamphusha ukuthi uma esenza i-Master’s yakhe acwaninge ngalesi simo. “Ngenkathi ngisafika enyuvesi eminyakeni engaphezu kwemihlanu edlule ngaba nenkinga yokungakwazi ukuxhumana kahle nabanye ozakwethu, futhi kwaba nzima nokuqonda into esuke ifundiswa ngaleso sikhathi ngenxa yokuthi ngenkathi ngisafunda ezikoleni zasemakhaya, izinto eziningi sasizifundiswa ngesiZulu nje kuphela,” kusho uNksz Mpanza. UNKSZ Thembeka Mpanza, osanda kuthweswa iziqu ze-Master of Arts in Applied Theatre e-UKZN Eqhuba uthe okunye afike wakuqaphela enyuvesi wukuthi izitshudeni ezidabuka emakhaya njengaye neziphuma emindenini eswele beziba nenkinga yokuzizwa zingamukelekile futhi zizibona zisalela emuva kozakwabo ngenxa yokweswela imali nezinsiza zokufunda. “Ngithole ukuthi konke lokho kuhlukumeza kakhulu izitshudeni emqondweni futhi kudale nokuthi ukufunda kwazo kuvame ukungahambi ngendlela efanele kunalezo ezikhulele emadolobheni nasemalokishini ngoba zona zifika sezivele zikwazi okuningi. “Yingakho ocwaningweni lwami ngibheke kakhulu amasu angasiza ukulungisa lesi simo, futhi ngibheka kakhulu ukuthi qhaza lini okudingeka ukuthi libanjwe wubuholi bamanyuvesi ukusiza  izitshudeni ezifana nami ukuze ukufunda kwazo kungabi nzima,” kulanda yena. Uthe isifiso sakhe wukuthi kusetshenziswe izethulo ezifuze ezocwaningo lwakhe ukuzama ukuphucula isimo sokufunda emanyuvesi nasezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme ezihlukene okuzosiza ukuthi zonke izitshudeni zizizwe zamukelekile futhi zingacindezelekile.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa usethobela umthetho ngodaba lwePhala Phala UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa, usedalule ukuthi uyasemukela futhi uyasihlonipha isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo enqume ukuthi iPhalamende alilusingathanga ngendlela efanele udaba lwePhala Phala. Ekhulunyelwa wumkhulumeli wakhe uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, uRamaphosa uthe umile ekutheni akekho umuntu ongaphezu komthetho, nokuthi lezi zinsolo ezibhekiswe kuyena kumele zilandelelwe ngokomthetho, ngokungachemi futhi kungancikwa ohlangothini oluthile. “UMengameli usesibonile isinqumo esithathwe yiNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo kuleli cala ebelidluliselwe phambilini ngabe-Economic Freedom Fighters, besebenzisa isigatshana somthetho u-Section 89. Ngakho uMengameli uyasihlonipha isinqumo futhi uyazibophezela ukuthi uzolandela konke okushiwo wumthetho wezwe,” kusho uMagwenya. Eqhuba, uthe uRamaphosa uzibophezele ungokukhipha usizo olungase ludingeke kuyena ukuze lolu daba lusingatheke ngendlela efanele futhi ezogculisa abathintekayo kulona. “URamaphosa umile ekutheni akekho umuntu onamandla ngaphezu komthetho, nokuthi zonke izinsolo ezibhekiswe kuye kumele ukuthi zilandelelwe ngokungachemi,” usho kanje. Izolo iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo inqume ukuthi iPhalamende laphula umthetho ngenkathi livota ngo-2022, liphikisa isigatshana somthetho u-Section 89 - okwakubikwe ngawo izinsolo zokwephula umthetho ezibhekiswe kuRamaphosa - okwavela wukuthi kwatholakala izishaqane zemali  epulazini lakhe ePhala Phala, eLimpopo, ngo-2020. INkantolo ithole ukuthi leso sinqumo sePhalamende sasingafanele, futhi asihambisani nhlobo nomthetho, yase inquma ukuthi lowo mbiko wangaleso sikhathi uhoxiswe, bese kuvulwa ithuba lokuthi udaba lulandelelwe futhi luphenywe kabusha. Leli cala belidliuliselwe eNkantolo yi-EFF ne-African Transformation Movement, bekhala ngokuthi iKomiti lePhalamende lasheshe lanquma ngalolu daba kungakabi yisikhathi esifanele. Ngakho lesi sinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo sisho ukuthi manje kuzodingeka ukuthi iKomiti lePhalamende liphinde licubungule kabusha bese linquma ukuthi isisombululo kuzofinyelelwa kanjani kusona. Umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, uthe bayasamukela isinqumo athi bathemba ukuthi sizosiza ukuthi kwenzeke ubulungiswa kuvele obala ugcobho ngodaba lukaMengameli. “Kufanele abantu bazi ukuthi kwenzekani ePhala Phala ukuze bazinqumele sebenolwazi oluphelele ukuthi ngokhetho oluzayo bavotela isigebengu noma cha,” kusho uMalema. USihlalo we-ActionSA kuzwelonke, uMnuz Dewan de Swardt, naye ufanise lesi sinqumo nophawu lokunqoba kubantu baseNingizimu Afrika. “Lokhu kuqondane kahle kakhulu njengoba kuzothi uma lolu daba seluphinda ludingidwa ePhalamende kube sekuwukuthi akuseyona i-ANC eqhoqhobele amandla yodwa, obekungenza kube lula ukuthi ivikele umholi wayo,” kusho u-de Swardt.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI wama-piano uZee Nxumalo usemenyezelwe yiSpotify ukuba yinxusa lohlelo lwayo lokuqhakambisa amaciko esifazane KUVALEKE amanxeba esilonda esidalwe wukuqokwa eminxeni eyisikhombisa kepha wangathola ndondo yamaMetro FM Music Awards kumculi wama-piano uZee Nxumalo, othole ingqayizivele yethuba alinikwe yinkampani edlala umculo nge-internet i-Spotify. Lo mculi,ongaconsi phansi kubalandeli bomculo, umenyezelwe ngabeSpotify ukuthi sebemkhethe njengenxusa lohlelo lwabo lwazinyanga zonke oluthi -EQUAL Africa, onhloso yalo wukuqhakambisa ubuhle bemisebenzi eyenziwa abesifazane emculweni. I-Spotify idalule ukuthi lo mculi ufakwe kulolu hlelo ngenxa yokuthi kuthe sekuhlanganiswa izibalo zezingoma zamaciko ezilalelwe nezidlalwe kakhulu nyakenye, kwavela ukuthi uZee Nxumalo odabuka eSwatini, kodwa osezinze eGoli uqenggeleza phambili. Kuvele ukuthi umculo okuzwakala iphimbo likaZee Nxumalo kuwona uqale ukugqama kakhulu ngo-2024 ngengoma yakhe ethi Funk 55 - ayishaya noDBN Gogo, uCeekaRSA, Chley neShakes & Les, esidayise ngaphezu kwe-platinum eliphindwe kahlanu. UMCULI wama-piano uZee Nxumalo usemenyezelwe yiSpotify njengenxusa lohlelo lwayo lokuqhakambisa amaciko esifazane Uqhubekile nokuhamba phambilini ngengoma yakhe ebishisa izikhotha nyakenye ethi Ngisakuthanda, apike kuyona oPYY Log Drum King no-TBO. Ezikhulumela ngokuthola leli thuba, uZee uthe into abona ukuthi imsize kakhulu ukuze afike kulesi sigaba akusona manje wukwenza umculo wakhe ngendlela afisa ngayo nakholelwa kuyona, wangabe esazixaka kakhulu ngokulandela okushiwo abantu. “Sengifundile ukuthi kumqoka ukuvikela indawo yami nobumina uqobo, okuyinto engenzekanga kalula ngoba ekuqaleni bengihlale ngikhathazeka kakhulu ngokuthi abantu bacabangani ngami. Manje sengizibeka mina phambili nengikuzwa ngaphakathi,” usho kanje. Uthe ithuba alithole manje lisho lukhulu kuyena ngenxa yokuthi libeka ngokusobala ukuthi ukwenza umculo ngendlela ethinta nejabulisa abantu akuphoqi ukuthi ube wubulili obuthile kuphela, kepha kudinga ukuthi wenze okusuka ngaphakathi kuwena zikhathi zonke, nokuthi ukholelwe entweni oyenzayo. UMCULI wama-piano uZee Nxumalo useqokwe yiSpotify ukuba abe yinxusa lohlelo lwayo lokuqhakambisa amaciko esifazane Bekungekhona okokuqala leli ciko lihlonishwa ngemisebenzi yalo, njengoba ngesonto elidlule linqobe indondo ye-Best Upcoming African Music Sensation kuma-African Golden Awards abese-Nairobi, eKenya. Ngale kwalokhu, uZee - ogama lakhe lokuzalwa wuZandile Nxumalo, uvele usematheni nge-EP yakhe esanda kuphuma esihloko sithi Izinja Zam Volume 1 - eyelama imisebenzi yakhe yaphambilini ethi KwaNxumalo EP (2022), KwaNxumalo: Deluxe (2023), nayegcine ngayo ngo-2024 esihloko sithi Inja YeGame EP.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Nokuthula Dlamini uvukwe wumunyu ethweswa iziqu ze-Bachelor of Arts Honours in Sociology e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN) USEBHEKE ukuqhubeka asebenzise imfundo yakhe ukushintsha isimo sakubo uNksz Nokuthula Dlamini, obesematheni kuleli sonto futhi wathinta abantu abaningi emva kokusabalala kwezithombe nama-video akhe ekhala izinyembezi ethweswa iziqu. UNksz Dlamini (24), waseNhlazatshe nowukuphela kwengane kaNksz Lindiwe Dlamini, uthweswe iziqu ze-Bachelor of Arts Honours in Sociology e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN emcimbini wokuthwesa izitshudeni iziqu kuleli sonto. Emva kokwamukela iziqu zakhe, ujabulise futhi wathinta abantu abaningi eseqonda ngqo kunina, wamanga ekhala izinyembezi zenjabulo - nebezidalwa nawukukhumbula ubunzima adlule kubo ngokufika kulowa mzuzu ‘wokunqoba’. KUBE wumunyu nezinyembezi zenjabulo kuNksz Nokuthula Dlamini, anga unina uNksz Lindiwe Dlamini - emukela iziqu zakhe ze-Bachelor of Arts Honours in Sociology e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN) Emcimbini wokuthweswa ieziqu ubengaswenkile okutheni njengoba kuvame ukwenzeka ngezitshudeni nezifundiswa eziningi ezivame ukugqoka ziconse ngengqephu uma sezamukela umqhele nomvuzo wokuzikhandla ngokusebenza kanzima. “Bengingafuni ukugqilaza umama ngokumfuna umswenko obizayo ngoba ngiyasazi futhi ngisiqonda ngokuphelele isimo sasekhaya ukuthi sinzima kangakanani. Ngibe senginquma ukuthi ngizigqokele izingubo zami ezijwayelekile enginazo ngoba bekumqoka kakhulu kimina ukuthi ngibe khona emcimbini wokuhlonishwa ngeziqu zemfundo. Ngiphushwa nawukuqonda ukuthi umzuzu onjena kuyenzeka ufike kanye empilweni yomuntu,” usho kanje. UNKSZ Nokuthula Dlamini, ujabule kanjena eseshutha izithombe emva kokuthweswa iziqu ze-Bachelor of Arts Honours in Sociology e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN) Image: K.O.R MEDIA PRODUCTION Eqhuba,uthe indlela abezizwa ngayo ibixutshwe yinjabulo nosizi ngenxa yokuthi ubekhumbula zonke izinselelo abhekane nazo wazinqoba esafunda - okumsize ukuthi aze afike esicongweni sohambo lwakhe. Uthe okumfikisele usizi nezinyembezi wukubonga okugcwele enhliziyweni yakhe ukuthi ekugcineni uze wanqoba, ejatshuliswa nawukuthi kulowa mzuzu wenjabulo bekukhona nonina, obezojabula naye ngesikhathi esihle nesimnandi empilweni yakhe. UNKSZ Nokuthula Dlamini, ujabule  eseshutha izithombe emva kokuthweswa iziqu ze-Bachelor of Arts Honours in Sociology e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN) Image: K.O.R MEDIA PRODUCTION Ubonge kakhulu uDkt Siphamandla Sithelo ongomunye wabebemfundisa nowamsiza kakhulu ngonyaka wakhe wokuqala enyuvesi wamtholela indawo yokuhlala.;Ubonge nesitshudeni abehlala naso endlini uNksz Khethukuthula Khoza obevame ukumsiza ngokudla nanganoma yini abesuke eyidinga ukuze afunde. “Ngiyabonga kuwona wonke umuntu osengithintile engisiza, ngibonga nezethembiso  zosizo olwehlukene oluzosiza ukuphucula isimo sempilo yami. Ngifisa ukuthi lokhu okwenzeke kimina kukhuthaze nabanye abeza ngemva kwami ukuthi baqedele okuhle abasuke sebeqalile ukukwenza empilweni,” kusho uNksz Dlamini.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INJABULO kuMnuz Siyabonga Khumalo, ethweswa iziqu ze-Bachelor of Social Sciences summa cum laude e-UKZN Image: NKOSI GCABASHE UKUNGAVUMELI ukuthi ukukhubazeka kumise izinto azifisela zona ngempilo nangekusasa lakhe kuthele izithelo kuMnuz Siyabonga Khumalo, ophila nokukhubazeka ngokuba mfishane ngokwedlulele phecelezi i-dwarfism. UKhumalo (21) ngesinye sezitshudeni eziwu-153 ezithweswe iziqu zemikhakha ehlukene yi-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN), ephumelela ngamalengiso izifundo ezingu-21, wathola izitifiketi eziwu-14 neziyisithupha ahlonishwe kuzona wuDean ngokwenza kahle emkhakheni abewufundela we-Bachelor of Social Science, awuphase ngezinga lika-summa cum laude. Leli bhungu eliwubude obuwu-120cm, lazalwa line-scoliosi, isimo sokukhubazeka esithikameza indlela okukhula ngayo umgogodla , kodwa lokho kwangamvimba ukufeza izinto ezinhle akhule ezifisela zona ngempilo yakhe. UMNUZ Siyabonga Khumalo, ejabula nonina uNksz Feziwe Khumalo, emva kokuthweswa iziqu e-UKZN Image: NKOSI GCABASHE Ngo-2022 uphothule u-matric eSarel Cilliers High, eGlencore, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal, lapho aklonyeliswa khona ngeDux Scholar - umklomelo onikwa umfundi osuke ebashaye bonke emakhanda kulesi sikole. “Ngenkathi ngifika enyuvesi ngaqhubeka lapho engangigcine khona emabangeni aphezulu, ngazitshela ukuthi ukuphasa ngamalengiso kuwukuthi uthole u-80% nangaphezulu esifundweni, okungisize ngokuphasa ngale ndlela okwenzeke ngayo manje,” usho kanje. Leli bhungu aligcini ngokwenza kahle ezifundweni kuphela njengoba kule nyuvesi beliyingxenye yezinhlelo ezihlukene okubalwa kuzona iGolden Key International Honour Society, Campus HIV and AIDS Support Unit ne-Differently Abled Student Association. Kanti kumanje uKhumalo usevele uqhubeka nemfundo yakhe njengoba enza i-honours degree, akwenza ngenhloso yokuthi abe neminyaka ewu-40 eseneziqu zobudokotela, okuzomlekelela kakhulu ukuthi abe yi-clinical psychologist.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: ISHINGA laKwaNongoma, uPhakel' Umthakathi likhala ngobuholi bukahulumeni obugxeka umphakathi olwa nabokufika abakuleli zwe ngokungemthetho 'SEKUNGENE umswane wembabala ekhaya' ngokuqonga komkhankaso wokulwa nabokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho kulandela ukubhavumula kukaNgqongqoshe Khumbudzo Ntshavheni osole abasekhaleni ngokudunga izwe. Omunye wabaqavile kulo mkhankaso weMarch and March, uNkosikhona Ndabandaba owaziwa ngelikaPhakel' Umthakathi, ukhwele wadilika kwabezepolitiki, ebasola ngokwehlulwa wumsebenzi wokuhola ngobuqotho nangokuhlanekezela umbono wemibhikisho eqhubekayo ezweni yokulwa nabokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UPhakel’ Umthakathi usho njalo ephendula inkulumo kaNgqongqoshe eHhovisi likeMengameli, uNksz Ntshavheni okhale ngokuthi bewuhulumeni ngeke bayimele eyesenzo sabantu abadunga izwe nabahlukumeza abantu bokufika abakuleli, kangangokuthi lezo zenzo zabo zize zikapakele nakulabo abangabakuleli zwe kepha abangezona izinhlanga ezithile. UPHAKEL'  UMTHAKATHI eseqhulwini lweminye yemibhikisho eqhubekayo ezweni yokulwa nabantu bokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho Image: DOCTOR NGCOBO/INDEPENDENT NEWSPAPERS “Siyazi ukuthi kunabantu bakithi abahlukunyezwayo nokugcina kuthiwa bangabokufika ngoba nakhu bengakhulumi izilimi ezikhulunywa ngabantu abathile, okugcina kuhamba kuze kufike esigabeni lapho behlukunyezwa futhi bephathwa kabi ngendlela efana nokwenziwa ngayo kulaba abadabuka kwamanye amazwe ase-Afrika abalapha eNingizimu Afrika," kukhononda uNgqongqoshe. Lokhu kuphawula kukaNtshavheni kumqhathe nabantu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana abamsole nangokuthi nguyena otshala ingxabano phakathi kwabantu bakuleli. UNgqongqoshe ubephawule ngokuthi lezi zigameko ezenzeka ezweni zokuhlukumeza abantu bokufika ziyindlela yokudunga izwe ngenhloso yokuthi lingabuseki. “Kumele sikuqonde ukuthi abantu bokufika abakuleli zwe beze ngezizathu ezihlukene, okubalwa kuzona ukuzosebenza ezweni lethu nabanye abafike ngoba bedinga usizo nokuvikelwa ezimweni ezihlukene ezimbi ababhekana nazo emazweni abo. Futhi yinto eyaziwayo ukuthi nalaba abasuke bezosebenza noma bezohweba ezweni lethu uhulumeni uyaqikelela ukuthi balandela yonke imithetho efanele,” kusho uNksz Ntshavheni. Ephendula leyo nkulumo, uPhakel’ Umthakathi ukhale ngokuthi kungukudideka ukucabanga nokukholelwa ekutheni imibhikisho eqhubekayo ezweni ngenhloso yokulwa nabokufika abakuleli zwe iwukuhlukumeza nokuzama ukudala udlame nobutha ezweni. UNdabandaba, obehlangene noNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal namalungu esigungu sakhe ngoLwesihlanu, ukhombe ukungazi kukaNgqongqoshe okumenza akhulume kanje. “Lokhu esikwenza manje ezweni lethu asikuqalanga manje, kade saqala ukulwela ukuthula ezweni lethu, kuphela nje into esingayifuni wukuthi kube khona abantu abakuleli zwe ngokungemthetho nabacekela phansi isithunzi sezwe lethu ngezenzo zabo ezingalungile. “Esingakufuni wukuthi kuvele kusuke umuntu ezihlalele lapho ekhona, enethezekile - bese ezokhuluma into angayazi nangayiqondi ngalo msebenzi esizama ukuwenza ngenhloso yokuphucula izwe lethu. Asikwazi ukusonga izandla, sibuke konakala izinto ezweni - sizoqhubeka nokuzikhandla nokulwela ukuthula nobumbano,” kushoa uPhakel’ Umthakathi. “Siphelile isikhathi sokuhlala dekle singenzi lutho ekubeni konakala kangaka nsuku zonke ezweni lethu. Abathule babuke ukuthi senzani ukulungisa izwe lethu, noma basijoyine ukuze babone ukuthi yini lena esizama ukuyenza,” usho kanje. Uthe abantu abayeke ukugxeka into abangayazi nabangakaze benze lutho ukuzama ukuyilungisa, wagcizelela ukuthi bazoqhubeka nemibhikisho abayenzayo ezweni nokuthi bazozeseka izinhlangano ezifana neMarch and March - enombono ofana nowabo. Oyisishabasheki kulo mkhankaso, uNgizwe Mchunu, naye ukhwele wadilika kuNgqongqoshe - emsola ngokuthi uhlanekezela umsebenzi abawenzayo wokuphucula izwe, wamsola ngokuthi ucwasa ngokobuhlanga abantu abangamaZulu. UNdunankulu uThami Ntuli kanye neMeya yeTheku nabo bangenelele ngokuhlangana nabaholi beMarch and March, lapho okuvele khona ukuthi abalo mkhankaso abanklamunklamu ekuthambiseni isitilobho ngemibhikisho esidale uvalo lokuthi ingase iphenduke inhlekelele noma nini.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Kipi Skweyiya, okubahleli bomcimbi wabesifazane nomama iMother's Day Brunch INHLANGANO esebenza ingabheke nzuzo ukusiza umphakathi Ikhethelo Society Group, izosebenzisa usuku lokuhlonipha omama, iMother’s Day, ukubahlanganisa kubhungwe ngamasu okubasiza bazimele empilweni. Lokhu kuzokwenzeka emcimbini iMother’s Day Brunch, ozoba seGarden Court Marine Parade, eThekwini ngeSonto ngo-11 ekuseni kuze kube ntambama, lapho okulindeleke ukuthi kubuthane abesifazane abangaphezu kuka-120. Kuzongenwa ngo-R600 umuntu ngamunye. Omunye wabahleli bomcimbi, uNksz Kipi Skweyiya, uthe babone kumqoka ukusebenzisa uSuku loMama ukuhlanganisa abantu besifazane babahlomise ngezinto namasu okungabazisa ukuthi bakwazi ukuzimela nokubhekana nezimo ezibahluphayo empilweni. UMBHALI wezincwadi Indlovukazi Mapule ngesinye sezikhulumi ezizobe zikwi-Mother's Day Brunch “Lokhu sikwenza ngoba sikuqonda ukuthi kuningi kangakanani okuhlupha abantu besifazane emphakathini ekubeni kube kuyibona ababhekene nomsebenzi wokukhulisa izingane, nokumisa imindeni namakhaya abahlala nabaganele kuwona,” kusho uNksz Skweyiya. Eqhuba uthe kulo mcimbi bazobe behambisana nezikhulumi nabazonandisa kuwona okubalwa umbhali wezincwadi Indlovukazi Mapule, Zonke Le Poet, umculi we-Afro pop uNdoni Radebe, uDJ uMalume Richy nozobe eqhulula amahlaya u-2K Womsakazi. UMCULI we-Afro pop uNdoni Radebe kwabazonandisa kwiMother's Day Brunch “Sihlele nezinhlelo zokuthi izethameli zomcimbi zibhucwabhucwe ukuzijabulisa, ziphinde zithole ithuba lokuxoxa nokwakha ubudlelwano bokuthi umuntu nomuntu asizakale ekhonweni analo nakunoma yini enhle akhonze ukuyenza,” usho kanje. Ngale kukaNksz Skweyiya - amanye amalungu ale nhlangano oNkk Duh Ndlovu, Nandi Goodjohn, Zah Duma, Ncamo Nkonjela, Buyi Gambu noNksz Luh Nzimande. IMBONGI uZonke Le Poet kwabazonandisa kwiMother's Brunch

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: BEKUKUHLE kwethulwa isakhiwo esisha sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries eliKwaSwayimane, eMgungundlovu KUBHEKWE ukuthi sibe wusizo emphakathini futhi silekelele ngokubamba iqhaza ezinhlelweni ezihlukene ezizothuthukisa umphakathi isakhiwo esisha sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries, esiseMambedwini, KwaSwayimane. Lokho kushiwo wumholi waleli bandla, uMfu Wiseman Vidima, ekhuluma emcimbini wokwethulwa kwesakhiwo sebandla ngokusemthethweni emcimbini obungesonto eledlule, lapho kubuthane khona amalungu ebandla, ubuholi bomphakathi izinhlaka ezizimele nezikahulumeni. “Ngizovula izandla ebantwini bakule ndawo namaphethelo abazofuna ukwenza izinhlelo nemibuthano ehlukene okungaphambene nenqubo kaNkulunkulu ukuthi beze basebenzise le ndlu. Sihlose ukuthi ibe wusizo kubantu bakithi,” usho kanje. UMFU Wiseman Vidima noMfu Vusi Dube bevula ngokusemthethweni isakhiwo esisha sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries eliKwaSwayimane, eMgungundlovu Omunye wezihambeli ebezikhona kulo mcimbi,uNkk Nomfundo Mcoyi-Zondo wenkampani yabangcwabi Icebolethu Funerals, nongomunye wabafake isandla ukwakha lesi sakhiwo. Uthe kuhlale kusemkhondweni wabo ukubamba iqhaza ezinhlelweni ezisiza umphakathi. UMFU Vusi Dube ephethe uhlelo emcimbini wokwethula isakhiwo sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries eliKwaSwayimane, eMgungundlovu “Sithemba ukuthi lo mbono uzoqhubeka uye phambili.Inhloso yethu wukuqhubeka sisize nabanye esingakwazi ukubasiza ukufeza imibono emihle njengalona ngoba iba wusizo kakhulu emphakathini ikakhulu ezindaweni zasemakhaya,” usho kanje. UNKK Nomfundo Mcoyi-Zondo ekhuluma emcimbini wokuvula isakhiwo esisha sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries eliKwaSwayimane, eMgungundlovu Umcimbi wokuvula leli sonto ubumeleleke kakhulu njengoba ubuhanjelwe nawusomabhizinisi uMnuz Themba Njilo, umakadebona kwezokulingisa uVusi Kunene, u-Ayanda Msweli, ilungu lesigungu soMnyango wezoLimo uMnuz Super Zuma, uMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThutha nokuHlaliswa kwaBantu uMnuz Siboniso Duma, iMeya kaMasipala wesiFunda uMgungundlovu uMnuz Mzi Zuma noMfu Vusi Dube obephethe uhlelo emcimbini.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMENGAMELI weZwe uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa INKANTOLO yoMthethosisekelo isinqume ukuthi umbiko wesinqumo seKomiti lePhalamende malungana nodaba lwePhala Phala kwakungekho emthethweni, nokuthi kusuka manje sekuthathwa ngokuthi yinto engekho, okusho ukuthi lolu daba sekumele ukuthi luyodingidwa kabusha ePhalamende. Leso sinqumo siphume ngoLwesihlanu ekuseni, futhi semukelwa ngamaqembu ehlukene ezepolitiki aphikisayo. Nokho umbuzo omkhulu ngothi kuzokwenzekani kusukela manje? INkantolo yoMthethosisekelo yethule izethulo ezintathu isusela ekutheni abeqembu i-Economic Freedom Party namanye amalungu esigungu ePhalsmende ayedlulisele lolu daba phambili ngoba engagculisekile ngesinqumo sokungatholi gcobho kulolu daba. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi iKomiti lePhalamende lalivote laphikisa umbiko wesigatshana somthetho u-Section 89, okwakukhalwa kulandelelwa kuwona malungana nodaba lokutholakala kwezishaqane zemali yakwamanye amazwe epulazini likaMengameli weZwe, uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa - okwavela ukuthi ingxenye yayo yayebiwe ngo-2020. Njengoba sekunqunywe kanjena manje, kusho ukuthi lo mbiko walolu daba kuzophoqa ukuthi ubuyiselwe ePhalamende ukuthi kuzophenywa kabusha ngawo ukuze kutholakale ukuthi akubanga nagcobho yini malungana nalolu daba, futhi kubhekwe ukuthi asizukuba bikho yini isidingo sokuthi kushushiswe uRamaphosa malungana nalokhu. Isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo siphikisa isinqumo esaphuma ngoDisemba 2022, esakhishwa yiKomiti elalilawulwa ngamalungu e-African National Congress, abanquma ukuthi ukuthi kungalandelelwa umbiko wekomiti elizimele - owawuveze ukuthi kwakunobufakazi bokuthi uRamaphosa wephula umthetho ngokugcina le mali ngokungemthetho epulazini lakhe ngoFebhuwari wango-2020, okuvela ukuthi yayilinganiselwa ku-580 000 wamaDola aseMelika, okungaba ngaphezudlwana kuka-R9.4 million. Njengoba sekuphume lesi sinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo, amalungu ePhalamende kuzomele ukuthi abuyele kulesi sigatshana somthetho u-Section 89, abheke nalowo mbiko - bese kuphenywa kabusha ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi konke kulandeleka ngokusemthethweni. Leli komidi elizimele, eliholwa yiNhloko yamaJaji uSandile Ngcobo, yathola ngoNovemba wango-2022 ukuthi kwakunobufakazi bokuthi uRamaphosa wasebenzisa kabi amandla negunya analo ukuthi agcine le mali yakwelinye izwe epulazini lakhe, futhi wagunyaza nokuthi isetshenziswe ngasese ngale komngcele waleli zwe. Kanti manje izinto sezishintshe kakhulu uma uqhathaniswa nango-2022, njengoba ngaleso sikhathi iPhalamende lalilawulwa ngamalungu e-ANC, okusolakala ukuthi yiwona aqinisekisa ukuthi lolu daba luyacindezeleka. Kanti-ke manje kubhekwe ukubona ukuthi luzosingatheka kanjani njengoba seluzobe lwenganyelwe ngamalungu ohulumeni wokubusa ngokubambisana. Ngenkathi lolu daba lusaqhubeka, uRamaphosa wayelokhu emile kwelokuthi umsulwa kwasolelwa khona.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUZOGUGA iphakethe kubashayeli bezimoto kunyuka intengo kaphethroli nodizili KUZOSHAYA kuzwele isibili ukunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli nekazidili namhlanje njengoba abashayeli bezimoto bebesazikhotha amanxeba futhi besazama ukwamukela ubunzima okudalwe wukwenyuka kwayo ngenyanga edlule. Abasebenzisa izimoto ezihamba ngophethroli bazokhokha u-14% ngaphezu kwemali abebeyikhokha ngelitha, bese kuthi abasebenzisa udizili bona bakhokhe u-24% ngaphezulu - okudalwe yimpi ebheduke e-Iran, okubukeka ishaye kwezwela emnothweni emhlabeni. Irandi belizinzile ngo-Ephreli kodwa kwathi ngokunyuka kukawoyela ongahluziwe emhlabeni usuka ku-93.67 wamadola aseMelika uya ku-101 wamadola aseMelika, kudale ukuthi kuphoqe ukunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli nodizili. Esitatimendeni soMnyango wezaMandla neziMbiwa Phansi esiphume ngoMsombuluko kuvele ukuthi uphethroli wohlobo i-93 ne-95 kuzonyuka ngo-R3,27 ilitha, okuzokwenza ilitha elilodwa libize u-R26.52. Udizili wona unyuke ngo-R6.19 ilitha, okusho ukuthi ilitha elilodwa selizoba wu-R32.09. Abantu bathinteke kakhulu ngalokhu, banikela ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuzwakalisa ilaka nokukhathazeka kwabo ngalokhu. UNokufa Bhungane uthe: “Kunzima ngoba asisebenzi, ngakho ukunyuka kukaphethroli kuzosilimaza kakhulu nathi ngoba kuzodala ukuthi kwenyuke nemali yokugibela izithuthi zomphakathi.” U-Excellent Simiso ukhale wathi: “Kuyacaca ukuthi maduze nje ilitha likaphethroli lizobe selibiza u-R50. Kuyacaca ukuthi sekuyisikhathi sokuthi sibheke ukusebenzisa icebo lezimoto ezihamba ngogesi.” USizwe Skara Shabalala Jr ubeke wathi: “Mina ngibona kungcono ukuthi kukhuphuke nemiholo kwabasebenzayo, bese kufakwa nochatha ezibonelelweni zohulumeni ukuze wonke umuntu akwazi ukumela izindleko abhekene nazo.” “Ayikho into ethusayo lapha ngoba lokhu okwenzeka manje kwakumele ukuthi kwenzeke ngenyanga edlule kodwa uhulumeni wamisa i-fuel levy ka-R3. Ukube uhulumeni ubakhathalele abantu baseNingizimu Afrika ubezoqhubeka amise i-fuel levy kuze kuxazululeke isio sale mpi yase-Iran. Amanye amazwe enze njalo,” kusho uLindelani Nhlabathi.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKELA kwesokunxele yingqalabutho yomculi kamaskandi uPhuzekhemisi Mnyandu, kube wuMnuz Stanley Cele wenhlangano Icikolethu noMnuz Abednigo Mpanza - ababambisene ukuhlela umcimbi wokukhumbula owayengumsakazi woKhozi FM ongasekho emhlabeni uBhodloza Nzimande KUZOSETSHENZISWA umculo wesintu nomaskandi ukukhumbula, ukuhlonipha nokugqamisa amagallelo owayeyingqalabutho yomsakazi woKhozi FM ongasekho emhlabeni uWelcome Bhodloza Nzimande, owayaziwa nangelikaNgulube Encane. Lokhu kuhlaluke esithangamini nabezindaba ebesise-Octavia Hotel, eNanda, ngoLwesithathu - ebesihlelwe yiPhuzekhemisi Foundation nenhlangano yezobuciko Icikolethu, okuyibona abahlela indumezulu yomcimbi iBhodloza Nzimande Maskandi Festival. Omunye wabahleli bomcimbi, uMnuz Stanley Cele owayewumngani omkhulu kaBhodloza, uthe bekuhlale kuyisilonda kuyena ukubona kungenzeki lutho ukuhlonipha amagallelo akhe ekubeni kukukhulu okuhle ashiya ekwenzile endimeni yezobuciko. “Nakuba okuningi sizokumemezela maduze, kepha siyakuqinisekisa ukuthi lo mcimbi sizowenza ngoSepthemba - esikuqondanise ngamabomu ukuthi kube ngenyanga yamagugu ukuze kuhambisane nombono esizowufeza ngawo ukuhlonipha le ngqalabutho yobuciko,” kusho uCele. Inngwazi yomculo kamaskandi, uPhuzekhemisi Mnyandu, ithe nayo ibone kumqoka ukweseka lo mbono ngoba iyawazi amagalelo kaBhodloza endimeni yomculo, futhi ikhumbula konke okuhle akwenzele amaciko ikakhulu abaculi bakamaskandi, ngisho nayo uqobo. “Ngale kokumhlonipha, sifisa nokuthi sisebenzise lo mcimbi ukuqhubeka nombono wakhe wokugqugquzela ukubumbana, ukuzigqaja ngobuciko namasiko ethu bese futhi usiza ngokuthi kufukuleke amaciko ehlukene ikakhulu asemasha emculweni,” usho kanje. UmkaBhodloza, uNkk Zandile Nzimande, naye uwuthakasele kakhulu umbono wokuhlonipha umyeni wakhe, akuchaze ngokuthi kufanele ngabe kudala yenzeka into enje. “Ngithemba ukuthi lokhu kuzosiza ukuqhakambisa ubuhle bezinto ayezithanda nayekade eshisekela ukuzifeza esaphila, futhi ngithemba ukuthi bakhona nabanye abazovela baseseke ukuze konke kube yimpumelelo,” kusho uNkk Nzimande. UBhodloza washona ngoJanuwari 15 ngo-2021 eneminyaka ewu-73. Wajoyina Ukhozi FM ngo-1978, wasebenza kulona iminyaka ewu-19 ewumsakazi newu-13 esengumphathisiteshi phakathi kuka-1997 no-2010. Waziwa ngeqhaza alibamba emculweni wesintu esathula uhlelo lukamaskandi iSigiya Ngengoma lolwethelevishini olwaluthi Ezodumo.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMAKADEBONA emculweni uDJ Tira, emukela indondo ye-Best Kwaito kumaMetro FM Music Awards abese-ICC, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku Image: LIGHT HOUSE STUDIO UMAKADEBONA kwezokudijeya, uDJ Tira, usephonsele inselelo amaciko asemasha endimeni yezobuciko ukuba asebenze kanzima lapho asuke ezinze khona, angabheki futhi angazitsheli ukuthi kudingeka ukuthi afudukele eGoli ukuze aphumelele. U-DJ Tira usho kanjalo ngenkathi emukela indondo ye-Best Kwaito ayinqobe ngengoma yakhe ethi Awungazi. Le ngoma wayicula noPcee, Campmasters noGeneral Simamane kumaMetro FM Music Awards e-ICC, eThekwini, ngempelasonto edlule. Ngokunqoba le ndondo, uTira ubhincisele nxanye oDladla Mshunqisi noBeastRSA ngengoma yabo ethi Puku Puku, DJ Lag, Zee Nxumalo noKC Driller bengoma ethi Ngiyasindelwa, kube wuBello B neWe Dem Boys bengoma ethi Dubai noKamo Mphela, u-Aymos, QUE DJ noJay Music bengoma ethi Partii. “Lokhu okwenzeka kimina manje kuwubufakazi bokuthi singamaciko akudingeki futhi akuphoqi ukuthi uze ufudukele koGoli noma kwamanye amadolobha amakhulu ukuze sichume , ngakho ngethemba ukuthi lokhu kuzofaka lowo moya nakwabanye,” usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe le ndondo imkhumbuze unyaka u-1999, anqoba ngawo umncintiswano wokuhlwaya ithalente lo-DJ, iSmirnoff Club DJ, nokuyiwona owamvulela intuba yokungena endimeni yomculo. “Namanje ngisayibambile njengoba sekuphele iminyaka ewu-27 ngilokhu ngiyibambile kule ndima futhi ngiyazibongela kakhulu kubantu abalokhu bengiseke njalo emculweni wami - okusize kakhulu ukufika kulesi sigaba engikusona manje,” kusho uDJ Tira. Ingoma ethi Awungazi ikwi-albhamu kaDJ Tira kanye nethi Izinsimbi ZikaMakoya; yona eyelama amanoni amaningi eminyaka edlule okubalwa kuwona ethi Ikhenani (2019), i-21 Years of DJ Tira (2020), iRockstar Forever (2021), iMalume Way (2023) iKhuphuka (2025) nayenze noGoldmax ethi Voices of Gqom (2025).

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKK Halalisiwe Mncwango weHala Lisa, odle umhlanganiso kumaBambelela Business Awards Image: SIBONELO NGCOBO/INDEPENDENT NEWSPAPERS KUBUYE ithemba lokulunga kwezinto kusomabhizinisi odle umhlanganiso emncintiswaneni wokuxhasa osomabhizinisi baKwaZulu-Natal, amaBambelela Business Awards - okuhlonishwe kuwona osomabhizinisi abawu-20 abenze kahle kuwona, bahlukaniselana isamba semali engaphezu kuka-R1 million wokubasiza ukufukula amabhizinisi abo. Lowo uNkk Halalisiswe Mncwango, webhizinisi lendawo yokudlela iHala Lisa yasePort Shepstone, ogwini oluseningizimu yeKwaZulu-Natal, ohlabane ngesamba sika-R145 000 wokumsiza eibhizinisini lakhe. Lokhu kwenzeke emcimbini wokuklomelisa osomabhizinisi, obuhlelwe yiHollywood Foundation eHollywoodbets Greyville Convention Centre, eThekwini ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. UNkk Mncwango uthe lo mklomelo ufike ngesikhathi esihle impela njengoba kuqondane nokuthi ibhizinisi lakhe linezinkinga eziningi, futhi lintengantenga kakhulu okwenza ukuthi inzuzo ingangeni ngendlela ejwayelekile. KUBE yinjabulo yodwa kosomabhizinisi abaphume phambili emncintiswaneni wokuxhasa osomabhizinisi amaBambelela Business Awards Image: SIBONELO NGCOBO/INDEPENDENT NEWSPAPERS “Ngiyakhumbula nokuthi ngike ngacabanga nokuhoxa kulo mncintiswano ngoba sengibona sengathi kungenzeka ukuthi kungahambi kahle, kukuningi nje okwenzekayo ngesikhathi esisodwa. Lokhu kuzongikhuthaza kakhulu ukuqhubeka nebhizinisi lami,” usho kanje. Ibhizinisi elilale isibili kube yiPitchbright ehlabane ngo-R115 000, kwaba yiMakoti Boot Camp endaweni yesithathu ehlonishwe ngoxhaso luka-R85 000. Amanye amabhizinisi awu-17 ahlonishwe ngoxhaso luka-R45 000 ibhizinisi ngalinye kube yiSparkling Touch Holdings, Samke's Boutique Craft, We Stand Well Holdings, Armsdon Trading, International Group Horizon Education, Sistas Felas Trading and Projects, Impebe Trading Enterprise, Beyond Integrated Services, Cleanfest, Ozel Trading, Honeylog, AMLESZ Healthcare, Umbilo Express Plant Hire, Rikhonile Investments, Ikhaya Lezimomondiya, Amandlenkosi Farms neNsikeleoah. Kukhona namabhizinisi amathathu ahlonishiwe ngokuzikhandla kwawo, anikwa umthobanhliziyo ka-R12 500. Lawo mabhizinisi yiCrispy Corner  enqobe umklomelo owawenziwe kwiFacebook, kube yi-SpazaSure ehlonishelwe ukufika ngesikhathi esifanele ngenkathi kuwusuku lombukiso wamabhizinisi ne-Hala Lisa ngokubukeka kahle ukwedlula wonke amabhizinisi ngenkathi kunombukiso. UNDUNANKULU waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli ekhuluma kumaBambelela Business Awards Image: SIBONELO NGCOBO/INDEPENDENT NEWSPAPERS Okhulumela iHollywood Foundation, uNksz Vuyisile Ngobese, uthe bajabule ngokuthi nakulo nyaka babuye ihlandla lesithathu ngalo mcimbi, futhi bakwazi nokwengeza emalini ngo-R135 000 - kufakwa ku-R1 million obekuhlale kunikelwa ngawo eminyakeni edlule. “Osomabhizinisi abasafufusa baneqhaza elimqoka kakhulu ekufukuleni umnotho nokwakha amathuba omsebenzi, ngakho ukubeseka ngamathuba afana naleli sibona kuyinto emqoka nokumele sihlale siyenza ukuze baqhubeke nomsebenzi omuhle abawenzayo emphakathini,” kusho uNksz Ngobese. Lo mbuthano ubuhanjelwe nawuNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli - obuye  wethula inkulumo yosuku onhloso yayo bekuwukukhuthaza osomabhizinisi abebeyingxenye yalo mncintiswano kulo nyaka. “Siwuhulumeni waseKZN sizibophezele ukusebenzisana nezinhlangano ezenza imisebenzi emihle njengeHollywood Foundation, futhi sikhuthaza nabanye ukuthi babonele kuyona ukuze kwande izinhlelo eziwusizo njengalolu emphakathini wethu,” kukhuthaza uNtuli.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKELA kwesokunxele obephethe uhlelo uNksz Tozi Mthethwa, Nksz Sbo Ncube kaMasipala weTheku, isikhuli esiphezulu seProudly SA uMnuz Eustace Mashimbye, Nksz Lindiwe Khuzwayo we-Illovo Sugar Africa noMnuz Vukani Mnyandu - bekhuluma esigcawini sokuvula umbuthano wamabhizinisi iDurban Business Fair, e-ICC, eThekwini ngoLwesithathu Image: ETHEKWINI MUNICIPALITY “SONKE sikhule sazi ukuthi ibhizinisi elithuthukayo noma eselichumile yilelo elinesitolo okwazi ukungena uthenge impahla noma umkhiqizo othile kusona, kepha ngenxa yesikhathi esiphila kusona - kufana nokuzibambezela ukubambelela kuleyo ndlela.” Usho kanjalo uMnuz Vukani Mnyandu, imenenja jikelele yoPhiko lwezokuXhumana nokuMaketha lweWholesale and Retail SETA, ecebisa osomabhizinisi ngamasu angabasiza maje ukuze bachume kwezamabhizinisi ngendlela engezukumba eqolo kubona. UMnyandu ubekhuluma embuthanweni wokucobelelana ngamabhizinisi wokuvula iDurban Business Fair, obuse-ICC, eThekwini ngoLwesithathu. Uthe sekuyisikhathi sokuthi osomabhizinisi abasebasha, basebenzise izindlela ezihambisana nesikhathi okuphilwa kusona ukuze imikhiqizo yabo ifinyelele kalula emakhasimendeni abo. KUBE nesasa bagcwala phama osomabhizinisi abasafufusa nezethameli abebezothekela ulwazi kuvulwa iDurban Business Fair e-ICC, eThekwini ngoLwesithathu Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE “Isikhathi esikusona manje sifuna ukuthi umuntu nomuntu asebenzise umakhalekhukhwini wakhe uwodwa qha ukuzakhela igama nokuthola indlela yokuchuma ebhizinisini. Kudinga ukuthi usebenze kanzima nokuthi uma usuqalile ungabe usayeka,” kusho yena. Uthe enye into esizayo ngokudayisa usebenzisa ubuchwepheshe besimanje wukulekeleleka ngokuthi umkhiqizo wakho usabalale futhi ufinyelele ebantwini basezindaweni eziningi, ngisho nasemazweni omhlaba imbala. Ezinye izikhulumi ebezikhona kulesi sigcawu uMnuz Eustace Mashimbye oyisikhulu esiphezulu seProudly SA, Nksz Lindiwe Khuzwayo we-Illovo Sugar Africa, Nksz Sbo Ncube kaMasipala weTheku noNksz Tozi Mthethwa obephethe uhlelo. Izethameli ebezihambele lesi sigcawu zithole ingqayizivele yethuba lokucetshiswa ngamasu okuthola amakhasimende amasha, nangobumqoka bokusebenzisana nezinhlaka ezihlukene. Lo mbuthano, owenziwa ihlandla lika-28 nonyaka, uvulwe ngokusemthethweni wuSihlalo weKomiti lokuThuthukiswa koMnotho nokuHlela eThekwini, ikhansela uThembo Ntuli - othe bahlose ukuqhubeka bawusebenzise ukuvula amathuba okuthuthukisa osomabhizinisi abasafufusa. Nonyaka ilinganiselwa ku-500 imikhiqizo yosomabhizinisi ezokhangiswa kusuka namhlanje kuze kusongwe lo mbuthano ngoMgqibelo. Ibalelwa ku-R400 million imali esitshalwe wuMasipala weTheku kulolu hlelo eminyakeni ewu-27 edlule, okusize amabhizinisi angaphezu kuka-40 000, kwakha amathuba omsebenzi angaphezu kuka-22 000. Indikimba yalo nyaka ithi Enabling SMME Growth Through Funding, Compliance, Market Access and Strategic Partnership - okusho ukuthi kuzosizwa osomabhizinisi abasafufusa ukuthola amathuba okuxhaswa, basizwe ngezindlela zokuphatha ibhizinisi, ukuthola amakhasimende nangamacebo okusebenzisana ukuze bathuthuke.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INGXENYE yezethameli nosomabhizinisi abebehambele umbuthano wosomabhizinisi amaBambelela Business Awards: Exhibition & Seminar, obuseHollywoodbets Greyville Convention Centre, eThekwini ngoLwesibili Image: FACEBOOK/HOLLYWOOD FOUNDATION BAZOHLEKA bodwa osomabhizinisi abawu-20 bamabhizinisi asafufusa, abazokhethwa ohlwini lwabawu-128 abangenele umncintiswano wokuthola uxhaso lokufukula osomabhizinisi amaBambelela Business Awards, ahlelwa yiHollywood Foundation. Lokhu kungenxa yokuthi nonyaka inyuswe ngo-R135 000 imali yomklomelo ozohlukaniswa  abazonqoba, isuka ku-R1 million - okuzohlaluka ukuthi bangobani uma sebeklonyeliswa emcimbini ozoba seHollywoodbets Greyville Convention Centre, eThekwini, namhlanje ngo-6 ntambama. Lezi zindaba zimenyezelwe okhulumela iHollywood Foundation, uNksz Vuyisile Ngobese - ekhuluma embuthanweni wokukhangisa ngamabhizinisi osomabhizinisi, obusendaweni efanayo ngoLwesibili - lapho bethole nethuba lokuzidayisa. OSOMABHIZINISI abasafufusa bathole ithuba lokukhangisa ngamabhizinisi abo kumaBambelela Business Awards: Exhibition & Seminar, abese-Hollywoodbets Greyville Convention Centre, eThekwini ngoLwesibili Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE UNksz Ngobese uthe babone kukuhle ukuthi bengeze le mali yomklomelo wokuxhasa osomabhizinisi ngoba bebona iqhaza umncintiswano olibambayo ukusiza ukuthi osomabhizinisi bafukule futhi bathuthukise amabhizinisi abo, kusuka beqala lo mbono ngo-2023. UNKSZ Samkelisiwe Gumbi weSamkes Boutique Craft, omunye wosomabhizinisi abakhangise ngamabhizinisi abo kumaBambelela Business Awards, abeseHollywoodbets Greyville Convention Centre, eThekwini ngoLwesibili Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE “Sijabule nangokuthi sesize safika esigabeni lapho umbono wethu sewaziwa yiNingizimu Afrika, yingakho sikhuze ibuya ngamandla angaka njengoba sizowenza okwesithathu kulo nyaka, nesibona kuzosiza ukuthi kufukuleke osomabhizinisi abadinga leli thuba,” usho kanje. UNKSZ Thembisa Jordaan, elinye lamajaji akumaBambelela Business Awards Image: FACEBOOK/HOLLYWOOD FOUNDATION Eqhuba, uthe okunye okubajabulise kakhulu ngosomabhizinisi abangenele kulo nyaka, wukuthi akugcwele abaseThekwini namaphethelo kuphela njengoba kukhona nabaqhamuka koPort Shesptone, Greytown, Lundi nakwezinye izindawo ezihlukene zaKwaZulu-Natal. “Sifisa ukuthi siqhubekele kulokho ngoba inhloso yethu enkulu wukuthi yonke imisebenzi emihle esiyenzela umphakathi ingabi ngeyabantu basezindaweni ezithile kuphela, kepha sibheke ukuthi senze into ebonakalayo ezweni lonke,” kusho uNksz Ngobese.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INTANDOKAZI yomculi kamaskandi Umafikizolo uqophe umlando enqoba indondo ye-Best Song of The Year kumaMetro FM Music Awards, abese-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo ebusuku Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE UMCULI kamaskandi okwabangaconsi phansi kule ndima, Umafikizolo, usethembise ukuqhubeka ajabulise abalandeli bomculo wakhe nabelashwe yizingoma ezinomyalezo wothando. Umafikizolo usho kanjalo exoxa neSolezwe emva kokuhlabana ngendondo ye-Song of The Year kumaMetro FM Music Awards, abese-ICC, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku, obekungokokuqala ukuthi inqotshwe wumculi kamaskandi. Emukela indondo, ayinqobe ngengoma yakhe ebishisa izikhiotha nyakenye ethi Uyoncengwa Unyoko, Umafikizolo untele ngokuthi wethemba ukuthi lo mklomelo uzomsiza ethole umuntu wesifazane ozomjabulisa. INTANDOKAZI yomculi kamaskandi Umafikizolo uqophe umlando enqoba indondo ye-Best Song of The Year kumaMetro FM Music Awards, abese-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo ebusuku Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE Ebuzwa ukuthi ubesho ukuthini ngalokhu uthe: “Akukho okutheni engingakusho noma ngikuqinisekise okwamanje ngesimo sami sezothando, kuphela nje ngithembisa ukuthi uma kunomuzwa engiwuzwayo ngezothando ngizowukhombisa ngengoma yami emnandi.” Khonamanjalo, omunye umculi kamaskandi ongaconsi phansi kubalandeli, uKhuzani “Indlamlenze” Mpungose, naye uqophe umlando enqoba indondo ye-Best Maskandi, obekungokokuqala kulo nyaka ukuthi kube khona lo mkhakha. Ekhuluma emva kokuklonyeliswa lo mklomelo, uKhuzani uthe ukunqoba le ndondo ufisa ukuthi  kuvulele amaciko akule ndima amathuba ikakhulu ngoba abelokhu evaleleke kakhulu kule minyaka edlule. “Sekukaningi silwa singamaciko kamaskandi ukuthi umaskandi uhlonishwe ezingeni eliphezulu ngakho ukufika kulesi sigaba engikusona manje ngethemba ukuthi kuzovulela amanye amaciko iminyango kwenzeke okuhle kubeke nomculo wethu ebalazweni,” usho kanje.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUVUKE umunyu kumrepha uStogie T, emukela indoda ye-Best Hip Hop kumaMetro FM Music Awards, abese-ICC eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku Image: LIGHT HOUSE STUDIO UKHUMBULE bonke ubunzima nezinselelo adlule kuzo umrepha uStogie T, ngenkathi eklonyeliswa ngendondo ye-Best Hip Hop kumaMetro FM Awards, ngengoma yakhe ethi Four Horsemen, apike kuyona uNasty C, Areece noMaggz. Esethula inkulumo yakhe yokwamukela le ndondo kulo mcimbi obuse-ICC, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku, uStogie T uqale ngokuchiphiza izinyembezi cishe imizuzwana ewu-30 ese-stage - kwachaza inkundla yonke, abantu belinde ukuthi akhulume. Esevula umlomo, uthe lokhu akuzuza manje ngomculo wakhe emva kweminyaka engaphezu kuka-20 esemculweni, kuwubufakazi bokuthi uNkulunkulu akabakhohlwa abantu bakhe, ikakhulu abasuke benza izinto ezinhle nezinomthelela omuhle emphakathini. “Ngibonga kakhulu wonke amaciko asebenze engomeni yami ethi Four Horsemen, okuyiyona engithole le ndondo ngayo - nokuyinto ecacisa ngokusobala ukuthi amagalelo ami ayabonakala emculweni phezu kweminyaka engaphezu kwa-20 ngikhona,” usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe into emkhalise kakhulu izinyembezi ngenkathi emukela indondo - wukuthi bese kuyisikhathi eside kakhulu ekule ndima yomculo kepha kulokhu kukuncane kakhulu okukhombisa ukuthi abantu neziphathimandla bayawubona umsebenzi awenzayo. “Lokhu kuyangikhuthaza ukuthi ngiqhubeke ngizikhandle ngomsebenzi wami womculo engibusiswe wuNkulunkulu ngawo. Ngithemba ukuthi kuzokhuthaza amaciko eza emva kwami ukukhuthala nokuma njalo ezimweni ezinzima ukuthola akufunayo,” kusho uStogie T. UStogie T udabuka eTanzania, wase eduma emculweni esezinze eNingizimu Afrika. Igama lakhe lokuzalwa wuTumi Molekane kanti uqale ukugqama endimeni yomculo eseyingxenye yeqembu le-hip hop eselahlakazeka iTumi and The Volume. Ngaphandle kwale ngoma ethi Four Horsemen ekwi-albhamu kaStogie T yanyakenye, ethi Anomy  amanye ama-albhamu akhe athi Return of The King (2015), i-Stogie T (2016), i-Honey and Pain (2018), ne-The Empire of Sheep yango-2020.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: USOLWAZI Velaphi "VVO" Mkhize uzokwethula incwadi ayihlelile edidiyele umsebenzi wezinkondlo zikaBethuel Ndelu owaziwa ngelikaNonkamfela ongasekho emhlabeni Image: DOCTOR NGCOBO/INDEPENDENT NEWSPAPERS UMAKADEBONA kwezobuciko futhi oyisazi samasiko, uSolwazi Velaphi “VVO” Mkhize, usedalule ukuthi bekuhlale kuyisilonda kuyena ukubona kushabalala igama lezingqalabutho zobuciko, ezabamba iqhaza kuleli zwe ngezikhathi zobandlululo. UMkhize usho kanje exoxa neSolezwe ngencwadi eyiqoqo lezinkondlo zesiZulu ayihlelile esihloko sithi UMSAMO: Imfihlo Yempophoma: Kuthangi - Izolo - Nanamuhla, edidiyele izinkondlo eziwu-28 zowayeyisishoshovu sobuciko nembongi uBethuel Blose Ndelu, owayaziwa ngelikaNonkamfela - ongasekho emhlabeni. “Kumqoka ukuthi thina esisaphilayo kube wumsebenzi wethu ukuthi sizihluphe ngokuvumbulula imisebenzi emidala yobuciko bamaciko akithi angasekho emhlabeni, aze ashona ingayibonanga ilanga - bese siyididiyela futhi siyenze kabusha ukuze ibe wumthombo wolwazi ozohlale ukhona futhi ube wusizo esizukulwaneni esizayo,” usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe kade afisa ukuhlanganisa imisebenzi yobuciko kaNonkamfela, kodwa kwangashesha ukwenzeka ngenxa yokuthi bekukuningi kakhulu obekumxinile okubalwa  nemisebenzi yasemsakazweni Ukhozi FM neqondene naye yesintu. “Ngize nngaqala ukusebenzela kulo msebenzi ngoba yena uNonkamfela esefika amagemugemu kimina ngephupho, engikhumbuza ukwenza lo msebenzi - njengoba kuvele kuyinto esasiyikhulumile savumelana ukuthi ngisale ngimqedelela yona uma eshona engakayiqedi.  Imisebenzi yakhe yobuciko eminingi ayenza ngezikhathi zobandlululo. “Kungithathe cishe iminyaka emithathu ukuqoqa cishe lonke ulwazi ngebengizokudinga ukudidiyela incwadi njengoba isizophuma iyilokhu esiyikhona manje. Bekudingeka ukuthi sivumbulule enqwabeni yemiqulu yolwazi enemisebenzi yakhe,” kusho uMkhize. Uthe uhlanganise le ncwadi ngosizo lwabahluzi oSolwazi Gugu Mazibuko we-University of Johannesburg, Nksz Fortunate Ngconco woMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko KwaZulu-Natal noMnuz Senzo Mkhize - omsize ukuvumbulula ezinye izinkondlo. “Lo msebenzi udidiyele izinkondlo ezihluba udlubu ekhasini ngobunzima umuntu omnyama adlule kubona ngenkathi kusabusa uhulumeni wengcindezelo, bese kuba khona nalezo eziqhakambisa ubuhle bemvelo namandla ayo ukulungisa izimo ezithile ezweni,” kusho yena. Le ncwadi izobiza u-R250 iyinye, kanti izoqala ukutholakala emcimbini wokuyethula ozoba se-UKZN ophikweni iHoward College, eThekwini, ngoLwesithathu kusuka ngo-3 ntambama kuya ku-7 kusihlwa.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UKHOMISHANA wamaPhoyisa obambile uLiet General Puleng Dimpane Image: PHANDO JIKELO/RSA PARLIAMENT UKUQOKWA kukaLiet General Puleng Dimpane njengebamba esikhundleni sokuba uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa kuZwelonke sekuqubule impikiswano ngokuthi ngabe ukufanele ngokuphelele yini ukumelana nokudingeka kulo msebenzi. ULiet General Dimpane umenyezelwe uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa ngoLwesine, ukuthi  usezobamba kulo msebenzi, ngenxa yokumiswa kobekuwona uLiet General Fannie Masemola. UMasemola ubuyiselwe eceleni ngenxa yokuthi ubhekene necala lokwephula umthetho i-Public Finance Management Act of 1999. UMasemola umiswe kusukela ekutheni evele eNkantolo yeMantshi ePitoli ngoLwesibili emva kokuthi ethunyelelwe amaphepha ngenyanga edlule, eyalelwa ukuthi avele enkantolo mayelana nezinsolo abhekene nazo zokwephula umthetho. Ubhekene namacala amane okwephula umthetho mayelana nethenda ka-R360 million yezinsiza kusebenza zezempilo zoPhiko lwamaPhoyisa iSouth African Police Service, okuvela ukuthi yatholwa usomabhizinisi osolwa ngezenzo zobugebengu uMnuz Vusimuzi “Cat” Matlala. Ngaphambi kwalokhu, uLiet General Dimpane wayekade eyiSikhulu esiPhezulu sezeziMali khona oPhikweni lwamaPhoyisa, kanti uke wafakaza kabili, lapho aveza khona ukuthi akakaze abe neqhaza endleleni okwenganyelwa ngayo leyo thenda. Ngenkathi uMcwaningi Mabhuku Jikelele eveza ukuthi iwu-R650 million imali eyasebenza ngendlela engafanele embuthweni wamaphoyisa onyakeni wemali ka-2024/25, lokho kubandakanya no-R360 million wethenda okwahlomula uMatlala kuyona. Okhulumela i-MK Party, uMnuz Nhlamulo Ndhlela, ugxeke isinqumo sikaRamaphosa ngalokhu, asichaze ngokuthi asiyixazululi nhlobo inkinga yobugebengu nenkohlakalo embuthweni wamaphoyisa. UNdhlela ukhale ngokuthi uDimpane akanawo amava adingekayo nafanele omkhakha wobuphoyisa, njengoba imisebenzi eminingi aseyenzile phambilini, kubalwa nabewenza manje - ibigxile kakhulu ekucwaningeni amabhuku nezomnotho. Ilungu lePhalamende le-Action SA, uNksz Dereleen James, lidalule ukuthi kubaxakile ukuthi uDimpane unikwe kanjani lo msebenzi ekubeni kwaziwa ukuthi izinto eziningi zonakale  kunguyena obebhekele ukusebenza kwemali yophiko lwamaphoyisa. “Ukuqokwa kwakhe kusishiya nemibuzo eminingi yokuthi ngabe akunagcobho yini, futhi kwenza sibe magange ukubheka ukuthi akukho chashaza yini elingase linamekeke egameni lakhe,” kusho uNksz James. UMnuz Ian Cameron weDemocratic Alliance (DA) uthe nakuba bebefisa ukuthi kube khona okwenzekayo ngoMasemola, kodwa abanaso isiqiniseko sokuthi uDimpane uzokwazi yini ukumelana nalo msebenzi ikakhulu ngoba akanawo amava awo. ULiet General Dimpane unamava eminyaka eya ku-20 omsebenzi, kanti uqale ukwenza umsebenzi wokuba yiSikhulu soPhiko lwezeziMali kwezamaPhoyisa ngo-2018.
