Ngaphambi kwalokho uke waba yiPhini likaKhomishana wamaPhoyisa eFree State, waba yiNhloko yoPhiko lwezeziMali lwe-SAPS, futhi wabamba isikhashana ekubeni wuMholi woPhiko lokuCwaninga amaBhuku emaPhoyiseni. Ngokwemfundo uneziqu ze-BCom in Business Administration. Khonamanjalo, uMshushisi woMbuso u-Adv Santhos Manilall watshela iNkantolo ukuthi uMasemola kumele avele enkantolo naye uMatlala nabanye abathintekayo kulo mkhonyovu wethenda. Icala likaMasemola lizobuyela eNkantolo yeMantshi ePitoli ngoMeyi 13.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KWAKUKUHLE kudelile kanjena ngenkathi kuklonyeliswa osomabhizinisi abadla umhlanganiso kumaBambelela Business Awards nyakenye KONKE sekumi ngomumo ngomcimbi waminyaka yonke wokuhlonipha nokuklomelisa osomabhizinisi bemikhakha ehlukene, nozohambisana nombukiso wokukhangisa ngamabhizinisi abo, amaBambelela Business Awards. Lo mcimbi ohlelwa yiHollywood Foundaton, okhuza ibuya ihlandla lesithathu nonyaka, uzoqala ngombukiso wamabhizinisi ngo-Ephreli 28 ngo-8 ekuseni, bese kuba wumcimbi wokuklomelisa osomabhizinisi ngo-Ephreli 29 ngo-6 kusihlwa - kokubili okuzoba seHollywoodbets Greyville Convention Centre, eThekwini. Kulo mncintiswano, osekwa nawuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal, kuzoklonyeliswa osomabhizinisi basesifundazweni abaqhamuka ezindaweni ezihlukene okubalwa kuzona iTheku, uMgungundlovu, Ulundi, Greytown, Richards Bay, Mpangeni nasePort Shepstone. Okhulumela iHollywood Foundation, uNksz Vuyisile Ngobese, uthe nonyaka lo mcimbi bawenze belandela indikimba ethi "Rooted in KZN, Advancing Township and Rural SMMEs for Inclusive and Sustainable Economic Growth", okusho ukuthi babheke ukufukula osomabhizinisi basemalokishini nabasezindaweni zasemakhaya ukuze kusimame umnotho. “Emva kohlelo lokuhlunga, sigcine siqoke amabhizinisi awu-128 eKZN yonkana ukuthi abambe iqhaza ohlelweni lwanonyaka. Sibaqoke eminxeni ehlukene okubalwa owezobuchwepheshe besimanje, ezokwakha, imboni yemfashini, ezempilo nezobuhle okubamba iqhaza elimqoka ukufukula umnotho wesifundazwe sethu,” kusho uNksz Ngobese. Eqhuba, udalule ukuthi kulokhu baqikelelile ukuthi kuqhakambiseke kakhulu osomabhizinisi besifazane njengoba bewu-66% abangenelile, okusho ukuthi nembokodo izoba neqhaza elinqala nelibonakalayo ekukhuliseni umnotho nokuthuthukisa umphakathi. “Konke lokhu esikwenzayo kokuveza amabhizinisi asemalokishini nasezindaweni zasemakhaya kuzosiza kakhulu ukuthuthukisa osomabhizinisi, kube kulekelela ngokuthi kwakhe amathuba okwandisa abatshalimali ukuze bafukuleke,” usho kanje. Uthe nakulo nyaka iwu-20 iminxa ehlukene yamabhizinisi okuzoklonyeliswa osomabhizinisi abanqobile kuyona, bese kuthi abazonqoba kuyona bahlukaniselane umklomelo ka-R1 million wokuxhasa amabhizinisi abo. “Izinga losomabhizinisi esibathole kulo nyaka lisinike ithemba lokuthi emva kokuhlomula kwabo kulolu hlelo bazokwazi ukubamba iqhaza elimqoka emphakathini futhi sizibophezele ukuqhubeka nalo mbono esiwenzayo,” kuthembisa uNksz Ngobese.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: AMACIKO omculo i-3 Step oJazzworld noThukuthela bemukela enye yezindondo ezinthathu abahlabane ngazo kumaMetro FM Music Awards, abese-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo ebusuku Image: LIGHT LOUNGE STUDIO UKUNGENISA nokuthandwa komculo omusha womdanso i-3-Step, oyinhlanganisela yeKwaito ne-House, kubonakale ngokuthi kukhonye amaciko enza lolu hlobo lomculo, egadla ephindelela ngokuwola izindondo zamaMetro FM Music Awards. Kulo mcimbi, obukhuza ibuya ihlandla lesi-20 nobekugujwa ngawo iminyaka ewu-40 kwasungulwa isiteshi somsakazo iMetro FM, ubuse-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo ebusuku - wenziwe kulandelwa indikimba ethi Music Excellence. Emacikweni adle ubhedlu kulokhu kubalwa amaciko eqembu le-3 Step oJazzworld noThukuthela, abahlabane ngezindondo ezintathu ze-Best Produced Album, yi-Best Dance ne-Best Duo/Group nge-albhamu yabo yokuqala ebishisa izikhotha nyakenye, esihloko sithi The Most Wanted. UMCULI uCiza emukela enye yezindondo ezimbili ahlabane ngazo kumaMetro FM Music Awards, abese-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo ebusuku Image: LIGHT LOUNGE STUDIO Umculi uCiza, ongenise kwezwakala naye nyakenye ngengoma yakhe ethi Isaka, ephrojuswe yibona oJazzworld noThukuthela, yena ukhale wemuka nezindondo ezimbili ze-Best Male Artist neye-Best Artist of The Year. Kulo mbuthano, uhlelo lwawo ebelwethulwa wumlingisi uLawrence Maleka nomsakazi weMetro FM uLerato Kganyago, kuhlonishwe ingqalabutho yomculo kaMaskandi, Ihhashi Elimhlophe - liklonyeliswa ngendondo ye-Lifetime Achievement Award. IQEMBU leSicathamiya elidume umhlaba wonke iLadysmith Black Mambazo, lemukela enye yezindondo ezintathu elihlabane ngazo kumaMetro FM Music Awards, abese-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo ebusuku Image: LIGHT LOUNG STUDIO Umakadebona kwezokusakaza uWilson B. Nkosi, wayo iMetro FM - yena uklonyeliswe ngendondo ye-Long Service Award, ukumhlonipha ngamagalelo akhe eminyaka engaphezu kwa-40 esakaza, nokuningi okuhle asekwenzele lo msakazo. Iqembu leSicathamiya elidume umhlaba wonke iLadysmith Black Mambazo nayo ihlabane ngemiklomelo emithathu ye-Best Collaboration Song, yi-Best African Pop ne-Best Global Icon. Emikhakheni emibili ebiqala ukuba khona kulo nyaka; okungowe-Best Lekompo, kunqobe kuwona uKharishma - obuye wahlabana nangendondo ye-Best New Artist; kwase kwathi owe-Best Maskandi wanqotshwa kuKhuzani “Indlamlenze” Mpungose. Selulonke uhla lwamaciko anqobile emikhakheni ehlukene lumi kanje: Best Jazz Album: Paras “Sibalikhulu” Dlamini - Ingoma Busuku Best Gospel Album: Musa Yende - Sustained By Grace Best Produced Album: Jazzworld & Thukuthela - The Most Wanted Best Collaboration Song: Ladysmith Black Mambazo - You Make Me Happy Best Viral Challenge: Goon Flavour, MasterKG & Eemoh - Ngishutheni Best Female Artist: Shandesh Best Male Artist: Ciza Best Styled Artist: Musa Keys Best RnB Song: Una Rams - Priceless Obsession Best Maskandi: Khuzani - Umanikinikana Best Hip-Hop: Stogie T - Four Horsemen Best Dance: Jazzworld, MaWhoo, GL_Ceejay & Thukuthela - Uzizwa Kanjani Best Music Video: Sam Deep, Nia Pearl, Boohle & Mano - Shela Best Lekompo: Kharishma - Wa Inama Best Amapiano: Sam Deep - Shela Best Kwaito/Gqom: DJ Tira - Awungazi Best African Pop: Ladysmith Black Mambazo - You Make Me Happy Best New Artist: Kharishma Best Artist of The Year: Ciza Best Duo/Group: Jazzworld & Thukuthela Best Global Icon: Ladysmith Black Mambazo Lifetime Achievement Award: Ihhashi Elimhlophe Long Service Award: Wilson B. Nkosi Song of The Year: Umafikizolo - Uyoncengwa Unyoko INTANDOKAZI kaMaskandi uKhuzani uhlabane ngendondo ye-Best Maskandi, obekungokokuqala iba khona kumaMetro FM Music Awards, abese-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo ebusuku Image: LIGHT LOUNGE STUDIO Emikhakheni emibili ebiqala ukuba khona kulo nyaka; okungowe-Best Lekompo, kunqobe kuwona uKharishma - obuye wahlabana nangendondo ye-Best New Artist; kwase kwathi owe-Best Maskandi wanqotshwa kuKhuzani “Indlamlenze” Mpungose. UMCULI kaMaskandi oshisa izikhotha Umafikizolo ngenkathi emukela indondo ye-Song of The Year kumaMetro FM Music Awards, abese-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo ebusuku Selulonke uhla lwamaciko anqobile emikhakheni ehlukene lumi kanje: Best Jazz Album: Paras “Sibalikhulu” Dlamini - Ingoma Busuku Best Gospel Album: Musa Yende - Sustained By Grace Best Produced Album: Jazzworld & Thukuthela - The Most Wanted Best Collaboration Song: Ladysmith Black Mambazo - You Make Me Happy Best Viral Challenge: Goon Flavour, MasterKG & Eemoh - Ngishutheni Best Female Artist: Shandesh Best Male Artist: Ciza Best Styled Artist: Musa Keys Best RnB Song: Una Rams - Priceless Obsession Best Maskandi: Khuzani - Umanikinikana Best Hip-Hop: Stogie T - Four Horsemen Best Dance: Jazzworld, MaWhoo, GL_Ceejay & Thukuthela - Uzizwa Kanjani Best Music Video: Sam Deep, Nia Pearl, Boohle & Mano - Shela Best Lekompo: Kharishma - Wa Inama Best Amapiano: Sam Deep - Shela Best Kwaito/Gqom: DJ Tira - Awungazi Best African Pop: Ladysmith Black Mambazo - You Make Me Happy Best New Artist: Kharishma Best Artist of The Year: Ciza Best Duo/Group: Jazzworld & Thukuthela Best Global Icon: Ladysmith Black Mambazo Lifetime Achievement Award: Ihhashi Elimhlophe Long Service Award: Wilson B. author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI kamaskandi uMlabalaba ngelinye lamaciko asematheni kulezi zinsuku nge-albhamu yakhe entsha yesikhombisa ethi Izethembiso UMCULI kamaskandi ongomunye wabangaconsi phansi kubalandeli bomculo, uMlabalaba, usedalule ukuthi ukuzinika isikhathi esanele sokupheka umculo wakhe omusha, nokuqapha izinto ezenzeka empilweni yabantu - kumsiza ukuthola izindikimba azocikoza ngazo. UMlabalaba usho kanjalo engxoxweni neSolezwe mayelana ne-albhamu yesikhombisa ethi Izethembiso, ephume ekupheleni kukaMashi. Igabe ngezingoma eziwu-17, ezididiyele imiyalezo yezimo nezinto ezihlukene zokwenzeka empilweni nasemhlabeni nsuku zonke. Udalule ukuthi uqale ukusebenza kule albhamu ngabo-Okthoba nyakenye, futhi okuvele kuwumkhuba wakhe ukuqala ngaleso sikhathi ukuze ayipheke ngokwanele nangokufanele. “Kanjalo nasemacikweni engisebenze nawo ngenze ngendlela engihlale ngenza ngayo eyenza kube lula ukusebenza nawo. Ngiqale ngokuwabhalela izinhlamvu ngengifisa ukuthi akusho engomeni ukwenzela ukuthi umyalezo wengoma ungalahleki,” usho kanje. Emacikweni asebenze nawo kule ngoma kubalwa uMzukulu, Jikelele Khumalo, Mashimane, noSamukelisiwe Ncwane ampike ezingomeni ezintathu kwi-albhamu. “Ngiyiqambe (i-albhamu) ngokuthi Izethembiso ngoba ngaphambi kokuthi iphume, kube iyona ngoma lena abantu abaningi abakhombise ukuyithakasela emva kokuzwa isiqeshana sayo, ngibe sengibona kukuhle ukwakhela lo msebenzi phezu kwayo. Ibukeka ingena kahle ebantwini njengoba zonke izingoma ezikuyo sezilalelwe ngaphezu kuka-200 000 ezitolo ezihlukene ezidayisa umculo kwi-internet,” kusho uMlabalaba. Uthe kule albhamu ubheke kakhulu ingoma ethi Izenzo, akhuthaza ngayo abantu ukuthi bangaliphonsi ithawula kunoma yisiphi isimo ababhekana naso empilweni, bathembe ukuthi ngelinye ilanga liyogcina livelile ithuba lokuchuma kulokho abakufisayo. “Kukhona nenye futhi ethi Ibiyini Imali ekhuluma ngokuthi kuyenzeka ukuthi uthole konke okudingayo empilweni, kepha kube wukuthi abasekho abazali bakho ozojabulela nabo leyo mpumelelo. Kukhona nethi Akeneli, ekhuluma ngendlela abanye besifazane abenza ngayo bekhombisa ukuthi abagculisekile ngendlela abadalwe ngayo, okuveza ngokusobala ukuthi kuwumqansa kangakanani ukubajabulisa ngokuphelele,” usho kanje. UMlabalaba udabuka KwaCeza, oLundi. Igama lakhe lokuzalwa nguSibusiso Khumalo; kanti le albhamu yakhe yelama ayisithupha okuqala athi Impande Yesikhova (2020), Njengo Zahara (2021), Zibomv’ Inhliziyo (2022), Son Of A Carpenter (2023), Ilo Nalo Naloya (2024) nethi Dankie Nkulunkulu (2025).

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: OMNUZ Sabelo Magwaza, uMnuz Siphesihle Biyela, uMnuz Emihle Dlamini, uMnuz Busiswa Chiliza noMnuz Monde  Mhlongo - abanikazi benkampani yemisebenzi yokuthwebula iKune Studio ezinze eThekwini, KwaZulu-Natal UKUHLANGANA enyuvesi besaqeqeshelwa umkhakha wokuthwebula nokubonana njalo uma benza imisebenzi yabo yalo mkhakha kwaze kwaqinisa ubudlelwano kwizinsizwa ezinhlanu, futhi kwazisiza nangokuzibula ngenkampani ezisiza ukusebenza ndawonye. Labo woMnuz Sabelo Magwaza weSabelo Mag yaseMlaza, wuSiphesihle Biyela weSphewato Media yaseNanda, wuBusiswa Chiliza wenkampani Umshuthi Media yaseMagabheni, wu-Emihle Dlamini wePluug Talk Studio yaKwaMashu noMonde Mhlongo weMonde Films yaseClermont - asebesebenzisana enkampanini yabo abayiqale ndawonye iKune Studio. Engxoxweni neSolezwe Ngempelasonto, uMagwaza uthe baqale ukuzwana noBiyela noDlamini besaqeqeshelwa lomkhakha eDurban University of Technology (DUT) ngo-2020, okuthe ngo-2022 bahlangana noChiliza noMhlongo - sebevele sebenamabhizinisi abo alo msebenzi, okuqinise ubudlelwano babo baze bashisekela ukusebenzisana ndawonye. “Kuqale kancane kuwukuthi siyalekelelana uma kukhona oyedwa phakathi kwethu osuke enomsebenzi omkhulu nodinga izandla eziningi, kwagcina kuba wumkhuba wethu ukuthi njalo siyalekelelana uma kunemisebenzi enjalo - sase sanquma ukuqala le nkampani ngenhloso yokuthi uma kunemisebenzi emikhulu siyenze egameni layo kuphela,” kusho uMagwaza. Eqhuba, uthe ukuqala iKune Studio kubasize kakhulu ukuthola imisebenzi yemicimbi emikhulu yohulumeni neyemicimbi emikhulu yobumnandi ejwayele ukwenzeka eThekwini namaphethelo, okubasiza ukuthi benze inzuzo ngezindlela eziningi futhi ezihlukene. “Lokhu kusisiza nangokuthi uma kwenzeka ukuthi oyedwa wethu athole ikhasimende elidinga ukwenzela umsebenzi odinga abantu abaningi, kuba lula ukuthi alidlulisele kwiKune Studio - bese singena sonke kalula kanjalo, okusisiza kakhulu ukuya phambili,” kusho yena. Uthe wethemba ukuthi ukungenisa kwabo ngale ndlela ehlukile kanjena kuzokhuthaza nabanye abantu abasha abanamakhono ehlukene basemalokishini ukulandela ezinyathelweni zabo ukwenza kahle, nokusebenzisana ukuze baphumelele.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUJWAYELE ukuthi phama kanjena uma sekuwumbukiso wezamabhizinisi waminyaka yonke i-Durban Business Fair, ekhuza ibuya inhlandla lesi-28 kulo nyaka OSOMABHIZINISI abasafufusa nabashisekela ukuchumisa amabhizinisi abo bazothola ithuba lokucetshiswa ngokumele bakwenze ukuthola intuba yokuphumelela ngawo uma sebehambele umbukiso wezamabhizinisi waminyaka yonke i-Durban Business Fair (DBF). Lo mbukiso wokukhangisa ngamabhizinisi ozoba seDurban Exhibition Centre, eThekwini, kusuka ngo-Ephreli 30 kuya kuMeyi 2, uzokwendlalelwa yi-Business Indaba izoba se-ICC, ngo-Ephreli 29 ngo-9 ekuseni, lapho okuzobhungwa ngamasu okukhulisa ibhizinisi. Nonyaka ukhuza ibuya ihlandla lesi-28 lo mbuthano wamabhizinisi, ondikimba yawo yanonyaka ithi Enabling SMME Growth Through Funding, Compliance, Market Access, and Strategic Partnerships - okusho ukuthi kuzosizwa osomabhizinisi abasafufusa ngamathuba okuxhaswa ebhizinisini, wukuthola amakhasimende nobumqoka bokusebenzisana nabanye. Ezikhulumini kuzobe kukhona isikhulu esiphezulu seProudly SA, uNkk Happy Khumalo-Ngidi, umqondisi woPhiko lokuThutha nokuHwebelana ngeMpahla kuMasipala weTheku, uNksz Sbo Ncube, ilungu loHlaka lwezeNtela eZweni i-SARS, uNksz Wandisa Madyibi nenye yezimenenja zeSEDA, uMnuz Thula Mkhwanazi. Lezi zikhulumi zizobe zidingida izihloko ezisemqoka kubalwa imigudu okumele ilandelwe wosomabhizinisi abasafufusa ukubasiza baxhaseke, izinkinga zokuswela imali, umthelela omubi wokunyuka kwamanani empahla, yimigudu esemqoka okumele ilandelwe yilabo abasanamabhizinisi, ikakhulu abasanda kuwaqala namasu okubasiza ukuwachumisa. Umbukiso wamabhizinisi uzobe usuvulwa ngokusemthethweni ngo-Ephreli 30, nguNgqongqoshe woMnyango wokuThuthukisa amaBhizinisi amaNcane, uNkk Stella Ndabeni-Abrahams, bese naye azisa ngezinhlelo zoMnyango wakhe zokuthuthikisa osomabhizinisi abasafufusa. Usihlalo wekomiti loPhiko lokuThuthukisa uMnotho nokuHlela kuMasipala weTheku, iKhansela uThembo Ntuli, uthe lo mbukiso usemqoka kakhulu ukusiza amabhizinisi asafufusa ngamathuba azonikezelwa kuwona ngokwehlukana kwawo. “Leli thuba lihlanganisa izinhlaka ezihlukene futhi eziwukhiye wokuthuthuka kosomabhizinisi abasafufusa, lapho bekwazi ukuthi bathole amathuba, amasu namathuluzi okubasiza ukufukula amabhizinisi abo, okusiza ukufukula umnotho wethu,” kusho uNtuli. Abafisa ukwethamela lo mbuthwano wokubhunga ngezamabhizinisi, ohlelwa wuMasipala weTheku - banxuswa ukuthi bathumele i-email ku: [email protected]

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: IMEYA kaMasipala waseMfolozi iKhansela uXolani Bhengu nethimba lezinhlekelele behlola umonakalo odalwe yisiphepho KwaMbonambi, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal SISHIYE kukhalwa isishingishane sesiphepho esihlasele ku-ward 7, u-8, u-9 no-17 ngeSonto kusihlwa endaweni yaseNtuzuma naseMvazane, KwaMbonambi, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal, njengoba kuvele ukuthi sishaye kwezwela emizini ebalelwa ku-70 ecekeleke phansi. IMeya yakuMasipala waseMfolozi, iKhansela uXolani Bhengu, yithimba lezinhlekelele kulo Masipala nomholi waku-ward 17 iKhansela uWiseman Njoko - bahambele kule ndawo ukuyohlola umonakalo owenzekele ukubheka ukuthi ungalungiseka kanjani. IMEYA kaMasipala waseMfolozi iKhansela uXolani Bhengu ehlola umonakalo odalwe yisiphepho KwaMbonambi, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal UBhengu udlulise amazwi enduduzo emndenini ethintekile kulesi simo, wase edalula nokuthi ithimba lezinhlekelele lizoqoqelela umbiko ogcwele ngomonakalo owenzekile, bese udluliselwa eMinyangweni efanele ukuthi kulungiswe lesi simo ngokushesha. “Kanti futhi sesibabikelile nabe-Eskom ukuthi basisize ukulungisa isimo sikagesi endaweni njengoba lo monakalo ukhinyabeze ukusebenza kogesi, futhi sinxusa nabanye abantu ukuthi bafake isandla kule mindeni ekhinyabezekile sibe sisalinde usizo olufanele,” kusho yena.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: Kusukela kwesokunxele wuSimzuzile Damisa, Thandeka Ngobese, Mendy Mbatha, Akhona Cele, Akhona Ngema no-Andile Moyana bephahle uNksz Zime Msweli - ongumsunguli womncintiswano wokumodela u-Miss KZN Queen ABESIFAZANE asebenezingane kodwa abanothando nentshisekelo yokuchuma emkhakheni wokumodela sebenikwe ithuba lokungenela u-Miss KZN Queen 2026/27, umncintiswano wokumodela osuvulele intsha yesifazane amathuba amaningi okumodela. Lezi zindaba zidalulwe wumsunguli walo mncintiswano, uNksz Zime Msweli othe bese kuyisikhathi eside kakhulu abantu bemcela ukuthi axegise kancane imithetho yokungenela umncintiswano, ukuze onobuhle asebezele bangavaleleki ngaphandle. “Ngibuye ngaphushwa nawukuthi okuningi kwesikwenzayo sisuke silandela imithetho nendlela yokwenza emincintiswaneni yokumodela emikhulu o-Miss Universe no-Miss World, nabo asebevele sebekwenzile lokhu kokuxegisa imithetho, sibonile futhi kwenzeka okufanayo nakuMiss South Africa lana ezweni lethu,” kusho uNksz Msweli. UNELISA Khumalo ophethe isicoco sika-Miss KZN Queen 2026 Eqhuba, uthe njengoba bebuya ihlandla lesishiyagalolunye kulo nyaka ngalo mncintiswano babheke ukwamukela onobuhle abawu-30 abazobahlukanisa kabili ngokwemikhakha yeminyaka yabo okungowe-Teen ongenelwa ngabano-15 kuya ku-32, nowama-Senior ongenelwa onobuhle abaneminyaka ewu-19 kuya ku-34. Ukungenela nonyaka kuvalwa ngoMeyi 16. “Sesivele sesivulile ngokusemthethweni imingenelo yalo nyaka esibheke ukuthi sizame ukwenza kube khona onobuhle asebezele esizobanika ithuba lokuzibonakalisa ukuthi yikuphi okuhle abangeza nakho kulo mncintiswano. Nokho kumele sisho ukuthi ngeke sibathambisele isandla  konke sizozama ukukwenza ngendlela eqondile nenobulungiswa,” kusho uNksz Msweli. “Nanokuthi njengoba ngiwumuntu osebenzisa kakhulu izinkundla zokuxhumana bese kukaningi ngiqaphela ukugxekwa kubuye kukhulunywe kabi ngabantu besifazana abanezingane, engicabanga ukuthi leli thuba lizokwenza ukuthi bazibonakalise,” kusho yena. UNELISA Khumalo ophethe isicoco sika-Miss KZN Queen 2026 U-Miss KZN Queen usuvule iminyango futhi wathuthukisa onobuhle abehlukene endimeni kubalwa u-Ayanda Thabethe owawunqoba ngo-2020, nowalala isibili kuMiss SA ngo-2022, Anelisa Nxele noSibusisiwe Zwane abangena kwi-Top 30 yawo uMiss SA ngo-2023. Konobuhle abanqobe lo mncintiswano eminyakeni edlule kukhona uSithabile Mnyandu ngo-2018, Kholeka Dlamini ngo-2019, Ayanda Thabethe ngo-2020/21.Philasande Ngcamu ngo-2022, Sibusisiwe Zwane ngo-2023, Nkazimulo Tshabalala ngo-2024, Nothando Mngadi ngo-2025 nophethe isicoco kulo nyaka uNelisa Khumalo.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCWANINGI Mabhuku Jikelele, uNksz Tsakani Maluleke UMUNWE ukhomba kubaholi neziphathimandla zoMasipala KwaZulu-Natal abawu-42 kwabawu-54 okuvele ukuthi bahlushwa yisihlava sobunuku emalini okumele ngabe isebenza ukulungisa nokufeza izidingo zomphakathi, kodwa igcine isebenza kokungafanele. Lokho kushiwo wuSihlalo we-Action SA KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Zwakele Mncwango, ngenkathi ezwakalisa ilaka lakhe mayelana nombiko okhishwe wuMcwaningi Mabhuku Jikelele, uNksz Tsakani Maluleke, embikweni awethule esiShayamthetho ngoLwesine. Embikweni kaNksz Maluleke kuvele ukuthi bane kuphela omasipala okungatholakalanga gcobho kubona okungowaseMhlathuze, Richmond, Umlalazi neKing Cetshwayo. Kuvele nokuthi omasipala abawu-42 basaphaze imali elinganiselwa ku-R7.8 billion ngonyaka wemali odlule, kanti futhi okukhathaza kakhulu wukuthi labo masipala yibona abathole ingxenye enkulu yesabelomali esitholwa womasipala baseKZN - njengoba bethole u-88% ku-R125.1 billion oklanyelwa omasipala. UMncwango uthe lesi simo sikhomba ukuthi izwe libuswa abaholi abangakulungele ukuphatha izwe ngobuqotho, futhi indlela abenza ngayo ikhomba ukuthi abayikhathalele inhlalakahle nentuthuko yomphakathi. “Kuyiqiniso elingenakuphikwa ukuthi okunye okusibeka lapho esikhona manje wukuthi ezinye iziphathimandla zomasipala zithatha imali okumele ngabe isiza ezidingweni zomphakathi,  ziyitshale emikhankasweni yazo yokhetho - okuyisenzo esiphambene nomthetho. “Lilonke nje kusobala ukuthi ubuholi obusemandleni manje kudingeka ukuthi buzinuke amakhwapha ngendlela okwengamela ngayo imali yokusiza umphakathi.Kuyacaca ukuthi sekuyisikhathi sokuthi kutholakale isandla sobuholi obusha obuzobeka izidingo zomphakathi phambili - ngoba laba abakhona manje sebehlulekile,” kusho uMncwango. UMncwango udalule nokuthi okufakazela ukungathembeki nokungaholi ngobuqotho komasipala wukuthi kumanje sekuphele iminyaka emibili yonke afaka incwadi efuna ukucaciseleleka ngezinsolo zokuqashwa kwabantu abayizipoki ohlelweni lwe-EPWP. Leli phephandaba liyibonile incwadi eyathunyelwa wuMncwango ngoJulayi ngo-2024, ayeyibhekise kuMasipala weTheku ebuza ukuthi kwagcina kwenzekenii ngalezo zinsolo, aveze ukuthi kuze kube yimanje do impendulo. UMcwaningi Mabhuku Jikelele udalule nokuthi kuleli qoqo lomasipala abanogcobho kukhona noMkhandlu omkhulu weTheku, omasipala bezifunda nomasipala abayizizinda nensika yomnotho wesifundazwe. Kuvele nokuthi kunomasipala abawu-10 asebehlale kuleli qoqo labangenzi kahle iminyaka ewu-10 nangaphezulu, okukhomba ubukhulu bomonakalo oqhubekayo ngalesi simo.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUBA kuhle kanjena uma ibandla lamaZayoni i-The New Zion City in SA: Omacekeceke - selenza iNkonzo yalo yesiVuno kahlanu ngonyaka NGOKUJWAYELEKILE amabandla amaningi amaZayoni avame ukusebenzisa inyanga uJulayi noma u-Agasti ukwenza iNkonzo yaminyaka yonke yesiVuno, okusetshenziswa yona ukuphana izipho zezithelo, amaveji nokudla okwehlukene - ukukhombisana uthando nokunakekelana. Kepha abebandla lamaZayoni, i-The New Zion City in SA: Omacekeceke, egatsheni laseZimbokodweni, eNingizimu yeTheku, bakwenza ngendlela ehlukile lokhu njengoba sebekwenze umkhuba wabo abawenza kahlanu ngonyaka. UMvangeli waleli bandla, uMnuz Nkosinathi Dladla, uthe lo mbono wabafikela ngokuthi bekuhlale kubakhathaza ukuthi uma beyokhonza kubo kamzalwane othile, abatatazelele uma sekuqediwe ngoba efuna ukukhipha unyawo lokukhombisa ukubabonga ngokungenisa endlini yakhe. UMNUZ Nkosinathi Dladla, uMvangeli webandla lamaZayoni i-The New Zion City in SA: Omacekeceke “Sibone lapho ukuthi kufanele senze uhlelo olunjena ukusiza ukuthi uma sivakashele umzalwane ukuyokhonzela kubo noma kwakhe, kube yithina esiletha nezipho kuyena, ukusiza ukugwema ukuthi angene agamanxe ephaketheni elungisa okudliwayo. “Kusisiza nangokuthi abazalwane bazane, futhi sikwazi ukwazi lapho okudabuka khona abazalwane esikhonza nabo ebandleni, kungaze kube wukuthi siyoze sifike emakhaya abo ngoba nakhu sekuvele isifo noma into embi edinga ukuthi siye khona,” kuchaza uDladla. Eqhuba, uthe lo mbono baqale ukuwenza ngo-2019 futhi kubonakala uthela izithelo ezinhle kakhulu ebandleni njengoba kuze kube yimanje, emalungwini abo awu-175 egatsheni labo, sebewenzele u-46% wawo ezindaweni zalapho edabuka khona. KUBA kuhle kanjena uma ibandla lamaZayoni i-The New Zion City in SA: Omacekeceke - selenza iNkonzo yalo yesiVuno kahlanu ngonyaka Uthe le nkonzo bayenza kahlanu ngonyaka okuba yingoFebhuwari, Ephreli, Juni, Agasti nango-Okthoba - kanti futhi bazama ukuthi ibe nobulungiswa ngokuthi njalo uma bezoyenza, benza i-draw yokuhlalukisa ukuthi elandelayo iya kuliphi ilungu lebandla. “Nalapho sekuthengwa ukudla esizoya nakho kulelo lungu, siyahlukanisela ukuthi lelo nalelo lungu lizothenga kudla kuni. Konke sikwenza ngokubambisana ukuze kungabi wumthwalo emalungwini ebandla, kunalokho kwakha futhi kuqinisa ukubumbana ebandleni,” usho kanje. UDladla ukhuthaze nabanye abazalwane bakwamanye amabandla ukuba bakhuthalele ukwenza izinhlelo ezifuze lezi ngenhloso yokwakha nokuqinisa ukwazana kubazalwane, okungasiza ukuthi amabandla akhule futhi kungabi lula ukuthi abe nezinxushunxushu. KUBA kuhle kanjena uma ibandla lamaZayoni i-The New Zion City in SA: Omacekeceke - selenza iNkonzo yalo yesiVuno kahlanu ngonyaka Omacekeceke banamagatsha awu-14 aseGamalakhe, amabili KwaMadlala, KwaMakhutha, eMlaza, eKenville, eNanda, Esikhawini, eGoli, KwaNdengezi, eClermont, eHammarsdale, eMolweni nalena yaseZimbokodweni.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INGAPHANDLE lomqulu wezolimi obhalwe wuMnuz Nhlanzeko Ngwenya, ozosiza abafundi basemabangeni emfundo aphansi ukuqonda amagama esiNgisi EZIKOLENI zasemakhaya kunenkinga yezingane ezithwala kanzima ezifundweni ezithile, kungekhona ukuthi azikuqondi ezikufundiswayo - kepha ngenxa yokuthi aziwaqondi amagama athile emibuzweni ukuthi aqonde ukuthini ngesiZulu. Usho kanjalo uMnuz Nhlanzeko Ngwenya waseMasundwini, KwaNongoma, elandisa ngomcabango wombono wakhe wosomqulu wamagama esiNgisi ahunyushelwe esiZulwini osihloko sithi ALL Action Assessment Verbs: for English First Additional Language and Mathematical Terminology Lists. Engxoxweni yakhe neSolezwe ngalo mqulu aqale ukuwuhlanganisa ngo-2017, kwaze kwaba wu-2018 - uthe umcabango wawo wamfikela ngokuthi kusukela aqala ukuba uthisha eminyakeni ewu-20 edlule ubeqaphela ukuthi abanye abafundi abami ndawonye emabangeni abakuwona ngoba bengakhaliphile, kepha bahlulwa wukuhumusha amanye amagama asetshenziswayo uma bebuzwa imibuzo ezivivinyweni. UMNUZ Nhlanzeko Ngwenya, obhale umqulu ozosiza ukuhumusha amagama alukhuni esiNgisi “Ngiqale kanjalo ukucwaninga ngamagama okuvame ukuthi anike abafundi inkinga yokungakwazi ukuwahumusha ngendlela efanele ikakhulu esiNgisini naseziBalweni nakwezinye izifundo, ngasebenzisa ulwazi lwami lwezemfundo namava obuthishela ukuqhamuka nezincazelo ezizokwenza kube lula ukuwaqonda kahle,” usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe inkinga ekhona okwamanje wukuthi akakayitholi indlela yokuthi lo mqulu ufinyelele kwaboMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal nasezweni lonke, athemba nakholelwa ekuthini ungabahlaba umxhwele futhi wenze babone ukuthi ungasiza kanjani. “Ngibona kuyinto ezoba wusizo ikakhulu ezikoleni zasemakhaya ngoba yilapho ziningi khona izingane ezithwala kanzima ukuhumusha amagama esiNgisi ngesiZulu ukuze ukufunda ngokuqonda kungabi wumthwalo,” kusho uNgwenya. UMNUZ Nhlanzeko Ngwenya, obhale umqulu ozosiza ukuhumusha amagama alukhuni esiNgisi Udalule nokuthi okunye futhi okuhle ngalo mqulu wukuthi udidiyele namanye amagama esiNgisi acotshelelwa wona wuSolwazi Thengamehlo Ngwenya ongasekho mhlabeni owayefundisa eDurban University of Technology, okusize ngokuwuqinisa. “Lawo magama kwavela ukuthi avame ukuba yinkinga kubafundi abasuke bezokwenza unyaka wokuqala emanyuvesi, okuveza ngokusobala ukuthi kunenkinga yokungakwazi ukuhumusha amagama esiNgisi,” kusho uNgwenya ofundisa isiNgisi kwaGrade 11 eKing Dinuzulu High, khona KwaNongoma. Ngale kwamava okufundisa eminyaka ewu-20, uNgwenya uneziqu zemfundo ze-BA in Communication Science ne-Post Graduate Certificate in Education kwase-University of Zululand; neze-BA Honours in Language Practice zase-University of The Free State.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMLINGISI wodumo emidlalweni yethelevishini, uThobani Nzuza ukhuza ibuya ngomdlalo wakhe weshashalazi othi, Boy Ntulikazi, azolingisa kuwo eThekwini ngenyanga ezayo OMUNYE wabalingisi abangaconsi phansi emdlalweni we-etv othi Isitha: The Enemy, uThobani Nzuza usememezele ukuthi nonyaka uzokhuza ibuya ngomdlalo wakhe weshashalazi othi, Boy Ntulikazi, okuyiwona aphendla ngawo intuba kwezokulingisa. Lo mdlalo weshashalazi agqama ngawo esaqeqeshelwa ukulingisa eDurban University of Technology ngo-2015, nanqoba inqwaba yemiklomelo ngawo, uzokhonjiswa eSeabroke Theatre, eDurban High School, eThekwini ngoMeyi 1 kuya ku-3. Engxoxweni neSolezwe ngalo mdlalo awubhale ngokuhlanganyela noKagiso Tsimakwane, uThobani uthe uqoke ukuwubuyisa kulo nyaka ngenxa yokuthi bese kuyisikhathi eside agcina ukuwenza njengoba wagcina ukuba khona ngo-2019. Uthe ubengasitholi kahle isikhathi sokugxila kuwona ngenxa yokuthi ubehlale exinwe kakhulu yimidlalo yethelevishini asebenza kuyo. “Ngikuqondanise nokuthi kulo nyaka kulo mcimbi kuzobe kutholakala nencwadi yawo lo mdlalo, esikwenzele ukuthi kube lula ukuqonda indikimba yawo ebantiwni abakhonze ukulandela imisebenzi yokubuciko ngokufunda izincwadi,” usho kanje. AMAZWIBELA okunye okuzokwenzeka emdlalweni weshashalazi kaThobani Nzuza osihloko sithi, Boy Ntulikazi, akhuza ngawo ibuya nazolingisa kuwo ngakubo eThekwini ngenyanga ezayo Eqhuba uthe lo mdlalo uqukethe indikimba ngokwenza ukuthi abantu abasha bangene ebugebengwini nokwenza ukuthi bakhulelwe besebancane. “Kukhona futhi uhlangothi lwendaba oluveza ukuthi ukucwasa ngokwebala kuba nomthelela omubi kangakanani emuntwini, okuwuhlangothi oluvezwe kakhulu wuKagiso ngoba yena ukhulele eKimberly, eNorthern Cape, ngakho izimo zokucwasana ngokwebala uzibone eduze, mina ngigqamisa engikubone elokishini ngoba ngikhulele eMlaza,” kusho uThobani. Udalule nokuthi uzolingisa izindawo zabalingisi abawu-11 bomdlalo eyedwa, bese elekelelwa wumculi uHloniphani Art, ozobe ecula futhi edlala nesiginci kube kuqhubeka umdlalo. NgoMeyi 1 no-2 lo mdlalo uzokhonjiswa ngo-7 kusihlwa, bese kuthi ngoMeyi 3 ukhonjiswe ngo-3 ntambama. Amathikithi okuwubuka abiza u-R200 eComputicket, eShoprite naseCheckers - kanti nencwadi yawo izobe itholakala emcimbini ngawo uR200 iyinye. Amagalelo kaThobani ayazikhulumela endimeni yokulingisa njengoba eselingise emidlalweni yethelevishini ehlukene esingabala kuyona iHostela, Isipho: The Gift, i-The Black Door, nalingisa kuwona manje - Isitha: The Enemy.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UPHROJUSA womculo, uXowla, ukhiphe i-albhamu yesitebele sakhe somculo iStalliontainment, esihloko sithi Genesis Chapter 1 UPHROJUSA womculo ozakhele igama kubalandeli ngenqwaba yezingoma zamaciko ehlukene ezikhiqizwe eNkabi Records, uXowla obuye aziwe ngelikaStallion, usebenzise i-albhamu entsha ukuhlonipha iqhawe lakhe emculweni Kule albhamu ephume ngaphansi kwesitebele sakhe iStalliontainment, esihloko sithi Genesis Chapter 1, uXowla uhloniphe uBhekumuzi Luthuli (ongasekho emhlabeni) engomeni ethi Silwelani, uyishintshe kancane ingoma kamfo kaMolo, ethi Sokukhumbula. Kulena ethi Silwelani, uXowla usebenze noSiya Ntuli, uSminofu, owayeyimbangi enkulu kaBhekumuzi, uThokozani “Somnandi” Langa, wase futhi efaka izinhlamvu zikamfo kaMolo, kanjalo nendodana yakhe uMadlanduna. “Lokhu ngikwenze ngoba kusukela ebuncaneni bami, ngikhule ngibukela kakhulu kuyena (uBhekumuzi) futhi ungelinye lamaciko engiyohlale ngiwahlonipha ngenxa yeqhaza lawo emculweni. Yingakho ngibone kusemqoka ukusebenzisa lo msebenzi ukufaka ingoma yokumhlonipha futhi engingabheke kwenza nzuzo nhlobo ngayo,” kusho uXowla. UPHROJUSA womculo, uXowla, ukhiphe i-albhamu yesitebele sakhe somculo iStalliontainment, esihloko sithi Genesis Chapter 1 Udalule nokuthi lo msebenzi uyindlela yakhe yokukhombisa ukuthi usekhule kangakanani emculweni futhi ubheke kakhulu nokukhombisa ububanzi bobuciko bakhe bokudidiyela umculo ngobunyoninco, yingakho esebenzisane namaciko awu-25 kuyona. Emacikweni asebenze nawo kule albhamu enezingoma eziwu-12 kukhona omfo kaMsezane, Uziyam’ Qhuksa, Mashabeni, Shwi Mantombazane, Dr Buselaphi, Bonakele, Quality Biyela, Umfana WeKhansela, Gatsheni, uKhuthuza, Mehlabomvu, Imfezi Emnyama, Kraizie, Mjolisi, Mlabalaba, Dumakahle, Diary, Pretty Masompisi, imbongi uZamo Cofi, Navigator Gcwensa, Siya Ntuli, Siphiwe Black, Qoqa Q7; nabadlali besiginci oMtuyenziwa, Pheny’ Awufake noMehlabomvu. “Lo msebenzi ufana nendlela yokwendlalela okukhulu engibheke ukukwenza nokukufeza ngobuciko bami futhi angibheke zinto ezinkulu nezibabazekayo ngawo. Ngifisa ukuthi ufinyelele kuwona wonke umuntu ozohambisana naye,” kulanda uXowla. Leli ciko elidabuka eMnambithi, maphakathi neKwaZulu-Natal, igama lalo lokuzalwa wuXolani Shabalala. Laziwa kakhulu ngesandla salo sokuphrojusa izingoma eziningi okubalwa kuzona i-albhamu kaLwah Ndlunkulu yokuqala ethi Imizwa, Umbayimbayi weziNkabi Zezwe, ne-albhamu kaBig Zulu ethi Escongweni, ukukha nje phezulu.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: USOLWAZI wase-UKZN weluleka othisha abangasebenzi ngokungabasiza ukuqhuba impilo INSELELO yokungabinamali eyanele ngasohlangothini lukahulumeni yenza ungakwazi ukuqasha othisha abadingeka ezikoleni zakuleli. Le nkinga ihlale ivezwa njengenye yezinselelo ezibhekene noMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo, njengoba othisha abangaqashiwe begcina sebeqhinqa emahhovisi befuna ukuqashwa. Sekuphenduke insakavukela ukuthi intsha ihlale ikhala kuhulumeni ngokushoda kwamathuba emisebenzi, kulo mkhakha. NoSolwazi uPhumlani Myende, wophiko loMkhakha wezeMfundo lwase-University of KwaZulu-Natal, uthe nakuba ekuqonda ukukhathazeka kwabantu abasha abaneziqu zalo mkhakha kodwa abangasebenzi, kepha ziningi izinselelo eziholela kuleso simo. UMyende uthe akukhona ukuthi amathuba omsebenzi walo mkhakha awasekho, kepha kunezimo ezenza ukuthi uhlelo lokuqasha othisha lungabe lusenzeka ngendlela efanele nobekwenzeka ngayo eminyakeni edlule, lapho othisha abebeqashwa khona kakhulu. “Enye yezingqinamba ezikhona wukuthi uhulumeni awunayo imali eyanele yokuthi kuqashwe futhi kukhokhelwe isibalo sothisha abadingekayo ezikoleni ezweni, lokho kufakazelwa wukuthi ngokomthetho, kumele ngabe amagumbi okufundela aba nezingane eziwu-35 igumbi ngalinye, kepha kwezinye izikole kuba nabafundi abawu-60, ngisho nangaphezulu." Uthe:“Konke lokho kuwuphawu lokuthi inkulu kakhulu inkinga ekhona, kangangokuthi kwezinye izikole kuyenzeka ukuthi kube nothisha abaze baphoqeleke ukufundisa izifundo abangaqeqeshelwe ukuzifundisa ngenxa yokungabi namali kukahulumeni.” Eqhuba, uthe ocwaningweni olwenziwe yiStellenbosch University ngo-2022 kuya ku-2024, kwavela ukuthi enye futhi inkinga ekhona wukuthi kunenqwaba yabantu abaqeqeshelwe umkhakha wobuthishela, kodwa bagabe ngezifundo ezingasadingeki kangako ezikoleni. “Nokuthi futhi kunenkinga yothisha abaqeqeshelwe ukufundisa izifundo zasemabangeni aphezulu ekubeni kube kusobala ukuthi othisha abadingeka kakhulu abazofundisa emabangeni aphansi, okubonakala abantu abaningi bekushalazela lokho,” kusho uMyende. Udalule nokuthi izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme, kumele zibuyekeze indlela ezihlele ngayo izifundo zobuthishela, zingabe zisaxutshwa ngendlela eyenza ukuthi ngisho umuntu esefunde wagogoda kepha kube lukhuni satshe ukuthola umsebenzi ngesicucu sakhe. “Akukhuthazwe izingane ukukhetha imikhakha efanele, nezozisiza ukukwazi ukuziphilisa nokuba wusizo ezidingweni zesikhathi esiphila kusona manje. Akungabi lula ukuthi umuntu avele adumele izifundo okungaziwa ukuthi uma eseziphothulile, uzosebenza kuphi." Uthe nalabo abaqeqeshelwe umkhakha wobuthishela neminye imikhakha, kumele bazi futhi baqonde ukuthi akuwona wonke umuntu ozoba nenhlanhla yokuqashwa, ngakho mhlawumbe kungakuhle ukuqala manje babheke amanye amasu okuphila.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: OWAYENGUMSAKAZI woKhozi FM, uLucky Nkosi, usebuyela emsebenzini ayevele ewenza wobuthishela Image: FACEBOOK/LUCKY NKOSI KUFAKAZELEKE isisho sesiZulu esithi, "ukuwa kwendlu wukuvuka kwenye" kowayengumsakazi woKhozi FM, uLucky Nkosi, osekuvele izindaba zokuthi ubuyela emkhakheni wezemfundo ayevele ewusheba nokusakaza. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi uLucky, obese ehlale iminyaka ewu-22 kulo msakazo, ube ngomunye wabasakazi engavuselelwanga inkontileka yabo ngesikhathi kushintshwa izinhlelo, okwenziwa minyaka yonke emisakazweni eminingi njalo ngo-Ephreli. Lezi zindaba zokubuyela kwezemfundo ziqinisekiswe wuyena uLucky uqobo, engxoxweni neSolezwe lapho edalule khona ukuthi lokhu kwenzeke ngokuthi anqobe icala ayebekwe lona ngo-2019, ngezinsolo zokuhlukumeza ozakwabo ngokweyamene nocansi. “Udaba lwaqala ngezindaba zokuthi kuvele ukuthi ngangifunwa yizinkabi, zifuna ukungibulala, okwahamba kwaze kwakapakela emsebenzini wami wobuthishela, kwakhona ozakwethu abathile abangenzela uzungu lokuthi ngigcine ngimiswa emsebenzini ngoba bekhala ngokuthi bazizwa bengaphephile ukuthi bangasebenza nami ngenxa yalezi zinsolo." OWAYENGUMSAKAZI woKhozi FM, uLucky Nkosi, usebuyela emsebenzini ayevele ewenza wobuthishela Uthe: “Kuhambe kwaze kwafika ekutheni udaba luze luphenywe wuMnyango wezeMfundo, kwase kuba khona abanye abanginyundela ngokungenameka nangamacala okuhlukumeza okweyamene nocansi ngoba befuna ukuthi ngixoshwe emsebenzini.” Uthe udaba luqhubekile yonke le minyaka lithethwa enkantolo, kwaze kwaba icala liyamthetha ngoMashi 31, kwaphuma isinqumo sokuthi abuyele emsebenzini ezinsukwini ezintathu kusukela ngalelo langa. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kwaphuma nomyalelo wokuthi kumele ukuthi akhokhelwe imali ewu-R2.8 million wesinxephezelo somholo obekumele ngabe ubewuthola yonke le minyaka kuqhubeka icala, ebe esamile emsebenzini abewenza eMariannpark Primary, KwaMamdekazi, eMariannhill, lapho ayewuthishanhloko khona. “Konke lokhu kufakazela ukuthi kusukela ekuqaleni bengingenacala kepha kwakuvele kuwuzungu lwabantu abebefuna ukucekela phansi umsebenzi wami nesithunzi sami engikusebenzele kanzima yonke le minyaka. Kufakazele nobukhona bukaNkulunkulu njengoba kuqondane nesikhathi lapho kuphela umsebenzi emsakazweni,” usho kanje. Udalule nokuthi ngale kobuthishela, usebheke ukuthi akwenze iminyaka emithathu kuphela bese eshenxa kukho kanti uzoqhubeka futhi nemisebenzi yakhe yomculo njengoba kuzothi ngo-Okthoba 2, enze umcimbi wedili lomculo wamakhwaya, iGauteng Meets KZN. “Ngale kwalokho, ngihlela nokuthi ingxenye yemali engizoyithola manje ngiyitshale ebhizinisini lami leShisanyama nelehhotela, engizokwakha eVryheid, ukucaba indlela yami yezamabhizinisi njengoba ngangivele nginesifiso sokugxila kuwona,” kusho uLucky.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: IZOBA ngeSonto enkundleni yezemidlalo iPrincess Magogo Stadium, KwaMashu inkonzo yomngcwabo kaLady Apostle Nonhlanhla Gama webandla lamaZayoni i-Trust in Christ Ministries IZOKWENZELWA enkundleni yezemidlalo iPrincess Magogo Stadium, KwaMashu, kusuka ngo-5 ekuseni inkonzo yokugcina ka-Lady Apostle Nonhlanhla Patricia Gama webandla lamaZayoni elidume iNingizimu Afrika yonke i-Trust in Christ Ministries. Ngaphambi kwenkonzo yokugcina kaLady Apostle Gama (43), oshone entathakusa ngoMsombuluko, kuzoba nenkonzo yomlindelo ezoba KwaMashu Indoor Sports Centre namhlanje ngo-10 ebusuku. Kuthintwa uMfu Vusi Gama, ongumholi waleli bandla nomyeni kamufi, uthe umkakhe bazomkhumbula kakhulu ngokuthi ubewumholi omqoka kakhulu ebandleni futhi kuwuyena obhekele ukuhola ibandla ikakhulu ohlangothini lomama bebandla nentsha yesifazane. KWAKUJATSHULWA amalungu ebandla embathisa uMfu Vusi Gama nomkakhe uLady Apostle Nonhlanhla Gama (ongasekho emhlabeni) Image: FACEBOOK/TRUST IN CHRIST MINISTRIES “Sizomkhumbula ngeqhaza lakhe elimqoka ebandleni lokuqinisekisa ukuthi ibandla lihlala libumbene, esithemba ukuthi abazalwane abasele ebandleni bazoqhubeka kulowo mgudu ukuze ibandla liqhubeke liye phambili nomsebenzi kaNkulunkulu ungalimali,” kusho uGama. Eqhuba, uthe benze ngamabomu ukuthi kuthi uma kuphela umlindelo ekuseni, kungene inkonzo yomngcwabo ekuseni ngo-5 ngenhloso yokuthi kushaye u-11 sekuqedwe yonke into ngenxa yokuthi baningi kakhulu abantu abezayo abasuka ezindaweni ezihlukene ezweni. IZIKHATHI ezazimnandi kuMfu Vusi Gama noLady Apostle Nonhlanhla Gama (ongasekho emhlabeni) Image: FACEBOOK/TRUST IN CHRIST MINISTRIES I-Trust In Christ Ministries ngelinye lamabandla aseZayoni ahlonishwayo ngenxa yeqhaza elimqoka alibambile ukukhulisa nokuthuthukisa umculo wamaZayoni kule minyaka ewu-32 lasungulwa okufakazelwa wukuthi manje selinamagatsha awu-49 ezweni lonke.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMNUZ uMfundiseni Mpanza onguMfundisi Jikelele webandla noMfu uKenneth Mngwengwe bephahle uMbhishophi uScelo Mpungose enkonzweni yoMkhosi wePhasika yebandla lamaZayoni, Isiqalo Sokuthula Kwama Krestu Church of God in Zion ebiseSikhonyane Primary School, eNdulinde, eMandeni ngempelasonto edlule IBANDLA lamaZayoni, Isiqalo Sokuthula KwamaKrestu Church of God in Zion, lisebenzise umbuthano wokukhumbula iNkosi uJesu Kristu - uMkhosi wePhasika, ukuqinisa izinhlaka zobuholi baleli bandla - obekuhlangene nokugubha iminyaka ewu-20 lasungulwa. Lokho kwenzeke ngenkathi leli bandla, okumanje linamagatsha amabili - lihlangene kule nkonzo yoMkhosi wePhasika ebiseSikhonyane Primary School, eNdulinde, eMandeni, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal ngempelasonto edlule. Kulo mbuthano kukhushulwe uMfu uMfundiseni Mpanza obewuMfundisi webandla nowakwakhe uNkk Smangele Mpanza, banikwa izikhundla zokuba wuMfundisi noMfundisikazi jikelele bebandla - okusho ukuthi yibona asebebhekele wonke amagatsha ebandla, inhlalakahle yawo, wukukhula nokubambisana kwabazalwane bawo. UNKSZ uThandi Nxumalo nowakwakhe uMnuz uLeonard Mpungose, abagcotshelwe ukuba wuMfundisi noMfundisikazi bebandla, bephahle indodana yabo uSiphesihle Mpungose, enkonzweni yoMkhosi wePhasika ebiseSikhonyane Primary School, eNdulinde, eMandeni ngempelasonto edlule UMnuz uLeonard Mpungose nowakwakhe uNksz uThandi Nxumalo noMnuz uMfanafuthi Magwaza begatsha laseNtuzuma, eThekwini, bona banikwe imisebenzi yokuba ngabeFundisi nomFundisikazi bebandla ngokubambisana. UMnuz uLindokuhle Nxumalo, ongumholi wekwaya yebandla - yena unikwe isikhundla sokuba wuMshumayeli webandla. ONksz uHlengiwe Nxumalo noNkk uNonhlangla Dludla begatsha laseNdulinde, noNksz uGirlie Hlanguza noNksz uZandile Biyela begatsha laseNtuzuma - bona bagixatshezwe ngomsebenzi wokuba woGosa bebandla, okusho ukuthi yibona asebebhekele ukuphatheka kahle kwabazalwane uma kuhlangenwe ezinkonzweni ezinkulu nezimqoka ebandleni. UNKSZ uGirlie Hlanguza, ongomunye wabagcotshelwe ukuba wuGoso webandla - enkonzweni yoMkhosi wePhasika ebiseSikhonyane Primary School, eNdulinde, eMandeni ngempelasonto edlule Umholi waleli bandla, uMbhishophi uScelo Mpungose, uthe bewubuholi bebandla babone kusemqoka ukuthi bahloniphe laba bazalwane ngale misebenzi ngoba bebona ukuzikhandla kwabo nokukhombisa amakhono nesineke kwabo kuyona bengakayigcotshelwa. “Nanokuthi ukuze ibandla likhule ngendlela efanele liyadinga ukuthi libe nazo zonke izinhlaka ezimqoka neziyinsika yokuthi liye phambili, yingakho sizamile ukuthi sivale zonke lezi zikhala ebezivuleke ngenkathi kuhamba abanye abazalwane ebandleni, sase sengeza nakuleyo misebenzi emqoka kodwa ebingenabantu abayenza ngokugcwele,” usho kanje. KUSUKELA kwesokunxele wuMnuz uJabulani Ntuli, uMfu uKenneth Mngwengwe, uMfu uLeonard Mpungose, uMfu uMfanafuthi Magwaza noMvangeli uSabelo Khumalo besenkonzweni yoMkhosi wePhasika ebiseSikhonyane Primary School, eNdulinde, eMandeni ngempelasonto edlule UMpungose ukhuthaze laba bazalwane ukuthi bahole ibandla ngobuqotho futhi baqinisekise ukugwema ukusebenzisa amandla abanikwe wona nabathenjwe ngawo ukuphilisa abazalwane ngesandla sensimbi, ngoba ngenye yezinto lezo ezibuyisela ibandla emuva.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: AMAWELE ASE CHESTERVILLE ayingxenye yosomahlaya abazojabulisa abantu emcimbini i-From Prison To Palace Comedy Show ozoba se-The Stable Theatre, eThekwini ngoLwesihlanu kusihlwa USOMAHLAYA futhi ongumbhali wencwadi ethi From Prison To Palace, uSithembiso “Pro” Ndlovu uzosebenzisa idili lomcimbi wamahlaya ukuhlanganisa osomahalaya abehlukene futhi abaziwayo, akuhlanganise nomgubho wosuku lwakhe lokuzalwa. UPro (34) waseSweetwaters, eMgungundlovu uzohlanganisa abantu ngoLwesihlanu kulo mcimbi ozoba se-The Stable Theatre, eThekwini kusuka ngo-7 kusihlwa, lapho okuzobe kungenwa khona ngoR150 noR300 emnyango. USOMAHLAYA futhi ongumbhali wezincwadi uSthembiso Pro Ndlovu uzokwenza idili lomcimbi wamahlaya othi From Prison To Palace Comedy Show ozoba se-The Stable Theatre, eThekwini ngoLwesihlanu kusihlwa Engxoxweni neSolezwe ngalo mcimbi othi From Prison To Palace Comedy Show, nazobe eqala ukuwenza nonyaka, uthe nakuba ungenye yezindlela azisebenzisa ukugubha usuku lwakhe lokuzalwa, kepha futhi uyindlela ayibone ifanele ukuhlanganisa osomahlaya. USOMAHLAYA uNdlebe Kapteni womunye wabazonandisa emcimbini wamahlaya i-From Prison To Palace Comedy Show ozoba se-The Stable Theatre, eThekwini ngoLwesihlanu kusihlwa “Ngiqaphelile ukuthi osomahlaya abaningi abaziwayo sebevame ukwenza ukuzenzela imicimbi yabo ngabodwana, okwenza ukuthi abantu ababathandayo bengabe besakwazi ukubabona ndawonye njengoba bekuvame ukwenzeka eminyakeni edlule, yingakho ngibone kukuhle ukusebenzisa lolu suku ukubaqoqa ndawonye,” kusho uPro. USOMAHLAYA uFlymotion womunye wabazonandisa emcimbini wamahlaya i-From Prison To Palace Comedy Show ozoba se-The Stable Theatre, eThekwini ngoLwesihlanu kusihlwa Kuleli dili lamahlaya izethameli zizohleka kuze kuvele elomhlathi zikitazwa woJustice Kubheka, uSimphiwe Shembe, uFlymotion, Amawele Amawele Ase Chesterville, Ndlebe Kapteni, Gqonq, Mmangaliso, Master Nuh, Moemish, Hallo M, Mshini Ntuli noDJ Twitty. USOMAHLAYA uMaster Nuh womunye wabazonandisa emcimbini wamahlaya i-From Prison To Palace Comedy Show ozoba se-The Stable Theatre, eThekwini ngoLwesihlanu kusihlwa “Kanti futhi ngizothola nethuba lokukhuluma ngencwadi yami ephume nyakenye, nengaqala ukuyibhala ngisasejele ngo-2019 lapho engangigwetshwelwe khona icala lokubulala elagcina lichithwa ngo-2024 sekucaca ukuthi ngaboshelwa ubala,” usho kanje. Leli ciko alilisha kule ndima njengoba ngo-2015 laqokwa emkhakheni we-Best Gospel Comedy kumaCrown Gospel Music Awards. Linxuse abantu ukuphuma ngobuningi babo ukuzozibonela ngokwabo into yamehlo abebheke ukujabulisa izethamli ngayo emcimbini.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI we-Afro pop uSiphiwe Black ukhiphe ingoma ethi Edolobheni, ayishaya noSiya Ntuli (ongemuva esithombeni) UMCULI we-Afro pop osemusha kule ndima, uSiphiwe Black usedalule ukuthi ukufikela eGoli ukuzozama impumelelo ngobuciko bomculo kwenze wabona ukuthi kumele akhuthaze abanye abazamayo njengaye ukungadikibali kwabashisekela ukukuthola nokukufeza empilweni. Usho njalo exoxa neSolezwe ngengoma yakhe ethi Edolobheni, ayishaya noSiya Ntuli, nephume ekupheleni kwenyanga edlule, nathi isemqoka kakhulu kuyena njengoba ingeyokuqala kuyena emculweni, futhi ikhuluma ngesimo naye abhekene naso ngqo. UMCULI we-Afro pop uSiphiwe Black ufike kwezwakala ngengoma yakhe entsha esihloko sithi Edolobheni, ayishaya noSiya Ntuli “Le ngoma isemqoka kakhulu kimina ngoba iveza futhi ihlalise obala ubunjalo besimo sempilo yasemadolobheni, njengoba sazi sonke ukuthi baningi kangakanani abantu abafana nami, abasuka emakhaya beyozama impilo engcono khona,” kusho yena. Leli ciko elidabuka Esikhawini, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal, neliqopha esitebeleni iStalliontainment kaXowla, lithe libheke ukwakhela kule ngoma ukuqhubeka lijabulise abantu abakhombisa ukweseka ubuciko balo selokhu liqale ukugqama nyakenye. Le ntokazi (25) ebiwukapteni weKZN Netball Team eminyakeni edlule, igama layo lokuzalwa wuSiphiwe Sibisi. Isisebenze nenqwaba yamaciko endimeni okubalwa kuwona uBig Zulu, uDr Malinga, uNomfundo Moh, uNavigator Gcwensa, uDonald, uDiary noZamo Cofi.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMSAKAZI weMetro FM uZola Mhlongo, okwabazokwethula uhlelo emcimbini wezindondo ama-Metro FM Awards azoba se-ICC, eThekwini kule nyanga KUZOGQAMA osaziwayo abangaconsi phansi kubalandeli abazobambisana ukwethula uhlelo emcimbini wezindondo waminyaka yonke ama-Metro FM Awards, azoba seNkosi Albert Luthuli International Convention Centre, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo ngo-Ephreli 25. AbeMetro FM baveze ukuthi uhlelo luzophathwa wumsakazi, uLerato Kganyago nomlingisi ongaconsi phansi uLawrence Maleka. Umcimbi uzosakazwa bukhoma kwiSABC 1. ULerato noLawrence, bazolekelelwa wumrepha uNomuzi “Moozlie” Mabena, nomethuli wezinhlelo zethelevishini uSiyabonga “Scoop” Ngwekazi, bona abazogxila kwi-Green Room, okusho ukuthi bazobe bexoxa namaciko aqokwe eminxeni ehlukene nalawo azobe esenqobe izindondo. UMSAKAZI weMetro FM uLerato Kganyago kwabazokwethula uhlelo emcimbini wezindondo ama-Metro FM Awards azoba se-ICC, eThekwini kule nyanga Isolezwe lithinta uLerato, udalule ukuthi leli thuba lisho lukhulu kuyena njengoba kuzobe kungokwesibili ethula lo mncintiswano. Uthe lokhu kusho ukuthi kukhona okuhle abakubonayo kuyena ngokumethemba ngethuba elihle kangaka. “Ngicabanga ukuthi amava ami kule ndima yiwona enze ukuthi ngithole leli thuba, engicabanga ukuthi akuzukuba nzima kakhulu njengoba ngike ngasebenza futhi noLawrence phambilini." UMSAKAZI nomethuli wezinhlelo zethelevishini uLamiez Holworthy kwabazophatha izinhlelo zomcimbi wokuklomelisa ngezindondo ama-Metro FM Awards azoba se-ICC, eThekwini kule nyanga Uthe:“Sengikubheke ngabomvu ukuba yingxenye yalo mcimbi ohambisana nomgubho weminyaka ewu-40 ye-Metro FM. Sibheke ukuthi ube sezingeni elifanele, siphinde siqhube umbono wokuhlonipha amaciko njengoba kufakwe neminxa emisha emibili, okamaskandi noweLekompo." Kwi-Black Carpet, exhaswe ngabe-African Fashion International, uDJ Lamiez Holworthy uzobe exoxa namaciko nezihambeli ezizofika emcimbini, bese kuthi umsakazi weMetro FM uZola Mhlongo, uzobe enza izimemezelo emcimbini. Kuvele nokuthi umakadebona emculweni uZakes Bantwini, uzobe ewumqondisi womculo emcimbini. UMSAKAZI nomethuli wezinhlelo zethelevishini uSiyabonga "Scoop Makhathini" Ngwekazi kwabazophatha izinhlelo zomcimbi wokuklomelisa ngezindondo ama-Metro FM Awards, azoba se-ICC, eThekwini kule nyanga Umphathi weMetro FM, uKina Nhlengethwa, uthe bakubheke ngabomvu ukuthi umcimbi walo nyaka ube yimpumelelo futhi bafeze umbono wabo wokuqhakambisa ubuciko bamaciko nokuwahlonipha ngomsebenzi wawo. Ukuvotela amaciko eminxeni ehlukene kuvalwa ngo-Ephreli 19, kanti amathikithi abiza uR750 noR1 100, umuntu ngamunye.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKOSIKHONA Ndabandaba owaziwa ngelikaPhakel'umthakathi uzovela eNkantolo KwaNongoma namhlanje ngecala alivulelwe ngowokufika USAZIWAYO ongaconsi phansi ebantwini abakhonze isintu, uNkosikhona Ndabandaba owaziwa ngelikaPhakel’umthakathi, usedalule ukuthi ukwenze ngabomu ukuthukusa izindaba zecala avulelwe lona. UPhakel’umthakathi usho kanje ekhuluma neSolezwe ngombhalo awunameke ekhasini lakhe likaFacebook izolo, lapho eveze khona ukuthi namhlanje uzovela eNkantolo yaKwaNongoma ngecala alivulelwe wumuntu wokufika, lokuthi angasondeli eduze kwakhe. Uthe sekuphele amasonto amathathu manje azi ngalolu daba njengoba waziswa ngalo maphakathi nenyanga edlule, ngesikhathi kufika abakwasidlodlo kuyena bezomazisa ukuthi kunomuntu othile ongowokufika kuleli zwe, omvulele leli cala elinamhlanje. “Nokho okwangidida kakhulu wukuthi kungani amaphoyisa engafikanga qathatha nalowo muntu kimina ukuze ngimbone ukuthi ungubani, kwase kungidida nokuthi kungani bala baphetha ukungichazela ukuthi wubani lowo muntu ngoba phela ecaleni elinjena, kuvame ukuthi kube kanjalo,” usho kanje. Uthe nokho uzonikela enkantolo ukuyozizwela mathupha ukuthi cala lini abekwe lona, nokuthi wubani omvulele lona. “Kodwa futhi ngiyakuqinisekisa ukuthi akuzukuba bikho dlame oluzophazamisa ukusebenza komthetho futhi nginxusa ukuthi nabanye abantu baqikelele ukuthi bangathathi izinto ngamawala ngoba asifuni ukuthi kube nodlame egameni lami,” kunxusa uPhakel’umthakathi. Akukhona okokuqala uPhakel’umthakathi eba sezindabeni njengoba eke waba sematheni emasontweni ambalwa edlule, njengoba yena nowayengumsakazi woKhozi FM, uNgizwe Mchunu, babe yingxenye yombhikisho wenhlangano engenzi inzuzo, i-March and March, obuKuGompo, e-Eastern Cape, sokuchitha isenzo seqeqebana labantu baseNigeria, abahlala kuleli dolobha, abavele babeka uMnuz Solomona Ogbonna Eziko, ukuthi abe yinkosi yabo kule ndawo.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI wama-piano ne-house uZee Nxumalo kwabazonandisa kwi-Kelvin Momo Live Concert ePeople's Park, eThekwini ngeSonto Image: Instagram/@_a_nailspressons UPHROJUSA wama-piano uKelvin Momo uzojabulisa abantu ngomcimbi wakhe wedili lomculo elizoba seThekwini ngempelasonto UPHROJUSA wama-piano ongomunye wabangaconsi phansi kule ndima, uKelvin Momo uzophelezelwa yizilomo zamaciko angaconsi phansi emculweni we-house nama-piano, edilini lakhe lo mculo, i-Kelvin Momo Live Concert ezoba sePeople’s Park, eThekwini ngeSonto. Kuleli dili lomculo elizobe liqala ukwenzeka kulo nyaka eThekwini, elizoqala ngo-4 ntambama, kuzonandisa amaciko okubalwa kuwona uSha Sha, Zee Nxumalo, Sykes, Distruction Boyz, Sphectacular & DJ Naves, Stixx, Benny Maverick, Earful Soul, Tycoon, Sino Msolo, Makhanj, Triple X Da Ghost, DJ Nel, DJ Feel, Man Q, Xola TSM, JNR De Rocka no-TBO. UBenny Maverick we-One Man Concert, ehlela lo mcimbi uthe: “Abantu baseThekwini sebezibonakalise kaningi ukuthi bawuthanda kangakanani umculo, ngakho sibheke ukuthi leli dili libe yindlela yokukhombisa uthando ebantwini ngokuhlale beseka umculo kaKelvin.” UKelvin uthe kumjabulisa kakhulu ukuthi lo mcimbi uzomnika ithuba lokuhlanganisa abathandi bomculo abehlukene, ukuzojabulela umculo wakhe abahlale beweseka, nowalawo maciko abawathandayo akwaze ukuwathola ukuzonandisa naye. “Abantu baseThekwini bangikhombise uthando kakhulu, futhi njalo uma ngiseThekwini bahlale benza isiqiniseko sokuthi baba khona lapho engikhona. Yingakho ngibone kukuhle futhi kumqoka kimina ukuthi ngibe nabo ngizobenzela into enhle nabangakaze bayibone,” usho kanje. UMCULI wama-piano ne-house uSino Msolo okwabazonandisa kwi-Kelvin Momo Live Concert, eThekwini ngeSonto Uthe uma ezokhipha i-albhamu iba nenqwaba yezingoma ezingaphezu kuka-20, kwesinye isikhathi zize zifinyelele naku-30 nangaphezulu. Udalule nokuthi umculo wakhe usulalelwe amahlandla angaphezu kuka-476 million kwi-Spotify, bese eba nabalandeli abangaphezu kuka-2 million abamlalela nyanga zonke khona kwi-Spotify nakwezinye izitolo zomculo ezisebenza nge-internet. UKelvin udabuka eSoweto, eGauteng. Igama lakhe lokuzalwa wuKelvin Thato Ledwaba. Unama-albhamu agila izimanga ngokulalelwa kakhulu okubalwa kuwona i-Amukelani (2022), Kurhula (2023), Ntsako (2024), Thato Ya Modimo neN’wana Wa MuTsonga anyakenye. Amathikithi aleli dili lomculo alokhu eqhubekile nokudayisa ubuthaphuthaphu eWebtickets njengoba manje sekusele ingcosana yalawo abiza kusuka kuR295 kuya kuR795, nabiza kusuka kuR2 250 kuya kuR10 300.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI wama-piano uNobantu Vilakazi ukhiphe ingoma exwayisa amantombazane ngobuqili obusemadolobheni UMCULI wama-piano okwabangaconsi phansi kule ndima, uNobantu Vilakazi usedalule ukuthi ukuzela impilo yasedolobheni ngobuso nokujaha izinto eziza kalula ngenye yezinto ezilimaza abantu besifazane, ikakhulu amantombazane asuke efika edolobheni. Yingaleso sizathu enqume ukukhipha ingoma yakhe entsha esihloko sithi Abafana BaseGoli, ayishaya noDBN Gogo, uLady Du no-Tman Xpress. Iqale ukutholakala ngesonto elidlule, kanti  idlulisa umyalezo oyisexwayiso emantombazaneni ngobungozi bokubhayizela impilo. Exoxa neSolezwe ngalokhu, uNobantu uthe nakuba lena kuyingoma edanselekayo futhi eshaya ngesigqi esijwayelekile sobumnandi bama-piano, kodwa uthemba ukuthi abantu abazoyilalela nasebeyilalelile bazowuthola umyalezo omqoka awudlulisayo ngayo. “Iyindlela yami yokudlulisa isexwayiso emantombazaneni ikakhulu afikayo emadolobheni amakhulu ukuthi angavumeli ukuluthwa kalula ngabantu besilisa ngobukhazikhazi bezinto ezinhle, ezisheshayo nezimnandi ngenhloso yokubasebenzisa bese bebalaxaza kanjalo. UMCULI wama-piano uNobantu Vilakazi ukhiphe ingoma exwayisa amantombazane ngobuqili obusemadolobheni “Leso yisimo engikhule ngisibona senzeka phambi kwami. Ngibone abantu abaningi bephazamiseka empilweni ngenxa yokungaqapheli izimo ezinjalo ezenzekayo. Yingakho ngibone kumqoka ukuthi ngikhuze futhi ngixwayise ngengoma,” kusho yena. Ubonge ophrojusa ababambe iqhaza ukuze le ngoma ibe yimpumelelo okungoFelo Le Tee, Fakewell noSouljam; kanjalo noDBN Gogo - athi wuyena owamnika igunya lokuthi ayithathe ibe ngeyakhe emva kokuzwa i-beat yayo bese-studio sakhe nyakenye. Leli ciko, elidabuka eSoweto, eGauteng, lidalule nokuthi ukuphuma kwale ngoma sekuwukuqala komsebenzi omningi elizowudedela kulo nyaka. Lithe selivele seliqalile ukupheka umculo elizolokhu liwudedela kancane kancane ngokuqhubeka konyaka. Ngale kwale ngoma, uNobantu waziwa ngezingoma eziningi ebezishisa izikhotha kule ndima okubalwa kuzona iVulamlomo kaMusa Keys, Data kaDJ Tira, Umlilo kaMas Musiq, Munyu kaScorpion Kings, Bayazi kaSjavasDaDeeejay neSoke Sbone kaDJ Stokie.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INGAPHAKATHI lelinye lamagumbi okufundela aseKhulani Junior Primary, eMaphephetheni, eNanda, okukhalwa ngokuthi aminyene abafundi ngokweqile ISIBALO esiphezulu ngokweqile sabafundi nokungeneli kwamagumbi okufundela kwenza ukuthi uhlelo lokufundisa lungahambi ngendlela ejwayelekile nefanele esikoleni samabanga aphansi iKhulani Junior Primary, eMaphephetheni, eNanda. Lokhu kudalulwe wumthombo othembekile nowazi konke okwenzeka kulesi sikole, okuvela ukuthi sinamagumbi amahlanu okufundela ekubeni sigcina kwa-Grade 4, okudala ukuthi kube nesinyokotho esingagculisi uma sekuyisikhathi sokufunda. “Umthetho woMnyango wezeMfundo ukubeka ngokusobala ukuthi igumbi negumbi lokufundela kumele ukuthi libe nabafundi abawu-30 kuya ku-40 kuphela. Kepha okwalesi sikole kunzima kakhulu njengoba kunamagumbi anabafundi abangaphezu kuka-71, kuthi kwamanye babe ngaphezu kuka-90 imbala, okudala isiminyaminya,” kusho umthombo. Uqhuba, uthe okunye okwenza ukuthi umsebenzi wothisha ubenzima kakhulu wukuthi abakwazi ngisho ukhulululeka njengoba bengenalo igumbi labo, okuphoqa ukuthi bahlale emagumbini okufundela kusuka ekuseni kuze kuyoshona ilanga. ELINYE lamagumbi okufundela aseKhulani Junior Primary, eMaphephetheni okukhalwa ngokuthi aminyene abafundi bagcwele ngokweqile “Kuyethusa nokuthi ngisho uthishomkhulu imbala akanalo ihhovisi lakhe, okuphoqa ukuthi asebenzise indlu kanogada engasesangweni lesikole ukwenza eminye imisebenzi yakhe yansuku zonke. Konke lokhu kuyasikhathaza kakhulu siwumphakathi, futhi nabo othisha akubagculisi ukusebenzela esimeni esinjena ikakhulu ngoba sekukaningi lolu daba lubikwa eMnyangweni wezeMfundo esifundazweni kepha awukho umehluko,” kulanda umthombo. Kubikwe nokuthi ngisho noma kunemihlangano yabazali, kuphoqeleka ukuthi uthishomkhulu afake itende elizokwanela bonke abazali ngenxa yokuthi amagumbi esikole ngeke abamumathe bonke njengoba lingekho futhi ihholo lokubhekela izinhlelo ezinjalo. “Yisimo esibi nesingabekezeleleki, esifisa ukuthi kube khona okwenzekayo ngaso ngoba lesi sikole siwusizo kakhulu emphakathini ngoba sakhiwe eduze nomphakathi futhi senza ukuthi kube lula ebantwini ukufaka izingane zabo zifunde kusona,” usho kanje. Umthombo ukhale nangokuthi sekuyisikhathi eside kakhulu behlalele ethembeni lokuthi izinto zizolunga, njengoba sekuke kwenzeka kaningana phambilini ukuthi kufike abantu abasuke bezohlola isimo, bathembise ukubuya bezolungisa kodwa bangabe besabuya. Kuthintwa uNkk Nokukhanya Makhoba wakhona kule ndawo, noke waba sesigungwini esilawula ukusebenza kwesikole iminyaka engaphezu kwewu-10, uvumile ukuthi isimo sesikole siya ngokuya siba sibi kakhulu ikakhulu ngenxa yokuthi minyaka yonke kwanda abafundi abazofunda kusona, okusho ukwanda komthwalo nengcindezi kothisha. “Sifisa ukuthi okungenani kutholakale amagumbi okufundela angomahambanendlwana ukuze kuphunguke umthwalo kothisha abanomthwalo wokufundisa inqwaba yezingane eziminyene endaweni eyodwa. Kanti kwalokho kukodwa nje kuyisimo esingaba yingozi empilweni yezingane ukuthi zibuthane endaweni ongakwazi nokuphefumula kahle kuyona ikakhulu njengoba nelanga lishisa kangaka kulezi zinsuku,” kusho uNkk Makhoba. Isolezwe lizame kaningi ukuxhumana nokhulumela uMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Muzi Mahlambi, kepha ucingo lwakhe belungabanjwa kwaze kwaphela cishe izinsuku ezine engayiphenduli imiyalezo abethunyelelwe yona kwi-WhatsApp yakhe, ekubeni kubonakala ukuthi uyifundile.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMSAKAZI we-702 uRelebogile Mabotja wethule ngokusemthethweni icwecwe lakhe elishaya ngesigqi sowokholo elithi Still Me - Live UMSAKAZI wesiteshi esizimele i-702 futhi owumculi ne-podcaster, uRelebogile Mabotja, useziphosele inselelo entsha emculweni ethula ngokusemthethweni icwecwe lakhe lokuqala aselenze kabusha elisihloko sithi Still Me - Live, eliqale ukutholakala ezitolo ngoLwesihlanu. URelebogile (40) wasePitoli, kodwa osezinze eGoli wethule icwecwe lakhe eligabe ngezingoma ezine zesigqi sowokholo nese-soul emcimbini eSandton, khona kwaNdongaziyaduma, lapho abememe khona abangani, ozakwabo basemsebenzini, izihlobo nasondelene nabo kuphela. Usebenzise lo mcimbi futhi ukugubha uhambo lwakhe lobuciko obehlukene njengoba sekukuningi akwenzile, wabe esezwisa izethameli izingoma ezikulona bukhoma ezithi You’re The Only One, i-I Feel Nothing, iMmamogaoi’s Prayer ne-Stil Me. UMSAKAZI we-702 uRelebogile Mabotja esemcimbini wokwethula icwecwe lakhe elithi Still In Me - Live, eSandton, eGoli ngoLwesine ebusuku Elandisa ngalo msebenzi wakhe wobuciko, uRelebogile uthe ngenkathi ewenza wayefuna ukuvezela abantu uhlangothi lwempilo yakhe oluveza ukuthi naye kuyenzeka ukuthi kube nezinto nezimo ezithiya impilo yakhe. “Bengingalindele ukuthi lolu hambo luzoba yinselelo ezoba nezithelo ezinhle kangaka kimina, ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi ukuzelapha ezimweni ezithile ezike zakuzamazamisa noma zithiye impilo yakho kuyaba kukhulu futhi kube kubi. Ukuthi lo msebenzi uphume usuyile nto enhle kangaka manje kungikhombisile ukuthi sonke sidinga ukudlula ezimweni ezithile kuqala ukuze kube khona okuhle esikukhombayo emva kwazo,” kulanda yena. “Ngibonga kakhulu umndeni wami ohlale ungeseka kukho konke okuhle engikwenzayo, kanjalo noNkulunkulu engikholwa wukuthi wuyena olawula indlela yami nokuhamba kwami ngomusa wakhe, okuhlale kungikhumbuza njalo ukuthi kungani ngenza lezi zinto ezinhle ezijabulisa abantu kangaka. Ngakho nge-Still In Me ngikhumbuza abantu ukuthi wonke umuntu unokuhle asakugcinile ngaphakahti kuyena,” usho kanje. UMSAKAZI we-702 uRelebogile Mabotja wethule ngokusemthethweni icwecwe lakhe elishaya ngesigqi somculo wokholo elithi Still Me - Live URelebogile uqale uhambo lwakhe lomculo eseneminyaka emihlanu kuphela, wakhula ecula emakhwayeni ehlukene ngakubo. Uke wamela isifundazwe sakhe neNingizimu Afrika esafunda amabanga aphansi naphezulu. Useke wagqama nakwezokulingisa ngokuvela emidlalweni ehlukene yethelevisihini okubalwa kuyona iHome Affairs, iZone 14, iGenerations, iSkeem Saam, Isidingo, iTraum Hotel neRhythm City ukukha nje phezulu. Kunjalo nje usezwakale kaningi kwezokusakaza kusukela eminyakeni ewu-14 edlule njengoba aqala ukusebenza kwiTalk Radio 702 ne-567 Cape Talk, Metro FM nalapho esebenza khona manje kwi-702 asebuya okwesibili kuyona, ethula  i-02 Afternoons phakathi nezinsuku ngo-1 kuya ku-3 ntambama. Unezinhlelo zakwiYouTube i-The Relebogile Mabotja Podcast ne-Unpacked with Relebogile Mabotja.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKELA kwesokunxele kwabamile ngamalungu enhlangano Isigungu Sezinsizwa oGqizile Khanyile, Somdenger Mthembu, Saliwa Ndunakazi, Mlondi Msweli nabahleli phansi o-Andile Ndabezitha Zulu noGezani Dludla IZINCOMO zobuhle bezingxoxo ezakhayo nezikhulisa izingane zabafana, zikhuthaze ukuziphatha okuhle kwabesilisa - yizona zinto ezikhuthaze abenhlangano engenzi nzuzo Isigungu Sezinsizwa - ukuhlela umbuthano wokubhunga ngokuvulelekile ngalezo zimo. Lokhu kuzokwenzeka kulo mbuthano okuzongenwa kuwo mahhala obizwa ngeSigungu Samadoda Live Men’s Conference, ozoba se-Stable Theatre, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ngoMashi 28, kusuka ngo-2 ntambama kuze kube wu-8 kusihlwa. Okhulumela le nhlangano, uMnuz Mlondi Msweli, uthe kuze kufika kulesi sigaba nje, le nhlangano bayiqala sakudlala nozakwabo abayisithupha abambisene nabo besahlala ehostela KwaMashu. Babevame ukwenza inguyazana yokubonisana nokukhulisana ngokuthi impilo kumele bayiphile kanjani ukuze bangabi nazithiyo. UMSAKAZI woKhozi FM uKhathide "Tshath' Ugodo" Ngobe okwabazobe bekhona embuthanweni wabesilisa Isigungu Samadoda Live Men's Conference “Sikhule kanjalo, kwase kuthi ngo-2024 sahlala phansi sibheka ezinye izindlela esingazisebenzisa ukuze abantu abaningi besilisa bazibone futhi bazizwe lezi zimfundiso esikhuluma ngazo ikakhulu izingane zabafana, ezinye zazo ezikhula zingenabazali. “Siqale lapho ukufaka ama-video sizixoxela ngezihloko nangezinto ezithinta impilo yomuntu wesilisa, kwaze kwafika lapho sihambela khona izikole ezahlukene koLundi naseMpangeni, lapho okwanda khona izincomo zothisha nabazali ngomsebenzi wethu,” kulanda uMsweli. UMCULI kamaskandi uThokozani Langa kwabazobe besembuthanweni wabesilisa Isigungu Samadoda Live Men's Conference Eqhuba, uthe yingakho bebone kumqoka ukuthi baqhube lo mbono wabo ngokwenza lo mbuthano ngenhloso yokuqoqa abantu besilisa beminyaka nezigaba zempilo okwehlukene ukuze kuzobhungwa futhi kuboniswane ngakho konke okubathintayo. Uthe azobe ekhona wonke amalungu eSigungu okukhona kuwona oSomdenger Mthembu, Phistili, umphathi wenhlangano u-Andile Ndabezitha Zulu, Gezani Dludla, nabaculi bakamaskandi oGqizile Khanyile noSaliwa Ndunakazi. UMBHALI wezincwadi uLungisani Mavundla kwabazobe besembuthanweni wabesilisa Isigungu Samadoda Live Men's Conference Emcimbini bazobe bengahambi bodwa njengoba kukhona izihambeli eziyokwethula izeluleko ezethamelini okukhona kuzona umbhali wezincwadi uLungisani Mavundla, Nkosikhona “Phakel’ Umthakathi” Ndabandaba, umsakazi woKhozi FM uKhathide “Tshathugodo” Ngobe nabaculi bakamaskandi oGadla Nxumalo noThokozani Langa. “Sizonika amadoda ithuba lokuthi abhoboke ngakho konke okuwahluphayo bese sibonisana futhi ngokuthi yikuphi okumele ukuthi kwenziwe ukuze kunqotshwe konke okwenza ukuthi abe negama elibi emphakathini ngenxa yokubandakanyeka ezintweni ezingezinhle. Sizogcizelela nobumqoka bemfundo ekugwemeni okungalungile,” kusho yena. UPHAKEL' UMTHAKATHI kwabazobe bekhona embuthanweni wabesilisa Isigungu Samadoda Live Men's Conference Udalule nokuthi kulo mcimbi balindele izethameli eziphakathi kuka-150 kuya ku-200, nokuthi bameme abaNtwana baseNdlunkulu kaZulu ukuthi bezozizwela mathupha izinto ezikhalisa amadoda ngenhloso yokuthi zizwakale bese kubonakala ukuthi zingasonjululwa kanjani. UMCULI kamaskandi uGadla Nxumalo kwabazobe besembuthanweni wabesilisa Isigungu Samadoda Live Men's Conference

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKELA kwesokunxele uNksz Ntombenhle Dlamini, uMnuz Mandla Ndlovu, uMnuz Muntomuhle Mcambi, uDkt Nakanjani Sibiya, uNksz Nompumelelo Khumalo, uSolwazi Themba Qwabe noMnuz Zwelihle Mkhize benhlangano yababhali Usiba Writer’s Guild. IGCAGCELE esokeni kubabhali bezincwadi abasafisa ukuchuma kulandela isimemezelo senhlangano yababhali, uSiba Writer's Guild, sokuvukuza amakhono amasha kulo mkhakha. USiba, kuleli viki, lwethule isigungu esisha esesizosingatha zonke izinhlelo, nokuyisona esizwakalise ukuthi sifisa ukuthi kube nezithelo ezibonakalayo ukusebenzisana namaciko asafufusa. Umbhali osemnkantshubomvu uDkt Nakanjani Sibiya uqokwe njengoSihlalo woSiba, kwathi iPhini likaSihlalo kwaba uMnuz Muntomuhle Mcambi, uMgcinimafa uDkt Themba Qwabe, kwesikaNobhala kwaba uNksz Nompumelelo Khumalo, yena osekelwa uNksz Ntombenhle Dlamini. Amalungu okwengeza kube ngoMnuz Zwelihle Mkhize noMnuz Mandla Ndlovu. Engxoxweni neSolezwe Ngempelasonto, uSihlalo woSiba, uDkt Sibiya wodumo lwencwadi esihloko sithi Bengithi Lizokuna, udalule ukuthi bekungahlali kahle emoyeni wabo ukuthi le nhlangano isize yafika eminyakeni ewu-40 yaba khona kodwa kusalokhu kunzima ukuthi ifinyelele kubantu ngendlela abafisa ngayo. “Ngenkathi kuqala le nhlangano ngo-1985 inhloso enkulu kwakuwukuthi ibambe iqhaza ekufukuleni nokuthuthukisa imisebenzi yababhali bezincwadi. Kuthe ngokuqhubeka kwesikhathi silokhu siyibambile kuyona - sagcina sibona ukuthi lokho akufezeki ngendlela efanele ngenxa yokuthi besizinze eThekwini kakhulu. Lokhu bekudala ukuthi kube nokuqhelelana nababhali abaningi, kungafinyeleleki kithi,” kusho uSibiya. Ngokwenqubo entsha, Usiba luzoba nezinhlaka ezifundeni ezahlukene okukhona kuzo Ugu oluzoholwa wuyena uSibiya, iLembe elizoholwa uMcambi, eThekwini okuzohola khona uNksz Khumalo, iHarry Gwala ezoholwa wuNksz Dlamini. EMzinyathi uQwabe ozoba yiso lakhona, eMgungundlovu kube wuNdlovu, iKing Cetshwayo iholwe uMkhize, kuthi oThukela, Amajuba, iZululand noMkhanyakude akukabi nammeli. USibiya udalule ukuthi kuzo zonke lezi zifunda bahlele ukuthi benze imicimbi yokuzethula kubantu ngoMashi wonke ukuze kuzokwazeka ukuthi sekunezinhlelo ezinjena eziqalayo, nabo bakwazi ukuthi baqale ubudlelwano nababhali. “Sifuna nokuthi sisize ababhali abasafufusa ukusebenzisa igama namagalelo enhlangano Usiba ukuthola amathuba ehlukene okuthuthukisa imisebenzi yawo yobuciko, ngoba siyazi ukuthi ngeke kufane ukungqongqoza eminyangweni ethile uzihambela wedwa, nanoma usebenzisa igama le nhlangano eyaziwa nenedumela njengeyethu,” usho kanje. Udalule nokuthi kusukela manje futhi bazoqhubeka benze imicimbi nezinhlelo okwehlukene okuhambisana nemincintiswano yokubhala emikhakheni nangezindikimba ezahlukene zezincwadi. “Sifisa nokugcina sisebenzisana namanye amaciko ukusebenzisa ubuciko bokubhala izincwadi ukungenisa nangezinye izindlela, sibala nokuthi sisize ababhali ukusebenzisa imisebenzi yabo yezincwadi engaguquleka ibe yimidlalo yakwithelevishini,” kusho yena.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI uMbuso Khoza ngelinye lamaciko azonandisa edilini lomculo i-African Strings Festival ezoba sePlayhouse eThekwini Image: SBONGA GATSHENI IZOHLONISHWA ngedili lomculo wesintu ingqalabutho yomculo yakuleli zwe, uMadala Kunene, oseneminyaka engaphezu kwa-50 eyibambile embonini yezobuciko, ikakhulu umculo okuyiwona agqame futhi wazakhela igama ngawo kule ndima. Lokho kuzokwenzeka emcimbini ozobe uqala ukwenziwa kulo nyaka obizwa ngokuthi i-African Strings Festival ozoba sePlayhouse eThekwini, ngoLwesihlanu lwango-Ephreli 10, kusuka ngo-6 ntambama kuze kube wu-11 ebusuku. Umhleli nomsunguli walo mcimbu, uThobani Mngadi, uthe leli dili liyindlela abone ifanele ukuthi ayisebenzise ukuveza nokugqamisa amagalalelo kaMadala Kunene kwezomculo, enzela ukuthi isizukulwane esisha nesingazi okuningi ngaye, sikubone ngosuku lomcimbi. IQEMBU lomculo i-Afro Soul liyingxenye yamaciko azonandisa kwi-African Strings Festival ezoba sePlayhouse eThekwini “Kulo mcimbi izethameli zizozibonela ngokwazo ubaba uMadala eqhulula inqwaba yamanoni aziwa ngawo emculweni. Sihlele nokuthi lokho sikudidiyele nendikimba yomcimbi wethu eqhakambisa ubuhle bamagugu nesintu kwethu, okuyizinto esaziyo ukuthi uKunene uzithanda futhi uzigqaja kangakanani ngobuhle bazo,” kusho uMngadi. Eqhuba, uthe nakuba amanye amaciko azonandisa emcimbini ezolokhu ewamemezela nje ngokuqhubeka kwesikhathi kodwa uyakuqinisekisa ukuthi iqembu lomculo i-Afro Soul nomculi wodumo lwamahubo nezomlando uMbuso Khoza, bazobe bekhona nakanjani. INGQALABUTHO yezobuciko, uMadala Kunene, izohlonishwa ngamagalelo ayo endimeni yezobuciko kwi-African Strings Festival ezoba sePlayhouse eThekwini “Siyakuqinisekisa ukuthi kuzoba yidili lomculo elizohlabahlosa ngokuthi kunandise amaciko omculo wesintu, owe-jazz nowesicathamiya ngoba inhloso yethu enkulu wukuqhakambisa ubuhle bobuciko obuveza ubunjalo bobuthina nezinto ezingamagugu kithina,” usho kanje. Udalule nokuthi umcimbi uzophrojuswa nguSabelo Ngema we-Afro Soul Music Group futhi ongumshana wengqalabutho yezobuciko engasekho emhlabeni, uMbongeni Ngema. Unxuse nokuthi abantu bathenge amathikithi ale festiveli ngo-R250 kuya ku-R350 eWebtickets.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: IMBONGI uMthuthu Ndebele ingomunye wabazonandisa embuthanweni wokubhunga ngezobuciko othi Ikhefu With Mbali Malimela AMACIKO abhala futhi ahaye izinkondlo azothola ingqayizivele yethuba lokubhoboka ngakho konke okuwahlupha emoyeni nokwenza aphelelwe umdlandla - kangangokuthi amanye awo - agcine eshiya phansi ubuciko, agxile kweminye imikhakha. Lokho kuzokwenzeka embuthanweni ohlelelwe ukubhunga ngezinkinga ezihlupha amaciko nomphakathi jikelele obizwa ngokuthi Ikhefu With Mbali Malimela, ozoba ngeSonto, langoMashi 15, eSantosa Coffee eMorningside, eThekwini, kusukela ngo-10 ekuseni. Engxoxweni ekhethekile neSolezwe Ngempelasonto, umbhali futhi oyimbongi, uMbali Malimela waseDududu, uthe umcabango walo mbuthano wamfikela ngenkathi efake isiqeshana senkondlo yakhe esihloko sithi Ikhefu, okwathi ingangena kwiTikTok - kwanda abantu abakhala ngokukhathala, bezwakalisa nokuthi impilo ibakhathaza kangakanani. IMBONGI uMbali Malimela uhlela umcimbi wokubhunga ngezinselelo ezithiya amaciko endimeni othi Ikhefu with Mbali Malimela “Kwangikhathaza emoyeni ukuzwa abantu abaningi bekhala ngokukhathala, kangangokuthi kukhona nabebelibeka ngembaba elokuthi bafisa ngisho ukufa imbala ukuze baphumule nje ngokuthula. Lokhu kwenza ngakhumbula ukuthi nalana kwezobuciko sibheke nenkinga efanayo yozakwethu abagcina besala endleleni ngenxa yezimo ezihlukene ezithiya ukusebenza kwabo. Ngibe sengifisa ukuthi kube khona ukwakha isithangami lapho esizobhunga khona ngalezo zimo ezenza sizizwe kanjalo empilweni,” kusho uMbali. UMCULI uMandisa Cebekhulu ngomunye wabazonandisa emcimbini wokubhunga ngezingqinamba ezibhekana namaciko othi Ikhefu With Mbali Malimela Eqhuba, uthe lo mcimbi uhlose ukusiza ngawo kakhulu amaciko esifazane ngoba ekholwa wukuthi yiwona abhekana nezimo eziningi ezenza ukuthi aphazamiseke endleleni yawo yobuckiko futhi usebone kaningi kuba yiwona okuthi uma ephazamisekile ngandlelathize kungabe kusaba lula ukubuya ngamandla, aqhubeke namakhono awo ezobuciko. IMBONGI uLuleka Mhlanzi womunye wabazonandisa emcimbini wokubhunga ngezingqinamba ezithiya amaciko othi Ikhefu with Mbali Malimela “Ngenkathi ngifaka isicelo sokuxhaswa ngabesikhwama esixhasa imisebenzi yobuciko, iNational Arts Council, nokuyibona ababambe iqhaza elikhulu ekutheni lo mbono uqhubeke manje, ngakuveza ngokusobala ukuthi ngihlose ukusiza kakhulu amaciko esifazane ukuthi athole ithuba lokubhodla nokubhoboka ngezimo ezihlukene eziwahluphayo endimeni. IMBONGI uSindiswa Zulu ingomunye wabazonandisa emcimbini wokubhunga ngezingqinamba ezithiya amaciko othi Ikhefu with Mbali Malimela “Nokho akuzukuphelela lapho futhi njengoba ngifisa nokuthi lo mbono uqhubeke ube wusizo nasebantwini nje emphakathini ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi sibaningi kakhulu esibhekene nezimo ezenza kube lula ukuthi umuntu aphose ithawula empilweni, engithemba ukuthi leli thuba lizokwenza umehluko wokunqanda ukudloba isimo sokudikibala esinaso,” kulandisa yena. UMELULEKI wezengqondo ozimele, uTholinhlanhla Dlamini-Ngcoya, ungesinye sezikhulumi ezizobe zikhona embuthaneni wokubhunga ngezinkinga ezithiya amaciko Kulo mcimbi uMbali uzobe engahambi yedwa, njengoba kuzoba khona ozakwabo kule ndima okubalwa kubona imbongi uSindiswa Zulu, uLuleka Mhlanzi naye obhala futhi ahaye izinkondlo, kube wuDemima Nokusa Buthelezi ozobe enzisa futhi ecebisa izethameli izindlela zokukhulula nokusabalalisa umqondo, kube wumeluleki wezengqondo uTholinhlanhla Dlamini-Ngcoya, imbongi uMthuthu Ndebele nomculi uMandisa Cebekhulu. UDEMISA Nokusa Buthelezi ngesinye sezikhulumi ezizobe zikhona embuthaneni Leli ciko lidalule nokuthi okunye okuhlabahlosile okuzokwenzeka kulo mbuthano wukuthi lizokwethula ngokusemthethweni incwadi yalo yokuqala yezinkondlo zesiZulu esihloko sithi Ikhefu: Awulidingi Yini Ikhefu? - nayo equkethe umyalezo ohambisana nokuzobe kudingidwa. Lithe lilindele izithameli eziphakathi kwa-50 kuya ku-80 kulo mcimbi kanti abafisa ukuba khona bengathenga amathikithi eQuicket ngo-R300 lilinye no-R500 elihambisana nencwadi. Ngale kweKhefu, uMbali usezifake ezinhlizweni zabaningi abakhonze ubuciko ngomcimbi wakhe waminyaka wezinkondlo nomculo othi Poetry on The Lawn. Ngale kwalokho, waziwa nangenkondlo yakhe ethi Isibeletho futhi usesebenze namaciko ehlukene okubalwa kuwona uGubhela, Mzukulu, Nkosazana Daughter uNontokozo Mkhize neMalumz on Decks.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMLINGISI uNhlanhla Kunene uthembisa ukushubisa izinto kwisizini yesibili yeLaw, Love & Betrayal, ezokhonjiswa kuMzansi Magic nakwiShowmax ngenyanga ezayo KUZOGQAMA kakhulu izigigaba nezigemegeme zikaNhlanhla Kunene, olingisa indawo kaMondli Gumede kwiLaw, Love & Betrayal, kwisizini yesibili yalo mdlalo ezoqala ngoMashi 8 kuMzansi Magici ngo-8 nangoMashi 9 kwiShowmax. Lokhu kudalulwe yilo mlingisi, ozakhele igama kwi-Adulting lapho ayelingisa khona indawo kaTsiki Tsiki. Uthe kulokhu abantu bazombona eshubisa izinto okuyinto ebingenzeki ngesizini yokuqala ngoba ubengaveli kuyona, kepha bekukhulunywa ngaye kuphela. Uthe kulokhu ukubuya nokuvela kwakhe kuzoza nezinkinga empilweni kadadewabo u-Ayanda Gumede, olingiswa wumethuli wezinhlelo zethelevishini uPearl Modiadie. “Kube sengathi ngingena endaweni ebivele ikhona ngoba bekukaningi kukhulunywa ngoMondli emdlalweni kepha engaveli yena siqu sakhe. Manje mina ngihlalelwe yinselelo yokuthi ngiqinisekise ukuthi lokho obekushiwo ngaye kuyabonakala ngezenzo uma sengivela kaningi ngokuqhubeka komdlalo manje,” kusho yena. UMLINGISI uNhlanhla Kunene uthembisa ukushubisa izinto kwisizini yesibili yeLaw, Love & Betrayal, ezokhonjiswa kuMzansi Magic nakwiShowmax ngenyanga ezayo Eqhuba, uthe nakuba izinselelo zokuphambana kwemibono phakathi kwakhe nodadewabo zizoshukumisa umdlalo, kodwa futhi zizogqamisa okuningi ngenhlalo yemindeni nokuthi ukungezwani emindenini kunamthelela muni empilweni yawo yansuku zonke. Uthe nakuba engeke avele kuzona zonke iziqephu zesizini yesibili, kepha lapho ezobe evela khona kuzobonakala ngombala, futhi yilapho ababukeli bezobona khona ukuthi unezilonda nobuhlungu obungakanani enhliziyweni yakhe. “Uthe: “Engikujabulele kakhulu ngokukhula kwale ndawo engiyilingisayo wukuthi  ihluke kakhulu kwengijwayele ukukulingisa, futhi ngikuthokozele nokusebenza eduze noBaba uNimrod Nkosi, ongubaba wami ngokomdlalo - ngoba ungomunye wabalingisi abadala, futhi engibahloniphayo nengikhule ngikhuthazwa yimisebenzi yabo emihle.” Abanye abalingisi abazogqama kwisizini yesibili yeLaw, Love & Betrayal uShannon Esra (Sandra Stein), Sparky Xulu (Sakhile Nxusa), Katlego Lebohang (Bokang Mokgotso) no-Anelisa Phewa (James Makaula).

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: IMBONGI uLuyanda EM izokwenza umcimbi wayo wokuqala wezinkondlo nomculo othi Imiyezane Poetry Experience UMBHALI obuye abe  yimbongi yezinkondlo zesiZulu, uLuyanda Mlotshwa, odume  ngelikaLuyanda EM kwezobuciko, usethembise ukwelapha imiphefumulo, futhi athobe nezinhliziyo zabantu emcimbini wakhe wokuqala wobuciko. Lo mcimbi awubiza ngokuthi Imiyezane Poetry Experience, uzoba se-The Stable Theatre, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ngoMashi 7 kusuka ngo-12 emini kuya ku-5 ntambama. ULuyanda waseMvoti, kodwa osezinze eThekwini, uthe sekuyisikhathi eside eshisekela ukwenza lo mcimbi kepha kungenzeki ngenxa yokuthi bekungakabi yisikhathi esifanele nesihle kuyena ukuziphonsela inselelo enjalo ngobuciko bakhe. IMBONGI uLuyanda EM izokwenza umcimbi wayo wokuqala wezinkondlo nomculo othi Imiyezane Poetry Experience “Yingakho kuthe uma sengibona ukuthi sengikulungele ngokuphelele ukuba nawo, ngaqinisekisa nokuthi ngiqala ngokuthola usizo lokuthi uxhaseke ngendlela efanele, nezokwenza ukuthi kungabi nzima ukuthi ube yilokhu engikufunayo,” kusho yena. IMBONGI uNhlanhla Mhlongo kwabazonandisa emcimbini wedili lezinkondlo nomculo Imiyezane Poetry Experience Eqhuba, uthe lona wumcimbi azobe ededela kuwona ingxenye yezinkondlo aziwa ngazo endimeni, iningi lazo ezikwi-EP yakhe yango-2023 esihloko sithi Imiyezane, nokuyiyona futhi adla ngayo umhlanganiso ewina emunxeni we-Best Poet kuma-SATMA Awards ngo-2024.
