Yize iToyota Hilux ngaphakathi ibukeka indala kunezimbangi kodwa yakhiwe yaqina ukuze ihlale iminyaka Amarimu angu-18 inch bese kuthi esikhenkeni kube nerabha ukuze sivikeleke uma ulayishe impahla engase iklwebhe. Ngiyakuthanda ukuthi uyakwazi ukusikhiya isikhenke impahla ivikeleke ngaphakathi njengoba kune-roller shutter kodwa engasebenzi ngogesi. Uma usungena ngaphakathi awusoze ukhohlwe ukuthi uhamba ngani ngoba nakhona iqoshwe ezindaweni eziningi uLegend 55. Ngaphakathi futhi yilapho ekhombisa khona ukuthi izimbangi zintsha kunayo ngoba isashaya ngegiya elide ne-handbrake, yinye imbobo yokushaja nge-USB ne-touchscreen infotainment system ewumhlobo “mdi”. Kwi-touchscreen uyakwazi kodwa ukuxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto futhi iveza nengaphandle ukuze ungashayisi. Injini ehamba ngayo yi-2.8 litre GD-6 turbodiesel eno-gearbox oyi-6 speed auto. Inamandla angu-150kW ne-torque engu-500Nm. Engikuqaphelile wukuthi sengathi bayithuthukisile indlela entofontofo ngayo emgwaqweni noma ingafiki ezingeni le-Ford Ranger ezihambela yodwa. Yize izimbangi zinezinjini ezinamandla amakhulu kodwa ngiwezwe ekahle nakuyona isukuma uma unyathela. Njengoba iyi-4x4 bengihamba ngokukhululeka ngokuthi angisoze ngibhajwe ndawo ngoba zikhona zonke izinsiza ezifana ne-diff lock no-4 low range. Kudizili ibidla amalitha angu-9.9 ngo-100km futhi ethangini ungalindela ukuhamba ngaphezu kancane kuka-600km. Zonke zifika ne-service plan yamasevisi ayisishiyagalolunye noma u-90 000km ne-warranty yeminyaka emithathu noma u-100 000km.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: KwaJetour bethule iT1 ne-T2 i-DM okuyizimoto ezingonhliziyombili njengoba zihamba ngenjini kaphethroli nekagesi webhethri ISIKHULU sakwaJetour emhlabeni jikelele sidalule ukuthi le nkampani yaseChina isezinhlelweni zokukhiqiza izimoto zayo eNingizimu Afrika. U-Andy Yuan, oyi-Vice President yakwaJetour International, wenze lesi simemezelo eSun Bet Arena kuleli sonto ngesikhathi le nkampani yethula izimoto zayo zokuqala kuleli ezingama-new energy vehicle (NEV). UYuan uthe basabalala emazweni angomakhelwane nawo adayisa izimoto ezishayelwa ngakwesokudla okubalwa kuwo iNamibia, Botswana, Zambia namanye. Uthe bafuna ukuvula ifemu yokwakha izimoto kuleli ukuze kunciphe izindleko futhi kudaleke amathuba omsebenzi. Ifemu izobe izihlanganisa izimoto, hhayi ukuzakha kusuka phansi. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi iChery South Africa isanda kumemezela ukuthi ithenge ifemu yakwaNissan ePitoli. IJetour ingenye yezinkampani ezenganyelwe yiChery emhlabeni jikelele. Izimoto ebezethulwa yi-T1 iDM neT-2 iDM ezingama plug-in hybrid. Zisuselwe kuma-T1 neT2 ahamba ngophethroli nabamba elikhulu iqhaza ekundlondlobaleni kweJetour kuleli. I-T2 ingenye yezimoto ezibanga isicoco se-2026 SA Car of the Year. I-T1 i-DM inenjini kaphethroli nezimbili zikagesi okukhipha amandla ahlanganisiwe angu-250kW ne-torque engu-530Nm. Ibhethri eligcina ugesi lingu-18.4kWh futhi uyakwazi ukuyisebenzisa njenge-generator ekhipha amandla angu-3.3kW. Ukuyishaja endaweni esheshayo bathi kuthatha imizuzu engu-27 ukusuka ku-30% iye ku-80% kuthi ngogesi wasendlini kuthathe amahora alinganiselwa kwamathathu ukuthi igcwale. Uma ibhethri nophethroli kugcwele bathi ungahamba amakhilomitha angu-1 200, kuthi ngogesi wodwa uhambe angu-100. I-T2 i-DM yona inamandla angu-265kW ne-torque engu-610Nm. Nakuyo bathi ungahamba amakhilomitha alinganiselwa ku-1 200 kuthi ngogesi wodwa uhambe angu-90. Ibhethri layo nezikhathi zokushaja kuyafana nakwiT1 i-DM.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMCULI we-jazz, uNduduzo Makhathini, nendodana yakhe, uThingo Makhathini, asebenze nayo kwi-albhamu yakhe ezophuma ngoJuni Image: Instagram/Nduduzo Makhathini UMCULI we-jazz, uNduduzo Makhathini, ujatshuliswa ukuphrojusa i-albhamu yakhe entsha  ngokuhlanganyela nendodana yakhe, uThingo, akubona kuzoheha nentsha. UNduduzo ophinde abe wuthisha womculo njengoba eneziqu zobudokotela kuwo, ulungiselela ukukhipha i-albhamu, i-The Myth We Choose ngoJuni. Kumanje usekhiphe ingoma eyendlalelayo ethi Kuzodlula. Uthe i-albhamu uyiphrojuse ngokuhlanganyela noThingo Makhathini (18). “Ukusebenzisana noThingo akuyona into eqalayo. Kwi-albhamu yokuqala eyayithi Sketches of Tomorrow (eyaphuma ngo-2014), babekhona abantwana uNailah, uThingo noMoyo becula. Balokhu beqhamuka bevela emsebenzini ngezindlela ezahlukile kodwa useyaqala ukuhlala esihlalweni sokuthi kube wuyena umdidiyeli noma uphrojusa kule albhamu,” kusho uNduduzo ekhuluma naleli phephandaba ese-United States of America (USA), lapho enomjikelezo khona. Uthe izingane zakhe ziyawuthanda umculo ngoba beziwufunda ezikoleni zamabanga aphansi kodwa uThingo uyena obonakala ngathi ufuna ukuwuqhuba. “Ulethe izithako ezintsha ezenza ukuthi lo mculo nabantu abancane ngokweminyaka bazowuthanda kakhulu.” Uthe baningi asebenze nabo okubalwa kubo uBlack Coffee, umkakhe u-Omagugu, Dalisu Ndlazi, Lukmil Perez, Ayana Sikade, Shabaka Hutchings, Robin Fassie, Keenan Ahrends, Thando Zide noMuneyi. Uthe i-albhamu likhuluma ngomlando nendlela okuthiwa abantu bavela ngayo emhlabeni. “NgesiZulu kuthiwa sadabuka ohlangeni, kube khona abantu abanjengoMvelikuqala kube khona oNomkhubulwane. Siyabheka ukuthi mhlawumbe lezo zindaba zendabuko zixhumana nekusasa? Yiziphi kulezi zindatshana esizikhumbulayo nokuthi ziwukhanda kanjani umlando wethu nendlela yokuziphatha? Ngizama ukuxhumanisa lokho njengoba mhlawumbe eminyakeni eyikhulu ezayo, sikhulume ngoNomkhubulwane ukuthi yiziphi izindaba ezintsha eziyokwakha abantu nemiphakathi nendlela yokuziphatha.” Uphethe ngokudlulisa amazwi enduduzo ngokudlula emhlabeni kuka-Albert Mazibuko weLadysmith Black Mambazo, asebenze naye. Muva nje, bakhiphe i-albhamu ngokuhlanganyela neMambazo, kubalwa noMbuso Khoza ethi One Voice – One World. “Abantu abanjengobaba uMazibuko babe negalelo nanokuthi babe nendlela yokuthi yini abafuna ukuyishiya siyikhumbula ngabo lokho okuyifudumezayo inhliziyo ngesikhathi sokukhala. Basishiye nolwazi oluningi, basishiye namathuba amaningi futhi sizohlala sibakhumbula ngamagalelo abo. Kuye kuthiwa umuntu onjengobaba uMazibuko akahambi usekhona, uphila kumculo nezimfundiso nakho konke akwenzile emhlabeni.”

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-LADYSMITH Black Mambazo ivalelisa ngomculo ku-Albert Mazibuko enkonzweni yomngcwabo wakhe eMtshezi High, ngoMgqibelo ekuseni UZOGCINWA ngencwadi nangeqophamlando, umlando wengwazi yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, u-Albert Mazibuko, eshone emasontweni amabili adlule, emuva kokugula isikhashana. UMazibuko (77) ushonele esibhedlela eThekwini, lapho ehlinzwe khona. Udlule emhlabeni esethathe umhlalaphansi ekunandiseni neqembu, ubeseba khona kuphela uma lizilolonga. NgoMgqibelo ekuseni, ufihlelwe emathuneni asekhaya eMtshezi, kwase kuqhubeka inkonzo enkundleni yemidlalo eMtshezi High. Lokhu kuye ngokwesifiso sakhe nokuthi endaweni kungcwatshwa engakashayi u-11 ekuseni, ngokusho kwemenenja yeMambazo, uXolani Majozi. UMajozi uthe uMazibuko bazomkhumbula ngokukhipha incwadi ekhuluma ngomlando wakhe. “Kuningi esikuqophile esaphila, kuzokwazi ukuthi kube nomthelela omuhle ekuhlanganiseni iqophamlando esizolenza,” kusho uMajozi. Ubonge nohulumeni wesifundazwe nokazwelonke ngokufaka isandla ezindlekweni zomngcwabo. “Uma umngcwabo kungowomndeni nomakhelwane, kuye kungabi nzima ukuwuthwala kodwa uma sekuzofika abantu abaningi, ngoba abantu abebesemngcwabeni bebalelwa ku-2 000, kuye kube nengcindezi emndenini ngezindleko. Uhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal oholwa ubaba u(Thami) Ntuli ukwazile ukuthi usondele ubheke ukuthi umndeni yikuphi la odinga ngakhona, wase uyalekelela. NoMnyango kazwelonke wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko usondelile wanikela ukuze umcimbi ube sezingeni. Senelisekile ngokwesekwa kuhulumeni nasemphakathini,” kusho uMajozi. Enkonzweni bekukhona uNtuli, iPhini likaNgqongqoshe wezemiSebenzi yoMphakathi neNgqalasizinda uMnuz Sihle Zikalala, uMqondisi Jikelele woMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, uNkk Stella Khumalo, iMeya kaMasipala Inkosi Langalibalele, uMnuz Mduduzi Myeza, owayenguNgqongqoshe wezemiDlalo, uMnuz Zizi Kodwa nabanye. Umndeni ududuzwe ngomculo yiMambazo eyacela ukuthi uMazibuko angafihlwa ingakabuyi e-United States of America (USA), lapho eyayinomjikelezo khona, iqembu laseSwatini iNcandweni Christ Ambassadors, Abanqobi, Thee Legacy nabanye. Izikhulumi bezibabaza inhlonipho nokuzithoba kukaMazibuko oshiye emhlabeni umkakhe uBongiwe Mazibuko, izingane nabazukulu.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-Kia Tasman entsha ishiya abantu abaningi behlukene phakathi ngendlela ebukeka ngayo BASUKELE isidleke sezinyosi kwaKia South Africa ngokwethula iveni labo lokuqala ngqa, iTasman, ababheke ukuzuza lukhulu ngalo. Umphumela kuyoba wukuthi zibatinyele okanye bafinyelele ekhekheni kube wuju lodwa. Izinyosi kulokhu yizingqungqulu ezikhonya emkhakheni wamaveni angama-double cab okuyi-Ford Ranger, Toyota Hilux, Isuzu D-Max, VW Amarok, GWM P-Series, Nissan Navara ne-Foton Tunland. Ngeke ubasole ngokuzama ukufika ojwini kwazise iconsisa amathe le makethe njengoba nyakenye kudayiswe ama-double cab angaphezu kuka-63 000. Uqala nje unyaka u-2026, evile ku-10 000 asefinyelele emakhasimendeni. Uma betinyeleka bazobe belandela ezinyathelweni zeMercedes-Benz ngeveni labo iX-Class eyayisuselwe kwiNissan Navara eyabhacaza baze bayihoxisa. Nokho iTasman ayifani neX-Class ngoba yona ayisuselwe ndawo, kunalokho kwaKia bayakhe kusuka phansi kuya phezulu. Ivele okokuqala emehlweni abantu ngo-2024 kwasuka okukhulu ukukhuluma ngendlela ebukeka ngayo. Namanje lokho kukhuluma akukapheli kusashiya abantu bengundaza ngezizathu ezingefani. Ngingomunye obeshaya amakhala kodwa emuva kokuyizwa ngezami izandla izinsukwana eWestern Cape ngesikhathi yethulwa, ngigcine sengingenankinga ngayo. Nabanye kungenzeka bajike umqondo uma sebeyijwayela. Ukuba le moto ingumuntu mhlawumbe beyizophiwa igama lokuthi uBuhlebuyeza. Ibukeka njengemoto encane okanye iSUV ngaphakathi iKia Tasman Okwamanje ezweni kukhona angu-150 futhi esinye isitokwe samaTasman angu-300 sisendleleni. Lokhu kukhombisa ngokusobala ukuzimisela kwabo ngokunyusa isibalo sezimoto abazidayisayo nonyaka, ngokusho kwesikhulu sakwa-Kia South Africa, uPaul Turnbull. Nyakenye badayise izimoto ezingu-18 843 nokuyisibalo esinyuke sisuka ku-14 103 ngo-2024. Ngo-2026, uTurnbull uthe bafuna ukudayisa ezingu-23 000 kuya phezulu. Ngale kweTasman, kunezinye izimoto ezintsha sha eziyisihlanu ezizayo nonyaka nezimbili ezinamagama asevele ekhona kuleli. Uma sibuyela kwiTasman, ngaphambili igolozile, iyagqama uma ithushuka. Iyagqama njengoba ubude bungu-5.410 mm kuthi ububanzi bube ngu- 1.930 mm. Ama-LED headlights ahlanganiswe nama-daytime running lights bawanameke ezinhlangothini bese ezansi kuba nama-fog lights. Ngikubone kuwabeka engcupheni yokulimala, ikakhulukazi uma usugudla ehlathini elithothene. Uma uyibuka ohlangothini kuvela amarimu angu-17 inch afakwe emasondweni angama-all terrain newindi langemuva elidimile. Kugqama amafenda aqumbile anombala omnyama okuthi uma uthanda uthole afana nombala ofana nomzimba wemoto. Esikhenkeni kunokokusivikela ukuthi singaklwebheki uma ulayishe impahla. Ngikuthandile ukuthi isivalo sesikhenke asisindi uma usivula noma usivala. Kuningi okunye ongakwengeza ngokuthanda kwakho njenge-bull bar, styling bar, i-roller shutter esikhenkeni kanjalo ne-towbar. I-towbar le ungakwazi ukudonsa ngayo isisindo esingu-3 500kg. ITasman ifika ngezinhlobo ezintathu okuyi-LX edonsa ngamasondo amabili, SX ne-X-Pro ezidonsa ngawo wonke. “Wu-last number” iX-Pro ebesihamba ngayo. Ngaphakathi ungafunga ukuthi yi-SUV. Inezihlalo zesikhumba, ezangaphambili okwazi ukuzifudumeza uphinde uzibandise. Okunye okokushisisa yisiteringi. Iphinde ibe ne-touchscreen infotainment system engu-12.3 inch ehlangene ne-digital instrument cluster. Phakathi nendawo kuwona la ma-screen kunesinye esincane esikukhombisa amazinga okushisa nokuthi umoya uphuma kuphi. Besingabonakali kahle ngasohlangothini lomshayeli kudingeka ngitshekise ikhanda ukulunguza. Kwi-infotainment udlala umculo ngezipikha ezikhala kamnandi ze-Harman Kardon, ikukhombisa lonke ingaphandle njengoba inamakhamera zinhlangothi zombili ngaphambili nangemuva, uxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto ngaphandle kwentambo nokunye. Ngiyakuthanda ukuthi kunamabhathini asheshe akufikise kofuna ukukwenza ungathinti kwi-touchscreen ize ingcole. Ngibala inkinobho yokunyusa umsindo, ezokushintsha amazinga okushisa nokunye. Kunezimbobo ezimbili zokushaja nge-USB ngaphambili, eyokushaja ngaphandle kwentambo nezinye ezimbili zokushaja ngemuva. Ngemuva isikhala sabagibeli ngisibone sikahle, kuphela ezinyaweni sincanyana. ITasman ifika nenjini eyodwa engu-2.2 litre kadizili ekhona nakwezinye izimoto zakwa-Kia njengeSorento. Inamandla angu-154kW ne-torque engu-440Nm bese kuthi u-gearbox ube yi-8 speed automatic. Indlela isisuse eWaterfront yaze yayophelela eLambert’s Bay, bude buduze nasezweni elingumakhelwane iNamibia. Sigudle etiyeleni, sangena obhuqwini, saphinde sabuyela etiyeleni. Ngisanda kuyisusa ngiyizwe sengathi inokuthanda ukushintshashintsha amagiya kodwa sagcina sijwayelene. Ngemuva ifika nokokuvikela isikhenke iKia Tasman Amandla abezwakala enele uma isukuma futhi iyicela indlela uma ngifuna ukudlula ezinye izimoto namaloli ahudula izinqola ezilayishe impahla. Inama-drive modes amane okungu-Eco, Normal, Sport no-Tow. Ngaphakathi ithule futhi uma umgwaqo uqala ukuba mubi bekuzwakala kodwa hhayi ngendlela ekhalisayo. Ngeke nokho uyibeke ezingeni leRanger. Ngichazwe yindlela ebambelela ngayo okusizwa kakhulu wukuthi idonsa ngawo wonke amasondo amandlla iwafake lapho edingeka khona. Uma uthanda uyayishintsha idonse ngamabili bese kuthi uma ususobhuqwini uyifake ku-4H okanye u-4Low. Ngike ngayishiya ku-4 Auto obhuqwini ngayibona ilubamba kodwa ngiyizwa ne-traction control ingenelela ukungigcina endleleni. Obhuqwini ibingakhalisi nhlobo ingazweli kakhulu futhi ilinyusa nejubane ngale kokukuthusa ngokuthi ingakuphosa esikhotheni. Akukho lapho sixakeke khona kwadingeka ukuthi sisebenzise i-diff lock kwazise asiziqwalanga izintaba. Angiboni ukuthi ibizoshaya phansi ngoba igabade ilishiye ngo-252mm. Ikwazi nokuzihambela yona uma uyifaka kuX-Trek ongawufanisa ne-cruise control yasobhuqwini. Siphinde sayihloma esihlabathini, okuyindawo ekwazi ukuhamba kuyo ngale kokuxakeka. Esiteringini kunamabhathini okukutshela ukuthi uhamba endaweni enjani njengasesihlabathini, ematsheni nasodakeni Yona ibe isizilungisa ngendlela efanele njengokuthi ithi ukulibamba igiya esihlabathini. KwaKia bathi ngo-100km iphuza amalitha angu-7.8 litres ethangini elingu-80 litres. Ngilunguze ngayibona idla 8.9l/100km. Ngokwami iTasman yiveni elisezingeni nelingase licoshacoshe emakhasimendeni. Izinyanga ezizayo yizona ezizosidweba sicace isithombe sokuthi abashayeli baseNingizimu Afrika bahamba nayo noma bazoqhubeka nokubambelela ezintandokazini zabo iRanger, Hilux okulindeleke entsha maduze neD-Max ethuthukisiwe ezokwethulwa noma yinini. Kia Tasman 2.2D AT 4x2 LX                        R 679,995 Kia Tasman 2.2D AT 4WD SX                      R 879,995 Kia Tasman 2.2D AT 4WD X-PRO               R 999 995 Zifika ne-service plan yeminyaka eyisithupha noma u-90 000km, Roadside assistance weminyaka emihlanu engakalelwe banga ne-warranty yeminyaka emihlanu nayo engakalelwe banga.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Kuqwashiswa ngobungozi bokuphazanyiswa okuthile ube ushayela nokungadala izingozi zomgwaqo U-EPHRELI uphawulwa njengenyanga yokuqwashisa abantu ngobungozi bokushayela kukhona okubaphazamisayo, nokuyinto okuthiwa ingenye yezimbangela ezinkulu zezingozi emgwaqweni. Isikhulu senkampani efundisa ukushayela futhi egqugquzela ukuphepha emgwaqweni iMasterDrive, u-Eugene Herbert, sithe imininingwane yezinkampani zemishwalense ikhomba ukuthi ukushayela bese kuba nokukuphazamisayo kwenyusa amathuba okushayisa ngo-60%. “Ngokwe-World Health Organisation, ukusebenzisa iselula ube ushayela kunyusa amathuba okushayisa ngokuphindwe kane. Lokhu kuhlanganisa ukuyibamba ngesandla nokusebenzisa iBluetooth. ENingizimu Afrika, iRoad Traffic Management Corporation (RTMC) ihlale ibalula ukuphazamiseka komshayeli njengokuphambili ezingozini okufa kuzo abantu. Kunzima ukuthola ulwazi oluqondile ngoba emuva kwengozi akulula ukusho kugcwale umlomo ukuthi ingozi idalwe wumshayeli obephazamisekile,” kusho uHerbert. Uthe ucwaningo lososayensi luthi kunzima ukuthi unganaka ngokugcwele izinto ezimbili kanye kanye. Kunalokho umqondo ulokhu ushintsha ngokushesha unaka izinto ozenzayo ngokwahlukana. “Kuleyo mizuzwana unganakile yonke into ingaphuma esandleni. Ngesivinini esingu-120km/h, imoto ihamba ibanga elilinganiselwa ku-33 metres njalo ngomzuzwana. Ukubuka iselula imizuzwana emine kuya kwemihlanu kufana nokuhamba ibanga enkundleni ye-rugby ucimezile,” kusho uHerbert. Uthe akuyona iselula kuphela kodwa nakhu okunye:

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UPANJARO elenga kwibhonethi imoto ibe iphenduka emncintiswaneni i-Red Bull Shay'iMoto Image: Craig Kolesky/Red Bull Content Pool USIVIKELE ngempumelelo isicoco sakhe uJean “Panjaro” Kruger emncintiswaneni i-Red Bull Shay’iMoto obuseSuncoast Casino, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Lo mncintiswano ubusubuya eThekwini okwesibili iminyaka ilandelana njengoba ubuqala ukuba khona nyakenye. Yilapho uPanjaro, ohlala eMahikeng, athatha khona isicoco kuBoksie waseKapa. Abashayeli banikezwa imizuzu emibili nohhafu wokuthi bashaye izidudla, bechushe nasezikhaleni, benze neminye imigilingwane ngemoto. Abanye baphuma imoto ihamba babuye bangene baqhubeke nokushayela. U-KING Tyler nomsizi wakhe benza abadume ngazo kwi-Red Bull Shay'iMoto Image: Mpumelelo Macu/Red Bull Content Pool UPanjaro uhehe izethameli elenga kwibhonethi evulekile imoto ibe ishaya isidudla. Konke abakwenzayo kumele kwenelise amajaji nezethameli nazo ezivotayo. NgoLwesihlanu ebusuku, umncintiswano uqale kunabashayeli abangu-16, kwase kuyiwa kowamanqamu ngoMgqibelo, sekusele abayisishiyagalombili. Abane abathole amaphuzu amaningi banikwe ithuba lokuzikhethela abafuna ukuqhudelana nabo. Bese kusele uPanjaro, Magesh Junior, Team VQ25, King Tyler, uBubu okunguye yedwa obemele iKwaZulu-Natal, King Kruger ongumfowabo kaPanjaro, Team 2xSpicy JZ noBemors. Uhlelo beluphethwe nguHope Mbhele nomakadebona kulo mdlalo, uVic Pardal. Ngokunqoba kabili kulandelana, uPanjaro ulandele ezinyathelweni zikaSam Sam obeyijaji okokuqala kulokhu. USam Sam wanqoba ngo-2021 nango-2022. UPanjaro ongandanga ngamazwi uthe: “Ngiyabonga kakhulu ngokungeseka, ngizonibona ngonyaka ozayo.”

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IZINKOMBA ziveza ukuthi ingase iphinde yenyuke intengo kaphethroli, udizili nopharafini ngenyanga ezayo UMFELANDAWONYE wezinyunyana zabasebenzi, iCosatu, uhlabe ikhwelo kuhulumeni ukuthi uphinde uqhamuke nezinye izindlela zokunciphisa ukuzwela kokunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli nodizili, okulindeleke ukuthi kwenzeke ekuqaleni kukaMeyi. Ekuqaleni kwenyanga intengo yelitha likaphethroli u-93 no-95 inyuke ngo-R3.06. Ekadizili u-500ppm inyuke ngo-R7.37 kwathi elika-50ppm lanyuka ngo-R7.51. Ilitha likapharafini linyuke ngo-R11.67. Lokhu kunyuka kwentengo kudalwe yimpi ephakathi kwe-Iran ne-Israel (ebambisene ne-United States of America). Iphazamise ukuthuthwa kukawoyela ongahluziwe eStrait of Hormuz. Uhulumeni wamemezela ukuthi uzokwehlisa isikhashana intela kaphethroli ngo-R3 isuka ku-R4.10 yaba ngu-R1.10 ilitha. Kudizili yehle isuka ku-R3.93 yaba ngu-R0.93 ilitha kule nyanga futhi kuzophinde kubuyekezwe ngezayo. Lokhu wathi kuzowulahlekisela ngo-R6 billion emnothweni. Uhulumeni ekhasini lawo kwi-X, uveze ukuthi ukunyuka kwentengo kawoyela nokushintshashintsha kwamandla erandi, kulindeleke ukuthi kunyuse intengo kaphethroli ezinyangeni ezizayo. ICosatu ithe imibiko yakamuva yeCentral Energy Fund, iveza ukuthi intengo yelitha likaphethroli ingase yenyuke ngo-R3, R10 elikadizili no-R7 kwelikapharafini. “Lokhu ngokunye ukushayeka emnothweni onyuka ngo-1% kule minyaka engaphezu kuka-10 nasempini yamazinga okungasebenzi aku-41.1%. I-International Monetary Fund isivele ikwehlisile ukuqagela kokunyuka komnotho ngo-2026, yakubeka ku-1% isuka ku-1.4%,” kusho iCosatu. Ithe ukwehliswa kwentela kaphethroli inyanga eyodwa yigxathu elihle kodwa kudingeka okunye ngokushesha. Ithe inovalo lokuthi abasebenzi nomnotho ngeke bakwazi ukumelana nokunye ukunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli, udizili nopharafini. “Udizili ubalulekile ezithuthini zomphakathi abasebenzi abathembele kuzo kanjalo nopharafini osetshenziswa yizinkulungwane zemindeni. Abasebenzi bavele bacwile ezikweletini, banakekela izihlobo eziyisikhombisa umsebenzi ngamunye, bachitha u-40% womholo wabo kwezokuthutha futhi ngeke bakwazi ukumelana nokunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli, kadizili nekapharafini.” ICosatu ithe kumele kuphinde kwehliswe intela kaphethroli nenye intela. Ibalule nokuthi kumele kuqhanyukwe nezindlela zokwehlisa intengo kapharafini. Okunye ithe wukuthi kwenziwe izithuthi zomphakathi zishibhe.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMCULI uSabelo Ngema ovivela ukugijima iComrades Marathon okokuqala ngoJuni UMCULI oyilungu leqembu i-Afrosoul ufuna ukugqugquzela ozakwabo ngokubaluleka kokuzivocavoca ukuze bagweme izifo. Uzokwenza lokhu ngokugijima iComrades Marathon okokuqala ngoJuni 14 nonyaka. USabelo Ngema uzoba ngomunye wezinkulungwane zabagijimi ezizosuka eThekwini, zilibangise eMgungundlovu, kulo mjaho ozoba ngoka-99 kulo nyaka. Lo mculi uzobe engaqali ukusebenzisa ukugijima ukuqwashisa abantu ngokubaluleka kokunakekela impilo njengoba ngonyaka odlule, yena nozakwabo bagijime besuka eThekwini baya ePort Edward, befundisa ngezifo zengqondo. “UNkulunkulu usidale ngendlela yokuthi akukho okungasihlula ukukwenza. Ngathi uma ngibona umkhulu omdala eqeda iComrades ngonyaka odlule, ngazitshela ukuthi nami ngifuna ukuzophonsela inselelo yokuthi ngiyiqede. Sengiwagijimile ama-marathon (42.2km), ngase ngithi ake ngizwe iComrades,” kusho uSabelo. Uthe ukugijima kuyamsiza empilweni nasemqondweni ngoba uyakhohlwa yizinkinga uma esemgwaqweni. “Uthi uma ugijima amabanga amade ubuye usuwakhe isitezi ngomqondo, usuthenge nezimoto. Ubuya namaqhinga amasha okuzithuthukisa, yingakho ngikuyamanisa kakhulu nezifo zengqondo ngoba ukhwantalala nengcindezi kuyaphela,” kusho yena. Uthe nasekhaya isimo siba ngcono uma ujima ngoba ukhwantalala nengcindezi, kusuke kuphansi. “Kuthina esiganelwe, ekhaya kumnandi. Umama uhlala ehleka futhi upheka kahle. Uma uyindoda uhlala ujabule, ungakhathazeki nangokuhamba imitholampilo yamadoda ngoba uba wuqanduqandu. Lokho ngezinye zezinto ezinhle ezenziwa ukujima ngoba umndeni uyabumbana,” kusho uSabelo oshadelwe wuzakwabo acula naye eqenjini, uThandeka Zulu. Uthe ugqugquzelwa kakhulu umculi we-kwaito ophinde abe wumfundisi, uKabelo Mabalane, osegijime iComrades izikhawu eziningi. Uqhube wathi baningi abanye njengoDJ Sndara, naye oseke wayigijima iComrades Marathon phambili. “Ngiyabasifela abafowethu esinabo emkhakheni wezokungcebeleka ukuthi bakujwayele ukuzivocavoca futhi behlise nasezinkanjini zikaFaro. Ngiyazi ukuthi ngizozwakala njengomuntu ozenza ngcono kodwa asisebenzise uphuzo njengento yenjabulo ngaleso sikhathi, hhayi ukuthi silusebenzise ngokweqile ngoba luzohlukumeza imizimba yethu. Asijimeni. Buka ubaba uHhashi Elimhlophe ukuthi uma esesteji, udlula izintwana ezincane.” Uthe ngokujima yena usehlale enomfutho singabi khona nesidingo sokusebenzisa izikhuthazi nokusiza impilo yakhe. “Ngiyakhumbula eminyakeni edlule uL’vovo ngesikhathi ewa esteji, ngaba ngomunye wabokuqala engaya ukuyomsiza. Ngiyambona manje ukuthi uyajima, okuyinto engikhuthazayo nami nengifisa ngathi bakhona nabanye abangafunda kuyo.” Uphethe ngokuveza ukuthi uzoqala amaqoqo okugijima ngalapho ehlala khona, eReservoir Hills ngenhloso yokukhuthaza nabanye.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IMINI Cooper JCW ibukeka i-sporty futhi iyawadonsa amehlo Image: FANELESIBONGE BENGU IMOTO: MINI COOPER JCW UKWANDA kwamaSport Utility Vehicle (SUV) emakethe emhlabeni jikelele kugcina kwenze zingasheshi ukufika kuqala emqondweni izimoto ezifana neMINI Cooper. Nokho uma isiphambi kwakho kwakheka uthando ngayo emehlweni akho. IMINI Cooper yimoto enomlando omude nedumile njengoba ike yavela ngisho emafilimini. Ebengihamba ngayo yiMINI Cooper John Cooper Works (JWC). Igama uma selijobelelwe ngalolu hlobo kusho ukuthi ishuniwe futhi namandla athe xaxa. Nebala uma uyibuka ngaphandle inemihlobiso yombala obomvu kwibhonethi omesha kamnandi nokhakhayi lwayo namakhava ezibuko. Ngaphambili inamalambu angama-LED okungama-headlights nama-headlights. Kwi-grille iqoshiwe uJohn Cooper Works ukuze ungadideki nakancane. Lo mbala obomvu womhlobiso uyavela futhi nakuma-brake callipers alunguza emarimini angu-18 inch nokuyenza ibukeke kahle Ngemuva ine-spoiler esikhulu esigqamisa ukuba sporty kwayo, amalambu angama-LED i-diffuser ngezansi nenqawe eyodwa phakathi nendawo. Ngaphandle yinhle, nginconywe omunye udade ethi ngihamba ngemoto “e-cute”. Ngaphakathi nakhona bayenze yabukeka kahle ngoba akukho mabhathini ayinqwaba. Cishe konke ukwenza kwi-touchscreen infotainment system eyindilinga enkulu phakathi nendawo. Amazinga okushisa uwahlela khona futhi kusobala, iveza inkombandlela, ingaphandle uma upaka, uxhuma khona iselula nge-Apple CarPlay, isivinini ohamba ngaso, uphethroli onawo, nokunye. IMINI Cooper JCW ayinaluxhaxha lwamabhathini ngaphakathi okuningi ukwenza kwi-touchscreen infotainment system eyindilinga Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Izinkinobho ezikhona ngezokunyusa umsindo, eyokushintsha ama-drive modes okanye ama-experience njengoba bekubiza kanjalo kwaMINI, eyokuyidumisa neyegiya. Amanye amabhathini asesiteringini esiqumbe kamnandi uma usibambile. Phezu kwaso akukho instrument cluster kunalokho kune-heads up display okwazi ukuyivala uma uthanda. Iveza imininingwane ebalulekile njengejubane. Ngikuthandile ukuthi ngisho inkombandlela uyivula kwiselula nge-Apple CarPlay iyakutshengisa ukuthi kumele ujike kuphi. Umgibeli nomshayeli bahlala ngokukhululeka ezihlalweni zesikhumba okwazi ukuzifudumeza. Bengingakulindele ukuthi esomshayeli siyakuwotawota. Inendawo yokubeka iziphuzo, ukushaja iselula ngaphandle kwentambo, indawo yokuphumuza ingalo bese kuthi okhakhayini ibe ne-sunroof. Ngemuva nokho isihlalo sincane. Ngemuva kwesihlalo sami ngishayela akekho obengakwazi ukungena ahlale. Nesebhuthi sincane iyakhombisa ukuthi ngeyomuntu ongenamndeni. Kulezi zinsukwana engizichithe nayo ngiyizwe ihamba kahle emgwaqeni. Noma ikhasa phansi ibingazweli kakhulu emigwaqeni ngaphandle uma umgwaqo umubi ngempela. Ukushintsha i-drive mode uyifake kuJohn Cooper Works bekuyilapho wonke amandla ayo ebivele iwakhiphe kalula khona. Amandla lawa angu-170kW ne-torque engu-380Nm enjinini engu-2.0 litre turbo kaphethroli. U-gearbox uyi-7 speed dct. Kule drive mode kuqina isiteringi ne-suspension umgwaqo uwuzwe ubunjalo bawo. Noma unyathela isivinini sinyuka manje kwazise phela ukusuka ku-0 iye ku-100km/h kuyithatha imizuzwana engu-6.1 kanti ijubane ligcina ku-250km/h. Bengithi uma ngishintsha igiya nginyukela kwelesibili ngizwe kukhala ithayi langaphambili izama ukunamathela bese iyanamathela etiyeleni. Nasemakhoneni ibijika kalula ngejubane. Nomculo obukhala ezipikheni zeHarman Kardon ngike ngathi ukuwukhohlwa sengizwa ukuduma kwayo okumnandi. Nokho kugcina ngaphakathi kuphela ngoba ngathi kwengezwe ngazo izipikha ngoba ngaphandle akukho nhlobo. Kuphethroli ibingakhalisi indlela ebidla ngayo ngoba ihambe iphuza 7.6l/100km. Ngokwamandla ayo ungayibheka njengembangi ye-VW Golf 8.5 GTI yize intengo iyibeka kwiGolf 1.4. MINI Cooper 3-door hatch JCW – R745 574 Iphuma ne-maintenance plan yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-100 000km.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: U-GASH1 noThato Immaculate omemezele ukuthi buphelile ubudlelwano babo ISIPHENDUKE indaba egudwini ezinkundleni zokuxhumana eyokuphela komshado kaThato Immaculate Mthombeni noGashwan “Gash 1” Mthombeni, ababopha ifindo likasofasilahlane emuva kokutholana endlini ohlelweni lwethevishini i-Big Brother Mzansi eminyakeni edlule. Laba bobabili babekwi-Big Brother Mzansi, eba nesiteshi sayo futhi ephinde ikhonjiswe nakuMzansi Magic ngo-2022. Kuleyo sizini kwakukhona oB.U Mthembu, Themba Mabaso, Tulz nabanye. Kwagcine kunqobe uMpho Wabadimo, uGash1 walala isibili. Akuyena kuphela uThato noGash1 ababa sebudlelwaneni emuva kwesizini yesithathu ye-Big Brother Mzansi njengoba noThemba noMpho baphenduka izithandani. Izindaba zokuphela kobudlelwano kwalezi zithandani ezinengane yomfana zidalulwe wuThato ngesitatimende. UThato, osanda kuhlukana neMetro FM njengomsakazi ngesikhathi lesi siteshi senza izinguquko ekuqaleni kwenyanga, uthe emuva kweminyaka emithathu eshadile, yena noGash1 sebehlukene. “Ngithathe isinqumo sokuhamba emuva kwezigameko ezenzeke ezinsukwini ezimbalwa ezedlule, ezingeke zisalungiseka ngokwemigomo nengikholelwa kukho,” kusho uThato. Uthe imindenni yabo ihlangene ukukhuluma ngalolu daba futhi uyibikelile phambi kukaGash1 ukuthi umile esinqumeni sakhe. “Ngeke ngande kakhulu ukuvikela imindeni yethu nendodana yami. Ngenkulu inhlonipho, nginxusa ukuthi lokhu kungaphenduki impi kaThato noGash1. Sihlanganile, sathandana, sazama ukwakha umndeni ngokwamandla ethu. Ngiphatheke kabi kodwa kumele ngiqinisele, ngiqhubeke ngisebenze,” kusho uThato. Uthe akaze afise ukuthi akhulise ingane yakhe yedwa kodwa ubelokhu emile ekutheni kunezinto angeke azimele noma ngabe zincane kangakannani komunye umuntu. “Lesi yisitatimende sami sokugcina ngalolu daba. Ngeke ngisaphawula ngoba uzoqhubeka nokuba wubaba wengane yami. Ngiyabonga kubalandeli bami ngothando nokuqonda. Ukuya phambili, sekuzoba yimi nengane yami futhi ngigxile ekwakheni ikusasa lethu elinempilo nenjabulo.” Ngesikhathi uGash1 engakathi vu ngalolu daba, abantu baqalile ukuqagela, bemsola ngobusoka. UThato ubuye wabhala ku-X ecacisa ukuthi lokhu akulona iqiniso.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UNGQONGQOSHE wezokuXhumana, uMnuz Solly Malatsi Image: X / IOLGraphics UHULUMENI ushicilele imigomo yokulawula ukusebenza kwe-Artificial Intelligence (AI), wase umema umphakathi ukuthi uphawule ngayo kuze kube wu-4 ntambama ngoJuni 10. Le migomo ishicilelwe wuMnyango wezokuXhumana nobuChwepheshe kusomqulu kahulumeni ngoLwesihlanu. Uhulumeni ukuhlukanise ngokwezigaba ezintathu ukwethulwa kwemigomo. Ngonyaka-zimali wokuqala osongwe ngenyanga edlule, ubeke eqhulwini ukuthi kuphothule imiyalelo futhi ubheke imigomo ephuthumayo ye-AI. Ngo-2026/27, ufuna ukuqala ushicilele imiyalelo futhi ulawule imikhakha esengcupheni kwi-AI. Ngonyaka zimali ka-27/28, ufuna imigomo isebenze ngokugcwele futhi uyithuthukise ihambisane nokushintsha kwayo i-AI. Uhulumeni uthe ufuna ukuthi imigomo iholele ekutheni kunyuke ukusetshenziswa kwe-AI ezikhungweni zomphakathi, ezizimele nasemphakathini. Ufuna i-AI idale amathuba omsebenzi. Ufuna kusetshenziswe i-AI ukugcina ulimi, ubuciko, nomculo kwakudala. Abantu okubhekwe ukuthi bahlomule ngemigomo ngabantu abasha, izingane, abesifazane abaphila nokukhubazeka, osomabhiiznisi, abatshalimali nezikhungo zikahulumeni. Kunabasebenzisa i-AI ukwenza imifanekiso engekho, umuntu ebonakala enza noma esho into angakaze ayisho. Uhulumeni ufuna kusungulwe nesikhwama esifana nesokunxephezela abalimale emgwaqweni i-Road Accident Fund. Lesi ngesokunxephezela abantu noma izikhungo i-AI, ethathe izinqumo ngabo kodwa ezingashayi emhloleni kungaziwa kuzogxekwa bani. Isibonelo, kungaba yi-AI enqaba isicelo sokuboleka imali kungafanele, imifanekiso okungeyona ngomuntu okungaziwa yenziwe ngubani, ukulinyazwa wumsihini osebenza nge-AI nokunye. I-AI ifuna kuvikelwe nezingane ezikhangisweni ze-AI, ezingenza ukuthi zichithe isikhathi esithe xaxa zidlala amakhompyutha noma amaselula.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-LADYSMITH Black Mambazo ivalelisa ngomculo elungwini layo ebese lithathe umhlalaphansi, u-Albert Mazibuko Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu IBISIYIBONA indlela yayo ingwazi yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, uMdletshe Albert Mazibuko, edlule emhlabeni ngeSonto eledule, emuva kokugula njengoba igcizelele kumfowabo isesibhedlela ukuthi ifuna ukufihlwa kuphi ngaphambi kokuthi kuyenele ngakusasa. UMazibuko (77) ushonele esibhedlela esiseThekwini, emuva kokugula isikhashana. Umfowabo u-Abednigo Mazibuko, oke wacula kwiMambazo ngaphambi kokuthatha umhlalaphansi, uthe uMazibuko wazisholo yena ukuthi ufuna ukufihlwa kubo eNtabamhlophe, Estcourt. “Ubengaqali, wakusho futhi kudala ukuthi uma ehamba ufuna ukuya ekhaya. Nakulokhu esegula ngiyombona esibhedlela kuwuMgqibelo, kanti uzohamba ngeSonto, washo wathi ningibeke eceleni kukamfowethu. Niyabona ngapha eduze kwesango. Ngadumala ngoba mina nginethemba lokuthi lo muntu uzophila, wase ekhuluma amagama anzima asinda kangaka. Wathi ningibeke ekhaya impela, ngifuna ukuya ekhaya eduze kukamfowethu. Usethuse kanti usekhuluma okokugcina,” kusho u-Abednigo. U-Abednigo ubekhuluma esithangamini nabezindaba eClermont, izolo, emzini womsunguli weMambazo ongasekho, uJoseph Shabalala. Uthe umfowabo ugule isikhathi esincane kodwa kwamqinisa waze wahlinzwa. Umchaze njengomuntu obenenhlonipho, ehlonipha wonke umuntu kungakhathalele ukuthi mncane noma mdala. Uthe balahlekelwe yisibani ebesegcine nomlando womndeni. Uphethe ngokubonga ukwesekwa wathi bathola izingcingo nemiyalezo evela ngisho phesheya kwezilwandle. URussel Mthembu oyilungu leMambazo eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uthe uMazibuko wayehlale ebagqugquzela ukuthi basebenze kanzima. “Wayethi sisalima, mhla saphumelela umhlabathi uzophenduka igolide, kwenzeka njengoba esho.” ILadysmith Black Mambazo ibuye ngeSonto, eNingizimu Afrika, emuva kokuphothula umjikelezo wase-United States of America (USA). Omunye wabaholi bayo uSibongiseni Shabalala, uthe ngesikhathi bethola izindaba zokudlula kukaMazibuko, babeyohlola imishini yokucula ngaphambi kwekhonsathi yabo kwaba nzima nokuqhubeka. “Kwase kusele imicimbi emine kuya kwemihlanu ukuthi siqede, sibuye. Saqhubeka sayenza sesiyibhekise kuye uMazibuko ngoba sazi ukuthi ukuba ubekhona, ubezosigqugquzela ukuthi asiqhubeke siyibambe kuyona le ndlela abeyihamba.” Uthe uMazibuko, owajoyina iMambazo ngo-1969 nobesethathe umhlalaphansi, ubesadlala indima eqenjini uma lizilolonga aphinde alikhumbuze lapho eliduka khona. “Sifunde okukhulu thina kubaba uMazibuko kusuka sijoyina ngo-1993. Ukuzimisela, ukugcina isikhathi nokuthanda umsebenzi safunda futhi sesiphakathi eMambazweni, nokubambisana nokulalelana ukuthi yikhona okwenza iphupho liphumelele,” kusho uSibongiseni. USibongiseni uveze ukuthi bacele ukulindwa babuye phesheya ukuze bezovalelisa ngaphambi komngcwabo. UMazibuko uzokhonjulwa enkonzweni ezoba seCFCI eBerea, eThekwini ngo-10 ekuseni kusasa. Inkonzo yomngcwabo izoba sesikoleni iMtshezi High, Estcourt ngoMgqibelo ekuseni.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ICHANGAN Uni-S yiSUV yemindeni engase ehehe abaningi ngendlela ebukeka ngayo INKAMPANI yaseChina, iChangan Motors, izethule ngokusemthethweni eNingizimu Afrika ekupheleni kuka-2025 ngezimoto ezine esizilamanise ngentsha i-Uni-S abanethemba elikhulu ngayo. Izimoto zakwaChangan zilethwa kuleli yiJameel Motors South Africa. Isikhulu seJameel, uMarinus Venter, sithe njengoba sebefikile emakethe yakuleli sekuyisikhathi sokudlondlobala. Uthe isibalo samagaraji adayisa izimoto zabo angu-20 kuzophela unyaka sesidlule kancane kuka-40. Ukukhula kwabo bazimisele ukuthi kuholwe phambili yi Uni-S abayibona njengemoto ebalulekile ezobadobela amakhasimende amasha. I-Uni-S yiSUV abathi izoba yimbangi enkulu yeHaval Jolion. Babala ne-VW Tiguan, Chery Tiggo 7 Pro nezinye. Abathanda imoto ebukekayo baningi abazothatheka ngoba yinhle ngaphandle. Le SUV ifika ihlukene ngezinhlobo ezintathu okuyiCS, CL neCE. Kuya ngenhlobo yakho kodwa amarimu aphakathi kuka-18 inch no-19 inch. Konke kwenziwa kwi-touchscreen infotainment system kwiChangan Uni-S njengoba ingenawo amabhathini Ngaphambili alambu angamaLED futhi kuneligudla kwi-grille ephicwe kahle liwahlanganise. Yinto efanayo nangemuva lapho kunelambu elikhanya lize liyoshaya kolunye uhlangothi kuze kukhanye nophawu lwayo. Ngaphakathi ifana nezimoto ezivela ezweni layo ngokungabi namabhathini kodwa izinto zenziwe kwi-touchscreen ye-infotainment system enkulu engu-12.80 inch. Yinto eyenza ibukeke kahle kodwa idinga isikhathi ukuthi uzijwayeze ukuhlela izibuko, amazinga okushisa nokunye. Kule-screen uphinde uxhume iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto ubone nengaphandle njengoba inamakhamera aveza umzimba wonke. Kunezindawo ezanele zokushaja okukhona kuyo neyokushaja ngaphandle kwentambo, ine-automatic climate control, 10.25 inch instrument cluster nesiteringi esinamabhathini. Ngibone ivuleke kahle futhi okhakhayini kune-panoramic sunroof. Izihlalo zangaphambili zihlelwa ngogesi futhi iyakwazi nokuziqandisa. Zonke izinhlobo ze-Uni-S zihamba ngenjini efanayo engu-1.5 litre turbo kaphethroli esebenza ne-7 speed Dual-Clutch Transmission. Amandla angu-138kW ne-torque engu-300Nm. Ngesikhathi yethulwa eKempton Park sihamba siyojika ePitoli kuleli sonto isikhathi esiningi ngisichithe ngihleli ngemuva. Amadolo abenesikhala esanele kwazise izihlalo ziphansi. Ukuba kwazo phansi kwenza usondelane nomgwaqo ugcine uzwa ubunjalo bawo emigwaqeni emibi kodwa okungeyona into ebuhlungu kangako. Umsindo wenqawe uma uhleli ngemuva ubuzwakala kakhulu hhayi ngendlela emnandi. Amandla enjini abezwakala enele nezinye izimoto zidluleka kalula. Abayincishanga izinsiza zomshayeli njengoba ifika nenqwaba yezinto. Phakathi kwakho kubalwa i-adaptive cruise control, iyakusiza ukuhlala emzileni, iyakuxwayisa futhi izibhrekele uma uzoshayisa, iyasho uma kunemoto eseceleni nokunye. Baphinde bayifaka nama-airbag amabili ngaphambili nangamakhethini kwezinye izinhlobo. Zifika ne-service plan yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-90 000km ne-warranty yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-150 000km.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UWinnie Ntshaba ongumsunguli wamaRoyalty Soapie Awards Image: Instagram/Winnie Ntshaba AYAQHUBEKA amalungiselelo amaRoyalty Soapie Awards okulindeleke ukuthi abuye nonyaka emuva kokungasingathwa nyakenye ngenxa yezizathu ezahlukene. Le miklomelo yasungulwa nguWinnie Ntshaba ongumlingisi ozakhele udumo kwiGenerations: The Legacy neminye imidlalo. Emuva kwamaSouth African Film and Television Awards abengempelasonto eGoli abalingisi nabasemkhakheni wethelevishini basuke sebebheke wona. Okhulumela abagqugquzeli, uSimphiwe Majola, utshele Isolezwe phambilini ukuthi u-2025 bekungowokucabangisisa nokuhlela izinto kabusha. “Esikhundleni sokujaha ukwenza into engeke ibe sezingeni lethu, sithathe isinqumo sokuhlaba ikhefu silungise bese siqinisa isisekelo. Okubalulekile kithina ukwenza imiklomelo ekhombisa izinga eliphezulu, ethembekile futhi enomthelela omuhle, hhayi ukugcina icala,” kusho uSimphiwe. USimphiwe uphinde washayelwa ebuzwa ngamalungiselelo kulandela ukungamenyezelwa kwabaqokiwe nokuvula ukuvota ngenyanga edlule njengoba kwakushiwo. Ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kwathiwa abantu abalindele uMashi 14 kodwa kwagcina kungenzekanga lutho. Uthe amalungiselelo aqhubeka kahle. "Imiklomelo ihlelelwe uSepthemba futhi konke kusahlelwa ngasese. Imingenelo ihambe kahle futhi ithimba lisebenza ngesigaba esilandelayo," kusho uSimphiwe. Uthe ngokuhamba kwesikhathi bazomemezela usuku lokumenyezelwa kwabaqokiwe, abaxhasi neminye imininingwane. AmaRoyalty Soapie Awards anonyaka, uma egcina enzekile, kuzobe kungawesishiyagalombili. Isiyonke iminxa iwu-28 futhi kulokhu kuzokwethulwa nomusha we-Outstanding Pan-African Show. Kuzoklonyeliswa imidlalo yasemazweni ase-Afrika angaphandle kweNingizimu Afrika.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Imboni yezimoto ingaphansi kwengcindezi njengoba ezinye izinkampani zidiliza UNOBHALA Jikelele weMotor Industry Bargaining Council (MIBCO), uPaulos Masemola, uthi uma izinkampani, izinyunyana zabasebenzi nabanye abasembonini yezezimoto bebambisana ungancipha umonakalo ozodaleka ngokudilizwa kwabasebenzi. ENingizimu Afrika isimo sishubile njengoba izinkampani zidiliza. Muva nje iFord Motor Company of Southern Africa imemezele ukuthi izodiliza abasebenzi, inkampani ekhiqiza amathayi iGoodyear ivalwe thaqa eGqeberha, iMotus isanda kudiliza abalinganiselwa ku-86 nezinye izinkampani. UMasemola uthe iqiniso wukuthi imboni ingaphansi kwenkulu ingcindezi. “Uma izinkampani ziqhubeka nokuba ngaphansi kwengcindezi yezomnotho, ukudiliza abantu kuba yiyona ndlela yokugcina eziyithathayo ukuze zizokwazi ukuqhubeka nokusebenza. Lokhu kodwa akusho ukuthi kumele zingakwenzi ngendlela enobulungiswa nevikela amalungelo abasebenzi,” kusho uMasemola. Uthe njenge-MIBCO badlala indima ebalulekile uyokuthi konke kwenzeke ngendlela. Uqhube wathi uma ukudiliza kuqhubeka, abantu abanamakhono bazoshoda ngoba abanye bazohamba bengaphinde bebuye embonini yezokuthutha. Uveze ukuthi kunezindlela zokunciphisa umonakalo abale kuzo ukunciphisa izikhathi zokusebenza, ukwehlisa isikhashana amaholo nokusiza abasebenzi abathintekayo ngemali. “Isifundo wukuthi ukuxoxa kusenesikhathi kuyasebenza. Uma abasebenzi, izinkampani nabasembonini bebambisana, kungenzeka ukuthi kunciphe umonakalo, kugcineke amakhono futhi imboni isimame.”

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: U-ALBERT Mazibuko odlule emhlabeni ngeSonto emuva kokugula UMFELANDAWONYE wezinyunyana zamaciko KwaZulu-Natal, iCultural and Creative Industries Federation of South Africa (Ccifsa), usuphakamise ukuthi ihlonishwe ngomngcwabo osezingeni lesifundazwe, ingwazi yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, u-Albert Mazibuko, edlule emhlabeni ngeSonto emuva kokugula. UMazibuko (77), ushonele esibhedlela esiseThekwini emuva kokuxinwa wukugula. Ushona nje, bese kunguyena yedwa obeneminyaka eqenjini njengoba ajoyina ngo-1969. USihlalo weCcifsa eKZN, uThokozani "T'zozo" Zulu, uthe ukudlula emhlabeni kukaMazibuko kubalimazile njengoba bebefunda lukhulu kuye njengamaciko. "Ukuba khona kweMambazo kuthathe iKZN neNingizimu Afrika kwayigqamisa emhlabeni jikelele. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi obaba uMazibuko bayizingqalabutho ezawina amaGrammy hhayi kanye, hhayi kabili, hhayi kathathu kodwa kahlanu. Silahlekelwe kakhulu njengamaciko. Abafowethu beMambazo abalahlekelwe bodwa kodwa silahlekelwe sonke ngoba besibukela kakhulu kubaba nozakwabo," kusho uT'zozo. Uthe ngenxa yamagalelo akhe bebebona kufanele ukuthi ahlonishwe ngomngcwabo kahulumeni. "Siyafisa ukuthi uNdunankulu waseKZN, akuhloniphe ukufihlwa kwakhe kube nesithunzi abekwe ngokusezingeni lesifundazwe," kubeka uT'zozo. Okhulumela uNdunankulu,uThami Ntuli, uMnuz Bongani Gina, uthe umndeni kumele ubhalele ihhovisi likandunankulu incwadi, ubeke ukuthi ungajabula uma ehlonishwa ngomngcwabo kahulumeni ngenxa yamava akhe. "UNdunankulu uzobe esethatha incwadi abhalele umengameli wezwe asho ukuthi njengeKZN silahlekelwe yingqalabutho ekanje futhi nathi njengesifundazwe sibona kufanele ukuthi ihlonishwe ngomngcwabo kahulumeni," kusho uGina. Okhulumela iMambazo, uXolani Majozi, uthe bazolinda uMphathiswa wezobuCiko namaSiko KwaZulu-Natal uMnuz Mntomuhle Khawula, ukuthi ahlanganise amehlo nomndeni kusasa bese bethola umhlahlandlela. "Okwamanje ayikho inkulumo enjalo esike yavela ngoba besilinde kufike umphathiswa, mhlawumbe kube wuye ophakamisayo ngokubona kwakhe," kusho uMajozi. UMajozi ubuye waqinisekisa ukuthi usuku lomngcwabo kuzoba wu-Ephreli 18, lapho edabuka khona e-Estcourt. Uthe indawo isazoqinisekiswa. Uphinde wachaza nangegama lokuqala likaMazibuko, okunguMdletshe. "Empeleni igama lakhe wuMudliwetshe kodwa kwathi uma eya eMnyangweni wezaseKhaya kwathiwa ayikho into enjalo, unguMdletshe." Uphethe ngokubonga imiyalezo yenduduzo elokhu ingena ilakanyana. "Iyasiduduza kakhulu imiyalezo. Kade ngibuka nje imiyalezo engenayo futhi baningi abantu abakhombisa ukuzwelana kakhulu nomndeni. Ngisho abezindaba basemazweni omhlaba bayabika," kusho uMajozi.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: USOMABHIZINISI uManzini Zungu no-Albert Mazibuko ongasekho KUTHINTEKE abantu abaningi ngokudlula emhlabeni komunye wabasunguli beLadysmith Black Mambazo, u-Albert Mazibuko, oshonele esibhedlela eThekwini ngeSonto ngemuva kokugula. Umqondisi weqembu iSoweto Central Chorus eliqophe neMambazo ingoma ethi Usuku Oluzayo, uManzini Zungu, uthe baphatheke kabi ngokushona kukaMazibuko. “Sigcine ukumbona emcimbini iChristmas with Mambazo eThekwini abewuthamele njengesibukeli eqhubeka ngokugqugquzela ngobukhona bakhe. Impilo nomsebenzi wakhe kushiya umlando wangunamaphakade emculweni eNingizimu Afrika futhi bonke ababe nenhlanhla yokumazi bazomkhumbula,” kusho uZungu. Uthe ubeyincwasimende egqugquzele wonke umuntu. “Ukusebenzisana kuSuku Oluzayo nokunandisa ndawonye eziteji ezihlukene, kusishiye nenkumbulo esingasoze sayikhohlwa." Umnikazi wenkampani yokuqopha ophinde abe yisifundiswa, uSipho Sithole, uthe akulahlekelwe iNingizimu Afrika kuphela kodwa umhlaba wonke. “Kule minyaka edlule u-Albert Mazibuko ubengisiza futhi ewumthombo wolwazi obalulekile ngesikhathi ngibhala incwadi ngempilo kaJoseph Shabalala ongasekho. Mina naye sivakashele iTheku namalokishi alakhele kanjalo namapulazi aseMnambithi lapho uJoseph Shabalala no-Albert Mazibuko bekhule bengabasebenzi neziqashi khona,” kusho uSithole. Uthe akasoze amkhohlwa. UNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uThami Ntuli, uthe alisoze lalibaleka iqhaza likaMazibuko ekugcineni nasekuqhakambiseni umculo wesintu emazweni omhlaba. “Sinxusa bonke abantu baKwaZulu-Natal nasezweni jikelele ukuthi babeke umndeni wakwaMazibuko emithandazweni ngalesi sikhathi esinzima nokuhlonipha iqhaza lakhe ngokugubha umculo nesiko akugcinile,” kusho uNtuli. IMeya yeTheku, uMnuz Cyril Xaba, igqugquzele amaciko asakhula ukuthi afunde kuMazibuko ngokuzihlonipha nokuthobeka. “U-Albert Mazibuko ubengaphezu kokuba wumculi, ubewafundisa amaciko eza ngemuva futhi ewumuntu abukela kuye. Ukushona kwakhe akukhona ukulahlekelwa komndeni wakhe neLadysmith Black Mambazo, kodwa okwezwe lonke,” kusho uXaba. Abantu badlulise amazwi enduduzo enkundleni yokuxhumana i-Instagram. UJeremy Loops uthe bazomkhumbula kakhulu. USekgwama Makhosazane uthe: “Awu kodwa alale ngokuthula ubaba impela umsebenzi wakhe mukhulu siyabonga.” “Siyabonga ngomculo baba uMazibuko, lala ngoxolo,” kusho uPearlzzz

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: OMUNYE wabasunguli beLadysmith Black Mambazo u-Albert Mazibuko ongasekho emhlabeni Image: Instagram/Ladysmith Black Mambazo UBEKHONZE ukucobelela abeza emuva kwakhe ngolwazi uMdletshe Albert Mazibuko obese esele yedwa njengomunye wabayibamba kuqala iLadysmith Black Mambazo okugcine kumenele esibhedlela ngeSonto ebusuku. UMazibuko (77) odabuka eMnambithi, ushonele esibhedlela esiseThekwini abese enamasonto engeniswe kuso ngokusho kwemenenja yeMambazo, uXolani Majozi. Uyibambe iminyaka neqembu njengoba aqala ngo-1969 ngaphambi kokuthatha umhlalaphansi ekunandiseni ngonyaka odlule. Ushona nje, bese esele yedwa njengowaba khona iMambazo iqsungulwa kwazise umsunguli wayo uJoseph Shabalala washona ngo-2020. “Ulwazi abenalo belubalulekile kakhulu. Njengomuntu obesesele kwababekhona kusungulwa iqembu, ubewumthombo wolwazi nokugcinwa komlando obaluleke kakhulu,” kusho uMajozi. Uqhube wathi ngisho behambela izindawo befundisa ngaphansi kohlelo lwabo iLadysmith Black Mambazo Mobile Academy, uMazibuko ubebamba iqhaza elikhulu ekufundiseni hhayi kuphela ngesicathamiya kodwa ngomculo wakudala jikelele nangesiko. “Ngisho nizixoxela nganoma yini, ubekushiya kukhona akufundise khona. Ubungadingi ukuthi uze umcele.” Uthe eqenjini bese ethathe umhlalaphansi ngokucula kuphela. Ngesikhathi eshiya, kwethulwe amalungu amasha uGagamela Shabalala noBabuyile Shabalala. “Ubengasekho esteji kodwa konke okunye esikwenzayo, ubeba yingxenye yakho njengokubonakala uma sizilolonga noma sinezinye izinhlelo." UMajozi uthe izindaba zokushona kwakhe ziyihlukumeze kakhulu iLadysmith Black Mambazo, okumanje inomjikelezo e-United States of America. “Baphatheke kabi kakhulu ngoba bebejabule ngokuthi umjikezo uyaphela ngale kwezihibe. Noma bebazi ukuthi akaphathekile kahle kodwa bebenethemba lokuthi bazokwazi ukubuya bamvakashele.” Uthe amalungiselelo okumbeka abengakaphothulwa. “Bekunombono wokuthi kulindwe iMambazo ibuye ngempelasonto, bese kuyaqhutshekwa kodwa sizonazisa uma konke sekuphothuliwe.”

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ULungelo KM osejoyine uhlelo iDaily Thetha kwiSABC 1 Image: Instagram/Lungelo KM UZONCELISA amawele uLungelo KM Mdletshe, odume nge-podcast yakhe yakwi-YouTube njengoba esejoyine uhlelo, iDaily Thetha kwiSABC 1. ULungelo KM uzakhele udumo nge-podcast yakhe i-Engineer Your Life lapho kufika khona abantu abahlukene bexoxa ngempilo yabo. Ngesikhathi kuqala isizini yesikhombisa yeDaily Thetha edlala ngo-11 ekuseni, umenyezelwe njengomunye wabethuli bayo. Ujoyine umsakazi woKhozi FM uNeliswa Cele, Ursula Mariani noGcina Mdikane. ULungelo KM uthe uletha izisombululo ohlelweni okuyinto ayenza emsebenzini wakhe wansuku zonke njengoba engunjiniyela kagesi. Ukuncelisa kwakhe amawele kuqinisekiswe ekhasini le-podcast yakhe kwi-X. UNeliswa uthe ukuba wumsakazi kumlungiselele ukuthi angene kwithelevishini. Uthe kuhluke ngokuthi abantu akhuluma nabo uyababona bukhoma nendlela abazizwa ngayo kwazise kusuke kunezethameli e-studio. “Yonke into yenzeka bukhoma, kumele ucabange ngokushesha. Kuyajabulisa, kumnandi futhi ngiyakuthanda." Kulolu hlelo oluqoshwa bukhoma, kukhulunywa ngezihloko ezihlukene ezithinta abantu. Ababukeli balo abase-studio, emgwaqweni nasemakhaya bayakwazi ukuphawula. Kuphinde kulandwe nongoti abazonaba kabanzi ngezihloko okusuke kukhulunywa ngazo. Phambilini lolu hlelo lwake lwethulwa wuKini Shandu, Tumelo Mothotoane, Pearl Shongwe ongasekho, owayenguMiss SA uLalela Mswane nabanye.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: SEKUBIZA imali ethe maxa ukwetha izimoto eNingizimu Afrika kusuka kuqale inyanga ABASHAYELI bavuke ngoLwesithathu isinyukile intengo kaphethroli nekadizili eNingizimu Afrika ngenxa yokunyuka kwekawoyela okudalwe yimpi eqhubeka e-Iran. Ekaphethroli u-93 unleaded no-95 unleaded inyuke ngoR3.06 ilitha. Ekadizili u-500ppm inyuke ngo-R7.37 kwathi eka-50ppm yona yanyuka ngo-R7.51 ilitha. Uhulumeni umemezele ukuthi uphungulele abashayeli umthwalo ngokukwehlisa intela ye-general fuel levy ngoR3 isikhashana kuze kube yinyanga ezayo lapho uzophinde ubuyekeze khona leso sinqumo. Yize kunjalo kodwa intengo yelitha likadizili ibiza imali engaphansi kancane kukaR30. Isikhulu seMasterDrive, u-Eugene Herbert, phambilini sake sakhipha amathiphu angasiza abashayeli ukuthi bonge. Nazi izinto okumele bazenze: Amathayi: Hlala njalo uhlola ukuthi umoya osemathayini uyahambisana yini noshiwo yinkampani eyakha imoto. Lokhu kungenza ukuthi wonge uphethroli ngo-3 kuya ku-5%. Ukunyathela amafutha mawala: Uma unyathela amafutha kahle ushiye isikhala esanele phakathi kwakho nemoto oyilandelayo kusiza ukuthi ungabhreki kungenasidingo uphinde unyathele nokungakusiza ukuthi wonge uphethroli ngo-15%. RPMs: Ezimotweni ezishintshwayo, ukushintsha amagiya engakafiki ku-3 000rpm kusiza ukuthi wonge kuphethroli. Ijubane: Uma wehlisa isivinini ngo-20km/h kungasiza ukuthi wonge uphethroli ngo-20% Ukushayela budlabha: Lokhu kunciphisa ukonga ngo-15 kuya ku-30% kuthelawayeka no-10 kuya ku-40% esiminyaminyeni lapho uma uphinde usuke khona. Yehlisa umoya uma ushayela. Ukulayisha umthwalo ongenasidingo: Khipha izinto ezingenasidingo emotweni. Ukudumisa imoto ibe imile: Ukudumisa imoto ume imizuzwana engaphezu kwengu-30 kumosha uphethroli. Ama-sensor alawula indlela izimoto zakamuva ezidla ngayo uphethroli, kwenza singabi khona isidingo sokulokhu uyifudumeza.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Omunye wabasunguli beLadysmith Black Mambazo u-Albert Mazibuko ongasekho emhlabeni ALISEKHO emhlabeni ilungu leLadysmith Black Mambazo ebese lithathe umhlalaphansi, uMnuz Mdletshe Albert Mazibuko, elithathwe ukugula ngeSonto ebusuku. UMazibuko (77), ongomunye wabasunguli beMambazo, ushonele esibhedlela abengeniswe kuso ngenxa yokugula. Yize imininingwane ephelele ingakacaci kodwa imenenja yeqembu uXolani Majozi ikuqinisekisile kwiSolezwe ushona kwakhe. “Yinto eyenzeke ngeSonto ebusuku ngakho ngicela unginikeze isikhashana ngixhumane kahle nomndeni ngithole imininingwane ephelele. Kuphela ngingakuqinisekisa ukuthi akasekho,” kusho uMajozi. UMazibuko uthathe umhlalaphansi ngonyaka odlule lapho iqembu lethule khona amalungu amasha okunguGagamela Shabalala noBabuyile Shabalala. Njengamanje iMambazo inomjikelezo phesheya kodwa kulindeleke ukuthi ibuye ngoLwesihlanu.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Umama Joy ukhala ngoxhaso lokuyobukela indebe yomhlaba phesheya UMama Joy uthandazela ukuxoshwa kukaMcKenzie onqaba ukumkhokhela ukubuka iNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa UNgqongqoshe wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko kuzwelonke, uGayton McKenzie, uthi uMama Joy akacele umyeni wakhe amkhokhele izindleko zokuyobuka imidlalo yeNdebe yoMhlaba ezoqala ngoJuni 11 eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America. UMcKenzie ukusho lokhu ephendula uMama Joy ku-X ethi njengabalandeli kumele bamukele ukuthi ngeke bayibuke iNdebe yoMhlaba ngoba ungqongqoshe nomnyango ngeke ubasize. “Asithandazele ukuthi umongameli asinikeze uNgqongqoshe omusha wezemiDlalo ozothanda abalandeli,” kubhala uMama Joy owaziwa ngokuzifela ngebhola. UMcKenzie uphendule ngokuthi uMama Joy unomyeni. “Akube wuye okhokhela isithandwa sakhe, i-Euro linamandla. Amadoda angamaFrench aziwa ngokutotosa izithandwa zawo, myekele akhokhe Sista Joy,” kusho uMcKenzie. UMama Joy unomyeni waseFrance amteketisa nnngelikaPapa Joy. Ekuqaleni uMama Joy ubebhalele umongameli weFifa uGianni Infantino ethi engathanda ukuyobuka iBafana Bafana ucela noma wubani ozomsiza ngoba uMcKenzie akafuni ukubakhokhela.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ICitroën Basalt entsha ezoshumbisa umbango wabathengi esigabeni samaSUV amancane angama-coupé Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu IMOTO: CITROËN BASALT KWA-CITROËN South Africa bazimisele ngokuqhubeka nokudlondlobala kuleli ngokwethula i-SUV entsha eyi-coupé, iBasalt, abanethemba elikhulu ngokwenza kahle kwayo. Ngo-2016 le nkampani ihoshe imfe emakethe yakuleli ngenxa yokubhimba kwezinto ngaphambi kokushaya ibuya isingaphansi kweStellantis. IStellantis ngenye yezinkampani zezimoto ezinkulukazi emhlabeni eyengamele okubalwa kuzo yona iCitroën, Jeep, Peugeot, Opel nezinye. Kusuka ngo-2023 lapho kwethulwe khona iC3 entsha, iCitroën ilokhu ikhula kancane kancane kwazise ngaloyo nyaka yadayisa izimoto ezingu-877. Nyakenye leso sibalo sifike ku-4 926 futhi, ngokwethula iBasalt, bakholwa wukuthi sizonyuka. Eminyakeni edlule le nkampani yaduma kabi ngokugqoza kwamaphathi kodwa bathi konke lokho sekuwumlando. IBasalt ingena phakathi kweC3 ne-Aircross elayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa. Ihlukene ngezinnhlobo ezimbili okuyiPlus neMax. Zombili zinamaLED headlights, amaLED daytime running lights namaLED fog lights. ICitroën Basalt ikhanyisa ngamalambu angamaLED futhi inamarimu angu-16 inch Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Zihamba ngamasondo anamarimu angu-16-inch futhi igabade zilishiye ngo-180mm. IBasalt yinde ingu-4 352mm nokuyenza ivuleke ngaphakathi bese iba nebhuthi engu-470 litres. Ngemuva ngesikhathi siyivivinya eGoli kuleli sonto ngibone kuhlaleka nokho kumele ugade ikhanda uma ungena ukuze lingashayi ngenxa yokhakhayi oluyisibaca. Ngemuva futhi kunezimbobo ezimbili zokushaja nezokukhipha umoya we-aircon. Ngaphambili kune-touchscreen infotainment system engu-10 inch lapho uxhuma khona iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto ngaphandle kwentambo. Kwi-Max kwengezwe ikhamera eveza ingemuva uma uhlehla, isiteringi esiyisikhumba kanjalo nezipikha ezimbili. Zombili zine-digital instrument cluster engu-7-inch eveza imininingwane ebalulekile. Isiyonke ngaphakathi ayikhalisi nhlobo yakheke kahle. Ngaphansi kwebhonethi bafake injini engu-1.2 llitre turbo kaphethroli. Inamandla angu-81kW ne-torque engu-205Nm. Le njini eyi-three cylinder futhi ejwayelekile kwezinye izimoto zale nkampani, ino-gearbox oyi-6 speed automatic. Sinqamula ezintabeni nasemajikeni emigwaqo ebheke eHartbeespoort, eNorth West, ibizwakala inamandla enele sihamba sibabili phakathi. Nokudlula ezinye izimoto bekungabi yinto enzima ngoba ibiphendula indlela ebenginyathela ngayo. Ngiyizwe intofontofo ngaphandle komoya wangaphandle obuthanda ukuba nomsinjwana ngaphakathi. KwaCitroën bathi iphephile ngoba bayifake ama-airbag ayisithupha, Electronic Stability Programme (ESP), ayihlehli uma usuka nendaweni enyukelayo, iyasho uma umoya wehla emasondweni, ABS nokunye. Ngaphakathi iCitroën Basalt ine-touchscreen infotainment system engu-10 inch exhume kuyo iselula nye-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto ngaphandle kwentambo KwaCitroën bathi uma ubusezinhlelweni zokuthenga iSuzuki Fronx okanye umzala wayo iToyota Starlet Cross, yima wo ngoba iBasalt yimbangi yazo. Ngendlela abayethemba ngayo ukuthi amakhasimende azoyamukela kahle, babheke ukuthi kuphele unyaka kudayiswe angaphezu kuka-1 300. Citroën Basallt PLUS 1.2 Turbo 6-Speed Automatic – R354 900 Citroën Basalt MAX 1.2 Turbo 6-Speed Automatic - R 369,900.00 Zombili zifika ne-service plan yamasevisi amane noma u-60 000km ne-warranty yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-100 000km.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IJaecoo J7 SHS engenye yama pług-in hybrid asanda kufika eNingizimu Afrika UKUNYUKA kwentengo kaphethroli kuphoqa abanini bezimoto bacabange ukushintshela ezimotweni ezingama-hybrid kunokuthenga ezihamba ngogesi wodwa, ngokocwaningo olwenziwe yiYazi. IYazi yinkundla yokwenza ucwaningo kusetshenziswa uWhatsApp. Kulezi zinsuku kulokhu kubikwa ukuthi intengo kaphethroli nodizili izonyuka uma kuqala u-Ephreli. Umthelela omkhulu wokunyuka kwentengo kawoyela ongahluziwe ngenxa yempi yeMelika ibambisene ne-Israel abagadla e-Iran. NgoLwesithathu i-IOL ibike ukuthi intengo kadizili kungenzeka inyuke ngemali elinganiselwa ku-R10 ilitha ngo-Ephreli 1. Lokhu kungenza intengo yelitha ibe ngaphezu kuka-R30 okokuqala ngqa emlandweni wakuleli. Intengo yelitha likaphethroli yona kuvela ukuthi izonyuka ngemali engaphansi kancane kuka-R6. Ucwaningo lweYazi lwangoMashi luveze ukuthi abantu abaningi bazimisele ngokushintshela ezimotweni ezingonhliziyombili (ama-hybrid) asebenzisa uphethroli nenjini kagesi. Ama-hybrid ahlukene njengoba kukhona anebhethri elizishaja ngesikhathi imoto ihamba kanti amanye abizwa ngama plug-in hybrid wona ashajwa eziteshini zokushaja, ezingakabi ningi kangako kuleli. Ucwaningo luveze ukuthi ukunqanyulwa kukagesi okuhleliwe nokushoda kwezindawo zokushaja yikho okuvimba abantu ukuthi bakhethe izimoto ezihamba ngophethroli nangodizili. Kwamanye amazwe athuthukile lolu uhlobo lwezimoto ezihamba ngamandla kagesi nama-hybrid seziya ngokwanda mawala.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UWISEMAN Mncube uzolingisa indawo ephambili Emzini okungumdlalo omusha kwi-e.tv ISILOMO somlingisi waKwaZulu-Natal uWiseman Mncube, sikwabazolingisa indawo ephambili Emzini okungumdlalo ozoqala kwi-e.tv ngo-Ephreli 13. Lo mdlalo ozokhonjiswa njalo ngo-9 ebusuku phakathi nesonto, uzovala isikhala seSmoke and Mirrors ephelayo. UWiseman kuthiwa uzobe elingisa indawo yokuba yindodana kaKhabonina Qhubeka Emzini. Esikhangisweni, abanye abalingisi okuvele ukuthi bazobe belingisa ngoMuzi Mthabela, Dumisani Mbebe, Bokang Phelane, Lungelo Mathonsi, Motshabi Tyalele nabanye. UKHABONINA Qhubeka kwabazolingisa Emzini Lo mdlalo ubhalwe wuLoyiso Maqoma, oke wasebenza kwi-Mbewu: The Seed neSmoke and Mirrors. Omunye osebenze kwi-Smoke n Mirrors ozoba kulo mdlalo, nguZuko Nodada onguphrojusa omkhulu. Umdlalo uveza okwenzeka elokishini i-Alex, eGoli. Ukhuluma ngomndeni ohlonishwayo, onendawo yobumnandi ebizwa ngegama okuqanjwe ngalo umdlalo. Umndeni uzama ukuvikela umlando wawo njengoba unezimfihlo ngowakwenza ukuze uphumelele. I-Smoke and Mirrors ephelayo, igabe ngezinkakha zabalingisi okubalwa kuzo uMeshack Mavuso, Siyabonga Twala nezinye. Ingomunye wemidlalo lesi siteshi esimemezele ukuthi iyaphela. Eminye yi-Scandal! esidonse iminyaka kanjalo ne-House of Zwide, yomibili ezosongwa ngoJuni. Muva nje, lesi siteshi sishintshe izikhathi le midlalo edlala ngazo. Iqale nge-Kelders Van Geheime, esidlala ngo-7 ebusuku, nayo okulindeleke ukuthi iphele ngo-Agasti. I-House of Zwide eyayidlala ngo-7, isingena ngo-7.30 esikhaleni se-Scandal! esingena ngo-8. Kulandela Isitha ngo-8.30.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IToyota Corolla Cross GR-S ilandele ejwayelekile ngokuthuthukiswa yashintshwa indlela ebukeka ngayo ngaphandle nangaphakathi Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu IMOTO: TOYOTA COROLLA CROSS GR-S EKUQALENI konyaka odlule kwaToyota South Africa Motors bethule iCorolla Cross ethuthukisiwe kwazise ibisineminyaka ikhona njengoba yaqala ukudayisa ngo-2021. Kusuka yaqala ukudayisa, le moto eyakhiwa efemini yakwa-Toyota eseProspecton, eThekwini, idayisa ubuthaphuthaphu. Empeleni yiyona SUV edayisa kakhulu eNingizimu Afrika njengoba nyakenye kudayiswe angu-22 191. Ngesikhathi ithuthukisiwe nyakenye, iGR-S iqhubeke nokudayisa njengokujwayelekile. Kushintshile lokho kuleli sonto ekomkhulu leToyota Gazoo Racing enkundleni yezimoto zomjaho, iZwartkops Raceway, eGauteng, kwethulwa iCorolla Cross GR-S ethuthukisiwe. Kube yindawo efanele yokusingatha umcimbi kwazise uGR-S umele uGazoo Racing Sport. Le moto yiyona GR-S edayisa kakhulu okuwedlula wonke kwaToyota. Nokho kwiCorolla Cross izinguquko azenzekanga enjinini njengoba kuseqhubeka ebezikhona phambilini. Zehlukene, kukhona ekaphethroli nengunhliziyombili i-hybrid ehlanganise ekaphethroli nekagesi. IToyota Corolla Cross GR-S itholakala ngemibala emithathu ehlukene emzimbeni engafani nokhakhayi olumnyama Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Ekaphethroli injini ingu-1.8 litre enamandla angu-103kW ne-torque engu-172Nm. U-gearbox ungumshini ozishintshayo oyi-CVT. Kwabafuna ukonga eyi-hybrid inamandla ahlanganisiwe angu-90kW ne-torque engu-142kW. Ngo-100km bathi idla amalitha angu-4.3 nokuyinto enhle kulesi sikhathi lapho simelwe wukunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli. Ngiyishayela ePitoli kuleli sonto isuka buthule ize iqale ukuduma uma usunyusa isivinini. Lapho iCorolla Cross eshintshwe khona yindlela ebukeka ngayo, ezinye izinguquko esezivele zikhona kwejwayelekile. Ishintshe amalambu angama-LED ngaphambili kwafakwa nama-indicator akhanya sakudweba. I-grille emnyama nayo ishintshiwe, kanjalo ne-skid plate ezansi. Ezinhlangothini kushintshwe amarimu angu-18 inch nesiketi ngezansi. Ukhakhayi lusemnyama njengaphambilini, alufani nombala womzimba. Imibala okhetha kuyo ngomhlophe, osiliva nobomvu. Ngaphakathi umbala obomvu ufakwe emabhandeni nokuyenza ibukeke i-sporty. Amesha nezitishi ezibomvu ezisesiteringini sesikhumba esimnyama esinophawu lakwa-GR. Okunye okuyenza ibe "sporty" ama-pedal ezansi. IToyota Corolla Cross GR-S ifakwe ama-pedals acwebezelayo ukuyenza ibukeke i-sporty Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Baphinde bashintsha i-centre console ngasegiyeni nokuyinto eyenziwe nakumaCorolla Cross ajwayelekile. Kuningi okunye efika nakho njenge-touchscreen infotainment system engu-10.1 inch lapho uxhuma khona iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto futhi iveze nengaphandle ngamakhamera. Ine-digital instrument cluster engu-12.4 inch, unyakazisa unyawo ngaphansi kwebhuthi ukuze ivuleke, izihlalo zesikhumba nokunye. Kwezokuphepha inama-airbag ayisikhombisa, iyasho uma uphuma emzileni nokunye. Mihla namalanga kwethulwa ama-SUV amasha eNingizimu Afrika ngakho bekumele kwaToyota bayithuthukise ukuze bengasaleli ngemuva. Uma uyiqhathanisa neHaval Jolion, Omoda C5, Jetour Dashing, Chery Tiggo 7 Pro iziqengqelezela yodwa phambili ngokudayisa. Yinto efanayo nnakwiCorolla Cross GR-S ebambe u-50% wemakethe uma uyiqhathanisa neVW T-Cross R-Line neHaval Jolion S. Toyota Corolla Cross 1.8 GR-S – R527 000 Toyota Corolla Cross 1.8 HEV GR-S – R569 700 Zifika ne-service plan yamasevisi ayisithupha noma u-90 000km ne-warranty yeminyaka emithathu noma u-100 000km. Eyi-hybrid ine-warranty yebhethri yeminyaka eyisishiyagalombili noma u-160 000km.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-JMC Vigus entsha enentengo eqala kuR399 900 Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Kungakapheli sikhathi esingakanani inkampani yaseChina, iJMC, yethule iveni layo lokuqala eNingizimu Afrika iVigus, isilandelise ngentsha eyi-double cab. Ezinyangeni ezimbili ezedlule le nkampani izimoto zayo ezilethwa yiSalvador Caetano South Africa, yethule iVigus enentengo eqala kuR299 900 i-single cab. Seyilamanise ngeVigus entsha eyi-double cab. Inenjini engu-2.5l kadizili enamandla angu-123kW ne-torque engu-410Nm. U-gearbox uhlukene kabili njengoba kukhona oyi-6 speed manual noyi-8 speed automatic. Kukhona neyi-4x4. Leli veni bathi likwazi ukuthwala isisindo esingu-915kg. Linamasondo anamarimu angu-17 inch, amaLED daytime running lights, izitebhisi zokugibela nokunye. Ngaphakathi kune-touchscreen infotainment system oxhuma kuyo iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, izihlalo zangaphambili ezihlelwa ngogesi, nokunye. Intengo iqala kuR399 900 igcine kuR499 900. I-Jiangling Motors Corporation (JMC) ayiwona amavukana kwezezimoto njengoba isungulwe ngo-1947. Ngaphandle kwalokho, inobudlelwano nezinkampani ezidumile i-Isuzu, Ford neChangan esebenzisana nazo ezweni edabuka kulo. Empeleni iFord Territory edayisa kuleli yakhiwa efemini yakwaJMC eChina. EChina iJMC iphinde yakhe nezakwa-Isuzu iD-Max neMU-X.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ULinda 'Mr Magic' Sibiya obephethe uhlelo enkonzweni yomngcwabo kaDJ Boonu e-Olive Convention Centre, eThekwini Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu UCHAZWE njengomuntu obenezisombululo futhi ewusizo, u-Andile “DJ Boonu” Chili (40), enkonzweni yakhe yomngcwabo ebise-Olive Convention Centre, eThekwini, izolo. U-DJ Boonu uzakhele udumo engu-DJ weBig NUZ ngaphambi kokukhipha ezimele. Ushone engasagcini ngokuba nguDJ kodwa esengene shi nasemabhizinisini. Ulale wangavuka ngeledlule. Zonke izikhulumi ebezishiyelana inkundla, bezifakazelana ngokuba wusomaqhinga kanjalo nosizo. Umngani wakhe u-Arab, uthe ubemncane kunaye kodwa emdala ngezenzo. “Ubewumuntu wabantu, ekwazi ukungena lapho kungangenwa khona,” kusho u-Arab. Uthe noma yinini uba benenkinga bebefonela uBoonu. Uveze ukuthi ngenyanga edlule, uBoonu uke wangeniswa esibhedlela kodwa ebatshela ukuthi akanalutho, uyohlolwa nokho udokotela ukhethe ukumlalisa ukuze ezomhlolisisa. Uthe uBoonu ubebukela kakhulu kuBlack Coffee, abe nenhlanhla yokuchitha naye isikhathi ngoMsombuluko odlule. Omunye umngani, uMthunzi Buthelezi, uma ecabanga uthe akasitholi isizathu sokuthi kungani uNkulunkulu ethathe uBoonu. “Yingakho ngithi uNkulunkulu angimazi ukuthi ucabanga kanjani.” Emngcwabeni bekuqhuma umculo womdanso nowokholo. Phakathi kwabebeduduza enkonzweni ebiphethwe uLinda Sibiya, kubalwa uMalusi Mbokazi, Andile KaMajola noJumbo. Izethameli ebezikhona kubalwa umndeni wakwaGcaba, uDJ Boonu abesebenza nawo, owakubo komholi weMK Party, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, njengoba ebesebenza noMnuz Khulubuse Zuma, amaciko ahlukene, osomabhizinisi nabanye. UMnuz Wandile Gcaba uthe uBoonu ulime indima enkulu emndenini wakhe njengoba abafowabo sebeze bangena ngisho emabhizinisini asemkhakheni wokungcebeleka ngenxa yakhe. “UMlazi Picnic ubambisane kakhulu nomfowethu uMfundo nakweminye imisebenzi. Uphinde futhi wabambisana nomfowethu uThembinkosi kwi-Executive Marquee kwiDurban July, uwena futhi obuphambili ukuhlela amaMetro Awards kanjalo neminye imisebenzi,” kusho uWandile.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ULEBO M obopha usomahlaya ngokuhlekisa ngengoma yakhe UCELA usizo lokuxhaswa ngemali usomahlaya okuthiwa akakhokhe u-$20 million (imali elinganiselwa ku-R334 million) ofunwa wuphrojusa womculo weThe Lion King, uLebo M, ngokwenza ihlaya ngengoma yakhe yalo mdlalo. ULebo M ubopha, uLearnmore Mwaanyenyeka odume ngelikaLearnmore Jonasi, ngokwenza kwakhe ihlanya ngengoma iCircle of Life/Nants’Ingonyama. ULearnmore, oke wawina indondo yePan African Comic of the Year kumaSavanna Comics’ Choice Awards kuleli, uhumushe ingoma ngokuthi ithi, “Buka, nali ibhubesi. Nkosi Yami!” Isenzo salo somahlaya odabuka eZimbabwe kodwa osebenzela kakhulu e-United States of America, asehlanga kahle kuLebo M oveze ukuthi uzame ukuxhumana nanye ngaphambi kokumbopha. Umbophela e-United States District Court for the Central Ditrict of California. ULearnmore usebhale ekhasini lakhe le-Instagram, ukuthi okuqale kuyihlaya sekundlondlobale kwaba yimpi yezomthetho. “Ngiwumkhiqizi ongakaze ahlose umonakalo kodwa manje ngibhekene nezindleko ezinkulu zomthetho ukuze ngivikele ilungelo lami lokukhuluma nokuxoxa amahlaya. Izindleko zokuzivikela zingaphezu kwamandla ami ngakho ngidinga usizo lwenu,” kubhala uLearnmore. Uthe noma ngabe umnikelo ungakanani kodwa uzomsiza kubameli ukuze avikele umsebenzi wakhe. USOMAHLAYA uLearnmore Jonasi ocela usizo lwemali ukuze azivikele kuLebo M ombophayo Image: Instagram/learnmore_jonasi Usungule isikhwama soxhaso kwi-website yeGofundme, lapho ethe ufuna ukuhlanganisa u$20 000 (R342 000). Izolo le mali ibisingaphansi kancane kuka $22 000 (R376 000). ULebo M wenza i-video ebiza uLearnmore ngesilima, wathi udukisa abantu ngomqondo wengoma. Wathi ingoma enezinhlamvu ezithi, "Nans'ingonyama bakithi baba" iyizibongo zokutusa inkosi ezithi; "Bayede Ngonyama". Kwi-video waveza ukuthi uzamile ukuxhumana noLearnmore kodwa wangalibona iphutha, wathi uzoqhubeka nakwenzayo. Okhulumela uLebo M, uSimphiwe Majola, uthumelele Isolezwe ubufakazi bengxoxo phakathi kukaLebo M noLearnmore kwi-Instagram. Engxoxweni uchazile ukuthi iNgonyama yigama lokubiza inkosi, hhayi ibhubesi. ULearnmore uphendule ngokuthi kuyiphutha ukuthi uyibona ngale ndlela ngoba inhloso ngamahlaya wukuqala ingxoxo ngakho uLebo M usenethuba lokuthi afundise abantu. Uphinde waveza ukuthi oyisemkhulu bangamaZulu bathuthela eZimbabwe futhi yena uhlale KwaZulu-Natal isikhathi eside. USimphiwe uthe uLebo M uzame ukukhuluma kahle noLearnmore kodwa bangazwana. "Ubemtshela ukuthi angadlala kanjani ngomlando obaluleke kangaka, zathathana. Manje udayisa izimpahla ezinebhubesi, uLebo M useyambopha," kusho uSimphiwe.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: INGWAZI ye-jazz u-Abdullah Ibrahim inandisa kwiCape Town International Jazz Festival ngoLwesihlanu ebusuku BABHEME bakholwa abahambele indumezulu yomcimbi, iCape Town International Jazz Festival (CTIJF) ebiseCape Town International Convention Centre, kusuka kusuka ngoLwesihlanu yaze yaphela ezintatha izolo. Lo mcimbi obekungoka-23 ukhona, ububophele izilomo zabaculi abahlukene. Phakathi kwabo kubalwa umakadebona u-Abdullah Ibrahim, obenandisa eneminyaka engu-91. UTUTU Puone enandisa kwiCape Town International Jazz Festival lapho edlale khona ingoma yakhe iMpho nezinye Lokhu kushiye abantu abaningi bejabule ngokubona le nkakha. "Sengithamele amakhonsathi ka-Abdullah iminyaka engu-40. Namuhla bekwehla izinyembezi ngimbona enandisa eneminyaka eko-90. Imilenze yakhe isiyahluleka kodwa umqondo nezandla kusakhonya. Siyabonga, ngwazi,” kubhala uKanthan Pillay ku-X. Abanye abebenandisa yiScorpion Kings, ehlanganiswe nguDJ Maphorisa noKabza De Small, Nduduzo Makhathini obehambisana noParas Sibal’khulu, Lordkez, Jasmine Myra, Jacob Collier, Sibusiso Mash Mashiloane, Jimmy Nevis, Yussef Dayes, Jazzwrld noThukuthela, Sipho Hotstix Mabuse, Linda Sikhakhane nabanye abaningi. UZoë Modiga obenandisa kwikhonsathi yamahhala yeCTIJF eGreenmarket Square, udlale ingoma entsha okokuqala. Ubhale ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi i-albhamu yakhe entsha izophuma ingakapheli le nyanga UMAKADEBONA uSipho “Hotstix” Mabuse

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IHaval 6 PHEV ehamba ngenjini kaphethroli nekagesi webhethri elishajwayo I-HAVAL H6 ingenye yezimoto eziyinsika ebalulekile kwa-GWM njengoba cishe u-50% wazo zonke abazidayisa emhlabeni jikelele kuyiyona. Le ntandokazi yeSUV yakhiwa emazweni ahlukene ukuze isatshalaliswe kwangaphezu kuka-170. KwaGWM bazimiselle ngokuthi iqhubeke nokwenza kahle ngokwandisa umndeni ngeyi plug-in hybrd (PHEV). Esikhathini lapho kusenezingqinamba ngezimoto ezihamba ngogesi kuphela ngenxa yokungabi ningi kwezindawo zokushaja novalo lokuphelelwa amandla endleleni besayishayela abahamba ngayo, kanjalo nokunyuka ngendlela ebabazekayo kukaphethroli okuthiwa kuzokwenzeka, iH6 PHEV ibukeka ifike ngesikhathi esikahle. Inenjini kaphethroli engu-1.5 litre turbo nezimbili zikagesi konke okufaka amandla kuwo wonke amasondo. Lobu buchwepheshe babubiza ngeGWM Hi-4 drivetrain. Amandla angu-268kW ne-torque engu-760Nm. Edonsa ngamasondo amabili yona inamandla angu-240kW ne-torque engu-540Nm. U-gearbox ungumshini ozishintshayo. Ngaphakathi iHaval H6 ifika ne-touchscreen infotainment system efakwe iCoffee Operating System KwaGWM bathi uma uyishaje yagcwala kanjalo nasethangini likaphethroli kuntanta isele, ungahamba amakhilomitha angaphezulu kuka-1 000. Ngogesi wodwa uhamba u-106km. Ibhethri layo lingu-19.09kWh, nokulithatha amahora alinganiselwa kwamathathu ukulishaja ligcwale nge-AC charger engu-7kW. Ngiyithandile indlela ehamba ngayo ngokuthi yize inamandla kodwa iwanyusa kahle, akuthi uma unyathela ivele igxume njengakwezinye. Okunye engikuthandile wushintsho abalwenze kwi-touchscreen infotainment system njengoba befake iCoffee Operating System. Bathi izolandela kwezinye izimoto zabo. Igqame kahle futhi kulula ukuyisebenzisa ngoba izinto eziningi zisobala ngisho nendawo lapho umgibeli ekwazi ukunyusa nokwehlisa khona umsindo. Uxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto nokunye. I-H6 PHEV ifike kusanda kutheleka iH6 ethuthukisiwe okwenze kwa-GWM bangasibona isidingo sokushintsha indlela ebukeka ngayo. Isuselwe  kwi-Ultra Luxury ngakho bayigqishile kwenakho futhi inkulu. Kubalwa amalambu angama-LED, amarimu angu-19 inch, panoramic sunroof, izihlalo zangaphambili okwazi ukuzifudumeza noma uziqandise, ibhuthi engu-550 litres nenqwaba yezokuphepha. Ifike neyakwabo iH7 Black Edition. I-Haval H7 Black Edition eshunwe ngokuba  mnyama ezindaweni ezithile emzimbeni Uzokhumbula ukuthi muva nje kwethulwe iJolion Pro Limited Edition eshuniwe ngaphandle. I-H7 Black Edition nayo ishunwe ngaphandle okunye bakushiya kufana. Ine-grille emnyama ngaphambili, amarimu ahlukile, ama-roof rails amnyama, amakhava ezibuko amnyama, amalambu amnyama ngemuva nasemawindini. Kwemhlophe izinguquko zigqame kahle. Ngaphansi kwebhonethi izinjini zisafana, kukhona engu-2.0 turbo kaphethroli enamandla angu-170kW ne-torque engu-380Nm. Enye ingu-1.5 litre turbo kaphethroli ehlangene nekagesi eyi-hybrid. Inamandla angu-179kW ne-torque engu-530Nm. H6 1.5T DHT ULTRA LUXURY PHEV                       R 699 900 H6 1.5T DHT ULTRA LUXURY 4X4 PHEV               R 749 900 Zombili zifika ne-warranty yeminyaka eyisikhombisa noma u-200 000km, service plan yeminyaka eyisikhombisa noma u-75 000km, i-warranty yebhethri yeminyaka eyisishiyagalombili noma u-150 000km ne-roadside assistance yeminyaka eyisikhombisa. H7 2.0T LUXURY 4x2 9DCT BLK                   R 604 950 H7 2.0T S-LUXURY 4X4 9DCT BLK               R 674 950 H7 1.5T HEV S-LUXURY 4x2 DHT BLK          R 734 950 Zontathu ziphuma ne-warranty yeminyaka eyisikhombisa u-200 000km ne-service plan yeminyaka eyisikhombisa noma u-75 000km. Eyi-hybrid ine-warranty yeminyaka eyisishiyagalombili noma u-150 000km.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Isikhulu esiphezulu sakwaGWM South Africa uKevin Li INKAMPANI yaseChina, iGreat Wall Motors (GWM), iqinisekise ukuthi iphezu kwezinhlelo zokukhiqiza ezinye izimoto zayo eNingizimu Afrika. I-GWM eyengamele iHaval, Tank, Ora nezinye, ingenye yezinkampani zaseChina ezindala eNingizimu Afrika njengoba nonyaka ihlanganisa engu-19. Emasontweni edlule kuqubuke imibiko yokuthi iGWM ixoxisana neMercedes-Benz ngokusebenzisa ingxenye yefemu yayo eKuGompo City (East London) ukukhiqiza kuyo. Ifemu ikhiqiza iC-Class futhi kuthiwa ingaphansi kwenkulu ingcindezi ngenxa yokwehla kwesibalo sezimoto ezakhiwa bese zidayiswa kuleli. Nesibalo somthamo wezimoto ebezithunyelwa e-United States of America kuthiwa wehlile. Isikhulu esiphezulu sakwaGWM South Africa, uKevin Li, siqinisekise ukuthi zikhona izingxoxo eziqhubekayo phakathi kwabo neMercedes. ULi, obekhuluma nabezindaba ngesikhathi kwethulwa iHaval H6 PHEV eGoli kuleli sonto, uthe bake baxoxa futhi neNissan. INissan inefemu esePitoli okusanda kumenyezelwa ukuthi ithengwe yiChery Group. ULi uthe abakubhekayo wukuqasha enye inkampani ukuthi ibakhiqizele noma bathenge ifemu ekhona ngoba kuthatha isikhathi ukuyakha isuka phansi. UConrad Groenewald, oyisikhulu sezokusebenza kwaGWM South Africa, uthe yigxathu elifanele abangalithatha ukukhiqiza kuleli njengoba sebeneminyaka engu-19. “Sikhulume nezinkampani ezimbalwa kodwa ngebhadi sihlulekile ukuthola iNissan yathathwa yiChery. Lokho kodwa akusho ukuthi sesimile,” kusho yena. Uthe ngenyanga ezayo bazohamba nezikhulu zikahulumeni nezenhlangano yezinkampani ezikhiqiza izimoto i-Naamsa baye embukisweni iBeijing Auto Show eChina lapho beyoqhubeka nezinye izingxoxo.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: U-HEAZY Madida ovivela ukugijima iComrades Marathon okokuqala ngoJuni UMA abagijimi abalinganiselwa ku-22 000 sebeqala indlela esuka eThekwini iyophelela eMgungundlovu emjahweni iComrades Marathon ngoJuni 14, omunye wabo kuzobe kungumsakazi weGagasi FM, uSiyabonga "Heazy" Madida. UHeazy (35), uzibekisele indawo yokugijima lo mjaho omkhulukazi ngokuqeda ngaphansi kwamahora amahlanu i-marathon (42.2km) yakhe yokuqala kwiSapphire Coast Marathon, eManzimtoti, ngo-Okthoba nyakenye. Lo msakazi owethula izinhlelo i-After 8 is After 8 ne-Urban Top 40, uthe kwakuvele kuyiphupho lakhe leminyaka ukugijima iComrades ekuzoba ngeka-99 nonyaka. "Ngiyaziqhenya ngokuba ngowaKwaZulu-Natal futhi lo mjaho wenzeka khona lapha esifundazweni. Ngikholwa wukuthi wonke umuntu kumele awugijime lo mjaho," kusho uHeazy. Uthe useneminyaka egijima kodwa ngoJuni, kuzobe kuhlangana iminyaka emibili esekwenza ngokuzimisela. "Ngangivamisile ukuyobuka iComrades ngime eFields Hill ngiphinde ngiyolinda lapho iphela khona. Ngo-2017, ngathi nami ngelinye ilanga ngizoyigijima." Uthe kuyajabulisa ukuba nento obheke ukuyizuza empilweni ekuphosela inselelo ngoba kuyamkhulisa, wathi ukugijima kumgcina ekude nezinto ezingamphazamisa empilweni. "Ngibe nenhlanhla yokukwazi ukuthi ngishintshe impilo yami ihambe ngendlela efanele. Ngichitha isikhathi esiningi ejimini ngehlisa nasophuzweni oludakayo. Ngonyaka odlule ngiqede izinyanga eziyisishiyagalombili ngingabuthinti nhlobo utshwala. Manje ngiyashesha ukuvuka ngibheka nezinto engizidlayo," kusho uHeazy ongumfowabo womculi nophrojusa womculo uZakes Bantwini. Uqhube wathi abantu bangafunda kuye ukuthi noma wubani engakwazi ukushintsha impilo yakhe noma yinini uma esefuna. "Akukho ebengikwenza emfihlakalweni, abantu bayangazi njengomuntu obefika kuqala ephathini abe ngowokugcina ukuhamba. Sekufike isikhathi sokuthi umuntu akhule ngoba iminyaka ayimile ngineminyaka engu-35 manje." Uveze ukuthi manje uvuka agijime noma ajime, ahambise ingane yakhe esikoleni ayilande ntambama ngaphambi kokulungisela uhlelo lwakhe ebusuku, wathi uzimisele ngokuba nesikhathi esimnandi emgwaqweni aqede iComrades ngaphansi kwamahora akaliwe angu-12. Ukuvivela iComrades, ngempelasonto uzogijima umjaho iBalwin Dolphin Coast Marathon ozosuka eBallito uphelele eNorth Beach eThekwini. Uzosuka lapho agijime eminye yemijaho ethathwa njengenzima ngenxa yezintaba iRising Sun Chatsworth Freedom Ultra ngo-Ephreli 19. U-HEAZY Madida ongumsakazi weGagasi FM

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Uphelele umndeni wamaRenault Kiger ngokwethulwa ethuthukisiwe enenjini ene-turbo INKAMPANI iRenault South Africa ifeze isithembiso sokuyilamanisa ngenenjini ene-turbo iKiger ethuthukisiwe etheleke okokuqala ekupheleni konyaka odlule. Ngesikhathi iKiger yethulwa ngoNovemba, isikhulu sakwaRenault, uShumani Tshifuralo, saveza ukuthi bakhethe ukungayilindi ukuthi bazethule kanye kanye kodwa banquma ukuqala ngengenayo i-turbo. Lokhu kungenxa yokuthi iKiger ingenye yezimoto zabo ezithandwayo njengoba sekuthengwe acela ku-30 000 selokhu yala ukudayisa ngo-2021. Injini iyefana neyakwedlule njengoba ingu-1.0 litre turbo kaphethroli. Inamandla angu-74 kW ne-torque engu-160Nm. Uma ngingakukhumbuza, engenena turbo inamandla angu-52kW. Kungenzeka kube yiyo abayifaka kwiTriber njengoba beveze ukuthi basezinhlelweni zokwethula ene-turbo njengoba ekhona manje inokuvilapha. Injini le uyithola ngo-gearbox oyi-5 speed manual okanye ozishintshayo oyiX-Tronic CVT.
