Ngenalo ozishintshayo engithole ithutshana lokuyishayela eKapa futhi ‘ukuba nempilo’ kwayo ngisheshe ngakuzwa ngoba amandla iwenyusa ngokushesha. Noma ngingenankinga ngeKiger engena-turbo ikakhulukazi eThekwini okuyindawo egudle ulwandle kodwa uma usezindaweni ezimaphakathi nesifundazwe noma ungumuntu onokuhambela izindawo ene-turbo ungabheka ngakuyo. Akudingi ucabangisise ngaphambi kokudlula ezinye izimoto ngoba amandla iyawafaka. Umehluko omkhulu bawenze endleleni ebukeka ngayo ngaphandle nangaphakathi, uma uyiqhathanisa neKiger endala. Ngaphandle inama-LED headlights, iqoshwe u-turbo kwifenda ngaphambili, amarimu angu-16 inch, inama-roof rails athwala isisindo esingu-50kg ne-spoiler ngemuva. Uma uthanda ukwazi ukuyothola ngenombala omnyama okhakhayini ongafani nowomzimba. Ngaphakathi eseqophelweni eliphezulu inezihlalo zesikhumba okwazi ukuziqandisa ngaphambili, inendawo yokushaja iselula ngaphandle kwnentambo ne-digital instrument cluster engu-7 inch. Iphinde ibe ne-touchscreen infotainment system engu-8 inch okwazi ukuxhuma kuyo iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto ngaphandle kwentambo. Iphinde iveze ikhamera ngemuva esiza ukuthi ungashayisi uma upaka. Lokhu kungezinye zezinto zokuphepha. Okunye enakho ngamabhreki i-ABS, EBD, iyasho uma umoya wehla emathayini, ama-airbag ayisithupha nokunye. Ukufika kweKiger turbo kwenza ikwazi ukuncintisana kahle nezimbangi okubalwa kuzo iNissan Magnite, Mahindra 3XO, Chery Tiggo 4 Pro, Hyundai Venue nezinye. Kiger 1.0L TURBO TECHNO - R 278 999.00 Kiger 1.0L TURBO ICONIC - R298 999.00 Kiger 1.0L TURBO ICONIC CVT - R 329 999.00 Zonke ziphuma ne-warranty yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-150 000km ne-service plan yeminyaka emibili noma u-30 000km.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMDLALO omusha wakwi-e.tv i-Emzini uzovala isikhala se-Smoke and Mirrors uma iphela ngenyanga ezayo ISITESHI sethelevishini, i-e.TV, siqede ukuqagela ngomdlalo ozovala isikhala se-Smoke and Mirrors uma isiphela ngenyanga ezayo, simemezela omusha okuthiwa i-Emzini. I-Smoke and Mirrors, edlala ngo-9 ebusuku phakathi nesonto, igabe ngezinkakha zabalingisi okubalwa kuzo uMeshack Mavuso, Siyabonga Twala nezinye. I-Emzini ibhalwe wuLoyiso Maqoma oke wasebenza kwi-Mbewu: The Seed neSmoke n Mirrors. Omunye osebenze kwi-Smoke n Mirrors ozoba kulo mdlalo nguZuko Nodada onguphrojusa omkhulu. Lo mdlalo uveza okwenzeka elokishini i-Alex, eGoli. Ukhuluma ngomndeni ohlonishwayo onendawo yokubumnandi ebizwa ngegama okuqanjwe ngalo umdlalo. Umndeni uzama ukuvikela umlando wawo njengoba unezimfihlo ngowakwenza ukuze uzuze impumelelo. Abalingisi nabanye abasebenza ukuhlanganisa i-Emzini bazomenyezelwa ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. I-Smoke and Mirrors ingomunye wemidlalo lesi siteshi esimemezele ukuthi uyaphela. Eminye yi-Scandal! esesidonse iminyaka kanjalo ne-House of Zwide kokubili okuzosongwa ngoJuni. Muva nje, lesi siteshi sishintshe izikhathi lezi zinhlelo ezidlala ngaso. Iqale nge-Kelders Van Geheime esidlala ngo-7 ebusuku. Nayo okulindeleke ukuthi iphele ngo-Agasti. I-House of Zwide eyayidlala ngo-7 isingena ngo-7.30 esikhaleni se-Scandal! esingena ngo-8. Kulandela Isitha ngo-8.30.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UBongani Mtolo noSli Langa abethula uhlelo iBongani & Sli in the Morning kwiVuma FM ANGIFUNI ukuqamba amanga kodwa iVuma FM ivele ilibaleke uma sekubalwa imisakazo ethathwa njengemikhulu. Kuyimanje indaba egudwini yizinguquko okubhekwe ukuthi zenzeke kuKhozi FM uma sekuqala u-Ephreli. NeGagasi FM lisuke lenza ezalo izinguquko ngesikhathi esifanayo futhi ngiyabona ukuthi kunokukhulu ukuqagela ngekusasa likaFelix Hlophe osohlelweni lwasekuseni phakathi nesonto. Abanye ngapha babheke ukubona ukuthi ngabe uLinda “Mr Magic” Sibiya uzonikezwa yini inkontileka emuva kwezimanga azigile ngoDisemba. I-East Coast Radio yona ngalesi sikhathi isuke igqame kakhulu ngomcimbi wayo iBig Walk oheha izinkumbi zabantu ngo-Ephreli. Nayi iMetro FM izodla umzila KwaZulu-Natal ngenyanga ezayo ngamaMetro FM Music Awards kodwa angizwa lutho ngeVuma. Kwakungcono kusekhona uJacinta Ngobese-Zuma ngoba ngangike ngibone efaka izingxoxo anazo ohlelweni lwakhe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Ngishaywa amahloni okuthi angazi nokuthi ubani osengena ngesikhathi eyengena ngaso. Engibabona benza ukuthi ngingayikhohlwa udu yithimba lohlelo lwasekuseni phakathi nesonto. Ngike ngibone uBongani Mtolo, Sli Langa noGabriel Sithole bezama ukuthi babe sematheni. Ngithanda indlela abamukela ngayo izimenywa zabo ohlelweni. Basuke benengxoxo nesimenywa kube sengathi bakhuluma nomngani hhayi umuntu abazomhlohla imibuzo. Lokho kwenza ingxoxo ibe mnandi ngoba isimenywa siyakhululeka sivuleleke njengoba sike sibone nakuma-podcast. Emasontweni adlule bameme abantu abasemehlweni omphakathi abahlukene njengoDJ Twitty, T’zozo, Bab’Dokotela, Hlomla Dandala nabanye. EkaHlomla bayenza kamnandi ngoba ngaphambi kokuya emoyeni bazikhipha naye beyodla bexoxa kwafikwa emoyeni sekungathi kuzozikhulumela abantu abazanayo. Konke lokhu bakuqopha bakufake kwiYouTube nokuheha wonke umuntu – othanda umsakazo nothanda ama-podcast. Yinto enhle le abayenzayo futhi sengathi bengaqhubeka nayo.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UJABULILE Majola ozobe enandisa okokuqala kwi-Cape Town International Jazz Festival UMCULI okhulele eGreytown, uJabulile Majola, uthi unovalo ngokuyocula okokuqala emcimbini i-Cape Town International Jazz Festival (CTIJF) ezoba se-Cape Town International Convention Centre izinsuku ezimbili ngoMashi 27, uze uphele ngakusasa. UJabulile usezakhele udumo ngomculo wakhe oxoxa indaba nothakaselwa ngabaningi. Phakathi kwezingoma adume ngazo kubalwa iWoza Mntana, Ujakalasi, Uyinkosi Yamakhosi, Ubhubesi nezinye. “Ngishaywa wuvalo, abantu bengalindela lokho kodwa ngithobekile kakhulu, akwenzeki kunoba wubani,” kusho uJabulile. Ubekhuluma ohlelweni i-Expresso kwi-S3 lapho ebebuzwa ukuthi uyilungiselele kanjani le ndumezulu okuzoba ngeka-23 nonyaka? Uthe ufuna ukuxoxa indaba yakhe ngeqiniso futhi axhumane nabantu. Uyonandisa kwi-CTIJF nje, usanda kusonga umjikelezo oqale eKapa, wahambela izindawo ezahlukene okubalwa kuzo iGqeberha, Makhanda, KuGompo City, Greytown, eThekwini naseSoweto. Kwi-CTIJF uzobe eshiyelana inkundla nezilomo zabaculi abahlukene phakathi kwabo okungoJacob Collier wase-United Kingdom, Abdullah Ibrahim, Nduduzo Makhathini, Manana, Lordkez, Scopion Kings, Yussef Dayes wase-United Kingdom, Jazzwrld noThukuthela, Sibusiso Mash Mashiloane nabanye abaningi. UJabulile uzonandisa ngosuku lokuqala Amathikithi omcimbi asatholakala eTicketmaster ngemali eqala ku-R1 350 usuku olulodwa noma u-R2 100 impelasonto yonke.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMCULI kamaskandi, uBahubhe osanda kukhipha i-albhamu yakhe entsha, ethi Ngiyobalanda Image: Facebook/Bahubhe SA UMASKANDA owenze indumezulu yomcimbi wokwethula i-albhamu yakhe waze wadalula ukuthi usexoshiwe ngaphandle kwenxanxathela yezitolo, iWorkshop eThekwini, uBahubhe, uthi usehlela ukuyoyethula ngakubo. Lesi silomo somculi sethule ngokusemthethweni i-albhamu yaso yakamuva ethi Ngiyobalanda emasontweni amabili edlule, lapho abantu bebebulala inyoka. Emuva komcimbi utshele Isolezwe ukuthi abaphathi beWorkshop - ngenxa yokugcwala kakhulu - bathe sebeyomtholela enye indawo uma ethula umculo wakhe ngokuzayo. I-albhamu ayeyethula yaba nokubambezeleka ukuthi iphume kodwa ekugcineni isiyatholakala. "Bajabulile abalandeli, ngeke ngidlale ngabo ngoba bayayithenga," kusho yena. Uthe unezinhlelo zokuyethula ezindaweni ezahlukene nangakubo yize engakaziphothuli. Uzakwabo emculweni, uKhuzani, ubhale kwiFacebook ukuthi uBahubhe wathi ufuna ukuyokwenza ikhonsathi bukhoma ePlayhouse. Uthe yena noJumbo bazomeseka ngale kokunanaza. UBahubhe uthe: "Sasixoxa nje, mhlawumbe sisazohlala sibuke kahle. Kuyisifiso sami vele kuyohamba kugcine kufikekile. Kuyaphoqa," kusho uBahubhe.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Kutholakale inkinga ethinta i-transmission kwi-Lexus LX 500d Overtrail ne-LX 500d F Sport Image: Lexus South Africa I-National Consumer Commission (NCC) isihlabe ikhwelo kubashayeli bama-Lexus LX emuva kokutholakala kwenkinga engaholela ekutheni iphelelwe ngamandla kokunye ibe sengcupheni yokugqamuka ilangabi. Izimoto ezithintekayo ngama-LX 500d F Sport nama-LX 500d Overtrail alinganiselwa ku-110 adayise phakathi kuka-13 Mashi nyakenye no-16 Januwari nyakenye. Ngokwesitatimende se-NCC, lezi zimoto zine-10 speed automatic transmission esebenzisa i-linear solenoids ukushintsha. Uma i-solenoid ifa, i-Transmission Electronic Control Unit ne-Engine Control Unit edume nge-computer box kuyahluleka ukuveza inkinga nokungaholela ekutheni imoto i-reve mawala kwamanye amagiya. "Lokhu kungadala umonakalo kwi-transmission futhi kulahleke amandla uma uhamba ngesivinini esiphezulu." Kuthiwa uma kulimala kwi-transmission kungaba namathuba okuthi kuvuze uketshezi nokungadala ukuthi imoto ishayise noma kugqamuke ilangabi uma kunokungavuthisa. Abahamba ngalezi zimoto banxuswa ukuthi bahambise izimoto emagaraji akwa-Lexus ukuze ziyolungiswa mahhala.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Ingwazi ye-jazz uSipho Hotstix Mabuse izobe inandisa kwiCape Town International Jazz Festival ngesonto elizayo INGWAZI yomculo, uSipho "Hotstix" Mabuse, ikushayela ihlombe ukuhlanganiswa kwabaculi abadala nabasafufusa emcimbini iCape Town International Jazz Festival, ozoba seCape Town International Convention Centre ngoMashi 27 uze usongwe ngakusasa. Kulo mcimbi owaqala ngo-2000 kuzobe kuboshelwe izilomo zabaculi abahlukene. Phakathi kwabo kubalwa uJacob Collier wase-United Kingdom, Abdullah Ibrahim, Nduduzo Makhathini, Manana, Lordkez, Scopion Kings, Jabulile Majola, Yussef Dayes wase-United Kingdom, Jazzwrld noThukuthela, Sibusiso Mash Mashiloane nabanye abaningi. UHotstix, ozobe engaqali ukudlala kule ndumezulu yomcimbi, uthe kubalulekile ukuthi njengabaculi abadala bangababandlululi abasha. "Intsha izofunda kithina nathi sizofunda kuyona. Yenza umculo ngendlela yayo kodwa kumele ifunde nakithina ngoba ngeke siphile isikhathi eside. Ngabe senza iphutha uma sithi sifuna ukuwugcina kithina umculo kodwa kumele siwabele nabanye," kusho uHotstix. Uthe uyayithanda iCTIJF ngoba iwumgubho wamaqembu nabaculi abahlukene futhi abavela kuzona zonke izinkalo. Uveze ukuthi noma zikhona izingoma ezintsha azozidlala kodwa ngeke awakhohlwe amanoni adume ngawo. "Abazohambela umcimbi bazozwa uHotstix abangakaze bamuzwe odlala i-jazz engasukumi phansi. Uma kukhona izingoma odume ngazo akumele uphume esiteji ungazidlalanga ngoba abantu bangadumala kakhulu uma ungasadlali abazaziyo. Ngempelasonto bengidlala eSecunda kwasukuma wonke umuntu sengidlala abayithandayo ngoba bebethi ngeke ngiphume esiteji ngingayenzanga," kusho lo mculi odume ngengoma ethi Burn Out. Omunye wabaculi abazobe beqala ukunandisa kwiCTIJF uJabulile Majola ucashunwe kwi-Independent Media Lifestyle ethi ubehlala ekuthanda okwenzeka kulo mcimbi ewubukela kude nabaculi abaqashwa kuwo. "Baletha abaculi abasezingeni lomhlaba," usho kanje. UJazzwrld uthe kusukelaa besakhula babekubheke ngabomvu ukuba kulo mcimbi. "Ngiyakhumbula ngiqala ukuzwa ngawo ngobaba wami owayejwayele ukukhuluma ngawo ngokuziqhenya. Ukubona ingwazi engasekho ubaba uHugh Masekela nabanye abake banandisa yikho okusihehile kuwo," kusho uJazzwrld. Amathikithi omcimbi asatholakala eTicketmaster.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-VOLVO ES90 ivele yenze ungakunqeni ukungena indlela ngenxa yokuba ntofontofo kwayo emgwaqweni EMINYAKENI embalwa eyedlule, kwaVolvo Car South Africa babedayisa i-S90 sedan futhi ngaba nenhlanhla nokushayela ngizizwa ngiwubhuti omdala. Kwakuyimbangi enkulu yeMercedes-Benz E-Class, Audi A6 kanjalo ne-BMW 5 Series. Ngesikhathi lezi zimbangi zisatholakala emagaraji, i-S90 yona ayisabonwa. Lokhu kungenxa yokuthi kwaVolvo emhlabeni jikelele bashintsha indlela abenza ngayo, bakhetha ukungenisa ezimotweni ezihamba ngogesi okanye ezingama-hybrid. Lelo qhinga selizale i-ES90 eqale ukudayisa eNingizimu Afrika kuleli sonto. Umbuzo omkhulu wukuthi njengoba uthando lwama-sedan, seluncipha abantu bencamela ama-SUV, ingabe izokwazi yini ukudoba amakhasimende? Likhulu ithemba kwaVolvo ukuthi izokwenza kahle ngokudayisa. Bakholwa wukuthi amakhasimende azoyishalazela iBMW i5 neMercedes-Benz EQE, njengoba bethembe ukuthi kuphele unyaka bedayise okungenani alinganiselwa ku-40. Ngokwentengo ibiza imali ephansi kunazo zombili izimbangi njengoba i-i5 iqala ku-R1.8 million kuthi i-EQE iqale ku-R1.7m. Ngiziyofaka ngezansi intengo ye-ES90 nephuma nakho. I-ES90 ifika ngezinhlobo ezintathu okuyiCore, Plus ne-Ultra. Zontathu zinebhethri engu-92 kWh abathi uma lishaje lagcwala ungahamba u-755km. Uma uyishaja endaweni esheshayo i-DC charger njengoba ingakwazi ukufaka enomlilo ongu-350kW, bathi isuka ku-10 iye ku-80% ngemizuzwana ewu-25. Uyakwazi futhi nokuyishaja nge-AC engu-22kW noma ekhaya. Amandla ayo awu-245kW ne-torque engu-480Nm futhi iwathumela emasondweni angemuva. KwaVolvo bathembisa ukuletha ezinye izinhlobo. Amandla ayenza ikwazi ukusuka ku-0 iye ku-100km/h ngemizuzwana engu-6.6 kanti ijubane elikhulu ligcina ku-180km/h. Yethulwa, indlela isukele eBallito sagudla ngaseSenembe, sakhuphuka ngeBhamshela, sadlula eWartburg, ngaphambi kokunqamula eMgungundlovu, singene ku-N3 siyophelela kuNottingham Road. NGAPHAKATHI iVolvo ES90 ifana nezimoto zakwabo ngokungabi namabhathini kodwa konke kwenziwe kwi-touchscreen enkulu Kuyo yonke leyo migwaqo ibizwakala intofontofo kwazise besihamba nge-Ultra ene-air suspension. Futhi ubuyizwa isebenza ngoba kokunye ibivele izinyuse yona igabade ilishiye ngo-203mm bungazweli ububi bomgwaqo. Uma upaka ubuyizwa yehla. Emgwaqweni iyabambelela futhi ithule ngaphakathi. Nesiteringi uma uphuma emzileni besingibuyisa nokungezinye zezinto zokuphepha abagabe ngazo abakwaVolvo. Okunye yi-adaptive cruise control, iyasho uma uphuma emzileni, Head-Up Display, amakhamera aveza umzimba wonke ngaphandle nokunye. I-ES90 yinde ingu-5 000mm, ububanzi bungu-2 120mm kuthi ukuphakama ibe ngu-1 546mm. Lokhu kuyenza ibe ne-wheelbase engu-3 102mm ebamba iqhaza elikhulu ekutheni ivuleke ngaphakathi. Isikhala ebhuthini singu-446 litres futhi kukhona nesinye kubhonethi sokufaka izintambo zokushaja. Uyabonga ngaphakathi, abagibeli bahlala ezihlalweni ezintofontofo. Ngemuva amadolo awashayi ezihlalweni zangaphambili. Nokho engikubone kuyinkinga wukuthi amadolo ayaphakama kube sengathi uqosheme kwazise amabhrethri bawafake ngaphansi. I-VOLVO ES90 ivele yenze ungakunqeni ukungena indlela ngenxa yokuba ntofontofo kwayo emgwaqweni Uma ungasukile egabadeni kangako, angiboni ungaba nenkinga. Engikuthandile wukuthi izihlalo ziyalala uhlale sakuqethuka mbijana. Phezulu bayifake i-eletrochromic panoramic sunroof othi uma iciphiza ibhathini ikhombise isibhakabhaka noma isisithe. Uma uthanda bathi uyakwazi ukufaka indwangu ngaphakathi yokuvala i-sunroof. Ngimane ngiyasho nje ukuthi uciphiza ibhathini, empeleni awekho ngoba iyefana nezimoto zakwabo zakamuva. Konke ukwenza kwi-touchscreen infotainment system enkulu futhi egqame kahle. Izibuko emaceleni uzihlela khona, ukwehlisa nokusondeza isiteringi kwenziwa khona, ukuvula i-cubbyhole nebhuthi konke kwenziwa khona. Uphinde ubone khona inkombandlela, uxhume iselula nge-Apple CarPlay, udlale umculo ngezipikha ezikhala kamnandi zeBowers & Wilkins nokunye. Ngaphandle le sedan ibuye izishaye sa-fastback uma unganakile, ikakhulukazi indlela eyakhiwe ngayo ngemuva. Inamalambu angama-LED, amanye abaze bawafaka ewindini elikhulu ngemuva. Ayakhanya "akubingelele" uma usondela noma "akuvalelise’ uma uhamba. Yinto efanayo nakwawangaphambili. Iphinde ibe nemibala enhlobonhlobo okhetha kuyo kanjalo namarimu aphakathi kuka-20 no-21 inch. ES90 Core – R1 590 000 ES90 Plus – R1 665 000 ES90 Plus – R1 795 000 Zonke ziphuma ne-warranty ne-maintenance plan yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-100 000km, i-wallbox charger yasekhaya nekhadi lokushaja ezindaweni zomphakathi iminyaka emithathu elifakwa u-R6 000 ngonyaka.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IToyota GR Yaris incane nesisindo esiphansi okuyenza ikwazi ukusheshe inyuse ijubane Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu IMOTO: TOYOTA GR YARIS NGIZITHOLE ngihleka ngedwa, hhayi ngoba bengingenelwa yimali yini, kodwa ngijatshuliswa wubumnandi beToyota GR Yaris ebengihamba ngayo. Uyazi kunezimoto okuba sengathi zikhuluma nawe uma uzishayela zikwenze uyizwe into ofuna iyenze ngaleso sikhathi. I-GR Yaris ingenye yazo futhi ikwenza ingishiye ngimangele ukuthi kwaToyota benza kanjani ukuthi bakwazi ukuthola amandla angaka enjini eyi-three cylinder. Ngesikhathi ifika okokuqala eNingizimu Afrika le njini engu-1.6 litre turbo kaphethroli yayinamandla angu-198kW akwazi ukuyisusa ku-0 iye ku-100km/h ngemizuzwana engu-5.5. Kulokhu sebewanyusile asengu-210kW ne-torque engu-400Nm. Nesikhathi esithathayo ufika ku-100km/h sesinciphile sesingu-5.2 yize isisindo sayo sinyuke kancane saba ngu-1 300kg. Phela u-gearbox ofakwe lapha uyi-8 speed GAZOO Racing Direct Automatic Transmission oyaziyo into yayo ngoba ushintsha kamnandi ngesikhathi esifanele. Uma ngifuna ukuzibambela koodwa bengishintsha ngama-pedal shifters noma kulona igiya. Ngiyazi igenge eningi ithanda ukuzibambela ekushintsheni amagiya ezimotweni zalolu hlobo kodwa angikhali ngalo gearbox. Isatholakala nenoyi-6 speed automatic. Indlela eshesha ngayo ukungena ejubaneni uyezwa ukuthi abasengi ezimithiyo kwaToyota ngalesi sikhathi abathi kuyithatha sona ukuthi ibambe u-100km/h. Uma unganakile ngempela “Ama-RTI Amahle” angahlale ekukhomba eceleni usuhamba ngesivinini esingagunyaziwe ngoba ijubane ilenyusa kalula. Angikhathelele ukuthi uhamba ngo-Eco, Normal noma u-Sport kuyefana. Emakhoneni iya lapho uyikhomba khona ngesiteringi esinesisinjwana futhi kusiza ukuthi idonsa ngawo womane amasondo kanjalo nama-Torsen® limited-slip differential ngaphambili nangemuva. Ubumnandi bayo buphoxwa wubuncane bethangi likaphethroli elingu-50 litres elingakwenza ungapheli egaraji. Ngihambe 363km yaveza ukuthi isengahamba omunye u-56km kade igcwele mfi. Ngaleso sikhathi indlela ebidla ngayo ibingeyimbi njengoba ibingu-9.8l/100km. U-gearbox ozishintshayo ubuwenza kube lula ukuyishayela kunesiminyaminya futhi nendawo yokuphumuza unyawo lwesokunxele inkulu. Njengoba kuyimoto yejubane nje, ithanda ukuzwela kakhulu emabhampini nokwengezelwa ngamasondo amancane anamarimu angu-18 inch. Ngizwe nomsinjwana womoya uthanda ukuba mkhulu ngaphakathi ngenxa yamawindi angenawo ama-frame. Izihlalo zeToyota GR Yaris ziyakubamba ukuthi unganyakazi futhi bazehlisile zaba phansi Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Izihlalo bazehlisile kancane uhlala usondelane nomgwaqo. Ngikuthandile ukuthi bayifake ezokuphepha njengokuthi isho uma kunemoto eseceleni, ikusize ukuhlala emzileni kanjalo ne-adaptive cruise control. Indlela eyakhiwe ngayo kunzima ukuzama ukuqalaza eceleni ukuthi kunemoto yini kwi-blind spot. Ukujeqeza esibukweni kuvele kukukhombise ama-hips ayo amakhulu ngemuva. Ngaphakathi ilayisha abagibeli abane yize ngemuva isikhala sisincane njengesebhuthi. Izihlalo zangaphambili ungena zikubambe kube sengathi ugonile. I-touchscreen infotainment system bayenze yabheka ngakumshayeli futhi yehlukile kuneyezinye izimoto zakwaToyota emakethe yakuleli. Iveza ingemuva uma upaka, uxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay yize bekubuye kuhluphe, futhi udlala umsakazo. I-GR Yaris ayinantanga kuleli ngoba ezinye zinkulu kunayo ungaze uziqhathe ne-GR Corolla. Nokho ngentengo yayo ungathola i-VW Golf GTI 8.5 esifika ifakwe konke namandla enyusiwe angu-195kW. GR Yaris Rally AT – R971 300 Iphuma ne-service plan yamasevisi ayisishiyagalolunye noma u-90 000m ne-warranty yeminyaka emithathu noma u-100 000km.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UDJ Zinzi Kahnish obuyele kuleli ngosizo lukahulumeni kulandela ukuvaleleka e-Israel Image: Instagram/Zinzi Kahnish UVALO belumi ngenhla kuDJ wakuleli obesengcupheni yokuthelwa amachaphazelo njengoba ibambene ngezihluthu phakathi kwe-Israel, United States of America (USA) ne-Iran. Le mpi esisesontweni layo lesibili isuswe wukugadla kwe-Israel ibambisene ne-USA e-Iran. I-Iran iziphindiselele ngeyayo imbubhiso yamabhomu e-Israel nasemazweni anamakhempu amasosha ase-USA. UDJ Zinzi Kahnish uzithole egaxele ngenxa yokuthi impi isuke ese-Israel lapho ebemenywe ukuthi eyodlala khona. “Ngijwayele ukuphuma ezweni ngiyodijeya. Bengingaqali ukuyodlala e-Israel. Bekungokwesibili futhi bengiqashwe emicimbini emithathu ehlukene,” kuchaza uZinzi kwi-video ayifake ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kulandela ukubuyela kwakhe ekhaya kuthangi. Uthe wahamba ngoFebhuwari 26 wafika ngakusasa lapho umcimbi wakhe wokuqala ubukhona njengoba ebeqashwe kwemithathu. Emibili ibiseTel Aviv nomunye eHaifa. Uthe konke kuhambe kahle efika ngoba wadlala ngaleso sikhathi. “Ngosuku olulandelayo savuswa wukukhala kwamacilongo satshelwa ukuthi sekuqale impi. Eqinisweni bengithuke kakhulu ngoba bengingazi ukuthi yini okumele ngiyenze. Yize benginamathikithi okubuya asekhokheliwe kodwa lokho bekungasathi shu ngoba umkhathi bese uvaliwe,” kuchaza uZinzi. Uthe wafonele umndeni wakhe omsize ukuthi axhumane noMnyango wobuDlelwano naMazwe oMhlaba (Dirco) nehhovisi lenxusa okuyibo abameluleke ngokumele akwenze ukuze agoduke ngokuphepha. “Ngilulekwe ukuthi ngiye eJordan ngisuke lapho ngiye e-Egypt bese ngibuyela ekhaya ngokuphepha. Ngithanda ukubonga iDirco, ihhovisi lenxusa laseNingizimu Afrika ePalestine, eJordan nomxhumanisi e-Israel ongeluleke ngakho konke ngoba bengingazi ukuthi ngizoyaphi, ngihambe ngaphi nokuthi yiliphi izwe eliphephe ngokwanele ukuthi ngingaya kulo ukugwema impi kodwa babe nami kukho konke." Ubonge uNkulunkulu, abangani, umndeni nabo bonke abamthandazele ukuze abuye ephephile. “Yize ngibuyile kodwa imicabango yami isenabantu abasele abahlala e-Israel nabase-Iran. Ngithandazela ukuphepha kwabo futhi ngithandazela ukuthi impi iphele ngoba bamsulwa abantu abasemazingeni aphansi abanemindeni nezingane.” Okhulumela iDirco, uChrispin Phiri, weluleke abantu baseNingizimu Afrika abaya phesheya noma ngabe yingasiphi isizathu ukuthi babhalise emahhovisi enxusa lakuleli eliseduze nalapho beya khona. Uthe imininingwane itholakala kwi-website yoMnyango wabo. “Izakhamuzi ziyagqugquzelwa futhi ukuthi zibhalise kwi-Dirco Travel Smart App lapho ungafaka khona nemininingwane yezihlobo futhi ufake khona udaba lwakho uma usenkingeni phesheya.”

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UPANJARO nomsizi wakhe bedlala kwiRed Bull Shay'iMoto eThekwini nyakenye Image: Red Bull Content Pool UBUYELA eThekwini unyaka wesibili kulandelana umncintiswano wokwenza izimanga ngemoto, iRed Bull Shay’iMoto, ozoba seSuncoast casino ngo-Ephreli 18. Kuwona abashayeli kumele baveze amakhono okushaya izidudla nangokuchusha emapalini imoto ishushuluza kodwa bengashayisi lutho. Abanye baphuma imoto ihamba benze izinto ezishiya izethameli zibambe ongezansi. Izethameli zikhetha ezibathandayo ngokubambisana namajaji. Nyakenye kwagcina kunqobe uJean "Panjaro" Kruger waseMahikeng owayesesele noBoksie waseKapa owayevikela isicoco. Uhlelo lwaluphethwe ngoseneminyaka kulo mdlalo uVic Pardal nomsakazi uHope Mbhele futhi wawukhonjiswa bukhoma kwiSABC Sports. Nakulo nyaka bazobe bengu-12 abashayeli abazobe bebanga isicoco salo mncintiswano owasungulwa ngo-2019. Bonke bazobe bezama ukulandela ezinyathelweni zoVeejaro, King Katra asebake banqoba kanjalo noSam Sam oseyinxusa lakwaRed Bull elihambela amazwe omhlaba likhombisa ngomdlalo wokushaywa kwezidudla. USam Sam usuke ehamba ngemoto yakhe i-BMW E30 eteketiswa ngele-Ultimate Gusheshe. Amathikithi aseqalile ukudayisa eComputicket futhi umncintiswano uzoqala ngo-6 ebusuku.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UCeleste Ntuli ngesikhathi ekumaSavanna Comics Choice Awards nyakenye Image: Comics' Choice Awards USOMAHLAYA waseMpangeni, uCeleste Ntuli, usethubeni lokuqopha umlando ngokunqoba umklomelo weComedian of the Year iminyaka emibilli kulandelana kumaSavanna Comics Choice Awards anonyaka abuyela eGold Reef City, eGoli, ngoMeyi 2. Nyakenye uCeleste, ophinde abe ngumlingisi, wahlula uKagiso KG Mokgadi, Khanyisa Bunu, Bobby Collins noSifiso Nene ayeqhathwe nabo emunxeni ofanayo.. Ekhuluma ngokudla umhlanganiso wathi: “Kusho lukhulu kimi ukuthola lo mklomelo ngoba amahlaya sengiwenze iminyaka engu-20 ngakho ukuwuthola ngalesi sikhathi kube kuhle kakhulu. Empeleni ngisashaqekile. Ngiyabonga kubo bonke abangesekile futhi wonke umuntu ungijabulele. Ngiswele amazwi.” Kulokhu uqhathwe noDillan Oliphant, Kagiso KG Mokgadi, Mpho Popps noSifiso Nene. Le miklomelo yosomahlaya kuzobe kungokuka-13 ikhona. Uhlelo luzobe luphethwe nguJason Goliath, Donovan Goliath, Nicholas Goliath noKate Goliath. Ukufakwa kwamavoti eminxeni emithathu evotelwayo sekuvuliwe kwi-website yemiklomelo futhi kuzovalwa phakathi kwamabili ngo-Ephreli 15. Selulonke uhla lwabaqokiwe lumi kanje: Savanna Newcomer Award Headliner of the Year Award Comedian of the Year Award Innovative Comedy Performance Award Best Friend of Comedy Award Best Comedy Festival or Show Award Breakthrough Act of the Year Award Comedic Content Award

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMLINGISI uWiseman Mncube uzobonakala ohlelweni i-Tropika Island of Treasure UMLINGISI uWiseman Mncube noke waba nguMiss South Africa, uLalela Mswane, ngabanye bosaziwayo osekuqinisekisiwe ukuthi bazobanga isheke lika-R1 million ohlelweni lwethelevishini i-Tropika Island of Treasure. Lo mncintiswano ugcine ukuba khona ngo-2024, uqoshelwa eZanzibar. Osaziwayo babehlanganiswe nabantu abangenela. Kwagcina kunqobe umlingisi uHungani Ndlovu noDimakatso Calisa abahlomula ngo-R500 000 umuntu ngamunye kanjalo namaSuzuki Jimny 5-door amasha. Laba bobabili behlula, okubalwa kubo uNdavi Nokeri, Nqobile Kwezi, Gloria Ngcobo nabanye ngokwenza imidlalo ehlukene ababenikezwa yona. Njengoba sekuqinisekisiwe ukuthi uhlelo luyabuya, sekuqalile ukuvezwa kosaziwayo abazoba yingxenye yalo. UWiseman ozakhele udumo emidlalweni okubalwa kuyo Uzalo, eHostela, Shaka Ilembe neminye, uqinisekise ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi uzoba kwi-Tropika Island of Treasure. SEKUQINISEKISWE ukuthi uZanele Potelwa ubuya njengomethuli wohlelo i-Tropika Island of Treasure "Wonke umholi oqotho udinga umuntu azobambisana naye. Ngifuna umuntu ozimisele futhi olungele ukuzinikela ngakho konke," kusho uWiseman. Abanye ngumlingisi u-Amanda du Pont, Leandie du Randt nomgijimi uCaster Semenya. Umethuli wezinhlelo, uZanele Potelwa, kuqinisekiwe ukuthi uzobuya azolushayela uhlelo. "Ukubuya njengomethuli we-Tropika Island of Treasure wukufezeka kwephupho. Ngijabule kakhulu ngokuthi ngiyabuya ngethule enye isizini. Ngingakutshela ngale kokungabaza ukuthi kuzoba yisizini enkulu kunawo wonke," kusho uZanele. "Emuva kokuqokelwa indondo yamaSafta (South African Film and Television Awards) ngesizini edlule, lesi simemezelo yindlela emnandi yokugubha lokho futhi sengijahile ukuba sesiqhingini," kusho yena. UZanele uqokwe emunxeni weBest TV Presenter kwathi uhlelo alwethulayo lwaqokwa koweBest Competition Reality Show. Ukungenela i-Tropika Island of Treasure kuvulwa ngoLwesihlanu. Kumele uqophe umngenelo wakho bese uwunameka ezinkundleni zokuxhumana wenze isiqiniseko sokuthi abakwaTropika bayawubona. Uhlelo kulindeleke ukuthi luqale ukukhonjiswa kwiS3 ngasekupheleni konyaka.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Umengameli we-Economic Freedom Fighers uJulius Malema UMHOLI we-Economic Freedom Fighters, uJulius Malema, uthi akukho akufihlayo njengoba eyamaniswa nokubhubhudlwa kwemali yebhange iVBS Mutual Bank. UMalema ukusho lokhu esikhangisweni seqophamlando elizochaza ukusuka nokuhlala ngokwenzeka kudliwa imali engaphezu kuka-R1 billion. Leli qophamlando, iThe People vs VBS, lizoqala ukukhonjiswa kwiShowmax kusuka ngoMashi 25 bese liphinda kuM-net kusuka ngenyanga ezayo. UMalema ungomunye wabazobe bechaza kulandela ukuthi igama lakhe lavela kokuthiwa bahlomula. Imibiko yabezindaba yaveza ukuthi yena nowayeyiphini lakhe ekuholeni i-EFF, uFloyd Shivambu, kukhona imali elinganiselwa ku-R16 million abayithola. "Akekho noyedwa ongaveza ubufakazi," uMalema usho kanje esikhangisweni. Abanye okuzokhulunywa nabo ngumphathi weSouth African Reserve Bank, uLesetja Kganyago, omunye wabasunguli beVBS uMadambi Muvhulawa, nowayeyisikhulu sePublic Investment Corporation uDan Matjila. Kuzophinde kubonakale nezintatheli ezaziphenya kabanzi ngokwenzeka kuleli bhange elake laba sematheni ngokuboleka imali owayengumongameli wezwe, uJacob Zuma. UZuma waboleka imali elinganiselwa ku-R8 million ukukhokhela ukulungiswa komuzi wakhe eNkandla. Lokhu kweza emuva kombiko wowayengumvikeli womphakathi, uThuli Madonsela, wokuthi okunye okwenziwa kwaZuma kwakungahlangene nezokuphepha. Kusuka kwaphuma umbiko wommeli, uTerry Motau ngokwenzeka ebhange, baningi asebashushiswa. UTshifhiwa Matodzi owayengusihlalo webhange wavuma amacala ahlukene ngeqhaza lakhe wagwetshwa iminyaka engu-15 ejele. Owayengumgcinimafa uPhilip Truter naye wavuma amacala wagwetshwa iminyaka eyisikhombisa. ngo-2020 waphuma ngo-2024 eyoqedela isigwebo ngaphandle.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Umculi we-kwaito obonga uNkulunkulu ngengoma entsha ethi Baba Siyabonga Image: Instagram/Lvovo SA UCELA ukwesekwa emculweni wakhe omusha ukuze amelane nezindleko zodokotela umculi wekwaito, uL'vovo Derrango, owahlaselwa yisifo sohlangothi ngo-2022. UL'vovo, odabuka eNewcastle, selokhu agcina ukukhipha ingoma ngoMashi nyakenye. Wenza ethi AmaXhosa ngokubambisana nomdidiyeli wakhe wakudala uZakes Bantwini lapho ababepike khona uNana Atta no-Okmalumkoolkat. Kulokhu ulungiselela ukukhipha i-Extended Play (EP) ngaphambi kokuphela kwenyanga. "Senza i-EP enezingoma ezine njengoba umuntu elulama kahle kakhulu ukwenzela ukukhumbuza abantu ukuthi ukuhlehla kwenqama akusho ukubaleka kodwa kusho ukukhokha amandla. Bengingahleli ngoba ngilulama kuphela, kodwa bengiqhubeka nomsebenzi," kusho uL'vovo. Uthe kuyona usebenze noMadanon, MDU aka TRP, Pex Africah, DJ Merlon, Gift the DJ noGoodman. "Ingoma yokuqala ikhuluma noMdali. Sibonga impilo, sibonga ukusivikela futhi sibonga ukuthi uwuNkulunkulu ophilayo nakhu usinike elinye ithuba. Senze ithi ukubadansisa kancane kodwa iyingoma yokholo ezothinta abantu abaningi. Ngithe njengoba ngibuya angibonge uNkulunkulu kuqala ngaphambi kokuthi sidanse ngendlela engaziwa ngayo," kuchaza yena. Uqhube wathi kuzona zonke izingoma lapho exube khona isigqi esahlukene somculo, ubonga impilo, udumisa uNkulunkulu futhi ukhuluma nangezinto adlule kuzona. "Angiceli ukuthi abantu banginikelele kodwa engikucelayo wukwesekwa kuphela ngoba ukulimala akuzange kulibulale iphupho lami lokuthi ngiwumculi angihlalanga ngakhongozela. Kuphela ngicela ukuthi bathenge i-EP yami baqale ngale ngoma engiyikhiphayo ethi Baba Siyabonga. Isifiso sami wqukuthi ngenyanga yokuqala idlalwe izikhawu ezingaphezu kuka-1 million. Angiceli ukuthi bangifakele imali kodwa uma bedlale umculo wami bayobe bangibusise kakhulu empilweni," kusho uL'vovo. Uthe kuzomsiza nokwenza imali ngoba nabeyibekile iya ngokuncipha kwazise usaqhubeka nokuhamba i-physiotherapist emsiza ukuthi akwazi ukusebenzisa isandla ngokugcwele athe sisabambekile. Lo mculi wahlaselwa yisifo sohlangothi esesiteji emcimbini owawuseNdwedwe ngoDisemba 2022. "Ngisebenzile hhayi ukuthi ngiyacela nje." Udalule ukuthi uzimisele ngokuhambela izindawo ezihlukene eyonandisa kuzo. "Ngifuna ukukujwayela kabusha okwenzeka ezindaweni zobumnandi ngoba bese siside isikhathi umuntu ezivalele engaphumi. Ngingakujabulela ukuvakashela izifundazwe ezihlukene ngoba angesekwa kwesisodwa kuphela."

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Ubukhulu beLexus GX benza igqame uma iqhamuka Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu AMAGAMA abafowethu abasiza ukusiphosela iso ezimotweni uma sipaka ezinxanxatheleni zezitolo noma yikuphi abajwayele ukungibingelela kuba ngo‘razo’ noma u-‘grootman’ ngenhloso yokuzincengela umnikelo. Kulokhu kuthe ukushintsha ulimi ngihamba nge-Lexus GX 550 SE, ngezwa omunye engibiza ‘ngomlungu’. Yinto omunye umngani wami ayiphindile ebona nginameke isithombe sayo kwiWhatsApp. Yigama okudlaliswa ngalo umuntu obukeka emi kangconywana empilweni. Ngiyakhumbula nje ukuthi omunye usomabhizinisi engangimazi abasebenzi bakhe babembiza kanjalo. I-Lexus GX izikhulumela yona ukuthi ohamba ngayo wumuntu okuliphi izinga lempilo. Ekhona yinhlobo yesithathu selokhu yaba khona kodwa kungokokuqala eNingizimu Afrika beyiletha ngezinhlobo ezimbili. Kune-Overtrail eyakhelwe abafuna ukuqwala izintaba bese kuba yi-SE nayo engenankinga nobhuqu kodwa engena khaxa nasemicimbini yomntakabani. I-SE ebesihamba ngayo ishaya ngomzimba osabhokisi. Esihlalweni somshayeli yilapho ebengibona khona ubukhulu bayo, ikakhulu kwibhonethi equmbile. Ishaya ngamalambu angamaLED namarimu amahle amakhulu angu-22 inch. Njengoba igabade ilishiye ngo-220mm nje, akuwona umzukuzuku ukungena phakathi ngoba kuba wukuvula isicabha bese kuqhamuka isitebhisi ngaphansi esiphinde sinyamalale uma usuvalile. I-GX yinde futhi inkulu ingu-5 015mm. Icishe ilingane ncimishi neLand Rover Defender 110 etete isondo njengoba ingu-5 018mm. Uyizwa ungena noma uthinta ukuthi kusetshenziswe okusezingeni eliphezulu ukwakha ingaphakathi leLexus GX Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu I-wheelbase yeGX engu-2 850mm futhi iyenza ivuleke kahle kubagibeli abayisihlanu. Ngibala abayisihlanu ngamabomu yize ilayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa ngoba lezi ezinye izihlalo zokugcina ngezokuhlala izingane. Ngike ngazama ukungena kuzo kepha amadolo athi cho. Engikuthandayo nokho wukuthi izihlalo zivuleka futhi zilala phansi ngokuciphiza ibhathini. Kuphinde kube nezimbobo zokushaja nge-USB ezimbili nezokubeka iziphuzo. Njengezimoto eziningi ezilayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa, uma izihlalo zime zonke isikhala sokulayisha impahla siba yimbijana. Nokho uma zilele sikhulu futhi ngichazwa wukuthi ungayipaka ihlehla ungaxwayi ukuthi uzolayisha kanjani. Phela ukwazi ukuvula ewindini langemuva ulayishe kodwa uma uthanda uyivula yonke ibhuthi ngebhathini. Ngingakakhohlwa, ebhuthini kunembobo yokufaka i-twin-plug. Uma sibuyela ngaphakathi izihlalo ziyisikhumba esintofontofo. Ezangaphambili uyakwazi ukuziqandisa noma uzifudumeze. Ngemuva uma unqena ukuzishayelela awuphuthwa yilutho ngoba nezakhona ziyafudumala. Amazinga omoya ophuma ngemuva uzihlelela wena, kunezimbobo zokushaja nge-USB futhi yize idimile ngemuva uma uthanda unyusa amakhethini abantu basale bezibuza ukuthi ngabe wubani ophakathi. Ngaphambili kune-touchscreen infotainment system yeMark Levinson enkulu engu-14 inch okulula ukuyisebenzisa. Iveza inkombandlela, uxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay futhi uma userobhothini ikuvezela lonke ingaphandle noma uma upaka. Izipikha zeMark Levinson zikhala kamnandi. Yize amabhathini eyingcosana, okuningi kwenziwa kwi-screen njengokuhlela amazinga okushisa kodwa kusobala ukuthi akuyona into engasusa amehlo akho emgwaqweni. Okunye okwazi ukukushintsha amazinga okushisa, yisiteringi esifudumalayo. Iphinde ibe nendawo yokuqandisa iziphuzo bese kuthi okhakhayini kube ne-sunroof engavuleki. Ngithanda ukuthi uciphiza ibhathini isithe ilanga okuthi uma ulithinta futhi ubone isibhakabhaka. ILexus GX ine-towbar ekwazi ukudonsa isisindo esingu-3 130kg Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu ILexus GX yakhelwe phezu kwesisekelo esifanayo neseToyota Land Cruiser Prado. IPrado  inenjini engu-2.8l kadizili, lapha kufakwe enkulu engu-3.5l twin-turbo V6 kaphethroli. Iyenza iyicele indlela ngoba inamandla angu-260kW ne-torque engu-650Nm. Isebenza no-gearbox oshintsha kamnandi oyi-10 speed auto owenze ngawakhohlwa nama-pedal shifters ngemuva kwesiteringi. Uma ushintsha ama-drive modes uyifaka kuSport+ ishintsha ukuduma uzwe ukuthi yiV6 futhi noma unyathela emafutheni ifune ukungena ejubaneni. Yize inkulu kodwa iyashesha ngoba ngemizuzwana eyisikhombisa isuke isiwubambile u-100km/h futhi ijubane ligcina ku-175km/h. Enye yezimbangi iLand Rover Defender inenjini kadizili eyongayo, lapha ukuze wonge kumele ube nonyawo lwesokudla oluthambile. KwaLexus bathi idla amalitha angu-12.3 ngo-100km ethangini elingu-80l kodwa kimi bekunzima ukwehla ngaphansi kuka-15l/100km, ngizulazula edolobheni. Emgwaqweni ovulekile ngihamba kahle bengibona yehla. Yize ingalunqeni ubhuqu kodwa ngigcine ngingayifakanga ngenqena nokuklwebha amarimu. Njengoba idonsa ngawo womane amasondo kodwa kuphinde kube ne-diff lock kanjalo ne-4L. Ukuqokwa kwayo kwezibanga isicoco se-2026 SA Car of the Year kusidweba sicace isithombe sezinga elikuyo elingenza uyizibe iDefender noma amanye amaSUV amakhulu anjenge-Ineos Grenadier, Toyota Land Cruiser 300. Ungayifaka neGWM Tank 500 nezinye. Lexus GX 550 SE - R 1 866 500 Iphuma ne-warranty ne-maintenance plan kweminyaka eyisikhombisa noma u-100 000km.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IVolkswagen Golf 8.5 GTI ifika nophawu lakwaVW olukhanyayo ngaphambili IMOTO: VOLKSWAGEN GOLF GTI KUKE kwangifikela emqondweni ukuthi ngivele ngibhale igama leVolkswagen Golf GTI, ngifake izithombe nentengo bese ngiyayivala le ndaba. Phela iGolf GTI yimoto engasadinge kwethulwa nakuchazwa ngoba inomlando omude emhlabeni jikelele naseNingizimu Afrika. Empeleni abanye sebeze bengawuphimisi nhlobo uGolf kodwa bavele bathi yi-GTI. Kungabe yisemalokishini noma esilungwini cishe bancane abangayazi. Uma ingahambi abayithengele izidingo zayo, iqhamuka iphayiza amalambu aluhlaza amaphoyisa okanye amhlophe ezinkampani zonogada abazimele. Ngiyakhumbula ngesikhathi sophiko lwamaphoyisa olwalubizwa ngamaScorpions lwaluhamba ngamaGolf 4 GTI. Njengoba sekukhona oKlebe nje, nabo bahamba ngawo amaGolf GTI. Ezinye zezizathu ezenza amaphoyisa nabanye bayithande yindlela eshesha ngayo emgwaqweni. Bazojabula ukuzwa ukuthi njengoba sekukhona eteketiswa ngeGolf 8.5 GTI, amandla asenyusiwe. Ngesikhathi iGolf 8 GTI ifika eNingizimu Afrika ngo-2021, injini kaphethroli engu-2.0 turbo ibinamandla angu-180kW ne-torque engu-370Nm. Ukusuka ku-0 iye ku-100km/h bekuba yimizuzwana engu-6.4. Kwi-8.5 GTI amandla ale njini efanayo asenyusiwe asengu-195kW. Lokhu kwenza nokuthi u-100km/h iwushaye ngemizuzwana engu-5.9 kanti ijubane ligcina ku-250km/h. Ngiyishayela eGoli kuleli sonto bengize ngihleke ngedwa uma kufanele ngidlule ezinye izimoto ngoba bekuba wukubona isikhala bese nginyathela nayo isheshe inginike amandla engiwadingayo. U-gearbox oyi-7 speed DSG ushintsha kahle kodwa bengibuye ngizibambele ngama-pedal shifters ngemuva kwesiteringi. Ngikuqaphelile ukuthi ngisho noma ngabe ukhethe ukuthi uzishintshele wena amagiya kodwa uma unyathela ize ibheke olayini ababomvu kuma-revs izishintshela yona. Ngaphakathi ine-touchscreen infotainment system enkulu ebheke ngakumshayeli iVW Golf 8.5 GTI NjengakwiGolf 8 GTI, umsindo wodumo othi “vrrr pha” uma ushintsha awusekho mkhulu njengakuqala njengoba imithetho yakwamanye amazwe ingasawufuni umsindo. Okunye engikuqaphelile ukuthi noma ngabe uhamba ngayiphi i-drive mode kodwa ayikuxukuzi noma ayizweli kakhulu emgwaqweni nokuyenza kube yimoto ekahle yansuku zonke. Kuphethroli bathi idla amalitha angu-7.2 ngo-100km ethangini elingu-50 litres. Ekupheleni konyaka odlule ngesikhathi kufika isitokwe sokuqala seGolf 8.5 GTI, kwa-VW kuleli baveza ukuthi abayithengayo wumbala kuphela into abazokwazi ukuyikhetha ngoba ifika isifakwe yonke into. Namanje lokho kusaqhubeka. Akukho ukwengeza imali ukhethe okufunayo. Ngaphambili ifike nama-headlights angama-LED asezingeni eliphezulu. Ahlanganiswa wulayini ogijima ngezansi kobomvu wodumo kwi-grille. Uphawu lwakwa-VW seluyakhanya ngaphambili. Amasondo enyathela ngawo angu-19” abizwa ngeQueenstown futhi akhelwe iGTI kuphela. Ngemuva izinqawe ezimbili ziyacwebezela bese kuba namalambu angamaLED. Okhakhayini into ethandwayo ezimotweni zakwaVW, i-panoramic sunroof nayo ifika ngaphandle kokwengeza imali njengakwendala. I-VW Golf 8.5 GTI ifika namandla anyusiwe angu-195kW Ngaphakathi inezihlalo eziyisikhumba. Ezangaphambili uyakwazi ukuzishisisa noma uzibandise. Okunye okwazi ukukushisisa yisiteringi osekubuyiswe kuso amabhathini akudala aqinile kwazise amakhasimende ayekhala ngacwebezelayo athinteka kalula. Iphinde ibe ne-digital instrument cluster egqamile nokwazi ukuyishintsha iveze okufunayo. Kugqame ne-touchscreen infotainment system enkulu engu-12.9-inch. Ifika nenkombandlela, uxhuma khona iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, udlala umsakazo, ikuvezela khona ingaphandle uma upaka nokunye. Ezokuphepha nezinsiza zomshayeli abazifakile kubalwa i-adaptive cruise control, iyasho uma uzoshayisa, iyakusiza ukupaka nokunye. Volkswagen Golf GTI- R908 000 Ifika ne-service plan yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-90 000km, i-warranty yeminyaka emithathu noma u-120 000km ne-service plan yeminyaka engu-12.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UBAHUBHE eshutha nabalandeli bakhe eWorkshop eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo emini Image: Bhanyazile TV2 UMASKANDA uBahubhe usedalule ukuthi ngeke aphinde ethule ama-albhamu akhe ngaphandle kwenxanxathela yezitolo iWorkshop enkabeni yeTheku kulandela "ukuxoshwa" ngabaphathi bayo ngenxa yokugcwala kwabantu. NgoMgqibelo lo mculi ubenze indumezulu yomcimbi wokwethula i-albhamu yakhe entsha ethi Ngizobalanda. Bekusweleka indawo yokunyathela ngenxa yokuphuma kwabantu ngobuningi babo bezobona lo mculi nabanye abebamemile. Phakathi kwabebezomeseka kubalwa uJumbo ampikile kwi-albhamu, Zakwe, Ntencane, Saliwa, Ndoni, Lungelo Hlongwane, Gadla Nxumalo, Musa Mseleku, Ithwasa Lekhansela nabanye. UBahubhe utshele Isolezwe ukuthi eWorkshop yilapho ezalelwe khona ngokomculo. “Inkaba yami ilapha eWorkshop. Mina ngiyindoda engakhohlwa la iphuma khona ngakho uma ngishiya labo bantu ngiya kobani? Bangazi ngani abantu engiya kubona? Yingakho bekugcwele kanjeya. Abantu baseWorkshop bebezobonga ukuthi angibalahlanga noma sekukwelinye izinga,” kusho uBahubhe. Uthe abekufisa nosekwenzekile wukuthi ubefuna ukuthi iWorkshop axoshwe yiyona kungabi uyena ozihambelayo ngoba esezibona engcono. “Kuyangijabulisa ke ukuthi ngenze umcimbi kwaze kwabuya abaphathi abathi leya ndawo ayisangifanele. Sebezoyizama yona indawo ngoba laphaya akusenzeki lutho uma ngikhona. Ngeke uphinde nje ubone ngethula i-albhamu eWorkshop ngoba abaphathi bangixoshile izolo, (esho ngoMgqibelo) base bethi kodwa kuyoba umsebenzi wabo ukungitholela indawo engifanele ngoba akubanga yimina ozixoshayo eWorkshop,” kusho uBahubhe othe umcimbi ube ngaphezu kwempumelelo. I-albhamu abeyethula inezingoma ezingu-17. Bekulindeleke ukuthi iphume ngoMgqibelo ekuseni ezitolo zomculo za-online kodwa kwangenzeka. “Iphutha alikho kimina ngoba ngazifaka. Ukubambezeleka kungakubona. Okwami ukuthi ngicele abafowethu ukuthi babekezele ngoba ingavela noma yinini. Nami sengikhathazekile ngoba abantu bayalwa, bazi ukuthi into uma bengayitholi kusuke inkinga kuwuwena kanti ngibathanda kakhulu abalandeli bami, ngeke ngibenzele phansi.” Uveze ukuthi kule albhamu unemiyalezo eminingi kodwa isikhathi esiningi ukhonze ukuzidlalela. “Kunengoma nje laphayana ethi: “WeJehova wena ngiyakudlela iZulu ngiyalithatha kube elami.” Uyabo leyo nto iwumdlalo ongawuzwa ngesinxele kodwa kahle hle inhloso yengoma yami wukudlulisa ukuphatheka kabi ukuthi hawu Nkulunkulu wasithathela abantu esibadinga kangaka kusuke sekwenze njani? Ekugcineni ngiyasho ukuthi ngiyadlala njalo ngoba akumele umuntu ayithathe ayifake kuye le nto ngoba kunabantu abamkhonzayo uNkulunkulu nami ngiyamkhonza kodwa ingoma uma uzoyikhipha kumele ikhulumise.” Uphethe ngokuveza ukuthi uhlela ukwenza umcimbi ngakubo uJolivet, ozoba yifestivali yomculo. “Akumele ngithandwe kangaka ezizweni ngakithi ngingabenzeli ubuhle.” UMCULI wokholo, uJumbo, enandisa emcimbini kaBahubhe eWorkshop ngoMgqibelo Image: Bhanyazile TV2

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: U-DEMOR Sikhosana, Shoba noBlack Coffee okuvela ukuthi base-studio bapheka umculo omusha ndawonye KUJABULISE abalandeli ukuvela kwezithombe zamalungu eqembu iShana ese-studio kukhombisa ukuthi kukhona akuphekayo. IShana (Simply Hot and Naturally African) yiqembu eladuma eminyakeni edlule libunjwe nguNathi "Black Coffee" Maphumulo, Mnqobi "Shoba" Shoba noThandukwazi "Demor" Sikhosana. Lazakhela udumo ngezingoma okubalwa kuzo ethi Uyangichomela, Benga, Umuhle, Ung'phula Inhliziyo nezinye. UBlack Coffee noShoba sekunesikhashana besebenza ndawonye behambela namazwe omhlaba. Yize bebebonakala bendawonye noDemor kodwa kuqale ukuvela ngezithombe abazinameke ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi kukhona abakuphekayo. UDemor noShoba bafake ama-video nezithombe emakhasini abo ezinkundleni zokuxhuana bese-studio. Yizindaba ezehle kamnandi kubalandeli abazwakalise ukujabula bephawula. "Sibonga uNkulunkulu onofefe namadlozi enu," kubhala umculi ophinde abe ngumsakazi u-Unathi Nkayi. U-DJ Boonu uphawule ngegama elilodwa wathi "izingwazi". "Abafana bakaMam'Busi madoda. Kwakuhle madoda! Nesalukazi siyagiya lapho sikhona,'' kuphawula uVusi Leeuw. Abanye abakhombise ukujabula kubalwa kubo uDBN Gogo, DJ Tira, Benny Maverick, Malumz on Decks nabanye. Bobabili uDemor noShoba batshele leli phephandaba ukuthi abafuni ukuyikhulumela eziko okwamanje. Bathe konke kuzohlala obala ngesikhathi esifanele. IShana yahlangana ngesikhathi besafunda ndawonye eNatal Technikon esiyaziwa ngeDurban University of Technology (DUT). Basebenze nabaculi abaningi okubalwa kubo uBusi Mhlongo noLebo Mathosa abangasekho, Oskido, Christos. Kusuka iqembu lakhetha ukusebenza ngokuhlukana kwamalungu, uBlack Coffee udlondlobale wakhonya emazweni omhlaba. UShoba ukhiphe ama-albhamu ashise izikhotha njengoba manje esengenise nasemculweni we-Afro house ehambela amazwe omhlaba. UDemor naye ukhiphe ngokuzimela wavundulula nabaculi abaningi okubalwa kubo uSun El Musician nabanye.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: U-TBO Touch nozakwabo ethula nabo uhlelo i-The Touchdown. Kusuka kwekunxele nguLindi Mtshali, Tbo Touch, LootLove noMorena Mothupi UMSAKAZI wohlelo lwantambama phakathi nesonto kwiMetro FM, uTbo Touch, udalule ukuthi usayine inkontileka entsha nalesi siteshi. Lesi silomo somsakazi sethula uhlelo i-The Touchdown noLootLove, Lindi Mtshali noMorena Mothupi njalo ngo-3 kuya ku-6 ntambama. Ngokujwayelekile iziteshi ezingaphansi kweSABC zijwayele ukwenza izinguquko ezinhlelweni uma kuqala u-Ephreli. Njengoba sekubalwa izinsuku ngaphambi kokuphela kwenyanga, baningi ababhekile ukuthi yini ezokwenzeka. Nokho uTbo Touch uqede ukuqagela ngekusasa lakhe nozakwabo ohlelweni lwangoLwesihlanu. Uthe ubusisiwe ngokusebenza nethimba abambisene nalo ohlelweni ngaphambi kokusho ukuthi bayisizathu sokuthi inkontileka yakhe ivuseleliwe. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, ithimba leMetro FM lilungiselela ukutheleka eThekwini, ngenyanga ezayo. Phakathi kuka-Ephreli 22 no-26 kuhlelwe imicimbi ehlukene ehambisana nemiklomelo amaMetro FM Music Awards abuya kuleli dolobha iminyaka emithathu ezayo. Abaqokiwe emiklomelweni ezoba seNkosi Albert Luthuli International Convention Centre ngo-Ephreli 26, basanda kumenyezelwa futhi ukuvota kuyaqhubeka.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-RENAULT Kiger ethuthukisiwe inamasondo afakwe amakhava ayenza ibukeke kahle ABANTU bayazifela ngama-Sport Utility Vehicle (SUV) futhi nezinkampani ziyakubona lokho, yingakho umbango wabathengi ushube kanje. Kwabiza intengo ephansi yilapho kushube kakhulu khona ngoba amakhasimende maningi kanjalo nezinhlobo angakhetha kuzo ziwuchithi saka. Ngibala wena Nissan Magnite, Hyundai Exter, wena Tata Punch, wena Mahindra 3X0, nezinye. Lokhu kwenza kubaluleke ukuthi izinkampani zibe nezinto ezehlukile ezizodoba ngazo abathengi. KwaRenault South Africa bavele bethula iKiger ethuthukisiwe ukuze izoqhubeka nokuthandwa kwazise ibisihanjelwa yiminyaka. IKiger yafika ngo-2021, izovala isikhala seSandero futhi isiphenduke enye yezimoto zakwaRenault ezibalulekile njengoba kudayiswe angaphezu kuka-28 000. Ubuhle ngenye yezinto eziheha abantu ukuthi bathenge imoto futhi kwaRenault bayithuthukisile indlela ebukeka ngayo. Ngaphambili isifana nezimoto zakwabo zakamuva ngokuba nophawu olusha lwale nkampani olugqamile kwi-grille. Uma unganakile ungazitshela ukuthi ifakwe amarimu emasondweni angu-16 inch kanti amakhava ayenza ibe yinhle nokho. Ngemuva nakhona kunophawu olusha kanjalo namalambu angamaLED amise okuka-C. Okhakhayini inama-roof rails angagcini ngokuyenza ibukeke kahle kodwa akwazi ukuthwala isisindo esingu-50kg. Ukushiya kwayo igabade ngo-205mm kuphelelisa ukubukeka kwayo njenge-SUV. Ngaphakathi okokuqala okungifikele wukuthi kumele ube wumuntu ohlanzekile ngoba izihlalo zinendwangu e-cream. Imesha ne-dashboard. Kuhle khona kodwa kuyashesha ukuzwela ukungcola. Ngaphambili kune-touchscreen infotainment system engu-8 inch oxhuma khona iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto. Ukuze kube lula ukuphendula iselula, bafake amabhathini esiteringini. Bekungaba kuhle ukuba izimbobo zokushaja okungenani zimbili ngaphambili ngoba iyodwa futhi akuyona eye-USB Type-C. Amathuba okushayisa uma uhlehla mancane kwazise kwi-screen kuphinde kuvele khona ingemuva futhi kunama-sensor abanga umsindo uma ususondele kakhulu entweni. Engikuthanda ngengaphakathi wukuthi livulekile futhi kunezindawo eziningi zokubeka izinto njengeselula, iziphuzo nokunye. Ebhuthini isikhala singu-405 litres. Emgwaqweni ihamba ngenjini engu-1.0 litre engenayo i-turbo. Inamandla angu-52kW ne-torque engu-96Nm njengakwiTriber. Nokho ngiyizwe ikhombisa ukuba nempilo kuneTriber. Kunemiqansa ibitabalasa iya phambili yize kodwa isikhathi esiningi bengihamba ngedwa ngingalayishe nampahla. U-gearbox uyi-5 speed manual. Bengixukuzeka uma ngishintsha amagiya, ngokuhamba kwesikhathi ngayibamba ukuthi i-clutch ithanda ukuba yinde ngakho kumele ngiyidedele kahle ngaphambi kokunyathela amafutha. Kuphethroli ibidla amalitha angu-7.6 ngo-100km. KwaRenault nokho bazoyilamanisa ngenenjini ene-turbo emasontweni ambalwa azayo. Kwezokuphepha nezinsiza zomshayeli bafake amabhreki i-ABS, EBD, iyasho ukuthi ungakanani umoya osemathayini, inendawo yokufasa isihlalo sengane ne-Eletronic Stability Program, Traction Control System nama-airbag ayisithupha. Renault KIGER  MT Techno - R244 999 Ifika ne-warranty yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-150 000km ne-service plan yeminyaka emibili noma u-30 000km.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ISUZUKI Grand Vitara inama-LED daytime running lights ayenza igqame nasemini Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu IMOTO: SUZUKI GRAND VITARA EZINSUKWINI ezimbalwa ezizayo iGrand Vitara izokwehlela ngezansi ekubeni wumakhonya emndenini wama-SUV akwaSuzuki njengoba kuzokwethulwa entsha i-Across. Ngeke ngichaze okuningi ngayo ngaphandle kokusho ukuthi hlala uthe njo kuyona le ngosi yeZezimoto ukuze uzothola konke ngayo. Engifuna ukukuchazela ngayo yiGrand Vitara engithole izinsukwana zokuhamba ngayo. Ihlukene ngezinhlobo ezimbili njengoba kukhona i-GL bese kuba ne-GLX efika nokuningi, nokuyiyo futhi ebengiyizwa amandla. NGAPHAKATHI iSuzuki Grand Vitara ihlanganiswe kahle yafakwa isikhumba sokuzakhela ezihlalweni nasesiteringini Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Ngoba sengize ngaliphatha igama lamandla, angisale sengikutshela ngenjini yayo. Ingu-1.5 litre kaphethroli engenayo i-turbo. Amandla angu-77kW ne-torque engu-138Nm. Amandla abezwakala enele lawa, ikakhulukazi eThekwini okuyindawo egudle ulwandle. Phela imoto uma isezindaweni ezimaphakathi nezwe lapho umoya uthanda ukucinana khona ziyasokola kancane emandleni. Inkinga ebenginayo kakhulu ngayo wu-gearbox oyi-4 speed automatic. Uzwakala "uwumhlobo mdi" kwazise izimoto zakamuva zishaya ngabasezingeni eliphezulu. Kokunye ibike idideke ukuthi ifake liphi igiya nobekugcina sekuyenza ibange umsinjwana. Lokhu kungenza abanye balunguze izimbangi ezifana ne-GWM Jolion Pro ebiza imali ecishe ilingane ncimishi nayo kodwa yona enenjini ene-turbo enamandla angaphezulu no-gearbox oyi-dual clutch. Ngale kwalokho, iyimoto ehamba kahle yokuthwala umndeni. Kuphethroli ibidla amalitha angu-7.1 ngo-100km. KwaSuzuki abayincishanga izinto efika nazo ngoba ine-cruise control kanjalo ne-heads up display. Ngangijwayele ukuhleka uma ngibona ukuthi ngemuva yona ine-wiper kodwa iToyota Urban Cruiser esuselwe kuyo, alikho. Kuze kwaba yikamuva lapho asebelifake khona. Ungalithatha kancane kodwa libamba iqhaza elibalulekile yokuthi ubone kahle ngemumva. Uma uhlehla, ingaphandle livela kwi-touchscreen infotainment system ukuze ungashayisi kanti iphinde ibe nama-sensor. Okunye kwezokuphepha abakufakile ngama-airbag ayisithupha, electronic stability control, amabhreki e-ABS ne-emergency brake assist (EBA) futhi ayihlehli uma usuka endaweni enyukelayo. Ngaphandle iyabukeka ngoba ihlotshiswe nge-chrome ecwebezelayo kwi-grille. Imesha namarimu angu-17 inch. Njengoba ngishilo ukuthi ifika nokuningi, ngaphakathi bayifake i-sunroof. Nokho noma uyivalile wavala nekhava, ilanga bengilizwa lingena. Izihlalo ziyisikhumba sokuzakhela kukhavwe ngaso nesiteringi futhi. Ngithanda ukuthi i-touchscreen infotainment system engu-9 inch inkulu kahle. Uxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay, udlala umsakazo nokunye. Ngiyakuthanda ukuthi kunamabhathini, hhayi ukuthi konke ukwenza khona. Okunye engikuthandile yizimbobo zokushaja ongazisweli kwazise ngemuva kukhona ezimbili neye-USB Type-C. Ngemuva isikhala sabagibeli sikhona kodwa ibhuthi ithanda ukungabi nkulu kakhulu ngoba isikhala sithathwa yisondo eliyisipele. Uyakwazi kodwa ukulalisa izihlalo bese sithi ukuthi xaxa. Suzuku Grand Vitara 1.5 GLX Auto – R453 900 Ifika ne-service plan yeminyaka emine noma u-60 000km ne-warranty yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-200 000km

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-Volkswagen Polo Vivo eyakhiwa efemini yakwaVW Group Africa eGqeberha ABASHAYELI bamaPolo Vivo balulekwe ngabakhiqizi bayo kwaVolkswagen Group Africa ngendlela yokuwapaka ukuze kuzogwemeka ukuthi angazihambeli kulandela ukutholakala kwenkinga kwi-handbrake. IPolo Vivo ikhiqizwa efemini yale nkampani eseKariega, eGqeberha, e-Eastern Cape. I-VW itshele iNational Consumer Commission ukuthi icela bonke abathenge amaPolo Vivo phakathi kukaFebhuwari 2025 noFebhuwari nonyaka ukuba bawahambise emagaraji ukuze ezohlolwa futhi alungiswe. Izimoto ezithintekayo zingu-25 729. Kutholakale ukuthi kungenzeka i-handbrake ingabambi kahle nokungaholela ekutheni izehlele yona. “Lokhu kungadala ingozi, kakhulukazi uma imoto ipake endaweni enyukelayo.” Abashayeli abahamba ngezinamagiya azishintshayo balulekwe ngokuthi bayifake kuP uma bepaka noma ku-1 kulabo abahamba ngeno-gearbox oshintshwayo. Banxuswe ukuthi bangapaki endaweni eyehlelayo noma enyukayo kuze kuba iyahlolwa. Bacelwe ukuba bahambise izimoto ngokushesha emagaraji akwaVW ukuba ziyohlolwa futhi zilungiswe nokuyinto ezokwenziwa mahhala. I-Volkswagen ithe nayo izobafonela abanikazi bezimoto ezithintekayo.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMASOJA Msiza odlala indawo kaNkunzi Mhlongo kuZalo Image: Facebook/Uzalo IKHULUNYELWA emakhoneni eyokuhamba kwesilomo somlingisi woZalo, uMasoja Msiza, kulo mdlalo wakwiSABC 1. UMasoja udlala indawo ephambili kaNkunzebomvu “Nkunzi” Mhlongo, emdlalweni okhonjiswa ngo-8.30 ebusuku, phakathi nesonto. Isolezwe lithole ngemithombo yalo engaphakathi kuZalo, ukuthi akucaci kahle ngekusasa likaMasoja oseneminyaka eyibambile emdlalweni. “UMasoja uyahamba futhi asimazi ukuthi uya kuphi,” kusho umthombo. Omunye umthombo ongazani nowokuqala, uthe naye uzwe ngandlebenye yize kungekho osephumele obala waqinisekisa. “Ngizwe kukhulunywa emaphaseji kodwa anginaso isiqiniseko,” kusho yena. Muva nje, kusanda kuqala isizini entsha ka-12 yoZalo olwaqala ngo-2015, lugxile emindenini emibili wakwaMdletshe nowakwaXulu. Kulezi zinsuku emdlalweni uNkunzi uboshiwe kulandela ukuboshelwa icala lokubanjwa kwenkunzi imali eyatholakala kwakhe. Ngokwamazwibela omdlalo ayo yonke inyanga, kuvela ukuthi uNkunzi usazoqhubeka nokuba sejele. Omunye umlingisi woZalo owanyamalala ngokuboshwa nguNothando Ngcobo olingisa indawo kaHlelo. Imizamo yokuthola ukuphawula kweSABC naboZalo ayiphumelelanga njengoba bengayiphendulanga imiyalezo abathunyelelwe yona. Nokho ngesikhathi uMasoja ethintwa, ukuphikile ukuthi akaseyona ingxenye yoZalo. “Asiyiyeke lapho, angihambi. Umdlalo nje. Abantu abehlise amaphaphu babukele umdlalo bengathuki. Sisayibambile, bona abaqhubeke babuke,” kusho uMasoja. UMasoja ujoyine Uzalo ngo-2017. Ngaphambi kwalokho, ulingise emidlalweni eminingi okubalwa kuyo Isibaya, Zabalaza, Scandal!, Umlilo, Ring of Lies neminye.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: OSAZIWAYO bakuleli abavaleleke eDubai, e-United Arab Emirates (UAE), ngenxa yokumiswa kwamabhanoyi, bacela usizo njengoba kuqhubeka impi eqale ngempelasonto. I-Israel ngokubambisana ne-United States of America (USA) bahlasele i-Iran. Esinye sezizathu ezivelayo wukuthi bavimba i-Iran ukuthi ikwazi ukwakha izikhali zenuzi nabakubona kungaba yingozi njengoba ubudlelwano bayo nala mazwe bungebuhle. I-Iran iziphindiselele ngokuqhumisa amazwe anobudlelwano ne-USA okubalwa ne-United Arab Emirates, lapho kunenkambu yamasosha ayo khona. Umsakazi ophinde abe ngumethuli wezinhlelo zethelevishini, uSpitch Nzawumbi, ulokhu ebhala ezinkundleni zokuxhumana njengoba eseDubai. NgoMgqibelo, ubhale kwiFacebook ukuthi uvalelekile. Unxuse abezindaba ukuthi bamthinte ngoba bayahlaselwa. Izolo, uSpitch oke wethula uhlelo i-Unfollowed kuShowmax, ubhale ukuthi: “Ngiphephile.” Image: Instagram/Spitch Nzawumbi Omunye usaziwayo u-Eva Modika, ukhiphe isitatimende ethi uthwele kanzima. Uthe uhambe eyosebenza futhi eyogubha nosoku lwakhe lokuzalwa. “Bengiqashwe eDubai njengoDJ nosaziwayo wakwithelevishini. Ngenxa yesimo esiqhubekayo, imicimbi iphazamisekile futhi kwamiswa wonke amabhanoyi. Ngenxa yalokhu sengilahlekelwe yimali elinganiselwa ku-R250 000,” kubhala u-Eva. Uthe unxusa uMengameli wezwe noMnyango wezobuDlelwano namaZwe oMhlaba, ukuba bangenelele ngokushesha, basize abantu baseNingizimu Afrika abakuleliya lizwe. UMnuz Clayson Monyela oyisikhulu kulo Mnyango, ubhale ku-X ukuthi umkhathi uvaliwe, “Akungeneki futhi akuphumeki kulawo mazwe. Siyaxhumana nabantu baseNingizimu Afrika sisebenzisa izinkundla ezahlukene. Izinhlelo zethu ziyasebenza,” kusho uMonyela. Isikhulumo sezindiza saseDubai, okungesinye esikhulu emhlabeni, sivalwe thaqa ngoMgqibelo ngenxa yale mpi. I-Airports Company South Africa (ACSA) esitatimendeni izolo, ithe kuphazamiseke ukuhamba kwamabhanoyi e-Emirates neQatar Airways. Ithe kuhoxiswe amabhanoyi ayisikhombisa abehlelwe ukuza e-OR Tambo International Airport, nelilodwa ebelizophuma. Esikhumulweni saseKapa kuhoxiswe izindiza ezine ebezizosuka khona kuthi eKing Shaka International Airport kwahoxiswa ezimbili.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: ULebohang ukhiphe incwadi yesixoliso ngokudlala ngesibhamu budedengu ULebogang Maji (23) owaziwa ngelika-"stockosamcd" noHosiame Chaane (22) bakhiphe izitatimende bexolisa ngokuziphatha kwabo budedengu, njengoba kuvezwe kwi-video esakazwa kuzo zonke izinkundla zokuxhumana bebhiyoza ngezulu lezandla okugcine kutholakala ukuthi azikho emthethweni. Bobabili baphinde bazibophezela ukubambisana ngokugcwele neziphathimandla zomthetho futhi bazithobe kuzo zonke izinqubo zomthetho ezisebenzayo. Abalisa ababili okuyibona ababanikeza izibhamu basagcinwe esitokisini ngamacala ahlobene nokuphambana nomthetho iFirearms Control Act, okuhlanganisa ukutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni nezinhlamvu, kanye nokutholakala nemoto ebiduniwe. Uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka. Isitatimende sikaLebohang UHosiame Chaane (22) ukhiphe incwadi exolisa emndenini nakubo bonke abantu ababone i-video yakhe nomngani wakhe bedlala budu ngezibhamu Isitatimende sikaHosiame Chaane (22)

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Uzobhekana nesigwebo esinzima uRosemary Ndlovu olahlwe elokwakha itulo lokubulala Owayeyiphoyisa uSergeant Rosemary Ndlovu kanye nalowo asolwa naye, uNomsa Mudau, bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi, eKempton Park ukuzozwa isinqumo senkantolo ngecala labo lokwakha itulo lokuzama ukubulala. Nakanjani, inkantolo isikhiphile isinqumo, bobabili batholwa benecala ngetulo lango-2018 lokubulala umyeni kaMudau. Inkantolo izwe ukuthi uNdlovu wathintana nezigebengu ukuze zisize uMudau ekubulaleni umyeni wakhe. Uphenyo oluholwa nguCaptain Kheswa Mabunda luveze ukuthi uNdlovu watshela izigebengu ukuthi uMudau uzoxhumana nabo ngqo mayelana netulo lokubulala. Kwaba khona ukuxhumana ngocingo kanye nemihlangano eminingi phakathi kwabo noMudau, eTembisa, eKurhuleni. Kule mihlangano kuthiwa uMudau wacela amadoda ukuthi abulale umyeni wakhe, ethi uyamhlukumeza futhi uyajola. Inkantolo iphinde yezwa ukuthi uMudau watshela izinkabi ukuthi uzozikhokhela ngemuva kokufaka isicelo sokushona komyeni wakhe enkampanini yomshwalense. Ngokuhamba kwesikhathi, izinkabi zashaya ungqimphothwe, zabikela umyeni, uJustice Mudau, ukuthi umkakhe ufuna ukumsoconga.  Umyeni wavula icala lobugebengu emaphoyiseni aseNingizimu Afrika. Lokhu kuholele ekuboshweni kwabammangalelwa bobabili. Umshushisi wombuso u-Advocate Riana Williams uveze ubufakazi obethulwe ofakazi boMbuso babuhambisana, buqinisekisa futhi bufakazele ngaphandle kokungabaza ukuthi bobabili abammangalelwa baqala inqubo yokuzama ukubulala. UMbuso uthe uNdlovu uyena oqala ukwenza umnyakazo ngokuthinta izigebengu wabe esehlelela umngani wakhe usizo, kwathi uMudau wazibandakanya nezigebengu wacela kaningi ukuthi kubulawe umyeni wakhe. Inkantolo ithole ukuthi umbuso uliqinisekise ngempumelelo elinye icala lokwakha itulo lokubulala. Icala lihlehliselwe umhla ziyi-15 kuJulayi 2026 ukuze kuhlanganiswe imibiko yangaphambi kwesigwebo kanye nokukhishwa kwesigwebo. Lesi sigwebo siza-nje uNdlovu esevele edonsa odilikajele abayisithupha kulandela ukugwetshwa kwakhe ngoNovemba 2021 ngamacala okubulala amalungu omndeni amahlanu. Lezo zigameko zokubulala zenzelwe inzuzo yemali ngomshwalense kanye nokukhokhelwa kwenqubomgomo yomngcwabo.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kubhimbe uhlelo kuboengafuni ukubuyisela imoto esitolo Owesilisa waseWestern Cape ongasebenzi nobesekuphele iminyaka emihlanu ephikisana nenkampani yakwaFirstRand Auto Receivables (RF) Limited, uyalelwe yiNkantolo eNkulu ukuthi ibuyisele iVolkswagen Polo yayo ka-2012. IJaji elibambile u-Yakea likhiphe isinqumo esifingqiwe esivuna abakwaFirstRand Auto, ababefuna ukuthi kuhoxiswe isivumelwano sokuqala sokudayiselana futhi ilandwe imoto ngokushesha ku-Kenneth Langeveldt. mpi yezomthetho isukela ngoJanuwari 2017 lapho uLangeveldt enza isivumelwano esibhalwe phansi ne-WesBank sokuthenga imoto yenani lika-R198,235 ayikhokhele kancane kancane ngezitolimende . Ngaphansi kwenkontileka, uzibophezele ukuthi uzokhokha izitolimende ezingu-60 njalo ngenyanga zika-R3,303 kanti inkokhelo yokugcina yayihlelelwe uJanuwari 2022. Ubunikazi bePolo bagunyazwa ngokwenkontileka ukuthi buhlale ebhange kuze kube yilapho isikhokhelwe yaphela. Ngokobufakazi obuphambi kwenkantolo, uLangeveldt wayeka ukukhokha ngoJuni 2020 ngemuva kokunqanyulwa kwenkontileka yakhe yomsebenzi. Inkokhelo yakhe yokugcina yaba ngu-R3,637.82. Ngesikhathi kwethulwa icala, izikweletu zase zingaphezu kuka-R96 000. ULangeveldt wazise ibhange ukuthi uphelelwe umsebenzi futhi uyaphikisana nokuxoshwa kwakhe eNkantolo Yezabasebenzi. Uphinde wafaka isimangalo kumshwalense wakhe wezikweletu kwaHollard Insurance, ngethemba lokuthi ipholisi izokhokhela izitolimende zakhe. Nokho, uHollard weluleke ngokuthi isimangalo sincike emphumeleni wesimangalo sakhe nomqashi wakhe.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kushaqeke abaingi kuzwakala izindaba zokuhlaselwa kukaThato Mosolankwe, ngokusa kwangoLwesithathu USATHUTHUMELA umphakathi waseLomanyaneng, eMahikeng, kulandela ukuhlaselwa kwesishoshovu somphakathi esingumelaphi wendabuko uThato Molosankwe. Imibiko yokuqala iveza ukuthi uMolosankwe uhlaselwa abasolwa abangaziwa ekhaya lakhe ngokusa kwangoLwesithathu, bemdubula ngentululwane yezinhlamvu. Lesi sishoshovu sibulawa nje, besisanga kukhipha isimemo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana simema umphakathi ukuba uhlangane esitolo sengawo ngoLwesibili oluzayo ukubhunga ngezinto ezithinta ukubuyisa umnotho womphakathi ezandleni zawo umphakathi. Okukhulumela amaphoyisa aseNorth West uCaptain Majang Skalkie usiqinisekisile isehlo. Leli cala selidluliselwe ophikweni oluphenya amacala okubulala nobugebengu esifundazweni. Amaphoyisa anxuse amalungu omphakathi angaba nolwazi ngabasolwa ukuba asondele ngaphambili.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Abasolwa abathathu badutshulwe balimala kabi esigamekweni sokudubulana namaphoyisa eMariannhill ezintatha. Amaphoyisa aqoqe umbiko wezobunhloli mayelana nokuthi bakuphi abasolwa abebefunelwa icala lokuthumba nokukhwabanisa eGreenwood Park, kanye nelokutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni. Amaphoyisa abone abasolwa beshayela kuMilky Way Road base bezama ukumisa imoto yabo. Umshayeli kuthiwa uyishaye yazula imoto ephambana nomyalelo wamaphoyisa kwabe sekujahwana. Amaphoyisa ajahe abasolwa kwathi kusenjalo  kwaqhuma isibhamu. Imoto yabasolwa iphaphalaze yashayisa isihlahla. Abasolwa abathathu badutshulwe bafa ngesikhathi sokudubulana, alikho iphoyisa elilimale. Abasolwa batholwe nezibhamu ezimbili nezinhlamvu eziningi.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaphoyisa aseFree State Unit ayaqhubeka nokuphenya ngesigameko sokudubula esenzeke ngoLwesine, 14 May 2026, ku-R76 phakathi kwe-Tweeling ne-Reitz. Lesi sigameko siholele ekutheni kushone abantu abane kwathi oyedwa walimala kanzima. Abashonile bahlonzwe kahle yizihlobo zabo okunguLekiba Likhetho (24), Rebone Moeketsi (26), Pule Latela (32) noTshepang Cecilia Letsoha (27). Bonke abashonile badabuka ezweni laseLesotho. Isisulu esisindile sisalashwa esibhedlela ngenxa yokulimala kabi. Akekho osaboshiwe okwamanje, uphenyo lusaqhubeka. Amaphoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika anxusa noma yiliphi ilungu lomphakathi elizibonele kwenzeka lesi sigameko noma ongaba nolwazi olungasiza uphenyo ukuthi athinte uKaputeni Sandile Dladla ku-073 226 6788 noma 082 466 8530. Ulwazi ungaluthumela ngokungaziwa ku-#CrimeStop ku-08600 10111App noma ku-#MySAPSApp.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Badedelwe ngebheyili abasolwa ngokukhwabanisa eyeCovid -19 Umsolwa oneminyaka engu-48 ubudala ongowokuzalwa eMalawi, uFumu Mkalira Msiska, unkosikazi wakhe oneminyaka engu-48 ubudala, uGladness Msiska Mkhonto, kanye nomlamu wakhe oneminyaka engu-39 ubudala, uBongani Zoran Mkhonto, bavele ngaphambi kweNkantolo yeMantshi yaseMiddelburg, ngoMsombuluko, 18 Meyi 2026, ngecala lethenda ye-COVID-19 yohlelo lokusiza abasebenzi (TERS). UMsiska nomkakhe bathole ibheyili ka-R300 000 umuntu emunye, kwathi uBongani Mkhonto yena wathola ibheyili ka-R3 000. Laba bobathathu bazinikele ophikweni oluphenya ngamacala enkohlakalo eNelspruit ngeSonto, mhla ziyi-17 Meyi 2026, kulandela uphenyo olude oluqhutshwa oKlebe, iSpecial Investigating Unit (SIU), i-Unemployment Insurance Fund (UIF), kanye nophiko lweNational Prosecuting Authority (i-AFU) lokudliwa kwempahla. Uphenyo luveze ukuthi inkampani, i-A and F Consulting, kusolakala ukuthi yahlomula ngokungekho emthethweni ku-COVID-19 TERS ngokufuna imali yezisebenzi eziyizipoki ezingaphezu kuka-700 kanye nalabo ababeyizisebenzi. Le nkampani kubikwa ukuthi yathola imali elinganiselwa ku-R26 943 793.19 ngalolu hlelo ngo-2020. Kusolwa ukuthi imali yabe isidluliswa isuka kwa-A and F Consulting yayiswa kuKhulani Quality Contribution, okuyinkampani exhumene nonkosikazi kaMsiska. Umlamu kusolakala ukuthi ubegijima ethola imininingwane yomazisi esetshenziswa ukwenza umkhonyovu wokumangalela abantu abayizipoki nababengabasebenzi bale nkampani. Ngesikhathi sophenyo, i-NPA's Asset Forfeiture Unit yathola incwadi yokumisa ukusebenza kwama-akhawunti asebhange futhi yashaqa izimoto ezinhlanu. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kwalondolozwa izakhiwo ezintathu ezisePitoli, eMiddelburg, naseWhite River, kanye nempahla yasendlini kanye nempahla yasehhovisi. Icala lihlehliselwe umhlaka-20 Julayi 2026, ukuze kuqhutshekwe nophenyo. Izindlu ezishaqwe yiNPA zabammangalelwa

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Isidumbu sikhishwa emfuleni ithimba labatshuzi Kubulawe ngesihluku isalukazi esineminyaka engu-75 engcobo, e-Eastern Cape, sisolwa ngokuthakatha. Ngokwemibiko evelayo, kuthiwa amalungu omndeni wakhe amthathile amyisa emfudlaneni oseduze, amshaya ngepulangwe, amminza. Isidumbu sakhe esinqunu satholwe eduze nomfudlana sinemihuzuko ekhanda nasebusweni kanye nezibazi zokuklinywa entanyeni. Abasolwa babaleke endaweni yesigameko kanti bekungakaboshwa muntu njengoba amaphoyisa ephenya icala lokubulala. I-video ezungeza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana yalesi sigameko esiphazamisayo isiqubule ulaka emphakathini. Umphathiswa inwezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uBukiwe Fanta ukugxeke kakhulu ukubulawa kwabantu. Uthi lesi sibhicongo siyingxenye yezinkinga ezikhulayo e-Alfred Nzo Region, lapho sekubulawe abesifazane abane ngoMeyi kuphela.kanti bekungakaboshwa muntu ngesikhathi kubikwa.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Image: Sandi Kwon Hoo / DFA Amaphoyisa omgwaqo eLimpopo abambe ibhasi okusolakala ukuthi beligcwele ngokweqile ku-N1 eduze komgwaqo obheke eMashishing, ePolokwane. Leli bhasi, elisuka eMalawi liya eGoli, linelayisensi yokulayisha abagibeli abangu-70 kodwa kuthiwa belithwele abantu abangu-90. Iziphathimandla ziphinde zathola ukuthi uhlu lwabagibeli lukhombisa abagibeli abangu-25 kuphela. Izikhulu zakwa-SAPS kanye nezoMnyango wabokufika babizelwe endaweni yesigameko kanti uphenyo lusaqhubeka. UMnyango wezokuThutha nokuPhepha koMphakathi eLimpopo uxwayise ngokuthi ukugcwala ngokweqile kubeka izimpilo zabantu engozini wathi abomthetho bazoqhubeka nokubhekana nokuphulwa kwemithetho yezokuphepha emgwaqeni.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Uyavela owesilisa okhulelise ingane 11 Owesilisa okusolwa ukuthi ukhulelise intombazane eneminyaka engu-11 ubudala kulindeleke ukuthi avele eNkantolo yeMantshi yase-Atlantis ngoMsombuluko. Umsolwa, 32, uboshwe ngoLwesihlanu, ngomhlaka-15 Meyi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa eWestern Cape, uCaptain Frederick van Wyk, uthe kunencwadi egunyaza ukuboshwa komsolwa. "Leli hhovisi lingakuqinisekisa ukuthi owesilisa, 32, uboshwe ngoLwesihlanu, 15 Meyi, ngencwadi egunyaza ukuboshwa. Uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi yase-Atlantis ngoMsombuluko, 18 Meyi," kusho uvan Wyk. Lokhu kuza ngemuva kokuthi izakhamuzi zase-Atlantis zizwakalise ukucasuka ngemuva kokuvela kokuthi intombazane eneminyaka engu-11 ubudala yabeletha esikhathini esingangesonto esidlule, okusolwa ukuthi kungenxa yokuhlukunyezwa ngokocansi okubandakanya umuntu owaziwayo emndenini. Umama wengane uboshiwe wavela eNkantolo yeMantshi yase-Atlantis. INational Prosecuting Authority (NPA) ikuqinisekisile ukuvela kwakhe enkantolo. Okhulumela iNPA, u-Eric Ntabazalila, ukuqinisekisile ukubonakala kwakhe. "Yebo, singakuqinisekisa ukuthi umama wengane eneminyaka engu-11 ubudala uvele eNkantolo yeMantshi yase-Atlantis ngecala lokwehluleka ukubika ikhomishini yecala locansi," kusho uNtabazalila. Icala elibhekene nonina lihlehliselwe uLwesibili, Meyi 19.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UJoseph “Big Joe” Nyalungu, udutshulwe wabulawa abasolwa abangaziwa emagcekeni ebhizinisi lakhe Ngemuva kokusinda esigamekweni sokudutshulwa ngesonto eyedlule, uJoseph “Big Joe” Nyalungu udutshulwe wabulawa NgoMgqibelo emagcekeni ebhizinisi lakhe eMkhuhlu, eMpumalanga. Kubikwa ukuthi abesilisa ababili baphume emotweni eyiveni emhlophe, bangena emagcekeni ebhizinisi likaJoseph “Big Joe” Nyalungu, 62, eMkhuhlu bamdubula bambulala ngoMeyi 16. Ngokwemibiko, uNyalungu phambilini wasinda kwesinye isigameko ngoMeyi 8 waphuthunyiswa esibhedlela iMatikwana. Le nsizwa yaziwa ngokuba yinkosi yabazibgeli bobhejane abangekho emthethweni yayiyiphoyisa ngaphambi kokwenza lomsebenzi eMpumalanga. UNyalungu ubesematheni eminyakeni edlule kulandela ukuboshwa okumataniswa nokubulawa kobhejane. Amaphoyisa aseMpumalanga akuqinisekisile ukuthi aphume umkhankaso wokuthungatha ababulali kulandela isigameko sokudutshulwa kwendoda eneminyaka engu-62 ubudala eMkhuhlu ngoMgqibelo, ngabo-2.30 ntambama. Okhulumela amaphoyisa aseMpumalanga uColonel Mavela Masondo uthe, ngokolwazi lokuqala, abasolwa ababili baphume evenini emhlophe baqonda kumufi ehlezi nabanye abantu emagcekeni ebhizinisi lakhe. "Isisulu sizame ukubaleka, kodwa abasolwa basilandele futhi kusolakala ukuthi badubule kaningi bebhekise kuso ngaphambi kokuba babaleke endaweni yesigameko ngesivinini esiphezulu ngemoto efanayo." Uthe umufi uhlonzwe ngabezempilo endaweni yesigameko. “Umufi wadutshulwa walimala endaweni efanayo ngesonto eledlule.” Uqhubeke wathi imbangela yokubulawa kwakhe ibingakaziwa okwamanje. Nokho kuvulwe icala lokubulala kanti uphenyo lusaqhubeka.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuphele 'ukuphapha' kuboshwa abebedlala ngezulu lezandla Amaphoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (SAPS) abophe amadoda amabili ayamaniswa nezibhamu abonakale kwi-video esakazwa ezinkundleni zokuxhumana lapho abesifazane bebonakala bedlala budedengu bephethe izibhamu. Emuva kokusabalala kwe-video, abeSAPS Gauteng Crime Intelligence baqale umkhankaso wokuthungatha abasolwa okuwaholele eTembisa, eGauteng, lapho abasolwa betholakale khona baboshwa. Izibhamu ezibonakale kuvidiyo zithathwe ngamaphoyisa kanti uphenyo lokuqala luveza ukuthi lezi zibhamu azinalayisensi. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka lo mkhankaso abasolwa baphinde batholakala nemoto ebiduniwe. I-Gauteng Crime Intelligence iyaqhubeka nokuphenya ngabasolwa. Laba balisa ababili abaneminyaka engu-21 no-34 baboshelwe ukwephula umthetho iFirearms Control Act, ukutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni nezinhlamvu kanye nokuba nemoto eduniwe. Amantombazane abonakala kule video agcine atholakele ngemuva kokuthi umkhondo wabasolwa ukhombe amaphoyisa lapho ahlala e-Ebony Park, eMidrand. Ngesikhathi amaphoyisa ebuza ngawo kuvele ukuthi abonwe namadoda aseNingizimu Afrika eshayela imoto emhlophe yohlobo lwe-VW Polo. Imoto ibe isivinjwa eduze kwaseKaalfontein, abesifazane ababili abebefunwa batholakale emotweni base beyiswa eTembisa South SAPS. Amaphoyisa aphinde axwayise amalungu omphakathi ngokuphatha budedengu kanye nokukhonjiswa kwezibhamu, ngoba lokho kubeka izimpilo zabantu engozini futhi kuyicala elinzima. Abasolwa kulindeleke bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseTembisa ngesonto elizayo.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kubikwa ukuthi zimkhalele ephuma kwikhomishini kaMadlanga uBrown Mogotsi. Kubikwa ukuthi zimkhalele ephuma kwikhomishini uBrown Mogotsi ngoLwesihlanu ntambama. Kuthiwa uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseGoli ngoMsombuluko. UMogotsi uboshwe yithimba lamaphoyisa eSAPS ngesikhathi eshayela esuka ePitoli elibangise eGoli - cishe imizuzu engu-45 ephumile kwikhomishini, nalapho echithe cishe amahora amane ephekwa ngemibuzo. Ngesikhathi ethula ubufakazi, uMogotsi ubelokhu ephindelela ukuthi ubengafuni “ukuzifaka icala” ngesikhathi ecindezelwa ngumholi wobufakazi kanye namakhomishana ngezinto eziningi ezibalulekile. Amaphoyisa akuqinisekisile ukuthi kukhishwe incwadi egunyaza ukuboshwa kwakhe i-J50 ngokuphula umthetho. Ngokusho kwamaphoyisa, leli cala lisukela ecaleni lokuzama ukubulala uMogotsi eVosloorus ngoNovemba nyakenye. Abaphenyi bathi isigameko sokudubula sahlelelwa ngamabomu ukuze kwakhiwe isithombe sokuthi uMogotsi wayekhonjwe indlela.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuthunjwe osanda kuthola ekaRAF Amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal ahlenge owesifazane owayethunjwe kanye nabanye abayisikhombisa ekhaya labo eChappies Section, eMandeville, eSundumbili, ngamadoda angaziwa ezintatha zangoLwesihlanu, 15 Meyi 2026. Izisulu eziyisikhombisa kubikwa ukuthi zidedelwe KwaDabeka ngemuva kwesikhashana, nokho owesifazane, osanda kuthola imali yakhe ye-Road Accident Fund (RAF), uyiswe endaweni engaziwa. Ithimba leProvincial Tracking Team lisebenze ngokuzikhandla lathola imoto eyodwa kwezimbili ezasetshenziswa ngesikhathi kuthunjwa, abopha abasolwa abathathu. Uphenyo luholele amaphoyisa ePhoenix lapho isisulu, esiseminyakeni yo-30 ubudala, sitholakale singenamyocu. Amaphoyisa anxusa abahlomuli be-RAF ukuthi bangazidaluli izinkokhelo zabo noma baziqhayise ngale mali. Abasolwa bazamile ukukhipha imali kaningi kodwa kwanhlanga zimuka nomoya, kodwa bakwazile ukuthenga ngemali elinganiselwa ku-R30 000. Abasolwa ababoshiwe bazovela enkantolo maduze. Kusathungathwa abanye abasolwa.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: 1008617120__20260430__0 ULehlogonolo Chauke, odume ngelikaShebeshxt ULehlohonolo “Shebeshxt” Chauke (31) uvele okokuqala eNkantolo yesiFunda ePolokwane ngamacala okugebenga nokutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni nokuzama ukubulala. Ubhekene namacala angu-20 esewonke, amanye awo inqwaba yokuzama ukubulala. Udaba luhlehliselwe umhla ka-28 Meyi 2026 ukuze kuvunyelwe umbuso ukuthi uqedele ukudalula okuqukethwe emadokodweni abekwe endaweni eyodwa. Umsolwa ugqunywe esitokisini kusukela aboshwa ngonyaka odlule. Uzohlala esitokisini. UFadiel Adams evele enkantolo yeMantshi ePinetown Umholi weqembu lezepolitiki i-NCC nelungu lePhalamende, uFadiel Adams, unikezwe ibheyili ka-R10 000. Icala lihlehliselwe umhlaka-14 Agasti 2026 ukuze kuqhutshekwe nokuqhubeka. Njengengxenye yemibandela yebheyili, ummangalelwa uyalwa ukuba angaxhumani, ngokuqondile noma ngokungaqondile, nanoma ibaphi ofakazi boMbuso kanye/noma ukushushiswa. Ummangalelwa uyalelwa ukuba azibike mathupha eHhovisi Lamaphoyisa aseMitchells Plain Police Station phakathi kwehora le-06h00 no-20h00 njalo ngoLwesibili nangoMgqibelo, kusalindwe ukuphothulwa kwalolu daba. USOMATEKISI uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni nasolwa nabo uMvimbi Daniel Masilela noPhilemon Msiza namhlanje bajoyinwe umsolwa wesine ozinikele emaphoyiseni uBafana Sindane. Namhlanje babuyele enkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein, eMpumalanga icala lahlehliselwa uMsombuluko. Abammangalelwa bepulazi lezidakamizwa eSwartruggens Babuyela esitokisini abammangalelwa anga-11, abatholwe epulazini elikhiqiza izidakamizwa eSwartruggens, eNorth West. Laba nammangalelwe abayisihlanu (5) badabuka eMexico, uFabian Astorga, Jesus Alonso, Medina Astorga, Luis Alberto Ramirez Rios, Jose Andres Medina, Jacquelin Lopez Madrid(owesifazane); abantu ababili (2) baseMozambique, u-Ismael Afiado Massinge, uLourenco Constantino Cumbane; oyedwa (1) ongowaseZimbabwe, uTobias Soyani kanye nezakhamuzi zaseNingizimu Afrika ezintathu (3), uTyron John Schutte, uKyle Schutte, uVusi Amos Mkambi.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaphoyisa ashaqe impahla ongumbombayi eGoli I-SAPS e-Gauteng ishaqe izimpahla zomgunyathi ezibiza cishe u-R23m ngesikhathi somkhankaso wezinhlaka eziningi ohlose ukuqeda izimpahla eziwumkokotelo kanye nezingekho emthethweni endaweni edolobheni laseGoli ngoLwesihlanu. Lo mkhankaso ubudidiyelwe uphiko oluphenya izimpahla zomgunyathi lwaseGauteng ngokwesekwa ngamaphoyisa asemngceleni, Public Order Policing (POP), uphiko lwezobugebengu bezohwebo, abavikeli bemikhiqizo kanye nophiko lwezentela lwaseNingizimu Afrika (i-SARS). Impahla eshaqwe amaphoyisa enkabeni yedolobha eGoli Amathimba abomthetho abehamba ehlola amabhizinisi asenkabeni yedolobha ukuthi ayayithobela yini imithetho. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka lo mkhankaso kuhanjelwe izitolo ezingu-23 zaseshwa nokuholele ekutheni kuthathwe izimpahla nezicathulo zomgunyathi ezingu-27 058. Impahla ezishaqiwr zenani elilinganiselwa ku-R23m. Ama-ejensi okuqinisekisa ukuthotshelwa komthetho azoqhubeka nokuqinisa imisebenzi yokuthobela kanye nokuphoqelela ukuthotshelwa kwemithetho kulo lonke elaseGauteng ukuze kuliwe nezenzo zobugebengu ezihlobene nezimpahla zomgunyathi nezingekho emthethweni. Amateki kanokusho awasalanga

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abantu ababili okusolwa ukuthi yizigebengu ebezihlomile ngesikhathi bedubulana namaphoyisa eSydenham ngoLwesine ntambama. Amaphoyisa azibonele isigameko sokugetshengwa kuBurnwood Road lapho abasolwa abathathu, abebeshayela iKia sedan emhlophe, bebegebenga owesilisa impahla yakhe. Abasolwa asukume abona ukuthi kukhona amaphoyisa, bashaya bachitha ngemoto. Ngesikhathi abasolwa bebaleka, omoto yabo ishayisane netekisi base beyishiya. Babaleke ngezinyawo bedubula bebhekise emaphoyiseni, kwadutshulwana. Abasolwa ababili badutshulwe balimala kabi, oyedwa waboshwa. Uzobhekana necala lokubamba inkunzi ehlomile nelokuzama ukubulala emaphoyiseni. Alikho iphoyisa elilimale ngesikhathi sokudubulana.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kwengezwe amanye amacala kuFannie Nkosi USergeant Fannie Nkosi kulindeleke ukuthi avele ngaphambi kwenkantolo yeMantshi yaseThohoyandou ngoLwesihlanu, 15 Meyi 2026. Kusolwa ukuthi ngomhlaka-10 Novemba kunomsolwa owaboshwa ngokutholakala nensangu, izibhamu ezingekho emthethweni kanye neziqhumane.
