Uphenyo lukhomba ukuthi u-Sgt Nkosi wafika walanda idokodo lecala lokuqala enza sengathi uthunywe indlunkulu yamaphoyisa. Emuva kwezinyanga ezimbalwa kuthiwa waphindela eThohoyandou, wazichaza njengoColonel osuka ehhovisi elikhulu wakhipha insangu eyayishaqwe lapho okugcinwa khona ubufakazi emaphoyiseni. Yize ubufakazi wabubhuka kwelomkhulu, ngokuhamba kwesikhathi kwatholakala ukuthi kunesikhwama esishodayo sensangu. Kwavulwa icala lokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaphoyisa athole iziza zokukhiqiza izidakamizwa Abasolwa abayishumi nanye kulindeleke ukuba bavele okokuqala eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseSwartruggens, namhlanje. Laba babhekene namacala ahlobene nokukhiqiza izidakamizwa, ukutholakala nezinsimbi eziyigugu ngokungemthetho, ukutholakala nempahla eyingozi kanye nokwephula uMthetho wokufika kwabantu bokufika. Lokhu kulandela umkhankaso wezobunhloli owenziwe yiNhloko yeCrime Intelligence, ihhovisi lenhloko uezobugebengu obuhleliwe, kanye neDirectorate for Priority Crime Investigation (DPCI) South African Narcotics Enforcement Bureau (SANEB)  kanye nabanye ababambiqhaza okuholele ekuboshweni kwabasolwa abayishumi nanye (11) abaxhumene necala lokukhiqiza izidakamizwa ngoMeyi 13. Lo msebenzi uholele ekutholakaleni kwesikhungo esikhulu sokukhiqiza izidakamizwa esingekho emthethweni okukholakala ukuthi siyabandakanyeka ekukhiqizeni i-methamphetamine.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: USOMATEKISI uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni nasolwa nabo uMvimbi Daniel Masilela noPhilemon Msiza besenkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein “MINA ngiyinceku kaNkulukulu”, kusho uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni etshela abezindaba ukuthi umsulwa ngesikhathi evele enkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein, eMpumalanga. USibanyoni uvele nabanye abasolwa okunguMvimbi Daniel Masilela noPhilemon Msiza ngamacala okuqola namabili okushushumbisa imali. Icala elibhekene nosomatekisi uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni livele lashuba ngemuva kokuthi ummeli wakhe uShaun Abrahams SC owayeyisikhulu seNPA, esole uMbuso ngokungazimiseli ngesikhathi ufaka isicelo sokuhlehlisa inqubo yesicelo sebheyili. Abashushisi batshele inkantolo ukuthi uphenyo lusaqhubeka futhi kusadingeka isikhathi sokuqoqa ubufakazi. UMbuso uphinde waveza ukuthi isicelo sebheyili singase singaqhubeki ngoba imantshi obekulindeleke ukuthi ilalele lolu daba ibingakatholakali. U-Abrahams ukuphikisile lokhu wathi uMbuso uhlulekile ukuzilungiselela ngendlela yize uphenyo seludonse isikhathi eside. U-Abrahams uphinde waqondisa abashushisi enkantolo, wathi lolu daba lungaphansi kwesigaba 5 hhayi u-6 we-Criminal Procedure Act. UMbuso uphinde wagxekwa ngokungabanikezi abameli babasolwa uhlu lwamacala Imantshi u-J.T. Erasmus ibuze abashushisi ukuthi ngabe uhlu lwamacala ludluliselwe yini ku-Abrahams. UMbuso uvumile ukuthi awuzange. U-Abrahams utshele inkantolo ukuthi uyayidinga incwadi ukuze aqhubeke nesicelo sebheyili. Inkantolo iluhlehlisele uLwesihlanu lolu daba.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Usomatekisi waseMpumalanga Joe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni Image: Screenshot/TikTok Isikhulu samatekisi esidumile eMpumalanga, uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni, singomunye wabesilisa abathathu ababoshiwe esigamekweni esididiyelwe samaphoyisa sokuqola okuhlobene necala osekunesikhathi liqhubeka eKwaggafontein elibandakanya izinsolo zokusatshiswa kanye nezimfuno zezimali eziphindelelayo kusomabhizinisi. Uyamataniswa nezinsizwa okusolwa ukuthi ziyiqoqwana longongqondongqondo bobugebengu okubalwa kubo uVusimuzi ‘Cat’ Matlala. Laba nasolwa baneminyaka ephakathi kuka-46 no-60 baboshwe ezintatha zangoLwesibili eGauteng naseMpumalanga wuphiko lwamaphoyisa aphenya ubugebengu obuhleliwe. Okhulumela amaphoyisa esifundazweni, uColonel Malesela Masondo, uthe leli cala lisukela ezinsolweni zokuthi abasolwa bafuna imali kaningi kusomabhizinisi isikhathi eside ngaphambi kokuthi agcine elubika esiteshini samaphoyisa eKwaggafontein ngo-2025. Icala lidlulele ophikweni oluphenya amacala ahleliwe eMpumalanga, okuyilona elihole uphenyo kwabe sekuboshwa. UMasondo ukuqinisekisile ukuthi bobathathu abasolwa kulindeleke ukuba bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKwaggafontein ngoLwesithathu, Meyi 13, babhekene namacala okubamba inkunzi. Umsolwa oyedwa usagcwele amathafa. "Kukhona umsolwa oyedwa ongakaboshwa. Okwamanje amaphoyisa athi kungenzeka kwengezwe amanye amacala kubasolwa njengoba uphenyo lusaqhubeka." UMasondo uthe amayunithi ayisipesheli asebenzela ukuhlakaza amanethiwekhi okuqola futhi wanxusa izisulu ukuthi ziphumele obala.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Umengameli Cyril Ramaphosa noNgqongqoshe wezokuVakasha uPatricia De Lille ngokusuku lokuqala le-Africa's Travel Indaba, e-ICC eThekwini UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa wethule inkulumo yosuku embukisweni we-Africa’s Travel Indaba 2026, e-Inkosi Albert Luthuli International Convention Centre, eThekwini, ngoLwesibili ekuseni. URamaphosa ugqamise ukuthi imboni yezokuvakasha ayigxilile ekuthuthukiseni umnotho nje kuphela, wayichaza “njengendlela ephilayo ebonisa lokho esiyikho njengabantu.” Uphawule ukuthi iNingizimu Afrika yamukele izivakashi zamazwe ngamazwe eziyizigidi eziyi-10.5 onyakeni odlule, futhi ingxenye yekota yabantu abafikayo bevela esifundeni se-SADC - okukhombisa ukuthi "ama-Afrika akhetha i-Afrika." Uphinde wagcizelela umsebenzi omele iNingizimu Afrika namazwe angomakhelwane wokugqamisa i-SADC Tourism UNIVISA ukuze kube lula ukuhamba amazwe alesi sifunda ngaphandle kokubhajwa emingceleni. "Sisebenzela ukuthi sivule imingcele yethu ibe sendaweni eyodwa futhi sithuthukise izindlela ezibheke emingceleni ezibonisa ukunotha kwesifunda sethu. Uma abantu base-Afrika behamba phakathi kwe-Afrika, siqinisa umnotho wethu, sijulise ubudlelwano bethu bamasiko futhi sakhe izwekazi elididiyelwe. Ekuqaleni kwalo nyaka, enkulumweni yami yeSimo Sezwe, ngenza ikhwelo embonini yethu yezokuvakasha, kwiziphathimandla kanye nemiphakathi. Ngithe: "Manje kufanele sikhuthaze izinto ezikhangayo ezihlukile zamasiko, ezomlando nezemvelo ezikhombisa ubunjalo bezwe." Ngemuva kokwethula inkulumo yakhe, uRamaphosa uhole inqubo yokusayinwa kwesifungo sezokuvakasha. Lesi sifungo siqinisekisa ukuzibophezela okuhlanganyelwe ekukhuliseni umnotho wezokuvakasha e-Afrika, ukuxoxa izindaba zase-Afrika nokusebenzisana ukwakha i-Afrika engcono nomhlaba ongcono ngokuvakasha, ukubambisana, kanye nokwabelana inzizo yentuthuko.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: USomlomo wePhalamende likazwelonke, uNkz Thoko Didiza, usenqume uhlelo oluzolandelwa iSishayamthetho sikazwelonke ukuphendula isinqumo esikhishwe yiNkantolo YoMthethosisekelo USomlomo wePhalamende likazwelonke, uNkz Thoko Didiza, usenqume uhlelo oluzolandelwa iSishayamthetho sikazwelonke ukuphendula isinqumo esikhishwe yiNkantolo YoMthethosisekelo ngoLwesihlanu, ziyi-8 kuMeyi 2026, odabeni oluthinta i-Economic Freedom Fighters ebisola uSomlomo wePhalamende kanye nabanye, mayelana noMthetho 129I weMithetho yeSishayamthetho sikazwelonke kanye nombiko wePhaneli lezobulungiswa elizimele liholwa owayengumengameli wamajaji uSandile Ngcobo. Ngokwesitatimende esikhishwe yiPhalamende, siveze ukuthi uDidiza uyasihlonipha isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo futhi uzohambisana ngokugcwele nomyalelo neziqondiso zeNkantolo. Kuvezwe uhla olulandelayo njengezinyathelo ezizokwenziwa: 1. Ngokuhambisana nokufundwa okubuyekeziwe koMthetho we-129I, uSomlomo uzokwazisa ngokusemthethweni isiGungu Sikazwelonke ngombiko wethimba elizimele ngokwethula amajenali afanelekile ePhalamende. 2.USomlomo uzohlinzeka umengameli wakuleli ngekhophi yombiko wethimba elizimele ngokushesha, njengoba kuyalele inkantolo yoMthethosisekelo. 3. Ngokuhambisana nesinqumo senkantolo, uSomlomo uzoqala inqubo yokuhlela ikomidi elizophenya icala ngokweMithetho 129J kuya ku-129O yeMithetho yesiGungu Sikazwelonke ukuze kucutshungulwe inqubo yophenyo yesigaba sama-89 ehlongozwe kuMthethosisekelo kanye neMithetho yesiGungu. 4. USomlomo uzodlulisela ngokusemthethweni umbiko wethimba elizimele eKomidini elizophenya icala njengoba kuyalele inkantolo yoMthethosisekelo. 5. USomlomo uzodlulisela isinqumo senNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ekomidini elincane lePhalamende likazwelonke lokubuyekezwa kwemithetho ukuze licubungule izichibiyelo ezidingekayo zeMithetho yesiGungu sikaZwelonke ngokulandela okutholwe, ukufundwa, kanye neziqondiso zeNkantolo. Ikomidi elincane lizobika ngomsebenzi walo ekomidini lemithetho, lona elizohambisa izincomo zalo esiGungwini Sikazwelonke ukuze sizicubungule. 6. USomlomo uzonquma uhlelo olufanele, izinhlelo zenqubo, izikhathi ezibekiwe kanye nezinyathelo zokweseka isikhungo ezidingekayo ukuze ikomidi eliphenya icala likwazi ukwenza futhi liqedele umsebenzi walo ngempumelelo, ngokungakhethi nangohlaka loMthethosisekelo kanye neMithetho yesiGungu sikaZwelonke.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Abammangalelwa ngesikhathi bevele enkantolo yeMantshi eKempton Park Usomabhizinisi uTariq Downes, oyiNhloko yezoBunhloli ophikweni lwamaPhoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (SAPS) uMajor-General Feroz Khan, kanye neNhloko yesiFundazwe saseGauteng yeDirectorate for Priority Crime Investigation (DPCI), uMajor-General Ebrahim Ahmed Kadwa, bavele okokuqala phambi kweNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKempton Park  ngoMsombuluko bebhekene namacala amabili okuphula umthetho owengamele ukuphathwa komcebo wezimbiwa kanye nokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. Banikezwe ibheyili ka-R20 000 umuntu ngamunye ngaphansi kwemibandela yokuthi bangaphazamisi uphenyo noma baxhumane nofakazi. Kudingeka futhi ukuthi banikeze anaseshi izincwadi zabo zezokuvakash kungakashayi umhlaka-12 Meyi. Laba bobathathu kumele bazise umseshi kungakapheli amahora angama-72 uma behlose ukuhamba. Icala lihlehliselwe umhlaka-14 Julayi ukuze kuzoqhutshekwa nophenyo. UMbuso awuzange uphikisane nokunikezwa kwebheyili. UKhan uboshwe ngeSonto kulandela ukugasela kwamaphoyisa efulethini lakhe eHoughton. La macala asukela esehlakalweni sangomhla zi-5 kuNhlaba wezi-2021, lapho uDownes kusolwa ukuthi watholakala negolide elingu-75.9 grams, lenani elilinganiselwa ku-R62 836, esikhumulweni sezindiza i-OR Tambo International. Ngesikhathi ephonswa imibuzo, kuthiwa wathi uliphethe ngenxa yomsebenzi awenzayo womshoshaphansi oxhumene nezikhulu eziphezulu zakwa-SAPS. Uphenyo lwaveza ukuthi akukho msebenzi womshoshaphansi ogunyaziwe ohilela izimbiwa eziyigugu owawukhona ngaleso sikhathi. Umbuso uphinde uthi uKhan noKadwa bayalele amaphoyisa ukuthi adedele iDownes yize zingekho izincwadi ezisekela lo msebenzi. Ekhuluma ngaphandle kwenkantolo, u-Athlenda Mathe, okhulumela i-SAPS uthe kuyadumaza ukuba nezikhulu eziphezulu enkantolo. Abammangalelwa ngesikhathi bevele enkantolo yeMantshi eKempton Park Abammangalelwa ngesikhathi bevele enkantolo yeMantshi eKempton Park

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaloli abesetshenziswa ukweba uphethiloli Abasolwa abangu-11 abaneminyaka ephakathi kuka-27 no-46 baboshwe esikhungweni sikaphethiloli eMeyerton ngamalungu ophiko loKlebe lweTactical Operations Management Section ngeSonto ekuseni ngamacala okweba uphethiloli. Amalungu e-TOMS oKlebe athole umbiko lwezobunhloli mayelana nobugebengu obuzokwenzeka eMeyerton lapho okugcinwa khona uphethiloli. Ulwazi lulandeleke ngendlela futhi lendawo yaqashwa ngaphansi kweso elibukhali. Ngesikhathi kusagadiwe, kubonakale amaloli amabili ethangi engena kule ndawo okuthe uphenyo lokuqala lwaveza ukuthi kwenzeka into engafanele kuphinde kwaba nezinsolo zokuthi onogada abaqaphe le ndawo kungenzeka ukuthi baxhumane nabasolwa abayisishiyagalolunye ababoshiwe. Kuboshwe abasolwa abangu-11 ngetulo lokweba uphethiloli

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuboshwe amaphoyisa amabili Amaphoyisa angosigaxamabhande amabili kanye nesakhamuzi okusolwa ukuthi bayamataniswa nokudayisa ngokungemthetho kanye nokutholakala nezinsimbi eziyigugu baboshwe kulandela uphenyo olunzulu olwenziwa yi-Gauteng Counter Intelligence Operations (GCI-OPS). Abasolwa, baboshwe kulandela uphenyo ngezinsolo zokuthengiselana ngensimbi eyigugu, inkohlakalo kanye namacala ahlobene nawo. Ukuboshwa kwalaba baboshwe ngempelasonto yithimba ebelikhiphe incwadi egunyaza ukuboshwa kwabo i-J50. Kukholakala ukuthi inqwaba yamaphoyisa asebenzisa ubuhlakani abehambisana nabaseshi ngesikhathi igasela emafulethini aseHoughton eGoli, lapho kuboshwe khona uMajor-General Firoz Khan. Kuthiwa amaphoyisa ashaye izicabha ukuze angene endlini. Ngokubika kwe-eNCA, kushaqwe inqwaba yamaselula ngesikhathi kuseshwa. UKhan kanye neNhloko yoKlebe, uMajor-General Ebrahim Kadwa, kulindeleke bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKempton Park kusasa. UKadwa yena ulandwe emzini wakhe oseGoli. Ngokombiko wamaphoyisa, laba bobabili, kanye nowesilisa, ongumnikazi wenkampani yonogada eThekwini, baboshwe kulandela uphenyo ngezinsolo zokudayisa ngokungemthetho kanye nokutholakala nezinsimbi eziyigugu. Lokhu kuboshwa kuyingxenye yemizamo eqhubekayo yabezomthetho yokuhlakaza amanethiwekhi obugebengu abathintekayo ekuhwebeni ngokungemthetho kwezimbiwa ezibalulekile nenkohlakalo. Abasolwa kulindeleke ukuba bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKempton Park, ngoMsombuluko bebhekene namacala angase ahlanganise ukudayisa ngokungemthetho izinsimbi eziyigugu, aphule umthetho, inkohlakalo kanye nokwephula umthetho olawula izinsimbi eziyigugu eNingizimu Afrika. Iqembu lepolitiki elisolwa uFloyd Shivhambu I-Afrika Mayibuye Movement ikwamukele ukuboshwa kwamaphoyisa UMajor General uFiroz Khan no-Ebrahim Kadwa osekunesikhathi eside besolwa ngobugebengu. Lawa maphoyisa asolwa ngamacala anzima ahlanganisa nokusebenzisa budedengu izikhundla zawo esiphoyiseni ukuze kuzuze wona kanye nenkohlakalo ehleliwe. Isitatimende se-Africa Mayibuye ngokuboshwa kwamaphoyisa amabili

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abantu abahlanu abasolwa ngokuzingela obhejane ngokungemthetho ngesikhathi bedubulana namaphoyisa eHluhluwe ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Amaphoyisa aqoqe lwazi lwezobunhloli ukuthi abasolwa bebehamba emgwaqeni u-R618 bebheke esiqiwini. Kuwo lo mgwaqo kube nesivimbamgwaqo kumiswa futhi kuseshwa izimoto okuthe uma abasolwa befika kule ndawo kwaduma izulu lezandla phakathi kwamaphoyisa nabasolwa. Abasolwa abahlanu badutshulwe bafa, batholakala nesibhamu sokuzingela nesithulisi namavolovolo amabili. Alikho iphoyisa elilimale ngesikhathi sokudubulana.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UPeggy Nkonyeni owayengumphathiswa wezeMpilo KwaZulu-Natal Owayengumphathiswa wezeMpilo KwaZulu-Natal uvele enkantolo ngolwenkohlakalo ethinta ithenda. UPeggy Yoliswa Nkonyeni (64), ngoLwesine, uvele eNkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu, ebhekene necala lokukhwabanisa nenkohlakalo. Ukuvela kwakhe kuhambisana neqhaza okusolwa ukuthi walibamba ekuthengweni kwemishini yokuhlanza amanzi (Watakas) nemishini yomoya ezibhedlela (Oxyntakas) KwaZulu-Natal. UNkonyeni wayewuMphathiswa wezeMpilo e-KZN ngesikhathi okusolwa ukuthi kwenzeka ngaso lokhu. Le mpahla yathengwa enkampanini Intaka Holdings, ephethwe wusomabhizinisi wase-Uruguay uDkt Gaston Savoi. Enkantolo uNkonyeni uvele ehambisana noBusisiwe Nyembezi, Victor Ntshangase, Alson Sipho Buthelezi, Sandile Kuboni, Kuboni Shezi Incoporated, Lindelihle Mkhwanazi no-Rowmoor Investements 783 (Pty) Ltd. Umbuso uthi amanye amacala avelayo athinta uNkonyeni enzeka phakathi kuka-August 2006 no-November 2007 lapho uNkonyeni nabanye ababili (uMkhwanazi ne-Rowmoor Investments) babesebenzisana ukuze bemukele umhlomulo kaR500 000 enkampanini Intaka Holdings ukuze bayilekelele ithole umsebenzi ezibhedlela ezimbili. Udaba luhlehlele u-11 Juni 2026 , eNkantolo eNkulu eThekwini ukuze uMkhwanazi athole ummeli bese yena noNkonyeni bahlinzekwe ngezitatimende. Bazophinde bebuyele enkantolo ngo-23 Julayi 2026 ukuze kulungiswe izendlalelo zokuqulwa kwecala. Ngo-September 2024 ,uGaston Savoi wahlambuluka wavuma amacala okubalwa kuwona amane okukhwabanisa nayisithupha enkohlakalo enzeka eNorthern Cape naKwaZulu-Natal phakathi kuka 2004 no-2007. Udaba lwaphothulwa ngokuthi kube nesivumelwano sokuhlambuluka ngaphansi kuka-Section 105A of the Criminal Procedure Act. Wagwetshwa ukuthi akhokhe inhlawulo kaR 5 million, noma abhadle iminyaka eyishumi ejele, wagwetshwa neminyaka eyishumi ejele yalengiswa iminyaka emihlanu. Inkantolo yakhipha umyalelo wokuthi kudliwe impahla kaR60 million. Wayalelwa nokuthi akokhe uR15 million wezindleko zokudliwa kwempahla.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UFadiel Adams evele enkantolo yeMantshi ePinetown UFadiel Adams uzogqunywa esitokisini kuze kube isonto elizayo ngemuva kokuvela kafushane eNkantolo yeMantshi yasePinetown KwaZulu-Natal, ngoLwesine. U-Adams, oyilungu lePhalamende nomholi weNational Coloured Congress (NCC), ubekwe ngokusemthethweni amacala amabili okuphazamisa ukusebenza kwezobulungiswa namathathu okukhwabanisa. U-Adams uboshwe ngoLwesibili eKapa kanti ubhekene namacala okuphula umthetho ngezinsolo zokuphazamisa ecaleni lokubulala uSindiso Magaqa, owabulawa ngo-2017. UMbuso uthi u-Adams wenza okuphambene nomthetho ezenza iLungu lePhalamende, wavakashela umsolwa, uSibusiso Ncengwa, ecaleni lokubulala uMagaqa. Ngo-2024, u-Adams walibangisa eThekwini kanti kusolakala ukuthi wayephelezelwa amaphoyisa ngamalambu aluhlaza amyisa eWestville Correctional Facility ukuyohlangabeza abasolwa. Amaphoyisa athi lolu hambo lwenzeka ngesikhathi esaphenya ngalolu daba, kanti udaba selusenkantolo. Ngesikhathi engena enkantolo namhlanje, u-Adams uqabule isiphongo sikanina UMbuso uyaphikisana okukhululwa kuka-Adams, uveza ukuthi kudingeka bazilungiselele ibheyili. Eminye imininingwane edingekayo nebalulekile ekufakeni isicelo sebheyili kufanele ihlolwe kubuye kucutshungulwe imininingwane evele esithangamini sabezindaba sika-Adams, esichazwe njengebalulekile. "Washo ngokusobala ukuthi unguphunyuka bemphethe. Lokhu singakuchaza njengomuntu obalekela umthetho. Uqhubeke wathi; "uma ufuna ukungithola, ungeza ukuzongithola. Noma uma ufuna ukungithola, ungibophe," lokhu kubonisa ukungibamba uma ukwazi. Uzobuyela enknatolo ngomhla ka-13 Meyi 2026, ukufaka isicelo sebheyili.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Umufi uThumeka Bikwana Image: Sithunyelwe/ Chris Hani District Municipality Kuvulwe icala lokubulala esiteshini eBholotwa kulandela ukudutshulwa kubulawe ikhansela uThumeka Bikwana, 46, oyiMMC yeCorporate Services kuMasipala wesiFunda iChris Hani. Kusolwa ukuthi ngomhla ka-05 Meyi 2026 ekuseni, ngabo-09:45, ufakazi utshele amaphoyisa ukuthi ubone imoto kamufi imi phambi kwegceke lakubo eTshatshu. Umshayeli ukhale ngokuthi sekunesikhathi eside elindile kodwa ikhansela aliphumi. Ufakazi ungene wayobheka wathola umnyango wangaphambili uvulekile. Ngaphakathi umufi ubelele ngomhlane edamini legazi enenxeba lenhlamvu ekhanda. Imbangela yokubulawa kwakhe ayikaziwa, kanti akukaboshwa muntu okwamanje. Idokodo selidluliselwe kubaseshi bobugebengu obuhleliwe besifundazwe ukuze kuqhutshekwe nophenyo.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UMazwi Kubheka kuthiwa uzifikele yena emaphoyiseni Amaphoyisa aseVosloorus ayakuqinisekisa ukuthi uMazwi Mpumelelo Kubheka, 27, okwabikwa ukuthi udukile ngo-2 Ephreli 2026 utholwe ephephile. Kuthiwa uzethule esiteshini samaphoyisa eVosloorus ngobusuku bangomhla ka-2 Meyi 2026. Ubunikazi bakhe sebuqinisekisiwe futhi uzohlanganiswa nomndeni wakhe ngemuva kokuhlolelwa udokotela. Okwamanje, izimo mayelana necala lomuntu olahlekile zisabonakala ziyingcosana futhi uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka. "Lo muntu uvele esiteshini samaphoyisa eVosloorus ngobusuku bangomhla ka-2 Meyi 2026. Kuqinisekisiwe ukuthi uyena ngempela uzohlanganiswa nomndeni wakhe ngemuva kokuhlolwa impilo," kusho okhulumela amaphoyisa uColonel Dimakatso Nevhuhulwi. Iziphathimandla zithe izimo ngokunyamalala kwakhe azikacaci, njengoba manje kusaphenywa ukuze kutholakale ukuthi kwenzekani phakathi nezinsuku ezicishe zibe ngu-30 enyamalele. "Okwamanje, izimo mayelana necala lomuntu olahlekile azikacaci futhi uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka," kwengeza uNevhuhulwi.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuboshwe amaphoyisa amabili ngokuzama ukungena nezidakamizwa ejele Amaphoyisa amabili angaphansi kweTembisa SAPS, aboshelwe ukutholakala nezidakamizwa eBoksburg Correctional Centre. Lokhu kwenzenge ngoLwesithathu cishe ngabo-09:30 ekuseni, isikhulu sezokuHlunyeleliswa kwezimilo esisejele laseBoksburg, ngesikhathi senza imisebenzi ejwayelekile yokulawula ukungena, senze uphenyo ezimotweni ezingena emagcekeni. Ngesikhathi kuseshwa, lesi sikhulu simise imoto emhlophe ye-SAPS ebinamalungu amabili e-SAPS, oyedwa egqoke umfaniswano wamaphoyisa, omunye egqoke izingubo zabantu. Ngesikhathi lisesha imoto, isikhulu sithole upulasitiki oluhlaza esinamaphilisi e-mandrax angu-82 kanye nensangu, ufihlwe ngaphansi kwesihlalo. Amaphoyisa amabili abe eseboshiwe. Laba bobabili bazovela enkantolo maduze.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Imoto ebihamba abasolwa abahlanu Kubulawe umsolwa oyedwa, kwaboshwa abane ngemuva kokudubulana namaphoyisa e-Athlone. Leli qulu, okusolwa ukuthi liyamataniswa nesigameko sokugetshengwa kwebhizinisi eLansdowne, belihamba ngeToyota Avanza empunga engenazo izinombolo ngesikhathi amaphoyisa ophiko lwe-Flying Squad ezama ukubavimba. Kubikwa ukuthi umshayeli uzame ukubalekela amaphoyisa nokwenze amaphoyisa avulela ngenhlamvu. Imoto igcine ima. Bebebahlanu abasolwa abebengaphakathi, omunye wabo kwatholakala ukuthi ushonile, omunye obelinele uphuthunyiswe esibhedlela iGroote Schuur, abasolwa abasele baboshwa. Uphiko lwe-Independent Police Investigative Directorate luyaphenya ngokwenzekile.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Imoto okutholakale kuyo umsolwa edindilizile Utholakale edindilizilw emotweni umsolwa  ozilimaze ehlomisa iziqhumane ngesikhathi kugetshengwa imali enkabeni yedolobha laseKranskop ngoMsombuluko, 13 Ephreli 2026. Lo mlisa utholakale eshonile emotweni ebisetshenziswa ebugebengwini emgwaqeni owubhuqu ngaseTugela River, obheke eNkandla ngoLwesibili, 14 Ephreli 2026. Imoto yemali ibanjwe ntambama kwathathwa imali engadalulwanga kanti onogada abathathu kubikwa ukuthi baphucwe izibhamu. Kubikwa ukuthi kuphinde kwadunwa izimoto ezine ezisetshenziswe abasolwa ukubalekela. Abasolwa baphinde badubula bebhekise esiteshini samaphoyisa ngesikhathi kubanjwa inkunzi, nokho alikho iphoyisa noma ilungu elilimale. Umkhankaso wokuthungatha abanye abasolwa, okukholakala ukuthi okungenani bangu-12, uyaqhubeka.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Constable Emmanuel Shimmy Ntoampe UConstable Bheki Gavin Sithole, Adedelwe ngebheyili amaphoyisa amathathu asebenzela uphiko lwe-Gauteng se-Crime Intelligence, aboshwe ngezithuba zabo-16:20 ngeSonto kuRakoma Street, eTokoza. La maphoyisa okunguConstable Emmanuel Shimmy Ntoampe, uConstable Bheki Gavin Sithole, uConstable Tshabangu anikezwe ibheyili ka-R1500 umuntu ngamunye. Umsolwa wesine okuthiwa uyimpimpi yamaphoyisa ugcinwe esitokisini. Laba babhekene necala lokugebenga ibhizinisi eliphethwe ngabasePakistan eliseduze neLetsoho Shopping Centre. Kuthiwa bagasele esitolo bazethula njengamaphoyisa bafuna ugwayi ongekho emthethweni. Kuthiwa baphinde babopha ummangali nabasebenzi bakhe ngozankosi ngaphambi kokuthi balayishe amabhokisi kagwayi ongekho emthethweni ezimotweni zabo. Umnikazi webhizinisi odabuka ePakistani ubikele i-Thathazonke Anti-Crime Community Group, yaphendula ngokushesha abasolwa baboshwa. La malungu akhonjwe umkhuzi wawo njengabasebenzi besifundazwe beCrime Intelligence. Uphenyo lokuqala luphinde lwaholela ekuthathweni kwalobu bufakazi obutholwe kubasolwa: •Amabhokisi amahlanu kagwayi ongekho emthethweni •Izibhamu zokudlala ezine •Izibhamu zikahulumeni ezimbili  futhi kuthathwe ne-video eqoshwe endaweni yesehlo. Icala lizobuyela eNkantolo yeMantshi yasePalm Ridge ngomhla ka-17 Ephreli 2026.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: U-MARTHA Mani obesebenza kuMasipala waseMfuleni, eMnyangweni wezeziMali, ongcwatshwe kulandela isigameko esinyantisayo sokubulawa kwakhe esitolo samasondo, eVanderbijlpark. Luthathwe wuphiko lwe-Political Killings Task Team (PKTT) uphenyo lokubulawa kowesifazane obesebenza njenge-accountant kuMasipala waseMfuleni, eVaal. UMartha Mani wadutshulwa wabulawa ngoMashi, ngaphandle kwesitolo samasondo eVanderbijlpark. Lesi sigameko sokubulawa kwakhe saqoshwa kwi-CCTV, esisabalale ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Phambilini, uMartha ubeqashwe eMnyangweni wokuqoqwa kwezimali zikamasipala kwathi ngokuhamba kwesikhathi wakhushulelwa esikhundleni sokuba yi-accountant. Ngokubika kwe-eNCA, kuthiwa uMani uvundulule inkohlakalo ehambisana namathenda. “Wavula icala elayiswa koKlebe, waphinde wavula elinye icala lokusabisa futhi ngicabanga ukuthi axhumene la macala ngoba kukhona lapho atshela khona umngani wakhe ukuthi kunomuntu okhokha amasheke omgunyathi kumasipala, bese imali ingangeni kuma-akhawunti abo,” kusho umfowabo uLerato Rantsofu. Amaphoyisa athi uMani ufike endaweni yesigameko ngemoto yohlobo lweVolkswagen Polo emhlophe kanti abasolwa kuthiwa bebehamba ngeVolkswagen Polo eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka. Kwi-video esabalele ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, le ntokazi ibonakala imi phakathi kwezimoto ezimbili ngesikhathi ehlaselwa. Owesilisa uqhamuka ngemuva kwakhe, avulele ngenhlamvu, kuthi uma ewela phansi, adubule ngezinye ngaphambi kokuba abaleke. Okhulumela amaphoyisa aseGauteng, uNoxolo Khweza, ukuqinisekisile ukuthi likhona icala lokubulala elibhalisiwe, kanti bekungakaboshwa muntu. "Imbangela yalokhu kubulala ayikaziwa. Uphenyo lusaqhubeka, akekho osaboshiwe okwamanje," kusho uKhweza.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Ubucwebe obutholwe kubasolwa ababoshiwe Amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal abophe abasolwa abahlanu abaneminyaka ephakathi kuka-20 no-44 ubudala eMlazi kulandela ukugetshengwa kwesitolo sobucwebe enxanxatheleni yezitolo eMhlanga ngeSonto, 12 Ephreli 2026. Ngesikhathi beboshwa kutholakale ezinye zezinto okusolakala ukuthi zebiwe ngesikhathi kubanjwa inkunzi. Ngesikhathi amaphoyisa elungisa indawo yesigameko enxanxatheleni yezitolo, athole imininingwane emqoka yokuthi abasolwa esigamekweni sokugebenga bebefuna ozothenga izimpahla ezebiwe eMlaza. Amaphoyisa ophiko lweProvincial Murder and Robbery kanye neThekwini District Task Team asukumele ngokushesha abhekisa amabombo eMlaza athungatha abasolwa. Ngokulandela umkhondo ngolwazi olutholakelela, amaphoyisa abophe abasolwa abahlanu (5) ezintatha zangoMsombuluko, Ephreli 2026. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka lo mkhankaso, kutholwe ubucwebe obulinganiselwa ezigidini ezintathu zamarandi kanye nezimpahla zokugqoka, amakhadi asebhange kanye nama-router. Abasolwa ababoshiwe babekwe amacala okugebenga amabhizinisi kanjalo nokuzama ukubulala. Bazovela eNkantolo yeMantshi eThekwini ngoLwesithathu, 15 Ephreli 2026.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Ubuhle nobukhazikhazi   uKhuli Chana noLamiez bebopha elikasofa silahlane Umgubho womshado kaLamiez Holworthy kanye noKhuli Chana kanokusho wezinsuku ezintathu uyaqhubeka eMahikeng. Ngemuva kweminyaka yokulungiselela nokuhlelela usuku olukhulu, uLamiez Holworthy noKhuli Chana bagcine bebophe ifindo likasofa silahlane kule mpelasonto. Lezi zihlabani zomculo ezidume umhlaba wonke okwamanje ziphakathi komgubho womshado oyimfihlo obanjelwe osaziwayo, abangani nezihlobo, oqale ngoLwesihlanu, 10 April, kanti uzosongwa ngeSonto. UKhuli noLamiez baqala ukuthandana ngo-2018 futhi bahlala kafushane ngaphambi kokuba uKhuli akhokhele ilobolo mhlaka 2 Novemba 2019. Kuthiwa izinhlelo zomshado zenziwe esithe ukuze uzoba sezingeni eliphezulu. Kumenywe kuphela nabangani abasondelene nabo, umndeni, kanye nedlanzana losaziwayo. Le mikhosi kuthiwa ayilona neze ihaba, kodwa kuhlelwe umshado wesintu owenziwe ngesimanje, ubukhazikhazi, nokugqama kwesiginesha yabashadikazi. ULamiez noKhuli, ogamalakhe langempela, uKhulane Morule, sekunesikhathi eside beyizithandani ezithandwa kakhulu eMzansi, ezaziwa ngokusebenza kwazo ngokuzinikela nokubonisa uthando emphakathini. Indaba yabo yothando yaqala ukunakeka kubalandeli lapho bephumela obala ngobudlelwano babo eminyakeni embalwa edlule, ngokushesha baba yizona zithandani okukhulunywa ngazo kakhulu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Naphezu kokuhlala ndawonye bengashadile ngokusemthethweni kuze kube manje, lo bebengenawo amahloni okubonisa impilo abo ndawonye, ​​baze wamukela ingane yabo yokuqala ngo-2023, into uLamiez ayithatha njengesikhathi senjabulo enkulu empilweni yakhe. Ngokuhamba kweminyaka, baye bamelana nokuhlolwa komphakathi, amahlebezi, nezingcindezi zodumo, kodwa bahlala beqinile, bevame ukuncomana ezingxoxweni nasekuthunyelweni kwe-inthanethi. UKhuli Chana, oyingqalabutho ku-hip hop yaseNingizimu Afrika, kanti no-Lamiez, u-DJ othandekayo nomsakazi, bobabili bajabulele imisebenzi ephumelelayo ngenkathi besekelana. Umshado wabo ibonakale njengokuhlanganiswa kwemihlaba emibili emikhulu kwezikaqedisizungu. Manje, ngemva kweminyaka yokuthandana ngokuzinikela ngaphandle kwezifungo ezisemthethweni, sebenqume ukuqinisa uthando lwawo phambi kwezihlobo abangani abasondelene nabo.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UKUFIKA kwamasosha eKapa, akushintshe lutho njengoba eqhubeka amaqembu emigulukudu ngempi yezibhamu KUDUTSHULWE abantu abayisishiyagalombili eMitchells Plain ngoLwesibili ntambama, ezigamekweni ezahlukene. Izigameko zokudubulana zithuse abaningi njengoba bebenethemba lokuthi ukufika kombutho wezokuVikela waseNingizimu Afrika (i-SANDF) ojutshwe eCape Flats, kuzokwenza umehluko. Okhulumela amaphoyisa aseWestern Cape, uColonel Andrè Traut, uthe izigameko zokudubula zidluliselwe ophikweni olulwa nezigelekeqe ukuze luphenye. Esigamekweni sokuqala, kudutshulwa abantu abayisikhombisa ngaphambi kwehora lesithathu ntambama erenki yamatekisi eHazeldene. "Kubikwa ukuthi abasolwa abangaziwa bavulele ngenhlamvu bebhekise kwiqulu labantu, kwashona amadoda amabili aneminyaka engu-20 no-22. Zombili izisulu kuthiwa zishonele endaweni yesigameko. Abesilisa ababili abadala nezingane ezintathu, okuhlanganisa nentombazane eneminyaka eyisithupha ubudala nabafana ababili abaneminyaka engu-12 no-13, balimele baphuthunyiswa esibhedlela ukuze bathole ukwelashwa," kusho uTraut. Amaphoyisa avule amadokodo amabili okubulala nayisihlanu okuzama ukubulala ukuze kuphenywe. UTraut uthe imbangela yokuhlasela ayikaziwa okwamanje, wathi abasolwa babaleke endaweni yesigameko ngemuva kwesigameko sokudubula. Kwesinye isigameko esenzeke ePortlands, owesilisa (26), udutshulwe wabulawa abasolwa abangaziwa kuMerrydale Street. Abasolwa babaleke endaweni yesigameko ngemoto. "Isisulu sibe namanxeba amaningi okudutshulwa kanti kuthiwa sishonele endaweni yesigameko. Lesi sigameko kukholakala ukuthi sihlobene namaqembu ezigelekeqe," kusho uTraut. Zombili izigameko zokudubula ziphenywa ngamalungu ophiko olulwa nezigelekeqe.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UMuzi okushaywe kuwo umsolwa eMzomusha Kubulawe osolwa ngokuba yilungu le-West Gang ngesikhathi kudutshulwana namaphoyisa eNanda. Umsolwa, olinganiselwa eminyakeni engamashumi amabili ubudala, ubethungathwa ngamacala amaningi okugebenga kuhlonyiwe namanye amacala anodlame. Utholwe namhlanje ekuseni yithimba leSAPS Task Team yaseNanda kanye neSAT Enforcement,  esusela emininingwaneni yophiko lwezobunhloli - ecashe endlini eyikamelo elilodwa eMzomusha. Umsolwa kuthiwa uzame ukudubula amaphoyisa kodwa kwashayeka yena kuqala washona ngemuva kwalokho. Kutholwe isibhamu sohlobo lwe-9mm.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Uzogqunywa esitokisini uFannie Nkosi kuze kuqinisekiswe imininingwane yesicelo sakhe sebheyili USergeant Fannie Nkosi uzogqunywa esitokisini kuze kube uMsombuluko, Ephreli 13, kulandela ukuvela kwakhe eNkantolo yeMantshi yasePretoria North ngoLwesibili. UNkosi uboshwe ngoLwesine, ngemuva kokuba amaphoyisa egasele emzini wakhe osePretoria North. Wachitha impelasonto ende etokile. Inkantolo igunyaze isicelo soMbuso sokuhlehlisa ukuze uqinisekise imininingwane ehlobene nesicelo sakhe sebheyili. UNkosi, oyisikhulu esingaphansi kophiko lobugebengu obuhleliwe eGauteng, ungomunye wabantu abethule ubufakazi phambi kweKhomishini kaMadlanga. Okhulumela amaphoyisa kuzwelonke uBrigadier Athlenda Mathe uthe ukugasela kwabo kuyingxenye yophenyo oluqhubekayo. Iziphathimandla ziphume umkhankaso wokuthungatha nokushaqa ubufakazi emzini kaNkosi, lapho kubikwa ukuthi zishaqe inqwaba yezinto ezingekho emthethweni, okubalwa izibhamu, izinhlamvu ezingekho emthethweni, ibhomu kanye namadokodo asuka eziteshini ezahlukene zamaphoyisa.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuthiwa uyalulama esibhedlela u-Offset ngemuva kokudutshulwa eCasino NgoMsombuluko ebusuku (April 6), kubikwa ukuthi umrepha owayeyilungu leqembu i-Migos u-Offset usinde edutshulwa eSeminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino eHollywood, ngesikhathi edutshulwa ngezithuba zabo-7 ebusuku. Kuthiwa lezi zindaba ziqinisekiswe umkhulumeli wakhe ngesitatimende esithunyelwe kwabezindaba ukuthi lo mrepha usesimweni esigculisayo esibhedlela sendawo. "Singaqinisekisa ukuthi u-Offset ogama lakhe langempela nguKiari Kendrell Cephus udutshuliwe futhi okwamanje usesibhedlela uthola usizo lwezempilo.Uzinzile futhi uqashwe ngeso lokhozi,” sifundeka isitatimende. Ngokusho kwe-TMZ, amaphoyisa ase-Seminole unikeze imininingwane ngesigameko, lapho kuboshwe abantu ababili. "Siyazi ngesigameko esenzeke ngemuva kwehora lesikhombisa ebusuku ngoMsombuluko ngaphandle kwaseSeminole Hard Rock Hollywood esiholele ekulimaleni komuntu oyedwa ophuthunyiswe esibhedlela iMemorial Regional Hospital eHollywood," kusho amaphoyisa ngesitatimende. Amaphoyisa afike ngokuphazima kweso kwavalwa indawo okwenzeke kuyo lesi sehlo. "Abantu ababili baboshwe." Uphenyo lusaqhubeka. Indawo ivikelekile futhi akukho usongo emphakathini. Imisebenzi isaqhubeka njengokujwayelekile."

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Zimkhalele usgaxabhande osolwa ngokuthatha ngozwane izigidi zombutho Amaphoyisa ophiko olulwa nenkohlakalo abophe uKapteni oneminyaka engu-53 ubudala ngecala lokukhwabanisa. Ukuboshwa kwakhe kuvela ophenyweni lwangaphakathi olugunyazwe Uphiko lwezokuphathwa kwemali, kulandela ukuthengiselana okusolisayo ohlelweni lwe-POLFIN. Lo kaputeni usebenzela uphiko lwezezimali lwe-Protection and Security Service (PSS) kusolwa ukuthi lasebenzisa isikhundla salo ukuze likhiphe imali efinyelela ezigidini. Uphenyo seluthole ukuthi wasebenzisa Lesi sikhundla ukuze azibekele yena ukheshi ecasha ngokuthi le mali yayihloselwe izindleko zokuhamba zabavikeli abasebenza nabangaphansi kwePresidential Protection Services (PPS). Olunye uphenyo luthole ukuthi imali ayitholwanga ngabavikeli, kodwa wayeyikhipha yena iyisamba semali. Ngemuva kophenyo oluthathe isikhathi eside, kubhaliswe icala lokukhwabanisa esiteshini samaphoyisa eSunnyside kanti uphenyo lwangaphakathi lomnyango seluholele ekutheni amiswe. Lo kaputeni uzovela ngoLwesibili, 07 Ephreli 2026, ngaphambi kweNkantolo yeMantshi yasePitoli ngecala lokukhwabanisa.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kulindeleke ukuthi bavele abasolwa ngokubamba imoto yemali ngaseFilidi NgoMgqibelo mhla Ephreli oKlebe e-Richards Bay Serious Organised Crime Investigation esebenzisana neZululand District Task Team abophe abasolwa abathathu abaneminyaka engu-35, 44 no-64. Laba bobathathu baboshelwe icala lokuphanga imoto yemali elenzeka eGluckstadt ngasejikeni laseLenjani ngomhlaka-14 Mashi 2026. Kusolwa ukuthi imoto ibihamba ku-R34 isuka oLundi iya eVryheid ngesikhathi ihlaselwa abasolwa. Badubula kaningi bebhekise kuyo yaze yama. Babe sebekhipha onogada babaphuca izibhamu zomsebenzi. Abasolwa bathathe onogada babayisa endaweni evulekile base besebenzisa iziqhumane ukuqhumisa imoto. Abasolwa babaleke nesamba semali esingadalulwanga nezibhamu ezimbili kanye nesibhamu esisodwa sohlobo lwe-9mm. Kubikwe icala lemali lokugebenga kuhlonyiwe lavulwa esiteshini samaphoyisa eGluckstadt kanti amalungu oKlebe ahambele endaweni yesigameko. Emuva kwamasonto amathathu kwatholakala imininingwane yokuthi abasolwa bakuphi kwase kwenziwa uhlelo lokulandela umkhondo wabo. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka lo mkhankaso kuboshwe abasolwa abathathu kwashaqwa nezimoto ezimbili ezasetshenziswa kwenziwa ubugebengu. Kulindeleke ukuthi bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseVryheid namuhla, 7 Ephreli 2026.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Izovula ngoJulius Mkhwanazi ikhomishini kaMadlanga IKhomishini kaMadlanga kulindeleke ukuthi iqhubeke nomsebenzi wayo ngoLwesibili ngemuva kwekhefu lePhasika elifushane njengoba kulindeleke ukuthi iPhini leNhloko yamaPhoyisa kaMasipala waseKurhuleni (EMPD) uJulius Mkhwanazi abuye azokwethula ubufakazi. UJeremy Michaels, okhulumela iKhomishini uthe ofakazi abangu-49 sebethule ubufakazi ezinsukwini ezingu-84. UMichaels phambilini umemezele ukuthi ikhomishini izothatha ikhefu lePhasika ngoLwesithathu, 25 Mashi, 2026, iqale ukusebenza ngoLwesibili, 07 Ephreli 2026. Uthe uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa welule isikhathi seKhomishini ukuze ikwazi kuqhubeka nohlu olude lofakazi abasazokwethula ubufakazi ngaphansi kwesifungo. IKhomishini kusamele imemezele ufakazi olandelayo. Ngosuku lokugcina ngaphambi kwekhefu (ngoMashi 24, 2026), iPhini leNhloko yamaPhoyisa oPhiko Lwezokuvikelwa Kwempahla kanye Nezokuphepha eMnyangweni Wamaphoyisa kaMasipala weDolobha laseTshwane (TMPD), uRevo Spies, wethula ubufakazi ngamaqembu obugebengu angenisile komasipala. Uchaze kabanzi ngohlelo lwethenda olungekho emthethweni lokuqapha izakhiwo zikamasipala, olubandakanya iGubis 85 Solutions, okuyinkampani yonogada eyathinteka ebufakazini bephoyisa ezingaphansi kophiko lwe-Gauteng Organised Crime Unit uSergeant Fannie Nkosi.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Ezinye zezinto ezitholakale ngesikhathi kuseshwa iziboshwa Ukubonakala weziboshwa zichanasa ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, okuhlanganisa ukuvela bukhoma ku-TikTok, nakwezinye izinkundla yikona okuziqhathe nezikaDalawane. Ukuqinisa imizamo yokuqeda ukungeniswa kwezinto ezingafanele ezikhungweni zokuhlunyeleliswa kwezimilo ezweni lonke, izikhulu zejele ziphume umkhankaso wokusesha iziboshwa zingazelele. UKhomishana kazwelonke womnyango wezokuHlunyeleliswa kweziMilo eqhuba umsebenzi ePollmoor, eKapa UKhomishana kazwelonke womnyango wezokuHlunyeleliswa kweziMilo uMnuz Makgothi Thobakgale uhole uhlelo lokusesha ejele i-Pollsmoor Correctional Centre, eseKapa, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Kuwumkhankaso ohlanganyelwe ohlanganisa i-DCS Emergency Support Team (EST) kanye namalungu ombutho wamaphoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (SAPS), izikhulu zithole izinto ezingekho emthethweni ezihlanganisa omakhalekhukhwini, izidakamizwa, nezikhali ezicijile. Ukutholakala kwalezi zinto kufakazela ukuthi ozikhulu ezikhohlakele ziyaqhubeka nokwenza lula ukushushumbiswa kwalezi zinto ezikhungweni. nke womnyango wezokuHlunyeleliswa kweziMilo uMnuz Makgothi Thobakgale uhole uhlelo lokusesha ejele i-Pollsmoor Correctional Centre, eseKapa, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Kuwumkhankaso ohlanganyelwe ohlanganisa i-DCS Emergency Support Team (EST) kanye namalungu ombutho wamaphoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (SAPS), izikhulu zithole izinto ezingekho emthethweni ezihlanganisa omakhalekhukhwini, izidakamizwa, nezikhali ezicijile. Ukutholakala kwalezi zinto kufakazela ukuthi ozikhulu ezikhohlakele ziyaqhubeka nokwenza lula ukushushumbiswa kwalezi zinto ezikhungweni.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Uzovela enkantolo ngoLwesibili obulale i-ex yentombi yakhe. Isithembu somjolo obandakanya izaguga endaweni yaseMthozela, e-Eastern Cape, uphele ngokufa kowesilisa, 78, ngesikhathi eshaywa ebulawa yisoka le-ex yakhe eneminyaka engu-65 ubudala ngoLwesihlanu. Imininingwane emaphoyiseni iveze ukuthi ikhehla elineminyaka engu-78 ubudala belisemzini walo lihleli nowayeyintombi yalo (65) bephuza utshwala, ngesikhathi konakala umcimbi ngokufika kwesoka lalona wesifazane (59). Kuthiwa isoka lifike live nolaka lashaya umufi (78) ngenduku maqede lamgwaza amanxeba amaningi emzimbeni. Umufi kuthiwa useshonile endaweni yesigameko. Umsolwa uboshwe ngemuva kweswhlo, kanti uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseQumbu ngoLwesibili, ngecala lokubulala.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kubikwa ukuthi uzovela eNkantolo ngoLwesibili uFannie Nkosi Image: Oupa Mokoena / IOL Graphics Kubikwa ukuthi kibhaliswe icala ePretoria North elithinta ilungu le-SAPS elimisiwe uSgt Fannie Hezekiel Nkosi. La macala ahlanganisa ukutholakala nezinhlamvu ezingekho emthethweni, ukweba, ukwephula umthetho, nokwehluleka ukugcina izibhamu nezinhlamvu ngokoMthetho Wokulawulwa Kwezibhamu. ngoLwesine mhla ku-Ephreli cishe ngo-07:30, “Ithimba loKlebe ligasele ekhaya likaNkosi nencwadi i-J50. Ngesikhathi kuqhutshwa umsebenzi, iziphathimandla zishaqe izinhlamvu ezingu-490 ezingekho emthethweni kanye nebhomu lesandla elilodwa. Kuphinde kwatholakala namadokodo amaningi avela eziteshini zamaphoyisa ezahlukene. Ithimba liphinde lathola izibhamu eziningi zingagcinwanga endaweni ephephile. Lezi zihlanganisa izibhamu ezine, izibhamu ezintathu kanye nesibhamu esisodwa. Ukuhlolwa kuqinisekisiwe ukuthi izibhamu zibhaliswe negama likaNkosi, namalayisensi asemthethweni aveziwe. Ngemuva kwalokho kusesha, kwengezwe amacala, okuhlanganisa ukuphatha budedengu izibhamu kanye nokutholakala nesiqhumane esingavunyelwe. UNkosi uboshwe wagqunywa esiteshini zamaphoyisa ePretoria North ngaphansi kwenqubo yeSAPS 14. Kulindeleke ukuthi avele enkantolo ngoLwesibili, mhla ka-7 Ephreli 2026. Kubikwa ukuthi ithimba lakwaMadlanga” lihlela ukumsusa e-Pretoria North imyise endaweni ephephile nengakadalulwa. Izungeza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana incwadi yokuboshwa kukaFannie Nkosi

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaphoyisa esebenzisa kwisivimbamgwaqo kuN12 eWestoria, eWest Rand Ibamba likaKhomishana wesiFundazwe saseGauteng, uMajor General Mbuso Khumalo, ujoyine umkhankaso wemikhakha eyahlukene yokuvimba umgwaqo u-N12 no-R28 eWestonaria, esifundeni saseWest Rand, eGauteng. Lo msebenzi ubuholwa nguKhomishana Wesifunda saseWest Rand, uMajor General Lorraine Challen uhlanganise  umnyango wezaseKhaya, amaphoyisa imigwaqo eGauteng, abezinkampqni zezokuphepha kanye nezinhlaka eziqapha emphakathini iCPF. Kuxwayiswa abashayeli ngokujabula bazibheke kuleli Phasika Ngesikhathi kusetshenzwa, kuboshwe abasolwa abayisithupha ngokuba sezweni ngokungemthetho kanti abanye abasolwa abayisithupha baboshelwe ukutholakala nezidakamizwa. Lo msebenzi uyingxenye yemizamo eqhubekayo yokuqinisekisa ukuphepha komphakathi kanye nokuhambisana nomthetho ngesikhathi samaholidi ePhasika kulo lonke elaseGauteng. UMajor General Mbuso Khumalo usenxuse zonke izakhamuzi nezivakashi ukuthi ziziphathe kahle ngesikhathi samaholidi ePhasika. Unxuse abasebenzisa umgwaqo ukuthi bahloniphe imithetho yomgwaqo, bagweme ukuphuza nokushayela, babeke eqhulwini ukuphepha ngaso sonke isikhathi. "Sinxusa imiphakathi ukuthi isebenzisane nabezomthetho ngokubika izenzo zobugebengu kanye nokuqinisekisa ukuthi imigubho iqhutshwa ngaphansi komthetho. Sonke asibambe iqhaza ekwenzeni leli Phasika libe yisikhathi esiphephile nesinokuthula kuwo wonke umuntu waseGauteng." UMajor General Mbuso Khumalo usenxuse zonke izakhamuzi nezivakashi ukuthi ziziphathe kahle ngesikhathi samaholidi ePhasika.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Isiphithiphithi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana uVusi Nova ezingcwaba UVusi Nova, ucasule abalandeli bakhe bebezibuza ukuthi kazi abaphuthelwa yini isimemezelo sokushona kwakhe ngesikhathi bebona ama-video ezungeza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ebonakalisa umngcwabo wakhe. Okuthuse abaningi ukubona imibhalo yenkampani yakwaCebolethu iyingxenye yalo mngcwbo, kodwa kwehle amaphaphu sekucaca kubantu cha akufiwe, kodwa lo mculi uqopha ivideo. Kubikwa ukuthi konke lokhu bekwenzelwa ingoma azoyidedela ethi, "Lapho Ngifa," ekhuluma ngendlela afuna ukungcwatshwa ngayo. Indlela eqoshwe ngayo ikhalisa abaningi ngoba kunezithombe zakhe, abangani bakhe ababonakala bekhala, bephethe ibhokisi lakhe lomngcwabo kukhona nomngani wakhe omkhulu uMoshe Ndiki ongumethuli wezinhlelo obekhuluma kulo ngcwabo ngomngani wakhe. Abanye osaziwayo ababonakala kule vidiyo kubalwa abalingisi uLuthuli Dlamini, u-Anele Matoti, u-Ayanda Makayi nomlingisi u-Andile Nebulana, nabanye osaziwayo endimeni yezokungcebeleka. Lo mngcwabo uqoshwe emathuneni aseFourways Memorial Par, eyaziwa njengendawo yokuphumula yabantu abaqavile, okuhlanganisa namalungu omndeni wakwaMandela. Ukukhethwa kwendawo kwengeze uvalo kubantu bethi hawu akasekho ngempela, kodwa akukaze kuvele isimemezelo sokudlula kwakhe emhlabeni. Ngenkathi abanye abalandeli bencome isiqondiso sobuciko esinesibindi, abanye bakhuza umhlola wokudlala ngokufa. Ukuphawula kwabantu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana: The Lord Of The Wings( Lisa) Arsenal Biggest Fan@WhyUfikelate·Apr 1 Hhaybo ngiphuthelwe yini? Sesidlala ngokufa? Ngathi engamthatha ngempela uNkulunkulu ngoba uyislima. yknipg@Yknip1·Apr 1Bayahlola oVusi ngempela, kuyacaca ukuthi amadlozi abo ajimile.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abasolwa ababili abebefunelwa amacala okubulala. La madoda amataniswa emacaleni amabili okubulala ahlukene enzeke ekuqaleni kwalo nyaka. Kuthiwa amaphoyisa alandele umkhondo wabasolwa emzini oseMhlasini, okuthe uma efika kwaduma izulu lezandla. Kutholakale izibhamu ezimbili endaweni yesigameko.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abasolwa abane abebehlela ukugebenga ibhizinisi eMofolo Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abalisa abane abasolwa ngokuba yizigebengu kwathi ababili baboshwa kulandela isigameko sokudubulana namaphoyisa eSoweto, eGoli ngoLwesithathu. Okhulumela oKlebe eGauteng, uColonel Katlego Mogale, uthe isigameko senzeke ngemuva kokuthi uphiko lwezobunhloli eModus Operandi Centre luveze ukuthi kunequlu elalihlela ukugebenga kuhlonyiwe ibhizinisi esiteshini iKwezi, eMofolo. UMogale uthe ithimba lezinhlaka eziningi ezihlanganisa amalungu oKlebe iTactical Operation Management Section, Badboyz Security, kanye neGauteng Highway Patrol balandele lo mbiko bahlonza nezimoto okuthiwa zihamba abasolwa eduze kwezakhiwo ababeqondiswe kuzo. "Ithimba lilandele izimoto ebezichaziwe eduze kwalapho bekuzobanjwa khona inkunzi. Ngokubona kwamaphoyisa, abasolwa bahlukana phakathi ngesikhathi bebaleka ngezimoto zabo ezimbili amaphoyisa abajaha. “Ngesikhathi kujahwa abasolwa, kube nokudubulana, kwalimala abasolwa abane, kwaboshwa ababili,” kusho uMogale. Abasolwa ababoshiwe kulindeleke ukuthi babhekane namacala okubalwa awokugebenga ibhizinisi, ukuzama ukubulala, nokutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni. UMogale wengeze ngokuthi kuthungathwa umsolwa wesikhombisa obaleke ngezinyawo ngesikhathi bejahwa.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Bazongena bagamanxe emaphaketheni abashayeli uphethiloli unyuka ngo-R3 Sekuqinisekisiwe ukuthi uphethiloli uzokhuphuka ngamalini kusukela ngoLwesithathu ngomhla ka-1 Ephreli 2026. UMnyango wezimbiwa udalule ukuthi uphethroli uzonyuka mawala naphezu kokuhoxiswa kwentela ka-R3 okwesikhashana. Kusukela phakathi kwamabili, abashayeli bazokhokha lokhu okulandelayo: Ngemuva kwezinguquko ezizokwenzeka ngoLwesithathu, Ephreli 1, ilitha likaphethiloli i-95 Unleaded lizobiza u-R22.53 ezindaweni ezisogwini kanye no-R23.36 ezifundeni ezimaphakathi nezwe, lapho i-93 Unleaded izobiza u-R23.25. Intengo kadizili engu-50ppm izokhuphuka ifinyelele ku-R25.35 ogwini kube ngu-R26.11 eGauteng.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Izidakamizwa zitholwe ematekini nasezithweni zangasese Amaphoyisa asebenza ngokuBambisana nezikhulu eziqapha ezokuphepha ze-Airports Company South Africa (ACSA), babophe abesifazane baseNingizimu Afrika ngoMgqibelo, esikhumulweni sezindiza i-OR Tambo International Airport. Kuthiwa laba basolwa bezama ukushushumbisa izidakamizwa zenani elingaphezu kwezigidi ezinhlanu zamarandi ebezifihlwe emizimbeni yabo. Umbiko wokuqala uveza ukuthi abasolwa bebesendleleni ebheke eChina bezodlula eDubai. Ukusesha kuholele ekutholweni kwezidakamizwa ebezifihlwe ngaphakathi kwamateku, izingubo zangaphansi, nasezithweni zangasese. Abasolwa kulindeleke ukuba bavele ngaphambi kweNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKempton Park ngoLwesibili, Mashi ngamacala ahlobene nokushushumbisa izidakamizwa.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Udinga oluwele abafundi a ayisithupha kwafa oyedwa Image: Sithunyelwe/GDE Ushonile umfundi owenza uGrade 3 esikoleni samabanga aphansi eGauteng ngemuva kokuwela udonga kuye ngesikhathi sekhefu ngoLwesine. UMnyango wezeMfundo eGauteng uthe udonga lwesikole iLerutle Primary eDaveyton, eKurhuleni, luwele phezu kwabafundi abayisithupha, balimala kabi. "Abezimo eziphuthumayo baphuthume ngokushesha, bonke abafundi abayisithupha baphuthunyiswe ezikhungweni zezempilo ezahlukene ukuze bathole usizo oluphuthumayo. Ngeshwa, omunye wabafundi abalimele, umfana ofunda uGrade 3, ushone ngesikhathi elashwa esibhedlela," kusho umnyango ngesitatimende. Umphathiswa wezeMfundo eGauteng, uMatome Chiloane, usenxuse ukuthi kwenziwe uphenyo. "Siphatheke kabi kakhulu ngalesi sigameko esibuhlungu kangaka kanye nokulahlekelwa yimpilo encane kangaka. Imicabango nemithandazo yethu ikanye nomndeni womfundi, abafundi esikanye nabo, othisha, nomphakathi wonke wesikole njengoba ukhala ngalesi sigameko esibuhlungu. Sizoqinisekisa ukuthi siyaluthola usizo oludingekayo nokuthi izimo ezihambisana nalesi sigameko ziyaqedwa," kusho uChiloane. U-MEC uthe amathimba aseka abantu ngokwengqondo atshalwe esikoleni ukuze elulekwe abafundi, abasebenzi kanye nemi Isitatimende somnyango wezemfundo

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Sihoxile isimemo seNingizimu Afrika sokuba yingxenye yeG7 eFrance Ingqiji kwiNingizimu Afrika izwe laseFrance lihoxisa isimemo esakhishwa umengameli ukuba elakuleli lijoyine ingqungquthela ye-G7 ehlelelwe uJuni. Ngokubika kwentatheli yeSABC uSherwin Bryce-Pease, uVincent Magwenya okhulumela ihhovisi likamengameli uthe isizathu esiveziwe wukuthi kungenxa yengcindezi eqhubekayo evela e-US, okuhlanganisa izinsongo zokuduba ingqungquthela ye-G7. Ngakho-ke, abakwazanga ukuzibeka engcupheni yokuphuthelwa yilungu elibalulekile le-G7, yingakho-ke kuhoxiswa kwesimemo seNingizimu Afrika. Umengameli waseFrance uMacron nguyena owanikeza umengameli uRamaphosa isimemo ngesikhathi kunengqungquthela ye-G20 eGoli. "Inqubo yokusetha kabusha ubudlelwano ne-US isaqhubeka. Sizibophezele ekuxoxisaneni ne-US ukuze sixazulule noma yikuphi ukungaboni ngaso linye abanakho ngeNingizimu Afrika. Kubalulekile ukuthi ubudlelwano bethu nala mazwe amabili ne-France buhlala buqinile futhi angeke bushintshwe ukuhoxisa kwabo isimemo sokuthamela ingqungquthela ye-G7," kusho uMagwenya.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UScoop noMoozle bajoyina iMetro FM IMetro FM isanda kumemezela uhla olusha lwezinhlelo zika-2026/27 oluqukethe izintandokazi ezidumile ezijoyina lo msakazo. UNomuzi ‘Moozlie’ Mabena noSiyabonga ‘Scoop’ Ngwekazi, bazobambisana ekushayeleni uhlelo lwangempelasonto. Laba bazophatha uhlelo olusha oluhambisana nendlela yokuphila, iLift Off, oluzodlala ngoLwesihlanu phakathi kuka-7:00 no-10 ebusuku, nangoMgqibelo kusukela ngo-6 ntambama kuya ku-9 ebusuku. Okuyinto ethembisa ukuthi kuzoba wuhlelo oluzogcina uMzansi umi ngezinyawo ngemigqibelo ebusuku. UScoop obephethe uhlelo emcimbini wamaMetro FM Awards ngonyaka odlule ehambisana noLuthando ‘Lootlove’ Shosha, akalona ivukane kwezokungcebeleka, njengoba abanye bazomkhumbula ohlelweni iForever Young ehambisana noThomas Gumede noLungile Radu, kanti useke wasakaza ku-YFM nasemsakazweni we-inthanethi, iTouch Central. Kukhona nomafikizolo abajoyina lesi sikhondlakhondla somsakazo. Omunye wabo uRicardo Genesis ijongo elisakhula elisuka kuVOW FM. Ungena ezicathulweni zika-Ismail Abrahams oshiye lesi siteshi eyokwenza ezinye izinto. UMvangeli Nzuza naye ungena ohlelweni olukhulu lwantambama njengomethuli wezemigwaqo . Umfundi wezindaba, u-Paulette Neo Kayise uzoshintshela ezindabeni zangempelasonto. “Njengoba iMetro FM ihlanganisa iminyaka engu-40, inhloso yethu akukhona ukushintsha osekusebenzayo, kodwa wukubungaza uhambo lomkhiqizo ngethalente eselisize ekuwulolongeni eminyakeni edlule, sibe senezela ngamasu aqinisa umkhankaso wethu,” kusho uMphathi weBhizinisi weMetro FM, uKina Nhlengethwa. “La mazwi amasha ahlanganyela neqembu elivele liqinile futhi aseka ukuqhubeka komsakazo ukuxhumana nabalaleli bawo,” kuphetha uNhlengethwa. Izinguquko nezinhlelo eziqhubekayo zeMetro FM Azikho izinguquko ezinkulu ezenzeke kulo msakazo ngale kokuthaka okwaziwayo nokusondeza ithalente elisha.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Izimoto ezinikelwe umnyango kaCogta KUBONAKALE okuhlukile emagcekeni oLundi namhlanje njengoba kuzoqalwa umcimbi ozoholwa yiSilo samabandla wonke wokuvula Ukuvulwa ngokusemthethweni kuphawula ukuthintana okubalulekile ohlelweni lwaminyaka yonke lwesikhungo sobuholi bomdabu esifundazweni futhi kunikeza iSilo ithuba lokukhuluma naMakhosi. UMphathiswa emnyangweni wezokBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu uMfundisi uThulasizwe Buthelezi uthi kubalulekile ukuhlomisa nokunika amandla lesi sikhungo ngezinqovunqovu zikaNokusho. "Lesi sinyathelo siwumzamo wamasu wokuqinisa nokuhlomisa amakhosi ethu, siqinisekise ukuthi anezinsiza ezidingekayo ukuze asebenzele imiphakathi yawo ngesithunzi nangempumelelo," kusho lo mnyango ngesitatimende. Athole izinyawo ezisheshayo amakhosi kuvulwa indlu yabaholi bendabuko

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kubulawe abasolwa abane bebhekene namaphoyisa ngenhlamvu Amaphoyisa aseGauteng athi abasolwa abane abadutshulwe babulawa ezintatha zangoLwesithathu, kwathi umsolwa wesihlanu walimala kabi, bayabandakanyeka emacaleni amaningi ahlanganisa ukugebenga kuhlonyiwe okubhekiswe kubagilwa abasuka esikhumulweni sezindiza i-OR Tambo. Umsolwa olimele uboshiwe kanti okwamanje ugadwe ngamaphoyisa. Okhulumela amaphoyisa aseGauteng uCaptain Tintswalo Sibeko usiqinisekisile isigameko sokudubula ngoLwesithathu ekuseni. "Ngezithuba zabo-05:30 ekuseni, kutholakale ulwazi lwezobunhloli mayelana neqembu labasolwa okusolwa ukuthi bayabandakanyeka ochungechungeni lwezigameko zokugebenga kuhlonyiwe izisulu ebezisuka esikhumulweni sezindiza i-OR Tambo," usho kanje. USibeko uthe imininingwane ihlaziywe yaphinde yasetshenziswa yithimba elihlanganisa iSAPS Counter Intelligence, SAPS Gauteng Tactical Response Team (TRT), Gauteng Traffic Police Airwing, CAP Specialized Operations, neTracker Connect. "Abasolwa kubikwe ukuthi bebehamba ngemoto yohlobo lweSuzuki Swift efakwe amapuleti okungelwona awayo."

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Asenkantolo amaphoyisa angu-12 abhekene nokusiza uVusimuzi Cat Matlala athole ithenda kaR360m Image: Kamogelo Moichela Elinye lamaphoyisa angu-12 avele eNkantolo yeMantshi yasePitoli ngoLwesithathu ekuseni nguBrigadier Rachel Matjeng, othe yena noVusimuzi 'Cat' Matlala babethandana futhi wayeyi-blesser lakhe. Ethula ubufakazi phambi kweKhomishana kaMadlanga ngoFebhuwari, uMatjeng wathi ayikho imali amnika yona uMatlala emfumbathisa ukuze athole inkontileka yasemaphoyiseni ka-R360million. Uthe wambhunyela ngezipho okubalwa kuzo i-Ozempic (okuyisidakamizwa esibizayo sokwehlisa isisindo). Ebuzwa ngemali engango-R300 000 ayithole kuMatlala, watshela ikhomishini ukuthi ayihlangene nomsebenzi wakhe. La maphoyisa angu-12 aboshwe ngesikhathi ebanjwa uphiko oluphenya amacala enkohlakalo i-IDAC ngoLwesibili ebusuku ngezinsolo zokusiza uVusimuzi “Cat” Matlala, ekutholeni ithenda elingekho emthethweni. Babhekene namacala okukhwabanisa, ukushushumbisa imali, ukuxhaphaza amathenda kanye nokwephula iFinance Act. Amanye amaphoyisa avoshiwe uGeneral Busi Temba, Brigadier Ofentse Tlhoaele, Brigadier Kistey Jonker, Brigadier Thembinkosi Ngema, Colonel Nehemiah Maleka, Colonel Johannes Monyai, Captain Brian Catwright, Colonel Anthony Paulsen osewathatha umhlalaphansi, noBrigadier Rachelle Matjeng.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: I-Y imemezele izinguquko zayo zonyaka omusha ISITESHI somsakazo esikhuluma ngqo nabantu abasha, i-Y yethule izinguquko zayo njengoba ingena esikhathini esisha esinamandla nesifaka umfutho kuzo zonke izinto ezibalulekile kubantu abasha. Lesi siteshi, esaziwa ngokugqamisa ithalente elisha nokwenza okuhlukile kwezokusakaza, sesilungele ukwembula uhlelo lwaso luka-2026, okuwumfanekiso ogqamile wokuthi siphokophele kuphi. Ngonyaka odlule, i-Y iqhubekile nokukhulisa isibalo sabalaleli futhi iguqule umsindo wayo yaphinde yaqinisa isikhundla sayo njengomholi kwezokuxhumana eziqhutshwa abantu abasha. Njengenkundla ekhula njalo edlula umsakazo, i-Y ihlala izibophezele ekwandiseni amaphimbo amasha, ekulolongeni izingxoxo nokwenza abalaleli bazizwe beyingxenye yezokuxhumana ngempela. Izinguquko ongazilindela ngezinhlelo ezahlukene kusukela ekuseni; uKaren Mthethwa ungena endaweni ka-9AM-12PM ohlelweni i-The Glow Up. Lolu hlelo lugqamisa unyaka omusha wezinguquko kulesi siteshi kwazise kuvalwa isikhala sika-Xtremme, omemezele ngeledlule ukuthi uyasishiya lesi siteshi njengoba efisa ukugxila kwelinye ibhizinisi. Kukhona nezinguquko ezenzeka ezinhlelweni zansukuzonke ebusuku njengoba uBarbara "Baxbara" Moagi ezojoyina uTulz Madala njengomsakazi omusha sha ku-Uncensored (8PM–10PM), bazoba yithimba elinesibindi nelikulungele ukubamba izingxoxo ezikhethekile. Lesi siteshi sivalelisa noDimpho Makgotho, intandokazi ye-Y ebisihlale iminyaka emine njengoba nayo iphikelele emadlelweni aluhlaza. Abathandi bomculo we-hip hop nabo bazokuthokozela ukwazi ukuthi kukhona okusha okuzayo njengoba uDJ Sliqe no-Roiii bethatha izintambo njalo ngeSonto kusihlwa kusukela ngo-7PM–10PM. IMigqibelo nayo izothola ivavavum' , thola ukugqama kwezamasiko ngephimbo elisha emsakazweni likaRIZZ kusukela ngo-5PM–6PM. Ubuso obuvele bujwayelekile ebumnandini, uMunaka buzogqamisa izihlabani ezisafufusa futhi avale igebe phakathi kokushisayo emigwaqweni nokulandelayo ku-Y. I-Karma Karma Radio ephethwe nguShimza ingena ngoMgqibelo ebusuku ngo-9pm - 10pm, okuyisikhathi esihle impela sabantu abalungiselela i-groov ebuyisa ubumnandi bezikhathi zakhe esahola uhlelo i-YTKO. Omunye umsakazi omusha ojoyina lesi siteshi uKmass ngempelasonto ngo-10-2pm. author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: AbeSouth African Health Products Regulatory Authority baqinisekise ukuthi kubuyiselwe ezitolo imikhiqizo yeCitro-soda ISouth African Health Products Regulatory Authority (SAHPRA) imemezele ukuthi kufanele kubuyiswe amaqoqwana athile e-Citro-Soda Regular (60g, 120g, and 4g sachets) ngenxa yokutholakala kwezinto ezingaphephile ezingadala ubungozi. kube khona ngezinto zangaphandle ezivela ebhandeni lokuthutha esikhungweni se-Adcock Ingram Clayville Lokhu kubuyiselwa emuva kuyingxenye yokuzibophezela kwe-SAHPRA ekuqinisekiseni ukuphepha, ikhwalithi, nokusebenza ngempumelelo kwemikhiqizo yezempilo etholakala emphakathini. "Uma uthenge le mikhiqizo, sicela uhlole iphakheji yakho bese ulandela isiqondiso esinikezwa ngamashaneli okuxhumana asemthethweni e-SAHPRA," kusho lo mqondisi ngesitatimende. Imikhiqizo ebuyiswayo ikhiqizwe esikhungweni se-Adcock Ingram, eClayville. Abathengi kufanele bahlole ngokushesha le mikhiqizo - Uma uhlola imikhiqizo, bheka lezi zinombolo nosuku lokuphelelwa yisikhathi komkhiqizo wakho. Hlola inombolo yomkhiqizo wakho lapha Ezinye izinombolo ongahlola kuzo Hlola inombolo yomkhiqizo owuphethe, Uma kuqondana, uyibuyisele esitolo Izinombolo zemikhiqizo okufanele ibuyiswe

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UNatasha Phiri omisiwe emsebenzini INHLANGANO yezokusakaza kuleli iSouth African Broadcasting Corporation (SABC) isimise intatheli yayo, uNatasha Phiri, ukuze kuphenywe izinsolo zokuthi ithole imali ukuze idedele ulwazi. Lokhu kuza ngemuva kokuthi uSergeant Fannie Nkosi evumile, ngesikhathi ethula ubufakazi kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga, ukuthi wamkhokhela u-R500. Ngesonto eledlule ikhomishini yezwa ukuthi uNkosi wakhokhela uPhiri le mali ukuze athole inombolo kanontandakubukwa uMusa Khawula. Ngesikhathi ikhomishini iqala ukuveza ubufakazi uNkosi waphika ukuthi wamkhokhela uPhiri ngolwazi. Kodwa-ke ngoMsombuluko, ngesikhathi ebhekene nobufakazi, akakwazanga ukucasha nangesithupha wavuma. "Manje usubonile uyakwamukela ukuthi ukhokhele uNatasha uR500?" kusho uKhomishana uSandile Khumalo. “Ngiyakwemukela,” kuphendula uNkosi. Inkokhelo yenziwa ngoNovemba 6, 2024, ngalo lolo suku uPhiri amnikeza ngalo inombolo kaKhawula. U-Advocate Matthew Chaskalson ucele uNkosi ukuthi akuqinisekise ukuthi u-R500 uwuphawu lokubonga inombolo kaKhawula, uNkosi wazibamba wathi uzoqinisekisa ngokuhamba kwesikhathi ngemuva kokuqinisekisa izingxoxo zabo. “Angiwugwemi lo mbuzo kodwa nginombono wokuthi imithombo kumele ivikelwe nobuqotho bayo,” usho kanje. Emuva kobufakazi iSABC ikhiphe isitatimende ngoMsombuluko imisa uPhiri emsebenzini. “I-SABC ilubheka njengento ebucayi lolu daba futhi isimise uNksz Natasha Phiri ukuze kuqikelelwe ukuthi kuyaphenywa ngalolu daba,” kusho le nhlangano ngesitatimende.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: uYusuf Nsibambi okuthiwa ukhiphe umyalelo wokuthi kunqanyulwe ugesi ngemuva nje kokulahlekelwa yisihlalo sakhe ePhalamende okhethweni lwangoJanuwari 15. Izakhamuzi zasesigodini saseBuyaaya, eMawokota South Constituency, esifundeni saseMpigi zizithole zihleli ebumnyameni ngenxa yezombusazwe ngemuva kokuthi ilungu lePhalamende eliphumayo uYusuf Nsibambi likhiphe umyalelo wokuthi kunqanyulwe ugesi ngemuva nje kokulahlekelwa yisihlalo sakhe ePhalamende okhethweni lwangoJanuwari 15. Ukucinywa kukagesi, okuthathe izinsuku ezimbalwa kwaphazamisa imizi namabhizinisi amancane, kulandela ukukhethwa kukaSuzan Nakawuki weqembu elibusayo iNational Resistance Movement. UNsibambi, oybeilungu lesishayamthetho amahlandla amabili oqokwe ngethikithi leForum for Democratic Change, ubesebambe lesi sihlalo iminyaka eyishumi. Ngokubika kwephephandaba lase-Uganda, uParliament Watch, UNsibambi uyavuma ukuthi nguyena owaxhasa ngezimali ukufakwa kwengqalasizinda kagesi eBuyaaya, okuhlanganisa namalambu asemgwaqweni kanye ne-transformer, okuyi-investment athi idle imali elinganiselwa ku-UGX 135 million. Uthi ngenxa yokuthi lo msebenzi wawuxhaswe ephaketheni lakhe, usenalo ilungelo lokuwuhoxisa. "Angisenaso isibopho ngalaba bantu. Lowo gesi akuyona impahla kahulumeni," kusho uNsibambi. “Ukube bebekwazisa engibenzele khona njengomuntu, bebezongivotela ukuthi ngibuye.” Uphinde waxwayisa ngokuthi uzohoxisa ukwesekaabafundi abangaphezu kwekhulu, njengoba esola izakhamuzi ngokungabongi nangokuchitha i-manifesto yakhe athe ukubeka phambili ukuqedwa kobubha nemfundo. "Angifuni ukubonakala ngincintisana nomkhankaso ohlukile. Ngivumela ilungu lePhalamende elisha lisebenze ngendlela yayo," wengeza.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuphenywa ngephoyisa elibulale intombi Amaphoyisa aseMpumalanga avule icala lokubulala kanye nedokodo lophenyo ukuze kuphenywe ngemuva kokuthi iphoyisa, 53, lidubule labulala umngani walo wesifazane, 39, ngaphambi kokuthi lizidubule ngesibhamu eGrootvlei, eMpumalanga ngoMgqibelo, Mashi 2026. Kubikwa ukuthi uKaputeni wamaphoyisa esiteshini saseBethal waya emzini womngani wakhe wesifazane eGrootvlei wamfica enodadewabo. Kuthe uma benqaba ukumvulela uKapteni wephula iwindi wangena endlini. Kuthiwa uqhubekile waxosha usisi wasala nomngani wesifazane. Udade wahamba wayofuna usizo kwabikelwa amaphoyisa. Ngesikhathi amaphoyisa efika afice uKapteni nomngani wakhe wesifazane bedindilizile benamanxeba okudutshulwa. Bobabili kuthiwa bashonele endaweni yesigameko. Kutholakale isibhamu somsebenzi okungesikapteni lo oseshonile.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Imeya yaseMngeni uChristoper Pappas iphume nethimba lezinhlekelele ukuhlola umonakalo odalwe yisiphepho Ngemuva kwesiphepho esinamandla, esihlasele izindawo ezahlu kumasipala waseMngeni, imeya uChristoper Pappas iphume nethimba lezinhlekelele ukuhlola umonakalo. Umbiko wokuqala walo masipala uveza ukuthi umonakalo omkhulu wenzeke ezindlini ezifulelwe nge-asbestos, izindawo eziningi nazo zibika amafasitela aphukile. "Umasipala usezinhlelweni zokuthola impahla efanele ukusiza izakhamuzi ezithintekile futhi uzohlinzeka ngosizo lapho ludingeka khona kakhulu, kusho lo masipala ngesitatimende. author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Umuzi okubulawe kuwo abasolwa Image: Dasen Thathiah/Facebook Basale enkundleni abasolwa ababili abebefunelwa amacala amane okubulala, okuhlanganisa nelokubulala isalukazi esineminyaka engu-84 nentombazane eneminyaka engu-13 ubudala. Amaphoyisa aqoqe ulwazi lwezobunhloli mayelana nokuthi abasolwa bakuphi nokuthe uma befika emzini karondo obekulele kuwo abasolwa kuMkhelekehleni Road, KwaNgcolosi, ezintatha zangoMgqibelo. Ngokubika kwamaphoyisa, kube nokudubulana phakathi kwawo nabasolwa ngesikhathi ezibika okuholele ekufeni kwabasolwa ababili. Awekho amaphoyisa agile.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: NgoLwesine, mhla ka-19 kwephezulu, iNkantolo eNkulu yaseMgungundlovu igwebe u-Andile Wonderboy Ngcobo, Andile Sabelo Shezi noMongezi Nyathi odilikajele abangu-14 kanye neminyaka engu-121 bebhadla ejele. Lokhu kulandela ukuthi laba bobathathu betholwe benecala lokuqothula umndeni wakwaKhumalo, ePlessislaer phakathi kuka-Okthoba 2021 no-Okthoba 2022. Ukuhlasela kwalaba abathathu kwaqala ngesikhathi bephuca owesilisa isibhamu sakhe eMgungundlovu ngomhla ka-3 Okthoba 2021. Ngemuva kwamasonto amabili izelamani ezintathu zakwaKhumalo zadutshulwa eMbali Unit J, ePlessislaer. Ababili kuzelamani bashonela endaweni yesigameko kwathi oyedwa wasinda. Abaseshi bophiko lweProvincial Serious and Violent Crime Unit balubambele mathupha uphenyo kwase kwaba wukuthi bebopha uNgcobo, Shezi noNyathi ngokutholakala nezibhamu ezintathu. Imibiko yeBallistic ihlobanisa izibhamu nezigameko zokubulawa kwezelamani zakwaKhumalo ezimbili basebebekwa amacala okubulala. Ngokuqhubeka kokuqulwa kwecala, isisulu sesithathu sezelamani zakwaKhumalo esasinda abuya sahlaselwa sinomngani badutshulwa bafa. Emva kosuku kwadutshulwa abafana bakwaKhumalo, abasolwa babuyela kulo mndeni babulala abazali bezelamani. Lokhu kuthiwa bakwenza ukuqeda ofakazi. Abagcinanga lapho ngoba babulala omunye ufakazi obengudadewabo wezelamani zakwaKhumalo. Yena ehlaselwa esemcimbini esehlakalweni lapho kwadubuleka abantu abathathu bafa eMaqeleni eMbali Unit J. Uphenyo lubuye lwaxhumanisa uNgcobo, uShezi noNyathi emacaleni ayishumi (10) okubulala phakathi kwamanye, okukhona kuwo elokuzama ukubulala, ukugebenga besebenzisa isihluku nokutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi eWitbank osolwa ngokubamba imoto yemali Umsolwa oneminyaka engu-41 ubudala uboshwe ngoLwesine, 19 Mashi 2026 eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseSprings kulandela isigameko sokuphanga imoto yemali eyenzeka eMalahleni, eMpumalanga, ngomhla Febhruwari 2026. Umsolwa uboshwe ngamalungu ethimba loKlebe eliphenya ngobugebengu obuhleliwe ngokuBambisana nethimba leNkangala District Flying Squad. Ngosuku lwesehlo kusolakala ukuthi abe-Izi Cash Africa Security bavinjwa abasolwa abathathu ababehlome ngesibhamu eMalahleni ngesikhathi bezolayisha imali emshinini (ATM). Ngesikhathi kwenzeke kudutshulwe kwabulawa unogada, kwalimala kabi omunye. Abasolwa babaleke nesamba semali esingadalulwanga, behamba ngeVW Jetta neVW Polo Sedan. Uphenyo lwamaphoyisa luwaholele kulo mlisa ngoLwesine, uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseWitbank ngoMsombuluko, mhla ka-23 Mashi 2026 lapho ezobhekana khona namacala okubulala, ukuzama ukubulala, ukugebenga esebenzisa isihluku, ukwakha itulo lokubulala kanye nokwephula umthetho wabokufika.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UKholofelo Morodi oyilungu le-ActionSA umisiwe emsebenzini kulandela ukuvela kwegama lakhe kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga UMasipala waseTshwane usumise emsebenzini ikhansela uKholofelo Morodi ngemuva kokuba igama lakhe livele kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga esePitoli. Ukumiswa kwaleli khansela kuqinisekiswe yiqembu lalo i-ActionSA eveze ukuthi iyasamukela isinqumo semeya esibonisa ukuzibophezela ekusebenzeleni umphakathi ngokuthembeka. "Siyeseka ngokugcwele imizamo kaDkt Moya yokuqinisekisa ukuthi izinga eliphezulu lobuqotho liyagcinwa emalungwini eqembu amele umphakathi, zonke izinsolo zicutshungulwa ngokugcwele. Abantu baseNingizimu Afrika sebejwayele kakhulu amaqembu ezepolitiki aphuzayo ukusukumela izinsolo zokungafaneleki noma avele azishanele. I-ActionSA ayisoze yasebenzisa leyo ndlela futhi, lapho kuvela noma yiziphi izinsolo, siyohlala sithatha isinyathelo ngokushesha ukuze sithole iqiniso eligcwele," kusho leli qembu ngesitatimende. IMeya yaseTshwane uDokotela Nasiphi Moya ifake inkulumo enkundleni u-X ithi:“Ngenhloso yokuvikela ubuqotho besikhungo kanye nokuqinisekisa ukuthi zonke izinhlangothi ziphathwa ngendlela efanele, ngithathe isinqumo sokumisa i-MMC Yezinkonzo Ezididiyelwe kanye Nokuhlanganyela, uCllr Kholofelo Morodi. “Uphenyo lokuqala luyaqhubeka mayelana nezindaba ezibekwe phambi kweKhomishini kaMadlanga ukuze kutholwe ukuthi ngabe likhona yini icala elisemthethweni.”

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Imoto ebihamba abasolwa Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abasolwa abathathu ngesikhathi bejahwa isivinini esikhulu bedubulana nethimba loKlebe iTactical Operations Management Team ezintatha zangoLwesine, eCrystal Park, eBenoni. La malungu athole imininingwane ngabasolwa abebehlela ukuduna imoto nokuthumba umuntu ku-Elm road. Ngezithuba zabo-20:30, amalungu oKlebe e-TOMS abone imoto, i-Opel Astra e-silver grey ngemva nje kokukhipha isisulu sowesifazane ku-Fiat yakhe asifaka emotweni yabo. Kube nokujaha ngesivinini abasolwa bavulela ngenhlamvu bebhekise koklebe. Imoto yabasolwa iphaphalaze yashayisa umgoqo oseceleni yabhajwa khona lapho. Isisulu  esithunjiwe sisindile satakulwa singenakulimala. Kushaqwe izibhamu ezimbili.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Ukhomishana wamaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal Police Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi ugeqe qmqgula ePhalamende UGEQE amagula uMkhuzi wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenent General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, ebuyela ePhalamende ukuyophendula izinsolo ezenziwa abanye ofakazi abafike emuva kwakhe. Enkulumeni yakhe, uMkhwanazi ubale izinto ezimbalwa nezimqoka ukucacisela abaningi abathola inkulumo engaphelele:

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Imoto edunwe abasolwa abagebenge isitolo sobucwebe enxanxatheleni yezitolo eTshwane Amaphoyisa eTshwane abophe abasolwa abahlanu, abaneminyaka ephakathi kuka-32 no-38, kulandela ukugetshengwa kwesitolo sobucwebe nokudunwa kwemoto enxanxatheleni yezitolo iBrooklyn ekuseni ngoLwesithathu. Cishe ngabo-09:50, abasolwa abahlanu bagasele esitolo sobucwebe enxanxatheleni yezitolo, umsolwa oyedwa uzenze ikhasimende ngaphambi kokungena ngenkani. Ngenkathi umsolwa oyedwa ecekele phansi amakesi ombukiso, abanye bakhiphe ubucwebe obuningi babufaka ezikhwameni. Abasolwa babe sebeduna imoto babaleka endaweni yesigameko. Amaphoyisa abikelwe ngalolu daba lwadluliselwa kumalungu eSAPS Tshwane District Stabilisation Team, ngokubambisana nabezokuphepha ezimele, bakwazile ukulandela umkhondo wabasolwa baze bavinjwa enkabeni yedolobha lasePitoli. Kube nekudubulana phakathi kwethimba nabasolwa, kwathi iphoyisa lathola imihuzuko. Uthola usizo lwezempilo. Abasolwa abathathu nabo bathole ukulimala base bephuthunyiswa esikhungweni sezempilo begadwe ngamaphoyisa. Amaphoyisa athole imoto ebiduniwe, isibhamu esinezinhlamvu kanye nobucwebe obebiwe.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Vusimuzi 'Cat' Matlala UKHOMISHANA wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Mkhwanazi, udalule ukuthi uCat Matlala ubenenkululeko engajwayelekile futhi ubenobudlelwano nezikhulu zasejele ngaphambi kokuba abanjwe neselula ejele iKgosi Mampuru C-Max Prison. ULieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi wethule ubufakazi phambi kwekomiti lesikhashana ePhalamende, ukuthi uMnuz Vusimuzi “Cat” Matlala ubenenkululeko engajwayelekile ngaphakathi kweKgosi Mampuru II Correctional Centre esigcemeni C-Max, ePitoli. Uthe uMatlala ubesondelene kakhulu nenhloko yalesi sikhungo nezinye izikhulu. Lokhu kwamvumela ukuba ahambe futhi enze izinto kalula. "Ngeke ngichaze ingxenye yezizathu ezenza kube nokugqugquzela ukuthi asuke lapho kodwa lokho kuyingxenye yezinkinga esezike zabhekana nazo," kusho uMkhwanazi. Izingqinamba nazo zahlonzwa nguKhomishana wasejele. UMkhwanazi uthe uMatlala ubehlala esitokisini nabanye ababili. Ngemuva kwenkulumo yakhe yomphakathi, uKhomishana wezokuHlunyeleliswa kweziMilo, uMakgothi Thobakgale, wamshayela ucingo ngqo. UKhomishana wathumela izikhulu ezithembekile ukuthi ziyosesha esitokisini ngenxa yokusola ukuthi kukhona okwenzekayo lapho. Bathole iselula nokuyinto engavumelekile, amaphoyisa ayisebenzise ngokuhamba kwesikhathi uma enza uphenyo. “Iselula isisize kakhulu ukubeka icala lapho eselikhona njengamanje,” kusho uMkhwanazi etshela ikomiti. Uqhubeke wathi kusasele imibuzo yokuthi iselula ifike kanjani kuCat esitokisini. Ujenene uveze ukuthi ubudlelwano abenabo nobuholi besikhungo buvumela uMatlala ukuthi athole noma yini ayithandayo.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Udokotela uNyaweleni Tshifularo oqophe umlando ngokuhlukanisa amawele azalwa ehlangene eLimpopo Image: Office of the Premier: Limpopo Provincial Government / Facebook Umengameli @CyrilRamaphosa ujoyini abantu bakuleli ngokuuhalalisela uDkt Nyaweleni Tshifularo kanye nethimba lakhe ngokuhlukanisa ngempumelelo amawele azalwe ehlangene esibhedlela saseMankweng, eLimpopo ngoJanuwari 28, 2026. URamaphosa udlulise ukubonga kwakhe kuleli thimba elimangalisayo eliholwa uSolwazi Tshifularo, elinikele ngesikhathi nobuchule balo ukubhekana nale nselelo enzima. Lo msebenzi uyingqophamlando eLimpopo kanye nasemkhakheni wezempilo womphakathi waseNingizimu Afrika. Kungokokuqala ngqá eNingizimu Afrika, isibhedlela esisemakhaya senze umsebenzi omkhulu kangaka. Okujabulisa kakhulu ukuthi izingane bezihlukene ngokuphelele futhi kubikwa ukuthi zisesimweni esigculisayo. Sihalalisela abazali nemindeni yabo, futhi sibafisela impilo ende nenempilo, nejabulisayo njengoba bekhula.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Lieutenant-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi Umkhuzi wamaphoyisa uzoqhubeka nomsebenzi wakhe Image: Facebook / SAPS UKhomishana wamaPhoyisa e-KZN uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi uzoqhubeka nesikhundla sakhe sobuholi esifundazweni njengoba inkontileka yakhe isivuselelwe ngeminye iminyaka emihlanu. Ukwelulwa kukaMkhwanazi kuza njengoba inkontileka yakhe bekumele iphele ekupheleni kukaMashi. Esitatimendeni esicacise ngalesi simo, uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa uFannie Masemola uveze ukuthi imininingwane yokugcina yokuvuselelwa kwenkontileka iyasetshenzwa. "Sisezinhlelweni zokuphothula leyo mininingwane, ngakho yebo, usazoba nguKhomishana wesiFundazwe e-KZN," kusho uMasemola. "Sinobudlelwano obuhle bokusebenza, futhi uNdunankulu wavuma ukuvuselelwa kwenkontileka. Ngakho-ke, sisebenza nje ukulungisa," engeza.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UMatipandile Sotheni, ubhekene necala lokubulala uFakazi D Image: Itumeleng English UMatipandile Sotheni, 41, obhekene necala lokubulala uMarius van der Merwe, owayedume ngelika-“fakazi D” kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga, uvele okokuqala eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseBrakpan ngoMsombuluko ekuseni. Bekugcwele kuphuphuma enkantolo izihlobo zikamufi, amaphoyisa abehlome eyizingovolo nezintatheli. Ngaphakathi enkantolo kube wubuwaqa kwazise kuqinisekiswe amagama kamangalelwa, wabekwa icala, kwase kuhlelwa usuku lokufaka isicelo sebheyili. Kuvele namuhla ukuthi uSotheni wayeyiphoyisa elibukhali esebenza ngaphansi kophiko lweTask Force, wayeka embuthweni eseyosebenzela umndeni womacaphuna-kusale eHoughton, kwandongaziyaduma. UBrigadier Athlenda Mathe uveze ukuthi uphenyo lwabo lubavezele ukuthi uSotheni nguyena owadubula wabulala uVan der Merwe wadutshulwa wabulawa ngaphandle komuzi wakhe eBrakpan ngoDisemba 5 ngemuva nje kokunikeza ubufakazi obushaqisayo ngenkohlakalo kanye nezinsolo zokufihla ukubulawa komuntu ngamaphoyisa kaMasipala wase-Ekurhuleni (EMPD). UMathe ubuye waveza ukuthi imoto abebehamba ngayo ngosuku lwesehlo, yohlobo lweSuzuku ngeyentombi kaSotheni, kanti yayishayelwa uWiandre Pretorius. “Ngokophenyo lwethu, umdubuli owadubula uFakazi D wamdubula esemotweni futhi lokho kungenzeka kuphela uma unoshayasibhamu oqeqeshwe kakhulu ukuba enze kanjalo. Wadubula kabili kwathi uFakazi D wabulawa ngenhlamvu eyodwa. Uphenyo lwethu lusitshela nokuthi uWiandre Pretorius wayengumshayeli wemoto,” kusho yena. UPretorius,wathatha impilo yakhe ngomhla ka7 Febhruwari enentombi yakhe egaraji likaphethiloli eBrakpan, eGauteng. Lokhu kwenzeka ngemuva kwezinsuku ezimbalwa esinde esigamekweni okusolakala eyongena kwakhe eBoksburg.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kube ongaphansi nongaphezulu isiboshwa sivimbezela amaphoyisa esiteshini saseNtuzuma Luqale kabi usuku emaphoyiseni asesiteshini saseNtuzuma ejikelwa yisiboshwa esineminyaka engu-22 ubudala kungazelele muntu ngoMsombuluko ekuseni. Ngokusho kukaColonel Robert Netshiunda, umsolwa waboshwa ngoMgqibelo ngecala lokuzama ukubulala owomndeni ekhaya. ngemuva kokuthi isiboshwa okuthiwa sihlule iphoyisa ngamandla salibamba isibhamu sashiya inqwaba yamaphoyisa evaleleke ngaphakathi ebhilidini. Ngokusho kwabeReaction Unit South Africa (RUSA), isiboshwa sihlule iphoyisa ebelingaphakathi ezitokisini esiteshini samaphoyisa eNtuzuma ebelizomthatha limubeke icala ngokusemthethweni kwasukathuthuva. “Kubikwe ukuthi isiboshwa sihlule iphoyisa ebelingaphakathi ezitokisini ngamandla saphuca iphoyisa izikhiye zasesitokisini,kusho Prem Balram okhulumela iRUSA. Okhulumela amaphoyisa uthi kufike amanye amaphoyisa ukuzohlola isimo ngemuva kokuzwa umsindo, isiboshwa lesi sagxuma sahlala sithathela iphoyisa isibhamu savulela ngenhlamvu khona lapho. Alikho iphoyisa elidubulekile ngesikhathi kwenzeka lokhu, kuze kwafika amanye amaphoyisa asinqoba ngenhlamvu isiboshwa. Ngokusho kukaGarrith Jamieson we-ALS Paramedics, umsolwa ubulawe ngesikhathi kudutshulwana namaphoyisa. Okhulumela amaphoyisa uRobert Nethsuinda uthe amaphoyisa amabili alimale kancane ngesikhathi kuqubuka ingxabano, kodwa awadubulekanga. Ubuye waveza ukuthi yize umsebenzi uqhubeka ngokujwayelekile esiteshini, amaphoyisa athintekile kulesi sehlo azotholelwa usizo lokwelulekwa ngokwengqondo.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuvalwe imingcele ngenxa yezikhukhula eLimpopo UKhomishana obhekelele ukusebenza kwemingcele uDkt Michael Masiapato, uveze izindaba zokuvalwa kwemingcele emibili iPafuri neGiriyondo Port of Entry ngenxa yokugcwala kwamanzi nasezindaweni ezizungezile. IPafuri umngcele ophakathi kweNingizimu Afrika neMozambique, osenyakatho yeKruger National Park. Isango lasePafuri livaliwe ngenxa yezikhukhula eziphezulu zamanzi. I-Giriyondo, iphakathi kweNingizimu Afrika neMozambique iyingxenye ebalulekile ye-Great Limpopo Transfrontier Park, enqamula iNingizimu Afrika yonke, iMozambique kanye neZimbabwe. NgeSonto emini, imibiko yabasebenzi baseKruger National Park abaqaphe le ndawo iveze ukuthi amanzi ebhulohwe lomfula iLuvuvhu anyuke cishe ngesigamu semitha uma kuqhathaniswa nangoMgqibelo. Izibuyekezo ezengeziwe ziphinde zaqinisekisa ukuthi imifula i-Klein Letaba kanye ne-Middlevlei igcwele iyachichima, kuyilapho ibhuloho iLetaba selizogcwala ngenxa yokuqhubeka kokungena kwamanzi amaningi. Uma kubhekwa ukuthi uMfula iLuvuvhu uncikene ne-Pafuri, amazinga amanzi akhuphuka ngokushesha abe yingozi  kwezokuphepha kubasebenzi, abahambi, nengqalasizinda endaweni. "Ngenhloso yokuqinisekisa ukuphepha kwabo bonke abathintekayo, isiphathimandla esilawula imingcele sithathe isinqumo sokumisa ukusebenza emingceleni ethintekile kuze kube yilapho izimo ziba ngcono.. Bonke abasebenzi be-BMA, amalungu eKomidi Lokuphathwa Kwemingcele kanye nezimoto ezisebenza kule mingcele ethintekile zikhishwe njengesinyathelo sokuqapha ezokuphepha," kusho abeBMA ngesitatimende Abahambi abahlose ukungena eSangweni lasePafuri balulekwa ukuthi basebenzise i-Punda Maria Gate njengendawo ephephile. IPunda Maria Gate itholakala cishe kumakhilomitha angu-65 ukusuka ePafuri.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Image: Simphiwe Mbokazi UKhomishana wamaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi uzokwengamela umhlangano oyisipesheli phakathi kososeshini abayizimbangi, iKwaMaphumulo Taxi Association kanye neKwaDukuza Taxi Association ngoMgqibelo. Inhloso yalo mhlangano ukuqeda ukungezwani okukhona phakathi kososeshini ababili ababanga imizila phakathi kokunye ukungezwani. Ukungezwani osekunesikhathi eside kuholele ekuphazamisekeni kokuhamba kwezimoto nodlame. UKhomishana WesiFundazwe uzozama ukuthola ababambiqhaza abathintekayo etafuleni ukuze baxazulule umsuka wenkinga futhi bathole izixazululo ezihlala njalo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
