text: EMINYAKENI edlule kwakungeyona inkinga uma kudingeka ukuthi abalingisi bashuthe iziwombe ezibenza bathintane nozakwabo okanye izindawo belingisa ukuya ocansini uma belingisa indawo yokuthandana. Kodwa muva nje zijikile izinto njengoba iningi labo liqalile ukuphumela obala lizwakalisa ukuthi uma liqopha izindawo ezizodinga ukuthi kulalwe, libe nqunu noma kuqatshulwane ngeke likhululeke ekulingiseni lokho. Abalingisi okukhona kubo uSonia Mbhele esashadele kwaSedibe kwavela izindaba zokuthi umyeni wakhe akayizwa kahle indaba yokuthi alokhu eqabulana namanye amadoda emsebenzini wokulingisa. Lokhu kwabonakala ukuthi akuthinti nje abesifazane kuphela kodwa bakhona nabesilisa abaveza ukuthi abayizwa kahle eyokukhululeka uma kudingeka balingise iziqephu ezinocansi. Umdlalo i-Adulting obukhonjiswa kwiShowmax bekuwumdlalo ogcwele ucansi ngendlela engakaze ibonakale kuleli. LUTHANDO ‘BU’ Mthembu Kodwa omunye wabalingisi bawo, uNhlanhla Kunene, waze waphela engabonakali enza iziqephu ezifana nezozakwabo. UNhlanhla wakuveza ukuthi akakhululeki ukuqopha iziqephu ezifana nalezi. Ozakwabo abebeyingxenye yomdlalo uThembi Seete ophinde abe umculi noBU Mthembu nabo baveza okufanayo ukuthi abakunambithisisi kahle ukuqopha iziqephu zocansi. Inkakha emkhakheni wokulingisa uVatiswa Ndara yaphumela obala yathi umkhakha wokulingisa sekumele ukubheke ukuphepha kwabalingisi uma kuqoshwa iziqephu ezithinta ukuya ocansini okanye indawo yezithandani. Umsakazi ophinde abe ngumlingisi uThando Thabethe wathi kuningi okumele umlingisi oqopha lezi ziqephu azilungiselele ngakho uma kuza emzimbeni wakhe, ngokomoya nesimo somqondo. Intokazi esematheni kulezi zinsuku uNirvana Nokwe-Mseleku isola uzakwabo uBonko Khoza ngokuyithinta ngendlela engafanele beqopha esinye seziqephu emdlalweni iRed Ink ngo-2023. UNirvana uthe uBonko wamthinta ngendlela ayengayithandi yize ayeshilo ukuthi yiziphi izindawo angazithinta noma okungamele azithinte. Lokhu kuveze imibono ehlukene emphakathini ngezinto okumele ziqale zibhekwe yizinkampani zokuqopha uma kuza ekulingiseni, nokuyinto okumele ngempela ziyivulele amehlo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: URETHABILE Khumalo okhiphe i-albhamu entsha ethi Kwelizayo athi uhlonipha ngayo unina uWinnie Khumalo ongasekho IHLONIPHE inkakha endimeni yomculo engasekho uWinnie Khumalo, indodakazi yakhe uRethabile njengoba ikhiphe i-albhamu ethi ngayo ifuna unina angalibaleki kwabaningi. URethabile ukhiphe i-albhamu ethi Kwelizayo athi kuye isho lukhulu njengoba inezingoma ezithinta inhliziyo ngokushiywa unina ngonyaka odlule, njengoba ixoxa ngempilo abayiphilile kuze kube uyadlula emhlabeni. Le albhamu ephume ngoLwesihlanu olwedlule ingeyesithathu kaRethabile selokhu anyathela ezinyathelweni zikanina ngokungena emculweni. "Ngale albhamu nezingoma ezikhona, ngizovulela abantu okokuqala ngobuhlungu engabuzwa kudlula umama emhlabeni nokuthi njengoba sekuhambe isikhathi ngbhekane kanjani nalesi simo. Yize ngingeke ngidlule kuso kodwa ngifunde kanjani ukuphila umama engasekho. Ngikhuluma ngokuthi umculo ungisize kanjani ukuze ngiphinde ngizithole ukuthi ngiwubani ngempela sengifikelwe yilesi simo engangingasicabangi. Ingoma yokuqala ezwakakala kule albhamu ethi Bagolo, ikhuluma kahle ngakho konke engidlule kukho futhi ngiyacabanga ukuthi abantu bazobona ukuthi bengidikibele kanjani ngoba konke ngikuveze obala," kusho yena. Uthe ezinye izingoma zikhuluma ngothando, ubuhlungu, ithemba nokukhula ngokomoya abe nakho edlula kulesi sikhathi. "Ngisebenzise izilimi ezihlukene ukwenza izingoma zami njengoba siyizwekazi elibusisekile ngezilimi ezihlukene. Kukhona izingoma engizicula ngesiZulu, isiXhosa neSepedi, ukuze wonke umuntu azijabulele. Abantu bazozwa izingxoxo zami nomama nomculo esasiwuqopha sizihlalele nje ekhaya engiwusebenzisile kule albhamu. Ngale albhamu ngiyamhlonipha naye ngomsebenzi awenzile kuleli, mina naye ubungeke usihlukanise.Besizwana, nami yindlela lena yokubonga," kuchaza yena. Akholelwa kukho manje uRethabile wukuthi usebheke ekutheni elapheke ngokwenza lolu hlobo lomculo ukuze unina angalibaleki kalula, kodwa ahlale ephila ezinhliziyweni zabantu abehlukene.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UKUNGAKHOKHELWA kwabalingisi yinkampani eqopha umdlalo iPimville, iBakwena Productions, kuholele ekutheni kumiswe esinye sezikhulu esibhekele imidlalo nezinhlelo uLala Tuku ZIMISELWE ukwenza izinto ngenkani noma zikhuzwa izikhulu eziphezulu eSABC, njengoba iya ngokushuba indaba yokungakhokhelwa kwabalingisi nabasebenzi bomdlalo obunezinyanga ukhona iPimville. Isolezwe ngomthombo walo lithole ukuthi uLala Tuku nozakwabo uNirvana Singh noReatlegile “Ree” Mampa kuthiwa bamisiwe emsebenzini kusaqhubeka uphenyo ngokuqhubeka banike inkampani iBakwena Production igunya lokuqopha lo mdlalo yize umlando wale nkampani ungemuhle. Umthombo uthe izikhulu eziphezulu zabuza kaningi ukuthi kungani laba besayine isivumelwano semali eyizigidi, kule nkampani yize kuke kwabikwa izinto ezingezinhle ngayo. “Baveza ukuthi bakwenze lokhu ngoba befuna ukuyinika elinye ithuba le nkampani. Kodwa lokhu kwazicasula izikhulu eziphezulu kwabo ngoba kwabonakala njengenye yezindlela zokungayibheki indaba yezezimali yize iSABC isazama ukuqoqa izimali, njengoba ibibhekene nesimo esingesihle sezimali. Kuthe uma sekuvela lezi zindaba ekubeni imali le nkampani yanikwa yonke kwashiwo ukuthi abakwenza akulungile, kungcono nabo bamiswe emsebenzini kuze kube kuphela uphenyo oseluqalile ngaphakathi,” kusho umthombo. Uthe kumanje izikhulu ezikhona azazi nokuthi zithathe siphi isinqumo, mayelana nokuqeda lo mdlalo unomphela zifake omunye noma ziphinde zithole enye inkampani ezoqhubeka nawo. “Okwamanje akucaci ukuthi isiphi isinqumo okumele sithathwe abaphathi njengoba abanye befuna ukuqeda ngalo mdlalo kodwa kusabhekwa izindlela ezihlukene ukuze kuphunywe nesinqumo okuyiso,” kuchaza umthombo. Esitatimendeni eyasikhipha iSABC yaveza ukuthi ngeke ize inabe noma idalule izivumelwano ababenazo nale nkampani kodwa okwamanje isabheka izindlela ezinye zazo okuwukuthatha le nkampani baye enkantolo njengoba bona bayikhokhela yonke imali yayo. UKagiso Modupe, okunguye umnikazi wale nkampani, waveza ukuthi akazani nokudliwa kwezimali njengoba yena wanikeza ozakwabo amandla okuthi bakhiqize umdlalo yena bagcina bemenza umqondisi. "Mina njengomphathi wenkampani iBakwena Productions Media House savumelana noBrenda Mukwevho okuwona lo mkhakha wokulingisa ukuthi sizosebenzisana ukwenza lolu hlobo lomdlalo, njengoba kunguyena umsunguli wawo. Kodwa ngesikhathi sekusayinwe izinkontileka sesiqala ukusebenza kwaba khona izinto ezingahambi ngendlela okwathi uma ngiziveza kwathiwa angingangeni ngigamanxe, angibhekane nomsebenzi wami njengoba ngingeyena uphrojusa kodwa ngingumphathi wabaqondisi," kusho uKagiso.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI ocula owokholo uJumbo Nyangiwe osenxuse abantu ukuthi bafike ngobuningi babo emcimbini iSilent Worship Experience ezoba seThekwini ngoLwesihlanu UMCULI ocula owokholo uJumbo Nyangiwe noweGqom uSizwe Mdlalose bathembisa lukhulu njengoba bethi ngoLwesihlanu kuyoshintsha impilo yabantu abaningi emcimbini iMayine Silent Worship Experience, ezobanjwa okokuqala eThekwini. Lo mcimbi kulindeleke ukuthi udonse amehlo abaningi eDCC Jesus Dome, njengoba ubophele abaculi bowokholo okukhona kubo uNtokozo Mbambo, Lisanda Beja, Oncemore Six, Ncebakazi Msomi, Khaya Mthethwa, Mpumi Mtsweni nabanye. Izolo ithimba elihlela lo mcimbi belihambele esikoleni iVelabahleke High, eMlaza liyokhulekela abafundi. USizwe odume endimeni yobumnandi ophinde abe ngumculi, uthe okumjabulisa ngabahleli balo mcimbi wukuthi abaqali ukuhambela izikole uma benomcimbi abawenzayo kodwa lokho bakwenza zikhathi zonke ukuyoqinisa abafundi ngomkhuleko. "Ngiyakuthanda kakhulu ukuhamba nethimba elihlela lo mcimbi ngoba abafundi bayadinga ukuthi izikhathi ngezikhathi bahanjelwe bayokhulekelwa njengoba kukuningi okwenzeka ezikoleni. Ngakho emcimbini ozoba ngoLwesihlanu simema wonke umuntu ukuthi aphumelele," kusho uSizwe. Uthe abazoba khona kulo mcimbi bayophuma bebusisekile njengoba behlele ukukhulekela konke okuhle nokubi okwenzeka kuleli. UJumbo uthe abaculi abazobe bekhona ngeke nje bagcine ngokujabulisa abantu ngomculo kodwa bazophinde bashiye amazwi okuvuselela ukholo kubantu. Uthe indlela lo mcimbi ohlelwe ngayo ayijwayelekile njengoba wonke umuntu ezobe efake ama-headset akhe ukuze asondelane noNkulunkulu ngendlela afuna ngayo angaphazanyiswa wumuntu. Uthishanhloko waseVelabahleke, uMnuz Bheki Mhlongo, uthe kuyajabulisa ukufika kwabantu abakuleli zinga bengabizwanga yibo, bengabakhokhele mali bezobapha umphako omkhulu abawudingayo njengesikole. Ugcizelele ukuthi imikhuleko efana nalena ezikoleni iyadingeka njengoba ibakhuthaza abafundi ukuthi benze kahle ezifundweni zabo. Amathikithi okuthamela umcimbi aseyatholakala eWebtickets nasePick n Pay ngo-R250.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa uhloniphe abasemikhakheni eyehlukene okubalwa namaciko emcimbini wama-National Orders,  ePitoli izolo. Kwabahlonishiwe kubalwa isihlabani somculo we-jazz uJonathan Kenneth Butler AMACIKO akuleli ahlonishwe nguMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, emcimbini wama-National Orders,  ePitoli izolo, asho ngazwi linye ukuthi okwenzekile kuwo kusho ukuthi asebenze kanzima ukugqamisa nokusiza abantu bakuleli emikhakheni abakuyo. Amaciko okukhona kuwo abaculi, oDJ, ababhali bezingoma nabafundisa ngomculo bahlonishwe ngezindondo ezihlukene zeKhamanga. Kwabahlonishiwe kubalwa uSamuel Mhangwani osemkhakheni womculo we-jazz, isihlabani somculo we-jazz uJonathan Kenneth Butler odabuka eKapa amava akhe aziwayo emhlabeni jikelele, uJonny Dyani umbhali wezingoma ophinde abe umshayi wezinsimbi, uDJ Oskido ogama lokuzalwa u-Oscar  Mdlongwa ovelele ekufukuleni amaciko asafufusa endimeni yomculo. Ayaziwa amagalelo ka-Oskido emculweni we-kwaito kanti uphinde abe ngusomabhizinisi futhi ungumsakazi. UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa uhloniphe abasemikhakheni eyehlukene okubalwa namaciko emcimbini wama-National Orders,  ePitoli izolo. Kwabahlonishiwe kubalwa uDJ Oskido ogama lokuzalwa u-Oscar  Mdlongwa ovelele ekufukuleni amaciko asafufusa endimeni yomculo Bekhuluma ngemuva kokuhlonishwa ngalezi zindondo iningi labo ligqamise ukuzinikela entweni abayithandayo nokuyiyona eholele ekutheni bahlonishwe ngomsebenzi wabo. U-Oskido uthe ukuhlonishwa ngalolu hlobo lwezindondo kuveza ukuthi umsebenzi abawenzile kusukela ngeminyaka yawo-1990 namhlanje usuthela izithelo. "Ukunikwa indondo yalolu hlobo kungibuyisela emuva mhla ngiqala ukudayisa amavosi edolobheni eGoli ngoba ngizama impilo, lokho kuqala kwami lelo bhizinisi kwathela izithelo zokuthi ngibe umculi engiwuyena namhlanje. Kwathela izithelo ukusebenza ngeminyaka lapho umculo wethu we-kwaito wawunganakiwe khona, kodwa sangena senza umculo owajatshulelwa abantu abaningi. Ukungabi nomhawu sasiza nabanye kwenza umculo wathuthuka sabonakala sibasiza yikhona konke okusibeke lapha," kusho u-Oskido. Ubonge nomndeni wakhe ngokumeseka, wathi ukukholelwa entweni ekugcineni kuthela izithelo eziningi abanye ababengazibhekile. UJonathan uthe uyaziqhenya ngokuba ngomunye wamaciko azalwa kuleli, njengoba esehlonishwa ezweni lakhe ngenye yezindondo ezinkulu. Uthe indondo ngeyawo wonke umuntu ozalwa elokishini nophokophelele ekutheni afeze amaphupho akhe kunoma yini enhle ayenzayo. Uveze ukuthi ngeke aze abakhohlwe abantu ahlangane nabo emazweni omhlaba abamsiza ezintweni ezihlukene ezithinta indima yomculo. UMengameli ubongele bonke abahlonishwe izolo wathi izwe liyaziqhenya kakhulu ngabo  nangomsebenzi abawenzile.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMLINGISIi uBonko Khoza osolwa uzakwabo ngokumthinta ezindaweni ezingafanele beqopha UDUBE umkhakha wokulingisa ngoba ethi kuwo uhlangabezane nokuhlukumezeka futhi wanganakwa uma ekhala ngokwenzeka kuqoshwa umdlalo iThe Red Ink, uNirvana Nokwe-Mseleku. UNirvana ngo-2024 waveza izindaba zokuthi omunye wozakwabo emkhakheni wokulingisa wamthinta ngendlela angayithandi nokuyinto eyagcina inganakiwe ngisho yinkampani yokuqopha eyayenza umdlalo. Nirvana Nokwe .jpg UNIRVANA Nokwe-Mseleku odube umkhakha wokulingisa athi awuphephile Kodwa ngaleso sikhathi akavezanga ukuthi yimuphi umdlalo okwehla kuwona lesi sigameko nokuthi yimuphi lowo zakwabo owenza lokhu. Wathi uzakwabo wamvulela icala ngakwenzile, futhi wanxusa ukuthi alulekwe ngokumehlele aphinde uzakwabo axolise kodwa konke lokho kwagcina kungenzekanga. "Okwenzeka kwangenza ngazizwa ngingaphephile emsebenzini, abantu ababengamele udaba bangidumaza njengoba balukhahlela ngazo zombili bangalunaka. Mina nozakwethu sasenza isiqephu eseyamene nocansi, nokulapho ngamchazela khona ngezindawo engingafuni angithinte kuzona nengingenankinga ukuthi azithinte. Ngamtshela ukuthi amathanga angawathinti kodwa kwathi sesiqopha wangithinta ezindaweni ezingafanele ngazizwa kuphulwa umgomo engiwubekile futhi lokho kwangihlukumeza kakhulu," kusho uNirvana. Uthe okwamcasula sekwenzekile konke wukuthi uzakwabo wathi lesi siqephu akade besiqopha abasiqhube, nokuyinto abona sengathi kwakumele yenzeke ngempela. Ngempelasonto le ntokazi iphumele obala yaveza ukuthi uBonko Khoza, osezakhele igama kulo mkhakha, uyena owenza lokhu beqopha umdlalo iThe Red Ink eyakhonjiswa kwiShowmax. Kule mpelasonto uthe okumenza akhulume ngalolu daba wukuthi uthumele i-email enkampanini iThe Bomb Production ekhala ngendlela lolu daba oluphathwe ngayo nokumenza athathe isinqumo sokuwushiya phansi lo mkhakha. "Okungiphatha kabi wukuthi ngatshelwa ukuthi uma ngiphumela obala ngalolu daba ngeke ngiphinde ngiwuthole umsebenzi kule ndima. UDesiree Markgraff okunguye engabika kuye udaba ungumuntu wesifazane kodwa indlela alusingathe ngayo angijabule neze. Ebengikufuna wukuthi uBonko axolise bese sidlulela phambili kodwa lokho akwenzeki," kusho yena. Uthe uBonko walivuma phambi kwawo wonke umuntu icala lakhe, futhi okwenza kucace ukuthi kukhona okungahambanga kahle wukuthi konke abakushutha okuthinta lesi simo kwagcina kungakhonjiswanga kwithelevishini. Lesi simo uthe siyishintshe kakhulu indlela abuka ngayo lo mkhakha, njengoba kungaphephile ukusebenza kuwo. Imizamo yokuthola uBonko ayiphumelelanga, futhi ngesikhathi sokushicilela ubengakaphefumuli ngalolu daba.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: INTANDOKAZI yomlingisi uSindi Dlathu ingomunye wabalingisi ababuyayo kulo mkhakha njengoba izoba ngomunye wabalingisi abaphambili emdlalweni iThe For of Us nozakwabo uRami Chuene USINDI Dlathu noRami Chuene abake babonakala emidlalweni emikhulu kuleli bakhuza ibuya kulo mkhakha ngemuva kweminyaka bengabonakali. Laba bethulwe njengabanye babalingisi abasha abazobonakala emdlalweni iThe Four of Us, ozoqala ngenyanga ezayo kwi-e.tv. Lo mdlalo uzokhonjiswa phakathi nezinsuku uzovala isikhala somdlalo iScandal! efinyelela emaphethelweni ngemuva kokukhombiswa iminyaka engaphezu kwengu-10 kulesi siteshi. Ngempelasonto i-e.tv imemezele ingxenye yabalingisi bokuqala lezi zintandokazi zabalingisi eziyingxenye yabo. Abanye abamenyezelwe kubalwa uThembinkosi Mthembu, Kelebogile Masango, Sdumo Mtshali, Dumisani Dlamini noMagic Hlatshwayo osanda kuhlonishwa ngendondo yeLifetime Achievement emcimbini amaSafta. Abakwa-e.tv baveze ukuthi ukuhamba kwesikhathi bazoqhubeka bamemezele abanye abalingisi okuhlanganisa nabomdlalo oqoshwa eThekwini othi eGagasini. UHelga Palmer, obhekelele ukuthuthukisa izinhlelo zakuleli kwa-eMedia, ugcizelele ukuthi izinguquko abazenzayo manje zingumbono abanawo walesi siteshi ukusithatha ezingeni elikuso manje basibeke kwelinye. "Ukwethula izinhlelo ezimbili kusho ukukhula kakhulu kwemidlalo esiba nayo ngezikhathi esizithatha njengokuthi zibalulekile ebusuku la iningi labantu lisuke selizibukela amathelevishini. Okusijabulisa kakhulu ukuthi sisebenze nezinkampani ezimbili ezinkulu esezenze imidlalo ehlonishwe ngezindondo kuleli nakwamanye amazwe, bathembise ukusiziza nathi siqhubeke nokuvula amathuba omsebenzi entsheni yakithi futhi kuphinde kugqame nezinto ezihlukene ezenzeka emiphakathini yakithi,” kusho uHelga. Uthe njengesiteshi bazinike ekutheni balethe imidlalo nezinhlelo ezizodala ukuthi abantu baxoxe emphakathini futhi zigcine abalandeli abaningi. Umdlalo othi eGagasini wona ukhiqizwa inkampani iStained Glass TV omunye wabaphathi bayo okunguPepsi Pokane. UPokane uveze ukuthi lo mdlalo wona ugxile entsheni efuna ukwakha igama ayo endimeni yomculo nokuyinto engezi kalula njengoba kukhona izingqinamba ehlangana nazo endleleni nokuyinto ezobonakala kulo mdlalo. Abalingisi balo mdlalo bona kulindeleke ukuthi bethulwe kuleli sonto.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: AMANXUSA omcimbi Ingoma kaZwelonke, uBahubhe noKhuzani Mpungose bephahle uXolani Mcinelka esithangamini sabezindaba ngesikhathi kumenyezelwa izinhlelo zomcimbi walo nyaka ozoba ngenyanga ezayo KULINDELEKE ukuthi kuguge imbadada kugqebhuke umhlaba ngoJuni 27, ePeople's Park, eThekwini, njengoba abahleli bomcimbi wengoma owaziwa ngokuthi Ingoma kaZwelonke, ngoLwesihlanu, bememezele izinhlelo zomcimbi walo nyaka. Lo mcimbi ozobe uhlanganisa iminyaka emihlanu waba khona, uXolani Mcineka ongomunye wabahleli bawo, uveze ukuthi abaziqhenya ngakho ukuthi wenze izinto ezinkulu emagoseni. Uthe namhlanje kukhona imicimbi ehlukene ngenxa yokuthi bakhetha ukusungula umcimbi ofana nalona. UMcineka uveze ukuthi abagcinanga lapho kodwa benza isiqiniseko sokuthi amagosa ayahomula uma kukhona imicimbi ayihambelayo ngenxa yawo njalo umsebenzi abawenzayo. “Usuku olukhulu lolu njengoba ingoma kukhona into eyenzayo kubantu ngokwehlukana kwabo. Abanye bahlengezela izinyembezi, kuvuke imizwa ehlukene. Ngakho umcimbi lona umuntu afunda okuhlukene kuwo unyaka nonyaka. Nakulo nyaka sizomemezela ukuthi lo mcimbi uzoba khona futhi kuzobe kunandisa amaqembu angu-60. Ngeke sikwazi ukufaka amanye amaqembu ngaphezu kwalawa. Wonke amaqembu esike saba nawo kule minyaka ayazimisela kakhulu futhi kuba nzima ukuthi ukhiphe amanye ufake amanye kodwa kuningi esikubhekayo okusha nokuhehayo esithuthukisa ngakho lo mcimbi, bese sibafaka emaqenjini azonandisa,” kusho uMcineka. Ubuciko nokunandisa ngezinto ezihlukene engomeni uthe yizona zinto abazifunayo ukuze kube mnandi engomeni. “Siyabonga kubantu basoLundi naseNkandla abaletha amakhono asishiya sibambe ongezansi ngonyaka odlule. Kwavela ukuthi impi akuyona nje eyokubulala kuphela kodwa ikhona nasengomeni, nokuyinto ezokwenzeka kulo nyaka. Impi kulo nyaka angikuveze ukuthi iphakathi kweziFunda iKing Cetshwayo neZululand,” kusho uMcineka. Umculi kamaskandi uKhuzani oyinxusa kulo mcimbi uthe kusukela kulo mcimbi uqala kuze kube manje babonga ukubekezelelana okuba khona phakathi kwabahleli namagoso, wathi umdlalo oba khona kulo mcimbi uyabajabulisa futhi banxusa abantu ukuthi baphume ngobuningi babo ngosuku lomcimbi. UBahubhe ongumculi kamaskandi naye oyinxusa lalo mcimbi, uveze ukuthi yena uselinde usuku lomcimbi njengoba konke sekukhulunyiwe ozakwabo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ABALINGISI bomdlalo KwaBaba ozoqala kuMzansi Magic ngenyanga ezayo, owethulwe kwabezindaba ngoLwesihlanu UMLINGISI waseMlaza, uVuyo Biyela, uthi intsha eningi yesilisa izozibona kumlingisi uZwelakhe Mkhize, ozobonakala emdlalweni owuchungechunge othi KwaBaba, ozoqala ukukhonjiswa kuMzansi Magic ngoJuni 1, ngo-7.30 ebusuku. Lona ngomunye wemidlalo Isolezwe elike labika ngawo, njengoba lathola ukuthi usaqoshwa, noqale sekudlule isikhathi ngemuva kokuphela kweGenesis ebikade ikhona. Lo mdlalo ukhuluma ngowesilisa osothandweni kodwa ongakwazi ukuya phambili nempilo yakhe njengoba kukhona izinto ezisambambile, okumele azenze nokwakumele zenziwe abazali bakhe. UVuyo ekhuluma ngale ndawo, uthe umdlalo lona abesilisa abazozibona kuwo njengoba ubheka ubuhle bothando kanjalo nomthwalo oza nalo. "Uzobe ugxile esikweni kakhulu, izinto zamasiko izona ezizobe zihamba phambili kuwona. UZwelakhe kulo mdlalo kuzogqama ukuthi yini adlule kuyo ukuze aqinisekise ukuthi uthando lwakhe nowesifazane azifelayo ngaye aluphazamiseni. Umndeni ufuna okwawo, ufuna enze izinto zamasiko angahlangani nazo, ezenzeka kudala kodwa manje esibhekene naye emehlweni nezimisa impilo yakhe," kusho uVuyo. Uthe yize uZwelakhe engayizwa yonke into atshelwa yona ngoba ekholelwa ukuthi ayibhekene naye kodwa ugcine ehlise umoya akwenze okufuneka kuye ngenxa yokuthi ufuna ukuthatha igxathu elikhulu empilweni yakhe. "Ukwenza kwakhe lokho ngenjongo yokuthi ufuna ukuphila impilo yakhe kula izinto zithanda khona ukushuba njengoba kuvela izinto okungenzeka ziwubumbe umndeni noma ziwubhidlize. Umbuzo ke uthi kumele yini ayeke konke abazali bakhe abamtshela khona okuthinta isiko lakubo, avele aqhubeke nempilo yakhe, athole umuntu amthandayo ashade? Abantu abaningi besilisa bazozibona kulo mdlalo, nesithemba ukuthi kuzoba khona isifundo abanye babone ukuthi yini okumele bayenze ngempilo yabo," kusho yena. Kwabanye abalingisi abazobonakala kulo mdlalo kubalwa uRorisang Mohapi-Grootboom ozobe elingisa indawo kaBahumi, Hlengiwe Lushaba-Madlala (MaMbokazi), Mpho J Molepo, Helen Lebepe, Lindani Nkosi, Nkanyiso Mzimela, Kwanele Mthethwa, Sparky Xulu noPhumzile Mlangeni. UShirley Adonisi ongumqondisi wezinhlelo zakuleli kulesi siteshi, uveze ukuthi bawamukela ngazo zombili lo mdlalo. Uthe uthemba ukuthi ababukeli bazowujabulela njengoba uxube isiko nempilo yaselokishini, waveza ukuthi kuzogqama sengathi bawuqophele elokishini laseMsawawa, eDiepkloof Ext.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMLINGISIu-Andile Mxhakaza oseveze izindaba zokuthi ukusindiswa ngenye yezinto ezimsizile empilweni yakhe U-ANDILE Mxhakaza uthi ukukholwa kumsizile ekuthatheni izinqumo ezihlukene empilweni yakhe manje kunakudala. Uthe wakhetha ukusindiswa ngo-2019 nokuyinto emshintshe kakhulu, ngisho elingisa. Kulezi zinsuku u-Andile ubonakale elingisa indawo ephambili emdlalweni othi Isithembu SikaMsongelwa. Kanti emasontweni amabili edlule umenyezelwe njengomunye wabalingisi abasha emdlalweni Isitha: The Enemy isizini yesine eqale ekuqaleni kwale nyanga. Kulo mdlalo ulingisa indawo kaMapholoba okungowesilisa ongumgulukudu wesigebengu. U-Andile uthe ukuthola indawo ayeyilingisa emdlalweni Ishaka-Ilembe nalena ayilingisa manje, kwakungelula kodwa ukuzila ukudla nokukhuleka kwamsiza kakhulu. "Ngaqeda ukuqopha Ishaka-Ilembe izinto zathula kakhulu ngemuva kwalokho, ngacishe ngalahlekelwa yithemba empilweni. Kodwa umndeni wami nokukholwa kwangisiza kakhulu ukuthi ngihlale nginethemba lokuthi izinto zizolunga ngelinye ilanga. Uma ngiya koqopha kwiShaka ngangiya sengikhulekile ukuze izinto zihambe kahle. Kuthe uma ngithola le ndawo ngase ngiyipakishile imithwalo yami ngiya kwelinye izwe kodwa sekusele usuku ngihambe ngafonelwa kwathiwa umsebenzi ngiwutholile, ngajabula kakhulu ngabona ukuthi ukholo lwami lungisebenzele," kusho u-Andile. Uthe indawo kaMapholoba, ibe nzima kakhulu kuye njengoba kumele akhulume ngezindlela ezihlukene nokuyinto engelula. "Abantu bazomthanda uMapholoba ngoba ungumuntu oyisigebengu esiphinde kube sengathi silungile uma sibona abantu abaningi, kodwa kulabo esibhekane nabo, kunzima kakhulu. Umdlalo lengithi mina ezinyangeni ezintathu ezizayo uzoba mkhulu kakhulu, futhi kuningi abantu abazokufunda kuwo ngenxa yezinto ezizokwenzeka ," kusho yena. Uthe kuningi okumehlele empilweni futhi ukuthatha isinqumo ngempilo yakhe kwenze washiya izinto ezindala. UMxhakaza uzakhele udumo ngokulingisa kwiTaxi Bosses, Housekeepers, Isibaya, The Righ, Gog' Helen nakwiZone 14.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ABALINGISI bomdlalo Inimba okukhona kubo uLoyiso MacDonald, Lunathi Mampofu, Ayakha Ntunjwa, Sisanda Hewana noZenande Mfenyana. UMBHALI womdlalo Inimba okwathi uqala nje kwavela izindaba zokuthi wenza kahle ngababukeli, uSiphosethu Tshapu, uthi akuyona into encane kubo ukukhala bamuke nezindondo ezimbili emcimbini amaMVCA abeseNigeria ngempelasonto. USiphosethu ungomunye wababhali abasebancane abasanda kufika kulo mkhakha nabenza kahle kakhulu. Isiteshi sakwa-e.tv sisanda kuqala umdlalo othi Emzini nawo obhalwe uyena. UMBHALI womdlalo Inimba uSiphosethu Tshapu ejabulela izindondo abazithole kulo nyaka emicimbini emikhulu kuleli nasezwenikazi i-Afrika USiphosethu uthe uyaziqhenya ngomsebenzi abawenzile ngomdlalo Inimba, futhi bajabule ngezindondo abazitholile. "Izindondo esizitholile okukhona kuzo eyeBest Indegenous M-Net Original neyeBest Scripted Series, ziyinto esingeke siyithathe kancane futhi yinto engingeke ngiyikhohlwe emlandweni wami wokubhala imidlalo. Lesi yisikhumbuzo sokuthi imidlalo yalana ezwenikazi lethu i-Afrika siyixoxa ngobuqotho, sikhuluma ngento eyenzeka ngempela emiphakathini yangakithi futhi akukho esisaba ukukuvezela umphakathi," kusho uSiphosethu. Uthe akubonga kakhulu abalingisi abazinikele nababukeli. "Sibonga ababukeli okuyibo abantu ababaluleke kakhulu. Ababukeli bayakhuluma ngomdlalo kube nemibono ehlukene, nokuyinto ejabulisayo uma siyibona. Abanye uma siqokwa eminxeni efana nalena ngenxa yothando bayavota singabacelile kungakho umuntu ephethe lezi zindondo manje. Ngiyabonga kakhulu esiteshini iMutlichoice Canal + ngokungithemba ngesikhathi ngilethe umdlalo walolu hlobo kubo, bakholelwa kakhulu kuwo, namanje baphinde basipha enye isizini yesibili nokuyinto enkulu kithi yokuthi siqhubeke sixoxe izindaba zethu," kusho yena. Uthe lesi kuseyisiqalo kulo mkhakha akuwona njengoba iminingi imidlalo azimisele ukuyikhiqiza bese eyibona ikhonjiswa emazweni ahlukene.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UGXEKA nabakuleli abahlomula ngemali yokuvikelwa kwabokufika ngesigameko sokushiswa komuzi wakhe uNgizwe Mchunu, othi ukhale izinyembezi ebona umuzi wakhe uwumlotha. UNgizwe okwenzeke lesi sigameko eseGoli, ngeSonto ekuseni, uthe ulivulile icala emaphoyiseni. Uthe njengoba akhe endaweni yasemakhaya eMbumbulu, unesiqiniseko sokuthi abekho abokufika abebengafinyelela kule ndawo benze umonakalo ofana nalona. UNgizwe ukhuluma ngalolu hlobo ngoba usekhaleni lemibhikisho yokulwa nabantu bokuhamba abaseNingizimu Afrika ngaphandle kwezimvume. Usale unje umuzi kaNgizwe ushiswa amadoda amathathu angaziwa afike emzini wakhe eMbumbulu, emfuna ngeSonto Ekhuluma neSolezwe, uthe umzabalazo wokulwa nabokufika abasezweni ngaphandle kwamaphepha ngeke baze bawuyeke futhi akanavalo. "Noma mina ngingenaso isiqiniseko kodwa imimoya ikhomba laba balapha kithi abathatha imali yokuvikela abokufika ukuthi yibona abenze lokhu. Konke ngikushiye emaphoyiseni ukuthi  aphenye. Abokufika ngihlala kude kakhulu mina ukuthi bebengeza lapha bafike benze lo monakalo kodwa engingakusho wukuthi ngibonga ukuthi izingane ziphephile nonkosikazi, okwamanje basendaweni engaziwa muntu. Mina ngiwumuntu onedlozi elinzima kakhulu, into enjena ibingeke ivele yenzeke nje emzini wobabamkhulu ngakho ngithi abenzi bokubi bazobanjwa," kusho uNgizwe. Uzakwabo abambisene naye kulo mkhankaso, uNkosikhona "Phakelumthakathi" Ndabandaba, uthe ngeke kubanqinde amandla ukushiswa komuzi kaNgizwe njengoba abakwenzayo kuwukulwa nabantu bangaphandle abakuleli abenza izinto ezingalungile. "Thina sifuna ukuqeda amaphara, siqede ukuhlukunyezwa kwezingane ezincane. Ngesonto elidlule, sithole ingane yentombazane eneminyaka engu-13 inengane ihlala nendoda eneminyaka engu-48 yangaphandle. Izingane zethu seziphenduke amaphara ngenxa yezidakamizwa ezidayiswa yilaba bantu ngakho sifuna ukuqeda lokho, asicwasi," kusho yena. Uthe kusasa bazoya e-ICC embukisweni iToursim Indaba lapho kuzobe kunomengameli bomhlaba khona ukuze bahlale phansi nabo babatshele ukuthi abacwasi muntu kodwa yini abalwa nayo. Uveze ukuthi bahlele ukuhamba nawo amaphara bayowakhombisa omengameli abahlukene, ukuze babone ukuthi izidakamizwa zililimaze kanjani elakuleli. UShansela ehhovisi leSilo, Inkosi uMalusi Zondi, usigxeke kakhulu isigameko sokushiswa komuzi kaNgizwe wathi okwenzekile kuletha ukukhathazeka. "Sicela ukuthi abasemandleni baphenye ngalesi sigameko. Isigameko esifana nalesi siletha ukukhathazeka kakhulu. Nathi siyaxhumana naye uNgizwe ngokwenzekile futhi isimo sisiqaphe ngeso lokhozi futhi sizomeseka kuze kube sekugcineni. Sinxusa ukuthi kube noxolo, ukuthula, ukubumbana kusona sonke isizwe," kusho uZondi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe bayaphenya ngemuva kokuthungelwa kwezindlu ezintathu eMbumbulu. UNGIZWE Mchunu ufike waphelelwa amandla emzini wakhe oseMbumbulu oshisiwe ngeSonto

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMLINGISI uKagiso Modupe osephumele obala ngokuphela isigubhukane komdlalo iPimville ngenxa yokungaholelwa kwabalingisi UKHOMBA ozakwabo asebenza nabo kuqopshwa umdlalo iPimville, umlingisi uKagiso Medupe, othi wakhishwa kwasetshenziswa inkampani yakhe kuphela ukuqopha lo mdlalo. Isolezwe libike ngezinkinga ezikhungethe lo mdlalo kusuka ekupheleni kukaMashi nalapho abalingisi bengaholanga. Kuthe ngenyanga edlule babeka phansi amathuluzi ngemuva kokungayitholi imali yabo, nokudale ukuthi kuphele iziqephu ebeziqoshiwe, kwama ukukhonjiswa komdlalo kwiSABC2, ngesonto eledlule. UKagiso uthe akafuni kusolwe yena ngalesi sigameko njengoba engekho ethimbeni lophrojusa abakhulu kodwa yena ungumqondisi nje kuphela womdlalo. "Mina njengomphathi wenkampani iBakwena Productions Media House savumelana noBrenda Mukwevho okuwona lo mkhakha wokulingisa ukuthi sizosebenzisana ukwenza lolu hlobo lomdlalo, njengoba kunguyena umsunguli wawo. Kodwa ngesikhathi sekusayinwe izinkontileka sesiqala ukusebenza kwaba khona izinto ezingahambi ngendlela okwathi uma ngiziveza kwathiwa angingangeni ngigamanxe, angibhekane nomsebenzi wami njengoba ngingeyena uphrojusa kodwa ngingumphathi wabaqondisi," kusho uKagiso. Uthe yena ubengangeni kwezemali kulo mdlalo, okuthinta amaholo, ukuqasha noma ukuxosha abasebenzi nabalingisi. "Kusuka uqala umdlalo, kuze kube manje angikaze ngithinte into ehlangene nemali, nokuthi isebenza kanjani kulo mdlalo. Mina okwami kwakuwukuthi ngikhiqize umdlalo osezingeni eliphezulu abantu abazowujabulela, emalini bengingazi lutho, kungakho ngikhethe ukuthi ngiphendule ngalezi zinsolo, esezibhekiswe kimina," kuchaza yena. Ngokusho kwakhe kuyamkhathaza ukuthi abalingisi, abasebenzi nawo wonke umuntu osebenza kulo mdlalo akaholile. Uthe uke wakhuluma nozakwabo abangaphezu kwakhe, abamtshele ukuthi akabheke umsebenzi wakhe. "Kulapho ngithathe isinqumo sokuthi ngixhumane neSABC nezinye izikhulu ezifanele ngoba ngase ngibona ukuthi isimo siya ngokuba sibi kakhulu. Ukungaholelwa kwabasebenzi abazinikele emsebenzini wabo ngakusukumela ngaze ngaxoxa nomunye wophrojusa ukuthi asitholele usizo ukuze kuqhubeke umsebenzi kodwa kwaba nhlanga zimuka nomoya," kuchaza yena. Uthe yize ezinkundleni zokuxhumana abantu besola yena, kodwa akungasolwa yena ngokudliwa kwemali njengoba naye engaholile njengawo wonke umsebenzi. Uthe okumenze waphumela obala ngalesi simo wukuthi kusolwa yena ekubeni engenalo icala ngokuqhubekayo. Akufunayo yena uthe wukuthi kukhokhelwe wonke umuntu ngomsebenzi awenzile futhi uzobeseka baze bathole imali yabo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI, uZakes Bantwini, ovule inhlangano engenzi nzuzo ngenjongo yokusiza intsha nabesifazane emkhakheni wamaciko nezemidlalo KULINDELEKE ukuthi igxile kakhulu emacikweni inhlangano engenzi nzuzo esanda kwethulwa yinkakha endimeni yomculo nesike yahlabana ngendondo iGrammy Award iphinde ibe umculi, uphrojusa, usomabizinisi nokunye. Inhlangano iZakes Bantwini Foundation, kulindeleke ukuthi ibhekane kakhulu nokuthuthukisa imiphakathi ehlukene ezintweni zamasiko, imfundo, umculo, nokuthuthisa amaciko. Ngale nhlangano, uZakes uthe ukholelwa ekutheni abantu abanethalente kumele bafundiswe futhi baqeqeshelwe imikhakha eminingi. Uthe ngayo akuhlose kakhulu ukuthuthukisa abesifazane, intsha futhi iqhakambise amakhono ezindaweni ezihlukene kuleli njengoba izozinikela ekutheni bafundiswe, bathuthukiswe baphinde babasize kukhona konke abakufunayo ukuze bavulekelwe amathuba ahlukene emikhakheni abayifunayo kuleli. "Izwe lethu ligcwele abantu abanamathalente ahlukene. Ngakho ukusungula le nhlangano ngikwenze ngoba ngifuna ukusiza la ngibona khona ukuthi kunesikhala kubantu abanamakhono nothando. Ngakho leli ithuba lokuthi kusizwe abantu abasha ngezinto abazidingayo, ulwazi namathuba esizobanika wona ukuze bathuthuke ezintweni abafisa ukuba yizona kusasa," kusho uZakes. Uthe bazoba nazo nezingqungquthela ezihlukene ngaphansi kwale nhlangano ezithinta ukuthuthukisa intsha nabesifazane emikhakheni asebeyivezile. "Siyathemba ukuthi senza into eyothuthukisa ngisho izizukulwane zethu, zisizakale kulokhu esikuqalayo manje sesingasekho. Ngale nhlangano sifuna ukubona isizukulwane esiyomela elakuleli emazweni omhlaba ezintweni ezithinta ubuciko nosomabhizinisi abakhulu. Njengenhlangano sivule izandla ukwamukela abaxhasi, abantu abafuna ukusebenza nathi kusuka kwabazimele nezinkampani, abafuna ukufaka esikhwameni sethu ukuze sikwazi ukuqhubeka sithuthuka siphinde sifake isandla emphakathini yakithi," kusho yena. Uthe maduzane bazohambela amadolobha ahlukene bethula le nhlangano kubantu abahlukene futhi bahlangane netsha ezimisele ukusebenza nabo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UBONGEZIWE Mabandla echaza ngengoma yakhe ethi Walila nendlalela i-albhamu yakhe nohambo lwamadolobha ahlukene UMZWILILI owaziwa ngokugqamisa umculo wesintu, uBongeziwe Mabandla, useveze ukuthi uhlela ukuhambela amadolobha ahlukene ukuhlangana nabalandeli bakhe njengoba ekhuza ibuya emculweni. Uthe lokhu kuhambisana nokuthi kusasa uzokhipha ingoma ethi Walila, nengenye yezikhona kwi-albhamu yakhe entsha ezophuma ngenyanga ezayo. Nge-albhamu yakhe ithi Ndingubani, uBongeziwe uthe uhlela ukuyethula kubalandeli bakhe kule nyanga nangezayo ezindaweni ezahlukene. Ekhuluma ngokubuya kwakhe emculweni, uveze ukuthi le ngoma iza nezinguquko eziningi emculweni wakhe njengoba unesigqi esisha. "Umculo wami abantu bayawazi futhi nakulokhu akukho okutheni okushintshile, kungaba nje ezingomeni ezimbalwa kodwa ngibuye ngesigqi abasaziyo futhi abasithandayo. Ingoma lena engiyibhale nginomqondo wokuthi kukhona udaba engiluxoxayo ngayo, ibheka indlela yokuziphindiselela nezinye izinto ehambisana nazo okwenzeka kithi singabantu. Ibheka indlela ubulungiswa obenzeka ngayo noma obugcina bufikile ngayo uma kukade wabulinda," kusho uBongeziwe. Uthe uke azithole ehleka yedwa uma ecabanga ukuthi le ngoma yamfikela kanjani. "Ngangidlala isigingci sami ngafikelwa imibono eminingi ngaleso sikhathi, omunye yawo wawungakho ukuziphindiselela. Ngafikelwa umuzwa wokuthi ngesinye isikhathi sike senze izinto singazi ukuthi ekugcineni lezo zinto - ngesinye isikhathi - ziyabuya kithi sesikhohliwe. Bengifuna ukuthola indlela elula yokuveza lo mbono ebenginawo kungakho ngiqhamuke nesihloko sale ngoma esithi umuntu uyakhala kodwa ukhala izinyembezi ezincane," kusho uBongeziwe. Uthe okunye akade ekucabanga ebhala le ngoma ukuthi iningi labantu like labhekana nesimo la lihlangabezana nokungabutholi ubulungiswa ngakho le ngoma ibheka lowo muzwa.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UKABZA De Small noDJ Maphorisa abaziwa ngeScorpion Kings ababonga uxhaso lwabalandeli babo kudayiswa ephela amathikithi omcimbi wabo ozoba ngoSepthemba IZINSIZWA esezizakhele igama endimeni yomculo ngisho emazweni omhlaba uKabza De Small noDJ Maphorisa abaziwa ngeThe Scorpion Kings, sezibonge abantu bakuleli ngokuzixhasa bathenga aphela amathikithi omcimbi wazo. Lokhu bakuveze izolo nala bethe uxhaso abaluthole kubantu yize kuqale kwaba nomsindo, luyamangalisa. Ekuqaleni kwale nyanga laba bamemezela izindaba zokuthi umcimbi iScorpion King Live uzoba ngoSepthemba 26, enkundleni yezemidlalo iFNB. Abantu abaningi bakhala ngokubiza kwamathikithi alo mcimbi, bathi lezi zinsizwa zinyuse kakhulu intengo yawo, akusafani naseminyakeni edlule. Lo mcimbi kulindeleke ukuthi ekuhambeni kwesikhathi ube ngomunye wemikhulu kuleli njengoba engu-70 000 amathikithi adayisiwe. UDJ Maphorisa uveze ukuthi bayabonga kakhulu ngothando abaluthole kubantu manje basezinhlelweni zokuthi bavule amathikithi akhethekile ngoMeyi 22. "Uthando abalandeli bethu abasikhombise lona lukwelinye izinga ngempela, ukubabona ngendlela ababe nesasasa ngayo simemezela umcimbi nokuvulwa kwamathikithi kusho lukhulu kithi futhi asikuthathi kancane lokho ngoba siba nomcimbi ngenxa yabo. Sibonga nokuthi njalo uma simemezela umcimbi basukuma bazithathe bese kuthi ngosuku lwawo bahlale nathi uze uphele, abakwenza kithi angeke size sikukhohlwe," kusho uMaphorisa. UKabza De Small uthe naye okukhulu ukuzithoba adlulise ukubonga njengoba okwenzekile kuwumlando kubo. "Siwadayise aphela amathikithi, okwamanje sisezinhlelweni zokufaka isicelo sokuthi sidayise amathikithi angu-10 000 ukuze sibe abantu abenza umcimbi omkhulu wesibili emhlabeni. Noma sibheke indlela yokuthi senze usuku lwesibili lwalo mcimbi, kodwa konke lokhu sisakubheka ukuthi ikuphi okungcono ukuze abalandeli bethu bajabule. Kunzima manje, silindele ukuthi nabafuna awezicukuthwane sebebonile ukuthi azoqala nini ukudayisa, siyabonga," kusho yena.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMETHULI wezinhlelo uNimrod Nkosi usebonge ukwesekwa kusabalala ingxoxo ayenayo nozakwabo ekhala ngokungasebenzi USEPHUMELE obala wabonga ukuxhaswa abantu bezwelana naye ngemuva kokusabalala kwenkulumo-ngxoxo ayenayo nomunye uzakwabo umlingisi obuye abe ngumethuli wezinhlelo uNimrod Nkosi. UNimrod kule nkulumo ubezwakala ekhala futhi ecela umsebenzi nokuyinto eyashiya abantu bakuleli bekhungathekile ngendima yezokungcebeleka. Wayeveza ubunzima obukule ndima yize eneminyaka engaphezu kuka-20 egxile kuyo. Kule ngxoxo wayethi uvula isifuba komunye umuntu wesilisa ukuze kube khona omlalelayo njengoba ekulesi simo esinzima sokungasebenzi. “Ngizinikele ngakho konke enginakho kule ndima, kodwa manje ngibona futhi konke kungilahlekela ngenxa yokungatholi amathuba omsebenzi. Ngibona ukuthi ake ngikhulume nomunye umuntu ngoba sengithule isikhathi eside, sekwanele,” kusho uNimrod. Muva nje uveze ukuthi ubonile abantu bekhathazeka sekusabalale le nkulumo kodwa angakusho wukuthi ngokwempilo uyaphila. “Ngiyabonga kubona bonke abantu abangithintile emva kokuba kusabalale le nkulumo ngenxa yokukhathazeka kwabo, bakhombisa ukungeseka. Ngithanda ukuniqinisekisa ukuthi mina nomndeni senza kahle kakhulu. Ngikhethe ukuthi ngalolu daba ngingabheki okubi kuphela. Abanye abantu bakhulume abakuthandayo, kodwa ngabheka okuhle ngalesi simo. Ngibonga nalabo abavikele isithunzi sami kuzona zonke izinkulumo ebezivela,” kusho yena. Uthe ukubona abantu bememeza bethi akathole umsebenzi njengoba esezikhalele kusho lukhulu kuye futhi uyathemba ukuthi maduzane abantu bazombona elapho bemfisela ukuthi abe khona. Lo mlingisi kulezi zinsuku ubonakala elingisa emdlalweni iLaw, Love & Betrayal nalapho alingisa khona indawo ephambili. Ukuphumela obala kwabalingisi, abaculi namanye amaciko kuleli bekhala ngezinkinga sekuyinto ejwayelekile njengoba ngisho uRami Chuene, emesekile uNimrod wathi lokhu akwenzayo kuyindlela engcono kunokuthi afele ngaphakathi njengoba besemkhakheni onzima.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMSUNGULI womcimbi wezindondo iThe Basadi in Music Awards uHloni Modise osememezele izindaba zokuthi sebekuvulile ukungenela lo mncintiswano futhi kulo nyaka kuzovuleleka nakwabesifazane bangaphandle kwakuleli Image: Hloni Modise Matau, CEO of Basadi in Music Awards/ Picture: Supplied IZINTOKAZI ezisemikhakheni ehlukene kwezikaqedizisungu eziqhamuka emazweni angaphandle, zizothola ithuba lokuqokwa okokuqala emcimbini wezindondo kulo nyaka ozobe ugubha iminyaka emihlanu wasungulwa iThe Basadi in Music Awards. Umcimbi wanonyaka uzobanjwa ngosuku olusazomenyezelwa kodwa ngenyanga yasebesifazane u-Agasti. Abahleli bomcimbi bamemezele izindaba zokuthi sebelivulile ithuba lokuthi abafuna ukuqokwa kuwo bangenele. UHloni Modise ongumsunguli wawo uthe ukwamukelwa kwemingenelo kuzovalwa ngoMeyi 30 ngo-12 ebusuku. “Kulo nyaka sihlele ukuhlonipha wonke umuntu wesifazane ngendlela ehlukile kunalena ebesijwayele ukwenza ngayo. Njengoba sigubha iminyaka emihlanu sihlele ukuthi sivulele nezinye izintokazi zakwamanye amazwe ase-Afrika ukuthi zibe yingxenye yomcimbi okokuqala. Njengoba sesiqalile ukumemezela izinhlelo lokhu kusho ukuthi akusekho ukubheka emuva, sesiqale sona isikhathi somcimbi wezindondo walo nyaka,” kuchaza uHloni. Uthe ukuphumela kwamanye amazwe kuseyindlela yokukhulisa umcimbi ukuze ungagcini kuleli kuphela. “Sifuna ukukhulisa umcimbi, kungabukeki sengathi owakuleli kuphela, awuvulelekile nakwabanye, kithina ke lokhu kusho ukukhula. Simema ngisho abathandi balo mcimbi kuwona wonke umhlaba ukuthi babe yingxenye yawo ngokuqoka abantu abafuna ukubabona beqhudelana kuwo. Sifuna ukwaziwa emhlabeni nakuzo zonke izindawo esiya kuzona negalelo lethu libonakale,” kusho yena. UXoliswa Nduneni-Ngema ongumphathi weJoburg Theatre, eGauteng, lapho umcimbi ubanjwa khona minyaka yonke uthe kuyabajabulisa ukuba yingxenye yomcimbi walolu hlobo ongasagcini nje kuphela kuleli kodwa osuzokwaziwa i-Afrika yonke. Uthe ukuvuleleka kokuqokwa kwabazoqhudelana kulo nyaka kuyindlela entsha umcimbi ozoba iyona kusukela manje uqhubeke ubungaze impumelelo yomuntu wesifazane emikhakheni ehlukene.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: USDUMO Mtshali ozolingisa indawo ephambili emdlalweni othi The Polygamist Image: Image:X/@tvmzansi ISITESHI esizimele iNetflix sesimemezele umdlalo wokuqala owuchungechunge othi The Polygamist, osuselwe encwadini kaSue Nyathi enesihloko esifanayo. Lo mdlalo oneziqephu ezingu-22, uqoshwe yinkampani esikhiqize imidlalo okukhona kuyo Uzalo nothi Amalanga Awafani, i-Stained Glass Productions. Kuwo kulingisa phambili abalingisi abanamava kuleli, uGugu Gumede noSdumo Mtshali. UGugu ekhasini lakhe kwi-Instagram uveze ukuthi ekugcineni ujabule ngokuba yingxenye yalo mdlalo. Yize engandanga ngamagama amaningi kodwa uveze ukuthi umdlalo lona abantu abazowubuka bengabi namkhawulo njengoba befuna ukubona isiphetho sawo. AbakwaNetflix baveze ukuthi ukhuluma ngowesifazane ozakhele igama ezinkundleni zokuxhumana osempini nowesifazane onguNdlunkulu emshadweni wakhe, njengoba uNdlunkulu ethola ukuthi umyeni wakhe unamanye amakhosikazi angaziwa. "UGugu uzobe elingisa indawo kaJoyce kanti uSdumo ulingisa indawo kaJonasi Gomora. Bobabili basemshadweni ongenazihibe kodwa kuhamba isikhathi kuvele ukuthi lona wesilisa ongusomabhizinisi odumile unamanye amakhosikazi awafihlile, nokuyinto engahlali kahle kunkosikazi wakhe omdala. Wenza konke ke ukuthi athole laba besifazane ukuze ababonise ukuthi ngempela ungubani," kusho iNetflix. Bathe lona wesilisa izinqumo zakhe izona eziqeda ngempilo yakhe ephezulu njengoba amakhosikazi nezanciza zimenza angazazi ukuthi yini okumele ayenze njengoba amanga akade ewaphila iminyaka ekugcineni esebanjiwe futhi bonke sebefuna ukuziphindiselela. "Siyajabula ukwethulela ababukeli bethu umdlalo ofana nalona esithemba ukuthi nabo bazowuthakasela njengathi uma siwamukela okokuqala. Silubheke ngabomvu usuku oluzoqala ngawo ukuvezwa kwalo mdlalo okunguJuni 12," kuphetha abakwaNetflix. Abanye abalingisi abazobonakala kulo mdlalo, kubalwa uKwanele Mthethwa, S’thandiwe Kgoroge, Kenneth Nkosi, Celeste Ntuli, Luyanda Zwane, Wonder Ndlovu, Noluthando Shabalala, Vuyo Biyela noLwazie Keith Tsebesha.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMSAKAZI we-East Coast Radio, uTee Xaba, obe ngomunye wabesikhungo semfundo ephakeme, iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, abathweswe iziqu okuqale kuleli sonto BAQHAKAZILE ekugqamiseni imfundo osaziwayo baKwaZulu-Natal, njengoba ngoMsombuluko, isikhungo iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal siqale imicimbi yokuthwesa izitshudeni iziqu. Umsakazi wesiteshi esizinze eThekwini, i-East Coast Radio ophinde wagqama ohlelweni lomndeni wakhe, i-Being A Xaba, uTee Xaba, nentokazi eyazakhela igama emdlalweni Isibaya, u-Amina Karen-Sue Jack, abasalanga ngaphandle. INTOKAZI eyazakhela igama ilingisa emdlalweni Isibaya, u-Amina Karen Sue Jack UTee uthole iziqu ze-Bachelor of Arts in Drama, Performance and English Studies. Kwathi u-Amina watheswa iziqu zeBachelor of Social Science kanti ngo-2024, kusona lesi sikhungo wathola ezeHournes in Psychology. Ekhuluma ngokuthweswa kwakhe iziqu, uTee uthe kuze kwaba yizikhathi ezine eshiya ekuqhubekeni nezifundo zakhe njengoba ekugcineni eze wabuyela ngokuzimisela ngenjongo yokufuna ukuqeda. "Ngiyajabula ukuthi ngilana ngikhona namhlanje, ngemuva kwesikhathi eside ngizama ngishiya ukuqeda izifundo zami. Bekungelula ngempela kodwa namhlanje umuntu uphumelele. Bekumele ngizibe konke okwenzeka eduzane kwami ukuze ngibhekane nezifundo zami. Bekumele ngizibekele isikhathi ngiphinde ngihlale ngizikhumbuza ukuthi kungani ngaqala ukufunda ekuqaleni, lokhu bengikwenza ngezinsuku ezinzima kakhulu," kusho uTee. Uthe uyambonga kakhulu unina, uBonisiwe Khanyile, obehlala emkhuthaza ukuthi aqede izifundo zakhe. "Nawo wonke nje umndeni wami ubungesekile njengoba bengihlala ngiwutshela ngobunzima bokufunda engibhekene nakho. Bengazi ukuthi ekugcineni kumele ngizithole iziqu zami ngenxa yokuthi bengiyodliwa unembeza isikhathi eside ukuthi ngike ngakhetha ukungazitholi lezi ziqu. Ukholo lwami lungisizile ukuthi ngibe lana ngikhona namhlanje," kusho yena. U-Amina waveza ukuthi uyena owokuqala ekhaya kubo ukuthi athweswe iziqu. Naye uveze ukuthi kube uhambo obelungelula njengoba abebuye ayeke, nokuyinto angayikholwa ukuthi ugcine eqedile waze wathola iziqu zakhe.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: INTOKAZI engumculi yaseJohannesburg, uTyla, iphinde yaba ngundabamlonyeni futhi yanconywa njengomunye wosaziwayo abebegqoke kahle nakulo nyaka emcimbini wemfashini waseMelika owaziwa ngeMet Gala. Lo mcimbi odonsa amehlo omhlaba kusuke kuhloswe ngawo ukuthi abasiki bengqephu bakhiphe amangwevu, ezimpahleni ezehlukene ezintsha abafuna ukuzikhangisa. INTOKAZI yakuleli uTyla ephinde yadonsa amehlo ngengubo akade eyigqokile emcimbini walo nyaka amaMet Gala Okunye ngawo ukuthi baphinde bakhombisa amakhono abanawo, ekubuyiseni izingubo ezaqopha umlando, ezake zagqokwa osaziwayo abadala kuwona lo mcimbi. UTyla noDoja Cat ozalwa umlingisi wakuleli uDumsani Dlamini, babe ngabanye abanconywe ngendlela akade begqoke ngayo. Nangonyaka odlule uTyla waba ngomunye wosaziwayo abanconywa kakhulu njengoba kwase kungokwesibili eba yingxenye yalo mcimbi. Wafika kuwona egqoke ingubo okungathi isihlabathi sasolwandle. Abasiki bengqephu bancoma ubuhlakani nobuhle bengubo yale ntokazi, njengoba kulo mcimbi kumele kugqame imisiko engajwayelekile. Okunye okukhulumisile nonyaka, ukukhuza ibuya komculi uBeyonce nomndeni wakhe kulo mcimbi. Laba bese kuphele iminyaka engu-10 bengawuhambeli lo mcimbi kusukela baqala umndeni njengoba benezingane ezintathu manje. UBeyonce wagcinga ukubonakala ngo-2016. Nakuwona ufike wadonsa amehlo abaningi, njengoba ayenza eminyakeni edlule, egqoke ingubo okuvela ukuthi ibikhandwe ngohlobo lwamadayimane alandwe ezweni laseBotswana. UBeyonce ekhuluma nabezindaba kafushane kulo mcimbi uthe okumjabulisayo ukuthi ubuye esephelezelwa indodakazi yakhe yokuqala eneminyaka engu-14 uBlue Ivy.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UHAMBE uphethe izipho ezihlukene umndeni kaNkk Thezani Mkhonza owaba unomehlo wokuqala eVryheid, ngoMgqibelo, obekwenziwe umcimbi wokumkhumbula, lapho iMeya yaseBaqulusini, uMnuz Sifiso Mkhwanazi, imbonge lona wesifazane ngokuzinikela ZIVEZE ukuthi wazikhuthaza ukuthi zihloniphe wonke umuntu emhlabeni ezihlangana naye izintombi ezaba nenhlanhla yokuqeqeshwa nguNkk Thezile Mkhonza, izolo okube nesikhumbuzo sakhe eCecil Emmet, eVryheid. UNkk Mkhonza ongasekho, waba owokuqala ukuba unomehlo ohlola izintombi kule ndawo. Isikhumbuzo sakhe besihanjelwe yizintombi aqala ukuzihlola, umndeni wakhe, amakhosi nabomndeni waseNdlunkulu kaZulu. BEZIPHUME ngobuningi bazo izintombi ngoMgqibelo, eVryheid, kukhunjula unomehlo wokuqala kuleli dolobha, uNkk Thezani Mkhonza UNksz Anami Zondo ongomunye wezintombi ebezikhona, uthe noma sebekhulile kodwa angeke aze akukhohlwe abakufundiswa yilona wesifazane besuka emakhaya ahlukene. "Noma sengiganile, ngahamba ngaya kude ngomsebenzi, ngeke ngikulibale umama uMkhonza ayesitshela khona, ikakhulukazi okuthinta inhlonipho, wayeyazisa inhlonipho. Ngijabule kakhulu ukuthi kwenziwe umcimbi ofana nalona," kusho uNksz Zondo. UNksz Busisiwe Manqele uthe okunye uNkk Mkhonza abatshela khona ukuthi bakhuthalele imfundo ukuze babe nezinto zabo bangathembeli kwabesilisa, uma sebeganile. "Akagcinanga ngokugcizelela inhlonipho, wathi asizame ukuzenzela okwethu sikhuthalele imfundo njengoba abantu besilisa engafuni sithembele kubo kakhulu. Wayesitshela ukuthi asikhuthaze nenye intsha ize ematshitshini ukuze izofundiswa ngokuziphatha, yazi ukuthi izohamba kanjani empilweni. Namanje noma engasekho, ngiyacela intsha ukuthi ihambe iyohlolwa ngoba ziningi izinto ezifundwa laphayana," kusho yena. UNkk Sibongile Nsibande othathe izintambo kuNkk Mkhonza, uthe ushona nje ngo-2020, kuningi la ayesehambe khona eshintsha indlela izintombi okumele zibukeke ngayo. Uthe imifaniswano egqokwa yizintombi manje ezindaweni ezihlukene yasungulwa yilona wesifazane, neyagcina isigcwele zonke izindawo. "Siyabonga kuNkk Sibonga Dlamini ngokuthi sifike nalo mbono, wasukumela phezulu wathi umcimbi walolu hlobo kumele ube khona, nakhu namhlanje sihlangene lapha. Ngiyacela kuMasipala wesiFunda iZululand nomncane Abaqulusi ukuthi baqhubeke nokuseseka uma kukhona esikucelayo ukuyisa izintombi phambili," kusho yena. UMnuz Sifiso Mkhwanazi oyiMeya kuMasipala waseBaQulusini, uthe abakwenzayo bakwenzela ukuhlonipha amakhosi akhona. "Siyabonga emndenini wakwaMkhonza nezihlobo zabo ngokusiboleka umama wabo, njengoba ubenomndeni kodwa ubegcwala zonke izindawo lezi ukuze agcine isiko. Likhulu igalelo elibanjwa onomehlo ngakho kumele nathi sibeseke kukhona konke abakwenzayo," kuchaza yena. Kulo mcimbi bekukhona amakhosi, abantwana baseNdlunkulu kaZulu beholwa uMntwana uNkinobho neMeya yaseZululand, uMnuz Micheal Khumalo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UKelebogile "Trivi K" Morake obonakala ohlelweni olukhonjiswa kuMzansi Magic iMageza Want a Wife UBEFUNA indlela ezomenza athembeke kuphathina wakhe uma esemtholile usomatekisi waseSoweto, uKelebogile "Trivi K" Morake (26), ngoLwesihlanu obonakale ohlelweni iMageza Want a Wife, kuMzansi Magic. Lolu hlelo olukhonjiswa ngo-8 ebusuku, uKelebogile uhlangane nabesifazane abaqhamuka emadolobheni ahlukene kuleli nabo abazifunela omaqondana kwezothando. Bonke bazofuna uthando, nokuzothi isonto ngalinye uKelebogile, akhiphe oyedwa kulaba besifazane aze agcine esale nalona amthandayo nazimisele ukuthi amenze unkosikazi wakhe. UKelebogile uthe ubone kungcono athathe enye indlela yokufuna umuntu amthandayo, nazimisele ukuthi athembeke kuye, njengoba efuna kubone izwe lonke ngalokhu akwenzayo ukuthi uqinisile. "Ngaphandle nje kokuthi asinaso isikhathi sokuzikhipha siye ezindaweni la singahlangana khona nabantu esingakha nabo uthando, kuthe uma kuqhamuka ithuba elifana naleli ngabona ukuthi angilisebenzise. Ngizinikele ekutheni ngithole owesifazane ozoba unkosikazi wami ngakhe naye umndeni wami. Ngifuna abantu basazi ukuthi sahlangana kanjani kungakho ngikhethe ukuba yingxenye yalolu hlelo. Ngifuna ukungafihli uma sengimtholile into yethu ngifuna ihlale obala," kusho uKelebogile. Uthe ukwazi kahle ukuthi lokhu akwenzayo indlela engajwayelekile yokufuna uthando, kodwa uzimisele ukuthi athole uthando lweqiniso nomndeni ngayo. "Ababukeli ngeke nje bagcine ngokubona ngifuna uthando ngale ndlela kodwa bazobona uhambo lwami nami olungimangazile njengoba ngibone olunye uhlangothi ngami, bazobona ezinye izindlela engenza ngazo imali izintokazi lezi engizozikhombisa ngaphandle nje kokuba umshayeli wekhumbi, bazohlangana nomndeni wami kanye nempilo engiyiphilayo elokishini, njengoba ngikhulele khona," kuchaza yena. UZanele Mauka, onguphrojusa walolu hlelo, uveze ukuthi ngalo bahlose ukususa indlela endala eke yabonakala kuleli isetshenziswa kuthelevishini yokufuna uthando. Uthe bakhethe le nsizwa ngoba ingumuntu ovulelekile futhi ibifuna ukuba ngomunye wabesilisa abafuna ukushintsha indlela endala yokubheka uthando, benze njengeyesimanje eqhamukayo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UNALEDI Aphiwe osexolisile ngakukhuluma kuwina iLadysmith Black Mambazo emcimbini wamaMetro FM Awards INTOKAZI yaseNanda, uNaledi Aphiwe igcine ixolisile ngeyakusho ngenkathi iqembu lesicathamiya elidume umhlaba wonke, iLadysmith Black Mambazo, linqoba izindondo ezintathu emcimbini obungeledlule amaMetro FM Music Awards. IMambazo yanqoba izindondo uNaledi Aphiwe ayezibheke ngabomvu kulo mcimbi okwafakazelwa yindlela ayenxenxa ngayo abantu ukuba bamvotele. Engasatholi neyodwa indondo waveza ukuthi akakuzwa kahle ukuwina kweMambazo, wabuza ukuthi ivotelwe obani njengoba abayiculelayo bengamakhehla nje. IqQEMBU iLadysmith Black Mambazo Image: Rajesh Jantilal "Siyababongela omkhulu Mambazo kusho ukuthi ogogo bebevota ethuneni. Yini yona leyo iLadysmith," washo kanje uNaledi. UNaledi wagxekwa abaningi ngokukhuluma ngale ndlela, kwathiwa udelela lezi zingqalabutho esezenze omkhulu umsebenzi ngokuphakamisa ifulegi lakuleli emazweni omhlaba. Ngempelasonto, emcimbini obuseMpumalanga, uNaledi uthe kwesinye isikhathi uyazibona naye ukuthi uke akhulume angacabangi nokuyinto ayixoliselayo. "Ezinye izinto ngike ngizenze ngokucasuka ngikhulume noma yikanjani ngingalicabangeli ikusasa. Ngiyazi engakusho kwakungamele ngikukhulume. Ngalokho ngiyaxolisa kakhulu kubantu abadala ngendlela engikhulume ngayo. Kwesinye isikhathi kubuhlungu kakhulu ukuthi into oyisebenzele kanzima ugcine ungayitholi, nami bengikuleso simo. Ngiyaxolisa kobaba nomkhulu beBlack Mambazo, ngiyathemba ukuthi bazongixolela nabo ngiyalucela uxhaso lwabo," kusho uNaledi. Uthe abanye abamgxekayo ngalokhu abalandeli bentokazi eyaphuma isibili ohlelweni iBig Brother Mzansi, uThandeka Tshabalala, nangazisoli ngokubagcona njengoba ajabula le ntokazi ingayitholi imali engu-R2 million kuphela uhlelo. Uthe uyalucela uxhaso kubalandeli abathanda umculo wakhe, nabanye abangabalandeli baleli qembu, okungenzeka ukuthi bese bengamthandi. Maduze nje uthe kukhona ingoma abayiphekayo nomculi osanda kufika kule ndima uSpikili, nabazomemezela izinhlelo zayo ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. UNaledi noZee Nxumalo yibona baculi okwakhalwa kakhulu ngokungawini kwabo kulo mcimbi njengoba babeqokwe eminxeni eminingi, kodwa bahamba beshwiba izandla.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMLINGISI uRosemary Zimu ozobonakala elingisa emdlalweni oqale izolo othi Strings Attached UMLINGISI, uRosemary Zimu, uthi kumvule amehlo yize eseshadile ukuba semdlalweni othinta ukuhlukumezeka othandweni, njengoba izolo kuqale umdlalo othi Strings Attached, okhonjiswa ngo-8 ebusuku kuMzansi Magic. Kulo mdlalo uRosemary ulingisa indawo ephambili kaLethabo okungowesifazane othandana  nowesilisa omhlukumeza ngokumenzisa izinto angazithandi. URosemany uthe indawo kaXolani elingiswa uMelusi Mbhele iveza ukuthi owesifazane angazithola kanjani ethandana nowesilisa onamanga owenza konke ukuze kubukeke sengathi uyamthanda owesifazane anaye kanti ufuna ukufeza izinhloso zakhe. "Umdlalo oveza owesilisa edlala umdlalo womqondo ngowesifazane ozithola esengene shi ezinkingeni ekubeni yena ubezitshela ukuthi uze ngothando. Into esihlala siyibona lena kwabanye abantu, nesithemba ukuthi kukhona abazovuleka amehlo. ULethabo ngowesifazane obheke umndeni wakhe njengoba kunguye osebenzayo kodwa ukuhlangana nalona wesilisa kushintsha izinto eziningi empilweni yakhe," kusho uRosemary. Uphrojusa walo mdlalo, uNthabi Tau wenkampani iRay Content Hub, uthe umdlalo awusungule ngemuva kokubona ukuthi ukuba sothandweni nomuntu okudlala umqondo kuyinto esithe chithi saka, nokuvezwa abantu abaningi emphakathini sengathi uthando lweqiniso. "Umdlalo ozoveza izinto eziningi ezithinta uthando, ezenzekayo kodwa okungakhulunywa ngazo esidlangalaleni. Sifuna ukukuveza kodwa isiphetho salo mdlalo sizoba yinto ebingalindelekile kwabaningi. Abalingisa kulo mdlalo babe yile nto esiyifunayo njengoba bekumele baxhumane kube sengathi bathandanai okwangempela yize belingisa, bakwazile ukukuqonda  ebesikufisa ngempela umdlalo waphuma ngendlela ebesifisa ngayo," kusho uNthabi. Uthe akufisayo ngalo mdlalo wukuthi kube khona izingxoxo ezithinta ukuzithanda nokuzivikela kubantu abahlukene abathi bayakuthanda. Ukugqamisa ilokhu uthando okumele lube yikhona ukuze lube luhle kubona bobabili abantu abakulo kungabi khona oyibhoklolo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: U-CHRIS Q Radebe ongumbhali womdlalo othi Shut Up Men Are Talking UMLINGISI ophinde abe umbhali wemidlalo, uChris Q Radebe, useveze ukuthi yize umdlalo othakaselwe abaningi othi Shut Up Men Are Talking, nobukhonjiswa kwiYouTube, wanqatshwa iziteshi zethelevishini. Ukusho lokhu ngemuva kokukhonjiswa kwesiqephu sokugcina salo mdlalo nasikhiphe ngesonto eledlule kule nkundla yezokuxhumana. Abantu bamshayele ihlombe uChris ngalo mdlalo kodwa kwaba nemibuzo yokuthi kungani lo  ungekho kwithelevishini? Ekhuluma neSolezwe, uthe ngaphambi kokuthi umdlalo aqale awufake ekhasini lakhe kwiYouTube, wawuhambisa esiteshini esizimele iNetflix kodwa bawenqaba. "Angigcinanga lapho, ngaya nakwezinye iziteshi nakhona bakhombisa ukungawuthakaseli kodwa ngabona ukuthi ngendlela onesifundo ngayo, kumele ugcine ufinyelele ebantwini bawubone. Ngafikelwa umqondo wokuthi angiwufake ekhasini lami enkundleni engaziyo ukuthi abantu bayakwazi ukufinyelela kuyo futhi ngempela bawuthakasela kusukela ngiwumemezela kwaze kwaba sekugcineni. Kungijabulisile ukubona ukuthi singababhali isikhona enye indlela esingakhombisa ngayo imisebenzi yethu njengoba mina sengihlela ukuthi imidlalo ngiyibhale bese ngiyikhombisa ngale ndlela," kusho uChris. Uthe yena njengomuntu oneminyaka emkhakheni wokubhala imidlalo, akuqondayo ukuthi ababukeli bayayazi into abafuna ukuyibuka emizini yabo. "Yingakho ngabhala umdlalo ofana nalona okhombisa usizi abesifazane ababhekene nalo emizini yabo, ikakhulukazi emakhaya. "Iziteshi zethelevishini zithatha lokho ezikufunayo ngaleso sikhathi, lo mdlalo njengoba abantu bewubona uwulolu hlobo nje kwithelevishini ubungashintsha ube ngenye into kodwa mina ngiwulethe unjengoba unjalo ngoba ngazi ukuthi yimuphi umyalezio engifuna ukuwudlulisa. Ngiyakholelwa ekutheni ngelinye ilanga abantu abakhangisayo bayofinyelela kithi bese senza imali ngalokhu, njengoba ngalo mdlalo abalingisi ngibaholele ngemali yami," kusho yena. Uthe uyababonga kakhulu abalingisi asebenze nabo, nathemba ukuthi bazoqhubeka babambisane ukuya phambili.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMPHAKATHI waseMondlo ubuphume ngobuningi bawo uzozwa izinhlelo zokwabiwa kwemali onyakeni omusha IMEYA yaseBaqulusini, uMnuz Sifiso Mkhwanazi, ithe kuyabalimaza njengomkhandlu ukucekelwa phansi kwengqalasizinda njengoba kwenza basebenzise imali ezinhlelweni ebezingahlelelwe. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi kwethulwa uhlelo lwentuthuko edidiyelwe eMondlo esigcemeni sakwa-A ngempelasonto. UMkhwanazi uthe emasontweni edlule ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kuke kwasabalala izindaba zokuthi kukhona imali edliwe kumasipala nokungaziwa ukuthi ishonephi. AMALUNGU omphakathi enza izinto ezihlukene anikelelwe ngezinto ezizosiza ukuthuthukisa amabhizinisi nezobuciko eMondlo exhaswa uMasipala waseBaqulusini Uthe abantu abakhuluma lokhu yingoba abazazi izinselelo ababhekana nazo ngenxa yokuziphatha kwamanye amalungu omphakathi. "Ngifuna ukulucacisa lolu daba ngoba luvele lwagcwala ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Ayikho imali edliwe budlabha noma edukile kodwa imali ngokwendlela esuke yabiwe ngayo isuke ibekwe ezindaweni zayo. Kodwa ukucekelwa phansi kwengqalasizinda yamanzi nogesi kwenza sithathe imali kwezinye izindawo ukuze kulungiswe izinto ezonakele. Ngeke silinde kuze kuqale omunye unyakamali ukuze silungise izinto ezingalungile," kusho uMkhwanazi. Uthe emphakathini waseMondlo banezinkinga eziningi ezithinta ukuxhunywa kukagesi ngendlela engekho emthethweni nabazokulungisa maduzane. "Mphakathi sicela nithenge ugesi niphinde nikhokhele nezikweletu eninazo. Siyazi abaningi bayafuna ukukhokhela izikweletu zabo kodwa njengabaholi kumele sibheke ukuthi sinikhipha kanjani kulesi simo," kusho uMkhwanazi. Uthe bakhethe ukungafiki beshwiba izandla emphakathini njengoba beshiyele osomabhizinisi imishini yokugunda utshani, eyokuthunga izimpahla neyokusiza amaciko asathuthuka emculweni.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI kamaskandi, uKhuzani Mpungose odume ngeleNdlamlenze, usememezele ukuthi uma kuvuma izimo, umcimbi i-Blu Nation Festival uzoza eThekwini, ngonyaka ozayo. Lo mcimbi obanjelwe eCarnival City, Ekurhuleni, uKhuzani ubehlose ngawo ukujabulisa nokubonga abalandeli bakhe ngawo. Kulo mcimbi obekuvalwe ngomuntu emnyango, amathikithi akhona athengwa aphela kusasele amasonto amathathu kube usuku lomcimbi. Kwacaca ukuthi abalandeli bakaKhuzani bawubheke ngabomvu lo mcimbi. Kuwona bekuboshelwe abaculi abahlukene bakamaskandi iningi labo elishisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku. UKhuzani ubonge abalandeli bakhe ngokuqhubeka bemeseka kulo mcimbi akhipha kuwo unyawo uma kuziwa kumfashini. BEKUGCWELE kuswelakala indawo yokunyathela eCarnival City emcimbini i-Bu Nation Festival ebingoMgqibelo "Sithanda ukubonga kuwona wonke umuntu osesekile ngalo mcimbi. Kodwa esithanda ukukudlulisa ukuthi iCarnival City isincane, abantu bagcine behlala ngaphandle ngenxa yokuthi banethemba lokuthi bazothola amathikithi nendawo ngaphakathi kodwa akwangenzeka lokho. Kusibekele obala lokho ukuthi sidinga indawo enkulu eGauteng, ehambisana nesibalo sethu, " kusho uKhuzani.0 Uveze ukuthi manje badinga indawo ezobavumela ukuthi umcimbi bawenze kuze kube sekuseni, wathi lokhu okwenzeka kuwo kuseyisiqalo, umbono ngalo mcimbi usemkhulu kuye. UMCULI kamaskandi, uKhuzani "Ndlamlenze" Mpungose usememezele ukuthi uma kuvuma izimo, umcimbi i-Blu Nation Festival uzoza eThekwini, ngonyaka ozayo. Lo mcimbi ube nesasa eGauteng ngempelasonto UKhuzani ubonge abaculi, abaxhasi, abaphathi bohlelo nawo wonke umuntu owenze umcimbi waba impumelelo. Kulo nyaka umsakazi woKhozi FM, uZimiphi Biyela umemezele ukuthi sekungokokugcina ukuthi aphathe uhlelo kuwo njengoba esethi khumu kulo mkhakha. UMCULI kamaskandi, uKhuzani "Ndlamlenze" Mpungose usememezele ukuthi uma kuvuma izimo, umcimbi i-Blu Nation Festival uzoza eThekwini, ngonyaka ozayo. Lo mcimbi ube nesasa eGauteng ngempelasonto

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Umlingisi uSimphiwe Ngema ozobonakala kweminye imidlalo emincane kuMzansi Magic kusuka ngenyanga ezayo ABOMZANSI Magic, sebeveze ukuthi ayikho enye indlela obekumele baqhubeke ngayo ukuxhasa amaciko, ngaphandle kokuthi benze imidlalo emincane ezokhonjiswa kulesi siteshi. Bakusho lokhu bethula imidlalo eyishumi, ezoqala ngenyanga ezayo ukukhonjiswa kulesi siteshi, njengoba kusanda kuphela imidlalo emikhulu emibili. UShirley Adonisi, uthe ngale midlalo baqinisekisile ukuthi iqoshwa yizinkampani zentsha futhi kuyo kulingisa intsha esizakhele igama ekulingiseni nenye esanda kufika. Yonke le midlalo uthe izokhonjiswa amasonto ayishumi, kusuka ngoMeyi 11 kuze kube uJulayi. "Sethula le midlalo ngenjabulo enkulu njengoba njengesiteshi sisanda kwethula izinhlelo ezimbili, abantu abakhombisa ukuzijabulela okuwuhlelo oluthi, The Makhene’s noluthi Mgidi Moms. Kusanda kubuya nomdlalo abantu abawujabulela othi, Isithembu SikaMsongelwa esingangabazi ukuthi isizini yesibili nayo izokwenza kahle njengeyokuqala. Siyabonga kuzona zonke izinkampani ezibambisene nathi kuze kube manje njengoba imidlalo sesiyethula. Asingabazi ukuthi ikusasa lazo liyakhanya kulo mkhakha, ngelinye ilanga siyozibona sezisenzela imidlalo emikhulu," kusho uShirley. Uthe imidlalo emifishane njengalena, babonile ukuthi abantu abaningi abangababukeli babo bayayithakasela yingakho bekhethe ukugxila kuyona okwamanje. Uthe bangasho ukuthi sekuyinto abazogxila kuyo isikhathi eside. "Imidlalo emide inawo umthelela wokuthi ababukeli bagcine bengasayithandi kahle, ngakho ukwenza lena emincane esheshe ifike esixazululweni, kuyinto esithe uma sibuka sabona ukuthi iyasisebenzela," kusho yena. Kule midlalo kukhona othi Love At Second Sight, kuwo okulingisa phambili u-Amanda Seome, Nduduzo Zuma, Aluve Mjali noNimrod Nkosi. Omunye umdlalo, uthi Kuningi, kuwo kulingisa phambili uSamkelo Ndlovu, Kay Sibiya, Simphiwe Ngema, Andy Mnguni noRatanang Mogotsi. Eminye ezokhonjiswa kubalwa ethi Amanzi Endlini, Ke Nyala Jwang? Lobola lama 2000, Mamfundisi Bae neminye.  Izinkampani eziqophe le midlalo kubalwa kuzona iNgomoya Films, Weldun Media, Pula Bakgaga, Behind the Best neMthakathi Entertainment.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI ocula owokholo uLusanda Beja oza eThekwini emcimbini iSilent Worship Experience: A Night of Songs ezoba ngenyanga ezayo KULINDELEKE ukuthi kuze kucishe kuse ekuseni kudunyiswa emcimbini wokudumisa ozobe uhanjelwe yizinkakha zabaculi, iSilent Worship Experience: A Night of Songs, ongowokuqala nozoba seDCC Jesus Dome eThekwini ngoMeyi 22. Kulo mcimbi kulindeleke ukuthi kuqopheke umlando njengoba izethameli zizodumisa zifake ama-earphone ezindlebeni. Ngeke kugcine lapho ngoba kwabazohambela umcimbi akekho ozobe ekhethekile njengoba amathikithi eVIP engekho. UKwezi Ndlovu-Mbambo, osethimbeni labahleli bomcimbi, uveze ukuthi bahlele into engakaze ibonakale nezoqala ukwenzeka kulo mcimbi njengoba abazobe bekhona bonke bezonikwa ama-earphone ukuze ulalele lonke uhlelo lomcimbi nokuyindlela abafuna umuntu asondelane ngayo noThixo njengoba kuzobe kugcwele umculo nomkhuleko. "Sihlele ukuthi umcimbi siwenze ngendlela engakaze ibonakale kuleli. Siyazi ukuthi abanye bazoba nokudideka kodwa njengoba sisho nje, ama-earphone azotholwa yiwona wonke umuntu ukuze azwe konke okuzokwenzeka, uma ungenawo ngeke uzwe lutho. Kanjalo akekho ozoba yiVIP ngenxa yokuthi sihlele ukuthi abantu babe ndawonye bazizwe bemunye. Abantu abazofika sifuna basondelane noNkulunkulu ngokubanika isikhathi somuntu ngamunye. Izingoma zonke nezintshumayelo abantu bazokuzwa ngalokhu abazobe bekufake ezindlebeni nokuyindlela esifuna ukuthi umuntu ngamunye asondelane ngayo noMdali wakhe," kusho uKwezi. Uthe kusasa njengoba besahambela izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme, bazoya oNgoye bayokhulekela izitshudeni futhi bazikhuthaze ezintweni ezihlukene. Uthe abaculi abazobe bekhona bonke ngeke bagcine nje ngokucula kuphela kodwa bazophinde bashumayele. Amathikithi okuthamela umcimbi aseyatholakala eWebtickets nasePick n Pay ngo-R250. Kubaculi abazobe bekhona kubalwa u-Oncemoresix, Khaya Mthethwa, Ncebakazi Msomi, Ntokozo Mbambo, Lusanda Beja noMpumi Mtsweni.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMNDENI wakwaMhlongo ozophinde unekele abakuleli impilo yawo njengoba uhlelo oluthi KwaNjomane lukhuza ibuya kuMzansi Wethu USIMANGELE Mhlongo, oqale ukuduma ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngomakaChicken, useveze ukuthi ukuvulela abantu babone izinkinga zabo njengomndeni kwenze baveza isithombe sempilo ephilwa eminye imindeni. Ukusho lokhu njengoba isizini yohlelo oluthi KwaNjomane ikhuza ibuya kuMzansi Wethu ngo-7 ebusuku. USimangele uveze ukuthi ngesikhathi bevela okokuqala njengomndeni impilo yabo yashintsha kakhulu. "Sakhula njengomndeni impilo yethu yashintsha, izinto sathanda ukuzibheka ngenye indlela. Izinselelo esasibhekene nazo zazinzima kakhulu kodwa kwathi uma zivela kwithelevishini izinto zaguquka. Mina njengomuntu owayehamba phambili ezintweni zomndeni ngabhekana nezingqinamba ezihlukene nxazonke, ngenxa yokuthi kwakumele ngithathe izinqumo njengosisi, umama kanye nomholi emndenini nokuyinto engabanga lula," kusho uSimangele. Kule sizini entsha uthe abantu kuzobathusa ukubona ukuthi naye uba nezinkinga ezinkulu abhekana nazo othandweni, nokuyinto eyehlela wonke umuntu. "Kuzocaca ukuthi nakimi izinto azihlali zihamba kahle othandweni, kuya le nale. Kodwa kukho konke ivangeli engihlala ngilikhuthaza ukuthi sihloniphane. Kimina kube nzima ukuthi ngithathe ubungoma nomndeni wami ngikubeke nje eceleni, ngaba nomhawu wokuthi ngizikhethe mina bese ngiyazethemba kukho konke engikwenzayo, lokho kwenze ngenza izinto eziningi engizithandayo futhi angizisoli ngokuthatha leso sinqumo," kusho yena. Uthe nakule sizini abalandeli bohlelo bazobona izinkinga abangazifihli ziqhubeka nokuhlasela umndeni wabo, ezinye zazo ezingakaze zixazululeke selokhu baqala ukuba semehlweni abantu. Bona uthe akukhona ukuzenzisa lokhu abakuvezayo njengoba bekholelwa ekutheni ukubonakala beveza amaqiniso kungasiza nabanye. "Ababukeli abazilungiselele ngoba lukhulu oluzayo, singumndeni sazitshela ukuthi asifuni ukuvezela abantu amanga, impilo esingayiphili, ngakho sibalethele lokhu abakufunayo nabakuthandayo," kuchaza yena.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ULONDIE London ophumela obala ngokukhetha ukuqopha impilo ngohlelo lwakhe noluzoqala ukubonakala kule nyanga kuMzansi Magic ULONDIE London okuyintokazi yaKwaNongoma, uthe unovalo ngokuvezela umphakathi izingane zakhe ngenxa yokugxekwa okukhona njengamanje ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. ULondie ukusho lokhu njengoba kusuka ngoMeyi 21, kuzoqala uhlelo olukhombisa ngempilo yakhe oluthi Life with Londie, oluzokhonjiswa ngo-8 ebusuku kuMzansi Magic. Uthe manje ubone sekuyisikhathi esifanele ukuvumela amakhamera amlandele ukuze baqophe impilo yakhe ivezelwe umphakathi, wathi abantu bebebona okuncane ezinkundleni zokuxhumana nakwezinye izinhlelo ake aba yingxenye yazo, okukhona kuzo i-The Real Housewives of Durban. "Izinhlelo ezidlule engibonakale kuzo zihlukile ngoba zona bekungalandelwa mina ngaso sonke isikhathi kodwa manje kubhekwe mina, la ngiya khona ngizobe ngilandelwa amakhamera. Abantu bazobona mina ngenza izinto ezihlukene ezinhle nezimbi. Bazobona umama, indodakazi, usomabhizinisi nowesifazane osebudlelwaneni bezothando. Bake bakubona abanye lokhu kodwa abanye bazobona ukuthi konke lokhu ngikwenza kanjani, konke ngikuqophe sengikulungele," kuchaza yena. Uthe ziningi izinto ezenzeke empilweni yakhe isikhathi eside nazocacisa ngazo manje. "Abantu bazongibona ngempela ukuthi ngiwubani. Bazobona okuhle nokubi okwenzeke kimi, ubunzima engidlule kubo nokuhle okwenzekile, nakho kuzovela. Kube nzima kimi ukuvumela amakhamera angiqophe ngisho izimo zinzima kodwa bekumele ngikwenze lokho ukuze abantu ngingabavezeli injabulo yami kuphela, lokho bekuzobe kungelona iqiniso ngempilo yami, bengingahlalisekile kahle," kuchaza yena. Uthe uyathemba ukuthi izingane zakhe ngeke abantu bazigxeke ngendlela yokuthi aze azisole, njengoba ukuzivikela bekuyiyona into eza kuqala kuye. Yena uthe akasenandaba nokugxekwa njengoba esekwazi ukubhekana nakho futhi esekujwayele, nangasakunaki uma kwenzeka. Ekuqaleni, uthe bekumenza aphatheke kabi nokuyinto angafuni yenzeke ezinganeni zakhe yize wonke umuntu enelungelo lokuphawula ngenzinto azibonayo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ABALINGISI bomdlalo Amalanga Awafani okuphoqe ukuthi uthathe ikhefu ngenxa yokuphuza kokuqala ukushuthwa kwesizini yawo yesibili KULINDELEKE ukuthi ungabonakali amasonto amathathu kwithelevishini umdlalo Amalanga Awafani obukhonjiswa phakathi nezinsuku ngo-6.30 ntambama, njengoba ngoLwesihlanu bekuphela isizini yawo yokuqala. Lokhu kudalwe wukuthi bekungacaci ngekusasa lawo, okwenze ukuthi kuqale sekuhambe isikhathi ukuqoshwa kwesizini yesibili ezoqala ngoMeyi 25. I-SABC iveze ukuthi kula masonto amathathu izodlala izinhlelo zemfundo, ezizosiza abafundi baka-matric ezifundweni zabo. "Sikhethe ukuthi silungiselele kahle isizini entsha yalo mdlalo ezoshisa izikhotha, nesithemba ukuthi abantu bazoyithakasela. Okwamanje abajabulele iziqephu ezizayo zohlelo iHigher Grade oluzosiza kakhulu abafundi baka-matric ezifundweni zabo ezihlukene. Siyabonga kakhulu uthando ababukeli balo mdlalo abalukhombisile kuze kube yimanje, siyathemba ukuthi bakulindele ngabomvu ukuqala kweziqephu ezitsha eziza nokuningi," kusho isitatimende seSABC. Umthombo weSolezwe uveze ukuthi ukungavuselelwa kwenkontileka entsha yalo mdlalo  yikhona okwenze kwaba nesikhala ekutheni umdlalo ungaqophi. "Bagcina ukuqopha ngonyaka odlule, kuthe kuqala unyaka iSABC yangacacisa ukuthi umdlalo iyawuqeda yini noma cha. Kuthe uma sebeqala befuna umdlalo ubuye isikhathi sabe sesihambe kakhulu kungeke kusenzeka ukuthi kusheshe, ukuze iziqephu zidlalwe manje, nezinguquko ezibe khona kulo mdlalo zibe zinkulu njengoba usuhambile ungeke usaqoshwa KwaZulu-Natal usuzogxila eGauteng manje," kusho umthombo. Uthe uma usubuya ziningi izinguquko ezizobonakala kuwo njengoba kukhona abalingisi abasha, abanye beshiyile ngenxa yezinguquko zokuthutha komdlalo. Abalingisi balo mdlalo, uFanele Zulu noNontsikelelo Mthiyane abalingisa izindawo eziphambili, enkundleni yokuxhumana i-Instagram babonge abathandi balo mdlalo ngokubeseka ngesizini yokuqala baveza ukuthi bona basabuya kulo mdlalo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ULUYANDA Zuma ngomunye wabalingisi abasha abazobonakala emdlalweni Isitha:The Enemy kwi-e.tv KULINDELEKE ukuthi kushube izinto emdlaweni Isitha: The Enemy, kwi-e.tv ngo-8.30 phakathi nezinsuku, njengoba lesi siteshi simemezele ukuqala kokubonakala kwabalingisi abasha izolo, kwisizini entsha yalo mdlalo. Umdlalo Isitha ukwesinde ezembeni elifakwe yilesi siteshi liqeda imidlalo emidala okukhona kuyo iScandal! neminye. Isizini yesithathu yalo mdlalo iphele ngoLwesihlanu futhi bekungacaci ukuthi lithini ikusasa lalo mdlalo njengoba bekungekho okuvelayo ngawo. Abakwa-e.tv baveze ukuthi bebefihle induku emqubeni ngesizini entsha njengoba iza nezinguquko ezinkulu kulokhu obekubonakala. "Umlingisi ngamunye kulaba abazayo, uza nokwakhe okuzokwenza ababukeli bomdlalo basale bebambe ongezansi. Sijabule ngokwethula isizini entsha, sithemba ukuthi izoqhubeka nokunika ababukeli lokhu abakufunayo ngalo mdlalo. Sizibophezele ekuqhubekeni sethule imidlalo ekhuluma nabantu bakithi ngqo, iphinde ibavezele izinto abazibona ngisho emiphakathini abahlala kuyo," kusho isitatimende. Bathe bakubheke ngabomvu ukuqhubeka bekhiqiza imidlalo emisha njengalona osanda kuqala othi Emzini, nabathi ufike ngegiya eliphezulu njengoba ukhombisa ukuthakaselwa abaningi emasontweni amathathu manje uqalile. Kubalingisi abasha abazobonakala kulo mdlalo Isitha kubalwa intokazi esanda kuphuma isibili emcimbini kazime wakuleli uMiss SA, uLuyanda Zuma ozobe elingisa indawo kaDabulamanzi okuyintokazi esencane esohambweni lokuthwasa nengazi ukuthi kumele ikhetheni phakathi kokuqhubeka nokuthwasa noma ifeze amaphupho ayo. ULuyanda ugqamise ikhono lakhe lokulingisa emdlalweni iShaka-Ilembe, nathi kulo mdlalo abantu bazobona into ehlukile kakhulu kunalena abamazela yona nokuyinto emjabulisile ukuveza olunye uhlangothi lwakhe kulo mkhakha. Abanye abazobonakala kubalwa uBongani Gumede ozolingisa indawo kaSam Gumede, Andile Mxakaza (Zikali “Mapholoba” Ngcobo), Harriet Manamela (Dorcas), Mpilo Mbatha (Ongeziwe Junior “OJ” Ngcobo) noCalvin Ratladi (Bhubesi).

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UZEE Nxumalo noNaledi Aphiwe abaveze ukungathokozi ngokungawini ndondo emcimbini amaMetro FM Music Awards SIKHULU isililo ezintokazini zaKwaZulu-Natal, uZee Nxumalo noNaledi Aphiwe, okuthe ngoMgqibelo, zabuya zishwiba izandla emcimbini wezindondo amaMetro FM Music Awards. Umcimbi walo nyaka ububanjelwe e-ICC, eThekwini. UZee ubeqokwe emikhakheni eyisikhombisa kuthi uNaledi yena ubeqokwe kwemithathu kulo mcimbi. Lezi zintokazi zikhale ngokungabi khona kobulungiswa kule mikhakha ebivotelwa, njengoba zozimbili zithe kube buhlungu ukuthi zingatholi ngisho neyodwa indondo. UZee uthe uyaxolisa kubalandeli bakhe abavotile, naye namanje usadidekile ukuthi kwenzekeni ngoMgqibelo. "Eish! Kubalandeli bami abavotile ngiyaxolisa yazi. Nami namanje angikakholwa yazi, ngathi kukhona ongidlalisayo ngale nto eyenzekile. Ngendlela obekunzima ngayo bekumele ngiziqinise ngenxa yokuthi bekukhona eminye imicimbi obekumele ngiyihambele ngalobuya busuku ngoba ngiyinja yeGame!" kusho uZee. UNaledi naye yize ecasule abaningi ngokugxeka iqembu lezinkakha iLadysmith Black Mambazo ngokumhlula kodwa uveze ukuthi yize engawinanga, mkhulu umthelela abawenzile nabalandeli bakhe ngokuqokwa kukodwa. "Ngiyabonga kuwona wonke umuntu ovotile, ongikhankasele nabanye abame nami benza kwaqiniseka ukuthi igama lami liyazwakala la bekhona, ngiyabonga. Uxhaso eninginike lona ngingasho nje ukuthi kuseyisiqalo lokhu sisazoqhubeka, kakhulu kunakuqala." UNaledi uthe kuyamxaka ukuwina kweMambazo kuze kube kathathu, nathe uyasola ukuthi ibivotelwa ngabantu abangasekho. Abaningi bamgxekile ngale nkulumo yakhe njengoba bemsole ngokudelela nokudicilela phansi igama lakhe emculweni. Abanye bamtshele ukuthi kuyacaca ukuthi abalandeli bakhe abamvotelanga ngendlela abelindele ngayo. Kulo mcimbi akukho ukukhala okuningi okube khona ngaphandle kwalokhu okuvela kulezi zintokazi. Abantu bancome indlela umcimbi obuhleleke ngakhona njengoba umsindo ubusezingeni eliphezulu kungekho buhixihixi. Ngisho abaculi benandisa esiteji bekungekho ukuphazamiseka.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: U-CYNTHIA Shange umndeni wakhe osuveze ukuthi uzofihlwa eKZN Image: Image: Instagram UZOFIHLWA ngeSonto, KwaZulu-Natal, umlingisi owazakhela igama ngeminyaka yama70s, uCynthia Shange (76), oshone ngezintatha zangoMsombuluko, kwesinye sezibhedlela eThekwini. Okhulumela umndeni, uLolo Morapeli, uthe angakuqinisekisa okwamanje ukuthi inkonzo kaCynthia izobe ibanjwe amaNazaretha, aseKuphakameni, njengoba uCynthia ebeyingxenye yaleli bandla. "Okwamanje kusabhekwa indawo la kuzobanjwa khona inkonzo, yiyona esasibambile nesenza singakwazi ukumemezela into eqondile. Umndeni usahlanganisa amakhanda ukuphuma nesixazululo kodwa ngingasho ukuthi izoba ngeSonto, KwaZulu-Natal," kusho uLolo. UCynthia udlula emhlabeni nje, ngo-2024 waveza ukuthi kwake kwambulwa kwembeswa kuye ngenxa yesifo sikashukela kangangoba waze wanqanyulwa izinzwane. Wazisholo yena ukuthi wasizwa uShembe lesi sifo sifuna ukumjuqa ngalowo nyaka. Umufi wadalula ukuthi uphethwe yisifo sikashukela ngesikhathi ehlonishwa ngendondo ye-Lifetime Achievement kumaSimon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards eThekwini, ngoJulayi 2024, wathi lesi sifo saqala ukumxina ngo-2018, kangangoba wagcina esegqigqa esibhedlela futhi nodokotela baze bafuna nokumnqamula umlenze. UCynthia odabuka eLamontville, waba ngunobuhle wokuqala omnyama kuleli ukumela iNingizimu Afrika ku-Miss World eLondon, ngo-1972. Akugcinanga lapho, uCynthia uqhubekile nokuvelela endimeni yezokungcebeleka njengoba waba wumlingisi oqavile efilimini yokuqala ende yesiZulu eyayithi uDeliwe, lapho uCynthia ayelingisa khona noSimon Mabhunu Sabela, Ndaba Mhlongo, Sydney Chama, Roland Mqwebu, Patience Africa, Maurel Msimang, June Buthelezi, Joe Mafela nabanye abaningi. Kusukela lapho, akabange esabheka emuva njengoba wadlulela efilimini esihloko sithi Isivumelwano. Wadlala indawo kaMkabayi emdlalweni ozigcawugcawu wethelevishini uShaka Zulu. Emuva kwalokho, walingisa emdlalweni owuchungechunge kaDuma Ndlovu uMuvhango, lapho ayelingisa khona indawo kaMaButhelezi unina kaThandaza (Sindi Dlathu). Ngenxa yeqhaza lakhe emkhakheni wezokulingisa, uCynthia uhlonishwe ngomklomelo we-Lifetime Achievement kuma-South African Film and TV Awards (Saftas) nakuma-Simon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards. Ushiye emhlabeni amadodakazi akhe uSihle nosaziwayo wethelevishini uNonhle Thema namadodana u-Ayanda noBanele Thema nabazukulu nesizukulwane.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UTHOMAS Gumede okhuza ibuya ekulingiseni ngomdlalo wamahlaya ozokhonjiswa kwiSABC1 othi Msebenzi UZOKHULUMA ngezingqinamba abazali ababhekana nazo ngenxa yezingane ezibafaka ezinkingeni ezehlukene umdlalo wamahlaya othi Msebenzi, ozoqala kwiSABC1 ngeSonto ngo-7.30 ebusuku. Kulo mdlalo oqoshelwe eSoweto kulingisa phambili umbhali obuye abe ngumqondisi wemidlalo emikhulu uThomas Gumede. UThomas uzobe elingisa indawo ephambili kaMsebenzi, okungowesilisa oneminyaka engu-30, onolimi olushelelayo, ongenandaba nokuthola umsebenzi oqondile nowenza konke okusemandleni ukubalekela izinkinga anazo zemali. Ekhuluma ngale ndawo uThomas uthe uMsebenzi, usebenzisa izindlela ezingaqondile ukuze athole inkece njengoba enamabhanoyi afake kuwo omakhelwane bakhe abangani nabomndeni wakhe. "UMsebenzi wumuntu nje esingathi akabalaleli abanye.
