Wenza izinto ngoba azi ukuthi uyakwazi ukubagoqa kalula kodwa lokhu kubuye kususe umsindo ngenxa yokuthi ukwenza ebantwini abazanayo nabasondelene kakhulu bese kuba nemiphumela naye abengayilindele.Yindawo lena ezohambisana nempilo yemindeni eminingi ngenxa yentsha ephila impilo efana nse neyalona wesilisa," kusho uThomas. Kulo mdlalo kuvele ukuthi omunye umlingisi ozogqama uDuduzile Ngcobo ozobe elingisa indawo kaMaGumede, ongunina kaMsebenzi. UMaGumede kuvela ukuthi into emkhathaza kakhulu wukuthi uwuthwele umndeni wakhe, futhi ukhathazekile ngendodana yakhe engazixaki ngokufuna umsebenzi. "Uhlala eyibelesele indodana yakhe ethi ayihambe iyofuna umsebenzi, kodwa yona ingakwenzi lokhu bese kugcina ngokuthi unina ayifunele yena umsebenzi. Kuzobonakala okuningi abazali ababhekana nakho. Ngakho ngikhuthaza kakhulu abafowethu nodadewethu ukuthi bawubuke lo mdlalo ngoba, bazozibona kuwo futhi bazofunda ukusukuma bazimele," kuchaza yena. Abanye abalingisi abazobonakala kulo mdlalo uNthabiseng Gwinya ozobe elingisa indawo kaMaMthimkhulu, Mondli Nkomo (baba uMthimkhulu), Kedibone Mulaudzi, Bongani Dube nabanye.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: BUZOBE bubuzwa eThekwini ubumnandi kule mpelasonto njengoba isize yafika impelasonto enkulu ebilindwe abaningi yomcimbi wezindondo amaMetro FM Music Awards. Umcimbi walo nyaka uzobanjelwa e-ICC eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo. Kuwona kulindeleke ukuthi osaziwayo abahlukene babonakale kuleli dolobha njengoba bezohambela umcimbi wakusasa. Kusuka ngoMsombuluko, isiteshi iMetro FM besisakazela eThekwini ezindaweni ezihlukene, ukuze kunxenxwe abantu ukuthi bahambele umcimbi. Kuleli sonto imicimbi ebikhona ebindlalela umcimbi omkhulu; bekukhona kuyo eyokunikela ngezinsiza zokufunda ezikoleni eziseThekwini, kuphinde kwaba nemicimbi la abaculi bebefundisa khona ngalo mkhakha abakuwo, omunye wale micimbi obubanelwe eThekwini. Namhlanje kulindeleke ukuthi kube nomcimbi wokwendlalela umcimbi omkhulu nozoba seTigers Milk, eMhlanga. Lawrence Maleka  Lawrence Maleka Kuyo kuzobe kunandisa uProfessor, Babalwa M, DJ Sox, DJ Tira, Oscar Mbo, Lamiez Holworthy, DJ Sabby, DJ Tira, Mondli Ngcobo nabanye. Umcimbi wakusasa wezindondo uzobe uhambisana nedili elikhulu lomcimbi elizobanjelwa ePeople's Park, iMetro FM Music Awards 2026 Festval kuwo okuzonandisa nakhona abaculi abahlukene okubalwa kubo uYoung Stuna, Big Nuz, Feza, Khuzani, uMafikozolo, Dladla Mshunqis nabanye. Emcimbini wezindondo abaculi abazonandisa khona Isolezwe lithole ukuthi bazoba yimfihlo ngenjongo yokujabulisa izihlwele ezizobe zihambele umcimbi. NgeSonto, umcimbi wokugcina wokuvala uzobe waziwa nge-Love Movement, nozobanjelwa eBerea Rovers, kuwo okuzonandisa abaculi okubalwa kubo uNaima Kay, Mondli ngcobo, Zamajobe, Naledi Aphiwe, Nomfundo Moh, Nontokozo Mkhize, Lwah Ndlunkulu nabasakazi beMetro FM. Emcimbini omkhulu uhlelo luzobe luphethwe uLerato Kganyago noLawrence Maleka kanti uLamiez Holworthy yena uzobe amukela osaziwayo kukhaphethi obomvu. Izolo, abamaMetro baveze izindaba zokuthi amathikithi eVIP asedayise aphela kanti akawonkewonke kusele ayingcosana. Kuleli sonto, Isolezwe libike ukuthi kuyagqoza ukuthemgwa kwamathikithi, nokuyinto ekhathaza abahleli bomcimbi oxhaswe wuMasipala weTheku

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ABALINGISI bomdlalo iHomecoming okhonjiswa kuMzansi Wethu osekuvele ukuthi usuzokhonjiswa kahlanu ngesonto hhayi kathathu njengoba bekwenzeka UMBHALI womdlalo iHomecoming, uPhathu Makhwarela, uthe bayaziqhenya ngokusebenza nesiteshi esibeka phambili ukuthuthukisa amakhono entsha. Ukusho lokhu njengoba iMultichoice okuyinkampani engaphansi kweCanal + imemezele izindaba zokuthi usuzokhonjiswa izinsuku ezinhlanu phakathi nesonto umdlalo iHomecoming. Lo mdlalo ukhonjiswa kuMzansi Wethu (163), ngoMsombuluko kuya kuLwesithathu. Kodwa kusuka ngoMsombuluko ozayo usuzokhonjiswa zonke izinsuku phakathi nesonto. UPhathu wenkampani eqopha lo mdlalo iTshedza Pictures, uthe ukunikwa ezinye izinsuku ukuthi bakhombise umdlalo walolu hlobo osagcwele abalingisi abasazakhela igama kule ndima, kusho ukuqhubeka kokuvuleka kwamathuba omsebenzi. "Kuzovula amathuba amaningi nahlukene ukuthi umdlalo walolu hlobo unikwe ezinye izinsuku. Angikhulumi nje ngabalingisi kuphela kodwa ngisho labo abasebenza eminyangweni ehlukene kuwona umdlalo. Sisendimeni lapho amathuba engemaningi khona ngakho uma kuqhamuka ithuba elifana naleli kumele silisebenzise ukuze sixoxe izindaba esihlala sizibona emphakathini. Ngakho sifuna ukuqinisekisa ukuthi amakhono esinawo kuleli anayo indawo yokuveza lokho abagabe ngakho futhi bayakhula kulokhu abakwenzayo nesifuna kuhambisane nababukeli bethu," kusho yena. UShirley Adonisi obhekele izinhlelo zakuleli kwaMultichoice uveze ukuthi ukwengenza izinsuku kuyinto nabo abathathe isinqumo sokuyenza ngoba bebona isasasa elikhona ngalo mdlalo. Uthe ababukeli balesi siteshi bababekele okuningi okusha njengoba kuza izinhlelo ezintsha okukhona kuzo oluthi Mama’s Boy futhi lukhuza ibuya uhlelo olukhuluma ngempilo yomndeni wakwaMhlongo oluthi Kwanjomane isizini yesithathu, nokuyimvubelo yezinhlelo abangangabazi ukuthi ziboshelwe ngendlela ezodonsa amehlo abaningi. Kulo mdlalo oqoshelwa eBergville, KwaZulu-Natal, kuligisa abalingisi okukhona kubo uMpume “Six” Nyamane Thembinkosi Mthembu, Amahle Khumalo, Sipho Manzini, Khombi Phetla, Mpilo Mbatha noKhayalethu Xaba.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UNKOSIKAZI wesine kasomabhizinisi uMusa Mseleku, uMbali MaNgwabe Mseleku UMBALI uMaNgwabe Mseleku usephumele obala wathi abantu abangabagxeki kakhulu ngeziqephu ezincane eziveza impilo yabo kwithelevishini njengoba amanye amagama abake bawasho efika kabi kubona. Ukusho lokhu ephumela obala okokuqala ngokuba yingxenye yesithembu sikasomabhizinisi uMusa Mseleku. UMseleku, amakhosikazi akhe amahlanu nezingane zakhe babonakala ohlelweni Uthando Nesithembu, olukhonjiswa ngoLwesithathu nangoLwesine ngo-8 ebusuku kuMzansi Magic (161). UMaNgwabe uthe kuncane kakhulu abantu abakubona ngabo kwithelevishini, kodwa ukugxekwa kwabo ikakhulukazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, kubazwisa ubuhlungu. "Abantu abasazi ngaleyo ndlela abacabanga ngayo, ikakhulukazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Uyabona nje mina ngoba ngisebenza ngabantu, ngiye ngithi uma ngihlangana nabo emsebenzini wami wobuhlengikazi sihleke, befuna ukwazi okuningi ngomndeni wethu, kungabi bikho ukukhuluma kabi. Kodwa laba abasezinkundleni zokuxhumana ungathi bayasazi ngendlela abakhuluma ngayo izinto ezibuhlungu ngathi nokuyinto engingathi angiyithandi ngokuba usaziwayo kulolu hlelo," kusho uMaNgwabe. Uthe ababukeli balolu hlelo akubonile ngabo wukuthi abayiqondi indlela adaleke ngayo, njengoba engumuntu othanda ukukhuluma iqiniso njengoba linjalo, ongafihli uma ephatheke kabi. "Ngesikhathi ohlelweni ngitshela abantu amaqiniso njengoba enjalo ngibaqonda nangezinto abazishilo, abantu bangibona njengomuntu onentukuthelo futhi ongakhulumi kahle nabanye. Ngiyakholelwa kakhulu ekutheni kumele uyiveze imizwa yakho kunokuthi wenze sengathi ujabule kanti cha. Uyabona nje konke lokhu kungenze ngafisa ukuthi ngabe kungcono ukuba izingane zami azaziwa emphakathini, kodwa ukuba  kwithelevishini kusho ukuthi izinto eziningi zomndeni kumele zibe semehlweni abantu, engicabanga ukuthi ezinye kumele zibe yimfihlo yethu kuphela," kusho yena. Uthe ezintweni ezikhulunywa ngabo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukhethe ukuthi eziningi angazifaki enhliziyweni ngoba ezinye azenzeki ngempela empilweni yabo. Uveze ukuthi ukuba kuya ngaye ngabe akaziwa emphakathini kodwa ngenxa yohlelo lwabo konke usekwamukele. UMaNgwabe ukhuluma kanjena nje lolu hlelo bekumele luphele kuMzansi Magic ngo-Ephreli 30 kodwa selululwe ngeziqephu ezine seluyoze lugoqwe ngoMeyi 14.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMNDENI kaDJ Sumbody usuphumele obala ngokungaphatheki kahle ngezindaba eziphume ngempelasonto zokuthi leli ciko labulawa ngoba lingene shi ekudayisweni kwezidakamizwa UMNDENI kaDJ Sumbody, ogama lakhe lokuzalwa ngu-Oupa John Sefoka, usuzichithile izinsolo ezisabalale ngempelasonto, zokuthi indodana yawo ibingene shi ekuhwebeni ngezidakamizwa. Lokhu kulandela umbiko oveza ukuthi leli ciko eladutshulwa ngoNovemba 2022, lalithinteka ekuntshontshweni kwezidakamizwa okwavela ukuthi zalahleka eKZN, endaweni ezazibekwe kuyo. Bathi lezi zindaba ezigcwale ezinkundleni zokuxhumana azilona iqiniso futhi zingubudedengu njengoba zingaqinisekiswe ndawo. Lolu daba bathi sebekhethe ukuthi abameli babo bababhekele lona futhi kukhona abazobathathela izinyathelo zomthetho. “Njengomndeni lusiphazamise kakhulu udaba oluvele muva nje olungamanga nesikholwa wukuthi kube ubudedengu ukuthi luphume, lwase lugcwala ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Udaba lolu olusasezithebeni zenkantolo futhi sikhuza amalungu omphakathi asebenzisa izinkundla zokuxhumana ukuthi ayeke ukuqagela okungaholela ekutheni kuphazamiseke uphenyo oluqhubekayo. Konke ngalolu daba kusezithebeni zenkantolo futhi silinde ukuthi lugoqwe khona," kusho isitatimende. Bathe ngalezi zizathu akukho abazokukhuluma nabezindaba futhi ngisho ezinkundleni zokuxhumana akukho abazokuphendula. "Kuyasilimaza esikubona kushiwo ngendodana yethu, kusehlisa isithunzi kakhulu. Abameli bethu sibazisile ngalokhu futhi sibatshelile ukuthi abakhulume nabasabalalise lezi zindaba, sizobathathela izinyathelo zomthetho," kusho umndeni. Bathe abakufunayo wukuthi kuboshwe abantu ababulala indodana yabo, kuyekwe ukukhuluma izinto ezingelona iqiniso. Okhulumela amaphoyisa kuzwelonke, uBrigadier Athlenda Mathe, unxuse abantu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi bayeke ukuqagela ezintweni ezifana nalezi wakuza nabanye abaphinde badalule amagama abantu emacaleni asaphenywa. "Ukwenza kanjena kukhipha imininingwane namagama aqukethwe emadokodweni, nokwenza kubekeke amagama abantu engozini njengoba kusuke kusaqhubeka uphenyo. Lokhu akubeki kuphela ofakazi kula macala anjena engozini kodwa kubeka nemindeni yabo," kuchaza yena.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UZIME wakuleli uZozibini Tunzi ungomunye wabethuli abasha bohlelo iTop Billing INTOKAZI yakuleli eyathatha isicoco sikaMiss SA yaphinde yakhala yemuka nesikaMiss Universe, uZozibini Tunzi, ingomunye wabethuli abasha bohlelo iTop Billing, ekhuza ibuya kwiS3 ekupheleni kwale nyanga. Lolu hlelo obeselunyamalele minyaka, lubuya kulesi siteshi nalapho luzokhombisa khona imizi nemicimbi esezingeni eliphezulu. Le ntokazi egqame kwabaningi ithatha lezi zicoco, ayiyona umafikizolo kwezethelevishini njengoba isike yabonakala ilingisa efilimini yaphesheya kwezilwandle eyaqoshwa kuleli iThe Woman King neBad Influencer eyayikhonjiswa kwiNetflix. UZozi uthe kuye leli yithuba eliyingqayizivele ngoba ukuba kulolu hlelo kusho lukhulu - yinto akade ayilindela. "Kuningi okusha okusazovela ngohlelo. Kusekhona okuningi okuzolandela nokuzohluka endleleni uhlelo obelwaziwa ngayo phambilini," kuchaza yena. Kulolu hlelo kubuya izinkakha ezake zalwethula okukhona kuzo uDkt Michael Mol, Basetsana Kumalo, Jonathan Boynton-Lee, Dkt Fez Mkhize noRyle De Morny. Kubethuli abasha abazoqala ukubonakala kulo kubalwa uBryoni Govender, Arno Greeff noSine Mpulu. Ukubuya kwalolu hlelo kuphendulwe ihlaya ezinkundleni zokuxhmana ngokuthi kumele baphenyisiswe abazobonakala beveza imizi yabo esezingeni eliphezulu, kwathiwa inkampani eqoqa intela i-SARS neKhomishini kaMadlanga, kumele bavule amehlo babophe bonke abazovela kulona. UPatience Stevens ongumqondisi enkampanini iCardova Productions, eqopha lolu hlelo, uthe bajabule ngokuthi ekugcineni abantu bakuleli bazophinda balubone. "Kulolu hlelo kusuke kukhonjiswa izindlela ezehlukene abantu abasuke beqhakambisa ngazo izinto abanazo. Ngakho ukulubuyisa manje kube yisikhathi esikahle njengoba sisesikhathini lapho kubungazwa ngezindlela ezihlukene izindaba esinazo kuleli, ngakho siyajabula. Sizoqhubeka ukuveza obekujwayelekile kulo kodwa ngendlela entsha, ezojatshulelwa ababukeli balo manje, abanye abangakaze balubone phambilini," kusho uPatience. UDichaba Phalatse wakwaSABC uthe ukubuya kwalolu hlelo kuyindlela efana nesiko yokukhombisa izinhlelo zakuleli ezinomlando. Uthe kuningi abantu abazokubona, okuzobafundisa, kubavule amehlo. Uphethe ngokuthi ukubuyisa lolu hlelo yisinqumo abangazisoli ngaso.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UDANYA Devs ngomunye wabaculi asebemenyezelwe abazonandisa emcimbini walo nyaka woGu Jazz Festival KULINDELEKE ukuthi kube noxhaxha lwemicimbi oluzobe yandulela umcimbi omkhulu woGu Jazz Festival ngoJuni 27, kulo nyaka. Le ndumezulu yomcimbi izoba sezinkundleni zemidlalo Ugu Sports & Leisure Centre, ePort Shepstone. Lo mcimbi obuye ngonyaka odlule ngezinhlelo ezimbalwa, kulo nyaka abahleli bawo bathembisa ukubuya ngegiya eliphezulu kunelejwayelekile ngemuva kweminyaka ungekho. USiya Msomi wenkampani weCoolsounds Trading, okunguye ohlela lo mcimbi ngokubambisana noMasipala Ugu, uveze ukuthi akade sebewuqalile owaziwa ngokuthi i-Offramp Experience, uzoqhubeka ukwenza imicimbi eyandulela Ugu, okukhona kuwo imikhuleko, ukuqwala izintaba, ukubona izindawo zokuvakasha, umcimbi wamahlala neminye. "Umcimbi I-Offramp Experience uzoqala ngedili lo mcimbi oyi-gala dinner enkundleni efanayo ngoJuni 25, bese kulandela eminye. Emcimbini la kuzobe kukhulekwa i-Worship Experience, wona uzoba ngoJuni 26. Kuwona kukhona nabaculi abahlukene esizobamemezela ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Silindele abantu abangu-3 000 bese kuthi emcimbini we-jazz khona silindele abantu abangu-8 000. Ngayo yonke imicimbi sifisa ukuthi abantu bahlangane ndawonye bajabulele umculo nakho konke esizobe sikuhlelile. Sithi abantu abaphume ngobuningi babo bezojabula nathi. Kanjalo nabaculi be-jazz angeke sibaveze bonke namhlanje. Sihlele ukuthi sibamemezele ngokuhamba kwesikhathi," kuchaza yena. IMeya kaMasipala Ugu, uMnuz Sikhumbuzo Mqadi, ithe ngemicimbi enjengalena baningi abantu abahlomulayo nabathola amathuba omsebenzi, hhayi nje abaculi nabanikazi bamahhotela nezindawo zobumnandi. "Uyabona njengoba umcimbi usumenyezelwe nje, sesizoya emphakathini siyobatshela ngamathuba emisebenzi ezoba khona bese siyanxusa ukuthi abantu bathathe amathuba avelayo. Ngeke kugcine lapho, besinenkinga yamanzi kakhulu ngapha kithi, esingakusho nje ukuthi izinkinga ezifana nalezo seziyalungiseka ngakho azikho izinkinga izivakashi zethu ezizobhekana nazo," kusho yena. Emcimbini we-jazz kuboshelwe abaculi okukhona kubo uNaledi Aphiwe, Mawelele, Siphokazi, Mondli Ngcobo, ilungu leqembu iBlaq Diamond uDanya, inkakha emculweni we-jazz uDon Laka, Ernie Smith, Bongani Nkwanyaka, Mnqobi Yazo, Olefied Khetha. KoDJ kulindeleke uDJ 101 noDJ Muntu.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ULERATO Kganyago ongomunye wabasakazi beMetro FM abazophatha uhlelo emcimbini wezindondo walesi siteshi ozoba ngoMgqibelo, eThekwini KUVELA ukuthi zishayana ngamakhanda izikhulu zeSABC nesiteshi iMetro FM, ngokugqoza kokudayiswa kwamathikithi alo mcimbi okulindeleke ukuthi ube se-ICC, eThekwini ngoMgqibelo. Umcimbi amaMetro FM Awards, ukhuze ibuya kulo nyaka ngemuva kwesikhathi eside agcina, njengoba lo mcimbi uke wamiswa iminyaka. Umthombo weSolezwe oyingxenye yethimba elihlela umcimbi, uveze ukuthi abakhangisa umcimbi bezwakalise ukukhathazeka kuqala njengoba abantu bebebonakala bewuthakasela umcimbi uma ufakwe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, okulethe ithemba kusaqalwa. "Kodwa izinto zishintshe sekubhekwa indlela amathikithi ahamba ngayo eTicketpro lapho edayiswa khona, kwacaca ukuthi athengwa kancane okuyinto ebingalindelekile," kusho umthombo. Omunye umthombo uveze ukuthi izikhulu eziphezulu zalo mcimbi zishayana ngamakhanda manje ukubheka enye indlela yokuthi abantu bathenge amathikithi. "Manje kusetshenziswana nemisakazo emikhulu namaphepha eThekwini, ukuthi bakhangise umcimbi njengoba befuna ube sezingeni, kodwa kuyala njengoba manje sisesontweni lokugcina lalo mcimbi. Sekuthenjwe ukuthi ngoLwesihlanu, abanye abantu bazobe beholile ngakho kungenzeka kube khona athengwayo. Nawomcimbi osePeople's Park nakhona yiso leso njengoba amathikithi engahambi yize abaculi abazobe bekhona bedonsa amehlo," kuchaza umthombo. Uveze ukuthi abanye basola ukuthi umcimbi awukhangiswanga ngendlela njengoba bekumele kuhanjelwe emalokishini, ukutshela abantu ngawo. Uthe kunalokho kuvele kwayiwa ezindaweni ezimbalwa ezindaweni zokuzijabulisa edolobheni eThekwini, nokuyinto abaningi abangayinakanga. Okhulumela iSABC uMmoni Ngubane, uthunyelelwe i-email agcine engaphendulanga kuyo ukuzwa izinhlelo zalo mcimbi. Ukuvotela bonke abaculi abaqokwe kuwona kuvalwe ngeSonto. NgoLwesihlanu kulindeleke ukuthi kube nemicimbi ehlukene ukundlalela omkhulu ngoMgqibelo. NgoMgqibelo kuzoba nosePeople's Park, nase-ICC. Kuyona kulindeleke ukuthi kunandise abaculi okukhona kubo uYoung Stuna, DJ Tira, Goldmax, Mthandeni SK, Benny Maverick, Sammy K, Umafikizolo, Khuzani nabanye. Uhlelo emcimbini omkhulu luyobe luphethwe uLerato Kganyago noLawrence Maleka.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: AZITHI vu izintokazi ezidumile kuleli ngamahlebezi alokhu evela ngazo kulandela ukuboshwa kwesikhulu sikahulumeni, uKagiso Michael Lerutla, oyimenenja yedolobha kuMasipala waseKurhuleni. UKagiso osamisiwe uboshwe esikhumulweni sezindiza i-OR Tambo kwaphinde kwavela ukuthi ubeyotetemuka nenye yezintokazi asondelene nazo okuthiwa ibiyogubha usuku lwayo lokuzalwa. NgoMsombuluko ube esevela enkantolo noBrigadier Julius Mkhwanazi oyisekela mphathi wamaphoyisa ezemimgwaqo Ekurhuleni. UMkhwanazi usamisiwe emsebenzini. Ezinkundleni zokuxhumana abantu baveze ukuthi uKagiso,imali kaMasipala ubeyichitha ngokuphilisa kahle izintokazi abethandana nazo. Kulezi zintokazi kubalwa uMawhoo ongumculi, Sithelo Shozi okuvela ukuthi washiya phansi ukuba uDJ ngenxa yokuba sebudlelwaneni noKagiso. Enye yezintokazi ezikhonjwa kuye uCyan Boujee, okuvela ukuthi umuzi asanda kuwusabalalisa ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ubuthengwe uyena uKagiso. Ngemuva kokuboshwa kukaKagiso, uCyan uvele wasusa zonke izithombe abezifake ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, nokuvele ukuthi ucisha ubufakazi ngempilo ayiphilayo. UCyan akakwazanga ukuthula kuvela lezi zindaba wathi yena ukhethe ukususa izithombe zakhe ngoba kuyisinqumo azithathele yena sona hhayi ngoba kuboshwe uKagiso. Image: Instagram/Cyan Boujee "Ngithathe isinqumo sokuvala ikhasi lami ngoba ngithanda ukwenza lokho ngenxa yokuthi ngifuna ukuthatha ikhefu khona. Ngingakujabulela ukuthi abantu bayeke ukukhuluma izinto ezingekho ngami ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Ngicela ningangixhumanisi nabantu engingahlangani nabo, bese ngithule isikhathi esingangonyaka nilokhu nikhuluma, ningihlanganisa nabesilisa baseVenda, abaseZimbabwe, nemishado engingayazi nithi ngiyingxenye yayo. Angikuthandi lokhu enikwenzayo. Ngiyaphuma ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngizobuya futhi," kuchaza yena. Kwenye yezinkulumonoGogo Skhotheni, uCyan uke wakuveza ukuthi wake waba nokungaboni ngao linye noSithelo njengoba amthathela indoda yakhe. Uthi naye wagcina ngokuthi athathe indoda kaSithelo nokwenzeka bengazi bobabili kodwa bagcina bazi ukuthi kwenzekani. Izolo kuvele izindaba zokuthi ama-akhawunti amabhange kaCyan asevaliwe nathi lokhu akazi ukuthi kudalwa yini. Imizamo yokuthola uSithelo noMawhoo ayiphumelelanga njengoba izingcingo zabo bezingangeni.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: 1008556652__20260221__0 ZIMANGZE abaningi izindaba zokudlula emhlabeni komlingiisi uCynthia Shange oshone izolo ekuseni esibhedlela eThekwini ZITHINTE abaningi emkhakheni wokulingisa izindaba zokudlula emhlabeni kwenkakha, uCynthia Shange, izindaba zokushona kwakhe zivezwe yindodakazi yakhe uNonhle Thema ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. UCynthia waba ngowokuqala ukumela elakuleli emcimbini kazime kaMiss World. Akagcinanga lapho wabuye wazakhela igama emkhakheni wokulingisa emdlalweni uShaka Zulu, Deliwe, Isivumelwano neminye. Ikhono lakhe ekulingiseni ugcine ukuligqamisa emdlalweni iMuvhango. UCynthia oke waphumela obala ngokuthi uhlushwa yisifo sikashukela waze wanqunywa izinzwane, kuvela ukuthi ushonele eThekwini entathakusa izolo. UNonhle uthe "Kubuhlungu ukunazisa izindaba zokudlula emhlabeni kukamama wethu. Ngiyanicela ukuthi nisibeke njengomndeni emikhulekweni yenu kulesi sikhathi esinzima," kusho uNonhle. Iningi losaziwayo lizwelane nale ntokazi iveza lezi zindaba ezishaqise abaningi. Umculi uThembi Seete uthe:"Phephisa sisi, siyazwelana nani ngokunehlele." UNhlanhla Mafu uthe:"Oh phephisa sthandwa sami". Inkakha endimeni yomculo uYvonne Chaka Chaka ithe:"Owesifazane omuhle kakhulu, lala uphumule sisi." U-Anele Mdoda uthe:"Oh sisi, sengathi uNkulunkulu anganengama wena nomndeni wonke. Ubengumuntu onomlando omkhulu umama asikhombise wona. Phephisa ntombi." I-IFP ifanise uCynthia neqhawe emkhakheni wokulingisa. "Ushiye umlando onothile oyobonwa yizizukulwane ngezizukulwane. Waqala ukuzakhela igama ngeminyaka yawo-1970 ngemuva kokuthatha isicoco sikazime sikaMiss South Africa. Akagcinanga lapho waqhubeka esimela emazweni lapho angenela khona umcimbi kaMiss World ngo-1972, eLondon. Waba ngowokuqala omnyama ukwenza lokhu. Ubonakale emidlalweni ehlukene elingisa izindawo eziphambili, ngakho imisebenzi yakhe siyibonile ijabulisa izinkumbi zabantu kuleli. Njengeqembu sidlulisa amazwi enduduzo emndenini wakhe nakubo bonke asebenze nabo," kuchaza isitatimende se-IFP.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UBASETSANA Kumalo owake wathula uhlelo i-Top Billing, ekhuza ibuya ekupheleni kwale nyanga kuS3 KUPHENDULWE ihlaya ngokuthi kumele kuphenywe kanzima abazobonakala bekhombisa imizi yabo esezingeni eliphezulu, uma sekukhonjiswa uhlelo i-Top Billing, ezoqala ukubonakala ngo-Ephreli 30, ngo-7 ebusuku, kuS3. Lolu hlelo obeseluneminyaka lwaphela, kulindeleke ukuthi luqhubeke luvakashele osomabhizinisi, osaziwayo bakuleli nabaphumelele ukubona imizi abahlala kuyo. Kulona kubhekwa imizi emikhulu emihle, nemicimbi esezingeni eliphezulu, nayo okungeyona ekanoma ubani kodwa eyomntakabani. UBasetsana Kumalo wake wathula uhlelo i-Top Billing, ekhuza ibuya ekupheleni kwale nyanga kuS3. Ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, abantu bakuphendule ihlaya ukubuya kwalolu hlelo, kwathiwa inkampani eqoqa intela i-SARS neKhomishini kaMadlanga, kumele bavule amehlo babophe bonke abazovela kulo. U-@XekiHlongwane uthe: "Lubuyile uhlelo i-Top Billing, luzoba uhlelo oluzodonsa amehlo abaningi, uma nje i-SARS ingabalandeli labo abavelile". U-@uMaster_Sandz uthe: "Isibindi esikhulu kodwa ukubuyisa uhlelo i-Top Billing ngalesi sikhathi esibi kangaka ezweni". UBubang Semono uthe: "Ngiyibekile iMadlanga". U-@Markosonke1 uthe: "Ekugcineni i-Top Billing iyabuya. Njengabahlali bakuleli silindele iziqephu ezisezingeni eliphezulu. Ngifisa ukuthi isiqephu sokuqala sihambele emzini kaGareth Mnisi, sibone ukuthi wayisebenzisa kanjani imali ewu-R36 million. Isiqephu sesibili sibone umuzi kaHangwani Maumela, izimoto, nezinto eziphakathi endlini ezathengwa phesheya. Kule sizini umethuli kumele kube ophuma kwa-SARS, umshuthi kube abaphuma kumaHawks abeKhomishini kaMadlanga kube yibona abasichazela konke okusendlini. Asibafuni osaziwayo, sifuna osomathenda". UPatience Stevens ongumqondisi enkampanini iCardova Productions, eqopha lolu hlelo, uthe bajabule ukuthi ekugcineni abantu bakuleli bazolubona lolu hlelo. "Kulolu hlelo kusuke kukhonjiswa izindlela ezehlukene abantu abasuke bebungaza ngazo izinto abanazo. Ngakho ukulubuyisa manje kube isikhathi esikahle njengoba sisesikhathini la kubungazwa khona ngezindlela ezehlukene izindaba esinazo kuleli ngakho siyajabula. Sizoqhubeka ukuveza obekujwayeleke kulo kodwa ngendlela entsha, ejwayelekile ezokwazi ukuthi ijatshulelwe ababukeli balo manje, abanye abangakaze balubone phambilini," kusho uPatience. UDichaba Phalatse wakwaSABC uthe ukubuya kwalolu hlelo kuyindlela efana nesiko yokukhombisa izinhlelo ezinomlando zakuleli. Uthe kuningi abantu abazokubona, okuzobafundisa, kubavule amehlo, okuyisinqumo abangazisoli ngaso ukubuyisa uhlelo olufana nalolu.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UBaby Cele ongomunye wabalingisi abebelingisa indawo ephambili emdlalweni, iGenesis ophelayo kusasa kuMzansi Magic SEKUSELE kancane ziphothulwe izinhlelo zomdlalo omusha ozovala isikhala seGenesis, efinyelela emaphethelweni kusasa. Lo mdlalo obukhonjiswa ngo-7.30, phakathi nesonto nogxile kwezenkolo, ukwengavuselelwanga emidlalweni ekhona kulesi siteshi, iningi layo eqale ngonyaka odlule. NgoFebhuwari umdlalo Ithonga ufinyelele emaphethelweni, okuze kube manje awukho umdlalo ovale isikhala sawo. Kunalokho uMzansi Magic uthathe umdlalo Inimba obukhonjiswa ngo-9 ebusuku, wawehlisela ku-8.30. Umthombo weSolezwe ongaphakathi kulo mdlalo, uveze ukuthi kusuka ngoJulayi, kuzoqala umdlalo ozovala isikhala seGenesis, kodwa umdlalo Inimba wona usazoqhubeka nokuba kulesi sikhathi okuso manje njengoba zingekho izindaba ezithinta ukumenyezelwa kwemidlalo emibili. "Ngenyanga ezayo sizomemezela umdlalo omusha ozovala isikhala seGenesis njengoba iphela manje. Okwamanje umdlalo basematasa nawo, uzoqala ukuqoshwa ngenyanga ezayo bese kuthi ngoJuni maphakathi nawo kumenyezelwe konke ngawo. Yebo iMultichoice ibhekene nobunzima bokubeka isenti phezu kwelinye kodwa kulesi sikhala ngeke kungabi khona mdlalo oba khona. Ngibona sengathi wumdlalo wesithathu ongeke usaba khona," kusho umthombo. Uveze ukuthi okwamanje kuzoba khona izinhlelo nemidlalo emincane ezongena kulesi sikhathi kuze kube kuqala umdlalo omusha. "Zikhona izinhlelo ezintsha ezizokhonjiswa kulesi sikhathi kuze kube kufika isikhathi somdlalo omusha. Kunzima okwenzeka ngaphakathi kule nkampani ngoba akujwayelekile, konke manje sekumele kuqale eFrance ukuze kube yizikhulu zenkampani iCanal+ ezishoyo ukuthi akuqhutshekwe. Izolambisa amaciko amaningi le nto eyenzekayo njengoba lo mdlalo uphela nje. Kumele ngabe omusha usukhona usuqoshiwe ukuze uqale ngoMsombuluko kodwa konke lokho akwenzekile ngenxa yokushintsha kwesimo sokusebenza," kuchaza umthombo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Umndeni ka-Albert Mazibuko izolo obuhambele inkonzo yesikhumbuzo sakhe eCFCI eThekwini IZOQALA ngokungcwatshwa kuqala ngo-8 ekuseni, bese kulandela inkonzo yomngcwabo wayo ingwazi engasekho yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, uMdletshe Albert Mazibuko (77), eshone ngeledlule esibhedlela, ngemuva kokugula isikhashana. Lokhu kuvezwe umfowabo enkonzweni yesikhumbuzo ebiseCFCI eBerea eThekwini izolo. U-Abednigo Mazibuko, oke wacula kwiMambazo ngaphambi kokuthatha umhlalaphansi, uthe umfowabo wazisholo yena ukuthi ufuna ukufihlwa kubo eNtabamhlophe, e-Estcourt. INDODANA ka-Albert Mazibuko uNhlanhla ogqoke isudi emnyama icula neqembu iLadysmith Black Mambazo enkonzweni yesikhumbuzo izolo Uthe ngenxa yemithetho yakule ndawo okuzofihlwa kuyo, bahlele ukuthi ekuseni kuqale umngcwabo afihlwe bese kuthi ngo-9 kube nenkonzo ezoba sesikoleni iMtshezi High, e-Estcourt ngoMgqibelo ekuseni. "Indawo azofihlwa kuyo inemithetho kakhulu, ngakho sizoqala ngokumfihla ekuseni bese kulandela inkonzo ezobe ihambisana nezikhulumi ezihlukene," kusho uMazibuko. Uthe umfowabo ubengumuntu onothando, nobexhasana kakhulu ezintweni abantu abazenzayo. "Ubenothando umfowethu, enomusa elungile futhi kakhulu. Ubengumuntu owesekanayo kunoma yini oyenzayo futhi ekwenza konke ngomoya owodwa. Wamxhasa uMshengu enza konke ayekusho njengoba inhloso kaMshengu kwakungukuthi umculo neqembu udume kuzona zonke izindawo, ngempela bakwenza lokho bebambene, kwaze kwaba uyakholwa uMshengu, bayihamba le ndlela naye wagcina ekholwa," kuchaza uMazibuko. ABEBEHAMBELE inkonzo yokukhumbula ingwazi yeMambazo u-Albert Mazibuko Ubonge ukuxhaswa abantu kulesi sikhathi esinzima, athe ukwesekwa abakutholile kubathobe kakhulu. U-Enos Phungula ongomunye wamalungu amadala aleli qembu, uthe kushayisa ngovalo ukuzokhuluma enkonzweni kaMazibuko, kodwa akujabulelayo wukuthi ulihambile ibanga lakhe waliqeda. "Ibanga lakhe uhambe waliqeda emculweni njengoba aze washiya yena esethanda. Sisacula, wayefika ngisho egula kodwa azinikele kukho konke akwenzayo, ushiye kuleli qembu esekhulile. Ngiyabonga kinina bafana bakwaMshengu ngokugcina iqembu liphila kangaka, nize ningavumi ukuthi  life," kusho yena. AMALUNGU eMambazo enkonzweni yokukhumbula  u-Albert Mazibuko eThekwini izolo Indodana kaMazibuko uNhlanhla, nayo ifakazele izikhulumi ebesezikhulume ngaphambi kwayo, yathi uyise ubakhulise ngothando. "Ubaba ubesithumelela amakhadi anemiyalezo nomculo osuka phesheya kwezilwandle. Kuwona wonke amazwe akade ewahambela, ubesithumelela amakhadi akhona esitshela indlela asithanda ngayo. Ubaba bekuthi uma ezofona ocingweni kudala, kushaye ihora lesine ntambama sekunolayini wokulinda ukukhuluma naye, ezositshela ukuthi usithanda kangakanani futhi athi asiziphathe kahle. Lokhu kwakusho kukhulu kithina," kusho uNhlanhla. USibongiseni Tshabalala, uthe kukhulunywe konke ngoMazibuko wathi abakubongayo yisikhathi ababenaso naye, esibe mnandi ebahola njengobaba wabo. Uthe ubaba wabo ngisho bonile, ubengabajezisi ngendlela enzima njengoba yena wabatshela ukuthi wakhula eshaywa ngakho ubehlala nabo ababonise. Uhlelo lwenkonzo beluphethwe wumsakazi woKhozi FM uPhindi P, kanti kunandise amaqembu ahlukene esicathamiya okulindeleke ukuthi aqhubeke nasenkonzweni yomngcwabo. Kube sekubonakala nabacula owokholo okubalwa kubo uSgwili, Ayanda Ntanzi nabanye.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI ocula owokholo oshisa izikhotha, uNothando Hlophe, obeyingxenye yomcimbi obekuboshelwe kuwo uBenjamin Dube WENZE ezibukwayo umculi ocula owokholo oyinkakha kule ndima uBishop Benjamin Dube, ngesikhathi ecula ngokuhlanganyela neThe Zulu Kingdom Choir ePlayhouse, eThekwini. Le nkakha ebibabaza ikhono eliyisimanga leThe Zulu Kingdom Choir, bekungokokuqala inandisa ngokuhlanganyela naleli qembu elisungulwe ngo-2020, uSiphiwe Bulose wakwaNyuswa, eThekwini. Le khonsathi ebizwa ngeSongs and Hymns, ibibophele abaculi abanohlonze okubalwa kubo u-Ayanda Ntanzi, Nothando Hlophe, Sindi Ntombela nabanye. UMphathiswa eMnyangweni wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uNksz Mbali Shinga noMnuz Siphiwe Bulose ongumhleli womcimbi iSongs and Hymns ebinedili lomcimbi ngempelasonto UDube ushaye amanoni akhe amadala, kwahlanya abantu ebambisene neThe Zulu Kingdom Choir, baze abantu bacela impinda. UDube ubenesikhathi sonke sokuzilolonga nale khwaya kwaNyuswa ngoLwesihlanu, okuyilapho etshele khona amalungu alo ukuthi ngendlela abenza ngayo baya kude emculweni. "Kuyangijabulisa ukuthi leli khwaya linekhono eliyisimanga kangaka. Empeleni singabaseGoli, siyaziqhenya ngekhono eliseKZN kwezomculo, lesi sifundazwe sibusisekile ngokuba nekhono kule ndima yomculo," kusho uDube. Kuhlanye izihlwele esenandisa nekhwaya ecula izingoma zakhe okubalwa ethi, Ngiyakuthanda, ayishaye abantu bavukwa wumoya. Kube sekungena u-Ayanda Ntanzi, abantu bavukwa yisithunywa ngamanoni akhe ahlukene asezakhele igama ngawo. Inkundla ivalwe yintandokazi emculweni wokholo uNothando Hlophe, ohlanyise izihlwele ngezingoma zakhe ezishisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku okukhona kuzo ethi, Empini Sothini, Sithumele Wena nezinye. Eyokuphuza ukuqala komcimbi igcine igqibeka njengoba abaculi begile izimanga esteji. Kucacile ukuthi isasasa lawo lizokhula njengoba ubuhanjelwe abantu abahlukahlukene kukhona nezikhulu zikahulumeni okubalwa kuzo abaPhathiswa beminyango ehlukene njengoba bewuhanjelwe owezeMpilo uNkk Nomagugu Simelane-Mngadi noNksz Mbali Shinga ohola uMnyango wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ULONDIE London neMzansi Magic asebememezele izindaba zokuza kohlelo ngempilo yakhe Image: Image: Instagram @londie_london_official KULINDELEKE ukuthi luqale maduzane uhlelo oluzophendula imibuzo abantu abakade baba nayo, ngentokazi yaKwaNongoma kodwa ezinze eGoli, uLondie London. ULondie neMzansi Magic bamemezele ukuthi kungekudala kuzoqala uhlelo ngempilo yale ntokazi oluthi Life with Londi. Kulolu hlelo, baveze kancane ukuthi kuzophenduleka imibuzo ehlukene ngezinto ebezilokhu zivela ngale ntokazi, ezinkundleni nakwezinye izinhlelo uLondie ake aba yingxenye yazo. Le ntokazi ike yabonakala ezinhlelweni okukhona kuzo i-The Real Housewives of Durban, ne-The Real Housewives Ultimate Girls Trip: South Africa. ULondie uthe usekubheke ngabomvu ukuthi abalandeli bakhe babone ukuthi ubaphatheleni ohlelweni oluthinta yena ngqo. "Okwamanje yize umuntu engeke aveze okuningi kodwa ngithi abantu abangithandayo abalindele okuningi, okunye abakade bezibuza ngami, uhlelo luyeza kuMzansi Magic futhi luzocacisa konke abafuna ukukwazi ngempilo yami yangasese, umculo nokunye okuningi," kusho uLondie ngamafuphi. Le ntokazi ikhuluma kanjena nje, isanda kuba sematheni njengoba ngesonto eledlule, igxekwe abaningi ikhuluma kabi ngomzimba wenye intokazi ezakhele igama ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, uDineo Moloisane. Abaningi bamgxekile uLondie ngokukhuluma kabi ngomunye wesifazane, wagcina exolisile ngamazwi awakhulumile, wathi uyalibona iphutha lakhe. Kodwa ukukhuluma akuphelanga njengoba uDineo ephinde waveza ukuthi uLondie uyamsongela enkundleni yokuxhumana uWhatsApp, okuyinto uLondie ayiphikile wathi ingamanga. Esitatimendeni asikhiphile, uLondie uthe inombolo okuthiwa isetshenziswa uyena ukuthumela le miyalezo, akuseyona ayisebenzisayo. “Ngifuna ukukubeka ngikucacise ukuthi lokhu osekuvela manje kokuthi ngithumelela le ntokazi imiyalezo yokuyisabisa, akulona iqiniso. Mina Londie angikaze ngithumele imiyalezo yokusabisa muntu. Okunye engifuna ukukucacisa, ngiyanxusa ukuthi akekho umuntu oseke waxhumana nami ngalezi zinsolo futhi anginazo nami izinombolo zomuntu okuthiwa ngiyamsabisa," kusho uLondi kulesi sitatimende. Laba kuvela ukuthi impi yabo imayelana nombango wesoka.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: U-LIMIT Nala ongomunye wabaculi bakamaskandi abasanda kukhipha i-albhamu eshisa izikhotha abazobe bekhona emcimbini i-Blue Nation Festival UMCULI waseMandaba, eNkandla, uKhuzani Mpungose, useveze ukuthi umcimbi i-Blue Naton Festival awenza eCarnival City, owokuhlanganisa abalandeli bakhe amaBlue Nation kodwa okukhulu ukuthi kuphinde kubumbane isizwe sikamaskandi. Lo mcimbi ozoba ngowesibili kulo nyaka, uzoba ngoMeyi 2, kanti uqale ngegiya eliphezulu ngonyaka odlule, lapho wahanjelwa yizinkumbi zabantu zisuka ezindaweni ezahlukene kuleli ziyojabula naleli qhawe. Emcimbini walo nyaka, uKhuzani uthe ufuna ukuqhubeka nokuhlanganisa isizwe sikamaskandi, ngokwenza umcimbi walolu hlobo nozakwabo abashisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku, ngezingoma zabo. "Abanye ozakwethu sengibamemezele abazoba yingxenye yomcimbi, abantu abakhombise ukubathakasela kakhulu. Ngifuna umkhakha kamaskandi ubumbane ube yinto eyodwa usebenzisa umculo wawo. Konke lokhu sizokwenza ngokuthi sibambane uma senza imicimbi efana nalena. Liyajabulisa isasasa elikhonjiswa ngisho abeza kuwo njengoba bethenga amathikithi ubuthaphuthaphu, okuyinto ebakhuthazayo," kusho uKhuzani. Uthe abanye abaculi ababaqashayo babathatha ngento abayenzayo kulo mculo njengoba bewuphethe ngesizotha, abanye bazibhalela wona futhi bawucula ngezindlela ezithinta izinhliziyo zabantu abahlukene. "Kukhona abaculi abathi uma bengena esteji bavuse injabulo, amandla nomoya wesintu kubantu abasuke besemcimbini ngomculo wabo. Abanye izingoma zabo zinomsindo ohlukile nomdlandla esteji, okuyinto leyo ejabulisa abantu abasuke bebukele. Abanye baneminyaka embalwa kule ndima kodwa amandla abanawo manje, izingoma zabo zithinta inhliziyo okuyinto esiyifunela abalandeli bethu leyo uma sihlela imicimbi yalolu hlobo," kusho uKhuzani. Kubaculi aseveze ukuthi bazoba khona okwamanje kubalwa insizwa yaseNquthu, uJaiva Zimnike, Gatsheni, Njoko, Menzi, Limit Nala, Mzukulu, Shenge waseHlalankosi, Mlabalaba, Mafikizolo, Nkeshemba, Feza. Namhlanje uKhuzani uveze ukuthi uzokhipha uhlu oluphelele lwabaculi nabaphathi bohlelo abazobe bekhona. Umsakazi woKhozi FM uZimdollar, osanda kumemezela ukuthi usebeka amakhokho ethala ekuphatheni imicimbi kamaskandi, kulindeleke ukuthi avalelise kuwona lo mcimbi okokugcina enza lo msebenzi. Amathikithi alo mcimbi ayatholakala eWebticket ngo-R200, R250 no-R300.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMOSHE Ndiki izolo oqale ukwethula uhlelo oluthi, Suxoka kuMzansi Magic UBONGA uNkulunkulu ngokuqhubeka emvulela amathuba emkhakheni wokwethula izinhlelo uMoshe Ndiki, emuva kokuba isiteshi iMzansi Magic, simemezele ukubuya kohlelo oluthi Suxoka, ngo-7 ebusuku. Lolu hlelo isizini yalo yesine eze nezinguquko, ibiyethulwa uMotlatsi Mafatshe kuphela kodwa kule sizini kuzoba nabethuli ababili. UMoshe kumanje ungumethuli wohlelo olusha oluthi Mgidi Moms, olungena ngeSonto ngo-6 ntambama, nalo lusanda kuqala kulesi siteshi. Le nsizwa yase-Eastern Cape, iveze ukuthi iyakholelwa ekutheni abantu kumele bangamdeli uNkulunkulu njengoba nayo ikholelwa ekutheni konke okuhle okwenzeka empilweni yayo, kungexa Yakhe. "Angazi nokuthi ngithini ngokuthola ithuba elifana naleli futhi ngisanda kubonakala kolunye uhlelo. Kusho lukhulu kimi ukuba yingxenye yalolu hlelo njengoba sizophenya amahlazo abantu abawenzayo becabanga ukuthi akukho okuzohlala obala ngelinye ilanga. Ngakho olunye uhlelo lolu oluzosiza abantu bakuleli ezinkingeni abafuna ukuxazululelwa zona, engicabanga ukuthi abantu bazoluthakasela kakhulu," kusho uMoshe. Uthe okunye akubhekile wukusebenza kahle noMotlatsi, asemaze iminyaka eminingi kule ndima abakuyo, nabazobambisana ukuletha lokhu ababukeli abakulindele kubona. UMoshe echaza ngokuba sohlelweni olugqamisa isiko lakwaXhosa lokusoka, uveze ukuthi ukuba nalolu hlelo, kugcizelela ukuthi izinhlelo ezigxile emasikweni kumele zisukunyelwe zenziwe, ukuze amasiko angafi. "Luvele lwangikhumbuza kwamina ohambweni lwami ngesikhathi ngenzelwa leli siko, ngakho ukulwethula kimi kusho lukhulu ngoba yisiko lethu okungamele sililahle, ukuveza isintu ngale ndlela iyonanto okumele siyikhuthalele. Ngizizwa ngithobeka nami ngiwuyise wabafana ababili ngelinye ilanga okumele ngibenzele lolu siko ngakho wuhlelo lolu olusenhliziyweni yami kakhulu," kuchaza yena.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Omunye wabaculi baphesheya kwezilwandle uJill Scott, oke wabonakala kuleli enandisa emcimbini iDStv Delicious festival ABAPHATHI abasha benkampani yakwaMultichoice, iCanal + bayaqhubeka nokwenza izinguquko kule nkampani njengoba sekuvela izindaba zokuthi sebeqedile ngesivumelwano sokuba yingxenye yomcimbi omkhulu iDStv Delicious Festival. Kuvele ukuthi bathe umcimbi awubasizi ngalutho. Lo mcimbi obudonsa amehlo abaningi kuleli nase-Afrika yonkana, udonsa izinsuku ezimbili futhi kusuke kuboshelwe abaculi bakuleli, abase-Afrika nabaphesheya kwezilwandle. Umthombo weSolezwe ongaphakathi, uziqinisekisile lezi zindaba ezisabalale ngempelasonto wathi ziningi izinguquko ezizozwakala njengoba iCanal+ ihlela ukunciphisa izindleko zemali ephumayo kule nkampani. "Okwamanje iCanal+, ekufunayo wukuthi amakhasimende ayo abukele izinhlelo ngezindleko eziphansi ukuze akwazi ukuthenga ama-decoder futhi aqhubeke nokujabulela izinhlelo ezehlukene zethelevishini. Bafuna kubuye amakhasimende amadala azokwazi ukukhokhela ukubuka izinhlelo, kunokuthi balahlekelwe akhona manje abambe le nkampani ukuthi ingawi bhu phansi," kusho umthombo weSolezwe. Bathe bakhethe ukungabi yingxenye yabaxhasa lo mcimbi ngenxa yokuthi udla izindodla zemali. "Miningi imicimbi iDStv engeke isaba yingxenye yayo ngenxa yokuthi ivaliwe ekutheni ibe abaxhasi bayo. Imicimbi yezindondo ebijwayele ukuba khona yeMzansi Magic, neyesiteshi sesibhunu ikykNET, yonke kuthiwa izovalwa ngoba ayikho inzuzo eyingenisa esiteshini. Neminye ebiyenziwa yinkampani kuvezwa izinhlelo neminye emikhulu, nayo ivaliwe ngenxa yokuncishiswa kwezindleko," kuphetha umthombo. Kuthiwa iCanal+ lokhu ayikwenzi nje kuleli kuphela kodwa nakwamanye amazwe ase-Afrika babhekene nenkinga efanayo yokunciphisa izindleko bese bezama ukungenisa inzuzo. Kwenzeka lokhu nje basanda kuvala isiteshi iShowmax, ebesibukwa ngokukhokhelwa, naso abakhale ngokuthi sidla imali eningi njengoba kuqashwe izikhulu nabasebenzi abakhokhelwa imali eshisiwe kodwa naso ayikho imali esiyingenisayo. Elinye lamaphephandaba angempelasonto, liveze ukuthi iCanal+ ihlela ukuthi ngo-2030 ibe isibuyise imali engu €400 million (R7.5 billion), ngokunciphisa ukuxhasa imicimbi ehlukene edla imali eshisiwe.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: SEBENGABASHADENE osaziwayo bakuleli uKhuli Chana noLamiez Holworthy, kule mpelsonto ababophe elikasofasilahlane BAVEZE ukuthi isiqalo sabo esisha sothando ukuzibophezela emshadweni, osaziwayo bakuleli uKhuli Chana noLamiez Holworthy, okusabalale izithombe zabo njengoba beziwushaya. Laba abaneminyaka bethandana, umshado wabo udonse izinsuku ezintathu njengoba kuvele ukuthi uqale ngoLwesihlanu, eNorth West. ULamiez uveze ukuthi akuthanda kakhulu ngomyeni wakhe ukuthi uthanda izingane zakhe. Uthe ehlangana naye, wayenendodakazi eneminyaka emihlanu, afike wayithanda njengeyakhe. "Bengihlala ngiyintombazane egxile emthandazweni kakhulu, kuningi ebengikuthandazela ngibeke isikhathi sokuthi kwenzeke, ngempela kwenzeke ngendlela ebengifisa ngayo. Umyeni wami ungikhombise uthando ngendlela ebengingayilindele. Ngangithi ungumuntu nje wesilisa ozodlala ngami kodwa izinto azenzile siqala ukuthandana, zibe zinkulu kakhulu. Ungikhombisile uthando," kusho uLamiez. Uveze ukuthi kuningi angabe uyakusho ngomyeni wakhe okuhle amenzele khona kodwa ngokugcina enze isethembiso somshado ayemthembise, sona uyohlala emthanda, emhlonipha. UKhuli Chana, ogama lakhe langempela uKhulane Morule, uthe yisiqalo sempilo yabo lesi kwezothando. Uthe uyamhlonipha kakhulu umkakhe ngendlela ayiyona njengoba ebemeseka kukuhle kukubi. Laba umshado wabo omhlophe ube yimfihlo ngoLwesihlanu, kanti ubuhanjelwe osaziwayo, abangani nezihlobo. Usongwe izolo. UKhuli noLamiez baqala ukuthandana ngo-2018, futhi bahlala kafushane ngaphambi kokuba uKhuli akhokhe ilobolo ngoNovemba 2, 2019. Kuthiwa izinhlelo zomshado zenziwe esithe ukuze uzoba sezingeni eliphezulu. Kumenywe kuphela nabangani abasondelene nabo, umndeni nedlanzana lo saziwayo. Le mikhosi kuthiwa ayilona neze ihaba kodwa kuhlelwe umshado wesintu owenziwe ngesimanje obuwubukhazikhazi. ULamiez noKhuli sekunesikhathi eside beyizithandani ezithandwa kakhulu eMzansi, ezaziwa ngokusebenza kwazo ngokuzinikela nokubonisa uthando emphakathini.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UKING David Muvhengo ongomunye wabadidiyeli bomdlalo Uzalo, useveze ukuthi uthando olulokhu lukhonjiswe ababukeli balo mdlalo, abaqala kudala ukuwulandela, yilona olubagqugquzela ukuthi benze umsebenzi oncomekayo. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi lo mdlalo umemezela abalingisi abasha, abazoba yingxenye yawo kusuka kule nyanga. Kubalingisi abakhona kubalwa asebezakhele igama ekulingiseni okukhona kubo uThulani Mtsweni ozolingisa indawo kaPondo, Nduduzo Zuma (Smiso), Phindile Mashabane (LaDlamini) noSikhosiphi Ngcobo (Bab’Sizwe). UMukwevho uthe laba balingisi bazofike bangene khaxa kuzona zonke izindaba ezenzeka KwaMashu, kule sizini yesibili esanda kuqala. "Bazofika benze lo mdlalo uye phambili, ezintweni ezenzekayo kuwona manje. Kule sizini esanda kuqala ababukeli bangalindela izinto ezizobashiya bebambe ongezansi kodwa ezizokwenza ukuthi abantu abaningi baqhubeke nokuwujabulela  futhi bahlale beseduzane nawo," kusho uMukwevho. Uthe bayaqhubeka nokumema bonke abalandeli bawo abasuka kude nawo, ukuthi baqhubeke nokuwuthakasela njengoba kuyibona abababeke lapho bekhona. "Siyathembisa ukuthi ngeke size sibaphoxe, uthando, uxhaso ababukeli abasikhombise lona lwenza siqhubeke nokwenza lo mdlalo njengoba manje sikwisizini ka-12, esizibophezele ukuthi siqhubeke silethe lokhu abakufunayo, nokuzobajabulisa," kusho yena. U-Ofentse Thinane, obhekelele izinhlelo zakuleli kwiSABC, uthe babemukela ngemfudumalo abalingisi abasha kulo mdlalo, wathi abakubhekile abazokuletha ezindaweni abazilingisayo nobudlelwane abazoba nabo nozakwabo. UNduduzo Zuma, uqale ukubonakala kulo mdlalo ngenyanga edlule, uPhindile Mashabane yena uqale ukubonakala ngoLwesithathu, uSikhosiphi Ngcobo uzoqala ukubonakala namhlanje kuthi uThulani Mtsweni aqale ukubonakala ngo-Ephreli 24.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: U-BLONDIE Makhene, ozogqamisa impilo yakhe neyomndeni ohlelweni oluzoqala ngeSonto kuMzansi Magic oluthi, The Makhene's INKAKHA endimeni yomculo neyazakhela igama ngeminyaka yama80s, uBlondie Makhene, isinxuse abantu bakuleli ukuthi abazokubona ohlelweni olugqamisa impilo yomndeni wakhe, uyakholelwa ukuthi abaningi badlulile kukho futhi abanye kukhona abazokufunda. Uhlelo i-The Makhene's luzoqala ukukhonjiswa ngeSonto, kuMzansi Magic ngo-7 ebusuku. Uthe ukubona abantu beshutha futhi konke kwenzeka phambi kwamehlo akhe ukuhlanganisa lolu hlelo, kumenze wangakholwa kusaqalwa kodwa manje ujabule ngoba lolu hlelo seluya kwithelevishini. "Kuyajabulisa ukubona konke sekugoqiwe, ekuqaleni bengingakholwa ukuthi sizofika lana sikhona manje. Ngisuka kude ezikhathini ezimnandi nezinzima kule ndima umuntu akuyona ngakho abantu bazobona ukuthi njengoba bese ngingabonakali nje bekwenzakali empilweni yami. Ukuba kulolu hlelo ngiyabona ngenye yezindlela zokubhekana nokhwantalala umuntu analo empilweni." Uthe: "Ngeke ngiqambe amanga, kube umzuzu ojabulisayo ukuqopha lolu hlelo, ukubona umndeni uhlangene kusho lukhulu kimi, njengoba konke sikwenze sizwana yize kukhona izinto okumele sizilungise sonke." Yize ethe yena ubedumile kodwa abantu bazobona ukuthi nabo njengabantu abasemehlweni omphakathi, kuzobonakala ukuthi bake babhekane nezinkinga ezinkulu futhi bazama ukuthola izixazululo zazo. "Ngikulindele ukugxekwa ngezinye izinto ezizovela kodwa engikwaziyo ukuthi kumele ukwamukela ukugxekwa okuyinto engayenza kudala empilweni. Ngazibekela umgomo wokuthi abantu kodwa akumele bangene bathi shi ezindabeni zami nomndeni wami, sonke siyawenza amaphutha. Ngisho ngibuka lana ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kugxekwa amalungu omndeni wami, ngibuka ngeso lokuthi akumele kube yinto abantu abasizakala ngayo, izinkundla zokuxhumana zilibulele izwe, kugcwele amabhoklolo akanise kuzona azenza ezawo. Lokhu kwenza ubuhlungu kubantu  esikhundleni sokuthi sibambane, siduduzane la kudingeka khona kodwa siyagxekana," kusho yena Kodwa nje akugcizelelayo ukuthi abantu balubuke uhlelo ngoba kukhona abangakufunda kulo, nasezintweni abadlule kuzo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Umculi kamaskandi uNtencane osebonge abalandeli ngokwenza kahle kwe-albhamu yakhe ethi, Awuyiphumuze enamacwecwe ajatshulelwe abantu abahlukene USEBONGE bonke abalandeli bakamaskandi ngokuqhubeka bagqamise umculo kamaskandi, uSenzo "Ntencane" Zondi, okhiphe amangwevu kwi-albhamu yakhe entsha, ayikhiphe ngenyanga edlule ethi, Awuyiphumuze. Emacwecweni akule albhamu kukhona elithi Ukhethe Mina nelithi Engalobolile, angamanye adla lubi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Ekuqaleni kwaleli sonto uNtencane uveze ukuthi ingoma ethi Ukhethe Mina, isifinyelele ku-5 million wabantu abayidlalayo. Uthe lokhu akusho nje ukuthi ukhiphe i-albhamu eshisa izikhotha, kodwa kuyaveza ukuthi umculo kamaskandi wenza kahle kulezi zinsuku. "Njengamanje ngihlele ukuthi ngenze imicimbi lapho ngizohambela khona izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme ngiyojabulisa izitshudeni ngomculo wami. Ngizobe ngizibonga ngezingenzela kona ngomculo. Okuvelayo muva nje wukuthi izitshudeni yizona ezilalela kakhulu umculo kamaskandi njengoba usungenisile nakuzo. Lokhu kwenze ukuthi umuntu afinyelele kulezi zibalo akuzo manje," kusho uNtencane. Kule albhamu uthe akwenzile okuhlukile wukuthi abheke ukuthi abalandeli bakhe bafunani ezingomeni zakhe bese eyakusebenzisa. "Angiyishintshanga indlela engicula ngayo, kodwa ngibheke emuva lokho abalandeli bami ababethe angikwenze ezingomeni zami, ngempela ngikwenzile lokho njengoba kukhona ushuni omusha engiqhamuke nawo wesimanje. Ngibheke uthando okuyinto wonke umuntu ayithandayo nesikholelwayo kuyona sonke, ngacula ngalo, yingakho lezi zingoma ezimbili kubonakala sengathi yizona ezidlisa kakhulu kule albhamu," kusho yena. Uthe le albhamu bekumele iphume ngoDisemba, kodwa wabona ukuthi akahlehlise ukuyikhipha, okuyinto angazisoli ngayo. NgoDisemba uthe basuke bebaningi abaculi abakhipha izingoma, kodwa naye isikhathi akhiphe ngaso kuye kube ngesikahle. Ubonge abantu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ikakhulukazi iTikTok, athe kubo bengabaculi ifike yenza omkhulu umehluko ngokwenza izingoma zabo zifinyelele kubantu balula.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Umsakazi omusha woKhozi FM uMsizi Maphumulo Ntaka osexolisile ngokungezwakali okokuqala ohlelweni obekumele alusakaze kusuka entathakusa ngoMsombuluko USEVEZE ukuthi udidwe wusuku obekumele angene ngalo, abezitshela ukuthi uMsombuluko hhayi entathakusa ngeSonto, umsakazi omusha emsakazweni Ukhozi FM, uMsizi Maphumulo Ntaka (32). UMsizi kulo msakazo kumele asakaze uhlelo oluthi Dabulukusa, olungena ngo-12 kuya ku-3 entathakusa ngoMsombuluko. Uphinde angene ngoMgqibelo ekuseni, kusuka ngo-7 kuya ku-9 ekuseni noZama Mseleku, besakaza uhlelo Kuhle Kwethu. Ekhuluma neSolezwe lo msakazi othezwe wuKhozi FM emsakazweni iNanda FM, uveze ukuthi iphutha libe ngakuyena kodwa futhi usexolisile kubaphathi kanjalo nakuzakwabo uNkosinathi Mshengu, owagcina esesakaza amahora ayisithupha. "Ngibonga nje ukuthi lolu daba seludlulile, ngixolisile kakhulu kubaphathi kanjalo nakuzakwethu uMshengu ngokwenzekile. Mina bengingazitsheli ukuthi kumele ngingene ngeSonto kodwa bengithi ngizongena ngoMsombuluko ebusuku. Kube nokudideka nje lapho kuphela, kodwa udaba lwaxoxwa kwadlula," kusho yena. Uthe uvalo lumshaye lwameqa ezwa ukuthi bekumele angene nini njengoba yena ebenganake lutho, ebazi ukuthi konke kuhamba kahle. "Bengizihlalele nje ekhaya nomama nogogo, ngingazitsheli ukuthi kumele ngiye emsebenzini. Kodwa manje ngimagange, ngilindele ukuhlangana nabalaleli engixolisa kakhulu nakubo ukuthi abangizwanga. Abanye baze bakuveza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi bebengilinde ngabomvu. Kodwa mhla sengiqala ukuzwakala emoyeni, ngiyofika ngixolise ngokwenzekile, nakuye uzakwethu ngisazophinde ngixolise kanjalo nakubaphathi," kuchaza yena. UMsizi uthe waqala ukusakaza esaseDurban University of Technology (DUT), lapho ayenza khona iziqu zakhe zePublic Relations. Ngemuva kwalokho uthe wabe esethola ithuba emsakazweni iDurban Youth Radio (DYR), kwathi muva nje waba yingxenye yomsakazo iNanda FM. Ukuba semsakazweni uKhozi FM, uveze ukuthi kufike engalindele njengoba ubengazi ukuthi kuzosheshe kufezeke iphupho lakhe lokuba kulo msakazo ngokushesha. "Bengizitshela ukuthi kusekude kimi ukuthi ngibe yingxenye yalo msakazo, kodwa konke kusheshe kwenzeka ngingalindele. Ngesikhathi besibiza ngamaholidi kaKhisimusi, ngangithi yinto ezokwenzeka idlule, nakho ukuzozwakala lezo zonsuku oKhozini kwaba yinto enkulu kakhulu. Ngakho sibonga ithuba elisibeke la umuntu ekhona manje," kuchaza yena. Uveze ukuthi abasakazi abafana nozakwabo uTshatha noDJ Sbu, yibona abantu akade ebukela kubo kakhulu emsakazweni.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI ocula owokholo u-Andile KaMajola obengomunye wamaciko ahlonishwe ngezindondo emcimbini Uvukile Gospel Music Festival obungeSonto, osekusuke ukukhuluma ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngokuhleleka kwawo UMHLELI womcimbi Uvukile Gospel Music Festival, uPastor Mjosty useveze ukuthi konke  akwenzile emcimbini obungeSonto, enkundleni yezemidlalo i-Sports and Leisure, ePort Shepstone ukwenze ngephakethe lakhe, okwenze ezinye izinto zangaba sezingeni ebelilindelekile. UMjosty ukhulume kanje kulandela ukuthi abanye abantu abebehambele umcimbi, bebhale ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi isteji nezindawo zokuhlala bekungekho ezingeni elijwayelekile lalo mcimbi. Ekhuluma neSolezwe uMjosty, uthe akazi nokuthi kumele abe nomuzwa onjani njengoba abantu sebemgxeka ngemizamo ayenzile. "Ngimemezele zisuka nje ngalo mcimbi ukuthi uxhaso asilutholanga ngakho konke besikwenza kusuka ephaketheni lethu. Abaculi, abantu abasinike isteji kanye namatende, onogada konke besikunikelelwe abantu esisebudlelwaneni obuhle kakhulu nabo, imali besingenayo. Yingakho izinto bezingekho esimeni esijwayelekile futhi ngalokho sithanda ukuxolisa kakhulu," kusho uMjosty. Uthe ukubonile ukuphawula kwabantu futhi ucela behlise umoya njengoba benza konke ukuthi umcimbi uqhubeke ube khona yize babebhekene nobunzima njengabahleli. "Mina ngithanda ukubonga kubona bonke abantu nabaculi ngokuzinikela ekutheni beze kulo mcimbi, siyathembisa ukuthi ngokuzayo konke kuzoba ngcono kunalokhu okuyikhona manje. Umoya wami wonakele kakhulu ngengikuzwayo futhi njengoba konke bekubheke mina, akukho ebengingakwenza ngedwa. Engingakusho nje wukuthi ngiphatheke kabi, kodwa okunye bekumele kuxoxwe njengoba kulo mkhakha sisebenzisana," kuchaza uMjosty. Emcimbini walo nyaka kuqopheke umlando kuhlonishwa abaculi bowokholo abahlukene ngezindondo abahleli bomcimbi abazimemezela ngonyaka odlule. UThobekile, Andile KaMajola iqembu i-Avante nabanye bahlonishwe ngezindondo kulo mcimbi ngomsebenzi wabo emculweni wokholo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Abalimi bakamoba nabasebenzi abebefuna izincazelo izolo ngekusasa labo kanjalo nelemisebenzi yabanye babasebenzi njengoba bethi kunzima ukusebenza muva nje nemiholo yabo seyehlile ngenxa yokungathengwa komoba wabo ABALIMI bakamoba sebephumele obala bathi bafuna ukwazi ngekusasa labo enkampanini kashukela, iTongaat Hullets. Lokhu bakusho izolo njengoba bebenesiteleka ngaphandle kwamasango ale nkampani, nabanye babasebenzi abaqashwe abasebenza ezimobeni. Bathe manje sesifikile isikhathi sokuthi batshelwe ngekusasa labo njengoba konke kumile, kungekho inqubekela phambili ngokuthengwa kwemikhiqizo yabo, okwenza bangakhiphi isivuno sikamoba, futhi kungangeni mali nabasebenzi bangaholi. Omunye wabatshali bakamoba uMnuz Derrick Mkhize, othe uqashe abantu abangu-70 enkampanini yakhe, uthe okubuhlungu wukuthi selokhu kwavela izindaba zokuthi inkampani kashukela kungenzeka ivalwe, abasebenzi bakhe sekuyizinyanga ezimbili bengatholi amaholo aphelele njengoba ingekho imali engenayo. “Lesi simo asithinti thina kuphela singabalimi bakamoba, kodwa miningi imindeni ethintekayo ngaso njengoba ithembele kithina kodwa nathi lokhu okwenzekayo sekungaphezu kwamandla ethu. Abasebenzi asazi ngempela ukuthi yini esizobatshela yona ngalesi simo ngoba nathi akukho okubambekayo esikuzwayo. South Africa. Member of Parliament Letsike Mmapaseka Steve Emily Credit:PARLIAME IPHINI likaNgqongqoshe wabeSifazane nabantu abaPhila nokuKhubazeka uMmapaseka Steve Letsike, osephumele obala wathi kumele bakulwele ukuthi ingavalwa inkampani kashukela, iTongaat Hullets njengoba iqashe abesifazane netsha eningi Uthe “Uma inkampani ivala, konke esikusebenzele kanzima kuzofa kuphele nya, ngoba iTongaat Hullets iyithemba lethu. Siyacela ukuthi kube bahlangane nathi ukuze kuxoxwe ngento eya phambili, kuvikelele nokuthi isimo somnotho singabi sibi kakhulu kunalokhu esiyikho manje." Amalungu omphakathi abekhona kule mashi anxuse uhulumeni, abaholi emphakathini nasezinkampanini ezehlukene ezithintekauyo ukuthi bangenelele ukuze kuvikeleke imisebenzi yabo. IPhini likaNgqongqoshe waBesifazane nabantu abaPhila nokuKhubazeka uMmapaseka Steve Letsike, uphawulile ngalolu daba emsakazweni Igagasi FM, lapho eveze  khona ukuthi uhulumeni lumkhathaze kakhulu lolu daba njengoba inkampani yakwaHullets inkulu. Uthe osomabhizinisi ikakhulukazi abancane yibona abebehlomula kakhulu kule nkampani, wathi kumele bakulwele ukuthi ingavalwa, iqhubeke nokuvula amathuba omsebenzi. "Asikwazi ukuthi kube khona imisebenzi ephelayo kuleli, kukhona abantu besifazane abaningi abasebenza kule nkampani kanjalo nentsha. UMnyango obhekelele imisebenzi uphezu kwalo lolu daba, yingakho nathi siyilo Mnyango singeke sithule." Inkampani kashukela ayiphawulanga.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: USWAZI Simelane oseveze ukuthi uphelile umshado wakhe noVJ Xaba  njengoba bebebonakala ohlelweni, i-Being A Xaba kuMzansi Magic njalo ngeSonto BAMNCOMILE ngesinqumo sokuqeda ngomshado wakhe noJabulani Xaba, odume ngelikaVJ,  uSwazi Simelane, obengomunye wabebevela ohlelweni i-Being A Xaba, obelukhonjiswa njalo ngeSonto ngo-7 ebusuku, kuMzansi Magic. Kulolu hlelo olufinyelele emaphethelweni ngeSonto, unkosikazi kaVJ, uSwazi, ubhale enkundleni iTikTok ukuthi ukuba kulolu hlelo kube uhambo alujabulele, futhi wabonga ababukeli balo ngokubamukela emindenini yabo. "Siyabonga kakhulu bantu bakithi ngokusibukela, kube uhambo obelwehla lwenyukela kodwa siyabonga mina nezingane zami," kubhala uSwazi. Omunye wabalandeli bakhe, ube esemncoma ngokwenzeke esiqeshini sokugcina lapho abekhuluma khona nomyeni ethi akalalele izingane zakhe uma zikhuluma naye. Kodwa kuleyo nkulumo uSwazi uveze izindaba ezishaqisayo zokuthi useshiyile ekubeni umakoti kulo mndeni. "Ngiyabonga kakhulu sithandwa sami, angiseyona ingxenye yaKwaXaba uhambo lwami noNonkosi selufike ekugcineni," kusho uSwazi. Abanye bamncomile uSwazi besho ukuthi ngesinqumo asithathile uzibeke yena phambili. ULondiwe Shangase uthe:"Kodwa ngabe ngingumuntu omubi ngokungamjabuleli ngesinqumo asithathile". UBucie uthe:"Ayikho into enhle njengokubona umuntu wesifazane ezikhetha yena, zikhethe wena njalo sisi siyakuthanda kukukhanyele mama". UNozipho Zeeh uthe:"Sisi ufikile, sakubona kodwa le ibingengangawe. Ngiyajabula ukubona ukuthi uzikhethe wena, ufanelwe okungcono wena nezingane zakho, nazo zidinga umama onothando nonokuthula ngoba ngeke Sisi yoooooh". Ababukeli balolu hlelo bake baveza seluphakathi, ukuthi iyadumaza indlela uXaba anesandla esiqinile ngayo ezinganeni, nakuye umkakhe ngezinye izikhathi. Baveza imizwa yokuthi akabalaleli abanye abantu, ufuna kuzwiwe ngaye. Ngenxa yesasasa yalolu hlelo iziqephu zalo kwakumele ziphele uma sekukhonjiswe ezingu-13 kuphela kodwa zanyuswa ngenxa yokuthandwa kohlelo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UDJ Lamiez Holworthy uzobe ekwabazonandisa emcimbini iMetro FM Music Festival ezoba seThekwini kule nyanga KULINDELEKE ukuthi udonse amehlo abaningi kuleli, umcimbi wamaMetro FM Awards, njengoba abalesi siteshi ngokuhlanganyela nenkampani i-Executive Concerts, sebememezele ukuthi uzobe uhambisana neFestival yomculo. Le micimbi izoba seThekwini ngo-Ephreli 25. Umcimbi wezindondo uzoba seNkosi Albert Luthuli International Convention Centre, kuthi i-festival ibe sePeople's Park khona eThekwini. Abahleli bomcimbi bathe bafuna ukulethela abantu ubumnandi njengoba umcimbi wezindondo uzobe ubukwa bukhoma kobhazabhaza bama-TV, ePeople's Park. UVictor Dlokolo osethimbeni lokukhangisa lalo mcimbi uveze ukuthi, baqhamuke naleli qhinga ukuze bajabulise abantu ngezindlela ezehlukene ngoba akuwona wonke umuntu othanda umcimbi wezindondo. UMAFIKIZOLO wemgoma ethi Uyoncengwa Unyoko naye ozoba yingxenye yalo mcimbi "Le micimbi yomibili izoba ngosuku olulodwa, lokho sifuna ukukugcizelela, ukuze abantu bangabi nokudideka. Abangathandi ukuya kowezindondo sithe asibenzele i-festival ukuze bajabule nathi. Sibophele abaculi abasezingeni eliphezulu abazobagcina bejabule umcimbi wonke," kuchaza uVictor. Uthe bonke abazohambela le micimbi bazobhema bakholwe njengoba kuzobe kubungazwa umculo wazo zonke izinhlobo. "Kulezi zinsuku abantu ngeke uze ubathinte uma kuza emculweni wePiano, Maskandi, Hip hop neGqom. Sibophele abaculi abahlukene ukuze sijabule nabantu. Abazohambela i-festival bazojabulela ukubona abaculi okukhona kubo uYoung Stunna, Babalwa M, DJ Tira, Lamiez Holworthy, Lerato Kganyago, Khuzani, Big Nuz, Dlala Thukzin nabanye," kusho yena. Uthe uhlelo lomcimbi luzobe luphethwe uSomizi, Tbo Touch noSizwe Dhlomo. I-festival uthe izoqala ngo-2 ntambama kuze kube phakathi kwamabili. Amathikithi alo mcimbi uthe ayatholakala eWebtickets, ePick n Pay naseBoxer ngoR300 noR750 iVIP. Kwenzeka lokhu nje abaculi bamatasa bakhuthaza abalandeli babo ukuthi babavotele eminxeni ehlukene abaqokwe kuyo ukuze bamuke nezindondo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ABALINGISI bomdlalo omusha othi The Phoenix oqale ukukhonjiswa kwi-e.tv izolo KUBUYA izinkakha zabalingisi asebenesikhathi bengabonakali ekulingiseni, njengoba izolo isiteshi i-e.tv, sethule umdlalo othi The Pheonix, okwezongena esikhaleni semidala okulindeleke ukuthi iphele maduzane Umdlalo iScandal! obusukhonjiswe iminyaka engu-20, nomdlalo iHouse of Zwide izogcina ukubonakala kulesi siteshi ngoJuni kanti kulindeleke ukuthi kuqhubeke ukwethulwa kweminye imidlalo. Lo mdlalo omusha uqale izolo ngo-7 ebusuku kulesi siteshi. Intokazi egcine ukubonakala ilingisa emdlalweni iThe River, kuMzansi Magic, uTango Ncetezo, izobe ilingisa indawo ephambili kuwo. Ekhuluma ngawo uTango, uthe ukhuluma ngowesifazane ogama lakhe uKholeka, ogxile ebhizinisini njengoba nozakwabo benamapulazi adayisa insangu. "Umdlalo okhuluma ngowesifazane osemncane ongena shi kuleli bhizinisi ngemuva kokuthi kudutshulwe umyeni wakhe obesatshwa futhi kulo mkhakha. Uba umsolwa kwabaningi ukuthi uyena obulale umyeni wakhe, ushiya konke njengoba ebehlala ekhaya engenzi lutho, kodwa uyasukuma uyalwa njengoba efuna ukugeza igama lakhe futhi efuna ukuqhubeka nokumisa ibhizinisi lomyeni wakhe," kusho uTango. Uthe abantu abaningi bafuna ukumbona engaphumeleli uKholeka, kodwa oyedwa wabangani bomyeni wakhe uyameseka ukuze aphumelele kukho konke akwenzayo. "Umdlalo lona nami ongifundise okuningi njengoba ngibonile ukuthi abanye abantu besifazane babhekana nobunzima obunjani uma kudlule abayeni babo, ikakhulukazi uma bengosomabhizinisi." Uthe:"Abantu basemzini nabo banokwabo, osomabhizinisi ahlanganyele nabo emsebenzini, bonke babheke ukuthi bangakuthatha kanjani konke akusebenzele, kodwa uKholeka yize ebhekene nalesi simo, ugcina ebonile ukuthi akasukume alwe, njengoba kufika nezingane akade engazazi okuthiwa ezomyeni wakhe. Izingane zisuke zifuna amafa. Baningi abazofunda ngalo mdlalo." Kulo mdlalo abanye abalingisi abazobonakala uDumisani Mbebe, Zikhona Bali, Lulama “AJ” Nyembezi, Yonda Thomas, Tyson Mathonsi noBrenda Ngxoli. Ngeledlule lesi siteshi simemezele umdlalo omusha othi Emzini: A Family Legacy ozoqala ngo-Ephreli 13 ngo-9 ebusuku, kuwo kulingisa phambili uWiseman Mncube.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: USIPHO Mbatha odume ngelikaSgqemeza oseveze olunye uhlangothi ngokuhamba kwakhe emsakazweni Ukhozi FM USIPHO Mbatha obenza uhlelo lwasekuseni phakathi nezinsuku emsakazweni Ukhozi FM, useveze ukuthi inkontileka yakhe ayivuselelwanga kulo nyaka, hhayi ukuthi uzicelele ukushiya. USgqemeza ukusho lokhu esitatimendeni asikhiphe ngoLwesibili emini, ngemuva kokwenza uhlelo lwakhe lokugcina kulo msakazo. Uthe kummangazile ukubona kwabezindaba ukuthi ubefuna ukushintsha uhlelo alwenzayo ngenxa yomsebenzi wobufundisi. Kodwa uthe abaphathi abayingenanga eyokuvuselela inkontileka yakhe. "Ngize ngaxhumana nezikhulu eziphezulu ngendlela udaba lwenkontileka yami olusingathwe  ngayo. Okungimangazayo ukubona kwabezindaba kuthiwa ngizicelele ukuhamba okungalona iqiniso. Ngingasho nje ukuthi ukungavuselelwa kwenkontileka yami, kukhona okungahambanga kahle kukhona njengoba kwenzeka izinto engingaziqondi. Okwaholela ekutheni kuthathwe lesi sinqumo ikhona engikhala ngakho, yingakho ngaze ngatshela abaphathi e-SABC ngakho. Ngiyasihlonipha isinqumo abasithatha kodwa indlela okuhanjiswe ngayo iyona engingajabule ngayo," kusho uSipho. Uthe akazimisele ukuveza ukuthi kwenzakaleni njengoba ewuhlonipha umsakazo Ukhozi kanjalo ne-SABC. "Kuyihlazo elikhulu abakwenzile ukuthi baze bafike kulesi sinqumo kodwa ke ngizokhetha ukuthula yingakho ngingakukhulumi. Ngakho kuthe sesikhuluma siya phambili ngomsebenzi, ngagcina nginikwa olunye uhlelo, okuthe mina nomndeni wami uma sicubungula ngalo, sagcina sithathe isinqumo sokuthi ngishiye phansi. Angiyekanga ngoba ngifuna ukugxila emsebenzini wobufundisi, lokhu akulona iqiniso njengoba kuvela sengathi mina ngizicelele ukuhamba ukuze ngiyobhekana nalo msebenzi. Ngiyohlala ngiyihlonipha i-SABC noKhozi kodwa inkinga yami inabanye ezikhulwini ezikhona ezingaluphathanga kahle udaba lokuhamba kwami," kuchaza yena. Ube esebonga wonke umuntu omesekile kulo mkhakha wezokusakaza wathi, usavulelekile ukuthatha wonke amathuba azoqhamuka okusebenza. Kulo msakazo uSipho akuchithwanga yena kuphela njengoba kuhambe nabanye ozakwabo okukhona kubo uZeal Dladla, Ayanda Msweli, Sphongo Dladla, uMfundisi Lungisani Simelane, King Sfiso nabo abakhiphe izitatimende bebonga abalaleli balesi siteshi ngokubeseka.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: USJAVA ozoba nohambo lokubungaza iminyaka ecula LUZOQAL  nA KwaZulu-Natal, la ezalwa khona umculi waseBergville, uSjava, uhambo lokuhlangana nabalandeli bakhe ukubungaza iminyaka eyishumi angena emculweni. USjava uzohlangana nabalandeli bakhe emadolobheni amane kuleli, ukubajabulisa ngomculo aphinde abonge uxhaso asebemkhombise lona kule minyaka ekhona kule ndima. Lolu hambo luzoqala eThekwini ngo-Ephreli 11, e-ICC, ludlulele eMiddleburg, eMpumalanga, ngoMeyi 1, luye eSun Bet Arena ePitoli, ngoJuni 15, bese luvalwa eCarnival City, eGauteng ngo-Okthoba 23. USjava uveze ngamafuphi ukuthi imicimbi lena esho lukhulu kuyena njengoba ibheka ibanga aselihambile emculweni. "Ngalolu hambo ngizobungaza umculo, izinkumbulo enginazo ngohambo lwami kulo mkhakha ezinhle nezimbi neminyaka emingaka ngisemculweni. Amathikithi asekhona, abantu abawathole kusemanje," kusho uSjava ekhuluma emsakazweni Ukhozi FM. USjava ukhipha lesi simemezelo nje, ubesanda kukhipha i-albhamu yakhe ethi, Inkanyezi Nezinkanyezi. Muva nje, miningi imicimbi ayenza ngenhloso yokuhlangana nabalandeli bakhe, okubonakala inesasasa njengoba ithakaselwa abaningi futhi abantu bephuma ngobuningi ukuyithamela. Umsakazo uKhozi FM, nawo umemezele izindaba zokuthi uzoba yingxenye yalo mcimbi, okuhlelwe ukulethela abalaleli babo konke okuzobe kwenzeka kuwona. NoMasipala weTheku uveze ukuthi lo mcimbi ungeminye yezodonsa amehlo ezivakashi njengoba kuyisikhathi sePhasika. UMnuz Cyril Xaba oyiMeya yeTheku, uthe ulindele izivakashi ezingaphezu kuka-1.2 million kula maholidi, okulindekele ukuthi zisebenzise u-R2.6 billion. Uthe balindele ukuthi kudaleke amathuba emisebenzi angu-16 000. "Izindawo zokulala silindele ukuthi zibe ku-62% ukugcwala." UXaba uthe ubumnandi buzobe bubuzwa eThekwini. "Abantu abazobe bevakashile bazobhema bakholwe njengoba kunemicimbi eyahlukene okubalwa kuyo i-One Man Concert, Doek On Fleak, Sjava 10th Year Celebration Tour kanye neminye. Imindeni ezobe ivakashile izokwazi futhi ukuzitika ngezinhlelo zokujabulisa izingane eShaka Marine Theme Park nasemapaki okubalwa kuwo iMitchell Park Zoo neDurban Botanic Gardens. Lezi zinhlelo zenzelwe ukuthi izingane zijabule ziphinde futhi zithole izinto ezizozivula imiqondo ngesikhathi samaholidi." kusho yena.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: IQEMBU elicula owokholo iNcandweni Christ Ambassadors elizonandisa ngehora lokukhumbula u-Irvin Sihlophe, emcimbini Uvukile Gospel Music Festival IQEMBU laseSwatini, iNcandweni Christ Ambassadors, lizohlonipha amagalelo ka-Irvin Sihlophe, ongasekho kodwa owayengomunye wabasunguli bomcimbi uVukile Gospel Festival, ozobanjelwa enkundleni yezemidlalo Ugu Sports and Leisure, ePort Shepstone, ngeSonto. Lokhu kuvezwe omunye wabahleli balo mcimbi uMjosty. Uthe konke sekumi ngomumo ngakubona ngalo mcimbi, abakulindele wukuthi kufike abazowuhambela njengoba kukhombisa ukuthi unesasasa. UPHINDIi P okubaculi abazonandisa "INcandweni kulo nyaka izonandisa ehoreni esilithatha njengeliyisipesheli, lokuqhubeka sihlonipha futhi sikhumbula uSihlophe njengomunye wabantu esasungula naye umcimbi, ngakho sithi nje abantu abafike bezojabula nathi. Konke sekumi ngomumo namathikithi asekhona," kusho uMjosty. Uveze ukuthi ngemuva kweminyaka engu-12 umcimbi bawuqala, bakhethe ukuthi ubuyele enkundleni owaqala kuyona. "Bese kuyiminyaka umcimbi siwubambela ngaphakathi ehholo elikhona kule ndawo kodwa manje  ngemuva kokuthi sihlale phansi sabonisana nethimba elihlela umcimbi, sibone ukuthi asibuyele lapho wethulwa khona. Abanye abantu bebekuveza ukuthi bawuthanda usenkundleni, ngakho sikhethe ukuthi siwubuyisele khona futhi simemezela lezi zindaba ngoba baningi abakhombise ukuzijabulela, baveza ukuthi bayakhululeka kahle uma bekhona." Uthe kwabanye abaculi abazonandisa kubalwa uButho Vuthela, Thobekile, Kholeka, Jumbo, Ntokozo Ngongoma, Fikile Mlomo, Andile KaMajola, Betusile, Phindi P nabanye. "Kuzoqopheka umlando kulo mcimbi njengoba iNcandweni izobe iqala ngqa ukuthi icule izingoma zayo ezintsha ebezingakaze zizwakale nezikhona kwi-albhamu yayo entsha," kuchaza yena. Okunye athe kuzokhulekelwa kulo nyaka, yisihlava sokubulawa kwabantu okwenzeka kulesi sifundazwe, kanjalo nokuphepha emgwaqweni. Amathikithi omcimbi ayatholakala eComputicket ngo-R150 kuya ku-R500. USiyanda Myeza odume ngelikaMakaTha, Swazy, Madongwe bazobe bekwabazophatha uhlelo.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: USTHANDWA Nzuza obuye kwezwakala emsakazweni Ukhozi FM njengoba manje esezosakaza uhlelo lwantambama phakathi nezinsuku noTshatha UMPHATHI wesiteshi emsakazweni Ukhozi FM, uLwazi Mthabela uveze ukuthi bahlose ukuthi bafinyelele kubalaleli abangu-10 million, ngabasakazi abasha ababethule izolo. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi bethula uhlu olusha lwabasakazi abazosakaza enyakeni omusha ka-2026 kuya ku-2027. Ekhuluma ngesikhathi bethula lezi zinguquko, uLwazi uthe basebenze kanzima ukwenza izinguquko kulo msakazo, abafuna ukuthi bafinyelele ezinombolweni ezinkulu ngabalaleli. "Bekungelula ukufika lapho sikhona namhlanje njengoba bekumele sixhumane nabantu abahlukene. Sibheke ukuthi lezi zinguquko zizosiza kakhulu isiteshi, ngisho emalini. Akulula ukwenza izinguquko, futhi akumnandi ukuthi kube khona abahambayo, kodwa siyathemba ukuthi abantu abazofika bazobajwayela abalaleli nalaba abahambile sizobakhumbula," kuchaza uLwazi. Uthe njengoba umsakazo ukulesi sigaba, bekumele bazenze izinguquko, ukuyisa isiteshi phambili. "Siyisiteshi esisakazela umphakathi, okubalulekile wukuthi kumele senze inzuzo, asisasakazi nje ngoba sinikeza umlaleli akudingayo, kodwa kumele kungene imali ukuze isiteshi sikhule. Siyabonga kubona bonke abantu esisebenze nabo kule minyaka nakulo nyaka ophelayo, ngeke size sibakhohlwe, namagalelo alaba abahambayo ngeke siwakhohlwe," kusho yena. Kulo msakazo phakathi nezinsuku ekuseni kusuka ngo-6 kuya ku-9 kuzozwakala uNonhlanhla Mroza Buthelezi, ozolubamba noVelani "Vee" Mthembu. UDudu Khoza uzozwakala ngo-9 kuya ku-12 ekuseni ,lapho ezosakaza khona uhlelo ngoMsombuluko kuya kuLwesine. Kuzothi ngoLwesihlanu kungene uThembeka Zondo-Cele. Emini uZimiphi Biyela uzosakaza noDJ Sphe Live, ophuma emsakazweni iGagasi FM. Ntambama uTshatha usezosakaza noSthandwa Nzuza. UVee Mthembu ekhuluma ngokuba yingxenye yalo msakazo, uthe kusekhaya oKhozini, njengoba kade ayefisa ukuba yigxenye yalo. "UMafresh, Mdonso njengoba bekhona la bayazi nje ukuthi ngempela kunini ngangifisa ukuba kulo msakazo. Ngiyabonga esiteshini engisuka kuso, njengoba singithathile sangifaka okwenze ukuthi abaphathi boKhozi bangibone, buka manje ngilana. Ngiyazethemba kakhulu ngomsebenzi engizowenza," kusho uVee. Kubasakazi abasha kulo msakazo kukhona uMsizi Maphumulo, Mhlali Khanyile, Lindokuhle Ntombela. Kwezemidlalo uSimtho Dladla, obesakaza ezemidlalo emsakazweni iGagasi FM, usezozwakala kulo msakazo. Kwezemigwaqo uClarissa Mfeka uzozwakala ohlelweni lwasekuseni kuthi uNokwanda Tema azwakale ohlelweni lwantambama ethula ezemigwaqo. ULwazi uthe bazovalelisa uMandla Mdletshe, ngomcimbi omkhulu ngamagalelo akhe kulo msakazo. UMandla usethi khumu kulo msakazo njengoba ethatha umhlalaphansi. Ohlelweni iSigiya ngeNgoma, kubuyele uVusizwe Langa noBingelela Mpanza. USipho Mbatha, Ayanda Msweli, Sphongo Dladla, Lucky Nkosi noKing Sfiso ababuyanga.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Sipho “DJ Sgqemeza” Mbatha BAMDUDUZE ngezindlela ezihlukene uSipho "Sgqemeza" Mbatha, abalandeli bakhe enkundleni yokuxhumana iFacebook, eveza izindaba zokugcina kwakhe emsakazweni Ukhozi FM. Iningi labantu liveze ukuthi uNkulunkulu ngeke aze amlahle njengoba evelelwe yilezi zindaba. Abanye bathe kukhona amanye amathuba azovuleka, njengoba eselahlekelwe yileli abenalo. UMbongeni Mthwane uthe "Awu madoda Mthiya baningi obakhile ngomsakazo". UNokulunga OkaDlodlo Mabuza:uthe "Okuhle kodwa Shandu uma uNkulunkulu evala umnyango uvula omunye, akayivali iminyango engezukuvula eminye". UNtokozo Page Mbatha:uthe "Eeesh Mthiya ncese wakithi, amagalelo akho siyawazi, bayimoshe ngokuxokiza nathi sazi ukuthi usuyogxila ekubeni umfundisi". UManie Paque uthe:"Siyabonga Mthiya okuhle kodwa kukhona amathuba asazovuleka, ngiyakholelwa ekutheni kukhona indawo ebalulekile ekumele". UThami Mthabela uthe:"Sgqemeza mfethu, ungalokhu uzichaza. Isosha elilimele lizikhotha amanxeba ekusithekeni, phola bese uvuka futhi usunamandla". Abanye abantu bakhale kakhulu ngokuhamba kuka-Ayanda Msweli, naye oveze ukuthi usezokwenza ezemigwaqo bukhona ekhasini lakhe kwiFacebook. Izolo ekuseni ngesikhathi enza lokhu izibalo ziveze ukuthi abantu bayameseka kulolu hambo lwakhe aseluqalile. UKing Sfiso ngoMsombuluko kuvele izindaba zokuthi ushiye isigubhukane njengoba ebenikwe usuku olulodwa lokusakaza. Lokhu kuthiwa akumjabulisanga wakhetha ukushiya ngokuphelele kulo msakazo. Isolezwe lihoshe ngomthombo walo ukuthi izinguquko ezithinta uKing Sfiso, zenzeke ngomzuzu wokugcina, okwenze abaphathi bashayana ngamakhanda.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UZeal Dladla oqale ukuzwakala emsakazweni iJozi FM ngemuva kokungavuselelwa kwenkontileka yakhe emsakazweni Ukhozi FM UQALE ukuzwakala izolo emsakazweni iJozi FM, umsakazi ochithwe Ukhozi FM, uZeal Dladla, ozosakaza uhlelo lwasekuseni phakathi nezinsuku. UZeal uzosakaza uhlelo iBig Breakfast Show engena ngo-6 kuya ku-9 ekuseni kanti uzoyisakaza ngokubambisana noPelePele Mchunu, Dkay Wa Batho noThemba TT Tshabalala. UZeal ube kubasakazi ezingavuselelwanga izinkontileka zabo oKhozini. Yena nozakwabo okukhona kubo uSipho Mbatha, Ayanda Msweli, Sphongo Dladla, King Sfiso, bashaywe ngesithende kulo msakazo. IJozi FM, imemezele ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi uZeal, useyingxenye yaso. "Sanibonani balaleli, sikhethe ukwenyusa izinga njengomndeni wethu, sicela namukele uZeal ohlelweni lwasekuseni iBig Breakfast, azozwakala kulo nozakwabo abebekhona uPelePele Mchunu, Dkay Wa Batho noThemba TT Tshabalala". kubhalwa kulesi siteshi. Abalaleli balo msakazo okucacile ukuthi bayawazi amagalelo akhe, bambongele ngokuba yingxenye yalo msakazo. UClement Thabang uthe:"Siyakubongela Zeal Dladla". UNhlakanipho Malinga uthe:"Ngiyanibingelela ohlelweni iBBT nasemsakazweni iJozi FM, kunguLwesithathu. Samukela noDJ Zeal, wamukelekile emhlabeni nasembusweni weJozi FM asibonge". Imizamo yokuthola uZeal ngokujoyina kwakhe lesi siteshi, ayiphumelelanga njengoba ucingo lwakhe belukhala lungabanjwa. Ngemuva kokuvela kwezindaba zokuthi uyashiya emsakazweni Ukhozi, uZeal wakhipha isitatimende ebonga abalandeli bakhe ngokumeseka kulo msakazo. Wakuveza ukuthi abalandeli bakhe basazombona kweminye imisakazo njengoba ezowamukela amathuba avelayo. Kulo msakazo insizwa ebisisebenze iminyaka emsakazweni womphakathi iNanda FM, uSiya Seme, ikwabaqale ukusakaza uhlelo lwantambama, iThe Afternoon Fix. Lolu hlelo  lushiywe nguVee Mthembu, osesakaza uhlelo lwasekuseni emsakazweni Ukhozi FM. Izolo iningi labasakazi liqalile ezinhlelweni ezintsha. UMroza noVee okwamanje kuhlale obala ukuthi basaqala ukusakaza uhlelo bobabili, njengoba bebenomsindo, kwasheshe kwabonakala ukuthi luselude uhambo abasazoluhamba kuze kube bayenza kahle into yabo. UVee kodwa ungumsakazi onekhono, nokwaziyo ukusakaza. Okuqaphelekile wukuthi uClarrisa, owenza ezemigwaqo, ugajwe wuvalo kubonakala ukuthi uthukile futhi ungumuntu ojwayele ukukhuluma isiNgisi kakhulu. UZimdollar noDJ Sphe Live, ubungathi kade bazana njengoba into yabo ivele yahamba kahle wena owabona isitimela siya eGoli, singaphazanyiswa lutho emzileni waso.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ABALINGISA izindawo eziphambili emdlalweni Isithembu sikaMsongelwa, okuwumdlalo okhuza ibuya ngesonto elizayo kuMzansi Magic KULINDELEKE ukuthi zande izinkinga zikaMsongelwa kwisizini yesibili yomdlalo wamahlaya othi Isithembu sikaMsongelwa isiqephu sokuqala salo mdlalo esizoqala ukukhonjiswa ngoMsombuluko ozayo, kuMzansi Magic (161), ngo-8 ebusuku. UMsongelwa (Andile Mxakaza) ongusomatekisi, kuvela ukuthi kulo mdlalo uzoqhubeka nokusebenza kanzima, ukubonisa amakhosikazi akhe amathathu ukuthi kusadingeka omunye unkosikazi egcekeni, njengoba esanda kubona intokazi ayethandana nayo besafunda, u-Asanda (Nosipho Pehlo), asefuna ukushadelwa yona. Ekhuluma ngokubuya kwalo mdlalo, u-Andile uveze ukuthi kube yinjabulo kubo bethola izindaba zokuthi lo mdlalo uyabuya njengoba kwacaca kwisizini yokuqala ukuthi abantu bayawuthanda. "UMsongelwa uzobonakala ezama ukubonisa amakhosikazi akhe amathathu ukuthi ufuna kanjani ukuthi abe nomunye unkosikazi. Kodwa izinto azihambi ngendlela yena afisa nahlele ngayo njengoba amakhosikazi engamvumeli ukuthi enze noma ikanjani emzini wabo. Iziqephu zokuqala zizokhombisa umsindo okhona manje njengoba uMsongelwa isizini yokuqala, yaphela sekucaca ukuthi kukhona owesifazane osempilweni yakhe. "Yingoba wayesenomkhuba wokuhamba ngisho ebusuku angaziwa ukuthi ukuphi. Imiphumela yezinqumo zakhe, iyona ezodala umsindo okhona manje," kusho u-Andile. Uthe ukufika kuka-Asanda emzini vele okukhona ukungezwani kuwo, kulethe omkhulu umsindo njengoba ngamunye kumakhosikazi akhe, efuna kuzwakale yena kulesi esithenjini. "U-Asanda uhlukile, usemncane, konke akwenzayo ukwenza ngendlela yesimanje, unothando okwenza uMsongelwa kube ngathi uphila komunye umhlaba. Umdlalo lona oveza ubuhle nobunzima besithembu. Uyasikhumbuza ukuthi uma ungazinikele kusona, kuningi ongathuka usuhlangabezana nakho ngakho siyathemba kukhulu abantu abazokufunda. Nathi singabalingisi sibonga uNkulunkulu ngokuphinde sibe yingxenye yomdlalo," kuchaza yena. Abalingisi abanye abaphambili kulo mdlalo kubalwa uNompumelelo Vilakazi, Phumzile Mlangeni noThandeka Shangase.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: U-DJ Sphe Live okuvela ukuthi useyosakaza emsakazweni Ukhozi FM ngemuva kokushiya Igagasi UKHONJWA emsakazweni Ukhozi FM, uDJ Sphe Live okuthe ngoLwesithathu, umsakazo Igagasi FM, wangamabela hlelo, njengoba bekumenyezelwa abasakazi abazoshayela izinhlelo ezehlukene zika-2026 kuya ku-2027. U-DJ Sphe Live obezwakala kulo msakazo ngezimpelasonto, Isolezwe lithole ukuthi uzokwenza uhlelo lwasemini, iWoza Nabangani Bakho noZimdollar. UZumdollar lolu hlelo ubelwenza noKing Sfiso, okuvela ukuthi yena usezozwakala ezinhlelweni zangempelasonto ebusuku. Umthombo weSolezwe, uthe Ukhozi lugawule kaningana kwiGagasi, njengoba noSimtho Dladla kungacaci ukuthi uyaphi ngoba engabonwa ohlwini lweGagasi. “UZimiphi lapha emini uthole uzakwabo omusha, uSphe njengoba engamenyezelwanga nje, useya oKhozini. UKing Sfiso ngathi ukhonjwa ezinhlelweni zangempelasonto, vele okuyizona afika ezenza kulo msakazo. Isikhala sikaZeal singase sivalwe uyena, asazi kodwa. USimtho indaba yakhe ayicaci noma naye uthathwe ilona Ukhozi noma uya kwenye indawo kodwa indaba yakhe ayizwakali kahle okwamanje,” kusho umthombo. Igagasi lilahlekelwe abasakazi abathathu okuwuKhaya Mthethwa, uSimtho Dladla noDJ Sphe Live. Intokazi ebeyenza ezemigwaqo kusona lesi siteshi, uNokwanda Tema, nayo Isolezwe lithole ukuthi iya oKhozini la iyoqhubeka khona nalo msebenzi. Ngesikhathi Igagasi lethula abasakazi abasha, okunye okucacile ukuthi uKhulekani Mbambo obenza uhlelo iSunday Devotion, naye ushiywe ngaphandle. Kulo msakazo ubephinde enze uhlelo lwasekuseni lwezinkuthazo ngoMsombuluko kuya kuLwesihlanu, olwashiywa uDJ Vuma. Ngesikhathi kumenyezelwa izinguquko, kuvele izindaba zokuthi zombili lezi zinhlelo ebezenziwa uMbambo manje sezithathwe uLinda Sibiya. UMbambo yena kuvela ukuthi usesethimbeni elisebenza ngaphakathi esiteshini. Njengokubika kweSolezwe, uMzokoloko ukhuze ibuya kulo msakazo, lapho ezokwenza khona uhlelo lwasemini ngoMsombuluko kuya ngoLwesihlanu, ngokubambisana noLuyanda Khambule. UMzokoloko uthe ukubuya kulesi siteshi kufana nokubuya ekhaya ngakho ujabule ukuphinde athole ithuba elifana naleli. Khonamanjalo: I-Metro FM isanda kumemezela uhla olusha lwezinhlelo zika-2026/27, oluqukethe izintandokazi ezidumile ezijoyina lo msakazo. UNomuzi ‘Moozlie’ Mabena noSiyabonga ‘Scoop’ Ngwekazi bazobambisana ekushayeleni uhlelo lwangempelasonto.
