USIHLE Nduli ekhipha omunye wemiklomelo emqhudelwaneni wakhe, iSihle Nduli Tournament, ngenyanga ngoDisemba Image: Isithombe:FACEBOOK/SIHLE NDULI Ukulimala kukaNduli kusho ukuthi iPirates kuzofanele ithembele kuMakhaula, Thalente Mbatha, Masindi Nemtajela noSimphiwe Selepe esiswini. EZimnyama zisemkhankasweni wokuwina isicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership ngaphansi komqeqeshi, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou. Kuyiwe ekhefini le-Afcon zihleli ezicongweni se-log ngamaphuzu angu-28 emuva kwemidlalo engu-12. Zilandelwa yiMamelodi Sundowns ngawu-26 emuva kwemidlalo engu-13. Njengoba kungamaholidi, uNduli ubuyisele emphakathini wangakubo eMthwalulwe ngomqhudelwano, iSihle Nduli Tournament, obunesiteki sika-R60 000. Iqembu i-Eleven Touches iyona ekhale yemuka nendebe.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ABADLALI beBafana Bafana bejabula noTshepang Moremi oyishayele igoli lokuqala ngesikhathi ibhekene neZimbabwe emdlalweni wokugcina wesigaba samaqoqo se-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) eMarrakech Stadium, eMorocco, ngoMsombuluko Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX IBAFANA Bafana izibekisele indawo kwi-Last 16 ye-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) ngemuva kokwehlula iZimbabwe eMarrakech Stadium, eMorocco, ngoMsombuluko ebusuku. Amagoli aweze iBafana ashaywe nguTshepang Moremi, Lyle Foster no-Oswin Appollis obekuyiphenathi sekuyophela umdlalo. AweZimbabwe ashaywe nguTawanda Maswanhise no-Aubrey Modiba okube wumkhonto ogwaze ekhaya. Abafana bakaHugo Broos baqede endaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu ayisithupha kuGroup B. I-Egypt ebambane ngo 0-0 ne-Angola emdlalweni wokugcina, iqede eqhulwini ngayisikhombisa. Ukuhlulwa kweZimbabwe yiBafana nokuphuma nephuzu kwe-Angola kwi-Egypt kusho ukuphela kwendlela yabo kwi-Afcon. IBafana idlulele kwi-Last 16 ye-Afcon okwehlandla lesishiyagalombili kulandelana. Ijoyine ezinye izinkunzi zase-Afrika eziyizimfivilithi kulo mqhudelwano okubalwa kuzona i-Egypt, Nigeria ne-Algeria. Amaqembu amabili azoqeda eqhulwini emaqoqweni ayisithupha azojoyinwa ngamane azoqeda kangcono endaweni yesithathu ukuze kuphume angu-16 azoqhuthana emzuliswaneni olandelayo. Emdlalweni weZimbabwe, uBroos ubuyisele esikimini uSipho Mbule ongawuqalanga owe-Egypt kwazise indawo yakhe ibithathwe nguThalente Mbatha. Nakuba iBafana iqale kahle, yathola igoli ngokushesha ngonyawo lukaMoremi kodwa kusheshe kwacaca ukuthi izothwala kanzima kwiZimbabwe. Lokho kufakazelwe wukuphendula kweWarriors ngokushesha ngegoli lukaMaswanhise oqede ngodonga lwasemuva lweBafana, walibeka phakathi. Esiwombeni sesibili, uBroos ubuye esekhiphe uSiphephelo Sithole, wafaka uBathusi Aubaas. Lokhu kusiqinise kakhulu isisu seBafana, ephinde yabekwa phambili nguFoster ngekhanda zisanda kubuya ekhefini. Emuva kwemizuzu embalwa, unozinti weBafana uRonwen Williams uvimbe ngonyawo ibhola elibi ebelishaywe nguMaswanhise kodwa lashaya ebusweni bukaModiba, langena phakathi. IBafana igcine ilanyulelwe ngu-Appollis obeke phakathi iphenathi edaleke emuva kokuthi uMarvelous Nakamba echithele ngaphandle ngesandla ibhola esebhokisini. Nakuba iBafana iwinile kodwa kucacele nekhasela eziko ukuthi kufanele ibhukule uma izimisele ngokuhamba ibanga elide kwi-Afcon.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ISITOBHA seBafana Bafana, uMbekezeli Mbokazi, siphenduka phambi kukaMo Salah emdlalweni we-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) e-Ardar Stadium, eMorocco. ngoLwesihlanu Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX KUGCINE kuphelile ngerekhodi leBafana Bafana lokungehlulwa leminyaka emibili ngesikhathi ikhala ngaphansi kwi-Egypt emdlalweni wesibili wesigaba samaqoqo kwi-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) eMorocco ngoLwesihlanu ntambama. IBafana ingene enkundleni, i-Adrar Stadium, e-Agadir, ibheke ukuqoqa amaphuzu amathathu abezoyibeka esicongweni sikaGroup B kwazise ibilingana ngamathathu ne-Egypt. Nokho igcine ikhale ngaphansi ngo 1-0 wephenathi kaMo Salah ayishaye esiwombeni sokuqala. Le phenathi idaleke ngokudlaliswa kabi kukaSalah nguKhuluso Mudau obeke isandla ebusweni balo mgadli weLiverpool besebhokisini. Amapuhuzu amathathu atholwe yi-Egypt ayibeke esicongweni kuGroup B ngayisithupha. Ilandelwe yiBafana ngamathathu ewathole yehlula i-Angola emdlalweni wokuqala. IZimbabwe ne-Angola banephuzu iqembu ngalinye kulandela ukudlala ngokulingana ngo 1-1 emdlalweni odlale ngaphambi koweBafana ne-Egypt. Ukwehlulwa kweBafana yi-Egypt kusho ukunqamuka komgqigqo wemidlalo engu-26 ingahlulwa. Leli qembu laseNingizimu Afrika belilokhu lagcina ukuthola isibhaxu kwiMali emdlalweni wokuvula we-Afcon ka-2023 e-Ivory Coast. Enkundleni, iBafana iqale kahle ibukeka izomelana nengcindezi ye-Egypt ehlasele zibekwa kodwa ibihluleka ukuphatha ibhola futhi kunzima ukufika phambili. Izinto zishintshe ngesikhathi i-Egypt ithola iphenathi. Kuyiwe ekhefini i-Egypt ingasaphelele kulandela ukuthola ikhadi lesibili eliphuzi kukaMohamed Hany ngenxa yokudlalisa kabi uTeboho Mokoena. Esiwombeni sesibili, umqeqeshi weBafana uHugo Broos, wenze izinguquko efaka uSipho Mbule endaweni kaThalente Mbatha. Emuva kwalokho, iBafana iqalile ukuthola izikhala, yaphatha ibhola. Nokho ibihluleka ukugqobhoza udonga lwe-Egypt ebisihlezi emuva. Kusuke umsindo umdlalo usuyophela umdlalo ngesikhathi ibhola lishaya esandleni somdlali we-Egypt ebebambelela phansi, wavimba ibhola likaMokoena. Emuva kwesikhathi, unompempe ubheke i-VAR, iBafana yagcina ingayitholanga iphenathi. Emdlalweni wokugcina wamaqoqo, iBafana izobhekana neZimbabwe eMarrakesh Stadium ngoMsombuluko ngo-6 ntambama. Ngaleso sikhathi i-Egypt izosonga ne-Angola e-Adrar Stadium. Amaqembu amabili azoqeda phezulu kuwona wonke amaqoqo, azohlanganiswa namane azoqeda kangcono endaweni yesithathu, adlulele kwi-Last 16.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI wasemuva we-Orlando Pirates, uMbekezeli Mbokazi, ejabula noMakhehleni Makhaula emuva kokwehlula iMarumo Gallants emdlalweni wamanqamu weCarling Knockout ngoMgqibelo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMBEKEZELI "TLB" Mbokazi ubhoboke ngazokukhumbula kwi-Orlando Pirates abeyidlalela okokugcina ngesikhathi iwina indebe yeCarling Knockout ngempelasonto edlule. EZimnyama ziqukule indebe yesikhombisa eminyakeni emine ngemuva kokwehlula iMarumo Gallants ngegoli likaRelebohile Mofokeng ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoMgqibelo. Ziwine indebe yeMTN ngo-2022, 2023, 2024 nango-2025. Ziphakamise eyeNedbank Cup ngo-2022 nango-2023 njengoba sezihlabana ngeyeCarling ngo-2025. Ibingekho indlela encomekayo iPirates ebingavalelisa ngayo uMbokazi osesayine kwiChicago Fire yase-United States of America azoqala kuyona ngoFebhuwari emuva komqhudelwano i-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon). Nakuba abalandeli bebejabule ngokubona iqembu labo liqukula indebe yesibili ezinyangeni eziyisithupha kodwa bekunomunyu ngokuhamba kwentandokazi yabo ekade isiyinsika odongeni lwasemuva lweZimnyama. "Akulula ukuthi ngihambe kodwa ngoba wumsebenzi ayikho into engizoyenza. Into engingayisho nje eqenjini wukuthi ngilifisela konke okuhle kwelizohlangana nakho. Ngisalithanda futhi ngiyohlezi ngilithanda ngenxa yokuthi lingikhulisile langenza umuntu langibeka ebalazweni. Ngilifisela inhlanhla," kusho uMbokazi kwiSABC. "Into engizoyikhumbula kakhulu wukuthi ngithole abantu abalungile abangenze ngazizwa ngisekhaya, ngizokhumbula nezikhathi ezingijabulisile zokuqukula izindebe. Nginethemba lokuthi  ngisazojabula kanye nabo ngoba ngeke ngiyeke ukubeseka." UMbokazi nabanye abadlali abayisishiyagalombili basesikwatini seBafana Bafana esiya kwi-Afcon esiqale ikhempu ePitoli izolo ngaphansi kweso elibukhali lomqeqeshi, uHugo Broos. Abadlali bePirates abakwiBafana nguSipho Chaine, Nkosinathi Sibisi, Thalente Mbatha, Tshepang Moremi, Oswin Appollis, Evidence Makgopa, Mofokeng noSipho Mbule. I-Afcon izoqala ngoDisemba 21 iphele ngoJanuwari 18. "Njengoba siya kwi-Afcon sisuka lapha eqenjini sibaningi, kumele sifike nawo lo mfutho. Sesingafika sigqugquzele nabanye, sibe nomoya owodwa sinqobe yonke into. Ayikho into ezosihlula uma sibambene silwa ngendlela efanele,"kusho uMbokazi.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ABADLALI nabaqeqeshi be-Orlando Pirates bejabulela igoli likaRelebohile Mofokeng abagcine behlule ngalo iMarumo Gallants kowamanqamu weCarling Knockout ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX KUFEZEKE isifiso somqeqeshi we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ezakhe siwina indebe yeCarling Knockout ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Igoli eliweze eZimnyama lishaywe nguRelebohile Mofokeng emuva kokuthi isikhathi esijwayelekile somdlalo siphele zibambene ngo 0-0. Lena yindebe yesibili ka-Ouaddou ofike kweZimnyama kunokungabaza mayelana nokuthi uzokwazi ukuvala isikhala sikaJose Riveiro oshiye efake izindebe eziyisihlanu ekhabetheni lePirates. Ekuqaleni kwesizini uwine indebe yeMTN8 okuyiyona eshintshe okuningi ngendlela abalandeli abebembeka ngayo. Ngalokhu u-Ouaddou ufice irekhodi likaRiveiro owawina izindebe naleli qembu ngesizini yakhe yokuqala kwiPirates. Ngemuva kowamanqamu weCarling, u-Ouaddou, uthe ubevele efuna ukuthi banike abalandeli babo isipho sikaKhisimusi ngokuwina le ndebe esibahlule iminyaka. "Lolu wusuku olukhulu eqenjini, kubadlali, kwibhodi, kubaphathi beqembu nakubalandeli. Ngishilo ukuthi ngifuna sibanike isipho sikaKhisimusi futhi ngicabanga ukuthi yisipho sabo esihle. Kufanele ngibabongele abafana bami. Besazi ukuthi wumdlalo wendebe, unzima. Udinga umqondo nokudlala ngenhliziyo. Kusifanele ukuwina ngoba uma sibheka umdlalo wonke, esiwombeni sokuqala bekufanele sihambe phambili ngo 2-0. Lokhu wukunqoba okusifanele, kubafanele abadlali. Ngingumqeqeshi ojabule,"kusho u-Ouaddou kwiSupersport. Lo mdlalo bekungowokugcina kumdlali wasemuva, uMbekezeli "TLB" Mbokazi osesayine kwiChicago Fire edlala kwiMajor League Soccer, e-USA. Umdlali ovelele wosuku kube ngu-Oswin Appollis ovotelwe ngabalandeli abangu-8876, wagoduka nesheke lika-R100 000.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: U-ASANELE Velebayi weKaizer Chiefs ubeyicela kanje indlela kubadlali beChippa United emdlalweni ezigcine zicazelane amaphuzu kuwona eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UKHALE ngamahlalakhona eKaizer Chiefs omunye wabaqeqeshi, uBen Khalil Youssef, ezakhe zibanjwa yiChippa United emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. Amakhosi abambane neChili Boys ngo 0-0 emdlalweni obekubhekwe ukuthi azoqoqa amaphuzu amathathu kuwona, ifake ingcindezi emaqenjini asezihola phambili kwi-log yePremiership okuyiMamelodi Sundowns ne-Orlando Pirates osekucacile ukuthi izovala unyaka iqhwakele. Nokho ukuhluleka ukusebenzisa amathuba phambi kwamapali kuphinde kwayicekela phansi iChiefs, ikakhulukazi esiwombeni sesibili. Lo mkhuba sebekhale ngawo kakhulu abaqeqeshi naMakhosi, kusukela kusekhona uNasreddine Nabi. Ukuhluleka kweChiefs ukubuya namaphuzu, kuhambisane nokubanjwa kweMamelodi Sundowns yiSiwelele ngo 1-1 eBloemfontein. Le miphumela yomibili iweze ngelibanzi iPirates evule igebe lamaphuzu amabili esicongweni se-log. UYoussef, oqeqesha iChiefs ngokubambisana noCedric Kaze, uthe ukwehlulwa ngamagoli yikhona okwenze bagcina bephuma nephuzu kungafanele kwiChippa esemsileni we-log. "Siyayibongela iChippa, ibinohlaka oluhle futhi ibilwela wonke amabhola. Ngasohlangothini lwethu, akukho esingakhala ngakho. Uma uthola amathuba amaningi okubhekana nonozinti kodwa ungawasebenzisi (akulungi), ibhola linjalo. Kufanele siqhubeke nokusebenza sizame ukulungisa inkinga eyodwa esinayo. Siyafika phambili kodwa siyahluleka ukushaya amagoli. Yileyo inkinga esinayo kodwa kufanele siqhubeke sisebenze,"usho kanje kwiSupersport. Nokho iChiefs isenalo ithuba lokulungisa isimo njengoba izobhekana neTS Galaxy emdlalweni wePremiership wokugcina wonyaka eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, ngeSonto ngo-3.30 ntambama.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: IKAIZER Chiefs iphume ingaphethe lutho emdlalweni wokuvula wesigaba samaqoqo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ehlulwe kuwona yi-Al Masry yase-Egypt eSuez Canal Stadium, e-Egypt, ngeSonto ebusuku Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX IKAIZER CHIEFS iyiqale kabi imidlalo yesigaba samaqoqo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ikhaa ngaphansi kwi-Al Masry yase-Egypt eSuez Sadium, e-Egypt, ngeSonto ebusuku. I-Al Masry ibekwe phambili nguBonheur Mugisha esiwombeni sesibili ngaphambi kokuthi uDillan Solomons ashayele Amakhosi elokulinganisa. UMohamed Hashem ushayele leli qembu lase-Egypt igoli lokuwina umdlalo usuyophela. Ukwehlulwa kweChiefs emdlalweni wokuqala wesigaba samqoqo kuyifaka ingcindezi yokuqinisekisa ukuthi iqoqa amaphuzu emidlalweni elandelayo ukuze izozibeka ethubeni lokubalwa namaqembu amabili azoqeda phezulu kuGroup D adlulele kuma-quarterfinal. NgeSonto Amakhosi azokwamukela elinye iqembu lase-Egypt, iZamalek, emdlalweni wesibili wesigaba samaqoqo. KuGroup D kukhona neZesco United yaseZambia engenawo umlando wokuhamba ibanga elinde emiqhudelwaneni yeCaf. Emdlalweni weMasry, iChiefs iqale umdlalo izama ukuthola igoli kuqala kubhoke uMduduzi Shabalala, Pule Mmodi no-Etiosa Ighodaro kodwa yagcina ingaphumelelanga. Kwesesibili, ibuye isicindezela kodwa kube yiMasry ethole igoli obekuyiphenathi edaleke emuva kokuthi unozinti weChiefs, uBrandon Petersen edlalise kabi ebhokisini umdlali waleli qembu elisendaweni yesihlanu kwi-Egyptian Premier League. UMugisha uyibeke phakathi. IChiefs ithole isixazululo sekungene uMfundo Vilakazi oyenze yahlasela ngamandla. Lo mdlali uphasele uSolomons ibhola alithathe waqonda nalo ezitobheni seMasry, wagcina elibeka phakathi. Leli goli libukeke liwanika isibindi nokuzethemba Amakhosi. Nokho kushabalale konke ngesikhathi uHashem eshayele iMasry igoli lesibili. IChiefs ihlalelwe wumsebenzi wokuvuka izithathe uma isibhekene neZamalek phambi kwabalandeli bayo eMzansi ngempelasonto.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI wasesiswini, uSibongiseni Mthethwa, ubalwa nabaphelelwa yizinkontileka eNaturena, ekupheleni kwesizini ka-2025/2026 PHEZU kokuba iKaizer Chiefs igxile emqhudelwani iCaf Confederation Cup kodwa ihlalelwe wumsebenzi wokuqala izingxoxo nabadlali abamqoka ezobadinga kuze kuphele lo mqhudelwano. IChiefs isesigabeni samaqoqo kwiConfederation lapho ikleliswe khona kuGroup D obophele i-Al Masry neZamalek okungamaqembu ase-Egypt neZesco United yaseZambia. Leli qembu libuyela emidlalweni yeCaf emuva kweminyaka lagcina ukudlala kuyona kwazise belingasazinqobi izindebe futhi lingasabonwa kwabanga isicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership. Nakuba iChiefs ingene kanzima esigabeni samaqoqo kodwa kuheleza umoya wenjabulo ekhempini yayo nakubalandeli. Nokho leli qembu lihlalelwe wumsebenzi wokuqala izongxoxo namanye babadlali abamqoka abaphelelwa yizinkontileka ekupheleni kwesizini elisengcupheni yokulahlekelwa yibona. Iningi lalaba badlali bayizinsika zeqembu futhi lizodinga ukuthi isimo sabo somqondo sibe ngesihle njengoba lisemkhankasweni wokwenza kahle e-Afrika. Ukuqala kwenyanga ezayo kuzobe kusho ukuthi abadlali okubalwa kubona uNkosingiphile Ngcobo oyintandokazi yabalandeli, Brandon Petersen, Bruce Bvuma (onombandela wokuyivuselela), Sibongiseni Mthethwa noGaston Sirino sebengasayina izinkontileka zesibambiso namanye amaqembu. Abanye abadlali abangakazi ngekusasa labo nguGeorge Matlou onenkontileka ebivuselelwe ngonyaka, Dillan Solomons, Pule Mmodi noTashreeq Morris onyamanambana kubalandeli baMakhosi. Nakuba iChiefs ingajwayele ukuvuselela ngokushesha izinkontileka zabadlali kodwa kuyaziwa ukuthi ukuba nenqwaba yabadlali engazi ngekusasa layo kungalenzela phansi iqembu elinezifiso zokwenza kahle kule sizini. Ngaphandle kwabadlali, abaphathi beChiefs kufanele banqume ngekusasa labaqeqeshi abasabambile okunguCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef. Ngemuva kokuhamba kukaNasreddine Nabi, iChiefs imemezele ukuthi laba baqeqeshi abebengabasizi bakhe bazobamba kuze kuphele isizini ka-2025/2026. Lokhu kuqondana nokuphela kwezinkontilela abazisayina ekuqaleni kwesizini edlule befika noNabi. Uma uKaze noYoussef behluleka ukwenza umsebenzi kwiChiefs, lokho kuyosho ukuthi abaphathi beqembu kufanele bathungathe omunye okungenzeka afike nabasizi bakhe. IChiefs isendaweni yesithathu kwi-log yePremiership lapho ibambene khona ne-Orlando Pirates ngamaphuzu angu-22. NgeSonto, izovakashela i-AL Masry eSuez Stadium e-Egypt, koqala ngo-6 ebusuku.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: KWENZEKE obekufiswa ngumqeqeshi, uHugo Broos, iBafana Bafana yehlula iZambia emdlalweni wobungani eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha, ngoMgqibelo ntambama. Amagoli eBafana ashaywe ngu-Oswin Appollis, Mohau Nkota noSiphephelo Sithole ngokwahlukana kweziwombe. EleZambia libekwe enethini nguSabobo Banda sekusele amanenjana kuphele umdlalo. Lo mdlalo bekungowokugcina wokuzicijela umqhudelwano i-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) ozoqala ngenyanga ezayo eMorocco. UBroos ubewusebenzisela ukubhekisisa abadlali azothembela kuwona lo mqhudelwano iBafana eqede kuwona endaweni yesithathu e-Ivory Coast nyakenye. Maphakathi nesonto, lo mqeqeshi waseBelgium utshele abezindaba ukuthi ufuna ukuwina kwiZambia ukuze ezofika eshayela phezulu eMorocco. Kulo mdlalo unike ithuba abadlali abaningi okubalwa kubona unozinti uSipho Chaine noThabang Matuludi obanga ijezi noKhuliso Mudau emuva kwesokudla. Emuva komdlalo, uBroos uthe:" Bekufanele sikwenze lokho ngoba bekungokokugcina sinethuba lokukwenza. Yikho ngesikhathi sekhefu sishintshe kakhulu. Bekungekuhle eqenjini kodwa kujwayelekile uma kufanele kungene abadlali abasha. Kuyadina kuwona wonke umuntu kodwa kulungile. Asidlalanga kahle namuhla kodwa bekuzikhathi ezinhle. Uma senza okufanele sikwenze, sibheka phambili, siphasa phambili, bekusenza sibe yingozi futhi yilokho okwenze sathola amagoli. Asidlalanga kahle futhi besingasheshi ngendlela esiyijwayele kodwa kuhle ukuthi kwenzeke manje nokuthi kwenzeke phambili." Enkundleni, iBafana iqale kahle iwulawula umdlalo kodwa ihluleka ukusebenzisa amathuba uma isifike phambili. Kuze kwayilungela sekusele imizuzu emithathu kuyiwe ekhefini ngesikhathi u-Appollis eqobela phakathi ibhola aliphaselwe nguSipho Mbule. Esiwombeni sesibili, iBafana ibuye noNkota ongene endaweni ka-Appollis obewuhlupho kwesokuqala. UNkota naye uthole ibhola kuMbule waphendula umdlali wasemuva weZambia ebhokisini, walibeka phakathi ngomzuzu ka-61. Emuva kwalokho, iBafana ibisizenzela kwiChipolopolo. Emuva kwemizuzu eyisikhombisa, uSithole ungqofele phakathi ikhona kaNkota. IZambia ithole umthobanhliziyo ngomzuzu ka-90 ngonyawo lukaBanda obesanda kungena. Isikwati seBafana esizoya kwi-Afcon kulindeleke ukuthi simenyezelwe ekuqaleni kukaDisemba.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: PHEZU kokuba kuseqhulwini ukunqoba kuVela Khumalo ongumqeqeshi weqembu lesizwe labaneminyaka engaphansi kuka-17, Amajimbos, kodwa ufuna bakhombise umhlaba indlela yokudlala yaseNingizimu Afrika. Amajimbos azibekisele indawo kwi-Last 32 weNdebe yoMhlaba eqhubekayo eQatar emuva kokuqeda endaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu amane kuGroup A esigabeni samaqoqo. Namuhla ngo-3.30 ntambama azobhekana neJapan emdlalweni wokuhlungela indawo kwi-Last 16 e-Aspire Zone - Pitch 3. Iqembu laseMzansi libalwa nayisishiyagalolunye kwayishumi ase-Afrika adlulele emzuliswaneni olandelayo. Nakuba Amajimbos edlale kahle esigabeni samaqoqo kodwa uKhumalo akaneme ngokuhluleka kwabafana bakhe ukugcina ibhola, babheke phambili ngomfutho, okuyindlela yokudlala ethathwa njengeyaseNingizimu Afrika. "Asidlali ngendlela yethu, asiwukhombisi umhlaba ukuthi thina sidlala kanjani. Sidlalela ukufika phambili ngokushesha kunokugcina ibhola sinyuke nalo kahle. Lokhu kufanele sikulungise ngoba sidlala indlela esingayazi neyenza singanethezeki. Sidlala ngokwesaba," kusho uKhumalo. Lo mqeqeshi ungowokuqala owinise Amajimbos umdlalo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba kusukela leli qembu laqala ukudlala kulo mqhudelwano osukhiqize abadlali abaningi abazakhele igama emhlabeni. UKhumalo uchaze iJapan eqede eqhulwini ngamaphuzu ayisikhombisa kuGroup B njengeqembu elisheshayo okufanele baliqaphele. "Bayiqembu eligijima umdlalo wonke futhi eliqatha. Thina sinethalente kunabo kodwa asinawo umfutho olingana nowabo. Uma sigijima njengabo noma siphaselana into engayi ndawo sizobe simosha umfutho esingenawo. Uma singagcina ibhola, sidlale ngendlela yaseMzansi, ngicabanga ukuthi kukhona esingaphuma nakho kulo mdlalo. Nginalo ithemba lokuthi singadlulela kwi-Last 16," kusho uKhumalo. Amajimbos afulathele uMzansi ukuyodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngaphandle kokuzilungiselela okufanele ngenxa yesixakaxaka ehhovisi leSouth African Football Association (Safa). Lokhu kuholele ekutheni uKhumalo engabatholi bonke abadlali abefisa ukuhamba nabo.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMANDLA Masango owayengaconsi phansi kubalandeli beKaizer Chiefs eminyakeni edlule, ukhuza eyokujikela umqeqeshi weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, ngenxa yokungabaqoki abadlali baleli qembu. IBafana izobhekana neZambia emdlalweni wobungani eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha, kusasa ngo-3 ntambama. Lo mdlalo uzoba ngowokugcina weqembu lesizwe ngaphambi kokuqala kwe-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) ezoba seMorocco, ngenyanga ezayo. UBroos ukubeke kwacaca ukuthi leli yithuba lokugcina alinika abadlali ukuthi bamkhombise abangakwenzela iBafana. Kule khempu, akekho noyedwa umdlali weChiefs okuyinto ethukuthelisa abalandeli. Bebefuna uBroos aqhubeke noShabalala osefomini kulezi nsuku. "Ngicabanga ukuthi wenza umsebenzi omuhle, ungumdlali osemncane onesibindi. Yilokho okudingayo ukuze uyibambe eqenjini elikhulu njengeChiefs. Kufanele aqhubeke nokusebenza kanzima, angapheli mandla ngoba yonke into ngaphansi komthunzi welanga inesikhathi sayo. Ngijabule ngendlela athuthuka ngayo. Akufanele sifake ingcindezi ngokuthi afakwe eqenjini lesizwe okwamanje, inqobo nje uma ebizwa ezothola leso sipiliyoni. Manje uzothola ithuba lokudlala kwiCaf Confederation Cup. Lokho kuzomsiza njengoba ekhula," kusho uMasango. UMasango ukhuze abalandeli beChiefs "ngenzondo" okubukeka iqhubeka ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ebhekisiwe kuBroos ngenxa yokushiya ngaphandle abadlali baMakhosi. Ezinyangeni ezedlule, lo mqeqeshi ubelimisa ngesihloko elokuthi abekho abadlali kwiChiefs engabaqokela kwiBafana ngoba ayenzi kahle. Esikwatini sikaBroos sekugcwele abadlali be-Orlando Pirates nabeMamelodi Sundowns okwenze abalandeli beChiefs bakuduba ukweseka iqembu lesizwe. "Siyayihlonipha imibono yabalandeli ngoba ibhola silibheka ngezindlela ezingafani sonke. Ngingabona ngenye indlela nomunye abone ngenye indlela. Singazondi umqeqeshi ngenxa yokuthi amqokanga uShabalala ngoba ngesikhathi embizile asimzondanga. Ngakho kufanele sigxeke ngendlela efanayo, asikwazi ukuvele sigxeke nje. Sizibekisele indawo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngaphansi kukaHugo Broos futhi unenqwaba yabadlali okumele akhethe kubona. Kumthathe isikhathi ukuthemba uThemba Zwane, ngakho sidinga ukuyiqonda indlela afuna iqembu lidlale ngayo. Asimyeke asebenze ngendlela yakhe ngoba ekugcineni uyena onqumayo, uyena ophethe. Thina singakhuluma kodwa ekugcineni isinqumo esiwujuqu ngesakhe. Kufanele sikuhloniphe lokho," kusho uMasango.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: IPHINI lomqeqeshi weKaizer Chiefs kwiDStv Diski Challenge, uDillon Sheppard, okufanele liqhamuke namaqhinga okuvimba i-Orlando Pirates abazobhekana nayo eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, eKaNyamazane, ngeSonto I-KAIZER Chiefs izothwala amathemba amaqembu asezithendeni ze-Orlando Pirates emjahweni weligi yeDStv Diski Challenge uma lezi zinkunzi seziqhuthana eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KaNyamazane, ngeSonto. Lo mdlalo ungomunye wedili lemidlalo emine ezodlalelwa eMpumalanga, ngoMgqibelo nangeSonto. IChiefs engompetha bangesizini edlule beDiski, idonsa kanzima njengoba okwamanje ingabalwa namaqembu asethubeni lokuwina isicoco. Isendaweni yesithupha kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-14 emidlalweni engu-10. Isele ngawu-11 kwiPirates esesicongweni ngawu-25 emidlalweni engu-10. IMamelodi Sundowns esendaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu angu-20 neStellenbosch ekweyesithathu ngawu-19, yiwona amaqembu ajaha iPirates ebukeka ishosholoza ngaphansi kobuholi bomqeqeshi uRoscoe Krieling. Ukuqhubeka nokucosha amaphuzu kweZimnyama kuzibeka ethubeni lokuwina isicoco seligi, iqede ishobolo leminyaka kwazise azikaze ziyiwine selokhu yasungulwa iDiski ngo-2014. Akubuzwa ukuthi iSundowns neStellies bazothembela kwiChiefs ukuthi ivimbe iPirates ingalinwebi igebe lamaphuzu esicongweni ukuze bezosala benalo ithuba lokuyibamba. IPirates isahlulwe yiPolokwane City kuphela kule sizini, yadlala ngokulingana neDurban City emdlalweni wokuvula wesizini. Ngaphandle kwalokho, iqhobozela kwasani okuphambi kwayo njengoba iyiwinile imidlalo eyisishiyagalombili. ISundowns neStellies yibona abazovula idili lemidlalo eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium ngoMgqibelo ngo-12 emini. Ukunqoba kweSundowns kungasho ukunciphisa igebe lamaphuzu phakathi kwayo nePirates. Ukudlala ngokulingana kwala maqembu kungayibeka ebuhleni iPirates ikakhulukazi uma iphumelela ukushaya iChiefs ngeSonto. Imidlalo yeDStv Diski Challenge: Stellenbosch FC v Mamelodi Sundowns (Solomon Mahlangu Stadium, 12pm); TS Galaxy v Orbit College (Solomon Mahlangu Stadium, 3pm); Marumo Gallants v Siwelele (Dr Molemela Stadium, 10am); Durban City v Chippa United (Chatsworth Stadium, 12pm); Golden Arrows v AmaZulu (Sugar Ray Xulu Stadium, 12pm) Polokwane City v Magesi (Solomon Mahlangu Stadium, 12pm); Kaizer Chiefs v Orlando Pirates (Solomon Mahlangu Stadium, 3pm); Richards Bay v Sekhukhune United (Princess Magogo Stadium, 10am);

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ILAHLISA ithemba inkulumo yomqeqeshi we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ngokubonakala enkundleni kukanozinti weZimnyama, uMelusi Buthelezi, olizwa ngendaba ijezi kule sizini. UButhelezi (27) waseNquthu, wajoyina iPirates esuka kwiTS Galaxy ngo-2023 ekade eyinsika ye-The Rockets futhi eseqala nokubizwa kwiBafana Bafana kaHugo Broos. Nokho izinto zimshintshele kweZimnyama ngaphansi komqeqeshi, uJose Riveiro, owaqoka uSipho Chaine njengonozinti wokuqina weqembu. Ngesizini ka-2023/2024, uButhelezi wadlala imidlalo engu-13 kuyona yonke imiqhudelwano. Lesi sibalo sehlele kweyisihlanu ngeka-2024/2025. Ukufika komqeqeshi omusha, u-Ouaddou, okholelwa ekunikeni ithuba bonke abadlali, kwenyuse ithemba lokuthi uzolithola ithuba noButhelezi oselahlekelwe nayindawo kwiBafana. Nokho lokhu akucaci kwazise u-Ouaddou akayizwa eyokushintsha unozinti nakuba ezishaya isifuba ngokuthi akekho umdlali onendawo yakhe kwiPirates. Selokhu kuqale isizini ka-2025/2026, kwiPirates kuvimba uSipho Chaine obukeka esezibekisele indawo njengonozinti wesibili kwiBafana. UChaine uqokwe njengonozinti ovelele kwiBetway Premiership ngesizini ka-2024/2025. Emidlalweni engu-10 yePremiership, usangenelwe ngamagoli ayisihlanu. Abanye onozinti bePirates nguSiyabonga Dladla (24) no-Ethan Visagie (23) abasuka kwiDStv Diski Challenge. UButhelezi noDladla yibona abashintshana ngokuhlala ebhetshini kwiPirates. "Ubalulekile umsebenzi owenziwa ngonozinti nsuku zonke. Indawo yonozinti ikhethekile. Umqondo wonozinti ukhethekile. Ngijwayele ukuthi onozinti basemhlabeni wabo bodwa. Asikwazi ukubaqhathanisa nabo bonke abadlali. Nakuba nabo bengabadlali kodwa banendlela ehlukile yokucabanga. Kufanele sixhumane babo, sibathembe, sibaqinise. Ngiyazi ukuthi nginonozinti abane abaseqophelweni eliphezulu,"kusho u-Ouaddou. Okwamanje uSipho wenza kahle kakhulu. Indawo yonozinti ibalulekile kimina, akulula ukushintsha ngoba uma siqinile kuyona futhi singangenelwa ngamagoli, akulula ukushintsha. Kodwa engingakusho wukuthi nginonozinti abahle, abasebenza kanzima futhi abagxile emsebenzini wabo. Ngijabule kakhulu ngabo, uButhelezi, uDladla noVisagie, benza umsebenzi omuhle eqenjini." IPirates ephume ekuseni kwiCaf Champions League, izobhekana neMarumo Gallants emdlalweni wamanqamu weCarling Knockout ngoDisemba 6 ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Ngaphambi kwalokho, izodlala emithathu yeligi neChippa United (Novemba 25), Durban City (Novemba 29) neRichards Bay (Disemba 2).

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: IGallants inqobe ngo 4-2 kumaphenathi. ASHABALELE amaphupho eKwaZulu-Natal okuba neqembu emdlalweni wamanqamu weCarling Knockout kulandela ukukhishwa kweLamontville Golden Arrows kowandulela owamanqamu eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza, izolo ntambama. Amagoli eGallants ashaywe nguNdabayithethwa Ndlondlo noChristopher Sithole esiwombeni sesibili. Awe-Arrows ebekwe enethini ngu-Isaac Cisse noNqubeko Dlamini kusona lesi siwombe. I-Arrows beyize kulo mdlalo ishayela phezulu kulandela ukubhubhudla kwayo iGallants ngo 4-0 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership phakathi nesonto eledlule. Ukuhlulwa kwayo kulandele ukukhishwa kweRichards Bay FC yi-Orlando Pirates ngo 1-0 komunye owandulela owamanqamu eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo. Ukuhlulwa kwawo womabili amaqembu kusho ukushabalala kwamaphupho eKZN okufinyelela kowamanqamu nokuqeda ishobolo leminyaka lokwehluleka ukuwina izindebe. I-Arrows yilona iqembu lokugcina elawina indebe iqukula iMTN8 ngo-2009. Kowamanqamu, iGallants isizobhekana ne-Orlando Pirates ngoNovemba 17 enkundleni esazomenyezelwa yiPremier Soccer League (PSL). Kunamahlebezi okuthi uzodlalelwa ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Emdlalweni wayizolo, amaqembu womabili aqale umdlalo ngegiya eliphansi. Awekho amathuba aphakamisa amaphaphu ewakhile kwaze kwaba kuphela isiwombe sokuqala. Nokho esesibili besihluke kakhulu kwazise i-Arrows neGallants baqalile ukuhlaselana. Kusheshe kwayilungela i-Arrows ngomzuzu ka-53 ngesikhathi uCisse eqedela ibhola ebelivinjwe ngunozinti weGallants, uWashington Arubi kukade kuyikhona eshaywe nguSibonelo Cele. Emuva kwemizuzu emibili, uNdlondlo udonse umngundatshani weshodi esemgqeni webhokisi, lamudla uXolani Ngcobo obevimbele Abafana Bes'thende. Emuva kwaleli goli, bekungathi i-Arrows iyabuya kodwa yangenelwa ngelinye igoli elishaywe ngobuchule nguChristopher Sithole weGallants ekude. Sekusele imizuzu engu-20 kuphele umdlalo, uDlamini ushayele i-Arrows igoli lesibili. Imizamo ye-Arrows yokushaya igoli lokuwina igcine ingaphumelelanga nasesikhathini esengeziwe, kwagcina kuyiwe kumaphenathi.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: I-ORLANDO Pirates iwendlalele ngokuxebula iLamontville Golden Arrows umdlalo owandulela owamanqamu weCarling Knockout ezowugijima neRichards Bay ngoMgqibelo eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. IPirates yehlule i-Arrows ngo 3-1 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. Amagoli eZimnyama kube womkhonto ogwaze ekhaya ka-Ayanda Jiyane esiwombeni sokuqala namabili abekwe enethini nguYanela Mbuthuma kwesesibili. ElaBafana Bes'thende livalelwe phakathi nguThokozani Khumalo. Amaphuzu amathathu atholwe yiPirates ayinyusele endaweni yesibili kwi-log yePremiership lapho isibambene khona neKaizer Chiefs ngawu-22. EZimnyama zingaphezulu ngenxa yokuba namagoli amaningi kunaMakhosi. Esicongweni kusahlezi iMamelodi Sundowns esinawu-25 kulandela ukwehlula kwayo iTS Galaxy ngo 1-0 eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. Emuva komdlalo, umqeqeshi wePirates u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, uncome abadlali bakhe ngendlela abayincishe ngayo umoya i-Arrows. "Ngiyababongela abafana bami, baqale umdlalo ngayo ngqo indlela ebesifuna ukuqala ngayo umdlalo. Besifuna ukubacindezela phambili ngesivinini, sidlale ibhola elihle. Besifuna ukucindezela abadlali babo abane basemuva kodwa futhi sibe baningi phakathi nendawo. Kusebenzile lokhu futhi sisheshile ukuthola igoli. Kodwa bekubalulekile kimina ukungavumeli leli qembu lidlale ngoba banomqeqeshi omuhle, asikusho lokho. Bayiqembu elihle, uma ubavumela bedlale bengakufaka enkingeni. Ngakho inhloso bekuwungabavumeli baphefumule futhi ngicabanga ukuthi kusisebenzele,"kusho u-Ouaddou kwiSupersport. IPirates izoqhubeka nokukhempa eThekwini kwazise ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama izobhekana neBay kowandulela owamanqamu eMoses Mabhida Stadium. Lo mdlalo ngowamagqubu kwazise iNatal Rich Boys iyona ekhiphe iPirates kulo mqhudelwano ngesizini edlule. Isiyonke imiphumela yemidlalo yeBetway Premiership Golden Arrows 1-3 Orlando Pirates; Mamelodi Sundowns 1-0 TS Galaxy; Durban City 1-0 Marumo Gallants; Stellenbosch 0-2 Siwelele

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: IKAIZER Chiefs inyukele endaweni yesibili kwi-log yeBetway Premiership emuva kokuzidlela amahlanga kwi-Orbit College eFNB Stadium, eNasrec, ngoLwesibili ebusuku. Amagoli aweze Amakhosi ashaywe nguMduduzi Shabalala amabili, Mfundo Vilakazi noFlavio Da Silva ngokwahlukana kweziwombe kulo mdlalo awunqobe ngo 4-1. Elokubika ekhaya le-Orbit lishaywe ngu-Ayanda Lukhele esuka ebhentshini esiwombeni sesibili. UShabalala ugcine eqokwe njengomdlali ovelele kulo mdlalo obuhanjelwe ngumqeqeshi weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, nephini lakhe uHelman Mkhalele. Kusasa, uBroos uzomemezela isikwati seBafana esizodlala umdlalo wobungani neZambia ngoNovemba 14. Ukunqoba kweChiefs kuyenyusele endaweni yesibili kwi-log yePremiership, yabambena neMamelodi Sundowns ngamaphuzu angu-22. Amakhosi angemuva kweSundowns ngenxa yokuthi leli qembu lasePitoli linamagoli amaningi. IChiefs ibivele ifike emdlalweni we-Orbit ishayela phezulu kulandela ukubuya namaphuzu amathathu kwiDurban City emdlalweni ewunqobe ngo 1-0 wegoli likaDa Silva eThekwini ngoLwesihlanu. Indlela eqale ngayo kowe-Orbit ikhombisile ukuthi izimisele ukuqhubeka nalowo mgqigqo, kubhoke kakhulu u-Asanele Velebayi obenikwe ithuba lokuqala umdlalo okokuqala eNaturena. Nakuba iChiefs ihlulekile ukusebenzisa amathuba amaningi ewatholile, ikakhulukazi esiwombeni sesibili kodwa umqeqeshi, uCedric Kaze usale enelisekile ngendlela abafana bakhe abadlale ngayo. "Besilokhu sidlala kahle kodwa sihluleka ukuqedela amathuba esiwakhayo.Namuhla bekubalulekile ukuqala kahle, siqale ngomqondo omuhle. Njengoba ngishilo emasontweni adlule, uma silokhu sidlala kahle amagoli azoqhamuka. Ngiyajabula ukuthi sishaye amane namuhla, sathola namaphuzu amathathu,"kusho uKaze kwiSupersport. IChiefs izobuyela enkundleni ngoNovemba 22 isiyobhekana neMagesi FC emdlalweni weligi eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: NAKUBA abalandeli be-Orlando Pirates begezeke igilo ngendlela leli qembu elidlale ngayo likhipha iMagesi FC kuma-quarterfinal eCarling Knockout kodwa umqeqeshi, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, usale enganeme ngokuyeka ukuhlasela kwabafana bakhe sekuyophela umdlalo. IPirates idlulele kowandulela owamanqamu weCarling ngemuva kokwehlula iMagesi ngo 2-1 e-Orlando Stadium, eSoweto, ngoLwesibili ebusuku. Amagoli eZimnyama ashaywe nguTshepang Moremi no-Evidence Makgopa esiwombeni sesibili. EleMagesi, ebivikela indebe, libekwe enethini nguLehlohonolo Mokone sekuyophela umdlalo. Lo mphumela akubuzwa ukuthi wesule izinyembezi kubalandeli bePirates abaphume e-Orlando bedumele ngoMgqibelo kulandela ukukhishwa kweZimnyama kwiCaf Champions League yiSaint Eloi Lupopo yaseDemocratic Republic of Congo (DRC). Nokho, u-Ouaddou uthe akaneme ngokudlala kweqembu lakhe ngasemaphethelweni omdlalo. Abadlali bePirates kade sebephaselana eduze, bezama ukugcina ibhola okuyinto ehlala ijabulisa abalandeli. "Wumdlalo obekufanele siye ekhefini sihamba phambili kuwona ngamagoli amathathu noma amane. Lokho ngikusho kahle. Ngebhadi yindawo okufanele sithuthuke kuyona ngokushesha uma sifuna ukuzuza okuthize. Ngaphandle kwalokho, ngithanda ukubongela abafana ngoba bekungewona umdlalo olula. Kuhlala kunzima ukudlala namaqembu anjena, ayalwa kakhulu. Sidlale nebhola elihle futhi ngicabanga ukuthi abalandeli bethu bajabulile ngalokho,"kusho u-Ouaddou kwiSuperSport. "Kodwa angijabulanga ngemizuzu engu-15 yokugcina. Esikhundleni sokuya phambili sishaye igoli lesithathu, sidlale amaphasi amafishane. Ngiyazi ukuthi abalandeli bayakuthanda lokho, abadlali bayakuthanda lokho kodwa mina angikuthandi lokho. Ngidinga ukushaya amanye amagoli futhi kumele sikwazi ukuwaqedela. Lokho kubalulekile ukwenyusa ukuzithemba ukushaya amagoli." Ngokudlulela kweyandulela owamanqamu, iPirates ijoyine iLamontville Golden Arrows neRichards Bay abaqede umsebenzi ngempelasonto. Iqembu lesine lizophuma phakathi kweMarumo Gallants neStellenbosch abazodlala ngoLwesithathu ngo-7 ebusuku eDr Molemela Stadium, eBloemfontein.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ANGASE abhekane nolaka lwabaphathi unozinti weKaizer Chiefs, uFiacre Ntwari, onqabe ekhishwa ngesikhathi leli qembu libhekene neStellenbosch FC emdlalweni we-Last 16 yeCarling Knockoout eKapa ngeSonto. Sekuwumlando ukuthi Amakhosi agcine ehlulwe ngo 5-4 kumaphenathi emuva kokuthi umdlalo uphele zibambene ngo 0-0. Ngesikhathi sekusele amanenjana umdlalo uphele esikhathini esengeziwe, ithimba labaqeqeshi leChiefs linqume ukukhipha uNtwari obeqala ukuvimba kule sizini, lifake uBruce Bvuma ngenhloso yokuthi ayovimba amaphenathi. Nokho lo nozinti waseRwanda unqabe isidana, wagcina eqhubekile nokuyovimba amaphenathi. UNtwari ugcine evimbe eyokuqala kuphela eshaywe ngu-Andre De Jong. Lesi senzo sika Ntwari sishiye abaningi beshaqekile, ikakhulukazi njengoba ehlulekile ukusiza iqembu lidlulele kuma-quarterfinal eCarling. UCedric Kaze ongomunye wabaqeqeshi beChiefs, uthe le ndaba izoxoxwa ngaphakathi eqenjini. "Leyo yinto esizobhekana nayo ngaphakathi. Uzizwe ekulungele ukuqhubeka kumaphenathi asize iqembu. Ubeqonde okuhle ngalokho kodwa mhlawumbe hhayi ngendlela obekumele kwenzeke ngayo. Kodwa yinto esizoyikhuluma ngaphakathi,'' kusho uKaze egwema ukuchaza okuningi. Kuyaziwa kwiChiefs ukuthi isenzo esikhombisa ukungayilandeli imiyalelo asithathwa kancane. Ngo-2022 umdlali wasemuva, uNjabulo Ngcobo, waxabana nomqeqeshi wonozinti uLee Baxter owayezama ukumkhuza kulandela ukukhombisa ukungakwenameli ukukhishwa ngumqeqeshi u-Arthur Zwane. Lo mdlali waphoqwa ukuthi axolise kubalandeli ngesenzo sakhe. Kusuka lapho aziphindanga zamhambela kahle izinto eNaturena, wagcina exoshiwe. UNtwari wenza lokhu nje ngeSonto, ubethole isikimu kungalindele muntu. Ngaphambi komdlalo uKaze uthe bekuvele kuwuhlelo lwabo ukuvimbisa lo nozinti kwiCarling. "Yinto esivumelane ngayo ngaphambi kokuqala kwesizini ukuthi uFiacre uzodlala kwiCarling. Ubeziqeqesha kahle, wenze kahle emidlalweni ayidlalele iqembu lesizwe. Ungumdlali iqembu elimthandayo futhi siyabona ukuthi uziqeqesha kanjani nsuku zonke. Kuhle ukuthi simnike ithuba lokumbona ukuthi yini angayenza,"kusho uKaze.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UVUYO Mere owayengumdlali weMamelodi Sundowns neBafana Bafana, uyasigxeka isinyathelo samaqembu eBetway Premiership sokuxosha abadlali abanamava, adume nabasebancane. UMere ngomunye wabadlali abadlale isikhathi eside esigabeni esikhokhelayo eMzansi. Waqala ukudala kwiBetway Premiership ngo- 2004 eyibamba kwiHellenic yaseKapa. Uyeke ibhola ngesizini edlule esedlalela iTS Galaxy, wajoyina ithimba layo labaqeqeshi. Njengoba isizini yePremiership isiphakathi, baningi abadlali asebehanjelwe yiminyaka abangawatholi amaqembu. Kulaba badlali kubalwa uRamahlwe Mphahlele (35) noWayde Jooste (34) abahlukane naMaZulu, Thamsanqa Mkhize (37) obengukaputeni weCape Town City, Lindokuhle Mbatha (40) obeyibamba kwiGalaxy nabanye. Sekuyinto ejwayelekile eMzansi ukuthi abadlali abaneminyaka engaphezu kuka-30 yobudala bashaywe ngesithende. "Kuningi okuhle nokubi ngoba uma usunabadlali abaningi abancane eqenjini, akekho okhuza omunye. Akekho okhomba indlela, akhuze uma sebephuma endleleni. Abadlali abadala sebeyagudluzwa okuyinto engiphatha kabi. Ngifisa ukuthi amaqembu abagcine abadlali abadala abenele ukuze bezocathulisa abancane," kusho uMere. "Abadlali abadala benza umsebenzi omkhulu ngaphakathi eqenjini, bayazi ukuthi kungani bekhona. Bahlala becabangela imindeni yabo ngoba bayazi ukuthi sesiyaphela isikhathi sabo esigabeni esiphezulu. Ngakho bazama ukwelula isikhathi sabo enkundleni ekubeni abadlali abancane bayazi ukuthi kuneqembu elisazobasayinisa okuyinto embi. Uma usuqala ukukholwa ukuthi kukhona abazokuthatha, wayeka ukujabulela ikhaya lakho, uzoshayeka. Sibabonile abadlali abaphezulu abadlale eNdebeni yoMhlaba nasemaqenjini amakhulu, emuva kokuphuma kuwona, akasekho obafunayo." Nakuba isaqhubeka eyokushaywa ngesithende kwabadlali abadala kodwa akhona amaqembu avuna izithelo zokudlalisa abancane emaqenjini ePremiership. Emaqenjini ashintshele kwinjejane kukhona i-Orlando Pirates eshaya ngoMbekezeli Mbokazi (20), Relebohile Mofokeng (20) asebephenduke abadlali beBafana Bafana.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: INHLANGANO eyengamele ibhola emhlabeni, iFifa, yephuce iBafana Bafana amaphuzu kulandela ukudlalisa kungafanele umdlali wasesiswini, uTeboho Mokoena, ngesikhathi ibhekene neLesotho emdlalweni wokuhlungela iNdebe yoMhlaba ngoMashi, nonyaka. Emasontweni adlule, iFifa ithumelele iSouth African Football Association (Safa) incwadi iyazisa ukuthi isiluqalile uphenyo mayelana nokudlaliswa kukaMokoena owaboshelwa enamakhadi aphuzi amabili. Kulowo mdlalo, iBafana yawina ngo 2-0. Nokho konke lokho kujikile kwazise iFifa isiwathathile lawo maphuzu, umphumela womdlalo yawunika iLesotho ngo 3-0. Ngaphezu kwalokho, iSafa ihlawuliswe imali elinganiselwa ku-R217 000. UMokoena uxwayisiwe kuphela. Ukuhamba kwamaphuzu amathathu eBafana, ebisesicongweni kuGroup C, kusho ukuthi isiyalingana neBenin ngawu-14 emuva kwemidlalo eyisishiyagalombili. Akubuzwa ukuthi lokhu kufaka ingcindezi njengoba leli qembu eliholwa ngumqeqeshi, uHugo Broos, lizodlala imidlalo emibili yokugcina yokuhlungela iNdebe yoMhlaba. IBafana izobhekana neZimbabwe eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, ngo-Okthoba 10, isonge neRwanda ngo-Okthoba 14 eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit. Abafana bakaBroos sebedinga ukuyiwina yombili le midlalo, bathandazele ukuthi iBenin ingawini ngamagoli amaningi emidlalweni emibili ezoyidlala neRwanda ngo-Okthoba, 10 neNigeria ngo-Okthoba 14, ekuhambeni. INigeria esendaweni yesithathu kwi-log kaGroup C, isibuyele ngokugcwele embangweni wokuqeda eqhulwini. ISuper Eagles inamaphuzu angu-11 emidlalweni eyisishiyagalombili. Lokhu kusho ukuthi uma ingehlula iLesotho neBenin ingaba namaphuzu angu-17.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UKUTHOLA isibhaxu kwamaqembu abebanga ukuhlala esicongweni seDStv Diski Challenge, kuweze ngelibanzi i-Orlando Pirates esiqhwekele. IPirates iqoqe amaphuzu amathathu ngokwehlula iTS Galaxy ngo 2-0 ngoMgqibelo, yahlala esicongweni se-log ngamaphuzu angu-10 emidlalweni emine. Bekubhekwe ukuthi iKaizer Chiefs, Mamelodi Sundowns neStellenbosch bazocosha amaphuzu emidlalweni yabo yayizolo, bayigudluze iPirates engayiqalanga kahle sizini ka-2025/2026. Nokho kuyiweze ngelibanzi ukuthola isibhaxu izolo kwalezi zimbangi esezike zayiwina iligi yeDiski. iChiefs yehlulwe ngaMaZulu ngo 1-0 ekhaya, iStellenbosch yaphuma inqina kamabuyaze kwiSiwelele, ishaywa ngo 3-0, kwathi iSundowns yakhala ngaphansi kwiRichards Bay ngo 1-0. AmaZulu neBay basezithendeni zePirates ngamaphuzu ayisishiyagalolunye iqembu ngalinye. IPirates engakaze iyiwine iligi yeDiski, ishaya ngomqeqeshi omusha, uRoscoe Krieling, owayiqukula le ndebe ngo-2023 eyiphini likaThabo September kwiSuperSport United. Akubuzwa ukuthi le ndebe ilindelwe kakhulu emahhovisi eZimnyama. Umqeqeshi ogqamise abadlali abaningi bePirates abanye asebeyibamba esikimini seBetway Premiership, uJoseph Makhanya, ugudluziwe kwesokupheka iqembu leDiski emuva kokwehluleka ukuwina iligi kumasizini amathathu. Nokho, ukhiqize abadlali abanekhono okubalwa kubona uRelebohile Mofokeng, Mohau Nkota noMbekezeli Mbokazi bonke asebedlalela iqembu lesizwe, iBafana Bafana. Ngaphandle kweZimnyama ezinyukele esicongweni, kukhona amaqembu azuze amaphuzu amathathu okuqala kule sizini. Iwini yeSiwelele kwiStellenbosch bekungeyokuqala selokhu kuqale isizini kuleli qembu elihaqwe yizinkinga nangaphandle kwenkundla. Kwenzeke okufanayo kwiDurban City ekhiphe ibhadi ngeMagesi, iyibhubhudla ngo 5-0 ekubeni ingakaze ishaye nelilodwa iqembu kule sizini kwiDiski. Imiphumela yeDStv Diski Challenge: Orlando Pirates 2-0 TS Galaxy; Golden Arrows 1-2 Orbit College; Marumo Gallants 3-2 Chippa United; Kaizer Chiefs 0-1 AmaZulu; Siwelele 3-0 Stellenbosch; Durban City 5-0 Magesi; Polokwane City 0-2 Sekhukhune United; Mamelodi Sundowns 0-1 Richards Bay

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UKUBALWA namaligi aphezulu emhlabeni kwePremier Soccer League kuletha ukuzigqaja kubantu baseNingizimu Afrika ikakhulukazi abazifela ngonobhutshuzwayo. Leli zinga lisho ukuthi iPSL yenza izinto ngendlela ehlelekile nenobulungiswa njengokuthi imidlalo idlalelwa ezinkundleni ezisezingeni, idlalwa ngesikhathi esinqunyiwe nezinga lebhola liphezulu. Nokho kuhlale kuqhamuka okubi okubeka engcupheni isithunzi nokuhlonishwa kwale nhlangano eholwa ngu-Irvin Khoza. Kushaqise abaningi ukuvela kwezindaba zokuthi abanikazi beqembu elisha iSiwelele, abasanda kuthenga iSuperSport United, bahambisa abadlali ngebhasi uma beyodlala imidlalo. Lokhu akwehlisi isithunzi sePSL kuphela kodwa kukhombisa ukungabakhathaleli abadlali uma ubheka isibalo sezingozi emigwaqweni yaseNingizimu Afrika. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kusalindeleke ukuthi badlale bawine emuva kokugoqana ebhasini amahora aminingi. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, iPSL inikeza wonke amaqembu kwiBetway Premiership imali engaphezu kuka-R2 million ngenyanga yokuwalekelela ngezindleko. Okushaqise kakhulu wukuzwa usihlalo weSiwelele, uCalvin Le John oyindodana kaGayton McKenzie, ethi abazile ukuzolahlekelwa yimali ebholeni njengoba futhi bengazile ukuzokwenza inzuzo. Le nkulumo ikubeka ngokusobala ukuthi akukho lesi sikhulu esizimisele ngokukushintsha kuleli qembu. IPSL isibhekene nalokhu nje, akukapheli nesikathi esingakanani ixazulule inkiyankiya yeRoyal AM egcine ixoshiwe ngenxa yokwehluleka wukunika le nhlangano isiqiniseko sokuthi izoyidlala yonke imidlalo kulandela amacala entela abebhekene nomphathi wayo uShawun "MaMkhize'' Mkhize. UMaMkhize wayethenge iqembu laseFree State, iBloemfontein Celtic elalinenkinga yemali. Kuyiqiniso ukuthi iSuperSport ibingasenayo imali yokuqhubeka neqembu kodwa ibibalwa naphethwe ngendlela ehlelekile kwiPremiership. Isixazululo wukuthi iPSL kumele iphenyisise isimo semali kwabathenga amaqembu nolwazi lwebhola ezikhulwini kwazise lokhu kugcine kuhlukumeza abadlali futhi kwehlise nesithunzi seligi.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: INHLANGANO eyengamele ibhola emhlabeni, iFifa, isiqale uphenyo mayelana nokudlaliswa kungafanele komdlali weBafana Bafana, uTeboho Mokoena, emdlalweni wokuhlungela iNdebe yoMhlaba ngasekuqaleni konyaka. IBafana inethuba lokuzibekisela indawo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ka-2026, ezodlalela eCanada, USA naseMexico, emuva kweminyaka yagcina ukuzingenela ngokwamandla ayo. Igcine ukudlala kulo mqhudelwano ngo-2010, ingosokhaya lapho eyaphuma khona emzuliswaneni wokuqala. Njengoba leli qembu eliholwa ngumqeqeshi, uHugo Broos, liqhubeka nokuqoqa amaphuzu, liphezulu ithemba nenjabulo kubalandeli bebhola eMzansi. Nokho leyo njabulo ingase iphenduke usizi uma iBafana igcina ngokuphucwa amaphuzu. Icala leNingizimu Afrika elokudlalisa uMokoena enamakhadi amabili aphuzi ngesikhathi iBafana ibhekene neLesotho emdlalweni ewunqobe ngo 2-0 ePolokwane ngoMashi. Lo mdlali oneminyaka engu-28, wathola amakhadi aphuzi ngesikhathi iBafana ibhekene neBenin ngo-2023 nangesikhathi idlala neZimbabwe ngoJuni, nyakenye. Lokhu kusho ukuthi bekungafanele adlale koweLesotho. Leli phephandaba lithole ukuthi iFifa ibhalele iSouth African Football Association (Safa) ifuna izincazelo ngokwenzeka. ISafa noMokoena babekwe amacala ngokwephula imithetho okubalwa kuyona ukudlalisa umdlali ongafanele ukuba nenkundleni. "Isimo sibi, ifikile incwadi yeFifa. Lokhu kusho ukuthi amaphuzu azohamba uma iFifa isilulandela lolu daba ngoba yinto ekhona eyokudlaliswa kukaMokoena," kusho umthombo weSolezwe ongaphakathi kwiSafa. ISafa ibingakaphawuli ngokufika kwencwadi yeFifa. UMninawa Ntloko oyikhulumelayo, ubengalupheduli ucingo lwakhe izolo. Ngokubika kwe-SABC, icala selisezandleni zekomiti eliqondisa ubugwegwe leFifa. Ngokwencwadi ethunyelwe ngoSepthemba 15, iSafa noMokoena banikwe izinsuku eziyisithupha ukuphendula. Uma iNingizimu Afrika itholakala inecala, ingephucwa amaphuzu anikezwe iLesotho namagoli amathathu ngaphezulu. Kungenzeka iphinde ihlawuliswe nangokukhokhiswa imali noma ikhishwe emqhudelwaneni. Uma iBafana iphucwa amaphuzu, ingalingana neBenin ngamaphuzu angu-14 emuva kwemidlalo eyisishiyagalombili kodwa iqhubeke nokuhlala esicongweni ngenxa yokuba namagoli amaningi. IBafana iseqhulwini kuGroup C ngamaphuzu angu-17. Nakuba iBafana isisengcupheni yokuphucwa amaphuzu kodwa kubalulekile ukucacisa ukuthi iLesotho ayisifakanga isimangalo ngesikhathi esikalwe yiFifa okungamahora angu-24 ngemuva komdlalo. Emuva kwesikhathi lolu daba lulenga, iNigeria namanye amazwe abelokhu eqhubeka nokufaka ingcindezi kwiFifa.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: LIGQABUKILE igoda phakathi kweKaizer Chiefs nomqeqeshi, uNasreddine Nabi, obenuka iqaqa kubalandeli bayo. Ngokwemibiko elishone elayizolo isisabalele, uNabi uhlukane naMakhosi ngenxa yokuthi akanawo amaphepha afanele amgunyaza ukuthi ahlale ebhentshini emidlalweni yeCaf. IChiefs izobhekana neKabuscorp S.C.P yase-Angola emdlalweni womlenze wokuqala wokuhlungela isigaba samaqoqo seCaf Confederation Cup ngoMgqibelo ngo-5 ntambama ekuhambeni. Owomlenze wesibili uzoba seFNB Stadium, eNasrec, ngoSepthemba 27, UNabi oqede isomiso sezindebe seminyaka kwiChiefs eyiwinisa iNedbank Cup ngesizini edlule, ubengekho emidlalweni yokuqala yesizini yaMakhosi aqoqe kuyona amaphuzu agcwele. Kuthiwa utheleke eNaturena izolo, watshelwa ukuthi useyamiswa emsebenzini ngenxa yamaphepha akhe okuqeqesha emidlalweni yeCaf angaqondile. Lo mqeqeshi waseTunisia unelayisensi yokuqeqesha yase-Europe, i-UEFA Pro License, ephelelwa yisikhathi ngo-2026, okuzodingeka ayivuselele. Ngokwezinga, le layisensi iyalingana neyokuqeqesha yase-Afrika, iCaf Pro License efunekayo emidlalweni yeCaf. Ngokwemibiko esabalele, amaphepha ahambisana nelayisensi yakhe amgunyaza ukuthi aqeqeshe kwiCaf, asedlulelwe yisikhathi. Ngokubika kwe-SABC, amaphepha aqondile kaNabi agcine efikile kodwa kube nhlanga zimuka nomoya, izinhlangothi zombili zavumelana ngokuthi zihlukane izindlela. Ngaphezu kwendaba yamaphepha, kuthiwa abaphathi beChiefs bacikwe yindlela iqembu elihlulwe ngayo yiSekhukhune United emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngoLwesibili. Amakhosi akhale ngaphansi ngo 3-1 obekungokokuqala ehlulwa kule sizini futhi abeqala ukulanda ibhola enethini. . UNabi uhlukana neChiefs nje, emasontweni adlule uphoqeleke ukubuyela ekhaya eTunisia kulandela ukulimala komkakhe. Umkhumbi waMakhosi uwushiye ezandleni zamaphini akhe uKhalil Ben Youssef noCedric Kaze. Ngaphansi kwawo, iChiefs iwine imidlalo emithathu ilandelana ixebula iStellenbosch ngo 2-0, Polokwane City ngo 1-0 neBay United ngo 1-0. Ekubuyeni kukaNabi, iChiefs ibanjwe yiMamelodi Sundowns ngo 0-0, yahlula iLamontville Golden Arrows ngaphambi kokwehlulwa yiSekhukhune United ngoLwesibili ebusuku. IDiski Times iveze ukuthi isizathu zokuhlukana kwakhe neChiefs wukuthi udinga ukuyobhekana nezimo zangaphandle kwenkundla okubalwa kuzona impilo yomkakhe. IChiefs ayiphawulanga ngezindaba zokuhlukana kwayo noNabi.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMGADLI waseNingizmu Afrika, uThandanani 'Obama' Mhlongo ongomunye wabadlali bakuleli abagqamile emqhudelwaneni iCosafa Cup oqhubekayo eZimbabwe Image: Isithombe:COSAFA IQEMBU lesizwe lika-Under 17, Amajimbos, lizibeke ethubeni lokuvikela indebe yeCosafa Cup ngokwedlulela kowandulela owamanqamu izolo. Amajimbos ahlule iMalawi ngo 4-1 emdlalweni wokugcina wesigaba samaqoqo eNgoni Stadium, eHarare, eZimbabwe. Amagoli aweze iqembu lakuleli ashaywe ngu-Inganathi Simama amabili, Mpho Molepo noNtokozo Madondo. Abafana bomqeqeshi, uVela Khumalo, sebezobhekana neComoros kowandulela owamanqamu kusasa ngo-12 emini. Komunye umdlalo owandulela owamanqamu, iMozambique izoqhuthana ne-Angola. Ukudlulela kowandulela owamanqamu kweqembu laseMzansi kusho ukuthi lisethubeni lokuvikela indebe yeCosafa eliyinqobe nyakenye. INingizimu Afrika iyona eyawunqoba futhi lo mqhudelwano udlalwa okokuqala ngo-1994. ICosafa edlalwa ngamazwe angu-12 asezansi ne-Afrika, isetshenziselwa ukuhlungela omkhulu okuyi-Africa Cuo of Nations (Afcon). Amajimbos aseshaye amagoli angu-12, angenelwa ngamabili kuphela. Aqale ngokuvulela isibhaxu sika 3-0 kwiZambia engelinye lamazwe ahlonishwayo emiqhudelwaneni yabasakhula e-Afrika. Emdlalweni wesibili Amajimbos azidlele amahlanga kwiMadagascar iyilobola ngo 5-1, ngaphambi kokuqeda ngeMalawi kowayizolo. Kubadlali abagqamile eqenjini laseMzansi, kukhona uThandanani "Obama" Mhlongo odlalela AmaZulu, oshaye amagoli amathathu koweMadagascar. Ngaphambi kokuqala kweCosafa, uKhumalo ubebalisa ngokungasitholi isikhathi sokulungiselela iqembu lakhe ngenxa yokuthi abadlali bayafunda.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Mbokazi's star continues to shine ISITOBHA se-Orlando Pirates, uMbekezeli Mbokazi, abanye abasifuna esikwatini sakuleli sika-Under 20 esizodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngenyanga ezayo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX IHLUKENE imibono ngodaba lokuyodlala emqhudelwaneni weNdebe yoMhlaba yabaneminyaka engaphansi kuka-20 kukaMbekezeli Mbokazi osephenduke ithemba le-Orlando Pirates neBafana Bafana. Iqembu laseMzansi lika-Under 20, Amajita, lizodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ezoba seChile kusukela ngoSepthemba 27 kuya ku-Okthoba 19. Umqeqeshi walo, uRaymond Mdaka omfunayo uMbokazi (19), uzosimemezela namuhla isikwati sabadlali abangu-23 esizomela iNingizimu Afrika kulo mqhudelwano odonsa amaqembu amakhulu emhlabeni ahlale ethungatha abadlali abanekhono. Ngenxa yokuthi lo mqhudelwano awukho ngaphansi kwekhalenda leFifa, amaqembu awaphoqelekile ukudedela abadlali. Yilokho ke okwenza imibono ihlukane ngoMbokazi abaningi ababona edingeka kwiBafana ezodlala imidlalo yokuhlungela iNdebe yoMhlaba ngenyanga ezayo. Kanjalo nakwiPirates uyadingeka kwazise izitobha zayo zibuya ekulimaleni. UBheki Mdletshe, owayeqeqesha uMbokazi kusukela esemncane eHluhluwe, KwaNibela, uthe ngokwakhe ufisa lo mdlali agxile kwiBafana. "Ngokwethu sibheke ukuthi adlalele iBafana ukuze kuzonyuka isibalo semidlalo eqenjini lesizwe okuyinto ezosisiza njengoba kukhona amaqembu aphesheya kwezilwandle amfunayo. Imidlalo yeqembu lika-Under 20 ayisisizi ngalutho kulokho. Ngikhulumile naye ngendaba yokudlalela iqembu lika-Under 20, washo ukuthi akufuna kakhulu wukudlalela iBafana," kusho uMdletshe. UMbokazi ugcine ukudlalela Amajita ewina umqhudelwaneni iCosafa Cup eMozambique, nyakenye. Kulo mqhudelwano ubedlala ngokuzwana maphakathi emuva noTylon Smith osedlalela iQueens Park Rangers yase-England. Ubengekho ngesikhathi Amajita ewina i-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) e-Egypt ngoMeyi. Umqeqeshi we-Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ukubeke eqenjini okuzokwenzeka ngoMbokazi. "Mayelana nokaputeni wethu (Mbokazi), ngeke ngimvimbe futhi iqembu alimvimbi umdlali ekuyeni eqenjini lesizwe. Kubalulekile ukumela izwe nokuba yingxenye yabadlali abahamba phambili ezweni. Sizokhuluma nabaphathi mayelana nalokho (ukuthi uMbokazi uzoya yini kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ka-Under 20) kodwa ngeke simvimbe umuntu ekudlaleleni iqembu lesizwe,"kusho u-Ouaddou. Umengameli weSouth African Football Association (Safa), uDanny Jordaan, ucashunwe yiSABC ethi unethemba kokuthi iPirates izomdedela uMbokazi. "Asikazi sibe nomdlali wasemuva oseqophelweni eliphezulu kule minyaka (engaphansi kuka-20). Ithuba lokudlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ka-Under 20 likhulu ngoba umhlaba wonke uyayibuka. Ngithemba ukuthi sizobona ngaso linye nePirates,"usho kanje. "Sineqembu eliqinile futhi ngiyathemba ukuthi uMbokazi uzohamba nalo ngoba uma ekhona udonga lwethu lwasemuva luzoqina kakhulu." Abanye abadlali okulindeleke ukuthi bathole indawo esikwatini sikaMdaka nguSmith, Siyabonga Mabena weMamelodi Sundowns noNaledi Hlongwane weKaizer Chiefs.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UKATLEGO Otladisa ozama inhlanhla kwiDurban City emuva kwamasonto echithwe yi-Orlando Pirates Image: Isithombe:FACEBOOK UMDLALI ochithwe yi-Orlando Pirates, uKatlego Otladisa, uselinde abaphathi beDurban City ukuthi banqume ngekusasa lakhe njengoba ezama inhlanhla kuleli qembu. U-Otladisa ukhonjwe indlela yiPirates emasontweni adlule, emuva kwamasonto ambalwa ebuye ekubolekisweni kwiSekhukhune United. Leli qembu limphindisele kweZimnyama kungasekuhle kulandela ukuxabana kwakhe nozakwabo, uKeletso Makgalwa. Kuphele isizini edlule u-Otladisa eselizwa ngendaba ijezi kwiSekhukhune. Ngesonto eledlule, kuvele ukuthi lo mdlali odle ngejubane nomjiko uziqeqesha neCity ngaphansi kweso elibukhali lomqeqeshi, uGavin Hunt. Imenenja ka-Otladisa, uNimrod Mbhalati, ithe sebelinde isinqumo sabaphathi beCity ngekusasa lalo mdlali. "U-Otladisa useqede isonto lonke kwiDurban City. Ngafonelwa ngusihlalo (Farook Kadodia) wacela ukuthi bezombukela eduzane, bamhlelela konke. Uqale ukuziqeqesha ngoMgqibelo odlule. Akhona namanye amaqembu amfunayo kodwa sinqume ukunika ithuba iDurban City, sibone ukuthi kuphelelaphi,'' kusho uMbhalati. "Sisalindile ukuzwa ukuthi kuzophetha kanjani kodwa sinethemba. Ukuziqeqesha kwakhe neqembu isikhathi eside kanje kuyizinkomba zokuthi izinto zizolunga. Naye umfana unethemba lokuthi uzolithola ikhaya elisha kwiCity." U-Otladisa owakhulela kwiPlatinum Stars ayevutha kuyona, usebuya nakwiMamelodi Sundowns aphume kuyona eminyakeni edlule, emuva kokuhlala isikhathi eside engadlali ehlushwa wukulimala. Wabuyela ezingeni lakhe ngesizini ka-2022/2023 esedlalela iMarumo Gallants. Yilapho iPirates eyanquma ukumsayinisa khona. "Uphatheke kabi ngesikhathi ehlukana nePirates kodwa kufanele aqhubekele phambili. Kufanele impilo iqhubeke. Akukhona okokuqala ehlukana neqembu elikhulu.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI wasemuva we-Orlando Pirates, uNkosinathi Sibisi, ufuna balwele ukuwina zonke izicoco kwiBetway Premiership Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UKAPUTENI we-Orlando Pirates, uNkosinathi ''Bhodlela'' Sibisi, udalule ukuthi ukushaya ngenqwaba yabadlali abaseqophelweni eliphezulu kubenza balambele ukuwola ezinye izicoco kwiBetway Premership. IPirates iqukule indebe yeMTN8 okwesine kulandelana ngemuva kokuxebula iStellenbosch FC Nelspruit, ngempelasonto edlule. Ngalokhu, iqophe umlando wokuba yiqembu lokuqala eMzansi eliwine le ndebe, okuvulwa ngayo isizini, amahlandla amane elandelana. Nakuba abalandeli beZimnyama bejabule ngokuwina kweqembu labo indebe kodwa emasontweni adlule bekunokungabaza ngesikhathi kufika umqeqeshi omusha, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ongene endaweni kaJose Riveiro abebemthanda. Lokhu kungabaza kubhebhethekiswe yindlela eZimnyama eziqale ngayo imidlalo yePremiership, zihluleka ukucosha amaphuzu agcwele emidlalweni emibili yokuvula lapho ezihlulwe khona yiSekhukhune United, zabanjwa yiMarumo Gallants. Okunye obekucika abalandeli wukudlalisa kwakhe inqwaba yabadlali abasha. Nokho ngokuwina iMTN8, kubukeka lo mqeqeshi esezifakile ezinhliziyweni zabalandeli bePirates. "Uma kunoshintsho kubakhona ukungabaza. Kodwa thina besazi ukuthi yini esingayenza futhi ngicabanga ukuthi sikutshengisile lokho ngesikhathi siseSpain (bezicijela ukuqala kwesizini). Kube nokuhixihixi nje nokuqala kabi isizini kwiligi kodwa siyalazi izinga eliphezulu labadlali esinabo. Ngakho ke akukho ukungaphuphi ngokuwina zonke izindebe. Ayikho enye indlela enhle yokuqala ngaphandle kokuwina iMTN8. Ngicabanga ukuthi kufanele sikhokhele iqembu ngokuwina le miqhudelwano. Okwethu wukuqhubeka nokusebenza, sibone ukuthi kuhamba kanjani," kusho uSibisi. EZimnyama zidlale zisebuhlungwini kulandela ukulimala engozini yomgwaqo kwethimba labaqeqeshi okukhona kulona u-Ouaddou nomdlali wasemuva, uThapelo Xoki. U-Ouaddou ubeqeqesha egodle ingalo. "Le nto eyethu sonke, abanathi lapha nabangekho. Ngokwethu, wumsebenzi weqembu lonke futhi sizoqhubeka sokusebenza. Sizolwela zonke izindebe ngenxa yobisi lwabadlali esinalo," kusho uSibisi. IPirates okuhlehliswe umdlalo wayo weligi naMaZulu, isizobhekana neLioli yaseLesotho, kowomlenze wokuqala wokuhlungela isigaba samaqoqo seCaf Champions League eFree State Stadium, eBloemfontein, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. Owomlenze wesibili uzoba se-Orlando Stadium, eSoweto, ngoSepthemba 27.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI wasemuva, uLiam De Kock, uyabuqonda ubungozi beSiwelele FC abazobhekana nayo emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eChatsworth Stadum namuhla ebusuku Image: Isithombe:FACEBOOK/DURBAN CITY ISITOBHA seDurban City, uLiam De Kock, siyachazeka ngokubukelwa phansi kwabo kwiligi yeBetway Premiership. ICity engomakoti kwiPremiership, imangaze abaningi iqala isizini ngegiya eliphezulu kule ligi ethathwa njengenye yanzima ebholeni lase-Afrika. Emidlalweni eyisihlanu, iwine emibili, yadlala ngokulingana kwemibili, yahlulwa kowodwa. Leli qembu eliphekwa ngumqeqeshi, uGavin Hunt, lithola le miphumela nje, lisathungatha abadlali elizoqinisa ngabo njengoba lilwela ukungabuyeli kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship. Nokho selivele linaso isisekelo esiqinile kwazise lishaya ngabadlali abanamava okubalwa kubona unozinti uDarren Keet noThabo Nodada abagawulwe yizembe neCape Town City ekupheleni kwesizini edlule. UDe Kock, owayedlalela iStellenbosch FC kwiDStv Diski Challenge, ubona ukuthathwa kancane kwabo kubasebenzela. "Kusuka emdlalweni odlule (abahlulwe kuwona yiSekhukhune United ngo 2-0) besisebenza kanzima, sizama ukulungisa amaphutha esiwenzile. Okungijabulisa kakhulu wukuthi abantu basithatha kancane, abalazi izinga eliphezulu kubadlali esinabo. Iyangithokozisa futhi nendlela esizwana ngayo singabadlali. Ngakho enkundleni kukhulu esizokwenza,"kusho uDe Kock. iCity izokwamukela iSiwelele FC emdlalweni wePremiership eChatsworth Stadium namuhla ngo-7.30 ebusuku. Kuleli qembu, uHunt uzobhekana nabadlali abaziyo kwazise ubebaqeqesha besabizwa ngeSuperSport United ngaphambi kokuxoshwa ngesizini edlule. Akubuzwa ukuthi lolu lwazi uzolusebenzisa ukubahlelela ukuze kujabule abaqashi bakhe abasha abamcoshe ejika nelanga ngaphambi kokuqala kwesizini ka-2025/2026. "ISiwelele inakho ukuba nzima njengeqembu ngosuku lwayo futhi ingenza ezibukwayo. Kodwa ngiyakholelwa kubafana ukuthi bazokwazi ukwenza okulindelekile. Ngicela abalandeli beDurban City baphume ngobuningi ukuzoseseka kulo mdlalo," kusho uDe Kock.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: BAPHINDE bagqemeka engeqiwa ntwala abalandeli beRichards Bay FC abebekubheke ngabomvu ukubuka leli qembu ligijima eMhlathuze Sports Complex kulandela ukufeyiliswa kwale nkundla yiPremier Soccer League (PSL). IBay ibihlele ukudlala imidlalo yasekhaya yeBetway Premiership yesizini ka-2025/2026, eMhlathuze, kwazise selokhu yanyukela kulesi sigaba izinze eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza. Kwenyuke ithemba lokuthi izobuyela ekhaya ngesikhathi inkundla uMhlathuze Sports Complex ivulwa ngemidlalo yeKZN Premier's Cup ngenyanga edlule. Kule midlalo, abalandeli badele imvula namakhaza bezobuka amaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal adlala kwiPSL egadulisana eMhlathuze. Nokho le midlalo iyona eholele ekutheni konakale utshani kule nkundla. IBay bekufanele idlale umdlalo wokuqala wesizini neMarumo Gallants ngo-Agasti 9, kodwa yagcina ithuthele eMlaza ngenxa yokuthi iPSL ikhala ngokuthi inkundla ayikho esimweni esifanele. Leli qembu eliholwa nguSifiso "Jomo" Biyela likhiphe isitatimende ngaphambi kwalo mdlalo, lazisa abezindaba ukuthi lizobuyela ekhaya uma selibhekene neChippa United ngo-Agasti 26 (kusasa). Nokho lo mdlalo usuzodlalelwa ePrincess Magogo Stadium KwaMashu, ngo-7.30 ebusuku, ngenxa yokuthi inkundla ayikabi sesimweni esifanele. Ukungalungi kwenkudla kuphazamise neMilford FC eyibamba kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship egcine idlale neLeruma Lions eChatsworth Stadium. Ngokwencwadi ethunyelelwe amaqembu emasontweni adlule ngemuva kwePremier's Cup, isikhulu sePSL uRonnie Schloss, sikubeke ngokusobala ukuthi inkundla isekude ukulunga. Ngaleso sikhathi uSchloss ukhombe amasonto amathathu. "Kusemqoka ukukhumbula ukuthi cishe sisenezinye izinyanga eziyishumi zokudlala ibhola ngaphambi kwethu futhi kubalulekile ukuthi sizivikele zonke izinkundla zethu ukuqinisekisa ukuthi zimelana nesizini yonke," kusho uSchloss encwadini. "Amasoyi otshani atshaliwe ezindaweni ezigebhukile, kusamele zifake izimpande phansi ukuze sibe nenkundla okudlalekayo kuyona. Ukudlala enkundleni ikulesi simo kuyingozi kubadlali okuyinto okumele siyicabange. Ngalokho, insimu ngiyithola njengekungadlaleki kuyona, inkundla ivalile kuze kuba niyaziswa ngokunye." Ngokoluhla lwemidlalo yeBay, leli qembu liyoze lidlale ekhaya uma selibhekene neTS Galaxy ngoSepthemba 17. Imizamo yokuthola uBiyela ayiphumelelanga kwazise ucingo lwakhe ubengalubambi.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: BASWELE amaphiko abadlali be-Orlando Pirates emuva kokuthi uTshegofatso Mabasa eshaye phakathi iphenathi eqinisekise ukuthi bazodlala kowamanqamu weMTN8 Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMDLALO weMamelodi Sundowns ne-Orlando Pirates kwiMTN8, uqubule imizwa eyahlukene yabalandeli ngabaqeqeshi bala maqembu. Abazifela ngeZimnyama bebemdinelwe u-Abdeslam Ouaddou ngaphambi kwalo mdlalo eziwunqobe ngo 4-1 kumaphenathi ngenxa yokwehluleka kwazo ukucosha amaphuzu emidlalweni yeBetway Premiership nokubeka ngaphandle kwakhe izintandokazi zabadlali. Nokho uligezile igama lakhe ngoMgqibelo, ePitoli, efaka leli qembu kowamanqamu weMTN8 esizobhekana kuwona neStellenbosch. Ngasohlangothini lweSundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, ujikelwe ngabalandeli, bafuna ukumthela isibhaxu ngesikhathi ibhasi leqembu liphuma enkundleni. Ukugxekwa kwakhe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kukhomba ukuthi abalandeli abasamfuni eChloorkop. Nakuba bebengakugqamisi lokhu kodwa bebeyikhulumela phansi eyokuthi abaneme ngokwehlulweka kwakhe ukuwina iCaf Champions League.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ISITOBHA seStellenbosch FC, uThabo Moloisane, onconywa ngokuzimisela phezu kokuba engase alishiye leli qembu Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX AKAZIMISELE ngokushiya iStellenbosch FC umdlali wasemuva, uThabo Moloisane, okusabalele ukuthi uyanqaba ukuvuselela inkontileka yakhe ezophela ekupheleni kwesizini ka-2025/2026. UMoloisane ushaye into ecokeme ngesikhathi iStellies yehlula iSekhukhune United ngo 2-0 emdlalweni womlenze wokuqala owandulela owamanqamu weMTN8 eDanie Craven Stadium, eStellenbosch, ngoMgqibelo. Amagoli aqinisekise ukuthi leli qembu lizongena enkundleni kowomlenze wesibili linethezekile, ashaywe nguGodswill Enyinnaya noDevin Titus. La maqembu azogadulisana futhi ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoMgqibelo ngo-6 ntambama. Umqeqeshi weStellies, uSteve Barker, uchazekile ngendlela uMoloisane adlale ngayo phezu kokuba lingakacaci ikusasa lakhe eqenjini. Bekusabalele ukuthi lo mdlali ufunwa ngamaqembu amakhulu kwiBetway Premiership okuyi-Orlando Pirates, Kaizer Chiefs neMamelodi Sundowns esayinise uzakwabo, uFawaaz Basadien. UMoloisane ngomunye wabadlali basemuva abashaye into ecokeme ngesizini edlule, waqokelwa umklomelo weBetway Premiership Defender of The Season kodwa wakhala ngaphansi kuNkosinathi Sibisi wePirates. "Kungenxa yendlela ayiyona nohlobo lomuntu ayilona. UThabo usonyakeni wakhe wokugcina kodwa akukhona ukuthi ufuna ukuhamba. Empeleni angathanda ukuhlala aqhubeke, ngakho yinto esiphezu kwayo leyo. Ngiyamhlonipha umdlali okungenzeka ahambe kodwa aqhubeke nokudlala ngendlela adlala ngayo kuyona yonke imidlalo, ngayo yonke imizuzu. Ngokwami bekumfanele ukuba ngumdlali wasemuva ovelele ngesizini edlule. Ngicabanga ukuthi ube neshwa nje lokungakutholi lokho. Kodwa ngicabanga ukuthi namuhla uphinde walikhombisa izinga lakhe. Usebenzile," kusho uBarker. ISekhukhune idlale neStellies umqeqeshi wayo, u-Eric Tinkler, ekhale ngendlela leli qembu elimandla ngayo ekusebenziseni amaphutha ezitha. Nokho yilokho okuphinde kwenzeka cishe kuwona womabili amagoli, ikakhulukazi kwelikaTitus elingene kukade kuyikhona yabo. UBarker uncome abadlali bakhe ngokuzinikela enkundleni phezu kokuba bedlale enkundleni emanzi. "Ngicabanga ukuthi sidlale kakhulu, izimo bezinzima kodwa sakwazi ukumelana nazo kahle. Kukhona izikhathi lapho ebesidlala khona, sibanika inkinga, singazami ukudlala ibhola emuva. Ngaphandle kwalokho, sigxile eqhingeni lethu kahle," kusho uBarker. NgoLwesithathu, iStellies izovakashela i-Orlando Pirates emdlalweni weBetway Premiership e-Orlando Stadium, eSoweto, ngo-7. 30 ebusuku.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX KUSEMNYAMA ngokubuya komqeqeshi weKaizer Chiefs, uNasreddine Nabi, okuqale isizini engekho ebhentshini kulandela ukulimala komkakhe ekhaya eTunisia. AMakhosi asedlale imidlalo emibili yeBetway Premiership njengoba sekuqale isizini ka-2025/2026, aqoqa amaphuzu ayisithupha. Athele isibhaxu sika 2-0 iStellenbosch FC kowokuvula, alandelisa ngokwehlula iPolokwane City ngo 1-0. IChiefs ibikade yagcina ngesizini ka-2014/2015 isaqeqeshwa nguStuart Baxter ukuwina imidlalo emibili yokuqala yesizini ilandelana. Kuleyo sizini, Amakhosi awina isicoco seligi nendebe yeMTN8. Ukuqala kahle kweChiefs kujabulise izigidi zabalandeli bayo ababuyelwa yithemba ngokubuya kwezinsuku zenjabulo. Njengoba engekho uNabi, izintambo zokuqeqesha zibanjwe ngamaphini akhe okunguCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef. Ngesonto eledlule, uKaze ukuqinisekisile ukuthi uNabi ukwazi konke okwenzekayo ekhempini yaMakhosi kwazise bayaxhumana naye phezu kokuba ezinye izinqumo zithathwa yibona njengabantu abaqeqesha abadlali nsuku zonke. Umthombo utshele leli phephandaba ukuthi akwaziwa namanje ukuthi uNabi uzobuya nini. "UNabi uyaxhumana neqembu kodwa akukho okukhomba ukuthi usezobuya. Akwaziwa ukuthi uzobuya nini okwamanje. Akukho nokucabangela ukuthi angase ebuye nini," kusho umthombo. Ukwenza kahle kweChiefs engekho uNabi kwamukelwe ngezindlela ezahlukene ngabalandeli ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Kukhona abasho sakuntela ukuthi akasale eseqhubeka ahlale nomkakhe, iqembu libanjwe nguKaze noYoussef. Amakhosi azobuyela enkundleni kusasa uma eseyobhekana neRichards Bay FC emdlalweni wePremiership eFNB Stadium, eNasrec, ngo-7.30 ebusuku. Akubuzwa ukuthi azolwela ukuqhubeka nokuqoqa amaphuzu njengoba ebheke ukwenza kahle kule sizini. IBay ibalwa namaqembu angakawini nowokubika umdlalo weligi kule sizini. Ikhale ngaphansi kwiMarumo Gallants ngo 2-1 kowokuvula weligi ngaphambi kokuthelwa othulini yiLamontville Golden Arrows. Ngaphambi kwemidlalo yeligi, iNatal Rich Boyz yehlulwe yiMamelodi Sundowns ngo 4-0 kuma-quarterfinal eMTN8. Imidlalo yeBetway Premiership Kaizer Chiefs v Richards Bay FC (FNB Stadium, 7.30pm); Orbit College v Sekhukhune United (Dobsonville Stadium, 7.30pm); Durban City v Golden Arrows (Chatsworth Stadium, 7.30pm); Chippa United v TS Galaxy (Buffalo City Stadium, 7.30pm); Siwelele v Polokwane City (Lucas Moripe Stadium, 7.30pm) Orlando Pirates v Stellenbosch (Orlando Stadium, 7.30pm); Magesi v Mamelodi Sundowns (Seshego Stadium, 7.30pm); AmaZulu v Marumo Gallants (Princess Magogo Stadium, 7.30pm)

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Keletso Makgalwa weSekhukhune United noHendrick Ekstein wamaZulu. UKUSHAYA into ephansi emidlalweni yokuqala yesizini kwesithenjwa seSekhukhune United, uKeletso Makgalwa, akwehli kahle kumqeqeshi, u-Eric Tinkler, oqoke ukusikhumbuza ukuthi sisanenkontileka naleli qembu. UMakgalwa ngomunye wabadlali abebegqamile kwiBetway Premiership ngesizini ka-2024/2025, eshayela iSekhukhune amagoli amqoka. Ngalokhu, ugcine eqokelwe imiklomelo emikhulu okungoweBetway Premiership Players' Player of The Season nowePSL Footballer of The Season. Nokho akalibonanga elidlalayo kuyona yomibili kwazise igcine igoduke noLucas Ribeiro weMamelodi Sundowns. Selokhu kuqale isizini ka-2025/2026, uMakgalwa owakhulela kwiSundowns, akakabuyeli ezingeni elimakhele ugazi kwabaningi, kwasabalala nezindaba zokuthi ufunwa yiKaizer Chiefs. Emidlalweni emithathu yeSekhukhune, okungemibili yeligi noweMTN8, akakashayi nelokubika igoli. Kukhona abakholwa wukuthi ifomu yakhe yehliswe wukuthi iSekhukhune ayimdedelanga. "Sesixoxile naye izikhawu ezimbalwa. Angivumi. Angicabangi ukuthi uKeletso udlale kahle kule midlalo emithathu ayidlalile. Emdlalweni wokuqala, ngiyavuma, wakhe igoli kodwa bekuyikhona. Awekho amathuba angako azakhele wona noma abanye emidlalweni emibili yakamuva. Kuhlala kunamahlebezi, ikakhulukazi emuva kokuqokelwa umklomelo womdlali ovelele, nokwakha amagoli njalo njalo. Kodwa okuningi kukhomba abezindaba, kodwa hhayi njalo. Kwesinye isikhathi kuba yimenenja ekhipha lolo lwazi futhi simtshelile uKeletso ngalokho. Ngeke simvimbe ekutholeni inkontileka kwenye indawo. Kodwa kudingeka kube khona okubekwa etafuleni. Akukho," kusho uTinkler. "Ngakho yizinkulumo nje. Okufanele akuqaphele wukuthi ungumdlali wesigaba esikhokhelayo, unenkontileka neSekhukhune United futhi kumele akuphinde kabili akwenze ngesizini edlule ngoba kuzokwenza abantu bambheke ngenye indlela. Ngeke kube yinzwabethi nje evela kwimenenja nakwabezindaba. Amaqembu azothinta iSekhukhune." ISekhukhune izobhekana neStellenbosch FC emdlalweni womlenze wokuqala owandulela owamanqamu weMTN8 eDanie Craven Stadium, eStellenbosch, namuhla ngo-6 ntambama. "Lona wumdlalo omkhulu. Sizobhekana neqembu elenze kahle kumasizini amabili. Limangaze abaningi ngendlela elidlale ngayo nendawo eliqede kuyona kwiligi. Irekhodi lami njengomqeqeshi uma ngibhekene nabo alilihle. Nginethemba lokuthi sizoya laphaya ngikushintshe lokho, ngibe nenhlanhla kanjalo neSekhukhune emizamweni yethu yokudlulela kowamanqamu weMTN8. Ngeke kube lula. Bayiqembu elinzima ukudlala nalo eDanie Craven. Banabalandeli abaningi uma bedlalela eDanie Craven kunoma bedlalela e-Athlone noma eDHL Stadium. Ngakho siyazi ukuthi ngeke kubelula. Bayiqembu eligada amaphutha akho, ngakho kufanele sizibambe ziqine,"kusho uTinkler.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UJABULE wabuya nganeno umqeqeshi waMaZulu, u-Arthur Zwane, ezakhe ziqeda ukhondolo lokwehluleka wukuwina umdlalo wokuqala wesizini kwiBetway Premiership. USuthu lwehlule omakoti bePremiership, i-Orbit College, ngo 1-0 emdlalweni obusePrincess Magogo Stadium, KwaMashu, ngoMgqibelo. Igoli kube wumkhonto ogwaze ekhaya kaSekhoane Moerane esiwombeni sokuqala. UZwane uthe ukwehluleka kwezakhe ukushaya amanye amagoli kunyomfe izinhlelo zabo ebhetshini njengoba bebevele sebehlelela abazowudlala neMamelodi Sundowns eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli, kusasa ngo-7.30 ebusuku. AmaZulu abelokhu agcina ukuwina umdlalo wokuvula isizini ngeka-2017/2018. "Besinawo amathuba okushesha siwine umdlalo, siwulawule ngokwazi ukuthi sinomdlalo ngoLwesibili futhi bekudingeka ukuthi songe abanye abadlali. Ngakho besifuna okungenani ukuthola amagoli amabili, sifake abanye babadlali abasebancane sehlise isivinini somdlalo, silinde isikhathi esifanele sibalimaze futhi. Kodwa asikwenzanga lokho, ngakho kudingeke sibagcine isikhathi abanye balaba badlali, silinde isikhathi esifanele sokubakhipha ngoba bazothatha isikhathi ukubuyela esimeni njengabasebancane abazobe sebelulungele uLwesibili," kusho uZwane. ISundowns ilahle amaphuzu ngesikhathi ibambana ngo 1-1 neChippa United eGqeberha. Nakuba lokhu kufanele kube yizindaba ezinhle kuZwane kodwa akafuni bakufake ekhanda. "Ngeke sithi ngoba iSundowns idlale ngokulingana, bese sithi kuzobalula. Into engiyaziyo wukuthi kubona bonke abantu kule sizini kuzoba nzima. Ngeke kube lula ukukhuluma ngamaqembu anganikwe lutho, kuzoba nzima kakhulu. Uma ubheka emidlalweni esiyidlalile neSundowns, besilinyazwa wubuchule bomdlali othize okunguPeter Shalulile, uRibeiro (Lucas), emzuliswaneni wokuqala nowesibili wami wangesizini edlule. Yilabo abadlali ababili abebenza umehluko omkhulu. Yikho ngithi kuzoba nzima. Yebo banabo abadlali abaseqophelweni eliphezulu, siyabahlonipha kodwa ngeke sibahlulele ngokuthi badlale ngokulingana. Kuzoba wumdlalo ohlukile uma sebedlala nathi," kusho uZwane.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UQHAKAMBISA eyokuvikela irekhodi lakhe umshayisibhakela waseNingizimu Afrika, uMxolisi "Nation" Zuma, ozobhekana noFillipus "Energy'' Nghitumbwa waseNambia, okleliswe ezilinganisweni zomhlaba. UZuma (10-0-0) noNghitumbwa (16-2-0) bazobanga ibhande le-WBO Global Super Bantamweight empini ezoba seWindhoek Country Club Resort and Casino ngoMgqibelo. Leli bhande beliphethwe nguNghitumbwa kusukela alithola ehlula ngomngqimuzo womlalisa phansi umshayisibhakela wakuleli, u-Innocent "Tycoon" Mantengu ngo-2021, kodwa waliphucwa nguJohn Riel Casimero wasePhilippines, ngo-2023. UZuma osaziwine ngomngqimuzo womlalisa phansi zonke izimpi asazilwile esibhakeleni esikhokhelayo, uzoba ngumshayisibhakela wesine waseNingizimu Afrika ozobhekana noNghitumbwa osazidlele amahlanga kubona bonke abakuleli asangene nabo eringini. Ngaphandle kukaMantengu, uNghitumbwa wahlula ngomcacamezelo womlalisa phansi uSabelo Ngebiyana wase-Eastern Cape evikela ibhande le-WBO Global Super Bantamweight ngo-2022, wanqoba ngendlela efanayo kuThato Bonokoane empini yebhande le-WBO Africa Global Super Bantamweight ngo-2023. Nakuba uZuma enengcindezi yokuqeda ukukhonya kukaNghitumbwa kubashayisibhakela baseMzansi, ukubeke phambili ubumqoka bokubuya nerekhodi lakhe lingangcolile. Ezimpini ezingu-16 aziwinile uNghitumbwa, ezingu-14 uzinqobe ngomngqimuzo womlalisa phansi. "Kubaluleke kakhulu ukuvikela irekhodi lami ngoba liyangikhulumela. Ukuthi angikaze ngihlulwe kuyinto engisizayo nengivulela amathuba. Ngiyazi ukuthi ngeke ngihlale nginqoba ngomngqimuzo womlalisa phansi ngoba asihlali sihlelela wona kodwa okubalulekile wukungahlulwa," kusho uZuma. "Ngiyajabula kakhulu ngethuba engilitholile. Ngibonga abaphathi bami uDladla (Hlula) noMama uHle (Jobe) ngokungivulela leli thuba. Amalungiselelo ahamba ngendlela ebesihlele ngayo futhi siyathemba ukuthi konke kuzohamba kahle ngosuku lwempi. " UZuma ongumpetha we-WBF Intercontinental Super Bantwaweight ne-African Boxing Union (ABU), ugcine ukungena eringini ngoJuni, ehlula uClifford Antafu waseMalawi empini ebiseDundee. Uzolwela ibhande le-WBO Global nje, usethubeni lokulwela ele-SA Super Bantamweight eliphethwe nguSiyabulela Hem wase-Eastern Cape kwazise ukleliswe phezulu kwabaligaqele. "Akukhona ukuthi ibhande laseNingizimu Afrika indaba yalo ngiyibeka eceleni kodwa ngizama indlela ezongisa esibhakeleni somhlaba. Kumele ngithathe wonke amathuba aqhamukayo ngoba neminyaka iyahamba. Ngizama indlela eya phambili," kusho uZuma.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: INKULUMO yomqeqeshi weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, mayelana nokuphungula isikwati kuleli qembu kungenzeka yehle kahle kwamanye amaqembu acuthele ukucosha abadilizwe eChloorkop. ISundowns enqobe isicoco seBetway Premiership ihlandla lesishiyagalombili ngesizini edlule, isamemezele kuphela uFawaaz Basadien osuka kwiStellenbosch njengomdlali omusha nakuba bekhona nabanye abamataniswa nayo. Kunalokho, ichithe abaningi okubalwa kubona abebebolekisiwe okunguSifiso Ngobeni osesayine kwiCape Town City. Abanye abakhululwe yiSundowns nguRivaldo Coetzee obelizwa ngendaba ijezi, Thabang Sibanyoni obephila ngokubolekiswa, Lebohang Maboe obebolekiswe kwiSuperSport United, noSipho Mbule ocoshwe yi-Orlando Pirates. Awakapheli amahlebezi ngokuthi iSundowns izodlala isizini ka-2025/2026 ngaphandle kukaPeter Shalulile okubukeka engekho ezinhlelweni zikaCardoso, Lucas Ribeiro abafunwa ngamanye amaqembu noKhuliso Mudau okuthiwa ufuna ukwenyuselwa iholo. "Mayelana nabazoshiya iqembu, asibone ekugcineni ukuthi ubani ozohamba, ubani ozongena. IMamelodi Sundowns iyiqembu elihlelekile, konke kwenziwa ngomqondo, siyasicabanga sonke isimo futhi sifaka amandla ukusilungisa sibeka phambili iqembu. Ngaleyo ndlela bakhona abazojoyina iqembu nabaphumayo ngoba sicabanga ukuthi kuyinto ekhethekile futhi kunomsebenzi omkhulu ukuba ngumdlali weMamelodi Sundowns, umdlali, umqeqeshi, isisebenzi, ibhodi, noma ubani. Yileyo ndlela okufanele sizizwe ngayo ndlela," kusho uCardoso. Kubadlali okuvela ukuthi bangase baphelelwe yindawo esikimini sikaCardoso kubalwa uSiphelele Mkhulise osekunesikhathi eqiwa yijezi. ISundowns eqale isizini ngokuxebula iRichards Bay ngo 4-0 koweMTN8, izovula iPremiership ngokuvakashela iChippa United eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha, namuhla ngo-3 ntambama. Akubuzwa ukuthi uCardoso uzolwela ukuthi baqale kahle ngenxa yengcindezi okulindeleke ukuthi ifakwe yiPirates esayinise inqwaba yabadlali abaseqophelweni eliphezulu. "Umbango ushubile, ngihlala ngisho ukuthi umbango weBetway Premiership ushubile. Ngaphandle kwamarekhodi esiwaphulile ngesizini edlule, kungenxa yezinga eliphezulu eqenjini, hhayi ukudlala kancane kwamaqembu esibhekana nawo," kusho uCardoso. Siyawuhlonipha umsebenzi wabaqeqeshi nabadlali kuwona wonke amaqembu. Ngihlala ngibancoma njalo ngaphambi komdlalo, ngibabongele emuva kwawo ngomsebenzi abawenzayo nsuku zonke. Ngakho ngiyabahlonipha futhi ngiyazithoba kuwona wonke umbango. Siyazi ukuthi sinezimbangi phambi kwethu. Ngokuba yithina nokugxila kokwethu, singaqala ukucabanga ngokuwina futhi.
