Asiwuthathe lowo msebenzi emdlalweni ngamunye ukuze sizowina njalo noma siphunyukwe ngamaphuzu ambalwa, ekugcineni sikwazi ukulwela iligi,"kusho uCardoso.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: USENGCUPHENI yokuphunyukwa yithuba lokuqopha umlando okhethekile kwiPremier Soccer League (PSL) umgadli weMamelodi Sundowns, uPeter Shalulile, okuvela ukuthi angase alishiye leli qembu laseChloorkop. UShalulile waseNamibia, wajoyina iSundowns ngo-2020 esuka kwiHighlands Park eseyadayiswa.  Wafika kwiSundowns waphenduka umshini wamagoli, eshaya inethi ephindelela amasizini elandelana. Uphethe irekhodi lokuwina kathathu umklomelo womdlali oshaye amagoli amaningi emidlalweni yeligi ngesizini, iBetway Premiership Top Goal Scorer. Wawudla lo mklomelo ngesizini ka-2019/2020 ewuhlukaniselana noGabadinho Mhango waseMalawi ngamagoli angu-16 umdlali ngamunye. Wawuphinda ngesizini ka-2021/2022 eqeda isizini eshaye angu-23 ngaphambi kokuwuhlukaniselana noKhanyisa Mayo ngeka-2022/2023 beshaye angu-12 ngamunye. Isizini edlule ngeyokuqala uShalulile ashaye kuyona amagoli ambalwa kwazise ushaye ayisithupha kuphela emidlalweni engu-24. Mhlawumbe yikhona lokhu okuholele ekutheni angamuzwa kahle umqeqeshi, uMiguel Cardoso, okuvela ukuthi akamboni enendawo esikimini sakhe. UShalulile ubenenkontileka ephela ngesizini edlule kodwa iSundowns isebenzise umbandela wokuyelula ngonyaka ukuze izothola amangqushana njengoba kunamaqembu amfunayo. Phakathi kwalawo maqembu kukhona i-Al Hilal yaseSudan ehlala idlala kwiCaf Champions League, Esperance yaseTunisia neqembu laseQatar elingakaveli igama lalo. Kuthiwa osekuvimbile yimali efunwa yiSundowns ngalo mgadli odlalela iqembu lesizwe laseNamibia. Ukungabi sezinhlelweni zikaCardoso kukaShalulile kugqame ngempelasonto edlule engabonwa nangokhalo ngesikhathi iSundowns ibhekene neRichards Bay emdlalweni we-quarterfinal eMTN8 abayiwine ngo 4-0 ePitoli. Abanye abadlali abebengekho nguLucas Ribeiro okuthiwa uxoxa namaqembu amfunayo noKhuliso Mudau okuvela ukuthi ufuna ukwenyuselwa umholo. Njengoba sekucaca ukuthi makhulu amathuba okuthi uShalulile angabe esadlala kwiSundowns, uzolahlekelwa yithuba lokwephula irekhodi lamagoli amaningi emlandweni wePSL eliphethwe nguSiyabonga Nomvethe ngawu-129. UShalulile ulandela ngawu-116. Ngaphezu kokuphunyukwa yirekhodi lePSL, uShalulile uzolahlekelwa yithuba lokuphatha elomdlali oshaye amagoli amaningi kwiSundowns eliphethwe yinkakha, uDaniel "Mambush" Mudau, esengukaputeni waleli qembu ngesikhathi liwola izicoco eminyakeni edlule. UMudau uhamba phambili kwiSundowns ngamagoli angu-172. Ukuhamba kukaShalulile eMzansi, kuvulela umgadli weSekhukhune United, uBradley Grobler, ithuba lokwephula irekhodi likaNomvethe kwazise uyena kuphela kwabasadlalayo onamagoli angaphezu kuka-100 kwiPSL.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: So far, so good Umqeqeshi weKaizer Chiefs uNasreddine Nabi I-KAIZER Chiefs izoqala isizini yeBetway Premiership inengcindezi yokukhombisa abalandeli ukuthi ibhodwe ebeliphekwa ngesizini edlule, lesekwa ngezaba, selivuthiwe. Amakhosi aqoke ukuyolungiselela isizini entsha eNetherlands lapho edlale khona imidlalo yobungani eyisihlanu namaqembu ahlukene. Lokhu kusize leli qembu lahlanganisa abadlali abasha nabadala okulindeleke ukuthi bakhiphe inqanawe ezojabulisa izigidi zabalandeli beChiefs ngesizini entsha. Emasontweni adlule, abalandeli bathole ithuba lokubuka iqembu okokuqala ngesikhathi libhekene ne-Asante Kotoko yaseGhana emdlalweni weToyota Cup elihlulwe kuwona kumaphenathi eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. Njengoba imidlalo yePremiership izoqala ngempelasonto, akubuzwa ukuthi abalandeli beChiefs babheke lukhulu kumqeqeshi, uNasreddine Nabi, okunomuzwa wokuthi bakulungele ukumnika elinye ithuba. Nokho kungenzeka futhi ukuthi umusa wabo uphele emuva kwemidlalo eyisihlanu ezoyidlala yonke kule nyanga okukhona kuyona ezowudlala neMamelodi Sundowns ngo-Agasti 27. Emidlalweni eyisihlanu yeligi yokuqala, Amakhosi azobhekana neStellenbosch (Agasti 10), Polokwane City (Agasti 13), Richards Bay (Agasti 19), Sundowns (Agasti 27) neLamontville Golden Arrows (Agasti 30). Le midlalo kungenzeka icacise okuningi ngamathuba eChiefs esizini engcono nekusasa likaNabi obetshela abalandeli ngesizini edlule ukuthi usalipheka ibhodwe lakhe. Ekhuluma nabezindaba muva nje, uNabi ukhombise ukuthi uyakuqonda ukuthi aphelile amahlathi. "Indlela esizobhekana ngayo nesizini ngokweligi, Nedbank Cup neCaf Confederations Cup wukuthatha umdlalo ngamunye senze konke okusemandleni ukuwina umdlalo," usho kanje kwabezindaba. Amakhosi azobhekana neStellenbosch ngaphandle komunye wabadlali abamqoka, uPule Mmodi, ozoqedela isigwebo sekhadi elibomvu alithole ngesikhathi bebhekene neSekhukhune United emdlalweni weligi owandulela owokugcina wesizini ka-2024/2025. Lokhu kusho ukuthi lo mdlali uyoze abonakale uma iChiefs isibhekene nePolokwane City. Ngaphezu kwalokho, iChiefs izoqala isizini ngaphandle kwesitobha, uRushwin Dortley, okuvele ukuthi asikakulungeli ukubuyela ensimini kulandela ukuhlinzwa idolo ngoMashi. Nakuba kunjalo kodwa kubukeka sesiphelile isikhathi sezaba kuNabi. Okufunwa ngabalandeli yiqembu elihlangene, elidlala ibhola elihle, eliwina imidlalo. Okwengenza ingcindezi kaNabi yindlela izimbangi, i-Orlando Pirates, ezisayinise ngayo abadlali beqophelo eliphezulu asebefike bakhombisa ukuthi bazolenyusa iqembu, mhlawumbe limise kabi iSundowns embangweni wesicoco seligi.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: KUSEMNYAMA ngokubuyela enkundleni kwesitobha seKaizer Chiefs, uRushwin Dortley, okuphele isizini edlule eselibuka nabalandeli leli qembu. UDortley (22) ofike kwiChiefs ekuqaleni kwesizini ka-2024/2025 esuka kwiCape Town Spurs kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship, ulimale edolweni esedlale imidlalo engu-18 yeligi eNaturena, wagcina ehlinziwe. Emuva kokuhlinzwa, odokotela beChiefs bebezitshela ukuthi uzoshesha ukubuyela enkundleni okuyinto engenzekanga. Ukulimala kwakhe kumlahlekisele ngendawo eqenjini lesizwe iBafana Bafana kwazise umqeqeshi, uHugo Broos, bekubukeka esethembele kuyena maphakathi emuva. NakwiChiefs, ukulimala kukaDortley kuholele ekutheni umqeqeshi, uNasreddine Nabi, ashintshe abadlali okubalwa kubona uGiven Msimango, Zitha Macheke no-Edmilson Dove ezama ukuvala isikhala odongeni lwasemuva. Kuphele isizini edlule uNabi esedlalisa umdlali osemncane, u-Aden McCarthy oyindodana yenkakha yeChiefs, uFabian McCarthy. Ngesikhathi iChiefs idlala ne-Asante Kotoko koweToyota Cup eThekwini ngempelasonto edlule, uNabi udlalise u-Aden maphakathi nendawo emuva nokaputeni u-Inacio Miguel. Laba kubukeka kuyibona iChiefs ezoqala ngabo isizini ka-2025/2026. Leli phephandaba lithole ukuthi uDortley akakakulungeli ukubuyela enkundleni njengoba iChiefs izoqala isizini yeBetway Premiership ngokubhekana neStellenbosch ngeSonto, e-Athlone Stadium, eKapa, ngeSonto. "Ngeke adlale okwamanje, kusenzima. Yebo, uyile eNetherlands neqembu kodwa nakhona ubengaziqeqeshi nalo. Okwamanje akakalungeli ukudlala futhi akwaziwa ukuthi uzobuyela nini enkundleni. Abanye abadlali bayimiqemane ekhempini," kusho umthombo. Ngesikhathi iChiefs izicijela ukuqala kwesizini eNetherlands emasontweni adlule, uDortley ubeziqeqesha yedwa ngokugijima. Kulolu hambo, Amakhosi adlale imidlalo yobungani eyisihlanu. Okucacile lapha wukuthi uNabi uzame abadlali abaningi maphakathi emuva. Ngesikhathi iChiefs isemazweni, idalule ukuthi uDortley uziqeqesha kanzima ngaphansi kweso lodokotela futhi usebenza kanzima ukuze abuyele enkundleni. Ucashunwe ethi umndeni wakhe uyameseka kakhulu. "Lokhu wukulimala kwami kokuqala kudinge ukuthi ngihlinzwe. Kube yizinyanga ezimbalwa ezinzima. Kumele ngiqine ngokomqondo njengoba ngifuna ukudlala kodwa angikwazi. Kunzima kodwa ngiyazi ukuthi kuzolunga," ucashunwe esho kanje uDortley kwi-website yeChiefs. Ukungalulami ngokushesha kukaDortley kungase kumphuthisele ngethuba lokudlalela iBafana kwi-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) ezobaDisemba kuya kuJanuwari 2026.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: BEKUBUKWA intokazi yaKwaZulu-Natal, uNonkululeko "Lefty" Mlaba, ngesikhathi iCricket South Africa (CSA) iklomelisa abadlali abenze kahle emdlalweni wekhilithi emcimbini obuse-Emperors Palace, eGauteng, ngoLwesine ebusuku. UMlaba waseThekwini oyi-bowler yamaProteas esifazane neHollywoodbets Dolphins, ukhale wemuka nemiklomelo emine ebibhekwe ngabomvu okungowe-SA Women's T20 International Player of The Year, Women's Players' Player of The Year, Women's Best Delivery nowe-Women's Player of The Year. Ezintweni ezenze leli nxele lahlabana, ngama-wikhethi angu-12 eliwathathe emqhudelwaneni i-2024 T20 World Cup okulenze laqeda endaweni yesibili kwabathathe amaningi. Ngaphezu kwalokho, uMlaba uqophe umlando wokuba ngowesifazane wokuqala othathe amawikhethi angu-10 emdlalweni we-test ngesikhathi bebhekene ne-England ngoDisemba. Ukuhlabana kukaMlaba ngemiklomelo kumenza abe ngomunye wabadlali abazobe bebhekiwe emqhudelwaneni i-ODI Cricket World Cup ezoba se-India ngenyanga ezayo. "Ngizwa sengathi ingcindezi iyanqonga kodwa ngizele yona lapha. Ngizokwenza konke okusemandleni ukusebenzela iqembu. Uma sizozama ukuwina iNdebe yoMhlaba futhi, ngizozama ngayo yonke indlela,"kufunga uMlaba ekhuluma ne-SABC. Ngaphandle kukaMlaba, ukaputeni weProtes yabesilisa kwi-ODI nakwi-Test, uTemba Bavuma, uvune izithelo zokushaya u-200 ekhaya ngesikhathi bebhekene neSri Lanka ngoDisemba nangesikhathi bedlala nePakistan eKapa bezibekisela indawo kowamanqamu we-World Test Championship abagcine beyiwinile. UBavuma ugoduke nomklomelo we-Test Player of The Year nowe-SA Fans' Player of The Year. Umklomelo womdlali ovelele kwabesilisa, utholwe nguKeshav Maharaj weProteas neHollywoodbets Dolphins. UMaharaj uthathe amawikhethi angu-40 phakathi kuka-Agasti 2024 noJanuwari 2025. Uqede engowesithathu kwabaphezulu ngokuthatha amawikhethi kwi-T20 World Cup kwabaMzansi. Isikhulu esiphezulu seKZN Cricket Union, uHeinrich Strydom, sithe:" Siyaziqhenya kakhulu ngabawinile abaphuma emndenini weHollywoodbets Dolphins. Konke ukusebenza kanzima nokuzinikela kuthele izithelo futhi konke kunifanele ukuwina. Kumnandi ukubona abadlali bethu bebonwa njengabahamba phambili ezweni futhi lokhu uyasigqugquzela umfutho wabo. Sithemba ukuthi sizoqhubeka nalokhu ngesizini entsha." Isiyonke imiklomelo yeCSA ihambe kanje: International Men's Newcomer of the Year: Ottneil Baartman Men's T20I Player of the Year: Anrich Nortje Men's ODI Player Of The Year: Heinrich Klaasen Men's Test Player Of The Year: Temba Bavuma Men's Players' Player Of The Year: Kagiso Rabada SA Men's Player of the Year: Keshav Maharaj International Women's Newcomer of the Year: Ayanda Hlubi Women's T20I Player of the Year: Nonkululeko Mlaba Women's ODI Player of the Year: Annerie Dercksen Women's Players' Player of the Year: Nonkululeko Mlaba SA Women's Player of the Year: Nonkululeko Mlaba SA Fans' Player of the Year: Temba Bavuma

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Manqoba Mngqithi uManqoba Mngqithi umqeqeshi weGolden Arrows IPHINI lomqeqeshi weLamontville Golden Arrows, uMusa Bilankulu, libuyelwa yithemba ngenkulumo kaManqoba Mngqithi obona bezoqeda isizini ezayo sebenenye indebe ekhabetheni. UMngqithi uhola ithimba labaqeqeshi be-Arrows elithakwe ngoBilankulu noKagiso Dikgacoi ababengabadlali bakhe kuBafana Bes'thende eminyakeni edlule. Bobathathu babekhona kwi-Arrows ngesikhathi iwina indebe yeMTN8 ngo-2009. I-Arrows ibingelinye lamaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal abedlala emqhudelwaneni iKZN Premier's Cup eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, ngempelasonto edlule. Ikhishwe ekuseni ngaMaZulu ngo 3-2. UMngqithi, otakule leli qembu kukubi ngesizini edlule, uzama ukubumba inqanawe ezobuyisa izinsuku zenjabulo kwi-Arrows. "Indlela yokucabanga yomqeqeshi...(ihlukile) njengoba wazi ukuthi ungumqeqeshi onamava, usesisize kakhulu selokhu efikile ngesizini edlule. Emidlalweni engu-12, abekhona kuyona kwiBetway Premiership kubonakele. Uyasisiza kakhulu ngoba thina singabaqeqeshi abasebancane, uyasifaka kule nto. Njengoba eshilo ukuthi sizolwa futhi sizowina okuthize, ngiyakukholwa lokho ngoba wake wakusho ngesikhathi sisadlala siwina iMTN8. Ngakho, azama ukukusho wukuzama ukushintsha indlela yokucabanga kubadlali ngoba sikholwa wukuthi siqine ngokwanele uma udlalela iChiefs, Pirates noma iSundowns. Kodwa eqinisweni, uma usaphefumula useqophelweni elifanele lokulwa nanoma ngabe yini enyakazayo," kusho uBilankulu. I-Arrows isayinise inqwaba yabafana abasebancane okubalwa kubona abayisithupha abaphuma kwiMidlands Wanderers enyukele kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship noSanele "Figo" Radebe obedlalela iRoyal AM ngesizini edlule. "Sidlala ngejubane. Uma ubheka kubadlali esibasayinisile phambili, kukhona ijubane. Ngakho akukhona ukuthi sinciphisa iminyaka yobudala eqenjini kodwa sidinga ijubane uma siphethe ibhola noma lingekho kithina ngoba uma ucindezela phambili udinga ukudlova nejubane. Yileso isizathu esiholele ekutheni iqembu livumelane ngokusayinisa abadlali abasebancane. Lokho kuzosinika isikhathi esanele sokubaphumuza ngoba isizini izoba yinde nemidlalo eminingi. Ngakho abadlali abasebancane bayashesha ukubuyela esimeni,"kusho uBilankulu. "Sinazo izifiso, sinakho esizibekele khona siyiqembu. Asikho kwiMTN8 okusho ukuthi sizolwela izindebe ezintathu kule sizini. Ngiqinisekile ukuthi sizolwa kahle futhi ngiyafunga ukuthi kukhona esizobuya nakho ekupheleni kwesizini ngoba iqembu esizama ukulihlanganisa yiqembu elidinga ukubhala kabusha umlando weGolden Arrows."

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI weBanyana Banyana, uJermaine Seoposenwe, ubhobonke ngokumenze waqoka ukuyeka ukudlalela leli qembu lesizwe. UJane umemezele ngaphambi kokuqala komqhudelwano weCaf Women's African Cup of Nations (Wafcon) ukuthi uzohoxa ekudlaleleni iBanyana emuva kawo. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, leli qembu eliqeqeshwa nguDesiree Ellis, lidlale iWafcon ngaphandle kwesinye sezithenjwa, uThembi Kgatlana, esicele ukuhoxa ngenxa yezizathu ezithinta sona. Ngaphambi kokuqala komqhudelwano, abadlali beBanyana batelekile bekhala ngokukweletwa imali yinhlangano eyengamele ibhola eMzansi, iSouth African Football Asscociation (Safa). Lokhu kuholele ekutheni umqhudelwano uqale sekumuncu nakubalandeli bebhola eMzansi. Abaningi bagxeka umengameli wayo, uDanny Jordan, ngokubhimba kwezinto kulo soseshini. USeoposenwe usibhale ekhasini lakhe le-Instagram isizathu esimenze waqoka ukushiya iqembu lesizwe. "Usoseshini, ukuqeqeshwa nesiko yikhona okwenza ngiphanyeke amakhokho emgibeni. Uma thina siyisizwe sithi siyalithanda ibhola ngendlela esisho ngayo, sinomthwalo wokuletha ushintsho. Ithemba lami wukuthi ukuhoxa kwami kuzoqala ingxoxo osekuneminyaka siyishaya indiva. Kodwa uma ingenzeki, sengikwenzile okungangami. Futhi ngizolwela ushintsho noma ngayiphi indlela ngoba isizukulwane esilandelayo kusifanele lokho. Njengoba abantu abangaphambi kwami bangicabela indlela ukuze ngibe lapho engikhona namuhla, nami ngizokwenza,"usho kanje. IBanyana obekubhekwe ukuthi ivikele indebe ye-Wafcon eyayiwina ngo-2022, ibuye ilambatha kulandela ukukhala ngaphansi kwiNigeria emdlalweni owandulela owamanqamu. Yehlulekile nokuthola indondo yethusi ihlulwa yiGhana emdlalweni wokubanga indawo yesithathu.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ASENGCUPHENI yokushabalala amaphupho kanozinti waseNingizimu Afrika, uJethren Barr, oyalelwe ngodokotela ukuba ahlale unyaka engalidlali ibhola ngenxa yokugula. UBarr (29) osaphethe irekhodi lePremier Soccer League (PSL) likanozinti omncane (17) kunabo bonke selokhu yasungulwa le nhlangano ngo-1996, wakhulela enkulisa yeBidvest Wits ngaphambi kokuzakhela igama kwiMaritzburg United. Ngo-2021 wasayiniswa yiPortadum yase-Ireland adlale kuyona waze wabizelwa esikwatini seBafana Bafana esadlala kwiCosafa Cup. Nyakenye usayine kwiDrogheda United yakhona e-Ireland. Izolo, uBarr waseThekwini ubhale ekhasini lakhe le-Facebook ukuthi usephoqekile ukuma ebholeni ngenxa yesifo esingajwayelekile esimngenile esaziwa ngeMyalgic Encephalomyelitis (ME) noma iChronic Fatigue Syndrome (CFS) esidala ukuthi umzimba ukhathale ngokweqile. Ethintwa yiSolezwe, uzwakalise ukuphatheka kabi ngalokhu kugula, wathi usehlale izinyanga eziyisithupha engalidlali ibhola. "Ngiqale ukugula ngasekupheleni kwesizini edlule kuze kwaba yile sizini. Lesi yisifo esingajwayelekile esidala ukuthi umzimba ukhathale ngendlela engachazeki, ngehluleke ngisho wukuhamba. Ngihambe odokotela abahlukene kodwa lesi sifo sigcine sitholwe ngowase-London. Bengilokhu ngiba ngcono izinsuku ezimbili, emuva kwalokho ngigule eziyisihlanu kwazise bengizama ukubuyela enkundleni ngoba kukhona amaqembu angifunayo," kusho uBarr ese-Ireland. "Ngizwile ukuthi bakhona nabanye abadlali abayisihlanu abahlaselwa yilesi sifo phambilini kodwa abane babo bagcina beliyekile ibhola. Angazi noma ngisazobuyela yini ebholeni kodwa nginalo ithemba. Bakhona abantu abangiqinisayo abangesekayo nabangikhulekelayo." Ukugula kukaBarr kungase kusho ukushabalala kwamaphupho akhe okuwukudlalela iBafana nokuvimbela iKaizer Chiefs aphumela obala eminyakeni edlule ngokuthi ufisa ukugijima kuyona. "Ngiyajabula ukuthi ngakwazi ukudlalela iBafana kwiCosafa futhi ngenza kahle. Ngiyakwamukela okwenzekayo ngoba konke enginakho ngikuzuze ngalo ibhola. Inkinga wukuthi ngizoyenza kanjani imali. Kunzima. Ngizohlala unyaka ngingadlali. Abantu abasindayo kulesi sifo abahlalayo bengenzi lutho. Lokhu kuphambene nami ngoba ngithanda ukugijima nokujima ngaso sonke isikhathi. Bengilokhu ngikhuleka ngibuza uMdali ukuthi kungani kwenzeka kanje kodwa impendulo engiyitholile wukuthi lokhu kuzoba yingxenye yohambo lwethu. Angikwazi ukukhala ngoba ngaqala ibhola ngineminyaka engu-17 ngenxa yakhe uMdali. Ngineminyaka engu-15 ngidlala ibhola," kusho uBarr.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UZOKHUMBUZA abalalandeli izinsuku zenjabulo umdlalo wezinkakha zeKaizer Chiefs nezaKwaZulu-Natal ozobhulela amazolo obhekwe ngabomvu weToyota Cup eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo. IChiefs izobhekana ne-Asante Kotoko yaseGhana koweToyota Cup lapho Amakhosi ezogijima khona ngabadlali abasha okokuqala phambi kwabalandeli bayo. Kulaba badlali kukhona uSiphesihle Ndlovu obedlalela iSuperSport United, Nkanyiso Shinga okhulele kwiZN Academy noThabiso Monyane obeyibamba kwi-Orlando Pirates. IChiefs kade isekhempini eNetherlands lapho idlale khona imidlalo yobungani. Umdlalo weChiefs neKotoko uzovulelwa ngowezinkakha zaMakhosi nezaseKZN, iZulu Kingdom Legends. Iqembu leChiefs lithakwe ngezinkakha ezawina inqwaba yezicoco naleli qembu eminyakeni edlule ezazithandwa ngabalandeli okubalwa kuzona uCollins "Ntofontofo" Mbesuma, David Radebe, Brian Baloyi, Cyril Nzama, Tinashe Nengomasha, Siphiwe Tshabalala, Reneilwe Letsholonyane, Siyabonga Nomvethe nabanye. Namanje laba badlali baseyintandokazi kubalandeli beChiefs. Akubuzwa ukuthi ukubabona enkundleni ngoMgqibelo kuzobuyisa izinsuku zenjabulo lapho Amakhosi ayaziwa ngokuqoqa izindebe ebholeni laseNingizimu Afrika. Ngesizini ka-2024/2025, iChiefs iqede indlala yeminyaka eyisishiyagalolunye ngokuwina iNebank Cup yehlula izimbangi i-Orlando Pirates eMabhida. Iqembu lezinkakha laseKZN nalo ligqishe ngenqwaba yabadlali abanyakazisa iNingizimu Afrika eminyakeni eyedlule. Kulaba badlali kubalwa uSiyabonga "Nsimbi" Sangweni owayengukaputeni we-Orlando Pirates, Thanduyise Khuboni owadlala koweNdebe yoMhlaba ka-2010 eMzansi, Sibusiso Zuma owadlala iminyaka eDenmark esuka kwiPirates, Njabulo Manqana wodumo kwiLamontville Golden Arrows eyawina iMTN8 ngo-2009 noPhumlani Mkhize owadlalela zombili izinkunzi zaseSoweto okuyiChiefs nePirates. Isikwati sezinkakha zeChiefs simi kanje: Onozinti: Brian Baloyi, Brilliant Khuzwayo Abasemuva: Cyril Nzama,Tefu Mashamaite, Morgan Gould, Tsepo Masilela, Derrick Spencer, Tinashe Nengomasha, Willard Katsande Abasesiswini: Siphiwe Tshabalala, Reneilwe Letsholonyane, Doctor Khumalo, Thuso Phala, Stanton Fredericks, Mandla Masango, Josta Dladla Abagadli: Siyabonga Nomvethe, David Radebe, Colins Mbesuma Umqeqeshi: Thabo Mooki Iphini lomqeqeshi: Lucas Radebe Isikwati sezinkakha zaseKZN simi kanje: Onozinti:Thokozani Ndlovu, Siyabonga Mbatha Abasemuva:Siyanda Zwane, Musa Mntakwenda, Siyabonga Sangweni, Bryce Moon, Japhet Zwane, Simphiwe Vezi, Thanduyise Khuboni, Tshepo Ntsoane, Mlungisi Masinga Abasesiswini:Delron Buckley, Njabulo Manqana, Philani Kubheka, Manqoba Mkhize, Ntokozo Sikhakhane Abagadli: Sibusiso Zuma, Phumalani Mkhize, Sandile Ndlovu, Sthembiso Ngcobo Umqeqeshi: Howard Freese - Coach Iphini lomqeqeshi: Mlungisi "Professor" Ngubane

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: SINYOMFE izinhlelo zamaqembu eBetway Premiership isinqumo seCape Town Spurs sokumangalela abadlali okuvela ukuthi sebesayine kwiKaizer Chiefs nakuMaZulu ngokwehlukana. Nakuba sekwaziwa ukuthi iChiefs isisayinise uLuke Baartam no-Asanele Velebayi kodwa ayikabamemezeli ngenxa yokuthi abaphathi beSpurs bafake isimangalo ekomitini eliqondisa ubugwegwe lePremier Soccer League (PSL) ikhala ngendlela abahambe ngayo ekubeni besanezinkontileka. Yisimo esifanayo kuMaZulu asayinise uLiam Bern obekufanele amethule kwabezindaba kuleli sonto. ISpurs, egawulwe yizembe kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship, ifuna babuyele kuyona njengoba isiqalile ukuziqeqeshela ukuqala kwesizini ye-ABC Motsepe League. Ngokomthetho wePSL, umdlali osedlala kumaligi eSouth African Football Association (Safa) akayisayini inkontileka. Lokhu kusho ukuthi uBaartman, Velebayi noBern sebangama-amesha. Nokho iSpurs izwakala ifuna inkokhelo ngala badlali ebakhulisile futhi ifuna amaqembu abafunayo asondele kuyona kuxoxwe kunokubathatha bhusende. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi seliqalile ukuqulwa icala likaBaartman kodwa kushaye isikhathi sokushicilela kungakaveli ukuthi lihamba kanjani. Kodwa kuvelile ukuthi lizobuyela ngoMsombuluko. Icala likaVelebayi kulindeleke ukuthi lingene ngoJulayi 31. Kubahluleli abakuleli kulele cala, kukhona uZola Majavu wePSL, Siboniso Gaxa owayengumdlali weChiefs noMathew Booth. Ngesonto eledlule, iChiefs iveze ukuthi izimisele ukwenza ngendlela efanele ukuze ithole laba badlali. Icala libavimbele ukuthi beyozicijela ukuqala kwesizini ka-2025/2026 eNetherlands. Ngaphezu kwalokho, ngeke babonakale njengoba leli qembu lizodlala ne-Asante Kotoko emdlalweni weToyota Cup eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. Ngasohlangothini lwaMaZulu, ayaphoqeka ukumshiya uBern njengoba ezodlala emqhudelwaneni iKZN Premier's Cup ozoba ngoMgqibelo nangeSonto eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay. AmaZulu azobhekana neLamontville Golden Arrows ngo-11 emini ngoMgqibelo. Emuva kwalokho, kuzongena iDurban City neMilford FC ngo-1. NgeSonto kuzoqhuthana iMidlands Wanderers neRichards Bay ngo-9 ekuseni. Emuva kwalokho, kuzoqala eyandulela owamanqamu ozodlalwa ngamaqembu awinile. Owamanqamu ozoba ngo-3 ntambama.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMQEQESHI weBanyana Banyana, uDesiree Ellis, unenselelo yokuqhamuka neqhinga lokugudluza iNigeria abazobhekana nayo emdlalweni owandulela owamanqamu kwi-Women's Africa Cup of Nations (Wafcon) eMorocco. IBayana idlule ngo 4-1 kwiMali kuma-quarterfinal sekukhahlelwa amaphenathi emuva kokuthi umdlalo uphele zibambene ngo 0-0 ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Unozinti, u-Andile Dlamini uvimbe amaphenathi amabili. Nakuba leli qembu lidlala ngaphandle kwezethenjwa okubalwa kuzona uThembi Kgatlana kodwa likhombisile ukuthi liyakwazi ukumelana nobunzima nengcindezi yokudlala iWafcon. Nokho umgoqo ophambi kweqembu lika-Ellis elivikela indebe yiNigeria esiwine iWafcon amahlandla ayisishiyagalolunye. Ngokomlando, iBanyana ayiliboni elidlalayo kwiNigeria. Emidlalweni engu-11 edlalwe yila maqembu, elakuleli liwine kanye kuphela, adlala ngokulingana kweyisithupha, iNigeria yawina emine. Umdlalo weBanyana neNigeria uzoba seLarbi Zaouli Stadium ngo-6 ntambama. Emuva komdlalo neSenegal, u-Ellis uncome abadlali bakhe ngokulwa kuze kube sekugcineni. "Bengishilo ukuthi umdlalo ngeke ubelula, ngathi uzoba nzima ngenxa yeqoqo abebekulona nangendlela abaqede ngayo. Besingalindele okulula. Emizuzwini yokuqala engu-15 sikhombise ukuba novalo, sizama ukungena emdlalweni. Kodwa sesingenile, sibuqede bonke ubungozi babagadli babo ababili abade. Sibhekane kahle namabhola amade kodwa kwesinye isikhathi besilahla ibhola kalula,"kusho u-Ellis. Kwi-Wafcon, iBanyana isishaye amagoli ayisikhombisa, yangenelwa ngelilodwa. La magoli ashaywe ngabadlali abahlukene okuyinto okungabuzwa ukuthi izokwenyusa ithemba ku-Ellis. Emuva komdlalo neSenegal, u-Ellis owayekhona ngesikhathi iBanyana ishaya iNigeria ngo-2017, ukugwemile ukuphawula ngeNigeria. "'Asicabangi ngeNigeria okwamanje. Sizocabanga ngomdlalo olandelayo kusasa (izolo). Asibhiyozele esikwenzile," kusho yena. Komunye owandulela owamanqamu, iMorocco izobhekana neGhana ngo-9 ebusuku.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: KUBE nemizwa eyahlukene kusongwa imiqhudelwano ehlukene ezinkundleni ezahlukene eNingizimu Afrika. ITheku beliyikhaya ezifundazweni ezahlukene njengoba kukade kudlalwa umlenze wokugcina weTelkom Netball League (TNL) eDurban ICC, ngoMgqibelo. Iqembu laKwaZulu-Natal, iKingdom Stars, lijabulise izinkumbi zabalandeli lenyukela kuDivision 1 emuva kowehlula iBaobabs yaseLimpopo ngo 60-42 emdlalweni wokuhlunga. Kwi-Engen Knockout Challenge Champ of Champs eGauteng, kugiye iPanorama yemuka nesicoco sikazwelonke.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UBONGE usihlalo weKaizer Chiefs esevalelisa obengukaputeni waleli qembu, uYusuf Maart, osayine kwiSV Ried yase-Austria. Emuva kwamasonto kunamahlebezi okuthi uMaart (29) uzosayina kuleli qembu, Amakhosi agcine ekuqinisekisile lokhu ngoLwesibili. Lo mdlali ubesanda kuyivuselela ngeminyaka emibili inkontileka yakhe neChiefs ephele ngenyanga edlule. Uhole leli qembu laqeda isomiso sezindebe seminyaka ngokuqukula iNedbank Cup, eshaya igoli eliqede nge-Orlando Pirates kowamanqamu eThekwini. Kuvela ukuthi uthengwe ngo-R15 million. "Umdlali wasesiswini, uYusuf Maart, usewashiyile Amakhosi, wajoyina iqembu elisanda kunyuselwa phezulu elikwi-Austrian Football Bundesliga, iSV Ried. Iqembu liyawubonga umsebenzi kaMaart kwiKaizer Chiefs futhi limfisela okuhle esahlukweni esisha ebholeni,"kusho iChiefs esitatimendeni. Encwadini yakhe yokuvalelisa, uMaart ubonge abantu abahlukene okukhona kubona nosihlalo weChiefs, uKaizer Motaung. Udlale iminyaka emithathu kwiChiefs ayijoyina ngo-2022 esuka kwiSekhukhune United. "Ngithanda ukubonga usihlalo weKaizer Chiefs nabaphathi bonke ngokungethemba ngebhande likakaputeni. Ukuhola elinye lamaqembu amakhulu naphezulu ezwenikazi yinto eyohlala iyigugu kimina ngiziqhenya ngayo,"kusho uMaart obengahamba neqembu njengoba lisekhempini eNetherlands. "Kubona bonke abaqeqeshi abangicijile kulona lonke uhambo lwami, ngiyabonga kakhulu. Ulwazi nobuhlakani enikudlulisele kimina kungisizile ekutheni ngikhule ngezindlela eziningi ezingaphezu kwebhola uqobo," Abanye ababongile ngusihlalo weSekhukhune, uSimon Malatjie, adlalela iqembu lakhe ngemuva kokuchithwa yiPirates adlala kuyona kwiDStv Diski Challenge. Nakuba ekade engukaputeni waMakhosi kodwa uMaart ubengomunye wabadlali abebenuka umzondo kubalandeli.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI omusha weKaizer Chiefs, uNkanyiso Shinga, udonswe ngendlebe ngengozi yokugijimela ubukhazikhazi njengoba esezolandelwa wudumo oluhambisana nokudlalela elinye lamaqembu amakhulu eMzansi. UShinga (25) oyibamba emuva kwesokunxele, umenyezelwe njengomdlali omusha waMakhosi kanye no-Ethen Chislett obedlala e-England nomgadli wasePortugal, uFlavio Silva, obedlala e-Indonesia. Laba badlali bathwele amathemba omqeqeshi, uNasreddine Nabi, onengcindezi yokwenza okungcono ngesizini ezayo kulandela ukuqeda kweqembu lakhe ngaphandle kwe-top 88.. UShinga owakhulela enkulisa yaseThekwini, iKZN Academy afika kuyona eneminyaka engu-15, uzobe eqala ukudlala kwiBetway Premiership kwazise wafulathela iNingizimu Afrika esemncane, wayodlala ePortugal eminyakeni edlule. Ujoyine iChiefs esesuka kwiFC Alverca edlala ku-Leagu 3 wasePortugal. Kuvele ukuthi iChiefs imthenge ngesizumbulu sika-R4.2 million. Ngokujoyina iChiefs, leli nxele elidlalele neqembu lesizwe lika-Under 17, lilandele uThabo Cele owaba ngumdlali wokuqala weKZN Academy owawelela phesheya kwezilwandle. UGugu Marawa, ongumphathi weKZN Academy, uthe akangabazi ukuthi uShinga uzoqhakaza eNaturena. "Ngiyamjabulela kakhulu. Angimangali ukuthi ubuyile futhi angikuboni lokhu njengokubuyela emuva. Izinga lePSL liphezulu futhi inamathuba amaningi. Abadlali bafuna ukudlalela iqembu lesizwe futhi babona benethuba elingcono lokuzuza lokho uma bedlala ekhaya. Ngibona kuyisinqumo esihle," kusho uMarawa. Eminyakeni edlule, baningi abadlali abasayine kwiChiefs kubhekwe lukhulu kubona kodwa bagcine behlulekile wukufinyelela ezingeni ebelibhekiwe. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abanye bayahluleka ukumelana nengcindezi yokuthi kumele bawine cishe yonke imidlalo okuyinto efunwa ngabalandeli. "Ngikhulumile naye ngoMsombuluko, ngamtshela ukuthi akagxilise umqondo wakhe emsebenzini ophambi kwakhe nokufanele akwenzele iqembu. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kumele akwazi ukumelana nokuthi abalandeli bazomthanda uma enza kahle kodwa futhi bazomjikela uma engadlali kahle. Kufanele aqine ngokomqondo, akulungele lokho. Abadlali abaningi bayalazi ibhola kodwa abaqinile ngokomqondo. Emuva kwemidlalo embalwa kuyaphela ngabo. Ngakho kumele afunde ukwamukela noma yini," kusho uMarawa. "Okunye kumele akhohlwe yindaba yobukhazikhazi, abheke ekhaya kuqala. Kufanele enze izinto ngokohlelo lwakhe, angaphiki nokuthi abadlali abathize benzani. Makangathathwa yimpilo azoyifica laphaya. Abadlali bayakhohlwa wukuthi baneminyaka ephakathi kuka-10 no-15 bedlala ibhola. Uma sebeliyekile ibhola bengasenalutho, abantu sebelokhu bebuza ukuthi lowo mdlali iChiefs imenzelani. Uma naye ezothathwa wudumo, ngeke aphumelele." Namuhla, iChiefs izondizela eNetherlands lapho iyozicijela khona ukuqala kwesizini ka-2025/2026. Izodlala imidlalo yobungani namaqembu ahlukene okuyiSBV Vitesse (Julayi 8), FC Utrecht (Julayi 11), NEC Nijmegen (Julayi 12), PEC Zwolle (Julayi 15) neFC Twente (Julayi 16).

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UTHAMI Mkhize obengukaputeni weCape Town City egawulwe yizembe kwiBetway Premiership ngenyanga edlule, usanethemba lokuthi uzolithola iqembu kulesi sigaba phezu kokuba esehanjelwe yiminyaka. UMkhize waKwaXimba, eCato Ridge, ozohlanganisa iminyaka engu-37  ngo-Agasti, ngomunye wabadlali ababekhona ngesikhathi kubunjwa iCity ngo-2016. Leli qembu lakhiwa emuva kokuthi usihlalo walo, uJohn Comitis, ethenge isitifiketi seMpumalanga Black Aces. Emuva kweminyaka engaphansi kweyishumi, lehlele kwiMotsepe Fundation Championship kulandela ukwehluleka wukuwina imidlalo yamaPlay-Off eliyidlale namaqembu akulesi sigaba okuyi-Casric Stars ne-Orbit College egcine inyukele kwiPremiership. UMkhize owaqala ibhola elikhokhelayo kwiLamontville Golden Arrows ngaphambi kokudlulela kwiMaritzburg United, wafika kwiCity emuva kokuphoxeka kwi-Orlando Pirates okwakuthiwa sekuqedwe konke ngokuthi uzoyijoyina kodwa izinto zashintsha ekugcineni, wehlela eKapa. ICity igawulwa yizembe kwiPremiership nje, ibihlala ibalwa namaqembu abanga izindede eMzansi. Ngesizini ka-2016/2027 yawina indebe yeTelkom Knockout iqeqeshwa ngu-Eric Tinkler, yahlabana ngeyeMTN8 ngesizini ka-2018/2019 iphekwa nguBenni McCarthy. UMkhize ubengenye yezinsika zaleli qembu likaComitis. "Umoya wami ubuphukile kakhulu. Iqembu elifana neCape Town City akulifanele ukugawulwa yizembe. Ngiphatheke kabi ukuthi bengikhona eqenjini njengoba izinto zingahambanga kahle. Njengomholi, ngizwa sengathi yimina imbangela yakho. Ngizwa sengathi ukuba ngenze ngenye indlela, umphumela ubuzohluka. Ingiphule umoya le nto sinoThabo (Nodada) ngoba sasinaye liqalwa iqembu," kusho uMkhize owadlalela iBafana kwi-Africa Cup of Nations ka-2019 e-Egypt "Okungiphule umoya kakhulu wukuthi bengifuna ukuwina isicoco seligi neCity. Lokhu kuyiphupho lami leminyaka. Nginethemba lokuthi kusazokwenzeka. Ngesikhathi ngikwi-Arrows ngajabula siwina iMTN8 nakuba ngingadlalanga. KwiCity ngiphumelele ukuwina izindebe okuyinto engijabulisile leyo ngoba ibiyiqembu ebelinamaphupho. Kodwa iseyisilonda eyokuthi angikaze ngiyiwine iligi." UMkhize ujoyine abadlali abaningi abahlonishwayo kwiPremiership abahanjelwe yiminyaka abangenawo amaqembu okubalwa kubona uRamahlwe Mphahlele ochithwe ngaMaZulu, Daniel Akpeyi oxhoshwe kwiMarumo Gallants nabanye. Ngokujwayelekile eMzansi, laba badlali babizwa ngamakhehla futhi amaqembu amaningi awafuni ukuzihlanganisa nabo kwazise iningi selithanda abafana abancane. "Kimina kuhluke ukuthi umuntu ubona kanjani. Iminyaka yami, yiminyaka yami. Angiyehlisanga. Kule minyaka enginayo, ngisagijima imizuzu engu-90 enkundleni. Ngiyakuqonda ukuthi kunzima ukuthola umsebenzi uma usunaleminyaka kodwa ngiyakholwa wukuthi bakhona abantu abangeke bakunake lokho, abaziyo ukuthi ngisebenza kanjani. Ngisaneminyaka emibili engingayidlala kodwa akuncikile kimina. Konke kuncike kubantu okufanele banginike umsebenzi," kusho uMkhize.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: IZIKHULU zeKaizer Chiefs zibambe umoya ngokulunga kwamaphepha omdlali omusha, uSiphesihle Ndlovu, okuvela ukuthi uzanyelwa ukuthi ajoyine leli qembu eNetherlands, lapho lizicijela khona ukuqala kwesizini entsha yeBetway Premiership. UNdlovu oyibamba enkabeni yenkundla, umenyezelwe yiChiefs njengomdlali wayo omusha ngempelasonto edlule. Uphelelwe yinkontileka kwiSuperSport United esidayisiwe. Lo mdlali wazakhela igama esayibamba kwiMaritzburg United (esiyiDurban City), ngaphambi kokudlulela kwi-Orlando Pirates emshovele kuMatsatsantsa. UNdlovu uvumelene neChiefs seziqedwe zonke izinhlelo zohambo lwaphesheya kwezilwandle, usalile waziqeqesha nabanye abadlali eNaturena okubalwa kubona ukaputeni uYusuf Maart ofunwa yiqembu lase-Austria, iSV Reid. Abanye ngo-Edison Castilo okusabalele ukuthi uzochithwa, Tebogo Potsane, Rushwin Dortley, Paseka Mako nabanye. Baziqeqesha ngaphansi kweso elibukhali labaqeqeshi okukhona kubona uDillon Sheppard owine isicoco seligi neqembu leDStv Diski Challenge ngesizini edlule. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi nakuba ikhempu isiphakathi kodwa iChiefs izama ngakho konke ukuthi iphele esefikile uNdlovu. Amakhosi kulindeleke ukuthi abuye eMzansi ngoJulayi 19, esedlale imidlalo eyisihlanu yokuziqeqesha namaqembu ahlukene. Kowokuqala ahlulwe yiVitesse ngo 2-1. Namuhla azobhekana ne-Utrecht FC ngo-4 ntambama. "UNdlovu kuzanywa ukuthi ajoyine iqembu lonke eNetherlands. Okubambile manje yindaba ye-visa esalindiwe. Konke kuzoncika esikhathini ezofika ngaso. Uma isheshile, noma kanjani uzojoyina iqembu lonke ekhempini. Kodwa uma kuhamba izinsuku kungalungi, uzogcina engahambanga ngoba ngeke kusize ukuya kwakhe ikhempu isizophela," kusho umthombo. Ukujoyina ikhempu eNetherlands kungamsiza uNdlovu ukuze aqale ukulwela indawo yakhe esikimini somqeqeshi, uNasreddine Nabi, onengcindezi yokushintsha izinto kuleli qembu. Uzobanga indawo nabadlali okukhona kubona uGeorge Matlou osanda kunikwa inkontileka entsha. Ngemuva kokuzicijela ukuqala kwesizini entsha, iChiefs izobuya eMzansi izodlala ne-Asante Kotoko yaseGhana emdlalweni weToyota Cup eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, ngoJulayi 26.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UBOMIBETHU Mangcaka waMajimbos eshikilisana no-Ayoub Dahmas we-Algeria emdlalweni we-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) U-17, eRabat, eMorocco, ungomunye wabadlali baMajimbos ababhekiwe emdlalweni wanamuhla neGhana kowokugcina kaGroup D UMQEQESHI weqembu lesizwe lika-Under 17, Amajimbos, uyavuma ukuthi kubavuse emaqandeni ukushaywa kwabo yi-Algeria emdlalweni wesibili ka-Group D we-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) U-17, okuyingakho bewuthatha njengowamanqamu umdlalo wanamuhla wokugcina wesigaba samaqoqo neGhana. UVela Khumalo usho kanjena nje ezakhe zidinga amaphuzu aphelele emdlalweni wazo neGhana namuhla ngo-9 ebusuku eMohamed VI Complex, eRabat, eMorocco, ukuqinisekisa ukuthi zidlulela emzuliswaneni olandelayo walo mqhudelwano we-Afcon oqale ngoLwesithathu olwedlule, ozosongwa ngoJuni 2. Komunye umdlalo ka-Group D i-Algeria izodlala neSenegal khona namuhla ngo-9 ebusuku. Amajimbos asendaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu amathathu ku-Group D, ngemuva kwe-Algeria ezihola phambili ngamane. Amajimbos avule ngonyawo oluhle ngokuguqisa iSenegal ngo 2-0 ngoLwesine kodwa ngeSonto aguqiswa yi-Algeria ngo 2-0. “Kusivuse emaqandeni ukuhlulwa kwethu okokuqala kulesi sigaba samaqoqo. Esizitshele khona wukuthi sihlulwa njengeqembu siphinde sinqobe njengeqembu. Sonke siyakuqonda ukuthi sifuna ukuzibekisela indawo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba, engikholwa wukuthi lelo phupho alikashabalali. Sidinga ukunqoba umdlalo wethu wokugcina (wesigaba samaqoqo) neGhana okungumdlalo esaziyo ukuthi awuzukuba lula njengoba nabo befuna ukuya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. Ngakho umdlalo wethu nabo okawafawafa kodwa sinethemba lokuwunqoba,” kusho uKhumalo. Kulo mqhudelwano we-Afcon U-17 odlalelwa ngamaqembu awu-16 ase-Afrika, ayisishiyagalombili azofinyelela kuma-quarterfinal yiwona azothola ingqayizivele yethuba lokuzibekisela indawo emqhudelwaneni weNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa Under 17 ozobanjelwa eQatar, ngoNovemba 19 kuya kuDisemba 13. Sekungumlando ukuthi Amajimbos afinyelela kuma-quarterfinal e-Afcon U-17 nyakenye,  azibekisela indawo koweNdebe yoMhlaba eyayibanjelwe khona eQatar, lapho afinyelele khona ku-Round 32 wesigaba somkhumulajezi. Elakuleli alikaze lisinqobe isicoco se-Afcon U-17 kusukela ngo-2005 liqala ukudlala kulo mqhudelwano, kanti ngo-2015 lafinyelela kowamanqamu laguqiswa yiMali ngo 2-0.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMGADLI weLamontville Golden Arrows, uJunior Dion, ohamba phambili ngamagoli kwiBetway Premiership Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX NGEMUVA kwamasizini awu-29 kwasungulwa iPremier Soccer League (PSL), umgadli weLamontville Golden Arrows, uJunior Dion, usethubeni lokuba ngumdlali wokuqala odabuka e-Ivory Coast okungenzeka ahlabane ngomklomelo wokushaya amagoli amaningi, iLesley Manyathela Golden Boot. UDion (27) uzihola phambili ngamagoli kwiBetway Premiership njengoba eseshaye awu-14 kule sizini ka-2025/2026.Ulandelwa ngu-Iqraam Rayners weMamelodi Sundowns ngawu-12, uRelebohile Mofokeng noBrayan Leon be-Orlando Pirates neSundowns ngawu-10 emunye. Ngenxa yokuthi iSundowns isiyisongile isizini ka-2025/26 yePremiership, uRayners noLeon abasenalo ithuba lokufica uDion. UMofokeng kuzodingeka ashaye amagoli amane ngoMgqibelo uma iPirates isibhekene ne-Orbit College eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, ngo-3 ntambama, ukuze ezofica uDion. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, uDion usenethuba lokwenyusa isibalo samagoli akhe ngomdlalo wokusonga isizini njengoba bezogadulisana ne-TS Galaxy ngawo uMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama, eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza. Lo mgadli odabuka e-Ivory Coast, ujoyine iGolden Arrows ekuqaleni kwale sizini emuva kokuchithwa ngaMaZulu FC esebuya ekubolekisweni kwiMarumo Gallants. Amagoli akhe asize leli qembu eliqeqeshwa nguManqoba Mngqithi ekuzibekiseleni indawo kwi-MTN8 ngesizini ezayo njengoba lisendaweni yesithupha kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu awu-40. Kusukela ngesizini ka-1996/97, bawu-12 abadlali bangaphandle asebeke bahlabana nge-Lesley Manyathela Golden Boot, eyaqanjwa ngesihlabani somgadli wePirates neBafana Bafana esingasekho, uLesley “Slow Poison” Manyathela. UManyathela wadlula emhlabeni ngo-2003 engozini yemoto. Wahamba phambili ngokushaya amagoli awu-18 ngesizini ka-2002/03 iPirates idla isicoco seligi yePremiership. UWilfred “Silver Fox” Mugeyi waseZimbabwe nguyena mdlali wangaphandle owakhangula lo mklomelo ngesizini ka-96/97 ehlohla amagoli awu-22. UPeter Shalulile waseNamibia noCollins Mbesuma waseZambia, yibona asebeke banqoba lo mqhudelwano amahlandla amathathu, namabili ngokwehlukana. Sebebonke abadlali bangaphandle asebeke bawudla umklomelo weLesley Manyathela: 1996/97 - Wilfred Mugeyi (Zimbabwe) 1999/200 - Dennis Lota (Zambia) 2000/01 - Gilbert Mushangazike (Zimbabwe) 2004/05 - Collins Mbesuma (Zambia) 2005/06 - Mame Niang (Senegal) 2006/07 - Christopher Katongo (Zambia) 2007/08 - James Chamanga (Zambia) 2010/11 - Knowledge Musona (Zimbabwe) 2015/16 - Collins Mbesuma (Zambia) 2018/19 - Mwape Musonda (Zambia) 2019/20 - Gabadinho Mhango (Malawi) no-Peter Shalulile (Namibia) 2021/22 no-2022/23 - Peter Shalulile 2024/25 - Lucas Ribeiro Costa (Brazil)

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UHENDRICK Ekstein no-Athini Maqokola baMaZulu FC NGEMUVA kwamasonto ambalwa iDurban City iqophe umlando ngokuba yiqembu lokuqala laKwaZulu-Natal elinqobe indebe yeNedbank Cup, lesi sifundazwe sisethubeni lokuqopha omunye umlando wokuba namaqembu amathathu aqeda isizini yeBetway Premiership ekwi-Top 8 okokuqala kusukela kwasungulwa iPremier Soccer League (PSL). Yize kwaba yiqembu lokuqala laKwaZulu-Natal, iManning Rangers, elawina isicoco seligi sokuqala ngesizini yokuqala yePSL ka-1996/97 kodwa akukaze kwenzeke lesi sifundazwe sibe namaqembu amathathu aqeda isizini ekwi-Top 8. Sekwenzeke izikhawu eziningi iKZN iba namaqembu amabili aqeda isizini kwi-Top 8 njengoba kwenzekile nangesizini edlule ka-2024/25 AmaZulu neRichards Bay bezibekisela indawo kwi-MTN8. Isithombe USAMKELO Maseko weDurban City Ukuqeda kwaMaZulu FC endaweni yesibili kwi-log yePremiership ngesizini ka-2020/21 okulandelwe wukuzibekisela indawo kwiCaf Champions League, ukuqeda endaweni yesithahu kweRoyal AM ngeka-2021/22 yangena kwiCaf Confederation Cup, kulibuyisile ithemba ngamaqembu aseKZN abelokhu aziwa ngokuhlale evika izembe. Ukuthatha igxathu lokukholelwa kubadlali abasebancane kwamaqembu akulesi sifundazwe okubalwa kuwona AmaZulu, Richards Bay FC, neLamontville Golden Arrows, kugqamile kula masizini ambalwa edlule, kwatuswa nangumqeqeshi we-Arrows, uManqoba Mngqithi izikhawu eziningana. Ngakho ukushaya kwalesi sikhathi sesizini lapho sekusele khona imidlalo emibili isongwe  kusenamaqembu amathathu aseKZN asabalwa nakwi-Top 8, kuyawaqinisa amathemba okuthi ngemuva kwamasizini awu-29 kwasungulwa i-PSL kungase kuqopheke umlando ngamaqembu akulesi sifundazwe. Isithombe USIYANDA Ndlovu weGolden Arrows AmaZulu asendaweni yesine kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-44, alwela ukugcina le ndawo kuze kuphele isizini emidlalweni emibili esele. Usuthu luzodlala neKaizer Chiefs namuhla ngo-3 ntambama kowePremiership eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, bese luvala neDurban City kowabakhaya ngoMgqibelo ozayo kaMeyi 23, eChatsworth Stadium. ICitizens esendaweni yesikhombisa kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-38, izodlala ne-Orlando Pirates namuhla ngo-3 ntambama e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, bese ivala noSuthu ngoMeyi 23. Abafana Bes’thende abasendaweni yesishiyagalombili ngamaphuzu awu-37, basenethuba lokuqeda kwi-Top 8 njengoba bezodlala neChippa United namuhla ngo-3 ntambama eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha. Bazosonga isizini ngowasekhaya ne-TS Galaxy ngoMeyi 23, eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX I-MILFORD FC neCape Town City bazibekisele indawo kumaPSL Promotion Play-Offs ngokuthola amaphuzu amqoka abebewadinga emidlalweni yokusonga isizini ka-2025/26 yeMotsepe Foundation Championship edlalwe izolo, ezinkundleni ezahlukene. IMilford ibambane ngo 0-0 neHungry Lions eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium, e-Upington, ngenkathi iCity ibhaxabula iLeceisterford City ngo 4-2 eDobsonville Sadium, eSoweto. IMilford ibidinga iphuzu kulo mdlalo wayo neLions ukuqinisekisa indawo yayo kumaPlay-Offs. Iqede isizini isendaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu awu-54 okuyisibalo esifanayo neseCity eqede endaweni yesibili ngenxa yomehluko wamagoli. ICasric Stars nayo ebingelinye lamaqembu abesembangweni wokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs, akuyisebenzelanga ukunqoba kwayo ngo 3-1 kwiGomora United eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. IKruger United edlale ngokulingana ibambana ngo 2-2 ne-The Bees, KaNyamazane Stadium, eNelspruit, inikwe ngokusemthethweni indebe yayo nezindondo ngokuba ngompetha baka-2025/26 beMotsepe Championship. Ngesizini ezayo isiyogijima kwiBetway Premiership ICity neMilford sebelinde iqembu lePremiership abazodlala nalo kumaPlay-Offs azoqala ngoMeyi 26, asongwe ngoJuni 13. Leli qembu kulindeleke ukuthi liphume emaqenjini amane emuva kwemidlalo yokusonga isizini yePremiership ngoMgqibelo, okuyi okuyiMagesi FC, Orbit College, Marumo Gallants neChippa United. IMilford eqeqeshwa nguXanti Pupuma, kungokokuqala izibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs. Nakuba igcine iphunyukwe yisicoco seligi ngemuva kokuhlala esicongweni se-log isikhathi eside kodwa akubuzwa ukuthi kuzoyithoba ukuthola elinye ithuba ngamaPlay-Offs. Leli qembu laseRichards Bay lihambe ibanga elide emqhudelwaneni weNedbank Cup, laguqiswa yi-TS Galaxy kowandulela owamanqamu. Ukuphumelela kweStallions ukungena kwiPremiership kuyobe sekusho ukwanda kwesibalo samaqembu aseBay kulesi sigaba esikhulu kwazise iRichards Bay FC yilona kuphela iqembu lakule ndawo elisayibambe kulesi sigaba. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, i-The Citizens eqeqeshwa uJan Vreman negqishe ngeningi labadlali abanamava amaPlay-Offs, yithuba layo lokuzabalazela ukubuyela kwiPremiership njengoba ngesizini edlule igawulwe yizembe idlala wona amaPlay-Offs kulandela ukuqeda kwayo endaweni ka-15 kwi-log. Imiphumela yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Casric Stars 3-1 Gomora United; Kruger United 2-2 The Bees; Leicesterford City 2-4 Cape Town City; Hungry Lions 0-0 Milford FC; Venda FC 1- 2 Highbury; Lerumo Lions 4-0 Black Leopards; University of Pretoria 6-2 Midlands Wanderers; Baroka FC 0-0 Upington City

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UNOZINTI weKaizer Chiefs osefomini enhle othishwa ngumqeqeshi waleli qembu ngokufanele ukubizwa eqenjini lesizwe eliya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa UMQEQESHI weKaizer Chiefs, uCedric Kaze, uphumele obala ngokuchoma uphaphe lwegwalagwala unozinti wakhe, uBrandon Petersen, akholwa wukuthi kumfanele ukungena endizeni yeqembu lesizwe, iBafana Bafana, ebheke koweNdebe yoMhlaba ngenyanga ezayo. UKaze ukusho lokhu ngemuva kokuba uPetersen ephinde washaya into ecokeme ezintini, wagcina oqokwe njengomdlali ovelele iChiefs iguqisa AmaZulu ngo 1-0 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngoMgqibelo, eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. UPetersen (31) osefomini enhle kule sizini, akangenelwanga yigoli emidlalweni ewu-18 kwengu-35 kuyo yonke imiqhudelwano kule sizini. Yize uKaze eqale ngokukucacisa ukuthi akafuni ukugxambukela ekuqokeni abadlali komqeqeshi weBafana, uHugo Broos, kodwa uthe ukholwa wukuthi uPetersen kumfanele ukubizwa eqenjini lesizwe ngenxa yefomu yakhe enhle kule sizini. “Angifuni ukuphawula ngokuthi yibaphi abadlali okufanele babizwe nabangafanele babizwe ngoba sizokwazi maduze ngabazobizwa futhi umqeqeshi weBafana Bafana uyakwazi akudingayo eqenjini lakhe,” kusho uKaze, oqeqesha ngokubambisana noKhalil Ben Youssef. Maduze kulindeleke uBroos amemezele isikwati sokugcina okuyisona azogadla ngaso kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ezoqala ngoJuni 11 kuya kuJulayi 19 e-USA, Canada naseMexico. “Nathi sidinga ukumnika ithuba lokukhetha abadlali abafunayo ngendlela engafihliwe. Ngifisa ukubona uBrandon Petersen eya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngoba kumfanele ngenxa yokwenza kahle kwakhe futhi ulokhu eqhubeka nokuba sefomini eyodwa isizini yonke,” kuqhuba uKaze. Ebuzwa ukuthi yini eshintshile ngalo nozinti kule sizini, uthe ukudlala kwakhe njalo kumsize kakhulu kule sizini. Uphinde wancoma indlela yokuziphatha kwalo nozinti ngisho nangaphandle kwenkundla ngaphambi kokuba ngumdlali ozinikelayo enkundleni. “Ngingasho ngithi yilokho okushintshile kuyena (ukudlala njalo) kule sizini ngoba akadlalanga imidlalo eminingi ngesizini edlule. Udlalile kowamanqamu eNedbank Cup (ngesizini edlule), kule sizini udlale imidlalo eminingi futhi ungumdlali osebenza ngokuzikhandla, oziqeqesha zonke izinsuku ngomoya ofanayo nomfutho ofanayo futhi ngiyathanda ukusho kubadlali ukuthi izinto ezinhle zenzeka kubantu abenza kahle. Ngijabule ngokwenzeka kuyena futhi kumfanele konke lokhu okwenzekayo kuyena," kusho uKaze. Amakhosi asezibekisele indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo, azosonga isizini ngokudlala neChippa United ngoMgqibelo, ngo-3 ntambama eMoses Mabhida Stadium.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, ovumayo ukuthi sekusezandleni zabo ngokuqeda endaweni yesine kwi-log yeBetway Premiership njengoba bezodlala neDurban City kowabakhaya baseThekwini ngoMgqibelo UKUBEKA ezandleni zeqembu umqeqeshi waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, ukugcina indawo yesine abasayibambile kwi-log yeBetway Premiership abahlale kuyo isikhathi eside kule sizini. AmaZulu asendaweni yesine kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-44, adinga amaphuzu amathathu emdlalweni wokugcina wesizini ka-2025/26 azowudlala neDurban City. Lo mdlalo wabakhaya baseThekwini uzodlalelwa eChatsworth Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. Ukwehluleka kwaMaZulu ukuthola amaphuzu aphelele kulo mdlalo kungasho ukusuka kwawo kule ndawo njengoba iSekhukhune United iwahlezi emhlane ngamaphuzu awu-43 endaweni yesihlanu. ISekhukhune izodlala neSiwelele FC ngawo uMgqibelo ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngo-3 ntambama. “Le ndawo yesine iyasithanda. Ngakho sekusezandleni zethu manje ukubambelela kuyona nokuyidedela ngoba sesihlale isikhathi eside kuyona. Eqinisweni ngabe kudala sayiqinisa le ndawo esikuyona ukuba asiwalahlanga amaphuzu kweminye imidlalo. Uma ubheka indlela esilahle ngayo amaphuzu sidlala ne-Arrows (bebambana ngo 1-1) lapho esingenelwe khona yigoli umdlalo usuphelile, saphinda sazodlala ngokulingana ne-Orbit College nakhona esilahle amathuba amaningi kuyona okushaya amagoli, ngabe kudala sayiqinisa indawo yesithathu noma yona le yesine esesiyilwela manje,” kusho uZwane. “Sidinga ukukhipha amangwevu okugcina emdlalweni wokugcina esizowudlala neDurban City, okungumdlalo ongeke ube lula neze ngoba wonke amaqembu afuna ukuqeda isizini ngomfutho. Uma siwatholile amaphuzu sizokwazi ukuqeda endaweni yesine, uma sidlale ngokulingana amathuba ethu azoba mancane kakhulu mhlawumbe sigcine siqeda endaweni yesihlanu.” Usuthu luzobhekana neCitizens esanda kubamba i-Orlando Pirates ngempelasonto, nesalwela ukugcina indawo yesishiyagalombili kwi-log. Lokhu kwenza lo mdlalo wabakhaya ube ngobhekwe ngabomvu. Usuthu neLamontville Golden Arrows ezosonga isizini ngomdlalo wasekhaya ne-TS Galaxy ngoMgqibelo eKing Zwelithini Stadium, KwaMashu, sebevele bazibekisele indawo kwi-MTN8. Ingcabha isisele neCitizens ekubeni yiqembu lesithathu laseKZN elizibekisela indawo nalo. ICitizens esendaweni yesishiyagalombili ngamaphuzu awu-39, ihleziwe emhlane yiStellenbosch FC neSiwelele FC ngamaphuzu awu-38 endaweni yesishiyagalolunye neyeshumi ngokwehlukana. Lokhu kusho ukuthi adinga okungenani iphuzu kulo mdlalo wayo noSuthu ukuqinisekisa indawo yayo kwi-Top 8. Ngaphambi kokuqala kwale sizini, umengameli woSuthu uSandile Zungu, ukubeka kwacaca ukuthi ufuna leli qembu liqede isizini lisendaweni yesine kwi-log yePremiership. Yisona isizathu esenza kubhekwe ngabomvu isinqumo ngekusasa likaZwane uma lehlulekile iqembu wukufeza lo mgomo.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithome OYISIQONGQWANE sasemuva kwiBafana Bafana, uMbekezeli Mbokazi, ungomunye wabadlali abamqoka leli qembu elizothembela kubona kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ka-2026 e-USA, Mexico naseCanada OWAYENGUMDLALI wasesiswini kwiBafana Bafana, uBennet Mnguni, ukholwa wukuthi leli qembu linalo ithuba lokuqopha umlando ngokudlula esigabeni samaqoqo okokuqala kusukela iNingizimu Afrika yaqala ukudlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa. IBafana ezodlala okwesine koweNdebe yoMhlaba kusukela ngo-1998, iqhathwe neMexico, South Korea ne-Czech Republic kuGroup A kulo mqhudelwano ezobanjelwa e-USA, Mexico naseCanada kusukela ngoJuni 11 kuya kuJulayi 19. Izodlala neMexico kowokuvula ngoJuni 11, e-Estadio Azteca, eMexico City. Kusukela iBafana idlala okokuqala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngo-1998, eFrance, ayikaze idlule esigabeni samaqoqo. Kanti ngo-2010 kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eyayidlalelwa eMzansi, yaqopha umlando omubi wokuba yizwe lokuqala emlandweni weNdebe yoMhlaba elaphuma esigabeni samaqoqo. “Ngicabanga ukuthi leli qembu leBafana Bafana eliqeqeshwa nguHugo Broos linabadlali abasezingeni nabanamava okuzibamba ziqine kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yakulo nyaka. Ngokwami iqoqo esikulona akulona iqoqo elinzima kangako ukuthi singakwazi ukudlula esigabeni samaqoqo. Angiyithathi kancane iCzech Republic neSouth Korea kodwa ngokwami akuwona amazwe anomlando ophathekayo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba, ngakho leli yithuba lethu lokuqopha umlando ngokuthi sidlule okokuqala esigabeni samaqoqo. Kanti nayo iMexico akulona izwe eselike lasinika inkinga,” kusho uMnguni owayeseqenjini leBafana eladlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eyayiseKorea-Japan ngo-2002. “Okuhle ngaleli qembu likaHugo Broos wukuthi selidlale ndawonye isikhathi eside futhi likwazile nokudlala kwi-Africa Cup of Nations iminyaka ilandelana obekuyinto ebaluleke kakhulu. Ngaphandle kwalokho sinabadlali beSundowns (Mamelodi) abadlalile kwiFifa Club World Cup, ethi ayibe sezingeni elifanayo neleNdebe yoMhlaba. Leli yiqembu engingabazi ukuthi lizokwenza okungcono kunamanye amaqembu esizwe aphambilini, elikwaze ukuzibekisela indawo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngezikhwepha zalo okokuqala kusukela ngo-2010.” IBafana isadlale kanye neCzech Republic emlandweni emdlalweni owawungo-1997 kwiFifa Confederations Cup, zabambana ngo 2-2. Ayikaze idlale neSouth Korea, kanti isadlale amahlandla amathathu neMexico, yanqoba kabili, yadlala ngokulingana kanye koweNdebe yoMhlaba ka-2010.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UDECLAN Rice ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka kwi-Arsenal esethubeni lokuqeda ishobolo lamasizini awu-21 esicoco se-English Premier League YIZE besekubukeka i-Arsenal FC isiphunyukwe yisicoco se-English Premier League ibhinciselwe nxanye yizimbangi iManchester City, kodwa ukulahla amaphuzu kweCity ibambana ne-Everton ngeledlule kuphinde kwanika leli qembu laseLondon elinye ithuba. Njengoba womabili la maqembu ehlukaniswe ngamaphuzu amabili, i-Arsenal iqhwakele ngawu-79, iCity isendaweni yesibili ngawu-77. Imidlalo emibili esele yiyona esizocacisa ukuthi isicoco siya eLondon noma eManchester. Kusukela iguqiswe yizimbangi, iMan City ngo 2-1 ngo-Ephreli 19, i-Arsenal ivuke yazithatha njengoba isiyinqobe yomithathu ilandelana imidlalo eyidlalile okubalwa noweWest Ham ewunqobe ngo 1-0 ngeSonto eledlule. Isalelwe yimidlalo emibili ezoyidlala neBurnley, edlalelwa ngumgadli weBafana Bafana uLyle Foster, neCrystal Palace. Izodlala neBurnley ngoMsombuluko ngo-9 ebusuku e-Emirates Stadium, eLondon. Isonge nePalace ngoMeyi 24 eSelhurst Park. ICity ezodlala owamanqamu weFA Cup namuhla ngo-4 ntambama eWembley Stadium, eLondon, isalelwe yimidlalo yePremier League ezoyidlala neBournemouth ne-Aston Villa. Izodlala neBournemouth ngoLwesibili ngo-8.30 ebusuku. Ukuhlala amaphuzu kwe-The Gunners emidlalweni emqoka kwenza kubhekwe ngabomvu ukuthi izokwazi yini ukuzibamba ziqine kule midlalo emibili esele igweme ukuphoxeka. Yize izobhekana neBurnley esivele igawulwe yizembe kodwa kungaba wukuzigwaza ngowayo ukuthatha kancane leli qembu okungangatshazwa ukuthi abadlali balo bazodlalela isithunzi nokuzidayisa emaqenjini ePremier League kule midlalo esele. Ngisho nomqeqeshi we-The Gunners, uMikel Arteta, uyavuma ukuthi ukushaywa kwezakhe yiMan City yikho kanye okubavuse emaqandeni. “Sisebenzise lokho kwehlulwa kwethu (yiMan City) njengesifundo nanjengesikhuthazi ekuqondeni umsebenzi esesiwenzile kuze kube yilesi sikhathi sesizini,” kuso u-Arteta, ecashunwa e-AFP. I-The Gunners osekube ngamasizini amathathu kusukela ngeka-2022/23 ilala isibili kwi-log yePremier League, ngaphansi kobuholi buka-Arteta inenselelo yokuqeda isomiso samasizini awu-21 sokungayinqobi iligi yePremier League. Yagcina ukuyinqoba ngesizini ka-2003/04. Imidlalo ye-English Premiership: Manchester United v Nottingham Forest Brentford FC v Crystal Palace; Everton v Sunderland; Leeds United v Brighton; Wolverhampton v Fulham Newcastle United v West Ham NgoMsombuluko - Ngo-9pm: NgoLwesibili - Ngo-8.30pm: Bournemouth v Manchester City Chelsea v Tottenham Hotspur

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMGADLI weMilford FC, uSiphosethu Ndlabi, ezakhe ezidinga ukunqoba emdlalweni wokusonga isizini  yeMotsepe Championshio neHungry Lions kusasa ukuzibekisela indawo kum-PSL Promotion Play-Offs UMGADLI weMilford FC, uSiphosethu Ndlabi, ugcizelela ukubaluleka kokunqoba umdlalo wabo wokusonga isizini yeMotsepe Foundation Championship neHungry Lions ukuze bazibekisele indawo kuma-PSL Promotion Play-Offs. IMilford izotholana phezulu neLions komunye wemidlalo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship ngo-3 ntambama eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium, e-Upington. Okwenza umdlalo weLions neMilford ubhekwe ngabomvu wukuthi womabili la maqembu asembangweni wokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs okulwela ukukhuphukela kwiBetway Premiership. IKruger United izogcotshwa ngokusemthethweni njengompetha baka-2025/26 beMotsepe Championship kusasa ngemuva komdlalo wayo ne-The Bees, KaNyamazane Stadium, KaNyamazane. IMilford, Lions, Cape Town City, neCasric Stars, yiwona maqembu asenethuba lokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs neqembu elizoqeda endaweni ka-15 kwi-log yePremiership azodlalwa ngoMeyi 26 kuya kuJuni 13. IMilford isendaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu awu-53, iCity isendaweni yesithathu ngawu-51 ngokulinganayo neLions enawu-51, kweyesihlanu yiCasric ngawu-49. Leli qembu laseRichards Bay lidinga amaphuzu amathathu noma elilodwa emdlalweni walo wakusasa neLions ukuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs. IStallions, efinyelele kowandulela owamanqamu eNedbank Cup, uma igcina ngokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs kuzobe kungokokuqala kusukela ngesizini ka-2023/24 okwakuyisizini yayo yokuqala kulesi sigaba kulandela ukuthenga isitifiketi seMotsepe Championship kuThongathi FC. “Sihlale isikhathi eside esicongweni se-log kodwa sagcina siphunyukwe yisicoco, ngakho akusasizi ukukhalela ubisi oluchithekile manje. Okumqoka kithina wukulwela ukubuya namaphuzu aphelele e-Upington kwiHungry Lions ukuze sikwazi ukuyodlala kumaPlay-Offs. AmaPlay-Offs sekuyilona themba lethu lokulwela ukungena kwiBetway Premiership,” kusho uNdlabi, odabuka eMmangweni, eLusikisiki. “Siyazi ukuthi sizobhekana nomdlalo onzima kwiHungry Lions nayo edinga amaphuzu njengathi njengoba nayo ilwela ukuyodlala amaPlay-Offs kodwa sizibophezele ngokulwela ukuwunqoba lo mdlalo. Yize sazi ukuthi ukudlala ngokulingana nakho kusengasiphumelelisa ukuyodlala amaPlay-Offs kodwa esizibophezele kukho wukuyolwela ukunqoba ngoba kungasithikameza kusifake engozini ukungena enkundleni sizitshele ukuthi siyodlalela ukudlala ngokulingana.” Ngaphandle komdlalo weMilford neLions, eminye imidlalo ebhekiwe ngoweCity neLeicesterford City eDobsonville Stadium, eSoweto, noweCasric neGomora United, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Imidlalo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Casric Stars v Gomora United (Solomon Mahlangu Stadium); Kruger United v The Bees (KaNyamazane Stadium); Leicesterford City v Cape Town City (Dobsonville Stadium); Hungry Lions v Milford FC (Mxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium); Venda FC v Highbury FC (Thohoyandou Stadium); Lerumo Lions v Black Leopards (North West University Stadium); University of Pretoria v Midlands Wanderers (Tuks Stadium); Baroka FC v Upington City (Global Stadium

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, owathathwa exhawulana nowe-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou UMQEQESHI waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, ubona kuyifanele i-Orlando Pirates ukuthola umvuzo ngenxa yokuphikelela kwayo embangweni wesicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership iminyaka ilandelana. IPirates esiqede endaweni yesibili ngemuva kweMamelodi Sundowns amasizini amathathu elandelana kusukela ngeka-2022/2023, idinga amaphuzu amathathu kwiDurban City e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, kusasa ngo-3 ntambama, ukuze izowina iligi eyayigcina ngesizini ka-2011/2012. ISundowns iwine isicoco seligi amasizini ayisishiyagalombili elandelana. “Yebo, kusengenzeka noma yini kodwa e-Orlando akubuyi lubuyayo. Kwesinye isikhathi kufanele sincome lapho okufanele sincome khona. Abantu uma beya laphaya e-Orlando bathola amagoli amahlanu, abanye ayisithupha, nathi sithole amathathu,” kusho uZwane sakuncokola. “Bakwelinye izinga (iPirates) uma bedlalela kuleya nkundla. Uma ubheka kula masizini amathathu edlule bebelokhu bengqongqoza, beqeda endaweni yesibili kwi-log. "Esikubona manje kwi-PSL kuyafana nesikubona e-England. Mina qobo lwami angiyilandeli i-Arsenal kodwa engingakutshela khona njengomqeqeshi wukuthi ngenxa yokuzinikela nokushabasheka kwe-Arsenal kuyifanele ukuwina iligi. "Kodwa njengomqeqeshi oqeqesha lapha kwi-PSL, angikwazi ukusho ukuthi ubani nobani kufanele awine ngoba ngingumqeshi nami olwela ukuzuza okuthile neqembu engiliqeqeshayo.” AmaZulu azotholana phezulu neKaizer Chiefs kusasa ngo-3 ntambama, eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. Usuthu ngokwezibalo ngeke lusakwazi ukugudluza iChiefs endaweni yesithathu eyisango lokungena kwiCaf Confederation Cup. Selulwela ukungagudluki endaweni yesine. “Nakuba sigcine ngisakwazanga ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu kodwa uma ubheka umsebenzi esiwenzile njengeqembu laMaZulu, simangaze abaningi ngalesi sikwati esisihlanganisile ngabadlali iningi labo ebelingenawo amava okudlala kwiPremiership, abanye babo abebedlala ezigabeni zama-amesha.  Anginandaba ukuthi ubani uthini, ngingabafela laba bafana ngenxa yomsebenzi abawenzile kule sizini. Okusemqoka manje wukulwela ukugcina indawo yethu yesine kwi-log okungumgomo ebesivele sizibekele wona njengeqembu isizini iqala,” kuqhuba uZwane ophonsele inselelo abadlali bakhe ngomdlalo abazowudlala neChiefs. “Kuzofanele bakhiphe amangwevu, bakhombise ukuthi bazimisele ukunqoba ngoba imidlalo yalolu hlobo yiyona eyakha abadlali, ibaqinise ukhakhayi. Sizobe sidlalela ekhaya, osekunesikhathi sagcina ukuhlulwa sidlala khona.”

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe USIYABONGA Mbongo waMajimbos ebanga ibhola noMouhamed Wagne weSenegal emdlalweni we-Afcon Under 17 eMohammed VI Complex, eRabat, ngoLwesine LIVULE ngonyawo oluhle liqoqa amaphuzu aphelele iqembu lesizwe lika-Under 23, Amajimbos, liguqisa iSenegal emdlalweni ka-Group D we-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) Under 17 ngoLwesine kusihlwa eComplex Mohammed VI Pitch 3, eRabat, eMorocco. ISenegal yiyona ebone inethi kuqala ngesiwombe sokuqala ngegoli elivalelwe phakathi uCheik Thior ngomzuzu ka-44. Nokho Amajimbos abuye ngesivuthevuthe ngesiwombe sesibili u-Inganathi Simama eshaya elokulinganisa ngomzuzu ka-48. Ukucindezela kwaMajimbos kuthele izithelo ethola igoli lesibili ngomzuzu ka-55 umkhonto ugwaza ekhaya uThior ezama ukususa umhlola ekhaya. Amajimbos aqhathwe neSenegal, Algeria neGhana kuGroup D. Azobuyela ensimini ngokubhekana ne-Algeria ngeSonto ngo-5 ntambama kulo mqhudelwano we-Afcon U-17 oqale ngoLwesithathu, ozosongwa ngoJuni 2. Kulo mqhudelwano waseMorocco, Amajimbos adinga ukufinyelela kuma-quarterfinal ukuze ezophinda azibekisele indawo koweNdebe yoMhlaba ka-Under 17 ezodlalelwa eQatar, ngoNovemba 19 kuya kuDisemba 13. Nanyakenye leli qembu laMajimbos lafinyelela kowamanqamu kwi-Afcon eyayiseMorocco, lapho laguqiswa khona ngosokhaya ngo 3-1. Sekungumlando ukuthi iqembu laseMorocco yilona elagcina lidla isicoco se-Afcon ngokuguqisa iMali ngo 4-2 sekukhahlelwa amaphenathi.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe ABADLALI bamaqembu ehlukene eHollywoodbets Super League, kwethulwa isizini entsha ka-2026 yeSuper League eSABC Studio, eGoli, izolo KUBUKEKA uzokwehla umthwalo wezindleko zokuhambela imidlalo emaqenjini eHollywoodbets Super League ngemuva kokuba iSouth African Football Association (Safa) ngokubambisana neHollywoodbets engabaxhasi, bememezele ukwethulwa kohlelo olusha lwamaqoqo amabili eligi yesizini ka-2026 yeHollywoodbets Super League. Lokhu kusho ukuthi isizini ka-2026 yeSuper League ezoqala ngochungechunge lwemidlalo  ngempelasonto kaMeyi 22-24, ezinkundleni zase-University of Johannesburg Soweto Campus, eSoweto, izobe inamaqoqo amabili okuyi-Super Rise no-Super Era. Kweminye imidlalo, amaqembu azodlala enkundleni eyodwa ngosuku. Amaqembu azoba yisishiyagalombili iqoqo ngalinye kule ligi enamaqembu angu-16. Ku-Super Rise kuboshelwe iMamelodi Sundowns Ladies, TS Galaxy Queens, University of Western Cape (UWC), University of Johannesburg, Stellenbosch FC, University of Pretoria, Ezemvelo Women’s FC neDiepkloof Ladies FC. Ku-Super Era kuboshelwe i-JVW FC, University of Fort Hare, Tshwane University of Technology (TUT), Richmond United Ladies, City Lads FC, First Touch Ladies neRamatlaohle FC. Le ligi kazwelonke yebhola labesifazane okuyiyona enkulu eNingizimu Afrika nephakela ngabadlali iqembu lesizwe lakuleli, iBanyana Banyana, yasungulwa ngo-2019 ngamaqembu angu-12. Amaqembu azodla umhlanganiso ku-Super Rise no-Super Era azodlala amaPlay-Offs okuhlunga iqembu elingompetha bakazwelonke beSuper League ekupheleni kwesizini ngoNovemba. Oyisikhulu esiphezulu kwiSafa, uLydia Monyepao, uthe lezi zinguquko kuhloswe ngazo ukwenza ibhola labesifazane ligqame liphinde limaketheke. “Amaqembu akuGroup A awezukuba nalo ithuba lokudlala namaqembu kaGroup B kuze kube sekupheleni kwesizini sekudlala ama-Play Off,” kusho uMonyepao izolo, kwethulwa iHollywoodbets Super League. “Sizokwenyusa izinga lokubukwa kwemidlalo ngokuba nemidlalo nama-festival (imidlalo edlalwa ngosuku olulodwa enkundleni eyodwa). Lokhu okusho ukuthi uma ukhuluma ngesibalo sezibukeli ezihambela imidlalo yebhola labesifazane, sizobona izibukeli eziningi, ezinye ezizobe zibuka kumabonakude. Lokho kuzonika bonke abadlali ithuba lokubonakala kumabonakude.”

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Video Assistant Referee Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX NAKUBA i-South African Football Association (Safa) isikuqinisekisile ukuthi i-Video Assistant Referee (VAR) izoqala ukusebenza ngesizini ezayo ka-2026/2027 emidlalweni yeBetway Premiership kodwa onompempe bayayichitha eyokuma ngomumo ekuqaleni ukusebenza kwalolu hlelo. Usihlalo wekomiti lemali kwiSafa, uMxolisi Sibam, ukuqinisekisile esithangamini nabezindaba ngempelasonto, ukuthi sebeyitholile imali engu-R20 million abayinikwe nguMnyango wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko oholwa nguNgqongqoshe, uGayton McKenzie, ukuze kuqale ukusebenza kwe-VAR emidlalweni yePremiership. Nyakenye, uMcKenzie uveze ukuthi konke sekusezandleni zeSafa. Ngokusho kukaSibam, iSafa izosebenzisana nePremier Soccer League (PSL) ukwethula lolu hlelo lobuchwepheshe be-VAR, abahlela ukuthi luqale ukusebenza ngesizini ezayo. “Uhulumeni usesinikezile u-R20 million wokuthi siqale uhlelo lwe-VAR. Imali isikhona ebhange futhi ngingakuqinisekisa ukuthi ikwi-akhawunti eseceleni engahlangene namanye asetshenziswa yiSafa. Kuzofanele silandele yonke imigomo nemibandela yeSafa nekahulumeni,” kusho uSibam. “INingizimu Afrika yiyona ehamba phambili ezwenikazini lase-Afrika ngakho asifuni ukusalela ngemuva uma sekuziwa kwi-VAR. Asevele asekhona amazwe amane lapha e-Afrika aseyiqalile ukuyisebenzisa i-VAR ngakho asifuni ukusala ngemuva. Sizibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi ukuthi i-VAR iba yinto ngempela kuleli zwe.” Kwenzeka lokhu nje, sekuyisikhathi abalandeli bebhola baseNingizimu Afrika nabaqeqeshi bekhala ngokwethulwa kwe-VAR ngenxa yezinqumo zonompempe ezishayisa amakhala kweminye imidlalo yePremiership. Omunye wonompempe asebemnkantshubomvu olumane indlebe neSolezwe ngalolu hlelo lwe-VAR okubikwa ukuthi lungase luqale ngesizini ezayo, ukufanisa nokugagamela okushiwo yiSafa ngokuqala kwalolu hlelo lwe-VAR ngesizini ezayo. “Kuyiphutha ukuthi sebekulungele (abeSafa nePSL) ukuqala kwe-VAR. Mhlawumbe bona ngabe bathi sebekulungele ukuqala ukufundisa onompempe ngokusebenza kwe-VAR, hhayi ukuthi onompempe sebeyilungele i-VAR. Bayisikhombisa kuphela onompempe abadlalisa kwi-PSL abasaqeqeshelwe ukusebenzisa i-VAR. Baningi abasadinga ukuqeqeshwa kulolu hlelo ngakho kusazothatha isikhathi impela. Kuthatha izinyanga eziyisithupha ukuqeqesha onompempe ngolwazi lwe-VAR,” kusho lo nompempe ongeke adalulwe. . Lo nompempe uqhube wathi okunye okusazodala ubunzima ngokwethulwa kwe-VAR wukuthi amaqembu adlala kwiPremiership kawanazo izinkundla zawo njengoba ziphethwe ngomasipala. “Izinkundla zisetshenziselwa imicimbi ehlukene, kwesinye isikhathi amadili omculo nemicimbi yamaqembu ezepolitiki neminye. Ngakho amakhamera e-VAR angazithola esengcupheni yokucekeleka phansi, ekubeni kubiza ukufakwa kwawo ezinkundleni. Ngakho akukezukuba yinto elula ukuqala ngokushesha ukusebenza kohlelo lwe-VAR eNingizimu Afrika njengoba kucatshangwa.” U-Abdul Ebrahim oyinhloko yonompempe kwiSafa, usanda kucashunwa eyiqinisekisa eyokuqala kwe-VAR ekuqaleni kwesizini ka-2026/2027. Konompempe abaqeqeshelwe i-VAR, kubalwa u-Abongile Tom, Zakhele Siwela, Akhona Makalima, Jelly Chavani, Eugene Mdluli noLuxolo Badi.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe USIHLALO weDurban City, uFarook Kadodia, ephahlwe nguNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uThami Ntuli, umengameli weKZN Sports Confederation, uThami Mchunu, umqeqeshi uPitso Dladla, uMphathiswa wezeMidlalo, uMntomuhle Khawula, nabadlali emcimbini wokuhlonipha leli qembu eSouthern Sun Hotel, eThekwini UMPHATHISWA wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko KwaZulu-Natal, uMntomuhle Khawula, unxuse ukwesekana emaqenjini esifundazwe adlala kwiPremier Soccer League (PSL) ukuze impumelelo yeDurban City yokuzuza isicoco seNedbank Cup ibe yisikhuthazi nakwamanye akulesi sifundazwe. UKhawula ukusho lokhu ekhuluma nabezindaba emcimbini wokubungaza ukunqoba kweCity iNedbank Cup obuseSouthern Sun Hotel, eThekwini, ngeSonto. Lo mcimbi bewuthanyelwe yizikhulu zeCity, okubalwa kuzo usihlalo, uFarook Kadodia, abadlali nethimba labaqeqeshi, abaxhasi beCity, aboMnyango wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, uNdunankulu wesifundazwe, uThami Ntuli, izikhulu zeSafa KwaZulu-Natal nesifunda iTheku neKwaZulu-Natal Sports Confederation. “Eminyakeni ewu-16 isifundazwe sakithi KwaZulu-Natal sagcina ukunqoba indebe, abafana bamaCitizens bakwenzile lokho, basiqeda isomiso sezindebe. Ngakho sibonga kakhulu kumqeqeshi, uPitso Dladla, usihlalo uKadodia (Farook), ithimba labaqeqeshi, nawo wonke umuntu oyingxenye yaleli qembu ofake isandla empumelelweni yalo. Okuqaphelekayo wukuthi yisizini yokuqala le iDurban City ingenile esigabeni esikhulu seBetway Premiership, kodwa isikwi-Top 8 futhi ayisaphumi, yaphinda yathatha indebe. Siyathokoza futhi ukuthi njengamanje kwi-Top 8 AmaZulu akhona, iGolden Arrows ibukeka izoba khona, neRichards Bay iyasondela,” kusho uKhawula. “Lokhu kusinika ithemba lokuthi kungenzeka sibe namaqembu amaningana kwi-MTN8 ngesizini ezayo. Impumelelo yeDurban City kufanele ibe yisikhuthazi nakwamanye amaqembu akulesi sifundazwe engifisa ukuthi kube nokubambisana kuwona, yize edlala ngokuncintisana. Ukubambisana nokwesekana kwawo kungahamba ibanga ekubuyiseni isithunzi nempumelelo ebholeni laKwaZulu-Natal, eyikhaya lebhola. NeMilford FC noma ingakwazanga ukunqoba iligi (yeMotsepe Foundation Championship), nayo sinethemba lokuthi izophumelela kuma-Play-Offs, yandise isibalo samaqembu akulesi sifundazwe kwiPremiership, futhi sizoyeseka.” ICitizens ibe yiqembu lokuqala laseKZN elinqobe isicoco selokhu kwagcina iLamontville Golden Arrows ngo-2009 inqoba indebe ye-MTN8. Usihlalo weCitizens, uKadodia, uzwakalise ukuthobeka ngomcimbi abawenzelwe wuMnyango wezeMidlalo esifundazweni ukubabonga nokubahlonipha ngokunqoba kwabo iNedbank. “Ibhola laKwaZulu-Natal bekungafanele lilinde isikhathi eside kangaka ukuthola impumelelo. Futhi amaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal akufanele adonse kanzima avike izembe kuwona wonke amasizini. Ibhola kufanele libe yimboni, lithuthukise abantu, lidale amathuba omsebenzi lithuthukise nezokuvakasha. Uma ibhola lisebenza, nomphakathi uyasebenza. Ligcina intsha imatasa, ihlengeke ezidakamizweni nasebugebengwini,” kusho uKadodia. Namuhla ngo-12.30 emini ezitaladini zaseThekwini, kuzoba nombhiyozo weCity nendebe yeNedbank Cup. Kuzosukwa eKing Dinuzulu Park, kubhekwe eMoses Mabhida Stadium.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UNOZINTI weDurban City, u-Ayanda Mtshali, odalule ukuthi usethi khumu ebholeni elikhokhelayo ekupheleni kwale sizini I-DURBAN City ezodlala kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo, inenselelo yokuphuma inqina iyozingela unozinti njengoba onozinti bayo ababili, uDarren Keet no-Ayanda “Pepe” Mtshali, bewaphanyeka emgibeni amagilavu ekupheleni kwesizini. Kungakapholi maseko uKeet (36) ememezele ukuthi useyayeka ukudlala ibhola, uMtshali naye usedalule ukuthi yisizini yakhe yokugcina lena. UMtshali (38) odabuka eSection 3, eMadadeni, eNewcastle, uveze ukuthi isinqumo wasithatha ngemuva kokuthi iCity iwine isicoco seligi seMotsepe Foundation Championship ngesizini edlule. Uthe ubehlele ukuthi uzodlala isizini eyodwa kwiBetway Premiership. “Ngibone sekuyisikhathi sokuthi nginike abanye ithuba, ikakhulukazi njengoba bengingasalitholi ithuba lokudlala njalo. Kule minyaka yobudala engikuyona njengamanje ngidinga ukudlala njalo. "Ngemuva kokuwina kwethu iligi yeMotsepe Foundation Championship ngesizini edlule, bekuvele kusezinhlelweni zami ukuthi ngidlale isizini eyodwa kwiBetway Premiership, bese ngithatha umhlalaphansi ebholeni. "Okungijabulisayo ukuthi ngiyeke ibhola nendondo yegolide ngokuwina indebe yeNedbank Cup neqembu lami iDurban City,” kusho uMtshali, oqale ukudlala ibhola elikhokhelayo ngesizini ka-2010/11 kwiBlack Leopards. Udlale nakwiFree State Stars, Bloemfontein Celtic, Chippa United, ngaphambi kokujoyina iCity ngesizini ka-2023/24 isabizwa ngeMaritzburg United. Uthe yize esengene endimeni yomculo kodwa ngeke aphume ebholeni njengoba esezinhlelweni zokuzithuthukisa ngolwazi lokuqeqesha. Uneziqu ze-Caf D Licence. “Bengivele nginothando lomculo kusukela ebuncaneni bami. Ngo-2018, ngavula i-studio i-Unified Entertainment eGoli, nomfowethu omncane, u-Anele. "Sike sama iminyaka embalwa, kwathi ngoJanuwari kulo nyaka, saphinda sasivula i-studio, sasayinisa abaculi abayisithupha ukuqopha kuso. "Sengiqalile ukuqeqesha onozinti eqenjini lethu leDiski Challenge. Kodwa ngizobona ngokuhamba kwesikhathi ukuthi ngilandela muphi umgudu ekufezekiseni iphupho lami lokuba ngumqeqeshi ngokugcwele,” kusho uMtshali. Njengamanje iCitizens inonozinti ababili, okunguFredrick Asare osayiniswe yileli qembu kule sizini esuka kwi-Asante Kotoko yaseGhana, no-Adren Dreyer naye osayiniswe kule sizini esuka kwiCape Town Spurs.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UTEBOHO Mokoena weMamelodi Sundows eshikilisana noMpho Mvelase emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, izolo ebusuku IMAMELODI Sundowns izifake engcupheni yokuphunyukwa yisicoco seBetway Premiership ishaywa yi-TS Galaxy ngo 3-2 koweligi eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, ngoLwesibili ebusuku Amagoli eGalaxy ashaywe nguVictor Letsoalo okube yiphenathi, Sedwyn George ngesiwombe sokuqala, noMpho Mvelase ngesibili. AweSundonwns ashaywa uBrayan Leon womabili angene ngesiwombe sokuqala okubalwa nephenathi ayishaye sekusele imizuzu embalwa kuyiwe ekhefini. Lokhu sekusho ukuthi eZimnyama ezisendaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu awu-65, sezidinga ukushaya iDurban City ngoMgqibelo e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, ziqukule isicoco seligi. Uma zihluleke lapho zinelinye ithuba njengoba zizobhekana ne-Orbit College ngoMeyi 23. . Yize iSundowns yenze izinguquko emuva kulo mdlalo iqalisa uKegan Johannes endaweni kaKhulumani Ndamane owenze amaphutha emdlalweni wangoMgqibelo iwina ngo 7-4 kwiSiwelele kodwa buphinde bagqama ukuthaka odongeni lwayo. Zibuya nje ekhefini iGalaxy ithole igoli lesithathu uMvelase ethola ibhola engamakwe muntu ngomzuzu ka-46. Ngemuva kokungenelwa yileli goli lesithathu kweSundowns, yenze izinguquko ezisheshaya iphinde ibuyisa uNdamane odongeni lwasemuva engena endaweni kaGrant Kekana, yafaka noTashreeq Mathews noMiguele Reisinho ezindaweni zo-Arthur Sales noMarcelo Allende. Nokho lokhu akuwenzanga umehluko kwazise iGalaxy iphumelele ukumaka kwaze kwaphela umdlalo. AmaSandawana azodlala ne-Esperance kowomlenze wokuqala wamanqamu weCaf Champions League ngeSonto ngo-4 ntambama.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI woMkhambathi FC, uXolani Khumalo, ezakhe ezizotholana phezulu noMvoti FC kowamanqamu wesifundazwe weSafa KwaZulu-Natal, ABC Motsepe League eSugar Ray Xulu Stadium, eClermont, ngoMgqibelo UMQEQESHI woMkhambathi FC, uXolani “Sdoks” Khumalo, uyavuma ukuthi banengcindezi yokuwunqoba umdlalo wabo wamanqamu wesifundazwe weSafa KwaZulu-Natal ABC Motsepe League wokuhlunga iqembu elizomela isifundazwe kumaPlay-Offs kazwelonke okuzabalazela ukukhushulelwa esigabeni seMotsepe Foundation Championship. UMkhambathi uzotholana phezulu noMvoti FC kowamanqamu wokukhipha inkunzi yaKwaZulu-Natal kwi-ABC Motsepe League ngoMgqibelo ngo-1 ntambama, eSugar Ray Xulu Stadium, eClermont. UMvoti uqede uqhwakele ngamaphuzu awu-59 ku-Stream A, uMkhambathi waqeda phezulu ngawu-55 ku-Stream B. Iqembu elizophumelela kulo mdlalo wangoMgqibelo, lizomela iKZN emidlalweni kazwelonke lapho kuzohlungwa khona amaqembu amabili azokhushulelwa kwiChampionship. AmaPlay-Offs kazwelonke e-ABC Motsepe League azobanjelwa eMthatha, e-Eastern Cape, ngoJuni 1-7. “Njengeqembu sinayo ingcindezi ngalo mdlalo esizowudlala noMvoti ngoba nangesizini edlule sahambe safika kowamanqamu lapho sahlulwa khona yiMidlands (Wanderers). "Nabaphathi (boMkhambathi) bafisa ukuthi iqembu likhushulelwe esigabeni seMotsepe Championship kule sizini, nangendlela abaleseka ngayo iqembu kusukela isizini iqala kuze kube manje. "Banezifiso ezinkulu ngaleli qembu ngoba bafuna ukulibona lidlala esigabeni esikhulu, limele indawo yaseMkhambathini,” kusho uKhumalo. “UMkhambathi uyiqembu elikhula ngesivinini elifiswa ngabaqeqeshi abaningi ukuliqeqesha. Nokho sikulungiselele ukubhekana noMvoti, siyakwazi esikulundele kubona, nabo bayakwazi abakulindele kithina. Ngakho silindele umdlalo onzima kodwa ozokwenza abathandi bebhola babheme bakholwe." UKhumalo odabuka KwaNomoya, eSahlumbe, ojoyine uMkhambathi kule sizini esuka kwiFC Drakensberg, usizana noNkosingiphile “Dimco” Ntinga oyiphini lakhe. UMkhambathi ufinyelele emzuliswaneni we-Last 16 weNedbank Cup, waguqiswa yiMilford FC ngo 3-0. “Nakho ukufinyelela kwethu kwi-Last 16 yeNedbank Cup kube yisikhuthazi esikhulu kubadlali bethu, kwenyusa nezinga labo lokuzethemba nasemidlalweni emqoka yeligi esiyidlalile," usho kanje uKhumalo. Uma kwenzeka uMkhambathi ugcina ngokuphumelela ukuya kumaPlay-Offs kazwelonke uzoba nenye ingcindezi yokulandela ezinyathelweni zabakhaya bawo, iMidlands Wanderers, abaphumelele ukwenyukela kwiChampionship ngesizini edlule.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe I-CAPE Town City ezibeke ethubeni elihle lokuzibekisela indawo kuma-PSL Promotion Play-Offs ngokushaya iBaroka FC ngo 1-0 emdlalweni weMotsepe Foundation Championship e-Athlone Stadium, eKapa, izolo ntambama I-CAPE Town City izibeke ethubeni elihle lokuzibekisela indawo kuma-PSL Promotion Play-Offs ngokushaya iBaroka FC emdlalweni weMotsepe Foundation Championship obudlalelwa e-Athlone Stadium eKapa, izolo ntambama. Igoli likaGabriel Amato elingene ngesiwombe sokuqala ngomzuzu ka-22 yilona eliqinisekise amaphuzu amathathu amqoka kuleli qembu laseKapa elisemshikashikeni wokuzabalazela ukubuyela esigabeni seBetway Premiership. Njengoba iKruger United isilinde isilinde umdlalo wayo wokugcina wokusonga isizini ngeSonto elizayo, ukugcotshwa ngokusemthethweni njengompetha beMotsepe Championship, umbango usuphakathi kweCity, Milford FC, Hungry Lions neCasric Stars, ukulwela indawo kumaPlay-Offs. Womathathu la maqembu asembangweni wokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs abuye namaphuzu aphelele, njengoba iMilford ishaye i-University of Pretoria ngo 2-0 eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichard Bay, ngenkathi iHungry Lions inenebula iHighbury FC ngo 4-0 eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberh. Kwathi iCasric yabhaxabula i-Upington City ngo 2-0 eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium, e-Upington. Amaqembu amabili azoqeda endaweni yesibili neyesithathu azodlala neliqede endaweni ka-15 kwi-lo yePremiership. IMilford isendaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu awu-53, ilandelwa yiCity endaweni yesithathu neyesine ngamaphuzu awu-51 ngokulinganayo ngokwehlukana, kube yiCasric kweyesihlanu ngawu-49 Lokhu kusho ukuthi imidlalo yangeSonto elizayo, ngekawafawafa kula maqembu alwela ukuya kumaPlay-Offs. I-The Citizens eqeqeshwa uJan Vreman negqishe ngeningi labadlali abanamava okudlala kwiPremiership, izosonga isizini ngomdlalo wasekuhambeni neLeicesterford City ngeSonto, eDobsonville Stadium, eSoweto.
