IMilford eqeqeshwa uXanti Pupuma isonga isizini ngomdlalo wasekuhambeni neHungry Lions, eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs, e-Upington, iCasric isonge neGomora United eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Kanti iKruger eshaye iGomora ngo 1-0 izolo, izosonga ngomdlalo wasekhaya ne-The Bees FC KaNyamazane Stadium, nokuyilapho ezobe isinikwa khona indebe yayo yeMotsepe Championship. Kanti ngakolunye uhlangothi, isifundazwe iLimpopo sikhungethwe yifu elimnyama njengoba womabili amaqembu amabili akulesi sifundazwe egawulwe yizembe, okuyiBaroka FC neBlack Leopards. Phezu kokunqoba kweLeopards ngo 2-1 ishaya iVenda FC izolo, eThohoyandou Stadium kodwa lokho akuyisizanga ngenxa yesibalo samaphuzu. Imiphumela yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: The Bees 1-1 Leicesterford City; Black Leopards 2-1 Venda FC; Cape Town City 1-0 Baroka; Upington City 0-2 Casric Stars; Highbury 0-4 Hungry Lions; Milford FC 2-0 Univ. of Pretoria; Gomora 0-1 Kruger United; Midlands Wanderers 1-1 Lerumo Lions

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe INSEPHE yaseNingizimu Afrika ka-400m, uZakithi Nene, owenze ezibukwayo eqopha irekhodi elisha lika-400m emjahweni wase-Italy, iPegaso Meeting, ngempelasonto INSEPHE ka-400m yaseNingizimu Afrika, uZakithi Nene, yenze ezibukwayo iqopha irekhodi elisha lika-400m kwabesilisa emjahweni i-Pegaso Meeting, eStadio Luigi Ridolfi, eFlorence, e-Italy, ngempelasonto. Uqophe isikhathi esiwu-44.44 seconds, eshiya uLapo Bianciardi wase-Italy, olale isibili ngesikhathi esiwu-46.01. UNene (28) odabuka eMnambithi, ukhipha unyawo kulo mjaho wase-Italy nje, akukapholi maseko ebambe iqhaza empumelelweni yeqembu laseNingizimu Afrika lika-4x400 le-relay elibuye nendondo yesiliva kowe-World Athletics Relays, eGaborone, eBotswana, ngoMeyi 3. “I-Italy inendawo ekhethekile enhliziyweni yami. Ngaqala khona lapha e-Italy ukugijima kwiDiamond League ngo-2021, eFlorence. Ngiyayijabulela imijaho yase-Italy ngenxa yomoya nokwesekwa okuqhamuka ezibukelini zakhona. Ngizizwa ngisefomini eyisimanga kusukela ngaqala ukugijima. Ngifuna ukuqhubeka ngigijime ngenze isikhathi esingaphakathi kuka-45 seconds ukuze ngikwazi ukuqhudelana nabagijimi abasezingeni eliphezulu emhlabeni,” kusho uNene, ecashunwa yi-WorldAthletics.com UNene ovutha engabaselwe kusukela kuqala u-2026, ngo-Ephreli udle umhlanganiso ku-400m emjahweni iKip Keino Classic, eNairobi, eKenya, ngesikhathi esiwu-44.50. Kanti nyakenye uqophe isikhathi sakhe (PB) esiwu-43.76 ethatha indawo yesihlanu kowe-World Athletics Ultimate Championships, eTokyo, eJapan. Ungomunye wezibabuli zabagijimi iNingizimu Afrika ezothembela kubona ekwenzeni kahle komunye umqhudelwano we-World Athletics Ultimate Championships, ozobanjelwa eBudapest, eHungary, ngoSepthemba. Khonamanjalo: Umjaho i-Absa Run Your City 10km uhlehlisiwe ngenxa yesimo sezulu esingesihle esifundazweni iWestern Cape. Lo mjaho womlenze wesibili webanga lika-10km obekulindeleke ubanjelwe eKapa, izolo ekuseni, ngoLwesihlanu kuthathwe isinqumo sokuthi uhlehliswe ngenxa yokuthi izangoma zezulu, bese ziqinisekise ukuthi idolobha iKapa nezindawo eziningi ezingaphansi kwesifundazwe iWestern Cape, zizohlaselwa ngumoya onamandla ngeSonto (izolo) ozolandelwa ngumsinga obandayo ngeSonto (namuhla). Umlenze wokuqala we-Absa Run ubanjelwe eGqeberha ngoMashi, wanqotshwa u-Adriaan Wildschutt, kwabesifazane kwaphuma phambili uBrenda Jepchirchir waseKenya.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI weDurban City osabambile, uPitso Dladla, okulindeleke kucace maduze ngekusasa lakhe ekuholeni leli qembu ngesizini ezayo ngemuva kokulinqobela indebe yeNedbank Cup USIHLALO weDurban City, uFarouk Kadodia, uveza ukuthi kuzocaca maduze ngekusasa lomqeqeshi waleli qembu osabambile, uPitso Dladla. UKadodia olumane indlebe neSolezwe, ukubeke kwacaca ukuthi sebelinde ukusongwa kwale sizini esezihubela sakusha kuyona ngaphambi kokuthatha isinqumo ngethimba labaqeqeshi elizohola leli qembu ngesizini ezayo. UDladla uthathe izintambo zokuqeqesha njengebamba ngoFebhuwari, ngemuva kokukhonjwa indlela kukaSinethemba Badela. Ngaphansi kwesandla sikaDladla odabuka eNewtown, oThongathi, eThekwini, iCity iqophe umlando ngeledlule ngokuba yiqembu lokuqala laKwaZulu-Natal eliphakamise indebe yeNedbank Cup ngokuguqisa i-TS Galaxy ngo 2-1 kowamanqamu ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Ngaphezu kwalokho, isenethuba lokuqeda kwi-Top 8 ngesizini yalo yokuqala kwiBetway Premiership njengoba isendaweni yesikhombisa kwi-log. Inselelo ebhekene noKadodia wukuthi uDladla akazo iziqu zokuqeqesha ezifanele njengoba ngesizini ezayo bezodlala kwiCaf Confederation Cup. Ngokomthetho weCaf, uDladla ngeke avumeleke ukuhlala ebhentshini njengoba eneziqu zokuqeqesha uCaf B License esikhundleni sezeCaf A noma ezePro License. Lokhu kusho ukuthi iCity izophoqeleka ukuqasha umqeqeshi oneziqu ezifanele, uDladla abuyele esikhundleni sokuba yiphini. “Sizolibuyekeza ithimba labaqeqeshi ngezinhloso ezinhle ngekusasa leqembu. Leli yithimba lesikhashana njengoba singakamqoki ngokugcwele umqeqeshi oyinhloko. "Sesisalelwe yimidlalo emibili ukusonga isizini, ngakho isinqumo ngethimba labaqeqeshi sizosithatha uma kuphela isizini. "Siyazazi izinhlelo esinazo ngesizini ezayo ngakho silinde kuphele isizini kucace ukuthi siyangena kwi-MTN8 noma cha,” kusho uKadodia.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UNOMPEMPE wase-DRC, uJean-Jacques Ndala, okushaywa amakhala ngokuqokwa kwakhe ukudlalisa owamanqamu eCaf Champions League phakathi kweMamelodi Sundowns ne-AS FAR ngoMeyi 17, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli INHLANGANO eyengamele ibhola e-Afrika, iConfederation of African Football (Caf) iphonselwe inselelo ngesinqumo sayo sokuqoka unompempe waseDemocratic Republic of Congo (DRC), uJean-Jacques Ndala,  njengezodlalisa umdlalo womlenze wokuqala wamanqamu weCaf Champions League phakathi kweMamelodi Sundowns ne-AS FAR Rabat yaseMorocco ngoMeyi 17. Owomlenze wokuqala uzodlalelwa eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli, ngoMeyi 17, kuthi owomlenze wesibili ugijinywe ngoMeyi 24 ePrince Moualy Abedellah Stadium, eRabat, eMorocco. Kuvela ukuthi iSundowns ne-AS FAR bathumele izikhalo ezisemthethweni kwi-Caf ngoMsombuluko beshaya amakhala ngokuqokwa kukaNdala. La maqembu akhala ngokuthi ukuqokwa kwalo nompempe kubukela phansi ubumqoka balo mdlalo wamanqamu weChampions League ngenxa yomlando wakhe ongemuhle. UNdala nguyena owayeshaya impempe emdlalweni wamanqamu we-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) phakathi kweMorocco neSenegal ngoJanuwari, eMorocco. Sekungumlando ukuthi kulo mdlalo wamanqamu we-Afcon kwaba nezidubedube ngenxa yezinqumo zakhe ezishaqisayo. Kusolwa yena ngokuvumela iSenegal ibuyele enkundleni ngemuva kokuphuma enkundleni kulandela ukubeka kwakhe iphenathi. Kumanje kusalindwe isinqumo se-Court of Arbitration for Sport (CAS) ngemuva kokuba iSenegal idlulise isikhalo ikhala ngesinqumo seCaf sokunika iMorocco indebe ye-Afcon ekubeni kuyiyona iSenegal eyanqoba ngo 1-0 kowamanqamu. Ngokusho kwe-Morocco World News, imithombo engaphakathi kwi-Caf iqinisekisile komunye umthombo wezindaba waseMorocco, i-El Botola, ukuthi la maqembu azodlala owamanqamu weChampions League anemibuzo ngokuqokwa kukaNdala. Ikomiti le-Caf eliqoka onompempe likuqinisekisile ngeSonto ukuthi uNdala nguyena ozodlalisa owamanqamu weChampions League, azolekelelwe ngabakhaya bakhe uJulien Ngila noGradiel Munia njengabasizi bakanompempe. UJesse Moise uzoba yi-fourth official. U-Ahme Abdelaziz waseSudan uzoqhoqhobala i-Video Assistant Referee (VAR), esizwa ngu-Ahmed Shelmani waseLibya noDiana Chikotscha waseZambia.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMDLALI wasesiswini kwiKruger Untied, uCelimpilo Ngema, obambe iqhaza elikhulu empulelweni yaleli qembu eselingompethea beMotsepe Foundation Championship UMDLALI wasesiswini kwiKruger United, uCelimpilo “Zidane” Ngema, utusa ukuzikhandla nokusebenza ngokubambisana njengekhubalo lokunqoba isicoco seMotsepe Foundation Championship kwaleli qembu elizogijima kwiBetway Premiership ngesizini ezayo. Yize kusasele imidlalo emibili kusongwe isizini ka-2025/26 yeChampionship, iKruger isivele iyiwinile iligi yalesi sigaba. Iqede ukuqagela ngombango weligi ibhaxabula iBlack Leopards ngo 3-1 ngoMgqibelo KaNyamazane Stadium, KaNyamazane. UNgema (28) waseThubalethu, eMelmoth, ngomunye wabadlali ababambe iqhaza elikhulu empumelelweni yeKruger ayijoyine esuka kuMaZulu ekuqaleni kwesizini. “Ukuzikhandla kwethu nokusebenza ngokubambisana njengabadlali beqembu kugcine kuthela izithelo. Ngakho sonke sithokozile ngokuthi sigcine sikwazile ukufeza umgomo wethu ebesizibekele wona kule sizini obekuyikho ukulwela ukuwina iligi,” kusho uNgema. Lo mdlali oyinjini yasesiswini, ohlukane naMaZulu esedlale amasizini amabili kuwona ubalwa nabadlali abadlale kwiPremiership okubalwa kubona uTercious Malepe, Morne Nel, Wandisile Letlabika, Sipho Sibiya noNtsako Makhubela. “Ukukhushulelwa kwiBetway Premiership kweqembu kusho lukhulu kimina ngoba kunginika elinye ithuba engilithatha njengethuba lesibili lokuthi ngibuyele ekudlaleni esigabeni seBetway okuyisigaba esifiswa yiwo wonke umdlali odlala ibhola elikhokhelayo. Ngizimisele ukulibamba ngazo zombili leli thuba, ngiqhubeke nokuzimisela,"kusho uNgema. IKruger ivule igebe lamaphuzu ayisishiyagalombili phakathi kwayo neMilford FC esendaweni yesibili ngawu-50. Izodlala neGomora United eMalamulele Stadium, eMalamulele, ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama. Emdlalweni wokugcina izodlala ne-The Bees ekhaya. “Nakuba sesazi ukuthi singompetha beligi kodwa sisazoqhubeka sidlale ngokuzimisela nakule midlalo emibili esisalele, siziqophele owethu umlando ngokuqeda isizini ngamaphuzu amaningi.” usho kanje uNgema. Ngesizini edlule iDurban City inqobe iligi yeMotsepe Championship ngamaphuzu awu-58, kanti iKruger isethubeni lokwedlula irekhodi lamaphuzu awu-62 leThanda Royal Zulu eyanqoba ngawo isicoco seChampionship ngesizini ka-2016/17.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMGADLI waMaZulu FC, uThapelo Matlhoko, ongangabazi ukuthi basenethuba lokuqeda isizini besendaweni yesithathu kwi-log yeBetway Premiership bazibekisele indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup UMGADLI waMaZulu FC, uThapelo Matlhoko, akangabazi ukuthi basenethuba lokuzibekisela indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngokuqeda endaweni yesithathu kwi-log yeBetway Premiership ngokuphela kwale sizini ka-2025/26 esisongwa. AmaZulu, asendaweni yesine kwi-log yePremiership, abalwa namaqembu asalwela ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu okuyindawo eyisango lokuyodlala kwiCaf Confed. Iqembu elizoqeda endaweni yesithathu kwi-log kule sizini lizojoyina iDurban City kwiCaf Confed esivele izibekisele indawo kulo mqhudelwano wasezwenikazi lase-Afrika ngokunqoba isicoco seNedbank Cup ngempelasonto. IKaizer Chiefs isahlezi endaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu awu-47, ilandelwa aMaZulu ngawu-42, kube yiSekhukhune United kweyesihlanu ngawu-39. AmaZulu azodlala neLamontville Golden Arrows kowePremiership wabakhaya baseThekwini kusasa ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. Lo mdlalo ufana nowamagqubu kwazise emidlalweni emithathu AmaZulu yiwona anqobile ngesikhathi la maqembu etholene phezulu kowabakhaya. Kule midlalo kubalwa nowomzuliswano wokuqala wesizini AmaZulu aguqisa kuwo i-Arrows ngo 1-0 ngoDisemba 2 eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza. “Ngumdlalo omkhulu wabakhaya, esizimisele ngokuwunqoba noma sazi ukuthi akuzukuba lula ukubhekana ne-Arrows,” kusho uMatlhoko. Usuthu luza kulo mdlalo luthelwe ngezibonkolo njengoba emdlalweni eligcine ukuwudlala wePremiership luvulele isibhaxu sika 5-1 kwiChippa United. “Ngikholwa wukuthi sisengakwazi ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu. Sidlala kahle futhi sizimisele. Ngisho nayo iKaizer Chiefs izoshaqeka ngoba izosithola simi ngomumo siyilindile,” kusho uMatlhoko ngokuzethemba. UMatlhoko (23) odabuka eMunsieville, eKrugersdorp, ujoyine Usuthu ngaphambi kokuqala kwale sizini esuka kwiKruger United edlala kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship, lapho abenza khona ezibukwayo waphenduka inyama emaqenjini ehlukene ePremiership. Nakuba efike wabhekana nobunzima ekutholeni ijezi ngaphansi komqeqeshi u-Arthur Zwane, kodwa usalibambe ngazo zombili ithuba asalinikiwe. Emidlalweni eyisishiyagalombili asayidlalile useshaye amagoli amathathu, waba nesandla kwelilodwa. “Zonke izinto zenzeka ngesizathu. Yebo bekungelula ukuhlala ngingadlali kodwa bengazi ukuthi ithuba lami liyeza. Okwenzeka kimi kule sizini ngikuthatha njengesifundo, ikakhulukazi njengoba kuyisizini yami yokuqala ngidlala kwiPremiership. Ngikholwa wukuthi ngesizini ezayo ngizokwenza okungcono kakhulu ukusiza iqembu lami," usho kanje uMatlhoko. Ngemuva kowe-Arrows, Usuthu luzokwamukela iChiefs eMoses Mabhida Stadium ngoMeyi 16 .

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UZOLA Luthuli oyi-kit manager yeDurban City asewe evuka nayo iminyaka ewu-22 njengoba eseze wanqoba nayo indebe yeNedbank Cup UKUNQOBA indebe yeNedbank Cup kweDurban City kumele nakanjani kube yisikhuthazi  nesiqalo sezinto ezinhle emaqenjini aKwaZulu-Natal, adlala kwiBetway Premiership. Lowo ngumbono kaZola “Mzolisto” Luthuli oyi-kit manager yeDurban City engompetha besizini ka-2025/2026 beNedbank Cup ngokuguqisa i-TS Galaxy ngo 2-1 ngoMgqibelo, ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. ICity eqede isomiso seminyaka engu-17 sokunganqobi izindebe kwamaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal, yaqeda ishobolo leminyaka ewu-54 lokubhekwa yisambane kwamaqembu akulesi sifundazwe kwiNedbank kusukela wasungulwa ngo-1971, usabizwa nge-Life Challenge. “Le mpumelelo yeDurban City kumele nakanjani ibe yisikhuthazi emaqenjini aKwaZulu-Natal ekwenzeni okufanayo nawo njengoba sesenzile siyiDurban City ngokuwina le ndebe. "Sinamaqembu amane adlala kwiBetway Premiership, namabili adlala kwiMotsepe Championship, angingabazi ukuthi wonke la maqembu azokhuthazeka ekulweleni impumelelo ngokwehlukana kwawo,” kusho uLuthuli, osewe evuka naleli qembu iminyaka kusukela lisabizwa ngeMaritzburg United. “Empeleni kule sizini amaqembu aseKZN enza kahle njengoba lingekho nelilodwa phakathi kwawo elivika izembe okuyinto ebesesaziwa ngayo kumasizini edlule. Lokho kuyinkomba yokuthi kukhona lapho esiya khona njengesifundazwe. Njengamanje mathathu amaqembu aseKZN alwela ukuhlala kwi-Top 8, kanti iRichards Bay nayo iyangqongqoza.” AmaZulu asendaweni yesine, iCity isendaweni yesikhombisa, iLamontville Golden Arrows isendaweni yesishiyagalombili, kanti iRichards Bay FC isendaweni ka-11. ULuthuli (54), odabuka eMlaza, usesebenze njenge-kit manager iminyaka ecela ku-30. WayekwiManning Rangers ngo-1996, inqoba isicoco seligi. Wasebenza kwiSantos banqoba indebe yeBobsave Super Bowl ngaphansi kukaClive Barker, bazuza neligi beholwa nguGordon Igesund. Uthe le ndebe yeNedbank isho lukhulu kuyena ikakhulukazi njengoba esesebenze kwiCity iminyaka ecela ku-22. “NgoJuni, ngizobe ngihlanganisa iminyaka ewu-30 ngenza lo msebenzi engiwenzayo. Kodwa kwiDurban City sengisebenze isikhathi eside nayo kusukela ngiyijoyina ngo-2004, ngisuka kwiSantos. Ngakho le ndebe yeNedbank isho lukhulu kakhulu kimina ngoba ngiwe ngivuka nayo. Ngangikhona ngesizini ka-2006/07, sidliwa yizembe siphethe o-Onismor Bhasera noSteve Lekoelea. Ngangikhona futhi ibuyela kwiPremiership ngo-2008. Ngangikhona futhi nangesizini ka-2022/23 sidliwa yizembe, saphinda sabuya ngesizini edlule ka-2024/25. Ngaphezu kwalokho, isizinda saseChatsworth okuzinze kuso iCity sesifana nekhaya lami ngoba neManning Rangers engawina nayo iligi ngesizini ka-1996/97, yayidlalela khona imidlalo yasekhaya,” kuphetha uLuthuli owayeseqenjini leBafana Bafana elalikwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngo-2002, eKorea-Japan.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: ABADLALI beDurban City bejabulela igoli elibanqobise umdlalo wamanqamu weNedbank Cup begqisa iTS galaxy ngo 2-1. IDURBAN City iqophe umlando ngokuba yiqembu lokuqala laKwaZulu-Natal emlandweni ukuzuza indebe yeNedbank Cup iguqisa i-TS Galaxy emdlalweni wamanqamu eNedbank ngoMgqibelo kusihlwa ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Amagoli aqinisekise ukuphela kweshobolo  nesomiso sezindebe seminyaka ewu-16 KwaZulu-Natal avalelwe phakathi uMfanafuthi Mkhize noJean Lwamba. ULwamba ongumgadli odabuka eDemocratic Republic of Congo (DRC), ushaye elokunqoba ngomzuzu ka-72 elungisa iphutha lakhe, kwazise iGalaxy ibithole igoli ngaye ngesikhathi umkhonto ugwaza ekhaya esiwombeni sokuqala. ICity ayiqedanga nje kuphela ishobolo isomiso sezindebe eKZN eyagcina ngeLamontville Golden Arrows ngesizini ka-2009/10 inqoba i-MTN8, kodwa iqede ishobolo leminyaka ewu-54 lesi sifundazwe sibhekwe yisambane kulo mqhudelwano womkhumulajezi. Kusukela ngesizini ka-1971 lo  mqhudelwano usaziwa ngeLife Challenge,  amaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal abelokhu ehluleka ukuwunqoba. Emaqenjini aseKZN aseke afinyelela kowamanqamu phambilini kubalwa AmaZulu FC, African Wanderers, Manning Rangers, nayo iCity eyaguqa kowamanqamu ngesizini ka-2017/18 isabizwa ngeMarizburg United. ICity, okuyisizini yayo yokuqala le ikhushulelwe esigabeni seBetway Premiership, beyize kulo mdlalo wamanqamu inenhloso yokuziqophela owayo umlando ngokuwina indebe yayo yokuqala kusukela yasungulwa. Ngakolunye uhlangothi iGalaxy beyize kulo mdlalo izimisele ngokusinqoba okwesibili lesi sicoco kwazise yasinqoba ngesizini ka-2018/19 ishaya iKaizer Chiefs ngo 1-0. ICitizens iqeqeshwa uPitso Dladla osabambile noziqophele owakhe umlando ngokunqoba indebe yakhe yokuqala esigabeni sePremiership.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UKHETHUKUTHULA Ndlovu weKruger United (osebholeni) owathathwa exinwe uLihle Dlamini weMidlands Wanderers, ungomunye wabadlali abamqoka kuleli qembu osekusele kancane lidle isicoco seMotsepe Foundation Championship UMDLALI wasophondweni lwesokunxele kwiKruger United, uKhethukuthula “Jaguar” Ndlovu, ukholwa wukuthi sekusezandleni zabo ukufeza isifiso sikasihlalo waleli qembu sokulibona likhushulelwa esigabeni seBetway Premiership. IKruger ihlezi esicongweni se-log yeMotsepe Foundation Championship ngamaphuzu awu-55 emuva kwemidlalo engu-28. Ivule igebe lamaphuzu ayisishiyagalombili phakathi kwayo neMilford FC neHungry Lions abayilandela ngawu-47 endaweni yesibili neyesithathu. Idinga amaphuzu amathathu kuphela emidlalweni emithathu esele ukuze ibe ngompetha baka-2025/26 beMotsepe Championship. Umdlalo wayo wasekhaya ezowudlala neBlack Leopards namuhla ngo-3 ntambama KaNyamazane Stadium, KaNyamazane, yiwona obukeka uzoba yingqophamlando kwiKruger ngokukhuphukela esigabeni sePremiership. Uma leli qembu laseBushbuckridge, okuyisizini yalo yesibili kwiMotsepe Championship, liphumelela ukukhuphukela kwiPremiership, lizoba ngelesibili lasesifundazweni iMpumalanga. Okwamanje lesi sifundazwe sishaya ngeTS Galaxy kuphela. UNdlovu, odlale amasizini amabili kwiRoyal AM, ngomunye wabadlali abanamava okudlala kwiPremiership iKruger eqinise ngabo isikwati sayo ngaphambi kokuqala kwale  sizini. Phakathi kwabo kubalwa uWandisile Letlabika, Morne Nel, Kagiso Malinga, Celimpilo “Zidane” Ngema, Sipho Sibiya ongukaputeni, Tercious Malepe, nonozinti uPhilasande Manqele obolekwe kwiRichards Bay FC. Ngewindi likaJanuwari, iphinde yaqinisa isikwati ngoNtsako “Neverdie” Makhubela noLindokuhle “Ma-11” Mtshali. “Sekuseduze phambili, futhi wonke umdlali okhona eqenjini uyakuqonda ukubaluleka kokuthi siwunqobe umdlalo esiyowudlala neBlack Leopards, yize sazi ukuthi akuzukuba ngumdlalo olula njengoba nayo ilwelwa ukusuka ezembeni. Kodwa esizibophezele ngakho wukuthi silwe njengamabhubesi, sikhiphe amandla okugcina sifeze isifiso sikasihlalo wethu (uBasil Khoza) sokubona iqembu likhushulelwa kwiBetway Premiership. Sesilwe kakhulu ngakho asikwazi ukuyilahla ekugcineni sesisebenze kangaka. Sekusezandleni zethu manje ukuphetha imbenge,” kusho uNdlovu, odabuka eBathenjini, eMsinga. UNdlovu ungomunye wabadlali abasale dengwane ngesizini edlule ngenkathi iRoyal AM ixoshwa yiPremier Soccer League (PSL) ngenxa yamacala ebibhekene nawo ngokukweleta umqoqi wentela, i-SARS. Ngaphandle kweKruger esizibeke ethubeni lokungena kwiPremiership, amaqembu asenethuba lokuzibekisela indawo kuma-PSL Promotion Play-Offs yiMilford, Hungry Lions, Cape Town City neCasric Stars. Esishozini sezembe nakhona isabambene ngezihluthu phakathi kweLeopards, Midlands Wanderers, ne-The Bees. ILeopards esendaweni ka-15 kwi-log ingase ibe sengcupheni yokulandela abakhaya bayo baseLimpopo iBaroka FC asebevele begawulwe yizembe. Imidlalo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Milford FC v The Bees (Umhlathuze Sports Complex); Hungry Lions v Upington City (Mxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium); Kruger United v Black Leopards (KaNyamazane Stadium); University of Pretoria v Lerumo Lions (Tuks Stadium) Venda FC v Leicesterford City (Thohoyandou Stadium); Cape Town City v Gomora United (Athlone Stadium)

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI weDurban City, uPitso Dladla, nowe-TS Galaxy, uBernard Parker, okuyibona abazobe behola la maqembu kowamanqamu eNedbank Cup kusihlwa ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane NGAPHANDLE kokuthi ukufinyelela kweDurban City kowamanqamu weNedbank Cup yinto ebingacatshangwa yiningi lezingqapheli nabathandi bebhola jikelele baseNingizimu Afrika njengoba kuyisizini yayo yokuqala esigabeni seBetway Premiership, kungase kube yingqophamlando nakumqeqeshi wayo imbala, uPitso Dladla. UDladla (47), ongumqeqeshi osabambile kwiCity, uzohlala ebhentshini njengenhloko yabaqeqeshi njengoba bezobhekana ne-TS Galaxy kowamanqamu weNedbank Cup namuhla ngo-6 ntambama, ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Lo mqeqeshi ubanjiswe izintambo zokuqeqesha ekuqaleni kukaFebhuwari ngemuva kokuxoshwa kukaSinethemba Badela. Usethubeni lokuba ngumqeqeshi waKwaZulu-Natal ozoqeda isomiso seminyaka engu-16 sezindebe emaqenjini akulesi sifundazwe. Usethubeni futhi lokuziqophela owakhe umlando ngokuba ngumqeqeshi wokuqala waleli qembu laseThekwini ozonqoba indebe kwiPremiership. “Asizikhathazi ngemidlalo yethu emithathu esingenzanga kahle kuyona ngaphambi kwalo mdlalo wamanqamu esizowudlala ne-TS Galaxy. Umdlalo womkhumulajezi wehlukile kunomdlalo weligi, ngakho umdlalo wamanqamu esiya kuwo sizowuthatha ngendlela ehlukile,” kusho uDladla. Emidlalweni emine yePremiership ngaphambi kowamanqamu wePremiership, iCitizens ihlulwe yiMamelodi Sundowns, Lamontville Golden Arrows neMagesi FC, ngaphambi kokudlala ngokulingana ngo 1-1 ne-Orbit College. “Ukufinyelela kwethu lapho esikhona manje (kowamanqamu) akukhona okwami kuphela, kodwa kungenxa yokubambisana ethimbeni lethu labaqeqeshi engibala kulo u-Ashraf Hendricks noRowen Fernandez. Kithi lo mdlalo wamanqamu mukhulu kuneqembu ngoba asimele iDurban City nje kuphele kodwa simele idolobha iTheku nesifundazwe sonke iKwaZulu-Natal. Ukwesekwa esikuthola eMnyangweni wezeMidlalo esifundazweni oholwa uMntomuhle Khawula, kuyisikhuthazi esikhulu kithina njengoba ethembise ukukhipha  amabhasi azothwala abalandeli abazoseseka benze inkundla iPeter Mokaba ifane nenkundla yethu yasekhaya iChatsworth Stadium.” UMDLALI wasezinhlangothini, uSamkelo Maseko, ngomunye wabazothwala amathemba aleli qembu uma selibhekene neTS Galaxy emdlalweni wamanqamu weTS Galaxy ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, namuhla. UDladla odabuka eHambanathi, oThongathi, ungomunye wabaqeqeshi asebeqeqeshe kuzo zonke izigaba zebhola eNingizimu kusukela kwezama-amesha kuze kufinyelele kwesikhokhelayo sePremier Soccer League (PSL). Ngesizini ka-2016/17 wayeqeqesha noRonnie Gabriel uThongathi FC  ludla isicoco sikazwelonke seSafa ABC Motsepe League, lwakhushulelwa kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship. Ngemuva kwamasizini amane eqeqesha esigabeni seMotsepe Championship, ngesizini ka-2021/22 wanqoba isicoco seligi neRichards Bay FC esebenza naye uGabriel. Ngesizini edlule ubesethimbeni labaqeqeshi leCitizens ngesikhathi inqoba isicoco seMotsepe Championship eyiphini likaSimo Dladla. Nakuba eseyibamba-mqeqeshi kuleli qembu kodwa uliqonda kangcono kwazise usehlale kulona amasizini amathathu. Lokhu kumbeka ethubeni elihle lokulinqobela isicoco, aziqophele umlando wokuba ngumqeqeshi wokuqala waKwaZulu-Natal ozonqoba iNedbank Cup okuyindebe engakaze itholwe yiqembu lakulesi sifundazwe kusukela ngo-1971 umqhudelwano usabizwa nge-Life Challenge Cup. ICity efudukele eThekwini ngesizini edlule ka-2024/25, seyike yafinyelela kowamanqamu eNedbank ngesizini ka-2017/18, isaziwa ngeMaritzburg United, yaguqiswa kowamanqamu ngo 1-0 yiFree State Stars. IGalaxy nethuba lomunye umlando IGalaxy yaKwaNdebele, eMpumalanga, yaqopha umlando ngesizini ka-2018/19 iba yiqembu lokuqala elalidlala esigabeni seNational First Division (esiyiMotsepe Championship) eliqukule indebe yeNedbank ngokuguqisa iKaizer Chiefs ngo 1-0 kowamanqamu. Isethubeni lomunye umlando kowanamuhla wamanqamu. Leli qembu liya kowamanqamu liholwa wuBernard Parker njengebamba lomqeqeshi, kulandela ukukhonjwa indlela kuka-Adnan Beganovic onganqobanga nowokubika umdlalo kwengu-11 yakamuva. Nokho, njengoba kuyinto eyaziwayo ukuthi umdlalo womkhumulajezi nowamanqamu uvamise ukuyintshinga ngewindi ifomu yeligi, kungemangaze ukuvuka inja ebomvu kwaleli qembu. UParker, owazakhela igama esengumgadli ovutha uphondo kwiChiefs eminyakeni embalwa edlule, naye usethubeni lokuziqophela owakhe umlando ngesicoco sakhe sokuqala njengomqeqeshi uma kwenzeka i-The Rockets iphakamisa iNedbank. Ukubeke ngokucacile ukuthi akayifakile emqondweni wakhe eyokuqashwa ngokugcwele kodwa ugxile emsebenzini asanikwe wona njengamanje wokuhola iqembu. “Angikakucabangi lokho. Okwami wukuqinisekisa ukuthi ngenza lo msebenzi engisanikwe wona ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ngiwenza kangcono nangokusemandleni ukufaka umoya wokulwela impumelelo kubadlali. Kungenzeka noma yini kowamanqamu,” kusho uParker owanqoba iNedbank Cup esagijima kwiChiefs. “Njengomqeqeshi osemncane, ngiyafunda usuku nosuku. Luselude uhambo engisazoluhamba kule ndima yokuqeqesha. Ngakho asikho isidingo sokuxhamazela, okumqoka nje wukusebenzisa ithuba enginikwe lona.” Isithombe ISIKHWISHIKHWISHI se-TS Galaxy, uSeluleko Mahlambi

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-AKANI Simbine osingathe ngempumelelo iSimbine Classic, ePitoli, usebheke ukuyoyibamba kowe-World Relay Championships, eGaborone, eBotswana, ngempelasonto INSEPHE yomgijimi webanga lika-100m, u-Akani Simbine, ikuqinisekisile ukuthi izobe iyibambe kwi-World Relay Championships ezobanjelwa eBotswana, kule mpelasonto. USimbine (32) ongumsunguli nomhleli weSimbine Classic, okungumjaho wohlobo lwe-track and field ogijinywe okokuqala nonyaka ePilditch Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesibili, uzwakalise injabulo nomunyu ngempumelelo yalo mjaho odonse abagijimi abaseqopheleni eliphezulu nezibukeli ebeziphume ngobuningi ukuzowethamela. Uthe okuqale njengephupho kuyena kugcine sekuba yindumezulu yomqhudelwano ogqugquzele abantu abaningi baseNingizimu Afrika ukuthi bakholelwe emaphusheni abo. “Ngijabule ukuthi ube yimpumelelo lo mjaho. Bekugcwele kuchichima ezihlalweni yizibukeli, izingane zibone amaphupho azo efezeka, nabagijimi bakithi bathola ithuba lokuncintisana nezihlabani zabagijimi bamazwe,” kusho uSimbine, oveze isifiso sakhe sokuletha i-Diamond League eNingizimu Afrika ngelinye ilanga. “Ngibonga kakhulu kuwona wonke umuntu ngokukholelwa kuleli phupho lami nokwazi ukuthi into enjengalena ingenzeka. Nginethemba lokuthi singawukhulisa lo mjaho. Lesi kuyesiqalo nje.” Kulo mjaho uSimbine ushaye isikhathi esiwu-9.98 seconds kowandulela owamanqamu ku-100m, okuyisikhathi esimsize ekuzibekiseleni indawo kuma-Commonwealth Games azobanjelwa eGlasgow, eScotland, ngoJulayi 23 kuya ku-Agasti 2. Nakuba uSimbine ehlulekile ukuwunqoba lo mjaho njengoba ephume ekugcineni kowamanqamu ka-100m onqotshwe ngu-Emanuel Eseme waseCameroon, ukuqinisekisile ukuthi uzoyibamba kwi-World Relay Championships ezobanjelwa eGaborone, eBotswana, ngoMgqibelo kuze kube yiSonto. Ukusho lokhu ngemuva kokuba ephume eseqhuga, kunokwesabela ukuthi ulimele. Nokho ukuqinisekisile ukuthi ubebanjwe ngamajaqamba nje. “Akukho okutheni, amajaqamba nje. Indlela engiqale ngayo umjaho iwunyakazile umzimba wami, emva kwalokho wenqaba nokuyilapho engiqale khona ukubanjwa ngamajaqamba. "Ngiyazi ukuthi ama-World Relays ayeza, yingakho ngiqede umjaho (Simbine Classic) sengizigijimela kancane ngoba bengifuna ukwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi umzimba ukahle. Umzimba udinga ukululama.” Kwi-World Relay, uSimbine neqembu lakhe lika-4x10mm banenselelo yokuvikela isicoco abasinqobe nyakenye eGuangzhou, eChina. KwiSimbine Classic, uPrudence Sekgodiso, udle umhlanganiso kwabesifazane kowamanqamu ka-1500m ngesikhathi sika-4 min, 08.93sec, eshiya uKarabo More kwathi uTshepo Tshite wadla umhlanganiso ku-300m kwabesilisa eshiya uLuan Munnik ngesikhathi sika-7min 54.05sec.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMARCELO Allende weMamelodi Sundowns egadulisa uRodney Maphangule wePolokwane City emdlalweni wePolokwane City emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoLwesithathu Mamelodi Sundowns (0) 1 IMAMELODI Sundowns ibuyele esicongweni se-log yeBetway Premiership ishaya iPolokwane City ngo 1-0 eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. Igoli eliqinisekise ukuthi iSundowns ibuya nawo womathathu amaphuzu ePolokwane livalelwe phakathi uMarcelo Allende ngesiwombe sesibili. Ukunqoba kweSundowns yiPolokwane kusho ukubuyela emgqigqweni wayo wokunqoba njengoba ibisilahle amaphuzu emidlalweni emibili yakamuva ibambana neStellenbosch FC ngo 1-1 neRichards Bay FC ngo 0-0 ngokwehlukana. AmaSandawana aqhwakele kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu awu-61, alandelwe yi-Orlando Pirates endaweni ngawu-59. Azophinda adlale neRise and Shine ngeSonto kowomzuliswano wesibili eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. Njengoba amaSandawana neZimnyama sebelingana ngemidlalo engu-26, lokhu kusho ukuthi le midlalo emine esalele la maqembu iyona esiyocacisa ngelizokhala lemuke nesicoco yize amaSandawana esevule igebe lamaphuzu amabili.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMGADLI weRichards Bay FC, uLundi Mahala, ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka abathwele amathemba aleli qembu okulwela ukuqeda kwi-Top 8 ekupheleni kwesizini IMIPHUMELA yakamuva isibuyise ithemba kumqeqeshi weRichards Bay FC, uRonnie Gabriel, ngokuphinda izibekisele indawo kwi-Top 8 njengoba selidumela emasumpeni ngokusongwa kwesizini yeBetway Premiership. IBay esendaweni yeshumi kwi-log yePremiership, isalelwe yimidlalo emine - okubalwa kuyo emibili ezoyidlalela ekhaya - ukulwela ukubuyela kwi-MTN8 ihlandla lesibili ngesizini ezayo. NgeSonto iphazamise umgqigqo weMamelodi Sundowns esembangweni wesicoco seligi, iyibamba ngo 1-1 eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay. IBay ibuye namaphuzu ayisishiyagalombili emidlalweni emine yakamuva. “Senza kahle emidlalweni yasekhaya. Obekusikhathaza wukungenzi kahle emidlalweni yethu yasekuhambeni, okuyingakho kusibuyisele ithemba ukubuya namaphuzu amathathu ekuhambeni kwi-TS Galaxy. Ifomu iyanyuka, iqembu liya ngokuya likhula kodwa iligi ingumjaho omude. Ngakho ngibone sithole ifomu ngesikhathi esifanele. Akuvamile ngalesi sikhathi sesizini isiyophela ukudlala imidlalo emine kwiPSL (Premiership) ungahlulwa. Sisalelwe yimidlalo emine futhi ngikholwa wukuthi sisazokwazi ukuba yiqembu okungelula ukulehlula kuze kuphele isizini, izinga lokuzethemba liyenyuka eqenjini,” kusho uGabriel, oqeqesha ngokubambisana noPapi Zothwane. “Bekuvele kungomunye wemigomo yethu kusukela kuqala isizini ukuqeda kwi-Top 8, futhi ngokwezibalo sisengakwazi ukuwufeza lo mgomo wethu kule midlalo esisalele. Ngaphandle kokubukela phansi amaqembu esisazodlala nawo kodwa uma ngibheka imidlalo esisazoyidlala ngikholwa wukuthi sinalo ithuba lokuweba amaphuzu.” INata Rich Boyz okuyisizini yayo yesine le kwiPremiership kulandela ukukhushulelwa kwayo kulesi sigaba ekupheleni kweka-2021/22, idlale okokuqala emqhudelwaneni weMTN8 kule sizini ngokuqeda endaweni yesishiyagalombili ngesizini edlule. Emidlalweni emibili esazoyidlalela ekhaya kwemine eyisalele, izodlala nePolokwane City neSekhukhune United, idlale ekuhambeni neMarumo Gallans neMagesi FC ngokwehlukana. Leli qembu laKwaZulu-Natal eligqishe ngabadlali abasebancane, seliphendule inkundla yasekhaya, uMhlathuze Sports Complex, indawo yokuthwalisa kanzima izitha. Emidlalweni engu--15 eseliyidlalile kule nkundla kusukela ngoSepthemba, lisahlulwe yi-Orbit College kuphela.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-DOCTOR Mkhonza no-Ayanda Dlamini abangabaqeqeshi boMvoti FC osethubeni lokuyodlala umdlalo wokuhlunga iqembu elizomela iKwaZulu-Natal kumaPlay-Offs kazwelonke eSafa ABC Motsepe League Image: UMVOTI FC FACEBOOK YIZE izinto zivuna bona ngokuqeda esicongweni kwi-log ka-Stream A weSafa KwaZulu-Natal ABC Motsepe League kodwa umqeqeshi woMvoti FC, uDoctor Mkhonza, ukubeka ngokucacile ukuthi ngeke bawuthathe kancane uMzinto United abazodlala nawo kowokusonga isizini. Umvoti ohlezi esicongweni se-log ngamaphuzu awu-56, udinga iphuzu emdlalweni wokugcina wesizini ka-2025/26, usugadulisana noMzinto eKing Edward Park, eGreytown, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. INjampela esendaweni yesibili kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-53, kudingeka iwunqobe kumnyama kubomvu umdlalo wayo wokusonga isizini neHellenic ngawo uMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama, eMthunzini Sports Field, eMthunzini, bese ithandazela ukuthi uMvoti uhlulwe wuMzinto. UMzinto osemsileni kwi-log ka-Stream A, akusekho okudlalelayo njengoba usugawulwe yizembe kulesi sigaba. “Ngeke siwuthathe kancane uMzinto ngoba uyiqembu elisekugcineni kwi-log ngoba lokho kungasifaka enkingeni. Sizowuthatha njengomdlalo omqoka okufanele silwele ukuwunqoba,” kusho uMkhonza oqeqesha ngokubambisana no-Ayanda “Cobra” Dlamini. “Indlela esidlale ngayo kule sizini kusukela iqala kuze kufike manje njengoba sesiyiqeda isizini, isinika ithemba ngokuyodalla amaPlay-Offs. "Osekusele nje wukuthi siwuqedele kahle umsebenzi esiwuqalile, sigweme ukuphoxeka ekugcineni sesibenze ngale ndlela.” UMvoti osahlulwe kanye kule sizini, usethubeni lokudlala umdlalo wokuhlunga iqembu elizomela iKwaZulu-Natal kumaPlay-Offs kazwelonke e-ABC Motsepe League. Amaqembu azodla umhlanganiso ku-Stream A no-Stream B, azodlala owamanqamu wokuhlunga elizomela isifundazwe kwekazwelonke yokuhlungela ukukhuphukela kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship. Ku-Stream B ushisa phansi umbango phakathi koMkhambathi FC noMsinga United, abehlukaniswe ngamaphuzu amabili kuphela. UMkhambathi osazihola phambili ku-Stream B ngamaphuzu awu-52, ulandelwa wuMsinga endaweni yesibili ngawu-50. UMkhambathi udinga amaphuzu amathathu emdlalweni wawo wokugcina neFC Drakensberg, eLambert Park, eMnambithi, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. UMsinga nawo uwadinga ephelele kumnyama kubomvu amaphuzu emdlalweni wokugcina neKwaMashu Durban Knights ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama, eMzisho Stadium, eMsinga.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UKHULISO Mudau oyisethenjwa seMamelodi Sundowns ezodlala nePolokwane City namuhla ebusuku koweBetway Premiership eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane UKULAHLA amaphuzu kweMamelodi Sundowns emidlalweni emibili yakamuva yeBetway Premiership, kuyishiye nenselelo yokuvuka izithathe njengoba izobhekana nePolokwane City kabili kulandelana. ISundowns esembangweni oshisa phansi weligi yePremiership ne-Orlando Pirates, iphazanyiswe yiStellenbosch FC emgqigqweni wayo iyibamba ngo 1-1. Iphinde ilahle elinye ithuba lokubuyela esicongweni se-log yePremiership ibambana ngo 1-1 neRichards Bay FC ngeSonto, eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay. AmaSandawana asendaweni yesibili kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu awu-58 ngemuva kwe-Orlando Pirates esaqhwakele ngawu-59. Azotholana phezulu nePolokwane namuhla ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane. Azophinda adudulane nePolokwane kowomzuliswano wesibili ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. IRise and Shine ezabalazela ukuhlala kwi-Top 8, kubukeka sekuyiyona esiphethe ukhiye wesicoco seligi yamaSandawana embangweni weligi. Leli qembu laseLimpopo liwaphonsele inselelo amaSandawana ngesizini edlule njengoba liwaguqise ngo 1-0 emzuliswaneni wokuqala wangesizini edlule. Ngakho lokhu kwenza le midlalo emibili elizoyidlala namaSandawana ibhekwe kakhulu ukuthi leli qembu lingakwazi yini ukuphinda liphazamise umgqigqo waleli qembu lasePitoli elisazihambela lodwa ngokudla izicoco zePremiership amasizini elandelana kusukela ngesizini ka-2017/2018. Oyisitobha seSundowns, uKhuliso Mudau, ubona kusemqoka kakhulu kubona ukuvuka bazithathe ngowePolokwane. “Lesi yisikhathi sokuthi sibhekane nomdlalo ngamunye, singazifakeli ingcindezi ngokunye okwenzekayo. "Umdlalo esizowudlala nePolokwane City kuzoba ngumdlalo onzima, ikakhulukazi njengoba sizodlala nayo imidlalo emibili ilandelana ngesikhathi esifushane. "Kodwa kusemqoka ukuthi sinqobe kwiPolokwane, sibuyise ithemba silethe nenjabulo kubalandeli bethu ngemuva kokulahla amaphuzu sidlala ngokulingana imidlalo emibili, okuyinto esingajwayele ukuyenza," usho kanje uMudau.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-ATHINI Maqokolo osephenduke isethenjwa saMaZulu FC asembhidlangweni wokuqeda isizini ebalwa namaqembu amane aphezulu kwi-log yeBetway Premiership KUBUYE ithemba kumqeqeshi waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, ngamathuba ezakhe okuqhubeka nokunombela kwi-log yeBetway Premiership ngenhloso yokuzabalazela ukuzibekisela indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngokunenebula iChippa United ngo 5-1 ngoMgqibelo eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. AmaZulu abhaxabula iChippa nje abebuya esibhaxwini sika 3-0 abesithole kwi-Orlando Pirates. Ukuthola umgqigqo kwaMaZulu ngalesi sikhathi sesizini sekusele imidlalo emine isongwe, kuya ngokuya kuwufezekisa umgomo wawo wokuqeda isizini ebalwa namaqemba amane aphezulu kwi-log yePremiership. Njengamanje Usuthu olusendaweni yesine kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-42, lwehlukaniswe ngamaphuzu amahlanu neKaizer Chiefs esendaweni yesithathu ngawu-47. “Sizele ukuzoncintisana la (kwiPremiership) yize sidlala ngeningi labadlali abasebancane. Sisafunda kwesikwenzayo ngaphandle kokuzifaka ngaphansi kwengcindezi. Sibhekana nomdlalo ngamunye. Uma uNkulunkulu efuna siye e-Afrika (Caf) angiboni kukhona ongasivimba. Nezingelosi zethu zizosiholela endleleni efanele,” kusho uZwane ekhuluma nabezindaba ngemuva komdlalo. ‘ “Ngokomoya siyiqembu eliqinile. Sithandaza ndawonye, sabelana ngezinto eziningi ezisondelene nezinhliziyo zethu nezinselelo esibhekene nazo njengeqembu. Sifana nomndeni. Ngijabule ngeqembu esilihlanganisile kule sizini. Kuyakhuthaza ukubona abafana abancane bezinikela ngokwenza okungaphezulu kokufanele bakwenze ngisho imilenze ingasakwazi ingasavumi.” Ngaphandle kweChiefs okuyiyona esahlezi endaweni yesithathu kwi-log, Usuthu luphakathi kwamaqembu asenalo ithuba lokuqeda endaweni yesithathu ukuzibekisela indawo kwiCaf Confederation, okubalwa iSekhukhune United, Polokwane City neDurban City. Usuthu luzobuyela ensimini ngomdlalo wasekuhambeni ne-Orbit College, e-Olympia Park, eRustenburg, ngoMeyi 9. Imidlalo yeBetway Premiership: Polokwane City v Mamelodi Sundowns (Seshego Stadium); Siwelele FC v Kaizer Chiefs (Free State Stadium)

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI weMidlands Wanderers, uVincent Myeni, ezakhe okubukeka ziyinqoba impi yokusuka ezembeni kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship UQINA idolo ngokusuka unomphela kwezakhe ezembeni kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship usihlalo nomqeqeshi weMidlands Wanderers, uVincent “Masenti” Myeni, kulandela ukunqoba imidlalo emibili ilandelana. IMidlands ibuyise ithemba ngokuvika izembe inqoba imidlalo emibili ngokushaya i-Upington City ngo 2-1 ngeledlule, yalandela ngokuthela esinye isibhaxu sika 1-0 kwiVenda FC ngoMgqibelo eMpumalanga Stadium, eHammarsdale. Nakuba ingakasuki endaweni ka-14 kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-31 kodwa umehluko wamaphuzu ayisithupha phakathi kwayo neBlack Leopards esendaweni ka-15 ngawu-25, ubeka leli qembu laseMgungundlovu ethubeni elingcono kakhulu lokusuka unomphela ezembeni. IBaroka FC esahlezi emsileni kwi-log yeMotsepe Championship, ukubhaxabulwa kwayo ngo 3-0 yiKruger Unied kushayele isipikili sokugcina ekuyishoveleni ehlathini njengoba isigawulwe yizembe. Kanti, isiyakhanya indlela yeKruger ebheke kwiBetway Premiership njengoba isivule igebe lamaphuzu ayisishiyagalombili esicongweni se-log futhi isidingo amaphuzu ayisithupha emidlalweni emithathu esele ukudla isicoco seMotsepe Championship. “Ekuqaleni kwesizini imiphumela ibisiphika phezu kokudlala kwethu kahle, kodwa ngiyajabula ukuthi manje sesiyakwazi ukugwema ukungenelwa ngamagoli angenasidingo nanokuthi-ke futhi asikehlulwa ekhaya kusukela kuqale umzuliswano wesibili, okuyirekhodi elihle. Abadlali bethu sebeyajwayela kulesi sigaba, baya ngokuya beqina ukhakhayi njengoba bebengenawo amava okudlala kulesi sigaba,” kusho uMyeni. “Iqembu lethu lisha kulesi sigaba, siyalakha silakhela ikusasa. Ngakho ukuthola kwethu imiphumela emidlalweni yakamuva kuyasiqinisa idolo ukuthi esikhathini esingengakanani sizobe sesisukile unomphela ezembeni. Asifuni ukutatazela, sizoqhubeka sidlale ibhola lethu esaziwa ngalo ukuthola imiphumela. Okumqoka manje wukuthi abafana bagweme ukuthatha izinto kalula ngenxa yokwenza kahle kwethu emidlalweni yethu yakamuva, ngoba isizini ayikapheli, kusasele imidlalo emine okufanele siyidlale silwele ukuthola amaphuzu.” Abafana Bebatha abasalelwe yimidlalo emine ukusonga isizini, babuyela ensimini ngomdlalo wasekuhambeni neHighbury eNelson Mandela Stadium, eGqeberha, kusasa ngo-3 ntambama.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UKHULISO Mudau eshikilisana noThulani Gumede emdlalweni weBetway Premiershp eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, ngoMgqibelo kusihlwa Mamelodi Sundowns (0) 0 IRICHARDS Bay FC iqhubekile nokubophela inja nogodo ngamaphuzu enkundleni yayo yasekhaya ivimba iMamelodi Sundowns ekubuyeleni esicongweni se-log yeBetway Premiership zishayana zize zibukana eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, ngoMgqibelo kusihlwa. ISundowns engompetha abavikela isicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership ilahle ithuba lokugudluza izimbangi zayo embangweni weligi, i-Orlando Pirates, ivovwa inkani yiRichards Bay esikwenze kwaba yinjwayelo ukuthwalisa kanzima amaqembu ayizihambi enkundleni yayo yaseMhlathuze. IRichards Bay yenze okufanayo kule nkundla iguqisa iKaizer Chiefs ngo 1-0, yalandela ngokubambana ngo 2-2 nePirates. Ukudlala ngokulingana ngo 1-1 kwePirates neChiefs kowabakhaya baseSoweto ngoMgqibelo ntambama eFNB Stadium, eGoli, kunike iSundowns ithuba lokulwela ukuthola amaphuzu amathathu agcwele kwiRichards Bay obekuyiwona abezoyenza ibuyele esicongweni se-log yePremiership, kodwa iBay yala ukhasha. EZimnyama yizona ezisaqhwakele kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-59, amaSandawana asendaweni yesibili ngawu-58, lokho okusho ukuthi leli qembu lasePitoli lidinga ukunqoba kumnyama kubomvu emdlalweni walo wangoLwesithathu nePolokwane City eSeshego Stadium, eSeshego. Ushube kakhulu umbango weligi yePremiership njengamanje phakathi kwamaSandawana neZimnyama, yize amaSandawana esenethuba lokugudluza eZimnyama esicongweni ngenxa yokusalela emuva ngomdlalo owodwa. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, iNatal Rich Boys yize isahlezi endaweni yeshumi kwi-log, kodwa leli qembu laKwaZulu-Natal eligqishe ngeningi labadlali abasebancane, selikhombisile ukuthi aligayelwa mphako enkundleni yalo yasekhaya kule sizini. Emidlalweni engu-15 elisayidlalele kule nkundla yaseMhlathuze lisahlulwe yi-Orbit College kuphela.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe ISIPHEKEPHEKE seRichards Bay FC, uLindokuhle Zikhali, ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka leli qembu elizothembela kubo ukuthwalisa kanzima iMamelodi Sundowns koweBetway Premiership eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, kusasa ntambama PHEZU kokuba amehlo amaningi abathandi bebhola laseMzansi ezobe ethe njo emdlalweni  wabakhaya baseSoweto phakathi kwe-Orlando Pirates neKaizer Chiefs, kodwa ngemuva kwalo mdlalo wezinkunzi zaseSoweto amehlo azophinde abheke koweRichards Bay FC neMamelodi Sundowns. Ngemuva komdlalo wePirates neChiefs weBetway Premiership e-FNB Stadium, kusasa ngo-3 ntambama, iRichards Bay izogadulisana neSundowns eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, khona kusasa ngo-5.30 ntambama. Lo mdlalo umqoka kuwona womabili la maqembu ngezizathu ezihlukene. ISundowns esembangweni wesicoco seligi yePremiership ilahle ithuba lokubuyela esicongweni se-log idlala ngokulingana ngo 1-1 neStellenbosch FC ngoLwesithathu. Ngakho amaSandawana anenselelo enkulu yokushintsha umshovo emdlalweni wakusasa neRichards Bay ukugwema ukulahla amanye amaphuzu angaholela ekudliselweni kwawo ogageni yiPirates uma kwenzeka inqoba kwiChiefs kowabakhaya. AmaSandawana asendaweni yesibili kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu awu-57 ngemuva kwePirates esaqhwakele ngawu-58, asenethuba lokugudluza eZimnyama esicongweni uma engawunqoba umdlalo asasele ngawo emuva. Ngakolunye uhlangothi iNatal Rich Boys emangaze abaningi ishikilisa iPirates yagcina ibambana nayo ngo 2-2 emasontweni adlule, akungatshazwa ukuthi izophinda isebenzise ithuba lokudlalela kwayo ekhaya kule nkundla yayo yaseMhlathuze esithwalise kanzima kuyo amanye amaqembu amakhulu. Ngaphambi kokuthwalisa kanzima iPirates kule nkundla, iNatal Rich Boys iqale ngokuthwalisa kanzima iChiefs eyithlule ngo 1-0. Ngaphandle kwalokho leli qembu laKwaZulu-Natal lizolwela ukuqhubeka nokugcina irekhodi lalo elihle kule nkundla yalo yasekhaya njengoba lisahlulwe kanye yi-Orbit College ngo-Okthoba, emidlalweni ewu-14 eseliyidlalile kule nkundla kusukela ngoSepthemba. Leli qembu elicijwa wuPapi Zothwane noRonnie Gabriel ngokubambisana lilwela ukuqeda kwi-Top 8 ihlandla lesibili amasizini elandelana njengoba likwazile ngedlule obekungokokuqala, laqeda endaweni yesishiyagalombili, ladlala okokuqala kwi-MTN8 kule sizini.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMDLALI we-Orlando Pirates u-Oswin Appollis, okubhekwe ukuthi abe wuhlupho ezitobheni zeKaizer Chiefs kowabakhaya INKAKHA ye-Orlando Pirates, u-Innocent “Inno” Mncwango, neyeKaizer Chiefs, uPhumlani “BMX” Mkhize, bavumelana ngazwi linye ngobumqoka bomdlalo wabakhaya baseSoweto kuwona womabili la maqembu ngezizathu ezihlukene. IPirates izotholana phezulu neChiefs emdlalweni weBetway Premiership womzuliswano wesibili kule sizini obhekwe ngabomvu yizinkumbi zabathandi bebhola eMzansi kusasa ngo-3 ntambama, eFNB Stadium, eGoli. Kuziwa kulo mdlalo nje iPirates esembangweni oshisa phansi wesicoco seligi yePremiership, isahleli phezulu kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-58, ilandelwa eduze yiMamelodi Sundowns endaweni yesibili ngawu-57, iChiefs isendaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu awu-46. U-INNOCENT Mncwango owake wagijima kwi-Orlando Pirates uwufanise nowafawafa umdlalo wabakhaya baseSoweto Image: FACEBOOK / FOOTBALL NEWS Ubucayi bombango wesicoco seBetway EZimnyama zidudulana naMakhosi eFNB nje, amaSandawana azogadulisana neRichards Bay FC komunye umdlalo obhekiwe khona kusasa ngo-5.30 ntambama, eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay. Imiphumela yayo yomibili le midlalo ingase inike umkhombandlela ngombango weligi yePremiership oqhubekayo phakathi kweZimnyama namaSandawana. Ukuqhuzuka kweminye yemidlalo yakamuva zibambana ngo 2-2 neRichards bay kuholele ekutheni iningi licabange ukuthi sekuphelile ngamathuba azo okuba ngompetha beligi. Nokho, ukubambana kweSundowns neStellenbosch FC maphakathi nesonto kuphinde kwavusa inhlansi yethemba lokuthi leli qembu lase-Orlando lisengakwazi ukuqeda ukucanasa kwamaBrazilians kwiligi yakuleli. Uma ezikaMagebhula zingaphinde zilahle amaphuzu kungalinciphisa kakhulu ithuba lokuba ngompetha okokuqala selokhu zagcina ngo-2012. “Njengeqembu elisembangweni weligi, iPirates kubaluleke kakhulu ukuthi iwuwine lo mdlalo wabakhaya baseSoweto kumnyama kubomvu ngoba ukwehlulwa kwayo noma ukudlala ngokulingana kuzoqeda ngethuba layo lokuwina iligi," kusho uMncwango owayeseqenjini leZimnyama elanqoba iCaf Champions League ngo-1995. "Ukulahla amaphuzu kweSundowns (ngoLwesithathu) kufane nenhlanhla kwiPirates, ngakho sekufanele ishaye iChiefs, iwine neminye imidlalo (emine) eyisalele, bese ithandazela inhlanhla yokuwina iligi ngokuthi iSundowns iqhuzuke kowodwa kulena esele njengoba iqhuzukile kwiStellenbosch. "Isenalo ithuba lokuwina iligi iPirates ngokwezibalo, futhi idlala kahle njengamanje, kodwa nenhlanhla isiyayidinga. Ngale kwalokho iyadinga ukuwuwina lo mdlalo wabakhaya ukukhombisa ukuthi iyona inkunzi esakhonya kowabakhaya baseSoweto.” ULEBOHANG Maboe okulindeleke ukuthi ahlanganise iKaizer Chiefs esiswini kowabakhaya Izwi leChiefs embangweni wesicoco Ngokwezibalo iChiefs isenalo ithuba lokunyukela esicongweni kwiBetway Premiership njengoba inamaphuzu angu-46 emidlalweni engu-24. Uma ingayinqoba yonke eyisithupha esele, okuhlanganisa nowabakhaya, ingaqeda isihlanganise amaphuzu angu-64. Ukuze idle isicoco ingadinga ukuthi iPirates neSundowns bashaye udaka emidlalweni yabo esele kwazise bona sebenawo amaphuzu angu-58 nangu-57, ngokwahlukana. Okungephikwe wukuthi Amakhosi azoba nezwi embangweni wesicoco njengoba esazobhekana nawo womabili amaqembu ahamba phambili kwi-log. Ngaphandle kokududulana nePirates kusasa ntambama, asazotholana neSundowns eLoftus Versfeld ngoMeyi 6. Ngokusho kukaMkhize, owagijima kuMakhosi ngemuva kokushiya kwakhe kweZimnyama ngasekuqaleni ko-2000, Amakhosi nawo adinga ukuqala ngokunqoba owakusasa nePirates ukuze abuyise isithunzi sawo. “IChiefs ayiwinanga ndebe kule sizini, ngakho ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu nokuyodlala kwiCaf Confed iyonanto ezobuyisa ithemba kubalandeli ngabangakulindela ngesizini ezayo," kusho uMkhize. "Nokho, okumqoka kakhulu kwiChiefs ukuwina lo mdlalo wabakhaya baseSoweto, ngoba ukunqoba kwayo lo mdlalo akuzukugcina nje ngokuqhubeka ngokwandisa amathuba ayo okuqeda endaweni yesithathu kodwa kuzobuyisa nesithunzi sayo kulo mdlalo wabakhaya. "Noma iPirates isefomini kodwa angiyiboni kulokhu iphinda iChiefs ngalawa magoli eyayishaya ngawo emzuliswaneni wokuqala, iChiefs nakanjani idinga ukubuyisa isithunzi kulokhu.” Emzuliswaneni wokuqala wesizini ngoFebhuwari, eZimnyama zanabisa Amakhosi ngo 3-0 wamagoli kaTshepang Moremi, Oswin Appollis no-Evidence Makgopa. UPHUMLANI Mkhize owake wadlalela iKaizer Chiefs ne-Orlando Pirates ubona Amakhosi engabuyisa isithunzi ngomdlalo wabakhaya

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe ISETHENJWA saMaZulu FC, uHendrick Ekstein, ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka leli qembu elizothembela kubona ekwenzeni izinto zenzeke emdlalweni weBetway Premiership wanamuhla ntambama neChippa United eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini UKHOLWA wukuthi kusengenzeka noma yini ngendawo yesithathu kwi-log yeBetway Premiership umqeqeshi waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, ezakhe ezisesemshungwini wamaqembu asalobizela ukunombela kule ndawo eyisango lokuyodlala kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo. AmaZulu asendaweni yesithathu kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu awu-39, ehlukaniswe ngamaphuzu ayisikhombisa neKaizer Chiefs esendaweni yesithathu ngawu-46. Ngaphandle kweChiefs naMaZulu, amanye amaqembu asenethuba lokuzabalazela indawo yesithathu yiSekhukhune United neDurban City abasendaweni yesihlanu neyesithupha ngokwahlukana. Emidlalweni emihlanu esalele AmaZulu kule sizini, asazodlala nayo iChiefs ekhaya. Nokho, emidlalweni emithathu yakamuva, Usuthu lubuye namaphuzu amabili kuphela ludlala ngokulingana neSekhukhune United neSiwelele FC ngokwahlukana, ngaphambi kokubhudluzwa yi-Orlando Pirates ngo 3-0 ngoMgqibelo odlule. Lunenselelo yokuvuka luzithathe ngomdlalo wasekhaya neChippa United eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, namuhla ngo-3 ntambama. “Umgomo wethu njengeqembu ukuqeda endaweni yesine kodwa sizibona sisenalo ithuba lokuqeda endaweni yesithathu, siye kodlala e-Afrika (Caf Confed) ngoba siyiqembu elinezinhloso ezinkulu," kusho uZwane. “Ngiyakholwa wukuthi kukhona okusengenzeka, ziyenzeka izinto ebholeni, kusengenzeka noma yini kule midlalo esele esazodlalwa. Kukuthina ukuthi sisebenze, sibhekane nophambi kwethu singazikhathazi ngokuthi abanye bacabangani ngathi,” kusho uZwane. Lo mqeqeshi akafuni badikibaliswe wukwehlulwa kwabo yiPirates ngeledlule, njengoba ekubeka ngokucacile ukuthi uyakholwa wukuthi abadlali bakhe bazovuka bazithathe. “Siyiqembu elikhulayo ngezinga, siyayibona inqubekela phambili. Akufanele sixhamazele sicabange ukuthi ngoba sike saba phakathi kwamaqembu amakhulu (kwi-log) lokho kusho ukuthi sesilaphaya phezulu nathi. Cha, sisacathula. Kufanele sithakasele lokhu esisakuzuzile kuze kube manje.” Usuthu lwayixebula ngo 3-0 iChilli Boys ngomzuliswano wokuqala wesizini.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMENGAMELI weSafa Ethekwini, uMazwi Mkhize, ongomunye wabahlonishwe ngezindondo ze-Lifetime Achievement muva nje, kuma-KZN Sports Awards ngeqhaza abalibambile ekuthuthukisweni kwebhola UMENGAMELI weSouth African Foootball Association (Safa) Ethekwini, uMazwi Mkhize, uveza ukuthi uyokwendela koyisemkhulu ekhululekile mhla ibhola labuyelwa wusikompilo kwathuthukiswa nangendlela efanele izinhlaka zabadlali abasakhuliswa KwaZulu-Natal naseNingizimu Afrika yonkana. UMkhize uphakathi kwezingwevu ebuholini bezemidlalo, okubalwa kuzo uJeremiah “Ace” Mdlalose noDkt Kevin Subban, ezihlonishwe ngezindondo ze-Lifetime Achievement emcimbini wama-KZN Sports Awards obungempelasonto, eNkosi Albert Luthuli Convention Centre, eThekwini. Ubuyele ngo-elethu kwesokwengamela iSafa Ethekwini okhethweni obelungoJanuwari. Ngaphansi kobuholi bakhe lesi sifunda sesihlomule ngabaxhasi abaningi abaxhase imiqhudelwano edlalwa ngamaqembu ososeshini abangaphansi kwaso. “Kubalulekile ukuthi umuntu ahlonishwe esaphila. Kodwa ngikholwa wukuthi kufanele ngabe kudala ngahlonishwa uma ubheka ibanga esengilihambile ekuphatheni ibhola, okuyiminyaka engu-47, kusukela ngo-1979," kusho uMkhize. "Baningi kakhulu abadlule ezandleni zami, ngingababala kushone ilanga. Abanye bebelokhu bebuza bethi ‘uKhabazela kanti uyohlonishwa nini?’ Kodwa-ke bengibatshela ukuthi ngeke ngisine ngiphinde ngizishayele ihlombe. "Akusizi kodwa ukuthi sihlonishwe uma ezweni lethu kusadlalwa leli bhola elingamanga, singakabuyeli ebholeni eliwusikompilo lwethu eNingizimu Afrika, elalidlalwa eminyakeni edlule singakaxoshwa yiFifa ebholeni lomhlaba. "Uma sisenabaqeqeshi abangafuni ukunika abadlali bethu inkululeko yokukhulumisa ibhola njengoba kwakwenza oKaizer Motaung, oChippa Moloi, oJomo Sono, oProfessor Ngubane, no-Ace Mnini nabanye.” UMkhize uthe okunye akufisayo wukuthuthukiswa kwabaqeqeshi abazogxila ekusebenzeni nabadlali abasakhulisa ezikoleni nakososeshini bethu bebhola, abangeke bahalele ukuyoqeqesha emaqenjini ePSL. "Kudingeka abazoqeqesha abadlali abasebancane ngendlela efanele ngokweminyaka yabo yobudala, hhayi abaqeqeshi asebehlulekile ebholeni abazobiza izingane ezino-10 (ubudala)  ngezinkomo," uqhube kanje. "Kwamanye amazwe abadlali abasakhula baqeqeshwa ngabaqeqeshi abagogodile ngeziqu zokuqeqesha abadlali abasakhula.” Ube esephonsela inselelo uMnyango wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko ngobumqoka bokugxila ekutshaleni imali ekuthuthukisweni kwebhola emazingeni aphansi esikhundleni sokufaka izigidi zemali kwi-Video Assistant Referee (VAR) ehlongozwa yilo Mnyango oholwa wuGayton McKenzie. “I-VAR ngeke ibasize abadlali abasakhula ezindaweni zakoNongoma, Newcastle, Vryheid, nakwezinye izindawo zasemakhaya ezintula ingqalasizinda nezinkundla zokudlala," kusho uMkhize. "Sikuphi isidingo sokuthatha izigidi zemali zifakwe kwi-PSL enamaqembu aphethwe ngosozigidi, ekubeni kungekho zinkundla ezisesimweni emakhaya nasemalokishini? Abadlali bebhola bamantombazane besagqokela obala ngoba zingekho izinkundla zethu zasemalokishini nasemakhaya zingenazo izindlu zokushintshela," uphethe kanje.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMDLALI wasesiswini kwiKruger United, uTercious Malepe, ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka nabanamava kuleli qembu eselizibeke ethubeni elihle lokudla isicoco seMotsepe Foundation Championship YIZE eseyibona indlela ebheke kwiBetway Premiership umqeqeshi weKruger United, u-Abram Mongoya, uyavuma ukuthi ayizukuba lula imidlalo ebasalele ukusonga isizini ka-2025/26 yeMotsepe Foundation Championship. UMongoya ukusho lokhu ngemuva kokuba ezakhe ziqhubekile nokuzisondeza ekunqobeni isicoco seligi yeMotsepe Championship ngokuguqisa iCape Town City ngo 2-1 ngoLwesithathu, KaNyamazane Stadium, KaNyamazane. Ukunqoba kweKruger kwiCity esabalwa namaqembu asembangweni weligi, kuyenze yaqhubeka nokuvula igebe lamaphuzu amahlanu esicongweni se-log yeChampionship, njengoba isiqhwakele ngawu-52. Emidlalweni emine esalele iKruger ukusonga isizini, idinga ukunqoba emithathu ukuba ngompetha beMotsepe Championship ikhushulelwe esigabeni sePremiership. Ilandelwa yiHungry Lions endaweni yesibili ngawu-47, kulandele iCity neMilford ngawu-44 endaweni yesithathu neyesine ngokwehlukana. “Yonke imidlalo esisalele manje inzima. Ngibatshelile abafana ukuthi umdlalo nomdlalo esizowudlala uzoba nzima ngoba sesiphenduke iqembu wonke umuntu afuna ukulishaya uma ehlangana nalo,” kusho uMongoya. “Kubaluleke kakhulu kulesi sikhathi ukuthi abadlali bethu bagweme ukushesha bajabule bese bethatha izinto kalula. Ngenhlanhla abadlali esinabo ngabadlali abanamava abanjengoMorne Nel noWandisile Letlabika.” Emidlalweni emine esele, ezikaMongonya zizodlala namaqembu amathathu abalekela izembe, okuyiBaroka FC, iBlack Leopards, iGomora United, ne-The Bees. Izodlala neBaroka eGlobal Stadium, eLebowakgomo, ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama. Ngokwezibalo, njengamanje iLions, iCity, iMilford, neCasric, yiwona maqembu asenethuba lokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs uma iKruger igcine ngokusidla isicoco seChampionship. Imidlalo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Kusasa - Ngo-3pm: Upington City v Univ. of Pretoria (Mxolisi Dicy Jacobs Stadium); Lerumo Lions v Highbury (Dobsonville Stadium); The Bees v Cape Town City (KaNyamazane Stadium); Black Leopards v Milford FC (Thohoyandou Stadium); Leicesterford City v Casric Stars (Lucas Moripe Stadium) NgeSonto - Ngo-3pm: Midlands Wanderers v Venda FC (Mpumalanga Stadium); Gomora United v Hungry Lions (Malamulele Stadium); Baroka FC v Kruger United (Global Stadium)

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI weDurban City, uPitso Dladla PHEZU kokulahla amaphuzu emidlalweni emithathu yakamuva kodwa umqeqeshi weDurban City, uPitso Dladla, usamile emgomeni wokuqinisa indawo yabo kwi-Top 8 ekupheleni kwale sizini ka-2025/26 esisongwa. ICity ebhaxabulwe yiMagesi FC ngo 5-2 ngeSonto eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane, ibibuya kwesinye isibhaxu semidlalo emibili ishaywa yiMamelodi Sundowns neLamontville Golden Arrows ngo 1-0 ngokwehlukana. Kodwa phezu kokulahla kwayo amaphuzu iCity ayikaphumi emshungwini wamaqembu akwi-Top 8 njengoba isesendaweni yesithupha kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-35. Leli qembu laseThekwini linenselelo yokuvuka lizithathe ngomdlalo wasekhaya elizowudlala ne-Orbit College kusasa ngo-3 ntambama eChatsworth Stadium, eChatsworth. “Inhloso yethu enkulu wukuqeda isizini sikwi-Top 8. Imidlalo esele iza nezinguquko eziningi. Okubalulekile manje kule midlalo esisalele wukuthi sibuye namaphuzu ukuze siyiqede kahle isizini, ngoba uma singakwenzanga lokho kuyobe kusho ukwehluleka,” kusho uDladla. “Sizohlala phansi nabadlali sibakhumbuze ukuthi isizini ayikapheli, sibakhumbuze nangokubaluleka kokuqeda isizini endaweni esizimisele ngokuqeda kuyona. Ngeke sikufihle ukuthi sifuna ukuqeda endaweni yesithupha. Akuzukuba lula kodwa kuzodingeka kubekhona ukubambisana kithi sonke ukuze siyiqede kahle isizini njengoba siyiqale kahle futhi.” Phezu kokulahla kwayo umgqigqo emidlalweni yayo yakamuva, iCitizens okuyisizini yayo yokuqala kwiBetway Premiership isakhombise ukuba yiqembu elinezinhloso ezinkulu zempumelelo kulesi sigaba nokufakazelwa yindawo ekuyo manje kwi-log. Yize imidlalo emihlanu eyisalele ibukeka ingelula, kodwa inenselelo yokulwela ukubuya namaphuzu kuyo ukuze igcine indawo kwi-Top 8. Ngaphandle komdlalo wakusasa ne-Orbit, isalelwe yiSiwelele FC, Stellenbosch FC, Orlando Pirates naMaZulu FC Ngale kwalokho leli qembu lisenethuba lesicoco somkhumulajezi njengoba lizodlala owamanqamu eNedbank Cup ne-TS Galaxy ngoMeyi 2, ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMQEQESHI waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, obona kusemqoka ukuthi leli qembu libagcine abadlali balo abamqoka ukuze likwazi ukuncintisana namanye amaqembu ekulweleni izicoco UMQEQESHI waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, ubona kubalulekile ukuthi leli qembu libagcine abanye babadlali balo abamqoka ukuze likwazi ukumelana namanye amaqembu ekulweleni izicoco. UZwane ukusho lokhu ekhuluma nabezindaba izolo, eKings Park, eThekwini, ngenkathi leli qembu lizilolongela umdlalo weBetway Premiership elizowudlalela ekhaya neChippa United eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. AmaZulu eza kulo mdlalo nje, abuya esibhaxwini sika 3-0 asithole kwi-Orlando Pirates ngoMgqibelo odlule, e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto. “Ibalulekile inqubekela phambili eqenjini. Uyacabanga nje ukuba uMoremi (Tshepang) ubesekhona kuleli qembu kodwa iqembu lazithola livaleleka ekhoneni lagcina limdedelile. "Kanti-ke futhi nomgomo kamengameli (uSandile Zungu) ngowokuthi kungamiwa endleleni yomdlali lapho efunwa (ngelinye iqembu), efuna nokukhula. "Kodwa uma ufuna ukuncintisana namanye amaqembu kufanele ubagcine abadlali bakho abamqoka, yebo abanye kuzofanele badayiswe ukuze iqembu likwazi ukuthola imali. "Lokho kubiza ukuthi sisebenze kanzima ukuqhubeke nokugcina usikompilo lethu ngokufuna umdlali wohlobo olunjengolukaMoremi, okungelula nokho. "Siyamjabulela kodwa futhi ukwenza kahle kwakhe kuyabakhuthaza nabanye ozakwabo abedlala nabo la eqenjini ukuthi nabo bakhule,” kusho uZwane. UMoremi usayiniswe yiPirates ngaphambi kokuqala kwale sizini, esuka Osuthwini abesephenduke esinye sezethenjwa zaleli qembu. Kumanje lesi siphekepheke somdlali wasophondweni lwesokunxele senza ezibukwayo kweZimnyama nesisethubeni lokuba seqenjini lesizwe, iBafana Bafana, elizoyodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa ezodlalelwa e-USA, Mexico naseCanada, ngoJuni kuya kuJulayi. Usuthu lugqishe ngeningi labadlali abasebancane kule sizini, abanye babo abasuka eqenjini lalo lweDStv Diski Challenge, nabasuka ezigabeni zama-amesha imbala. Usuthu okumanje lusendaweni yesine kwi-log yePremiership, lusalelwe yimidlalo emihlanu ukufeza umgomo walo wokuqeda isizini lusesixhantini samaqembu amane aphezulu ekupheleni kwesizini. “Umdlalo wethu neChippa akuzukuba ngumdlalo olula kodwa siyawadinga amaphuzu. Ngalesi sikhathi sesizini awukho umdlalo olula futhi awudingi ukudlala ibhola elihle ukuze uthole amaphuzu. "Sisamile emgomeni wethu wokuqeda ku-Top 4 kodwa futhi siyazi ukuthi sisengenza okungaphezulu kwalokho. "Ukuhlulwa kwethu yiPirates akusenzi ukuthi ngosuku olulodwa nje, bese siphenduka iqembu elibhedayo, sidinga ukuvuka sizithathe silwe.”

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-KEAGAN Dolly egadulisana noKgopotso Zitha weKruger United emdlaweni womzuliswano wokuqala wesizini yeMotsepe Foundation Championship, njengoba la maqembu ezophinda adudulane kowanamuhla ntambama KaNyamazane Stadium UKUHUBELA sakusha ngokusongwa kwesizini ka-2025/26, yeMotsepe Foundation Championship, kukhomba ukuthi imidlalo esele isifana neyamanqamu emaqenjini akulesi sigaba kusukela kwasembangweni weligi navika izembe. Ngakho lokhu kwenza ubhekwe ngabomvu umphumela womdlalo weKruger neCape Town City ozodlalelwa KaNyamazane Stadium, KaNyamazane, namuhla ngo-3 ntambama. IKruger okuyiyona esazihola phambili kwi-log yeMotsepe Championship, iza kulo mdlalo nje isavule igebe lamaphuzu amahlanu njengoba inamaphuzu awu-49, nokungayibeka ethubeni elihle kakhulu lokunqoba isicoco uma ingakwazi ukubuya namaphuzu amathathu emdlalweni wanamuhla. Ngempelasonto, iphinde yakhombisa izinhloso zayo ngesicoco seligi inenebula iMidlands Wanderers ngo 3-0. ICity esendaweni yesibili, neMilford FC neHungry Lions abasendaweni yesithathu neyesine ngokwehlukana, banamaphuzu awu-44 ngokulinganayo. Kanti ukunqoba kweCity nakho kungayinika ithuba lokuvala igebe phakathi kwayo neKruger, kuphinde kuwushubise mawala umbango weligi. ICity iya kulo mdlalo wanamuhla neKruger isefomini enhle njengoba ibuye namaphuzu ayisishiyagalombili emidlalweni emine yakamuva ngokunqoba emibili idlale ngokulingana kweminye emibili okubalwa nowangempelasonto ebambane kuwo ngo 0-0 neLions. Ngakho nemiphumela yemidlalo emibili yanamuhla yeMilford neHungry Lions nayo ibhekwe ngabomvu. IMilford izodlala neVenda FC namuhla ngo-3 ntambama eThohoyandou Stadium, eThohoyandou, kuthi iHungry Lions ibhekane ne-University of Pretoria namuhla ngo-3 ntambama. Leli qembu laseRichards Bay ebeselilahle amaphuzu emidlalweni emibili lidlala ngokulingana neCasric Stars, lishaywa nayiGomora United, lizibuyisele embangweni ngokubhaxabula i-Upington City ngo 3-1 ngempelasonto. Ngakho ukuthola kwalo amaphuzu kwiVenda kungalibeka ethubeni elingcono lokushubisa umbango weligi, ikakhulukazi uma kwenzeka izimbangi zayo iCity, iKruger neLions belahla amaphuzu emidlalweni yanamuhla. Khonamanjalo: ICasric Stars izibuyisele embangweni wesicoco ngokunenebula iHighbur ngo 3-0 izolo ntambama, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Lo mphumela usho ukuthi iCasric isinamaphuzu awu-43, nokuyibeka endaweni yesihlanu kwi-log. Imiphumela yayizolo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Midlands Wanderers 2-1 Upington City; Black Leopards 0-0 The Bees; Casric Stars 3-0 Highbury Hungry Lions v Univ. of Pretoria (Mxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium); Venda FC v Milford FC (Thohoyandou Stadium); Leicesterford City v Lerumo Lions (Dobsonville Stadium); Kruger United v Cape Town City (KaNyamazane Stadium); Baroka FC v Gomora United (Global Stadium)

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe ISITOBHA seKaizer Chiefs, uRushwin Dortley, okuvela ukuthi akusekude aphinde abonakale edlubhe ijezi laleli qembu njengoba eseluleme ekulimaleni obesekumhlalise isikhathi eside ebuka ibhola nezihlwele SEKUNTWELA ezansi ngokululama kwesiqongqwane sasemuva kwiKaizer Chiefs, uRushwin Dortley, osekuyophela isizini singadlali kusukela salimala edolweni ngasekupheleni kwesizini edlule. UDortley (23) iqembu eselike labika ukuthi uhlinzwe ngempumelelo edolweni, bekunethemba lokuthi kungaphela le sizini esedlala. Ngemuva komdlalo wangoMgqibelo weBetway Premiership iChiefs ewudlale ngokulingana ngo 0-0 nePolokwane City, umqeqeshi uCedric Kaze, uveze ukuthi lo mdlali uDortley useqalile ukulithinta ibhola. “Ngesonto eledlule uqalile ukuthinta ibhola ngakho nginesiqiniseko sokuthi akusekude abuye,” kusho uKaze ebuzwa ngabezindaba ngokululama kukaDortley. Lo mqeqeshi ube esechaza ngokunika ithuba lokudlala uReeve Frosler naye ongumdlali wasemuva ohlangothini lwesokudla, osanda kubuya ekulimaleni obesekumhlalise isikhathi eside. UFrosler owayegcine ukudlala ngo-Okthoba nyakenye, ubonakale okokuqala kule sizini edlubhe ijezi laMakhosi eguqisa iMagesi FC ngo 4-1 ngoLwesithathu olwedlule, esuka ebhentshini ngesiwombe sesibili. Nasemdlalweni wangoMgqibelo nePolokwane, uFrosler ungene sekusele imizuzu embalwa kuphele umdlalo, engena endaweni kaThabiso Monyane. “Ubelimele isikhathi eside. Ngakho umdlalo onjalo kufanele umnike kancane kancane ithuba lokudlala, hhayi ukumgxisha ngomsebenzi omningi ongase uphinde umbeke engcupheni yokuphinda alimale. "Uza kahle kakhulu futhi ungumdlali ongasisiza ngenxa yamava akhe. Uyakwazi ukuhlasela futhi umaka kahle. "Ukhaliphile ekungeneni ezikhaleni ezifanele ukugoba amabhola ngakho nginesiqiniseko sokuthi kusukela manje kuze kuphele isizini uzosisiza kakhulu.” UDortley oyiqongqotha emuva maphakathi nendawo, ujoyine Amakhosi ngesizini edlule esuka kwiCape Town Spurs, wafika walenza elakhe ijezi edlala imidlalo engu-20 kuyo yonke imiqhudelwano ngaphambi kokulimala ngoMashi nyakenye. Kanti naseqenjini lesizwe, iBafana Bafana, ubehlale ebizwa nokusho ukuthi ukuphuza kwakhe ukululama sekumphuthisele ngengqayizivele yethuba lokuyodlala koweNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa ozobanjelwa e-USA, Mexico naseCanada, ngoJuni kuya kuJulayi. Ifomu nomgqigqo wakamuva waMakhosi akubuzwa ukuthi ufike ngesikhathi esifanele, nosekudale elikhulu isasasa ngomdlalo wawo wabakhaya baseSoweto ne-Orlando Pirates ozodlalwa ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama, eFNB Stadium, eGoli. Leli qembu laseNaturena eselinqobe imidlalo emihlanu kweyisithupha yakamuva, lilwela ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu kwi-log yePremiership ngenhloso yokuzibekisela indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, eZimnyama zisesembangweni wesicoco seligi ezisibanga neMamelodi Sundonwns.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMDLALI wasophondweni lwesokudla kwiRichards Bay FC, uSanele Barns, otuswa ngumqeqeshi waleli qembu ngomehluko afike nawo kuleli qembu elisemshikashikeni wokuzibekisela indawo kwi-Top 8 ekupheleni kwesizini ONGUMQEQESHI weRichards Bay FC, uRonnie Gabriel, utusa ubunkunzi bomdlali wasophondweni lwesokudla, uSanele Barns, ngomehluko afike nawo kuleli qembu elisemshikashikeni wokuqeda isizini kwi-Top 8 ekupheleni kwesizini. Igoli likaBarns alishaye ngesiwombe sokuqala yilona elisize iRichards Bay ekubuyeni namaphuzu amathathu ekuhambeni iguqisa i-TS Galaxy ngo 1-0 koweBetway Premiership eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, ngeSonto. UBarns emidlalweni ewu-12 asayidlalile kwiNatal Rich Boys, useshaye amagoli amathathu, waba nesandla kwelilodwa. Ulokhu eqhubeka nokuba ngumdlali omqoka kuleli qembu laKwaZulu-Natal elibalwa nasemshungwini wamaqembu azabalazela ukuzibekisela indawo kwi-MTN8 ngesizini ezayo. “USanele Barns ulenzela umsebenzi omuhle iqembu. Amava akhe nomfutho anawo, uyakwedlulisela kubadlali abasebancane eqenjini ngokuba yisibonelo esihle kubona. "Amagoli ambalwa asewashayile enze umehluko ekusizeni iqembu. Kusukela efikile eqenjini ufike nomehluko obonakalayo,” kusho uGabriel oqeqesha ngokubambisana noPapi Zothwane. Ifomu kaBarns nomgqigqo wakamuva weRichards Bay kuza nesivivinyo esimqoka njengoba emdlalweni walo olandelayo lizobhekana neMamelodi Sundowns ngeSonto ng-5.30 ntambama, eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay. Emidlalweni emithathu yakamuva iNatal Rich Boys ikwaze ukubuya namaphuzu ayisikhombisa ngokushaya iStellenbosch neGalaxy ngokwehlukana, yadlala ngokulingana ne-Orlando Pirates. “Bekusemqoka kakhulu kithina ukuthola umphumela omuhle ekuhambeni nokugcina umgqigqo esesiwuqalile. "Ekutholeni kwethu imiphumela emihle kwiStellenbosch nePirates sibone kunesidingo sokuthi siqhubeke singasishintshi isikimu esidlala ngaso, nebala siwutholile umphumela omuhle. "Bekungewona umdlalo olula ukubhekana ne-TS Galaxy, iqembu okudina ube nabadlali abazimisele nabanesibindi ukubhekana nalo ngakho siyawabonga la maphuzu amathathu esiwatholile.” Ifomu yakamuva yeRich Boys ehambisana nokudlala kahle kwayo enkundleni yayo yasekhaya, iMhlathuze Sports Complex, esahlulwe kanye kuyo, idala isasasa elikhulu ngomdlalo wayo wangeSonto namaSandawana avutha engabaselwe njengoba esenqobe imidlalo eyishumi yePremiership ilandelana.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe INSEPHE ye-long jump, uLuvo Manyonga, obuye ngomfutho kwi-long jump ngemuva kokumiswa iminyaka emine ngenxa yokusebenzisa izidakamizwa, udle umhlanganiso kwi-long jump kwi-ASA Track and Field National Championship, eStellenbosch USELUBALUBELA ukuyoyibamba kuma-Commonwealth Games, uLuvo Manyonga, kulandela ukuhlabana ngesicoco sikazwelonke kwi-long jump emqhudelwaneni we-Athletics South Africa (ASA) Senior Track and Field National Championships ngempelasonto, eStellenboch. UManyonga (35) uwine isicoco kuma-ASA Championships ngo-8.04 metres leap kwi-long jump, obekungokokuqala kusukela ngo-2019, egcina ukuthola impumelelo yalolu hlobo kwi-long jump. Ukuphumelela ngale ndlela kwale nsempe edabuka eMbekweni, eWestern Cape, kuyinkomba yokukhuza kwayo ibuya sekungatshazwa, kwazise ibuya esigwebeni seminyaka emine sokumiswa ekubambeni iqhaza kwezokugijima ngenxa yokusebenzisa izidakamizwa. Ngemuva kokuphela kwesigwebo sakhe ngo-2024, ubonakale okokuqala emqhudelwaneni wamazwe ngamazwe i-World Athletics Indoor Championships ebisePoland, ngoMashi. Waba ngumpetha womhlaba kwi-long jump ngo-2010, edla umhlanganiso kwi-World Junior Championships, eCanada. Wenza esifanayo nango-2011, edla umhlanganiso kwi-All Africa Games eMozambique, walandela ngokuba yingqwele kwi-World Championships ngo-2017, e-England. Waphinda wahlabana kuma-Commonwealth Games, e-Australia, ngo-2018. Kanti ngaphambi kwalokho, wayebuye nendondo yesiliva kuma-Olympic Games eBrazil, ngo-2016. “Lokhu kusho lukhulu kimi. Kuwubufakazi bokuthi ngeke uliqede iphupho uma esaphila umnikazi walo, iphupho liyaqhubeka. "Ngonyaka odlule ngilale isithupha (kwi-ASA Championships) kowamanqamu. Kodwa manje ngigxumela ukunika abantu ithemba nokukhombisa ukuthi noma nini uma unikwa ithuba lisebenzise,” kusho uManyonga, osebheke amaCommonwealth Games ka-2026, azoba seGlasgow, eScotland, ngoJulayi. “Ngiyakulangazelela ukuyobamba iqhaza emiqhudelwaneni yomhlaba kodwa ngithatha umqhudelwano ngamunye ngaphandle kokuzifakela ingcindezi.” Abanye abenze kahle kuma-ASA Championships; nguTshepi Tshite odle umhlanganiso ku-1500m kwabagijimayo, uSinesipho Dembile wanqoba ku-200m, uLythe Pillay wavikela isicoco ku-400m. Kwabesifazane kugiye uTayla Kavanagh ku-5000m, kwathi uPrudence Sekgodiso wavikela ngempumelelo isicoco sakhe ku-800m.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe USIYAMTHANDA Bazane odle umhlanganiso emjahweni iZululand District Ultra Marathon ephahlwe uMeya waseZululand, uMichael Khumalo noSifiso Mkhwanazi onguMeya kaMasipala Abaqulusi ngemuva kokushaya intambo eBhekuzulu, KwaNongoma, ngempelasonto Image: SIBUSISO MDLALOSE Isithombe U-JENET Mbhele odle umhlanganiso kwabesifazane kwiZululand District Marathon ephahwle uMeya waseZululand, uMichael Khumalo noSifiso Mkhwanazi uMeya woMasipala Abaqulusi Image: SIBUSISO MDLALOSE UZOSEBENZISA umhlomulo weZululand District Ultra Marathon ukuzithengela imoto umgijimi wamabanga amade, uJenet Mbhele, odle umhlanganiso kwabesifazane kulo mjaho webanga lika-56km, wakhala wemuka nesamba sika-R100 000. UMbhele ogijimela iMzimkhulu Striders unqobe iZululand Marathon ngesikhathi esiwu-4:9:51, isibili kwaba uGladys Jephirchir waseKenya weNedbank Running Club ngo-4:34:07, wathola umthobanhliziyo ka-R50 000, isithathu kwaba uFikile Mbuthuma naye weNedbank Club ngo-4:35:40, wathola umthobanhliziyo ka-R25 000. Kwabesilisa ubhedu ludliwe uSiyamthanda Bazane weNedbank ngesikhathi esiwu-3:24:37, isibili kwaba uMholi Jali naye weNedbank ngo-3:30:42, isithathu kwaba uSiboniso Sikhakhane we-Entsika Athletics Club ngo-3:36:01.UBazane naye uhalabane ngo-R100 000, uJali wathola u-R50 000, uSikhakhane u-R25 000. Lo mjaho okhuza ibuya kulo nyaka njengoba wawugcine ukugijinywa ngo-2019, ugijinywe izolo usuka oLundi Airport, waphelela eBhekuzulu High School, KwaNongoma. "Bengiqala ukuwugijima lo mjaho kodwa unginike isivivinyo engisidingayo njengoba unezindawo ezikhuphukelayo ezinemiqansa ngakho amalungiselelo ami eComrades ahamba ngohlelo. Inhloso yami enkulu ukungena nabayishumi bokuqala kwiComrades," kusho uMbhele waseWhite City, eMzimkhulu. "Imali engiyitholile ngokuwina lo mjaho ngifuna ukuyisebenzisela ukuthenga imoto ngoba sengikhathele manje ukuhamba ngamatekisi." UMbhele uvivela iComrades Marathon yebanga lika-87km ezogijinywa ngoJuni 14, kusukwa eThekwini kubhekwe eMgungundlovu. Nguyena mgijimi wesifazane onsundu osakwaze ukuzuza amagolide amathathu kwiComrades, nosethubeni lokuzuza elesine nonyaka uma ekwaze ukungena nabayishumi bokuqala. UBazane uthe kusho lukhulu kuyena ukunqoba lo mjaho ngoba ubengazitsheli ukuthi uzowunqoba, ikakhulukazi njengoba ebeqala ukuwugijima. "Bengingazitsheli ukuthi ngizowuwina lo mjaho, bengizigijimela nje yize bengiziqeqeshe kahle ngizizwa ukuthi ngiqatha. Sengibheke ukuyoyigijima kwiComrades futhi ngizimisele ngokwenza kangcono kakhulu kulo nyaka njengoba ngonyaka odlule ngingenzanga kahle," kusho uBazane, odabuka eLusikisiki. UMeya waseZululand, uMnuz uMichael "Mkhonyovu" Khumalo, uhlabeke umxhwele ngezinga lalo mjaho wethembisa izinga elithe thuthu ngonyaka ozayo. "Ngonyaka ozayo sifuna ukubona lenyuka kakhulu izinga nemiklomelo yenyuke. Siyababongela abanqobile, nokho ngibaphonsela inselelo nabagijimi bakulesi sifunda iZululand, ukuthi nabo benze kahle kulo mjaho. Esikufisayo manje wukuthi abagijimi abanqobe iZululand bafike bayiwine neComrades ngoba lona ngumjaho obasiza kakhulu abagijimi ukuzilungiselela iComrades."

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMDLALI wasesiswini kwiKaizer Chiefs, uThabo Cele, umqeqeshi waleli qembu ohlabeke umxhwele ngaye ngemuva kwesikhathi engadlali UMQEQESHI weKaizer Chiefs, uCedric Kaze, uhlabeke umxhwele ngendlela uThabo Cele noGastin Sirino abadlale ngayo emdlalweni weBetway Premiership nePolokwane City ophele zibambene ngo 0-0 e-Old Peter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoMgqibelo. Ukudlala kweChiefs ngokulingana nePolokwane kuphazamise umgqigqo wayo wokunqoba imidlalo emihlanu ilandelana. UCele odlale endaweni kaSiphesihle Ndlovu, bekungokokuqala kule sizini eba sesikimini esiqala umdlalo, wawudlala wawuqeda. Ngaphambi komdlalo wangoMgqibelo nePolokwane, lo mdlali wasesiswini odabuka KwaMashu, eThekwini, ubonakale okokuqala ngoLwesithathu, engena esuka ebhentshini iChiefs ibhaxabula iMagesi FC ngo 4-1. Kanti ngaphambi kwalokho, wayegcine ukubonakala ngoFebhuwari kowabakhaya baseSoweto owanqotshwa yiPirates ibhaxabula iChiefs ngo 3-0. Kanti uSirino ongene esuka ebhentshini kowePolokwane, wayegcine ukudlala ngoMashi Amakhosi edlala neMagesi kowomzuliswano wokuqala. "Bangabadlali abaneqhaza elibalulekile eqenjini, yize sinesikwati esikhulu. "Badlale kahle kakhulu, futhi ukuncintisana kuhle phakathi kwabadlali eqenjini, wonke umuntu usebenza ngokuzikhandla ukuthola ijezi," kusho uKaze oqeqesha ngokubambisana noKhalil Ben Youssef. Ebuzwa ngokudlalisa uCele esikhundleni sikaNdlovu, uKaze ukubeke kwacaca ukuthi isizathu sokungamdlalisi uNdlovu, obanga ijezi noCele, yingoba ubesabela ukuthi angase athole elinye ikhadi njengoba evele enelinye ikhadi eliphuzi. Uyichithile eyokuthi yingoba esecabanga ngomdlalo wabakhaya nePirates ngoMgqibelo. "Cha, isinqumo sokudlalisa uCele kube wuhlobo lweqembu ebesidlala nalo esibone kufanele sidlalise yena," kuqhuba uKaze othe bazolwa kuze kube sekugcineni kule midlalo eyisithupha ebasalele. "Izinto azihambanga ngendlela ebesihlele ngayo futhi asiwasebenzisanga ngendlela amathuba esiwatholile. "Kodwa sizimisele ukwenza kangcono emidlalweni elandelayo, silwele amaphuzu angu-18 emidlalweni esisalele. Sizolwa kuze kube sekugcineni." Amakhosi azotholana phezulu neZimnyama kowabakhaya baseSoweto obhekwe ngabomvu yiningi labathandi bebhola ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama, eFNB Stadium, eGoli.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UNOZINTI wokuqina kwi-Orlando Pirates, uSipho Chaine, osethubeni lokwephula amarekhodi okungangenelwa magoli eqenjini lakhe nakwiBetway Premiership NGAPHANDLE kokuba ngomunye wabadlali abamqoka i-Orlando Pirates ethembele kubona emshikashikeni wokulwela isicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership, unozinti wokuqina uSipho Chaine, usethubeni lokufinyelela kwamanye amarekhodi okungangenelwa magoli kwiligi kule sizini. UChaine (29), okunguyena njengamanje ozihola phambili konozinti bePremiership ngokungangenelwa magoli emidlalweni ewu-16, usejaha amarekhodi amabili, okungelePirates nelePremiership. Ujaha elenkakha yePirates, uMoeneeb “Slim Kat” Josephs, lemidlalo ewu-17 engangenelwa magoli, aliqopha ngesizini ka-2009/10, nelikanozinti weMamelodi Sundowns, uRonwen Williams, lokungangenelwa goli emidlalweni ewu-18 ngesizini ka-2022/23. Lo nozinti okhale wemuka nomklomelo weGoalkeeper of the Season ngesizini edlule, udinga ukuthi kungadluli lutho kuyena emidlalweni emithathu kweyisithupha yePremiership esalele eZimnyama ukufica nokwephula la marekhodi. Ngenkathi iPirates ibambana ngo 2-2 neRichards Bay FC kowePremiership ngoLwesihlanu, bekungokwesithathu uChaine engenelwa amagoli amabili emdlalweni weligi kule sizini. Ngaphambi kwalo mdlalo kwakugcine benqotshwa yiMarumo Gallants ngo 2-1 nangesikhathi begiquswa yiMamelodi Sundowns ngo 2-1. Umdlalo eZimnyama ezizowudlala naMaZulu FC ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, uphonsela inselelo lo nozinti elinye ithuba lokwala ukhasha ezintini angangenelwa goli. Ngemuva kwalo mdlalo wangoMgqibelo, leli qembu laseSoweto elizowudlala noSuthu, lizobhekana neKaizer Chiefs ngo-Ephreli 26, kowabakhaya baseSoweto obhekwe ngabomvu ngabathandi bebhola. EZimnyama, ezisendaweni yesibili kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu awu-55, zehlukaniswe yiphuzu neMamelodi Sundowns esaqhwakele ngawu-56.
