Lo nozinti ujaha la marekhodi okungangenelwa magoli nje, unenye inselelo yokuzibekisela indawo eqenjini lesizwe, iBafana Bafana, elizodlala koweNdebe yoMhlaba e-United States, Canada, naseMexico ngoJuni 11 kuya kuJulayi 19. Ubanga ijezi noWilliams, uRicardo Goss weSiwelele FC, noRenaldo Leaner weSekhukhune United, kanti nokululama kukaBrandon Petersen weChiefs nakho kubukeka kuzowuqinisa umbango wejezi. Muva nje usale ngaphandle kwabizwa uLeaner, iBafana idlala eyobungani nePanama.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: OMUNYE wabasubathi abazobe bemele iKwaZulu-Natal Athletics kuma-ASA Senior Championships eStellenbosch, uPrudence Sekgodiso. KUSUKA amaphepha emqhudelwaneni we-Athletic South Africa (ASA) Senior Track and Field National Championships ozobanjelwa eCoetzenburg Stadium, eStellenbosch, kusukela ngoLwesine kuze kube nguMgqibelo. Kulo mqhudelwano kazwelonke waminyaka yonke kuzobe kudlana imilala abagijimi emabangeni ehlukene okubalwa kuwo u-100m, 200m, 400m, 800m, 1500m, 5000m, 4x400m relay, Long Jump, Triple Jump, Discus ne-Javelin. Umqhudelwano uzoqala ngo-8 ekuseni ngoLwesine ngomjaho ka-10km wabesilisa. Kwabazomela iKwaZulu-Natal Athletics kuzobe kubhekwe kakhulu uPrudence Sekgodiso emijahweni yabesifazane ka-800m no-1500m, kanye noTshepo Tshite kowabesilisa ka1500m. USekgodiso wadlala umhlanganiso ku800m nyakenye ngo-1:58.80, waphinde waphuma phambili naku-1500m ngo-4:11.34. Ngonyaka odlule uTshite wanqoba ku-800m ngo-1:46.84, isicoco sika-1500m sathathwa nguLuan Munnik ngo-3:40.38 Ku-100m wabesilisa kuzogadulisana abagijimi okubalwa kubona uBenjamin Richardson, Bradley Nkoana, Wayde van Niekerk noGift Leotlela okunguyena owadla umhlanganiso nyakenye kuleli banga nyakenye ngesikhathi esiwu-9.99. Naku-400m wabesilisa kuzohlangana abasubathi abazanayo okubalwa kubona uLythe Pillay, Udeme Okon, Leendert Koekemoer nabanye.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMBEKEZELI Mbokazi oshaye into ecokeme, waqokwa njengomdlali ovelele iChicago iguqisa i-Atlanta United koweMajor Soccer League (MLS) Image: CHICAGO FIRE FACEBOOK UKUKHOMBISA ukudlondlobala kukaMbekezeli "TLB" Mbokazi eqenjini lakhe lase-United States of  America (USA), iChicago Fire, kuyizindaba ezinhle eqenjini lesizwe iBafana Bafana njengoba livivela iNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa ka-2026 esiseMome. UMbokazi oqale umdlalo wakhe wesikhombisa esikimini seChicago kule sizini, ushaye into ecokeme kulo mdlalo ala ukhasha emuva, ebhula umlilo sekuvalwe amehlo ifike qathatha i-Atlanta United ifuna igoli lokulinganisa, yagcina inqobe ngo 1-0 iChicago iguqisa i-Atlanta yeMajor League Soccer (MLS) ngeSonto, eSoccer Field, eChicago. Ukushaya kwakhe into ecokeme kumhlomulise ngomklomelo wokuba ngumdlali ovelele - Man of the Match - kulo mdlalo iChicago ekhombise kuwo ukushubisa umbango wesicoco seligi kwi-Eastern Conferernce ye-MLS phakathi kwayo neNashville SC. Njengamanje iChicago isendaweni yesibili kwi-log ye-Eastern Conference ngamaphuzu awu-13 emidlaweni eyisikhombisa, ngemuva kweNashville SC esaqhwakele ngawu-16 emidlalweni elinganayo. IChicago izodlala neDetroit City emdlalweni womqhudelwano womkhumulajezi i-US Open Cup ngoLwesithathu, bese ibuyela kweyeligi ngokududulana neCincinati ngeSonto. Lesi sishaqamba sesiqongqwane sasemuva esijoyine iMen in Red ngoJanuwari sisuka kwi-Orlando Pirates, ifomu yaso akubuzwa ukuthi ifana noju kumqeqeshi weqembu lesizwe, iBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, njengoba sikubadlali abamqoka kuleli qembu elivivela ukuyoyibamba koweNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa ezobanjelwa e-USA, Canada naseMexico, kusukela ngoJuni 11 kuya kuJulayi 19. Emdlalweni wakamuva wobungani iBafana ewudlale nePanama ihlulwa ngo 2-1, uMbokazi ushaye ingcwenga yegoli edudula inguzunga yeshodi engaphandle kwebhokisi. UMbokazi wenza kahle kuleli qembu lase-USA nje, uBroos wayeshaya amakhala ngokuyodlala kwakhe kule ligi yase-USA, ayithatha njengeligi engekho emgangathweni ngokwezinga lamaligi ebhola emhlabeni. Nokho, kancane, kancane amathe abuyela kwasifuba kulo mqeqeshi odabuka eBelgium ngayekungabaza ngezinga le-MLS njengoba eqhubeka uMbokazi nokwenza kahle. Kanti muva nje umbizile nomgadli uBongokuhle Hlongwane, naye odlala kuyo le ligi kwiMinnesota United, emdlalweni weBafana nePanama. IBafana eqhathwe kuGroup A weNdebe yoMhlaba neSouth Korea, Mexico neCzech Republic, izovula neMexico ngoJuni 11, e-Estadio Azteca, eMexico City.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe USIYABONGA Mafuleka weNRB Harriers Club ongomunye wabagijimi abazobe beyibambe emjahweni iZululand District Marathon webanga lika-56km ngeSonto USIYABONGA Mafuleka weNRB Harriers Athletics Club ungomunye wabagijimi abazobe bedlana imilala emjahweni iZululand District Marathon (ZDM) webanga lika-56km ozogijinywa kusukwa  oLundi, usongwe KwaNongoma, ngeSonto. Lo mjaho oxhaswe nguMasipala wesiFunda iZululand oholwa yiMeya uMichael "Mkhonyovu" Khumalo, ogcine ukugijinywa ngo-2019. Ukhuza ibuya nonyaka ngenhloso yokusiza abagijimi basesifundeni iZululand namaphethelo ukuwenza izikhathi zokuzibekisela indawo kwiComrades Marathon ezogijinywa ngoJuni 14, eThekwini, kuphelelwa eMgungundlovu. I-ZDM yanonyaka okulindeleke igijinywe nangabagijimi abanohlonze bakwezinye izifundazwe nabangaphandle kweNingizimu Afrika, izogijinywa ngokusuka eMangosuthu Buthelezi Airport, oLundi, isongwe eKing Bhekuzulu High School, KwaNongoma. UMafuleka (32) waseJozini, KwaMhlabuyalingana, ongaphansi kweNRB Harriers Athletics Club, usebenzise umjaho uMhlathuze Crocs Marathon yebanga lika-42km obuseMpangeni, ngoMashi 21, lapho elale khona isibili ngesikhathi esingu-2:30:25, ngemuva kukaSicelo Mkhwanazi odle umhlanganiso ngo-2:28:43. Nyakenye, udle umhlanganiso kwi-Best of the Best Marathon yebanga lika-42km, walala endaweni ka-13 kwiPrince Mangosuthu Ultra Marathon yebanga lika-52km. “Ngizobe ngiwugijima okokuqala lo mjaho, angiwazi umzila. Nokho lo mjaho ngizulungiselela ngawo ukuyogijima iComrades Marathon. “Abagijimi abaningi engixoxe nabo bangitshele ukuthi lo mjaho (we-ZDM) uyisivivinyo esihle ekuzilungiseleleni iComrades, ikakhulukazi njengoba eyokulo nyaka izogijinywa kukhushukwa (kusukwa eThekwini kuyiwa eMgungundlovu). Ngakho ngizodinga zonke izikhalo ukulungela umjaho weComrades,” kusho uMafuleka owenza isikhathi esingu-5:39:55 ngo-2023 ephuma endaweni ka-21. “Kulo nyaka ngizamile ukubona ukuthi yikuphi okuzongisebenzela. Kuthatha isikhathi ukuthola ifomu ekahle, kudinga isikhathi esiningi nokubekezela. Okubalulekile wukuthi ngigweme ukulimala. Kodwa nginesiqiniseko sokuthi ngizokwazi ukungena nabayishumi bokuqala kulo mjaho weZululand Marathon. "Abagijimi abaningi bazobe belwela umkomelo omkhulu ngakho akuzukuba ngumjaho olula. Kodwa ngizimisele ukwenza kahle.” Umgijimi ozodla umhlanganiso kulo mjaho we-ZDM uzokhala emuke no-R100 000, isibili kube wu-R50 000, isithathu kube wu-R25 000. Izinombolo zizolandwa ngoMgqibelo, ePrince Mangosuthu Regional Airport, kusuka ngo-10 ekuseni. Abafuna ukungenala, bangangena kwi-website ethi: www.webtickets.co.za

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe URELEBOHILE Mofokeng we-Orlando Pirates oxinwe uSanele Barns weRichards Bay FC, ungomunye wabadlali abamqoka leli qembu laseSoweto, elithembele kubona emshikashikenei wokulwela isicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, unethemba lokuthi iRichards Bay FC izokwazi ukubenzela “ufefe” ngokubabambela iMamelodi Sundowns ukuze ingavuli kakhulu igebe esicongweni se-log yeBetway Premiership. IPirates iphinde yalahla amaphuzu idlala ngokulingana ngo 2-2 neRichards Bay ngoLwesihlanu, eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay. Ukulahla kwayo amaphuzu sekunike iSundowns ithuba lokuvula igebe esicongweni se-log yePremiership kwazise njengamanje la maqembu okuyiwona asembangweni wesicoco seligi asehlukaniswe yiphuzu elilodwa. ISundowns isaqhwakele ngamaphuzu awu-56 emidlalweni ewu-23, iPirates isendaweni yesibili ngawu-55 emidlalweni ewu-24, okunika iSundowns ithuba lokuvula igebe njengoba isasalele emuva ngomdlalo. AmaSandawane asayibambe kwiCaf Champions League, azobuyela kweyePremiership ngomdlalo wasekhaya neStellenbosch FC ngo-Ephreli 22, alandele ngowasekuhambeni neRichards Bay ngo-Ephreli 25, eMhlathuze. Kanti eZimnyama esezisalelwe yimidlalo eyisithupha ukusonga isizini, zizobuyela ensimini ngomdlalo wasekhaya naMaZulu FC ngoMgqibelo, e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto. “Nginethemba lokuthi iRichards Bay ingakwazi ukubamba iSundowns. Iyiqembu elihlelekile futhi elilwayo. "Ngicabanga ukuthi ingelinye lamaqembu adlala kwiPSL, elikwaziyo ukuncintisana namanye amaqembu, elenza kube nzima kunanoma yiliphi iqembu elidlala nalo kule nkundla yalo yasekhaya. "Okubalulekile kithina ukuthi siqhubeke sisebenze, silwe kuze kube ngumdlalo wokugcina. Lesi akusona isikhathi sokuthi silahle ithemba,” kusho u-Ouaddou oncome ukuzinikela okukhonjiswe yiqembu lakhe elibuye ngemizuzu yokugcina ukuthola igoli lokulinganisa koweRichards Bay. Ngemuva kokulahla amaphuzu zibambana ngo 1-1 neSiwelele FC ngoMashi 14, eZimnyama zibuye ngesivuthevuthe zinqoba imidlalo emibili ilandelana ngembudlu yamagoli ngokunenebula i-TS Galaxy ngo 6-0 neLamontville Golden Arrows ngo 5-0 ngeledlule, ngaphambi kokulahla amanye amaphuzu eMhlathuze. “Khona kudumazile ukungenelwa ngamagoli amabili kodwa futhi kufanele ngibancome abadlali bami ngokukwazi ukubuya bashaye amanye amabili. Bakhombise isibindi nomoya wokulwa kwaze kwaba sekugcineni.”

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: USPHAMANDLA Nkosi we-Entsika Athletics Club obe ngomunye wabagijimi baKwaZulu-Natal, abangene nabayishumi bokuqala kwi-Two Oceans Marathon ngoMgqibelo, ngokuthatha indawo yesithupha UMGIJIMI waKwaZulu-Natal, uSphamandla Nkosi, ukuthatha njengesiqalo esihle kuyena ukungena nabayishumi bokuqala emjahweni i-Totalsports Two Oceans Marathon yebanga lika-56km abeqala ukuwugijima ngoMgqibelo, eKapa. Sekungumlando ukuthi umhlanganiso udliwe ngu-Arhur Jantjies wePan African Resources Running Club ngesikhathi esingu-3:09:25, isibili kwaba ngu-Onalenna Khonkhobe ngo-3:10:00, isithathu kwaba nguBlessing Waison waseZimbabwe ngesikhathi esingu-3:11:13. Kwabesifazane kube nguGerda Steyn weHollywood Athletics Club ngo-3:27:43, isibili kwaba nguMargaret Jepchumba waseKenya, isithathu kwaba nguNobukhosi Tshuma waseZimbabwe ngo-3:38:34. USteyn ubesewunqoba okwesikhombisa lo mjaho webanga lika-56km nokunguyena osaphethe irekhodi lawo lesikhathi sika-3:26:54 kwabesifazane aliqopha ngo-2024. UNkosi (30) ongaphansi kwe-Entsika Athletics Club ulale isithupha kwiTwo Oceans ngesikhathi esingu-3:12:42. Lo mgijimi odabuka eMakheni, eDumbe, nonqobe i-Best of the Best Marathon yebanga lika-42km eThekwini, ngoMashi, uphakathi kwabagijimi abathathu baKwaZulu-Natal abangene nabayishumi bokuqala kulo mjaho waseKapa. USiboniso Sikhakhane waseMadadeni, eNewcastle, ogijimela i-Entsika Athletics Club, uthathe isikhombisa ngesikhathi esingu-3:12:42, uMsawenkosi Mthalane waseSweewaters, eMgungundlovu, ogijimela iNedbank Running Club, wathatha indawo yeshumi ngo-3:13:32. Yize bengaphumelela ukunqoba lo mjaho kodwa laba bagijimi baseKZN babuye nemithobanhliziyo ka-R30 000, R23 000 no-R12 000 ngokulandelana kwabo. “Noma umgomo wami bekuwukungena kwabahlanu bokuqala kodwa kusho lukhulu kimina ukuthola indawo yesithupha kwiTwo Oceans ngiqala ukuyigijima, lokhu kuyangikhuthaza kakhulu ekutheni ngonyaka ozayo ngibuye ngizolwela ukuwunqoba lo mjaho. "Manje sengiyawazi umzila walo mjaho nezinselelo zakhona ngakho nakanjani ngonyaka ozayo ngizobuya sengiyiqonda kangcono inselelo engizobe ngibhekene nayo kulo mjaho,” kusho uNkosi oqeqeshwa ngu-Andries Taleng waseLesotho. Umgijimi waKwaZulu-Natal owagcina ukunqoba i-Two Oceans Marathon, nguBongumusa Mthembu, owanqoba lo mjaho ngo-2019, ngesikathi esingu-3:80:40. Kanti uNkosinathi Mhlakwana noSikhakhane yibona abacishe bawunqoba bawunqoba lo mjaho ngo-2022 nango-2025, belala isibili ngokwehlukana. “Ukungena kwethu kwabayishumi bokuqala singabagijimi baKwaZulu-Natal kuyisikhuthazi kithina ukuthi sekuseduze omunye wethu awunqobe lo mjaho. "Ngemuva kwe-Two Oceans, sengibheke iDurban International Marathon kodwa ngizozwa umzimba wami ukuthi uyavuma yini. "Kodwa iComrades Marathon cha angikakulungeli ukuyigijima okwamanje, mhlawumbe eminyakeni emihlanu ezayo, hhayi manje.” IDurban International Marathon yebanga lika-42.2km izogijinywa eThekwini, ngoMeyi 3.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMDLALI weMamelodi Sundowns uThemba Zwane owayekhona leli qembu linqoba isicoco seCaf Champions League. UMDLALO weMamelodi Sundowns ne-Esperance de Tunis umqoka ngezindlela ezahlukene kuwona womabili la maqembu ukubhekana kwawo okulindelwe ngabomvu ngabathandi bebhola lase-Afrika kule mpelasonto. ISundowns izodudulana ne-Esperance emdlalweni womlenze wokuqala wowandulela owamanqamu eCaf Champions League kusasa ngo-9 ebusuku, eHammadi Agrebi Stadium, eRades, eTunisia. Owomlenze wesibili uzodlalelwa eLucas Moripe Stadium, ePitoli, ngoMgqibelo ozayo. Ufana nowamagqubu umdlalo wala maqembu kwazise nangesizini edlule adudulana kuwo lo mzuliswano womqhudelwano, kwanqoba iSundowns nokuyiyona egcine idlala owamanqamu nePyramids yase-Egypt yaguqa ngo 2-1. Kusukela eqala la maqembu ukudibana kwiChampions League ngesizini ka-2017, i-Esperance yiyona ekhombise ukukhonya phezu kwamaSandawana eyawaguqisa ngo 2-1 esigabeni samaqoqo ngo-2017. Nangesizini ka-2023/24 isiqeqeshwa nguMiguel Cardoso, i-Taraji yaphinda yathela isibhaxu kumaSandawana iwaguqisa ngo 1-0 kowandulela owamanqamu alo mqhudelwano, yadlulela kowamanqamu yaguqiswa yi-Al Ahly. Nokho, ngesizini edlule amaSandawana aphendule amatafula esecijwa nguCardoso, ebuyisa izinduku kuleli qembu laseTunisia enqoba ngo 1-0, azibekisela indawo kowamanqamu. AmaSandawana anqoba iChampions League ngesizini ka-2016, asefinyelele kweyandulela owamanqamu amasizini amathathu elandelana okubalwa nowamanqamu ngesizini edlule, ngakho anengcindezi enkulu yokushintsha ukwenza kule sizini ukuqeda ishobolo lokungayinqobi le ndebe yase-Afrika. UHlompho Kekana, owayeyinjini yasesiswini nokaputeni ngenkathi amaSandawana edla isicoco seChampions League ngo-2016, ubona leli qembu lasePitoli linethuba lokuwunqoba lo mqhudelwano kule sizini inqobo nje uma lingakwazi ukugudluza i-Esperance kowandulela owamanqamu. “ISundowns kudala ingqongqoza kwiChampions League. Ngonyaka odlule besesizitshela ukuthi sekuyisikhathi sokuyithatha le ndebe kodwa akwangalunga. I-Esperance neSundowns ngamaqembu azanayo, ngakho iSundowns iyakwazi ekulindele kulo mdlao eyowudlala eTunisia," kusho uKekana. "Kuzobaluleka kakhulu ukuthi iSundowns ishaye igoli eTunisia ukuzibeka ethubeni elingcono lokuqedela umsebenzi emdlalweni womlenze wesibili ekhaya. "Ngikholwa wukuthi uma iSundowns ingakwazi ukushaya i-Esperance ingaba nethuba elikhulu lokuyinqoba le ndebe yeChampions ngoba lawa amanye amaqembu asele, iBerkane ne-FAR Rabat akuwona amaqembu angayithwalisa kanzima kangako." UKekana ugcizelele ubumqoka bamava abadlali okubalwa kubo uTeboho Mokoena noThemba “Mshishi” Zwane kulo mdlalo. “Yisikhathi sokuthi abadlali abanjengoTeboho Mokoena bakhombise amava abo kulo mqhudelwano, ikakhulukazi uMshishi, okuwuyena no-Onyango (Denis) abasasele eqenjini lika-2016 elawina le ndebe.” Imidlalo yowandulela owamanqamu weCaf Champions League: FAR Rabat v RS Berkane (Prince Moulay Abdellah Stadium) Esperance Tunis v Mamelodi Sundowns (Hammadi Agrebi Stadium)

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-GODWIN Katakura waseZimbabwe okunguyena ozovikela isicoco ku-42.2km kwi-Durban International Marathon ngoMeyi, eThekwini KULINDELEKE izinga eliphezulu emjahweni i-Durban International Marathon yanonyaka, kulandela ukwenyuswa kwemiklomelo ezohlonyulwa ngabagijimi abazokwenza kulo mjaho ozogijinywa ekuqaleni kwenyanga ezayo. IDurban International Marathon ehlanganisa i-ASA Marathon Championships nesezingeni le-Abbot World Marathon Majors, yethulwe ngokusemthethweni eRiverside Hotel, eThekwini, ngoLwesine. Lo mjaho waminyaka webanga lika-42.2km ohlanganisa nebanga lika-10km, nohlelwa yiNewlands Athletics Club, uzogijinywa ngoMeyi 3, eThekwini. Wandulela omkhulukazi weComrades Marathon webanga lika-87km ozogijinywa ngoJuni 14. Umgijimi ozodla umhlanganiso ku-42.2km uzokhala emuke no-R80 000, isibili kube u-R45 000, isithathu kube u-R20 000 kwabesilisa nabesifazane. Le miklomelo yenyukile kweyangonyaka odlule, isuka ku-R75 000 kophume phambili, u-R40 000 isibili, no-R15 000 isithathu. Naku-10km yenyusiwe njengoba ozodla umhlanganiso ezothola u-R6 000, isibili kube u-R3 500, isithathu kube u-R2 500. Yenyuke kweyangonyaka odlule isuka ku-R5 000 kophume phambili, u-R2 500 isibili, no-R1 500 isithathu. Kuphinde kwabekwa eceleni imihlomulo yokukhuthaza abagijimi ekwenzeni izikhathi ezinhle nokuqopha amarekhodi. Kwabesilisa ebangeni lika-42.2km, kubekwe u-R45 000 wokuqopha isikhathi sika-2:07:00, u-R30 000 wesikhathi sika-2:08:00, no-R20 000 wesikhathi sika-2:09:00. Nakwabesifazane kubekwe imiklomelo efanayo, njengoba kubekwe u-R45 000 wokuqopha isikhathi sika-2:27:00, u-R30 000 wesikhathi sika-2:28:00, no-R20 000 wesikhathi sika-2:29:00. Irekhodi lika-42.2km labesilisa lalo mjaho lesikhathi sika-2:08:43 lisaphethwe uSamuel Naibei waseKenya, aliqophe ngo-2021, okungunyaka okusungulwe ngawo lo mjaho. Elabesifazane lesikhathi sika-2:29:46 lisaphethwe uCian Oldknow waseNingizimu Afrika. Nyakenye, kwabesilisa umhlanganiso udliwe uFelix Kiprotich waseKenya, kodwa wagcina ephuciwe umklomelo ngenxa yokutholakala nezikhuthazi ezingavumelekile egazini, wanikwa uGodwin Katakura waseZimbabwe, owayelale isibili ngesikhathi esingu-2:11:02. Kwabesifazane umhlanganiso udliwe u-Emane Hayile wase-Ethiopia, ngesikhathi esingu-2:31:45.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMQEQESHI waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane (maphakathi) namaphini akhe, uSimo Dladla (kwesokunxele) noSiboniso Vilakazi (kwesokudla). WALE waphetha umqeqeshi waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, ukuphawula ngokungabonakali ebhentshini komunye wamaphini akhe, uSimo Dladla, okunezinsolo zokungahoshelani kwakhe naye. UDladla, oyiphini lesibili likaZwane, ubengabonwa nangokhalo ebhentshini Usuthu lubambana ngo 2-2 neSekhukhune United emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngoMsombuluko, ePrincess Magogo Stadium, KwaMashu. Ebhentshini bekukhona uSiboniso “Nini” Vilakazi, oyiphini lokuqala, noPosnett Omony, ongumqeqeshi wonozinti. Ukungabonakali kukaDladla kulandela isitatimende esikhishwe yileli qembu ngekhefu leFifa, emasontweni amabili edlule, siveza ukuthi inkontileka yakhe ayizukuvuselelwa ekupheleni kwale sizini. Ukungavuselelwa kwenkontileka yalo mqeqeshi kuhambisana nokungavuselelwa kwekaPedro Dias oyi-Director of Football kuleli qembu. Ngemuva kokuvela kwalezi zindaba, kube sekuqubuka izinsolo zokungahoshelani phakathi kwakhe noZwane oyinhloko yabaqeqeshi. “Leli qembu lingaphezulu kunanoma ngubani, ngisho nami uqobo. Lingadlala kusasa ngaphandle kwami, liphinde lidlale ngaphandle kaPostnett. Akekho ongaphezulu kweqembu,” kusho uZwane. “Okubaluleke kakhulu uthando, ugqozi nokuzinikela eqenjini. Iqembu liza kuqala. Okunye kuyalandela. "Ukuba ngumqeqeshi yigama nje lomsebenzi, okubalulekile ukubambisana. Kodwa uma izinto zingasahambi kahle ingcabha ingami, yimina okufanele ngithathe izinqumo ngakho kubaluleke kakhulu ukwesekwa ngabanye ozakwethu engibambisene nabo (ethimbeni labaqeqeshi). "Engikushoyo wukuthi iqembu lingaqhubeka ngaphandle kwethu ngakho kubalulekile ukuthi sikuqonde lokho,” kuqhuba uZwane enqaba ukuphawula ngezinsolo zokungahoshelani noDladla. “Iqembu lasikhipha isitatimende ngakho akukho okunye engizokuphawula. Umuntu onjengoNini (Vilakazi) kufanele anconywe, wenza umsebenzi omuhle kakhulu, ngiyathokoza ngaye. "Khona manje usanda kuthola iziqu zakhe ze-CAF A Licence, esizwa yiqembu ukuzithuthukisa. Okuyingakho ngithi nginamava anele ebhentshini.” Ukudlala ngokulingana koSuthu kuluphuthisele ngethuba lokubambelela endaweni yesithathu kwi-log yePremiership nokuqongisa ingcindezi kulona emidlalweni eyisikhombisa elusalele ukusonga isizini emgomweni walo wokuqela isizini libalwa namaqembu amane aphezulu.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UGERDA Steyn ophethe irekhodi lika-56km kwi-Totalsports Two Oceans Marathon kwabesifazane ungomunye wabagjimi okubhekeke baqophe izikhathi ezintsha kulo mjaho KUBHEKWE amarekhodi amasha emjahweni wanonyaka we-Totalsports Two Oceans Ultra Marathon onemiklomelo econsisa amathe. Lo mjaho waminyaka yonke ohlanganisa ibanga lika-56km nelika-21.1km, nonyaka uxhaswe yinkampani eyakha izimoto ezihamba ngogesi ehlonishwayo, i-BYD, nokuyiyona ezobanika izinyawo ezilula abayingxenye yalo mjaho kusukela kubagijimi kuya kubaqeqeshi nezikhulu. Owebanga lika-56km, nokuyiwona obhekwe kakhulu, uzogijinywa ngoMgqibelo kusukela ngo-5.15 ekuseni, kuthi u-21.1km uqale ngo-6.15 ekuseni ngeSonto Owanonyaka umjaho uxhaswe ngesizumbulu sika-R2.6 million, ohlanganisa imiklomelo yawo womabili amabanga. Ku-56km, ozophuma phambili kwabesilisa nabesifazane uzokhala emuke no-R380 000, isibili kube u-R220 000, isithathu kube u-R100 000. Imali yompetha inyuke ngo-R130 000 uma kuqhathaniswa nonyaka odlule. Ku-21.1km ozodla umhlanganiso uzohlabana ngo-R50 000, isibili kube u-R30 000, isithathu kube u-R18 000. Nyakenye, uKhoarahlane Seutloali waseLesotho, ogijimela iHollywood Athletics Club, udle umhlanganiso kwabesilisa ku-56km ngesikhathi esingu-3:10:47. Isibili kwaba uSiboniso Sikhakhane we-Entsika Athletics Club ngesikhathi esingu-3:11:18, isithathu kwaba uLucky Mohale weNedbank Running Club ngo-3:11:27. Kwabesifazane kwanqoba uGerda Steyn weHollywood AC ngo-3:29:11, isibili kwaba uShelmith Muriuki waseKenya ogijimela e-Entsika AC ngo-3:37:51, isithathu kwaba uNeheng Katala waseLesotho ogijimela iHollywood AC ngo-3:40:39. USteyn, osenqobe lo mjaho amahlandla ayisithupha iminyaka ilandelana, uphethe irekhodi labesifazane lika-56km lesikhathi sika-3:26:54, aliqopha ngo-2024. Nguyena obhekiwe nasemjahweni wanonyaka ukuthi uzokwazi yini ukuqhubeka nokukhonya, aphinde aqophe elinye irekhodi. Kwabesilisa kubhekwe ngabomvu ukuthi uSeutloali, ophinde wadla umhlanganiso nakwiSoweto Marathon yebanga lika-42km ngoNovemba, uzokwazi yini ukuvikela isicoco. Ubhekene nenselelo ku-Onalenna Khonkhobe noSiboniso Sikhakhane, okuyibona okubhekeke ukuthi bamdlisele ogageni. Irekhodi labesilisa le-Two Oceans lesikhathi sika-3:03:34 elaqoshwa uThompson Magawana ngo-1988, alikaphulwa muntu kuze kube manje. UMarco Mambo waseZimbabwe owashaya isikhathi sika-3:05:39 ngo-2005, nomkhaya wakhe uMoses Njodzi owashaya u-3:06:50 ngo-2006, yibona asebeke basondela ekuficeni irekhodi likaMagawana.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMDLALI wasemuva kwiMilford FC, uKonke Khwanya, ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka kuleli qembu elihambe ibanga kwiNedank Cup nelisembangweni wesicoco seligi yeMotsepe Foundation Championship YIZE ezakhe ziphume emzuliswaneni weyandulela owamanqamu eNedbank Cup kodwa umqeqeshi weMilford FC, uXanti Pupuma, ukuthatha njengesikhuthazi ukufinyelela kulesi sigaba somqhudelwano futhi ubona sezikulungele ukuncintisana namanye amaqembu adlala kwiBetway Premiership. IMilford, edlala esigabeni seMotsepe Foundation Championship, kwale kancane ifinyelele kowamanqamu eNedbank iguqiswa yi-TS Galaxy ngo 4-3 sekukhahlelwa amaphenathi kweyandulela owamanqamu alo mqhudelwano ngeSonto, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Kuma-quarterfinal eNedbank iMilford iguqise iSekhukhune United ngo 3-2 kumaphenathi, ngaphambi kokushikilisa elinye iqembu elidlala kwiPremiership, iGalaxy kowandulela owamanqamu. Ibe yiqembu lesibili elidlala kwiMotsepe Championship ukuwashiswa ijezi ngempelasonto kweyandulela owamanqamu eNedbank njengoba kube ngesifanayo nakwiCasric Stars nayo iguqiswa yiDurban City ngo 1-0 ngoMgqibelo. Ukuphuma kweMilford kwiNedbank sekusho ukugxila kwayo ngokuphelele emshikashikeni wokulwela ukunqoba isicoco seligi yeMotsepe Championship. “Yingxenye yomdlalo (ukwehlulwa). Akuyona inhlekelele ukwehlulwa kwethu, ngakho angikhathazekile ngakho.  Sizothatha okuhle esikwenze kulo mdlalo esihlulwe kuwo yi-TS Galaxy, sakhele phezu kwakho emidlalweni yethu elandelayo yeligi esisazoyidlala," kusho uPupuma. "Abadlali bethu bayabona nabo manje ukuthi sebengakwazi ukuncintisana namaqembu ePSL (Premiership), badlale esigabeni esisodwa nawo. Ukuphuma kwethu kwiNedbank kusinika ithuba lokugxila ngokuphelele ekulweleni ukuwina iligi ukuze sifeze umgomo wethu wokukhushulelwa esigabeni sePSL ekupheleni kwesizini.” IStallions, esihlale esicongweni se-log yeChampionship ingxenye enkulu yale sizini, inomdlalo omqoka wasekhaya neCasric eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, ngoLwesithathu ngo-3 ntambama. Lo mdlalo ubaluleke ngokufanayo kuwona womabili la maqembu njengoba womabili enezinhloso ezifanayo ngesicoco seligi yeChampionship. Ngaphambi kwekhefu leFifa womabili la maqembu athumele umlayezo oshubile ezimbangini ngezinhloso zawo ngesicoco seligi, ngenkathi iMilford inenebula iBaroka FC ngo 5-0, kwaba ngesifanayo iCasric itaxa iKruger ngo 4-0. Imidlalo yangoLwesithathu yeMotsepe Foundation Championship (3pm): Milford FC v Casric Stars (Umhlathuze Sports Complex); Kruger United v Lerumo Lions (Kanyamazane Stadium); Upington City v Venda FC (Mxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium)

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isthombe USIBONISO Sikhakhane we-Entsika Athletics Club ozimisele ngokubuyisa izinduku embangini yakhe emdlisele ogageni kwi-Two Oceans Marathon nyakenye njengoba ebuyela kulo mjaho ngo-Ephreli 11 UMGIJIMI wamabanga amade waKwaZulu-Natal, uSiboniso Sikhakhane, ubona sesifikile isikhathi sokudla umhlanganiso kwi-Totalsports Two Oceans Marathon osekube ngamahlandla amabili ekhala ngaphansi kuyona. USikhakhane (35) ogijimela i-Entsika Athletics Club, ungomunye wabagijimi ababhekiwe kwi-Two Oceans yanonyaka yebanga lika-56km ezogijinywa ngoMgqibelo, eKapa. Lo mgijimi odabuka eMadadeni, eNewcastle, uza kulo mjaho elubalubela ukukhipha amanye amangwevu ekwehluleni imbangi yakhe evikela isicoco, uKhoarahlane Seutloali waseLesotho omgabisele ngezithende nyakenye edla umhlanganiso kulo mjaho. USikhakhane ulale isibili kulo mjaho ngesikhathi esiwu-3:11:18, esala ngemizuzwana engu-31 kuSeutloali weHollywood Athletics Club oshaye intambo ngo-3:10:47. I-Two Oceans yanonyaka exhaswe nayinkampani yezimoto, i-BYD, inemiklomelo econsisa amathe njengoba igabe ngesizumbulu sika-R2.6 million. Umgijimi ozodla umhlanganiso kwabesilisa nabesifazane uzokhala emuke no-R380 000, isibili kube u-R220 000, isithathu kube u-R100 000. “Namanje ngisasho, kwakufanele ngiyiwine i-Two Oceans ngonyaka odlule. Ngangineqhinga elihle lokuthi ngizowuqala ngiwuphethe kanjani umjaho. Konke kwahamba ngendlela engangihlele ngayo, kodwa ngenza iphutha elikhulu ngenkathi ngilanda isigubhu samanzi okuphuza endaweni engafanele, nokuyilapho enganika khona uKhoarahlane ithuba lokuvula igebe kwase kuba nzima ukumfica,” kusho uSikhakhane, olale isithathu kwiPrince Mangosuthu Ultra Marathon 52km nyakenye. USikhakhane ulala isibili nyakenye nje, ngo-2022 walala isithathu ewugijima okokuqala lo mjaho we-Two Oceans, nokho wangawugijima ngo-2023 nango-2024. Lo mgijimi oqeqeshwa yinkakha yezokugijima eMzansi, uHendrick Ramaala, nakulo nyaka usebenzise umjaho waseBotswana, i-FNB Kazungula Bridge Marathon yebanga lika-42.2km, ebisekuqaleni kukaMashi, ukuzicijela i-Two Oceans. Ulale isibili kulo mjaho ngesikhathi sika-2:19:17, ngemuva kuka-Isaac Mpofu waseZimbabwe odle umhlanganiso ngo-2:14:18. “Njengoba ngikwaze ukwenza isikhathi esingaphansi kwalesi ebengizibekele sona esingu-2:20, kwi-FNB Kazungula Marathon, lokho kusho ukuthi isabambe ngakho ngamalungiselelo ami e-Two Oceans. Inhloso yami wukwenza isikhathi esingcono kunengisenze ngonyaka odlule. Ngikholwa wukuthi sesifikile isikhathi sokuthi nginqobe umjaho omkhulu ezweni. Ngiwenzile amaphutha esikhathini esedlule, kodwa ngifundile kuwona.” Kwagcina ngoBongumusa Mthembu ngo-2019 ukuthi umgijimi waseKZN anqobe i-Two Oceans.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe ISITOBHA nokaputeni weDurban City, uSiphamandla Ncanana ISASASA kubathandi bebhola baKwaZulu-Natal ngokufinyelela kweDurban City neMilford FC emzuliswaneni weyandulela owamanqamu eNedbank Cup lingesolwe kwazise la maqembu abhekene nenselelo yokuqeda isomiso sesifundazwe seminyaka ewu-17 sokungabi naqembu eliphakamisa indebe. Sekungumlando ukuthi iLamontville Golden Arrows yilona qembu laseKZN elagcina ukuphakamisa indebe nge-MTN8 ngokunenebula i-Ajax Cape Town ngo 6-0 kowamanqamu ngesizini ka-2009/10. Ngemuva kwalokho amaqembu akulesi sifundazwe abhekwe yisambane kweyamanqamu ngokwehlukana kwaze kwaba yisizini ka-2022/23. Ngayo isizini ka-2009/10 okuyiyona Abafana Bes’thende abaphakamisa ngayo isicoco seMTN8, AmaZulu afinyelela kowamanqamu eNedbank aguqiswa yiBidvest Wits ngo 3-0. Ngesizini ka-2017/18 iMaritzburg United (esiyiDurban City) yafinyelela kowamanqamu eNedbank yaguqiswa yiFree State Stars ngo 1-0. Liqhubekile ishobolo lokubhekwa yisambane kweKZN, Usuthu luguqiswa yi-Orlando Pirates ngo 1-0 kowamanqamu e-MTN8 ngesizini ka-2022/23. Ngakho iCity neMilford kule mpelasonto babhekene nenselelo enkulu yokuqeda leli shobolo njengoba benemidlalo emqoka nebhekwe ngabomvu eyandulela owamanqamu eNedbank. ICity izotholana phezulu neCasric Stars, eChatsworth Stadium, eThekwini, namuhla ngo-3 ntambama. Isithombe ISIPHEKEPHEKE somdlali wasesiswini kwiMilford FC, uMenzi Chili IMilford izodlalela ekuhambeni ne-TS Galaxy, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga, kusasa ngo-3 ntambama. Oyisiqongqwane sasemuva nokaputeni weCity, uSiphamandla Ncanana, uyavuma ukuthi bebengakulindele ukufinyelela kulo mzuliswano womqhudelwano kodwa sezigawulwe zabekwa bayilindele iCasric. “Kusimangazile sonke ukufinyelela kwethu kulesi sigaba somqhudelwano, kodwa sisebenze kanzima ngakho kusifanele ukuba lapha. Wonke umuntu oyingxenye yeqembu uyaziqhenya ngesisakwenzile kuze kube manje,” kusho uNcanana. “Lokhu kusho lukhulu kithina badlali ikakhulukazi kwabaningi bethu abaqalayo ukufinyelela kulesi sigaba somqhudelwano, ngakho siyilambele impumelelo. Siyazi kodwa ukuthi akuzukuba lula ukubhekana neCasric Stars, ezolwa ngayo yonke indlela. Kodwa sikulindele ukubhekana nayo.” Ngakolunye uhlangothi, umqeqeshi nosihlalo weMilford, uXanti Pupuma, akakufihli ukulobizela kwakhe ukufinyelela kowamanqamu abhekane nelinye iqembu laseKZN. “Ngiyazi ukuthi ngike ngasho phambilini ukuthi ngibona iMilford neCasric kowamanqamu. Kodwa eqinisweni, ngaphakathi ekujuleni kwenhliziyo yami isifiso sami wukubona owamanqamu udlalwa amaqembu aseKZN. Uma kwenzeka lokho, angingabazi ukuthi siyoyigcwalisa iMoses Mabhida (Stadium) sikhombise abantu ukuthi akufanele kube yiKaizer Chiefs, Orlando Pirates noma iMamelodi Sundowns kuphela okufanele bagcwalise izinkundla.” Imidlalo yowandulela owamanqamu eNedbank Cup: Durban City v Casric Stars (Chatsworth Stadium) TS Galaxy v Milford FC (Solomon Mahlangu Stadium)

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe ISIKHWISHIKHWISHI se-Orbit College, uSiyabulela Mabele, owathathwa exinwe uGoodman Mosele weChippa United, ungomunye wabadlali abamqoka kuleli qembu elilwela ukusuka ezembeni OYISIKHWISHIKHWISHI somdlali wasophondweni lwesokudla kwi-Orbit College, uSiyabulela Mabele, uveza ukuthi sebekubeke emahlombe abo njengabadlali baleli qembu ukulihlenga ezembeni ukugwema lokho akuchaza njengosizi lokubuyela “ehlathini”. UMabele (22) odabuka e-Uitval, eMnambithi, ungomunye wabadlali ababambe iqhaza ekuphumeleleni kwe-Orbit ukukhushulelwa kwiBetway Premiership ngokudla umhlanganiso kuma-PSL Promotion Play-Offs ngesizini edlule. Kodwa isashisa insimbi kwi-Orbit okumanje ibalwa namaqembu amathathu asesishozini sezembe kwiPremiership, njengoba isendaweni ka-15 kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-18 emidlalweni ewu-22, ngaphezudlwana kweMagesi esemsileni ngamaphuzu awu-14. Emidlalweni eyisishiyagalombili elisalele, kubukeka libhekene nomqansa leli qembu laseRustenburg, kwazise lisazodlala namaqembu okubalwa kuwo AmaZulu FC, Stellenbosch, Orlando Pirates neKaizer Chiefs. Ngemuva kwekhefu leFifa, i-Orbit izobuyela ensimini ngomdlalo wasekhaya ezowudlala neChiefs eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha, ngoMsombuluko ngo-3 ntambama. Izithola iyodlalela umdlalo wayo wasekhaya eGqeberha nje, yingoba inkundla yayo yasekhaya, i-Olympia Park, eRustenburg, ebidlalela kuyona imidlalo yayo eminingi kule sizini, isalungiswa. “Khona sibhekene nesimo esinzima uma ubheka ukuthi emidlalweni emihlanu esigcine ukuyidlala sibuye nephuzu elilodwa kuphela.Lokho kusifakela ingcindezi yokuthi nakanjani kule midlalo elandelayo esisazoyidlala sibuye nawo amaphuzu. "Noma kungeke kubelula ukubuya namaphuzu aphelele kweminye kodwa kuzofanele sibuye nephuzu, okuyikhona okuzosisiza sisuke kule ndawo esikuyona,” kusho uMabele osashaye igoli elilodwa waba nesandla kwelilodwa emidlalweni ewu-17 ngenxa yokuhlushwa ukulimala. “Abaqeqeshi sebenze okuningi ukusikhuthaza nokusinika amasu kodwa izinto zingenzeki ngendlela esihlele ngayo kweminye imidlalo esihlulwe kuyona. "Ngakho sesikubeke emahlombe ethu manje njengabadlali ukuthi sililwele iqembu, abadlali abadala esinabo eqenjini yibona abafaka lowo moya wokuphokophelela ukulwela iqembu kuze kube ngumdlalo wokugcina. "Sisebenze kanzima ngesizini edlule silwela ukufaka iqembu kwiBetway Premiership ngakho asifuni ukuzithola osizini lokubuyela phansi ehlathini ngoba siyabanzi ubunzima bokudlala kulesiya sigaba seMotsepe Championship.” IMswenko Boys, eqeqeshwa uPogiso Makhoye, igqishe ngabadlali abanamava okubalwa kubona uRamahlwe Mphahlele, Brian Onyango, Ben Motshwari, noBradley Ralani, okubhekwe amava abo ekutakuleni iqembu.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMGADLI weMamelodi Sundowns, u-Iqraam Rayners, kulindeleke enze izinto zenzeke koweBetway Premiership neChippa United eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. UMGADLI weMamelodi Sundowns, u-Iqraam Rayners, uyanuqonda ubungozi bokubhekana neqembu elilwa nokubalekela izembe ngalesi sikhathi sesizini okuyingakho ekubeka ngokucacile ukuthi ngeke bayithathe kancane iChippa United. ISundowns esinqobe imidlalo eyisithupha yeBetway Premiershio ilandelana, izotholana phezulu neChippa kowePremiership ngoLwesihlanu ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. Lo mdlalo weSundowns neChippa udlalwa kusasa nje bekumele udlalwe ngo-Ephreli 28, kodwa ngenxa yokuxinwa kweSundowns wukuthothana kwemidlalo yayo yePremiership neyeCaf Champions League, ithathe isinqumo sokuwusondeza lo mdlalo wayo wasekhaya neChippa. Leli qembu lasePitoli elisembangweni wesicoco sePremiership nelisembhidlangweni wokuqhubeka nokwenza kahle nakwiChampions League njengoba selisesigabeni seyandulela owamanqamu alo mqhudelwano webhola lase-Afrika, linabadlali abayisikhombisa abebeseqenjini leBafana Bafana elisanda kudlala nePanama kweyobungani eThekwini naseKapa. Labo badlali nguRonwen Williams, Teboho Mokoena, Aubrey Modiba, Khulumani Ndamane, Khuliso Mudau, Jayden Williams noThemba “Mshishi” Zwane. “Kuhlale kunzima ukubhekana namaqembu avika izembe ngalesi sikhathi sesizini. Abadlali bawo balwela ukugcina imisebenzi yabo nenhlalakahle yemindeni yabo. Ngakho silindele umdlalo onzima kwiChippa kodwa okubalulekile kithina ukugcina umgqigqo, nokuqhubeka nokuwina imidlalo. Sithatha umdlalo ngamunye, okuyikho okubalulekile kithina njengamanje kule midlalo esele,” kusho uRayners. IChippa ibalwa namaqembu alwa nokusuka endaweni okudlalela kuyo izembe, njengoba isendaweni ka-13 kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-20, yehlukaniswe ngamaphuzu ayisithupha neMagesi FC esemsileni ngawu-14. AmaSandawana asendaweni yesibili kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu awu-50 emidlalwweni ewu-21, ehlukaniswe yiphuzu ne-Orlando Pirates esahlezi phezulu ngawu-51 emidlalweni ewu-20. Njengoba esele emuva ngomdlalo owodwa kwiPirates, amaSandawana uma enqoba kwiChippa kusasa yiwona azohlala phezulu kwi-log yePremiership. Ngemuva kwalo mdlalo wakusasa, azodlala neDurban City ngoLwesibili ngo-7.30 ebusuku eChatsworth Stadium, eThekwini. Azobe esebhekisa amabombo eTunisia ayobhekana ne-Esperance Tunis kowomlenze wokuqala wowandulela owamanqamu eChampions League ngo-Ephreli 12, bese edlala umlenze wesibili ePitoli ngo-Ephreli 18. Lezi zingqungqulu zasePitoli esezifinyelele kowandulela owamanqamu amasizini amathathu elandelana kwiChampions League, zinenselelo yokubhala kabusha umlando wazo kulo mqhudelwano. Ngesizini edlule zaguqiswa yiPyramids yase-Egypt kowamanqamu.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: IQEMBU labadlali beKaizer Chiefs Ladies elethulwe izolo, eDaveyton, eGauteng, nabaxhasi balo iBruma Logistics. IChiefs Ladies izodlala kwiSafa Gauteng Sasol League ngesizini ezoqala ka-2026 I-KAIZER Chiefs igcine isifezile isethembiso ngokwethula iqembu layo lebhola labesifazane, iKaizer Chiefs Ladies, ngemuva kwesikhathi ihlongoza ukuba neqembu labesifazane kwenye yamaligi ebhola labesifazane eNingizimu Afrika. Le ngqophamlando yokwethulwa ngokusemthethweni kweqembu labesifazane leChiefs yenzeke ngoLwesibili ntambama, eDaveyton, eGauteng. Leli qembu laseSoweto lizodlala kwiSafa Gauteng Sasol League ngesizini ka-2026, okulindeleke iqale ngoJulayi, kulandela ukuthenga isitifiketi seSprings Home Sweepers kaJoseph “Skheshe” Mkhonza, owake waba ngumqeqeshi weqembu lesizwe, iBanyana Banyana. UMkhonza unomlando omude neChiefs kwazise wayeyisihlabani saleli qembu ngeminyaka yo-1970 kuya ko-80. Nyakenye, ngoSepthemba, Amakhosi amemezela ubudlelwano bayo neHome Sweepers njengeqembu azosebenzisana nalo. Leli qembu leChiefs elizoqeqeshwa ngu-Unathi Mbena ozosizwa uJustice Khunou njengephini, libophele abadlali okubalwa kubo uMamello Makhabane owayengumdlali wasesiswini kwiBanyana, uZanele Kunyamane noKatlego Mohale abadlale ezikwatini ezincane zamaqembu esizwe. Kanti futhi libophele nabadlali abanamava okudlala esigabeni seHollywoodbets Super League, okuyiyona ligi enkulu eMzansi iChiefs Ladies ezozabalazela ukukhushulelwa kuyo ngesizini ezayo. “Lesi yisikhathi sokuziqhenya kwiKaizer Chiefs. Njengeqembu siyasiqonda isibopho sokuthwala ibhola laseNingizimu Afrika, ngakho lesi yisinyathelo esibheke ekuzinikeleni kwethu ekukhuliseni umdlalo webhola (labesifazane) ngendlela efanele. Ibhola labesifazane liyingxenye ebalulekile kwikusasa lebhola, nathi esifuna ukuba yingxenye yohambo lalo,” kusho usihlalo nomsunguli weChiefs, uKaizer Motaung, esitatimendeni seqembu. Amakhosi awagcinanga nje ngokwethula iqembu izolo, njengoba ethule nenkampani okuyiyona ezoba ngabaxhasi bayo, iBruma Logistics, okuyinkampani yamaloli. UJessica Motaung, oyi-marketing and commercial director, uthe lokhu kuyisinyathelo esimqoka ekuphendleni indlela yoqobo ebholeni labesifazane. “Ibhola labesifazane likhula ngokushesha emhlabeni jikelele neNingizimu Afika iyingxenye yalowo mshungu. "Sifuna abadlali besifazane bazibone benendawo eqenjini leKaizer Chiefs,” kusho uJessica. “Siyabonga kwiSafa ngokuqhubeka kwayo nokweseka ibhola labesifazane, noxhaso esilutholile njengeqembu kwiBrima Logistics. Abaxhasi badingeka kakhulu ekuthuthukiseni nasekukhuliseni ibhola labesifazane ezweni lethu,” kuqhuba uJessica oyiphini likamengameli weCaf African Clubs Association (ACA). Ngaphandle kokuhamba emiyalelweni yeCaf yokuba neqembu labesifazane, Amakhosi andisa isibalo samaqembu abesifazane angaphansi kwamaqembu eBetway Premiership, okuyiMamelodi Sundowns Ladies ne-TS Galaxy Queens abadlala kwiHollywoodbets Super League.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe USIHLALO nomqeqeshi weMilford FC, uXanti Pupuma, olubalubela ukubona owanqamu weNedbank Cup udlalwa ngamaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal USEPHUMELE obala ngesifiso sakhe sokubona amaqembu amabili aKwaZulu-Natal edlana imilala emdlalweni wamanqamu eNedbank Cup usihlalo nomqeqeshi weMilford FC, uXanti Pupuma, ezakhe ezizodudulana ne-TS Galaxy kowandulela owamanqamu. IMilford izodlalela ekuhambeni neGalaxy eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga, ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama. IDurban City izoba ngosokhaya kwiCasric Stars komunye wowandulela eChatsworth Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. IMilford neCasric badlala kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship, kanti kumanje babalwa namaqembu asembangweni wesicoco seligi yalesi sigaba esiphakela eseBetway Premieship. Ephawula ngokubhekana neGalaxy, uPupuma ubona kungase kube yikhubalo kwezakhe ukuthi bayogadulisana neqembu akholwa wukuthi akukho okutheni elikwaziyo ngabo. “Sibabonile ukuthi badlala kanjani. Badlala ngokusebenzisa umfutho kodwa okuyinto esingeke sihluleke ukumelana nayo. Angicabangi kukhona okuningi abakwaziyo ngathi. Ngakho nginethemba lokuthi oNkulunkulu bebhola bazosibheka,” kusho uPupuma ekhuluma nabezindaba esingamini nabezindaba eMhlathuze Sports Complex. UPupuma akakufihli ukulobizela kwakhe ukubhekana neCity uma kwenzeka kwenzeka ethela othulini iGalaxy esibayeni sayo eSolomon Mahlagu ngeSonto. “Ngiyazi ukuthi ngike ngasho phambilini ukuthi ngibona iMilford neCasric kowamanqamu. Kodwa eqinisweni, ngaphakathi ekujuleni kwenhliziyo yami isifiso sami wukubona owamanqamu udlala ngamaqembu aseKZN. Uma kwenzeka lokho, angingabazi ukuthi siyoyigcwalisa iMoses Mabhida (Stadium) sikhombise abantu akufanele kube yiKaizer Chiefs, Orlando Pirates noma iMamelodi Sundowns kuphela okufanele bagcwalise izinkundla.” Sekungumlando ukuthi iCasric neMilford baguqise amaqembu ePremiership abethenjiwe endleleni ebheke kweyandulela owamanqamu. IMilford iguqise iSekhukhune United kuma-quarterfinal, iCasric yawashisa ijezi AmaZulu FC, kanti ngaphambi kwalokho ithele othulini i-Orlando Pirates.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UNJABULO 'Vula Vala' Ngcobo, ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka nabayizethenjwa kwi-Asande FC egqishe ngeningi labadlali abasebancane kwiSafa KZN ABC Motsepe League IMENENJA ye-Asande FC, uMakhosonke Mhlongo, akayingabazi ukuthi ngesizini ezayo leli qembu eligqishe ngenqwaba yabadlali abasebancane lizokufaka ukushisa ezimbangini zalo kwiSafa KwaZulu-Natal ABC Motsepe League. I-Asande esendaweni yesithupha kwi-log, yilona qembu elisahlule uMvoti FC ozihola phambili ngamaphuzu kwi-log ka-Stream A njengoba inqobe ngo 1-0 ngesonto eledlule eBuffelsdale Ground, oThongathi. Ukwehlulwa koMvoti yi-Asande kuvulele iNjampela ithuba lokusondela ekuvaleni igebe njengoba yona ikwazile ukubuya namaphuzu amqoka inenebula Ulundi United ngo 5-1. UMvoti oqhwakele ngamaphuzu awu-50 sewehlukaniswe ngamaphuzu amathathu neNjampela esendaweni yesibili ngawu-47. “Siyiqembu elinabafana abaningi abasebancane, abasalambele ukuzakhela igama ebholeni. "Ngesizini edlule besivika izembe ngakho ukuba kule ndawo esikuyona njengamanje ngalesi sikhathi sesizini kusiqinisa idolo ngenqubekela phambili nangezinhloso esinazo njengeqembu. "gakho kule sizini inhloso yethu wukuthi siqede endaweni engcono kakhulu, bese ngesizini ezayo sakhela phezu kwalokhu esizobe sikufezile,” kusho uMhlongo. “Umvoti siwuhlule sidlala ngabadlali abayisishiyagalombili abaneminyaka engaphansi kuka-23 esibanikayo ithuba, hhayi ngoba siphoqwa yimithetho yeSafa. Abaqeqeshi esinabo, uQatha Shongwe noSiyabonga Mzila, bayakholelwa kubadlali abasebancane, bayabanika bonke ithuba. "Sikholwa wukuthi ukwehlula kwethu iqembu elinjengoMvoti elingagayelwa mphako kule sizini kuzokwenza umehluko omkhulu ekwenyuseni izinga lokuzethemba kubadlali bethu nasemidlalweni elandelayo esisazoyidlala.” Leli qembu lasoThongathi elizodlala ekuhambeni neGood Fellas kusasa ngo-3 ntabama, eMzimkhulu Turf, eMzimkhulu, linenselelo yokuhamba ezinyathelweni zoThongathi FC eyanyukela kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship kodwa yagcina idayiselwa iMilford FC ngaphambi kwesizini ka-2023/24. Imidlalo yeSafa KwaZulu-Natal ABC Motsepe League: NgoMgqibelo - Ngo-3pm: Summerfield Dynamos v Umzinto United (Road 1016 Field); Njampela FC v Durban Pioneers (Pongola Sugar Mill Field); Umvoti FC v Umlazi Young Lions (Greytown High School); Hellenic v Ulundi United (Mpanga Soccer Field); Good Fellas v Asande FC (Umzimkhulu Turf); Tornado v University of KZN FC (Siyabonga Sangweni Sports Complex) Chess FC v KwaMashu Durban Knights (Arbor Park); Mkhambathi FC v Falcons (Royal Ranch Soccer Field); Msinga United v Umshwathi United (Mzisho Stadium); FC Drakensberg v Ditlou FC (Lambert Park); Umgungundlovu United v Ethekwini Coastal (Wartburg Stadium); Newcastle Warriors v Newcastle All Stars (Paradise Field A)

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMDLALI wasophondweni lwesokudla kwiKaizer Chiefs, uGlody Lilepo, umqeqeshi wakhe amchaza njengomqoka kuleli qembu elilwela ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu kwi-log yeBetway Premiership UMQEQESHI weKaizer Chiefs, uCedric Kaze, uveza ubumqoka bukaGlody Lilepo oyibamba ezinhlangothini naphambili kuleli qembu elisemshikashikeni wokulwela ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu kwi-log yeBetway Premiership ezoyinika ilungelo kwiCaf Confederation Cup. ULilepo (28) ujoyine iChiefs maphakathi nesizini edlule esuka kwiValenciennes FC yaseFrance. Useshayele Amakhosi amagoli amqoka kwiPremiership nakwiCaf Confederation Cup kule sizini. Lo mgadli odabuka eDemocratic Republic of Congo (DRC) ngesizini yakhe yokuqala kuMakhosi ushaye amagoli ayisithupha, waba nesandla kwelilodwa emidlalweni engu-19 ayidlalile. Kule sizini useshaye inethi amahlandla ayisikhombisa emiqhudelwaneni ehlukene,  okungamathathu kwiPremiership, amane kwiConfederation Cup, waba nesandla kwamabili. “Ngikholwa wukuthi ungumdlali onamava kakhulu, udlalile emaqenjini amakhulu, futhi unamakhono amaningi. Ungumdlali okwazi ukudlala ezindaweni ezihlukene futhi uyashesha. Ngaphandle kokudlala ezinhlangothini, uyakwazi ukudlala njengomgadli njengoba edlalile sidlala neMagesi,  nasemizuzwini engu-20 sidlala neDurban City waze washaya negoli,” kusho uKaze odedelwe yiChiefs ukuyosiza eqenjini lesizwe laseBurundi njengoba kuyisonto lemidlalo yamazwe. “Uyakwazi ukugcina ibhola, futhi ungumdlali ongaxhamazeli uma esengaphakathi ebhokisini. Ababaningi abagadli abanjalo, abakwazi ukwenza njengaye. Igoli alishaye sidlala neDurban City, lapho ethathe khona amagxathu amabili ukungena endaweni efanele, kude nesitobha, yikho okungenza ngimthathe njengomdlali omqoka nokhethekile eqenjini.” ULilepo uyalingana ngamagoli nozakwabo ongumgadli, uFlavio Silva, yena onamahlanu kwiPremiership, elilodwa kwiNedbank Cup, nelilodwa kwiConfederation Cup. Bobabili, uLilepo noSilva bangabanye babadlali abamqoka kuMakhosi athembele kubona njengoba ekhombisa ukubuyelwa ngumgqigqo emidlalweni yakamuva  okuwabeka ethubeni lokugudluza AmaZulu FC endaweni yesithathu kwi-log njengoba esenemidlalo emibili asele ngayo. Amakhosi asendaweni yesine kwi-log yePremiership, azobuyela ensimini ngemuva kwekhefu leFifa neleNedbank Cup, ngokutholana phezulu ne-Orbit College ngo-Ephreli 6 eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ogcizelela ubumqoka bokuthi ezakhe zingawulahli umgqigqo njengoba sezibheke entanjeni ngombango weligi yeBetway Premiership UKHUMBUZE abadlali bakhe ngobumqoka bokungawulahli umgqigqo njengoba sezibheke kuMaliyethe umqeqeshi we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ezakhe ezisembangweni wesicoco seBetway Premiership oshisa phansi neMamelodi Sundowns. EZimnyama zibhudluze iTS Galaxy ngo 6-0 kowePremiership ngeSonto, eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit. Ukunqoba kwePirates kuyibuyisele esicongweni se-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu angu-51, ilandelwa yiMamelodi Sundowns ngawu-50. EZimnyama sezizihola phambili nangamagoli njengoba sezihlohle angu-40 emidlalweni engu-22. ISundowns ishaye inethi amahlandla angu-37 emidlalweni engu-21. Lokhu kwenza leli qembu laseSoweto kube yilona eselizihola phambili ngamagoli amaningi njengamanje kwiPremiership kule sizinini. ISundowns isele emuva ngomdlalo ezowudlala neDurban City ngo-Ephreli 7, eThekwini. “Ngibatshelile abafana ukuthi akukapheli (ngesicoco seligi). Sizolwa kuze kube sekupheleni kwesizini, ngemuva kwalokho sizobona ukuthi kwenzekani,” kusho u-Ouaddou. Ukuhlohla amagoli amaningi kwePirates emdlwalweni wayo neGalaxy yikho okumgeze igilo u-Ouaddou obekhala ngokwehlulwa ngamathuba kwabadlali bakhe emidlalweni edlule. “Ngiyacabanga bekungokokuqala siqedela ngendlela iningi amathuba esiwakhile ngakho namuhla (ngeSonto) kube usuku oluhle kithina. Kubalulekile ukushaya amagoli ngoba ekugcineni angaba wusizo ekupheleni kwesizini ngasohlangothini lomehluko wamagoli," usho kanje. Nakuba u-Ouaddou ejabule ngokuzinikela kwabadlali bakhe kodwa uncome kakhulu uRelebohile Mofokeng oshaye amagoli amathathu kulo mdlalo. Lokhu bekungokokuqala kusukela akhushulelwa esikimini esikhulu ngesizini ka-2022/2023. Ngesizini edlule uwine umklomelo weBetway Premiership Young Player of The Season. “Kubalulekile kuyena kodwa futhi kubalulekile naseqenjini. Lokhu kuzokwenyusa ukuzethemba kuyena, abone ukuthi usengakwazi ukudlala ezingeni eliphezulu. La magoli amathathu awashayile kufanele amkhombise ukuthi akukapheli, kusazofanele aqhubeke asebenze mhlawumbe aphinde ashaye amanye futhi amathathu ngokuzayo," kusho u-Ouaddou. EZimnyama zizobuyela ensimini ngemua kwekhefu leFifa neleNedbank Cup ngomdlalo wasekhaya neLamontville Golden Arrows ngo-Ephreli 7 e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-PETER Muindi waseKenya, odle umhlanganiso ku-42.2km weHarry Gwala District Marathon ephahlwe yiMeya kaMasipala wesiFunda, uZamo Nxumalo nePhini layo, uNosisa Jojozi, iMeya waseMzimkhulu, uJabu Mzizi neMeya kamasipala u-Johannes Phumani Phungula noNgqongqoshe wezeSayensi, uDkt Blade Nzimande Image: SIBUSISO MDLALOSE USIHLALO we-Genius Athletic Club engabahleli beHarry Gwala District Marathon, uThemba Gumede, ayimkhathazi eyokwenyuka kwesibalo sabagijimi baseKenya okugcine kuyibona abadle umhlanganiso kulo mjaho izolo ekuseni. Umjaho ubusuka eHighflats uyophelela eMzimkhulu TVET College, eMzimkhulu. Ebangeni lika-42.2km umhlanganiso, udliwe nguPeter Muindi waseKenya, weMaxed Elite Club ngesikhathi esiwu-2:16:54, isibili kwaba uJobo Khatoane waseLesotho, naye ongoweMaxed Elite ngo-2:19:00, isithathu kwaba uSimon Mwangi waseKenya, ongaphansi kweMaxed Elite ngo-2:20:07. Kwabesifazane kuhlabane uRholex Kogo waseKenya, we-AmaRavens Club ngo-2:39:16, isibili kwaba nguJenet Mbhele, woMzimkhulu Striders ngo-2:50:53, isithathu kwaba nguMathane Nhlabathi weMaxed Elite ngo-2:54:08. Ku-21km no-10km kunqobe izintokazi zaseKenya, uWinny Biwott noRachael Mbao ngokwehlukana. UMuidi noKogo bahlomule ngo-R60 000 ngamunye kwabesilisa nabesifazane ku-42.2km ngokwehlukana, ku-21km no-10km bagoduka no-R10 000 no-R5 000 ngokwehlukana. "Kwezokugijima njengoba siphethwe ngu-World Athletics, Athletics South Africa noKZN Athletics, la esifundazweni sakithi, umgijimi unelungelo lokugijima kunanoma yimuphi umjaho emhlabeni. "Ngakho umdlalo wokugijima ungumdlalo ongabandlululi ngoba umgijimi ugijima ngayedwana, yingakho uthola nabagijimi bangaphandle bezogijima la. Bona-ke banenhloso ngokuzogijima lapha. Bayazi ukuthi ngokugijima imijaho yalapha bayazuza ngoba imali yaseNingizimu Afrika kubona iphindaphindeka kashumi. Lokho-ke kuyinselelo kubagijimi bakithi ngokufanele bakwenze ukukhuphula izinga lokuziqeqesha. Ngakho-ke angiyiboni inkinga ngabagijimi bangaphandle ngoba ukugijima kwabo lo mjaho kwenyusa izinga lomjaho kuthuthukise, kubeke nasebalazweni indawo yakithi," kusho uGumede. OyiMeya yaseHarry Gwala, uZamo Nxumalo, uveze ukuthi nakuba bejabula ngokwenyuka kwesasa nezinga lo mjaho kodwa ubona kufanele benze kangcono ngasohlangothini lwabagijimi besifunda iHarry Gwala kulo mjaho. Nyakenye, uSinethemba Ntshangase waseMzimkhulu udle umhlanganiso ku-42.2km kwabesilisa kodwa nonyaka akabuyanga ukuzovikela isicoco ngenxa yokulimala. "Sifuna sengathi irandi lalapha eHarry Gwala lingajikeleza kabili noma kathathu kulesi sifunda ngaphambi kokuphumela ngaphandle. Okusijabulisayo ukwanda kwamakilabhu abagijimi lapha eHarry Gwala, okuyiGenius Athletics Club, Umzikhulu Striders, iXobho Athletics. Sizowabiza la makilabhu sibe nomhlangano nawo ukuzohlaziya sibheke indlela angalekeleleka ngayo ukuze kwenyuswe izinga lokwenza kwawo kulo mjaho ngoba ngumjaho osezingeni lona, siyancintisana kuwona," kusho uNxumalo.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQSESHI weMilford FC, uXanti Pupuma, ezakhe ezibuyele esicongweni se-log yeMotsepe Foundation Championship ngokunabisa iBaroka FC ngempelasonto, eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay I-MILFORD FC neCasric Stars okungamaqembu asembangweni wesicoco seligi yeMotsepe Foundation Championship athumele umlayezo oshubile ezimbangini zawo enqoba ngembudlu yamagoli. IMilford ibuyele esicongweni se-log yeMotsepe Championship ngokunenebula iBaroka FC ngo 5-0 ngoMgqibelo, eMhlathuze Sports Complex kanti ngoLwesihlanu, iCasric yenze esifanayo ibhambabula iKruger United ngo 4-0 kowabakhaya baseMpumalanga, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. IMilford ibambene neKruger esicongweni ngamaphuzu angu-40 kodwa leli qembu laseRichards Bay liphezulu ngenxa yamagoli. Iyisishiyagalombili imidlalo esalele amaqembu adlala kulesi sigaba - ngaphandle kweBlack Leopards neGomora United - ngaphambi kokusonga le sizini. ICasric eqeqeshwa uJoseph “Bucs” Mthombeni ivivela ukuyodudulana neDurban City emdlalweni wowandulela owamanqamu eNedbank Cup ngo-Ephreli 4, eChatsworth Stadium, eThekwini. Ifinyelele kulesi sigaba somqhudelwano ngokukhipha amaqembu amabili eBetway Premiership, i-Orlando Pirates naMaZulu kwi-Last 16 nakuma-quarterfinal ngokwehlukana. IMilford eqeqeshwa ngusihlalo wayo, uXanti Pupuma, izobhekana ne-TS Galaxy komunye wowandulela owamanqamu eNedbank ngo-Ephreli 5, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium. Womabili la maqembu, iMilford neCasric, abaphathi nabaqeqeshi bawo sebephumele obala kaningi ngokuseqhulwini kubona kule sizini okuwukudla isicoco seligi yeMotsepe Championship. Nokho abafuni ukuzithela ngabandayo nakwiNedbank Cup esike yanqotsha yiqembu elidlala kwiChampionship. Ngemuva kwemidlalo yeyandulela owamanqamu, iMilford neCasric bazogadulisana emdlalweni obhekwe ngabomvu ngo-Ephreli 8, eMhlathuze Sports Complex. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, iCape Town City nayo engelinye lamaqembu asesembangweni wesicoco seChampioship, iphinde yalahla amaphuzu ibambana ngo 1-1 neVenda FC ngoMgqibelo, eThohoyandou Stadium, eVenda. Emidlalweni emithathu yakamuva, iCity ibuye namaphuzu amabili kuphela ibambana ngo 2-2 neMilford ngaphambi kokubhaxabulwa yiHighbury ngo 3-1. Nokho isahlezi endaweni yesine kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-37. Imiphumela yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Casric Stars 4-0 Kruger United; Highbury 0-0 Black Leopards; Venda FC 1- 1 Cape Town City; Milford FC 5-0 Baroka; Leicesterford City 1-1 Gomora United; The Bees 3-0 University of Pretoria; Hungry Lions 2-1 Midlands Wanderers

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMDLALI weKaizer Chiefs, uMfundo Vilakazi, ejabulela igoli alishaye ngesikhathi bebhekene neMagesi FC eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI weKaizer Chiefs, uCedric Kaze, udonse ngendlebe abadlali bakhe ngokuthi bangadudwa wukunqoba imidlalo emibili yeBetway Premiership ilandelana. IChiefs iguqise iMagesi FC ngo 2-0 wamagoli kaWandile Duba noMfundo Vilakazi kowePremiership ngoMgqibelo, eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. Leli qembu lishaya iMagesi nje, belishaye iDurban City ngo 1-0 ngesonto eledlule. Le miphumela ibuyisele Amakhosi emathubeni okuqeda endaweni yesithathu kwi-log yePremiership ezoyinika ilungelo lokubuyela kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo. Amakhosi anqobe le midlalo emibili esebuya esibhaxwini semine ilandelana. "Ngikholwa wukuthi ubunzima esidlule kubona bebudalwa wukulinyalelwa kakhulu ngabadlali nokumiswa ngenxa yamakhadi kodwa ukwenza kahle kwabadlali abamqoka eqenjini emidlalweni ilandelana kuletha uzinzo esiludingayo," kusho uKaze oqeqesha ngokubambisana noKhalil Ben Youssef. "Siyithimba labaqeqeshi besazi ukuthi kungani sibhekene nesimo esinzima futhi okuhle ukuthi sonke besibeke umoya phansi kanti namanje sidinga ukubeka phansi umoya singajabuli kakhulu ngokuwina nje imidlalo emibili. Sidinga ukusebenza kanzima sigcine umgqigqo." UDuba oshaye igoli lakhe lokuqala kule sizini, kwenza uKaze akholwe wukuthi lokhu kuzokwenyusa izinga lokuzethemba kulo mdlali "Ukhombisile kusukela ngesizini edlule ukuthi ungumdlali oseqophelweni. Siyamdinga futhi ngikholwa wukuthi uyabuya ngemuva kokucwila kwakhe kweminye imidlalo. Igoli alishayile besilidinga, yingakho singamdlalisanga njengomgadli ngoba besazi ukuthi uma edlala kule ndawo abeyidlala uzokwazi ukungena ebhokisini abe nesikhala esikhulu sokuqedela umsebenzi ngoba uyashesha, uyagijima. Igoli lakhe ngikholwa wukuthi lizonyusa ukuzethemba kuyena." Lo mqeqeshi osabambile akayishayanga mkhuba eyokubuzwa ngokuthi uma ehamba ekupheleni kwale sizini ngabe kuyobe sekusho ukushiya engasawuphothulanga umsebenzi awuqalile nozakwabo kuleli qembu. "Angikholwa yilokho. Kusele imidlalo engu-10, kusekuningi okusazokwenzisa kuze kuphele isizini. Ngiyabonga.” Amakhosi azobuyela ensimini ngomdlalo wasekuhambeni ne-Orbit College ngo-Ephreli 6 eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: ISITOBHA seMamelodi Sundowns, uKhuliso Mudau, kulindeleke ukuthi siqinisekise ukuqina kodonga lwasemuva nozakwabo uma sebebhekene neStade Malien emdlalweni womlenze wesibili weCaf Champions League eMali Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UKUDLULA ngehubo kweMamelodi Sundowns kwiStade Malien yaseMali emdlalweni womlenze wokuqala wama-quarterfinal eCaf Champions League, akuyibeki nje kuphela ethubeni lokwedlulela kweyandulela owamanqamu kodwa kuyinselelo yokuqopha omunye umlando ngokuwunqoba okwesibili lo mqhudelwano. ISundowns izongena enkundleni kowomlenze wesibili igcwele ukuzethemba kwazise inenebule iMalien ngo 3-0 kowokuqala ePitoli ngesonto eledlule. AmaBrazilians ahlalelwe yijoka lokuqedela umsebenzi eStade du 26 Mars, eBamako, ngeSonto ngo-6 ntambama. Ukufinyelela kweSundowns kowandulela owamanqamu sekujwayelekile kuyona. Yafinyelela kulesi sigaba ngesizini ka-2018/19, 2022/23 neka-2023/24. Ngesizini edlule ka-2024/25 idlulele kowamanqamu okokuqala kusukula ngo-2016 eyanqoba ngawo iChampions League. Nokho, sekungumlando ukuthi iguqiswe yiPyramids yase-Egypt ngo 3-2 kowamanqamu. Phezu kokuba izinto kubukeka ziwavuna amaSandawana ngaphambi komdlalo wakusasa neBlancs de Bamako kodwa umqeqeshi wawo, uMiguel Cardoso, ukuqonda kahle ukubaluleka kokuqapha eqolo njengonwabu kwezakhe ukugwema ingozi yokuphendukelwa yileli qembu laseMali esibayeni salo. Lo mqeqeshi ukubeke kwacaca ngemuva komdlalo wangeledlule womlenze wokuqala ukuthi abakawuqedi umsebenzi, exwayisa ngokuthi umdlalo wabo womlenze wesibili naleli qembu laseMali uzohluka kakhulu ngoba inkundla izobe yomile nokuzokwenza kungabi lula ukudlala ibhola abalijwayele elidla utshani, nelisheshayo. Kusukela ngo-2016 egcina ukunqoba iChampions League, amaSandawana awabanga nayo inqubekela phambili kulo mqhudelwano ephuma kuma-quarterfinal amahlandla amane okubalwa nokuphuma esigabeni samaqoqo ngo-2018. Ngakho ukuqashwa kukaCardoso ngoDisemba ka-2024 kwakuyindlela yabaphathi yokukhombisa ukuthi bafuna ukuphinda okwango-2016. Kule sizini iqonge kakhulu ingcindezi kulo mqeqeshi odabuka ePortugal ukuthi anqobe iChampions League ukuze ageze igilo abalandeli baleli qembu asebekhombise kaningi ukuthi abayizwa indaba yakhe.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMGADLI weLamontville Golden Arrows, uJunior Dion, osethubeni lokudla umklomelo wamagoli kwiBetway Premiership ekupheleni kwesizini ka-2025/2026 Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI weLamontville Golden Arrows, uManqoba Mngqithi, ubona umgadli wakhe uJunior Dion esazoba nenselelo embangweni womklomelo wokushaya amagoli amaningi kwiBetway Premiership, i-Lesley Manyathela Golden Boot. UDion nguyena osazihola phambili kwiPremiership ngawu-12 emidlalweni engu-19 kule sizini. Ulandelwa ngu-Iqraam Rayners weMamelodi Sundowns ngawu-10, kube nguBradley Grobler weSekhukhune United ngayisishiyagalombili. Maphakathi nesonto, i-Arrows iphume nephuzu ibambana ngo 1-1 neStellenbosch FC eMlaza. Ngalokhu, Abafana Bes'thende banyukele endaweni yesishiyagalombili kwi-log. NgoMgqibelo ngo-3.30 ntambama bazobhekana neSekhukhune United, eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza. “Kungaba mnandi ukubona uDion eqhubeka nokuzihola phambili ngamagoli kodwa futhi sibe siqhubeka nokuba ngcono ekuhlaseleni kwethu njengeqembu. Kuyajabulisa futhi ukuthi uNdlovu noKhumalo baphakathi kwabadlali abasahamba phambili kwiPSL (Premiership) ngokwakha amagoli. Asibheki nje kuphela ukuthi uDion nguyena ohamba phambili ngamagoli kodwa sibheka nokuthi mangaki amagoli akhiwe ngabadlali bethu. Kodwa iqiniso wukuthi unenselelo enzima (uDion) kwabanga nabo umklomelo wokushaya amagoli, kubadlali abanjengo-Iqraam Rayners. "Ngithandazela ukuthi aqhubeke nefomu yakhe, angalimali angatholi namakhadi ngoba uma esefomini wenza kahle, uyalisiza iqembu. Kodwa ngijabule ukuthi usahamba phambili ngamagoli kwiligi," kusho uMngqithi. UMngqithi kumqinisa idolo ukungena kwezakhe kwi-Top 8, yize ekuqonda ukuthi iSiwelele isengabagudluza uma inqoba kwi-Orbit College ngeSonto. ISiwelele isenethuba lokusisusa kule ndawo esikuyo uma ingawina emdlalweni wayo olandelayo ngoba isasele emuva ngomdlalo owodwa kodwa okubalulekile kithina ukuqhubeka nokubamba umgqigqo singabe sisaphuma kwi-Top 8," kusho uMngqithi.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-OLISAH Ndah Image: STELLENBOSCH FACEBOOK UMQEQESHI weStellenbosch FC, uGavin Hunt, uveza ukuthi sekuseduze abonakale enkundleni umdlali wasemuva, u-Olisah Ndah, ongakadlali kuleli qembu alijoyine ngoFebhuwari esuka kwi-Orlando Pirates. UNdah (28) oyibamba maphakathi emuva, uhlukane nePirates abesedlale kuyona amasizini amane. Wafika eMzansi ngesizini ka-2021/2022 kuleli qembu laseSoweto esuka kwi-Akwa United yaseNigeria. KwiStellies, ujoyine uTshegofatso Mabasa obolekiswe ngeZimnyama kuleli qembu laseStellenbosch kuze kuphele isizini. IStellebosch idlale ngokulingana ngo 1-1 neLamontville Golden Arrows emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngoLwesithathu eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza. “Akukho nkinga ngo-Olisah, ukuthi nje ufike kithi esenesikhathi agcina ukudlala. Ngakho ubengakabi qatha ngokwanele. Kodwa usebenza kanzima ukuze naye athole indawo eqenjini njengabadlali abadlala endaweni ayidlalayo uMoloisana (Thabo) noLebusa (Mosa). Maduze uzobonakala, mhlawumbe ngoMgqibelo,” kushaya ngamafuphi uHunt. UNdah ubanga ijezi noMoloisana, Lebusa, Athenkosi Mcaba, Henri Stanic, noSiviwe Nkwali odongeni lwasemuva maphakathi nendawo. IStellenbosch engayazi induku emidlalweni eyisithupha yakamuva, idlale ngokulingana kwemithathu. Isendaweni yeshumi kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu angu-25 emidlalweni engu-21. “Akufanele ngabe sikule ndawo esikuyona kodwa ngenxa yokulahla kwethu amaphuzu sizithola sikuyona. Imidlalo iseminingi, ngithi iyisishiyagalolunye uma ngingaphosisi esele. Wona umsebenzi usemningi kodwa sisenalo ithuba lokuthola amaphuzu siqede endaweni engcono kwi-log ekupheleni kwesizini,” kuqhuba uHunt ofice leli qembu livika izembe ethatha izintambo kuSteve Barker ekupheleni kukaDisemba. IStellies izotholana phezulu neChippa United ngoMgqibelo ngo-3.30 ntambama e-Athlone Stadium, eKapa.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMDLALI weCasric Stars, uLelethu Skelem, ezakhe ezizotholana phezulu neKruger United kowabakhaya baseMpumalanga koweMotsepe Foundation Championship kusasa ntambama eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga UMDLALI wasophondweni lwesokudla kwiCasric Stars, uLelethu Skelem, uyavuma ukuthi ukulahla kwabo amaphuzu emidlalweni yabo emibili yakamuva kubaqongisele ingcindezi yokuthi babuye nawo kumnyama kubomvu amaphuzu emidlalweni elandelayo abasazoyidlala ukuze bengaphumi embangweni wesicoco seligi. ICasric izotholana phezulu neKruger United emdlaweni wabakhaya baseMpumalanga weMotsepe Foundation Championship ngoLwesihlanu ngo-3.30 ntambama eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Iza kulo mdlalo nje, iCasric ilahle amaphuzu emidlalweni emibili yakamuva. Ngemuva kokushaya AmaZulu ngo 2-1 kuma-quarterfinal eNedbank Cup, ishaywe yi-University of Pretoria ngo 2-1, yadlala ngokulingana ngo 1-1 neLerumo Lions ngeledlule. Lokhu kuyehlisele endaweni yesihlanu kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-35 emidlalweni engu-21. Ihlukaniswe ngamaphuzu amahlanu neKruger okuyiyona eqhwakele kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-40. “Kufanele sizisole thina ngokulahla kwethu amaphuzu kule midlalo emibili esiyidlale namaTuks neLerumo ngoba lokhu sekusifakele ingcindezi enkulu yokuthi emidlalweni elandelayo esisazoyidlala nakanjani siwathole amaphuzu okubalwa nalo esiyowudlala neKruger Siyazi ukuthi umdlalo esizowudlala neKruger kuzoba ngumdlalo onzima, ikakhulukazi njengoba kungumdlalo wabakhaya. Sobabili singamaqembu asembangweni weligi,” kusho uSkelem. “Kodwa kuyasiphoqa ukuthi sibuye nawo amaphuzu kulo mdlalo ngoba ukulahla kwethu amanye amaphuzu kuzosifakela enye ingcindezi. Kule midlalo eyisishiyagalolunye esele kuningi okusengenzeka, ngakho asikalilahli nakancane ithemba ngokuba sembangweni weligi. Okubalulekile manje wukugwema ukulahla amaphuzu, ngoba yikho okungasifaka enkingeni.” Umdlalo weCasric neKruger ufana nowamagqubu kwazise emzuliswaneni wokuqala iKruger yathela isibhaxu sika 3-2 kwiCasric. ICasric esidlale amahlandla amabili kuma-PSL Promotion Play Offs, isemaqenjini amane asazodlala kweyandulela owamanqamu yeNedbank. Izodlala neDurban City, kuthi iMilford idlale neTS Galaxy. “Ngesizini edlule sidlale kuma-Play Offs, nakule sizini sisenethuba lokuwadlala yize inhloso yethu enkulu kuwukuwina iligi. NakwiNedbank Cup siyafuna ukwenza kahle, ngakho ngeke sithi sesihambe ibanga elingaka, saze safinyelela kowandulela owamanqamu, bese sizithela ngabandayo ngoba sithi sibheke iligi," kusho uSkelem. Imidlalo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship NgoLwesihlanu - Ngo-3.30pm: Highbury v Black Leopards (Gelvandale Stadium); Casric Stars v Kruger United (Solomon Mahlangu Stadium) NgoMgqibelo - Ngo-3.30pm: Venda FC v Cape Town City (Thohoyandou Stadium); Leicesterford City v Gomora United (Dobsonville Stadium); Milford FC v Baroka (Umhlathuze Sports Complex) NgeSonto - Ngo-3.30pm: Hungry Lions v Midlands Wanderers (Mxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium); The Bees v University Of Pretoria (KaNyamazane Stadium)

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMDLALI waMaZulu, uHendrick Ekstein, edlula kuSibangani Zulu weRichards Bay FC ngaphambi kokushaya igoli elinqobise Usuthu emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX IPHINI lomqeqeshi waMaZulu, uSimo Dladla, libalule ubomqoka bamava abadlali baleli qembu, uHendrick "Pule" Ekstein noThabiso Kutumela, abalishayele amagoli ngesikhathi lihlula iRichards Bay FC emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngoMgqibelo. AmaZulu ashaye iRichards Bay ngo 2-1 eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. Amagoli kaKutumela no-Ekstein yiwona aqinisekise ukuthi AmaZulu aqoqa amaphuzu amathathu, aqhubeka nokuhlala emshungwini wamaqembu amahlanu aphezulu kwi-log yePremiership. “Besesidlale imidlalo emihlanu (empeleni emine) singawini, ngakho bekubalulekile ukuthi sibuyise isithunzi. Besiwadinga kakhulu la maphuzu amathathu ukubuyisa ukuzethemba kwethu, siqhubeke nomgqigqo wokufeza umgomo wethu wesizini wokuqeda ku-Top 4,” kusho uDladla. “Sineqembu elinabadlali abaningi abasebancane ngakho ukuba nabadlali abanamava njengo-Ekstein kuyalisiza iqembu. Akwenzile kulo mdlalo yilokho ebesikulindele kuye njengoba enzile nakweminye imidlalo eminingi elitakula iqembu. Unamava kakhulu futhi ukhaliphile. "Ezindaweni ezithile eqenjini sinabadlali abanamava njengoKutumela, endaweni kaNgwenya (Thandolwenkosi) osadonsa isigwebo samakhadi. Yize kusithokozisa ukusishayela kwakhe nokukhombisa ukukhula kodwa usemncane uNgwenya, maningi amathuba awalahlayo okushaya amagoli. Ngakho amava kaKutumela no-Ekstein alisizile iqembu, ikakhulukazi njengoba sisalwa nenselelo yokuqedela amathuba esiwakhayo phambi kwamapali." U-Ekstein (35) oqokwe njengomdlali ovelele emdlalweni wangoMgqibelo, useshaye amagoli ayisikhombisa, waba nesandla kwamane emidlalweni engu-25 asayidlalile kule sizini kuyo yonke imiqhudelwano. UKutumela obuya ekulimaleni, ushaye igoli lakhe lokuqala kule sizini obekuyingcwenga ye-free kick. Usuthu luzobuyela ensimini ngomdlalo wasekuhambeni nePolokwane e-Old Peter Mokaba Stadium ePolokwane, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3.30 ntambama.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe ULUVO Manyonga oseqenjini labagijimi abayisishiyagalombili abazomela iNingizimu Afrika kuma-World Athletics Indoor Championships, ePoland LIGQISHE ngoLuvo Manyonga iqembu labagijimi abayisishiyagalombili elizomela iNingizimu Afrika emqhudelwaneni we-World Athletics Indoor Championships, ePoland. I-Athletics South Africa (ASA) imemezele iqembu labagijimi abayisishiyagalombili elizoyibamba emabangeni ehlukene okubalwa u-60m, u-300m, i-long jump ne-shot put, kulo mqhudelwano ozoqala ngoLwesihlanu usongwe ngeSonto, eKujawy Pomorze, ePoland. Leli qembu lihlanganisa abagijimi abayisikhombisa besilisa noyedwa wesifazane okunguMine de Klerk ozoyibamba kwi-shot put. UManyonga (35) ukhuza ibuya emiqhudelwaneni yomhlaba ngemuva kokudonsa isigwebo seminyaka eyisikhombisa emisiwe ngenxa yokutholakala nezikhuthazi ezingavumelekile emzimbeni nokwephula imigomo ye-Covid-19. Le nsephe ye-long jump yadla umhlanganiso kwi-World Championship ka-2017 eLondon, nakumaCommonwealth Games e-Australia ngo-2018, yabuya nesiliva kuma-Olympic Games ka-2016 eBrazil, nelinye isiliva kwi-World Athletics Indoor Championships ngo-2018 e-England. Ijoyinwa ngezinye izibabuli ezisencane okubalwa kuzo uKarabo Letebele (19) noTemosi Masikane (19) abazoyibamba ku-60m nakwi-long jump ngokwehlukana. ULetebele ubeke isikhathi esingu-6.53 seconds eTexas, e-USA, ngoFebhuwari, kwala kancane afice irekhodi lika-6.48 elisaphethwe nguMorne Nagel waseNingizimu Afrika aliqopha ngo-2002. Ebangeni lika-3000m kubhekwe uLuan Munnik njengoba eshaye isikhathi esingu-7:38:35 ngoFebhuwari eLievin, eFrance. Ku-60m kubhekwe uFranco le Roux noMondray Barnard. Kwi-shot put yabesilisa kubhekwe u-Aiden Smith ongumpetha we-World University Games. UDe Klerk kwi-shot put kwabesifazane, usanda kwenza kahle muva nje ku-18.48m e-Indiana, ngoFebhuwari. Iqembu elizomela iNingizimu Afrika kwi-World Athletics Indoor Championships: Karabo Letebele (men) 60m, Luan Munnik (men) 3000m, Franco Le Roux (men) 60mH, Mondray Barnard (men) 60mH, Luvo Manyonga (men) Long Jump, Temoso Masikane (men) Long Jump, Aiden Smith (men) Shot Put, Mine De Klerk (women) Shot Put.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMDLALI wasemuva othembisayo kuMaZulu FC, uWandile Dube, umqeqeshi waleli qembu anxusa ukuba angasheshi aqhathaniswe noMbekezeli Mbokazi wodumo kwiBafana Bafana UMQEQESHI waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, usenxuse ukuba angafakelwa ingcindezi umdlali wakhe wasemuva, uWandile Dube, ngokushesha aqhathaniswe noMbekezeli “TLB” Mbokazi ngenxa yokungafani kwezimo ababhekane nazo emaqenjini abo ngokwehlukana. UDube (21) ungomunye wabadlali abakhushulelwe esikimini esikhulu saMaZulu ekuqaleni kwale sizini esuka kweleDStv Diski Challenge. Emidlalweni eyisishiyagalombili asayidlalile, lo mdlali wasemuva maphakathi nendawo odlala ngonyawo lwesokunxele, usaqale emibili.  Uqale koweligi bebhekene neMagesi FC nakoweNedbank Cup bedlala neCasric Stars, evala isikhala sikaKeagan Allan obesalimele. “UDube ungumdlali othembisayo kakhulu. Uwuhlobo olungandile (lwabadlali). Angaba ngumdlali okhethekile. Udinga isikhathi, umdlali onjengaye akudingeki aphonswe emphandwini wezingonyama ngenkathi iqembu lingenzi kahle. "Udinga ukudlaliswa uma izinto zihamba kahle eqenjini ukuze ezokwazi ukuzinza kahle ngoba uma ulindela lukhulu kuyena, umfakela ingcindezi, uzokwenza amaphutha angase amakhe noma ambulale. "Yingakho kule sizini silinde isikhathi esifanele ukumdlalisa. Uma ungabheka amaphutha awenzile kweminye imidlalo asayidlalile ngamaphutha angenziwa yinoma yimuphi umdlali osemncane afundayo kuwona,” kusho uZwane. “Angingabazi ukuthi unekusasa eliqhakazile. Okungikhathazayo nje wukuthi sekukhona asebeqala ukumqhathanisa nabanye abadlali abanjengoMbokazi, okuyilapho-ke iqala khona inkinga. "Uma uqhathanisa isimo sikaMbokazi nesikaDube sihluke kakhulu ngoba ekufikeni kukaMbokazi kwiPirates ufike iqembu liwina, linabadlali abanamava (odongeni lwasemuva) okudlala eqenjini lesizwe. Abadlali abanjengoSibisi (Nkosinathi) osedlale imidlalo engu-200 nangaphezulu okubalwa  nemidlalo yeqembu lesizwe. "Bese ubheka isimo sikaDube, ofike eqenjini elakhiwa kabusha elisazama ukuthola umgqigqo. Uma enza amaphutha iqembu lingawini, uzoqala azingabaze, okuyikona lokho esizama ukukugwema. Ngakho simfaka kancane, kancane ukuze ajwayele futhi engikholwa wukuthi simfake ngesikhathi esifanele kulimele uKeagan.” UMbokazi okhushulelwe esikimini esikhulu sePirates maphakathi nesizini edlule, ufike eqenjini lesizwe, iBafana Bafana, wenza ezibukwayo. Sekungumlando ukuthi usegijima kwiChicago Fire yase-USA emsayinise ngoJanuwari.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMQEQESHI weRichard Bay FC , uPapi Zothwane Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UBONA umbango weligi yeBetway Premiership phakathi kwe-Orlando Pirates neMamelodi Sundowns ungase ufinyelele emidlalweni yokugcina yokusonga isizini umqeqeshi weRichards Bay FC, uPapi Zothwane. IPirates ibuyele esicongweni se-log lapho ibambene khona neSundowns ngamaphuzu angu-47 ngemiuva kwemidlalo engu-20 iqembu ngalinye. Iyishumi imidlalo esalele la maqembu asembangweni wesicoco seligi ngaphambi kokusonga le sizini ka-2025/26. IPirates izothola ithuba lokuvula igebe njengoba izobhekana neSiwelele FC e-Amstel Arena, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3.30 ntambama. ISundowns isamile kweyeligi yakuleli kule mpelasonto njengoba idlale umlenze wokuqala we-quarterfinal yeCaf Champions League neStade Malien yaseMali eLoftus Versefeld, ePitoli, ngoLwesihlanu ebusuku, yawunqoba ngo 3-0. “Kunzima ukuqagela ngombango weligi phakathi kwePirates neSundowns ngoba nanoma yiliphi iqembu elisazodlala nelinye lalawa womabili lizodlala ngokuzimisela. Womabili la maqembu anabadlali abaseqophelweni eliphezulu futhi ayayiwina imidlalo yawo (yeligi) nokubukeka ezoqhubeka nokwenza ngendlela efanayo. Ngokubona kwami kungase kucace ngemidlalo yokugcina yesizini ukuthi yiliphi phakathi kwala maqembu elingagcina libe ngompetha beligi yePremiership,” kusho uZothwane. UZothwane ukhuluma kanjena nje, emasontweni adlule abaqeqeshi abahlukene okubalwa kubona uManqoba Mngqithi no-Eric Tinkler bayichithile iPirates embangweni weligi, bayinika iSundowns. IBay esendaweni yeshumi kwi-log yePremiership, izodlala naMaZulu FC kowePremiership ngoMgqibelo ngo-6 ntambama, eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. “Okubalulekile wukuthi sikhuthaze abadlali bethu ukuthi bathathe okuhle abakwenze kulo mdlalo wethu nePirates basebenzise khona emidlalweni yethu elandelayo, bese sigwema namaphutha esiwenzayo. Laba bafana bayinike umdlalo onzima iPirates, ngakho lokhu kufanele kube yisikhuthazi kubona njengoba siyodlala naMaZulu. Njengamanje okumqoka kithi wukuthi silwele ukungena kwi-Top 8, singahlehleli endaweni yezembe,” kuqhuba uZothwane.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI weMilford FC, uXanti Pupuma, omagange ngokubona kwanda isibalo samaqembu eBetway Premiership eRichards Bay UKUFINYELELA kowamanqamu nokunqoba indebe yeNedbank Cup kungaba yibhonasi kusihlalo nomqeqeshi weMilford FC, uXanti Pupuma, njengoba ekubeka ngokucacile ukuthi okusemqoka kuyena ukubona leli qembu landisa isibalo samaqembu eBetway Premiership, eRichards Bay. IMilford edlala esigabeni seMotsepe Foundation Championship izibekisele indawo kweyandulela owamanqamu eNedbank Cup ngokushaya iSekhukhune United ngo 3-2 kumaphenathi ngoMgqibelo ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Leli qembu laseRichards Bay elisethubeni lokuzoqophela owalo umlando kwiNedbank, selisele neCasric, nayo edlala kwiMotsepe Championship, iDurban City ne-TS Galaxy, kweyandulela owamanqamu eNedbank Cup. “Ukuzuza indebe yomkhumulajezi yinto efiswa yinanoma yiliphi iqembu, ngakho-ke nathi kuyasijabulisa ukuhamba size sifike kulesi sigaba somqhudelwano esesifinyelele kusona njengamanje. Thina kwiMilford umdlalo ngamunye esiwudlalayo siwuthatha njengobalulekile ngendlela efanayo, kungakhathaleki ukuthi oweligi noma owomkhumulajezi. Ngakho ukufinyelela kowamanqamu nokuzuza indebe yeNedbank kungaba yibhonasi kithi njengeqembu kodwa okusemqoka kakhulu ukuzuza isicoco seligi siyodlala kwiPremiership, sandise nesibalo samaqembu adlala kwiPremiership eRichards Bay,” kusho uPupuma. “Ukunqoba kwethu kwiSekhukhune ngesikhathi esikahle abadlali bethu bedinga ukubuyisa ukuzethemba ngemuva kokushaywa kwethu emdlalweni wabakhaya yiMidlands Wanderers. Ngakho kufike ngesikhathi esifanele njengoba sizodlala neCape Town City emdlalweni weligi, okungumdlalo esidinga kakhulu amaphuzu kuwona.” IMilford esendaweni yesibili kwi-log yeMotsepe Championship, izodlala neCape Town City namuhla ngo-3.30 ntambama e-Athlone Stadium, eKapa, emdlalweni obhekwe ngabomvu, kwazise womabili lamaqembu abalwa nasembangweni wesicoco seligi. ICity isendaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu awu-35, ngemuva kancane kweMilford enawu-36, kube yiKruger United eqhwakele ngawu-37. ICasric Stars nayo esembangweni wesicoco nesendaweni yesine kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-34, inomdlalo omqoka ne-University of Pretoria kusasa ngo-3.30 ntambama, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Imidlalo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Namuhla - Ngo-3.30pm: Cape Town City v Milford FC (Athlone Stadium) Casric Stars v University of Pretoria (Solomon Mahlangu Stadium

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI wamaBhokobhoko esifazane uSwys de Bruin ozwakalise injabulo enkulu ngokuziklaya phakathi izikwati KUXUTSHWE abadlali abanesipiliyoni nabasafika ezingeni lomhlaba esikwatini samaBhokobhoko esifazane esimelwe yijoka lokuvikela isicoco se-Rugby Africa Woman’s Cup emqhudelwaneni ozobanjelwa ekomkhulu laseKenya, iNairobi, kusukela ngoMgqibelo kuya kuMeyi 31. Kulo mqhudelwano amaBhokobhoko esifazane ahamba noLaurian Johannes-Haupt noFranzel September abangamaphini enhloko yabaqeqeshi uSwys de Bruin. Leli qembu laseMzansi kulokhu liqhathwe neMadagascar, Uganda nosokhaya iKenya. Lizoqala ngeMadagascar (ngoMgqibelo), Uganda (Meyi 27) bese livala ngosokhaya (Meyi 31). Yonke le midlalo izogijinyelwa e-RFUEA Grounds ekuNgong Road, eNairobi. Ngonyaka odlule kuwona lo mqhudelwano eMadagascar, iNingizimu Afrika ikhale yemuka naso isicoco okuyinto elindelekile nakulokhu. Iqembu lakuleli lizoholwa ngu-Anathi Qolo ongukaputeni. UQolo ungomunye wabadlali abaningi abakulesi sikwati ababekhona kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yombhoxo yabesifazane ebise-England ngonyaka odlule. Lo kaputeni udlale kahle kule sizini ehola amaBlue Bulls Daisies ngesikhathi edla isicoco sePick N Pay Woman’s Super League okwehlandla lesine amasizini elandelana. Kulesi sikwati kuxutshwe nabadlali abake badlala kumaBhokobhoko esifazane phambilini kodwa abangabizwanga kwesidlale kwiNdebe yoMhlaba nyakenye. “Sizosihlukanisa phakathi isikwati sethu, abanye baye eKenya bese kuthi abanye ngisale nabo eStellenbosch lapho sisebenza khona ngokuzikhandla,” kusho uDe Bruin. “Sine-test emqoka ne-United States of America (USA) ngoJulayi, ngakho-ke kungumqondo esijwayele ukuwusebenzisa ukuzihlukanisa phakathi izikwati njengoba sizoba no-2026 omatasa. “Okuhle ngalo mqhudelwano waseKenya ngukuthi nabadlali obekusazobathatha isikhathi ukuthi sibabophele emiqhudelwaneni emikhulu bathola isipiliyoni ngokushesha." Sesisonke isikwati samaBhokobhoko esifazane esiya kwiRugby Africa Woman’s Cup simi kanje: Abaphambili: Yonela Ngxingoli, Xoliswa Khuzwayo, Nombuyekezo Mdliki, Thandile Mazwi, Sanelisiwe Charlie, Anuschka Ekron, Roseline Botes, Anushka Groenewald, Abigail Smit, Nomsa Mokwai, Anathi Qolo (ukaputeni) noZethu Gcaza. ABASEMUVA: Nobuhle Mjwara, Faith Tshauke, Sinelitha Noxeke, Ntsako Mbombi, Logan Welman, Insaaf Levy, Anacadia Minnaar, Mary Zulu, Thami Yeko, Aphiwe Ngwevu, Jakkie Cilliers, Naima Hlatshwayo, Nomawethu Mabenge, Alichia Arries, Shaunique Alexander noChuma Qawe.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
