Ubuziwe emuva komdlalo u-Ouaddou ukuthi ukwenza ngabomvu yini ukushiya ngaphandle uMakgopa wase eveza ukuthi ubengekho fithi ngokugcwele kulezi zinsuku. “Sekusele kancane ukuthi uMakgopa afike ezingeni lokuthi usengaqala umdlalo aze awuqede njengoba elulama ekuthintekeni,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Ungumdlali wethu omqoka ekhona noma engekho enkundleni ngakho-ke konke esikwenza ngabagadli bethu kuhlale kuncike ekubasizeni ukuthi bahlale bewumqemane,” kugcizelela lo mqeqeshi onobuzwe baseMorocco nobaseFrance. Le nkulumo ka-Ouaddou idwebe isithombe sokuthi kungenzeka ukuthi iPirates incamele ukumonga uMakgopa ngenhloso yokuthi kufike umdlalo weChiefs ewumqemane. Akuthusi lokhu ngoba irekhodi likaMakgopa likhomba ukuthi uzoyitholela iPirates igoli uma ibhekene neChiefs kwazise lokhu usekwenze imidlalo emithathu ilandelana. Kusukela uFani Madida weChiefs ashaya amagoli emidlalweni yabakhaya amahlandla amane kulandelana ngo-1992, akekho omunye umdlali oseke waphinda waphumelela ukwenza lokhu. UMadida wayelithatha ku-Alfred “Russia” Jacobs owakwenza edlalela iPirates ngo-1971, leli rekhodi. Kusukela ngo-2023, uMakgopa akwenzeki angayishayi inethi uma bebhekene neChiefs nokwenza kulindeleke ukuthi nakulokhu adlale indima kwazise uzobe ephumule kahle. Ngaphandle kukaMakgopa, abanye abadlali abanomlando wokushaya amagoli amathathu kulandelana kwiSoweto Derby singabala uJoseph “Banks” Setlhodi noPule “Ace” Ntsoelengoe bobabili beChiefs, Jerry “Legs of Thunder” Sikhosana noDennis “Chesa Mpama” Lota ababesemabhukwini ePirates.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMGADLI weMamelodi Sundowns waseColombia, uBrayan Leon, okubhekwe lukhulu kuyena emidlalweni yeBetway Premiership ebasalele ABADLALI beMamelodi Sundowns ngeke babenawo uphawini wokuzithambisa ngenxa yenjabulo yokuzifaka kwaleli qembu laseChloorkop emdlalweni wamanqamu weCaf Champions League uma sebebhekene neStellenbosch FC kwiBetway Premiership kusasa ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. Iwini yeSudowns kulo mdlalo izogudluza esicongweni i-Orlando Pirates okuyiyona eqhwakele kwi-log kepha iphambili ngokwemidlalo. ISundowns ihamba ize iqholoshe kulezi zinsuku kulandela ukuzifaka kwayo emdlalweni wamanqamu weChampions League ngokunqoba kwi-Esperance Sportive de Tunis yaseTunisia, ngo 2-0 sekuhlangene yomibili imiphumela yemilenze. Nakuba uCardoso ekugqamisa ukuthi ukufaka kwakhe iSundowns kowamanqamu weCaf ngenye yezinto ezinkulu esezike zenzeka empilweni yakhe kodwa isicoco seligi kuyena simqoka ngendlela efanayo nezinye. Leli qembu laseChloorkop seliyikhonye amasizini ayisishiyagalombili kulandelana iligi enkulu yebhola laseNingizimu Afrika. Yize isobala imizamo yePirates kule sizini kodwa leli qembu likaCardoso yilona elikhombisa izimpawu zokuqina okufakazelwa ngamaphuzu eseliwaqoqile ekubeni lisele ngemidlalo emibili kwiBucs ebashiya ngamaphuzu amabili. “Kuhle ukujabulela esikwenzile kwiChampions League ngoba bekungesinye sezifiso zethu kodwa bekungesona sodwa yingakho kufanele sibuye nganeno ngokubhiyozela kwethu ukungena kowamanqamu weChampions League,” kusho uCardoso kwabezindaba ngempelasonto edlule. “Usemkhulu umsebenzi osihlalele ukuze sizothola lokhu esikufisayo ekupheleni kwesizini. Ubunzima buqala ngeStellenbosch okungelinye lamaqembu okufanele uzinike isikhathi uma uwahlelela. “Engingeke ngikuvume ukuthi abadlali bami bajabulele iChampions League baze bakhohlwe wumsebenzi onzima osasihlalele kule miqhudelwano esiseyingxenye yayo. “Ngiyajabula ngoba iningi labadlali beSundowns lijwayele ukuba kulesi simo ngakho-ke okwami ukuqapha nje ukuthi akekho ophuma endleleni kumbe okhombisa izimpawu zokuthatha kancane imidlalo esisalele kwiligi. “Siyobhekana neqembu elilwela okuthile njengathi ngakho-ke kuyasiphoqa ukuthi sizibambe ziqine kuthi noma iqhubeka kubalandeli imibhiyozo yeChampions League umqondo wabadlali ungagudluki kulokhu esifisa ukukuzuza,” kusho uCardoso.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UTHUTO Sesipi ongomunye wabashayele i-Orlando Pirates amagoli ngesikhathi inqoba kuMaZulu FC kwiDDC ngempelasonto edlule I-ORLANDO Pirates ikhombise izimpawu zobumpetha kwiDStv Diski Challenge (DDC) ngesikhathi ibuya singasekho isikhathi kade ilandela emuva, yaze yanqoba kuMaZulu FC okungumphumela oyigcina esicongweni se-log yale ligi ngempelasonto edlule e-UJ Stadium, eGoli. Emuva kokuthi AmaZulu eyeshayelwe nguThandanani Mhlongo igoli ngomzuzu ka-81, uThuto Sesipi noJoy Manana bashaye awePirates okulinganisa nelokuwina umdlalo ususemseni kanondweba. Ngenxa yalo mphumela, leli qembu eliphekwa nguRoscoe Krieling lihleli ngokunethezeka esicongweni kwazise lingcono ngamaphuzu ayisithupha kwiMamelodi Sundowns elele isibili. IPirates inamaphuzu angu-66 emidlalweni engu-27. Yize kubuye kubukeke sengathi iPirates iyasidedela isicoco ngemiphumela ebuye iyithole kungalindelekile kodwa kubukeka sengathi uKreiling owalandwa kwiSuperSport United angase agcine ephumelele ukuwenza umsebenzi osewahlula abaqeqeshi abaningi abanegama. ISundowns idinge ubuqhawe bukaKutlwano Letlhaku ukuze inqobe ngo 3-2 kwiChippa United emdlalweni obunzima ngempelasonto edlule e-TUKS Stadium, ePitoli. ISundowns izithola isisempini nje, kuyiwe ekhefini ihamba phambili ngo 2-0 wamagoli kaBennet Mokoena noNtokozo Siquba. Ngokuthatha kancane iChippa kweSundowns, amaChilli Boys abuye aze ashaya amagoli amabili okuphoqe ukuthi kuvele iqhawe elinguLetlhaku ngomzuzu ka-85. Iqembu elivikela isicoco - iChiefs - linqobe ngo 5-1 kwiPolokwane City ngeSonto ekuseni. Kulo mdlalo kuthe kuyiwa ekhefini wabe eseyibeke ebuhleni amahlandla amabili uNaledi Hlongwane nelinye elilodwa likaSteve “Stevie G” Mendes. Esiwombeni sesibili ezinye izihlabani zeChiefs, uNeo Bohloko noMpho Khethang, zishaye amanye amagoli. Yize iChiefs ibukeka ingeke isenza lutho embangweni wesicoco kule sizini kodwa kufanele ukuba abaqeqeshi bayo bayajabula ngefomu eyikhombise inenebula iPolokwane. Eminye imiphumela yeDDC kule mpelasonto ihambe kanje: TS Galaxy 0-3 Durban City Stellenbosch FC 1-2 Sekhukhune United Siwelele FC 1-1 Magesi FC Orbit College 1-0 Golden Arrows Marumo Gallants 2-2 Richards Bay

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: URELEBOHILE Mofokeng no-Oswin Appollis be-Orlando Pirates abasefomini ethusayo kwiBetway Premiership UKUBABA njengopelepele kwe-Orlando Pirates kwiBetway Premiership kule sizini akumethusi umqeqeshi wayo u-Abdeslam Ouaddou oxwayise amaqembu ePremier Soccer League (PSL) asazobhekana nezakhe ngokuthi azibambe ziqine ngoba bahlose ukulinyusa nakakhulu izinga kunokulehlisa kule midlalo esele. IPirates ibuyele esicongweni kwi-log ngokunenebula AmaZulu FC ngo 3-0 wamagoli kaYanela Mbuthuma, Oswin Appollis noRelebohile Mofokeng ngoMgqibelo ntambama, e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto. Nakuba iPirates isesicongweni ngamaphuzu angu-58 kodwa kusemqoka ukukhumbula ukuthi iMamelodi Sundowns esendaweni yesibili ngawu-56, isele ngemidlalo emibili. Leli qembu laseSoweto elizama ukugudluza iSundowns ekukhonyeni ibhola laseNingizimu Afrika lisalelwe yimidlalo emihlanu kule sizini. Eqhulwini lale midlalo yizimbangi zePirates ezinkulu iKaizer Chiefs abazodudulana nazo ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama, e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. IChiefs izolandelwa yiStellenbosch FC, Magesi FC, Durban City ne-Orbit College FC. Emuva komdlalo waMaZulu, u-Ouaddou utshele abezindaba abesesithangamini nabo ukuthi kayimethusi indlela iPirates elikhuphule ngayo izinga ekubeni isizini isiyela ngasemaphethelweni. “Ngesikhathi kuqala isizini sasebenza kakhulu ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi abadlali bethu bazoba fithi kuze kube sekupheleni kwayo,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Kwakuvele kuyinhloso ukuthi kushaye lezi zikhathi zesizini sifithi ngokwanele ngoba sasiqonda ukuthi ukuze siphumelele ukufeza iphupho lethu leligi kufanele silekelele ithalente ngokuzikhandla. “Sisalelwe yimidlalo eyisithupha esingenawo kuyona uphawini wokuzithambisa. Engingakusho kugcwale umlomo ngukuthi kule midlalo esele sizimisele ngokuba nolaka olungaphezulu kwalolu esilukhombise kuMaZulu. “Amaqembu esisazobhekana nawo kuyawaphoqa ukuthi azibambe ziqine ngoba kunokuthi sehlise kulo mgqigqo esihamba ngawo sisengafaka amanye amagiya uma kudingeka. “Impi esiyilwayo siyayazi ngakho-ke noma ngubani ozoma phambi kwethu aqinisekise ukuthi uzimelele phansi ngoba indlela esifuna ukuyinqoba ngayo le midlalo eyisithupha esisalele iyasiphoqa ukuthi sisebenzise indluzula uma kufanele,” kusho u-Ouaddou. Yize kwaziwa ukuthi uhlale ushubile umdlalo phakathi kwePirates neChiefs kodwa kulokhu kuningi okuxhumeke kumphumela womdlalo. IChiefs isazikhotha amanxeba kwazise yashaywa yiPirates ngo 3-0 ngoFebhuwari. Nakuba iwini ingeke yenze umehluko ongako kodwa kuzobathoba izinhliziyo abalandeli beChiefs ukubuyisa izinduku. Inkinga ngalokhu ukuthi iPirates ka-Ouaddou igijima ngendlela ethusayo kulezi zinsuku okufakazela ukuzimisela kwayo ukushubisa umbango wesicoco neSundowns kuze kube sekugcineni.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: USALE ekhathazekile umqeqeshi weHollywoodbets Sharks, u-JP Pietersen, ngesikhathi beguqiswa yi-Ospreys kwu-URC UKULIMALA kwesilomo seHollywoodbets Sharks, u-Ethan Hooker, kufane nokungena kukasawoti esilondeni saleli qembu laseThekwini, ebesivele sibhibha ngenxa yomphumela obuqeda amathuba alo okuba yingxenye yemidlalo yomkhumulajezi we-United Rugby Championship (URC) eliwuthole ngempelasonto. Lokhu kushiwo ngumqeqeshi weSharks, u-JP Pietersen, ekutshela abezindaba kulandela ukuguqa kwezakhe ngo 21-17 kwi-Ospreys yaseWales, ekuhambeni ngoMgqibelo. Ukuguqa kweSharks kuwaqeda nya amathuba ayo okudlulela emidlalweni yomkhumulajezi kwazise igebe elikhona phakathi kwayo neqembu lokugcina (kwazoqhubeka iVodacom Bulls) likhulu ekubeni nemidlalo esele isimbalwa (3). Bekusobala kulo mdlalo ukuthi iSharks ibe nebhadi okufakazelwa wukuthola kwayo ama-try amathathu njenge-Ospreys kodwa yahlulwa ama-conversion. Iqiniso ukuthi leli qembu laseThekwini, lizenzele phansi. Ama-try amabili eSharks ashaywe nguPhepsi Buthelezi neyodwa kaHooker kodwa lo mdlali wamaBhokobhoko akazange awuqede umdlalo. Lokhu kunanelwe yinkulumo kaPietersen kwabezindaba lapho ekhale khona ngamaphutha nokulimala kukaHooker. “Nakulokhu siphinde sazenzela phansi emdlalweni obungekho lukhuni kangako ukuthi besingashaywa kuwona,” kusho uPietersen. “Okubuhlungu kakhulu ngukulinyalelwa nguHooker olinyazwe ngendlela engavumelekile ngokwemithetho yombhoxo kodwa abebephethe umdlalo bangasibona isidingo sokumvikela. “Okuningi ebesikuhlelile bekuncike kuHooker okuthe angalimala ihlombe zaqala nezinkinga zethu. Ngeke sikubalekele ukuthi sizenzele thina phansi ngokuyeka amathuba esiwathole esiwombeni sesibili. “Umkhuba wethu wokungazicindezeli izitha noma sesizithole lapho sizifuna khona uphinde waqhubeka. “Siyazama ukuwagwema la maphutha kodwa asaqhubeka nokuvela emidlalweni yethu yakamuva. “Akukho esisengakwenza ngaphandle kokubuyela ejimini siyobona ukuthi singawalungisa kanjani amaphutha ngenhloso yokujika imiphumela emidlalweni ezayo,” kusho uPietersen. UHooker ulimala nje, wengeza ku-Eben Etzebeth, Aphelele Fassie, Bongi Mbonambi, Grant Williams noJordan Hendrikse bonke abangeke besabonakala kule sizini ngenxa yesizathu esifanayo.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, oyifake emdlalweni wamanqamu weCaf Champions League UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns okuke kwaba nezimpawu zokuthi unuka iqaqa kwezinye izingxenye zabalandeli baleli qembu laseChloorkop, uMiguel Cardoso, uzishaya isifuba ngokufica irekhodi likaPitso “Jingles” Mosimane kwiCaf Champions League. UCardoso ufake iSundowns emdlalweni wamanqamu weChampions League ngokuyisiza inqobe ngo 1-0 umdlalo womlenze wesibili wowandulela owamanqamu walo mqhudelwano kwi-Esperance Sportive de Tunis yaseTunisia ngoMgqibelo, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. Nasemdlalweni womlenze wokuqala iSundowns yayinqobe ngo 1-0 okuyifaka ngewini ka 2-0 kowamanqamu weChampions League ne-AS FAR yaseMorocco ngenyanga ezayo. Lo mqeqeshi wasePortugal, ufaka iSundowns lapho kunoju khona nje, nangesizini edlule wenze okufanayo kepha wahluleka ukudla isicooco esagcina sihambe nePyramids FC yase-Egypt. Kuzobe kungokwesithathu kulandelana uCardoso eyingxenye yomdlalo wamanqamu wale ndumezulu yomqhudelwano wase-Afrika kwazise ngesizini ka-2023/2024 wayekhona kodwa esaqeqesha i-Esperance. BekuwuMosimane onerekhodi lokudlala eyamanqamu yeChampions League emithathu ilandelana. Lokhu uMosimane wakwenza ne-Al Ahly yase-Egypt, wanqoba kwemibili waguqa kowodwa. UCardoso uzobe ebheke iwini yakhe yokuqala kwi-AS FAR kwazise umphumela womdlalo wamanqamu wangesizini edlule ungezinye zezizathu kwabakhona izingxenye zabalandeli ezimjikelayo. Ubejabule ngendlela engajwayelekile uCardoso esithangamini nabezindaba emuva kokunqoba kwi-Esperance ngegoli likaBrayan Leon waseColombia. “Abadlali beSundowns bakhombise wonke umuntu ofuna ukwazi ukuthi idlalwa kanjani imidlalo yeChampions League,” kusho uCardoso. “Ngizishaya isifuba ngendlela abazinikele ngayo abadlali bami nethimba lami. ISundowns idlalise okweqembu elifanelwe wukuba yingxenye yomdlalo wamanqamu. “Ngigcwele ukuziqhenya ngomsebenzi wami kwiSundowns. “Amarekhodi adalelwe ukuphulwa ngakho-ke ngijabule. “Sekunesikhathi ngisebholeni kepha ukweneliseka engikuzwa ngaphakathi ngalokhu kuhlabana kangibukhumbuli phambilini,” kuqhuba yena. Akazange aliyeke ithuba lokuphindisela kulaba abebemgxeka ngesikhathi kuqhubeka isizini. “Ngifisa ukuthi ukungena kweSundowns emdlalweni wamanqamu weChampions League kusize nalaba abangabaza izinqumo zeqembu, baqonde ukuthi zihlale ziphusile,” kusho uCardoso.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UNONKULULEKO Mlaba noZakithi Nene behalaliselwa yizikhulu zikahulumeni waseKZN ngokuhlabana ngezimoto kumaSports Awards Image: KZN SPORT FEDERATION/FACEBOOK INTOKAZI yaseThekwini edlalela amaProteas esifazane, uNonkululeko Mlaba noZakithi Nene waseMnambithi ongumsubathi weNingizimu Afrika ebangeni lika-400m, yibona abagoduke nemiklomelo emikhulu emcimbini wamaKZN Sports Awards obungempelasonto, eNkosi Albert Luthuli Convention Centre, eThekwini. UMlaba (27) ugoduke nomunxa weKZN Sportswoman of the Year kwaba nguNene (28) kofanayo kodwa kwabesilisa (KZN Sportsman of the Year). Zombili lezi zihlabani ezisimele ngobuqotho isifundazwe i-KZN emaqenjini esizwe aseMzansi ngokwahlukana kwemidlalo, zibuyele emakhaya nezimoto ezintsha zohlobo lwe-VW Polo umdlali ngamunye. Komunye umunxa obubhekiwe we-KZN Sports Personality of the Year kukhonye isihlabani seLamontville Golden Arrows uSiyanda “Skhwishi” Ndlovu. UNdlovu ugoduka nalo munxa nje, ubeqhathwe nezilomo obekukhona kuzona uMlaba noNene. Miningi neminye imiklomelo ephumile kulo mcimbi obuhanjelwe yizikhulu zikahulumeni wesifundazwe ngokwahlukana kwazo. Selulonke uhla lwabahlabene eminxeni eyahlukene kwiKZN Sports Awards lumi kanje: Administrator of the Year – Precious Nzimande Coach of the Year – Precious Mthembu Federation of the Year – KZN Netball Junior Sportsman of the Year – Connor Doig Junior Sportswoman of the Year – Mbali Diphoko Newcomer of the Year – Ethan Hooker Recreation Body of the Year – Durban Africa Sports Club Sport Journalist of the Year – Robin Duke Madlala Sportsman of the Year – Zakithi Nene Sport Personality of the Year – Siyanda Ndlovu Sportsman of the Year with a Disability – Mhlengi Gwala Sportswoman of the Year – Nonkululeko Mlaba Sportswoman of the Year with a Disability – Sthabile Mnyandu Team of the Year – Moothee Ram Tuskers Youth/Junior Team of the Year – KZN Football U15 Girls Technical Official of the Year – Eugene Mdluli Visual Journalist of the Year – Thulisile Dlamini Volunteer of the Year – Sandile Lukhele MEC Special Recognition – Vijay Balram, Khokho World Cup KZN Representatives Honours Black Blazer – Jorah Soojay, Sarah Reed Lifetime Achievement - Mazwi Mkhize, Jeremiah “Ace” Mdlalose, Dr Kevin Subban Posthumous Awards - Nomvula Miya, Teddyboy Buthelezi, Themba “TV” Mkhize

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMGADLI we-Arsenal uViktor Gyokeres noweManchester City u-Erling Haaland ngabanye babadlali abazobe bebhekwe ngabomvu emdlalweni wePremier League. Image: FACEBOOK / PREMIER LEAGUE CISHE bonke abalandeli bakanobhutshuzwayo bayavumelana ngokuthi iqembu elizogoduka namaphuzu agcwele kwindumezulu yomdlalo wePremier League (PL) yase-England ophakathi kweManchester City ne-Arsenal kule mpelasonto yilona elizokhala lemuke nesicoco sale ligi. IMan City kaPep Guardiola izokwamukela i-Arsenal yomngani wakhe omkhulu uMikel Arteta emdlalweni obhekwe ngabomvu ngeSonto ngo-5.30 ntambama e-Etihad Stadium, eManchester. Kusukela isizini iqala, i-Arsenal ikhombisa izimpawu zokuqina uma kuqhathaniswa nakwadlule, kucaca nokuthi isifundile emaphutheni ayo. Ngenxa yalokhu akhule ngamandla amathemba okuthi ingase iphele indlala yesicoco abalandeli be-Arsenal abasigcina ngo-2004. UMQEQESHI weManchester City uPep Guardiola okukhona abamthipha ngokudla isicoco seligi e-England Kuthe kungalindelekile ezika-Arteta zavele zashaya udaka, zaqala ukudedela imidlalo. Kuyona kubalwa noweFA Cup lapho i-Arsenal ikhishwe khona yiSouthampton edlala kwiChampionship. Indlela iCity enqobe ngayo kwiChelsea emdlalweni odlule, uma uyiqhathanisa ne-Arsenal eshayelwe yiBournemouth ekhaya, iyakucacisa ukuthi kungani izazi zalo mdlalo emhlabeni zingamniki lutho u-Arteta. Lokhu kuvulele iCity intuba yokuzisondeza kwi-Arsenal kwazise ezikaGuardiola sezisele ngamaphuzu ayisithupha kuphela kwiGunners, esidlale umdlalo owodwa ngaphezulu. ICity inomlando wokuthi isuke ingasabambeki ngalezi zikhathi (ngo-Ephreli nangoMeyi) okuyenza ibe yingozi kwi-Arsenal ekhombisa izimpawu zokwehlelwa yifomu ngesikhathi esibi. Muva nje iCity isanda kuyishaya ngo 2-0 i-Arsenal emdlalweni wamanqamu weCarabao Cup. Lokhu kukodwa kuwumthwalo kumaGunners kodwa futhi bakhona abakubona njengesikhuthazi. Emidlalweni emihlanu edlule ehlanganisa yonke imiqhudelwano i-Arsenal inewini eyodwa. UMQEQESHI we-Arsenal uMikel Arteta ozama ukuwinisa leli qembu iligi okokuqala kusukela ngo-2004 Image: ARSENAL/FACEBOOK Maphakathi nesonto, emuva kokudlulela kwe-Arsenal emdlalweni owandulela owamanqamu kwi-Uefa Champions League ngokubambana ngo 0-0 neCP Sporting yasePortugal, uDeclan Rice obekhuluma ne-Arsenal TV uthe: “Kasinandaba nalaba ababona ukuthi ifomu yethu yakamuva ikhomba ukuthi siyophisana ngamaphuzu ngeSonto. Siyakwazi okufanele sikwenze futhi kasikhohliwe ukuthi konke kusezandleni zethu.” UGuardiola ufanise lo mdlalo nowamanqamu womqhudelwano omqoka kunayo yonke. “Yonke imidlalo esisalele kule sizini imqoka kodwa owe-Arsenal ufana nowamanqqamu wayo yonke,” kusho uGuardiola kwiMan City TV. I-Arsenal iqhwakele kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-70 emidlalweni engu-32 okuzitolika ngokuthi ukuwina kweCity ena-64 kuyobe kusho ukuthi (iCity) isisele ngamathathu ekubeni isalele emuva ngomdlalo. Manchester City: Rayan Cherki, Erling Halaand noRodri Arsenal: Victor Gyokeres, Noni Madueke noDavid Raya

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ISITOBHA seMamelodi Sundowns, uZuko Mdunyelwa, silindele isibiliboco somdlalo weCAF Champions League ne-ES Tunis yaseTunisia ISITOBHA seMamelodi Sundowns, uZuko Mdunyelwa, kasingabazi ukuthi bazojahana zibekwa ebhandeni ne-Esperance Sportive de Tunis yaseTunisia, kwazise womabili amaqembu azibona efanelwe yindawo emdlalweni wamanqamu weCaf Champions League. ISundowns yazihhafulela umsebenzi ngokunqoba umlenze wokuqala wowandulela owamanqamu ngo 1-0 ekuhambeni. Izokwamukela lezi zinkunzi zebhola lase-Afrika ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. NgokukaMdunyelwa obekhuluma nabezindaba ekomkhulu leSundowns, abalandeli yibona abazothokozela lo mdlalo. “Kubhekene amaqembu anesipiliyoni kulo mqhudelwano kanti kuwona kalikho elinophawini wokuzithambisa,” kusho uMdunyelwa. “Ukuhamba phambili ngegoli elilodwa akwanele. Sizobe sidlala neqembu eliphoqelekile ukunqoba nokuzitolika ngokuthi bazosihlasela zisuka. Abalandeli abazobuka umdlalo omnandi ngoba iSundowns iyakuthokozela ukudlala namaqembu ayixinayo. Ukuya phambili ngamandla kwe-Esperance kuzoyishiya iklayekile emuva, njengoba kwenzeka emlenzeni wokuqala, bese siyayijezisa. “Okusobala ngalo mdlalo ukuthi womabili amaqembu anezizathu ezimqoka zokuhlaselana, nokuyinto engiyibona izohlomulisa abazobe bewubuka. Kusemqoka kithina ukuya kuwona ngomqondo ohluzekile ngoba siyaqonda ukuthi kwenzekani kwiChampions League uma uzithambisa.” Okunye akubona njengesikhali seSundowns lo mdlali ongalijwayele ijezi wukuba nolwazi olunzulu nge-ES Tunis komqeqeshi uMiguel Cardoso. Kumasizini amathathu adlule, uCardoso wakhipha iSundowns kwiChampions League isendleleni ebheke emdlalweni wamanqamu, osekungumlando ukuthi wawinwa yi-Al Ahly yase-Egypt. “Nakuba izinto zishintsha kodwa lukhona ulwazi ulunzulu noluwusizo kithina esiluthola kuCardoso ngoba useke wasebenza kuleli qembu laseTunisia. Okungaphezulu kunakho konke wukuzethemba ngokugcwele ukuthi sinawo amava okudla lesi sicoco okusebuhlungu namanje ukuthi sisihwebe ekugcineni ngesizini edlule,” kusho uMdunyelwa. Sekuphele iminyaka engu-10 iSundowns yagcina ukuwina isicoco seChampions League. Komunye umdlalo owandulela owamanqamu kubhekene amaqembu aseMorocco, i-AS FAR  neRS Berkane. Emlenzeni wokuqala kwanqoba i-AS FAR ngo 2-0.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UKHANYISA Mayo oshayele iKaizer Chiefs igoli emuva kwesikhathi eside eqiwa yijezi ngenxa yezizathu ezihlukene UKUQEDA isizini endaweni yesithathu akuyona into okufanele ithathwe njengempumelo eqenjini elikhulu njengeKaizer Chiefs ngokusho komunye wamabamba abaqeqeshi kuleli qembu, uKhalil Ben Youssef. Lo mqeqeshi ocija Amakhosi ngokubambisana noCedric Kaze uthe uwafuna emgodleni wonke amaphuzu emidlalo yeBetway Premiership esele bese bebona ukuthi baqeda bekuphi kwi-log. IChiefs, esefomini emangalisayo kulezi zinsuku, inqobe umdlalo wayo weligi wesihlanu kulandelana ngokuxebula iMagesi FC ngo 4-1 ngoLwesithathu ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Le wini yamagoli kaFlavio Da Silva, Wandile Duba, Mduduzi Shabalala noKhanyisa Mayo igcine indawo yeChiefs emva kwe-Orlando Pirates ngamaphuzu angu-45 emidlalweni engu-23. UBen Youssef utshele abezindaba ukuthi ubheke amaphuzu agcwele kuyona yonke le midlalo eyisikhombisa esalele iqembu lakhe . “Indawo yesithathu akuyona into okufanele ibhiyozelwe eqenjini elikhulu njengeChiefs yingakho kusafanele sifake umfutho ongaphezulu kule midlalo esele. Sinejoka lokuyinqoba yonke imidlalo esisalele bese sihlala phansi sibheke ukuthi siqede kuphi kwi-log,” kusho lo mqeqeshi. IChiefs iyaqala ukuhlanganisa amaphuzu angu-45 selokhu yagcina ngo-2022 iqeqeshwa ngu-Arthur Zwane. Ingaphelela kwangu-66 uma iyinqoba yonke imidlalo eyisalele. Njengoba izobhekana nePolokwane City ngoMgqibelo ngo-5.30 ntambama, e-Old Peter Mokaba Stadium, izosalelwa yiPirates, Siwelele FC, Mamelodi Sundowns, Sekhukhune United, AmaZulu FC neChippa United. Nakuba engazange alibeke ngembaba, kodwa inkulumo kaBen Youssef ibinezinhlayiya zokukhomba ukuthi abalilahlile ithemba ngokugudluza iPirates endaweni yesibili. Lokhu kubukeka kuwumqansa nokho njengoba iPirates (ephambili ngomdlalo) ingcono ngamaphuzu angu-10 kwiChiefs, kodwa kunzima ukuqagela imiphumela kanobhutshuzwayo, ikakhulukazi njengoba lezi zinkunzi zaseSoweto zizobhekana ngo-Ephreli 26 e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. Imidlalo yeBetway Premiership kule mpelasonto NgoMgqibelo: Marumo Gallants v Siwelele FC (Dr Molemela Stadium, 3pm); Orbit College FC v Lamontville Golden Arrows (Olympia Park, 3pm); Orlando Pirates v AmaZulu FC (Orlando Amstel Arena, 3pm); Polokwane City v Kaizer Chiefs (Old Peter Mokaba Stadium, 5.30pm). NgeSonto: TS Galaxy v Richards Bay FC (Mbombela Stadium, 3pm); Magesi FC v Durban City (Seshego Stadium, 6pm).

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UKAPUTENI weBafana Bafana, uRonwen Williams, elihola ngengoma leli qembu lesizwe ngaphambi komdlalo walo wobungani nePanama, eKapa OMUNYE wabadlali basesiswini ababeqavile kwiBafana Bafana eminyakeni edlule, u-Andile Jali, ulibona lingavuthiwe ngokugcwele iqembu lesizwe likaHugo Broos ukuthi selingahamba ibanga elide kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eqala ezinyangeni ezimbili eMexico, Canada nase-United States (USA). Muva nje, iBafana izwane amandla nePanama emidlalweni emibili emshiye engeneme ngokugcwele uJali osanda kutshela Isolezwe ukuthi wayibona ingavuthiwe ngokwanele. Kufanele ukuba uBroos akasalali ethatha ebeka, kwazise uzoqala ngoJuni, lo mqhudelwano lapho beqhathwe khona neMexico, Korea republic neCzechia kuGroup A. Emuva kokuthi uJali owadlalela iBafana amahlandla angu-45, eyibuke ibambana iphinde ishaywe yiPanama eThekwini naseKapa muva nje, wasala nomuzwa wokuthi ngeke ihambe ibanga elide kulo mqhudelwano. “Kukhona umlilo engangiwulindele kule midlalo kodwa engingawubonanga uphuma emehlweni abadlali abayolwela izwe labo esigabeni somhlaba,” kusho uJali. “Ngokwami ngabona iPanama ingcono kakhulu ngasheshe ngawehlisa umoya ngebanga esizolihamba kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. “Kangigxeki muntu kodwa mhlawumbe kukhona induku abasayithukuse emqubeni kusukela kumqeqeshi kuya kubadlali bakhe ngoba uma kungukuthi bazoya ngendlela abaye ngayo kwiPanama, sizobuya ekuseni. “Kangisho ukuthi sesisezingeni lokubanga isicoco kodwa eminyakeni embalwa edlule besilokhu sikhula. Ibhola lase-Afrika liyakhula ngakho-ke bekungakuhle uma neBafana ingalimela ngobuqotho ku-Group A. “Bakhona abadlali kwiBafana kodwa futhi kabawufakile wonke umfutho ukuthi singadlisela ogageni amaqembu esizwe esiqhathwe nawo ku-Group A. “Kuningi okufanele kushintshe emqondweni kubona bonke abadlali. Akukhona Ukuthi iqembu liyinhlakanhlaka kodwa kunokuhlangana okungekho obekuzoba wusizo kule mpi abaya kuyona. “Kungcono kodwa ngoba zisekhona izinyanga ezisele noma zimbalwa ukuthi uBroos athumele umyalezo ohlukile kubadlali bakhe,” kusho uJali. UJali wayeyingxenye yabadlali ababezodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ka-2010 kodwa wagcina egafakwanga esikwatini sokugcina ngenxa yesifo esasithinta inhliziyo. Wadlala kwi-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) yango-2015.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ISITOBHA seMamelodi Sundowns, uKhulumani Ndamane, okubhekwe lukhulu kusona ngoMgqibelo, kwiCaf Champions League njengoba ezobe engekho uGrant Kekana IJOKA lokumelwa wukuthola umphumela oncomekayo ngaphandle kwesitobha esibuqonda ukusuka nokuhlala ubunzima beCaf Champions League, uGrant Kekana, kwenza bonke abadlali beMamelodi Sundowns baye ngomqondo ohluzekile emdlalweni womlenze wesibili wowandulela owamanqamu ne-Esperance Sportive de Tunis yaseTunisia. Lokhu kushiwo yisitobha seSundowns, uKhulumani Ndamane, ngesikhathi edlana indlebe nabezindaba ngezinhlelo zokwamukela i-Esperance ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. ISundowns yanqoba ngo 1-0 wegoli likaBrayan Leon eTunisia, ngempelasonto edlule, kulandela ukukhishwa kukaKekana ngekhadi elibomvu esiwombeni sesibili. Emuva kwekhadi likaKekana, yahlasela ngamandla i-Esperance ngenhloso yokuthola igoli lokulinganisa kodwa yalwa iSundowns. UNdamane utshele abezindaba izolo ekuseni, eChloorkop, ukuthi yize kubathambisa ukugwetshwa kukaKekana kodwa banejoka lokuqedela umsebenzi abawuqala ekuhambeni ngempelasonto edlule. “Kuyabaphoqa laba abazonikwa isikimu ukuthi babambisane ngoba isipiliyoni sikaKekana kwiChampions League ngeke kuzibeke ukungabibikho kwaso,” kusho uNdamane. “Okuhle ngeSundowns ukuthi ukubambisana yinto yakhona ngakho-ke noma ngabe wubani ozonikwa ijezi uzokwazi okufanele akwenze. “Kwaba yinhlanhla ukuthi ngifike eqenjini elifana neSundowns njengoba ngizibona ngisondelene nokuningi engangiphupha ngakho ngisemncane njengezicoco ezihlanganisa iligi neChampions League. “Siyaqonda ukuthi ubunzima bomdlalo bulele ekutheni i-Esperance iphoqelekile ukuthola igoli ngakho-ke kumele siqaphe macala onke ikakhulukazi kubadlali basemuva. “Ngenxa yalokhu kulambela igoli lokulinganisa kwezitha kunezikhathi lapho zizoklayeka khona emuva nokuyilapho nathi esihlele ukuzingcwaba khona ngoba kuzosikhulula ukulithola kuqala igoli. “Siya kulo mdlalo ngokwethembana nangokuvumelana ngokuthi iSundowns iyona ezodlulela emzuliswaneni wamanqamu emuva kwawo,” kusho lo mdlali sakuphaka impi. Ikhadi likaKekana ngeke limphuthisele ngomdlalo wamanqamu uma iSundowns iphumelela ukuzifaka kuwona.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ABANYE babadlali beMamelodi Sundowns abamfakela itwetwe umqeqeshi we-Esperance Sportive de Tunis, uPatrice Beaumelle, UMQEQESHI we-Esperance Sportive de Tunis, uPatrice Beaumelle, ukufanise nokushukana neqembu lesizwe ukudlala neMamelodi Sundowns ababanga nayo indawo emdlalweni wamanqamu weCAF Champions League. Lo mqeqeshi waseFrance ukusho lokhu kwabezindaba sakwamukela ukuthi iSundowns ikhombisa izimpawu zokungabambeki kulo mqhudelwano kule sizini. Ngempelasonto edlule, iSundowns inqobe okokuqala eRandes, eTunisia, lapho iwine khona ngo 1-0 emdlalweni womlenze wokuqala walo mdlalo ozokhipha iqembu elizodlulela kowamanqamu. I-Esperance enomlando wokukhipha iSundowns esigabeni esifanayo kumasizini amabili adlule, inethuba lokulungisa iphutha langeledlule emdlalweni womlenze wesibili ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. UBeaumelle uchaze iSundowns njengeqembu elingadlisela ogageni amaqembu esizwe amaningi yingakho kulukhuni satshe ukubhekana nayo. “Abadlali bami bebedonswe ngendlebe ukuthi bangalokothi bazame ukuxina unozinti weSundowns (uRonwen Williams) uma eqala ibhola ngoba ubungozi baleli qembu obukhulu buqala kuyena,” kusho uBeaumelle. “Angazi ukuthi bakhohlwe kanjani abadlali bami bakwenza lokhu ihlandla elilodwa kodwa futhi kulapho iSundowns ethole khona igoli. “Uma ubhekene neSundowns kufana nokuthi usuke udlala neqembu lesizwe. Ubufakazi balokhu busekutheni iqembu elisishaye ngo 1-0 libunjwe ngabadlali abayisikhombisa abakwiBafana Bafana ebheke kwiNdebe yoMhlaba emasontweni ezayo. “Kuliqiniso ukuthi kasiliphonsile ithawula kodwa siyabuqonda ubunzima esibhekene nabo emdlalweni womlenze wesibili yize (lobu bunzima) bungasho ukuthi ngeke siwathole awethu amathuba okuzibeka ebuhleni ePitoli,” kusho uBeaumelle. Yize konke kubukeka sengathi kuvuna iSundowns kodwa umqeqeshi wayo uMiguel Cardoso wethembise ukubaqapha ngelokhozi abadlali bakhe. “Umfutho ongaphezulu kwalo engiwubone ekuhambeni yiwona engiwulindele uma sesidlalela ekhaya phambi kwabalandeli bethu esibakweleta okuningi. “Akekho kubona (abadlali) ozothola uphawini wokuzithambisa ngoba ngizobe ngibaqaphe ngelokhozi ukuthi baziphethe kanjani ngaphambi nangesikhathi usuqhubeka umdlalo,” kusho uCardoso.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UROGER De Sa oqashwe yiqembu lesizwe laseGhana njengephini lomqeqeshi UNOZINTI owawina i-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) neBafana Bafana ngo-1996, uRoger De Sa, uphinde wanyelwa yinyoni esandleni ngesikhathi ethola umsebenzi ozombuyisela kwiNdebe yoMhlaba njengoba kwenzeka ngo-2022, eQatar. UDe Sa, owadlala waphinde waqeqesha esigabeni esikhulu sebhola laseNingizimu Afrika, uzobe esebhentshini leGhana kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ezoqala ngoJuni eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America (USA) kulandela ukuqashwa kwakhe njengephini lomqeqeshi. IGhana eboshelwe ku-Group L nePanama, Croatia ne-England idilize kungalindelekile, u-Otto Addo, okungumqeqeshi obeyifake ezweni lesethembiso indawo yakhe yayivala ngoCarlos Queiroz wasePortugal. UQueiroz owake waqeqesha iBafana ujwayele ukusebenza noDe Sa anobudlelwano obuhle naye kwazise nakwiNdebe yoMhlaba yaseQatar babesebenza njengenhloko nephini eqenjini lesizwe lase-Iran. Nakwi-Afcon yango-2019 laba baqeqeshi abanobuhlobo nezwe laseMozambique sebeke basebenza njengenhloko nephini eqenjini lesizwe lase-Egypt. Ngesikhathi Isolezwe lithinta uDe Sa ngalokhu kuthola umsebenzi ubejabule waze waveza ukuthi usenesonto esayinile. “Ngizizwa ngihloniphekile ngaleli thuba ngoba iGhana ingelinye lamazwe akhiqiza abadlali abagila izimanga emaligini athathwa njengamakhulu ebholeni lomhlaba,” kusho uDe Sa. “Angisakwazi ukulinda njengoba ngisayine ngesonto eledlule kodwa ngabe kangazi ukuthi ngenzani uma ngingabongi kuQueiroz ongikhumbula njalo uma kuvela amathuba alolu hlobo. “Leli yithuba lami lokukhula njengomqeqeshi ngesikhathi esifanayo kunelinye (ithuba) lokubuyisela iGhana endaweni eyifanele ebholeni lomhlaba,” kusho lo mqeqeshi oseke wasebenza kwi-Orlando Pirates, Bidvest Wits nakwiCape Town Spurs.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: USIPHESIHLE Ndlovu ongomunye wabadlali abathe bangakhuphula ifomu kwiKaizer Chiefs naleli qembu laseNaturena, laqala laqoqa imiphumela encomekayo IZIMPAWU zokuqaqeka kwezinto kwiKaizer Chiefs kazisho ukuthi abaqeqeshi bayo sebezothambisa isandla bavumele ukuthi abadlali benze intando yabo ngoba bayalwazi usizi lokucindezelwa wukungayitholi imiphumela encomekayo. Nakuba ukunqoba kweChiefs kwiGalaxy bekungokokuqala eminyakeni emihlanu edlule kuyona yonke imiqhudelwano kodwa omunye wamabamba abaqeqeshi kuyona, uCedric Kaze, ubeshumayela ivangeli lokungavuvukalelwa ngamakhanda njengoba kungathi isimo semiphumela sesijikile. Iwini yeChiefs kwiGalaxy bekungeyesine kulandelana kwiligi nokuyisondeza nephupho layo lokubuyela kwiCaf Confederation Cup ephume kuyona emidlalweni yamaqoqo kule sizini. “Isikhathi esikusona nomuzwa esiwuzwayo uyasiphoqa ukuba singabe sisathambisa kulokhu esikwenzayo ngoba kusobala ukuthi kusinika izithelo,” kusho uKaze kwabezindaba emuva komdlalo. “Esizokwenza wukusiqinisa nakakhulu isandla kubadlali ngenhloso yokususa kubona umqondo wokuthi izinto sezilungile ngoba luselude ukhalo okusafanele siluhambe ngaphabi kokusongwa kwesizini,” kuqhuba yena. Kunezikhathi lapho iChiefs ebibukeka khona sengathi ihlehla nyova okugqanyiswe yimiphumela emine eyithole ilandelana emiqhudelwaneni ehlanganisa iBetway Premiership nokukhala ngaphandle kwiConfed Cup. Konke lokhu kwenzeka ngesikhathi esifanayo nokuthi iChiefs iphume ekuseni kwiNedbank Cup ebiyivikela kwazise indlala yeminyaka yokweqiwa izinkomishi yayiqeda ngayo ngesizini edlule. Muva nje, Amakhosi asendaweni yesithathu kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-42 emidlalweni engu-22 akhombisa izimpawu zokudlondlobala kwiligi. Okusobala ngalokhu wukubuya kwefomu yabadlali abafika kuyona bethwelwe ngeqoma njengoSiphesihle Ndlovu noLebohang Maboe. Kuyalisiza iqembu ukuduma kwabadlali abancane ebholeni laseNingizimu Afrika nokukhuphula sakuphoqa ifomu kwabafana noMfundo Vilakazi osetshenziswa njengethuluzi lokukhathaza izitha, Aden McCarthy noBradley Cross bobabili abakhombisa izimpawu zokukhula kuyona yonke imidlalo abayingxenye yayo. Kufanele ukuthi nokubuya kukaBrandon Petersen, aqhubeke la ayegcine khona ngokunqaba namagoli kuzokukhuphula nakakhulu ukuzethemba kweChiefs kule midlalo eyisishiyagalombili eyisalele ngaphambi kokusonga isizini. “Konke kuhle kulezi zinsuku kodwa akusho ukuthi sekufanele sizithambise ngoba ubunzima beligi esikuyona nobuhlungu bokuphikwa yimiphumela sikwazi njengoba sizazi,” kusho uKaze. IChiefs ibuyela enkundleni ngoLwesithathu lapho izovakashela khona iMagesi FC ngo-7.30 ebusuku, ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ISITOBHA seBanyana Banyana, uBambanani Mbane, ongase adlale okwehlandla lika-100 kuleli qembu lesizwe UKUBE kayibanga nebhadi lokuhlushwa wukulimala inqokonqoko yesitobha seBanyana Banyana, uBambanani Mbane, ngabe seyafika kudala kwirekhodi lokumela iNingizimu Afrika amahlandla angu-100 emidlalweni yomhlaba. Lokhu kutshelwe abezindaba yinhloko yabaqeqeshi kwiBanyana, uDesiree Ellis, ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabo muva nje, ekhempini yaleli qembu lesizwe eRiverside Sports Club, eDurban North, eThekwini. IBanyana ikuleli dolobha lapho izodlala khona eyobungani emibili ne-Algeria ngoLwesibili ngo-3 ntambama ePrincess Magogo Stadium, KwaMashu, naseKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza, ngoLwesihlanu. Leli qembu lesizwe lizwana amandla ne-Algeria nje yingoba lizicijela iWoman’s Africa Cup of Nations (Wafcon) ezokuba ngoJulayi, eMorocco. “Kuyisibusiso kumqeqeshi ukuba nomdlali ongahluphi ngalutho ngaphandle kwenkundla njengoMbane kodwa okunika konke uma engaphakathi kwayo njengaye,” kusho u-Ellis. “Kuwubufakazi nokugcina kwakhe umgqigqo ukuthi wayeyingxenye yeqembu eladla isicoco seWafcon kodwa nakulesi esahamba ibanga elide kwiNdebe yoMhlaba wayekhona. “Kumhluphile ukulimala kodwa ngaphandle kwakho ngabe kade afike emidlalweni engu-100 kwiBanyana,” kusho lo mqeqeshi ngalesi sitobha. Akuyena uMbane yedwa osethubeni lokushaya isibalo esimqoka semidlalo kwiBanyana kwazise noKarabo Dhlamini uzodlala owakhe ka-50 uma enikwe ithuba kule midlalo ne-Algeria. “Ngesikhathi ngiya noDhlamini kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eminyakeni edlule, kwaba khona abebethi ngiyahlanya ngoba wayesemncane kodwa ngangibona ithuba lokumkhulisa nangempela usengomunye wabadlali abamqoka eqenjini. “Ngaphandle kokuphakamisa isandla ngaso sonke isikhathi uma edingeka, uDhlamini ukwazile ukusisiza ezindaweni eziningi futhi uphiwe uma ibhola lisezinyaweni kuyena,” kusho u-Ellis. UMbane unethuba lokujoyina izinkakha zeBanyana ezayidlalela amahlandla angu-100 nangaphezulu njengoJanine Van Wyk (185), Noko Matlou (174), Nothando Vilakazi (132), Rifiloe Jane (107) noJermaine Seopesenywe (100).

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: BAGADLI bekaizer Chiefs uFlavio da Silva noWandile Duba ngesikhathi benqoba iTS Galaxy koweBetway Premiership ngeSonto. UKWENAMA bekubhalwe ebusweni kumabamba abaqeqeshi beKaizer Chiefs, uCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef, kulandela ukunqoba kwaleli qembu laseNaturena, kwi-TS Galaxy emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngeSonto ntambama, eFNB Stadium, eSoweto. Le wini iqinise indawo yesithathu yeChiefs kwi-log okukhuphula amathuba kaKaze naleli qembu ngokubuyela kwiCaf Confederation Cup, eliphume kuyona kweyamaqoqo kule sizini. Ngenxa yale wini, Amakhosi azonethezeka endaweni yesithathu kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-42 emidlalweni engu-22. Asevule igebe lamaphuzu amathathu phakathi kwawo neqembu elisendaweni yesine, AmaZulu FC, eselidlale imidlalo emibili ngaphezulu. UFlavio Da Silva, obengomunye wabekushintshwe ngabo esikimini seChiefs nonozinti uBrandon Petersen, nguyena ovule inkundla ngegoli alingqofele enethini ngomzuzu ka-35. Ngoka-78, uGlody Lilepo ushaye elesibili leChiefs nobekungelokushayela isipikili sokugcina yize eshaye udaka kulona unozinti weGalaxy, u-Ira Tape, eshesha ukuphuma epalini lakhe. IChiefs izodlala olandelayo weligi neMagesi FC ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoLwesithathu ngo-7.30 ebusuku.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos KUFANELE ukuba kuyamudla umqeqeshi weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, ukuthi akanaye umgadli angamkhomba ngokuzethemba ukuthi amagoli uwabheke kuyena njengoba kungasensuku zatshwala kuqale imidlalo yeNdebe yoMhlaba ka-2026 eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America (USA). IBafana inenhlanhla yokuba yingxenye yomdlalo wokuvula umqhudelwano ngokubhekana neMexico ngoJuni 11 e-Azteca Stadium, eMexico City. Kuleli qoqo eliqala ngomdlalo oyimpinda yomqhudelwano wango-2010, owawuseNingizimu Afrika, kukhona neKorea Republic neCzechia. Lo mqeqeshi waseBelgium akalufihli uthando lwakhe ngoLyle Foster weBurnley yase-England no-Evidence Makgopa we-Orlando Pirates, kodwa imiphumela yakamuva yemidlalo emibili nePanama imkhumbuzile ukuthi lezi zithandwa zakhe azibukhali ngendlela edingeka kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. Le nkinga yeBafana isobala kodwa okuhle ngayo wukuthi uBroos akakufihlanga ukuthi usengawujika umqondo ngabagadli azohamba nabo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yize bese bekhona abese ecabangela phezu kwabo. UMGADLI weBafana Bafana neBurnley FC uLyle Foster Ngesikhathi iBafana idlala ngokulingana ngo1-1 yaphinda yashaywa yiPanama ngo 2-1 eThekwini naseKapa ngokwahlukana, uFoster wahlulwa yinqwaba yamathuba. Lokhu kuba buthuntu kukaFoster kuqale phansi inkulumo-mpikiswano kwabalandela unobhutshuzwayo waseNingizimu Afrika ngokusala kuka-Iqraam Rayners weMamelodi Sundowns ezikwatini zeBafana zakamuva. Isisusa salokhu yinkulumo yakhe uBroos lapho achaza khona uFoster njengobuye abe nokuvilapha yize iqophelo lakhe liphezulu. Kule sizini uFoster useshayele iBurnley amagoli amathathu emidlalweni engu-23 kwiPremier League yase-England. Kwi-Afcon washaya amabili emidlalweni emine kanti unamagoli angu-10 emidlalweni engu-30 aseyidlalile kwiBafana. UMGADLI weBafana Bafana ne-Orlando Pirates u-Evidence Makgopa Nakuba esegxekwe kaningi uBroos ngokungamshiyi noma kunjani uMakgopa kodwa lo mqeqeshi waseBelgium usamile ekutheni uma lo mgadli esenkundleni kuyacaca yikhona ukuthi asuke ekufakelwe enkundleni ngamagoli. UMakgopa uwuhlobo lomgadli olunyakaza ngale ndlela efunwa nguBroos kodwa unenkinga yokuphikwa yizibalo zamagoli uma kuqhathaniswa nethuba alithola enkundleni kuleli qembu lesizwe nakwiPirates. "UMakgopa ngimthandela ukuthi uyangenzela konke engisuke ngikucele kuyena kulawo mathuba amancane engimnika wona enkundleni. Kuyamphazamisa nokungayiqali yonke imidlalo kwiPirates (Orlando) kodwa ungumdlali engiyohlale ngithembele kuyena," kusho uBroos kwabezindaba ngenyanga edlule. Kule sizini uMakgopa usejwayele ukuqala ebhentshini kweZimnyama kwazise umqeqeshi u-Abdeslam Ouaddou ukhetha ukuqalisa uYanela Mbuthuma. Unamagoli ayisithupha emidlalweni engu-25 emiqhudelwaneni ehlukene. Kwi-Afcon washaya elilodwa emidlalweni emithathu kanti unamagoli ayisithupha emidlalweni engu-24 aseyidlale kwiBafana Bafana. UMGADLI weMamelodi Sundowns u-Iqraam Rayners. Ngesikhathi uBroos evuma ukuthi akaneme ngokugcwele kubagadli wachazela abezindaba ngohlobo lomgadli olungena khaxa endleleni afuna ukuyidlalisa iBafana. “Indlela esidlala ngayo iphoqa ukuthi umgadli angami ndawonye alindele ibhola ngoba lokhu ngeke kwenzeke njengoba sikholelwa ekuliqaleni emuva,” kusho uBroos kwabezindaba eKapa ngenyanga edlule. “Kabadingeki abagadli abama ndawonye ngoba lokhu kunqinda abasezimpondweni amathuba okusivumela ukuthi sidlale ngendlela esiyijwayele,” kuqhuba yena. Okwagqama ngale ncazelo kaBroos yomgadli amfunayo yindlela yokudlala kaRayners okunguyena ozihola phambili ngamagoli angu-11 kwiBetway Premiership kubagadli baseNingizimu Afrika. Kule sizini unamagoli angu-15 emidlalweni engu-28 emiqhudelwaneni ehlukene. Kwi-Afcon wayekubadlali okwakucushwe ngabo. Unamagoli amahlanu kwiBafana emidlalweni engu-18.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, ufisa baqhubeke nokujabula kanje noma sebekwiCaf Champions League UKUNGAXOLELI okukhonjiswa yiMamelodi Sundowns emidlalweni yakamuva yeBetway Premiership yikhona okungaba yisikhali saleli qembu laseChloorkop, esifihlekile njengoba selingena kuvuthondaba kwiCAF Champions League. Lona ngumbono kaMiguel Cardoso oyinhloko yabaqeqeshi kwiSundowns eyagcina ukuqukula iChampions League eminyakeni engu-10 edlule, kusekhona uPitso “Jingles” Mosimane. ISundowns ezama ukuwina isicoco seligi yaseNingizimu Afrika okwehlandla lesishiyagalolunye kulandelana, isiwine kwiligi kwaze kwaba kawu-10 ngaphandle kokuphazanyiswa wukudlala ngokulingana. Ngenxa yale fomu, iSundowns isibuyele esicongweni kwi-log futhi iyona esithishwa ngabaningi ukuthi igoduke nesicoco yize kuke kwaba nomuzwa wokuthi i-Orlando Pirates ikhombisa izimpawu zokuqina ngokwanele ukuyigudluza. Kule mpelasonto, iSundowns izoma kwiligi ibhekane nomdlalo womlenze wokuqala wowandulela owamanqamu weChampions League ne-Esperance Sportive de Tunis yaseTunisisa, ngeSonto ngo-9 ebusuku, eHammadi Agrebi Stadium, eRades. Lo mdlalo unzima ngezindlela eziningi kwiSundowns kodwa okuseqhulwini ngukuthi uCardoso uyobhekana neqembu lakhe lakudala. Kuzobe kungokwesithathu amasizini elandelana la maqembu ehlangana esigabeni somkhumulajezi kulo mqhudelwano kwazise i-Esperance kaCardoso yakhipha iSundowns kaRulani Mokwena emdlalweni owandulela owamanqamu kumasizini amabili adlule. Nyakenye, kube yiSundowns kaCardoso ekhipha e-Esperance kodwa esigabeni sama-quarterfinal. Ngaphambi kokufulathela iNingizimu Afrika, uCardoso ukhulume nabezindaba lapho egcizelele khona umyalezo kubadlali bakhe ngokubaluleka kokuqhubeka nendluzula abayikhombisa kwiligi yaseMzansi. “Isikhathi esikusona sesizini kasisiniki ithuba lokucwaninga okuningi ngaphandle kokuzama ukuqhubeka nomgqigqo esihamba ngawo emidlalweni yeligi,” kusho uCardoso. “Ngiyavuma kuhlukile kwiChampions League kodwa iligi yaseNingizimu Afrika iqine ngokwanele ukusicijela ukubhekana nezingqinamba zokudlala e-Afrika. “Indlela esenza ngayo kwiligi iyisikhali sethu sokunqoba izimpi ezinzima esingena kuzona njengoba umqhudelwano usuyela ngasemaphethelweni. “Bonke abadlali bayakuqonda okubhekwe kubona futhi iningi labo linaso isipiliyoni sokubhekana nobunzima obunhlobonhlobo bokungena esibayeni samanye amaqembu athathwa njengamakhulu emlandweni webhola lase-Afrika,” kusho uCardoso.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: USIHLE Nduli oyinsika ye-Orlando Pirates owalimala ngasekuqaleni kukaNovemba, wonyaka odlule ILAHLISA ithemba inkulumo yomqeqeshi we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ngokubonakala enkundleni ingakapheli isizini kwezinsika zaleli qembu laseSoweto, ezilimele uSihle Nduli noThapelo Xoki osekunezinyanga zingabonakali ngenxa yokuthinteka okwahlukene. Le nkulumo umqeqeshi uyethule phambi kwesithangami nabezindaba ngoLwesibili ebusuku, kulandela iwini yePirates ka 5-0 kwiLamontville Golden Arrows ngaphansi kweBetway Premiership e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto. IPirates inethuba lokubuyela esicongweni kwi-log kule mpelasonto njengoba izimbangi zayo iMamelodi Sundowns zinomdlalo weCaf Champions League ekuhambeni. Ngokwenkulumo ka-Ouaddou, mancane amathuba okuthi uNduli noXoki bafake isandla embangweni wesicoco oqhubekayo ngomdlalo weligi neRichards Bay FC ngoLwesihlanu ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay. Lo mqeqeshi uphawule ngoNduli noXoki kulandela umphumela omqoka emjahweni wesicoco seligi neSundowns okuyiyona eqhwakele ngamaphuzu angu-56 uma uqhathanisa nawu-54 ePirates emuva kwesibalo semidlalo esifanayo (23). Ngokusho kwakhe, bobabili uNduli noXoki babuya ekulimaleni okubucayi kodwa sebeqalile ukusebenzela enkundleni nokuhlale kuyizinkomba zokuthi sekuseduze phambili. “Iphutha esingakaze silenze ngelokuqhela kuNduli noXoki ngoba belimele kwazise bangabadlali abamqoka kithina nabangabaholi,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Kuyasijabulisa ukubabona begijima etshanini abadlali abayizinsika abese behlale isikhathi eside besebenzela ngaphakathi (ejimini). “Konke kuyethembisa ngabo bobabili kodwa inkinga ukuthi kanginayo incazelo eqondile ngokuthi bazobuya nini enkundleni ngoba lokho kuphethwe ngodokotela beqembu. “Ngiyazi ukuthi amava abo nobuholi babo ngiyabudinga kodwa ngeke ngiphoqe ukuthi basheshe babuye enkundleni ngoba bamqoka kakhulu kwiPirates. “Ngisho ngabe kuthiwa bayoze babonakale enkundleni ngesizini ezayo, ngeke ngibe nankinga yinqobo nje uma bezobuya bewumqemane ngokugcwele ngoba ukulimala kwabo ngiyakwazi ukuthi bekubucayi kangakanani,” kusho u-Ouaddou. Yize lezi zindaba zingemnandi kwabalandela iPirates kodwa kufanele ukuba kubathoba inhliziyo ukwazi ukuthi esiswini ukhombisa izimpawu zokukhula uMasindi Nemtajela ekubeni kusekhona noMakhehleni Makhaula olindile ebhentshini. Ukungabibikho kukaXoki nakho akunakeki kwazise uNkosinathi Sibisi noLebone Seema sebenqabe namagoli emidlalweni engu-16 yeligi kusukela kwahamba uMbekezeli “TLB” Mbokazi.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UNOZINTI weKaizer Chiefs wokuqina, uBrandon Petersen, okuvela ukuthi akusensuku zatshwala ukuthi abonakale enkundleni KUQINISEKISWE izindaba ezimnandi kwabasondelene neKaizer Chiefs ngokusondela kwesikhathi sokubuya enkundleni kukanozinti wayo wokuqina, uBrandon Petersen, okuzitolika ngokuphephuka kwejezi kuBruce Bvuma ovele unyamanambana kwezinye izingxenye zabalandeli ngenxa yamaphutha asobala emidlalweni yakamuva. UPetersen nguyena owaqala isizini ezintini zeChiefs ngaphambi kokuxinwa wukugula okwamqala ngaphambi komdlalo wabakhaya ne-Orlando Pirates ngasekupheleni kukaFebhuwari nonyaka. Ngesikhathi ijezi lisekuyena lo nozinti ongukaputeni kwiChiefs, leli qembu laseNaturena lalibalwa namanye okunzima ukuthola amagoli kuwona. Ubufakazi balokhu busekutheni ngesikhathi uPetersen engeniswa esibhedlela okwalandelwa wukuhlinzwa, wayesenqabe namagoli amahlandla angu-11 emidlalweni yeligi engu-16. Indawo kaPetersen ibivalwe ngoBvuma ofike wabhekana nobunzima kwazise iChiefs ithole imiphumela emibi ilandelana ngoba sekunguyena osezintini. Yize iChiefs inezinkinga kodwa amaphutha akhe agqame kakhulu ngoba uqhubekile nokuwenza ngisho iqembu selishintsha ukuqala linqoba imidlalo yeligi emithathu ilandelana. Emidlalweni yeChiefs emihlanu yeligi evinjwe nguBvuma kusukela kwagula uPetersen, usengenelwe ngamagoli amahlanu okubalwa namathathu amngenela kowokuqala (nePirates). Ukubuyisa kweChiefs isithunzi kwakamuva sekuphinde kwaliqalisa phansi ithemba ngokuqeda okungenani endaweni yesithathu kwi-log lapho kumanje ihleli khona ngamaphuzu angu-39. Emdlalweni weligi wokugcina onqotshwe yiChiefs ngo 3-1 kwi-Orbit College FC, lo nozinti wenze iphutha eliphinde lamqhatha nezingxenye zabalandeli beChiefs kwazise ubengaqali. Emuva komdlalo we-Orbit, uBen Youssef ongelinye lamabamba kumaKhosi umemezele ukuthi akusensuku zatshwala ukuthi uPetersen abonakale enkundleni. “Kumasonto amabili adlule ubesebenzela eduze nabaqeqeshi bonozinti yingakho ngibonga nginconcoza kodokotela abebemlungiselela ukuba abuyele ekuziqeqesheni ngokugcwele,” kusho uBen Youssef. “Iyangenelisa nendlela yena uPetersen asebenza ngayo ngakho-ke uzobonakala enkundleni maduze,” kusho uBen Youssef. Umdlalo weChiefs olandelayo usekhaya ne-TS Galaxy ngeSonto ngo-3.30 ntambama, e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ULUCAS Ribeiro Costa waseBrazil owashiya isigubhukane kwiMamelodi Sundowns njengoba esedlalela iqembu laseSpain USEQALILE ukuheha izesheli umdlali waseBrazil owashiya kukhalwa kwiPremier Soccer League (PSL) ngengcwenga ayigijima kwiMamelodi Sundowns, uLucas Ribeiro Costa, osemabhukwini eCultural Deportiva Leonesa edlala esigabeni esiphekela iSpanish La Liga. URibeiro (27), okunguyena ophethe unklomelo wokuba yiPSL Footballer of the Season neminye emikhulu, uke waba sematheni muva nje ngezinkinga abebhekene nazo eqenjini akhe laseSpain. Emidlalweni yeligi engu-20 uRibeiro usayibhakuzise amahlandla amathathu inethi, wakhela uzakwabo elinye igoli elilodwa, okuyizibalo eziphansi kakhulu uma umqhathanisa nangesikhathi esalihlikihla kwi-PSL. Njengoba iqembu lakhe libhekene nokugencwa yizembe kufanele ukuba yisimo angasijwayele lesi lo mdlali waseBrazil njengoba ngesizini edlule ubengaconsi phansi ngisho kubalandeli bamaqembu ayizitha zeSundowns. Kusukela kusabalale imibiko ngezinkinga uRibeiro abhekene nazo eSpain kubukeka sengathi sekuyamkhanyela. Namanje usekhona kubalandeli beSundowns umuzwa wokuthi kufanele ngabe uyabasiza kule sizini ukugwema isimo seyangeyedlule lapho leli qembu laseChloorkop laguqa khona kwiPyramids FC yase-Egypt emdlalweni wamanqamu weCaf Champions League. Kuvela ukuthi asemathathu amaqembu afuna ukusayinisa uRibeiro njengoba ephelelwa yinkontileka ekupheleni kwale sizini. Muva nje, izinkinga zikaRibeiro zaseSpain bese zisetshenziswa ngabalandeli beKaizer Chiefs ukunxenxa abaphathi baleli qembu ukuba bamsayinise ngokushesha, angaze abuyele kwiSundowns noma athathwe ngamanye amaqembu aphesheya kwezilwandle. Emdlalweni wangempelasonto edlule uRibeiro uqalile kodwa wakhishwa singakapheli isiwombe sokuqala. Konke lokhu kuyizinkomba zezinkinga ezinkulu ezikhungethe lo mdlali osekuvele amaqembu ameshelayo. Phakathi kwamaqembu okuthiwa ashela uRibeiro kukhona negama leReal Mallorca edlala esigabeni esikhulu saseSpain (Spanish La Liga). IMallorca, esanda kushaya iReal Madrid kwiligi, inamasizini amahlanu ikhushulelwe esigabeni esikhulu isuka kulesi okudlala kusona uRibeiro. Ngaphandle kwaleli qembu laseSpain kuyavela nokuthi iWydad AC neRaja Casablanca, bobabili baseMorocco, bazama konke okusemandleni abo ukuqinisa ngalo mdlali onomlando wokulalisa uyaca kuwona wonke amaqembu athathwa njengamakhulu ebholeni lase-Afrika nelaseNingizimu Afrika ngokwahlukana.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: IZITOBHA zeKaizer Chiefs ezihlale zingekho ngenxa yamakhadi noma ukulimala u-Inacio Miguel no-Aden McCarthy NAKUBA imiphumela yakamuva yeKaizer Chiefs kwiBetway Premiership ikhombisa izimpawu zokuvuka ngesikhathi esikahle sesizini kuleli qembu laseNaturena kodwa omunye wamabamba abaqeqeshi, uKhalil Ben Youssef, ubalisa ngezinkinga ezibaphoqa ukushintsha isikimu cishe kuyona yonke imidlalo. Amakhosi anqobe okwesithathu kulandelana kwiligi ngoMsombuluko kwi-Orbit College ngamagoli kaWandile Duba, Mduduzi Shabalala noSiphesihle Ndlovu. Nakuba umphumela we-Orbit ubuyisele iChiefs endaweni yesithathu kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-39 emidlalweni engu-21, okuyisondeza nalapho ifisa ukuqeda khona, kodwa uBen Youssef uqome ukubalisa ngezitobha kunokuthakasela iwini. Umdlalo we-Orbit uqalwe nguGiven Msimango obese kunesikhathi engadlali ngenxa yokulimala, ezovala isikhala sika-Inacio Miguel obengekho ngenxa yesigwebo samakhadi. UNkanyiso Shinga, owafika ekuqaleni kwesizini esuka eqenjini lasePortugal, usabonakale emdlalweni owodwa nawo angawuqedanga ngenxa yokulimala. Abadlali abafana noReeve Frosler, Zitha Kwinika noDillan Solomons badlala kwembalwa baphinde bangabonakali ngenxa yakho belu ukuthinteka. UMiguel no-Aden McCarthy, abajwayele ukudlala ndawonye, bakwabahamba phambili kwiChiefs ngokuwola amakhadi aphuzi kule sizini. Nakuba iChiefs ibalwa namaqembu angawadedeli kalula amagoli kodwa uBen Youssef uveze ukuthi banenkinga yabadlali basemuva abahlale bengekho. “Njengoba sesiqedile ne-Orbit emqondweni wethu sekuduma ukuthi ukuthi sizosimisa kanjani isikimu somdlalo olandelayo neTS Galaxy,” kusho uBen Youssef kwabezindaba. “Izinkinga zethu ziqala ngokungabinaso isikimu esaziwayo ikakhulukazi emuva. Imbangela yalokhu wukuthi imidlalo yethu cishe yonke iphela sekukhona umdlali wasemuva olimele kumbe osethole ikhadi elimkhipha kolandelayo. “Lokhu sekuze kwasiqhatha nabalandeli abasisola ngokusishintsha njalo isikimu ikakhulukazi kubadlali basemuva. Kusukela kuqale isizini iChiefs idlala ngaphandle kwesinye sezitobha zayo ezingcono uRushwin (Dortley) ngenxa yakho belu ukulimala. “Ngaphezulu kwalokhu, kwiChiefs kuhlale kukhona umdlali wasemuva okufanele eqiwe yijezi cishe masonto onke ngenxa yezigwebo zamakhadi. Sizama ngakho konke okusemandleni ukusigwema lesi simo esisihlupha ezitobheni kodwa silokhu sisilandele njalo. “Isifiso sethu wukuba nesikimu esiqondile ikakhulukazi ezitobheni ngoba lokhu kuyasiza kodwa kasinawo uphawini wokukwenza lokhu ngoba isifo samakhadi nokulimala njalo kwezitobha kulokhu kusihlasele.” Amakhosi azodlala olandelayo weligi neTS Galaxy eFB Stadium ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: OMUNYE wabadlali beMamelodi Sundowns abayizinsika zeBafana Bafana, uTeboho Mokoena ABADLALI beBafana Bafana bahlohlwe ngumqeqeshi weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, ngokungazithambisi kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngoba izinga labo kalihluke ngalutho kwelalaba abadlala kumaligi athathwa njengamakhulu emhlabeni. UCardoso uzwakalise ukuyethemba iBafana kaHugo Broos njengoba iya kweyoMhlaba. Leli qembu likaBroos lisalelwe yizinyanga ezimbili ukuthi liqale iNdebe yoMhlaba eliqhathwe kuyona ku-Group A nabanye bosokhaya iMexico, South Korea neCzech Republic. Ngokubona kukaCardoso, odabuka ePortugal, kawukho umehluko otheni phakathi kwabadlali bomhlaba nabeBafana, ngoba iSundowns yakucacisa lokhu kwiFifa Club World Cup ngoJuni wonyaka odlule e-United States (USA). Kulo mqhudelwano, iSundowns yaqopha umlando ngokunqoba ngo 1-0 kwi-Ulsan HD yaseSouth Korea emdlalweni wokuqala, yabambana ngo 0-0 neFluminense yaseBrazil, ngaphambi kokuguqa ngo 4-3 emdlalweni namanje okusakhulunywa ngawo neBorussia Dortmund yaseGermany. Ukugqisha kweBafana ngabadlali beSundowns, uCardoso ukubona njengesikhali esimqoka sikaBroos ngoba leli qembu laseChloorkop selivele limfakele isithunzi ebholeni lomhlaba. “Umhlaba wonke uyaqonda ukuthi ibhola laseNingizimu Afrika liseqophelweni eliphezulu kulandela ukuhlabana kwalo kwakamuva njengendlela iSundowns eyalimela ngayo kwiFifa Club World Cup,” kusho uCardoso. “Kwababe nemibuzo yokuthi sizokwenzenjani uma sesibhekene nabadlali bomhlaba bazithola izimpendulo zabo ngesikhathi kuqhubeka umqhudelwnao. “Kuningi lapho kusafanele siqinise khona kodwa ngikubona kufanele kusebenze njengesikhuthazi kubadlali beBafana ukuthi kasikho isidingo sokuzingabaza. “Akukuningi okudingwa ngabadlali beBafana kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngaphandle kokuhlangana njengeqembu bazame ukugwema amaphutha, bangalokothi bazingabaze ngoba umhlaba wonke usuyaqonda ukuthi liningi kangakanani ithalente ebholeni laseNingizimu Afrika,” kusho uCardoso. Ngokusho kukaBroos, iBafana kusafanele ithole okungenani umdlalo owodwa oqinile wokuziqeqesha ngenyanga ezayo ngaphambi kokuqala kwalo mqhudelwano ozobe usingethwe yiMexico, Canada ne-USA ngokubambisana kusukela ngoJuni 11.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMDUDUZI Shabalala ejabulela igoli alishaye ngesikhathi benqoba i-Orbit College FC ngo 3-1 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership. I-KAIZER Chiefs iphilise iphupho layo lokubuyela kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngokubuya seliyoshona, inqoba ngembudlu kwi-Orbit College FC emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngoMsombuluko ntambama, eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha. Ngale wini, iChiefs eyithole kade ilandela emuva, ilishiye liphila iphupho layo lokubuyela emidlalweni yase-Afrika, njengoba ebeshilo omunye wamabamba abaqeqeshi bayo, uKhalil Ben Youssef, ngaphambi komdlalo. Inkundla ivulwe ngegoli nguMbulelo Wagaba ngomzuzu ka-22 ngaphambi kokulinganisa kukaWandile Duba ngoka-42. Amaketango eChiefs aze aqaqeka ngomzuzu ka-68, lapho uMduduzi Shabalala eyibeke khona ebuhleni ngegoli athe angalishaya wakhishwa. UNdlovu ushaye elesithathu akhelwa nguFlavio Da Silva abebesanda kungena naye. Komunye umdlalo weBetway Premiership obusePrincess Magogo Stadium, KwaMashu, AmaZulu FC neSekhukhune United badlale ngokulingana ngo 2-2. Amagoli oSuthu ashaywe nguThapelo Matlhoko noNkosikhona Radebe, aweBabina Noko ashaywa ngu-Olerato Mandi noBright Ndlovu. Le miphumela ishiye iChiefs endaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu angu-39 emidlalweni engu-21, Usuthu lusendaweni yesine ngamaphuzu angu-38 emidlalweni engu-23 neSekhukhune kweyesihlanu ngamaphuzu angu-35 emidlalweni engu-23. I-Orbit isasengozini yokugawulwa yizembe kwazise isendaweni ka-15 ngamaphuzu angu-18 emidlalweni engu-23. Iyishiya ngamaphuzu amane iMagesi FC esemsileni, ekubeni leli qembu laseLimpopo lisadlale imidlalo engu-21.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMBEKEZELI Mbokazi oyisithenjwa seBafana Bafana UKUCACA kwezwe lesine kwazobumba u-Group A weNdebe yoMhlaba kufana nokukhala kwewashi elivusa umqeqeshi weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, osezohlelela into ayaziyo kulezi zinsuku ezingu-68 ezisele ngaphambi kokuqala komqhudelwano. Maphakathi nesonto sihlangene isibalo samazwe azobumba u-Group A kulandela ukungena kweCzechia eyengeze kwiNingizimu Afrika, South Korea nosokhaya iMexico. INdebe yoMhlaba ka-2026 izoqala ngoJuni 11 eMexico, Canada ne-United States of America (USA). Amazwe amabili azoqeda phezulu ku-Group A azodlulela kwi-Last 32 kwazise lo mqhudelwano uzoqalwa ngamazwe angu-48. Amaqembu esizwe ayisishiyagalombili azoqeda endaweni yesithathu ngezibalo ezingcono nawo azothola indawo kwi-Last 32. Kusukela kuqhathwe amaqoqo ngonyaka odlule, umqeqeshi weBafana (uBroos) ubelokhu eliqagela iqembu lesizwe lesine kwaze kwaba wukuthi iCzechia izifaka esigqokweni ngeledlule ngokunqoba kwiDenmark sekukhahlelwa amaphenathi. Imidlalo yeBafana Bafana Mexico v Bafana (Azteca Stadium, Mexico City, 16 Juni); Czech Republic v Bafana (Mercedes Benz Stadium, Atlanta, 18 June); Bafana v South Korea (BBVA Bancomer Stadium, Guadalupe, 25 Juni). Amazwe nokukleliswa kwawo yiFifa: IBafana, ebuyela kwiNdebe yoMhlaba okokuqala eminyakeni engu-16, ibalwa namazwe angase amangaze kulo mqhudelwano yize ikhombise izimpawu zokuhlehla nyova eMorocco uma uqhathanisa neyakwenza kwi-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) yase-Ivory Coast. Iqembu lakuleli lingene eNdebeni yoMhlaba ngokuqhwakela eqoqweni lalo kweyokuhlunga yeCaf lapho lanqoba khona imidlalo emihlanu, ladlala ngokulingana kwemithathu, lahlulwa kowodwa, laphinde laphucwa owodwa elaliwudlale neLesotho ngenxa yokudlalisa uTeboho Mokoena enamakhadi. Umdlali obhekiwe (Mbekezeli “TLB” Mbokazi) UMbokazi, ogqame isizini eyodwa kwi-Orlando Pirates wathola amadlelo aluhlaza kwiChicago Fire FC yase-USA, ukhombisa izimpawu zokukhula kakhulu okufakazelwa yindlela adlale ngayo selokhu afika eqenjini lesizwe ngonyaka odlule nakowakamuva ngesikhathhi bezwana amandla nePanama lapho eshaye khona inguzunga yeshodi layonamathela enethini. UMGADLI weMexico onamava, uRaul Jimenez Image: FACEBOOK / MEXICAN NATIONAL TEAM IMexico eyaphelela kwi-quarterfinal ngo-1986, okungunyaka eyagcina ngawo ukusingatha iNdebe yoMhlaba, ibikhona emqhudelwaneni odlule eQatar ngo-2022, yaphuma esigabeni samaqoqo. Nakulokhu ithwelwe ngeqoma njengoba isemazweni okuzodlalelwa kuwo iNdebe yoMhlaba. Umdlali obhekiwe (Raul Jimenez) Nakuba engabanga nesizini enhle kwiFulham FC yase-England lapho eseshaye khona amagoli ayisishiyagalolunye emidlalweni engu-30 kodwa lo mgadli ubebiziwe emidlalweni yobungani yakamuva futhi ukwabangahola iqembu lasekhaya kulo mqhudelwano. UMGADLI weKorea uSon Heung-min osedlala kwiligi yase-United States Image: FACEBOOK / KOREA FOOTBALL TEAM Yize kungakhulunywa kangako ngaleli qembu lesizwe kodwa lingase libe yingozi kakhulu kwiBafana kwazise alikaze liphuthwe yiNdebe yoMhlaba kusukela ngo-1986. Kweyakamuva eyayiseQatar ngo-2022 laphuma kwiLast 16. Emidlalweni yokuhlunga liqede phezulu emaqoqweni alo kuyona yomibili imizuliswano futhi alihlulwanga nakanye emidlalweni engu-16 eliyidlalile. Umdlali obhekiwe (Son Heung-min) Kuze kube namuhla lo mgadli wodumo kwiTottenham Hotspur yase-England usawaqhulula amagoli njengoba esedlalela iLos Angeles FC yase-USA. Ukuba sendaweni ayijwayele nokuba ngumholi othembekile eqenjini lakhe lesizwe kwenza abalwe kokumele iBafana ibaqaphelisise. UMGADLI weCzechia oyingozi, uPatrik Schick Image: FACEBOOK / CZECHIA FOOTBALL ICzechia isemazweni akhuza ibuya eNdebeni yoMhlaba ngemuva kwesikhathi eside njengoba yagcina ukubonakala kulo mqhudelwano ngo-2006, lapho yaphuma khona esigabeni samaqoqo. Isike yafika kabili kowamanqamu, ngo-1934 nango-1962. Nakuba yahluleka ukuzibekisela indawo emzuliswaneni wokuqala wokuhlunga e-Europe, ikhombise ukuqina kowesibili idlula kwi-Ireland neDenmark. Umdlali obhekiwe (Patrik Schick) USchick ukubagadli abahlonishwayo kwiBundesliga yaseGermany lapho eseshayele khona iBayer Leverkusen amagoli ayisishiyagalolunye emidlalweni yeligi engu-20.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: U-ANDILE Jali owavezwa yiNedbank Cup osephenduke inxusa layo njengoba engaseyena umdlali webhola elikhokhelayo OMUNYE wabadlali okuyohlale kukhulunywa ngabo ebholeni laseNingizimu Afrika, u-Andile “Mhlekazi” Jali, uhlabe ikhwelo kwinjejane esemaqenjini amane asethubeni lokudla isicoco seNedbank Cup ngokubaluleka kokubambisisa leli thuba njengoba enza wagcina esethole amadlelo aluhlaza nokwalandelwa yimpilo entofontofo. Ukusongwa kwemidlalo yamazwe kukhomba ukubuya kweNedbank ngeyandulela eyamanqamu ezodlalelwa ezinkundleni ezahlukene kule mpelasonto. Kuzoqala umdlalo weDurban City neCasric Stars ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambala, eChatsworth Stadium eThekwini, kulandele owe-TS Galaxy neMilford FC kongeSonto ngesikhathi esifanayo, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Nakuba kunomuzwa wokuthi ukuphuma kwamaqembu athathwa njengamakhulu kwi-Premier Soccer League (PSL) kulo mqhudelwano kulehlisile isasasa kodwa uJali ubona ngendlela ehlukile. “Kuwukubuka ngomqondo ongahluzekile ukuthi umdlalo wamanqamu uzobheda ngoba kubhekene amaqembu angenabo abalandeli abaningi, inhloso enkulu yakwaNedbank wukufukula laba abakudingayo lokho,” kusho uJali kwiSolezwe izolo emini. “Isifiso sami esikhulu ukuthi abadlali, ikakhulukazi abancane abadlalela la maqembu asele kwiNedbank, basebenzise mina njengesibonelo. “Kungenxa yeNedbank Cup abalandeli bebhola laseMzansi bazi uJali kodwa ukube (uJali) wazithambisa ngabe akwaziwa lutho ngaye. “Ngisfisa abadlali abancane bamaqembu e-PSL bawukhumbule njalo lo mqhudelwano ngamathuba owavulayo njengoba kwenzeka kimina ngagcina ngidlalela amaqembu athathwa njengamakhulu ngaze ngaya naphesheya kwezilwandle. Buka manje yiwona futhi ongibuyisa njengenxusa. “Umyalezo wami kubadlali abancane ukuthi bangaliyeki leli thuba lokuziveza ngoba nami ngagqanyiswa yiNedbank nokwalandelwa ngukuthi ngiye phesheya kwezilwandle,” kusho uJali (35) owawina iligi ne-Orlando Pirates Mamelodi Sundowns. Ukuqinisekisile kwiSolezwe ukuthi usewabeke ethala amakhokho nokuthi usegxile ekubeni ngumlimi wemfuyo. “Kangiseyena umdlali webhola elikhokhelayo. Sengigxile ekubeni ngumlimi nokuzidlalela izithuthuthu,” kusho uJali. Ngaphambi kokudlana indlebe noJali owagqama kwiBafana Bafana nakwiKV Oostende yaseBelgium, leli phephandaba lixoxe noNthabiseng Matshekga oyinhloko yohlaka olungaphansi kwezokukhangisa kwaNedbank. “Silindele lukhulu kule mpelasonto kumaqembu amane azibeke ethubeni lokugoduka nale nkomishi ehamba nentshontsho lokumela iNingizimu Afrika kwiCaf Confederation Cup,” kusho lesi sikhulu.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ISITHENJWA seBafana Bafana uMbekezeli 'TLB' Mbokazi esikhuzwe ngumqeqeshi uHugo Broos ngomkhuba okufanele siwuyeke KUKHUZWE isilomo somdlali weBafana Bafana neChicago Fire FC yase-United States of America (USA), uMbekezeli “TLB” Mbokazi, ngomkhuba okuyiwona wodwa onamandla okuma phakathi kwaso nekusasa eliqhakazile emaligini athathwa njengamakhulu ebholeni lomhlaba. Lesi sexwayiso sikhishwe yinhloko yabaqeqeshi kwiBafana, uHugo Broos, ngesikhathi ikhuluma nabezindaba kulandela ukushayelwa kwayo ekhaya okokuqala kusukela yathatha lo msebenzi ngo-2021. IBafana ikhale ngaphansi ngo 2-1 kwiPanama e-DHL Stadium, eKapa, kodwa uMbokazi uyishayele elinye lamagoli amahle emlandweni waleli qembu lesizwe elilungiselela iNdebe yoMhlaba ezoqala ezinsukwini ezingaphansi kwezingu-75 eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America (USA). Nakuba uBroos ebephoxekile emuva kokuguqiswa yiPanama ngoLwesibili ebusuku, kodwa uveze okuningi akuchaze njegokumjabulisile njengendlela uMbokazi adlale ngayo. “Kukhona engingakuthandanga ngomdlalo kodwa okuningi kungiphendule imibuzo eminingi ebenginayo ekhanda,” kusho uBroos esithangamini nabezindaba. Lo mqeqeshi waseBelgium ubuzwe ngegoli likaMbokazi nendlela adlale ngayo kwazise wayemshiye ngaphandle kowokuqala owadlalelwa eMoses Mbhida Stadium, eThekwini. “UMbokazi uyaziwa ukuthi yisitobha sethu esingafuni lutho kodwa futhi ungumdlali webhola ophelele njengoba ekhombisile ngengcwenga yegoli asishayele yona. “Unawo wonke amava adingeka kumdlali ongagqama emaligini athathwa njengamakhulu emhlabeni kodwa kufanele alungise indaba yakhe yokuhluthuka kalula. “Ngiyavuma ukuthi usemncane kodwa kufanele akufunde ngokushesha ukuthi uma izinto zingahambi ngendlela afisa ngayo enkundleni kasikho isidingo sokuhluthuka inhliziyo ngoba lokhu kuvamise ukulandelwa yizinto ezimbi. “Ngijabule ngaye (uMbokazi) nozakwabo adlala nabo emuva kodwa ukuhluthuka kuyena yikhona engikubona kungase kumkhubaze kumbe kume phakathi kwakhe nezinkontileka emaligini athathwa njengamakhulu emhlabeni,” kusho uBroos. UMbokazi unekhadi elibomvu elilodwa kwiBafana alithola ngenxa yakho ukuhluthuka ngesikhathi ibhekene neZimbabwe emdlalweni wokuhlungela iNdebe yoMhlaba.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: Lucas Ribeiro Costa  UMDLALI wakudala weMamelodi Sundowns uLucas Ribeiro Costa othwele kanzima eqenjini lakhe laphesheya kwezilwandle SINZIMA isimo esimi phambi komdlali ophethe umklomelo wokuba yi-PSL Footballer of the Season, uLucas Ribeiro, njengoba ebhekene nokugencwa yizembe eqenjini lakhe laseSpain elidlala esigabeni esiphakela esikhulu. URibeiro (27) namanje okusakhalwa ngenxa yalokhu ashiya ekwenze ebholeni elikhulu laseNingizimu Afrika ngesikhathi esemabhukwini eMamelodi Sundowns, angase azithole edlala esigabeni sesithathu uma iqembu lakhe iCultural Deportiva Leonessa lingashintshi ukuqalaza kule midlalo yeligi esele. Lo mdlali okufanele ngabe usiza iSundowns ivikele isicoco seBetway Premiership aphinde afake isandla ukulungisa iphutha langesizini edlule kwiCaf Champions League, umelwe wukusiza iLeonessa isuke emsileni kwi-log yeSpanis La Liga 2. URibeiro waseBrazil wafika kwi-PSL ngo-2023 kwacaca ukuthi akekho ofika ezingeni lakhe njengoba ngesizini yakhe yokugcina kuleli qembu laseChloorkop uyidle yonke imiklomelo emikhulu ye-PSL. Esikhundleni sokuthi ibhola lakhe likhuphuke ujoyine leli qembu laseSpain kwaba sengathi izinto ziqala kahle kodwa zaphinde zajika. Ngezinyanga zokuqala uRibeiro uke waqokwa njengomdlali wenyanga kwiLeonessa njengoba eshwebe iphenathi kodlule bexetshulwa yiFC Andorra ngo 4-0. Kumanje iLeonessa enamaphuzu angu-28 emidlalweni yeligi engu-32 ibambe ibhuleki kwi-log kodwa okwenza umsebenzi wayo ube nzima nakakhulu ngukuthi ingaphansi kwengu-10 imidlalo yeligi esele ngaphambi kokusongwa kwesizini. Lesi sibalo semidlalo uma usiqhathanisa nefomu yakamuva yeLeonessa kucishe kucace ukuthi lingase likhale izembe kuyona ngoba iReal Zaragoza okuyiqembu elihleli endaweni yokugcina yokuvuka (izembe) kwi-log ingcono ngamaphuzu amahlanu. Kusukela kuqubuke izindaba zokungahlali kahle kukaRibeiro eSpain abalandeli beKaizer Chiefs balokhu bemcele njalo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana uKaizer Motaung Jnr oyisikhulu sayo ukuba amgxumele kumanje lo mdlali ngoba inkontileka yakhe neLeonessa iyaphela ngoJuni 30.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ABALANDELI baKaizer Chiefs ne-Orlando Pirates kwiSoweto Derby. UKUTHENGWA kwamathikithi omdlalo wabakhaya baseSoweto aphele ezinsukwini ezimbili kuwubufakazi obuqanda ikhanda bokuthi nakuba kubukeka sengathi iKaizer Chiefs isalele emuva ngokuningi ezimbangini zayo i-Orlando Pirates kodwa leli qembu laseNaturena lisenawo amandla uma kuza kubalandeli. IPirates engosokhaya kulokhu iyona ememezele ngoMsombuluko ukuthi aseqalile ukudayiswa amathikithi omdlalo wayo weBetway Premiership neChiefs ngo-Ephreli 26 ngo-3.30 ntambama e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. Lo mdlalo ukwemqoka kwesalele la maqembu anezinhloso ezingafani ngale sizini ezosongwa ngoMeyi 23. IPirates emiswe kabi yiSundowns esicongweni izama ukudla iligi okokuqala kusukela ngo-2014 kanti Amakhosi ake abakhona embangweni wesicoco seligi asecula ingoma ekhomba ukuthi ngisho angaqeda endaweni yesithathu lokhu kuzowajabulisa ngoba kuzowabuyisela kwiCaf Confederation Cup. IPirates iqhwakele kwi-log kodwa ingcono ngephuzu elilodwa kwiSundowns esele ngomdlalo nenomlando wokucoboshisa kwasani olubekwa phambi kwayo uma isiyibona intambo yesicoco. Ingaphansi kwengu-10 imidlalo esele ngaphambi kokusongwa kwesizini uma kubalwa nalona wabakhaya. Amathikithi awo adayise aphela yize bekunemibiko eminingi ngobuhixihixi. Kubikwe inqwaba yezinkinga ngohlelo lokuthenga amathikithi nemishini yakhona kodwa ngoLwesibili ekuseni iqalile ukusabalala imibiko ebiqinisekisa ukuthi sekwenzekile obekulindelekile (asedayiswe aphela). Asiside isikhathi iChiefs nePirates benqwamene kwiligi (ngoFebhuwari) osekungumlando ukuthi ezika-Aabdeslam Ouaddou zatitinya leli qembu eliphekwa nguCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef ngembudlu ka 3-0 wamagoli kaTsepang Moremi, Oswin Appollis no-Evidence Makgopa. Lesi sibhaxu esaba yisilonda bekubhekwe ukuthi sidlale indima ngokuthi kube  nabalandeli beChiefs abebengeke bayingene indaba yokuyoyeseka kulo mdlalo. Emasontweni adlule enye ingxenye yabalandeli beChiefs beyinxenxa abanye ngokuduba iqembu bangayihambeli imidlalo yalo kuze kube abaphathi balo basukumela indaba yokuqasha umqeqeshi ngokugcwele. Lokhu bekulandela imiphumela emibi etholwe yiChiefs kulandelana nokuyilapho iqale khona imvunge ngamaqhinga asetshenziswa nguKaze noBen Youssef.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UBONGOKUHLE Hlongwane ongabanga nomdlalo omuhle kwiBafana Bafana BALISEBENZISE ngezindlela ezahlukene ithuba abadlali ababili beBafana Bafana abagagule ngamagama umqeqeshi waleli qembu lesizwe uHugo Broos ngesikhathi ekhuluma ngaphambi komdlalo wobungani nePanama ngoLwesibili ebusuku e-DHL Stadium, eKapa. Kulo mdlalo obekungokokuqala emlandweni ukuthi uBroos ashayelwe ekhaya, amagoli okuwine ngawo iPanama ashaywe ngoJose Cordoba noGiovanni Ramos, obecisha elikaMbekezeli Mbokazi. UBongokuhle Hlongwane owagcina ukushayela iBafana igoli ngo-2022 akabanga nomdlalo omuhle kwazise uthole ithuba elilula esiwombeni sokuqala lamehlula ngaphambi kokukhishwa kwesesibili. UJayden Adams naye osanda kubuya kuleli qembu lesizwe kulandela ingxabano yakhe noBroos ukhombise izimpawu zokukulungela ukuvala isikhala sikaSiphephelo Sithole uma uBroos emdinga. Bobabili laba badlali ubasho ngamagama uBroos ukuthi ubheke lukhulu kubona ngoba kufanele athathe isinqumo ngabo neqembu eliya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. “Bobabili ngibabuyisele ukubabonela eduze ngakho-ke kukubona ukuthi bayalisebenzisa ithuba noma cha,” kusho uBroos ngoHlongwane no-Adams kwaSuperSport. Nakuba kuyiwe ekhefini zibambene ngo 0-0 kodwa obekusobala ngukuthi iPanama ibikhombisa izimpawu zokuba ngcono kuneqembu lasekhaya. Ngokubona ingozi uBroos ukhiphe uLyle Foster ophinde waphikwa ngamathuba nokaputeni uRonwen Williams, izindawo zabo wazivala ngo-Evidence Makgopa noRenaldo Leaner. Ube nesandla uLeaner ekungeneni kwegoli likaCordoba alishaye kade kuyi-freekick. Kuthe kungangena igoli lePanama uBroos wafaka uThemba Zwane, Thapelo Maseko no-Oswin Appollis ezindaweni zoTsepang Moremi, Relebohile Mofokeng noHlongwane. Bonke laba badlali abafakwe nguBroos bangene bayikhuphula iBafana kwaze kwavela nenguzunga yegoli lokulinganisa uMbokazi ayijikijele enethini kulandela iphasi kaZwane. Isheshe yashabalala nokho leyo njabulo ngesikhathi uRamos eshaya igoli lokuwina lezivakashi nelishiye kukhalwa eKapa.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UNOZINTI we-Orlando Pirates, uSipho Chaine, okwethuse abaningi ukusala kwakhe ngaphadle esikwatini seBafana Bafana esizicijela iNdebe yoMhlaba Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX KUFANELE kube yinto elindelekile ukuthi kunabadlali abangaconsi phansi kubalandeli bamaqembu abo abazosala ngaphandle uma umqeqeshi weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, esebopha amabhawodi okugcina ngaphambi kokuya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America (USA). Lona ngumbono kaRoger De Sa ongomunye wonozinti beBafana ababesebhentshini umqhudelwano wonke ngesikhathi idla isicoco se-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) ngo-1996. UDe Sa osewaphenduka umqeqeshi nomhlaziyi webhola, uphendule ngale ndlela ngokusala ngaphandle kukaSipho Chaine we-Orlando Pirates kwiBafana ematasa namalungiselelo eNdebe yoMhlaba ngemidlalo emibili nePanama. Ukusala kukaChaine kulesi sikwati kwethusile kwazise kwiBetway Premiership wenza kahle ngale ndlela yokuthi ubalwa konozinti abasemgqeni wokugoduka nomklomelo weBetway Premiership Goalkeeper of the Season ka-2025/2026. Ngesikhathi uBroos ebuzwa ngokuqoka kwakhe uRenaldo Leaner weSekhukhune United esikhundleni sikaChaine, uphendule ngokuthi ukuthola indawo kwiBafana akuyona into ecoshwa phansi. UDe Sa oseke wasebenza kwiPirates njengenhloko yabaqeqeshi akakholwa ukuthi kukhona inkinga uBroos anayo noChaine ngqo kepha kuqondane nokuthi kukhona abanye abadlali abefisa ukubabonela eduze ngaphambi kokunquma ngabaya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. “Baningi abadlali okufanele ngabe basekhempini yeBafana eqhubekayo eKapa, kodwa umqeqeshi uqome ukusebenzisa lena (khempu) ukubonela eduze laba angabajwayele,” kusho uDe Sa. “Kuyaqapheleka okukaChaine ngoba wenza kahle kulezi zinsuku kwiPirates kodwa futhi ukusala kwakhe emidlalweni yePanama akusho ukuthi ngeke esaba yingxenye yesikwati esiya koweNdebe yoMhlaba. “Kangicabangi ukuthi naye uChaine kumele adikibaliswe wukusala kwakhe kodwa kufanele kufundise abadlali nathi singabalandeli ukuthi uBroos ngeke akwazi ukuhamba nabo bonke kweyoMhlaba," kusho uDe Sa. “Kunesibalo esikalelwe ukuba uBroos afike naso kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngakho-ke kubalulekile ukuqonda ukuthi kunabadlali abangeke bayidlale iNdebe yoMhlaba ekubeni beyizithandwa emaqenjini abo. “Kasikho isidingo sokuthi uChaine athuke kodwa thina abalandeli kufanele sikukhumbule njalo ukuthi kukhona izithandwa zethu ezisosala ngaphandle esikwatini seNdebe yoMhlaba ngoba uBroos akakwazi ukuhamba nabo bonke."

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMGADLI weBafana Bafana, uBongokuhle Hlongwane, onejoka lokuqinisekisa indawo yakhe esikwatini esiya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngoJuni Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX BANEJOKA lokuzifaka enhliziyweni yomqeqeshi, uHugo Broos, ngomdlalo wobungani nePanama abadlali beBafana Bafana ababuyiswe kulesi sikwati emuva kwesikhathi banyamalala. Abadlali okusekucatshangwa ukuthi uBroos usebalahlile okubalwa kubona uThapelo Maseko noBongokuhle Hlongwane, kulindeleke ukuthi bathole isikimu uma iBafana isidudulana nePanama eDHL Stadium, eKapa, namuhla ngo-7.30 ebusuku. Nakuba abanye abadlali sekucaca ukuthi bazoyithola indawo esikwatini esizodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngoJuni eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America kodwa uMaseko noHlongwane basahlalelwe wumsebenzi wokukhombisa uBroos ukuthi wenze iphutha ngokubashiya kwi-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) eMorocco nasemidlalweni yokuhlungela eyoMhlaba. NgoLwesihlanu, iBafana ibambane nePanama ngo 1-1 kowobungani eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. UMaseko noHlongwane kabazange balithinte ibhola kowePanama wokuqala kodwa uBroos wethembise ukubazwisa kowesibili okungowokugcina. Lo mdlalo unika ingqayizivele yethuba ukuthi uMaseko noHlongwane baqhubeke nefomu abayikhombisa ngokwahlukana eCyprus nakwiMajor League Soccer (MLS) yase-USA. UMaseko owayekwiBafana kwi-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) ngo-2024 e-Ivory Coast, ufike ngoJanuwari kwazwakala kwi-AEL Limassol yakuleliya lizwe lapho ebolekiswe khona yiMamelodi Sundowns. Kusukela uMaseko efikile kuleli qembu usephenduke isithandwa sabalandeli kwazise inethi useyibhakuzise amahlandla amabili, wakhela nozakwabo amanye amagoli. Kuhlukile okukaHlongwane kwazise ubese enesikhathi egila izimanga kwiMinnesota FC kodwa uBroos ubeyiziba ngisho ebuzwa indaba yakhe. Okuhle ngalo mdlali wukuthi ungomunye walaba uBroos asuka nabo phansi yingakho bekuxaka ukuzitshwa kwakhe njengoba ebengasagcini ngokushaya amagoli kodwa ubesedlaliswa nasemuva uma isimo siphoqa. Ukubizwa kwabo kwiBafana ngesikhathi besefomini kunika uMaseko noHlongwane ingqayizivele yethuba lokushayela isipikili sokugcina ngomdlalo wePanama enhliziyweni yalo mqeqeshi waseBelgium kwazise sesisondele isikhathi sokumemezela isikwati aya ngaso kweyoMhlaba. Omunye umdlali okufanele athathe iso likaBroos nguThabang Matuludi wePolokwane City onethuba lokukhumbuza uBroos ukuthi ukulungele ukungena enkundleni uma edingeka. Ngokusho kukaBroos, lo mdlalo ungase uqalwe nguMbekezeli “TLB” Mbokazi athembise ukungamxini kwazise benoHlongwane basuka e-USA okuphoqa ukuthi kufanele baphunyuzwe ngokugcwele ngaphambi kokuqala imidlalo.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMBEKEZELI "TLB" Mbokazi ulwazi kahle ulaka lomqeqeshi weBafana Bafana uHugo Broos UMQEQESHI weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, ukhuze amaqembu adlala kwi-Premier Soccer League (PSL) ngomkhuba wokujaha ithuba lokwenza imali ngabadlali abancane abakhombisa ikhono, akhohlwe wukubafundisa indlela yokuziphatha ngaphakathi nangaphandle kwenkundla. UBroos uyaziwa ngokungathuli uma kukhona anganeme ngakho njengoba enza kuMbekezeli "TLB" Mbokazi ngoDisemba nakuJaydon Adams weMamelodi Sundowns ngonyaka odlule. Bobabili laba badlali babefike sekudlule isikhathi ejmini yeBafana. U-Adams waxoshwa kodwa uMbokazi waxwayiswa kanzima. Kusukela athatha umsebenzi ngo-2021, lo mqeqeshi waseBelgium usenyathele amakhona abaningi ngezinkulumo zakhe uma kukhona angakuthandi kubaphathi bezindaba zabadlali kuya emaqenjini uqobo. UBroos ukhulume ngalo mkhuba esithangamini nabezindaba lapho ebenza khona amalungiselelo okugcina omdlalo wobungani wokuqala nePanama ngoLwesihlanu ngo-7 ebusuku eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini.
