Ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba ePitoli kuleli sonto, uBroos ukhale ngomkhuba omubi wamaqembu e-PSL wokubeka phambili ukwenza imali, engazixaki ngokukhulisa abadlali abancane ngendlela yokuziphatha Kula maqembu uBroos uphume iqhubu ne-Orlando Pirates ngendlela eyenza ngayo ngesikhathi uMbokazi eshiywe yindiza okwaholela ekutheni afike sekudlule isikhathi eyelindelwe ngaso ekhempini. “Mubi lo mkhuba wamaqembu wokubuka abadlali abancane njengemali hhayi izingane ezincane ezisadinga ukugadwa cishe kukona konke ezikwenzayo,” kusho uBroos. “Isenzo sePirates sokuvikela uMbokazi ekubeni esephutheni sangishiya nginengekile ngoba kwakungicacela ukuthi bayambulala esikhundleni sokumakha. “Ngiyazi ngijwayele ukukhala ngokuziphatha kwabaphathi bezindaba zabadlali uma sebebona imali kodwa ukungishayela ucingo kwePirates ingazisa ukuthi uMbokazi ushiywe yibhanoyi ngoba ebesuka endaweni okulukhuni ukufinyelela esikhumulweni sezindiza uma usuka kuyona kwangicika. “UMbokazi nabanye abadlali beBafana banekusasa eliqhakazile kepha bholeni kodwa lokhu akukucishi ukuthi baseyinjejane. “Lolu hlobo lwabadlali lusadinga ukubanjwa ngesandla kokuningi. Uma amaqembu abo ebavikela bonile kufana nokuthi asuke ekugqugquzela ukuthi bangawuhloniphi umthetho. “Akuyona iPirates yodwa enalo mkhuba kepha namanye amaqembu e-PSL asengikhombise kaningi ukuthi imali asuke ebona ukuthi angayenza ngomdlali osemncane kuba iyona eseqhulwini kunokuthi amfundise indlela eqoqekile yokuziphatha komdlali webhola elikhokhelayo."

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMGADLI uTshegofatso Mabasa obolekiswe kwiStellenbosch FC yi-Orlando Pirates ezinyangeni ezedlule Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI weStellenbosch FC, uGavin Hunt, ukhulume sakugudla opheka u-Abdeslam Ouaddou opheka i-Orlando Pirates ngokuntula amaqhinga okusebenzisa ngezindlela ezahlukene umgadli uTshegofatso Mabasa. UMabasa ubolekiswe yiPirates kwiStellenbosch ngoJanuwari, kuze kuphele isizini ka-2025/2026. Phakathi kwezizathu ebeziseqhulwini ngokubolekiswa kwalo mgadli elingangatshazwa, ikhono lakhe lokubhakuzisa inethi kube wukuthi u-Ouaddou akakwazi ukusebenzisa abagadli abalindela ibhola. Kunalokho ufuna abaxina izitobha phambili liziqala emuva ibhola. Ngaphambi kokuhamba kwiPirates, uMabasa uyishayele amagoli amane emidlalweni eyisishiyagalolunye. Nakuba izinombolo zakhe bezizinhle kodwa kwakusobala ukuthi u-Ouaddou ukholelwa ekusebenziseni uYanela Mbuthuma no-Evidence Makgopa. Kusukela efikile kwiStellies, useshaye amagoli amathathu. Ngempelasonto edlule, ushaye amabili ngesikhathi inqoba kwiChippa United ngo 2-0 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership. Ngalokhu, iStellies isinyukele endaweni yesishiyagalolunye. “Akukwazi ukuthi umgadli wohlobo oluphambili njengoMabasa lungaze luhambe eqenjini ngoba ingekho indlela yokulusebenzisa,” kusho uHunt sakugudla u-Ouaddou. “Ngiyavuma akalona uhlobo oluxina izitobha ngoba nathi kasimsebenzisi kanjalo kepha ukumdedela, bengingeke ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi uma umnika ibhola esendaweni ekahle, izobhakuza nakanjani inethi. “Unekhono elivumela zonke izindlela zokudlala, yinqobo nje uma uzomnika ibhola ukuthi enze lokhu adalelwa khona (ukushaya amagoli)." Le nkulumo kaHunt ihamba kweyezinkumbi zabalandeli beBucs ababekhala ngesikhathi ebolekiswa. UMabasa ushaye amagoli angu-50 kwiPirates. Lokhu kumenza asale ngayisishiyagalombili kuBenedict "Tso" Vilakazi ophethe irekhodi leZimnyama ngawu-58. Ukuhamba kwakhe kukhalise nabalandeli bePirates kwazise izama ukugudluza iMamelodi Sundowns esicongweni sebhola laseNingizimu Afrika. NgoJuni, inkontileka kaMabasa nePirates iyaphela okungenzeka kube ngenye yezizathu ezenza uHunt akhulume ngale ndlela kwazise leli qembu laseKapa, lisanda kuphumela obala ngokuthi lingathanda ukumgcina kulona.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UNOZINTI weBafana Bafana, uRicardo Goss, ochazwe ngumqeqeshi waleli qembu lesizwe uHugo Broos njengomunye wabadlali bakhe abamqoka UMQEQESHI weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, akawuvali umlomo ngobumqoka bukanozinti weSiwelele FC, uRicardo Goss, kuleli qembu lesizwe elenza amalungiselelo okugcina ngaphambi kokuqala iNdebe yoMhlaba neMexico ngoJuni 11, e-Azteca Stadium, eMexico. IBafana, efakwe ku-Group A okukhona kuwona iMexico, South Korea nezwe elilodwa lase-Erope elizocaca kwephezulu, izozwana amandla nePanama ngoLwesihlanu ngo-7 ebusuku eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. La maqembu azophinda eKapa, ngoMashi 31. Ngesikhathi uBroos ememezela isikwati azobhekana ngaso nePanama, umangaze abathandi bakanobhutshuzwayo waseMzansi ngokushiya ngaphandle unozinti we-Orlando Pirates, uSipho Chaine, isikhala sakhe wasivala ngoRenaldo Leaner weSekhukhune United. UBroos akenabanga ngalesi sinqumo kwazise uChaine ekhombisa usefomini enhle kule sizini. Kunalokho, uqome ukutusa uGoss ngokuba yilokhu akubheke kumdlali weBafana. “Uhlale elungile futhi ekulungele nokusebenza ngaphandle kokukhombisa izimpawu zokunengeka,” kusho uBroos kwabezindaba. Ngeledlule, uGoss ugile izimanga egeza iPirates emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ophele zibambene ngo 1-1. NgokukaBroos, ukwala ukhasha kukaGoss kulo mdlalo bekuyisikhumbuzo sokuthi unekhono elingakanani uma edingeka. “Uma ngikhuluma ngomdlali weBafana kusukela endleleni yokuziphatha kuya ekusebenzeni ngisuke ngichaza umuntu ofana noGoss,” kuqhuba uBroos. “Lo nozinti uyisibonelo salokhu engihlale ngikhuluma ngabo uma ngithi kukhona abadlali iBafana engaphakathi kubona. Umoya wakhe nendlela yokuziphatha uma esekhempini kuyamangalisa. Uwuhlobo lomuntu ohlale ekhona uma ozakwabo bedinga usizo. “Izinto azenza enkundleni ziyasikhumbuza ukuthi ngeke kuphithane amakhanda kithina uma kungathiwa kukhona okwenkayo kukaputeni wethu wokuqina uRonwen (Williams)."

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, onomlando wokufika emidlalweni emibili yowamanqamu weCaf Champions League namaqembu ahlukene kodwa akanayo indondo yegolide KUYAFANA ukugula okuphethe iMamelodi Sundowns nomqeqeshi wayo, uMiguel Cardoso, kwazise leli qembu laseChloorkop, nalo mlolongi wasePortugal sebejike emnyango wesicoco seCaf Champions League amahlandla amaningi ngokwahlukana kumasizini adlule. ISundowns izibekisele indawo emdlalweni owandulela owamanqamu weChampions League yize yehlulwe yiStade Malien yaseMali ngo 2-0 emdlalweni womlenze wesibili we-quarterfinal yeChampions League ngeSonto eBamako. ISundowns igcine inqobe ngo 3-2 uma sekuhlangeniswe imiphumela yemilenze yomibili kwazise amaBrazilians anqobe owomlenze wokuqala ngo 3-0. Nakuba kunjalo kodwa uCardoso ubalise ngokungenami ngokugcwele ngendlela abadlulele ngayo esigabeni esilandelayo. “Kumnandi ukudlulela emzuliswaneni olandelayo kodwa kumuncu ukuthi lokhu kwenzeke kungasaphefumuleki ngenxa yokuminca,” kusho uCardoso kwabezindaba. “Kangazi ukuthi kwenzekeni kodwa kasizange sidlale ngendlela ebesihlele ngayo, ikakhulukazi esiwombebi sokuqala. Sizamile kwesesibili kodwa kuthe kungaphuma ikhadi elibomvu (Aubrey Modiba) kwanyomfeka konke ebese siqalile sikuzama njengokuthola igoli ebelizosikhulula. “Siwinile kodwa kufanele sibhukule esigabeni esilandelayo ngoba namaqembu esesizobhekana nawo ngeke asinike ithuba lokuphaphama uma esithole silele njengoba kwenzeke eMali." Kowandulela owamanqamu, iSundowns izobhekana ne-Esperance yaseTunisia edlule kwi-Al Ahly yase-Egypt ngo 4-2. Kuzobe kungokwesine amasizini elandelana ukuthi iSundowns idlala kowandulela owamanqamu weChampions League kusukela ngesizini ka-2022/2023. Kuwona wonke la masizini, iSundowns eshaywe yiPyramids FC yase-Egypt kowamanqamu ngesizini edlule, kayikaze isiqukule isicoco. Yasigcina ngo-2016, isaqeqeshwa nguPitso Mosimane. Ukugula kuyafana nakuCardoso owakhipha iSundowns kowandulela owamanqamu weChampions League ngo-2023/2024. Nakuba uCardoso oseke wasebenza eFrance, Portugal naseGreece ayikhipha iSundowns ngaleyo sizini kodwa wahluleka ukudla isicoco ehlulwa yi-Al Ahly yase-Egypt kowamanqamu. Ngesizini edlule, uCardoso uphinde wafika kowamanqamu esepheka iSundowns kodwa nakhona waguqa emdlalweni wamanqamu kwiPyramids FC yase-Egypt.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UNOZINTI weKaizer Chiefs ophazanyiswe ngukugula uBrandon Petersen UKUGULA okuqhamuke isigubhukane kungase kukhinyabeze amathuba kanozinti weKaizer Chiefs, uBrandon Petersen, okungena esikwatini seBafana Bafana esiya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. UPetersen okuqale isizini kwaze kwayiwa ekhefini le-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) ngoDisemba ebalwa nonozinti abavelele, ungeniswe esibhedlela ngaphambi komdlalo wabakhaya ne-Orlando Pirates ngenyanga edlule. Nakuba iChiefs ingazange yenabe ngokungenise uPetersen esibhedlela kodwa kuvelile ukuthi kudingeke ukuthi ahlinzwe. Kusukela kudlale owabakhaya osekungumlando ukuthi iChiefs iguqe kuwona ngo 3-0, uPetersen akakaze aphinde abonakale enkundleni njengoba ijezi seliwele kuBruce Bvuma. Ngesikhathi umqeqeshi weBafana, uHugo Broos, ememezela isikwati sakhe azobhekana ngaso nePanama emidlalweni emibili yobungani ingakapheli inyaka ephezulu, uveze ukuthi uPetersen usale ngoba enenkinga. “Ifomu kaPetersen kusukela kwaqala isizini iyazikhulumela, ngakho-ke ngabe ukhona kulesi sikwati,” kusho uBroos. “Kuyasiphoxa lokhu ngoba besithanda ukumbonela eduze kodwa-ke akukho okungenziwa ngoba isimo yisona esingavumanga. UPetersen ubengagcini ngokuhola iChiefs njengesibani kule midlalo ayidlalile ngaphambi kokuhlinzwa kodwa ubesembangwnei wokunqaba namagoli kwiligi noSipho Chaine we-Orlando Pirates. Lokhu bekumbeka ethubeni lokuwina umklomelo kanozinti ovelele, iBetway Premiership Goalkeeper of The Season, osekhabetheni likaChaine. Ngokujwayelekile unozinti ongenelwa ngamagoli ambalwa kunabo bonke ngesizini nguyena ogoduka nalo mklomelo. UChaine usenqabe namagoli amahlandla angu-15 kule sizini emidlalweni engu-22 futhi nguyena ozihola phambili. UPetersen usewele endaweni yesithathu ngokunqaba namagoli amahlandla angu-11 kwengu-16 yeligi emuva kokweqiwa nguDarren Keet weDurban City osenqabe amahlandla angu-12 kwengu-22. Nakuba isikwati esizodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba singakamenyezelwa kodwa okucacayo wukuthi sizophuma kubadlali abazodlala imidlalo yobungani nePanama. UPetersen, okungakaziwa ukuthi uzobuyela nini enkundleni, usalelwe yizinyanga ezimbili zokukhombisa uBruce ukuthi imfanele indawo kusona.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI weBafana Bafana uHugo Broos oveze indaba yezigidi ezifunwa ngamazwe athathwa njengamakhulu ebholeni lomhlaba uma ufisa ukudlala nawo UMQEQESHI weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, uphumele obala ngembangela yokuqhela kwabo ekudlaleni imidlalo yokuzwana amandla anamazwe athathwa njenganegama ebholeni lomhlaba, iBrazil ne-Argentina. Kusukela kumenyezelwe ukuthi iBafana izoyiqala ngePanama imidlalo yokucijela iNdebe yoMhlaba, inkulu imvunge kubalandeli ngokuqokwa kwaleli zwe abalichaza njengelinamlando nelingeke liyivivinye iBafana. IBafana izodlala kabili nePanama ngoLwesihlanu eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, nangoMeyi 31 e-DHL Stadium, eKapa. Kuvele ukuthi iSouth African Football Association (Safa) icelwe imidlalo yobungani yi-Argentina neBrazil kodwa bafuna itshe lemali. I-Argentina eholwa yisihlabani somhlaba, uLionel Messi kuthiwa ifuna u-R84 million. Esithangamini nabezindaba ePitoli ngoMsombuluko, uBroos uthe: “Kufanele iSafa ibe nemali ecela ku-R100 million uma ifuna ukuthi iBafana idlale eyobungani namazwe afana neBrazil noma i-Argentina. “Siyathanda ukudlala namazwe athathwa njengamakhulu emhlabeni kodwa i-Safa kayinayo imali efunwa yila mazwe uma ufuna ukudlala nawo. “Sigcina siqoma amazwe afana nePanama nje yingoba siphoqwa yisimo kodwa nawo kawezi bhusende kwazise ikhona imali ekhokhwe yiSafa ngale midlalo emibili. “Ngenyanga ezayo kufanele sidlale nezwe lase-Asia nelase-Europe kodwa nakhona kasazi sizophelela kumaphi ngoba amazwe asekhokhisa imali eyesabekayo uma ufuna ukudlala nawo."

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: URELEBOHILE Mofokeng ozonikwa ithuba elanele kwiBafana Bafana ukuziveza ukuthi unawo amava okuvala isikhala sikaThemba Zwane kuleli qembu lesizwe ISILOMO seBafana Bafana, uRelebohile Mofokeng, sizonikwa ithuba lokuzibonakalisa ukuthi sinawo yini amava okuvala isikhala sensephe enguThemba Zwane osekunesikhathi umqeqeshi waleli qembu lesizwe, uHugo Broos, nethimba lakhe beshayisana ngamakhanda ngokuzokwenzeka njengoba isihanjelwe yiminyaka. IBafana izoqala amalungiselelo eNdebe yoMhlaba ka-2026 eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America (USA) ngomdlalo wobungani nePanama ngoLwesihlanu ngo-7 ebusuku eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. Ngesikhathi uBroos ememezela isikwati sakhe ngeledlule, ubuzwe ngokubuya kukaZwane kuleli qembu waphendula sakuveza ukuthi usemtholile ozovala isikhala sale nkakha yeMamelodi Sundowns eyeqiwe yi-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) ngenxa yokulimala. Ukubuya kukaZwane ofana nombhidisi wekhwaya kwiBafana, kuholele ekutheni kusale ngaphandle uSipho Mbule noPatrick Maswanganyi be-Orlando Pirates. UMbule uyena obedlala indawo kaZwane kwi-Afcon eMorocco, ezinyangeni ezedlule. UBroos umemezele ukuthi ngeke aphinde amdlalise ezimpondweni uMofokeng ngoba akakhelwe ukudlala le ndawo kepha usezomfaka ngaphakathi elandele abagadli. “Kangingabazi ukuthi uMofokeng angasivala thaqa isikhala sikaZwane ngoba baphiwe ngendlela efanayo uma ibhola lisezinyaweni kubona,” kusho uBroos. “Kukuyena uMofokeng ukuthi asenelise njengethimba labaqeqeshi ukuthi unawo amava okudlala maphakathi nenkundla. Akayena umdlali wasophondweni futhi akakhelwe lokho. “Ngalokhu kangisho ukuthi ngitshela iqembu lakhe ukuthi kalimsebenzise kanjani kodwa ngaphansi kobuholi bami kwiBafana, uMofokeng ngeke aphinde adlale ezimpondweni. “Unobuhlakani obuningi obudingwa yiqembu kodwa elingeke lizuze kubona uma esezimpondweni. Nguyena osezokwelusa abagadli ngoba usekuveze kaningi ukuthi ungcono uma edlala kule ndawo. Kukuyena-ke ukuthi uyayithatha le ndawo ngoba abanye esibazame kuyona kabazange basanelise ngokugcwele yize singeke siwadle amandla abadlali abafana noMbule noMaswanganyi." IBafana izophinda ibhekane nePanama ngoLwesibili, ngoMashi 31, e-DHL Stadium, eKapa.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ISITOBHA seKaizer Chiefs, u-Aden McCarthy, okulindeleke ukuthi sithole indawo esikimini saMakhosi uma esebhekene neMagesi emdlalweni weligi eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, kusasa Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UKUWA bevuka neqembu kwabalandeli beKaizer Chiefs iminyaka engu-10 ngaphandle kokubongwa ngenkomishi, kwenza u-Aden McCarthy akholelwe ekutheni ukubhacaza kwabo emasontweni adlule ngeke kube yisizathu esanele sokuthi sebengabalaxaza kalula kanjalo. UMcCarthy, obengekho ngesikhathi iChiefs inqoba kwiDurban City ngeledlule, kulindeleke ukuba abuyele esikimini uma leli qembu selidlala oweBetway Premiership neMagesi FC ngoMgqibelo ngo-6 ntambama, eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. Ngaphambi kokuwina kwiDurban City, iChiefs ishaywe imidlalo emine ilandelana emiqhudelwaneni eyahlukene okuyisimo esithukuthelise abalandeli. Lokhu kuhambe kwaze kwafika ekutheni kube nabebenxenxa abanye ukuba lidutshwe leli qembu, ingahanjelwa imidlalo yalo kuze kube abaphathi baxosha amabamba abaqeqeshi, uCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef. Kuyaziwa ukuthi kufana nokuthi isekhaya iChiefs uma idlalela eThekwini, kodwa futhi abalandeli bayo basesifundazweni, iKwaZulu-Natal, badumile ngokungawubambi umshini uma kukhona abangeneme ngakho. UMcCarthy, obekhuluma nethimba labezindaba leChiefs ngezinhlelo zomdlalo weMagesi, ucele kubalandeli baseThekwini namaphethelo ukuthi bangabalahli manje ngoba kulapho sebebadinga khona nakakhulu. “Amasonto adlule abenzima kithina ngenxa yemidlalo enzima esibhekane nayo ngokwahlukana kodwa kufanele ukuba bekubuhlungu kakhulu kubalandeli ngenxa yemiphumela esibuye nayo,” kusho uMcCarthy. “Ngeke ngikufihle ukuthi sizame ngawo wonke amandla esinawo kule sizini ukuhamba ibanga elide kuyona yonke imiqhudelwano. Yingakho ngikuqonda ukuphoxeka okukubalandeli njengoba sesisele nethuba kwiligi kuphela. “Ngiyazicelela kubalandeli baseThekwini namaphethelo ukuba bangalwi nathi ukuze sizozama kahle ukuguqula isimo. Uma bekwazile ukusibekezelela iminyaka engu-10 singabaniki lutho, kangicabangi ukuthi kungumqondo ophusile ukusilaxaza ngenxa yemiphumela yakamuva. “Sizokwenza konke okusemandleni ukunqoba kwiMagesi ngoba osekusibusa emakhanda manje wukuqeda endaweni yesithathu kwi-log ukuze sizobuyela emidlalweni yeCaf Confederation Cup." IChiefs esendaweni yesihlanu kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu angu-33 emidlalweni engu-19, inethuba lokwenyukela kweyesithathu uma yehlula iMagesi.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: INJINI yeBafana Bafana, uThemba Zwane, ibuyiselwe eqenjini lesizwe ngemuva kwesikhathi ingaqokwa ngenxa yokuhlushwa wukulimala Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, uchome uphaphe lwegwalagwala uSipho Mbule we-Orlando Pirates ngokuthwala leli qembu lesizwe emidlalweni emqoka ngesikhathi engekho uThemba “Mshishi” Zwane weMamelodi Sundowns obehlushwa ngukulimala. UBroos ukhulume izolo, eGoli, ngalo mdlali wePirates osanda kubuya ekulimaleni ngesikhathi ememezela isikwati sabadlali abangu-23 azozwana ngabo amandla emidlalweni emibili nePanama ngasekupheleni kukaMashi. IBafana izobhekana nePanama ngoMashi 27 eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. Emuva kwalokho, zizoqhuthana ngoMashi 31 eDHL Stadium, eKapa. UBroos ubuyise uZwane kwiBafana, washiya uMbule obengadlali kweZimnyama emidlalweni yakamuva. Kusale ngaphandle umgadli weSundowns, u-Iqraam Rayners nonozinti wePirates, uSipho Chaine ozihola phambili ngokunqaba namagoli kwiBetway Premiership kule sizini. “Kangisoze ngawadla amandla kaMbule ngoba usisize kakhulu emidlalweni emqoka ngesikhathi uZwane esalimele,” kusho uBroos kwaSABC. “UZwane uwuhlobo lomdlali okungelula ukuvala isikhala salo kodwa ngiyamncoma uMbule ngasenzele khona ngesikhathi simdinga kwiBafana. Muva nje, akadlali kwiPirates okuyisizathu sokuthi angabibikho kulesi sikwati kodwa ungomunye wabadlali abayohlale besenhliziyweni yami ngoba iqiniso ngukuthi bonke abanye esizame ngabo ukuvala indawo kaZwane basishiye singenelisekile ngokugcwele.” Esikhundleni sikaChaine, uBroos ubize uRenaldo Leaner weSekhukhune United amchaze njengonozinti ongakaze asuke emehlweni akhe. Kubagadli, lo mqeqeshi waseBelgium ongazange aphumele obala ngesizathu sakhe sokushiya uRayners, uqhubeke no-Evidence Makgopa wePirates noLyle Foster weBurnley yase-England. Ngesikhathi uBroos ekhuluma, ubelokhu ekuphinda ukuthi akuhlosile ngale khempu wukuthi bonke abadlali bakuqonde ukuthi akekho kubona ozoya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngenxa yegama lakhe kuphela. “Ngosuku lwesibili lwekhempu (ngoLwesibili), ngizoba nomhlangano nabadlali lapho ngizobakhumbuza khona bonke ukuthi ukubabiza kwami kulesi sikwati akusho ukuthi ngizohamba nabo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba,” usho kanje. “Kangiqondile ukuthi abadlali abafana noChaine balehlisile izinga kodwa lona ngumyalezo obheke kubona bonke abadlali ukuthi ngeke bayithole indawo esikwatini seNdebe yoMhlaba uma bengaqhubeki nokungihlaba umxhwele ngabakwenza emaqenjni abo,” kusho uBroos. Abanye ababuyele kwiBafana nguBongokuhle Hlongwane, Thapelo Maseko, Jayden Adams no-Ime Okon. Sesisonke isikwati seBafana Bafana esizobhekana nePanama simi kanje: Onozinti: Ronwen Williams (Mamelodi Sundowns), Ricardo Goss (Siwelele FC) noRenaldo Leaner (Sekhukhune United). Izitobha: Khuliso Mudau (Mamelodi Sundowns), Thabang Matuludi (Polokwane City), Nkosinathi Sibisi (Orlando Pirates), Aubrey Modiba noKhulumani Ndamane (Mamelodi Sundowns), Ime Okon (Hannover 96), Samkelo Kabini (Molde FK) noMbekezeli Mbokazi (Chicago Fire FC). Abasesiswini: Teboho Mokoena noJayden Adams (beMamelodi Sundowns), Thalente Mbatha (Orlando Pirates) noSiphephelo Sithole (CD Tondela. Abaphambili: Oswin Appollis, Tsepang Moremi, Evidence Makgopa noRelebohile Mofokeng (Orlando Pirates), Lyle Foster (Burnley FC), Bongokuhle Hlongwane (Minnesota United), Themba Zwane (Mamelodi Sundowns) noThapelo Maseko (AEL Limassol).

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMGADLI weKaizer Chiefs u-Etiosa Ighodaro eziqeqesha naleli qembu kule sizini UKUVELA kwezindaba zokuthi useluleme ngokugcwele umgadli weKaizer Chiefs, u-Etiosa Ighodaro, akugcini ngokuqinisa leli qembu lapho lintenga khona kepha kumnika ithuba lokugwema umlando wokuba nesizini embi kunawo wonke kusukela aqala ukudlala kwiPremier Soccer League (PSL). Ngesikhathi iChiefs isayinisa lo mgadli waseNigeria oneminyaka engu-24 ubudala ngo-Agasti nyakenye, belilikhulu isasasa kubalandeli kwazise bekubhekwe ukuthi axazulule inkinga yokushaywa kwamagoli kuMakhosi esinekhathi iwakhubaza. Akuzange kuhambe ngendlela okwakuhlelwe ngayo nokho ngoba u-Ighodaro ulimale esanda efika kuMakhosi, wahlala ngaphandle izinyanga ezimbili zokuqala zesizini. Lo mgadli ubonakale okokuqala edlubhe umfaniswano weChiefs ngasekupheleni kuka-Okthoba nyakenye emdlalweni weBetway Premiership bebhekene neSiwelele FC. Ushaye igoli lakhe lokuqala kwiChiefs ngesikhathi inqoba ngo 3-1 kwi-AS Simba yaseDemocratic of Congo (DRC) emdlalweni weCaf Confederation Cup. Kuvele izindaba zokuthi u-Ighodaro ubonakele eziqeqesha ngokugcwele nozakwabo kuleli sonto. Lokhu kusho ukuthi sekuseduzane abuyele enkundleni. Lo mgadli, owafika eMzansi ezodlalela iMamelodi Sundowns, usalelwe yimidlalo engu-11 ukuba agweme irekhodi elibi kunawo wonke selokhu afika eMzansi ngo-2021. Ngokomlando ka-Ighodaro kusukela afika eMzansi, akakaze ashaye amagoli angaphansi kwayisithupha ngesizini. Isizini ka-2024/2025 esemabhukwini AmaZulu FC, iyona embi kunawo wonke kwazise washaya amagoli ayisithupha emidlalweni engu-27. Ngaphandle kweSundowns, AmaZulu neChiefs, u-Ighodaro useke wadlalela iSuperSport United, Chippa United ne-University of Pretoria. U-Ighodaro akuyena yedwa Isolezwe elihoshe ukuthi useluleme ngokugcwele kepha noReeve Frosler ubonakele eziqeqesha neqembu lonke ngesikhathi ilungisela ukubhekana neMagesi FC emdlalweni weligi eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ngo-6.30 kusihlwa.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMONNAPULE Saleng ongomunye wabadlali beMamelodi Sundowns abalokhu beqhubeka nokuzifaka enhliziyweni yomqeqeshi uMiguel Cardoso UKUFIKA kuzwakale kwiMamelodi Sundowns kwabadlali ababili abasayine kuyona ngoJanuwari, uMonnapule Saleng noKhulumani Ndamane, kumphathisa ngekhanda umqeqeshi wayo, uMiguel Cardoso, kwazise usebhekene nesimo esimphoqa ukuba athathe izinqumo ezishiya abanye abadlali bakhe bedangele. ISundowns ibuyele esicongweni seBetway Premiership ngokunqoba kwiMarumo Gallants phakathi nesonto. AmaBrazilians asewine imidlalo eyisishiyagalombili yeligi ilandelana. Ngenxa yefomu yakamuva yeSundowns, kunabalandeli abakholelwa ekutheni kalisekho iqembu elizoyivimba ekutheni isidle ihlandla lesishiyagalolunye kulandelana isicoco seligi. Kule midlalo eyiwine ilandelana, ishaye amagoli angu-17, yangenelwa ngamane kuphela. NgokukaCardoso, uSaleng noNdamane abafike kwiSundowns ngoJanuwari, sebephenduke izinsika okuyinto eholele ekutheni ahluleke ukubashiya ngaphandle esikimini njengoba besembangweni wesicoco seligi oshisa phansi ne-Orlando Pirates. Nakuba uSaleng, obebolekiswe yiPirates kwi-Orbit College, engakafiki efomini aziwa ngayo kodwa kule midlalo embalwa aseyidlalele iSundowns kwiligi nakwiCaf Champions League kucacele wonke umuntu ukuthi uzoba yinkinga kakhulu uma esengene ngokugcwele egiyeni. “Nsukuzonke sifunda okusha ngoSaleng, nathi simgxisha konke okufanele akwazi ngendlela esifuna ukumsebenzisa ngayo kwiSundowns. Wafika elimele, ngakho-ke kasikabi naso isikhathi esanele sokusebenza naye. Okwamanje sisasebenza ngekhono lakhe aliphiwe nguMdali nokuyinto ebukeka sengathi iyasebenza. “Ngimthandela ukuthi akabuzi uma etshelwa ngokufanele akwenze kepha uhlala phezu kwakho,” kusho uCardoso. UNdamane (22), ofike ngoJanuwari esuka kwi-TS Galaxy lapho ebegqame khona, waze wathatha iso lomqeqeshi weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, owamfaka esikwatini se-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) yaseMorocco ngasekuqaleni konyaka. “Ikhono likaNdamane liyathusa uma ubheka iminyaka yakhe futhi akufihliwe ukuthi ufike wengeza kwebesinakho yingakho sengihlale ngiphethwe yikhanda. “Kunzima ukungambopheli. Lokhu kusho ukuthi kukhona abebejwayele ijezi engakafiki osekushintshile ukulithola kwabo,” kulandisa uCardoso. Ngaphandle kukaSaleng noNdamane, umgadli uBrayan Leon waseColombia ufike kwacaca njengoba eseshayele iSundowns amagoli eligi amane. Lokhu kwenza aqale ebhentshini u-Iqraam Rayners yize ebalwa nabangase bagoduke nesicathulo segoli ekupheleni kwesizini.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ISITOBHA seMamelodi Sundowns, uGrant Kekana, kasinankinga nokuzitshwa nguHugo Broos ngoba sigxile ekusizeni iqembu laso kwiCaf Champions League UKUMFIMFA kwamathuba okungena esikwatini seBafana Bafana esibheke kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngoJuni, akukho emqondweni wesitobha seMamelodi Sundowns, uGrant Kekana, kepha sihlushwa wumuzwa wokukweleta leli qembu laseChloorkop ngokwenzeke emdlalweni wamanqamu weCaf Champions League ngesizini edlule. UKekana ngomuye wabadlali asebejwayele ukusala ngaphandle kwiBafana ekubeni ebalwa nabashaye into ecokeme kwi-Africa Cup of  Nations (Afcon) yase-Ivory Coast ngo-2023. Zingaphansi kwezintathu izinyanga ezisele ngaphambi kokuba iBafana iqale iNdebe yoMhlaba ezosingathwa yiMexico, Canada ne-United States of America (USA) ngokuhlanganyela ngoJuni. Nakuba umqeqeshi weBafana, uHugo Broos, elokhu emzibe njalo uKekana oke wahlushwa wukulimala kodwa akananxa nalo mqeqeshi waseBelgium. UKekana obesesikimini seSundowns esixebule iStade Malien yaseMali ngo 3-0 ngoLwesihlanu oludlule kowomlenze wokuqala we-quarterfinal yeChampions League, uveze ukuthi okwamanje akukho okumbusa ekhanda njengokusiza iSundowns idle indebe yeCaf. Kulindeleke ukuthi lesi sitobha siphinde sidlale ngeSonto ntambama uma iSundowns isiyodlala owomlenze wesibili eMali. “Ukungabizwa kwiBafana yinto wonke umdlali okufanele ayilindele ngoba umqeqeshi kumele akhethe kubadlali abaningi abamnika okuhlukene,” kusho uKekana. “Kuyisibusiso kuwona wonke umdlali ukumela izwe lakhe, ikakhulukazi kwiNdebe yoMhlaba kodwa ngeke ukuphoqe ukubizwa noma ukushiywa ngaphandle. “Okusemqondweni wami yisikweletu sabalandeli esabaphoxa ekugcineni ngesizini edlule. Iseyisibhobo kimina nozakwethu indlela esihluleke ngayo ukwengeza inkanyezi yesibili ejezini lethu. “Kule sizini kasinawo uphawini wokuzithambisa ngoba ubufakazi balokho bahlala obala emdlalweni wamanqamu ngesizini edlule,” kusho uKekana sakubalisa. ISundowns eyayithwelwe ngeqoma ngesizini edlule ukufaka inkanyezi yesibili, yakhala ngaphansi kowamanqamu kwiPyramids FC yase-Egypt eyayingenamlando otheni kwiChampions League.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ABADLALI be-Orlando Pirates, uLebone Seema noSipho Chaine bangezinye zezinsika zaleli qembu emkhankasweni wokuwina isicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership UKUNGAWUNAKI ‘umsindo’ oqhamuka ngaphandle kweqembu kuzoba wukhiye kwi-Orlando Pirates emkhankasweni wayo wokuqoqa amaphuzu anele emidlalweni eyisishiyagalolunye yeBetway Premiership eyisalele ukuze izibeke ethubeni lokuqeda ishobolo leminyaka engu-14 yokwehlulwa yisicoco seligi. Lesi seluleko siphume emlonyeni kaLucky “Phinda Mzala” Lekgwathi ongukaputeni wokugcina wePirates owaphakamisa indebe yeligi ngesizini ka-2011/2012. Kule sizini iPirates izama ukugudluza iMamelodi Sundowns esiyiphendule ithofi iligi enkulu yaseNingizimu Afrika. AmaBrazilians azama ukudla isicoco seligi ihlandla lesishiyagalolunye. ULekgwathi uyohlale esemlandweni wePirates ngokuba ngukaputeni wokuqala nowokugcina owaphakamisa isicoco seligi amasizini elandelana, wasisheba nezindebe ezine. “Ukudla isicoco seligi kakugcini ngalokhu iqembu elikwenza enkundleni kepha ukhakhayi lwabadlali kufanele luqine ngokwanele bengaphandle kwenkundla noma ngaphakathi kwayo,” kusho uLekgwati kwiSolezwe. “Ukuze iqembu lithweswe umqhele wokuba ngompetha beligi kumele liqoqe amaphuzu anele kodwa futhi kubalulekile ukuba nezindlela zokuvala izindlebe ukugwema ukuzwa okungehli kahle okusuke kushiwo ngalo. “Kumanje izinkulumo ziningi kodwa kufanele zibe khona ngoba akujwayelekile ukuthi kuze kushaye uMashi umbango wesicoco seligi enkulu yaseMzansi ungakacaci ukuthi uvuna liphi iqembu. “Okukhulu iPirates isikwenzile ngokuthi kuze kushaye lesi sikhathi kungacacile ukuthi siyaphi isicoco. “Kuningi okubukeka kuhlangana kwiPirates kule sizini ngoba nomqeqeshi (u-Abdeslam Ouaddou) ukhombisa izimpawu zokuba namaqhinga angase ayiweze kule sizini. “Ngaphezulu kwalokhu iqembu liqine ngokwanele uma kuza kubadlali, ngakho-ke okumqoka wukuvala izindlebe ukugwema ukuzwa abalingabazayo baqinise ekufeleni enkundleni. “Ngeke ngiqhathanise nangezikhathi kusadlala thina ngoba okuningi kuhlukile kodwa ngibona iPirates inazo zonke izinongo ezidingekayo ukuwina iligi yize kusobala ukuthi iSundowns ngeke ivume ukuyidedela kalula,” kusho uLekgwathi. Le nsephe ikhuluma kanjena nje, abaqeqeshi abahlukene kwiBetway Premiership okunguManqoba Mngqithi weLamontville Golden Arrows, Phuthi Mohafe wePolokwane City no-Eric Tinkler weSekhukhune United bayayichitha iPirates embangweni weligi. IPirates izobuyela enkundleni isiyobhekana neTS Galaxy emdlalweni weligi eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, ngeSonto ngo-3.30 ntambama.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: EzikaSK zihlangene zanzela omunye wabo okuhle kodwa Ziqalile ukutheleka izipheko kwigidangoma likaMthandeni SK "Igcokama Elisha" Manqele njengoba lizosinelwa kubo eDubeni, eMelmoth ngoJuni 28. NgeSonto uMthandeni neqembu lakhe iSK Brothers yibona abavule inkundla ngokuphekisa uTekisi "Nkintsho" Ntetha ngezinkomo ezintathu, utshwala obebungangamanzi okuphala izikhumba nesamba semali esingadalulwanga. Ebebehamba noMthandeni basine bededelana ngokushaya indishi, okusho ukunikela ngemali ngokwamakholwa. Ngosuku lomgcagco kuzoqopheka umlando njengoba umdidiyeli wamabutho akwaMandlakazi, kwaNongoma, uPhakel'umthakathi Ndabandaba ezoba wumqhathi kumgangela wabaculi bakamaskandi abazobe beziphethe ziphelele. Lolu dwendwe luzobuye luhlanganise abaculi abayinkukhu nempaka, uMthandeni noKhuzani ngenxa yokuthi uTekisi uqale ukuvelela ngokugidela uKhuzani ngaphambi kokuhlubukela kweyaseMdletsheni. Bobabili bakuqinisekisile ukuthi bazobe bekhona kulolu dwendwe elinesasasa. UMthandeni SK ufike nenqwaba yotshwala ephekisa igidangoma lakhe uNkintsho Injabulo kuTekisi ebona izipheko ezifike nabeSK Brothers

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMENGAMELI weSkebhe, uMnuz Sibangani Manyathi, wethule inkampani yonogada iSkebhe National  Protection Services eZero Lounge eNquthu SELIZOGAYA ngomunye umhlathi enhlanganweni iSkebhe njengoba sekunophiko lonogada. Lokhu kuvele emcimbini wokwethulwa kwenkampani yonogada, Iskebhe National Protection Services, eZero Lounge eNquthu, ngoLwesihlanu. ISkebhe inhlangano eyayisungulelwe ukuqapha ukwebiwa kwezinkomo ezindaweni zaKwaZulu-Natal, njengoba seyilwa nayo yonke inhlobo yobugebengu nakwezinye izifundazwe zakuleli. Ekhuluma kulo mcimbi uMengameli weSkebhe, uMnuz Sibangani Manyathi, uthe inhlosongqangi ngokuqhamuka nale nkampani akukhona ukukhanda imali kodwa ukuqinisa izindlela zokulwa nobugebengu. Uthe abahlosile ukuzophazamisa ukusebenza kwezinye izinkampani zonogada kodwa ukusebenzisana nazo ukunqanda ubugebengu obubhokile kuleli. UManyathi uthe banxuswe ngamalungu eSkebhe ukuba kusungulwe inkampani yonogada. Uthe ngeke onogada babo basebenze eNquthu kuphela kodwa bazosabalala wonke amadolobha nezifundazwe zakuleli. "Uma onogada bethu befuneka eThekwini, bazokuya kuleyo nkampani abadingeka kuyo." Uthe izandla bazivule kunoma wubani ofuna ukusebenzisana nabo, okungaba abanikazi bamapulazi nabamabhizinisi anhlobonhlobo. IPhini likaMengameli weSkebhe, uMnuz Zakhele Mncube, lithe nakuba bezobabhekelela nabantu abangamalungu eSkebhe njengoba besasebenza ngokuvolontiya kodwa bazobe beqasha onogada abaqeqeshelwe lo msebenzi ngoba bazobe belandela imithetho, imigomo nemibandela ebekwe uhulumeni. NoManyathi uthe bazosebenzisa uhlelo lwentando yeningi uma sebeqasha ngoba abafuni ukwenzelela ngokuqasha izihlobo nabangani babaholi beSkebhe. Uthe bazobheka onogada abanezicucu zalo msebenzi futhi abagunyaziwe ukuwenza. Eqhuba uManyathi uthe ngeke baze bazihluphe ngonogada ocwile etshwaleni, ongathembekile nobhema esidlangalaleni ngoba uzobalimazela igama labo. Uthe enye inhloso ngale nkampani ukuvulela intsha ebhuquza emakhaya nezitifiketi zobu-security amathuba emisebenzi. UManyathi uthe bazoba namahhovisi eNquthu naseGoli bese bedlulela nakwezinye izifundazwe. Uthe le nkampani iyinkomba yokuthi umsebenzi weSkebhe awufi, kunalokho uyadlondlobala. Lo mcimbi bewuhanjelwe ngabebemele ubukhosi bendawo noMasipala waseNquthu namalungu omphakathi. UMNUZ Sibangani Manyathi ephahlwe yingxenye yonogoda abangaphansi kweSkebhe National Protection Services eZero Lounge eNquthu UMENGAMELI weSkebhe, uMnuz Sibangani Manyathi, ethula inkampani yonogada iSkebhe National Protection Services eZero Lounge eNquthu ngoLwesihlanu UMENGAMELI weSkebhe, uMnuz Sibangani Manyathi, wethule inkampani yonogada, Iskebhe National Protection Services eZero Lounge eNquthu, ngoLwesihlanu

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UCELESTE Ntuli ukhale wemuka nendondo kwi-13th Savanna Comics' Choice Comedy Awards eLyric Theatre, eGold Reef City eGoli ngoMgqibelo USOMAHLAYA waseMpangeni, uCeleste Ntuli, ukhale wemuka nendondo kuma-2026 Savanna Comics' Choice Comedy Awards eLyric Theatre, eGold Reef City, eGoli, ngoMgqibelo. UCeleste, owazakhela udumo enguSiphokazi kwiSibaya, uhlule uDillan Oliphant, Kagiso KG Mokgadi, Mpho Popps noSkhumba Hlophe. Nakuba kunjalo kodwa akalibonanga elidlalayo kwi-Comedian of the Year. Kulo munxa uqunjwe phansi enoKagiso KG Mokgadi, Mpho Popps nomkhaya wakhe uSifiso Nene babhonywe wuDillan Oliphant. Nomcimbi kaCeleste iCeleste Ntuli and The Big Dudes ukhale ngaphansi okweNtshebe yaKwaMashu emkhakheni weBest Comedy Festival or Show Award. Umklomelo uhambe neGround Culture Comedy ehlule ne-Armchair Comedy, Bioscope Sundays Comedy Festival neJive Funny Championship. ULinda Sibanda ukhale wemuka nesicoco kwiBreakthrough Act of the Year, uSiya Seya uthathe umklomelo weJoe Mafela Award, uConrad Koch noChester Missing bahlabane kwi-Innovative Comedy Performance Award, uKagiso Lediga uwine indondo yeBeyond the Mic Award ngokuba yizwi likaRafiki omncane kwiThe Lion King, uYaaseen Barnes udlule ngehubo kwiBest Friend of Comedy Award, uDavid Kau uthole indondo yeThe Legacy, uVafa Naraghi umuke nesicoco seComedic Content Award, uDillan Oliphant uphinde wahamba nendondo yeBest Solo Award ngeMansekind. Uhlelo lwalo mcimbi, oteketiswa nge-It's a Family, beluphethwe ngumndeni wakwaGoliath, okungoJason Goliath, Donovan Goliath, Nicholus Goliath noKate Goliath. Kosomahlaya ebebehlekisa kubalwa uTumi Morake, Lindy Johnson, Khanyisile Ngwenya, Mbali Gudazi, Summary noConrad Koch ozobe ehambisana noChester Missing. Oyisikhulu sabaxhasi balo mqhudelwano wezindondo uKayla Hendricks, uthe akuwona nje umcimbi lo kodwa umkhankaso wokwakha le ndima yamahlaya. Uthe lo mcimbi oyinkundla yokufukula osomahlaya ukuze bagcine sebesezingeni elicokeme. UKayla uthe bayaziqhenya ngokubungaza osomahlaya ngendlela ebafanele.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UBUSI Mhlongo uzokhunjulwa kwiStandard Bank Joy of Jazz OWASHIYA umaka emculweni, uBusi "Queen of Maskandi" Mhlongo, uzohlonishwa kwi-27th Standard Bank Joy of Jazz eSandton Convention Centre eGoli ngoSepthemba 25 kuya kumhla ka-26. UBusi wadlula emhlabeni ngoJuni 15, 2010, eneminyaka engu-62, ngenxa yomdlavuza webele owamqala ngo-1978. Leli qhawekazi lizokhunjulwa ngezingoma zalo, ezizobe zihlatshelelwa ngoBuhlebendalo Mda, Zawadi YaMungu noXolisa Dlamini. Esinye isihlabani esizohlonishwa lapha uHugh Masekela, ozokhunjulwa wuThandiswa Mazwai bese uKippie Moeketsi ahlonishwe uKhaya Mahlangu. UThandiswa uthe kumthinte kakhulu ukunikezwa ithuba lokuhlonipha uMasekela ngoba ubudlelwano babo babujulile. "Umculo wakhe awuguqulanga kuphela i-jazz kodwa umoya waleli zwe. Ukuhumusha kabusha umsebenzi wakhe esteji kuyinto enkulu." Kule ndumezulu yomcimbi kuboshelwe izingwazi zakuleli nezasemazweni angaphandle, okubalwa kuzo u-Angelique Kidjo waseBenin nomfuthi we-saxophone waseMelika uKamasi Washington. Amaciko akuleli azobe eshiyelana inkundla nguye uThandiswa, uMcCoy Mrubata, Khaya Mahlangu noNdabo Zulu. KwiDinaledi Stage kuzobe kunandisa o-Ibrahim Maalouf, Judith Sephuma no-Ola Onabule kanti kwiDiphala Stage kuzobe kushiyelana inkundla oNubya Garcia noLorraine Klaasen. KwiConga Stage kuzobe kunandisa oTank, The Bengas, Reza Khota, Madala Kunene noSibusile Xaba. KwiMbira Stage kuzobe kunandisa uNomfusi, Anais Rosso, Floetry, Buhlebendalo Mda, Zawadi YaMungu noXolisa Dlamini. Umdidiyeli walo mcimbi, uMantwa Chinoamadi, uthe iStandard Bank Joy of Jazz yakulo nyaka izokhumbuza abantu ngeminyaka eyadlula bese kubhekwa nekusasa lomculo we-jazz kuleli. Uthe umcimbi walo nyaka uqondaniswe nesikhumbuzo sokuphela kweminyaka engu-50 kwenzeka isibhicongo sabafundi baseSoweto ngoJuni 16, 1976 nesemashi yabantu besifazane ngo-Agasti 9, 1956. Kulindeleke izethameli ezibalelwa ku-25 000.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UTREVOR Noah enozakwabo u-Eugene Khoza noNtosh Madlingozi kwiBafunny Bafunny KUBHEKWE ngabomvu ukumenyezelwa kohlu losomahlaya bakuleli abazoboshelwa eqenjini lesizwe iBafunny Bafunny. Ngokusho komsunguli nokaputeni waleli qembu, uTrevor Noah, iBafunny Bafunny izohlekisa ochungechungeni lwemicimbi ezokuba kuleli ngoSepthemba walo nyaka. UTrevor ubuye waqoka uzakwabo u-Eugene Khoza weWhat Now Podcast nomqeqeshi waleli qembu uNtosh Madlingozi. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi leli qembu lesizwe lizoqala ukuhlekisa izethameli emcimbini oseSunBet Arena ePitoli ngoSepthemba 5 bese lidlulela eGrandWest Arena eCape Town ngoSepthemba 26. "INingizimu Afrika iyakudinga ukuhleka, ngakho neSavanna ngiletha iqembu ukuba lenze lokho. IBafunny Bafunny iqembu lesizwe losomahlaya. Kuzoba nemicimbi emihlanu, emadolobheni amathathu ngoSepthemba 2026. Ngiphethe u-Eugene Khoza oseqinisekisiwe nabanye osomahlaya bakuleli abaningi nabakwamanye amazwe abasazomenyezelwa." Uthe usazohlanganisa amakhanda nephini lakhe kanye nomqeqeshi ukumemezela abanye osomahlaya abazobe bebabophele kulolu chungechunge. UTrevor, oseke wahlabana amahlandla amabili kuma-Emmy Awards, uzohlekisa okokuqala kuleli kwiFestival of Comedy ekubeni ayegcine ukunandisa kwiSavanna Presents Trevor Noah Live in South Africa Tour ngoSepthemba 2023.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UBONGANI Fassie usengene emculweni wegqom' INDODANA yesihlabani yomculo we-Afro pop, uBrenda "Mabrrr" Fassie, singene emculweni wokujuxuza wesimanje obizwa ngokuthi igqom'. UBongani Fassie uzokhipha icwecwe elisihloko sithi Skomline ngoMeyi 8. Uthe ngale EP uhlose ukuvezela umphakathi ukuthi usezelwe kabusha futhi usezilungisile izindlela zakhe ebezingaqondile. UBongani uthe kumsizile ukushaywa wumoya kule ndima ngoba kumnikeze ithuba lokuyolanda amandla, umfutho nokuzivuselela. "Lo msebenzi uyimi, sengibuye ngokugcwele ekubeni yimi ngaphandle kokwesaba, izihibe nemvume yamuntu. Akusiyo nje i-EP kodwa umlayezo." Uthe okumenze wakhuza ibuya ngomculo owasungulwa kwelikaMthaniya yingoba efuna ukwethulela isigqoko iKwaZulu-Natal. Uthe noma kunjalo akakhohliwe neze ukuthi ungumnsinsi wokuzimilela elokishini lakwaLanga, eWestern Cape. UBongani uthe wenze le ngoma ethi Skomline ngenhloso yokubungaza abantu balapho edabuka khona. Ngaphandle kwegqom' ubuye wahlanganisa nohlobo lomculo wamapiano, Afro tech, barcadi, hip-hop neR&B. Lo mculi waqala ukuzakhela kakhulu udumo esavela kuma-video kanina esemncane. Esekhulakhulile uBongani wabe esecula i-Afro pop nendodana kaChicco Twala, uLongwe besazibiza ngeNew Age. Waphinda wabuya esenza i-hip hop sebezibiza ngeJozi. Emuva kwalokho wabe esevela ngezindaba ezimbi emaphephandabeni nasezinkundleni zokuxhumana, ethinteka ekubeni umlutha wezidakamizwa.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: Ngizwe Mchunu NGIZWE MCHUNU Image: Itumeleng English AKWAZIWA ukuthi iyozala nkomoni engxabanweni yomholi we-EFF uMnuz Julius Malema nowayengumsakazi woKhozi FM kodwa osengumengameli wamabhinca, uNgizwe "Zulu Charmer" Mchunu, njengoba sesiphelile isikhathi ebesinqunyelwe uNgizwe sokuba axolise kuMalema. NgoLwesine abameli bakaMalema, i-England Slabbert Attorneys Inc, banqumele uNgizwe ugwayi katiki ukuba ahoxise inkulumo yakhe ngoMalema futhi axolise esidlangalaleni kulo mholi, aphinde athumele isitatimende emithonjeni yezindaba bese ehlawula uMalema ngesamba sika-R1 million kungakapheli amahora awu-24 kusukela ngoLwesine. Abameli bathe uma lokhu abakubalile kungenzeki, noma kanjani bazomthathela izinyathelo zomthetho. Bathe le ndaba isukela engxoxweni kaNgizwe noKing Zoso ngaphandle kwase-Union Buildings ePitoli ngoLwesine. "Le ngxoxo iphindiwe nakwezinye izinkundla zokuxhumana okubalwa kuzo i-X neTikTok." Abameli bakhala ngokuthi uNgizwe waqambela uMalema amanga ngokuthi wamukela isamba sika-R60 million kumshushumbisi wezidakamizwa waseNigeria, uvikela abantu bangaphandle abakuleli ngokungemthetho ukuze azuze futhi ubandakanyeka enkohlakalweni nasebugebengwini. "Le nkulumo yamanga, iyalimaza futhi icekela phansi isithunzi sakhe njengelungu lePhalamende nomholi wepolitiki," kusho incwadi yabameli. Eziphendulela esithangamini semithombo yezindaba, uNgizwe uthe akasoze yena athuswa wuMalema ngoba useyinyoka efile futhi engeke iphinde ivuke. "Akahambe aye jele, aphume. Walahla ithuba lokuba ashintshe ukuphathwa kwezwe kodwa wadakwa wumbuso. Wanyanya uZulu. Waphinda wathatha imali ko-OnPoint Engineering. Balutha i-VBS bayiqeda nya. Bangena Ekurhuleni bashaya babhuqa. Anginandaba ngisho noma engenzani, uyinyoka efile." UNgizwe uthe isikhathi sikaMalema siphelile manje, wamsola ngokuthi udayise ngabantu baseNingizimu Afrika kubantu bokufika. Ebuzwa ukuthi uzoya yini enkantolo uma ebizwa, uNgizwe uthe ngeke aze awubeke owakhe umcondo lapho. "Ngiyinsizwa yakwaZulu. Uma engifuna uyongithola eNkandla." Uthe ofuna ukuza kuye engamthumelela i-location. "Asisekho isikhathi sokudlala. UJulius Malema uyi-political devil.  Osopolitiki bayamesaba noMengameli uyamesaba. Asimesabi thina, yinja nje. Yithi esiphethe manje futhi sizolithatha leli zwe siliqondise liqonde ngqo." Uthe izwe lifile ngenxa yezidakamizwa notshwala obubulala intsha. "Izingane zethu zidakwa ubusuku nemini. Zidayisa ngemizimba. Yihlazo elenzeka kuleli zwe," kusho uNgizwe. Yize kungokokuqala bebophana kodwa uMalema noNgizwe abaqali ukuxabana.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: IZIDUMBU zabazalwane ababulawelwe ukuba ngamaKhrestu e-Afrika IMIBIKO eshaqisayo idalula ukuthi bangaphezu kuka-200 000 abantu base-Afrika ababulawe ngesihluku, noma badlwengulwa, bathunjwa noma baphoqwa ukuba bashiye amakhaya namabhizinisi abo nyakenye ngenxa yokuba ngamaKhrestu. Lezi zibalo ezithusayo zivezwe esitatimendeni esithunyelelwe abezindaba ngumkhulumeli kazwelonke wenhlangano ezwelana nabantu bakwa-Israel, iSouth African Friends of Israel (SAFI), uMnuz Bafana Modise. Kulesi sitatimende kubhalwe ukuthi phakathi kuka-Ephreli 1 nyakenye nomhla ka-31 Mashi kulo nyaka, imibiko iveze ukuthi luyanda udlame olubhekiswe kubantu abangamaKhrestu emazweni ase-Afrika. Embikweni wekota yokuqala weSAFI mayelana nokuqothwa nokuhlukunyezwa kwamaKhrestu e-Afrika, le nhlamgano iyakuqinisekisa ukuthi angaphezu kuka-200 000 amaKhrestu adabuka e-Afrika avelelwe yilo mshophi phakathi kuka-Ephreli 2025 noMashi 2026. UModise uthe ukusebenzela izinkampani ezinjengeReuters, Africa Centre for Strategic Studies, Open Doors, Vatican News ne-US State Department kukhathule enkulu indima ekuhlanganiseni ucwaningo. Eqhuba uModise uthe kulolu cwaningo kubalwa namaKhrestu angu-180 abulawe yiBarnabas Aid eMiddle Belt eNigeria ngo-Ephreli 2025, angu-200 abulawe eYelwata eBenue State ngoJuni 2025, abazalwane abangu-38 babulawe besesontweni bekhonza eKomanda, empumalanga ye-DRC ngoJulayi 2025, amaKhrestu awu-20 abulawe eNapala eMozambique ngo-Okthoba 2025, ababili ababulawe enkabeni yaseNigeria ngoNovemba 2025, uthisha ongumKhrestu uMnuz Stephen Musili eKenya ngoJanuwari 2026 namaKhrestu angu-17 ase-Ituri, eDRC ngoMashi 2026. Lezi zigameko zilandela isigameko esenzeka ngeSonto lamaSundu nyakenye, senziwa yizihonga zeBoko Haram eNorth Central Nigeria, lapho kwabulawa khona amaKhrestu awu-53. "Esinye isigameko esihlasimulisa umzimba esokuthwalwa kwabesifazane abathwalwa bese bephoqwa ukuba bashadwe ngempoqo njengesikhali sempi. Abesifazane namantombazane bathwalwa amabutho ezempi," kusho uModise. Ngokwesitatimende se-Open Doors' World Watch kulo nyaka, phakathi kuka-Okthoba 1, 2024 noSepthemba 30, 2025, angu-4 849 amaKhrestu abulawelwe inkolo yawo emhlabeni jikelele, awu-4 491 kwabulawa awaseSub-Saharan Africa kwathi amanye angu-3 490 abulawa eNigeria kuphela. Siqhuba isitatimende sithe uMfu Sore waseBurkina Faso uthe amaKhrestu ayadingiswa. "Uma amaphekulazikhuni etheleka emasontweni efica amakholwa ethandaza, awatshela ukuthi isikhathi sobuKhrestu siphelile. Ngakho kufanele abaleke. UMfu Hamza waseCameroon naye uhambe emazwini kaSore. ESINYE sezigameko lapho kuhlaselwa khona ibandla lamaKhrestu KUBA ubumayemaye uma kuhlaselwa amaKhrestu e-Afrika

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: YIZE amaMetro FM Music Awards abese-ICC Arena eThekwini ngoMgqibelo owedlule kodwa nanamhlanje asesematheni. Kunamaciko ahlulwe maqede adubela kwamanye anqobile. Omunye wawo, umculi we-Afro pop uNaledi Aphiwe, obhodlele kwiLadysmith Black Mambazo emuva kokuhlulwa kwiBest African Pop. Ubhuqe aMambazo ngokuthi uyawahalalisela ngokuvotelwa yizalukazi esezalala emathuneni maqede wabuza ukuthi ayini aMambazo. Ugxekwe kakhulu uNaledi ngokudelela izingwazi ezinezindondo zamaGrammy ezinhlanu futhi eziwuzungezile umhlaba. Yize kunjalo, uNhlamulo "Nota" Baloyi, onamagalelo namava emculweni wakuleli, uthe uyazwelana noNaledi Aphiwe ngoba usebenze ngokuzikhandla, ekhankasa ezindaweni eziningi kodwa wagcina engalibonanga elidlalayo. Nomculi wamapiano ne-3 Step, uZee Nxumalo, ukhale kakhulu ngokuhlulwa eminxeni eyisikhombisa. Ekhuluma kwiPodcast and Chill with MacG, uZee uthe uphethwe yikhanda ngenxa yokuhlulwa kuma-awards. Abantu bazwelane noZee bethi bekumfanele ukumuka nendondo yeBest Artist of the Year, okuwunklomelo othathwe uzakwabo uCiza. Umculi wamapiano futhi obengumsakazi weKaya FM ne-YFM, uSol Phenduka, uthe bekungafanele kuwine uCiza ngenxa yokuthi ubedume ngengoma eyodwa ethi Isaka. NoMacGyver "MacG" Mukwevho unuke uCiza ngokuthi uyithengile le ndondo esizwa nguyise uThembinkosi Nciza wodumo lweTS Records eyayinoZahara. USol uthe ama-awards asaphelelwa yisithunzi nokwethembeka ngenxa yokuthi amaciko okusuke kufanele ukuthi aqokwe, awaqokwa kodwa kuqokwa asuke ebhacazile ngalowo nyaka. Uthe amaMetro abehlonishwa futhi kumnandi ukuqokwa kuwo kodwa manje asehlelwe yisasasa ngenxa yokuhlulwa ukuqoka ngendlela. UNota uthe izindondo zithengiwe. "Uyangiqonda? La ma-awards ayathengwa. URiky Rick wanitshela ngalokho bantwana." KumaMetro FM Music Awards ango-2017 umrepha ongasekho uRiky Rick, emukela indondo yakhe, waveza ukuthi kuyagwazwa emisakazweni yingakho kudlalwa izingoma ezibhedayo. Wathi umculo omnandi ukwi-internet ngenxa yokuthi kunabantu ababamba amaciko ngophondo emisakazweni. "U-90% womculo owuzwa emisakazweni wumbhedo." Ngebhadi inkulumo yakhe yanqanyulwa esaqhubeka. Ekhuluma kwiMusic Pulse Podcast, uNota uthe ukuthengwa kwezindondo kuyamthunuka ngoba iMabala Noise yangcwaba umrepha ayemphethe uKwesta kumaMetro ngoba yasebenzisa imali eyayiyithole eMnyangweni wezaManzi ngo-2017. Uthe ingoma kaKwesta ethi Ngud yahlulwa ekaNasty C ethi Hell Naw. UNota uthe ingoma kaKwesta yayishisa izikhotha ngapha nangapha futhi idlalwa nasezinkundleni zemidlalo. Uzakwabo uSifiso "Mafitsotso" Ndlovu uthe okulimaze amaciko amaningi wukuthi akusenziwa njengakuqala lapho abalandeli babevota ngempela hhayi ngomlomo. Uthe kumqoka ukuthi amaciko ahlanganise abantu bese ekhipha ngisho u-R20 000, anikeze abantu ukuba bawavotele ngaphambi kokunxenxa izihlobo nabalandeli ukuba bavote. Eqhuba uMafitsotso uthe iyona ndlela le yokunqoba ama-awards. Uthe akekho umuntu othenga izindondo kodwa kusuke kukhuluma ivoti. Uthe kunamaciko obekungafanele aqokwe eminxeni ethize ngenxa yokuthi abengafanele. Uze wenza isibonelo ngomculi owine kwiBest Styled Artist. Nakuba kunjalo wabuye wazisola ngale nkulumo emuva kokugxekwa. Usomahlaya uMpho Pops uthe Zee ubulawe abalandeli ebebemvotela. Uthe kunabanye ebebemeseka ngezinhliziyo kodwa bengamvoteli ngoba bezitshela ukuthi bakhona abazomvotela. "Ngisho eyintandokazi yami, angizovota ngoba ngithemba ukuthi abanye bazomvotela. Sonke isikhathi sihlale sizitshela ukuthi umculi othize uzowina ngenxa yokuthandwa kodwa kuvele kungenzeki," kusho uMpho kwiPeople Need Comedy. ULondie London wodumo kwiReal Housewives of Durban uthe uZee walinyazwa wukuqokwa eminxeni eminingi ngoba amavoti akhe acazeka. "Ukube wayeqokwe eminxeni emithathu kwakungenzeka awine," kusho uLondie London kwiRead The Room Podcast. Imizamo yokuthola ukuphawula kokhulumela iSABC, uMmoni Ngubane, ayiphumelelanga kwaze kwashaya isikhathi sokushicilela.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UTOYA Delazy enomkhulu wakhe uMntwana waKwaPhindangene ngo-2019 KUSINDA kwehlela kumzukulu woMntwana waKwaPhindangene futhi ongumsunguli weNkatha Freedom Party, uNontokozo "Toya Delazy" Buthelezi, njengoba esecela inkongozelo kubantu bakuleli ukuze abuyele ekhaya. Kushaqeke abaningi ngesikhathi lo mculi wodumo lwengoma ethi Pump It Up ethi uswele imali yokuyokhangisa ngecwecwe lakhe elizayo kwiPodcast and Chill with MacG. "Ngimenywe kwiPodcast & Chill manje inkinga wukuthi ngiphesheya kwezilwandle futhi iKerosene imba eqolo ngenxa yempi (ngiya kanye onyakeni ekhaya) - ningakwazi ukungixhasa ngemali yebhanoyi?" Uthe ubezokwenza le ngxoxo ngosizo lwezinkundla zokuxhumana kodwa akufani nokuba se-studio. "Nikwenzile kuJacinta ukuxosha abadayisa emgwaqweni. Ngifuna ukuxosha abacindezeli kule ndima yethu. Benza izinto ezibulale amaciko amaningi avelele." Nakuba kunjalo i-EP iyaphuma ngoMeyi 20. "Ngizimele futhi ngitshala imali kimi ngqo. Ngihlala kude ngoba ngavalwa kodwa ngizophinde ngizame. NgiwuToya Delazy futhi ngake ngaba wumculi omkhulu e-Afrika. Manje ngiwumculi ongaqondakali e-Afrika." Yize uToya Delazy abelindele ukuthola uxhaso kodwa bavele bamtinyela, bethi akasebenzise imali yefa likamkhulu wakhe. Kwenzeka lokhu nje uToya ubesanda kukhala ngokuvalwa komculo wakhe emisakazweni yaseNingizimu Afrika. Le ntokazi yaseMahlabathini yathi sekuphele iminyaka engu-13 ihluleka ukwenza umculo wayo udlale emisakazweni. UToya Delazy wathi akahleli eLondon ngoba ethanda kodwa uphoqelekile ukuba azidingise. Wathi ukushiya iNingizimu Afrika kwakungesiyo intando yakhe kodwa kwaba yimpoqo ngenxa yokuthi uphila ngomculo." UToya Delazy wathi ukuba nyamanambana kuleli akuqalanga manje kodwa kuqale ngaphambi kuka-2017, okuwunyaka ahamba ngawo. Wathi ukucwaseka kwaqala mhla elaxaza inkampani ayeqopha kuyona maqede wazisungulela eyakhe. UToya Delazy wathi namanye amaciko awasafuni ukusebenzisana naye ezingomeni ngoba esaba ukuthelwa amachaphazelo.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMFU Muhle Mzokhona Zondi ohlele inkonzo ezohlanganisa amabutho nabazalwane KULINDELEKE abaholi bomphakathi nezinduna zamabutho enkonzweni esesigodini saseKupholeni, ngasesikoleni iMehlwenkosi Primary, kwaSwayimani, eMgungundlovu ngoMeyi 10 kusukela ngo-9 ekuseni. Umgqugquzeli wale nkonzo, uMfu Muhle Mzokhona Zondi, uthe inhlosongqangi ukuzozethula kubazalwane njengoba eseqokwe njengenduna yezinsizwa. UZondi, onguMengameli webandla iChristian Zion Church in South Africa, uthe uzobe azisa abazalwane ukuthi usezosheba ivangeli nobunsizwa. "Ngifuna amakholwa angathuki uma ezwa ukuthi ngihamba nezinsizwa. Ngalolu suku ngizobe ngizoveza obala ukuthi ngibuye ngihambe namabutho." UZondi uthe kule nkonzo kulindeleke abazalwane basenkonzweni yakhe nabakwamanye amabandla. Kubaholi athe bazohambela inkonzo kukhona iMeya kaMasipala uMnuz Mandla Zondi, ikhansela laku-ward 11 uMnuz Mthokozisi Mbhele, abadidiyeli bezinsizwa uMnuz Sifafa Nyoka, Mnuz Musa Luthuli noMnuz Jefrey Mthembu, izinduna uMnuz Gendezi Shangase, Mnuz Mndeni Gwala noMnuz Njeza Ngcobo kanye noSomlomo eMkhandlwini waseMgungundlovu futhi onguNobhala we-ANC Women's League KwaZulu-Natal uNkk Nonhlanhla Gabela. "Sizobuye sikhulekele ukuphela kwezingozi zomgwaqo ngenxa yokuthi zidlula nemiphefumulo eminingi kulezi zinsuku. Njengoba uMengameli wezwe esememezele usuku loKhetho loHulumeni baseKhaya olungoNovemba 4, nalo sizolubeka kuMdali ukuze kuheleze umoya wokuthula noxolo ezindaweni ezikuMasipala waseMshwathi," kuphetha uZondi.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: AYANDA amaciko aseka umkhankaso wokuxosha abantu bangaphandle abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Kwaqala umlingisi wodumo kuMkhokha The Curse, uDeli Malinga, obengapheli kumamashi eMarch and March, ikakhulukazi eThekwini. Lo mkhankaso, owasungulwa wuJacinta Ngobese owayengumsakazi weVuma FM neGagasi FM, ube sewujoyinwa wumlingisi weShaka Ilembe uNkosikhona "Phakel'umthakathi" Ndabandaba nowayengumsakazi woKhozi FM, uNgizwe Mchunu. Umculi wamapiano uMbongeni "Oscar Mbo" Ndlovu uthe iNingizimu Afrika eyabantu abadabuka kuleli. "Kwanele. Uma abantu bangaphandle befuna ukuba kuleli, abalandele imigudu efanele. Njengomuntu ohambela kakhulu amazwe angaphandle, ubunzima esihlangabezana nabo uma sifaka isicelo sokwamukelwa abuchazeki." Uthe amanye amazwe abeke imigoqwana eyenza kubenzima ukungena kuwona. "Kungani thina singakwenzi lokho? Okunye abantu abangakwazi wukuthi kuthatha amahora angu-7 kuya kwawu-8 ukungena eLagos, eNigeria (noma ngaphezulu uma unganabo obhululu abangakusiza ukuthi ungene khona) ngenxa yemithetho yeVisa yakhona. "Uma ungene ngendlela engafanele, bakubuyisela ezweni lakho ngokuphazima kweso. Asikho isizathu sokuthi iNingizimu Afrika imumathe inqwaba yabantu. Hhayi ngeke!" Nomculi we-Afro jazz uSimphiwe Dana, uthe uyahambisana impela nomkhankaso woNgizwe kodwa wakhala ngokucwaswa kwabantu abathandana nabanobulili obufana nobabo. Usomahlaya waseMpangeni, uCeleste Ntuli, uqale waxolisa ngenkulumo ayisho ngo-2022. Uthe wayengeqondile ukuthi uzwelana nabantu bokufika abangenamvume yokuba kuleli kodwa wayekhuluma ngokunye. Uthe ayekukhuluma kwenye iPodcast akuhlangene nomkhankaso woJacinta. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, umholi we-EFF uMnuz Julius Malema, uthe angancamela ukungavotelwa wumuntu uma evotelwa abantu abazonda abantu bakwamanye amazwe ase-Afrika. UMalema ubekhuluma emcimbini weCollen Mashawana Foundation eGoli. Abantu bamgxeke kakhulu uMalema ngale nkulumo, bathi ucabangelela isisu sakhe hhayi abantu bakuleli.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: YINGXENYE yamalungu ebandla iSt Johannes National Church of Zion uMnuz Siboniso Sithole, uDkt Arch-Bishop Siyabonga Chiliza, uMnuz Luyanda Mlungwana noMnuz Thabiso Magwaza NGENYANGA ezayo kuhlelwe inkonzo yesikhumbuzo senhlekelele yengozi yesitimela eyadlula nemiphefumulo engu-87 kwathi abagibeli abawu-200 balimala kabi eDuffs Road, eThekwini, ngo-Okthoba 14, 1965. Omunye wabagqugquzeli bale nkonzo, uNksz Thobile Kweyama, uthe kuzobe sekungokwesibili bekhumbula le nhlekelele. UNksz Kweyama, oyiPhini likaNobhala ebandleni iSt Johannes National Church of Zion KwaMashu, uthe isikhumbuzo sizobanjelwa esigcemeni sakwa-C kuMtoti Road esidlangaleni. "Le nkonzo ibihlale yenziwa njalo ngonyaka ukukhumbula labo abasishiya. Nakuba kunjalo, kulo nyaka sifisa ukuyibeka kwelinye izinga elithe thuthu njengoba simema nomphakathi waKwaMashu nabasebenzi bakwaPrasa," kusho uNksz Kweyama. Ngokomlando oqoshiwe, lesi sitimela esehlelwa yilo mshophi sasilayishe abantu abamnyama ababebalelwa ku-1 500. Lesi sigameko senzeka ngezikhathi kusenobandlululo. Ngenhloso yokuziphindiselela, abagibeli bakhiphela ulaka lwabo kubasebenzi bakajantshi. Izinkumbi zabantu zahlangana zashaya inhlabaluhide, zamashela endaweni yesigameko. Isolezwe Ngempelasonto lithole ukuthi babebalelwa ku-100 000 abantu abahambela inkonzo yomngcwabo yalaba sebenzi abamnyama abangu-87. Ngokusho kwe-https://en.wikipedia.org, le ngozi yadalwa ngamabomu ngoba abantu abamnyama babegitsheliswa izitimela ezingekho ezingeni lokugibelisa abantu futhi zizindala ukuthi zazingagcwala zinyinyitheke abantu. "Kwakuwumhla ka-4 Okthoba 1965 isitimela esinamakhoshi awu-11 sakwaSouth African Railways sigcwele sichichima abantu abamnyama ababephakathi kuka-1 200 no-1 500, ababephuma kosebenza e-Effington, bezodlula eDurban Station, sebebuyela lapho babehlala khona elokishini KwaMashu ngezithuba zabo-5.28 ntambama. Emgwaqweni u-Effingham Road, izinqola ezintathu zokugcina zaphaphalaza maqede zagingqika. Ukhondathi nomshayeli bathi bezwa umsindo maqede isitimela sagingqika." Kulesi sigameko abagibeli batholakala becakazekile ebangeni eliqhele ngamamitha angu-300 ngakujantshi. Kuthiwa kwagcwala odokotela, abahlengikazi nabosizo lokuqala endaweni yesigameko. Omunye wabasinda kule ngozi wasola uhulumeni wamaBhunu ngokwenza itulo lokubulala abantu abamnyama ngale ngozi. Yingakho ibhungu elimhlophe elalino-25, uWalter Hartslief, lathi liyosiza endaweni yesigameko, iqulu labantu elalithukuthele ligane unwabu lambulala ngesihluku maqede lahlasela nomunye umsebenzi. Kwagwetshwa abantu abathathu ngokufa kukaHartslief.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: ABEFUNDISI nezikhulu ebezihambele inkonzo yaseMshwathi BADELE amakhaza bayodumisa uNkulunkulu enkonzweni yokubonga abahlali baseMshwathi ku-ward  2 ngoLwesine lomama bomthandazo. UKhansela SK Nxumalo, ebambisene ne-ward committee ku-ward 2 eholwa uGogo uMaNdaba bahlele indumezulu yenkonzo yokubonga. Le nkonzo bekungeyokubonga ubuhle bukaNkulunkulu ngokuvikela umphakathi waseNew Hanover osanda kuhlaselwa yizikhukhula ezadlula nemiphefumulo yabantu abathathu ngoNovemba nyakenye. Lokhu kuvele ngesikhathi uNxumalo ethula inhloso yosuku. Enkulumweni yakhe yokwamukela izihambeli zenkonzo, uNxumalo uthe sekukuningi okwehlele umphakathi waseMshwathi okungajwayelekile nokubuhlungu, okubalwa kukho ukushona kwabantu ngokuvamile. “Kepha ngenxa yokuthi sinezinto esimbonile uNkulunkulu esivikela kuzo, simelwe ukubonga. Isibhicongo sikaNovemba sasingaqeda ngamakhaya amaningi kakhulu kodwa abaningi bethu basinda, simelwe ukubonga.” UNxumalo uqhube ngokuthi athi: “ngisho sesibuya ePhasikeni, uye wathembeka uNkulunkulu wayivikela indawo yakithi yangahlaselwa yizingozi zePhasika.” Isikhulumi esiqavile sosuku kwaba bekungoDkt Angie Ntuli-Zuma onguMengameli weKwaZulu-Natal Women Leadership Forum. UDkt Ntuli-Zuma ugxile kakhulu ekuphakamiseni abantu besifazane ebuholini, wagcizelela ukubaluleka kwenkonzo yokubonga obekuyiyona ingqikithi yosuku. Ekugcineni abefundisi baye bakhulekela izihlava ezihlasele indawo yaseMshwathi, baphinde bakhulekela nobuholi bewadi nokhetho olunokuthula lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo ngoNovemba YINGXENYE yabazalwane ebebehambele inkonzo yaseMshwathi INGXENYE yekhwaya ebinandisa kule nkonzo

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: YINGXENYE yosomahlaya bakuleli abadlana imilala kwi-13th Savanna Comics' Choice Comedy Awards eThe Lyric Theatre eGold Reef City  ngo-8 ebusuku NAMHLANJE kuzolalwa sekwaziwa ukuthi yibaphi osomahlaya abayizintandokazi kuleli njengoba kumenyezelwa abanqobe kwi-13th Savanna Comics' Choice Comedy Awards eThe Lyric Theatre eGold Reef City eGauteng ngo-8 ebusuku. Uhlelo lwalo mcimbi, oteketiswa nge-It's a Family, luzobe luphethwe ngumndeni wakwaGoliath, okungoJason Goliath, Donovan Goliath, Nicholus Goliath noKate Goliath. Kosomahlaya abazobe behlekisa bededelana ngoTumi Morake, Lindy Johnson, Khanyisile Ngwenya, Mbali Gudazi, Summary noConrad Koch ozobe ehambisana noChester Missing. Usomahlaya waseMpangeni uCeleste uqokwe emunxeni weHeadliner of the Year Award lapho eqokwe khona noDillan Oliphant, Kagiso KG Mokgadi, Mpho Popps noSkhumba Hlophe. Uphinde waqhathwa noSifiso Nene, Mpho Popps, Kagiso KG Mokgadi noDillan Oliphant emunxeni weComedian of the Year Award. Igama likaCeleste libuye latonyulwa kwiBest Comedy Festival or Show Award njengoba engene ngomcimbi wakhe iCeleste Ntuli and The Big Dudes. Eminye imicimbi eqokiwe ngowe-Armchair Comedy, Bioscope Sundays, Ground Culture Comedy neJive Funny Championship. KwiBest Solo Show Award kuqokwe uChester Missing, Dillan Oliphant, Khanyisa Bunu, Prins noSifiso Nene. KwiJoe Mafela Award kutholene phezulu uMashabela, Siya Seya, Skhumba Hlophe, Summary noTT Phasha ekubeni kwiBeyond the Mic Award kubhaxulana oKagiso Lediga, Lazola Gola, Trevor Gumbi noTumi Morake. Umunxa okushube kakhulu kuwo oweThe Legacy Award lapho kubambene khona uDavid Kau, Kagiso Lediga, Loyiso Gola, Skhumba Hlophe noTrevor Gumbi. Abaqokwe kwiComedic Content Award kududulana uChester Missing, Dillan Oliphant, Kagiso KG Mokgadi, Tsitsi Chiumya noVafa Naraghi kanti koweBreakthrough Act of the Year Award kuboshelwe uChuma Bentele, Dakes, Linde Sibanda, Mbali Gudazi noPanch Gasela.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMFUNDISI Makitaza webhantshi eliwolintshi emukela umklomelo wakhe ISIZULU sithi umuntu ubongwa esefile kodwa uMkhandlu waseMgungundlovu uphume eceleni njengojosaka ngokuhlonipha izingwazi zawo zisadla anhlamvana. La maqhawe abeke induku ebandla emikhakheni ehlukahlukene athulelwe isigqoko emcimbini obusePietermaritzburg City Hall ngoLwesine. Kwabachonywe uphaphe lwegwalagwala kuMgungundlovu District Legends Music Experience Awards kubalwa umakadebona emculweni we-jazz uThemba Mokoena, inkakha emculweni wokholo uSam "Mfundisi Makitaza" Zondi, usonkondlo uBotsotso "Ibhubesi LaseMgungundlovu" Mahlaba, owayengumsakazi weRadio Maritzburg ne-P4 Radio uBrian Zuma, umlingisi woZalo uZama Magubane-Ngcobo onguMaDongwe, owayedlalela iMamelodi Sundowns uSandile "AK47" Ndlovu, umsunguli wenhlangano egqugquzela ukuhlolwa kwezintombi kuleli uDkt Nomagugu Ngobese nabanye. Lo mcimbi wezindondo bewenziwe ngokubambisana wuMkhandlu waseMgungundlovu, uMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, CCIFSA, KwaZulu-Natal Sports Confederation, ABASA ne-MKP Protection Services. Phakathi kwezicukuthwane ebezizimazise le ndumezulu bekukhona iMeya yalo Mkhandlu, uMzi Zuma, iMeya yaseRichmond uMelikhaya Ngcongo neyaseMpofana uMaureen Magubane, iNhloko yoMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko KwaZulu-Natal uDkt uNtokozo Sifunda namakhosi asezindaweni ezakhele lo mkhandlu. Kulo mcimbi akuhlonishwanga kuphela izingwazi ezibeke induku ebandla kodwa kutuswe nalezo ezingamavulandlela. UZuma ubonge kakhulu labo qolothakamango ngokuqhakambisa uMkhandlu waseMgungundlovu ngamagalelo abo. "Kumqoka kakhulu ukuhlonipha izingqalabutho zisadla anhlamvana, hhayi ukulinda zize zidlule emhlabeni. Amagalelo ala maqhawe emphakathini, ngeqhaza alibambe kwezobuciko, emculweni nakwezemidlalo, kuklame enkulu indima ekuhlanganiseni umphakathi wezinhlanga ezihlukene nabantu bamazinga angafani ndawonye." Uthe basawadinga la maqhawe ekwakheni umphakathi, asize ekucijeni abaseza ngemuva kwawo. "Asebenzise amakhono awo ukusabalalisa imiyalezo ekhuluma ngezihlava ezikhahlameza umphakathi kulezi zinsuku njengodlame lomndeni, ukukhulelwa kwentsha, izidakamizwa nokunye okuningi." UZuma ugcizelele ukuzibophezela ekutheni lo mcimbi wenziwe minyaka yonke futhi izingwazi zingatholi izindondo kuphela kodwa ziklonyeliswe nangezipho ezizozikhuthaza. IMEYA yaseMgungundlovu uMzi Zuma UMADONGWE, wengubo emnyama, emukela umklomelo wakhe UBRIAN Zuma emukela indondo yakhe kubagqugquzeli UBOTSOTSO Mahlaba, ongakwesokunxele, emukela indondo yakhe

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: IZINKAKHA zomculo we-jazz zizoshiyelana inkundla emcimbini wokuqongelela imali yokuxhasa isikole iSacred Heart Secondary School ozoba semagcekeni alesi sikole Osindisweni, eVerulam ngoMeyi 2 kusukela ngo-3 ntambama. Kubaculi abazobe besina bededelana kubalwa uSelaelo Selota wodumo lwengoma ethi Thrrr Phaaa! nezihlabani zomculo esezingodokotela ngenxa yemfundo uXolisa Dlamini, Mash Mashiloane noNatalie Rungan. Umgqugquzeli walo mcimbi, u-Atlas Duma, uthe enye inhlosongqangi ngawo wukugubha i-International Jazz Day. "Ochungechungeni lwemigubho ye-jazz yaminyaka yonke, kulo nyaka iSagiya Foundation iqoqe izinkakha zalo mculo ukuba zigubhe lolu suku ngokunikela ingxenye yenzuzo ezokwenziwa kuleli dili lomculo eSacred Heart Secondary." U-Atlas uthe ukubophela odokotela kwezomculo kusho ukukhuphuka kwezinga lalo mgidi okwenza ube sezingeni lomhlaba njengoba ugqugquzelwa yi-UNESCO ne-Herbie Hancock Institute of Jazz yaseLondon. "Sizokhumbula ukuthi i-Inaugural KZN International Jazz Festival yaba nesasasa elikhulu ngo-2023 lapho yayilethe izihlabani zaphesheya kwezilwandle okubalwa kuzo uRichard Bona (USA) noYayoi Ikawa (Japan)." U-Atlas uthe ezinye izihlabani eziyizifundiswa emculweni we-jazz ezizobe zinandisa kulo mcimbi ngoMthobisi Mthalane ofundisa umculo eSacred Heart nodume ngenoni elith Usizi Lomuntu Omnyama, Vincent Mtetwa odume ngengoma ethi Judgement Day naye oyisifundiswa se-jazz esacijwa eTechnikon Natal nase-UKZN futhi wafundisa khona iminyakana ngaphambi kokuwelela phesheya kwezilwandle. "Kuzobe kukhona noSifiso Khanyile waseMgungundlovu  kodwa osezinze eGoli. Uzobe ededela amanoni e-albhamu yakhe entsha." Intokazi esanda kuphothula izifundo ze-jazz e-UKZN, uThembalethu Bhengu, ithe kuyigugu kuyo ukushiyelana inkundla enkulu kangaka nabaculi ebahlonipha kakhulu futhi abanye babo ebebengothisha bayo bomculo eNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal. Amathikithi aseyatholakala ePick n Pay nakwa-Boxer ngo-R200 kuya ku-R1 000 kanti abangena nama-coolerbox kufanale bengeze u-R150.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMLINGISI uRenatefetswe “Rena” Ramosala ubhoboke ngokukhuleliswa yisihlobo kungavunyelwene UMLINGISI, odlale kuZalo nakwiSbongile & Dlaminis, ubhoboke ngokudlwengulwa aze akhulelwe okwenziwa yisihlobo sakhe esahamba uMkhosi woMhlanga. URanatefetswe "Rena" Ramosala (41), onguNkk Zondo kuZalo, uthe wayeseneminyaka engu-16 ngesikhathi ehlelwa yilo mshophi. Uthe kubo baze bathola ngoba esekhulelwe ukuthi isihlobo sakhe besilala naye. "Leso sigameko sangishiya ngikhulelwe ngisemncane, ngingenalo ulwazi noma ukuqonda okwanele ngesimo engangikuso. Ngangingakwazi ukutshela abazali bami ngoba umnukubezi wayethe uzongibulala. Ngaze ngakwazi ukubhoboka esehambile ekhaya, kusho ukuthi wayebona ukuthi ngikhulelwe ngoba ngangigula, ngingakwazi ukutshela abazali bami. Emuva kokuzwa ukuthi ngikhulelwe, abazali bami bathatha izinyathelo zokungivikela, bangiyisa kodokotela, kosonhlalakahle nasezikhungweni zomthetho." URena uthe nakuba icala lavulwa kodwa laphelela emoyeni ngenxa yokuthi amaphoyisa alisukumela sekuphele iminyaka emibili ebelethile. "Abomthetho bahamba bayobopha umsolwa kodwa baze babuya ingane isineminyaka emibili, bethi beze ngecala lokunukubezwa kwami. Umama wabaxosha ngoba ethi leli cala lenzeka ingane ingakazalwa, manje izohlukumezeka uma sekugqigqwa enkantolo," uyilanda kanje indaba yosizi lwakhe. "Lokho kwaholela ekutheni ngiqhubeke nempilo ngibhekene nobunzima. Ngicindezelekile futhi ngihlukumezekile ngokwengqondo." URena uthe akugcinanga ngalesi sehlakalo kodwa wagcina esedlwengulwa nangabanye abantu besilisa ababenza sengathi bazwelana naye kanti bafuna ukumgila. "Phezu kwalokho, angizange ngivumele ubuhlungu bempilo bunginqinde ekufezeni amaphupho ami. Yize kwakunzima kodwa ngagcina ngisiphothulile isikole futhi ngenza izifundo ezingama-short courses. Ngakhula ngaba umuntu ozimisele ukuvulela abanye indlela, ikakhulukazi abesifazane abake bahlukumezeka." URena uthe uqale ukukhuluma ngalesi sigameko esasakaza esiteshini esi-online iPhly Radio lapho ayesakaza khona uhlelo lwantambama nolwangezimpelasonto. Uthe ukunqanda lesi sihlava emphakathini, usungule inhlangano engenzi nzuzo ebizwa ngoMzokhanyayo Development Community Upliftment Plan, lapho begxila khona ekuqwashiseni umphakathi ngezinkinga ezifana nodlame lobulili, ukunukubezwa ngokocansi, ukuziphatha kwabesifazane nokukhulelwa kwabantu abasha. Ngaphandle kwalokho, uthe uziphilisa ngebhizinisi alisungulile i-Ezemvelo Ea Batho, athe kulona benza imikhiqizo yokunakekela izinwele nomzimba ebizwa nge-Ea Batho Hair Food, Ea Batho Virgin Hair Growth Oil, Ea Batho Root Revival Hair Spray, Ea Batho Carrot Body Oil, Ea Batho Glow Serum, Ea Batho Inner Thighs Cream ne-Ea Batho Glow Body Lotion Cream. Uthe usebenzisa ukunukubezwa kwakhe ukuqwashisa nokukhuthaza abantu besifazane.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UCYNTHIA Shange owayemele uMiss Africa South noStephanie Elizabeth Reinecke owayemele uMiss South Africa kuMiss World ngo-1972 PHEZU kokuthi ivulandlela kwezobuhle kuleli, uCynthia Philisiwe Shange, lihambe inhliziyo yalo ibuhlungu ngenxa yokuthwala kanzima kwabalingisi, kodwa lishiye umsizilo esingeke siwulibale endimeni yezobuhle nokulingisa. Ekhuluma enkonzweni yesikhumbuzo sikazakwabo, uJoe "Sdumo" Mafela eJoburg Theatre, eGoli ngoMashi 2017, uCynthia wakhuluma waze wahlengezela izinyembezi. Wathi yize ayeseneminyaka engu-43 endimeni yokulingisa kodwa wayesathwele kanzima. "Yingoba asiqashiwe ngokugcwele emsebenzini esiwenzayo. Ngiyazi ukuthi siyanijabulisa kodwa ekujuleni kwezinhliziyo zethu njengabalingisi asijabulile. Singabantu abanosizi. Singazenzisa sishuthe izithombe nani futhi sisayine ama-autograph kodwa impilo yomlingisi inzima." Wathi nakuba ayeselingise iminyaka engu-18 kwiMuvhango kodwa wayelokhu esayina isivumelwano esisha. "Angikwazi ukuboleka imali ngoba angiqashiwe ngokugcwele. Ungazama ukupatanisa ukukhokhela i-medical aid, kodwa uma uphelelwa wumsebenzi iyaphela. Ungazama ukukhokhela umasingcwabisane kodwa uma kuphela umsebenzi, uyaphela. Siyacela, uma omunye wabalingisi eshona engenayo imali, akusho ukuthi asikwazi ukonga imali. Siyazama ukonga. Sakhetha lo msebenzi, angisho ukuthi obhedayo kodwa siqhutshwa wuthando lwawo." UCynthia (76) uze wahamba emhlabeni esibhedlela saseThekwini entathakusa ngoMsombuluko, le nkinga ayekhala ngayo ngo-2017 kusakhalwa ngayo. Nokho leso sikhalo ngeke sashintsha ukuthi uCynthia uyingqalabutho eyagudluza izikhonkwane ngezikhathi ezinzima zobandlululo yayoqhudelana nezintokazi zamazwe kuMiss World ngo-1972. Umdidiyeli omkhulu weMuvhango, uDuma Ndlovu, uthe ukuba emhlabeni bekuneqiniso ngabe uCynthia ushone sekunonodoli obizwa ngaye ngenxa yomlando awuqopha ngo-1972. Ubekhuluma ngokuba ngunobuhle wokuqala omnyama wakuleli ukungenela uMiss World eLondon, e-UK ngoNovemba 22, 1972 futhi waphuma endaweni yesihlanu. UDuma uthe lokho kwafaka ugqozi izintokazi ezimnyama ngoba wayengekho unobuhle omnyama owake wafika kulelo zinga eNingizimu Afrika. Nakuba kunjalo uCynthia uhambe emhlabeni engakaze wahlonishwa ngeziqu noma ngenye yezindondo ezibizwa nge-Order ngoMengameli bakuleli abamnyama. UCynthia wazalelwa elokishini eliseThekwini, iLamontville, ngoJulayi 27, 1949. Waqala ukumodela ekuqaleni kweminyaka yo-1970. Waduma waziwa izwe lonke emuva kokudla umhlanganiso kuMiss Natal noMiss Africa South. Emuva kokuhlabana ngalesi sicoco sikazime wakuleli, uCynthia waklonyeliswa ngama-suitcase, isitofu sikagesi, ukheshi ka-R200 nomsakazo. Ngesikhathi sobandlululo, imiqhudelwano yonobuhle yayihlukanisiwe ngokobuhlanga njengoba abamnyama babencintisana bodwa. Esekhale wemuka nesicoco sikaMiss Africa South, uCynthia wabe eseqokwa ukuba amele iNingizimu Afrika kuMiss World. Kulowo mqhudelwano walala isihlanu kuqhudelana izingqazu zamazwe ngamazwe. UCynthia wakhumbula ukuthi lo mqhudelwano wamnikeza ithuba lokubona umhlaba nokuveza amaqiniso ngesihluku sobandlululo nokucwaswa ngokwebala eNingizimu Afrika. Ukungena kukaCynthia ekulingiseni Esebuyile phesheya, uCynthia wabe esengena emkhakheni wokulingisa emafilimini nasemidlalweni yethelevishini. Ngo-1975 walingisa efilimini yokuqala ende yabantu abamnyama bodwa eyayisihloko sithi UDeliwe. Wasuka lapho wadlulela kweyayithi Isivumelwano nakwiNkedama ngonyaka ofanayo. Waqhubekela emdlalweni wethelevishini ozigcawugcawu owawuthi Shaka Zulu ngo-1986, elingisa indawo kaMkabayi. Ngeminyaka yo-1990 wabe eselingisa indawo kaMaNkosi Buthelezi kwiMuvhango, engunina kaThandaza Buthelezi-Mukwevho (okuyindawo eyayilingiswa nguSindi Dlathu). Washada nowayeyintatheli eyayingumdlali webhola elikhokhelayo, umbhali wezincwadi nomlingisi uDerrick Thema. Umyeni kaCynthia wadlula emhlabeni ngoDisemba 31, 2021, eseneminyaka engu-74. UCynthia noDerrick babusiswa ngezingane ezine, okunguBanele, Sihle, Archie noNonhle Thema, odume kakhulu ngokwethula izinhlelo zethelevishini. UCynthia waqala ukuguliswa yisifo sikashukela kusukela ngo-2018 kangangoba wake walaliswa izinyanga ezintathu esibhedlela futhi wacishe wanqanyulwa umlenze kodwa kwagcina kususwe izinzwane. Ngo-2009 uCynthia waklonyeliswa ngendondo yeLifetime Achievement kumaSouth African Film and Television Awards (Saftas). Waphinda wahlonishwa ngalo mklomelo weLifetime Achievement kumaSimon Mabhunu Sabela KZN Film and TV Awards ngo-2024. Umufi uzofihlwa ngeSonto emuva kwenkonzo ezokuba sesikoleni saseNanda, iShembe Memorial ngo-10 ekuseni. UCYNTHIA Shange enguMkabayi kuShaka Zulu UCYNTHIA Shange ushone inhliziyo isaqaqamba UCYNTHIA Shange ephahlwe yiSilo uZwelithini noJoe Mafela ngesikhathi kukhonjiswa UDeliwe e-Eyethu Cinema eSoweto ngo-1975 UCYNTHIA Shange esangenela imiqhudelwano yonobuhle USINDI Dlathu noCynthia Shange besalingisa kwiMuvhango UNDABA Mhlongo enoCynthia Shange ngesikhathi kuqoshwa Isivumelwano UCYNTHIA Shange engenele uMiss World UCYNTHIA Shange emukela indondo yeLifetime Achievement U-CYNTHIA Shange nendodakazi uNonhle Thema

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMPHATHISWA eMnyangweni wezeMpilo eKZN, uNomagugu Simelane-Mngadi, esegqoke izevatho  zase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD BEKUMNANDI kudelile enkonzweni yebandla i-United Congregational Church of Southern Africa (UCCSA) egatsheni laseMzinyathi njengoba bekwamukelwa njengelungu elisha uMphathiswa eMnyangweni wezeMpilo KwaZulu-Natal, uNkk Nomagugu Simelane-Mngadi ngeSonto. Kule ndumezulu yenkonzo bekukhona abaholi bomphakathi nabazalwane bamahlelo ahlukahlukene. Kubaholi ababonakale kule nkonzo bekukhona noMphathiswa woMnyango wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uMbali Shinga, owayenguMphathiswa wezemiDlalo, ezobuCiko namaSiko kulesi sifundazwe uWeziwe Thusi nowake wawuphatha lo mnyango uHlengiwe Mavimbela. UMhlonishwa uShinga uthe bebengayile ukuyoqhuba ivangeli lokuhambela imiphakathi kuphela kodwa bebeyoqinisa ubudlelwano phakathi kukahulumeni nabantu abasemazingeni aphansi. "Bekuwumoya obugcwele intokozo, indumiso nenhlokomo njengoba besihlabelela futhi sigwaba ndawonye siqhakambisa iqhaza elinamandla elibanjwe yinkolo nobumbano emphakathini." UMphathiswa uthe ubuye wanikezwa ithuba lokugibela esteji lapho egcine esemukelisa izaguga zebandla izinduku zokudondolozela. Uthe kuye kusho lukhulu lokho ngoba bekuqinisekisa ukuzibophezela koMnyango wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi ekwesekeni abantu abadala, uvikele isithunzi sabo futhi uqinisekise ukuthi bazizwa besabalulekile futhi benakekelwa emphakathini. "Imizuzu efuze lena isikhumbuza ukuthi ukulethwa kwentuthuko akusiyo inqubomgomo kodwa kuwukuxhumana kwabantu, ukubanakekela nokuba sempilweni yabo," kusho uShinga. UMphathiswa uthe imfudumalo nothando olukhonjiswe yibandla kukhombise ubumqoka bokweseka abantu, ikakhulukazi abadala nokuqinisekisa ukuthi abekho abashiywa ngaphandle. Eqhuba uMphathiswa uthe ukubambisana kuveza iqhaza elimqoka elibanjwe ngabezenkolo ekwesekeni imiphakathi, ikakhulukazi ngezikhathi ezinzima. Uthe njengohulumeni bazoqhubeka nokuzibophezela ekusebenzisaneni nabezenkolo ukuze baqinise izinhlelo zokulekelela imiphakathi yaKwaZulu-Natal. "Ngokubambisana, ngenkolo nokulethwa kwentuthuko, siyaqhubeka nokugcina isithunzi, ukwakha nokunakekela imiphakathi," kuphetha uMphathiswa woMnyango wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi KwaZulu-Natal. UMHLONISHWA uMbali Shinga ebingelela uNkk Weziwe Thusi e-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD UMPHATHISWA uNomagugu Simelane-Mngadi ephahlwe nguNkk Weziwe Thusi noMphathiswa uMbali Shinga ngesikhathi emukelwa njengelungu elisha lase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD UMHLONISHWA uHlengiwe Mavimbela ubekwabebehambele inkonzo yase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD UMPHATHISWA uNomagugu Simelane-Mngadi efunga njengelungu elisha lase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/UCCSA UMPHATHISWA uMbali Shinga emukelisa abefundisi base-UCCSA izinduku zokudondolozela zezaguga Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD OMUNYE wabaholi be-ANC ophikweni lwabesifazane eyingxenye yabazalwane ebebehambele inkonzo yase-UCCSA Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD BEKUKHONA amahlelo ahlukahlukene enkonzweni yokwamukela uMphathiswa uNomagugu Simelane-Mngadi Image: FACEBOOK/KZNDSD

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: KULINDELWE izinkumbi zabathandi bobumnandi emcimbini wokwamukelwa kolale isithathu kwiMzansi Big Brother Season 6, uLindokuhle "Bravo B" Nsele. Le nsizwa yaseHlalankosi izobungazwa emcimbini iNongoma Big Night Music Festival eMcebo kaZulu Lodge KwaNongoma namhlanje. Kulo mcimbi kuzobe kunandisa uShenge WaseHlalankosi, Thokozani Langa, Lwah Ndlunkulu, Jumbo, Qwabe Twins, Mayoghurt, Gatsheni, uMzukulu, Ama-NND International, Mdumazi, Jaiva Zimnike, Njabulo Langa, Stabhilithi, Navigator, Mjolisi, Mashelela, Imfezemnyama, Mdabu Ngqulunga, Inkosi Yamagcokama, Mashampula, Cmbero, Mashwabana, Luve Dubezane, Magoqa Womdanso nabanye. Umgqugquzeli walo mcimbi, uBingelela "Bings" Mpanza, uthe bazohlonipha uBravo B ngenxa yokuqhakambisa isifunda saseZululand, ikakhulukazi uNongoma. Uthe nakuba uBravo B engawudlanga umhlanganiso kulo mqhudelwano kodwa ukulala isithathu kwasho lukhulu emphakathini wangakubo. UBingelela uthe bafuna ukumamukela ngezandla ezifudumele nangenhlokomo ukuze abone ukuthi kubo useyiqhawe. Uthe nakuba  bemfihlele induku emqubeni ngesipho kodwa unxusa abafuna ukumgixabeza ngezipho ukuba baziphathe ngalolu suku. Ubuye waveza ukuthi kulo mcimbi kuzobuye kuqwashiswe umphakathi ngokuhlukunyezwa kwabantu ngokobulili. UBingelela uthe amathikithi asatholakala ezitolo zakwaShoprite, Pick n Pay, Spar, Ticket Pro, Computicket naseWebTickets ngo-R100. Amanye azobe etholakala esangweni ngo-R150. Ubonge kakhulu abaxhasi balo mcimbi okukhona kubo neminyango kahulumeni.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: AYAPHELA amaphupho  kwabaqokwe kumaMetro FM Music Awards ase-ICC Arena eThekwini namuhla ngo-8 ebusuku. Le ndumezulu yomqhudelwano wezindondo izokhonjiswa bukhoma kuSABC 1 kusukela ngo-7.30 ebusuku njengoba kuzobe kuvela osaziwayo besahamba kukhaphethi omnyama. Angaphezu kuka-100 amaciko azobe edlana imilala eminxeni engu-21. Umunxa ozobe ubhekwe ngamehlo abomvu ngoweBest Song of The Year lapho kudlana khona imilala oSam Deep, Nia Pearl, Boohle & Mano – Shela, Dj Smallz, 031 Choppa & Uncool MC– Zep, Dj Maphorisa, Xduppy, Kabza De Small, Thatohatsi, Young Stunna & Nkosazana Daughter- Abantwana Bakho, Mawhoo, Gl ceejay, Jazzwrld & Thukuthela – Bengicela, Khadeair, Peekay Mzee & Kaytah – Magumba, Jazzwrld, Mawhoo, Thukuthela & Gl_ceejay – Uzizwa kanjani,Shandesh and Mvzzle – Sdudla or Slender,Goon Flavour, Master KG & Eemoh – Ngishutheni, uMafikizolo – Uzoncengwa unyoko noCiza, Jazzwrld & Thukuthela – Isaka. Kulo nyaka kuzobhekwa ukuthi iyiphi insizwa ezowina okokuqala emunxeni weBest Maskandi njengoba kuqhathwe Umafikizolo – Uzoncengwa Unyoko, Sminofu and Zee Nxumalo – Sajola Kamnandi, Mzukulu, Intombi yasoLundi – Ubu Ghost Bami, Khuzani – Umanikinikana noSiya Ntuli – Amaphiko. Umculi kamaskandi oshisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku uNkeshemba, utholene phezulu noShandesh, Khadeair, Kharishma, Goon Flavour. Izintokazi zaseKZN uMawhoo noLwah Ndlunkulu zidudulana noLordkez, Zee Nxumalo noShandesh. UXolly Mncwango waseRichards Bay ubambene noNontokozo Mkhize, Musa Yende, Mmatema noNothando Hlophe. USam Deep ubhekene nenselelo emunxeni weBest Artist of The Year kuMaphorisa, Ciza,Shandesh noZee Nxumalo. UMawhoo angase aphume nesikhuni sivutha kwiBest Collaboration njengoba eqhathwe noSam Deep, Nia Pearl, Boohle and Mano – Shela, Jazzwrld, Mawhoo, Thukuthela and Gl_ceejay – Uzizwa Kanjani, Ladysmith Black Mambazo, Nduduzo Makhathini & Mbuso Khoza – You make me happy, Mawhoo, Gl ceejay, Jazzwrld & Thukuthela – Bengicela noGoon Favour, Master KG& Eemoh – Ngishutheni. *Kwenzeka lokho nje ziyabuya kwiMetro FM Music Awards Festival ePeople's Park eThekwini namhlanje kusukela ngo-2 ntambama.
