Kuzobe kusina kudedelana oYoung Stunna, Babalwa, DJ Tira, Lamiez Holworthy, Lerato Kganyango, Khuzani, Mthandeni, uMafikizolo, Big NUZ, Feza, Somizi Mhlongo, Zola Zee Loving, Skhinkily nabanye. *Kusasa ziyahephana kwiMetro FM Music Awards: Love Movement eBerea Rovers eThekwini kusukela ngo-12 emini. Kuzobe kunandisa uWilson B Nkosi, Paul Mtirara, Sentle Lehoko, Msizi Shembe, Naima Kay, Mondli Ngcobo, Naledi Aphiwe, Zamajobe, Nomfundo Moh, Nontokozo Mkhize, Lwah Ndlunkulu, Khutso Thiledi nabanye. *Kusasa ziyaphenduka kwiDubane Summer Break eShaka Marine World eThekwini kusukela ngo-9 ekuseni. Kuzobe kushiyelana  inkundla uGoldmax & Dankie Boi, Young Stunna, Blckie, Beast, Dladla Mshunqisi, Buko & DJ Sox, Loki, Louis Ribbs, and Tobzela,

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UTHANDOH  Gumede ongumsunguli werobhothi elinguthisha wazozonke izifundo, u-Iris UNOBUHLE wakwaMnqobokazi, eHluhluwe, uThandoh "BS" Gumede, uzobonakala nezinkakha zabalingisi emdlalweni omusha ozongena esikhaleni seScandal! ku-etv. Isolezwe Ngempelasonto lithole ukuthi uThandoh uzobe elingisa noRami Chuene noSindi Dlathu kulo mdlalo osihloko sithi Four Of Us. Ethintwa uThandoh, obuye aziwe ngelikaMaka-Iris, ukuqinisekisile ukuthi uzovela kulo mdlalo esebenza endaweni yokucwalwa izinwele. Unxuse ukungandi ngamagama ngenxa yesivumelwano asisayine nabadidiyeli. Inkonyane izobe ingathuki isisinga kuThando njengoba eseke walingisa emidlalweni Empini, Muvhango nasesikhangisweni sakwa-Assupol. "Ukulingisa ngisuka kude nakho njengoba ngakuqala ngisafunda e-University of Zululand futhi umkhakha engiwuthandayo. Okungichaza ngokulingisa ukuthi kuyangivumela ukuba ngizichaze futhi kuyindlela yokushaywa wumoya nokubuyisa amandla emuva kokusebenza kanzima kwezobuchwepheshe." UThandoh uphethe isicoco sikaMiss Tech Universe asiwina eqhathwe nezintokazi zamazwe ngamazwe ezingongoti kwezobuchwepheshe emcimbini waseThailand. Ngaphambi kokuhlabana ngalesi sicoco, wayeqale waqwaqwada izintokazi zase-Afrika kuMiss Dot Africa. Ngo-2024 uThando ube esesungula irobhothi elibizwa ngo-Iris elisebenza njengothisha nelinolwazi lwazo zonke izifundo ezenziwa kusukela kuGrade 1 kuya emanyuvesi akuleli futhi uqeketha izilimi ezingu-11 ezikhulunywa kuleli ngokusemthethweni. Ngaphandle kwalokho ungumsunguli wesikole sokuqala endaweni yasemakhaya eHluhluwe, esigxile ezifundweni zobuchwepheshe, iMaths neSayensi esigcina ku-matric, iBSG Technologies Combined School. UNksz Thando ‘’BS“ Gumede ozobonakala emdlalweni weTV omusha

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: KUZOQOPHEKA umlando  emcimbini walo nyaka wedili lomculo wokholo iMayine Gospel Experience njengoba izithameli zizodumisa zifake ama-earphone ezindlebeni. Le ndumezulu ebizwa nge-Silent Worship Experience: A Night of Song and Worship izoba se-DCC Jesus Dome eThekwini ngoMeyi 22. Kubaculi abazobe besina bededelana kubalwa u-Oncemoresix, Khaya Mthethwa, Ncebakazi Msomi, Ntokozo Mbambo, Lusanda Beja noMpumi Mtsweni. UKwezi Ndlovu-Mbambo, osethimbeni labahleli balo mcimbi, uveze ukuthi bahlele into engakaze ibonakale njengoba abazobe bekhona bonke bezonikwa ama-earphone ukuze ulalele lonke uhlelo lomcimbi nokuyindlela abafuna umuntu asondelane ngayo noThixo njengoba kuzobe kugcwele umculo nomkhuleko. "Sihlele ukuthi umcimbi siwenze ngendlela engakaze ibonakale kuleli. Abantu abazoba khona sifuna basondelane noNkulunkulu ngokubanika isikhathi somuntu ngamunye. Izingoma zonke nezintshumaelko abantu bazozizwa ngalokhu abazobe bekufake emadlebeni nokuyinto esifuna umuntu ngamunye asondelane nomdali wakhe," kusho uKwezi. Uthe abaculi abazobe bekhona bonke ngeke bagcine nje ngokucula kuphela kodwa bazophinde bashumayele. Amathikithi okuthamela lo mcimbi aseyatholakala eWebtickets nasePick n Pay ngoR250. I-DCC Jesus Dome ku-39 Garth Road eMayville, eThekwini.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: NGAPHAMBI kokuba ingqalabutho yomlingisi, uCynthia Shange, idlule emhlabeni yakuveza ngo-2024, ukuthi kwake kwambulwa kwembeswa kuyo ngenxa yesifo sikashukela kangangoba yaze yanqanyulwa izinzwane. UCynthia (76), oshonele kwesinye sezibhedlela zaseKZN, ngezintathakusa zangoMsombuluko, emuva kokugula, wazisholo yena ukuthi wasizwa uShembe lesi sifo sifuna ukumjuqa ngalowo nyaka. Umufi wadalula ukuthi uphethwe yisifo sikashukela ngesikhathi ehlonishwa ngendondo ye-Lifetime Achievement kumaSimon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards eThekwini, ngoJulayi 2024. Wathi lesi sifo saqala ukumxina ngo-2018, kangangoba wagcina esegqigqa esibhedlela futhi nodokotela baze bafuna nokumnqamula umlenze. "Bengizokwamukela lo mklomelo ngiqhutshwa ngenqola kodwa ngibonga umusa kaNkulunkulu," esho ngo-2024. Wathi waze wasizwa ukuqambela odokotela amanga ukuze anganqanyulwa umlenze. "Ngo-2018, ngesikhathi ngisuka eGoli ngiya eThekwini, ngaba nokugula okwangenza ngalaliswa esibhedlela izinyanga ezintathu. Kwakunzima ngiphakathi kokuphila nokufa. Ngibonga uShembe ngokusindisa impilo yami sengiphelelwe yithemba. Ngasenga ezimithiyo ngokubatshela ukuthi kunesivumelwano engisenzile sokuqopha ifilimu, esingangenza ngihlawuliswe u-R5 million uma ngisephula. Bafonela indodakazi yami ukuba izosayina amafomu ukuze nginikezwe ama-antibiotics." Esikhundleni sokunqanyulwa umlenze, uCynthia wathi wagcina enqanyulwe izinzwane onyaweni. UCynthia odabuka eLamontville, waba ngunobuhle wokuqala omnyama kuleli ukumela iNingizimu Afrika ku-Miss World eLondon, ngo-1972. Wathola le ngqayizivele yethuba emuva kokuhlabana ngesicoco sikaMiss Black South Africa ngenxa yokuthi ngezikhathi zobandlululo abantu abamnyama babengavunyelwe ukuqhudelana nezinye izinhlanga. Nakhona ku-Miss World waphuma endaweni yesihlanu, okwenza amantombazane amnyama aba nogqozi nofuqufuqu lokungenela imiqhudelwano yonobuhle kusukela ngo-1992. Akugcinanga lapho, uCynthia uqhubekile nokuvelela endimeni yezokungcebeleka njengoba waba wumlingisi oqavile efilimini yokuqala ende yesiZulu eyayithi uDeliwe, lapho uCynthia ayelingisa khona noSimon Mabhunu Sabela, Ndaba Mhlongo, Sydney Chama, Roland Mqwebu, Patience Africa, Maurel Msimang, June Buthelezi, Joe Mafela nabanye abaningi. Kusukela lapho, akabange esabheka emuva njengoba wadlulela efilimini esihloko sithi Isivumelwano. Wadlala indawo kaMkabayi emdlalweni ozigcawugcawu wethelevishini uShaka Zulu. Emuva kwalokho, walingisa emdlalweni owuchungechunge kaDuma Ndlovu uMuvhango, lapho ayelingisa khona indawo kaMaButhelezi unina kaThandaza (Sindi Dlathu). Ngenxa yeqhaza lakhe emkhakheni wezokulingisa, uCynthia uhlonishwe ngomklomelo we-Lifetime Achievement kuma-South African Film and TV Awards (Saftas) nakuma-Simon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards. Ushiye emhlabeni amadodakazi akhe uSihle nosaziwayo wethelevishini uNonhle Thema namadodana u-Ayanda noBanele Thema nabazukulu nesizukulwane. Ngokwesitatimende somndeni, imininingwane ngezinhlelo zomngcwabo isazomenyezelwa. U-CYNTHIA Shange ewina isicoco sikaMiss Black South Africa ngeminyaka yo-1970s UNDABA Mhlongo ephethe into enesithombe sikaCynthia Shange kuSivumelwano U-CYNTHIA Shange emele iNingizimu Afrika ngo-1972 U-CYNTHIA Shange elingisa noSindi Dlathu kuMuvhango U-CYNTHIA Shange mhlazane ehlonishwa ngomklomelo we-Lifetime Achievement U-CYNTHIA SHANGE noNONHLE THEMA

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: U-AYANDA Mchunu obhale incwadi ebuyisa ithemba ngamaphoyisa kuleli YIZE abantu bakuleli sebeqala ukungayithembi ingalo yomthetho kulandela ukuvela kobufakazi obushaqisayo kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga kodwa umbhali wezincwadi u-Ayanda Mchunu uyalibuyisa leli themba. Leli bhungu lakwaSwayimani, eMgungundlovu, lilobe incwadi okungeka-13 esihloko sithi Akukho Qili. U-Ayanda uthe ubhale le ncwadi ngenhloso yokunika abantu ithemba ngobude bengalo yomthetho "ngoba sezaba ziningi izigilamkhuba ngenxa yenkolelo yokuthi umthetho wakuleli kawunabo ubulungiswa uma kuza ekuphenyweni kwamacala." Uthe  sebebaningi abantu ababulewe muva nje kodwa kungaboshwa muntu. U-Ayanda uthe ufuna abantu bazihloniphe, bazi ukuthi uma benza okubi bazobhekana nengalo yomthetho, bazijezele izono zabo. "Nginenkolelo yokuthi akusiwona umsebenzi wamaphoyisa kuphela ukulwa nobugebengu. Nathi njengezakhamuzi zakuleli zwe kumele sibambe iqhaza ukuze sakhe isizwe esingcono kakhulu kunayizolo." Uthe le ncwadi  izokwethulwa ehholo lomphakathi KwaNdlebezembuzi, kwaSwayimani, ngoJuni 20. "Kulo mcimbi kuzobe kusetshenziswa le ncwadi ukuqwashisa intsha ngokuthi ingangeni ebugebengwini njengoba kuzobe kuyinyanga yayo." Le ncwadi yelama ezishicilelwe wu-Ayanda kusukela ngo-2019, okubalwa kuzo ezithi  Bengithi Ngizigwaze Ngowami, Imfundo Yikusasa Lethu, Usuku Lomshado, Kuyosa, Imiphumela, Words Of Wisdom, Akabange Esafika, Angikaze Ngikubone Okunje, On Thin Ice, Imfihlo, Echoes Of Courage nethi Beyond The Storm. Ngale misebenzi u-Ayanda usehlabane ngemiklomelo ehlukahlukane kwiDepartment of Arts and Culture Provincial Short Story Compertition. Wabuye wahlabana ngeBest Male Author 2024 kwiThe Book Behind Awards. U-Ayanda uthe wangena kulo mkhakha ngenxa yokufakwa ugqozi wumbhali ongasekho uMeshack Mfaniseni Masondo, owamgqugquzela ukuba abhale izincwadi ezigxile ophenyweni.  "Emuva kokufunda imibhalo yakhe ngabe sengibuka ukushintsha kwesikhathi." Uthe wabe esebhala incwadi esihloko sithi Angikaze Ngikubone Okunje eyahlabana emncintiswaneni owawugqugquzelwa yi-University of Johannesburg (UJ IsiZulu Main Prize for Creative Writing 2024). Emuva kwalokho abantu bangigqugquzela ukuba ngiqhubeke ngibhale lolu hlobo lwezincwadi. U-AYANDA Mchunu obhale incwadi ebuyisa ithemba ngamaphoyisa kuleli U-AYANDA Mchunu ongumlobi ohlonishwayo emkhakheni wokubhalwa kwezincwadi

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: USAMKE Chiliza usakaza kwiJozi FM uhlelo olusihloko sithi Intimate Connection ngeSonto ngo-3 ekuseni INTOKAZI yaseMlaza, uSamukelisiwe "Samke" Chiliza isizakhele ugazi ngendlela esakaza kamnandi ngayo emsakazweni iJozi 105.8 FM, lapho isakaza khona uhlelo lwangeSonto entathakusa. Kulesi siteshi somphakathi waseGauteng, uSamke (32) usakaza uhlelo olusihloko sithi Intimate Connection phakathi kuka-3 no-5 ekuseni. Ngaphandle kokusakaza, uSamke ubuye alingise emidlalweni yethelevishini. Imidlalo aseke walingisa kuyo, kubalwa ekhonjiswa kuMzansi Magic ethi Mina Nabangani Bami, Umuntu Wethu, Isitishi Sami, Incwadi Yokugqibela, Umtshakazi Usebharini nethi Ayamemeza. "Khona maduze ngizobonakala kothi Umkhwenyana Usebharini ngoMeyi." USamke uthe waqala ukulingisa indawo eqavile efilimini ebikhonjiswa kwiShowmax esihloko sithi Good Parable lapho abelingisa khona indawo kaKhanyisile. "Ngabuye ngadlala enye indawo eqavile efilimini ekhonjiswe kuMzansi Magic ethi Umacala Wami, ngilingisa indawo kaRose," kusho uSamke owafunda ezikoleni zaseThekwini, okuyiseSherwood Primary naseMowat Park Girls, lapho aphothula khona u-matric. Uthe wabe eseyokwenza izifundo zomthetho e-University of Western Cape kodwa wazishiya eseyokwenza unyaka wesithathu ngenxa yamathuba avuleka okuba umbhali oyithwasa enkampanini iDaydream Films. "Ngabambisana nabanye ekubhaleni ifilimu ethi Inkanyezi nethi Ukukhula. Ngabuye ngaqhamuka futhi ngabhala ifilimu ethi Imfihlo." Uthe waqala kule ndima yokulingisa njengomxhumanisi wabalingisi nombhali wemidlalo namafilimu akhonjiswa kwiLokshin Bioskop (DStv Channel 164) ngaphambi kokungena emkhakheni wokulingisa. Eminye imidlalo abonakale kuyo yi-1802: Love Defies Time neChampions. Lesi simomondiya esibuye sibe wumkhangisi wengqephu ezikhangisweni zethelevishini nezamaphephandaba ne-voice over artist kanti silama izinsizwa ezintathu bese sona silanywa wudadewabo omncane. USamke ukhulele ekhaya lamaKrestu njengoba uyise ayengumshumayeli wevangeli nombhidisi wekhwaya ekubeni unina enguthisha kasontosikole owawusegcekeni kubo. "Engikuthanda kakhulu kulo mkhakha wukucija abalingisi abasafufusa. Yikho okungenze ngagcina sengisungula inhlangano iPerfomers' Hub. Yinkundla ezonikeza abalingisi abasafufusa ithuba lokuveza amakhono abo ukuze abonwe ngabahlwayela imidlalo ikhono kubalingisi, abadidiyeli nezinkampani ezihlonza ikhono. Ngibasize ngolwazi oluzobenza bangene kalula kulo mkhakha. Ngaphezu kwalokho, lena yinkundla okuhloswe ngayo ukuvula imboni yezobuciko ngokwabelana ngolwazi nokucija amaciko angenamava." Uthi yile nhlangano eyamenza wazithola esesakaza esiteshini i-Opulance Radio. Wayesakaza uhlelo olubizwa ngePerfomers' Hub, lapho babedingida khona zonke izindaba eziphathelene nomkhakha wokungcebeleka. Abadinga ukumlandela bengangena emakhasini akhe asezinkundleni zokuxhumana, ubizwa ngoSamke Chiliza noma bangene kwiPerfomers' Hub. USAMKE Chiliza usakaza kwiJozi FM uhlelo olusihloko sithi Intimate Connection ngeSonto ngo-3 ekuseni

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMNUZ Julius Malema eqabulana nomkakhe uMantwa uKaMatlala UKUHLASELWA kobudlelwano bomholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, nomkakhe uMantwa uKaMatlala Malema ngunontandakubukwa onguMusa Khawula, kwenze uthando lwabo lwagqamuka izinhlansi ebezingalindelwe. Kulezi zinsuku uMantwa ubonakala ehla enyuka noMalema futhi beqabulana umkhanya. Baqale ngesikhathi kunomdlalo womkhaya phakathi kweKaizer Chiefs ne-Orlando Pirates eFNB Stadium eSoweto. Nangesikhathi uMalema ethamele icala lokuqhumisa isibhamu eNkantolo yeMantshi KuGompo, e-Eastern Cape, kuleli sonto, lezi zithandani zibonakale zinamathelana ngesinqanda. Kwenzeka lokhu nje ngoLwesibili iNkantolo eNkulu yaseGauteng ivune uMalema ecaleni amangalele khona uKhawula ngokumhlambalaza. Lo nontandakubukwa wasezinkundleni zokuxhumana uyalelwe ukuba uwahoxise amanga awaqamba ngalo mholi nomkakhe ku-X. Ubuye wayalelwa ukuba ashicilele isixoliso emakhasini akhe asezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Akugcinwanga lapho ubuye wayalelwa ukuba akhokhele zonke izindleko zenkantolo. Nakuba kunjalo kunokuthi uKhawula axolise uvele waphendula ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngokufaka i-video kaBeyonce ecula izinhlamvu ezithi I ain't Sorry. Abaningi bahumushe lesi senzo njengempendulo ebhekiswe esinqumweni senkantolo. UKhawula uze angene kulo noxhaka nje wabika ukuthi uMalema uyahlukanisa nomkakhe. Kwatholakala ukuthi lo nontandakubukwa wayesenga ezimithiyo ngomholi nomkakhe. UKhawula wabhala ngoFebhuwari wakulo nyaka kanje: "Umshado kaJulius Malema uphelile njengoba umkakhe uMantwa (Mantoa) Matlala) efake icwadi yesehlukaniso...Akasakwazi ukubekezelela ukujolelwa, wabe esethatha isinqumo salo mshado omhlukumezile." Emuva kwezinsukwana uMalema wasabisa ukuthathela uKhawula izinyathelo zomthetho futhi wafuna inhlawulo ka-R1 million. UKhawula wavele waphendula kanje "Hi baby, ungakhohlwa ukuthola abantu bakho bangithumelele imvalamlomo. Awukwazi ukufihla ngokudivosa kwakho ingunaphakade." UMalema noMantwa bashada isinyenyela eSeshego, ePolokwane, ngoDisemba 27, 2014. Nakuba uMantwa eqale wangaziveza kakhulu emphakathini kodwa kulezi zinsuku mningi njengoba ephelezela umyeni wakhe obhekene necala lokuqhumisa isibhamu elimgwebe iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele kodwa usalidlulisele phambili. Kuleli sonto uNkk Malema wenze angavamile ukukwenza futhi okwaziwayo ukuthi umyeni akhe uyamvikela kukho, ngokuthi ashaye isiqubulo somzabalazo phambi kwezihlwele, azibongele ngokwesekwa komyeni wakhe.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: INGOMA  iqhathe umndeni kaBhekumuzi Luthuli IZINGANE zengwazi yomculo kamaskandi, uBhekumuzi Luthuli, seziphenduke inkukhu nempaka ngenxa yokwenziwa kabusha kwengoma kayise esihloko sithi Sokukhumbula. Kushube ngale ndlela yokuthi indodakazi kaBhekumuzi, uSithembile Luthuli, ize yashiya engalazi kumnewabo, uTholinhlanhla "Madlanduna" Luthuli kangangoba ize yaveza namahlazo akhe esidlangalaleni. Leli culo likaBhekumuzi, okwakuhlonishwa ngalo uLucky Dube, lenziwe kabusha wumculi we-Afro pop waseMnambithi uXolani "Xowla" Shabalala kwenkampani yakhe, iStalliontainment. Isihloko salo sesithi Silwelani futhi upike kulo abaculi bakamaskandi okunguMadlanduna, uThokozani Langa owayengabhekani noBhekumuzi noSminofu.UXowla wathi wenze lengoma ngenhloso yokuhlonipha uBhekumuzi ngoba ekhule ebukela kuye. Isolezwe liyizwile lengoma esiqhathe umndeni kaBhekumuzi, kufana isigqi kuphela kwase kucashunwa ezinye izinhlamvu ezaziculwa wuBhekumuzi kwiSokhumbula. Ekhuluma kwiNakho Production, uSithembile uthe bewumndeni kaBhekumuzi abaneme neze ngenxa yobunyoka obenziwe nguMadlanduna ngokuhlangana nabantu bangaphandle ukuze kuxhashazwe lo mndeni. Uthe babevumelene bewumndeni ukuthi ukuthi ngeke lengoma isetshenziswe e-albhamini kaXowla ethi Genesis Chapter One kungekho okubonakalayo akunikeze umndeni. "Wahlangana nabantu bangaphandle wayisebenzisa ngokuthanda kwakhe, sasithe lengoma ayiphumi kungekhona into esiyibonayo siwumndeni. Wahamba wayoyenza yedwa leyonto. Wavuna lesosivuno asivunile...UXowla noMadlanduna bahlanganise uBhekumuzi Luthuli noThokozani Langa, amanzi nopharafini. Into engakaze yahlangana ngisho emandulo. Angazi kungani behlanganisa abantu abangakaze bahlangana ukuhlomula ngomsebenzi wabanye abantu." UMadlanduna uthe umsindo waqala ukusuka ngesikhathi kuputshuke le ngoma ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kodwa kwakusaziwa amanzi ngobhoko. Uthe umsindo wabangwa ukuthi kukhona kubo abangaqondi ukuthi umculo usebenza kanjani. "Ekhaya asifani sonke, asiyiqondi sonke indaba yomculo ukuthi ihamba kanjani. Kwabakhona lokho kuhilizisana, befuna ukwazi ukuthi kwenzekalani. Kwaba yimina ozamayo ukukhuluma nezingane zasekhaya, ngithi  asimzweni ukuthi ubafo (Xowla) uthini nokuthi yini inhloso yakhe." UMadlanduna uthe uXowla wachaza ukuthi kuzohamba kanjani uma ingoma yenze inzuzo. "Savumelana ngalokho kwaze kwafika isikhathi sokuthi i-albhamu iyenziwa nokuthi ingoma iyafakwa phakathi. Kwasethiwa angize nami ngizofaka iphimbo lami ukuze kuzobakhona into ezokhombisa ukuthi akwenzayo uStallion, ukwenza ngeqiniso, akukhona ukuthi ingoma ubeyintshontsha futhi kufanele kubone wonke umuntu ukuthi umndeni kababa wonke uvumile," kusho uMadlanduna. USthembile uthe  bewumndeni baxoxisana noMadlanduna futhi bavumelana  kodwa wahamba ngemuva wayokwenza ingoma ngaphandle kwemvumo yabo. "Vele uyazi ngomculo kodwa lokho akumnikezi ilungelo lokuthi thina asithathe noma yikanjani ngenxa yokuthi asazi lutho ngomculo. Amalungelo ethu njengezingane zikaBhekumuzi siyawazi futhi ayalingana. Akakwazi ukusenza kanje ehlangene nabantu bangaphandle abafuna ukuzixhaphazela lomndeni," kusho uSithembile. USTHEMBILE Luthuli (ongakwesokunxele) nomunye wodadewabo

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: Cynthia Shange mhlazane ehlonishwa ngomklomelo weLifetime Achievement UCYNTHIA Shange waba wunobuhle wokuqala omnyama ukumela iNingizimu Afrika kuMiss World ngo-1972 UKUDLULA emhlabeni kwengqalabutho yaseLamontville, uCynthia Shange, kufane nokuwa komuthi omkhulu. Ngokusho kwesitatimende somndeni, uCynthia (76) ushonele kwesinye sezibhedlela zaKwaZulu-Natal ngezintathakusa zangoMsombuluko emuva kokuxinwa wukugula. UCynthia wayibeka induku ebandla ngokuba ngunobuhle wokuqala omnyama ukuhlabana ngesicoco sikaMiss South Africa ngo-1972 ngesikhathi sobandlululo, abamnyama besaqhudelana bodwa ngaphambi kuka-1992. Umlando wawuqopha ngokuba ngowesifazane wokuqala omnyama ukumela iNingizimu Afrika kuMiss World. Akagcinanga lapho, wabuye waqopha omunye umlando ngokulingisa indawo ephambili efilimini yokuqala ende eyayisihloko sithi UDeliwe, lapho uCynthia ayelingisa khona noSimon Mabhunu Sabela, Ndaba Mhlongo, Sydney Chama, Roland Mqwebu, Patience Africa, Maurel Msimang, June Buthelezi, Joe Mafela nabanye abaningi. Kusukela lapho akabange esabheka emuva njengoba wadlulela efilimini esihloko sithi Isivumelwano. Wadlala indawo kaMkabayi emdlalweni ozigcawugcawu wethelevishini uShaka Zulu. Emuva kwalokho walingisa emdlalweni owuchungechunge kaDuma Ndlovu uMuvhango. Ngenxa yeqhaza lakhe emkhakheni wezokulingisa, uCynthia uhlonishwe ngomklomelo weLifetime Achievement kumaSouth African Film and TV Awards (Saftas) nakumaSimon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards. Ushiye emhlabeni amadodakazi akhe uSihle nosaziwayo wethelevishini uNonhle Thema namadodana u-Ayanda noBanele Thema kanye nabazukulu nesizukulwane. Ngokwesitatimende somndeni, imininingwane ngezinhlelo zomngcwabo zisazimenyezelwa. UCYNTHIA SHANGE noNONHLE THEMA UCYNTHIA Shange elingisa indawo kaMaButhelezi, unina kaThandaza (Sindi Dlathu) kuMuvhango UCNTHIA SHANGE noNONHLE THEMA

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMELISIZWE Xulu osezakhele ugazi ngokuphatha izinhlelo zemicimbi kamaskandi UMLINGISI osezakhele ugazi ngokulingisa emidlalweni ye-TV ekhonjiswa kwiYouTube, uMC Melisizwe Mnomiya (Xulu), usekhonya ekuphatheni izinhlelo emicimbini kamaskandi. UMelisizwe useke washiya izethameli ziphethwe yizisu ngenxa yamancoko kwiMbadada Maskandi Festival, Nisishiyelani Maskandi Festival, Impumelelo Maskandi Festival, Ingoma Yasemazimeleni eShowe, Kissbefore Maskandi Experience, Bhinca Day, Isintu Sethu neminye. "Kumanje ngithole ithuba lokusebenza emcimbini Umzumbe Maskandi Festival ezinkundleni zemidlalo eSibanini, eMthwalume ngoJuni 16. Lokho kusho ukukhula kwami ezingeni lokuba wumphathi wezinhlelo," kusho leli jongo. UMelisizwe ubonge kakhulu kubahleli bemicimbi ngokukholelwa ekhonweni lakhe. Uthe ungene kulo mkhakha emuva kokuhlangana nomsakazi ongumphathi wezinhlelo, uNkosikhona Mthalane. "Le nsizwa yangihlanganisa noSgwili Mhlongo ocula umaskandi abuye ahlele imicimbi ngakubo eBhamshela eNgcongangconga lapho engabamba khona umbhobho okokuqala njengomphathi wezinhlelo." Uthe ikhono lakhe lahlonzwa wuMhlongo ngaphambi kokutuswa nokugqugquzelwa wuKing Zoso noSphalaphala. "Bawuthanda umsebenzi wami, kwathi ngo-Okthoba 2021 ezitolo KwaMashu, uSphalaphala wangimema. Ngafika lapho ngaphatha uhlelo noZama 'Zulu Glamour' Mthalane ongasekho emhlabeni. Ngathi uma ngigibela esteji, ngacula ingoma kaMajotha ethi Kwadilika Umthangala. Ngathi uma ngehla esteji, wangibiza  uKissbefore wathi 'mfana ungayiyeki le nto iphila kuwena." UMelisizwe uthe wazalelwa eNkandla, phesheya kweMvutshini, futhi ufunde eNjikini, eJubilee kodwa waphothula uGrade 12 eMargot Fontyen Secondary ngo-2008. Wabe esehlangana nomrepha uYoung Rhythm, owamhlanganisa noPastor Dee owamfaka emidlalweni yakhe ye-TV. Ubuye walingisa indawo kaKhambule emdlalweni othi Umendo.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UKEALEBOGA Masango osengene emculweni emuva kokufakwa ugqozi umnewabo UMLINGISI onguBuhle Thabethe kwiGenesis noBuhle Kunene kwiYoungins, uKealeboga Masango, useveze ikhono abengaziwa ngalo. UKealeboga (22) waseMlaza ukhiphe izingoma eseziqalile ukuchaza abantu abaningi. Le ntokazi izibule ngomucu osihloko sithi Never Show Me Off yalandela nge-EP ethi A Love That Made Me Hate You. "Ngijabule kodwa nginovadlwana." Uthe umculo yinto ebisondele kakhulu enhliziyweni yakhe isikhathi eside. "Ngizizwa ngibusisekile ngokuthi lesi sikhathi sigcine sifikile ukuba ngabelane nani ngawo." Ucashunwe ethi wafakwa ugqozi nofuqufuqu lokucula ngumfowabo obedlala yonke inhlobo yomculo. Uthe umnewabo owamsondeza kuzo zonke izinhlobo zomculo. Eqhuba uKealeboga uthe kumthathe iminyaka engaphezu kweyisithupha ezama ukuveza leli khono njengoba izingoma eqale ukuzibhala kusukela ngo-2020. Uveze ukuthi izingoma eziqukethwe kuleli cwecwe zigxile ezehlakalweni adlule kuzo, okubalwa kuzo ubuhlungu, uthando nokuxakeka. Uthe selokhu lo msebenzi uphumile, abantu bawamukele ngezandla ezifudumele. UKealeboga uqale ekulingiseni okukhokhelayo eseneminyaka engu-16 ngesikhathi elingisa indawo kaZinhle Ngobese emdlalweni owawusakazwa kwi-e.tv iRhythm City kusukela ngo-2019. Wabe esedlulela kothi YeYe, elingisa indawo kaNtsiki nakwiThe River lapho ayenguMimi. Ubuye walingisa indawo kaNoks kwiPound For Pound. Nyakenye umenyezelwe njengenxusa leDark and Lovely. UKealeboga waphothula u-matric KwaMduku High, eHluhluwe, ngaphambi kokubhalisa e-University of South Africa. UKEALEBOGA Masango, olingisa indawo kaBuhle kwiYoungins, usengene emculweni UKEALEBOGA Masango, olingisa indawo kaBuhle kwiGenesis, usengene emculweni UKEALEBOGA Masango, olingisa indawo kaBuhle kwiGenesis, usengene emculweni UKEALEBOGA Masango, olingisa indawo kaBuhle kwiGenesis, usengene emculweni

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: USHANDESH nobeyisinqandamathe sakhe uMimi Mogale UBARBIE odalule ukuthi ubejola noMimi Mogale UMCULI, oqokwe eminxeni eyisithupha kumaMetro FM Music Awards ngengoma ethi Sdudla or Slender, uNelly "Shandesh" Machete, uthukuthele uyaveva emuva kokuba kuvele izindaba zokuthi intokazi ebisimthembise umshado ibimbhangqe nonontandakubukwa wakwi-TikTok. Unontandakubukwa, oziphilisa ngokuba yi-content creator ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, uBarbie, uphumele obala watshela umhlaba wonke ukuthi ubejola nesinqandamathe sikaShandesh, uMimi Mogale. UBarbie, owaziwa ngo-theselfmadebarb kwiTiTok, uthe lo mjolo ubuqhubeka ngesikhathi uMimi noShandesh besengamathe nolimi. UShandesh uqale wawuhlaba inhlali kanti usadla imihlathi njengoba ebhoboke kuleli sonto ngesitatimende asikhiphe ngabameli bakhe. UShandesh, owahlukanisa unyaka kwiCapricorn FM, uthe kungamampunge ukuthi uMimi ubembhangqe noBarbie ngoba ubudlelwano babo bunezinyanga buphelile. "Singakuqinisekisa ukuthi ikhasimende lethu like lajola noNksz Mogale odume ngelikaMimi futhi ubudlelwano babo buphele ezinyangeni ezimbalwa ezedlule," kusho isitatimende sabameli. Phezu kwalokho, lo mculi weLekompo, okuwuhlobo lomculo wokujuxuza owenziwa abaculi baseLimpopo, ubuye wadalula ukuthi wahlukana noMimi ngenxa yezizathu ezingadalulwanga. “Ikhasimende lethu liqinisekise ukuthi uNksz Mogale uyazi ukuthi bahlukaniswa yizizathu ezaziwa yibo futhi lokhu kuyinhlamba kwabazibandakanya noNksz Mogale ukuthi baqhubeke nokuhudulela phansi igama lakhe ngenhloso yokuzifunela udumo," kuqhuba isitatimende. Ubudlelwano bukaShandesh noMimi buqale ukwaziwa esidlangalaleni ekuqaleni kuka- 2025 ngesikhathi sebeneka izindaba zomjolo wabo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Lezi zithandani zaphumela obala ngokuthembisana umshado ekuqaleni kwalo nyaka. Yize kunjalo abalandeli baqale ukuqaphela kuma-video akamuva kaShandesh ukuthi akasayigqokile indandatho yesethembiso, okwenze baqala ukushaya amakhala ngothando lwabo. UBarbie ubuye wasola uMimi ngokuthi ubemsebenzisa ngoba ubexhumana naye kuphela uma efuna usizo. "Angithandani nabantu babantu. Lobu budlelwano benzeke nyakenye". Eqhuba uBarbie, uthe selokhu ubudlelwano bakhe noMimi baphela, bebenza sengathi basajola. Eziphawulela uMimi nge-video ayifake kwiTikTok, unxuse ukuba kunaphazwe yena kuphela ngoba uyena okufanele agxekwe, hhayi uShandesh. Uthe uyalivuma icala lakhe kodwa akuhlukanwe noShandesh ngoba uthelwa amachaphazelo ngento angahlangene nayo. UShandesh noMvzzle baqokwe kumaMetro FM Music Awards ase-ICC eThekwini ngoMgqibelo ozayo emunxeni weSong of the Year, Best Lekompo, Best Female Artist, Best New Artist, Best Artist of the Year noweBest Viral Challenge. Ukuvota kuyavalwa ngeSonto, kuvotwa ngokushayela le namba: *120*45787# USHANDESH nobeyisinqandamathe uMimi Mogale

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UPENNY Ntuli ubhodle ngomlingisi owayemfuna ucansi ukuze aphumelele inhlolokhono kwiTV OBENGUMSAKAZI weGagasi FM neJozi FM, uPenny Ntuli, wenze iningi labantu besifazane babhoboka ngokuhlukunyezwa ngokocansi emisebenzini ebelikuyo. UPenny ugonyuluke ngokwamenza wakunyanya ukulingisa okuwumsebenzi awufundela nabekhule efuna ukuwenza. Le ntokazi ikhombe ngenjumbane umlingisi engamdalulanga kodwa obelingisa emdlalweni wodumo osakazwa ku-SABC 2. Uthe wayesekwenze konke ukufeza iphupho lakhe lokulingisa emidlalweni yethelevishini kangangoba wayesekwazi konke. Uthe indaba yonakala ngesikhathi eyokwenza inhlolokhono komunye umdlalo wethelevishini. Uthe umlingisi thizeni, owayeyingxenye yamajaji kwinhlolokhono, wamthumelela umyalezo owawuthi akazolala naye ehhotela uma efuna ukuvela kwithelevishini. "Ngafunda kwezami ukuthi kuthiwa 'woza uzovula imilenze ukuze uthole lowo msebenzi.' Ngisetekisini ebuyela eMlazi, yathi idlula eMega City, ngafunga ngagomela ukuthi indaba yokulingisa ngeke ngiphinde ngiyenze. Loya baba wangibulalela iphupho lami lokuthi ngifuna ukulingisa. Ngabona ukuthi ngiyohlezi ngivula imilenze ukuze izinto zami ziphumelele." UPenny uthe kwamsiza ukungavumi ukulala yize kwenza amaphupho akhe aphuza ukufezeka. Uthe ukube wavuma wayezothini ezinganeni azikhuthazayo ngempumelelo. Kube sekungena abaningi nabo beveza ukuthi baphoqeleka ukuyeka imisebenzi ababeyenza ngenxa yokuthi abaqashi babo basebefuna ukubalala.Akukhona okokuqala osaziwayo begonyuluka ngokufunwa ucansi. UVatiswa Ndara wakuveza ukuthi waqala ukuba nyamanambana kubadidiyeli emuva kokuba enqabe ukulala nomunye wabo. UFlorence Masebe, Bonnie Mbuli noNokuthula Ledwaba baphumela obala ngokuthi sebeke bahlukumezeka ngokocansi emuva kokuba kube nomlingisi waseMelika uHarvey Weinstein owadulula usizi lwakhe. Emuva kwenkulumo kaPenny, uSphesihle Thikazi uthe umqashi wamtshela emehlweni ukuthi uzomxosha uma engafuni ukulala naye. "Ngamenzela kwalula, ngavele ngasula. Kumanje angisebenzi kodwa impilo iyaqhubeka," kusho uSphesh embhalweni kaPenny kuFacebook. Umculi osafufusa uChile Le Brown uthe naye watshelwa emehlweni ngomunye wophrojusa womculo odumile ukuthi ikhono alikho mqoka kule ndima, "kufanele ukhiphe okuthize ukuze uzuze okuthize. Cabanga utshelwa leyo nto. Omunye wayeza estudio efake unoyila, lingekho idilozi, waphumelela, sasala kanjalo-ke thina." Nakuba kunjalo u-Ayanda Nokubonga uthe ungcono umuntu wesilisa osuke ezokunikeza umsebenzi kunalona okulala mahhala. NoKay McKnight uthe yena ukube wayeyintombazane wayengeke azilibazise enawo ukhiye awuphiwa wuMdali. USkhumbuzo Hlophe utshele uPenny ukuthi ezinye izimfihlo ufa nazo ukuze uzuze okufunayo, "wogwinya itshe mzala, ubheke phezulu kube kanye nje, ezinye izimenenja ezinkampanini ezinkulu ngo-once off wemizuzu emibili."

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: USGQEMEZA (ongaphambili), uSphongo no-Ayanda Msweli abangabuyiswanga oKhozini USIHLALO we-ActionSA eKZN, uMnuz Zwakele Mncwango, usethembise uSgqemeza lukhulu USOMABHIZINISI ongumholi we-ActionSA KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Zwakele Mncwango, usezibophezele ekondleni umndeni womsakazi osanda kukhonjwa indlela kuKhozi FM, uSipho "Sgqemeza" Mbatha. UMncwango ubhale ekhasini lakhe likaFacebook ebalisa ngokuhamba kukaSgqemeza no-Ayanda Msweli kulesi sikhondlakhondla somsakazo. "Kusazothatha isikhathi ukujwayela ukuthi ekuseni alisezwakali izwi lika-DJ Sgqemeza no-Ayanda Msweli." UMncwango ube esetusa isenzo soMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThutha nokuHlaliswa kwaBantu kulesi sifundazwe, uMnuz Sboniso Duma, sokweseka uMsweli. Uthe kubuhlungu ukuphelelwa umsebenzi usunomuzi, usuganiwe futhi unezingane. "Kodwa uNkulunkulu ukhona, uzohlela indlela. Engikwaziyo ukuthi ngeke uMthiya (esho uSgqemeza) nezingane balambe ngisaphila. Mina umuntu owumngani weqiniso, nami ngiyalenza iqiniso kuye," kuphetha uMncwango obuye asebenze njengekhansela elimele i-ActionSA eMkhandlwini weTheku. USgqemeza ungomunye wabasakazi abangabuyiswanga oKhozini, okubalwa kubo uKing Sifiso okhonjwa kwiVuma FM, uZeal Dladla osekwiJozi FM, uMhlonishwa Sibisi, uphrojusa wezinhlelo zezenkolo uLungisani Simelane nobenguphrojusa wezobuchwepheshe kulesi siteshi, uBonga "Sphongo" Dladla. USgqemeza uthe kungamampunge ukuthi uzihambele kulo msakazo. Uveze ukuthi inkontileka yakhe ayivuselelwanga kulo nyaka, hhayi ukuthi uzicelele ukushiya. Ukusho lokhu esitatimendeni asikhiphe kuleli sonto, emuva kokwenza uhlelo lwakhe lokugcina kulo msakazo. Uthe kummangazile ukubona kwabezindaba ukuthi ubefuna ukushintsha uhlelo alwenzayo ngenxa yomsebenzi wobufundisi. Kodwa uthe abaphathi abayingenanga eyokuvuselela inkontileka yakhe. "Ngize ngaxhumana nezikhulu eziphezulu ngendlela udaba lwenkontileka yami olusingathwe  ngayo. Okungimangazayo ukubona kwabezindaba kuthiwa ngizicelele ukuhamba, okungelona iqiniso. Ngingasho nje ukuthi ukungavuselelwa kwenkontileka yami, kukhona okungahambanga kahle njengoba kwenzeka izinto engingaziqondi. Okwaholela ekutheni kuthathwe lesi sinqumo yikhona engikhala ngakho, yingakho ngaze ngatshela abaphathi e-SABC. Ngiyasihlonipha isinqumo abasithatha kodwa indlela okuhanjiswe ngayo iyona engingajabule ngayo," kusho uSgqemeza. UMsweli obebika ngesimo sasemigwaqweni, uthe uDuma uthe engezwa ukuthi ukhishiwe ohlwini lwabasebenzi boKhozi, waxhasa umsebenzi wokumemezela ngesiminyaminya ekhasini lakhe likaFacebook eselinabalandeli abevile ku-1 million. Uthe uzwe ngoMsombuluko ngabo-5.30 ntambama - igama lakhe lingasabizwa - ukuthi ibhantshi ligcwale umoya kuye.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UPHAKEL'UMTHAKATHI ngomunye wabaholi abangaconsi phansi kubantu bakuleli SELIPHENDUKE inkomo kadade ishinga laKwaNongoma, uNkosikhona "Phakel'umthakathi" Ndabandaba, kulandela idumela lemashi elwa nokususa abokufika kuleli abeyihola noJacinta Ngobese-Zuma noNgizwe Mchunu KuGompo, e-Eastern Cape. Izolo lesi siqhwaga siphinde sahlaba umkhosi ngemilayezo yokwesatshiswa ethunyelwa abathile ngenxa yokuba sekhaleni lalo mkhankaso yize abaningi bencoma isibindi salo. Yize kubukeka kusamdlalwana kwabanye, kodwa ezintokazini zangaphesheya kweNciba, e-Eastern Cape, uPhakel'umthakathi (45) akaconsi phansi muva nje kangangoba zilibeka ngembaba elokuthi i-KZN ayibanike yena bese elikaMthaniya lithatha uNobhala-Jikelele we-ANC uMnuz Fikile Mbalula nosiHlalo-Jikelele wale nhlangano, uMnuz Gwede Mantashe. Ezinye izintokazi zithe zichazwa yisibindi nobuqhawe bakhe kanye nokunakekela umzimba wakhe. Abesifazane sebemteketisa ngelikaPhakel'igqwirha. Kuze kwakhala usomabhizinisi ongumlandeli omkhulu weKaizer Chiefs, uManD, othe uPhakel'umthakathi ubaqhathe namakhosikazi abo e-Eastern Cape ngoba asebabona njengamadoda angelutho njengoba kuze kwasukuma izinsizwa zakwaZulu ukulwa nalo mlisa waseNigeria osanda kugcotshwa njengeNgonyama yesizwe sakhe. Lo mdidiyeli wamabutho uthandwa ngendlela yokuthi usekleliswe noMkhuzi wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. Yize eseyintandokazi kodwa kubantu bakwamanye amazwe nangaphandle kwalesi sifundazwe, uPhakel'umthakathi unyamanambana. Izolo uphinde wadalula ukuthi akasabuthi quthu ubuthongo ngenxa yabantu abamsongelayo bemthumelela imilayezo emsabisayo. Uze wayiveza le miyalezo eyizinsongo ayithola ubusuku nemini, kodwa ayiphendule ngokuthi akawona umnqolo yena usazoqhubeka nomkhankaso. UPhakel'umthakathi ube esenxusa omacaphunakusale bakuleli ukuba bameseke ngabaqaphi ngoba igazi liyamshiya. Kwenzeka lokhu nje nabaholi bakwezinye izifundazwe bakhwela bedilika kuye njengoba engomunye wabeseka umkhankaso kaJacinta Ngobese Zuma iMarch and March Movement, okuwumkhankaso olwa nokugcwala kwabantu bangaphandle abangenamaphepha. Umholi we-EFF uMnuz Julius Malema, ukwabangafuni nokubabona oPhakel'umthakathi nomkhankaso wabo. Ubathatha njengabantu abacwasa ngokobuzwe. NowayenguSotswebhu Omkhulu we-MK Party ePhalamende, uColleen Makhubele, ucasuke kakhulu ngenxa yengoma ebiculwa emashini ebiKuGompo, e-Eastern Cape. Ngubani loPhakel'umthakathi osedume kangaka? Le nsizwa, edabuka KwaMandlakazi ngaphansi kweNkosi uBhekintinta Zulu, ikhule isheba imfundo nokungcweka ngenduku. Iyazwakala olimini ukuthi yafunda yaze yafika esikhungweni semfundo ephakeme. Nakwezepolitiki unamava njengoba ancela embeleni ogwansile womsunguli weIFP, uMntwana wakwaPhindangene. Izinkomba zokuthi abantu baKwaNongoma bayakholelwa ebuholini bakhe zibonakale ngokuthi bamenze ikhansela labo eminyakeni eyedlule. Uqale ukwaziwa eNingizimu Afrika esevela ezinkundleni zokuxhumana njengomshayi wenduku. Umsakazi woKhozi FM, uKhathide "Tshatha" Ngobe, waveza ukuthi uPhakel'umthakathi ungumkhaya wakhe. Ubuye wazakhela udumo exabana noNgizwe ngesikhathi kutshalwa uMntwana waKwaPhindangene, lapho ayeqimbe khona futhi emzimbeni ebhale ukuthi Shenge 95. Ukuduma kwakhe kumenze wagcina eselingisa emidlalweni yethelevishini okuyiShaka Ilembe neSmoke and Mirrors. Uthe okumenza angabi mningi ekulingiseni wukungahambisani nokudlala izindawo ezizomenza alingise ukuya ocansini.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMREPHA uBig Zulu uzogubha usuku lwakhe lokuzalwa nomndeni wakubo UMREPHA waseBergville, uSiyabonga "Big Zulu" Nene, uzogubha ukuqeda iminyaka engu-40 azalwa nomphakathi wangakubo ngo-Ephreli 4. UBig Zulu uthe lo mcimbi uzobe ukubo egcekeni esigodini sasoBonjaneni, eMazizini, eBergville. "Ngizobe ngibonga nje impilo ukuthi uMdali ungigcinile, wangibusisa kwaze kwafika la. Ngizobe ngihlabile." Sezizine izinkomo asephekiswe ngazo selokhu ememezele usuku lwalo mcimbi. Kwasebemphekise ngezinkomo, kubalwa umculi we-house, uMalungelo Sir noBenny Spice okhiphe ezintathu. UBig Zulu waveza ukuthi wakhula kubo kudliwa imbuya ngothi kangangoba wayehamba ngezinyawo ngisho kunongqoqwane, kulele iqhwa ezintabeni zoKhahlamba. Uqale ukondla kubo ngokushayela amatekisi. Ube esengena emculweni we-hip hop ebukela komrepha abanjengoPro Kid. Njengamanje ungomunye womrepha abangaconsi phansi ngezingoma ezithi Imali Eningi, Home, Khaya, Home Sweet Home, AmaMillion, Umuzi eSandton nezinye. Usenenkampani iNkabi Records ephethe uLwah Ndlunkulu, Siya Ntuli, Xowla, Fanatic SA nabanye. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, uzobe enandisa kwi-Mr Somatekisi Live In Concert ePlayhouse Opera Theatre eThekwini, namhlanje kusukela ngo-6 ebusuku. Kulo mcimbi uBig Zulu uzobe eshiyelana inkundla noKhuzani, Lwah Ndlunkulu, Aymos, Xowla, Blaq Diamond, Musiholiq, Starr Healer, Siya Ntuli, Zakwe, Fanatic SA neNdlondlo Emnyama. Amathikithi atholakala eWebtickets, Pick n Pay nasezitolo zakwaBoxer ngemali esukela ku-R200 kuya ku-R300.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: ULONDIE London wayeka ukulingisa ngoba ehlikihlwe ngomphambili ovukelwe UMCULI  wodumo kwiReal Housewives of Durban, uSiphowokuhle "Londie London" Zulu, udalule okwamenza walaxaza ukulingisa. ULondie London (33), ekhuluma kwiPodcast and Chill Network (Read The Room), uthe ukuphathaphathwa wuzakwabo owayesevukelwe ngesikhathi beqopha isiqephu socansi yikho okwamenza wathatha isinqumo sokungaphinde azihlanganise nokulingisa. "Okokuqala angisiye umlingisi oqeqeshiwe futhi kwakungenamqeqeshi weziqephu zocansi. Akekho owangitshela ngokuzokwenzeka." Yize engawudalulanga umdlalo ayelingisa kuwo, uLondie London kodwa uthe kwakunabantu abayishumi namakhamera lapho kwakuqoshelwa khona. "Lapho mina ngigqoke izimpahla zokulala ezihehayo (lingerie). Umfana usephefumulela phezulu kimina futhi ujuluka uyaconsa. Umphambili wakhe wawumile uthe mpo. Ngaxakeka nje ukuthi kwenzekani." Uthe wazibuza waziphendula ukuthi kungani kufanele ahlukumeze imizwa yakhe ngale ndlela njengoba umfana wayemhlikihla ngawo umphambili futhi abuye amphathaphathe umzimba wonke. "Ngafunga ngagomela ukuthi ngeke ngiphinde ngizibandakanye nokulingisa. Angiphathekanga kahle esiqeshini socansi." ULondie London uthe wabona ngalolo suku ukuthi kungani abanye abalingisi begcina sebethandana. Uthe nakuba agcina esemthanda umfana ngoba wayebaba kodwa wanqandwa wukuthi wayenguBen 10. "Yena wayebaba, sasingaqhubeka sijole ukuba wayengeyona ingane. Kimi uma umfana ngimdlula ngeminyaka emibili nemithathu, usuke eyingane. Yize kunjalo kodwa umfana wayeyenza into yakhe." ULondie London ungumculi owazakhela udumo ngamanoni athi You Were Mine neNomakanjani. Unabalandeli abangaphezu kuka-2 million ku-Instagram.  Ngaphambi kokuduma wayefunda e-University of Johannesburg. Wabe esengenela inhlolokhono yemiqhudelwano eminingi ngaphambi kokusayinwa yi- Ambitiouz Entertainment ngo-2017. Ungumsiki wobucwebe abuye abe nenkampani yakhe iFly Clothing Store. Unezingane ezimbili  azithola emshadweni wakhe nosomabhizinisi. ULONDIE London udalule okwamxosha ekulingiseni ULONDIE London udalule okwamxosha ekulingiseni

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: U-AMANDA Eve Mseleku ongumgqugquzeli woMzumbe Maskandi Festival, ezoba sezinkundleni zaseSibanini, ngoJuni 16 U-AMANDA Eve Mseleku ongumgqugquzeli woMzumbe Maskandi Festival, ofuna ukutakula umphakathi wangakubo ngamathuba omsebenzi INTOKAZI yaseMthwalume, engumsunguli wekhishi eliphinde libe yindawo yobumnandi, i-Eve's Eatery Cuisine, ithi izimisele ngokubeka indawo yangakubo ebalazweni ukuze nezivakashi ezisuka emazweni angaphandle, zigcine zifinyelela ezindaweni zasemakhaya ezingaphansi koGu. U-Amanda Eve Mseleku (35) waseMpompini, uneziqu zobuthishela nezokupheka azizuza esikhungweni sokupheka i-Capsicum Culinary School. Ngesikhathi esakhula, iphupho lakhe bekuwukuguqula isimo sempilo yakhe ngenhloso yokuthi abe namandla okwenzela umphakathi wangakubo into ezowuthuthukisa. "Siyazi sonke ukuthi intsha yakuleli ikhungethwe yizinkinga ezigcina ziyiholela ekutheni idikile empilweni, iphinde iziyekelele ezidakamizweni nasotshwaleni. Namaphupho ebinawo ashabalale kube engathi ayizange yaba nentshisekelo empilweni. Ngesikhathi ngithatha isinqumo sokuthi ngiyivule le ndawo, ngangingahlosile nje kuphela ukudayisa ngenze imali ezojabulisa mina ngedwa kodwa inhloso yami enkulu bewukuvula amathuba emsebenzi njengoba namhlanje nginabasebenzi abangaphezulu kuka-20." Uthe: "Kuleso sibalo kukhona abaqashwe ngokuphelele kuphinde kube nabayitoho. Yize ngihlangabezana nazo izingqinamba, ayikho into eyenza ngikhululeke emoyeni njengokubona iphupho lami leminyaka lokuthi ngilime indima ekutakuleni intsha ezingqinambeni zokuswela umsebenzi, okuyiwo futhi obeka ukudla etafuleni." Uveze ukuthi asekwenzile kuseyisiqalo, njengoba kumanje umatasa nokuhlela umcimbi kamaskandi, Umzumbe Maskandi Festival ozobe usezinkundleni zaseSibanini, ngoJuni 16. Ngalo mcimbi uhlose ukuqhakambisa amaciko asendaweni. Uhlose nokusungula amanye amathuba omsebenzi kulabo abangasebenzi endaweni yangakubo nasezindaweni ezakhelene noMthwalume. Le ntokazi, esihlonishwe ngezindondo ezahlukene okubalwa kuzo eye-Young Entrepreneur of the Year, Community Leader of the Year, Best NPO of the Year, Social Enterprise of the Year nezinye, ithe izivakashi zakwamanye amazwe zizogcina ziyihlonipha indawo yaseMthalume njengazo zonke izindawo eziseqophelweni eliphezulu ezithandwa kakhulu. Iphinde yakucacisa ukuthi kuningi okuzohlonyulwa yintsha emcimbini kamaskandi njengoba kungezogcina nje kuphela ngokuthi kube wumcimbi wokubhiyozela amaciko kamaskandi. "Sizophinde siqwashise intsha ngobungozi bokuzibandakanya nezidakamizwa, utshwala nokukhulelwa kwentsha ekubeni ingakakulungeli ukukhulelwa. Le lizwi ngilishumayele kakhulu ngisagijima noMnyango wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi, ngisasebenza kakhulu nenhlangano  engayisingula eminyakeni eyedlule, i-EYODO." Inxuse nosomabhizinisi abangakwazi ukufaka isandla emcimbini awuhlelayo ukuthi basondele eduze ukuze bahlanganise amakhanda ngoxhaso abangalekelela ngalo. U-AMANDA Eve Mseleku ongumgqugquzeli woMzumbe Maskandi Festival, ozoba sezinkundleni zaseSibanini, ngoJuni 16

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: BEKUKUHLE kudelile emkhulekweni wamaNazaretha angaphansi kweNkosi uNyazilwezulu obubanjelwe ePrince Mangosuthu Buthelezi Regional Stadium, oLundi, ngeSabatha eledlule. UMasipala wasoLundi, uphe amathempeli angu-85 izigubhu, izimbomu nokunye. Khonamanjalo: Izifundiswa bezitheleke ngezinkani emcimbini wokuhalalisela amaNazaretha asanda kuphothula iziqu ezikhungweni zeMfundo ePhakeme. Lo mcimbi obuseBuhleni, eNanda, ubuhanjelwe nawuDkt Nomcebo Mthembu neMeya yaseThekwini, uMnuz Cyril Xaba Izithombe: FACEBOOK IMEYA yasoLundi, uMnuz Wilson Ntshangase noNgqongqoshe woMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana nobuHoli boMdabu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa esenkonzweni yamaNazaretha ePrince Mangosuthu Buthelezi Regional Stadium oLundi YINGXENYE yamaNazaretha abehambele umkhuleko wasoLundi INGUDLUNGUDLU beyifike ngobuningi bayo NGABEFUNDISI bebandla lamaNazaretha oLundi BEKUKUHLE kudelile kumkhuleko wamaNazaretha IMEYA uMnuz Cyril Xaba noDkt Ngogi Mahaye kuNyazi Lwezulu Mass Graduates Ceremony NGEZINYE zezifundiswa ebezihambele umcimbi Unyazi Lwezulu Mass Graduates Ceremony U-DKT Nomcebo Mthembu (ongowesibili ekuqaleni) ubeyingxenye yezifundiswa ebezihambele umkhosi wabaphothule iziqu zabo YIWO amaNazaretha abehalaliselwa ngokuphothula iziqu zawo BEBEHLEKA kuze kuvele elomhlathi abanye abaphothule iziqu zabo kwi-Unyazi Lwezulu Mass Graduates Ceremony

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: U-DJ Boonu oshone ngokuzuma eseMhlanga ngoLwesithathu UMUNYU bewubhalwe ebusweni emacikweni akuleli ngesikhathi eyovela ka-Andile "DJ Boonu" Chili esigcemeni sakwaB eMlaza izolo. Phakathi kwamaciko abekhona kubalwa umsakazi woKhozi FM futhi olingisa kuMalanga Awafani kuSABC 1, uSthandwa Nzuza, umculi wekwaito futhi ongusihlalo wenhlangano yamaciko iCcifsa eKZN, uT'zozo Zulu, uDJ Que, uDJ Sox, umculi wekwaito uThukielano, umculi wegqom' uDladla Mshunqisi, umphathi wezinhlelo uSizwe Mdlalose, uGoldmax nabanye abaningi. Lize lashona elayizolo abaculi besababaza ukudlula ngokuzuma emhlabeni kukaDJ wodumo lwengoma  ethi, Uswidi Wodwa. Le ngoma wayeyenze noMthandeni SK, Jaiva Zimnike noMadanoni. U-DJ Boonu kuvela ukuthi ushone ngoLwesithathu elele, enowesifazane abethandana naye. Umthombo weSolezwe uveze ukuthi uDJ Boonu ubuye ebusuku ngoLwesithathu endaweni abehlala kuyo eMhlanga,  wangena embhedeni, kwathi ngehora lesihlanu ekuseni kwabonakala ukuthi akasekho. "Usisi athandana naye, uthe uBoonu ubengumuntu ozwakalayo uma elele ngenxa yokuthi ubehonqa kodwa kuthe uma sekuzosa, kwezwakala ukuhonqa kwakhe kwehla, wagcina esethule. Owesifazane kuthiwa iyona into emthusile leyo ukuthi kungani engasenzi ngendlela ajwayele ngayo, okuyilapho ebone khona ukuthi akasekho emhlabeni. Ube esefonela umndeni kanye nabangani bakhe, abafikile bezobona lesi simo," kusho umthombo. UDJ Boonu uzofihlwa ngeSonto eNgonyameni emuva kwenkonzo ezokuba sezinkundleni zaseKing Zwelthini eMlaza kusukela ngo-9 ekuseni.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMBHISHOBHI Vusi Dube noDkt Taki Dube abangabaholi be-Ethekwini Community Church IBANDLA lodumo laseThekwini, i-Ethekwini Community Church, lizogubha iminyaka ewu-21 lasungulwa ngezinsuku zePhasika. I-ECC yasungulwa yiLungu lesiShayamthetho KwaZulu-Natal, uMbhishobhi Emmanuel Vusimuzi Dube neqeqebana labefundisi ayehlubuke nabo eDurban Christian Church ngo-2005. UDube uthe bekungelula neze eqala lolu bizo lokusungula ibandla elizimele. "Ukuhola abantu kudinga ube nenhliziyo kaNkulunkulu. Sihlangabezanile nezinselelo kodwa uNkulunkulu wama nathi kukho konke," usho kanje. Leli bandla, elalingaconsi phansi entsheni nakosaziwayo, laqala lakhonzela etendeni elaligxunyekwe eGugu Dlamini Park, ngasezitolo eWorkshop. Ukuba newozawoza kwenza lathuthela e-Albert Park, ngaphambi kokukhonzela ku-Anton Lembede Street. Labuye lazala iSobantu Community Church, Lamontville Community Church namanye amagatsha acela eshumini. Isasasa lathi ukwehla futhi kwaze kwaba nosaziwayo nabefundisi abaxebuka nezihlalo kulona, ngesikhathi seliphenduke igatsha le-ANC futhi selibamba izinkonzo zokukhulekela, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, esabhekene namacala. Nakuba kunjalo kodwa lisayibambe ishisa insimbi. Kwavulwa amabandla osaziwayo eThekwini kodwa i-ECC yangaphazamiseka. Kula mabandla kukhona nebandla likaMthunzi Namba eGreyville Primary, elikaZanele Mbokazi eNicol Square nelika-Pastor Andile KaMajola ku-Anton Lembede Street. Isolezwe Ngempelasonto lithole ukuthi i-ECC seyinamalungu angaphezu kuka-20 000 futhi uDube uyilungu leNational Interfaith Council of South Africa (NICSA). Leli bandla limeme bonke abazalwane ukuba bazogubha nabo le ngqophamlando eCentrum Park eThekwini, kusukela ngomhla ka-2 kuya kumhla ka-5 Ephreli. Kubaholi abazobe bekhona kubalwa iMeya yeTheku, uMnuz Cyril Xaba noMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThutha nokuHlaliswa kwaBantu KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma. Abazalwane bazobuye badumise ngomculo nezihlabani zamaciko ahlukahlukene. Ngo-Ephreli 2, kuzobe kune-Holy Communion, kube Amazwi Ayisikhombisa ngo-Ephreli 3, kube ne-ECC Heritage Day ngo-Ephreli 4, bese imbenge isongwa ngomhla ka-5, nge-Day of Resurrection. IMEYA yaseThekwini, uMnuz Cyril Xaba UMPHATHISWA wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sboniso Duma

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: NGESIKHATHI isikhulu samaphoyisa esisamisiwe, uLieutenant-General Shadrack Sibiya, sivele kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga, sadalula ukuthi kunezinsolo zokuthi iPhini likaKhomishana kaZwelonke elisabambile, uLieutenant-General Hilda Senthumule, lasizwa usomabhizinisi uVusumuzi "Cat" Matlala, ukwenza uhlelo lokudiya kabusha izinqe nezipikha, olwaziwa ngeBrazilian Butt Lift (BBL). Nokho uLieutenant Senthumule waziphika lezi zinsolo eKomitini lasePhalamende ngesonto eledlule, wathi wazilungisela ngemali yakhe izinqe zakhe. Wathi yena akwenza wuhlelo lokususa amafutha kwezinye izicubu zomzimba, olubizwa nge-liposuction ngo-2023. Nokho u-Lt Senthumule akayedwa kulo mshikashika wokubunjwa kabusha komzimba kodumo lwe-BBL. Izazi zithi lolu wuhlelo lokulawula izinqe ziyeke ukulithika ngokusebenzisa amafutha asuke ethathwe kwenye ingxenye yomzimba wakho. Lolu hlelo lubuye luvuselele izinqulu nesisu ukuze olwenzayo agcine ephenduka umnyovu. Kosaziwayo asebeke balwenza lolu hlelo kubalwa uDJ Sithelo Shezi wodumo lwengoma ethi Forever. Ekhuluma kwiMetro FM, uSithelo wathi akenzanga lolu hlelo ngoba eqonde ukuheha izesheli kodwa wayehlose ukulungisa umzimba wakhe ukuze ubukeke ngendlela afisa ngayo. Umlingisi ongu-Owethu Hlophe kwiGenesis, uLerato Nxumalo, waya eClinic Wise eTurkey ngo-2022 eyokwenza iBBL. Usaziwayo odume kakhulu ohlelweni lwe-TV iDiamond and Doll kwiShowmax, u-Inno Morolong, wathi yena wenza iBBL ne-liposuction ngo-2022. "Ngangiyisitufuza kodwa manje sengiwunodoli. Sengigqoka noma yini," wacashunwa esho kanje u-Inno. UNonkanyiso "Laconco" Conco, uphumele obala ngokunciphisa isisu emuva kokwenza i-liposuction ukuze abe nokhalo lomnyovu. Nakuba iningi belisola ukuthi lo saziwayo waseMgungundlovu wenze iBBL kodwa yena uphike walala ngomhlane, uthe usebenzise uhlelo lokususa amafutha. Odume kwiReal Housewives of Durban, uSiphiwokuhle "Londie London" Zulu, uke wasolwa ngokwenza iBBL ngenxa yokuba nezinqe kodwa yena uthi unje isidalo. Kwashaqeka abaningi umlingisi weGenerations The Legacy, uThulisile "Thuli P" Phongolo, eqhamuka esengumapakisha ngo-2023 ekubeni ayeyisilenda eminyakeni eyedlule. Nakuye kwasolwa lolu hlelo lweBBL. Umlingisi wodumo kwiMuvhango, uTebogo Thobejane, waphenduka ihlaya ngesikhathi eveza izithombe zakhe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana engcebeleka eMelika ngo-Agasti nyakenye. Kwaqashelwa ukuthi ama-curve akhe akhenikhiwe kodwa kwahlukana imibono. Yize abanye babemshayela ihlombe ngalokhu kubukeka kodwa iningi lamgxeka. UTebogo ubevele enezinqulu ezinkulu. Intokazi eyake yakhonjwa kuDkt Malusi Gigaba, uCindy Makhathini, yaveza ukuthi yonga uR100 000 ukuze yenze i-BBL. No-DJ wakuleli u-Eva Modika wahlukana no-R65 000 enza iBBL ne-liposuction eThe Clinique Instabul eTurkey ngo-2022. Kulolu hlelo olusemfashinini kusuke kuhlinzwa umzimba ngenhloso yokuwudiya kabusha  ngasezinqeni, zithi ukukhukhumala saludiyo. Odokotela abalwenzayo bathi kusetshenziswa amafutha athathwe kwenye ingxenye yomzimba. Lawo mafutha abe esefakwa kulezo zindawo ofuna zithi ukubuya ukuze zithi xaxa futhi zibe yindilinga eqoqekile. Yenzani i-liposuction? Uhlelo olwenziwa ngokuthi kususwe amafutha ndawana thize. Uma kwenziwa lolu hlelo, kufakwa umjovo omunca amafutha asuke enenkani ngesikhathi uzilolonga noma udla ngendlela ehlelekile. Kusuke kungahlosiwe ukunciphisa umzimba kodwa ukuguqula izingxenye zomzimba, okuyisisu, amathanga, izingalo nomhlane. Ngamanye amazwi kwi-liposuction kusuke kumuncwa mafutha ekubeni kwi-BBL kusuke kususwa amafutha kwenye ingxenye yomzimba ethuthelwa kwenye. Lezi zinhlelo zibiza malini? ENingizimu Afrika lezi zinhlelo zibiza imali ephakathi kuka-R75 000 kuya kuR100 000 ekubeni eTurkey kuphakathi kuka-R49 000 kuya ku-R70 000. Nakuba kunjalo kodwa udokotela waseGoli ongungoti emkhakheni wokuhlinzwa nokulungisa umzimba kuleli, uDkt Deon Weyers, uthe yena  nge-360 Lipo ubiza imali ephakathi kuka-R115 000 noR125 000, kodwa kuya ngezidingo zofuna ukwenziwa nokuthi kumthathe isikhathi esingakanani. Nge-BBL uDkt Wyers uthe uhlelo lonke lubiza imali ephakathi kuka-R125 000 no-R135 000. Yibuphi ubungozi ongabhekana nabo? Ubuhlungu, ukuguquka kwesikhumba, ukutheleleka ngezifo, ukuphathwa yisifo samaphaphu nesenhliziyo uma lezi zinhlelo zenziwe odokotela abayimfundamakhwela.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: ISIHLOKO: Pantsula 4 Life UHLOBO: Kwaito/Amapiano UMHLAZIYI: CHARLES KHUZWAYO UMA ulalela leli cwecwe elisha lalezi zinkakha zekwaito, ungaphika ukuthi zaqala ukuyibamba kulo mculo kusukela ngo-1995. Iphelile iminyaka engaphezu kuka-30 ziyibambe ishisa insimbi kwikwaito. Empeleni iTrompies yaqala amalungu eyisihlanu - kunguSpikiri, Mahoota, Donald Duck, Jakarumba noMjokes. Ibishisa izikhotha ngamanoni ayethi Sigiya Ngengoma, Ke Tswa Hole, Mdibuseng, Sweet Lavo nethi Tholakele. Sekungumlando ukuthi uMjokes wadlula emhlabeni engozini yemoto ebuya konandisa emcimbini ngoMeyi 23, 2021. Nakuba kunjalo ozakwabo baqhubekile lapho babegcine khona. Kuleli cwecwe elinezingoma ezingaphelele iTrompies ihloniphe uMjokes engomeni ethi We Still Alive. Ngaphambi kokuphuma kwePantsula 4 Life, iTrompies iqale yezwa amazwi ngobhoko ngomucu obusihloko sithi Lilizela, ebihambisana kuyo noNokwazi Ntuli noStoan. Ukubamba abalandeli abadala bese liheha nabasha, leli qembu lithe alipike abaculi abayizintandokazi ezinhlobeni zomculo ezahlukahlukene. Yingakho kunamaciko adume kumapiano anjengoKabza De Small, Reece Madlisa, Dr Lamandro, Skotts Maphuma, Toss, Bhudescar, General Official. UKabza De Small usezingomeni eziningi. UKabza De Small ukwethi Bhemisa, Ufun' Ukwenzani nakwethi Ndofaya. UKwesta esengomeni ethi We Still Alive nethi Lilizela. Yize kusazwakala ukuthi yiTrompies kodwa kukhonya kakhulu isigqi samapiano. Ngakho uma uzifela ngomculo weTrompies wamzukwane nesigqi esidla lubi kulezi zinsuku, noma kanjani izokuchaza le-EP.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UBUYILE Mdladla obonga umkakhe ngokumfaka enkolweni yobuKrestu KUDUME isiqubulo esithi "wadla Jesu, washweba Sathane" ngesikhathi umlingisi uBuyile Mdladla, onguGabriel Gigaba emdlalweni i-Genesis, edalule ukuthi usengumntwana kaNkulunkulu ozelwe kabusha. UBuyile ukhulume kanje ngesikhathi ekhishelwa eshashalazini kwi-YouTube Channel i-Engineer Your Life with Lungelo K. Uthe wethulwa enkolweni yobuKrestu ngumkakhe aseshadelwe yena iminyaka ewu-15. "Ngishadelwe unkosikazi oyisimangaliso okunguye owangisondeza okholweni. Wangenza ngakuqonda ukubaluleka kokuba yisisebenzi sikaNkulunkulu nobumqoka bokukhonza," usho kanje echaza ngohambo lwakhe. Uthe umkakhe wafika ngesikhathi lapho izinto zimbhedela empilweni, washintsha impilo yakhe. "Ngasengiwumgodi onganukwa nja. Abantu sebezitshela ukuthi ngiwe unomphela, ngeke ngisavuka. Uma ngikhuluma ngabantu, ngikhuluma nangomndeni wami owawusungilahlile. Ngikhuluma ngamalungu omndeni ayengazi ngaphambi kokuhlangana nomkami. Ayengikhuluma kabi." UBuyile uthe uNkulunkulu sekukaningi emtakula ezimweni ezinzima. "Ngake ngalingwa wuSathane emshadweni, ngazithola sengidansa naye uSathane, sengidavuza kwenye indawo kodwa uNkulunkulu wanginikeza ithuba lesibili," kusho uBuyile othe uthando lukaNkulunkulu lwehlela kumkakhe owamxolela emaphutheni akhe. Eqhuba uBuyile uthe ukwamukela uJesu njengoMsindisi kwamsiza nasekukhuzeni ibuya emkhakheni wokulingisa ayesewudubile. "Konke osekwenzeka empilweni yami, akukhona ukuhlakanipha kwami kodwa kungumusa kaNkulunkulu." Uthe ukube uJesu akekho empilweni yakhe mhlawumbe ngabe ubhukuda esonweni. UBuyile uthe kwamsiza ukwethula uhlelo lwezenkolo kwi-SABC 1 i-Spirit Sundae ngamaSonto, ngoba wagcina eseqonda zonke izinkolo ezikhona kuleli. Mayelana nomsindo wakamuva nomthetho ohlongozwayo wokulawula amabandla ezenkolo, uthe yena uyahambisana nokulawulwa kwamabandla wuhulumeni ngoba kusho ukuthi asekhokha intela futhi kube nokuhleleka. Le nsizwa edabuka eMnambithi, ilingisa indawo kaphrojusa womculo wokholo oyisikhohlakali, ohamba ebhabhabala nabaculi bakhe kangangoba ugcine esebhangqe izingane zandawonye. UGigaba ubuye wadayisa lezi zingane ukuba zilale nosomabhizinisi ukuze yena azuze umnotho. Ngaphandle kwe-Genesis, uBuyile uke walingisa kwi-Hardcopy, Izingane Zobaba nakuMuvhango. Nasekwethuleni izinhlelo ngeke wamthinta njengoba esebuya kwi-Electric Workshop, Live Lotto Draw ne-Quizmaster of the Sports Soccer Challenge. *I-Genesis idlala kuMzansi Magic phakathi nezinsuku ngo-7.30 ebusuku.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMINENHLE "I-Advocate"  Ngubane owethula ingosi ethi Sihlel' Ekhoneni oKhozini ngoLwesine ebusuku NJENGOBA imisakazo ipheka ithulula kulezi zinsuku, intokazi yaseGreytown uMinenhle Ngubane, ibona seyikulungele ukusakazela noma yisiphi isiteshi. UMinenhle (29) ukhulume kanje ngesikhathi Isolezwe Ngempelasonto limbuza ngekusasa lakhe emsakazweni njengoba esenamava kulo mkhakha. Njengamanje uMinenhle uzwakala ohlelweni lukaNkosinathi Mshengu oKhozini ngoLwesine ngo-8 ebusuku. Uthe ucabanga ukuthi usenamava anele. Le ntokazi, ehola umkhankaso wokuvotelwa kukaBravo B kwiBig Brother kuMzansi Magic, ayigabile ngamava kuphela kodwa ibuye ibe nolwazi njengoba yenza izifundo zeMedia & Journalism. UMinenhle uthe ukusakaza wakuqala esiteshini somphakathi saseNquthu ethula izinkulumo ezakhayo ohlelweni lwasekuseni. Ngo-2018 ungenele inhlolokhono yohlelo lwesiteshi sethelevishini,  i-1KZN TV, uGubhu Lwami kodwa waphuma emzuliswaneni wamanqamu, ehlulwa wuHelicopter Ndlovu noMadlokovu Ngema. Ngonyaka ofanayo wasebenza kwi-Eantouch Radio engumsakazi ngaphambi kokuqashwa njenge-Marketing Manager yesiteshi . Ngo-2019 wasebenza esiteshini somphakathi saseNdwedwe,  iSiyathuthuka FM, esakaza  uhlelo lukamaskandi nolwamenza wagcina eseqokwe kumaSouth African Traditional Music Achievement (Satma) Awards kwiBest Community Radio Presenter. Ngo-2022 wadlulela kwiVibe FM, esakaza uhlelo lukamaskandi ngaphambi kokunxenxwa Ukhozi FM ukuba azobamba iqhaza kuBusuku Obuhle, lapho enengosi ethi Sihlel' Ekhoneni. NgoMsombuluko ubonakale esakaza kuGubhu Lwami njengesimenywa. Ngaphandle kokusakaza uMinenhle ubuye abe yi-social media influencer njengoba elandelwa yizihlwele futhi ungumnikazi weMinenhle Beauty CAR. UMinenhle wafunda amabanga aphansi eSangweni Combined lapho eqeqeshelwa khona nokulingisa nokukwazi ukukhuluma emphakathini. Esephothule u-Grade 12 eBusana High eMatimatolo ngo-2014 wadlulela eDamelin nase-Unisa lapho enza khona izifundo zomthetho. Kubaculi abambe iqhaza empumelelweni yabo kubalwa uMnikezwa noDJ Hlo. UMINENHLE "I-Advocate" Ngubane owethula ingosi iSihlel' Ekhoneni oKhozini ngoLwesine ebusuku

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: Ngizwe Mchunu NGIZWE MCHUNU Image: Itumeleng English IYASHUBA impi yamazwi phakathi kukamengameli wamabhinca, uNgizwe Mchunu nomsakazo ongaphansi kweSABC, iMetro FM, ngenxa yokuqokwa kwabaculi bakamaskandi kumaMetro FM Music Awards. Ekhuluma kwiBhinca Nation, esakazwa kwiPodcast and Chill Network kaMacG, uNgizwe ukhale ngokufakwa kukaKhuzani, Sminofu, Mzukulu noMafikizolo abaqokwe kwiBest Maskandi. UMafikizolo ubuye wafakwa kwiBest Song of the Year nakwiViral Video Challenge kwathi uNkeshemba wafakwa kwiBest New Artist. UNgizwe uthe ubengeke akhale ukuba laba baculi baqokwe komunye umqhudelwano, hhayi womsakazo ongagunyaziwe ukudlala umculo kamaskandi. Uthe balwe baze banqamuka izandla befuna umculo kamaskandi udlalwe eziteshini zesilungu kodwa kwanhlanga zimuka nomoya ngenxa yelayisense engayivumeli. "Njengoba beza lapha eKZN bafuna ukudla imali yaseKZN. Udoti le nto eyenziwayo yokuthi kuthathwe omaskanda bethu bafakwe enkohlakalweni yeMetro FM eyazi kahle ukuthi into enobubhinca, enobuZulu nesiko ayiyifuni." UNgizwe uthe iMetro FM iqoke omaskanda ngoba ifuna ukuxhaphaza amabhinca. Uthe iMetro ifuna ukugcwalisa i-ICC ngoba iyazi ukuthi amabhinca azoza ngobuningi bawo ezobona amaqhawe awo. "Abawudlali umculo wethu ngoba bayasinyanya laba bantu siyabanukela. Asifundile kubona." UNgizwe uthe abaculi bakamaskandi baqokiwe ngoba bangamathuluzi asetshenziswa ukuqola amabhinca. OyiNhloko yezokuXhumana kwiSABC, uMmoni Ngubane, uthe kungamampunge ukuthi baqonde ukuxhaphaza amabhinca ngokufakwa kwabaculi bakamaskandi. "Umculo kamaskandi njengamanje sewufakiwe ohlwini lwezingoma ezidlalwa kwiMetro FM, ngoba uyahambisana nesigqi sesiteshi nabalaleli esibasakazelayo futhi abalaleli bayawuncoma." UMmoni uthe baqale ukukhombisa ukuthi umculo kamaskandi nowaseLimpopo, iLekompo, bayayithanda emcimbini iMetro FM Heatwave ngokuthi baqashe abaculi balezi zinhlobo. Uthe ngamaMetro FM Music Awards baqonde ukuqhakambisa umculo ovutshelwe kuleli. "Ngakho umbono wokuthi ngokufakwa kwale minxa kulo mqhudelwano kuhloswe ukuxhaphaza abaculi ukhohlisa abantu. Okwenziwa yimisakazo wukukhokhela abaculi imali ngokudlalwa kwezingoma zabo nangokunandisa, lokho kuthuthukisa futhi kusimamisa indima yomculo. IMetro FM ingezinye zezinkundla ezinkulu kuleli eziqhakambisa amagalelo neqhaza lamaciko endimeni." UMmoni uthe iSABC izibophezele ekuvuleni inkundla yenkulumo-mpikiswano ukuze kudingidwe kabanzi ngale ndaba. *AmaMetro FM Music Awards azoba se-ICC eThekwini ngo-Ephreli 25. UKHUZANI Mpungose osephumele obala ngezinhlelo zomcimbi wakhe walo nyaka iBlue Nation Festival ezoba seCarnival City

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: OWE-GENERATIONS usolwe ngokuqambela uMenzi Ngubane amanga UMDIDIYELI omkhulu weGenerations The Legacy, uMfundi Vundla, uziqhathe nomndeni womlingisi ongasekho uMenzi "Ngamla" Ngubane ngokubathunuka amanxeba ngokukhuluma ngaye ekubeni engasekho emhlabeni. Ekhuluma nomsakazi we-94.7, uThando Thabethe, uMfundi uthe waxosha abalingisi abawu-16 kulo mdlalo ngo-2014 ngenxa yokwenziwa wuMenzi owadlula emhlabeni ngoMashi 2021. "Kwathi phakathi nokuqoshwa kwesiqephu, kwangena uThato (Molamu) lapho kuqoshelwa khona. Lo mfana ungumlingisi. Wangena kusaqoshwa maqede wahlebela uMenzi okuthile. UMenzi walahla phansi yonke into maqede waphumela ngaphandle." UMfundi uthe wanqumela abalingisi ugwayi katiki ethi akungapheli izinsuku ezine bengabuyile kodwa bangawugqiza qakala umyalelo wakhe, okuyikho okwaholela ekutheni abakhombe indlela. "Ngathi kubo niyaphuma. Niyahamba. Ninezinsuku ezine. Ngababekela umnqamulajuqu wokuthi babuyele emsebenzini. 'Uma ningabuyeli emsebenzini, kuphelile.' Ababuyanga. Kwaya ngamagama enkehli," kusho uMfundi. Ethintwa yiSolezwe Ngempelasonto, umfowabo kaMenzi, uMnuz Bonny Ngubane, uthe inkulumo kaMfundi ibaphathe kabi ngoba uqamba amanga futhi uyikhulume kabi uMenzi engasekho ukuba aziphawulele. Unxuse uMfundi ukuba angaphinde ayokhuluma emisakazweni ngoba usegugile. "Akahlale ekhaya adlalise izingane nezimaku ngoba sizogcina seziveza amahlazo akhe okuthi wayebaphethe kanjani," kuphetha uNgubane ongusomabhizinisi ohlonishwayo kuleli. Omunye wabalingisi abaxoshwayo kwiGenerations endala, uZolisa Xaluva, uthe uMfundi usenga ezimithiyo ngoMenzi nangoThato. "UThato akukho akuhlebela uMenzi. UMenzi wayebuqamama nalapho uThato ayekhona. Akekho owakhuluma noMenzi wathi kuye 'yeka ukuqopha’. Lokho akwenzekanga nje," kusho uXaluva owayelingisa indawo kaJason. NoZikhona Sodlaka, uvumelane noZolisa. "Le nto ibukeka njengomdlalo obhaliwe. Uyezwa nje ukuthi yingxoxo ebhalwe kahle. Uyangena, uyahleba, kudlalwe ibika olisebenzisa efilimini esabekayo," kusho uZikhona owayenguPrisca. OZikhona noXaluva bathe babengafuni ukukhokhelwa ngokuphindwa komdlalo ngoba base beyinqobile leyo mpi. UZolisa uthe kwakunesivumelwano sokuthi kunengxenye yenzuzo ababezoyithola ngezikhangiso noma uma umdlalo udayiselwa isiteshi saphesheya noma kunemali oyenzayo. Laba balingisi bathe baqala baqasha ummeli ngaphambi kokuthatha izinqumo. UMfundi uthe abalingisi babefuna imali yama-royalties, okuyimali ababezoyikhokhelwa yiSABC, hhayi yena. "Ama-royalties akhokhwa yisiteshi esisakaza umdlalo. Mina angisiye umnikazi womdlalo. Uphethwe yisiteshi. Ngakho ukukhokhelwa imali yama-royalties kulele esiteshini." UMfundi uveze ukuthi abalingisi babefuna abalwele impi yabo bese konakala iphupho lakhe leminyaka lokuba nomdlalo owuchungechunge osakazwa kwithelevishini. Uthe okwenza axoshe abalingisi abawu-16 wukuthi kwakuzoxoshwa umdlalo wakhe. UZolisa uthe le mpi bayifaka ngisho kwi-ANCYL nakuMnuz Jacob Zuma eNkandla, esengumengameli wezwe ne-ANC kodwa baphumelela kokukodwa kuphela, ukubangcono kwezimo zokusebenza.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UTHWALOFU Khoza ephahlwe wuSgwebo Sentambo no-Ayanda Msweli emzini wakhe okwesaKwaBiyela, oBuka, eMpangeni INKOSI yomculo kamaskandi, uSipho "Thwalofu" Khoza, izohlonishwa isadla anhlamvana kwiBenefit Gala Dinner eBon Hotel Conference Hall, eMpangeni namhlanje kusukela ngo-3 ntambama. Umgqugquzeli walo mcimbi futhi ongumsakazi woKhozi FM, u-Ayanda Msweli, uqale ngokubonga kakhulu uMnyango wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko ngokuphonsa itshe esivivaneni ukuze lo mcimbi wenzeke. Uthe waya kulo Mnyango oholwa wuMphathiswa uMnuz Mntomuhle Khawula eyozikhalela ukuze kusizakale le ngqalabutho. "Ngafike ngabika isimo engisibone emzini kaThwalofu ngesikhathi ngivakashele khona." UMsweli uthe wathola ukuthi nakuba ehola isibonelelo sikahulumeni sabadala, kodwa asanele ukubhekana nezindleko abhekana nazo usuku nosuku. Uthe uThwalofu usehlala ngokungaphili okwenza ukuthi aphume engena kodokotela. "Ukwehla enyuka nakho kudinga imali. Kufanele uma ezodla amaphilisi, abe nento azoyifaka esiswini." UMsweli uthe inzuzo ezotholakala kulo mcimbi izolekelela kakhulu uThwalofu empilweni. UMsweli utuse kakhulu amandla ebhakede lakhe ahlale eqongelela ngalo iminikelo futhi eselakhele imindeni engaphezu kwemihlanu imizi, langcwaba abantu futhi lafundisa intsha ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme. Phakathi kwabaculi abazonandisa kulo mcimbi kubalwa uMaqhinga Hadebe noSgwebo Sentambo. UThwalofu (75) odabuka kwesaKwaBiyela, Obuka, eMpangeni, waqala ukucula ngeminyaka yo-1970, ephelezela ngephimbo idlozi lalo mculo uJohn "Phuzushukela" Bhengu, okunguye owambiza ngenkosi kamaskandi. Esecula ngokuzimela wakhiqiza ama-albhamu angaphezu kuka-40. Wapheka abaculi abahlonishwayo kule ndima futhi okungabashana bakhe uSgwebo Sentambo noHhashi Elimhlophe.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: NJENGOBA ngale mpelasonto kuphela amaphupho kwabadlana imilala kwiBig Brother Mzansi, kubanjwe umoya. Asebesele emzuliswaneni wamanqamu ngoLindokuhle "Bravo B" Nsele (28) waKwaNongoma, Thandeka Shabalala (30) waseMnambithi, Didintle Bonolo "Didi" Mothobi (21) waseLenasia, eGauteng, Liema Pantsi (24) waseQonce (King William's Town), e-Eastern Cape, Que Qondile (27) waseGqeberha,e-Eastern Cape noLindy "Trixie" Christoffels (34) wase-Uitenhage, e-Eastern Cape. Yize kunjalo kodwa amehlo athe njo kuBravo B noThandeka. Ngakho kulindeleke ukuthi ozodla umhlanganiso aphume phakathi kwalezi zintandokazi zaseKZN. UBravo B ukhankaselwa kakhulu ngamabhinca, okukhona kuwo uKhuzani, Mthandeni SK noTshatha Ngobe. UThandeka ukhankaselwa kakhulu ngabantu abasemikhakheni ehlukahlukene. Ukubonakala kwakhe egeza kusinki nobunye ubunuku kuthiwa yikho okumakhele ugazi kubantu abaningi. UBravo uzakhele udumo emabhinceni ngenxa yokuthi wayedlala izingoma zikamaskandi nangokuhlale ephethe ithawula lamabhinca. Yingakho amabhinca evele athi "Hlangana Zulu." Uma amabhinca asho lesi siqubulo noma kanjani ngeke ubhekane nebhinca. Lokhu kubonakalile nyakenye ngesikhathi u-Akhonamathemba "Sweet Guluva" Mbele waseNquthu enqoba kwiBig Brother. NoSiphephelo "McJunior" Zondi kwamsebenzela ukuba ngowaseKZN ngesikhathi enqoba kwiBig Brother ngo-2024. UKhosi Twala (27) waseNewcastle wadla umhlanganiso kwiBig Brother Titans ngo-2023. Ukubambisana kwamabhinca kwaqala ukubonakala ngesikhathi kuqokwe uMroza engomeni ehlukanisa unyaka oKhozini ngo-2016. Wavele waqwaqwada bonke abaculi kangangoba ingoma yakhe yahlukanisa unyaka eziteshini ezingu-18 ze-SABC. Kwalandela uNtencane, uKhuzani noMthandeni SK. NakumaSama uMthandeni uphinde wahlabana ngeRecord of the Year neVideo of the Year ngo-2024 nango-2025. Umsakazi woKhozi FM, uTshatha wahlabana nge-Favourite Radio Personality ne-Ultimate Viewers' Choice Award kuma-2020 DStv Mzansi Viewers' Choice Awards ngo-2020. Umculi kamaskandi uNtencane wabuye wahlabana kwiClash of the Choirs ngo-2023. Yize kubhekwe uBravo B noThandeka kodwa kukhona nomculi uLiema okhankaselwa kakhulu ngosaziwayo njengoba esebuya nase-Afrotainment.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UNKSZ Thabile  Mwandla, oyiClinical Technologist,  uzihola phambili emqhudelwaneni wosomabhizinisi abavelele kuleli OWESIFAZANE wasemakhaya endaweni yaKwaNdaba, KwaMaphumulo, uMksz Thabile Mwandla, uqengqeleza phambili emqhudelwaneni wosomabhizinisi besifazane abavelele emphakathini iNorth Coast Business Woman of the Year. UNksz Mwandla oyiClinical Technologist - ongumcwaningi wamaphaphu futhi ongusosayensi ekukhiqizweni kwamakhambi, udlana imilala noCrystal Naidoo, Verushka Nair, Andile Pieterson, Sibongile Ntusi, Nonhle Ngubane, Simonia Marimuthoo noNtethe Ndaba emunxeni we-Inspirational Woman of the Year kulo mncintiswano ozobanjelwa eSimbithi Country Club eBallito. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi le ntokazi iqokwe ngenxa yokuba usomabhizinisi owenza umehluko emphakathini wakuleli. UNksz Mwandla, ongaphansi kwenkampani yakhe i-Onkwelo Pty Ltd, uthe ukujabulele kakhulu ukuqokwa kulo mqhudelwano ngoba kusho lukhulu kuye futhi kuyamgqugquzela ukusebenzela umphakathi engabheke nzuzo. Akaziwa kuleli kuphela kodwa nasemazweni angaphandle ayaziwa amagalelo akhe njengoba esebenza nezinkampani zamazwe angaphandle ukuthola amakhambi amasha okwelapha izifo ezihlukene. Useke wavelela njengomunye wochwepheshe abasebenze ukuhlola ikhambi lokuzivikela kwiHIV eliwumjovo (PreP) osujovwa kabili ngonyaka. Uphinde futhi abe umnikazi wama-salon avelele eBallito, iMthaniya Hair Studio neBrighter Kidz Salon lapho eqashe khona abantu abasha abangu-12, asebeshintshe impilo yabo. Ngaphezu kwalokho  uphinde abe ngumnikazi wenkampani engenzi nzuzo, iKaMwandla Foundation, ayisungula ukwenza umehluko entsheni evela ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Uhambela izikole ezihlukene abuye asize abantwana ukukhetha imisebenzi abangayifundela ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme asize nezinkampani ezizimele, okubalwa kuzo iNyala Brand. Uphinde axhase abafundi ngemali yokubhalisa ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme nangezimpahla zokugqoka ngenxa yokuthi uyalwazi usizi lwezingane ezidabuka emakhaya aqhelelene namadolobha amakhulu. Uphinde futhi abe umhleli wemicimbi ngaphansi kwenkampani yakhe iKaMwandla Eventz,  okubalwa umcimbi omkhulu iTshatha Music Festival. *Ukuvotela abaqokiwe kwiNorth Coast Business Woman of the Year, kungenwa ku-www.sabeautymodelling.com/vote-ncbwa. UNKSZ Thabile  Mwandla, oyiClinical Technologist,  uzihola phambili emqhudelwaneni wosomabhizinisi abavelele kuleli UNKSZ Thabile  Mwandla, oyiClinical Technologist,  uzihola phambili emqhudelwaneni wosomabhizinisi abavelele kuleli UNKSZ Thabile  Mwandla, oyiClinical Technologist,  uzihola phambili emqhudelwaneni wosomabhizinisi abavelele kuleli

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: INDLONDLO Emnyama esike yaphuma phambili kwiNgoma yesiKhuze ZIYIKLAME ziyiklamile kwindumezulu yomqhudelwano wengoma yasePlayhouse eCurries Fountain Stadium, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo kusukela ngo-9 ekuseni. Kulo mqhudelwano waminyaka yonke, iSishaya Ingoma Competition, kulindeleke amaqembu angu-42 nazobe eliqhamukisa kuzozonke izifunda zaKwaZulu-Natal, ukuba azodlana imilala. Ngokusho kwesitatimende esithunyelelwe abezindaba, iyisikhombisa iminxa okuzobe kuqhudelwana kuyo. Kubalwe Isigekle, Ushameni, Ingoma Yezinsizwa, Ingoma Yezintombi, Ingoma Sikhuze, Indlamu noMzansi. Siqhuba isitatimende, sithe umqhudelwano osuqede iminyaka ewu-12 wasungulwa kulo nyaka, sewukhule kakhulu kangangoba sewubalwa neminye imicimbi eqhakambisa ubuciko namasiko kulesi sifundazwe. "Lo mncintiswano awusagcini ngokunikeza amaqembu engoma inkundla yokuba aveze amakhono awo kuphela kodwa sewuklama indima ebalulekile ekugcineni nasekugqugquzeli amagugu endabuko." Sithe abantu abazohambela umcimbi walo nyaka bazobhema bakholwe ngoba wonke amaqembu azimisele ngokukhipha amangwevu. Abagqugquzeli banxenxe bonke abantu bakulesi sifundazwe nakwezinye ezingomakhelwane ukuba batheleke ngobuningi babo bezozitika mahhala ngobuhle bomqhudelwano wengoma kuze kulamule ukushona kwelanga. ELINYE lamaqembu aseke ahlabana kwiSishaya Ingoma Competition EZINYE izinsizwa esezike zashiya izithameli zihlabeke umxhwele ngoshameni

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: IZELAMANI zasesigodini saseBathenjini, eMsinga, uNobuhle "Buhle" Nhlangulela noSimphiwe "Simmy" Nhlangulela, zizoshiyelana inkundla emcimbini obizwa ngoMsinga Folk & Indigenous Music Festival ezinkundleni zemidlalo zaseMzisho eTugela Ferry namhlanje kusukela ngo-12 emini. UBuhle usemnkantshubomvu emculweni wokholo njengoba aqala eqenjini iSinethemba yodumo lwenoni elalithi ‘Ubani Othi Abazalwane Bayabhora’ futhi eyaqokwa kumaMetro FM Music Awards nakuma-Sama. Uqale ukugqama kule ndima nge-albhamu eyayithi Gijima Nkosi ngo-2010 ngaphambi kokukhipha eyashisa izikhotha ethi i-Agenda YeZulu eyayigabe ngenoni elithi Ekuxakekeni Konke. Ngaphandle kokucula ngokuzimela, uBuhle ubuye waphelezela ngephimbo izihlabani zomculo wokholo ezingoSifiso Ncwane, Deborah Fraser, Sipho Makhabane, Lundi, Hlengiwe Mhlaba, Thobekile nabanye. USimmy, oyisihlabani se-Afro house, waqala ukuzama emculweni ngokungenela umqhudelwano wamaciko asafufusa i-Idols SA ne-SA's Got Talent kodwa kwangalunga. Ikhono lakhe lize lanakwa uSandile Sithole ngesikhathi esenza iSocial Sciences e-UKZN eThekwini ngo-2013. Emuva kokuphothula lezi ziqu wabe esebhekisa amabombo eGoli lapho akhipha khona i-albhamu yakhe yokuqala eyayithi Tugela Fairy ngo-2018. Wavele wavutha engabaselwe ngamanoni athi Ngiyesaba, Ubala nethi Umahlalela Umgqugquzeli walo mcimbi, uSipho Sithole, uthe izethameli zizobuyela emakhaya zingawuvali umlomo njengoba  kuzobe kunandisa abaculi bakuleli nabasemazweni angaphandle. Kwabakuleli kuboshelwe uMntuyenziwa, Inkosi Yamagcokama, Simmy, Buhle Nhlangulela, Zakwe, Pomeroy Gordon Stars, Lwah Ndlunkulu, Soul Brothers, Big Zulu, Nkonzo, Felikhono, Thiwe, nabanye. Kubabaculi bangaphandle kubalwe uKommanda Obbs (Lesotho), Bholoja (Swaziland) noPositive Black Soul (Senegal). Amathikithi asatholakala eTicketpro naseComputicket ngo-R150 (general), R550 (VIP), nango-R850 (VVIP). Ezitolo atholakala ePick n Pay, Shoprite, Jumbo, Spar, Checkers, Rhino Cash & Carry, USave, Power Fashion (Tugela Ferry), naseKhonzinkosi Spar (Tugela Ferry).

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: ULUYANDA Zwane ugeqe amagula ngokuhlukunyezwa kwabalingisi abasavela ngozakwabo asebemnkantshubomvu kule ndima UMLINGISI ozakhele udumo ngokulingisa indawo eqavile emdlalweni wethelevishini iSibongile & The Dlaminis, uLuyanda Zwane, ugonyuluke ngokuhlukunyezwa abhekana nakho endimeni yezokungcebeleka. ULuyanda (22), owayenguSibongile kulo mdlalo owaqedwa, ubhoboke ngalobu bunzima ekhasini lakhe kwi-Instagram. Leli lamba lidlile laseMlaza lidalule ukuthi kunesinye isikhulu sesifazane, elingasivezanga ukuthi singubani nokuthi sasikumuphi umdlalo, esamsabisa ngokuthi ngeke aphinde asebenze ndawo uma ekhala ngokungaphatheki kahle emsebenzini. ULuyanda ubhale kanje "Ngake ngabuzwa ngomunye umuntu wesifazane oyi-Commissioning Editor ukuthi ngizimisele ngokuba yisishoshovu samalungelo noma ngokuba wumlingisi. Wayengibuza kanjalo ngenxa yokuthi ngangilwela amalungelo ami njengomlingisi lapho kuqoshelwa khona." ULuyanda uthe lesi sikhulu sabuye samtshela emakhaleni ukuthi ngeke aphinde asebenze ndawo futhi uzovalwa kule ndima yezokulingisa angaphinde aqashwe uma ezoqhubeka nokulwela amalungelo akhe. "(Okuxakayo) wukuthi uhlale ekhuluma ngokufukulwa kwabantu besifazane nsuku zonke ezinkundleni zokuxhumana." Uthe kwamphatha kabi ukubona abantu besifazane asebemnkantshubomvu kule ndima kuyibo abacindezela ozakwabo abasengamaqhumamponjwana emkhakheni wokulingisa. ULuyanda uthe abalingisi besifazane abasebasha badlula ekuhlukumezekeni kule ndima. "Basivala imilomo ngokusisabisa ngokuthi 'ngeke siphinde sisebenze ndawo.' Ake ngizikhulumele mina. Bengimpintshelwa ekhoneni futhi ngihlukunyezwa ngomama abadala 'abasemandleni' balindele ukuthi ngizovele ngisabe futhi ngigodole. (Ngebhadi) lapho ngivele ngibhekane ngqo nesikhondlakhondla. Awuvele nje ungenwe amanzi emadolweni bese uyavevezela. Ikusasa lomuntu lisemseni kaNkulunkulu kuphela, hhayi entendeni yesandla somuntu osazowushiya lo mhlaba." ULuyanda wangena ekulingiseni okukhokhelayo emuva kokuphumelela ngamalengiso u-matric  esikoleni saseManzimtoti, iKingsway High. Indlela asevuthwe ngayo kulo mkhakha ungaphika ukuthi uneminyaka emithathu kuphela eyibambile kule ndima. Uqale ukulingisa emidlalweni yethelevishini ngo-2022, elingisa indawo kaLelo kwiDurban Gen nekaPhumzile kwi-Outlaws. Ngo-2023 ulingise indawo ka-Amina kwiClassified neka-Aphiwe Ndima kwiMiseducation. Uqale ukuvelela esenguSibongile Mbambo kwiSibongile & The Dlaminis. Udlulele kwiShaka Ilembe lapho afika waba nguVundlazi. Nyakenye ubonakale emdlalweni iSpinners Season 2. ULUYANDA Zwane ugeqe amagula ngokuhlukunyezwa kwabalingisi abasavela ngozakwabo asebemnkantshubomvu kule ndima

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: KWAKUSEMNANDI kubasunguli beJoyous Celebration, uPastor Mthunzi Namba, uLindelani Mkhize noPastor Hlongwane IZINDABA zokungaboni ngaso linye phakathi kwabasunguli beJoyous Celebration, uLindelani Mkhize, uPastor Mthunzi Namba noPastor Jabu Hlongwane, zikhathaze abantu abaningi, ikakhulukazi abazalwane nabefundisi. Ngenyanga eyedlule kuvele izindaba zokuthi kunokungahoshelani phakathi kukaLindelani nozakwabo uMthunzi noJabu kubangwa imali. Laba ababili kuthiwa bebesola uLindelani ngasemalini yaleli qembu kodwa uLindelani ukhiphe isitatimende athe kuso kungamampunge konke okushiwo ngaye, waveza ukuthi oMthunzi bathatha isinqumo sokushiya kuleli qembu. Omunye wezinceku eziphatheke kabi, wumsakazi weHighway Radio, uDennis "Nzonzonzo" Ntombela. Uthe leli qembu ulihlonipha kakhulu ngamagalelo alo ekukhiqizeni izihlabani zabaculi kuleli, ezinye ezisimele phesheya kwezilwandle njengoXolani Mdlalose. "Abasunguli balo mina ngibazi bengabantu abakhulile kakhulu ngokomqondo nangokomoya abangeke benzise okwezingane sebekhule kangaka. Ngingathi ukuhlukana ngemibono akusiyo inkinga, kanjalo omunye uma esekhethe ukushiya akuyona inkinga, indaba ingaba yimbi uma kukhona osebukela phansi umsebenzi ongaka." Uthe leli qembu linabantu abadlulile ku-70 abaphilisa imindeni yabo ngalo. "Siyohlezi sileseka ngoba liveze amakhono abantu esingabazi. Liyisikhungo sokwakha esikhiqize abaculi abaseqophelweni eliphezulu. Uyamuzwa nje umculi odlule kulona, ngisho esezimele." Uthe ngoba basuka ndawonye futhi sebekhulile ababonise abantwana ukuthi izinto nezinkinga zisombululwa kanjani. "Abazokwenza manje bazi ukuthi kuwumlando nawo oyosala ngabo emhlabeni, ufundwe yizizukulwane, abanye baqophe imidlalo yamafilimu ngendlela abalusingethe ngayo lolu daba. Singabefundisi siyabakhulekela futhi siyohlezi siyeseka iJoyous Celebration kukho konke. Bakhumbule negama Joyous Celebration, ngakho akukho sitha okumele sivunyelwe ukuxova le njabulo yamakholwa nethuthukisa amakhono kangaka," kuphetha uPastor Ntombela osondelene kakhulu naleli qembu njengoba lake lamyisa naphesheya kwezilwandle ngesikhathi liqopha i-albhamu eyayithi Live At Potter's House, eDallas, Texas ngo-2017.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UWILSON B Nkosi oqeda iminyaka ewu-40 esakaza NJENGOBA iMetro FM igubha iminyaka ewu-40 yasungulwa, i-SABC izochoma uphaphe lwegwalagwala oyingqalabutho kulo msakazo uWilson Bafana Nkosi. Nale ngwazi, esakaza uhlelo lwangeSonto iSounds And Stuff Like That phakathi kuka-9 ekuseni no-12 emini, iqeda iminyaka ewu-40 iyibambile insimbi ishisa ekusakazeni kusukela ngoSepthemba 1, 1986. UWilson B (58), owazalelwa ePiet Retief, eMpumalanga kodwa wakhulela eSwatini. Uzohlonishwa ngokuthi kusakazwe umlando ngempilo yakhe. Uthe lelo qophamlando lizobe liveza okuningi obekungaziwa ngaye. "Abantu abaningi bebehlale befuna ukwazi ngami njengokuthi ngabe nginazo yini izingane, unkosikazi nabazali." UWilson B uthe waqala ukuba nothando lokusakaza esemncane kangangoba waqala ukufaka isicelo somsebenzi kwiSABC eseneminyaka ewu-17. Uthe ngo-1985 esefunda uGrade 12 wabuye wafaka isicelo kwiSABC efuna ukusebenzela umsakazo osuwavalwa iRadio Springbok. Uthe owayeyimenenja Jikelele yakwa-SABC ngaleso sikhathi, uTess Louwe, wathi bayasizwa isicelo sakhe kodwa akathi ukulinda ngoba kunomsakazo abazowuvula iRadio Metro. Nebala ngonyaka olandelayo wabizelwa kwinhlolokhono.
