Sekungumlando ukuthi uWilson B wabe eseqashwa ukuba asebenzele lo msakazo owawuphethwe uKoos Radebe owayesakaza imidlalo yebhola kuRadio Zulu (osekuwuKhozi FM). Uthe wafica izinkakha ezinjengoLucky Ntuli, Shado Twala, Sheila D, Lawrence Dube, Tim Modise, Mesh Mapetla, Grant Shakoane, Tom Mphatsoe noTreasure Tshabalala. "Ngaqala ukusakaza uhlelo lwaphakathi kwamabili kuya ku-5 ekuseni noTim Modise olwalusihloko sithi All Night Flight. Ngangitatazela, ngesaba futhi ngijuluka ngimanzi te yize kwakubanda qa e-studio. Ingoma yokuqala engayidlala eyama-Commodores ethi United In Love." Uthe uyabonga kakhulu kubaphathi balo msakazo ngokukholelwa kuye yize ayengenasicucu sokusakaza futhi engenamava. Njengoba wayesanda kuphuma esikoleni, wayengakaze wasebenza ndawo. Konke kwakukusha kuye. Nakuba bonke abasakazi bamemukela ngezandla ezifudumele kodwa owagcina esewumngani wakhe nguGrant Shakoane ngenxa yokuthi babezalwa ngosuku olulodwa. UWilson B uthe benoGrant bagcina sebevakashelana nasemakubo. Echaza ngobudlelwano bakhe nowayeyisilomo seRadio Zulu, uCyril Bongani "Kansas City" Mchunu, uWilson B, uthe wathuka wacishe wamelwa yinhliziyo ngesikhathi ezwa efonelwa wuKansas ngabo-2 ekuseni, esematasatasa esakaza. Uchaze uKansas njengomsakazi ayekhula emlalela nowamfaka ugqozi nofuqufuqu lokuba wumsakazi. "Baningi engabaphoxa ngokufuna ukuba wumsakazi ngoba abanye babelindele ukuba ngibe yiChartered Accountant noma i-Economist." "Wathi uKansas City lo." Uthe baxoxa, wagcina uKansas esemtshela ukuthi useGoli uzoqopha uhlelo i-TV NgoMgqibelo/KaMokibelo. "Kwathi uma ngishayisa ngo-5 ngangabe ngisalala. Ngaqonda lapho babeqophela khona, ngafike ngahlangatshezwa wumufi uBoby Dlikilili. UKansas watshelwa ukuthi kukhona oze kuye. Kwathi uma engibona, wavele weza egijima wangiwola engibamba isikhathi eside." Uthe kusukela lapho bagcina sebengabangani beqiniso futhi waqala ukugitshezwa ibhanoyi wuKansas ngoba wayefuna amvakashele emzini wakhe eThekwini. "Wangihlalisa ehhotela lomntakabani i-5 Star," kusho uNkosi. Uthe wanqaba uKansas esefuna abe amumise eshadelwa ngo-1988. "Ngagcina ngivume ukuba wumphathi wohlelo emshadweni wakhe owawuseCamperdown," kusho yena. Uthe ngaphambi kokuba uKansas adlule emhlabeni, wahlala phansi naye wamxoxela konke ngempilo yakhe futhi wamnikeza nesithombe sakhe ayesisayinile. "Kwaba yilolo suku engagcina ngalo ukumbona ephila." UWilson B akagcinanga ngokusakaza kuphela kodwa ubuye wethula izinhlelo zethelevishini okubalwa kuzo iSidlalela Intsha/Ulusha ngo-1987, enoNomawethu Dingiswayo. Wadlulela kwiJam Alley enoVinolia Mashego noLeon Mazibuko ngo-1992 kanye neStudio Mix. Uthe okuningi abantu bazokubona okokuqala kwiqophamlando ekhuluma ngempilo yakhe. UWILSON B Nkosi ekakwe wu-Unathi Msengana, Melanie Bala,  noGlen Lewis beyibambe kwiMetro FM UWILSON B Nkosi eqeda kuhlonishwa ngendondo yeLifetime Achievement UWILSON B Nkosi ephethe umklomelo weLifetime Achievement kumaSouth African Voice Awards UWILSON B Nkosi enezinye izingqalabutho ayeyibambe nazo kwiMetro FM, kuseyiRadio Metro UWILSON B Nkosi esakaza uhlelo lwakhe lwangeSonto ekuseni kwiMetro FM

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: INGWAZI yomculo wesintu, uDkt Sipho Sithole, ikhala ngokwehla kwesithunzi emculweni kamaskandi njengoba sekuqhakanjiswa kakhulu amagidangoma nobusaziwayo, hhayi umculo. USithole uthe kuyihlazo futhi kuyajabhisa ukubona abaculi abanegalelo elikhulu emculweni kamaskandi bebulala lo mculo. Uthe lo mculo awusafani njengoba sekuqhudelwana ngabalandeli, nokuthi ubani othenge imoto kanokusho edlula ekabani, nobucebi. USithole uthi ucabanga ukuthi abafazi balaba baculi baze babuze abayeni babo ukuthi kungani usudlulwa usibanibani osethenge imoto kanokusho. Uthe kunabadlali balo mculo abagcina ukubona imali uma beqashiwe uma kuqoshwa icwecwe kuphela. "Emuva kwalokho ababe besadlala. Lokhu sekubangele ubuphofu kubadlali balo mculo ngenxa yokungaqashwa. Abanye abaculi abafana noSkhindi sabeSuthu, obedlala inkostini, noLahlumlenze, owaduma kakhulu ngokudlala i-accordion, bagcine beshonile, bebulawa yindlala." USithole ukhuluma kanjena nje uhlelele umphakathi waseMsinga idili lomculo wesintu iMsinga Folk & Indigenous Music Festival ezinkundleni zemidlalo zaseMzisho eTugela Ferry ngoMashi 21. Uthe ufuna izethameli zibuyele emakhaya zingawuvali umlomo njengoba izinsimbi ziyobe zidlalwa bukhoma. Uthe okunye okuzohluka kakhulu ngalo mcimbi wukuthi kuzobe kunandisa abaculi bakuleli nabasemazweni angaphandle. Kwabakuleli kuboshelwe uMntuyenziwa, Inkosi Yamagcokama, Simmy, Buhle Nhlangulela, Zakwe, Pomeroy Gordon Stars, Lwah Ndlunkulu, Soul Brothers, Big Zulu, Nkonzo, Felikhono, Thiwe nabanye. Kubabaculi bangaphandle kubalwe uKommanda Obbs (Lesotho), Bholoja (Swaziland) noPositive Black Soul (Senegal). USithole, ebambisene nowakwakhe uVelile Sithole, sebenamava kule ndima yokuhlelwa kwemicimbi eseqophelweni eliphezulu futhi abaqali njengoba bake baletha indodana kaBob Marley, uDamian Marley ngo-2017. Basebenze kakhulu emazweni angaphandle behambisa abaculi kuma-festival afana neWomad (eNgilandi, Australia, eNew Zealand), Atlantic Music Expo (Cape Verde), Doa Doa (Uganda), Azgo (Mozambique), Bushfire (Swatini), Africa Festival (Germany), Edinburgh Festivals (Scotland), Sacred Festival (India), Sakifo Festival (Reunion Island) neSakifo Music Festival (eThekwini). Bobabili bake baqokwa wuMnyango wezobuCiko namaSiko kuzwelonke ngo-2010 ukuba bahlele amakhonsathi onyaka wonke eChina, lapho babehambisa amaqembu amaningi ukuyokhombisa ubunono nokuhleleka komculo wamaciko akuleli. IMsinga Folk & Indigenous Music Festival yesekwe yiNational Arts Council, Presidential Employment Stimulas Programme, Umsinga Municipality, KZN Dept of Sports, Arts, and Culture, KZN Dept of Economic Development, Tourism and Environment, Amafa Research Institute,  Msinga FM, neWonga Music, ezobe ilethe amanzi azophuzwa abaculi kanye nezihambeli. Amathikithi ayotholakala eTicketpro naseComputicket ngo-R150 (General), R550 (VIP), nango-R850 (VVIP). Ezitolo atholakala ePick n Pay, Shoprite, Jumbo, Spar, Checkers, Rhino Cash & Carry, USave, Power Fashion (Tugela Ferry), naseKhonzinkosi Spar (Tugela Ferry).

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMAFIKIZOLO uhoxe kwi-Best Maskandi kumaMetro FM Music Awards UMCULI kamaskandi ohlukanise unyaka kuKhozi FM naku-SABC 1 ngengoma ethi Uzoncengwa Unyoko, uLethukuthula "Mafikizolo" Mhlongo, uhoshe imfe emunxeni we-Best Maskandi kuma-Metro FM Music Awards azoba se-ICC eThekwini, ngo-Ephreli 25. UMafikizolo (27) waseWasbank, eMnambithi, ubuye waqokwa emunxeni we-Best Song of the Year nakowe-Best Viral Challenge. Kwi-Best Maskandi ubeqhudelana noKhuzani, uSminofu, uMzukulu noSiya Ntuli weNkabi Nation kaBig Zulu. Izimpukane eziluhlaza zitshele Isolezwe Ngempelasonto ukuthi lo mculi uhoxe kulo mkhakha ngenxa yokungenwa amanzi emadolweni uma ebona ebanga noKhuzani Mpungose. "Akekho ongazi ukuthi uKhuzani akacushwa evotini. Akekho umculi kamaskandi ongamelana naye uma kuyiwa ngevoti. Enye into ebukeka inqenisa uMafikizolo ukuthi engase abuye engaphethe lutho kulo mqhudelwano uma ezofuna ukuwola zonke izindondo. Amavoti akhe azohlakazeka agcine engawinanga ngisho neyokubika ekhaya indondo," kusho osondelene noMafikizolo. UMafikizolo ukuqinisekisile ukuthi uphumile kwi-Best Maskandi ngoba efuna abamvotelayo bagxile eminxeni emibili. "Empeleni ngicela bangivotele kwi-Song of the Year nakwiViral Challenge lapho engilwa khona. Ngibe nenhlanhla yokuqokwa kathathu. Angilimele, ngilwela izindondo ezimbili." Ebuzwa ukuthi uhoxe ngoba esaba uKhuzani, uphendule kanje: "Ngiyamsaba ngoba mdala." Kwi-Best Song of The Year uMafikizolo uqhathwe noSam Deep – Shela, DJ Smallz – Zep, DJ Maphorisa, Xduppy noKabza De Small – Abantwana Bakho, Mawhoo– Bengicela, Khadeair – Magumba, Jazzwrld noThukuthela – Uzizwa kanjani, Shandesh & Mvzzle – Sdudla or Slender, Goon Flavour – Ngishutheni noCiza – Isaka. Kwi-Viral Challenge uqhathwe noDJ Sallz – Zep, Mluucisian – Malacosta, Goon Flavour – Ngishutheni noShandesh & Mvzzle – Sdudla or Slender. UMafikizolo uzobe emele umaskandi kwi-8th Umlazi Jazz Festival eKing Zwelithini Stadium: Outer Field eMlaza, ngoMashi 28 kusukela ngo-12 emini, Uzobe eshiyelana inkundla noSjava, Selaelo Selota, Wilson B Nkosi, Lwah Ndlunkulu, Siphokazi, Brenda Mntambo, Selbeyonce, Collen Zondo, Mzokoloko, Bongani Nkwanyana nabanye. Amathikithi atholakala eWebtickets, Pick n Pay nakwaBoxer ngo-R300 nango-R350.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UPHAKELUMTHAKATHI NDABANDABA UMSAKAZI weMetro FM, uSomizi "Somgaga" Mhlongo uzithintele iziqandu kumlingisi weShaka Ilembe, uNkosikhona "Phakelumthakathi" Ndabandaba ngokuqhosha ngokuncoma abantu basemazweni angaphandle, maqede wagxeka abakuleli. Ekhuluma ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, uSomizi uthe uyafisa ukwazi ukuthi ingabanjani iNingizimu Afrika uma bengahamba bonke abantu bokufika, basale bodwa abakuleli. Uthe okumenza asho kanje wukuthi ubone ingcosana yakuleli isebenza lapho kubhakwa khona izinkwa nalapho kudayiswa khona izimbali kanye nabagada izimoto emapaki. "Ngakho ingabanjani iNingizimu Afrika uma bengahamba abantu okungebona bakuleli? Ngisho ngoba kusukela lapho kubhakwa khona izinkwa kuya esitolo sezimbali, cishe babili abantu bakuleli engibabone besebenza khona, mhlawumbe abawu-40 abangaphandle." USomizi ubuze ukuthi uma bengahamba bonke abangaphandle, bakhona yini abakuleli abangenza le misebenzi. "Bakhona abangagada izimoto? Ngisho ngoba ezindaweni zobumnandi nasema-salon kukhonya abantu okungebona abakuleli. Sisobishini. Nami nginecala njengoba umsizi wami kungowaseZimbabwe, ongenzela ingadi owaseMalawi, omunye umsiki wengqephu owaseZimbabwe, ababili ngabaseMalawi." USomizi uthe munye kuphela ongumZulu nomunye oyibhunu enkampanini yakhe ekhiqiza izimpahla zokugqoka." Uthe okwenza ancamele abangaphandle wukuthi bayawenzisisa umsebenzi ekubeni abakuleli begcina icala futhi beneconsi. "Ngiyafisa ukwazi ukuthi kungaba njani kuleli uma bengasekho bonke abantu bangaphandle," kugcizelela uSomizi. Ethintwa uPhakelumthakathi, ongumdidiyeli wamabutho nesiqhwaga sakwaNongoma esingabafuni nalapho behambe khona abantu bangaphandle abenza imisebenzi engatheni eZululand, ushiye angalazi kuSomizi. Uthe kufanele akhulume kanje ngoba wabalekela ubunsizwa waqoma ukuba wumuntu wesifazane ngoba efuna ukuba nemali. "USomizi sekufanele simchaze ukuthi uwuhlobo luni lomuntu. USomizi yindoda eyavilapha ukuba yindoda, yazenza into engeyona. Abantu sebeyayinyanya le nto yabo yokuthi ngaso sonke isikhathi bafuna ukugqama ngento ewubunuku, ephambana nosiko lwakwaZulu futhi sibe sazi kahle ukuthi lezi zinto abayizo abazona kodwa bazenzela imali, hhayi ngoba ngempela beyizo." UPhakelumthakathi uthe oSomizi banomkhuba wokuthi kuthi uma kunento ababonayo ukuthi ilungisa isizwe bese bona babe ngongoma uyayona. "Bazama ukuveza into ezobenza banakwe ngoba bajabulela ngisho nokwethukwa," kuqhuba uPhakelumthakathi onguMahlabeni kwiShaka Ilembe. Uthe kungenzeka ukuthi uSomizi uqhosha ngabasebenzi abuye agange ngabo. Nabanye abantu bakuleli bakhwele badilika kuSomizi bethi ungumuntu wokugcina ongazishaya isifuba ngabantu bangaphandle.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: YINGXENYE yamakholwa abehambele umkhuleko wamabandla ahlukahlukene obuhlelwe yiSA Church Defenders eCurries Fountain Stadium eThekwini ngempelasonto eyedlule UMBHISHOBHI ND Nhlapo weGNF Ministries ubeyingxenye yabefundisi ebebehambele umkhuleko weSouth African Church Defenders eCurries Fountain Stadium eThekwini ABAZALWANE  ebebehambele umkhuleko weSA Church Defenders eCurries Fountain Stadium eThekwini ngempelasonto eyedlule ABEPHUME ngobuningi  amakholwa emkhulekweni weSouth African Church Defenders eCurries Fountain Stadium eThekwini BEKUHELEZA umoya wokuthula noxolo emkhulekweni weSouth African Church Defenders eCurries Fountain Stadium eThekwini ABEPHUME ngobuningi amakholwa amabandla ahlukahlukene ngesikhathi kunomkhuleko weSouth African Church Defenders eCurries Fountain Stadium eThekwini ngempelasonto eyedlule. Ngale nkonzo bekulungiselelwa imashi yamaKhrestu eseThekwini ngoMgqibelo ozayo

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMKHETHENI Obed "Shiyiscefe" Mgube uzofihlwa emathuneni asekhaya eGreytown ngeSonto INDIMA yemidlalo yethelevishini seyiphinde yagubuzelwa yifu elimnyama ngokudlula komunye wabalingisi asebemnkantshubomvu, uMkhetheni Obed "Shiyisicefe" Mgube. Umufi wazakhela udumo ngokulingisa indawo kaSgegede Emzini Wezinsizwa nekaNhlapho kwiMthunzini.com. Nababukeli boZalo bazomkhumbula njengoba abeke avele kulo. Emzini Wezinsizwa ulandela abanye ozakwabo abangasekho abanjengoRoland Mqwebu owayenguMkhize, Shadrack Ngema owayenguMagubane, Bafana Mlangeni owayeyisidakwa noWashington Sixolo owayenguJwara. Okhulumele umndeni kamufi, uMsenti Mgube, uthe uShiyisicefe (77) udlule emhlabeni esekhaya esigodini sakwaMandwahla, KwaJikijiki, eMabomvini, ngenxa yokuxinwa yisifo sikashukela. Uthe umufi wawa esekhaya, wabe esephuthunyiswa esibhedlela eSwidi ngenxa yokuthi wayengasakwazi ukukhuluma. Eqhuba uMsenti uthe umufi ushona nje bese ebuyile esibhedlela futhi sekuphele amasonto amathathu engakwazi ukukhuluma. "Sigqemeke udume lwengozi ngenxa yokuthi ubengumxhumanisi wabantu bakwaMgube futhi kunguye obehlela imihlangano yomndeni." Ngaphandle kokulingisa umufi ubaziwa njengosomabhizinisi obedayisa izinkomo nezimbuzi futhi eqashisa nangama-coldroom nama-trailer. Umufi ushiye emhlabeni unkosikazi wakhe uMaMfeka, abantwana abawu-11, abazukulu abawu-24 nodadewabo ababili. Uzofihlwa emathuneni asekhaya eMabomvini, eGreytown, ngeSonto. Abadinga imininingwane egcwele bangathinta uMsenti ku-079 1519 288.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: IBANDLA lamaNazaretha lizigqaja ngokukhonza ngendlela encike osikweni lwesintu kodwa lokhu akusho ukuthi lithandwa abantu abathile. KwaShembe kunendidiyela yamakholwa aqhamuka emikhakheni nasemazingeni ahlukene empilo. Kulo 7 million wamalungu aleli bandla kunalo lonke uhlobo lomuntu. Abanye bangosaziwayo abazishaya isifuba ngokuthi balapho bekhona ngenxa yemisebenzi yoMphrofethi ongumsunguli waleli bandla elikhulukazi e-Afrika, u-Isaiah "Mqaliwendlela" Shembe. AmaNazaretha angahlukana ngezinhlangothi, njengoba kukhona elaseBuhleni eliholwa yinkosi uMduduzi "UnyazilweZulu" Shembe, elaseGinyezinye eliholwa yinkosi uSizwe "Mudliwamafa" Shembe, eKuphakameni eliholwa yinkosi uVukile "Incoyincoyi" Shembe, elaseThembezinhle eliholwa yinkosi uPhinda "Ukukhanya Kwelanga" Shembe nelaseGauteng eliholwa yinkosi uPhakama Shembe kodwa zonke lezi zinhlangothi zibambelele ezinkambisweni zomsunguli webandla, uMqali Wendlela. Kosaziwayo abakholelwa kuleli bandla kubalwa umrepha futhi ongumculi we-Afro Soul, uJabulani "Sjava" Hadebe. Ngaphandle kokucula uSjava ubuye abe ngumlingisi owaqala ukuduma edlala kwi-Zone 14. USjava usewole inqwaba yemiklomelo kuleli nasemazweni angaphandle kuma-BET Awards eMelika. Abaningi bazomkhumbula umlingisi wodumo kuDeliwe nakwiSivumelwano, uCynthia Shange (77), ongunina kaNonhle Thema. Waba ngumlingisi wokuqala omnyama wakuleli ukungenela umqhudelwano kaMiss World ngo-1972, emele iNingizimu Afrika. UCynthia ubuye walingisa iminyaka ecela ku-20 engunina kaThandaza (okuyindawo eyalingiswa wuSindi Dlathu). Umdidiyeli wemidlalo yeshashalazi ongasekho, uMbongeni Ngema, wayelandela inkonzo yobuNazaretha ayevame ukusho ukuthi wazalwa emuva kokuthi abazali bakhe babemcele khona. UMadlokovu wazakhela udumo ngokudidiyela iSarafina ne-The Zulu. Abalingisi abaningi abanjengoSomizi, Leleti Khumalo, Dumisani Dlamini, Sindi Dlathu, Wendy Mseleku nabanye, badlula esandleni saleli qhawe laseNhlwathi, kwaHlabisa. Umsakazi woKhozi FM uZimiphi "Zimdollar" Biyela, ungomunye wamaNazaretha angaphuthelwa yimikhosi yaleli bandla. UZimdollar ulingise emidlalweni eminingi enjengeDurban Gen, eHostela noZalo. UNgizwe "Zulu Charmer" Mchunu, naye uyakholelwa kule nkolo yobuNazaretha ngenxa yokuthi wacelelwa khona. Lo saziwayo, osebizwa ngomholi wamabhinca, waqala ukuzakhela udumo ngokulingisa emidlalweni yeshashalazi, wasakaza oKhozini futhi wethula uhlelo lomculo wesintu kuSABC 1, iRoots. UMike Mvelase owayenguKhaphela kwiGenerations uwe evuka naleli bandla lakwaShembe. Omunye usaziwayo osanda kuphumela obala ukuthi uyindodakazi yaseKuphakameni futhi ukhonza kuleli bandla uDawn Thandeka King, odume kakhulu enguMaNgcobo kuZalo. Eminyakeni eyedlule uSiyabonga Twala, obenguMpiyakhe Zungu kwiSibaya, ubengaphuthi emikhosini yaleli bandla ngaphambi kokuzalwa kabusha aphendukele kumaKristu. Owayeyinkosi ye-reggae kuleli, uLucky Dube, ubedume umhlaba wonke kodwa ubengakhohlwa wukuthi uyiNazaretha kangangoba waze waqamba ingoma etusa amagalelo aleli bandla, esihloko sithi Shembe Is The Way. Uphrojusa wezinhlelo oKhozini uThembeka Cele ungomunye wosaziwayo abakhuliswe ngobuNazaretha. Umsunguli nomgqugquzeli weMpucuzeko Maskandi Festival neNgoma Kazwelonke, uXolani Mcineka, naye uyiNazaretha. Owayengumsakazi weGagasi FM nomlingisi woZalo, uKini Shandu, ukhonza kwaShembe.Owayeyisihlabani emculweni kamaskandi, uMgqumeni "Idlamanzi" Khumalo, wayekhonza kwaShembe futhi waze waqamba ingoma ethi Inkonzoni. UMgqumeni wazakhela ugazi ngokusungula ushuni osadlisa namanje nokuyiwo ofudunyezwe ngabaculi abaningi. UMengameli weNkatha Freedom Party, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uyiNazaretha benobeyiPhini likaMengameli wamaJaji eKZN, uMjabuliseni Madondo. OwayeyiMantshi kuleli uMthembeni Phineas Mpanza nobenguMphathi woKhozi FM, uBonga Mpanza, bangamaNazaretha. Ngakho uma ukhonza kwaShembe ungazinyezi, uzitshele ukuthi udukile. Unenqwaba yabantu ababalulekile abangamaNazaretha. UNDLUNKULU uNtokozo KaMayisela Zulu

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: NGAMALUNGU esigungu saKwaZulu-Natal esikhethwe eKZN Music House eThekwini SEKUNTWELA ezansi ngezinkinga zikhungethe amaciko aKwaZulu-Natal kulandela ukukhethwa kwesigungu senhlangano entsha i-Artists United eKZN Music House eThekwini muva nje. Amaciko aqokelwe esigungwini esisezingen9 lesifundazwe ngoGugu Nzimande, Sabelo ngema, Dkt Njabulo Mholi Mabaso, Mphumzeni Sipho Phoswa, Dkt Xolisa Dlamini, Zwelithini Leo Sibisi, Dkt Nomkhosi Kubheka noTrevor Nzimande. Ngokusho kwesitatimende esithunyelelwe imithombo yezindaba, lolu khetho lubeyingqophamlando.Sithe amaciko aqokiwe azibophezele ekusebenzeleni lendima ngokwethembeka nokuyiqhakambisa. Ongumholi wale nhlangano kuzwelonke, u-Owen Ndlovu, ukhulume kabanzi ngosizi olukhengethe abaculi njengokungakhokhelwa imali ngokudlalwa komculo wabo emisakazweni naseziteshini zethelevishini. Uthe bazokulwa kuze kunqamuke izandla ukuze le nkinga ixazululeke. Lo mhlangano bewuhanjelwe nangamanye amalungu omfelandawenye wezinhlangano zamaciko iCreativer and Cultural Industries Federation (Ccifsa).Abaholi bakazwelonke be-Artists United bathe bazosuka eKZN balibhekise eNorth West lapho beyokhetha khona esakhona isigungu.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UTOYA Delazy ukhala ngokukhishwa inyumbazane kuleli UMZUKULU woMntwana wakwaPhindangene, uNontokozo "Toya Delazy" Buthelezi, usole umsakazo owenza inzuzo wase-KZN, iGagasi FM, ngokushaya umculo wakhe ngesithende. UToya Delazy (36), wodumo lwengoma ethi Pump It Up, uveze lokhu ngesikhathi edalula okumenza abhungukele e-UK. Uthe okwenze inkukhu yawusola umgqakazo ngokuthi unesigcwagcwa kwiGagasi wukuchithwa kwengoma apikwe kuyo kaMfumfana Kagogo. "Ngiqophe ingoma yokuqala yegqom' noMfumfana Kagogo. Umsakazi wacela uMfu ukuba ayithumele ukuze idlale engosini yegqom' kwiGagasi. Leli culo lingena khaxa kulolu hlobo lomculo kodwa kwathi uma bebona kunegama lami, yachithwa." UToya Delazy uthe isizathu esashiwo yizikhulu zomsakazo wukuthi ayihambisani nomculo odlalwa kulesi siteshi. "Ukushaywa ngesithende okuthule." Isolezwe Ngempelasonto liyizwile le ngoma esihloko sithi Khumbuza, inekhorasi eshaywe njengengoma kaBhizer ethi Gobis'iqolo. Okhulumela iGagasi FM, uKhulekani Shandu, uphike walala ngomhlane ukuthi bakhetha iphela emasini kulesi siteshi esisakazela eCornubia Mall, eThekwini. "Zonke izingoma ezithunyelwa kwiGagasi FM zidlula ekomitini eliqondene nomculo ukuze lizicubungule. Lolu hlelo lwenziwa kuzo zonke izingoma ezithunyelwayo, akusiyo into eyenziwa engomeni noma kumculi othize." UKhulekani uthe ukuba khona kwaleli komiti ukuqinisekisa ukuthi akukho ukuchema, "konke okuthunyelwayo kwamukelwa ngendlela efanayo." Le ntokazi yaseMahlabathini ithe sekuphele iminyaka engu-13 yehluleka ukwenza umculo wayo udlale emisakazweni. UToya Delazy uthe akahleli eLondon ngoba ethanda kodwa uphoqelekile ukuba azidingise. Uthe ukushiya iNingizimu Afrika kwakungesiyo intando yakhe kodwa kwaba yimpoqo ngenxa yokuthi uphila ngomculo." UToya Delazy uthe ukuba nyamanambana kuleli akuqalanga manje kodwa kuqale ngaphambi kuka-2017, okuwunyaka ahamba ngawo. Uthe ukucwaseka kwaqala mhla elaxaza inkampani ayeqopha ngaphansi kwayo maqede wazisungulela eyakhe. UToya Delazy uthe namanye amaciko awasafuni ukusebenzisana naye ezingomeni ngoba esaba ukuthelwa amachaphazelo. UMNTWANA waKwaPhindangene uDkt Mangosuthu Buthelezi ongumkhulu kaToya Delazy

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: U-DR Khehlelezi ucacisa ngokumenze wagijima ngesivinini esesabekayo INYANGA yodumo yaseThekwini futhi engumfundisi waseZayoni, uBhongolethu "Dr Khehlelezi" Mzozo, igonyuluke ngokuyenze yagijima ngesivinini sika-171 km/h endaweni evumela u-120km/h ePark Rynie, eningizimu yogu KwaZulu-Natal ngoMsombuluko. Ekhuluma ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, uKhehlelezi uthe wayebalekela abantu abamvimbezela esenxanxatheleni yezitolo zaseManzimtoti, iGalleria Mall. Uthe wakha phansi washiya isithunzi ngoba ecabanga ukuthi wayehujwa ngabantu ababulala osopolitiki. Uvumile ukuthi wawabona amaphoyisa ayezama ukummisa kodwa ngenxa yokusabela impilo yakhe wabaleka waze wayongena nezicabha komunye umuzi womngani wakhe, lapho afike wabhaca khona. Uthe ngakusasa, esephumile ekubhaceni, uzithele phezu kwamaphoyisa ammisile. Eqhuba, uthe uqale wawedlula kodwa wabuye wahlehla nyova. Uthe ambuzile ukuthi uwabalekeleleni ngayizolo, wawachazela maqede ahamba naye ngaphambi kokumdedela esekhokhe ibheyili ka-R1 000. Uphike walala ngomhlane ukuthi uke walala ebaliwe esitokisini. Udaba lukuboshwa kukaKhehlelezi ludalulwe kuqala yikhasi loMnyango wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal kwiFacebook. Esitatimendeni soMnyango kuthiwe umsolwa uboshwe emuva kokuthi uthe emiswa ngamaphoyisa eRTI ku-N2 waqale wademelayisa, waphinde washwabula. "Inyanga isibona ukuthi iyaboshwa, kubonakale kushunqa izintuli inyangambhishobhi idla phansi, ishiya isithunzi. AmaRTI Amahle, angehlulwa lutho, asebenzise ubuchule ukuze kugcine wona." Siqhuba isitatimende soMnyango, sithe sekungumlando ukuthi le nyanga kuphinde kwayibhedela ngesikhathi ibanjwa kwenye indawo futhi ihamba ngesivinini, ingazi nokuthi lidumephi. "AmaRTI Amahle ayiphonse umbuzo othi #NenzaniLaEzweni, yathi idla phansi kanti kuyashibilika-kwabheda kanjalo, yaboshwa." Isitatimende sithe, le nyanga engene yathi shi nakwipolitiki njengoba iyilungu lokuqina loMkhonto weSizwe Party futhi engene shi nasemkhakheni wezokungcebeleka, nasekuhleleni, ivele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseScottburgh, ngoLwesibili.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: ISIHLOKO: Awuyiphumuze UMHLAZIYI: CHARLES KHUZWAYO UNTENCANE ubageze ubebebe abazifela ngomculo USENZO "Ntencane" Zondi ukhiphe amangwevu kule albhamu. Uma kungakhulunywa ngamacwecwe kamaskandi angungqaphambili kulo nyaka, lena ayinantanga. Ushaye kwabola ngale albhamu esihloko sithi Awuyiphumuze. Nakuba zimnandi zonke kodwa echaze abantu abaningi, ikakhulukazi abesifazane abasothandweni oluvutha amalangabi, ngethi Bebangaka Abantu Emhlabeni Ukhethe Mina. Yingakho isino-1.8 million views kwiYouTube. Nakwi-International Charts Top 20 le ngoma iwunombolo 13 kanti ethi Engalobolile, ayicule noKaMaphanga, ilele unombolo 20. Awupheli umshado ingadlalwanga le ngoma. Engikuqaphelile ngezingoma eziqukethwe yileli cwecwe wukuthi zinemiyalezo eyakhayo. Ngakho ngeke ungayitholi eqondene nawe. Ngiyithandile indlela acikoze ngayo engomeni ethi Enxiweni Elinethuna. Kudingeka uze ube nencwadi ebizwa ngeHluzo ukuze ukwazi ukuqonda indlela ankondloze ngayo. Ushayile nakwethi Akathumel' i-location. Uthi baningi asebeze balimala bezama ukuthola uthando, ngakho osothandweni akathumel' i-location. Ulikhuphulile izinga ilobuchwepheshe ngengoma ayenze noShenge WaseHlalankosi noZamambo Mkhize esihloko sithi Useyakhala Phambili. Bengithi uyagadla ngengoma ethi Ziyakhala Manje kanti uyazishingela nje. UMzukulu ulenzile iqiniso engomeni ethi Uwedwa Yini. NeZingane Zoma zenze okufanayo engomeni ethi Musa Ukusilinga. Ugadla kwabagabisa ngabantu babo ekubeni kungalotsholwananga. Bazokwehla ngayo abajojayo le ngoma enoMfo kaMsezane ethi Silindele Umalindela. Akusiyo eyehawu kodwa eyobunsizwa. Nabasemajele abasalanga njengoba uNtencane epike uFreddie Gwala engomeni ethi Idayimane. Lo mculi ubuye afundise isiNgisi ngengoma ethi Family and Enemy kodwa uqonde ukuthi ayikho into ebuhlungu njengesitha esisemndenini. Uthulele isigqoko Inkosi uMalusi Zondi enguShansela waseNdlunkulu ngengoma ethi Isihlalo Sobukhosi. Kule ngoma uhambisana nembongi uNgcweti. Abaningi bazoyithanda ingoma ethi Amakhaya Aboshiwe nethi Vuka Uzithathe. Ngamafuphi ugadle kwezwakala umfo kaNondaba.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: ZIYIKHALELE inyanga yaseThekwini ngenxa yokuhamba ngesivinini esiphezulu INYANGA yodumo yaseThekwini ziyikhalele emuva kokuba amafutha enyengelezi engayisebenzelanga kade igijima ngesivinini sika-171 km/h endaweni ka-120km/h ePark Rynie ku-N2 muva nje.Isolezwe liligodlile igama layo njengoba ingakaveli enkantolo. Ngokusho kwekhasi likaFacebook loMnyango wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, le nyanga ebuye ibe wumfundisi webandla lamaZayoni, imiswe amaphoyisa eRTI maqede yademalayisa , yaphinde yashwabula. "Isibona ukuthi iyaboshwa, kubonakale kushunqa izintuli inyangambhishobhi idla phansi, ishiya isithunzi. AmaRTI Amahle angehlulwa lutho asebenzise ubuchule ukuze kugcine wona." Siqhuba isitatimende somnyango sithe sekungumlando ukuthi le nyanga kuphinde kwayibhedela ngesikhathi ibanjwa kwenye indawo futhi ihamba ngesivinini ingazi nokuthi lidumephi. "AmaRTI Amahle ayiphonse umbuzo othi #NenzaniLaEzweni, yathi idla phansi kanti kuyashibilika-kwabheda kanjalo, yaboshwa." Isitatimende sithe le nyanga engene yathi shi nakwipolitiki nasekuhleleni imicimbi izovela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseScottburgh ngoLwesibili.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: YINTOKAZI esolwa ngokuqola nokwebela izintombi zayo eThekwini INTOKAZI okuthiwa ibaqedile abesifazane ebijola nabo ngokubaqola nokubantshontshela ZIMKHALELE owesifazane waseThekwini obesebaqedile abesifazane athandana nabo ngokubaqola nokubantshontshela. Le ntokazi (32), esiligodlile igama layo ize ivele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseThekwini namhlanje, ikhalelwe ngamasongo kaSigonyela eThekwini izolo. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, ukuqinisekisile ukuboshwa komsolwa amaphoyisa aseDurban Central. Uthe owesifazane ophila impilo yokuthandana nabanye besifazane usolwa ngecala lenkohlakalo nelokweba. "Uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseThekwini ngoMashi 3, 2026," kuphetha uSergeant Ngcobo. Udaba ngokukhohlakala kukamsolwa luqale ukudalulwa kwiTikTok intokazi eyaziwa ngoNksz Alabaster "Cijimpi" Zwane. Wachaza umsolwa njengomuntu wesifazane obefike akhohlise abantu besifazane ngokuthi uyabathanda bese ebagila uma esefike ezindlini zabo. U-Alabaster uze wafaka i-video ebiveza umsolwa ekhipha umbhede emqashweni wentombi yakhe eHomii, eThekwini ngolunye usuku. "Amaqola lawa aseThekwini. U.... (emgagula ngegama), akadlali. Ngisho umbhede uyawuqukula. KwakuseHomii lana, enentombi athandana nayo. Wakwazi ukungena kanti amakhamera azomdividiya. Ngisho umbhede uyaphuma," kusho u-Alabaster eveza umsolwa eqiqinga umbhede nomatilasi. "Indoda yomgunyathi. Ufike enze sengathi uyakuthanda bese eyakuqola - cellphone, mbhede, mali. Aphinde akubhonye, unesandla esilula." Isolezwe lithole ukuthi umsolwa wafunda eSithengile Senior Secondary eClermont. KwiFacebook uvela eswenke econsa futhi edla ezindaweni zokudla ezihanjwa ngomntakabani. U-Alabaster uthe umsolwa akayedwa eThekwini owenza lo mkhuba. Kukhona nomunye wesifazane amgagulile owayenguthisha kodwa wasula. U-Alabaster uthe umsolwa wesibili (55), naye othandana nabantu abanobulili obufana nobakhe, waqola obengumkakhe ngokuthi athi akamthathele u-R100 000 ebhange, wathembisa ukuthi uzoyikhokha kodwa wakhala amaphepha, wasala umkakhe encela izithupha nesikweletu. Uthe manje umsolwa wesibili usefuna ukudivosa umkakhe ukuze athole uhhafu emalini yamafa. "Amadoda omgunyathi afuna ukudla izithukuthuku zabanye abantu," kusho u-Alabaster.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: U-DJ Sbu ukhuze ibuya ohlelweni lwakhe I-SABC ikuchithile ukuthi ukunyamalala komsakazi wohlelo lwasekuseni kwiRadio 2000, uSbusiso "DJ Sbu" Leope, kuhlangene nokuvela kwegama lakhe kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga. U-DJ Sbu ubengazwakali emoyeni kusukela ekuqaleni kwesonto esiphuma kulo. Oyinhloko yezokuXhumana kwa-SABC, uMmoni Ngubane, uthe bayakuqinisekisa ukuthi uDJ Sbu ubengekho emoyeni kusukela ngoLwesibili. Nakuba engacacisanga ukuthi yini ebangele ukuthi engazwakali emoyeni kodwa uthe ukunyamalala kwakhe emoyeni akuhlangene nokwenzeka kwikhomishini. "Iziphathimandla zingakuqinisekisa ukuthi uDJ Sbu uzobuyela emoyeni ngoMsombuluko (esho owanamhlanje)," kuphetha uMmoni. Ukungazwakali kwephimbo lalesi silomo kwi-Big Breakfast Show (BBS) with DJ Sbu, kwenze abanye abalaleli bashaya amakhala, basola ukuthi izikhulu zeRadio 2000 zimmisile emuva kokuba igama lakhe lithinteke enkohlakalweni. U-DJ Sbu uzichithile izinsolo ezimyamanisa nenkohlakalo kuMasipala waseKurhuleni ezenziwe yiNhloko yezoMthetho emisiwe kulo masipala, u-Advocate Kemi Behari, ngesikhathi ivele kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga ngoMsombuluko odlule. UBehari ubethula ubufakazi ngokugxambukela kosopolitiki ecaleni lokuqondisa ubugwegwe kowayeyisikhulu esiphezulu, uLesiba Mojapelo. Uthe uDJ Sbu nowayenguzakwabo kwiTS Records futhi oyilungu le-ANC, uThembinkosi “TK” Nciza, bahlomula esambeni sika-R100 million. Esitatimendeni sakhe uDJ Sbu, uthe lezi zinsolo zingamanga, zingcolisa igama lakhe futhi azinasisekelo. Uthe kusukela aqala emsebenzini wokusakaza nowokophatha amabhizinisi kanye nokusebenzela umphakathi, usebenza ngokwethembeka nangokuzihlonipha. U-DJ Sbu usabise ngokubathathela izinyathelo zomthetho abaqhubeka nokungcolisa igama lakhe futhi wazibophezela ekusebenzisaneni nengalo yomthetho ephenya ngalezi zinsolo. U-DJ Sbu ubuyele ohlelweni lwakhe emuva kokunyamalala isonto lonke U-DJ Sbu ubuyele ohlelweni lwakhe emuva kokungazwakali ngesonto eledlule

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: US'PHOKUHLE Luthuli okhala ngabamxina ngama-nudes ezinkundleni zokuxhumana UMSAKAZI weGagasi FM futhi olingisa kuZalo, uS'phokuhle Luthuli, ubhoboke ngokumxosha ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Ekhuluma kwiPodcast, Radio & Stuff, uS'phokuhle (23) uthe ubalekiswa ngabesifazane abahlale bemxina ngama-nudes (izithombe benqunu). "Angifuni ukuqamba amanga. Yingakho ngithi izinkundla zokuxhumana angizikhonzile ngoba kwesinye isikhathi ukuthi uyangena kwi-Instagram, sekunama-nudes ongawazi ukuthi aqhamukaphi. Avele avumbuke nje ama-nudes." Uthe uvamise ukushaya amakhala uma ezithela emananazini abantu besifazane ngoba ubengawatholi engakadumi. US'phokuhle, osakaza Umsindo Take Over ngoMgqibelo, uthe okumshaqisa kakhulu ukuthi amanye ama-nudes avela kubantu besifazane abashadile futhi abanye basuke bengazifihlile ebusweni. "Ngithuka abanye sengihlangana nabo. Amahloni ababa nawo uma sebengibona." Abanye basuke belindele ukubona umuntu wesilisa omude kodwa bashaqeke sebethola ukuthi ungumfana omfishane. Uthe abanye abantu besifazane bafike bamcele izinombolo ngoba bethi benzela izingane zabo. "Inkinga uma ngike ngabona into ethi view once sesigejene. Yini lena oyisendayo ofuna ngiyibone ngedwa futhi kanye. Uma ngike ngaphuma kuyo angisayiboni." US'phokuhle uthe okumenza angangeni ezilingweni ukuthi unezinqumo azithatha nabangani bakhe futhi nonina uhlale emluleka ngabantu besifazane. Leli ciko libuye lidlale indawo kaSbongiseni, oyindodana kaCaptain Mondli Mdlalose kuZalo. US'phokuhle udabuka eMelville, ngaseHibberdene, kodwa wakhulela eMthwalume. Uphothule u-matric eNational School of the Arts maqede wajoyina isiteshi somphakathi iRadio Sunny South njengomfundi wezindaba ngaphambi kokufundela ukusakaza eVusi Letsoalo Academy. Emuva kwalokho waqala ukuhambisa ama-demo eziteshini ezinjengeGagasi ne-East Coast Radio kodwa bengamnaki. Wathi xinti kuma-Call Centre ngaphambi kokuwalaxaza phansi esethole imisebenzi yamaphupho akhe. Uthe wajabula kabi kuqhamuka komncintiswano iGagasi FM Rising Star Presenter Search ngo-2023 ngoba wagcina edle umhlanganiso. Uthe uthando lokulingisa lwamngena esafunda uGrade 7, echazwa yindawo kaMazwi (Menzi Ngubane) emdlalweni uBambo Lwami. Ubuye walingisa efilimini ethi Amathambo. Usenaye owesifazane azimisele ngokumshada. US'PHOKUHLE Luthuli okhala ngabamxina ngama-nudes ezinkundleni zokuxhumana US'PHOKUHLE Luthuli okhala ngabamxina ngama-nudes ezinkundleni zokuxhumana

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMSAKAZI we-East Coast Radio, uZisto, ephahlwe wuNonto R noSipho Alphi Mkhwanazi abashiye izithameli zihalela impinda kwi-Comedy Meets Gospel IZITHAMELI zigcwale phama kwi-Comedy Meets Gospel: A Decade of Laughter eSuncoast Casino (Tsogo Globe) eThekwini OSOMAHLAYA baveze amanye amakhono kwi-Comedy Meets Gospel: A Decade of Laughter eSuncoast Casino (Tsogo Globe) eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo. Kulo mcimbi, uNomthandazo "Nonto R" Rubushe ubebungaza ukuqeda iminyaka eyishumi ebambe insimbi eshisayo kule ndima. Uqophe umlando ngokukwazi ukugcwalisa phama le ndawo. Okuqaphelekile ukuthi osomahlaya abaningi bahlekise kakhulu ngamavesi ebebewacaphuna eBhayibhelini nangamahubo ahlatshelelwa ezinkonzweni. Umethuli wezinhlelo zethelevishini, uSipho Alphi Mkhwanazi, uyena ovule inkonzo ngengoma ethi We Bangcwele, maqede wathandaza okwangampela. Njengamanje u-Alphi wethula uhlelo olukuMzansi Wethu ngoLwezine ngo-6.30 oluthi Face To Face futhi ubethula oluthi Stina kuMzansi Magic. Ukhombisile ukuthi uma kungasahambi kahle emkhakheni wezokungcebeleka, angakwazi ukuziphilisa ngomculo wokholo nangevangeli ngoba unobizo. UNonto R obebambisene no-Alphi ekuphathweni kohlelo, ushiye izithameli zisahalela impinda. Nakuba abesebenzisa kakhulu ulimi oluqosheme kodwa ukhombisile ukuthi iBhayibheli uyalifunda kangangoba ubecaphuna izehlakalo ezenzeka ngempela eBhayibhelini. Ubengagcini ngokucaphuna amavesi kodwa nezingoma zendumiso bezingasali. Ubekuthatha akubeke uma ekuchazela ngomehluko phakathi kokusonta kwabantu abamnyama nabamhlophe. Ubethi uma ekuchazela ngokuthi izinkonzo zabantu abamnyama ziba wundendende kodwa ezabamhlophe ziba mfishane. Lokhu ukukhombise ngokucaphuna izingoma nemithandazo yakhona. Omunye futhi usomahlaya ochaze abazalwane nguSimunye "ChurchBoy" Sikhakhane. Abantu bachazwe yizintshumayelo zakhe kanye nemihlabelelo. Nakuba kunjalo kodwa oKhanyisa Bunu, Justice Kubheka noTall A$$ Mo, benze abadume ngakho. Emuva kosomahlaya, kube sekungena abaculi bokholo uDumi Mkokstad, Jumbo noXolly Mncwango. Bavele bayithatha indumiso bayibeka phezulu. Ezithamelini bekugcwele kakhulu izithandani kwazise bekugujwa iValentine's Day. Yize bekunomculo wokholo kodwa nophuzo beluphezulu kwabanye ebebehambele lo mcimbi ngenxa yokuthi bewuxhaswe nayiSavanna ngokubambisana neCebolethu, Châteaux nezinye izinkampani.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: USTHEMBISO "SK" Khoza uzobanga ukushisa kwiSitha The Enemy ULUNGA Mofokeng esejoyine iSkeem Saam IMIDLALO uZalo kuSABC 1 neThonga kuMzansi Magic kufanele izibambe ziqine njengoba izimbangi zayo kwi-e.tv, Isitha The Enemy, ziqinise isikimu ngesilomo somlingisi waseThekwini,  uSthembiso "SK" Khoza. Isolezwe Ngempelasonto lithole ukuthi indawo ezolingiswa wu-SK izosusa ukushisa njengoba ezojola nentombi yomuntu. Izindaba zokujoyinwa kwalo mdlalo yilesi silomo esaduma ngokuba uShaka Khoza kwi-The Queen, ziqinisekiswe ngokhulumela abakwa-e.tv, uTshegofatso Kolotse. Uthe uSK uzobe elingisa indawo kaSabelo, ozofika kulo mdlalo ezoxova. Eqhuba uTshegofatso, uthe uSK uzoba phakathi kodweshu oluzothinta umndeni wakwaSokhulu, Gumede nowakwaMabuza. Leli phephandaba libuye lathola ukuthi uSabelo uzofike aqhubeke lapho agcina khona nentokazi eyayiyisinqandamathe sakhe uNandi, okuyindawo elingiswa wuSibonginkosi Tenza. Okuzodala umsindo omkhulu wukuthi uNandi usothandweni oluvutha amalangabi noSolomzi, okuyindawo elingiswa wuSenzokuhle Radebe. Kulindeleke ukuthi ukushisa kuqale ngesikhathi uSabelo evela ngoMsombuluko. Khonamanjalo, umdlalo osakazwa kwiSABC 1 phakathi nezinsuku ngo-7.30 ebusuku, iSkeem Saam, uqinise amabhawodi ngokulanda uLunga Mofokeng. Le nsizwa eyaduma kakhulu kwiThe River ingu-Andile Dikana, izodlala indawo kaQhomane, ozobe eteketiswa ngelika-Mr Q. ULunga uzobe elingisa indawo kathisha waseTurf High osemncane futhi onogazi. Naye kulindeleke ukuba abe nogazi kubafundi nakothisha kodwa abuye abe nesigcwagcwa kwazobanyathela amakhona.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: IZIHLABANI zomculo wokholo zithembisa lukhulu emcimbini iComedy Meets Gospel: Decade of Laughter eSuncoast Casino (Tsogo Globe) eThekwini ngoFebhuwari 14 kusukela ngo-6.30 ntambama. UJumbo unxuse abantu abakhathazekile emoyeni ukuthi bangaphuthelwa yile ndumezulu yomcimbi ngoba bazobuyela emakhaya sebehleka bodwa ngenxa yomculo wendumiso namahlaya abazobe bezitika ngakho. Uthe okumenza abe neqholo wukuthi umculo wokholo namahlaya kuyamelapha umuntu odabukile. UJumbo uthe ufuna ukufundisa abazalwane ngokubaluleka kokuhleka uma unezinkinga. Eqhuba, uJumbo uthe kumjabulise kakhulu ukunandisa kulo mcimbi ngoba uzothola ithuba lokwethula umculo wakhe entsheni ebingawazi. UXolly Mncwango uthe okumenze wavumela phezulu ukuzonandisa kulo mcimbi wukuthi uNonto R uzobe egubha iminyaka eyishumi ehlekisa abantu “Ngingumlandeli omkhulu kaNonto R, ngiyayithanda indlela ethula ngayo amahlaya akhe.  Njengomntwana kaNkulunkulu, ngiyakuthakasela ukubona indlela adidiyela ngayo amahlaya neZwi. Kuyasikhumbuza ukuthi ukukholwa kuyingxenye yempilo. Njengeciko kuwubuhlakani ukuhlanganyela kwabaculi bomculo wokholo nosomahlaya, nakuba kungajwayelekile, kodwa kuyasikhumbuza ngokubaluleka kwethu sonke kwezikaqedisizungu." Uthe kumnandi nokubona isifundazwe iKwaZulu-Natal sivuleleka ekwenzeni izinto ngendlela ehlukile. "Ngikhuthaza abalandeli bomculo wami ukuba bahlanganyele nathi kulo mcimbi. Kubalulekile ukubona abathandi bakaqedisizungu behlanganyele ndawonye ngoba kusimamisa nomkhakha wethu,” kusho Xolly. Laba baculi bazobe beshiyelana inkundla noDumi Mkokstad, Tall A$$ Mo, Churchboy, Justice Kubheka, Khanyisa Bhunu, Alph Mkhwanazi nabanye. Amathikithi asatholakala eWebtickets ngemali esukela kuR300.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UZAMAMBO Mkhize oyinxusa leMatshwelele Festival unxuse izintombi ziphelele ngobuningi bazo eCurries Fountain Stadium eThekwini ngoMashi Image: FAACEBOOK/MNTEBHANYAZILE MBATHA IUMGQUGQUZELI obuye abe yinxusa leMatshwelele Festival, uZamambo Mkhize, kulo nyaka uthi kulindeleke ukuthi kutheleke amatshitshi angaphezu kuka-10 000 eCurries Fountain Stadium, eThekwini ngoMashi 7. Kulo mcimbi waminyaka yonke kuzobe kusina kudedelana uMthandeni SK, Babes Wodumo, Khuzani, Big NUZ, Dankie Boi, Gatsheni, Natasha K, Ntencane, Saliwa, Jaiva Zimnike, Ali Mgube, Omathwala, Qwabe Twins, Skweletu, Lungelo Hlongwane, DJ Kotini, Shenge WaseHlalankosi, Thandeka Hadebe, Mjabulisi, AmaYellowBone, Zamambo, Navigator, Thokozani Langa, Maganga Thishela, Limit, Gandaganda, DJ Mngadi, DJ Boonu, Sminofu, Feza, Mayoghurt, Sizwe Mdlalose, Shuni Wasemzini, Mjolisi nabanye. Lokhu kuvele esithangamini nabezindaba ebesiku-27 Meridian Drive eMhlanga Ridge, eThekwini ngoLwesine. Umsakazi woKhozi FM, obephethe uhlelo, uKhathide "Tshatha" Ngobe, uthe lo mcimbi uzobe sewenziwa okwesibili. Uthe owokuqala wahamba kahle kakhulu kugcwele izintokazi ezaziliqhamukisa kuzozonke izinkalo. Unxuse wonke amatshitshi ukuba aphume ngobuningi bawo, noma ngabe itshitshi liwuluphi uhlanga. UZamambo uthe inhlosongqangi ngalo mcimbi wukuvumbulula nokuthuthukisa amakhono amatshitshi. Uthe amatshitshi azobe eqhakambisa amakhono ahlukahlukene njengokucula nokunye. Umsunguli nomqondisi waMatshwelele Festival, uLindani "Papa G" Gumede, uthe lona akusiwo umcimbi kodwa wumgubho wesiko lakwaZulu. Ubonge kakhulu izintombi nonomehlo ngokuba yingxenye yomcimbi. Uthe okwenze lo mcimbi wakhuza ibuya yingcindezi yabantu ebebewufuna. Amathikithi aseyatholakala eTicketPro ngemali esukela kukaR150 kuya kuR1000.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMREPHA wodumo lwengoma ethi Imali Eningi, uSiyabonga "Big Zulu" Nene, ukhuza udlambedlu kubaculi bakamaskandi kulandela ukuvela kwengxabano eyaqubuka phakathi kwabo ngo-2023. Kuleli sonto kuvele okushaqisayo ngokwaholela ekubhidlikeni kweqembu lebhola labaculi bakamaskandi, iMaskandi FC. Kukhona abadalule ukuthi ngesikhathi omaskanda bekhishwa emqhudelwaneni weJammin To Soccer ezinkundleni zaseTsakane ngoJulayi 2024, bafika ezindlini zokushintshela baxabana kabi kangangoba kwaze kwathukwana, kwanukwana futhi kwakhishelwana nezibhamu. Kubuye kwavela nezindaba zokuthi umculi kamaskandi uKhwezi "Smomoza" Mkhize wayeyinkukhu nempaka noMalahle Sibiya emuva kokuba elale no"mfazi" wakhe. UBig Zulu uqale ngokuxolisa ngokugxambukela ezindabeni zeqembu lebhola likamaskandi ekubeni yena ekwele-hip hop maqede wathi kufanele abantu bazi ukuthi ebholeni kuyenzeka abantu banyukelwe wumoya enkundleni. "Kuyenzeka ukuthi kuphakame umoya enkundleni, ningaboni ngaso linye.  Yinto ekhona, nami ngaphambana nabanye abadlali njengomfwethu uDumi (Mkokstad) kodwa ngoba kwakuyinto yebhola, ngabuye ngaxolisa. Impilo iyaqhubeka." UBig Zulu uthe kusuke kungeyona inzondo yeqiniso. "Bafowethu ibiyinhle kakhulu into ebeniyenzile, ukubambisana kudlalwe kube mnandi. Ngane zakwethu ayehle imimoya, sibuye sibambisane. Sibuyele enkundleni sidlale. Asingajabulisi izitha. Thina singabalandeli bakamaskandi sikhona sizoneseka njengoba nani nisekana nje isikhathi esiningi." UBig Zulu uthe uma ngabe oyedwa womaskanda enento  ayenzayo bazoyeseka.  "Ngithi awehle umoya, zinsizwa sicela ukunipha umdlalo wobumbano kube yi-Hip Hop vs Maskandi. Siyacela," kuphetha uBig Zulu. Ngokusho kukaSmomoza, ingxabano yashisa phansi kubaculi bakamaskandi  kangangoba kwacishe kwabanjwana ngezandla. Uthe kukhona abaze banuka abanye ngokufuna ukuthwebula izinhlanhla zabo futhi kwabakhona ababizwa ngaphansi kweziketi zonina. USmomoza uthe abaculi ababengobhongoza nguSenzo "Ntencane" Zondi nosonkondlo ongumlingisi wemidlalo yethelevishini, uKwazi Nsele. Eziphendulela uNtencane uvele washiya angalazi kuSmomoza. Uthe uSmomoza uyabasanganela futhi ugqwaba udumo ngabo. "Yiliphi ibhola olifunayo ngoba wena ubungayi emidlalweni, ubalekela amanyala owawenza ulala nomfazi womuntu esasidlala naye eqenjini. Mina noKwazi, laba osubadakelwa manje, yithi owawucasha ngathi eMpangeni uthi sikugade ngoba awuphephile. Belukuphi lolo thando lwebhola ngaleso sikhathi?"

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UNAMBITHA Mpumlwana osolwa ngokweba i-lipstick UMLINGISI wodumo lukaMawande kwiGenerations, uNambitha Mpumlwana, ubambe umoya ngenxa yecala lokweba abhekene nalo. UNambitha (58) usolwa ngokweba i-lipstick ebiza u-R160 esitolo sakwaDis-Chem eFerndale Mall eRandburg, eGoli, ngoMashi nyakenye. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi lo mlingisi wabanjwa ethatha ngozwane i-lipstick kodwa waphika walala ngomhlane, wazithethelela ngokuthi kukhona ukungaboni ngaso linye. Abaphathi balesi sitolo babe sebebiza amaphoyisa asesiteshini saseRandburg, afika ambopha futhi wabekwa icala lokweba kodwa wakhululwa ngebheyili ka-R1000. Leli phephandaba libuye lathola ukuthi uNambitha wavela okokuqala eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseRandburg ngoMashi 20 lapho engabuzwanga ukuthi icala uyaliphika noma uyalivuma. Ubuye wavela ngoMeyi 2 ngaphambi kokuba icala lakhe lihoxiswe okwesikhashana. Okhulumela uPhiko lezokuShushiswa koMphakathi eGauteng, uPhindi Mjonondwane, utshele Isolezwe ukuthi leli cala lisahoxisiwe okwesikhashana ukunikeza uNambitha isikhathi sokuthamela uhlelo olubizwa nge-diversion programme. Ngamafuphi lolu hlelo elokuhlumelelisa isimilo ngenhloso yokunqanda osuke ebhekene necala ukuba abe nerekhodi lobugebengu noma agwetshwe. Luvamise ukunikezwa abantu abasha nabasuke beqala ukwenza amacala. Umsolwa usebenzela umphakathi noma athole uqeqesho oluthize ngaphambi kokuba inkantolo inqume ukuthi umsolwa uyaqhubeka yini nokufakaza enkantolo noma icala nesigwebo kuyahoxiswa. Uma ungaluqedanga uhlelo ubuyela enkantolo uyoqula. "Uma eseluphothulile uhlelo, uMbuso kuzofanele uthole umbiko oqinisekisa ukuthi luphothulwe ngempumelelo," kuphetha uMjonondwane. UNambitha ngomunye wabalingisi abahlonishwayo kuleli nasemazweni angaphandle kangangoba wayeyingxenye yabalingisi abaphambili efilimini eyahlabana kuma-Oscar Awards iTsotsi. Wabuye walingisa kwiRed Dust neCountry of My Skull. Eminye imidlalo alingise kuyo kubalwa iYizo Yizo, Sokhulu & Partners, Interrogation Room, Ashes To Ashes. Akagcinanga ngokulingisa kodwa ubuye wethula izinhlelo zethelevishini ezinjengePractical Parenting, Money,  Lebone ne-50/50.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMCULI kamaskandi oshisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku, uFeza Langa, ugqugquzele ukuqhakanjiswa kwemfundo YINGXENYE yabafundi ebebehambele umcimbi obuseMfolozi TVET College eNkandla, ngoLwesihlanu U-AMAHLE Mchunu ekakwe wuMnuz Mthokozi Mchunu (ngakwesokunele), uMnuz Jerome Zungu noMnuz Vakashela Mahaye UMCULI kamaskandi oqengqeleza phambili ngokudayisa kwengoma yakhe kuma-Official SA Charts (kwi-local Top 10 nakwi-International Top 20), uFeza Langa, ukhuthaze abafundi ngokubaluleka kwesikole. Uthe noma ngabe unaliphi ikhono kodwa kusemqoka ukuba ulishebe nesicucu semfundo. NgoLwesihlanu, uFeza (29) - oshisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku ngenoni elithi Umaqondana - ubekhuluma nabafundi abaphumelele ngamalengiso izifundo ezisemqoka nabebezenza ngaphansi kohlelo olubizwa ngeSteam (Science,Technology, Engineering and Mathematics) eMfolozi TVET College eNkandla. Lo mculi uthe yena uqale waphothula iziqu zobuthishela kwiFoundation Phase e-University of Free State nyakenye, ngaphambi kokugxila emculweni lapho efike wakhonya khona. "Okunye engicabanga ukuthi kubalulekile ukuba ngabelane ngakho nani ukuthi u-matric ngake ngawufeyila. Kodwa lokho akwenzanga ukuthi ngiyeke. Ngaya koqala phansi kaGrade 11 kwesinye isikole futhi ngagcina ngiwuphase kahle u-matric wami." Unxuse abafundi ukuba babekezele ngoba zikhona izinto ezizobakhuba kule ndlela asebeyithathile kodwa bangaliphonsi ithawula. UFeza waseNgwetshana, eNquthu, ugila izimanga ngengoma ayicaphune kwicwecwe eliyi-EP elisihloko sithi Inkanyezi. Ngokudayisa ezitolo, le ngoma esihloko sithi Umaqondana, ihudula izingoma ezifana nekaSam Deep ethi Shela, ekaShebeshxt ethi Rato Laka, ekaJazzworkx ethi Uvalo, ekaDJ Maphorisa ethi Abantwana Bakho nekaNkeshemba ethi Ngixolele Mntanami. Lo mcimbi bewenziwe yinhlangano engenzinzuzo yaseNkandla, iNkungumathe NPO. Umfundi uNhlanhla Mkhize obefunda eNkandla High kodwa oseyokwenza i-Actuarial Science e-University of Johannesburg, uthe basizakale kakhulu kwiSteam ngenxa yokuthi bekufika othisha abangongoti kwiScience neMaths base-Unisa. Nozakwabo uThabisile Mchunu, uthe uhlelo lweSteam lumsize kakhulu ekuxazululeni izinkinga abehlangabezana nazo kwiMaths neScience. Uthe kulo nyaka uyokwenza izifundo zobudokotela e-University of KwaZulu-Natal. U-Amahle Mchunu obeseThala High, uthe ukube uhlelo lweSteam belungekho ngabe akawuphumelelanga u-matric. USihlalo weNkungumathe NPO, uMnuz Mthokozi Mchunu, uthe okumjabulise kakhulu ukuthi izikole ebebezisekela ngalolu hlelo zikwazile ukuphasa u-matric ngamalengiso. Uthe bona bahambisana nombono wokuthi kufanele kusizwe izingane ukuze kushaye u-2030 kunabafundi abangaphezu kuka-450 abangena emanyuvesi ngoba bephase ngamalengiso  ezifundweni ezingaphansi kweSteam. INduna yesizwe sakwaMpungose, uMnuz Vakashela Mahaye, ilishayele elikhulu ihlombe lolu hlelo.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: YILO iqembu labaculi bakamaskandi, iMaskandi FC KUVELE okushaqisayo ngokwaholela ekubhidlikeni kweqembu lebhola labaculi bakamaskandi, iMaskandi FC. Ngaphambi kokuba leli qembu libe yinhlakanhlaka kukhona abanukwa ngokuthwala nangokuthwebula izinhlanhla zabanye, abanye babizwa ngaphansi kweziketi zonina, abanye bacishe babambana ngezandla, kwakhona ukufelana ngamathe futhi kwakhonjwana nangezibhamu. Akugcinanga lapho, kukhona osolwa ngokuzitika ngocansi nomfazi womunye wabaculi beMaskandi FC. Kukhona ababuye basola ukudliwa bume kwemali yeqembu yiziphathimanda zalo. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi umfantu waqala ngengxabano eyayishisa phansi egunjini lokugqokela emuva kwemidlalo iJammin To Soccer Tournament ezinkundleni eTsakane Stadium eGauteng, ngoJulayi 2024. Yingesikhathi umculi wokholo uMdumiseni "Dumi Mkokstad" Nzimande weGospel FC ecishe ebambana ngamawashingi nozakwabo we-hip hop, uSiyabonga "Big Zulu" Nene. YILO iqembu labaculi bakamaskandi, iMaskandi FC Ngokusho komculi kamaskandi owaqala ukuduma kuma-DVD kaMgqumeni, uKhwezi "Smomoza" Mkhize, ingxabano yashisa phansi kubaculi bakamaskandi sebesegunjini lokugqokela kule nkundla kangangoba kwacishe kwabanjwana ngezandla. USmomoza ubegonyuluka lezi zindaba ekhasini lakhe likaFacebook. Uze waveza ukuthi kwaze kwakhona abanuka abanye ngokufuna ukuthwebula izinhlanhla zabo futhi kwakhona ababizwa ngaphansi kweziketi zonina. USmomoza uthe abaculi ababengobhongoza nguSenzo "Ntencane" Zondi nosonkondlo ongumlingisi wemidlalo yethelevishini, uKwazi Nsele. USmomoza uthe lawa maciko kufanele axolise kumsunguli weMaskandi FC, uKhuzani "Indlamlenze" Mpungose ngenxa yezinhlamba abamchapha ngazo. Uze wathi useyaxakeka uma esebona uNtencane noKwazi sebehla benyuka noKhuzani ekubeni bagcina bemthukile kwaze kwaphoqeleka ukuba alilaxaze iqembu futhi waphumisa okwembewu yamazambane kwi-group yabo kaWhatsApp. Eziphendulela uNtencane uvele washiya angalazi kuSmomoza. Uthe uSmomoza uyabasanganela futhi ugqwaba udumo ngabo. "Yiliphi ibhola olifunayo ngoba wena ubungayi emidlalweni, ubalekela amanyala owawenza ulala nomfazi womuntu esasidlala naye eqenjini. Mina noKwazi, laba osubadakelwa manje, yithi owawucasha ngathi eMpangeni ukuthi sikugade ngoba awuphephile. Belukuphi lolo thando lwebhola ngaleso sikhathi?" YILO iqembu labaculi bakamaskandi, iMaskandi FC UNtencane uthe bakhuluma noKhuzani njengabaculi futhi waya nasemngcwabeni kagogo wakhe. "Kungani ungayanga kubo kuvele umkhuhlane ngoba phela lapho kwakungamenywa muntu futhi wawungabonanga poster eyayingakuvimba ukuthi ungayi? Mina lo osufuna ukuthandwa ngaye kwakuyimi ngedwa owayelapho, umatasatasa uqopha lo mculo owuculayo." UNtencane uthe ngamanga ukuthi iqembu laphela ngoJulayi 2024. Uthe iqembu ladlala kwi-activation yeGcwalisa Spring Picnic ngo-Okthoba 2024. "IMaskandi FC yadlala ngoJanuwari 2025, eWema. Ubukuphi wena? Yadlala eGoli ngoMashi 2025, kwi-activation yeCarnival City, ubukuphi wena?" UNtencane usole uSmomoza ngokufuna ukwakhela i-albhamu azoyikhipha isigcwagcwa emphakathini. UKwazi uvumelane noNtencane ngokulala kukaSmomoza nomfazi kazakwabo ababehlanganisa naye elinye ibhizinisi kanti uzomshaya ngemuva kwendlebe. Uthe yena akamsabi uSmomoza futhi lapho beyohlangana khona ngeke kumile utshani. Usabise nangokuveza igama lomculi kamaskandi owadlelwa umfazi wuSmomoza. Uthe ingxabano yayishubile kangangoba kwaze kwakhishelwana nezibhamu. Uthe yena benoNtencane baze babizwa ngabafazi ngoba belokhu bekhuza. Uthe kubaculi abaphuma kuqala kuleli qembu ngoSminofu, Ntencane, Jaiva Zimnike noMashelela. Emuva kosuku lwaseTsakane, uthe kwaqala uKhuzani kwalandela uNjoko. UNjoko uvumile ukuthi kwashuba kwaze kwakhishelwana nezibhamu kodwa kwadlula ngoba kwakuphambana izinsizwa ezazihlangene ngobumbano.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: U-VIGGY noVirginia Qwabe bazokwethula i-albhamu yabo entsha ngoMgqibelo IZINTOKAZI ezazakhela ugazi kuma-Idols SA ngo-2019, uViggy noVirginia Qwabe, zibuye ngenkani emculweni we-Afro pop. La matshitshi asahamba uMkhosi woMhlanga futhi asezibiza ngamaQ Twins azokhipha i-albhamu yawo yesibili esihloko sithi Imicabango ngoJanuwari 30. Ngokubambisana la mawele aKwaDukuza, ameme abathandi bobumnandi ukuba baphelele ngobuningi babo emcimbini oyisendlalelo wokwethulwa kwaleli cwecwe (listening session) eThe Villa eWaterfront, ku-98 Mahatma Gandhi Road eThekwini, namhlanje ngo-7 ebusuku. Banxuse izithameli ukuba ziswenke ngezingubo ezimhlophe. Kuleli cwecwe kuboshelwe abaculi abahlukahlukene okubalwa kubo uNomfundo Moh engomeni ethi Ezinkingeni, uMawhoo engomeni ethi Ukuthula, uMjolisi noZamambo abapikwe engomeni ethi Baphi, uShandesh noBlaq Major bapikwe engomeni ethi Bekumnandi, uNaledi Aphiwe engomeni ethi Uthando, uBeast RSA, Dladla Mshunqisi noDJ Fuzeh baboshelwe engomeni ethi Impilo. Lezi zintokazi ziphinde zapika u-Exclusive Drumz noTee Jay eculweni elithi Imali.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMENZI Mabizela usehoshe imfe emiqhudelwaneni yabaculi KUDUMALE abantu abaningi umculi kamaskandi, uMenzi Mabizela, ememezela ukuthi usehoxa unomphela emiqhudelwaneni. Uthe okumenze wathatha isinqumo sokuhosha imfe ekuncintisaneni nabanye ukuphoxeka ahlangabezana nakho komunye umqhudelwano nyakenye. Ekhuluma kwiBhanyazile TV, uthe akalwi nemincintiswano nabagqugquzeli bayo kodwa wenqena ukuxoveka umoya. Nakuba kunjalo, uthe uyayemukela imiklomelo ayithola emiqhudelwaneni okusuke kungavotwa kuyo njengendondo asanda kuyihlomula kwaYouTube ngenxa yokuba nabalandeli (subscribers) abangaphezu kuka-100 000. "Izinto lezi ozithola zingenawo umsindo ngisho omncane. Imincintiswano okuvotwa kuyo igcina imibono seyiba miningi. Uma nisebenza niba baningi kuyenzeka ugcine sewubamba phezu kwesandla somunye, adinwe. Ezintweni ezinjengalezo ngathatha isinqumo sokuthi ngingasazingeni emuva kokulimala enhliziyweni yami komunye umncintiswano." Uthe yena akazongenela ngisho owodwa umncintiswano, noma ngabe kuvotwa ngoshingamu, wathi kukhona ebesebeqalile bephakamisa igama lakhe nelikaMzukulu neNkosi Yamagcokama kwiMother Of All Maskandi Festival, okungumncintiswano kaZimdollar. UMenzi uthe unxuse ukuba itekisi iye kwiNkosi Yamagcokama ngoba seyindala endimeni. Uthe uqale ukuhoxa emncintiswaneni ngesikhathi eqokwa kwiTshatha Music Festival. "Angisakwazi ukubuyela emicimbini okuqhudelwanayo kuyo ngoba sekuke kwakhona omunye abathe uma bengifonela becela ukungifaka kuwo, ngacela ukungafakwa. Ngagcina ngingafakwanga futhi basihlonipha isicelo sami. Ngakho angikwazi ukungenela omunye umqhudelwano ngoba lokho kungasho ukuthi ngiyamdelela engiwunqabile owakhe." Unxuse abalandeli abamthanda ngeqiniso ukuba bengamfaki emincintiswaneni ngenxa yokusabela umsebenzi awenzela bona. Uthe imincintiswano igcina seyimenza agcine esecula ngenhliziyo embi ngenxa yobuhlungu. "Mina ngiyeneliseka ngoxhaso abanginikeza lona ko-Apple Music, Spotify nakwiYouTube." Uthe ukukhombisa ukuthi akanankinga nemincintiswano, uzoqhubeka nokuyojabulisa abantu emicimbini. UMenzi waqala ukumemezela ukuthi usezohoxa emincintiswaneni ngesikhathi besahubhana nozakwabo uLimit Nala kwiMother Of All Maskandi Festival nyakenye, bebanga iQuantum. Sekungumlando ukuthi lelo tekisi lagcina liwelele eNkandla, emuva kokunqotshwa wuLimit. Yize kwavela ukuthi uLimit wavotelwa kakhulu yizintokazi zaseLadies House (ikhasi elikwiFacebook) emuva kokuba uMenzi esolwe ngokweseka izinkulumo zikaTamara, kodwa uMenzi wathi ngamampunge lawo. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, nango-2024 akubanga kuhle nakubalandeli bomculi waseMzimkhulu, uSolwazi, emuva kokuba iQuantum liwinwe wumculi wasoPhongolo, uGatsheni.
